name: geoBoundaries source repository (per-country provider URLs)
theme_raw: metadata + raw vector sources | Administrative statistical units (ADM0-ADM5) | admin_boundaries (ADM0-ADM5)
coverage: ~200 country-specific upstream provider URLs documented in sourceDataURL metadata
formats: metadata CSV/JSON pointing to shapefile/geojson/gpkg sources
access: open via GitHub (LFS for v5+, clone via SSH or gh recommended)
feature_count: over 200 entities (all UN member states); ~1 million boundaries; ~300 million vertices
notes: Each release records the originating national source URL — primary lead for phase-2 enumeration of national admin data portals.
verify_notes: v6.0.0 released Sep 2023; uses Git LFS | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: geoBoundaries 是由威廉玛丽学院 geoLab 维护的全球开放行政边界数据库，覆盖全部联合国会员国共约两百多个国家和地区，含约百万条边界、上亿个折点。其源数据元数据记录了每个国家边界的上游官方来源 URL，可作为追溯各国国家级行政数据门户的线索。数据以 CC BY 4.0/ODbL 等开放许可发布，提供 shapefile、GeoJSON、GeoPackage 等格式，通过 GitHub（v5+ 使用 LFS）获取，适合需要商用友好许可的全球行政区划分析。
desc_en: geoBoundaries, maintained by the geoLab at William & Mary, is an open global database of administrative boundaries covering all UN member states (200+ entities), with roughly one million boundaries and hundreds of millions of vertices. A distinctive feature is that its sourceDataURL metadata records the originating national source for each boundary, making it a strong lead for tracing authoritative country-level data portals. Released under open licenses (CC BY 4.0 / ODbL), it ships shapefile, GeoJSON and GeoPackage formats via GitHub (LFS for v5+). It is a preferred choice when commercially friendly licensing for global admin layers is required.

name: 国家地球系统科学数据中心 黄河中下游分中心 河流/海岸湿地/流域矢量
provider: 河南大学 / 国家地球系统科学数据中心 黄河中下游分中心
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Hydrography | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: public_services | rivers, coastal wetlands, watersheds | 流域专题（黄河中下游：水系、土地利用、行政等）
lychee_text: Network error: Network error: received fatal alert: HandshakeFailure (error sending request for url (http://henu.geodata.cn/feature.html))
feature_count: 11 time periods of Yellow River channel change
notes: Sub-center with specialized layers including Yellow River channel migration polylines and floodplain polygons; often missed by global users.
verify_notes: Yellow River sub-center; copyright 2003-2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集来自国家地球系统科学数据中心黄河中下游分中心（依托河南大学），聚焦黄河中下游地区的河流、海岸湿地与流域矢量要素。其中包含黄河河道变迁折线（1855–2000，约 11 个时段，30 米分辨率）及湿地范围多边形等专题图层，是研究黄河河道迁移与泛滥平原的区域性资源。数据以 shapefile 提供，按 geodata.cn 学术开放条款发布，需注册后下载。这类分中心专题层常被全球用户忽略，对区域水文与地貌研究尤为有用。
desc_en: Hosted by the Yellow River Middle-Lower Reach sub-center of China's National Earth System Science Data Center (at Henan University), this collection provides river, coastal-wetland and watershed vector layers for the middle and lower Yellow River. It includes specialized layers such as Yellow River channel-migration polylines (1855–2000, about 11 time periods, 30 m) and floodplain/wetland polygons. Data are distributed as shapefiles under geodata.cn academic open terms and require registration. Often overlooked by global users, these sub-center layers are valuable for regional hydrological and geomorphological study.

name: geobr
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: Official Brazilian spatial data | administrative/statistical/environmental boundaries (states, municipalities, census tracts, biomes, Amazon, conservation units, indigenous lands, urban areas, health regions, etc.) | social infrastructure / hazards
coverage: Brazil — states, municipalities, census tracts, biomes, indigenous lands; 1872–2025
license_now: see LICENSE in repo (open, cite Pereira et al.)
notes: Harmonized attributes and topology across years
verify_notes: v2.0.0 May 2026; CRAN/PyPI | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: geobr 是巴西应用经济研究所（Ipea）开发的开源数据集与软件包，提供巴西各级官方空间数据，包括州、市、人口普查区、生物群系和原住民土地等 30 多种图层，时间跨度自 1872 年至 2025 年。其最大优势是对不同年份的属性和拓扑进行了协调统一，便于跨年比较。数据采用 SIRGAS2000 坐标系，提供 sf、GeoPackage、Shapefile、GeoArrow 等格式，可通过 R/Python 包或直接下载获取，是巴西地理与社会经济研究的标准底图来源。
desc_en: geobr is an open dataset and software package from Ipea (Brazil's Institute for Applied Economic Research) delivering official Brazilian spatial data—states, municipalities, census tracts, biomes, indigenous lands and more—across 30+ layers spanning 1872 to 2025. Its key strength is harmonized attributes and topology across years, easing longitudinal comparison. Data use the SIRGAS2000 reference and are available as sf, GeoPackage, Shapefile and GeoArrow through R/Python packages or direct download. It is the standard basemap source for geographic and socioeconomic research on Brazil.

name: SHRUG - Socioeconomic High-resolution Rural-Urban Geographic Dataset (India) shapefiles
provider: Development Data Lab (Asher, Lunt, Matsuura, Novosad)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: admin_boundaries (village/town/subdistrict/district/state) | India village & town polygons, keyed to Census 2011 IDs | Indian census village/town, sub-district, district, state boundaries 1991-2011 + 'shrid' harmonised IDs
doi_or_citation: Asher et al. 2021, World Bank Econ Rev / WBPR 9540 ; SHRUG v2.1
notes: Stitches together datameet, SEDAC, Bharatmaps, Administrative Atlas; THE go-to open village polygon set for India research
verify_notes: Active; constituency boundaries are not open | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SHRUG（社会经济高分辨率城乡地理数据集）由 Development Data Lab 维护，是印度研究中最常用的开放村级多边形数据。它覆盖印度 50 多万个村庄、8000 多个城镇及各级次区、县和邦，基于 2011 年人口普查（并延续 1991/2001 编码），提供约 65 万个城镇/村多边形和约 57.5 万个 SHRID 单元。数据整合了 Datameet、SEDAC、Bharatmaps 等来源，以 shapefile 和 GeoJSON 提供，采用 SHRUG 开放数据许可，可直接下载，便于与社会经济指标关联分析。
desc_en: SHRUG (Socioeconomic High-resolution Rural-Urban Geographic Dataset), maintained by the Development Data Lab, is the go-to open village-polygon resource for India research. It covers 500k+ villages, 8k+ towns, and all subdistricts, districts and states, built on the 2011 Population Census (with 1991/2001 codes carried forward), comprising roughly 650k town/village polygons and 575k SHRID units. Stitched together from Datameet, SEDAC and Bharatmaps among others, it is offered as shapefile and GeoJSON under the open SHRUG Data License via direct download, enabling easy linkage to socioeconomic indicators.

name: Digital Atlas of Australia - master dataset catalogue
theme_raw: Multi-theme aggregator | Ramsar wetland boundaries (state subset) | Administrative boundaries (national)
notes: Hub-style catalogue aggregating ABS + state agency FeatureServers; entry point for transport, hydrography, environment themes referenced by parent lead.
verify_notes: Digital Atlas of Australia datasets index; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳大利亚数字地图集（Digital Atlas of Australia）由澳大利亚地球科学局（Geoscience Australia）运营，是汇聚联邦与各州机构地理数据的 Hub 式目录平台。它整合了澳大利亚统计局（ABS）及各州机构的 FeatureServer 服务，涵盖行政边界、交通、水文、环境等多个主题，是访问全国权威空间数据的统一入口。多数数据集以 CC BY 4.0 许可发布（按数据集而定），提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON 及 FeatureServer/WFS 服务，支持在线浏览与 ArcGIS Hub 下载。
desc_en: The Digital Atlas of Australia, run by Geoscience Australia, is a hub-style catalogue aggregating geospatial data from federal and state agencies. It brings together FeatureServers from the Australian Bureau of Statistics and state bodies across themes including administrative boundaries, transport, hydrography and environment, serving as a unified entry point to authoritative national spatial data. Most datasets are released under CC BY 4.0 (per dataset), with Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON and FeatureServer/WFS access supporting both online browsing and ArcGIS Hub download.

name: OCHA Common Operational Dataset – Administrative Boundaries (COD-AB) global collection
provider: UN OCHA Field Information Services; live services by ITOS/University of Georgia
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Humanitarian & conflict
theme_raw: Operational admin0–admin4 polygons used in humanitarian response (many derived from SALB-validated layers) | population_socioecon | Authoritative humanitarian admin boundaries (Admin 0-3)
coverage: ~140 countries with priority humanitarian focus (Africa, MENA, Asia)
license: Public domain or CC BY (per country dataset card)
formats: Shapefile, FileGDB, KMZ, EMF, ArcGIS FeatureServer
access: Direct HDX download (Shapefile, GDB, EMF, KMZ) + ITOS live ArcGIS REST services
notes: Most reliable open re-release route for SALB-validated African admin layers (e.g., cod-ab-ben, cod-ab-mwi, cod-ab-zaf).
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; HDX usually accessible in browser | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: OCHA 通用业务数据集—行政边界（COD-AB）是联合国人道协调厅维护的全球行政边界集合，重点覆盖约 140 个国家，尤其聚焦非洲、中东北非和亚洲等人道主义优先地区。这些边界经 SALB 验证，是非洲等地区最可靠的开放行政图层再发布渠道。数据通过 HDX 提供 Shapefile、FileGDB、KMZ、EMF 等格式下载，并配套 ITOS 提供的实时 ArcGIS REST 服务，许可按各国数据卡为公共领域或 CC BY，广泛用于人道响应与人口分析。
desc_en: The OCHA Common Operational Dataset – Administrative Boundaries (COD-AB) is UN OCHA's global collection of admin boundaries for roughly 140 countries, with humanitarian priority on Africa, MENA and Asia. Often SALB-validated, it is the most reliable open re-release route for authoritative African admin layers. Data are downloadable from HDX as Shapefile, FileGDB, KMZ and EMF, complemented by live ITOS ArcGIS REST services. Licensing is public domain or CC BY per country card, and the collection is widely used in humanitarian response and population analysis.

name: GADM (Global Administrative Areas) v4.1
provider: UC Davis / U.C. Berkeley team (Hijmans et al.)
theme_raw: Administrative boundaries ADM0-ADM5 | administrative boundaries (up to 5 levels) | ADM0-5 administrative boundaries
license: custom (free for academic/non-commercial; commercial requires permission)
license_now: Free for academic/non-commercial use; redistribution and commercial use require permission
notes: Anchor dataset but license is NOT fully open; for commercial use prefer geoBoundaries.
verify_notes: 当前版本v4.1; v5计划2026年1月发布 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GADM（全球行政区数据库）v4.1 是由加州大学戴维斯/伯克利团队维护的权威全球行政边界数据集，收录 400,276 个各级行政区。它长期作为全球行政区划研究的基准锚定数据集，提供 GeoPackage、Shapefile、KMZ 及 R 的 sf/sp 对象等格式，支持直接下载。需注意其许可仅供学术与非商业用途免费使用，再分发和商业用途须经授权——并非完全开放，商业场景建议改用 geoBoundaries。
desc_en: GADM (Global Administrative Areas) v4.1, maintained by a UC Davis/Berkeley team, is the authoritative global administrative-boundary dataset, cataloguing 400,276 admin areas at multiple levels. It has long served as the anchor reference for global admin-division research and is offered as GeoPackage, Shapefile, KMZ and R sf/sp objects via direct download. Note that its license is free only for academic and non-commercial use; redistribution and commercial use require permission, so it is not fully open—prefer geoBoundaries for commercial scenarios.

name: Statistical Area 1 (SA1) 2023 (generalised)
theme_raw: admin-statistical | admin (regional government) | admin / statistical boundaries
formats_now: Shapefile, GeoPackage, KML, MapInfo, CSV, WFS
notes: SA1s are aggregations of meshblocks; used for census output. URL example is 2021 edition; newer editions follow same pattern on Datafinder.
verify_notes: Stats NZ Geographic Data Service | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为新西兰统计局（Stats NZ）发布的统计区一级（Statistical Area 1, SA1）边界（综合化/概略版）。SA1 由网格块（meshblock）聚合而成，是新西兰人口普查的标准输出地理单元，适用于人口与社会经济统计分析。数据以 CC BY 4.0 许可开放下载，提供 SHP、GeoJSON、KML、MapInfo 等格式。示例 URL 为 2021 版，更新版本在 Datafinder 平台沿用相同的发布模式。
desc_en: This is the Statistical Area 1 (SA1) boundary layer (generalised) published by Stats NZ for New Zealand. SA1s are aggregations of meshblocks and serve as the standard census output geography, well suited to population and socioeconomic statistics. The data are openly downloadable under CC BY 4.0 in SHP, GeoJSON, KML and MapInfo formats. The example URL refers to the 2021 edition; newer editions follow the same publication pattern on the Datafinder platform.

name: Marine Regions / VLIZ Maritime Boundaries (EEZ v12, Territorial Seas, Internal Waters, Archipelagic Waters, High Seas, Extended Continental Shelf)
theme_raw: EEZ / Maritime boundaries | maritime boundaries, named marine zones, biogeographic provinces | Maritime boundaries / EEZ
license: Custom (CC-BY style, non-commercial / non-legal use; attribution required)
doi_or_citation: Flanders Marine Institute (2023). Maritime Boundaries Geodatabase v12. https://doi.org/10.14284/632
notes: The canonical EEZ vector dataset for the world; companion layers include disputed/joint regime, 24NM, 12NM, and IHO Sea Areas.
verify_notes: License shown as CC-BY 4.0 (more open than the p4-listed 'custom non-commercial') | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Marine Regions 由佛兰德海洋研究所（VLIZ）维护，是全球海洋边界的权威矢量数据来源，包括专属经济区（EEZ v12）、领海、内水、群岛水域、公海和外大陆架等图层。其 EEZ 数据是世界范围内最经典的海域边界参考，配套图层还涵盖争议/共同管辖区、24 海里、12 海里及 IHO 海区。数据以 CC BY 4.0 开放，提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage 及 WMS/WFS 服务，直接下载，广泛用于海洋管理与海域划界研究。
desc_en: Marine Regions, maintained by the Flanders Marine Institute (VLIZ), is the authoritative source of global maritime boundary vectors, including Exclusive Economic Zones (EEZ v12), territorial seas, internal waters, archipelagic waters, the high seas and the extended continental shelf. Its EEZ layer is the canonical worldwide maritime-boundary reference, with companion layers for disputed/joint-regime areas, 24 NM and 12 NM zones and IHO Sea Areas. Released under CC BY 4.0, it offers Shapefile and GeoPackage plus WMS/WFS via direct download, widely used in ocean governance and delimitation research.

name: 全国 1:100万公众版基础地理信息数据 (2021) / National 1:1,000,000 Public Basic Geographic Database
provider: 国家基础地理信息中心 / National Geomatics Center of China (NGCC), 自然资源部
theme_raw: 基础地理 / coastlines, hydrology, terrain, boundaries, vegetation, geomorphology | Multi-theme base map at 1:250k (boundary, hydrography, residential, transport, pipeline, vegetation, terrain points) | High-resolution multi-theme base map (DLG vector)
coverage: country (China incl. islands and adjacent seas)
license: 公众版 (public version, free for non-commercial after registration; CC-like terms)
doi_or_citation: NGCC 2021版1:100万全国基础地理数据
notes: 9 layers: hydrology, residential, transport, pipelines, boundaries, geomorphology/soil, vegetation, place names, annotations. CGCS2000 / 1985 height datum. Officially authoritative coastline and physical layers for China.
verify_notes: 国家测绘局公众版；使用需遵守《地图管理条例》，公开出版需地图审核 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全国 1:100 万公众版基础地理信息数据由国家基础地理信息中心（NGCC，自然资源部）发布，覆盖中国全境，包括岛屿及邻近海域，共 77 幅图幅。数据包含水系、居民地、交通、管线、境界、地貌/土质、植被、地名及注记等 9 个图层，采用 CGCS2000 坐标系与 1985 国家高程基准，是中国官方权威的海岸线及自然地理图层来源。数据以 shapefile 提供，按公众版条款（注册后非商业免费使用），需注册下载，现势性约为 2019 年。
desc_en: The National 1:1,000,000 Public Basic Geographic Database is published by China's National Geomatics Center (NGCC) under the Ministry of Natural Resources, covering all of China including islands and adjacent seas across 77 map sheets. It contains nine layers—hydrology, residential areas, transport, pipelines, boundaries, geomorphology/soil, vegetation, place names and annotations—on the CGCS2000 datum with the 1985 national height datum, providing China's officially authoritative coastline and physical layers. Distributed as shapefile under public-version terms (free for non-commercial use after registration), it currently reflects roughly 2019 conditions.

name: Global Oceans and Seas v01 + VLIZ MarineRegions WFS/WMS (all layers)
theme_raw: All MR layers as live OGC services | marine boundaries + marine ecoregions | Maritime boundaries / EEZ
notes: Includes Global Oceans and Seas v01 (10 basins, 2021-12-14), SeaVoX v19 (doi 10.14284/590), UNESCO World Heritage Marine Sites v2, Emission Control Areas (NOx/SOx), Global Contourite Distribution v3; also serves MEOW, Longhurst, FAO, ICES, OSPAR re-publications
verify_notes: Valid WFS 1.0.0 GetCapabilities from VLIZ MarineRegions | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 VLIZ Geoserver 提供的 Marine Regions 全套 OGC 服务端点（WFS/WMS），无需注册即可访问约 66 种要素类型。它包含 Global Oceans and Seas v01（10 个海盆）、SeaVoX v19、联合国教科文组织世界遗产海洋遗址 v2、排放控制区（NOx/SOx）、全球等深流沉积分布 v3 等图层，并转发 MEOW、Longhurst、FAO、ICES、OSPAR 等机构的海洋分区数据。数据可通过 WFS 输出 GML/GeoJSON/Shapefile，许可按图层为 CC BY（部分需联系 VLIZ），是程序化获取全球海洋分区的便捷入口。
desc_en: This is the VLIZ Geoserver OGC endpoint (WFS/WMS) serving the full Marine Regions catalogue—about 66 feature types—without registration. It includes Global Oceans and Seas v01 (10 basins), SeaVoX v19, UNESCO World Heritage Marine Sites v2, Emission Control Areas (NOx/SOx) and Global Contourite Distribution v3, and re-publishes marine classifications from MEOW, Longhurst, FAO, ICES and OSPAR. Output is available via WFS as GML/GeoJSON/Shapefile, with per-layer CC BY licensing (some requiring contact with VLIZ). It is a convenient entry point for programmatic access to global ocean and sea regionalizations.

name: OpenAddresses Global Address Collection (aggregate)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Buildings & addresses | POI / places
theme_raw: addresses (points) | Address points | Address points with admin attributes (city/region/postcode)
coverage: ~70+ countries (sources/ tree has subdirs for ae, ar, at, au, be, br, ca, ch, cn, cz, de, dk, ee, es, fi, fr, hk, it, jp, kr, mx, nl, no, nz, pl, pt, ru, se, sg, tw, ua, us, za, etc.)
license: Per-source open licenses (mostly CC-BY / public domain / attribution-only); aggregate openly licensed
formats: CSV with WGS84 lat/lon (point vector), GeoJSON-derivable
access: HTTP download via batch.openaddresses.io; source manifest JSON in GitHub
notes: Aggregate of authoritative national/state address point datasets - serves as a meta-catalog
verify_notes: Page loads but content minimal; portal still serving; license per-source as before | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenAddresses 是一个汇聚全球权威地址点数据的开放协作项目，覆盖 70 多个国家（如美、加、澳、法、德、日、韩、巴西、中国等），将各国/各州官方地址数据集整合为统一可下载的点矢量。它本质上是一个元目录，汇编各地权威来源。数据以 WGS84 经纬度的 CSV 提供（可派生 GeoJSON），通过 HTTP 批量下载，GitHub 上维护源清单 JSON。各来源采用其原始开放许可（多为 CC BY、公共领域或仅署名），整体以开放方式发布，适合大规模地理编码与地址覆盖分析。
desc_en: OpenAddresses is an open collaborative project aggregating authoritative address-point data worldwide, covering 70+ countries (including the US, Canada, Australia, France, Germany, Japan, Korea, Brazil and China). It consolidates national and state-level official address datasets into uniform downloadable point vectors and effectively functions as a meta-catalog of authoritative sources. Data are provided as WGS84 lat/lon CSV (GeoJSON-derivable) via HTTP batch download, with a source manifest JSON on GitHub. Each source keeps its original open license (mostly CC BY, public domain or attribution-only), making it well suited to large-scale geocoding and address-coverage analysis.

name: World Database on Protected Areas (WDPA) - monthly release
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Marine & coastal
theme_raw: global protected areas (terrestrial + marine polygons & points) | Marine Protected Areas | Marine Protected Areas (polygons/points)
license: WDPA Terms & Conditions; non-commercial; citation required; commercial use needs UNEP-WCMC permission
notes: Core flagship dataset; the canonical PA boundary reference globally
verify_notes: Duplicate of index 0 within this batch. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界保护区数据库（WDPA）由联合国环境署世界保护监测中心（UNEP-WCMC）与世界自然保护联盟（IUCN）联合维护，是全球保护区边界的权威基准数据集。它每月更新，收录 20 万个以上多边形及 2 万个以上点位（约 31 万处保护区），覆盖全球陆地与海洋保护区。数据提供 ESRI Shapefile 和文件地理数据库（GDB）格式，注册后可批量 ZIP 下载或按国家获取，使用须遵循 WDPA 使用条款，是保护地分析与生物多样性研究的核心数据。
desc_en: The World Database on Protected Areas (WDPA), maintained jointly by UNEP-WCMC and IUCN, is the authoritative global reference for protected-area boundaries. Updated monthly, it holds 200,000+ polygons and 20,000+ points (around 312,000 protected areas) spanning terrestrial and marine sites worldwide. Data are provided as ESRI Shapefile and File Geodatabase, downloadable in bulk ZIP or per country after registration, with use governed by the WDPA Terms of Use. It is the core flagship dataset for protected-area analysis and biodiversity research.

name: China Land-Use/Cover Datasets (CLUD) - urban boundary vector polygons
provider: Resource and Environment Science and Data Center (RESDC), CAS
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Land use / land cover (urban built-up vector polygons) | admin boundaries — county/district (1986–2022) | national LULC (6 primary / 23 secondary classes)
license: Restricted academic use (registration required at RESDC)
formats: shapefile (vector polygons derived from 30 m CLUD); also raster
access: Free for registered academic users; DOI landing page with download
notes: Cited as principal comparison dataset in CLCD ESSD paper; vector urban boundaries (CLUD-Urban) for 2000/2005/2010/2015/2018 are extracted and distributed as shapefiles
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国土地利用/覆盖数据集（CLUD）由中国科学院资源环境科学与数据中心（RESDC）维护，其中的城市边界矢量多边形（CLUD-Urban）基于 30 米 CLUD 提取，提供 2000/2005/2010/2015/2018 等年份的城市建成区范围 shapefile。该数据集覆盖中国全境，时间跨度自 1980 年代至 2020 年（5 年间隔），是 CLCD 等遥感土地覆盖研究的重要对照数据。数据为 RESDC 版权所有，注册学术用户可免费下载，同时提供矢量与栅格形式。
desc_en: The China Land-Use/Cover Datasets (CLUD), maintained by the Resource and Environment Science and Data Center (RESDC) of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, include urban-boundary vector polygons (CLUD-Urban) extracted from the 30 m CLUD, distributed as shapefiles of urban built-up extents for 2000, 2005, 2010, 2015 and 2018. The dataset covers all of China from the 1980s to 2020 at five-year intervals and is a key comparison source in remote-sensing land-cover studies such as CLCD. Data are RESDC-copyrighted, free for registered academic users, and available in both vector and raster form.

name: Mekong River Commission Data Portal (basin physical layers)
theme_raw: Mekong basin hydrography, floodplain, land cover, ecological zones | Mekong basin hydrology, sediment, water quality, fisheries, flood/drought, stations | Inland waterway navigation, ports, ferry crossings, road & rail in Lower Mekong basin
license: MRC PDIES (Procedures for Data and Information Exchange and Sharing); attribution required
access: registration-required (license + small fee for raw data)
notes: Transboundary commission portal — visualization is free, raw downloads gated. Rare cross-border physical dataset for Southeast Asia.
verify_notes: Page loaded but content sparse; details require login/sub-pages | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 湄公河委员会（MRC）数据门户提供湄公河下游流域（涉及中国、缅甸、老挝、泰国、柬埔寨、越南）的物理地理图层，包括行政边界、交通和水文等主题。作为跨境流域委员会平台，它是东南亚少有的跨国物理地理数据来源。数据提供 shapefile 与栅格格式，遵循 MRC 数据与信息交换共享程序（PDIES），需署名。在线可视化免费开放，但原始数据下载需注册并可能收取少量费用，适用于湄公河跨境水资源与流域研究。
desc_en: The Mekong River Commission (MRC) Data Portal provides physical-geography layers for the Lower Mekong Basin (China, Myanmar, Laos, Thailand, Cambodia and Vietnam), spanning administrative boundaries, transport and hydrography. As a transboundary basin commission platform, it is a rare source of cross-border physical data for Southeast Asia. Data are offered as shapefile and raster under the MRC Procedures for Data and Information Exchange and Sharing (PDIES), with attribution required. Online visualization is free, but raw downloads are gated behind registration and possible small fees—useful for transboundary water and basin research.

name: AfriGIS CDSM-derived layers (Railways, Nature Reserves, Built-up Areas, Water Features)
theme_raw: transport, environment, landuse, hydrology | admin / postal / suburb boundaries | suburb / settlement
license: Underlying CDSM/CD:NGI data is open SA government data; AfriGIS redistribution is commercial
access: Open at source (CD:NGI http://www.ngi.gov.za), commercial via AfriGIS
notes: Original CDSM 1:50k topographic vector layers are publicly available from Chief Directorate: National Geo-spatial Information; AfriGIS packages them as paid WFS.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该条目涉及南非 CDSM 1:50,000 地形矢量图层，包括铁路、自然保护区、建成区和水系等要素。这些原始 1:50k 地形矢量层由南非国家地理空间信息总局（CD:NGI）公开提供（ngi.gov.za），而 AfriGIS 将其打包为商业 WFS/WMS 服务。覆盖范围为南非全国。建议优先从 CD:NGI 官方源获取免费数据；AfriGIS 页面本身未明确许可条款，使用前应核实来源与授权。
desc_en: This entry concerns South Africa's CDSM 1:50,000 topographic vector layers, including railways, nature reserves, built-up areas and water features. The original 1:50k topographic vectors are publicly available from the Chief Directorate: National Geo-spatial Information (CD:NGI, ngi.gov.za), while AfriGIS repackages them as commercial WFS/WMS services. Coverage is national for South Africa. Prefer the free official CD:NGI source for downloads; the AfriGIS page itself does not state explicit license terms, so verify provenance and rights before use.

name: FAO GAUL (Global Administrative Unit Layers)
theme_raw: Administrative boundaries | Administrative units | Administrative units ADM0-ADM2 (lower where available)
license: GAUL Data License — non-commercial only; UN cartographic constraints apply
license_now: CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO + GAUL Data License + UN Cartographic disclaimer
notes: Includes 'disputed areas' layer; license is more restrictive than geoBoundaries — flag for commercial use.
verify_notes: License now explicitly CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO (more specific than the 'non-commercial' note in p4). Distribution constraints still apply. | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: FAO 全球行政单元图层（GAUL）由联合国粮农组织维护，提供全球各级行政边界的统一参考。该版本（GAUL 2015）时间跨度约 1990–2014 年，并包含专门的“争议地区”图层及联合国制图免责声明。数据可通过 FAO 目录直接下载，或作为 Google Earth Engine FeatureCollection 使用，提供 shapefile 与地理数据库格式。其许可为 CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO 加 GAUL 数据许可，比 geoBoundaries 更具限制性，商业用途需特别注意。
desc_en: The FAO Global Administrative Unit Layers (GAUL), maintained by the UN Food and Agriculture Organization, provide a harmonized global reference for administrative boundaries at multiple levels. This GAUL 2015 edition spans roughly 1990–2014 and includes a dedicated 'disputed areas' layer plus the UN cartographic disclaimer. Data are downloadable directly from the FAO catalog or usable as a Google Earth Engine FeatureCollection, in shapefile and geodatabase formats. Its license—CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO plus the GAUL Data License—is more restrictive than geoBoundaries, a point to flag for commercial use.

name: GeoNames Premium Polygons (ADM1-ADM5 + features)
theme_raw: High-resolution administrative + feature polygons | Global gazetteer / named places as points | Postal code centroids
coverage: Global, >600,000 polygons across ADM1-ADM5, populated places, islands, lakes
notes: Sample subset available free for preview. Cold but most comprehensive global ADM polygon set tied to GeoNames IDs - useful as a crosswalk to OSM/GeoBoundaries.
verify_notes: premium subscription; contact premiumdata@geonames.org | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoNames 高级多边形（Premium Polygons）是与 GeoNames ID 关联的全球行政及要素多边形商业产品，覆盖 ADM1–ADM5 各级行政区、聚居地、岛屿和湖泊，共 60 多万个多边形。作为最全面的全球 ADM 多边形集之一，它特别适合作为与 OSM、geoBoundaries 等数据集的交叉对照桥梁。数据以扁平文件提供（geonameId 加 WGS84 GeoJSON 几何），采用商业订阅许可（每年 2000 欧元，含 12 次月度发布），并提供免费样例子集供预览。
desc_en: GeoNames Premium Polygons is a commercial product of global administrative and feature polygons tied to GeoNames IDs, covering ADM1–ADM5 levels plus populated places, islands and lakes—over 600,000 polygons in total. As one of the most comprehensive global ADM polygon sets, it is especially useful as a crosswalk linking OSM, geoBoundaries and other datasets. Data are delivered as flat files (geonameId plus WGS84 GeoJSON geometry) under a commercial subscription (EUR 2000/year with 12 monthly releases), with a free sample subset available for preview.

name: Eurostat GISCO NUTS Statistical Units
theme_raw: NUTS statistical/administrative regions (NUTS 0/1/2/3) and LAU | population_socioecon | admin_boundaries / statistical regions
coverage: EU + EFTA + candidate countries; NUTS 0/1/2/3; editions 2003, 2006, 2010, 2013, 2016, 2021, 2024
license: Free reuse with attribution (EuroGeographics for admin boundaries)
license_now: Eurostat/GISCO standard reuse terms (free reuse with attribution; not explicit on this page)
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, TopoJSON, File Geodatabase, SVG, Parquet
formats_now: Shapefile, TopoJSON, GeoJSON, ESRI File GDB, SVG, Parquet, API
notes: Multiple scales (1:1M, 1:3M, 1:10M, 1:20M, 1:60M). The reference statistical-units backbone for European regional statistics.
verify_notes: Parquet now offered; NUTS 2024 vintage available. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Eurostat GISCO NUTS 统计单元由欧盟委员会统计局（GISCO）维护，是欧洲区域统计的基准空间骨架。数据覆盖欧盟、欧洲自由贸易联盟及候选国，包含 NUTS 0/1/2/3 各级，并提供 2003 至 2024 年的多个版本及多种比例尺（1:100 万至 1:6000 万）。数据免费开放（署名使用），格式丰富，包括 Shapefile、GeoJSON、TopoJSON、文件地理数据库、SVG 和 Parquet，是欧洲区域社会经济统计的标准参考边界。
desc_en: Eurostat GISCO NUTS Statistical Units, maintained by the European Commission's GISCO service, form the reference spatial backbone for European regional statistics. They cover the EU, EFTA and candidate countries at NUTS levels 0/1/2/3, with multiple editions from 2003 to 2024 and several scales (1:1M to 1:60M). The data are freely reusable with attribution and come in a rich set of formats including Shapefile, GeoJSON, TopoJSON, File Geodatabase, SVG and Parquet, serving as the standard statistical-unit boundaries for European regional socioeconomic analysis.

name: INSPIRE Hydrography Download Services (per Member State)
provider: EU Member States via INSPIRE Geoportal
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Hydrography | Physical geography (natural earth)
theme_raw: hydrography theme (HY) - physical waters, network, reporting units | Meta-catalog (all 34 INSPIRE themes) | administrative units (national, regional, local) across all EU MS
formats: WFS 2.0.0 GML 3.2.1, Atom feeds, some OGC API Features pilots
doi_or_citation: INSPIRE Directive 2007/2/EC, Annex I theme HY
notes: Heterogeneous quality. MDPI Water (Castelli et al., 2022) survey: doi:10.3390/w14091499 - hydrography theme has the highest INSPIRE conformance in Europe.
verify_notes: Page loaded but minimal content extracted (likely JS-heavy SPA) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: INSPIRE 水文下载服务通过欧盟 INSPIRE 地理门户，由各成员国按 INSPIRE 指令（2007/2/EC）附件 I 的水文（HY）主题发布，覆盖欧盟 27 国及欧洲自由贸易联盟。数据主要通过 WFS 2.0.0（GML 3.2.1）、Atom 订阅源及部分 OGC API Features 试点提供。由于由各成员国分别发布，数据质量参差不齐；据 MDPI Water（Castelli 等，2022）调查，水文主题在欧洲的 INSPIRE 符合度最高，许可多为开放/署名（按成员国而定）。
desc_en: INSPIRE Hydrography Download Services are published per Member State through the EU INSPIRE Geoportal under the Annex I Hydrography (HY) theme of the INSPIRE Directive (2007/2/EC), covering the EU27 and EFTA. Access is mainly via WFS 2.0.0 (GML 3.2.1), Atom feeds and some OGC API Features pilots. Because each state publishes independently, quality is heterogeneous; according to an MDPI Water survey (Castelli et al., 2022), the hydrography theme shows the highest INSPIRE conformance in Europe. Licensing is mostly open/attribution, varying by Member State.

name: BTS National Transportation Atlas Database (NTAD) - ArcGIS Hub
theme_raw: transportation (roads, rail, airports, ports, intermodal, bridges, tunnels) | Meta-catalogue across hundreds of city Hubs | Multi-theme aggregator (admin boundaries, transportation, parcels, env, etc.)
formats: ArcGIS FeatureServer/REST, WFS, Vector Tiles, Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, FGDB
notes: ~90 datasets; each layer has direct WFS + FeatureServer URL. Includes Amtrak routes, Class I railroads, NHPN highways, intermodal connectors, runways, navigable waterways.
verify_notes: 页面活跃；具体格式需进入 dataset | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国国家交通图集数据库（NTAD）由美国交通部交通统计局（BTS）通过 ArcGIS Hub 发布，覆盖美国全国，约含 90 个交通主题数据集。内容包括 Amtrak 客运线路、一级铁路、国家公路网（NHPN）、联运枢纽、跑道和可通航水道等，每个图层均提供直接的 WFS 与 FeatureServer 访问地址。数据为美国政府作品/公共领域，提供 ArcGIS FeatureServer/REST、WFS、矢量切片、Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、FGDB 等多种格式，适合美国交通基础设施分析与建模。
desc_en: The National Transportation Atlas Database (NTAD), published by the USDOT Bureau of Transportation Statistics via ArcGIS Hub, covers the entire United States with roughly 90 transportation-themed datasets. Content includes Amtrak routes, Class I railroads, the National Highway Planning Network, intermodal connectors, runways and navigable waterways, with each layer exposing direct WFS and FeatureServer endpoints. As a US Government Work in the public domain, it offers ArcGIS FeatureServer/REST, WFS, vector tiles, Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and FGDB, well suited to US transportation-infrastructure analysis and modeling.

name: DataV.GeoAtlas (Aliyun) 中国行政区与基础边界 GeoJSON
provider: Alibaba Cloud DataV / 数据来源 高德 AMap
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Marine & coastal | Physical geography (natural earth)
theme_raw: administrative + physical reference | Administrative boundaries | admin_boundaries
license: Aliyun terms (free, non-commercial; permissive for visualization)
notes: Most-used Chinese ecosystem source for ready-to-use GeoJSON. Includes coastline-conformant province polygons. Companion repo: github.com/zhChuXiao/ChinaGeoJson (Node batch downloader).
verify_notes: DataV.GeoAtlas geographic tools series page accessible; license details not visible in fetched snippet | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: DataV.GeoAtlas 由阿里云 DataV 提供（数据源自高德 AMap），是中国生态系统中最常用的即取即用 GeoJSON 行政边界来源。它覆盖中国多级行政区（国家/省/市/区县/乡镇/村），并包含符合标准海岸线的省级多边形。数据以 GeoJSON 格式通过 API 获取，遵循阿里云条款（免费、非商业，适合可视化用途）。配套有 Node 批量下载仓库（github.com/zhChuXiao/ChinaGeoJson），便于快速构建中国地图可视化应用。
desc_en: DataV.GeoAtlas, provided by Alibaba Cloud DataV with data sourced from AMap, is the most widely used source of ready-to-use GeoJSON administrative boundaries in the Chinese ecosystem. It covers China at multiple levels (country/province/city/district/township/village) and includes coastline-conformant province polygons. Data are served as GeoJSON via API under Aliyun terms (free, non-commercial, permissive for visualization). A companion Node batch-downloader repo (github.com/zhChuXiao/ChinaGeoJson) makes it easy to build China map visualizations quickly.

name: WFP GeoNode WFS GetCapabilities (full layer enumeration)
theme_raw: OGC WFS endpoint | Roads, admin boundaries, logistics, food security overlays | Railways (global), airports (global), country main-road networks (~70 countries)
coverage: All WFP-published vector layers (humanitarian admin, food security, hazard, transport)
notes: Entry point for programmatic enumeration of all WFP admin-boundary feature types.
verify_notes: 两次 60s 超时；GeoServer WFS 端点不可达 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是世界粮食计划署（WFP）GeoNode 的 WFS GetCapabilities 服务端点，可枚举 WFP 发布的全部矢量图层，包括人道行政边界、粮食安全、灾害与交通等要素类型。它是程序化获取 WFP 行政边界及相关人道主义图层的入口，通过开放的 OGC WFS（1.1.0/2.0.0）提供，可输出 GML、GeoJSON 及 Shapefile。各图层许可按来源而定，适用于人道响应与粮食安全分析的批量数据获取。
desc_en: This is the WFP GeoNode WFS GetCapabilities endpoint, which enumerates all vector layers published by the World Food Programme, including humanitarian administrative boundaries, food-security, hazard and transport feature types. It serves as the entry point for programmatically enumerating WFP admin-boundary and related humanitarian layers, exposed via open OGC WFS (1.1.0/2.0.0) with GML, GeoJSON and Shapefile output. Per-layer licensing varies by source, making it suitable for bulk data acquisition in humanitarian-response and food-security analysis.

name: 锐多宝 China Multi-Level Admin Vector (省市县乡村)
theme_raw: China 5-level admin (province → village) | Village-level admin boundaries | 行政边界 / administrative boundaries
license_now: free + 限流 (>20 次需微信公众号取密码, >100 次封 30 分钟)
notes: Useful where official township/village boundaries are not openly released. License situation murky.
verify_notes: freemium 模式, 下载有限流; 支持县/乡/村级 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 锐多宝（map.ruiduobao.com）是一个社区维护的中国多级行政边界矢量数据源，覆盖省、市、县、乡、村各级。在乡镇和村级官方边界未公开发布的情况下，它提供了实用的替代来源。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、GeoPackage、SVG 等多种格式，直接下载，但设有限流（超过 20 次需通过微信公众号取密码，超过 100 次封禁 30 分钟）。其许可情况不甚明确，使用前建议核实来源与授权。
desc_en: Ruiduobao (map.ruiduobao.com) is a community-maintained source of multi-level Chinese administrative-boundary vectors covering province, city, county, township and village levels. It offers a practical alternative where official township- and village-level boundaries are not openly released. Data are available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, GeoPackage and SVG via direct download, but with rate limits (a password via WeChat is needed beyond 20 requests, and over 100 triggers a 30-minute block). Its licensing situation is murky, so verify provenance and rights before use.

name: WorldPop Administrative Areas listing (hub)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: admin boundaries | Census admin units used as input to gridded population products | admin boundaries + population density
notes: Top-level WorldPop Administrative Areas catalogue; vector boundary shapefiles accompany several country population products
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 WorldPop 行政区域（Administrative Areas）的顶层目录页，按国家逐一提供全球行政边界矢量。这些边界 shapefile 与 WorldPop 的多项国家级人口产品配套使用，便于将人口栅格（GeoTIFF mastergrid）汇总到行政单元。数据以 CC BY 4.0 开放，矢量边界以打包 shapefile 提供，栅格则为 GeoTIFF，适合人口、社会经济及基础设施相关的空间分析。
desc_en: This is the top-level WorldPop Administrative Areas catalogue, providing global administrative-boundary vectors on a country-by-country basis. These boundary shapefiles accompany several WorldPop country-level population products, making it easy to aggregate population rasters (GeoTIFF mastergrids) to administrative units. Released under CC BY 4.0, vector boundaries are supplied as bundled shapefiles and rasters as GeoTIFF, supporting spatial analysis of population, socioeconomic and infrastructure topics.

name: Australian Statistical Geography Standard (ASGS) Digital Boundary Files
theme_raw: Australian census statistical units | Mesh Blocks (smallest unit), SA1-SA4, GCCSA, Remoteness Areas, Indigenous Areas | population_socioecon
coverage: Australia; Mesh Blocks, SA1/SA2/SA3/SA4, GCCSA, LGAs; Edition 3 (2021-2026)
file_size: Mesh Blocks Shapefile 217.44 MB; SA1 95.97 MB; SA2 48.33 MB; Main Structure GeoPackage 504.8 MB
time_span: Date of effect: 20 July 2021; LGAs revised annually; next major update 2026
notes: GDA2020 and GDA94 CRS variants. Mesh Blocks are the smallest statistical geography.
verify_notes: ASGS Ed.3 digital boundary files available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳大利亚统计地理标准（ASGS）数字边界文件由澳大利亚统计局（ABS）发布，是澳大利亚普查与统计的标准空间框架。第 3 版（2021–2026）覆盖全国，包括最小统计单元网格块（Mesh Blocks）、SA1/SA2/SA3/SA4、大首府都会统计区（GCCSA）及地方政府区（LGA）等层级。数据以 CC BY 4.0 开放，提供 Shapefile 和 GeoPackage 格式，并有 GDA2020 与 GDA94 两种坐标系；网格块文件约 217 MB，自 2021 年 7 月 20 日起生效。
desc_en: The Australian Statistical Geography Standard (ASGS) Digital Boundary Files, published by the Australian Bureau of Statistics, form the standard spatial framework for Australia's census and statistics. Edition 3 (2021–2026) covers the nation, including the smallest units (Mesh Blocks), SA1/SA2/SA3/SA4, Greater Capital City Statistical Areas and Local Government Areas. Released under CC BY 4.0, it is provided as Shapefile and GeoPackage in both GDA2020 and GDA94 reference systems; the Mesh Blocks file is about 217 MB, with effect from 20 July 2021.

name: Datameet India maps (SHRUG ancestor source)
theme_raw: admin boundaries (states, districts, parliamentary/assembly constituencies) | admin (state/district/subdistrict/village) | Indian state legislative assembly constituency boundaries
doi_or_citation: Referenced in Asher et al. 2021 polygon sources
notes: Underlying open community source SHRUG stitches in; useful for vintages SHRUG itself does not redistribute
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Datameet India maps 是由 Datameet 社区维护的印度开放地图数据仓库，包含多个年份版本的印度行政边界。它是 SHRUG 等数据集所整合的底层开放社区来源，对于 SHRUG 本身未再分发的年份版本尤为有用。数据提供 shp、geojson、topojson 等格式，可通过 git clone 或直接下载获取，仓库为 MIT 许可、数据为 CC BY 4.0，适合需要历史版次印度边界的研究。
desc_en: Datameet India maps is an open repository of Indian map data maintained by the Datameet community, containing administrative boundaries across multiple vintages. It is the underlying open community source that datasets like SHRUG stitch in, and is especially useful for vintages SHRUG itself does not redistribute. Data come as shp, geojson and topojson via git clone or direct download, with the repository under MIT and the data under CC BY 4.0—well suited to research needing historical editions of Indian boundaries.

name: WFP Global Administrative Boundaries (reference)
theme_raw: Administrative boundaries | admin boundaries | Roads and pathways
license: WFP terms (mostly open for humanitarian use; per-country source licences vary)
notes: Official WFP reference admin boundaries built by merging best-available country sources; international lines from UNmap. Examples: idn_bnd_adm4_2017_bps_a, col_first_level_admin_boundaries.
verify_notes: 60s timeout; WFP GeoNode often slow/unstable | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: WFP 全球行政边界（参考）是世界粮食计划署 GeoNode 发布的官方参考行政边界，按国家逐级提供（各国 admin0 至 admin4）。它通过合并各国最佳可用来源构建，国际边界采用 UNmap。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、GML 及 WFS 等格式，可通过 WFS GetFeature 或按图层下载（SHAPE-ZIP）获取，许可多对人道用途开放（各国源许可不一），广泛用于人道响应与运营规划。
desc_en: WFP Global Administrative Boundaries (reference) are the official reference admin boundaries published on the World Food Programme's GeoNode, provided country-by-country (admin0 to admin4 per country). They are built by merging the best-available country sources, with international lines drawn from UNmap. Data are offered as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, GML and WFS, accessible via WFS GetFeature or per-layer SHAPE-ZIP download. Licensing is mostly open for humanitarian use (source licenses vary by country), and the layers are widely used in humanitarian response and operational planning.

name: 中国主体功能区划数据 (China Major Function-Oriented Zones)
theme_raw: policy region — 主体功能区 (Optimized/Key/Restricted/Prohibited Development) | admin boundaries — township/街道 | policy region — 19/20 大城市群 (BTH, YRD, PRD, Chengyu, etc.)
notes: Widely cited derived policy-zone vector from 国务院 2010 plan
verify_notes: Encoding garbled, footer with ICP shown | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国主体功能区划数据由中国科学院资源环境科学与数据中心（RESDC）/地理科学与资源研究所发布，是基于国务院 2010 年主体功能区规划提取的政策区划矢量数据，覆盖中国全国（含 2010/2015 等规划版次）。该数据被广泛引用于国土空间与区域发展研究。数据以 Shapefile 格式提供，遵循 RESDC 用户协议，需会员访问下载。
desc_en: The China Major Function-Oriented Zones dataset, published by RESDC/IGSNRR of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, is a policy-zone vector derived from the State Council's 2010 Major Function-Oriented Zoning plan, covering all of China (with vintages such as 2010 and 2015). It is widely cited in territorial-spatial planning and regional-development research. Data are provided as Shapefile under the RESDC user agreement and require member access to download.

name: historical-basemaps: world historical boundary polygons (world_<year>.geojson series)
theme_raw: Historical political/cultural boundaries (world) | historical administrative/political boundaries | Historical settlements / named places (points)
doi_or_citation: Ourednik, A. historical-basemaps, GitHub (no formal DOI; cite repository URL and commit)
notes: Polygon attributes include NAME, SUBJECTO, PARTOF, BORDERPRECISION (1-3 accuracy level). Marked 'work in progress'; verify before academic use.
verify_notes: 724 stars, active; historical world maps 123,000 BC to 2010 AD | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: historical-basemaps 是 Andre Ourednik 维护的社区项目，提供全球历史边界多边形（world_<年份>.geojson 系列），时间跨度极广，从约公元前 123000 年至公元 2010 年，包含 1279、1492、1715、1815、1914、1938、1945、1994、2010 等多个时间切片。多边形属性含 NAME、SUBJECTO、PARTOF 及 BORDERPRECISION（1–3 级精度标记）。数据以 GeoJSON（及衍生 SVG、TopoJSON）通过 GitHub 开放获取，采用 GPL-3.0 许可。该项目标注为“进行中”，学术使用前建议核实。
desc_en: historical-basemaps is a community project by Andre Ourednik providing global historical boundary polygons (the world_<year>.geojson series) spanning an enormous range from roughly 123,000 BCE to 2010 CE, with time slices such as 1279, 1492, 1715, 1815, 1914, 1938, 1945, 1994 and 2010. Polygon attributes include NAME, SUBJECTO, PARTOF and BORDERPRECISION (a 1–3 accuracy flag). Data are openly available as GeoJSON (plus derivative SVG and TopoJSON) via GitHub under GPL-3.0. The project is marked 'work in progress,' so verify before academic use.

name: Kartverket - FKB Bygning / Matrikkelen (Norway)
theme_raw: buildings + addresses | Coastline, hydrography, glaciers, admin, transport | national coastline polygon/line referenced to mean high water
license: Norwegian Licence for Open Government Data (NLOD) for selected layers
notes: Search FKB-Bygning / Matrikkelen Adresse on Geonorge; portions are open, full FKB is restricted - read each layer's licence.
verify_notes: 页面可达但内容动态加载，WebFetch 仅看到标题；门户仍是 FKB/Matrikkelen 入口 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该条目指向挪威地图局（Kartverket）经 Geonorge 门户发布的 FKB-Bygning（建筑物）与 Matrikkelen（地籍地址）数据，覆盖挪威全国，主题涉及建筑、地址与交通。可在 Geonorge 上搜索 FKB-Bygning / Matrikkelen Adresse 获取，提供 GeoPackage、GML、SOSI 等格式，直接下载。需注意：部分图层开放，而完整 FKB 数据受限——使用前应逐一阅读各图层的许可条款。
desc_en: This entry points to FKB-Bygning (buildings) and Matrikkelen (cadastral addresses) data from the Norwegian Mapping Authority (Kartverket), published via the Geonorge portal and covering all of Norway across building, address and transport themes. They can be found by searching FKB-Bygning / Matrikkelen Adresse on Geonorge, offered as GeoPackage, GML and SOSI via direct download. Note that some layers are open while the full FKB is restricted—read each layer's license before use.

name: World Bank Official Boundaries
theme_raw: ADM0-2 + non-determined-legal-status areas + ocean mask | ADM0/1/2 boundaries reflecting WB official position (disputed area handling) | Administrative boundaries (Admin 0/1/2 + NDLSA + ocean mask)
formats_now: Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, CSV, XLSX, API
file_size: Admin 2 Additional Attributes: 5.7 MB; Admin 1: 299.6 KB
notes: World Bank-approved official boundaries; includes disputed-area conventions. Updated May 2026.
verify_notes: Last updated 2026-05-14 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界银行官方边界（World Bank Official Boundaries）是世界银行批准发布的全球官方行政边界数据集，含争议地区的处理惯例。数据覆盖全球，提供 Admin 1、Admin 2 等层级（如 Admin 2 附加属性约 5.7 MB，Admin 1 约 299.6 KB），每年更新，最新为 2026 年 5 月发布的 v2 版本。数据以 CC BY 4.0 开放，提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON 格式，可公开直接下载，适合国际机构口径的全球边界制图与分析。
desc_en: World Bank Official Boundaries is the Bank's approved global dataset of official administrative boundaries, including conventions for disputed areas. Covering the world, it provides levels such as Admin 1 and Admin 2 (e.g., Admin 2 additional attributes about 5.7 MB, Admin 1 about 299.6 KB), updated annually, with the latest v2 released in May 2026. Released under CC BY 4.0 in Shapefile, GeoPackage and GeoJSON, it is publicly available via direct download—well suited to global boundary mapping and analysis using an international-institution convention.

name: 天地图 数据 API / Tianditu Vector Data Service (政区, 水系, 交通, 居民地)
provider: 国家地理信息公共服务平台 天地图 / NGCC
theme_raw: physical & administrative base layers (rivers, coastline, boundaries) | national hydrography, coastline, land cover boundaries (Chinese natural features) | POI 地名查询 / 行政区
license: 天地图开放服务协议 (free with key; non-commercial)
formats: vector tiles, WFS-style queries, GeoJSON (via mirrors like geojson.cn/data/atlas/tiandi)
notes: Bulk shp download is officially restricted; community uses WFS via QGIS or geojson.cn mirror (https://geojson.cn/data/atlas/tiandi) for province/city/county boundaries plus rivers.

desc_zh: 天地图数据 API（国家地理信息公共服务平台 / NGCC）提供中国全境的矢量数据服务，涵盖政区、水系、交通、居民地等主题。服务以矢量切片、类 WFS 查询及 GeoJSON 形式通过 API 提供，需申请密钥（免费、非商业），遵循天地图开放服务协议。官方对批量 shp 下载有限制，社区通常借助 QGIS 的 WFS 或 geojson.cn 镜像（geojson.cn/data/atlas/tiandi）获取省、市、县级边界及河流等数据。
desc_en: The Tianditu Vector Data Service, from China's National Geographic Information Public Service Platform (NGCC), provides nationwide vector services covering administrative divisions, hydrography, transport and residential areas. Services are delivered via API as vector tiles, WFS-style queries and GeoJSON, requiring a free non-commercial API key under the Tianditu open-service agreement. Bulk shapefile download is officially restricted, so the community typically uses WFS via QGIS or the geojson.cn mirror (geojson.cn/data/atlas/tiandi) to obtain province, city and county boundaries plus rivers.

name: ChinaAdminDivisonSHP (民政部 + NBS derived)
provider: GaryBikini / open community (derived from MoCA, NBS, AMap)
theme_raw: China province / city / county boundaries | admin_boundaries | Administrative boundaries
license: Public on GitHub (use with caution — derived from semi-open Chinese sources)
notes: China official admin boundaries are sensitive; this repo is most common pragmatic source. Compare with DataV.GeoAtlas (Amap).
verify_notes: 活跃, 最近 release v24.02.06; README 提示 2023-12 起天地图发布了更权威 GeoJSON 省/市边界 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ChinaAdminDivisonSHP 是一个开源社区仓库，提供中国行政区划边界，数据派生自民政部（MoCA）、国家统计局（NBS）和高德（AMap）。由于中国官方行政边界较为敏感且不易直接获取，该仓库是最常用的实用替代来源之一（如 v24.02.06，2024 年 2 月发布）。数据以 shapefile 和 geojson 格式通过 GitHub 直接下载，采用 MIT 许可，建议与 DataV.GeoAtlas（高德源）相互比对验证。
desc_en: ChinaAdminDivisonSHP is an open community repository providing China's administrative-division boundaries, derived from the Ministry of Civil Affairs (MoCA), the National Bureau of Statistics and AMap. Because official Chinese admin boundaries are sensitive and not readily accessible, this repo is one of the most common pragmatic sources (e.g., release v24.02.06 in February 2024). Data are downloadable directly from GitHub as shapefile and geojson under the MIT license; it is advisable to cross-check against DataV.GeoAtlas (the AMap source).

name: National Geospatial Information Authority (NMA) per-country provider list — SALB directory
theme_raw: Authoritative national boundary data providers (gateway, not data itself) | Administrative boundaries (admin0/1/2) and historic admin-unit change tables | Administrative boundary change history (tabular metadata, NOT vector)
formats: Directory of upstream NMA URLs (e.g. CENACARTA Mozambique http://www.cenacarta.com, IGC DRC, IGN Benin http://ign.bj, IGB Burkina Faso, w3sli.wcape.gov.za South Africa, Surveys Dept Malawi)
formats_now: xlsx for historic data; geospatial via country pages
access: Web-listed contacts and homepage URLs per country
notes: SALB's main downstream value as a 'lead' is its enumeration of which national stats office / NMA owns each country's authoritative boundary vectors — these upstream NMA portals are the actual vector sources to mine in phase 2 (e.g. CENACARTA Mozambique, IGC DRC, IGN Benin, IGB Burkina Faso).
verify_notes: covers 197 member states; active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国 SALB 目录提供 197 个联合国会员国各自的国家测绘机构（NMA）/统计局上游来源清单，是一份指向各国权威边界矢量持有者的“线索”目录。它列出各国 NMA 的联系方式与主页 URL，例如莫桑比克 CENACARTA、刚果（金）IGC、贝宁 IGN、布基纳法索 IGB、南非 w3sli 及马拉维测量局等。其核心价值在于指明每个国家由哪个机构持有权威行政边界数据，便于进一步从这些上游门户挖掘实际矢量源；使用遵循联合国自定义条款。
desc_en: The UN SALB directory provides, for 197 UN Member States, a list of upstream national mapping agencies (NMAs) and statistics offices—essentially a 'leads' directory pointing to the authoritative holders of each country's boundary vectors. It lists NMA contacts and homepage URLs, such as CENACARTA (Mozambique), IGC (DRC), IGN (Benin), IGB (Burkina Faso), South Africa's w3sli and the Malawi Surveys Department. Its core value is identifying which agency owns each country's authoritative admin boundaries, enabling further mining of the actual vector sources from these upstream portals; use follows the UN's custom terms.

name: simonepri/geo-maps
theme_raw: World boundaries & physical features | World political & physical maps (lands, coastlines, maritime, seas, lakes, rivers) | countries land/coastline/maritime, lands, rivers, lakes, seas

notes: Convertible to Shapefile/TopoJSON via mapshaper
verify_notes: last release Nov 2017 but still referenced | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: geo-maps 是一套由 OpenStreetMap 数据派生的全球轻量级矢量地图集合，以 GeoJSON 格式发布。内容涵盖国家陆地、海岸线与海洋边界、湖泊、河流和海域等基础地理要素，适合做底图、Web 制图和快速可视化。代码采用 MIT 许可、数据遵循 OSM 的 ODbL 许可。可借助 mapshaper 等工具方便地转换为 Shapefile 或 TopoJSON，便于按需简化与集成到前端项目中。
desc_en: geo-maps is a lightweight collection of global vector basemaps derived from OpenStreetMap and distributed as ready-to-use GeoJSON. It covers core geographic features including country land and coastlines, maritime boundaries, lakes, rivers, and seas, making it convenient for web cartography, basemaps, and quick visualization. The code is MIT-licensed while the underlying data follows OSM's ODbL terms. Files can be readily converted to Shapefile or TopoJSON with tools such as mapshaper, allowing on-demand simplification and easy integration into front-end projects.

name: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 - 土地利用/覆盖产品集

notes: TPDC 是国内最规范的英文友好开放平台; 含历史尺度大比例尺矢量 (如 1978 天水 1:50万, 1980s 贵州 1:10万)
verify_notes: TPDC portal loads; SPA, content not extracted via static fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源是国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布的土地利用/覆盖产品集，覆盖青藏高原及中亚、南亚、中南半岛与中国大陆区域。数据混合矢量与栅格形式，包含县级大比例尺（如 1:10 万）历史土地利用矢量及多期产品，适用于区域生态、城镇化与土地变化研究。采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，需注册后下载。TPDC 是国内规范且对英文用户友好的开放平台，多个数据集附有独立 DOI。
desc_en: This is a land-use/land-cover product collection from the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), covering the Tibetan Plateau together with Central Asia, South Asia, Indochina, and mainland China. It mixes vector and raster formats and includes large-scale county-level historical land-use vectors (e.g., 1:100,000) and multi-period products, suitable for regional ecology, urbanization, and land-change studies. Released under CC-BY-4.0, it requires registration to download. TPDC is one of China's most standardized, English-friendly open platforms, with many datasets carrying individual DOIs.

name: AreaCity-JsSpider-StatsGov (national-stats-bureau derived boundaries)
theme_raw: Admin boundaries (民政部/统计局/高德/腾讯 derived) | admin_boundaries | 4级行政统计单元(省/市/县/乡镇街道) + 边界
formats_now: CSV, JSON, GeoJSON, Shapefile, SQL, JS
notes: Most actively-maintained Chinese-language admin boundary spider; pairs directly with modood codes.
verify_notes: 6.6k stars, last update April 2026; active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: AreaCity-JsSpider-StatsGov 是一个抓取并整理中国行政区划数据的开源项目，提供从省到村五级的行政区多边形及区划代码。数据以 GeoJSON、SQL、CSV 等格式发布，便于直接导入数据库或制图使用。它是中文社区中维护最活跃的行政边界爬虫之一，可与 modood 区划代码表配套使用。代码采用 MIT 许可，通过 GitHub release 开放获取，含压缩后约 13 MB 的 ok_geo 数据。
desc_en: AreaCity-JsSpider-StatsGov is an open-source project that scrapes and assembles Chinese administrative-division data, providing five-level admin polygons from province down to village along with division codes. Data is published in GeoJSON, SQL, and CSV, making it easy to import into databases or use in mapping. It is among the most actively maintained Chinese-language admin-boundary spiders and pairs directly with modood code tables. The code is MIT-licensed and openly available via GitHub releases, with the compressed ok_geo dataset around 13 MB.

theme_raw: Country polygons with ISO codes | country polygons | Country boundaries

desc_zh: geo-countries 是由开放知识基金会（Open Knowledge Foundation）维护的全球国家边界数据集，以 DataPackage 形式封装的 GeoJSON 发布。数据由 Natural Earth 经 ogr2ogr 转换而来，提供统一、易用的世界各国轮廓，适合数据分析、Web 可视化和与统计数据连接。数据采用 ODC PDDL 公共领域许可、代码为 MIT 许可，可通过 GitHub 与 datahub.io 直接获取，文件约 110 MB。
desc_en: geo-countries is a global country-boundary dataset maintained by the Open Knowledge Foundation, published as GeoJSON wrapped in a DataPackage. Derived from Natural Earth via ogr2ogr, it offers consistent, easy-to-use national outlines suitable for data analysis, web visualization, and joining with statistical data. The data uses the ODC PDDL public-domain dedication while the code is MIT-licensed, and it is available directly through GitHub and datahub.io, with the file around 110 MB.

name: DIVA-GIS country bundles (GBIF + GADM)

desc_zh: DIVA-GIS 提供按国家打包的免费空间数据，整合了 GBIF 物种分布点与 GADM 行政边界等内容，并以 Shapefile 形式直接下载。数据涵盖各国行政区、地名/兴趣点和交通要素，长期被生态与生物多样性研究引用。它是少数将 GBIF 物种记录重新整理为开箱即用 Shapefile 的来源之一。数据可免费用于学术用途，其中 GBIF 部分遵循 CC BY 许可。
desc_en: DIVA-GIS provides free per-country spatial data bundles that combine GBIF species occurrence points with GADM administrative boundaries and related layers, offered as direct-download Shapefiles. Coverage includes national admin units, place/POI data, and transportation features, and it has long been cited in ecological and biodiversity research. It is one of the few sources that redistributes GBIF occurrences as ready-to-use shapefiles. The data is free for academic use, with the GBIF component following CC BY terms.

name: Eurostat GISCO Local Administrative Units (LAU)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Buildings & addresses | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: Municipality-level administrative units | population_socioecon | Administrative boundaries
license_now: Free reuse subject to GISCO download rules

notes: Building blocks of NUTS; linked with population counts per LAU.
verify_notes: Eurostat GISCO LAU page active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Eurostat GISCO 本地行政单元（LAU）数据集提供欧盟成员国市镇/社区一级的行政边界，按年度更新（约 2011–2024 年版本）。LAU 是 NUTS 统计区划体系的最小构成单元，并与各 LAU 的人口数据相关联，常用于区域统计、人口与社会经济分析。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、TopoJSON 等格式开放发布，使用须遵循 GISCO 的下载与署名规则。
desc_en: The Eurostat GISCO Local Administrative Units (LAU) dataset provides municipality/commune-level administrative boundaries for EU member states, updated annually (roughly 2011–2024 editions). LAUs are the smallest building blocks of the NUTS statistical hierarchy and are linked with population counts per unit, making them widely used for regional statistics and socioeconomic analysis. The data is openly distributed in Shapefile, GeoJSON, and TopoJSON formats, with reuse subject to GISCO's download and attribution rules.

name: FAO Hand-in-Hand Geospatial Platform (GAUL etc.)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use | Geology, soil & geomorphology
theme_raw: Admin units (GAUL 2024), land cover, agriculture, water | global / national land cover (multiple legends incl. LCCS, GLC-SHARE) | Agriculture, soil, land cover, food security

verify_notes: 301 to http variant; HAND in Hand platform alive; per-dataset licenses | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: FAO Hand-in-Hand 地理空间平台是联合国粮农组织的开放数据目录，汇集了行政边界（如 GAUL）、土地利用与土壤地貌等全球专题数据。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON 与 WFS 等多种访问方式，广泛用于农业、粮食安全与可持续发展分析。其中 GAUL 2024 新版已可下载 ADM1 与 ADM2 行政层级，此前仅在 Google Earth Engine 中可用。GAUL 数据通常限于联合国与各国非商业用途。
desc_en: The FAO Hand-in-Hand Geospatial Platform is the UN Food and Agriculture Organization's open data catalog, bringing together administrative boundaries (such as GAUL), land use, and soil/geomorphology themes at global scale. Data is accessible as Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON, and WFS, and is widely used for agriculture, food security, and sustainable-development analysis. Notably, the new GAUL 2024 release makes ADM1 and ADM2 levels downloadable, having previously been restricted to Google Earth Engine. GAUL data is generally limited to UN and national non-commercial use.

name: FROM-GLC10 / FROM-GLC plus (Tsinghua) - vector administrative LC summaries
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Global land cover; companion vector products (e.g., GUB urban boundaries) | Global LULC fine classification | 城市/不透水面边界

verify_notes: FROM-GLC data migrated to PCL StarCloud portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: FROM-GLC 系列是清华大学地球系统科学系发布的全球土地覆盖产品，含 10 米分辨率版本（FROM-GLC10）及其衍生的全球城市边界（GUB）矢量数据。数据提供 GeoTIFF 栅格与 Shapefile 矢量（如城市边界），免费供学术使用，可从清华门户直接下载。该数据集常被 CLCD 等土地覆盖研究交叉比对，是全球高分辨率土地覆盖与城市扩张研究的重要参考。
desc_en: The FROM-GLC series, produced by Tsinghua University's Department of Earth System Science, comprises global land-cover products including a 10-meter resolution version (FROM-GLC10) and its derived Global Urban Boundary (GUB) vector layer. Data is offered as GeoTIFF rasters and Shapefile vectors (such as urban boundaries), free for academic use and downloadable directly from the Tsinghua portal. It is frequently cross-compared in land-cover studies such as CLCD, serving as an important reference for high-resolution global land cover and urban expansion research.

name: GRID3 Operational Country Boundaries (data portal)
provider: GRID3 / CIESIN Columbia / WorldPop / UN Population Fund
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: Admin1/2/health-area boundaries for African focus countries (NGA, COD, ZMB, MOZ, BFA, etc.), some SALB-validated | settlement polygons + linked population estimates | Settlements

notes: De-facto open release vehicle for several SALB-aligned admin2 layers (notably DRC, Nigeria, Zambia).

desc_zh: GRID3 运营级行政边界数据由 GRID3、哥伦比亚大学 CIESIN、WorldPop 与联合国人口基金合作发布，覆盖约 20 个非洲重点国家。数据包含与 SALB 对齐的行政边界（尤以刚果（金）、尼日利亚、赞比亚等的二级行政区著称），并结合人口与基础设施信息，常用于公共卫生、人口与发展规划。多数图层采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage 下载及 ArcGIS FeatureServer 接口。
desc_en: GRID3 Operational Country Boundaries are published collaboratively by GRID3, Columbia University's CIESIN, WorldPop, and the UN Population Fund, covering roughly 20 priority African countries. The data includes SALB-aligned administrative boundaries (notably ADM2 layers for DRC, Nigeria, and Zambia) combined with population and infrastructure information, widely used for public health, demographics, and development planning. Most layers are licensed CC BY 4.0 and are available as Shapefile and GeoPackage downloads plus ArcGIS FeatureServer endpoints.
