notes: Experimental program (since 2014-08-01) to test vector-tile delivery of authoritative FGD; includes coastlines, contour lines, hydrography, road/rail, building footprints, town/admin boundaries — uniquely authoritative Japan-only source.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GSI 实验性基础地理数据（FGD）是日本国土地理院发布的权威矢量瓦片项目，自 2014 年起以 GeoJSON XYZ 瓦片形式（z=18）测试矢量切片分发。内容涵盖海岸线、等高线、水系、道路与铁路、建筑轮廓及行政与町级边界，覆盖范围由最初的筑波、新潟扩展至全国点线 FGD。作为日本独有的官方权威来源，数据使用须遵循 GSI 内容使用协议。
desc_en: The GSI Experimental FGD is an authoritative vector-tile project from the Geospatial Information Authority of Japan, testing the delivery of Fundamental Geospatial Data as GeoJSON XYZ tiles (z=18) since 2014. It covers coastlines, contour lines, hydrography, roads and railways, building footprints, and town/administrative boundaries, expanding from initial coverage of Tsukuba and Niigata to nationwide point and line FGD. As a uniquely authoritative Japan-only source, its use is governed by the GSI Content Usage Agreement.

name: INDE Catálogo de Geosserviços (federated catalog)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: Federation of 60+ federal/state/municipal GeoServers | Setores censitários (census tracts) 2010 / 2022; districts; subdistricts; neighborhoods | municipal, state and intermediate region boundaries; census sectors
license_now: unspecified on portal (遵循 OGC 标准; 各机构条款各异)
notes: Root entry point; enumerates 37 national + 13 state + 6 municipal + 3 academic providers
verify_notes: INDE 国家空间数据基础设施目录, 聚合 40+ 联邦/13 州级机构; 2025 年仍活跃 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: INDE 地理服务目录（Catálogo de Geosserviços）是巴西国家空间数据基础设施的统一入口，由国家制图委员会（CONCAR）/INDE 维护，汇集联邦、州与市级机构的地理服务。它枚举了 37 个国家级、13 个州级、6 个市级及 3 个学术机构提供方，通过 WFS、WMS、WCS 等 OGC 标准接口提供行政边界、地名与人口社会经济等数据。各机构许可条款不一，使用前需逐项核对。
desc_en: The INDE Geoservices Catalog (Catálogo de Geosserviços) is the unified entry point for Brazil's national spatial data infrastructure, maintained by CONCAR/INDE and federating geospatial services from federal, state, and municipal agencies. It enumerates providers across 37 national, 13 state, 6 municipal, and 3 academic institutions, exposing administrative boundaries, place names, and population/socioeconomic data through OGC-standard WFS, WMS, and WCS endpoints. Licensing varies by institution and should be checked per provider before use.

name: NUTS boundaries (nutsbn)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Marine & coastal
theme_raw: administrative boundary lines | country polygons | point labels / cartogram anchors
notes: Lines with level + border-type (coast / land border) attributes
verify_notes: directory listing not served by raw.githubusercontent; specific files inside path exist | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该资源是 Eurostat/GISCO 的 NUTS 边界数据（Nuts2json 项目），以 TopoJSON 与 GeoJSON 格式提供欧盟、欧洲自由贸易联盟及候选国的 NUTS 统计区划。边界以线要素形式发布，并带有层级（level）与边界类型（海岸线/陆地边界）属性，便于按需制图与轻量化 Web 渲染。数据通过 GitHub 静态文件直接获取，使用须遵循 Eurostat 条款。
desc_en: This resource provides Eurostat/GISCO NUTS boundaries via the Nuts2json project, offering the NUTS statistical regions of the EU, EFTA, and candidate countries in TopoJSON and GeoJSON. Boundaries are published as line features carrying level and border-type attributes (coastline versus land border), making them convenient for on-demand cartography and lightweight web rendering. The data is served directly as static GitHub files, with reuse subject to Eurostat terms.

name: ONS Open Geography Portal (Output Areas, LSOA, MSOA, Wards)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Marine & coastal
theme_raw: population_socioecon | Census output areas, super output areas, IMD lookup boundaries, electoral, health geographies | Output Areas, LSOAs, MSOAs, wards, parishes, parliamentary constituencies, IMD lookups
coverage: England, Wales, Scotland (NI partial); 2011 and 2021 Census geographies
license_now: Open Government Licence v3 (per ONS portal-wide policy; not in fetched fragment)
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, vector tiles, WFS/ArcGIS REST
notes: Full and generalised, extent-of-realm and clipped-to-coast variants. Output Areas (OA) are the lowest UK census unit and the IMD (Index of Multiple Deprivation) geographies are published here.
verify_notes: WebFetch returned minimal content (JS-driven ArcGIS Hub); portal is operational. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ONS 开放地理门户由英国国家统计局维护，发布英格兰、威尔士与苏格兰（含部分北爱尔兰）的统计地理边界，覆盖 2011 与 2021 年人口普查地理体系，包括输出区（OA）、LSOA、MSOA 与选区等。其中输出区是英国普查最小统计单元，多重剥夺指数（IMD）相关地理也在此发布。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、矢量瓦片及 WFS/ArcGIS REST 等多种格式，并区分完整版、概化版与裁剪到海岸线等变体，遵循开放政府许可（OGL v3）。
desc_en: The ONS Open Geography Portal, maintained by the UK Office for National Statistics, publishes statistical-geography boundaries for England, Wales, and Scotland (with partial Northern Ireland), spanning the 2011 and 2021 Census geographies including Output Areas, LSOAs, MSOAs, and Wards. Output Areas are the lowest UK census unit, and the Index of Multiple Deprivation geographies are also published here. Data is offered in Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, vector tiles, and WFS/ArcGIS REST, with full, generalised, and clipped-to-coast variants, under the Open Government Licence v3.

name: 三江源地区1:25万交通数据 (LRDL 道路 / LRRL 铁路)
theme_raw: transport vectors (China) | transport (Arctic) | admin boundaries / settlements (POI)
notes: National/provincial/county/township roads; rail incl. standard, narrow gauge, metro, light rail
verify_notes: TPDC search page reachable; content JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为三江源地区 1:25 万交通数据，由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）提供，覆盖三江源/青藏高原区域。内容以线状 Shapefile 形式表达，包含国道、省道、县道、乡道等各级公路，以及标准轨、窄轨、地铁、轻轨等铁路要素，适用于高原交通、可达性与生态评估研究。数据限学术用途，需注册后获取。
desc_en: This dataset provides 1:250,000-scale transportation data for the Three-River-Source region, supplied by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC) and covering the Three-River-Source / Tibetan Plateau area. It is expressed as linestring Shapefiles covering national, provincial, county, and township roads, along with rail features including standard gauge, narrow gauge, metro, and light rail, suitable for plateau transportation, accessibility, and ecological assessment research. The data is for academic use and requires registration.

name: Boundary of county-level administrative units of the Tibetan Plateau (2015)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Administrative boundary (county) - Tibetan Plateau | 行政边界 | Administrative boundary
coverage: Tibetan Plateau (Tibet, Qinghai, Gansu, Yunnan, Xinjiang, Sichuan), 2015
license: TPDC user agreement (academic use, registration required)
notes: County-level boundary vector for QTP urbanization/ecology studies
verify_notes: TPDC SPA - content mostly client-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为青藏高原县级行政单元边界（2015 年），由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）提供，覆盖西藏、青海、甘肃、云南、新疆、四川等省区的高原范围。数据以 WGS84 坐标系的 Shapefile 提供，常作为高原城镇化与生态研究的县级行政底图。登录后可免费下载，使用须遵循 TPDC 用户协议。
desc_en: This dataset provides the county-level administrative unit boundaries of the Tibetan Plateau for 2015, supplied by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC) and covering the plateau portions of Tibet, Qinghai, Gansu, Yunnan, Xinjiang, and Sichuan. The data is provided as Shapefile in the WGS84 coordinate system and commonly serves as a county-level administrative basemap for plateau urbanization and ecology studies. It is free to download after login, subject to the TPDC user agreement.

name: CanVec / Geographical Names Database (NRCan) for Canadian Arctic
provider: Natural Resources Canada (Canada Centre for Mapping and Earth Observation)
theme_raw: Topographic vectors: hydrography, transport, admin, place names | topographic vector (hydro, transport, admin, landform) | Multi-theme topographic (admin, hydro, land, manmade, elevation, toponyms)
coverage: Canada incl. Nunavut, NWT, Yukon, Arctic Archipelago
feature_count: more than 60 topographic features classes organized into 8 themes
notes: Canadian contribution to Arctic SDI.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源来自加拿大自然资源部（NRCan）的 CanVec 与地名数据库，覆盖包括努纳武特、西北地区、育空及北极群岛在内的加拿大全境。数据按 8 大主题组织、含 60 余类地形要素，提供 GML、Shapefile、GeoPackage、KML 等格式，并可通过 GeoBase 的 WFS 访问。它是加拿大对北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic SDI）的贡献，适用于基础地形、地名与交通制图。数据遵循加拿大开放政府许可。
desc_en: This resource comes from Natural Resources Canada's (NRCan) CanVec and Geographical Names Database, covering all of Canada including Nunavut, the Northwest Territories, Yukon, and the Arctic Archipelago. Organized into 8 themes with more than 60 topographic feature classes, it is offered as GML, Shapefile, GeoPackage, and KML, with WFS access via GeoBase. It is Canada's contribution to the Arctic Spatial Data Infrastructure, suitable for base topographic, place-name, and transportation mapping. The data follows the Open Government Licence – Canada.

name: GAUL 2024 - Administrative boundaries Level 1 (states/provinces)
theme_raw: Subnational admin L1 | Subnational admin L2 | administrative boundaries
verify_notes: GAUL 2024 L1 page live; ToU required | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: GAUL 2024 一级行政边界数据由 FAO AgroInformatics 发布，提供全球州/省一级（ADM1）的行政区划，参考年份为 2024 年。数据以 ESRI Shapefile、WMS 及配套 CSV 代码表形式开放发布，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，便于全球农业、统计与空间分析使用。GAUL 是联合国粮农组织维护的权威全球行政边界框架，2024 版进一步开放了下载访问。
desc_en: GAUL 2024 Administrative Boundaries Level 1 is published by FAO AgroInformatics, providing global state/province-level (ADM1) administrative divisions referenced to 2024. The data is openly distributed as ESRI Shapefile and WMS with an accompanying CSV codelist under a CC BY 4.0 license, supporting global agricultural, statistical, and spatial analysis. GAUL is the authoritative global administrative-boundary framework maintained by the UN FAO, and the 2024 edition further opens up download access.

name: geojson.cn 中国国家标准矢量地图（基于天地图 GS(2024)0650）
theme_raw: admin_boundaries | administrative + coastline + 九段线 (correct Chinese standard depiction) | 行政区划 / 标准矢量
coverage: China provinces/cities/counties (含台湾、南海诸岛、九段线，符合审图号)
license: custom (积分制，部分免费，部分付费下载，CGCS2000)
license_now: 积分制 (100 积分/份, 会员8折, 注册赠100积分); 审图号 GS(2024)0650; CGCS2000
formats: GeoJSON, TopoJSON (中国_省/市/县 三级)
notes: 审图号 GS(2024)0650, CGCS2000 (EPSG:4490) 是与官方一致版本；社群衍生 https://geojson.hxkj.vip/ 提供镜像
verify_notes: Last updated 2025-09. Sourced from Tianditu. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据由 geojson.cn / EasyMap 社区基于天地图发布，是符合官方审图号 GS(2024)0650 的中国国家标准矢量地图，采用 CGCS2000（EPSG:4490）坐标系。数据提供省、市、县三级 GeoJSON 与 TopoJSON，完整包含台湾、南海诸岛与九段线，是与官方一致的合规版本，2025 年 9 月更新。平台采用积分制获取，支持注册下载与 API 访问，并有社群镜像可用。
desc_en: This dataset, published by the geojson.cn / EasyMap community based on Tianditu, is a China national-standard vector map compliant with the official map-review number GS(2024)0650, using the CGCS2000 (EPSG:4490) coordinate system. It provides province-, city-, and county-level GeoJSON and TopoJSON, fully including Taiwan, the South China Sea islands, and the nine-dash line, representing a version consistent with official boundaries (updated September 2025). The platform uses a credit-based access model supporting registration downloads and API access, with community mirrors available.

name: GISCO Countries 2024 (CNTR)
theme_raw: Administrative boundaries — countries (global) | world countries boundaries | World country administrative boundaries
license: Free re-use with attribution (© EuroGeographics / UN-FAO / Turkstat — see GISCO disclaimer)
formats_now: Shapefile, GeoJSON, TopoJSON, GPKG, SVG (per GISCO standard); JSON listing
notes: Successor of CNTR_RG; multilingual labels EN/DE/FR. Beyond NUTS — this is the country layer.
verify_notes: Versions 2001-2024 available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GISCO Countries 2024（CNTR）是 Eurostat GISCO 的全球国家图层，提供国家多边形、标注点与边界线，并附 EN/DE/FR 多语言标签。数据涵盖 2001 至 2024 多个版本，提供 1M 至 60M 多种比例尺，格式包括 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GeoPackage、TopoJSON 与 SVG，并支持 HTTPS 批量下载与 datasets.json API。作为 CNTR_RG 的后继产品，它是 NUTS 体系之外独立的国家边界基准层，免费使用但须署名。
desc_en: GISCO Countries 2024 (CNTR) is Eurostat GISCO's global country layer, providing country polygons, label points, and boundary lines with multilingual EN/DE/FR labels. It spans multiple releases from 2001 to 2024 at scales from 1M to 60M, in Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, TopoJSON, and SVG formats, with HTTPS bulk download and a datasets.json API. As the successor to CNTR_RG, it serves as a standalone country-boundary reference layer beyond the NUTS hierarchy, free to reuse with attribution.

name: Global Seafloor Geomorphic Features Map (GSFM)
provider: Geoscience Australia, GRID-Arendal, Conservation International (Harris et al.)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Transportation | Geology, soil & geomorphology
theme_raw: Marine geomorphology / seafloor physiography | Marine geomorphology by maritime jurisdiction (EEZ overlay) | Seafloor geomorphic features intersected with national EEZ boundaries
access: Direct Dropbox ZIP download from bluehabitats.org Access Data page
doi_or_citation: 10.1016/j.margeo.2014.01.011 (Harris, P.T., Macmillan-Lawler, M., Rupp, J., Baker, E.K., 2014. Geomorphology of the oceans. Marine Geology 352, 4-24)
notes: Bundle contains 27+ feature classes incl. shelf, slope, abyss, hadal, seamounts, guyots, ridges, rises, plateaus, escarpments, canyons (shelf-incising and blind), trenches, troughs, basins, terraces, sills, spreading ridges, rift valleys, glacial troughs, fans, bridges. Authoritative source layer for blue-economy/MSP work.
verify_notes: lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 全球海底地貌特征图（GSFM）由澳大利亚地球科学局、GRID-Arendal 与保护国际（Harris 等人）联合制作，覆盖全球海洋海底。数据集（约 389 MB 的 ESRI Shapefile 压缩包）包含 27 类以上地貌要素，如陆架、陆坡、深渊、海山、平顶海山、海岭、海台、海沟、峡谷、扇与裂谷等，是研究海底地貌的权威源数据。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，并附学术引用（Harris 等，2014，《海洋地质》）。
desc_en: The Global Seafloor Geomorphic Features Map (GSFM) was produced by Geoscience Australia, GRID-Arendal, and Conservation International (Harris et al.), covering the world's ocean seafloor. The dataset (a roughly 389 MB zipped ESRI Shapefile) contains more than 27 feature classes, including shelf, slope, abyss, seamounts, guyots, ridges, plateaus, trenches, canyons, fans, and rift valleys, serving as the authoritative source layer for seafloor geomorphology. It is released under CC BY 4.0 and accompanied by an academic citation (Harris et al., 2014, Marine Geology).

name: GRanD v1.01 Reservoirs (polygons)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Hydrography | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Hydrology | Population, urban extents, admin, hazards, infrastructure (many as vectors) | energy_infrastructure (dams)
notes: Polygon shoreline of large reservoirs digitized from imagery.
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout on retry | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GRanD v1.01（Global Reservoir and Dam）是全球大型水库与大坝数据集，由 NASA SEDAC、GWSP 与麦吉尔大学发布，包含约 6,862 座水库的多边形岸线，由遥感影像数字化获得。数据以 ESRI Shapefile（面要素）提供，适用于水资源、水文与人类活动对河流影响等研究，通过 HTTPS 配合 Earthdata 账号下载。原始 GRanD 采用 CC BY-NC-SA 许可，由 SEDAC 再分发，并附 DOI 标识。
desc_en: GRanD v1.01 (Global Reservoir and Dam) is a global dataset of large reservoirs and dams published by NASA SEDAC, GWSP, and McGill University, containing polygon shorelines for about 6,862 reservoirs digitized from imagery. The data is provided as ESRI Shapefile (polygon) and is suited to water-resources, hydrology, and human-impact-on-rivers research, downloadable via HTTPS with an Earthdata Login. The original GRanD uses a CC BY-NC-SA license, redistributed through SEDAC, and carries a DOI identifier.

name: LLM-GeoDis: Subnational geocoding of EM-DAT disasters (GADM ADM1-2)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Hazards & disasters
theme_raw: Subnational admin units linked to disaster/population impacts | Disasters / admin boundaries
formats: GeoPackage (.gpkg) + harmonized GADM geometries; point geometries
notes: Vector-format GeoPackage with FAO GAUL + GADM ADM1/2 polygons
verify_notes: LLM-GeoDis v7 (2026-03-10), ~14.9GB. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: LLM-GeoDis 是一个将 EM-DAT 灾害事件进行次国家级地理编码的数据集，发布于 Zenodo，覆盖 2000–2024 年全球范围，含约 14,215 起事件、17,948 个位置。数据以 GeoPackage 格式提供，将灾害位置匹配到协调后的 FAO GAUL 与 GADM ADM1/2 行政多边形，便于灾害风险、人口暴露与空间分析研究。数据集约 14.9 GB，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可开放获取。
desc_en: LLM-GeoDis is a dataset that geocodes EM-DAT disaster events to the subnational level, published on Zenodo, covering the globe from 2000 to 2024 with about 14,215 events and 17,948 locations. The data is provided as GeoPackage, matching disaster locations to harmonized FAO GAUL and GADM ADM1/2 administrative polygons for disaster-risk, population-exposure, and spatial analysis. The dataset is roughly 14.9 GB and openly available under a CC BY 4.0 license.

name: MLIT National Land Numerical Information (KSJ) - Transport layers
provider: Japan MLIT (Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism)
theme_raw: Roads (N01/N13), railways (N02/N05), airports (C28), ports (C02), bus stops, station passenger counts | POI (schools, hospitals, welfare, tourism, commercial accumulation) | Rivers, dams, lakes, watershed boundaries
license: CC BY 4.0 (most layers); some ports/rail time-series are non-commercial
notes: Note the per-layer license: ports (C02) and N05 time-series rail still carry restrictions despite the portal-wide CC BY shift.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国土数值信息（KSJ）是日本国土交通省（MLIT）发布的权威国土地理数据，此条目侧重交通图层，覆盖日本全国。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 JPGIS2.1 GML 格式，可直接下载，涵盖行政边界、地名/兴趣点与交通设施。大多数图层已转为 CC BY 4.0 许可，但需注意部分图层例外，如港口（C02）与 N05 铁路时间序列仍保留非商业等限制。
desc_en: National Land Numerical Information (KSJ) is authoritative national geospatial data from Japan's Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism (MLIT), with this entry focusing on transport layers and covering all of Japan. Data is offered as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and JPGIS2.1 GML for direct download, spanning administrative boundaries, places/POIs, and transport facilities. Most layers have shifted to CC BY 4.0, but note per-layer exceptions: ports (C02) and N05 time-series rail still carry non-commercial restrictions.

name: OSM admin_level + boundary relations
theme_raw: Crowd-sourced administrative + statistical boundaries (var. countries) | power=line/tower/substation, pipeline=*, telecom=* | 任意 tag/几何条件的实时 OSM 查询
formats: PBF, GeoJSON via Overpass; vector tiles via OpenMapTiles
notes: Mainline anchor; useful for countries lacking official open release.
verify_notes: Active OSM Overpass API query/visualization tool (not a dataset per se) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenStreetMap 的 admin_level 与 boundary 关系是全球行政边界的主线数据源，可通过 Overpass API 按需提取为 GeoJSON，或以 PBF、OpenMapTiles 矢量瓦片等形式获取。数据全球覆盖、社区持续维护，遵循 ODbL 许可，对于缺乏官方开放发布的国家尤为有用。它常被用作行政边界的权威锚点，但完整性与精度依国家和地区而异，使用前宜结合具体区域核查。
desc_en: OpenStreetMap's admin_level and boundary relations are the mainline source for global administrative boundaries, extractable on demand as GeoJSON via the Overpass API, or available as PBF and OpenMapTiles vector tiles. The data is global, community-maintained, and licensed under ODbL, and is especially valuable for countries lacking an official open release. It is often used as an authoritative anchor for admin boundaries, though completeness and accuracy vary by region and should be verified for specific areas before use.

name: OSM-Boundaries (community extractor)
theme_raw: OSM administrative boundaries (admin_level 2-11) | OSM 行政边界 (admin_level 1-11) | OSM admin boundaries
notes: Quick way to grab specific admin levels from OSM without running osmium yourself.
verify_notes: 页面提到 CC-BY-SA 2.0，与 p4 ODbL 不一致；OSM 数据实际为 ODbL，站点描述可能不准确。 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OSM-Boundaries 是一个社区提取工具，可从 OpenStreetMap 的行政区关系中按需生成指定层级的边界数据，无需自行运行 osmium 等工具。它支持 GeoJSON、Shapefile、KML 与 PBF 等格式的自定义构建，覆盖所有存在 OSM 行政关系的地区。数据沿用 OSM 的 CC-BY-SA 许可，是快速获取特定国家或行政级别边界的便捷途径。
desc_en: OSM-Boundaries is a community extractor that generates administrative boundaries at chosen levels from OpenStreetMap's admin relations on demand, without requiring you to run tools like osmium yourself. It supports custom builds in GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, and PBF, covering anywhere OSM admin relations exist. The data inherits OSM's CC-BY-SA license and offers a quick, convenient way to grab boundaries for a specific country or admin level.

name: Peking University 9 Major Chinese River Basins (1:250k)
provider: Peking University, College of Urban and Environmental Sciences
theme_raw: China river network, basin polygons (9-basin scheme) | basin boundaries | public_services / POI
notes: Chinese-language portal hosting national-scale watershed and water-system datasets including 9 major basins, 3-level water systems. Login required.
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout after 60s | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该资源为北京大学城市与环境学院发布的中国九大流域数据（1:25 万），覆盖全国，内容包含九大流域及三级水系等国家尺度的流域与水系矢量数据，以 Shapefile 提供。数据适用于水文、流域管理与生态环境研究。平台为中文界面，需注册登录后下载，按学术用途的自定义条款使用。
desc_en: This resource is the Nine Major Chinese River Basins dataset (1:250,000) published by Peking University's College of Urban and Environmental Sciences, covering all of China. It hosts national-scale watershed and water-system vector data, including the nine major basins and three-level water systems, provided as Shapefile. The data suits hydrology, basin management, and eco-environmental research. The portal is Chinese-language and requires registration and login, with use governed by custom academic-use terms.

name: Statistics Canada 2021 Census Boundary Files (Dissemination Areas, CTs, CSDs)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Marine & coastal
theme_raw: population_socioecon | provinces, census divisions, federal electoral districts, CSD, CMA/CA, census tracts, dissemination areas | census subdivisions, CMA/CA, dissemination areas, electoral districts
coverage: Canada; 2021 Census (DAs, DBs, CTs, CSDs, CMAs, ADAs, FSAs, FEDs)
formats_now: Shapefile, GML, FGDB, ESRI REST, WMS
notes: Cartographic and digital (full extent including coastal water) versions, NAD83 Lambert.
verify_notes: File not found - 2021 boundary page removed/relocated by StatCan | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 加拿大统计局 2021 年人口普查边界文件覆盖加拿大全境，提供普查传播区（DA）、传播块（DB）、普查区（CT）、人口普查细分区（CSD）、人口普查都会区（CMA）及联邦选区（FED）等多层统计地理。数据采用 NAD83 Lambert 投影，提供制图版与数字版（含完整范围及沿海水域）两类，格式包括 Shapefile、GML、KML 与 MapInfo。数据开放，遵循加拿大开放政府许可，是加拿大普查与人口社会经济分析的官方基础。
desc_en: Statistics Canada's 2021 Census Boundary Files cover all of Canada, providing multiple statistical geographies including Dissemination Areas (DA), Dissemination Blocks (DB), Census Tracts (CT), Census Subdivisions (CSD), Census Metropolitan Areas (CMA), and Federal Electoral Districts (FED). The data uses the NAD83 Lambert projection and comes in cartographic and digital (full-extent including coastal water) versions, in Shapefile, GML, KML, and MapInfo formats. Openly available under the Open Government Licence – Canada, it is the official basis for Canadian census and socioeconomic analysis.

name: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 (TPDC) - 青藏高原范围与界线 / 区划数据
provider: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 (中科院青藏所)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Transportation | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: admin_boundaries | marine_coastal | 居民点 / 建筑 / 道路 / 土地覆盖 (青藏高原及一带一路)
coverage: 青藏高原及周边区域 (含 TP 范围线, 行政区裁剪)
license: CC-BY 类似 (申请注册后免费供研究, 须引用)
notes: 区域专题中心的代表; 行政边界常作为高原研究底图; 检索 keyword 'boundary' '行政'
verify_notes: TPDC 首页可达, 但抓取内容稀疏, 未在首页见到许可证/格式细节; 详细信息位于具体数据集页 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源为国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC，中科院青藏所）的青藏高原范围与界线/区划数据，覆盖青藏高原及周边区域，包含高原范围界线与行政区裁剪等内容。数据以 Shapefile 提供，常作为高原相关研究的行政与范围底图。门户首页信息较少，许可条款未明确，需注册后通过检索 'boundary'、'行政' 等关键词获取，并附有 DOI 标识。
desc_en: This resource is the Tibetan Plateau extent and boundary / zoning data from the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC, CAS Institute of Tibetan Plateau Research), covering the Tibetan Plateau and surrounding areas, including the plateau extent line and administrative clips. Provided as Shapefile, it commonly serves as an administrative and extent basemap for plateau-related research. The homepage is sparse and licensing is unspecified; access requires registration and searching keywords such as 'boundary' or '行政', and the data carries a DOI identifier.

name: Africapolis Urban Agglomerations
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: urban agglomeration boundaries | urban settlements / built-up agglomerations | urban admin / agglomerations
license: OECD terms of use (free for non-commercial)
doi_or_citation: Moriconi-Ebrard, Harre & Heinrigs (2015), West African Studies
notes: Primary urban agglomeration boundary dataset used in Prieto-Curiel et al. 2023 PNAS paper
verify_notes: Page loads but content is rendered client-side; WebFetch returned only title. Site itself alive. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Africapolis 城市聚集区数据由 OECD/SWAC（萨赫勒与西非俱乐部）制作，覆盖整个非洲，约含 7,700 个城市聚集区。数据以 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 提供，是非洲城市化与土地利用研究中权威的城市聚集区边界来源，并被 Prieto-Curiel 等 2023 年 PNAS 论文等研究采用。数据可注册后免费下载，遵循 OECD 使用条款（非商业免费）。
desc_en: Africapolis Urban Agglomerations, produced by OECD/SWAC (Sahel and West Africa Club), covers all of Africa with about 7,700 urban agglomerations. Provided as Shapefile and GeoJSON, it is the authoritative source of urban-agglomeration boundaries for African urbanization and land-use research and was used in studies such as the Prieto-Curiel et al. 2023 PNAS paper. The data is free to download after registration, under OECD terms of use (free for non-commercial use).

name: AMap (Gaode) District API - Administrative Boundaries
theme_raw: Administrative boundaries (country/province/city/district) | admin_boundaries | 行政边界(省/市/区县)
license: Commercial API ToS; requires API key; redistribution restricted
license_now: 高德开放平台开发者协议(免费配额, 需Key)
formats: JSON, XML (polyline boundary strings, GCJ-02 coordinates) — convertible to GeoJSON/Shapefile
notes: Upstream source for nearly all Chinese open admin vector derivatives. Returns adcode/citycode + polyline boundary when extensions=all. Street level lacks boundary.
verify_notes: 文档最后更新2024-10-24,功能正常 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 高德（Amap）行政区查询 API 由阿里旗下高德地图提供，覆盖中国大陆，支持国家、省、市、区县及街道五级查询（街道级无边界）。接口以 REST 方式返回 JSON/XML，当 extensions=all 时返回 adcode/citycode 及 GCJ-02 坐标的边界折线，可转换为 GeoJSON/Shapefile。它是几乎所有中国开放行政矢量衍生数据的上游来源。需申请 Key、遵循高德开放平台协议，有免费配额。
desc_en: The AMap (Gaode) District API, provided by Alibaba's AutoNavi/Amap, covers mainland China and supports five query levels—country, province, city, district/county, and street (street level has no boundary). The REST interface returns JSON/XML, and with extensions=all it returns adcode/citycode plus boundary polylines in GCJ-02 coordinates, convertible to GeoJSON/Shapefile. It is the upstream source for nearly all Chinese open admin-vector derivatives. It requires an API key under the Amap open-platform agreement, with a free quota.

name: Austrian Silesia Historical Administrative Units 1837-1910
theme_raw: admin_boundaries (historical cadastral/communal) | historical admin units + socio-economic attributes | Historical census/cadastral statistical units
notes: Manually vectorised from 1837-41 historical maps with socio-economic attributes; rare commune-level historical vector
verify_notes: Nature SSO redirect; open access article | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为奥地利西里西亚 1837–1910 年历史行政单元，作为 Scientific Data（2020）论文的补充材料发布，覆盖约 700 个地籍/政治社区单元。数据由 1837–41 年历史地图人工矢量化而来，并附带社会经济属性，是少见的社区级历史行政矢量资料。以 Shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可通过论文补充材料/Figshare 获取，适用于历史地理与长时段社会经济研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides historical administrative units of Austrian Silesia from 1837 to 1910, released as supplementary material to a Scientific Data (2020) paper, covering about 700 cadastral/political commune units. Manually vectorized from 1837–41 historical maps and enriched with socioeconomic attributes, it is a rare commune-level historical administrative vector. Provided as Shapefile under a CC-BY 4.0 license and available via the paper supplement/Figshare, it suits historical geography and long-run socioeconomic research.

name: ChinaGeoJson - 行政区元数据 (info.json)
theme_raw: Administrative metadata / centroids | administrative metadata / centroid points | administrative hierarchy index
notes: Lookup table linking adcode to parent admin unit and centroid coordinates; supports join with the GeoJSON polygons.
verify_notes: info.json 1.35 MB present at master branch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ChinaGeoJson 的 info.json 是中国行政区划的元数据查找表，覆盖各级行政区，记录 adcode、上级行政单元（parent）及经纬度质心坐标。文件以 JSON 提供，约 1.35 MB，采用 MIT 许可开放下载。它可与对应的 GeoJSON 多边形数据连接，方便建立行政层级关系、做空间标注与质心定位，是中国行政区划数据处理中的实用辅助资源。
desc_en: ChinaGeoJson's info.json is a metadata lookup table for Chinese administrative divisions, covering all admin levels and recording adcode, parent admin unit, and latitude/longitude centroid coordinates. The file is provided as JSON, about 1.35 MB, and openly downloadable under an MIT license. It can be joined with the corresponding GeoJSON polygon data to build admin hierarchies, support spatial labeling, and provide centroid positioning, making it a practical helper resource for processing Chinese administrative-division data.

name: CnOpenData China administrative shapefile collection (CTAmap 1.12, 2013-2023)
theme_raw: Chinese province/city/county polygons (annual) | admin_boundaries | 五级行政统计单元
feature_count: Shandong alone has 60,000+ GeoJSON files; 5 levels (省/市/县/乡/村)
notes: Aligned with civil affairs ministry; popular in Chinese academia.
verify_notes: Updated Sept 2025; two versions | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CnOpenData 中国行政区划 Shapefile 集合（CTAmap 1.12，覆盖 2013–2023 年）提供省、市、县、乡、村五级行政边界，含港澳台，与民政部区划对齐，在中国学术界广泛使用。数据以 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 提供，体量较大（接近 6 GB，部分省份含数万个 GeoJSON 文件）。可直接下载，但仅限个人/教育用途，不得商用。
desc_en: The CnOpenData China administrative shapefile collection (CTAmap 1.12, covering 2013–2023) provides five-level administrative boundaries—province, city, county, town, and village—including Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan, aligned with the Ministry of Civil Affairs divisions and popular in Chinese academia. Data is offered as Shapefile and GeoJSON and is sizable (nearly 6 GB, with some provinces containing tens of thousands of GeoJSON files). It is available for direct download but restricted to personal/educational use with no commercial use.

name: CShapes 2.0 - Historical State Boundaries
provider: ETH Zurich ICR (Schvitz, Girardin, Ruegger, Weidmann, Cederman, Gleditsch)
theme_raw: admin_boundaries (national/historical) | Historical administrative / international boundaries | Historical European state boundaries
formats_now: CSV, tab-delimited, GeoJSON, Shapefile, SQL, R package
doi_or_citation: Schvitz et al. 2022, Journal of Conflict Resolution 66(1):144-161, doi:10.1177/00220027211013563
notes: Only freely available global historical political-boundary dataset; coded against Tir Territorial Change Dataset, Biger, Brownlie encyclopaedias
verify_notes: License is NC-SA, more restrictive than p4 record of 'academic non-commercial'. v2.0 (2022), copyright 2023. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CShapes 2.0 是 ETH 苏黎世国际冲突研究组发布的历史国家边界数据集，覆盖 1886–2019 年的全球主权国家与殖民地（CShapes-Europe 可追溯至 1816 年）。数据以事件历史多边形的 Shapefile 形式提供，并配有 R/Python 软件包，记录边界随时间的演变，与 Tir 领土变更数据集及 Biger、Brownlie 等历史百科对齐。它是目前唯一免费可得的全球历史政治边界数据集，采用 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 许可。
desc_en: CShapes 2.0 is a historical state-boundary dataset published by ETH Zurich's International Conflict Research group, covering global sovereign states and colonies from 1886 to 2019 (CShapes-Europe extends back to 1816). The data is provided as event-history polygon Shapefiles with companion R/Python packages, recording how boundaries change over time and coded against the Tir Territorial Change Dataset and the Biger and Brownlie historical encyclopedias. It is the only freely available global historical political-boundary dataset, released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.

name: data.gov.uk / data.gov mirrors of statistical boundaries via CKAN
theme_raw: Census/admin/statistical boundaries indexed in national CKAN catalogues | population_socioecon | Census statistical geography
notes: CKAN action API allows programmatic harvest of dataset resources (often the WFS URLs).
verify_notes: Dataset page on data.gov.uk fully accessible; 2001 & 2011 censuses | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源是 data.gov.uk / data.gov 等开放数据门户通过 CKAN 对统计边界数据的镜像/汇编，覆盖英国与美国，主要包含输出区（OA）等统计地理边界（涉及 2001 与 2011 年普查，最后更新于 2016 年）。资源格式不一，含 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 WFS 链接，遵循英国开放政府许可（OGL）。其 CKAN action API 支持程序化采集数据资源（常为 WFS 地址），便于批量获取与集成。
desc_en: This resource is a CKAN-based mirror/compilation of statistical boundary data on open-data portals such as data.gov.uk and data.gov, covering the UK and USA and centered on statistical geographies like Output Areas (OA) (spanning the 2001 and 2011 censuses, last updated 2016). Resource formats vary, including Shapefile, GeoJSON, and WFS links, under the UK Open Government Licence (OGL). Its CKAN action API supports programmatic harvesting of dataset resources (often the WFS URLs), enabling bulk retrieval and integration.

name: Datahub — Country Polygons as GeoJSON (geo-countries)
theme_raw: admin boundaries (countries) | Administrative boundaries (countries) | Country boundaries (small scale)
license_now: ODC-PDDL-1.0 (源自 Natural Earth, public domain)
notes: Companion reference vector frequently paired with airport-codes for joins/visualisation
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集以 GeoJSON 形式提供全球 258 个国家及地区的行政边界多边形，源自公有领域的 Natural Earth 数据，并通过 Datahub.io 进行打包分发。文件约 14.6 MB，采用 ODC-PDDL 公有领域许可，可自由使用。它常作为轻量级参考底图，与机场代码等表格数据做空间连接或快速可视化，适合 Web 制图、原型开发和教学演示等对精度要求不高的场景。
desc_en: This dataset provides administrative boundary polygons for 258 countries and territories as a single GeoJSON file (~14.6 MB), distributed through Datahub.io and derived from the public-domain Natural Earth data. Released under the ODC-PDDL public-domain dedication, it can be used freely without attribution. It is widely used as a lightweight reference basemap, commonly joined with tabular data such as airport codes for quick spatial visualization. Typical uses include web mapping, prototyping, and teaching, where simplicity and an open license matter more than high geometric precision.

name: DataMeet Indian Village Boundaries Project
theme_raw: village & ward boundaries collected from state government sites | Village, ward, panchayat boundaries (community digitised) | admin_boundaries (village)
license: varies per state contribution; mostly open
license_now: ODbL (Open Data Commons Open Database License)
notes: Aggregates non-uniform state data; useful complement to SHRUG and ESRI India data.
verify_notes: Active community project; WGS84 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: DataMeet 印度村级边界项目由印度开放数据社区 DataMeet 维护，逐州收集并整理印度村庄一级的行政边界，目前覆盖范围为部分州、并非全国统一。数据提供 WGS84 坐标的 GeoJSON 和 Shapefile，并关联 2001 与 2011 年人口普查代码，采用 ODbL 开放数据库许可。由于各州数据来源与质量不一，它常作为 SHRUG、ESRI 印度数据等的补充，用于村级层面的社会经济与空间分析。
desc_en: Maintained by the Indian open-data community DataMeet, this project aggregates village-level administrative boundaries for India on a state-by-state basis, with coverage that is partial rather than nationally uniform. Data are offered as GeoJSON (WGS84) and Shapefile and are keyed to 2001 and 2011 census codes, under the ODbL open-database license. Because the underlying state sources vary in quality and completeness, the dataset is best used as a complement to resources such as SHRUG and ESRI India data for village-level socio-economic and spatial analysis.

name: DHS Spatial Data Repository (Subnational Boundaries)
theme_raw: DHS survey region administrative boundaries | survey clusters / admin | DHS survey region boundaries
license: DHS Terms of Use (free with registration)
doi_or_citation: Cited as a primary household survey boundary source in Smits & Permanyer 2019
notes: Key input boundary layer for harmonising GDL subnational regions in DHS countries.
verify_notes: Server returned 403 to WebFetch; site likely alive but requires login | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: DHS 空间数据库由美国国际开发署 DHS 项目（ICF 执行）维护，提供 90 多个 DHS 调查国家、多个调查年份的次国家级行政边界图层。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 和 KML 提供，需注册后按国家下载，遵循 DHS 使用条款。这些边界是协调家庭健康与人口调查数据的关键参照，常被用于将 DHS 调查结果与 GDL 等次国家区域体系对齐，支撑健康、人口与发展研究。
desc_en: The DHS Spatial Data Repository, run by USAID's DHS Program (implemented by ICF), provides subnational administrative boundary layers for more than 90 DHS survey countries across multiple survey years. Data are available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and KML, with per-country download after free registration under the DHS Terms of Use. These boundaries are a key reference for harmonizing household-survey data and are frequently used to align DHS survey results with subnational region systems such as the GDL, supporting health, demographic, and development research.

name: DOPA - Digital Observatory for Protected Areas (JRC)
theme_raw: PA indicators + ecoregion/country aggregates built on WDPA
license: JRC open data (CC-BY in most cases)
formats: Shapefile / GeoPackage via JRC Data Catalogue + REST services
formats_now: RDF/XML; RDF/JSON-LD; CSV; HTML; Turtle; NTriples
access: JRC Data Catalogue + DOPA Explorer REST
notes: Useful derived layers (ecoregion overlays, connectivity, pressure indices) rather than raw boundaries
splink_merged_from: JRC Digital Observatory for Protected Areas (DOPA)
verify_notes: Landing page http://dopa.jrc.ec.europa.eu/; collection lists zero datasets | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: DOPA（保护区数字观测站）由欧盟委员会联合研究中心（JRC）开发，是一个面向全球保护区的监测与分析平台。它通过 JRC 数据目录和 DOPA Explorer 的 REST 服务，以 Shapefile/GeoPackage 等形式提供生态区叠加、连通性、人为压力指数等派生图层，而非单纯的原始边界。该资源适合用于保护区有效性评估、生物多样性与生态系统压力的全球与区域分析。
desc_en: DOPA, the Digital Observatory for Protected Areas developed by the European Commission's Joint Research Centre, is a global monitoring and analysis platform for protected areas. Through the JRC Data Catalogue and the DOPA Explorer REST services, it offers derived layers such as ecoregion overlays, connectivity measures, and human-pressure indices in formats like Shapefile and GeoPackage, rather than raw boundaries alone. It is well suited to assessing protected-area effectiveness and analyzing biodiversity and ecosystem pressures at global and regional scales.

name: FAO GAUL 2015 Level 2 (Districts)
theme_raw: Global administrative boundaries (second-level / districts) | Country boundaries | Administrative boundaries
access: Free via Earth Engine; requires GEE account
notes: Heavily used in non-English/global-south workflows for sub-national stats. Asset ID FAO/GAUL/2015/level2.
verify_notes: GEE catalog; restricted to non-commercial use | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: FAO GAUL 2015 第二级（区/县）是联合国粮农组织全球行政单元图层的 2015 年版本，提供全球二级行政区划的多边形。数据在 Google Earth Engine 中作为 FeatureCollection 免费提供（资产 ID 为 FAO/GAUL/2015/level2，需 GEE 账号），可导出为 Shapefile 或 GeoJSON。它在全球及发展中地区的次国家级统计、农业与粮食安全分析中被广泛使用，遵循 FAO GAUL 非商业许可。
desc_en: FAO GAUL 2015 Level 2 is the 2015 edition of the FAO Global Administrative Unit Layers, providing second-order (district) administrative polygons worldwide. It is available free of charge in Google Earth Engine as a FeatureCollection (asset ID FAO/GAUL/2015/level2, requiring a GEE account) and can be exported to Shapefile or GeoJSON. Widely used in global and Global-South workflows for subnational statistics, agriculture, and food-security analysis, it is distributed under the FAO GAUL non-commercial license.

name: GADM 4.1 - World GeoPackage (single database)
license: Free for academic/non-commercial use; commercial use requires permission
notes: Standard GADM 4.1 distribution, all admin levels in one DB
verify_notes: large binary; fetch buffer exceeded | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 GADM 4.1 的全球单库 GeoPackage 发行版，由 GADM 项目（UC Davis 托管）维护，将全球所有国家、共约 40 万个各级行政区划单元合并到一个 .gpkg 数据库中。GADM 是全球行政边界领域的旗舰参考数据集，提供从国家到最低行政层级的多层级多边形，被广泛用于科研、统计制图和空间分析。许可证免费用于学术与非商业用途，商业使用需另行授权。
desc_en: This is the GADM 4.1 single-database GeoPackage distribution, maintained by the GADM project (hosted at UC Davis), bundling all countries and roughly 400,000 administrative areas across all levels into one .gpkg database. GADM is a flagship global reference for administrative boundaries, offering multi-level polygons from national down to the lowest available administrative tier, and is widely used in research, statistical mapping, and spatial analysis. It is free for academic and non-commercial use, while commercial use requires permission.

name: geoBoundaries on HDX (organization)
theme_raw: Admin boundaries | administrative boundaries | Open admin boundaries used in humanitarian context
coverage: Global, ~130 country datasets mirrored to HDX
notes: Alternative to COD-AB; useful where COD is missing or out-of-date
verify_notes: HDX returns 403 to WebFetch (likely anti-bot); page itself exists | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: geoBoundaries 在 HDX（人道主义数据交换平台）上的镜像由威廉与玛丽学院 geoLab 维护，提供约 130 个国家的全球行政边界数据。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoJSON 提供，采用宽松的 CC-BY 4.0 许可，便于商业与人道主义场景使用。它是 COD-AB（人道主义通用操作数据集）的有力替代，尤其适用于 COD 缺失或过时的国家，常用于人道响应、冲突分析与跨国统计制图。
desc_en: This is the HDX mirror of geoBoundaries, maintained by the William & Mary geoLab, providing global administrative boundaries for around 130 countries. Data are offered as Shapefile and GeoJSON under the permissive CC-BY 4.0 license, making them easy to use in both commercial and humanitarian contexts. geoBoundaries is a strong alternative to the humanitarian Common Operational Datasets (COD-AB), particularly useful where COD coverage is missing or outdated, and is commonly applied in humanitarian response, conflict analysis, and cross-country mapping.

name: geobounds R API client (dieghernan/geobounds)
theme_raw: R interface to geoBoundaries | R API client to geoBoundaries CGAZ + country files
what_changes: Independent R API client (not the official rgeoboundaries) that caches and reformats geoBoundaries downloads as sf objects; ships small simplified test vectors derived from geoBoundaries.
notes: Alternative to the official wmgeolab/rgeoboundaries package; relatively unknown community derivative.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: geobounds 是一个用于访问 geoBoundaries 行政边界数据的 R API 客户端，由 GitHub 用户 dieghernan 开发，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可（要求署名）。它是官方 rgeoboundaries 包之外的社区衍生工具，知名度相对较低，主要面向需要在 R 环境中以编程方式检索和加载全球行政边界的用户。元数据较少，具体功能与覆盖范围以其仓库说明为准。
desc_en: geobounds is an R API client for accessing geoBoundaries administrative boundary data, developed by the GitHub user dieghernan and released under CC BY 4.0 with attribution required. It is a community-built alternative to the official rgeoboundaries package and is relatively little known. The tool is aimed at users who want to retrieve and load global administrative boundaries programmatically within R. Given the limited metadata, its exact features and coverage are best confirmed from the repository documentation.

name: Global Groundwater Information System (GGIS) - Transboundary Aquifers
theme_raw: transboundary aquifer polygons, country aquifer inventories, MAR sites | Groundwater - transboundary aquifers | transboundary aquifer polygons
license_now: unknown (CC-BY-SA 3.0 IGO per metadata, not visible on landing)
formats: WMS/WFS via GeoServer behind the GGIS viewers; Shapefile downloads
formats_now: map layers + downloadable datasets (format unspecified on landing)
doi_or_citation: IGRAC Transboundary Aquifers of the World 2025
notes: GGIS portal uses standard OGC stack (GeoServer). Multiple modules: TBA, TWAP, GGRETA, Global Groundwater Monitoring Network (GGMN).
verify_notes: GeoNode 4.4.3, GGIS v4.12.49 — active portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球地下水信息系统（GGIS）由 IGRAC（在 UNESCO 与 WMO 支持下运作）维护，提供包括跨境含水层在内的全球地下水相关空间数据。系统基于标准 OGC 技术栈（GeoServer），通过 WMS/WFS 服务和 Shapefile 下载提供数据，并包含 TBA、TWAP、GGRETA 及全球地下水监测网（GGMN）等多个模块。它是水资源管理、跨境水治理与水文研究的重要数据来源。
desc_en: The Global Groundwater Information System (GGIS), maintained by IGRAC under the auspices of UNESCO and WMO, provides global groundwater-related spatial data, including transboundary aquifers. Built on a standard OGC stack (GeoServer), it delivers data via WMS/WFS services and Shapefile downloads and hosts several modules including TBA, TWAP, GGRETA, and the Global Groundwater Monitoring Network (GGMN). It is an important resource for water-resource management, transboundary water governance, and hydrological research.

name: GlobeLand30 (vectorised national subsets)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Global 30 m land cover; downloadable per 1°x1° tile (raster) with vector class boundaries | 全球地表覆盖 (10 类: 耕地/林地/草地/灌木/湿地/水体/苔原/人造地表/裸地/冰川积雪) | Global LULC 10 classes
formats: GeoTIFF raster; tile-level vector polygons available on request and via derived shapefiles
notes: Cited in CLCD paper as comparison dataset; derivative vector products widely available

desc_zh: GlobeLand30 由中国国家基础地理信息中心（NGCC）研制，是 30 米分辨率的全球地表覆盖数据集，包含 2000、2010 和 2020 三个年份。数据主体为 GeoTIFF 栅格，注册后可免费获取；瓦片级矢量多边形及派生 Shapefile 也有相应产品。它是全球土地覆盖研究的重要基准数据，常被用于土地利用变化分析、生态评估和与其他地表覆盖产品的对比验证。
desc_en: GlobeLand30, produced by the National Geomatics Center of China (NGCC), is a 30-meter global land-cover dataset covering the years 2000, 2010, and 2020. The core product is GeoTIFF raster data, available free of charge after registration, with tile-level vector polygons and derived shapefiles also available. It is a widely cited benchmark in global land-cover research and is frequently used for land-use change analysis, ecological assessment, and comparison or validation against other land-cover products.

name: GLocal - Global Development Dataset of Subnational Administrative Areas
formats: csv tables keyed to GADM geometries; companion shapefiles
doi_or_citation: Morales-Arilla & Gadgin Matha 2024, Scientific Data, doi:10.1038/s41597-024-03539-y
notes: Pairs subnational econ/demo/eco/socio-political variables with stable GID identifiers; useful for cross-walking to GADM polygons
splink_merged_from: GLocal global development dataset of subnational administrative areas
verify_notes: DOI returned 404 Not Found via WebFetch; DOI suffix may be malformed (Harvard Dataverse DOIs don't typically end in '45') | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: GLocal 是哈佛增长实验室发布的全球次国家级发展数据集，将经济、人口、生态和社会政治等变量与稳定的 GADM 行政区标识符（GID）关联。数据以 CSV 表格形式提供（配套 Shapefile），通过哈佛 Dataverse 直接下载，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。它便于把各类指标与 GADM 多边形进行跨表连接，适合全球范围的次国家级比较研究与发展分析。
desc_en: GLocal is a global subnational development dataset released by the Harvard Growth Lab that pairs economic, demographic, ecological, and socio-political variables with stable GADM administrative identifiers (GIDs). Data are provided as CSV tables with companion shapefiles, downloadable directly from the Harvard Dataverse under a CC-BY 4.0 license. By keying variables to consistent GIDs, it makes cross-walking indicators onto GADM polygons straightforward, supporting global subnational comparative research and development analysis.

name: GWL_FCS30 - Global 30 m Wetland Map with Fine Classification
theme_raw: Wetlands - inland + coastal (mangrove, salt marsh, tidal flats) | wetlands | global wetlands, 8 sub-classes

notes: Eight sub-categories; vector boundary extracts available
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GWL_FCS30 是一套 30 米分辨率、面向 2020 年的全球湿地精细分类地图，发表于 Earth System Science Data（Zhang 等，2023）。它将全球湿地细分为约八个子类（包括红树林、盐沼、潮间带等），主体为栅格产品，并提供派生矢量边界。数据采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可通过 DOI 链接开放获取，适用于湿地监测、海岸带与生态系统研究。
desc_en: GWL_FCS30 is a global 30-meter wetland map with fine classification for the year 2020, published in Earth System Science Data (Zhang et al., 2023). It divides global wetlands into roughly eight sub-categories, including mangroves, salt marshes, and tidal flats, with a raster core product and derived vector boundary extracts. Released under CC-BY 4.0 and openly available via its DOI, it supports wetland monitoring as well as coastal and ecosystem research.

name: India Village-Level Geospatial Socio-Economic Data Set 1991/2001
provider: NASA SEDAC / CIESIN (digitised from Survey of India)
license_now: EOSDIS Data Use and Citation Guidance (open, no restriction)
notes: Includes 200+ socio-economic variables; finest pre-SHRUG village polygon dataset
splink_merged_from: India Village-Level Geospatial Socio-Economic Data Set (1991, 2001)
verify_notes: SEDAC moved under NASA Earthdata catalog; active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由 NASA SEDAC/CIESIN 根据印度测量局资料数字化而成，提供印度 1991 和 2001 年村庄/城镇一级的地理空间社会经济数据，覆盖 28 个邦。数据为 Shapefile（UTM 44N），包含 200 多个社会经济变量，需免费注册后获取，遵循开放的 EOSDIS 数据使用与引用指南。作为 SHRUG 之前最精细的村级多边形数据之一，它适合村级社会经济、人口与发展研究。
desc_en: Digitized by NASA SEDAC/CIESIN from Survey of India sources, this dataset provides village- and town-level geospatial socio-economic data for India for 1991 and 2001, covering 28 states. It is distributed as Shapefiles (UTM 44N) with more than 200 socio-economic variables, available after free registration under the open EOSDIS data-use and citation guidance. As one of the finest village-level polygon datasets predating SHRUG, it supports village-scale socio-economic, demographic, and development research.

name: Maanmittauslaitos (NLS Finland) Hydrography INSPIRE WFS
theme_raw: watercourses, water polygons, shoreline constructions, rapids, dams | AdministrativeUnit, AdministrativeBoundary, Baseline, MaritimeZone, MaritimeBoundary | buildings, addresses
license_now: Open / free (specific licence not stated on page)
formats: WFS 2.0.0 (INSPIRE GML), OGC API Features pilots
notes: Exemplary INSPIRE HY implementation; lakes + rivers polygons and lines. Finland is also experimenting with OGC API Features.
verify_notes: NLS Finland INSPIRE services open & free | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 芬兰国家土地测量局（NLS）的水文 INSPIRE WFS 服务提供芬兰境内的水文要素数据，包括湖泊、河流的多边形与线状要素。数据通过符合 INSPIRE 规范的 WFS 2.0.0（GML）接口提供，并在试验 OGC API Features，属于开放免费使用（具体许可以页面为准）。它是 INSPIRE 水文（HY）主题的典范实现，适合需要标准化、可互操作水文数据的 GIS 与水文应用。
desc_en: The National Land Survey of Finland's Hydrography INSPIRE WFS service provides hydrographic features for Finland, including lake and river polygons and lines. Data are served through an INSPIRE-compliant WFS 2.0.0 (GML) interface, with OGC API Features pilots also under way, and are openly and freely usable (exact license per the page). It is an exemplary implementation of the INSPIRE Hydrography (HY) theme, well suited to GIS and hydrological applications that require standardized, interoperable water data.

name: MAPTA - Mapping Africa Transformations platform
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use | Energy & infrastructure

desc_zh: MAPTA（非洲转型测绘平台）由 OECD/SWAC 及相关研究者发布，是一个面向非洲城市集群的公共数据传播平台。它以 Web 地图（矢量瓦片）和 CSV 形式呈现研究成果，并叠加在 Africapolis 的矢量边界之上，涉及行政边界、土地利用与基础设施等主题。该平台遵循 OECD/SWAC 使用条款，适合用于非洲城市化、空间转型与区域发展的可视化与探索。
desc_en: MAPTA, the Mapping Africa Transformations platform released by OECD/SWAC and associated authors, is a public dissemination platform focused on African urban agglomerations. It presents research outputs as web maps (vector tiles) and CSV files, overlaid on the Africapolis vector boundaries, spanning themes such as administrative boundaries, land use, and infrastructure. Distributed under OECD/SWAC terms, it is well suited to visualizing and exploring African urbanization, spatial transformation, and regional development.

name: Marine Ecoregions of the World (MEOW) – Spalding et al. 2007
provider: TNC / WWF / Spalding et al., BioScience 2007
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Marine & coastal | Protected areas & biodiversity
theme_raw: 海洋生态分区 / marine ecoregions (12 realms, 62 provinces, 232 ecoregions) | coastal & continental shelf marine ecoregions, provinces, realms | 海洋生态区划
notes: Companion to terrestrial ecoregions; outer boundaries are extended ~200 nm, beware.
verify_notes: MEOW page exists; metadata not extracted in preview | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界海洋生态区（MEOW）是 Spalding 等人 2007 年提出的全球海岸与陆架海域生物地理分区体系，由 TNC 与 WWF 等机构发布。数据以 Shapefile 提供（亦见于 marineregions.org），将全球近岸与陆架划分为分层的生态区单元，开放用于科研与保护用途。它是陆地生态区的海洋对应物，广泛用于海洋保护规划与生物地理分析；需注意其外边界向外扩展约 200 海里。
desc_en: Marine Ecoregions of the World (MEOW), introduced by Spalding et al. in 2007 and published by TNC and WWF, is a global biogeographic classification of coastal and shelf waters. Distributed as Shapefiles (also via marineregions.org), it partitions nearshore and shelf areas into a nested system of ecoregions and is open for scientific and conservation use. As the marine counterpart to terrestrial ecoregions, it is widely used in marine conservation planning and biogeography; note that its outer boundaries extend roughly 200 nautical miles offshore.

name: MGGG States Precinct/Boundary Releases (rehosted by RDH)
theme_raw: Electoral - precinct shapefiles for redistricting research | State precinct boundaries with election results | electoral districts (US redistricting)

desc_zh: MGGG States 是由 MGGG 选区重划实验室维护的美国部分州的选区与边界数据发布，并由 Redistricting Data Hub（RDH）重新托管。数据覆盖宾州、北卡、弗吉尼亚、马萨诸塞等多个州，以 Shapefile 和 GeoJSON 形式提供，包含 2000–2018 年选举结果，许可证按各仓库而定。该组织下设约 36 个分州仓库，是 RDH 选区数据的上游来源，适用于选区重划与选举地理分析。
desc_en: MGGG States is a collection of precinct and boundary releases for selected US states, maintained by the MGGG Redistricting Lab and rehosted by the Redistricting Data Hub (RDH). It covers states such as Pennsylvania, North Carolina, Virginia, and Massachusetts, distributed as Shapefile and GeoJSON with 2000-2018 election results, under per-repository licensing. Organized as roughly 36 per-state repositories, it serves as an upstream source for the RDH precinct dataset and is used in redistricting and electoral-geography analysis.

notes: 中文圈最频繁更新的 admin 边界聚合数据, 原始坐标为高德 GCJ-02 需纠偏; 必须配合 AreaCity-Geo-Transform-Tools 输出矢量格式
verify_notes: 同 release 页面 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ok_geo.csv 提供中国大陆省、地级市、区县三级行政区划边界（约 3000 多个多边形），由 xiangyuecn 聚合自高德地图、民政部及国家地名信息库等来源，采用 MIT 许可（四级数据部分付费）。原始数据为 CSV，需配合 AreaCity-Geo-Transform-Tools 转换为 Shapefile、GeoJSON 或 SQL，并支持 GCJ-02、BD-09、WGS-84、CGCS2000 等坐标系。它是中文圈更新最频繁的行政边界聚合数据；原始坐标为高德 GCJ-02，使用前需注意纠偏。
desc_en: ok_geo.csv provides three-level administrative boundaries for mainland China at the province, prefecture-city, and county levels (around 3,000+ polygons), aggregated by xiangyuecn from sources including Amap, the Ministry of Civil Affairs, and the national place-name database, under the MIT license (fourth-level data partly paid). The raw CSV is converted to Shapefile, GeoJSON, or SQL via AreaCity-Geo-Transform-Tools, with support for GCJ-02, BD-09, WGS-84, and CGCS2000 coordinate systems. It is among the most frequently updated Chinese admin-boundary aggregates; note the source coordinates are Amap GCJ-02 and require offset correction.

theme_raw: administrative + electoral boundaries (parishes, wards, districts, counties, regions, Westminster constituencies, European parliament regions) | Administrative boundaries

desc_zh: Ordnance Survey Boundary-Line 是英国测绘局（Ordnance Survey）发布的英国（大不列颠）行政边界开放数据，涵盖各级行政区划界线，并包含未来选区边界（依据边界委员会的审查结果）。数据通过 OS Data Hub 以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON 直接下载或 WFS 服务提供。作为英国权威的开放行政边界来源，它适用于选举、行政管理与统计制图等应用。
desc_en: Ordnance Survey Boundary-Line is the open administrative-boundary dataset for Great Britain published by Ordnance Survey, covering administrative division lines at multiple levels and including future constituency boundaries based on Boundary Commission reviews. It is available through the OS Data Hub as direct downloads in Shapefile, GeoPackage, and GeoJSON, or via WFS. As an authoritative open source of UK administrative boundaries, it is well suited to electoral, administrative, and statistical mapping applications.

name: Overture Maps Foundation Open Map Data
provider: AWS Open Data / Overture Maps Foundation

theme_raw: Global base map: Admins, Base, Buildings, Places, Transportation, Addresses | buildings, places, transportation, admins, base | 全 theme 镜像

desc_zh: Overture Maps 开放地图数据由 Overture Maps 基金会发布，并通过 AWS 开放数据计划提供，是一套全球范围、按月更新的云原生矢量数据集，涵盖行政边界、建筑、地址和兴趣点等主题。数据以 GeoParquet 格式存储，可从 us-west-2 区域的公共 S3 桶免费访问（无需 AWS 账号），采用 CDLA Permissive v2 与 ODbL 双许可。作为旗舰级云原生地图数据，它正在取代许多定制的 OSM 提取流程。
desc_en: Overture Maps Open Map Data, published by the Overture Maps Foundation and provided through the AWS Open Data program, is a global, monthly-updated, cloud-native vector dataset spanning administrative boundaries, buildings, addresses, and points of interest. Stored in GeoParquet, it is freely accessible from a public S3 bucket in us-west-2 without an AWS account, under dual CDLA Permissive v2 and ODbL licensing. As a flagship cloud-native map dataset, it increasingly supersedes many bespoke OpenStreetMap extracts.

theme_raw: Health / Poverty | Health / poverty | Subnational poverty proxy (IMR) on admin polygons
notes: Polygon shapefile of ~1,000 subnational units with IMR; widely used proxy for poverty / SDG mapping.

desc_zh: 全球次国家级婴儿死亡率（v2.01）由 NASA SEDAC/CIESIN 发布，提供全球约 1000 个次国家级单元的婴儿死亡率（IMR）多边形数据，参考年份为 2015 年。数据以 Esri Shapefile、栅格和 XLS 形式提供，通过 HTTPS 下载（需 Earthdata 登录），采用 CC BY 许可。它常被用作贫困与发展水平的代理指标，广泛应用于贫困制图和可持续发展目标（SDG）相关分析。
desc_en: Global Subnational Infant Mortality Rates (v2.01), published by NASA SEDAC/CIESIN, provides infant mortality rate (IMR) polygon data for roughly 1,000 subnational units worldwide, referenced to 2015. Data are available as Esri Shapefile, grids, and XLS via HTTPS with Earthdata Login, under a CC BY license. The dataset is widely used as a proxy for poverty and development levels and is applied in poverty mapping and Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) analyses.

desc_zh: 拉姆萨尔湿地信息服务（RSIS）由《拉姆萨尔公约》秘书处维护，提供全球 2500 多处国际重要湿地（拉姆萨尔湿地）的边界数据。数据以 Shapefile（边界与中心点）和 PDF 地图形式免费下载，遵循拉姆萨尔使用条款；对于尚未数字化官方边界的湿地，则提供中心点坐标。它是湿地保护、生态监测与水文研究的权威数据来源。
desc_en: The Ramsar Sites Information Service (RSIS), maintained by the Secretariat of the Ramsar Convention, provides boundary data for more than 2,500 Wetlands of International Importance (Ramsar Sites) worldwide. Data are freely downloadable as Shapefiles (boundaries and centroids) and PDF maps under Ramsar terms, with centroids supplied where an official boundary has not yet been digitized. It is an authoritative source for wetland conservation, ecological monitoring, and hydrological research.
