desc_zh: RDH 国会选区边界数据集由 Redistricting Data Hub 维护，提供美国全部 50 个州 2010–2022 年间生效（enacted）的国会选区划分方案，以 Shapefile 形式发布，注册后免费下载，按州获取。2010–2020 年的数据来源于洛约拉法学院的 All About Redistricting 项目，2022 年方案由 RDH 自行收集。它适用于选区重划研究、选举地理与公共代表性分析。
desc_en: The RDH Congressional District Boundaries dataset, maintained by the Redistricting Data Hub, provides enacted congressional district plans for all 50 US states across the 2010-2022 vintages, released as Shapefiles and downloadable for free per state after registration. The 2010-2020 plans are sourced from Loyola Law School's All About Redistricting, while the 2022 plans were collected by RDH. It supports redistricting research, electoral geography, and analyses of political representation.

name: TIGER/Line Shapefile, Current, Nation, U.S., State and Equivalent Entities
notes: National state polygons from MAF/TIGER
verify_notes: tl_2025_us_state available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该 TIGER/Line Shapefile 由美国人口普查局发布，提供美国全国层面的州及等同实体多边形，约 56 个单元（50 个州、华盛顿特区、波多黎各及 4 个岛屿地区）。数据源自普查局的 MAF/TIGER 数据库，以 Shapefile 形式开放提供，采用 CC0 1.0 公有领域奉献。作为美国权威的法律与统计边界数据，它广泛用于人口普查制图、行政管理与各类空间分析。
desc_en: This TIGER/Line Shapefile, published by the U.S. Census Bureau, provides nation-level state and equivalent-entity polygons for the United States, about 56 units (50 states, DC, Puerto Rico, and four Island Areas). Derived from the Census Bureau's MAF/TIGER database, it is openly distributed as a Shapefile under the CC0 1.0 public-domain dedication. As an authoritative US legal and statistical boundary source, it is widely used for census mapping, administration, and a broad range of spatial analyses.

name: UK ONS Lower Layer Super Output Area (LSOA) Boundaries
provider: Office for National Statistics (UK), via data.gov.uk CKAN
coverage: England & Wales LSOA (small census/IMD reporting units)
access: CKAN + ONS Open Geography Portal WFS
notes: Standard reporting unit for Index of Multiple Deprivation
verify_notes: 数据集 2016 年发布，CKAN 页面正常，多种格式与切片版本。 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国 ONS 下层超级输出区（LSOA）边界由英国国家统计局（ONS）通过 data.gov.uk 的 CKAN 平台发布，覆盖英格兰与威尔士，是用于人口普查和多重剥夺指数（IMD）报告的小型统计单元。数据以 Shapefile、KML、GeoJSON 及 WMS/WFS 服务提供，采用英国开放政府许可（OGL）。LSOA 是 IMD 的标准报告单元，广泛用于社会经济、贫困与公共服务的精细空间分析。
desc_en: The UK ONS Lower Layer Super Output Area (LSOA) boundaries, published by the Office for National Statistics through the data.gov.uk CKAN platform, cover England and Wales and represent the small statistical units used for census and Index of Multiple Deprivation (IMD) reporting. Data are available as Shapefile, KML, GeoJSON, and WMS/WFS services under the UK Open Government Licence (OGL). As the standard reporting unit for the IMD, LSOAs are widely used in fine-grained socio-economic, deprivation, and public-service analysis.

name: USGS National Hydrography Dataset (NHD) + Watershed Boundary Dataset (WBD)
theme_raw: Rivers, lakes, watershed boundaries (HUC2-HUC12+) | rivers, streams, lakes, watershed boundaries (HUC) | Hydrography
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: NHD is legacy but still the canonical US hydrography vector. 3D Hydrography Program (3DHP) is the successor; worth flagging for phase 2.
verify_notes: NHD retired Oct 2023; replaced by 3DHP / NHDPlus HR | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 美国国家水文数据集（NHD）与流域边界数据集（WBD）由美国地质调查局（USGS）维护，提供美国全境的水文要素与流域边界。数据以 Shapefile 和文件地理数据库形式直接下载，属于美国公有领域。NHD 是美国权威的水文矢量数据，虽已进入维护阶段，但仍是经典参考；其后继者为 3D 水文计划（3DHP）。该数据广泛用于水资源管理、流域分析与水文建模。
desc_en: The National Hydrography Dataset (NHD) and Watershed Boundary Dataset (WBD), maintained by the USGS, provide hydrographic features and watershed boundaries across the United States. Data are available for direct download as Shapefile and file geodatabase and are in the US public domain. NHD is the canonical US hydrography vector data and, although now in a legacy maintenance phase, remains a key reference, with the 3D Hydrography Program (3DHP) as its successor. The data are widely used in water-resource management, watershed analysis, and hydrological modeling.

name: USGS Watershed Boundary Dataset (WBD)
theme_raw: Watershed/HUC polygons | 流域边界（HUC2-HUC12） | Watershed boundaries
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: Final static version published Jan 2025.
verify_notes: Transitioning to 3DHP data model | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 美国流域边界数据集（WBD）由 USGS 维护，提供美国全境分级的水文单元边界，从 HU2 到 HU12（部分地区细至 HU14/16）。数据以 Shapefile 和文件地理数据库形式提供，可通过 TNM 下载工具和 ScienceBase 获取，属于 USGS 公有领域。其最终静态版本已于 2025 年 1 月发布。WBD 是美国流域划分的权威参照，广泛用于水文分析、流域管理与环境研究。
desc_en: The Watershed Boundary Dataset (WBD), maintained by the USGS, provides a nested hierarchy of hydrologic unit boundaries across the United States, from HU2 down to HU12 (with HU14/16 in some areas). Data are available as Shapefile and File GDB through the TNM Downloader and ScienceBase, and are in the USGS public domain. Its final static version was published in January 2025. WBD is the authoritative reference for US watershed delineation and is widely used in hydrologic analysis, watershed management, and environmental research.

name: World Subnational Boundaries
theme_raw: Administrative boundaries | International + subnational boundaries, coastlines, lakes, disputed areas | Harmonised global subnational admin polygons joined to country indicators
formats: ESRI GeoDatabase, Shapefile, GeoJSON/TopoJSON, REST API
formats_now: ESRI GDB, GeoJSON, TopoJSON, Shapefile, JSON, API
notes: 13 files, sizes 20KB-1.3GB; last major update Nov 2021. Predecessor/companion to 0038272.
verify_notes: World Subnational Boundaries public | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 世界银行的世界次国家级边界数据集提供全球范围的次国家级行政边界，并包含水文与海岸相关要素。数据以 ESRI 地理数据库、Shapefile、GeoJSON/TopoJSON 及 REST API 等多种形式公开提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。整套数据由 13 个文件组成，文件大小从约 20KB 到 1.3GB 不等，最近一次主要更新为 2021 年 11 月。它适用于全球及次国家级的发展、统计与空间分析。
desc_en: The World Bank's World Subnational Boundaries dataset provides subnational administrative boundaries worldwide, along with related hydrographic and coastal features. It is openly available in multiple formats including ESRI GeoDatabase, Shapefile, GeoJSON/TopoJSON, and a REST API, under a CC BY 4.0 license. The collection comprises 13 files ranging from about 20KB to 1.3GB, with its last major update in November 2021. It supports global and subnational development, statistical, and spatial analysis.

name: 中国村级行政区与居民点分布矢量 (gaohr.win 整理)
provider: 高华瑞 (gaohr.win) 个人维护, 数据来自天地图/民政区划
theme_raw: 村级居民点 / 行政边界 | admin_boundaries | 五级行政 + 村级居民点
coverage: 中国 (五级 至 村级)
license: unknown (个人聚合, 原始来自官方)
license_now: 分级共享: 省-乡免费, 村级需邮件申请
feature_count: 约70万行政村 (自然村约260万)
notes: 中文圈知名的村级矢量分发节点; 用于居住用地/居民点分析
verify_notes: 数据更新到 2023-06-30; 村级点需联系 gispie@163.com | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国村级行政区与居民点分布矢量由高华瑞（gaohr.win）个人整理维护，数据来自天地图与民政区划，覆盖中国五级行政区划直至村级，约 70 万个行政村（自然村约 260 万），更新至 2023 年。数据以 Shapefile 提供，采用分级共享方式：省至乡级免费，村级需邮件申请。它是中文圈知名的村级矢量分发节点，常用于居住用地与居民点的空间分析。
desc_en: This Chinese village-level administrative and settlement vector dataset is curated and maintained individually by Gao Huarui (gaohr.win), drawing on Tianditu and civil-affairs division data, covering China's five-level administrative hierarchy down to the village level, with roughly 700,000 administrative villages (and around 2.6 million natural villages), updated through 2023. Provided as Shapefile, it uses tiered sharing: province-to-township levels are free while village-level data require an email request. It is a well-known Chinese distribution node for village-level vectors, commonly used in residential land and settlement analysis.

name: 青藏高原流域边界数据集 (2016) / Tibetan Plateau River Basin Boundary
provider: Zhang Guoqing / 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 (TPDC)
theme_raw: watershed / basin boundary | 水文/流域边界 | Hydrology / basin boundaries
license: TPDC user agreement (free for research, attribution required)
notes: 包含 12 个子流域: Amu Darya, Brahmaputra, Ganges, Hexi, Indus, Inner, Mekong, Qaidam, Salween, Tarim, Yangtze, Yellow
verify_notes: TPDC SPA 页面需 JS, 站点活跃 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 青藏高原流域边界数据集（2016）由张国庆制作、国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，提供青藏高原区域的流域边界。数据以 Shapefile 形式提供，需注册后获取，遵循 TPDC 用户协议，包含阿姆河、雅鲁藏布江、恒河、印度河、湄公河、怒江、长江、黄河等 12 个子流域。它适用于青藏高原的水文、冰冻圈与水资源研究。
desc_en: The Tibetan Plateau River Basin Boundary dataset (2016), produced by Zhang Guoqing and published by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), provides river-basin boundaries for the Tibetan Plateau region. Distributed as Shapefile and available after registration under the TPDC user agreement, it includes 12 sub-basins such as the Amu Darya, Brahmaputra, Ganges, Indus, Mekong, Salween, Yangtze, and Yellow rivers. It supports hydrological, cryospheric, and water-resource research across the Tibetan Plateau.

name: 1:1,000,000 administrative boundary data of the Tibetan Plateau (2017)
theme_raw: Multi-level admin boundaries (national/province/city/county lines & polygons) | 区域行政边界
notes: Layers: National_Tibet_line, Province_Tibet, City_Tibet, County_Tibet_poly, County_Tibet_line
verify_notes: National Qinghai-Tibet Plateau Science Data Center; JS-heavy | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 青藏高原 1:100 万行政边界数据（2017）由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，提供青藏高原区域 2017 年的多级行政边界，比例尺为 1:100 万。数据以 Shapefile 形式提供，注册后免费获取，遵循 TPDC 自定义许可，包含国界线、省、市、县（面与线）等图层。它适合作为青藏高原各类专题研究的行政底图与空间参照。
desc_en: The 1:1,000,000 administrative boundary data of the Tibetan Plateau (2017), published by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), provides multi-level administrative boundaries for the Tibetan Plateau region at a 1:1,000,000 scale for 2017. Distributed as Shapefile and free after registration under a TPDC custom license, it includes layers for national borders, provinces, cities, and counties (both polygon and line). It serves as a useful administrative basemap and spatial reference for a wide range of Tibetan Plateau studies.

name: 2023 Cartographic Boundary File (SHP), State and Equivalent Entities, 1:500,000
theme_raw: generalized state boundaries | generalized county boundaries
verify_notes: HTTP 404 Not Found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 2023 年制图边界文件（州及等同实体，1:500,000）由美国人口普查局发布，提供美国 2023 年州及等同实体的概化边界，比例尺为 1:500,000。数据以 Shapefile 形式开放提供，属于美国公有领域。制图边界文件相较于 TIGER/Line 经过简化，更适合制图与可视化，常用于全国尺度的专题地图、统计展示与一般空间分析。
desc_en: The 2023 Cartographic Boundary File (state and equivalent entities, 1:500,000), published by the U.S. Census Bureau, provides generalized boundaries of US states and equivalent entities for 2023 at a 1:500,000 scale. It is openly available as a Shapefile and is in the US public domain. Cartographic boundary files are simplified relative to TIGER/Line, making them better suited to mapping and visualization, and are commonly used for national-scale thematic maps, statistical displays, and general spatial analysis.

name: adyliu/china_area
notes: 全国村级代码, 与其他几何源 join 常用
verify_notes: 原标注MIT,实际为GPL-3.0;最新release 2023-12(数据截至2023-06-30),2024年版本 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: adyliu/china_area 是 GitHub 上的中国五级行政区划代码数据集，覆盖省、市、县、镇、村五级，约 66.5 万个单元（31 省、343 市、3255 县、41351 镇、620572 村），更新至 2024 年。数据以 CSV/SQL 形式直接下载，采用 GPL-3.0 许可。它提供完整的村级行政代码，常用于与其他几何边界数据做属性连接，适合行政区划编码与数据整合工作。
desc_en: adyliu/china_area is a GitHub dataset of Chinese administrative division codes across five levels (province, city, county, town, and village), comprising about 665,000 units (31 provinces, 343 cities, 3,255 counties, 41,351 towns, and 620,572 villages), updated through 2024. Data are available for direct download as CSV/SQL under the GPL-3.0 license. Providing complete village-level administrative codes, it is commonly joined with other geometry sources by attribute and is well suited to administrative coding and data-integration work.

name: Arctic SDI Topographic Basemap (vector backing layers)
provider: National Land Survey of Finland (operator) + 8 Arctic NMAs
theme_raw: topography / hydrography / transport / admin | coastline + hydrography (Arctic)
notes: Common circumpolar basemap blending coastline, rivers, lakes, roads, admin boundaries from contributing NMAs.
verify_notes: lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic SDI）地形底图由芬兰国家土地测量局运营、8 个北极国家测绘机构（NMA）共同贡献，提供环北极地区的地形底图。数据融合各贡献机构的海岸线、河流、湖泊、道路和行政边界，通过 WMS、WMTS 服务提供（矢量瓦片在规划中），按各贡献机构条款开放使用。它是通用的环北极底图，适合北极区域的制图、监测与跨国空间分析。
desc_en: The Arctic SDI Topographic Basemap, operated by the National Land Survey of Finland with contributions from eight Arctic national mapping agencies (NMAs), provides a topographic basemap for the circumpolar Arctic. It blends coastline, rivers, lakes, roads, and administrative boundaries from the contributing agencies, served via WMS and WMTS (with vector tiles on the roadmap) and open under each contributor's terms. It serves as a common circumpolar basemap suited to Arctic mapping, monitoring, and cross-border spatial analysis.

name: ASGS Edition 3 (2021) Boundaries
notes: SA1-SA4, GCCSA, LGA, Mesh Blocks etc.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; data.gov.au blocks automated fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ASGS 第三版（2021）边界由澳大利亚统计局（ABS）发布，是澳大利亚统计地理标准的 2021 版边界，适用于 2021–2026 年。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoPackage 形式开放下载，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，包含 SA1–SA4、大首府城市统计区（GCCSA）、地方政府区（LGA）和网格块（Mesh Blocks）等多级单元。它是澳大利亚人口普查与统计制图的权威标准地理框架。
desc_en: The ASGS Edition 3 (2021) Boundaries, published by the Australian Bureau of Statistics, are the 2021 edition of the Australian Statistical Geography Standard, applicable for 2021-2026. Data are openly downloadable as Shapefile and GeoPackage under a CC-BY 4.0 license and include multiple levels such as SA1-SA4, Greater Capital City Statistical Areas (GCCSA), Local Government Areas (LGA), and Mesh Blocks. It is the authoritative standard geographic framework for Australian census and statistical mapping.

name: Australia's Administrative Boundaries (aggregate explorer)
notes: Aggregate application referencing ABS + Geoscape boundary layers
verify_notes: 404 Not Found - slug may have changed | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 这是澳大利亚数字地图集（Digital Atlas of Australia）提供的全国行政区划聚合应用，汇集了澳大利亚统计局（ABS）的统计边界与 Geoscape 的行政边界图层，覆盖澳大利亚全境。数据以 FeatureServer 服务和网络地图形式发布，适合用于行政区检索、统计制图与区域分析。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可证，开放访问，是查询和获取澳大利亚官方行政边界的权威入口。
desc_en: An aggregate boundary explorer from the Digital Atlas of Australia that brings together administrative and statistical boundary layers from the Australian Bureau of Statistics (ABS) and Geoscape, covering the whole of Australia. It is delivered as a FeatureServer service and web map, making it suitable for administrative lookups, statistical mapping and regional analysis. The data is openly accessible under CC BY 4.0, serving as an authoritative entry point to Australia's official administrative boundaries.

name: BKG Verwaltungsgebiete VG250 / VG5000
provider: Bundesamt für Kartographie und Geodäsie (BKG, Germany)
theme_raw: Bund, Länder, Kreise, Gemeinden | Administrative boundaries 1:250k (Bund/Länder/Kreise/Gemeinden)
notes: Historical VG250 versions back to 1997 at daten.gdz.bkg.bund.de/produkte/vg/.
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: VG250/VG5000 是德国联邦测绘局（BKG）发布的官方行政区划数据集，覆盖德国全境，包含从联邦州到乡镇各级行政边界，比例尺约为 1:250 万。数据每年更新（当前现势性为 2024 年 12 月 31 日），并提供可追溯至 1997 年的历史版本。提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GML 及 WFS 等多种格式，采用德国数据许可（署名版，兼容 CC BY 2.0），适合德国境内的行政分析、统计制图与时序研究。
desc_en: VG250/VG5000 are the official administrative boundary datasets published by Germany's Federal Agency for Cartography and Geodesy (BKG), covering all of Germany at scales around 1:250,000 and including all administrative levels from federal states down to municipalities. Updated annually (current reference 31 Dec 2024), with historical editions available back to 1997. It is offered in Shapefile, GeoPackage, GML and via WFS under the Data Licence Germany (attribution, CC BY 2.0 compatible), ideal for administrative analysis, statistical mapping and time-series studies within Germany.

name: Brazil Country Boundary (historical)
notes: Historical boundary series
verify_notes: Simplified vs original resolution | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 这是巴西国家边界的历史序列数据，源自巴西地理统计局（IBGE），通过 geobr 包（R/Python）提供。数据以矢量（sf）格式呈现，覆盖 1872 至 2025 年的历史国界变迁，适合研究巴西国土范围演变、历史地理与时序制图。geobr 仓库采用 MIT 许可，便于在科研与可视化工作流中直接调用。
desc_en: A historical time series of Brazil's national boundary derived from the Brazilian Institute of Geography and Statistics (IBGE) and served through the geobr package (R/Python). Provided as vector (sf) data spanning historical years from 1872 to 2025, it is well suited to studying the evolution of Brazil's territorial extent, historical geography and time-series cartography. The geobr repository is MIT-licensed, making it easy to call directly within research and visualisation workflows.

name: Brazil Legal Amazon
provider: MMA (Ministério do Meio Ambiente) via geobr
access: R/Python package geobr; backend GeoPackage on GitHub
notes: Boundary of the Legal Amazon administrative-environmental region.
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该数据集提供巴西「法定亚马孙」（Legal Amazon）区域的边界，原始来源为巴西环境部（MMA），通过 geobr 包分发。法定亚马孙是兼具行政与环境管理意义的特定区域，常用于森林砍伐监测、保护政策评估与区域统计分析。数据以 sf/GeoPandas（GeoPackage）格式提供，包采用 MIT 许可，后端 GeoPackage 托管于 GitHub，便于直接读取。
desc_en: This dataset provides the boundary of Brazil's Legal Amazon region, originally from the Ministry of the Environment (MMA) and distributed via the geobr package. The Legal Amazon is a defined administrative-environmental region frequently used for deforestation monitoring, conservation policy assessment and regional statistical analysis. The data is offered in sf/GeoPandas (GeoPackage) format, with the package MIT-licensed and the backend GeoPackage hosted on GitHub for direct access.

name: Brazil Municipalities
notes: Most-used product; matches IBGE municipal codes.
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 这是巴西约 5570 个市镇（municípios）的行政边界数据，来源于巴西地理统计局（IBGE），通过 geobr 包提供，并支持多个年份版本。其要素直接对应 IBGE 官方市镇代码，是 geobr 中使用最广泛的产品，广泛用于市级统计制图、社会经济分析与数据连接。以 GeoPackage/sf 格式分发，仓库采用 MIT 许可，便于科研调用。
desc_en: Administrative boundaries for Brazil's roughly 5,570 municipalities (municípios), sourced from the Brazilian Institute of Geography and Statistics (IBGE) and served through the geobr package across multiple years. Features map directly to official IBGE municipal codes, making it geobr's most widely used product for municipal-level statistical mapping, socioeconomic analysis and data joins. Distributed in GeoPackage/sf format under an MIT-licensed repository, it is convenient for research use.

name: CHGIS - China Historical GIS
theme_raw: admin_boundaries (historical Chinese dynasties) | historical Chinese admin units (Dynasties through 1911)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://chgis.fairbank.fas.harvard.edu/))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://chgis.fairbank.fas.harvard.edu/))
doi_or_citation: Bol & Berman, multiple data papers (CHGIS v1-v6)
notes: Authoritative for Chinese historical boundaries; >35k late Qing town/village points
verify_notes: Connection refused. Harvard CHGIS host appears down/migrated. Dataset typically now accessed via Harvard Dataverse. | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://chgis.fairbank.fas.harvard.edu/))
desc_zh: 中国历史地理信息系统（CHGIS）由哈佛费正清中心与复旦大学合作建设，是中国历史疆域研究的权威数据库，覆盖自公元前 221 年秦统一至 1911 年清末的行政区划、地名与政区点。数据包含逾 3.5 万个晚清城镇/村庄点位，以 Shapefile 和地理数据库格式提供，供免费学术使用（需注册）。它是历史地理、经济史与历史人口研究的基础性资源。
desc_en: The China Historical GIS (CHGIS), built jointly by Harvard's Fairbank Center and Fudan University, is an authoritative database for the study of China's historical territory, covering administrative boundaries, place names and settlement points from the Qin unification (221 BCE) through the end of the Qing in 1911 CE. It includes over 35,000 late-Qing town and village points and is provided as shapefiles and geodatabases for free academic use (registration required). It is a foundational resource for historical geography, economic history and historical demography.

name: CHGIS V6 中国历史地理信息系统数据
provider: 复旦大学历史地理研究中心 + Harvard Yenching
theme_raw: 历史行政区划(秦至清) | historical hydrography
license_now: 复旦大学历史地理研究中心版权所有(学术使用)
time_span: Qin unification through end of Qing; snapshot years 1820 & 1911
notes: 中文圈罕见英文 / 中文双语开源历史GIS;经济史与历史人口研究必备;Harvard镜像 https://chgis.fas.harvard.edu/
verify_notes: 页面显示为CHGIS V4而非V6,实际下载页面版本号需进一步确认 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CHGIS V6 是复旦大学历史地理研究中心与哈佛燕京学社合作发布的中国历史地理信息系统数据，覆盖中国历史疆域，包含行政区划、水系及历史人口社会经济等主题，提供 1820 年与 1911 年等断面年份。数据以 MapInfo Tab 和 Shapefile 格式直接下载，版权归复旦史地中心（限学术使用）。作为中文圈罕见的中英双语开源历史 GIS，是经济史与历史人口研究的必备资料。
desc_en: CHGIS V6 is the China Historical GIS dataset released by Fudan University's Center for Historical Geography together with Harvard-Yenching, covering China's historical territory across themes including administrative boundaries, hydrography and historical population and socioeconomics, with snapshot years such as 1820 and 1911. Distributed as direct downloads in MapInfo Tab and Shapefile formats, copyright is held by Fudan's center for academic use. As a rare bilingual open historical GIS for the Chinese-language world, it is essential for economic and historical-demographic research.

name: China National Boundary (country.shp)
provider: GaryBikini (community), source: Amap Web Services API
notes: Level-1 admin polygon; derived from Amap (Gaode) administrative district query API.
verify_notes: Subpath returns 404 via fetch but repo has folder '1. Country'; access via repo root | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 这是社区开发者 GaryBikini 整理的中国国界 Shapefile（country.shp），数据源自高德（Amap）行政区划查询 API，提供 WGS84 与 GCJ-02 两种坐标系下的国家级行政多边形。当前版本为 v24.02.06（2024 年 2 月 6 日），采用 MIT 许可，可通过 GitHub 直接下载并有 Zenodo 镜像（DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.10624971）。适合作为中国地图的国界底图用于可视化与制图。
desc_en: A community-maintained Shapefile of China's national boundary (country.shp) compiled by GaryBikini, derived from the Amap (Gaode) administrative-district query API and provided as a level-1 polygon in both WGS84 and GCJ-02 coordinate systems. The current version is v24.02.06 (6 Feb 2024), MIT-licensed, available for direct download from GitHub with a Zenodo mirror (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.10624971). It is suitable as a national outline basemap for visualisation and cartography of China.

name: ChinaGeoJson - City-level Boundaries (prefecture)
theme_raw: administrative boundaries (prefecture/city) | administrative boundary - prefecture city
notes: Polygons keyed by 6-digit adcode.
verify_notes: Folder name actually 'citys/' at repo root | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: ChinaGeoJson 是 zhChuXiao 维护的中国行政区划数据集，此部分提供全国地级市（prefecture）级别的边界多边形，源自阿里巴巴 DataV.GeoAtlas。数据以 GeoJSON 格式按 6 位行政区划代码（adcode）组织，可逐市直接下载，采用 MIT 许可。它是 Web 地图开发中常用的中国地级行政边界资源。
desc_en: ChinaGeoJson, maintained by zhChuXiao, is a dataset of Chinese administrative divisions; this portion provides boundary polygons for all prefecture-level cities, mirrored from Alibaba's DataV.GeoAtlas. The data is organised in GeoJSON keyed by 6-digit administrative codes (adcode), downloadable per city under an MIT licence. It is a commonly used resource for prefecture-level Chinese administrative boundaries in web mapping development.

name: CnOpenData 中国行政区划shp数据(2013-2023年)
theme_raw: 历年省/市/县级行政矢量 | 行政统计单元-省/市/县/国界/九段线
license: 学术免费/商用付费(平台许可)
license_now: Not explicit on page (academic free / commercial paid per platform)
notes: 罕见的多年历史时序行政区划(年度切片) - 经济计量做panel数据时极有用;基于2022国家基础地理信息,辅以高德/天地图;民政部口径
verify_notes: Catalog page active; license details on individual dataset pages | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CnOpenData（锐多宝）提供的中国行政区划 Shapefile 数据，覆盖中国大陆并含九段线，提供 2013 至 2023 年的逐年历史时序切片。数据基于 2022 国家基础地理信息，辅以高德/天地图，采用民政部行政区划口径。作为少见的多年度行政区划年度序列，它在经济计量研究构建面板数据时尤为有用。需注册访问，页面未明示统一许可（平台通常学术免费、商用付费）。
desc_en: A Shapefile dataset of Chinese administrative divisions from CnOpenData, covering mainland China including the nine-dash line and offering annual historical slices from 2013 to 2023. It is based on the 2022 national base geographic information, supplemented by Amap and Tianditu, and follows the Ministry of Civil Affairs' administrative-division definitions. As a rare multi-year annual series of administrative divisions, it is especially valuable for building panel data in econometric research. Access requires registration, and the page does not state a single explicit licence (typically free for academic, paid for commercial use).

name: Dataforsyningen (Danish Agency for Climate Data) GeoDanmark / FOT vectors
theme_raw: Topographic vectors: coastline, hydrography, admin, buildings | topography, coastline, hydrography
notes: Danish kingdom contribution to Arctic SDI.
verify_notes: URL rejected by edge firewall; site exists at root domain | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Dataforsyningen 是丹麦气候数据局的官方地理空间数据门户，提供 GeoDanmark/FOT 矢量数据，覆盖丹麦本土，并通过合作方延伸至法罗群岛与格陵兰，涵盖行政边界、建筑与地址、水系等主题。数据以 GML、Shapefile、GeoPackage 格式提供，并支持 WFS 与下载，采用 Open Data DK 开放许可。它也是丹麦王国对北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic SDI）的贡献。
desc_en: Dataforsyningen is the official geospatial data portal of the Danish Agency for Climate Data, providing GeoDanmark/FOT vector data covering Denmark and, via partners, the Faroe Islands and Greenland, across themes including administrative boundaries, buildings and addresses, and hydrography. Data is available in GML, Shapefile and GeoPackage, served through WFS and download under the Open Data DK licence. It also represents the Danish Kingdom's contribution to the Arctic Spatial Data Infrastructure.

name: Datahub — World Cities (core/world-cities)
feature_count: major cities with population above 15,000 (sourced from Geonames cities15000)
notes: Related Datahub reference layer in the same `core` collection as airport-codes
verify_notes: cities >15k population | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Datahub.io 核心数据集合中的世界城市数据，源自 GeoNames，收录全球人口超过 1.5 万的城市及其经纬度坐标。数据以 CSV 格式提供（可转换为点矢量），体量约 1.32 MB，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可（需署名 GeoNames）。它是一个轻量、便捷的全球城市参考图层，常用于快速制图、地理编码与教学示例。
desc_en: Part of Datahub.io's core data collection, this world-cities dataset is derived from GeoNames and lists cities worldwide with populations above 15,000 along with their latitude and longitude. Provided as a roughly 1.32 MB CSV (convertible to point vector) under CC BY 4.0 with GeoNames attribution, it serves as a lightweight, convenient global city reference layer commonly used for quick mapping, geocoding and teaching examples.

name: DOSE - Database Of Sub-national Economic Output (with shapefiles)
provider: MCC + PIK Potsdam (Wenz, Levermann, et al.)
theme_raw: admin_boundaries (ADM1) with GRP/GVA series | Subnational administrative boundaries harmonised to reported GDP regions
doi_or_citation: Wenz et al. 2023, Scientific Data, doi:10.1038/s41597-023-02323-8 ; data doi:10.5281/zenodo.7573249
notes: Includes harmonised polygons for 8 countries where GADM 3.6 is unsuitable; cleanly joins to GADM ADM1 for remainder
verify_notes: DOSE V2 published Jan 2023, last update Jul 2023. Notice indicates newer version exists on Zenodo. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: DOSE（次国家经济产出数据库）由 MCC 与波茨坦气候影响研究所（PIK）的 Wenz、Levermann 等人构建，整合了 83 个国家、1661 个一级行政区（ADM1）约 1960–2020 年的经济产出数据，并附带配套边界多边形。数据以 GeoPackage 和 CSV 提供（约 350 MB），采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，发表于《Scientific Data》（doi:10.1038/s41597-023-02323-8）。其边界对 8 个 GADM 3.6 不适用的国家做了协调处理，其余可干净对接 GADM ADM1，适合气候经济与区域发展研究。
desc_en: DOSE (Database Of Sub-national Economic Output), built by Wenz, Levermann and colleagues at MCC and PIK Potsdam, compiles economic output data for 1,661 ADM1 regions across 83 countries spanning roughly 1960–2020, accompanied by matching boundary polygons. The data is provided as GeoPackage and CSV (about 350 MB) under CC BY 4.0 and published in Scientific Data (doi:10.1038/s41597-023-02323-8). It includes harmonised polygons for eight countries where GADM 3.6 is unsuitable and joins cleanly to GADM ADM1 elsewhere, making it well suited to climate-economics and regional-development research.

name: e-Stat Statistical Geographic Information System (chōchō/aza & basic unit boundaries)
theme_raw: Census small-area boundaries: 町丁・字, 基本単位区, DID (densely inhabited districts), mesh statistics | Japanese census small-area boundaries
license: Government of Japan Standard Terms of Use (CC-BY-compatible)
license_now: Government of Japan Standard Terms of Use (CC BY compatible)
notes: ROIS-DS CODH 'Geoshape' mirror provides processed/cleaned versions for academic use.
verify_notes: jSTAT MAP boundary data downloads available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: e-Stat 统计地理信息系统由日本总务省统计局运营，提供日本的小地域（町丁・字）及基本单元统计边界，覆盖日本全境，并关联人口与社会经济统计。数据以 Shapefile、KML、GeoPackage 等格式直接下载，遵循日本政府标准使用条款（与 CC BY 兼容）。ROIS-DS CODH 的「Geoshape」镜像还提供经清洗处理的学术版本，是日本细粒度统计制图与空间分析的核心数据源。
desc_en: The e-Stat Statistical GIS, operated by Japan's Statistics Bureau, provides small-area (chōchō/aza) and basic-unit statistical boundaries covering all of Japan, linked to population and socioeconomic statistics. Data is available for direct download in Shapefile, KML and GeoPackage under the Government of Japan Standard Terms of Use (CC BY compatible). The ROIS-DS CODH 'Geoshape' mirror additionally offers cleaned, processed versions for academic use, making this a core source for fine-grained statistical mapping and spatial analysis in Japan.

name: election-geodata (nvkelso)
theme_raw: US precinct boundaries + election results | Election precinct boundaries + results
notes: National precinct file in shp and gpkg; multi-year coverage
verify_notes: Active repo, national files via S3 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: election-geodata 是由 Nathaniel Kelso 等人维护的社区项目，汇集美国各州选区（precinct）的地理边界，覆盖约 2008–2018 年间多个选举年份。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 GeoJSON 提供，包含全国合并的选区文件，可从 GitHub 下载。该项目无正式许可证，建议使用时署名，适合选举地理、政治学与投票模式空间分析。
desc_en: election-geodata, maintained by Nathaniel Kelso and others, is a community project assembling geographic boundaries of U.S. statewide voting precincts across multiple election years from roughly 2008 to 2018. The data is provided in Shapefile, GeoPackage and GeoJSON, including a national merged precinct file downloadable from GitHub. The project carries no formal licence and attribution is recommended; it suits electoral geography, political science and spatial analysis of voting patterns.

name: EuroGlobalMap (Open Maps for Europe)
theme_raw: Topographic reference | Annex I: Administrative Units, Hydrography, Transport Networks, Geographical Names
license: Open Maps for Europe licence (free re-use)
notes: 1:1M pan-European topographic vector dataset.
verify_notes: EuroGeographics dataset page loads; content sparse | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EuroGlobalMap 由 EuroGeographics（欧洲各国国家测绘机构联盟）通过 Open Maps for Europe 平台发布，是一套 1:100 万比例尺的泛欧地形矢量数据，覆盖约 45 个欧洲国家，涵盖行政边界、交通与水系等要素。数据以 GeoPackage、Shapefile 提供，并支持 WFS/WMS/WMTS 服务，开放下载。它适合泛欧尺度的小比例尺制图、跨境分析与背景底图制作。
desc_en: EuroGlobalMap, published by EuroGeographics through the Open Maps for Europe platform, is a 1:1,000,000-scale pan-European topographic vector dataset covering roughly 45 European countries with administrative boundaries, transport and hydrography. It is available in GeoPackage and Shapefile and via WFS/WMS/WMTS services as an open download. The dataset suits small-scale pan-European cartography, cross-border analysis and background basemaps.

name: FAO GAUL 500m Simplified Level 1
theme_raw: Simplified province-level admin boundaries | Country boundaries (simplified)
notes: 500m-simplified version, faster for global-scale ops than full GAUL.
verify_notes: GEE catalog | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是联合国粮农组织（FAO）全球行政单元图层（GAUL）的 500 米简化版一级行政区数据，覆盖全球，基准年为 2015 年，在 Google Earth Engine 中以 FeatureCollection 形式提供。相比完整版 GAUL，简化几何在全球尺度运算中更快、更轻量。采用 FAO GAUL 非商业许可，适合全球或区域尺度的一级行政区统计汇总与快速制图。
desc_en: This is the 500 m simplified Level-1 administrative dataset of the FAO Global Administrative Unit Layers (GAUL), covering the globe with a 2015 reference year and provided as a FeatureCollection in Google Earth Engine. Compared with full GAUL, its simplified geometry is faster and lighter for global-scale operations. Distributed under the FAO GAUL non-commercial licence, it suits first-level administrative statistical aggregation and rapid mapping at global or regional scales.

name: fiboa — Field Boundaries for Agriculture (multi-country GeoParquet)
theme_raw: Agricultural parcels / field boundaries | agricultural field boundaries (50+ country/region collections)
coverage: AT, DE, DK, FI, FR, LV, NL, SI, US, ...
notes: Cold, non-English-world heavy. Best single registry of national parcel datasets unified to a common schema.
verify_notes: 55 datasets listed as of 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: fiboa（农业田块边界）是由 fiboa 社区与 Taylor Geospatial Engine 主导的开放项目，将多个国家的农业地块/田块边界统一到共同的 fiboa 模式（schema），覆盖奥地利、德国、丹麦、芬兰、法国、拉脱维亚、荷兰、斯洛文尼亚、美国等。数据以 GeoParquet 格式并结合 STAC 提供，托管于 source.coop，许可证为 CC-BY-4.0/CC0/CC-BY-NC 混合。作为目前统一各国地块数据的最佳单一登记处，它对农业遥感与地块级分析很有价值。
desc_en: fiboa (Field Boundaries for Agriculture) is an open project led by the fiboa community and the Taylor Geospatial Engine that unifies agricultural parcel/field boundaries from many countries into a common fiboa schema, covering Austria, Germany, Denmark, Finland, France, Latvia, the Netherlands, Slovenia, the US and more. The data is provided as GeoParquet alongside STAC, hosted on source.coop under a mix of CC-BY-4.0/CC0/CC-BY-NC licences. As the best single registry harmonising national parcel datasets, it is valuable for agricultural remote sensing and field-level analysis.

name: Foundation Spatial Data Framework - Administrative Boundaries theme
lychee_text: Network error: HTTP/2 protocol error. Server may not support HTTP/2 properly (error sending request for url (https://www.anzlic.gov.au/resources/foundation-spatial-data-framework/fsdf-themes-datasets/administrative-boundaries))

desc_zh: 这是 ANZLIC 基础空间数据框架（FSDF）下的「行政边界」主题页，覆盖澳大利亚与新西兰，作为联邦化元数据入口指向各州/属地的行政边界服务（如 NSW Spatial Services、Vicmap、QSpatial、Landgate WA 等）。数据通过各管理方以 WFS、WMS 和 Shapefile 形式提供，许可证因来源而异（多为 CC BY 4.0），整体开放访问，是检索澳新各级行政边界权威服务的导航枢纽。
desc_en: This is the Administrative Boundaries theme page under ANZLIC's Foundation Spatial Data Framework (FSDF), covering Australia and New Zealand and acting as a federated metadata hub pointing to state and territory boundary services (such as NSW Spatial Services, Vicmap, QSpatial and Landgate WA). Data is provided by each custodian via WFS, WMS and Shapefile, with licences varying by source (mostly CC BY 4.0) and generally open access, serving as a navigation hub to authoritative administrative boundary services across Australia and New Zealand.

name: GaoHR 全国精细道路网矢量数据集 (公路/铁路)
theme_raw: 交通 - 公路+铁路 | 交通 - 铁路 (含车站点)
license: "交换共享"，需邮件获取下载码 (gispie@163.com)
notes: 中文 GIS 圈知名个人整理；铁路集见 http://gaohr.win/site/blogs/2019/2019-10-16-china-railway.html ；附属 30m DEM、五级行政区划等
verify_notes: China road network vector | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是中文 GIS 圈知名个人 GaoHR 整理的全国精细道路网矢量数据集，覆盖中国全境的公路与铁路，提供 1:100 万（2015）、1:25 万（2019）及基于 OSM（2017/2019/2020）的多版本，采用 CGCS2000/WGS84 坐标的 Shapefile 格式。资源还附带 30 米 DEM、五级行政区划等数据，铁路集另有单独页面。采用交换共享方式（需密码注册），适合中国交通网络制图与可达性分析。
desc_en: A finely detailed national road network vector dataset compiled by GaoHR, a well-known individual in the Chinese GIS community, covering highways and railways across China. It offers multiple versions at 1:1,000,000 (2015), 1:250,000 (2019) and OSM-based editions (2017/2019/2020) as Shapefiles in CGCS2000/WGS84, and is bundled with a 30 m DEM and five-level administrative divisions. Distributed on an exchange-sharing basis (password/registration required), it suits transport network mapping and accessibility analysis for China.

name: GAUL 2024 Level 1 shapefile (direct download)
theme_raw: Subnational admin L1 | Subnational admin L2
verify_notes: download accessible (response exceeded fetch size limit, confirming large binary) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是联合国粮农组织（FAO）全球行政单元图层（GAUL）2024 版一级行政区的直接下载包，覆盖全球，基准年为 2024 年，以打包 Shapefile（zip）形式提供。GAUL 是 FAO 维护的全球标准行政边界数据集，被广泛用于全球与区域尺度的统计汇总和制图。本资源采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，通过 HTTPS 直接下载。
desc_en: A direct-download package of FAO's Global Administrative Unit Layers (GAUL) 2024 edition at Level 1, covering the globe with a 2024 reference year and provided as a zipped Shapefile. GAUL is FAO's standard global administrative boundary dataset, widely used for statistical aggregation and mapping at global and regional scales. This resource is licensed under CC BY 4.0 and available via direct HTTPS download.

name: GDL Subnational HDI Shapefiles (GDL Regions)
provider: Global Data Lab, Radboud University (Smits & Permanyer)
theme_raw: subnational administrative boundaries for HDI/SHDI/SGDI reporting | Subnational HDI + dimension indices for ~1,800 regions
coverage: ~1625 subnational regions in 161 countries, global LMIC focus, 1990-present
license: Free use with attribution / registration required
notes: Primary boundary layer accompanying the Subnational HDI database; GDL-Codes join key to SHDI/SGDI tabular data.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GDL 次国家 HDI 边界数据（GDL Regions）由拉德堡德大学全球数据实验室（Global Data Lab，Smits & Permanyer）发布，覆盖 161 个国家约 1625 个次国家区域，以中低收入国家为重点，时间跨度自 1990 年至今。数据以 Shapefile 提供（当前 v6.4，2025），需免费注册下载。它是次国家人类发展指数（SHDI/SGDI）数据库的配套边界图层，通过 GDL-Codes 与表格数据连接，发表于《Scientific Data》（doi:10.1038/sdata.2019.38）。
desc_en: The GDL Subnational HDI boundary data (GDL Regions), published by the Global Data Lab at Radboud University (Smits & Permanyer), covers roughly 1,625 subnational regions across 161 countries with a low- and middle-income focus, spanning 1990 to the present. It is provided as Shapefiles (currently v6.4, 2025) with free registration required. As the companion boundary layer to the Subnational HDI (SHDI/SGDI) database, it joins to tabular data via GDL-Codes and is documented in Scientific Data (doi:10.1038/sdata.2019.38).

name: geo-boundaries-world-110m
theme_raw: World admin0 boundaries | World country boundary polygons at 1:110m
notes: Deprecated but data still available
verify_notes: DEPRECATED - migrate to datasets/geo-countries | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: geo-boundaries-world-110m 是基于 Natural Earth 的全球国家边界数据，比例尺为 1:1.1 亿，由 datasets.io 打包，以 GeoJSON 和 TopoJSON 格式通过 GitHub 直接提供。作为 Natural Earth 数据，处于公有领域（Public Domain），可自由使用。尽管该仓库已被弃用，数据仍可获取，适合作为全球小比例尺底图用于概览制图与 Web 可视化。
desc_en: geo-boundaries-world-110m provides global country boundaries derived from Natural Earth at 1:110 million scale, packaged by datasets.io and available directly from GitHub in GeoJSON and TopoJSON. As Natural Earth data, it is in the public domain and free to use. Although the repository is deprecated, the data remains available and is well suited as a global small-scale basemap for overview cartography and web visualisation.

name: geojson.cn / China-GeoJSON 行政区划矢量
coverage: China — national / province / city / county / 街道 (selected)
notes: Frequently joined to modood adcode lookup for web mapping.
verify_notes: Site functional; Zhejiang ICP filing; license not explicit on home | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: geojson.cn 是基于天地图派生的中国行政区划矢量数据集，覆盖中国的国家、省、市、县及部分街道层级，以 GeoJSON 和 TopoJSON 格式开放直接下载（当前为 2025 年版本，审图号 GS(2024)0650）。数据常与 modood 的 adcode 代码表配合用于 Web 地图开发，是中文前端可视化中常用的行政边界资源。
desc_en: geojson.cn is a vector dataset of Chinese administrative divisions derived from Tianditu, covering national, provincial, city, county and selected sub-district (街道) levels, available as open direct downloads in GeoJSON and TopoJSON (current 2025 edition, map review number GS(2024)0650). The data is frequently paired with modood's adcode lookup for web mapping and is a commonly used administrative boundary resource for Chinese front-end visualisation.

name: GISCO Communes 2016
theme_raw: Communes (legacy local administrative units, pre-LAU) | municipal boundaries
notes: Historical communes layer — superseded by LAU but valuable for time-series analysis pre-2011.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GISCO Communes 2016 由欧盟统计局（Eurostat）的 GISCO 提供，是欧洲市镇（communes）级行政边界数据，含 2001 至 2016 年间多个版本。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GeoPackage 和 TopoJSON 多格式通过 HTTPS 批量下载，遵循 Eurostat/GISCO 下载条款。该历史市镇图层虽已被 LAU 取代，但对 2011 年之前的时序分析仍具价值。
desc_en: GISCO Communes 2016, provided by Eurostat's GISCO, is a commune-level administrative boundary dataset for Europe with multiple editions from 2001 to 2016. It is available for bulk HTTPS download in Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage and TopoJSON under Eurostat/GISCO download provisions. Although this historical commune layer has been superseded by LAU, it remains valuable for pre-2011 time-series analysis.

license: Mixed — per-country terms; see release notes
notes: Partial-coverage product; one of the few open multi-country postal-area vector layers.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GISCO 邮政编码 2025（PCODE）由欧盟统计局 GISCO 发布，提供部分欧盟国家的邮政编码区域矢量，覆盖国家随版本而异（含 2020、2024、2025 版）。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GeoPackage 和 CSV 通过 HTTPS 批量下载，遵循 Eurostat/GISCO 下载条款。作为少数开放的多国邮政区域矢量产品之一，它适合邮编级别的空间分析与地理编码，但覆盖范围为部分国家。
desc_en: GISCO Postal Codes 2025 (PCODE), released by Eurostat's GISCO, provides postal-code area vectors for selected EU countries, with coverage varying by edition (2020, 2024 and 2025). It is available for bulk HTTPS download in Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage and CSV under Eurostat/GISCO download provisions. As one of the few open multi-country postal-area vector layers, it suits postal-code-level spatial analysis and geocoding, though coverage is partial.

name: Global Oil & Gas Plant Tracker / Gas Pipeline Tracker
theme_raw: Gas/oil pipelines and plants (line + point vectors) — BRI transboundary energy infrastructure | 管线 - 油气管线网 (运输周边)
license_now: 未声明开放许可证（仅 © 2026 GEM All Rights Reserved）
formats_now: 交互地图、Google Sheets 摘要、可下载数据集
feature_count: 4,158 pipelines tracked; 1,207 LNG terminal projects; 1.5 million km of combined pipeline length
notes: Cross-border BRI transport-of-energy vector layers (pipelines).
verify_notes: 页面活跃，2025-11/12 更新；P4 标 CC-BY-4.0 但当前页面仅版权声明，无显式开放许可 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球油气基础设施追踪器由全球能源监测（Global Energy Monitor，GEM）维护，覆盖全球范围的油气管道与 LNG 终端等设施，追踪约 4158 条管道、1207 个 LNG 终端项目，合计约 150 万公里管道长度（数据发布于 2025 年 9–12 月）。数据以含坐标的 GeoJSON、KML 和 CSV 提供，通过表单开放获取。其跨境能源运输矢量图层适合能源地理、基础设施与「一带一路」相关研究。资源未声明开放许可证（仅标注 GEM 版权）。
desc_en: The Global Oil & Gas Infrastructure Tracker, maintained by Global Energy Monitor (GEM), covers oil and gas pipelines and LNG terminals worldwide, tracking roughly 4,158 pipelines, 1,207 LNG terminal projects and about 1.5 million km of combined pipeline length (data released Sep–Dec 2025). It is provided as GeoJSON, KML and CSV with coordinates, accessible via form. Its cross-border energy-transport vector layers suit energy geography, infrastructure and Belt-and-Road research. The resource carries no stated open licence (only a GEM copyright notice).

name: Global Urban Boundaries (GUB) v1
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Transportation | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: global urban boundary polygons | urban physical boundaries
notes: Companion global city polygon vector used in many street-block studies.
verify_notes: TLS certificate hostname mismatch on https upgrade | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球城市边界（Global Urban Boundaries，GUB）v1 由清华大学（Li 等，2020）基于 GAIA 30 米不透水面数据生产，提供 1985–2018 年的全球城市轮廓多边形，覆盖全球。数据以 Shapefile 提供，通过鹏城实验室 StarCloud 平台直接下载，供开放/学术使用。作为配套的全球城市多边形矢量，它被广泛用于城市扩张、街区与城市形态研究（doi: Li et al. 2020, Sci. Bull.）。
desc_en: Global Urban Boundaries (GUB) v1, produced by Tsinghua University (Li et al. 2020) from the 30 m GAIA impervious-surface dataset, provides global city outline polygons for 1985–2018 with global coverage. The data is available as Shapefiles via direct download from the PCL StarCloud platform for open/academic use. As a companion global city-polygon vector, it is widely used in research on urban expansion, street blocks and urban form (Li et al. 2020, Sci. Bull.).

name: GPWv3/v4 Subnational Administrative Boundaries
notes: Referenced as comparator; coarser geometry and outdated vintages.
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout; SEDAC migrated to NASA EarthData in 2024 - URL may be deprecated | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GPWv3/v4 次国家行政边界数据由哥伦比亚大学 CIESIN（NASA SEDAC）发布，提供全球次国家级行政边界，并与人口及社会经济数据关联。数据以 Shapefile 提供，需 SEDAC 登录免费下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该图层常作为全球人口栅格（GPW）的配套与对比基准，但几何较粗、版本年份较旧，适合全球尺度人口与社会经济分析参考。
desc_en: The GPWv3/v4 Subnational Administrative Boundaries dataset, published by Columbia University's CIESIN (NASA SEDAC), provides global subnational administrative boundaries linked to population and socioeconomic data. It is available as Shapefiles via free download with a SEDAC login under CC BY 4.0. The layer often serves as a companion and comparator to the Gridded Population of the World (GPW), though its geometry is coarser and vintages are older, making it a reference for global-scale population and socioeconomic analysis.

name: GRDC Major River Basins of the World / WMO Basins & Sub-Basins
provider: Global Runoff Data Centre, BfG (under WMO)
theme_raw: Major river basins, networks | Major river basin boundaries
license: Free for non-commercial use with citation
license_now: Public use with citation; incorporates HydroSHEDS
notes: Authoritative WMO-blessed basin polygons; subset selection in web GUI.
verify_notes: Active; last updated 2026-06-02 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GRDC 全球主要流域 / WMO 流域与子流域数据由全球径流数据中心（GRDC，隶属德国联邦水文研究所 BfG，受 WMO 支持）发布，覆盖全球 520 个主要河流流域及 983 条命名河流，为 2020 年第二修订版（取代 2007 版）。数据以 Shapefile（约 117 MB）和 GeoJSON（约 130 MB）直接下载，并整合了 HydroSHEDS 成果，供注明引用的公共使用。作为 WMO 认可的权威流域多边形，它支持 Web 界面子集选择，适合水文与水资源分析。
desc_en: The GRDC Major River Basins of the World / WMO Basins & Sub-Basins dataset, published by the Global Runoff Data Centre (GRDC, at Germany's BfG under the WMO), covers 520 major river basins and 983 named rivers worldwide as the second revised edition of 2020 (replacing 2007). It is available for direct download as Shapefiles (~117 MB) and GeoJSON (~130 MB), incorporates HydroSHEDS, and is for public use with citation. As authoritative, WMO-endorsed basin polygons with web-based subset selection, it suits hydrological and water-resources analysis.

name: GSI vector-tile-experiment
theme_raw: vector tile provision experiment (general basic-map layers) | general national basemap vectors (admin boundaries, transport, hydrography, buildings)
license_now: GSI Content Terms of Use (no SPDX license)
access: Public repo with tile URLs and HTML demos
notes: Original GSI vector tile experiment; precursor to optimal_bvmap and gsimaps-vector-experiment.
verify_notes: Experimental, URLs/structure may change | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GSI 矢量瓦片实验项目由日本国土地理院（GSI）发布，覆盖日本，包含行政边界、建筑与地址、交通等要素，以矢量瓦片（MVT/GeoJSON）形式提供，仓库内附瓦片 URL 与 HTML 演示。数据时间约自 2014 年 8 月至 2017 年，遵循 GSI 内容使用条款（无 SPDX 许可标识）。作为 GSI 最初的矢量瓦片实验，它是后续 optimal_bvmap 与 gsimaps-vector-experiment 的前身。
desc_en: The GSI vector-tile-experiment, published by the Geospatial Information Authority of Japan (GSI), covers Japan with administrative boundaries, buildings and addresses, and transport, provided as vector tiles (MVT/GeoJSON) with tile URLs and HTML demos in the repository. The data spans roughly August 2014 through 2017 under the GSI Content Terms of Use (no SPDX licence). As GSI's original vector-tile experiment, it is the precursor to the later optimal_bvmap and gsimaps-vector-experiment efforts.

name: IGADC 行政区划主题集 (filter d101)
theme_raw: 行政区划集合入口 | 行政区划主题集合
notes: 主题集合页, 进入可枚举所有省/市/县/跨境 admin 矢量
verify_notes: Page not found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 这是 IGADC 平台的行政区划主题集（筛选 d101），覆盖东北亚地区（中国、俄罗斯、蒙古、朝鲜、日本），主要以 Shapefile 形式提供省、市、县及跨境的行政边界矢量。该页面为主题集合入口，进入后可枚举各级行政矢量数据，需申请共享获取。适合东北亚区域的跨境行政分析与制图。
desc_en: This is the administrative-divisions theme collection on the IGADC platform (filter d101), covering Northeast Asia (China, Russia, Mongolia, North Korea and Japan) and providing province-, city-, county-level and cross-border administrative boundary vectors primarily as Shapefiles. The page serves as a thematic entry point from which the full set of administrative vectors can be enumerated, with access via shared-application request. It suits cross-border administrative analysis and mapping across Northeast Asia.

name: IGN ADMIN EXPRESS / COG
provider: Institut National de l'Information Géographique et Forestière (France)
theme_raw: communes, arrondissements, départements, régions, EPCI, cantons | communes, EPCI, cantons, départements, régions
notes: ADMIN EXPRESS COG includes the official Code Officiel Géographique; mirror on data.gouv.fr.
verify_notes: geoservices.ign.fr migrated to cartes.gouv.fr portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ADMIN EXPRESS / COG 由法国国家地理与森林信息研究所（IGN）发布，提供法国本土及海外省（DROM）的官方行政边界，涵盖从大区到市镇各级。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON、TopoJSON 及 GeoParquet 多种格式直接下载，采用开放许可 2.0（Licence Ouverte 2.0）。其中 ADMIN EXPRESS COG 版本包含官方地理代码（Code Officiel Géographique），并在 data.gouv.fr 提供镜像，是法国行政分析与统计连接的权威数据。
desc_en: ADMIN EXPRESS / COG, published by France's National Institute of Geographic and Forest Information (IGN), provides official administrative boundaries for metropolitan France and the overseas departments (DROM) across all levels from regions to municipalities. It is available for direct download in Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON, TopoJSON and GeoParquet under the Licence Ouverte 2.0. The ADMIN EXPRESS COG variant includes the official geographic code (Code Officiel Géographique) and is mirrored on data.gouv.fr, making it authoritative for administrative analysis and statistical joins in France.

name: INSPIRE WFS Download Service for Cadastral Parcels Extended (CPX) - Czech Republic
provider: ČÚZK - Czech Office for Surveying, Mapping and Cadastre
license_now: No limitations to public access; CUZK conditions
notes: Full national cadastre parcels, boundaries, easements, geodetic points - rich Annex I vector dataset.
verify_notes: Metadata updated 2025-10-23; service endpoint at services.cuzk.gov.cz | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是捷克测绘与地籍局（ČÚZK）提供的 INSPIRE 地籍地块扩展（CPX）WFS 下载服务，覆盖捷克全境约 75913 平方公里（占国土约 96.25%），含完整的国家地籍地块、边界、地役权与大地测量点等丰富的 INSPIRE 附录 I 矢量数据。数据以 WFS 2.0.0 和 GML 3.2.1 提供，开放的 WFS 端点免费访问，无公众访问限制（遵循 ČÚZK 条款），适合地籍与产权层面的精细空间分析。
desc_en: This is the INSPIRE WFS download service for Cadastral Parcels Extended (CPX) provided by the Czech Office for Surveying, Mapping and Cadastre (ČÚZK), covering about 75,913 km² of the Czech Republic (roughly 96.25% of its territory) with full national cadastral parcels, boundaries, easements and geodetic points as a rich INSPIRE Annex I vector dataset. The data is served via WFS 2.0.0 and GML 3.2.1 through a free, open WFS endpoint with no limitations to public access (subject to ČÚZK conditions), suiting detailed cadastral and property-level spatial analysis.

name: Marine Regions - Maritime Boundaries & EEZ (VLIZ)
theme_raw: EEZ / 海洋边界 | maritime boundaries, EEZs, territorial seas, IHO sea areas
formats_now: GIS layers (polylines, polygons) - format detail on Downloads page
doi_or_citation: Flanders Marine Institute (2023). Maritime Boundaries Geodatabase, v12. https://doi.org/10.14284/632
notes: 事实上的全球 EEZ 标准矢量；被 ESSD/Scientific Data 论文反复引用作为底图；同步发布 12NM、24NM、内水、joint regimes、disputed areas。
verify_notes: VLIZ open-source project | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Marine Regions 的海洋边界与专属经济区（EEZ）数据由佛兰德海洋研究所（VLIZ）维护，覆盖全球，是事实上的全球 EEZ 标准矢量，常被 ESSD/Scientific Data 等期刊论文反复引用作为底图。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 WFS 提供，并同步发布 12 海里、24 海里、内水、联合管辖区与争议区等图层，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可（Maritime Boundaries Geodatabase v12，doi:10.14284/632）。适合海洋空间规划、海事与海岸研究。
desc_en: Marine Regions' Maritime Boundaries & EEZ dataset, maintained by the Flanders Marine Institute (VLIZ), covers the globe and is the de facto standard global EEZ vector, repeatedly cited as a basemap in ESSD/Scientific Data papers. It is provided as Shapefile, GeoPackage and WFS, and also publishes 12 NM, 24 NM, internal waters, joint regimes and disputed areas layers under CC BY 4.0 (Maritime Boundaries Geodatabase v12, doi:10.14284/632). It suits marine spatial planning, maritime and coastal research.

name: MPIDR Population History GIS Collection / Mosaic Historical GIS
provider: Max Planck Institute for Demographic Research / IPUMS Mosaic
theme_raw: admin_boundaries (historical Europe) | historical European admin boundaries 1900-2003
coverage: European states 1900/1930/1960/1990/2003 plus country specials (German Empire, Austro-Hungary, Poland 1770/1897/1931/1970/1978, Russian Kurland 1797)
license: Custom non-commercial scientific use; attribution required
license_now: Custom: free for non-commercial scientific use with registration + citation
notes: Backbone for historical European demography; pre-1960 IDs match Princeton European Fertility Project
verify_notes: Requires Mosaic project registration. | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 由马克斯·普朗克人口研究所与 IPUMS Mosaic 维护的欧洲历史 GIS 数据集合，提供欧洲各国在 1900、1930、1960、1990、2003 等年份的行政边界，并包含德意志帝国、奥匈帝国、波兰（1770—1978 多个断面）、俄属库尔兰（1797）等专题图层。数据以 Shapefile 格式提供，时间跨度从 1770 年至 2009 年，是欧洲历史人口研究的基础数据。1960 年前的单元 ID 与普林斯顿欧洲生育率项目对应。使用需免费注册，限非商业科研用途并注明出处。
desc_en: A collection of historical GIS boundary files for Europe maintained by the Max Planck Institute for Demographic Research and IPUMS Mosaic. It provides administrative units for European states at several benchmark years (1900, 1930, 1960, 1990, 2003) plus country-specific layers such as the German Empire, Austro-Hungary, Poland and Russian Kurland, spanning roughly 1770 to 2009. Distributed as shapefiles, it is a backbone resource for historical European demography, with pre-1960 unit IDs aligned to the Princeton European Fertility Project. Use requires free registration and is restricted to non-commercial scientific use with citation.

name: Municipal Demarcation Board (MDB) Open Data Portal
provider: Municipal Demarcation Board of South Africa
theme_raw: admin boundaries (provinces, districts, local municipalities, wards) | provinces, district/local municipalities, wards
notes: Authoritative upstream for South African admin boundaries; partial overlap with AfriGIS admin layers.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub 首页可达；详细数据/许可需逐层查看 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 南非市界划定委员会（MDB）运营的开放数据门户，是南非行政边界的权威上游数据源，与 AfriGIS 等行政图层存在部分重叠。门户基于 ArcGIS Hub 搭建，提供 Shapefile、KML、GeoJSON 以及 FeatureServer/WFS 等多种格式，可免费下载或通过 API 调用，适用于南非各级行政区划相关的制图与分析工作。
desc_en: The open data portal operated by South Africa's Municipal Demarcation Board, serving as the authoritative upstream source for South African administrative boundaries (with partial overlap with AfriGIS admin layers). Built on ArcGIS Hub, it offers data in Shapefile, KML and GeoJSON formats as well as FeatureServer/WFS services, all freely available via direct download or API. It is well suited to mapping and analysis involving South Africa's administrative divisions.

name: Natural Earth Admin1 Polygons US
theme_raw: Administrative boundaries (US states) | Administrative boundaries (first-level subdivisions)
notes: Subset of Natural Earth Admin1
verify_notes: US Admin1 polygons from Natural Earth | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 通过 DataHub 分发的 Natural Earth Admin1 数据的美国子集，包含美国 50 个州的一级行政区（州）多边形边界。数据采用 1:10m 比例尺、GeoJSON 格式，文件仅约 111 kB，体积轻巧，采用 ODC-PDDL 公共领域许可，可自由开放下载。适合用于美国州级专题制图、概览底图及快速原型开发等场景。
desc_en: A US subset of the Natural Earth Admin1 dataset distributed through DataHub, containing first-level administrative (state) polygons for all 50 US states. It is provided at 1:10m scale in GeoJSON format and is very lightweight at roughly 111 kB. Released under the ODC-PDDL public-domain dedication, it is openly downloadable and well suited to state-level thematic mapping, overview basemaps and quick prototyping.

name: NRFA Catchment Boundaries (per-station)
formats: ESRI Shapefile (per-station download); bulk zip via EIDC Hub; WMS service
notes: Vector polygons derived from CEH IHDTM; the canonical NRFA-aligned catchment vectors that essd-15-2533-2023 conceptually maps onto.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国国家河流流量档案馆（UKCEH NRFA）发布的逐站集水区边界数据，覆盖约 1,500 个有水文测站的集水区。矢量多边形由 CEH 的 50m 分辨率 IHDTM 衍生而来，是与 NRFA 测站对应的标准集水区边界。数据可按单站下载，也可通过 EIDC Hub 批量获取 zip 包，并提供 WMS 服务，适用于英国水文与径流相关研究。
desc_en: Per-station catchment boundary polygons published by the UK National River Flow Archive (UKCEH), covering roughly 1,500 gauged catchments. The vectors are derived from CEH's 50m IHDTM and serve as the canonical NRFA-aligned catchment boundaries. Data can be downloaded per station, obtained in bulk as a zip via the EIDC Hub, or accessed through a WMS service, making it a standard resource for hydrological and streamflow research across the UK.

name: Nuts2json overseas territory insets
coverage: Azores, Canary Is., French Guiana, Guadeloupe, Martinique, Mayotte, Reunion, Iceland, Svalbard, Madeira, etc. (14 areas)
notes: Dedicated UTM-style projections per territory
verify_notes: repo active, years 2010-2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Eurostat/GISCO 维护的 Nuts2json 项目中针对海外领地的插图图层，覆盖亚速尔、加那利群岛、法属圭亚那、瓜德罗普、马提尼克、马约特、留尼汪、冰岛、斯瓦尔巴、马德拉等 14 个区域。数据以 TopoJSON 和 GeoJSON 格式、1:60 概化级别（01M scale）通过静态原始 URL 提供，涵盖 NUTS 2010 至 2024 多个版本，并为各领地配置专门的 UTM 式投影，便于网页地图嵌入。
desc_en: Dedicated inset layers for overseas territories within Eurostat/GISCO's Nuts2json project, covering 14 areas including the Azores, Canary Islands, French Guiana, Guadeloupe, Martinique, Mayotte, Reunion, Iceland, Svalbard and Madeira. Provided in TopoJSON and GeoJSON via static raw URLs at the generalised 1:60 (01M) scale, the data spans NUTS versions from 2010 to 2024 and applies bespoke UTM-style projections per territory, making it convenient for embedding in web maps.

name: openAFRICA
theme_raw: Pan-African open data | sub-national admin boundaries for African countries
notes: Largest community-run CKAN for Africa; hosts country admin boundaries (Kenya counties, Nigeria LGAs, etc.) that are heavily reused.
verify_notes: 403 to crawler | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 由 Code for Africa 运营的 openAFRICA，是非洲规模最大的社区驱动 CKAN 数据平台，覆盖 54 个非洲国家。平台托管大量被广泛复用的国家级行政边界数据（如肯尼亚的县、尼日利亚的地方政府区域等），提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 等格式，可通过 CKAN 网页界面与 API 访问。各数据集许可条款不一，使用前需逐条核对。
desc_en: openAFRICA, run by Code for Africa, is the largest community-driven CKAN data platform for Africa, spanning all 54 African countries. It hosts widely reused country-level administrative boundaries (such as Kenya's counties and Nigeria's LGAs) in Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML formats, accessible via both the CKAN web interface and an API. Licensing varies by dataset, so terms should be checked record by record before use.

name: OpenDataSoft 'World Administrative Boundaries - Countries and Territories'
provider: Opendatasoft (derived from World Food Programme / OCHA)
theme_raw: ADM0 world countries + territories | admin boundaries
license: derived; mostly open (CC-BY) - check per record
notes: Widely reused as starter dataset; exposes Explore API and supports OGC-style downloads.
verify_notes: Page alive but license/formats not surfaced in landing snippet; portal rebranded to Huwise | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Opendatasoft 发布的全球行政边界数据集（国家与领地级），源自世界粮食计划署/OCHA 的边界数据。该数据集因易用而被广泛用作入门级底图，提供 GeoJSON、Shapefile、CSV、KML、Parquet 等多种格式，可通过 Explore API v2.1 及 OGC 式接口下载。多数记录采用开放许可（多为 CC-BY），但建议按记录核对具体授权。
desc_en: A global dataset of country- and territory-level administrative boundaries published by Opendatasoft, derived from World Food Programme / OCHA boundary data. Widely reused as an easy starter basemap, it is available in GeoJSON, Shapefile, CSV, KML and Parquet, and can be retrieved through the Explore API v2.1 and OGC-style downloads. Most records are openly licensed (commonly CC-BY), though the specific licence should be checked per record.

name: OpenMapTiles administrative boundaries layer
theme_raw: Admin boundaries as vector tile linestrings | OSM vector tile schema + tilesets
license: BSD + CC-BY (schema and tools); tiles derived from OSM (ODbL) and Natural Earth
access: Self-host build pipeline or hosted tiles
notes: Uses Natural Earth z0-4, OSM admin from z5-14
verify_notes: 301 to trailing-slash version | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: OpenMapTiles/MapTiler 矢量瓦片方案中的行政边界图层，覆盖全球。该图层在低缩放级别（z0–4）使用 Natural Earth 数据、在 z5–14 使用 OpenStreetMap 行政边界，以 Mapbox 矢量瓦片（MVT/PBF）形式分发。用户可自建瓦片生成流水线，或使用托管瓦片服务，采用 BSD/CC-BY 许可，适合构建多尺度交互式底图。
desc_en: The administrative-boundaries layer of the OpenMapTiles/MapTiler vector-tile schema, with global coverage. It draws on Natural Earth at low zoom levels (z0-4) and OpenStreetMap admin boundaries from z5-14, delivered as Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT/PBF). Users can either self-host the tile-building pipeline or rely on hosted tiles. Released under BSD/CC-BY licensing, it is well suited to building multi-scale interactive basemaps.

name: OpenStreetMap on AWS
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Buildings & addresses | POI / places
theme_raw: Raw OSM planet history + changesets | global vector basemap (roads, buildings, POI, admin)
formats: OSM PBF, OSM XML, Parquet planet history
notes: Weekly planet snapshots; also planet-history in ORC/Parquet
verify_notes: Updated minutely/hourly/daily/weekly | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenStreetMap 在 AWS 开放数据计划下的公开镜像，提供全球范围的协作式地理数据，涵盖行政边界、建筑与地址、POI/地点等丰富要素。数据以每周一次的 planet 快照形式发布，格式包括 OSM PBF、OSM XML，并提供 ORC/Parquet 的 planet 历史数据，托管于 s3://osm-pds/。数据遵循 OSM 的 ODbL 许可，是大规模地理空间分析与处理的重要数据源。
desc_en: The OpenStreetMap public mirror hosted under the AWS Open Data program, offering global collaboratively-mapped data covering administrative boundaries, buildings and addresses, and POI/places. Weekly planet snapshots are provided in OSM PBF and OSM XML, alongside full planet history in ORC/Parquet, all hosted at s3://osm-pds/. Licensed under OSM's ODbL, it is a key source for large-scale geospatial analysis and processing.

name: Ordnance Survey OS Open Zoomstack / OS OpenMap Local
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Buildings & addresses | POI / places
theme_raw: buildings, POI categories (limited) | Multi-layer basemap (admin, transport, buildings, greenspace, contours)
notes: WFS access via OS NGD APIs is on Premium tier; the open downloads are bulk
verify_notes: page loads but minimal SSR content; JS-driven | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国国家测绘局（Ordnance Survey）的 OS Open Zoomstack / OS OpenMap Local 开放数据，覆盖英国大不列颠地区，包含行政边界、建筑与地址、POI/地点等要素。提供 MBTiles 矢量瓦片、GeoPackage、Shapefile 格式，可直接下载或通过 OS Data Hub API 批量获取。该数据采用 OS OpenData 署名许可；通过 OS NGD API 的 WFS 访问属于付费高级层，开放下载为批量形式。
desc_en: Ordnance Survey's OS Open Zoomstack / OS OpenMap Local open data, covering Great Britain and including administrative boundaries, buildings and addresses, and POI/places. It is offered as MBTiles vector tiles, GeoPackage and shapefile, available via direct download or the OS Data Hub API. Released under the attribution-based OS OpenData licence, the open downloads are bulk products, while WFS access through the OS NGD APIs sits on the Premium tier.

name: OS Data Hub – OS Open (Great Britain)
theme_raw: topographic, boundaries, roads, addresses | UK topographic vectors: OS Open Roads, Boundary-Line, OS Open Names, OS Open Greenspace
formats: Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON, vector tiles, WFS
notes: Includes OS Open Map – Local, Boundary-Line, OS OpenRoads, OS OpenNames.
verify_notes: Page reachable but renders via JS - body content sparse to WebFetch. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国国家测绘局 OS Data Hub 上的 OS Open 系列开放数据，覆盖大不列颠地区，涵盖行政边界、建筑与地址、交通等主题，包含 OS Open Map – Local、Boundary-Line、OS OpenRoads、OS OpenNames 等产品。提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON、矢量瓦片及 WFS 等格式，可免费下载或通过 API 访问，通常采用开放政府许可（OGL）。
desc_en: The OS Open suite of open data on Ordnance Survey's OS Data Hub, covering Great Britain across administrative boundaries, buildings and addresses, and transportation. It bundles products such as OS Open Map - Local, Boundary-Line, OS OpenRoads and OS OpenNames. Data is offered in Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON, vector tiles and WFS, available via free download or API and generally under the Open Government Licence.

name: OS Open Zoomstack (OGC API Features demo)
license_now: Open Government Licence (OGL) - Contains OS data (c) Crown copyright 2023
formats: OGC API Features (GeoJSON, HTML), Vector Tiles
notes: Reference public OGC API Features endpoint exposing collections: airports, railway_stations, roads_local, roads_national, roads_regional, rail. Great teaching/demo endpoint also fully usable for GB Zoomstack data.
verify_notes: Demo active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 interactive instruments 搭建、基于 Ordnance Survey OS Open Zoomstack 数据的 OGC API Features 演示端点，覆盖英国部分地区。端点暴露 airports、railway_stations、roads_local/national/regional、rail 等集合，提供 GeoJSON、HTML 及矢量瓦片输出，遵循开放政府许可（含 OS 版权）。它既是优秀的 OGC API 教学示例，也可实际用于访问 GB Zoomstack 数据。
desc_en: An OGC API Features demonstration endpoint built by interactive instruments on top of Ordnance Survey's OS Open Zoomstack data, covering a region of Great Britain. It exposes collections such as airports, railway_stations, roads_local/national/regional and rail, serving GeoJSON, HTML and Vector Tiles under the Open Government Licence (containing OS data, Crown copyright). It works both as a teaching/demo endpoint for OGC API Features and as a usable source for GB Zoomstack data.

name: POI86 中国道路路网 / 水系水路 Shapefile (按行政区下载)
theme_raw: waterways - OSM 派生 | 路网 + 水域 + POI
notes: 中文圈 "按区域" 直接下 SHP 的少见站点；含道路路网、水系水路、建筑轮廓、铁路轨道等
verify_notes: China hydrological/waterway shapefile | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: poi86.com 提供的中国道路路网与水系水路 Shapefile 下载服务，支持按省/市/区行政区划分级下载，同时还包含建筑轮廓、铁路轨道等图层，提供 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 格式。它是中文圈内少见的可按区域直接下载 SHP 数据的站点。使用遵循网站条款，商业用途需另行咨询。
desc_en: A download service from poi86.com providing road networks and waterway shapefiles for China, downloadable by province, city or district administrative unit, and also covering building footprints and railway tracks. Data is offered in Shapefile and GeoJSON formats. It is one of the few Chinese-language sites that allows downloading SHP data directly by region. Use follows the site's terms, with commercial use subject to inquiry.

name: RDH TIGER 2010 Boundary Files with 2010 Population Joins
access: Free direct download from RDH; mirrored from Census FTP
notes: Blocks, block groups, tracts, counties, VTDs, AIANNH, with 2010 Decennial total population joined
verify_notes: Same page as above | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Redistricting Data Hub（RDH）发布的 2010 年版 TIGER 边界文件，并连接 2010 年十年一度人口普查的总人口数据，覆盖全部美国各州及领地。数据为 Shapefile 多边形格式，包含人口普查区块、区块组、普查区、县、投票区（VTD）及 AIANNH 等单元，源自美国人口普查局 FTP 镜像，遵循公共领域许可，可从 RDH 免费下载。
desc_en: The 2010-vintage TIGER boundary files published by the Redistricting Data Hub (RDH), joined with 2010 Decennial Census total population, covering all US states and territories. Provided as Shapefile polygons, the data includes census blocks, block groups, tracts, counties, voting districts (VTDs) and AIANNH areas, mirrored from the Census Bureau FTP. It is in the public domain and freely downloadable from RDH, making it convenient for redistricting and demographic analysis.

name: Reconstructing Italy's rural landscape - Catasto Agrario 1929 geospatial baseline
theme_raw: Historical Italian provincial statistical units with agrarian socioeconomic attributes | 1929 Italian admin/cadastral polygons + agro/socio attributes
notes: OCR-digitised historical census attributes joined to province polygons
verify_notes: Italy Catasto Agrario 1929 dataset article; data on Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 一篇《Scientific Data》数据论文配套的地理空间数据集，重建了意大利 1929 年《Catasto Agrario》（农业地籍）所描述的乡村景观基线，以 1929 年的省级行政边界为单元。数据通过 OCR 数字化历史普查属性并连接到省级多边形，以矢量（Shapefile/GeoPackage）格式开放发布，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，适用于意大利历史农业与社会经济研究。
desc_en: A geospatial dataset accompanying a Scientific Data data paper that reconstructs Italy's rural landscape baseline as described in the 1929 Catasto Agrario, organised by 1929 provincial boundaries. OCR-digitised historical census attributes are joined to province polygons and released openly in vector format (shapefile/GeoPackage) under CC BY 4.0. It is suited to historical agricultural and socioeconomic research on early-twentieth-century Italy.

name: Res-CN (Reservoir dataset in China) — reservoir/catchment polygons
formats_now: Shapefiles + tabular attributes; archive on Zenodo doi:10.5281/zenodo.7664489
access: Open download via paper-linked Zenodo record
notes: Sibling dataset cited alongside CRD; provides vector catchment boundaries usable for hydrologic studies
verify_notes: Res-CN data paper; 3,254 reservoirs | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Res-CN（中国水库数据集），由 Shen 等人发表于 ESSD（2023），涵盖中国 3,254 座水库及其划定的集水区。数据集提供水库与集水区多边形（Shapefile）以及配套的时间序列（CSV/NetCDF），通过论文关联的 Zenodo 记录开放下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它常与 CRD 等数据集并列引用，所提供的矢量集水区边界可用于水文研究。
desc_en: Res-CN (Reservoir dataset in China) by Shen et al., ESSD 2023, covering 3,254 Chinese reservoirs together with their delineated catchments. The dataset provides reservoir and catchment polygons as shapefiles alongside time-series data in CSV/NetCDF, openly downloadable via the paper-linked Zenodo record under CC BY 4.0. Often cited as a sibling to CRD, its vector catchment boundaries are directly usable for hydrological studies in China.

name: SADC Groundwater Information Portal (SADC-GIP) hydrogeological maps
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Hydrography | Geology, soil & geomorphology
theme_raw: Hydrogeology, aquifer types, groundwater monitoring | southern Africa hydrogeology + transboundary aquifers
notes: Includes vectorized Mozambique and Zimbabwe national hydrogeological maps.
verify_notes: 422 layers, 28 maps, 61 docs; license not explicit on homepage | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 SADC-GMI 与 IGRAC 共建的南部非洲发展共同体地下水信息门户（SADC-GIP），提供水文地质类专题地图，覆盖 SADC 的 16 个成员国，包含 422 个图层，其中含莫桑比克、津巴布韦等国的矢量化国家水文地质图。数据以 Shapefile（及 Excel）格式提供，访问需注册，主页未明确说明许可条款。
desc_en: The SADC Groundwater Information Portal (SADC-GIP), built by SADC-GMI and IGRAC, offering hydrogeological maps for the 16 member states of the Southern African Development Community across 422 layers, including vectorised national hydrogeological maps for countries such as Mozambique and Zimbabwe. Data is provided in shapefile (and Excel) format, with registration required for access. Licensing is not specified on the homepage.

name: SASDI Catalogue
theme_raw: National SDI metadata + vector layers | admin, hydro, cadastre
notes: Underused African SDI node referenced in kartoza/awesome-geodata
verify_notes: SASDI Catalogue did not respond | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 南非空间数据基础设施（SASDI）的元数据目录服务，覆盖南非，是 kartoza/awesome-geodata 中提及但使用度偏低的非洲 SDI 节点。目录汇集来自不同节点的数据，格式包括 Shapefile、GeoPackage 及 WFS 等（具体因节点而异），涉及行政边界、水文等主题，可作为查找南非官方空间数据的入口。
desc_en: The metadata catalogue service of the South African Spatial Data Infrastructure (SASDI), covering South Africa and noted as an underused African SDI node referenced in kartoza/awesome-geodata. It aggregates data from various nodes in formats such as Shapefile, GeoPackage and WFS (varying by node), spanning themes including administrative boundaries and hydrography. It serves as an entry point for discovering official South African spatial data.

name: SEDAC GPW v4 Administrative Unit Center Points & National Identifier Grid
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
formats: Shapefile (centroids), GeoTIFF (raster); input admin polygons referenced
notes: Vector centroids identify the ~13.5 million input census/administrative units used to build GPW; useful as a global census-unit inventory.
verify_notes: Timed out. SEDAC has migrated to NASA EarthData; original URL may be slow/deprecated | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NASA SEDAC/CIESIN（哥伦比亚大学）发布的 GPW v4 行政单元中心点与国家标识栅格数据集，全球覆盖，包含约 2000、2005、2010、2015、2020 年等断面。矢量中心点标识了构建 GPW 所使用的约 1,350 万个普查/行政输入单元，可作为全球普查单元清单。数据以 Shapefile（中心点）与 GeoTIFF（栅格）提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，通过 NASA Earthdata 登录开放获取。
desc_en: The GPW v4 Administrative Unit Center Points and National Identifier Grid from NASA SEDAC/CIESIN (Columbia University), with global coverage at benchmark years circa 2000, 2005, 2010, 2015 and 2020. The vector centroids identify the roughly 13.5 million census/administrative input units used to build GPW, making it a useful global census-unit inventory. Provided as Shapefile centroids and GeoTIFF rasters under CC BY 4.0, it is openly available via NASA Earthdata login.

name: SHRUG-public release archives (GitHub)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: admin/socioeconomic boundary archive | Versioned SHRUG release notes + asset pointers
coverage: India, all SHRUG versions (v1.x through v2.1 Pakora)
notes: Versioned releases enabling reproducibility across SHRUG editions.
verify_notes: Latest SHRUG v2.1 Pakora 2024-10-30 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Development Data Lab 在 GitHub 上发布的 SHRUG（Socioeconomic High-resolution Rural-Urban Geographic）公开版本归档，覆盖印度，包含从 v1.x 到 v2.1（Pakora）的所有版本。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、CSV 格式提供，采用 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 许可，通过 GitHub release 下载。其版本化发布便于在不同 SHRUG 版本间实现可复现研究。
desc_en: The SHRUG-public release archives from Development Data Lab on GitHub, covering India across all editions from v1.x through v2.1 (Pakora). Data is provided in Shapefile, GeoPackage and CSV formats under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, distributed via GitHub release downloads. Its versioned releases support reproducible research across successive SHRUG editions, making it a valuable resource for Indian socioeconomic and administrative analysis.

name: Simplified dataset of world countries boundaries, including their maritime exclusive economic zones (EEZ)
what_changes: Shapefile converted to GeoJSON, geometries simplified, ambiguous areas such as 'Joint regime' and 'Overlapping claim' filtered out for lightweight web mapping use
notes: Lightweight community re-distribution; treats Marine Regions EEZ as primary source
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 一份发布于 Zenodo 的简化版世界各国边界数据集，并包含各国的海洋专属经济区（EEZ）。该数据集为社区轻量化再分发版本，以 Marine Regions 的 EEZ 数据作为主要来源，采用 MIT 许可。当前版本约 64.9 MB，跨所有版本累计约 5.9 GB，适用于需要兼顾陆地与海洋管辖范围的轻量制图与分析。
desc_en: A simplified dataset of world country boundaries including their maritime Exclusive Economic Zones (EEZ), published on Zenodo. It is a lightweight community re-distribution that treats the Marine Regions EEZ data as its primary source, released under the MIT licence. The current version is around 64.9 MB, with about 5.9 GB across all versions, making it convenient for lightweight mapping and analysis that needs both land and maritime jurisdiction boundaries.

name: TangSY/echarts-map-demo
theme_raw: Administrative boundaries (Amap) | province / city / district / county boundaries
notes: Multi-level admin polygons for ECharts maps.
verify_notes: Active repo; China admin GeoJSON multi-level boundaries demo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: TangSY 在 GitHub 上维护的 echarts-map-demo 项目，提供用于 ECharts 地图的中国多级行政区划多边形数据，支持省—市—县等层级的逐级下钻。数据以 GeoJSON 格式提供，采用 MIT 许可，便于在前端可视化中直接调用，适合构建中国行政区划的交互式地图展示。
desc_en: The echarts-map-demo project maintained by TangSY on GitHub, providing multi-level administrative boundary polygons for China designed for use with ECharts maps, supporting drill-down across province, city and county levels. Data is offered in GeoJSON format under the MIT licence, making it easy to consume directly in front-end visualisations and well suited to building interactive maps of China's administrative divisions.

name: Thematic Mapping World Borders
theme_raw: World country borders (simple polygons) | country boundaries with FIPS/ISO codes, area, population
