lychee_text: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://thematicmapping.org/downloads/world_borders.php))
notes: Listed in awesome-geospatial-data-sources
verify_notes: Connection refused - server may be down or domain retired. | lychee:Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://thematicmapping.org/downloads/world_borders.php))
desc_zh: 由 Bjørn Sandvik 提供的 Thematic Mapping World Borders 全球国界数据集，是 awesome-geospatial-data-sources 中收录的经典数据。数据以 Shapefile 格式直接下载，附带便于专题制图的属性（如人口等），采用 CC BY-SA 3.0 许可，长期被用作世界地图专题可视化的基础底图。
desc_en: The Thematic Mapping World Borders dataset by Bjørn Sandvik, a classic global country-borders resource listed in awesome-geospatial-data-sources. Provided as a directly downloadable shapefile with attributes convenient for thematic cartography (such as population), it is released under CC BY-SA 3.0. It has long been used as a foundational basemap for world-map thematic visualisations.

name: TZ Timezones World Shapefile (efele.net mirror / timezone-boundary-builder)
theme_raw: World timezone polygons derived from OSM | World timezone boundaries
file_size: timezones-1970.shapefile.zip 67 MB; timezones-1970.geojson.zip 42.2 MB; timezones-now.geojson.zip 23.2 MB
notes: Original efele.net link in awesome list is offline; this is the active successor.
verify_notes: Latest release 2026b; license not on releases page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Evan Siroky 维护的 timezone-boundary-builder 项目（原 efele.net 时区数据的活跃继承者），提供全球时区边界数据。数据以 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 格式通过 GitHub release 发布，采用 ODbL 许可，包含含/不含 1970 年前历史区划的多种变体（如 timezones-1970 与 timezones-now）。由于 awesome 列表中原 efele.net 链接已失效，此项目是当前推荐的替代来源。
desc_en: The timezone-boundary-builder project maintained by Evan Siroky, the active successor to the former efele.net timezone data, providing global time-zone boundaries. Released via GitHub as Shapefile and GeoJSON under the ODbL, it offers several variants including 1970-based and present-day boundaries. As the original efele.net link in the awesome list is now offline, this is the recommended current source for authoritative time-zone polygons.

name: uiwjs/province-city-china
theme_raw: admin_boundaries (codes + boundaries) | 行政区划编码(可转GeoJSON)
notes: 属性表为主; 与边界数据 join 时常用
verify_notes: 最新release v8.5.8 (2024-09);数据更新至2021-03 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: uiwjs 在 GitHub 上维护的 province-city-china 数据集，提供中国省、市、县、镇四级行政区划数据，共约 34 个省、337 个城市、2846 个区县（合计 3217 项），并含部分 GeoJSON 子集。数据以 JSON/CSV/SQL 为主、采用 MIT 许可，属性表完整，常与边界数据 join 使用，便于行政区划编码与名称的查询和关联。
desc_en: The province-city-china dataset maintained by uiwjs on GitHub, providing China's four-level administrative divisions (province, city, county, town), totalling roughly 34 provinces, 337 cities and 2,846 districts (3,217 entries in all), with some GeoJSON subsets included. Primarily distributed as JSON/CSV/SQL under the MIT licence, it is an attribute-focused dataset commonly joined with boundary data to support lookups of administrative codes and names.

name: UNEP/GRID-Geneva GeoNetwork (DataCore)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Marine & coastal | Hazards & disasters
theme_raw: Environment, hazards, biodiversity, UNmap 2018 boundaries | protected areas, admin, shipping, pollutants
notes: Hosts historical UNmap 2018 international boundary polygons & coastlines as downloadable vectors — non-trivial to find elsewhere
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UNEP/GRID-Geneva 运营的 DataCore GeoNetwork 元数据目录，全球覆盖，涉及行政边界、海岸/海洋、灾害等多个主题。其托管的资源包括 2018 年 UNmap 国际边界多边形与海岸线等可下载矢量数据，这类数据在别处较难获取。数据格式包括 Shapefile、GeoPackage、WFS，多数采用 CC-BY 类开放许可，提供开放元数据与下载。
desc_en: The DataCore GeoNetwork metadata catalogue operated by UNEP/GRID-Geneva, with global coverage spanning administrative boundaries, marine and coastal, and hazard themes. It hosts resources including the 2018 UNmap international boundary polygons and coastlines as downloadable vectors, which are non-trivial to find elsewhere. Data is available in Shapefile, GeoPackage and WFS, much of it under CC-BY-style open licences, with open metadata and downloads.

name: UNESCO IHP-WINS hydrography & water layers
theme_raw: Wetlands, rivers, basins, water-related case-study layers | Hydrology, transboundary aquifers, water-related datasets
license_now: CC BY 4.0 or equivalent (per featured datasets)
formats_now: Shapefile, raster, time series, tabular, PDF
notes: Hosts GLWD mirror plus UNESCO case-study basins; underused gov-IGO portal.
verify_notes: 418 datasets, 216 orgs; updates through May 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UNESCO 国际水文计划（IHP）运营的 IHP-WINS 水文与水资源数据平台，提供全球及具体项目范围的水文与水相关图层，共托管 418 个数据集，包含 GLWD 镜像及多个 UNESCO 案例研究流域。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、WMS 等格式直接下载，所列特色数据集多采用 CC BY 4.0 或等效许可，是一个使用度偏低的政府/政府间组织门户。
desc_en: The IHP-WINS hydrography and water-data platform operated by UNESCO's International Hydrological Programme, providing global and project-specific hydrography and water-related layers across 418 hosted datasets, including a GLWD mirror and various UNESCO case-study basins. Data is available for direct download as Shapefile, GeoJSON and WMS, with featured datasets typically under CC BY 4.0 or equivalent. It is an underused government/IGO portal for water-related geodata.

name: UNHCR Operational Data Portal - Geoservices (People of Concern locations)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: Refugees, IDPs, camp/site locations | Refugee camps, settlements, operational areas
notes: Point layer of refugee/IDP/stateless locations by population/location type; admin boundaries layer
verify_notes: UNHCR Operational Data Portal operational | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UNHCR 业务数据门户的地理服务（Geoservices）模块，全球覆盖，提供难民、境内流离失所者（IDP）及无国籍人士所在地的点图层（按人口/地点类型组织）以及配套的行政边界图层。数据以 GeoJSON、JSON API、WMS/WFS 等形式开放提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，适用于人道主义与人口流动相关的空间分析。
desc_en: The Geoservices module of UNHCR's Operational Data Portal, with global coverage, providing point layers of refugee, IDP and stateless populations and locations (organised by population and location type) along with accompanying administrative boundary layers. Data is openly available as GeoJSON, a JSON API and WMS/WFS under CC-BY 4.0, making it suitable for humanitarian and displacement-related spatial analysis.

name: US Census (Planetary Computer)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: US Census 2020 boundaries + demographic tables | Administrative boundaries + demographics
formats: GeoParquet (per-geography level: state, county, tract, block-group, CD, etc.)
access: STAC API; one STAC item per table
notes: Convenient cloud-native TIGER + tabular join in one place.
verify_notes: JS-rendered page; STAC catalog page reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 微软 Planetary Computer 上的美国人口普查数据集（2020 年），将美国人口普查局的 TIGER 边界与表格数据整合于一处，按州、县、普查区、区块组、国会选区等不同地理层级组织。数据以 GeoParquet 格式提供，每张表对应一个 STAC item，通过 STAC API 访问，属公共领域（美国人口普查），便于云原生的边界与属性 join 工作流。
desc_en: The US Census dataset (2020) on Microsoft's Planetary Computer, bringing together the Census Bureau's TIGER boundaries and tabular data in one place, organised by geography level (state, county, tract, block group, congressional district, and more). Data is provided in GeoParquet with one STAC item per table and accessed via the STAC API. As public-domain US Census data, it enables convenient cloud-native joins of boundaries and attributes.

name: US Census Cartographic Boundary Files (CBF)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: Generalized boundaries (tract, BG, county, place, CBSA, AIANNH) | administrative boundaries
license_now: Public domain (US Federal; not explicit on page)
formats_now: Shapefile, File Geodatabase, KML; GeoPackage added in 2024
notes: Simplified, coastal-water removed; preferred for thematic mapping. Also indexed in catalog.data.gov.
verify_notes: GeoPackage support is new since 2024. | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 美国人口普查局发布的制图边界文件（CBF），覆盖美国全境，是经过概化、去除沿海水域的简化边界，专为专题制图设计。提供 1:500,000、1:5,000,000、1:20,000,000 等多种比例尺，格式包括 Shapefile、地理数据库、KML，并自 2024 年起支持 GeoPackage。数据为美国联邦公共领域产品，可直接下载，也在 catalog.data.gov 中编目。
desc_en: The Cartographic Boundary Files (CBF) published by the US Census Bureau, covering the entire United States. These are generalised, coastal-water-removed boundaries designed specifically for thematic mapping, offered at scales such as 1:500,000, 1:5,000,000 and 1:20,000,000. Formats include shapefile, geodatabase and KML, with GeoPackage added since 2024. As US federal public-domain data they are directly downloadable and also indexed in catalog.data.gov.

name: USDOS LSIB 2017 Detailed
provider: US Dept. of State (Office of the Geographer)
theme_raw: Large Scale International Boundaries (detailed) | International boundaries
notes: Detailed variant; LSIB_SIMPLE/2017 is the lighter cousin.
verify_notes: No restrictions | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国国务院地理学家办公室发布的 LSIB 2017 详细版（Large Scale International Boundaries），全球覆盖，包含 180,741 个要素、约 284 个国家的国际边界。该数据在 Google Earth Engine 中以 FeatureCollection 形式提供，属美国公共领域。它是详细变体，另有更轻量的 LSIB_SIMPLE/2017 简化版。
desc_en: The USDOS LSIB 2017 Detailed dataset (Large Scale International Boundaries) from the US State Department's Office of the Geographer, with global coverage comprising 180,741 features across roughly 284 countries. Available in Google Earth Engine as a FeatureCollection and in the US public domain, this is the detailed variant; a lighter LSIB_SIMPLE/2017 companion is also available. It is an authoritative reference for international boundaries.

name: USGS National Boundary Dataset (NBD/GovUnits)
theme_raw: Federal land + admin boundaries | elevation contours, hypsography vector layer
formats_now: REST, WCS, WMS, WMTS, WFS, FTP
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: Federal land ownership boundaries distinct from Census legal boundaries.
verify_notes: TNM Downloader + LidarExplorer + TNM Access API | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局（USGS）的国家边界数据集（NBD/GovUnits），覆盖美国全境，提供政府单元与边界数据。其中的联邦土地所有权边界与人口普查局的法定边界有所区别。数据以 Shapefile、File GDB、GeoPackage 格式通过 TNM Downloader 的 Boundaries 主题获取，属 USGS 公共领域。
desc_en: The USGS National Boundary Dataset (NBD/GovUnits), covering the United States and providing governmental-unit and boundary data. Notably, its federal land-ownership boundaries are distinct from the Census Bureau's legal boundaries. Data is available in Shapefile, File GDB and GeoPackage via The National Map (TNM) Downloader under the Boundaries theme, and is in the USGS public domain.

name: USGS National Map Alaska vector layers (TNM / National Hydrography Dataset / GNIS)
theme_raw: Hydrography, transport, structures, admin, geographic names | hydrography (NHD), transport, boundaries, structures
notes: US contribution to Arctic SDI (USGS as participating NMA).
verify_notes: TNM Downloader live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局（USGS）The National Map 下载器提供的阿拉斯加矢量图层，覆盖阿拉斯加/美国北极地区，涵盖行政边界、交通、水文（国家水文数据集 NHD、地名 GNIS）等主题。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON 格式提供，并支持 WFS 与 REST FeatureServer 访问，属美国公共领域。USGS 作为参与的国家测绘机构，这是美国对北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic SDI）的贡献之一。
desc_en: Alaska vector layers from the USGS The National Map (TNM) Downloader, covering Alaska and the US Arctic and spanning administrative boundaries, transportation and hydrography (National Hydrography Dataset and GNIS place names). Data is offered in Shapefile, GeoPackage and GeoJSON, with WFS and REST FeatureServer access, all in the US public domain. As USGS participates as a national mapping agency, this represents the US contribution to the Arctic SDI.

name: Who's On First — Administrative data (global)
theme_raw: administrative boundaries (continent→microhood) | Gazetteer of places (admin + venues + neighbourhoods)
notes: Unified repo containing continents, countries, regions, counties, localities, hoods, microhoods with stable WOF IDs and concordances (GeoNames, WD, ISO).
verify_notes: Since May 2019 data split into per-country repos | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Who's On First 的全球行政数据仓库，提供从大洲、国家、地区、县到城市、街区、微街区等多个层级的地名实体，每个实体带有稳定的 WOF ID 以及与 GeoNames、Wikidata、ISO 等的对照关系。数据以 GeoJSON 格式通过 GitHub 克隆或打包下载获取，采用 CC0 许可（含来源署名属性），适合作为统一的全球地名/行政层级参照框架。
desc_en: The global administrative data repository of Who's On First, providing place entities across many levels from continents, countries, regions and counties down to localities, neighbourhoods and microhoods, each with a stable WOF ID and concordances to GeoNames, Wikidata and ISO. Data is provided as GeoJSON via GitHub clone or bundles under CC0 (with source-attribution properties). It serves well as a unified global gazetteer and administrative-hierarchy reference.

name: WhosOnFirst Gazetteer
theme_raw: Places gazetteer | places gazetteer (admin hierarchy vectors)
notes: Hierarchical places (countries->venues), vector points/polys.
verify_notes: docs path returns 404; data now lives at spelunker/sfomuseum org repos | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: Who's On First 地名词典（Gazetteer），源自 Mapzen/SFOMA，全球覆盖，包含超过 2600 万条记录，构成从国家到具体场所（venue）的层级化地名体系，提供矢量点与多边形。数据以 GeoJSON 格式通过 S3 数据包分发，采用 CC BY 4.0 与 ODbL 许可。它是构建地理编码、地名解析与层级查询的重要开放参考数据。
desc_en: The Who's On First Gazetteer, originating from Mapzen/SFOMA, with global coverage and over 26 million records forming a hierarchical place system from countries down to individual venues, offered as vector points and polygons. Data is distributed as GeoJSON via S3 bundles under CC BY 4.0 and ODbL licensing. It is an important open reference for building geocoding, place resolution and hierarchical place-lookup systems.

name: World population centroids of GADM administrative units from nighttime lights 1992-2013
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: Population-weighted centroids for admin statistical units
what_changes: For GADM levels 0/1/2, derives population-weighted centroid point shapefiles per year using DMSP-OLS nighttime lights; 132 datasets with per-point quality flags.
notes: Hosted on figshare ("World-population-centroids.zip"); converts polygon GADM into a centroid point product.
verify_notes: Nature IDP auth redirect; paper exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集利用1992至2013年的夜间灯光遥感数据，为GADM行政区划单元计算人口加权的中心点（质心），将原本的多边形边界转化为点状产品。它覆盖全球各级行政单元，可用于人口分布建模、可达性与引力模型、区域统计制图等场景。数据以CC-BY 4.0许可证发布，托管于figshare（World-population-centroids.zip），包含约132个数据集文件，配套发表于《Scientific Data》。
desc_en: This dataset derives population-weighted centroids for GADM administrative units using nighttime-lights satellite imagery spanning 1992-2013, converting polygon boundaries into a point-based product. It covers global administrative units at multiple levels and is well suited to population modelling, accessibility and gravity-model analysis, and thematic mapping where a representative point per unit is needed. Published alongside a Scientific Data paper under a CC-BY 4.0 licence, it is hosted on figshare as World-population-centroids.zip and bundles roughly 132 dataset files.

name: Worldwide Geographic Division: Continents and Oceans/Seas Shapefile
notes: 18 categories merging Esri continents + Flanders Marine ocean/seas
verify_notes: 18 categories (8 continents + 10 ocean/sea regions); Esri + Flanders Marine Institute | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一份2024年发布的全球地理分区Shapefile，将陆地与海洋/海域统一组织为18个类别，融合了Esri的大洲数据与佛兰德斯海洋研究所（VLIZ）的海洋/海域边界。数据覆盖全球，可作为全球尺度的底图与分区框架，用于跨大洲、跨海域的统计汇总与制图。以CC-BY 4.0许可证开放发布，托管于Zenodo，压缩包约73MB。
desc_en: A 2024 global geographic-division shapefile that organises land and seas into 18 unified categories, merging Esri continent polygons with Flanders Marine Institute (VLIZ) ocean/sea boundaries. With worldwide coverage, it provides a convenient framework for global-scale basemaps, regional aggregation, and cross-continent or cross-ocean mapping. Released openly under CC-BY 4.0 and hosted on Zenodo, the archive is around 73 MB in size.

name: 中国各级行政、河流、道路等基本要素矢量数据 (China Multi-level Admin/Rivers/Roads Vector Data)
theme_raw: 行政区划/河流/道路 | rivers / boundaries
license: OSM (ODbL) 衍生 — 平台共享上传
access: 需注册并消耗积分点（1 credit）
notes: 用户共享，2019-03-10 上传，访问量约 18 万次
verify_notes: 需登录并消耗1积分下载; excludes Taiwan | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由地理空间数据云（中科院计算机网络信息中心）提供的中国基础要素矢量数据集，包含各级行政区划、河流、道路等图层，覆盖中国（不含台湾），数据源自OpenStreetMap。数据以Shapefile格式提供，适合GIS制图、区域分析与底图叠加。访问需注册账号并消耗1个积分点，遵循OSM的ODbL共享条款；2019年上传，访问量约18万次。
desc_en: Provided by GSCloud (CNIC-CAS), this dataset offers fundamental Chinese vector layers including multi-level administrative boundaries, rivers and roads, covering China excluding Taiwan and derived from OpenStreetMap. Supplied as shapefiles, it is convenient for GIS mapping, regional analysis and basemap overlays. Access requires registration and one credit point, and as OSM-derived data it follows ODbL share-alike terms; it was uploaded in 2019 and has been accessed roughly 180,000 times.

name: 中国湖泊数据集 (1960s-2020) / China Lake Dataset
provider: Zhang Guoqing / 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 TPDC
theme_raw: lakes | 中国 >1 km² 湖泊面积变化
notes: Nature Sci Data 论文配套数据, 全国 >1km² 湖泊多期边界
verify_notes: 重复条目, 见第 2 项 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由张国庆团队制作、国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布的中国湖泊数据集，包含全国面积大于1平方公里湖泊的多期边界，时间跨度约从1960年代至2020年。数据以Shapefile格式提供，是研究中国湖泊面积变化、水资源与气候响应的重要资料，配套发表于学术期刊。访问需注册并遵循TPDC用户协议。
desc_en: Compiled by Zhang Guoqing and published through the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), this dataset provides multi-period boundaries of lakes in China larger than 1 km², spanning roughly the 1960s to 2020. Delivered as shapefiles, it is a valuable resource for studying lake-area change, water resources and climate response across China, and accompanies a peer-reviewed publication. Access requires registration under the TPDC user agreement.

name: 中国长江经济带 / 黄河流域 / 胡焕庸线 矢量
provider: 立方数据学社等社区(基于国务院规划)
theme_raw: 村/居委会级 | 特殊政策区/地理分割线
coverage: 长江经济带11省市 / 黄河流域9省 / 胡焕庸线
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 521 Unknown status code
notes: 中国特有的政策性社会经济分区边界 - 国务院 重大区域战略文件直接画线;英文数据集几乎不收录
verify_notes: CSDN article deleted/missing | lychee:Rejected status code: 521 Unknown status code
desc_zh: 这是一组中国特有的政策性社会经济分区矢量数据，包含长江经济带（11省市）、黄河流域（9省）和胡焕庸线，由社区基于国务院重大区域战略规划文件整理绘制。数据以Shapefile格式提供，便于直接下载，适用于区域发展、人口地理与政策分析等研究。许可状态不明确，且此类政策性边界在国际数据集中几乎不被收录。
desc_en: A set of China-specific policy-oriented socioeconomic division vectors, covering the Yangtze River Economic Belt (11 provinces/municipalities), the Yellow River Basin (9 provinces) and the Hu Huanyong Line, compiled by community contributors from State Council regional-strategy documents. Provided as directly downloadable shapefiles, it supports research on regional development, population geography and policy analysis. The licence is unspecified, and such policy boundaries are rarely included in international datasets.

name: 国家生态数据中心 NESDC 自然保护区 / 站点矢量
provider: 国家生态科学数据中心 / IGSNRR CAS
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Hazards & disasters | Protected areas & biodiversity
theme_raw: protected areas, ecosystem station boundaries | 地质构造 / faults, volcanoes, boreholes, eclogites etc.
license: NESDC open (academic; nesdc@igsnrr.ac.cn for sharing publications)
license_now: 版权所有：国家生态科学数据中心 (proprietary institutional, no explicit open license)
formats_now: Spatial/raster 30 m datasets, station time-series, NDVI/land-use imagery (formats per dataset)
notes: Linked to CNERN (cnern.org.cn) which adds 53 long-term ecological stations with boundary polygons.
verify_notes: Active; latest updates 2024-11; per-dataset terms required | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家生态科学数据中心（NESDC，依托中科院地理资源所）提供的自然保护区与生态站点矢量数据，覆盖中国，包含保护区及生态观测站的边界多边形。数据以Shapefile和KMZ格式提供，可用于生态保护、生物多样性与长期生态研究。该中心与CNERN（中国生态系统研究网络）相关联，后者补充了53个长期生态站的边界。版权归属机构所有，访问需注册，无明确开放许可证。
desc_en: Hosted by the National Ecosystem Science Data Center (NESDC, affiliated with IGSNRR-CAS), this resource provides vector data on China's nature reserves and ecological station sites, including boundary polygons for protected areas and observation stations. Supplied as shapefile and KMZ, it supports conservation, biodiversity and long-term ecological research. Linked to CNERN, it adds boundaries for 53 long-term ecological stations. Rights are held by the institution; access requires registration with no explicit open licence.

name: 天地图 2024年全国省市县三级行政区划矢量数据 (GS(2024)0650)
provider: 国家基础地理信息中心 / 天地图
theme_raw: 行政统计单元-省/市/县级行政边界 | admin_boundaries
license: 公众版, 审图号 GS(2024)0650; 需注册天地图账号
notes: 权威官方行政区划矢量数据,带审图号,用于普查/统计单元的标准底图
verify_notes: HTTP 418 (anti-bot teapot). Page likely requires browser/JS; not accessible via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由国家基础地理信息中心通过天地图发布的2024年全国省、市、县三级行政区划矢量数据，带审图号GS(2024)0650，属公众版权威官方数据。数据以GeoJSON格式提供（可转为Shapefile），是普查、统计单元划分与标准底图的权威来源。注册天地图账号后免费下载，使用需遵守公众版相关规定。
desc_en: Released by the National Geomatics Center of China via Tianditu, this 2024 dataset provides authoritative province-, city- and county-level administrative boundaries for the whole country, carrying the official map-review number GS(2024)0650 as a public edition. Delivered in GeoJSON (convertible to shapefile), it serves as a standard basemap for census, statistics and administrative-unit work. It is free to download after registering a Tianditu account, subject to public-edition usage terms.

name: 天地图 矢量瓦片 / 数据 API (LRDL 公路、LRRL 铁路、水系、居民地)
provider: 国家测绘地理信息局 / 天地图
theme_raw: 交通 (公路/铁路/地铁) + 水系/居民地 | 行政区划/POI/地表覆盖
license: 非商业使用，需申请 Key
formats: 瓦片 / GeoJSON (经 QGIS TianDiTu Tools 插件或 R 转 SHP)
notes: 中文圈最大权威在线地图源；矢量瓦片可被脚本抓取转 shp，社区有QGIS TianDiTu Tools 插件辅助
verify_notes: HTTP 418 returned, likely anti-bot block | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 天地图（国家测绘地理信息部门）提供的矢量瓦片与数据API服务，包含公路（LRDL）、铁路（LRRL）、水系和居民地等图层，覆盖中国，是中文圈最大的权威在线地图源。数据通过API以瓦片或GeoJSON形式提供，可借助QGIS的TianDiTu Tools插件或脚本转换为Shapefile。需申请Key、限非商业使用，并受相关审图号约束。
desc_en: Tianditu's vector-tile and data API service, provided by China's national surveying and mapping authority, exposes layers for roads (LRDL), railways (LRRL), hydrography and settlements across China, and is the largest authoritative online map source in the Chinese-speaking world. Data is delivered via API as tiles or GeoJSON and can be converted to shapefile using the QGIS TianDiTu Tools plugin or scripts. An API key is required, use is non-commercial, and official map-review numbers apply.

name: 标准地图服务系统 (Standard Maps, MNR)
provider: 自然资源部 (MNR) 测绘地理信息局
theme_raw: Authoritative Chinese & world standard boundary maps | admin_boundaries
license: Free, with attribution; official approved boundaries
notes: 知乎 p/702676540 推荐为合规中国/世界边界来源
verify_notes: WebFetch 报 self-signed certificate, 可能 HTTPS 证书问题或反爬; 浏览器仍可访问 (官方标准地图服务) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 自然资源部测绘地理信息部门运营的标准地图服务系统，提供经官方审核批准的中国及世界标准地图与边界，覆盖中国与全球。数据以EPS矢量和JPG格式提供，可在通过审图号后直接下载，免费使用但需署名。它是合规绘制中国及世界边界的官方权威来源，常被推荐用于出版与公开制图。
desc_en: Operated by the surveying and mapping branch of China's Ministry of Natural Resources (MNR), the Standard Maps service provides officially reviewed and approved standard maps and boundaries for China and the world, with both national and global coverage. Data is offered as EPS vector and JPG and can be downloaded directly with the relevant map-review number; it is free with attribution. It is the authoritative, compliance-safe source for depicting Chinese and world boundaries in publications and public maps.

name: 百度地图开放平台 BMap.Boundary (行政区边界)
license: 百度 LBS ToS (注册 AK)
notes: 用得少于高德, 坐标系 BD-09 转换更繁琐; 仅支持区级及以上
verify_notes: Endpoint api.map.baidu.com/place/v2/search; SN verification optional | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 百度地图开放平台提供的BMap.Boundary行政区边界接口，覆盖中国国家、省、市、区县级别，通过API以JSON形式返回边界。它适合在百度地图生态内进行行政区划绘制与空间查询，但仅支持到区县级，且坐标系为BD-09、转换较繁琐，整体使用度低于高德。调用需申请AK密钥，遵循百度LBS服务条款。
desc_en: Baidu Maps Open Platform's BMap.Boundary API returns administrative-district boundaries for China at national, provincial, city and county/district levels, delivered as JSON. It suits boundary rendering and spatial queries within the Baidu ecosystem, but only down to county level, and uses the BD-09 coordinate system, which complicates conversion; it is less used than AMap. Access requires an AK key and is governed by Baidu's LBS terms of service.

name: 青藏高原边界数据总集 / Tibetan Plateau Boundary Dataset Collection
provider: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 (TPDC)
theme_raw: physiographic boundary / 高原边界 | Boundary / Administrative
notes: Five canonical TP boundary polygons used in nearly all TP studies. Derived from ETOPO5.
verify_notes: TPDC 页面存在但 WebFetch 抓取内容稀薄（JS 渲染）；license/formats 需登录查看 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布的青藏高原边界数据总集，汇集了五种被广泛采用的青藏高原边界多边形（部分基于ETOPO5），覆盖范围约为东经65–105度、北纬20–45度。数据以Shapefile和KMZ格式提供，几乎是所有青藏高原研究的标准空间界定底图。访问需注册，面向学术免费使用。
desc_en: Published by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), this collection assembles five canonical Tibetan Plateau boundary polygons (partly derived from ETOPO5), covering roughly 65-105°E and 20-45°N. Supplied as shapefile and KMZ, these boundaries are used in nearly all Tibetan Plateau studies as a standard spatial delineation. Access requires registration and is free for academic use under TPDC terms.

name: "一带一路"沿线8个关键节点区域百米尺度人口格网数据集 (2015, WorldPop1.0) — 含节点区行政矢量
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Energy & infrastructure
notes: Population grid raster comes with vector boundary delineations of the 8 key nodes
verify_notes: TPDC timeout | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: TPDC发布的“一带一路”沿线8个关键节点区域百米尺度人口格网数据集（2015年，基于WorldPop 1.0），主产品为高分辨率人口栅格，并附带8个节点区域的行政边界矢量。它聚焦于一带一路重点节点的人口分布、基础设施与社会经济分析。数据以栅格加配套Shapefile形式提供，访问需注册，面向学术使用。
desc_en: This TPDC dataset provides 100-metre-scale population grids for eight key node regions along the Belt and Road for 2015, based on WorldPop 1.0, accompanied by administrative boundary vectors delineating those node areas. It targets population distribution, infrastructure and socioeconomic analysis at strategic BRI nodes. Delivered as raster grids plus accompanying shapefiles, it requires registration and is intended for academic use.

name: "一带一路"沿线国家植被覆盖状况恢复力数据集 (2000-2020) — 含国家边界矢量
lychee_status: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (http://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/zh-hans/data/24312c5e-9288-450b-acba-d5cb9edaea5f))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (http://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/zh-hans/data/24312c5e-9288-450b-acba-d5cb9edaea5f))
notes: Country-level vector boundaries accompany the resilience indicator
verify_notes: Connection refused; subdomain poles.tpdc may be deprecated | lychee:Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (http://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/zh-hans/data/24312c5e-9288-450b-acba-d5cb9edaea5f))
desc_zh: TPDC极地数据分中心发布的“一带一路”沿线国家植被覆盖恢复力数据集（2000–2020年），主产品为植被恢复力指标栅格，并附带相关国家的国家级边界矢量。它适用于评估一带一路沿线生态系统稳定性与植被对扰动的恢复能力。数据以栅格加国家边界Shapefile形式提供，访问需注册，面向学术使用。
desc_en: Published by TPDC's Poles branch, this dataset characterises vegetation-cover resilience for Belt and Road countries over 2000-2020, with the main product being resilience-indicator rasters accompanied by country-level boundary shapefiles. It supports assessment of ecosystem stability and vegetation recovery from disturbance along the BRI. Provided as raster plus country-boundary vectors, it requires registration and is intended for academic use.

name: 1990-2015 中国30万以上城市建成区标准化矢量数据集 (SUBAD-China)
provider: 中国科学院遥感所 (Aerospace Information Research Institute)
theme_raw: 城市边界 / 不透水面
notes: 罕有的真正以矢量形式公开发布的中国城市边界数据; 配套混淆矩阵和验证点
verify_notes: PDF served; binary content (734KB, 10 pages, Chinese) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SUBAD-China是中国科学院遥感所（空天信息创新研究院）发布的1990至2015年中国30万以上人口城市建成区标准化矢量数据集，覆盖中国433个城市，包含约2598个矢量文件。它是少有的以矢量形式公开发布的中国城市建成区边界数据，配套混淆矩阵与验证点，适用于城市扩张与城镇化研究。以开放许可（中国科学数据CC-BY）随论文发布。
desc_en: SUBAD-China, released by the Aerospace Information Research Institute (CAS), is a standardised vector dataset of built-up areas for Chinese cities with over 300,000 inhabitants from 1990 to 2015, covering 433 cities across roughly 2,598 vector files. It is a rare openly published vector product of Chinese urban built-up boundaries, supplied with confusion matrices and validation points, and is well suited to urban-expansion and urbanisation research. It is released openly (China Scientific Data, CC-BY) alongside its paper.

name: 2022 Cartographic Boundary File (SHP), United States, 1:20,000,000
verify_notes: 1:20M national boundary | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国人口普查局发布的2022年制图边界文件（Shapefile），比例尺为1:20,000,000，覆盖美国。这是经过制图简化的小比例尺边界，适合全国尺度的统计制图与可视化，而非精确测量。数据以CC0 1.0公共领域许可开放发布，可在data.gov自由获取。
desc_en: A 2022 cartographic boundary file (shapefile) from the U.S. Census Bureau at 1:20,000,000 scale covering the United States. These are generalised, small-scale boundaries intended for national-level statistical mapping and visualisation rather than precise measurement. Released under a CC0 1.0 public-domain dedication, it is freely available via data.gov.

name: 360info Country Centroids v2024-05-02
what_changes: Converts geoBoundaries ADM0 polygons into single centroid points per country, intended for bubble maps / arc maps where polygon geometry is unnecessary.
notes: Explicitly states 'based on the geoBoundaries.org ADM0 boundaries'. Low-profile derivative published by the 360info organisation.
verify_notes: 360-info country-centroids v2024-05-02, derived from geoBoundaries ADM0 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由360info组织发布的国家质心数据集（2024-05-02版），为各国提供代表性中心点坐标，明确基于geoBoundaries.org的ADM0国家边界派生。它适合在全球地图上做国家标注、数据连接与可视化定位。这是一份较为小众的衍生产品，以CC-BY 4.0许可发布，托管于Zenodo。
desc_en: Published by the 360info organisation, this country-centroids dataset (version 2024-05-02) provides representative point coordinates for nations, explicitly derived from the geoBoundaries.org ADM0 boundaries. It is handy for labelling countries on global maps, joining tabular data and positioning visualisations. A relatively low-profile derivative, it is released under CC-BY 4.0 and hosted on Zenodo.

name: 500 Cities: City Boundaries
provider: U.S. Department of Health & Human Services / CDC
verify_notes: 500 Cities city boundary shapefile; CDC source | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由美国卫生与公众服务部/CDC发布的“500 Cities”城市边界数据，覆盖美国500个最大城市，是500 Cities公共卫生项目的地理底图。数据以Shapefile和GeoJSON格式提供，可用于将城市级健康指标空间化与制图。以ODbL许可开放发布，可在data.gov免费获取。
desc_en: Part of the CDC/HHS "500 Cities" project, this dataset provides city boundary polygons for the 500 largest U.S. cities, serving as the geographic base for the project's public-health indicators. Supplied as shapefile and GeoJSON, it is useful for mapping and spatially joining city-level health metrics. It is openly available via data.gov under an ODbL licence.

name: aaron-strauss/precinct-shapefiles
notes: Project notes nvkelso/election-geodata as more current alternative
verify_notes: Per-state directories | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Aaron Strauss在GitHub上维护的美国选区（precinct）Shapefile集合，覆盖约33个州（如AK、CA、FL、GA、IL、NC、PA、TX等）。这类细粒度选区边界适用于选举分析、选区划分与政治地理研究。项目本身指出nvkelso/election-geodata是更新更及时的替代来源；仓库未明确说明许可证。
desc_en: An open GitHub collection of U.S. voting-precinct shapefiles maintained by Aaron Strauss, covering roughly 33 states (including AK, CA, FL, GA, IL, NC, PA and TX). These fine-grained precinct boundaries support election analysis, redistricting and political-geography research. The project itself notes nvkelso/election-geodata as a more current alternative, and no explicit licence is specified for the repository.

name: ABS ASGS Edition 3 - 2021 Statistical Area Level 2 (SA2)
notes: Statistical Area Level 2 polygons; part of ASGS Main Structure.
verify_notes: ABS ASGS Edition 3 SA2; content snippet limited | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳大利亚统计局（ABS）发布的ASGS第3版（2021年）二级统计区（SA2）数据，是澳大利亚统计地理标准主结构的一部分，覆盖全澳。SA2是常用的社区级统计单元，适合人口普查数据制图与区域社会经济分析。数据以Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML及WFS/FeatureServer等多种形式提供，以CC-BY 4.0许可开放下载。
desc_en: The Australian Bureau of Statistics' ASGS Edition 3 (2021) Statistical Area Level 2 (SA2) dataset forms part of the ASGS Main Structure and covers all of Australia. SA2s are widely used community-level statistical units, ideal for census mapping and regional socioeconomic analysis. Available as shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and via WFS/FeatureServer, it is openly downloadable under CC-BY 4.0.

name: ABS Australian Statistical Geography Standard (ASGS) Boundaries
provider: Australian Bureau of Statistics via FSDF / data.gov.au
coverage: SA1/SA2/SA3/SA4, Mesh Blocks, LGAs across Australia
access: FSDF/data.gov.au CKAN + ABS geospatial web services
notes: SA1 is finest census reporting unit
verify_notes: FSDF link retired; resource now at Digital Atlas of Australia | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳大利亚统计局通过FSDF/data.gov.au发布的ASGS统计地理标准边界数据，涵盖SA1/SA2/SA3/SA4、网格区块（Mesh Blocks）以及地方政府区（LGA）等多级单元，覆盖全澳。其中SA1是最精细的普查报告单元，适合人口普查、社会经济与区域统计分析。数据以GeoPackage、Shapefile及WFS/WMS服务提供，以CC-BY 4.0许可开放获取。
desc_en: Provided by the ABS via FSDF/data.gov.au, this dataset delivers the full ASGS boundary hierarchy, including SA1-SA4, Mesh Blocks and Local Government Areas across Australia. SA1 is the finest census-reporting unit, making it suitable for census, socioeconomic and regional statistical analysis. Available as GeoPackage and shapefile and through WFS/WMS web services, it is openly accessible under CC-BY 4.0.

name: ACT State Electoral Boundaries (Geoscape)
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由Geoscape Australia与首都领地选举委员会提供的ACT州选举边界数据，覆盖澳大利亚首都领地（ACT），属Geoscape行政边界产品系列。它适用于选举管理、选区分析与政治地理制图。数据以Shapefile和GeoPackage格式提供，以CC-BY 4.0许可开放下载。
desc_en: Provided by Geoscape Australia and the ACT Electoral Commission, this dataset delineates state electoral boundaries for the Australian Capital Territory as part of the Geoscape Administrative Boundaries suite. It supports electoral administration, district analysis and political-geography mapping. Supplied as shapefile and GeoPackage, it is openly available under CC-BY 4.0.

name: ACT Suburb/Locality Boundaries (Geoscape)
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由Geoscape Australia提供的ACT郊区/地名（suburb/locality）边界数据，覆盖澳大利亚首都领地，属Geoscape行政边界产品系列。它适用于地址定位、地名查询与本地化制图等场景。数据以Shapefile和GeoPackage格式提供，以CC-BY 4.0许可开放下载。
desc_en: Provided by Geoscape Australia, this dataset delineates suburb and locality boundaries for the Australian Capital Territory as part of the Geoscape Administrative Boundaries suite. It is useful for address location, place-name lookup and localised mapping. Supplied as shapefile and GeoPackage, it is openly available under CC-BY 4.0.

name: Admin 1 – States/Provinces (10m)
verify_notes: Direct download exceeds 10MB content limit but URL is reachable. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Natural Earth的Admin 1州/省级边界数据（1:10m，最精细比例尺），覆盖全球各国的一级行政区划。Natural Earth是制图领域广受欢迎的免费公共领域底图，数据经过制图优化，适合全球及区域尺度的地图制作。以Shapefile格式经CDN提供，属公共领域，可自由使用。
desc_en: Natural Earth's Admin 1 states/provinces layer at 1:10m (its most detailed scale), covering first-level administrative divisions for countries worldwide. Natural Earth is a widely used, free public-domain basemap source, cartographically optimised for global and regional map production. Delivered as a shapefile via CDN, it is public domain and free to use without restriction.

name: Admin 2 – Counties (10m, US)
verify_notes: Binary zip downloaded successfully | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Natural Earth的Admin 2县级边界数据（1:10m），覆盖美国各县。它是Natural Earth公共领域底图系列中较细粒度的一层，适合美国全国尺度的县级制图与可视化。数据以Shapefile格式经CDN提供，文件约1.8MB，属公共领域，可自由使用。
desc_en: Natural Earth's Admin 2 counties layer at 1:10m, covering U.S. counties. As one of the finer-grained layers in Natural Earth's public-domain basemap series, it suits national-scale county mapping and visualisation across the United States. Delivered as a shapefile via CDN at around 1.8 MB, it is public domain and free to use.

name: Administrative Boundaries in Canada - CanVec Series - Administrative Features
verify_notes: Last modified 2025-12-22 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 加拿大自然资源部（NRCan）CanVec系列中的行政要素数据，提供加拿大的行政边界，比例尺从1:5万到1:2500万多尺度可选。它是加拿大权威的基础地理参考数据，适合多尺度制图与国家级空间分析。数据以Shapefile和文件地理数据库（FGDB）格式提供，遵循加拿大开放政府许可（OGL）。
desc_en: Part of NRCan's CanVec series, this Administrative Features dataset provides Canada's administrative boundaries at multiple scales from 1:50k to 1:25M. It is an authoritative foundational geospatial reference for Canada, suitable for multi-scale mapping and national spatial analysis. Available as shapefile and file geodatabase (FGDB), it is distributed under the Open Government Licence - Canada.

name: Administrative Boundary Vector Tile Maps (town/block level)
provider: CODH / NII (combining MLIT KSJ + Statistics Bureau Census)
coverage: Japan, as of 2020-01-01 (MLIT KSJ) + 2020 Census Town/Block Boundaries
license: Derived from MLIT KSJ (open) and Statistics Bureau Census (open); CC BY-style attribution required
doi_or_citation: Source: MLIT 国土数値情報 行政区域データ (2020) + 総務省統計局 国勢調査町丁・字等別境界データ (2020)
notes: Sister product complementing the historical dataset with contemporary fine-grained town-block boundaries.
verify_notes: Zoom 5-16+ binary vector tiles | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由日本CODH/NII发布的行政边界矢量瓦片地图，整合了国土交通省国土数值情报（MLIT KSJ，2020年1月1日基准）与总务省统计局2020年国势调查的町丁·字等界线，覆盖日本，可细至町/街区级别。数据以Mapbox矢量瓦片提供（市町村级缩放5-12，町级13-16+），通过开放瓦片端点访问，是其历史边界数据的现代细粒度配套产品。
desc_en: Published by CODH/NII, this administrative-boundary vector-tile map combines MLIT's KSJ administrative areas (as of 2020-01-01) with the Statistics Bureau's 2020 Census town/block boundaries, covering Japan down to town and block level. Served as Mapbox Vector Tiles (municipal at zoom 5-12, town-level at 13-16+) via open tile endpoints, it is a contemporary fine-grained companion to the project's historical boundary dataset.

name: Administrative enheter - fylker
notes: Counterpart to kommuner
verify_notes: lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 挪威国家测绘局（Kartverket）发布的“行政单元—县（fylker）”数据，覆盖挪威全境的县级行政边界，是kommuner（市镇）数据的上一级配套产品。它是挪威权威官方行政区划数据，适合区域统计与国家级制图。数据以FGDB、GML和SOSI格式提供，支持下载与WFS访问，遵循CC-BY 4.0许可。
desc_en: Published by Norway's national mapping authority Kartverket, this "administrative units - counties (fylker)" dataset provides county-level boundaries for all of Norway, serving as the tier above the kommuner (municipalities) dataset. As authoritative official administrative geography, it suits regional statistics and national mapping. Available as FGDB, GML and SOSI with download and WFS access, it is licensed under CC-BY 4.0.

name: Administrative enheter - kommuner
verify_notes: Kommune (municipality) admin boundaries | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 挪威国家测绘局（Kartverket）发布的“行政单元—市镇（kommuner）”数据，覆盖挪威全境的市镇级行政边界，是挪威最常用的基础行政区划单元。它适合本地行政、人口统计与国家级制图。数据以FGDB、GML、SOSI和GeoJSON等格式提供，支持下载与WFS访问，遵循CC-BY 4.0/NLOD许可。
desc_en: Published by Kartverket, this "administrative units - municipalities (kommuner)" dataset provides municipality-level boundaries for all of Norway, the most commonly used base administrative unit in the country. It supports local administration, demographics and national mapping. Available as FGDB, GML, SOSI and GeoJSON with download and WFS access, it is licensed under CC-BY 4.0 / NLOD.

name: Africa Crop Field Boundary Labels (Lacuna Fund)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
formats_now: S3 vector labels + Planet imagery; rasterized labels
notes: Field labels for smallholder agriculture; AWS Open Data + paper
verify_notes: License is Planet NICFI participant agreement (more restrictive than generic CC-BY). | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由Clark University、Farmerline和Spatial Collective在Lacuna Fund资助下制作的非洲农田田块边界标注数据，覆盖撒哈拉以南非洲，时间约2017至2023年。它聚焦小农农业的田块边界，可用于训练田块分割模型、农业监测与遥感研究。数据以GeoJSON/GeoParquet矢量格式提供，托管于AWS开放数据，配套论文（arXiv:2412.18483），遵循Planet NICFI参与者许可。
desc_en: Produced by Clark University, Farmerline and Spatial Collective with Lacuna Fund support, this dataset provides crop field-boundary labels across Sub-Saharan Africa for roughly 2017-2023. Focused on smallholder agriculture, it is well suited to training field-delineation models, agricultural monitoring and remote-sensing research. Delivered as GeoJSON/GeoParquet vectors via AWS Open Data with an accompanying paper (arXiv:2412.18483), it is distributed under the Planet NICFI participant licence.

name: Africapolis on Data Basis
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
notes: Alternate accessible mirror of Africapolis vector boundaries
verify_notes: Africapolis dataset entry, 1950-2010 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是OECD西非俱乐部（SWAC）Africapolis数据在Data Basis平台上的镜像版本，提供非洲城市聚集区（urban agglomeration）的矢量边界。Africapolis是关于非洲城市化与城市动态的权威数据库，适合城市增长、人口与区域发展研究。数据以GeoJSON和Shapefile格式开放下载，使用须遵循OECD Africapolis的相关条款。
desc_en: This is a Data Basis mirror of OECD SWAC's Africapolis dataset, providing vector boundaries of urban agglomerations across Africa. Africapolis is an authoritative reference on African urbanisation and city dynamics, useful for studying urban growth, population and regional development. Offered as openly downloadable GeoJSON and shapefile, its use is subject to the OECD Africapolis terms.

name: AI4Boundaries / EuroCrops harmonised LPIS
theme_raw: Crop field boundaries with crop labels
license: Mixed (per-country LPIS terms; bundled CC-BY where allowed)
notes: Standardised pan-EU LPIS — rare aggregation of 27 national field-boundary datasets
verify_notes: Active; satellite imagery planned | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: AI4Boundaries/EuroCrops是由JRC与慕尼黑工业大学（TUM）制作的泛欧统一土地利用图斑（LPIS）田块数据，覆盖欧盟27国，将各国农田申报数据库标准化整合为统一作物分类体系。它是少有的跨27国田块边界聚合数据，适合作物类型分类、农业遥感与农田监测研究。数据以GeoPackage、Shapefile和Parquet格式直接下载，遵循CC-BY 4.0许可。
desc_en: AI4Boundaries/EuroCrops, produced by the JRC and TUM, is a harmonised pan-European LPIS field dataset covering the EU-27, standardising national parcel-declaration databases into a common crop taxonomy. A rare aggregation of 27 national field-boundary datasets, it is well suited to crop-type classification, agricultural remote sensing and parcel monitoring. Available for direct download as GeoPackage, shapefile and Parquet under a CC-BY 4.0 licence.

name: Antarctic masks (ice-shelves, ice-sheet, and islands), link to shape file
verify_notes: Antarctic masks - ice shelves/sheet/islands | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由Depoorter等人(2013)发布、托管于PANGAEA的南极掩膜数据，包含冰架、冰盖和岛屿的多边形矢量，覆盖南极洲。它常用于南极冰架研究、物质平衡计算与区域空间界定。数据以ESRI Shapefile（多边形）格式开放下载，文件约15.8MB，遵循CC-BY 3.0许可。
desc_en: Published by Depoorter et al. (2013) and hosted on PANGAEA, this dataset provides polygon masks for Antarctic ice shelves, the ice sheet and islands, covering Antarctica. It is commonly used in ice-shelf studies, mass-balance calculations and regional spatial delineation. Available as ESRI shapefile polygons (about 15.8 MB) for open download under a CC-BY 3.0 licence.

name: ARC Open Data & Mapping Hub (Atlanta Regional Commission)
notes: Cited county boundaries dataset confirmed live
verify_notes: ARC Open Data & Mapping Hub (Atlanta Regional Commission) | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 亚特兰大区域委员会（ARC）的开放数据与制图门户，提供大亚特兰大都市区（佐治亚州）的多种地理数据，包括县界、交通等图层。它适合区域规划、交通与本地空间分析。数据以Shapefile、GeoJSON和KML格式开放直接下载，其中县界数据已确认在线可用。
desc_en: The Atlanta Regional Commission's open data and mapping hub provides a range of geospatial datasets for metropolitan Atlanta, Georgia, including county boundaries and transportation layers. It supports regional planning, transportation and local spatial analysis. Data is openly available for direct download as shapefile, GeoJSON and KML, with the county-boundaries dataset confirmed live.

name: ArcGIS Living Atlas of the World
notes: Featured in awesome-arcgis Vector section; downloads via Download Dataset button
verify_notes: Page returned redirect placeholder content | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: ArcGIS Living Atlas of the World是Esri与社区共建的全球权威地理内容库，覆盖全球，提供从行政边界到影像、人口、环境等海量图层与底图。它适合在ArcGIS生态内快速获取参考数据与制图底图。数据以Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML和要素服务等多种形式提供，许可证混合（许多为开放），可开放访问或通过ArcGIS Online账号获取。
desc_en: The ArcGIS Living Atlas of the World is a curated global collection of authoritative geographic content built by Esri and its community, spanning everything from administrative boundaries to imagery, demographics and environmental layers worldwide. It is ideal for quickly sourcing reference data and basemaps within the ArcGIS ecosystem. Content is offered as shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and feature services under mixed (often open) licences, accessible openly or via an ArcGIS Online account.

name: Archipelagic Waters v4
notes: Archipelagic waters as defined under UNCLOS.
verify_notes: Archipelagic Waters v4 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由比利时VLIZ/Marine Regions发布的群岛水域（Archipelagic Waters）v4数据，依据《联合国海洋法公约》(UNCLOS)定义全球群岛国家的群岛水域，覆盖全球。它适合海洋管辖、海洋空间规划与海洋边界研究。数据以Shapefile、GeoPackage和WFS服务提供（图层MarineRegions:eez_archipelagic_waters），遵循CC-BY 4.0许可。
desc_en: Published by VLIZ/Marine Regions, Archipelagic Waters v4 delineates archipelagic waters as defined under UNCLOS for archipelagic states globally. It supports maritime jurisdiction, marine spatial planning and ocean-boundary research. Available as shapefile, GeoPackage and via WFS (layer MarineRegions:eez_archipelagic_waters), it is distributed under a CC-BY 4.0 licence.

name: Arctic Maritime Boundaries (NGA)
doi_or_citation: Subset of NGA World Maritime Boundaries
notes: Companion regional cut of the world maritime boundary database.
verify_notes: Page accessible but content minimal in scrape | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集是美国国家地理空间情报局（NGA）世界海洋边界数据库针对北极地区的区域切片，呈现北极海域的领海、专属经济区等海上边界线。作为美国政府公有领域数据，可经 ArcGIS Hub 免费开放获取，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、GPKG 等多种矢量格式。适用于北极航运、海洋治理、管辖权分析及极地地图制作等场景。
desc_en: This dataset is the Arctic regional cut of NGA's World Maritime Boundaries database, depicting maritime boundary lines (territorial seas, EEZs and related limits) across the Arctic. Released as U.S. Public Domain data and freely available through ArcGIS Hub, it ships in Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and GPKG vector formats. It supports Arctic shipping, ocean governance, jurisdictional analysis and polar cartography. As a companion regional subset, it inherits the source database's compilation and structure.

name: Arctic SDI Geoportal - administrative reference layer
provider: Arctic SDI partnership (8 national mapping agencies)
formats: WMS, WMTS, evolving OGC API support
notes: Cross-NMA harmonized; WFS limited but OGC API roadmap in Oskari.
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic SDI）地理门户由八个北极国家测绘机构合作建设，提供经跨机构协调的环北极行政与参考底图图层。数据通过基于 Oskari 的地理门户以 WMS、WMTS 等 OGC 服务发布，并在逐步扩展 OGC API 支持，目前 WFS 能力有限。许可条款因各国测绘机构而异。适用于环极区域的统一制图、跨境分析与北极协作研究。
desc_en: The Arctic SDI Geoportal is a collaboration of eight national mapping agencies providing a harmonized circumpolar administrative and reference base layer. Data are served as OGC services (WMS, WMTS, with an evolving OGC API roadmap) through an Oskari-based geoportal, though WFS support remains limited. Licensing varies by national mapping agency. The cross-NMA harmonization makes it well suited to seamless pan-Arctic mapping, cross-border analysis and Arctic Council–related research.

name: AreaCity-JsSpider-StatsGov 省市区镇+坐标边界
theme_raw: 行政统计单元-省/市/区/乡镇/街道边界
coverage: 全国,精确到乡镇/街道,2024-2026持续更新
formats_now: SHP, GeoJSON, MySQL, SQL Server, ArcGIS, QGIS, MapInfo
notes: 综合民政部/国家地名信息库/统计局/高德/腾讯,覆盖普查统计区
verify_notes: Page accessible; updated to 2026 data | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该开源项目（GitHub，xiangyuecn）提供中国全国省、市、区县、乡镇/街道四级行政区划及坐标边界数据，精确到乡镇/街道层级，并在 2024–2026 年持续更新。数据综合自民政部、国家地名信息库、统计局及高德、腾讯等来源，并覆盖普查统计区。提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、SQL、CSV 等格式，可在 GitHub 免费获取，适用于行政区划匹配、统计制图与地址解析。
desc_en: This open-source project (GitHub, xiangyuecn) provides China's full administrative hierarchy—province, city, district/county and township/street levels—with coordinate boundaries down to the township level, continuously updated through 2024–2026. It aggregates official sources (Ministry of Civil Affairs, the national place-name database, statistics bureau) with Amap and Tencent data, and also covers census statistical zones. Available free on GitHub in Shapefile, GeoJSON, SQL and CSV, it suits administrative geocoding, statistical mapping and address parsing.

name: AreaCity-Query-Geometry 内置测试 GeoJSON (世界大洲 + 中国省级简化)
theme_raw: 测试用极简行政边界 GeoJSON
coverage: 世界大洲轮廓 + 中国 34 省级简化轮廓
license: MIT (但 README 明确声明 '不可在其它地方使用')
formats_now: GeoJSON, WKT, WKB, WKBS; 配套工具支持 shp/kml/gpkg
notes: 仅作 demo/单元测试, 精度过低不能用于研究或制图; 列出仅作完整性
verify_notes: Java 项目, README 声明数据不可在其它地方使用 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 AreaCity-Query-Geometry 代码库内置的演示/单元测试 GeoJSON，包含世界各大洲轮廓及中国 34 个省级简化边界。采用 MIT 许可，随代码免费提供。需注意其精度过低，仅供功能演示与单元测试，不适合用于研究或正式制图，此处列出仅为数据完整性。
desc_en: This is the demo/unit-test GeoJSON bundled inside the AreaCity-Query-Geometry repository, containing world continent outlines plus simplified boundaries for China's 34 provincial-level units. Released under the MIT license and shipped with the code, it is intentionally low-resolution and meant only for functional demos and unit testing—not for research or production cartography. It is listed here for completeness rather than analytical value.

name: Asiaq Greenland Survey NunaGIS vector datasets
notes: Greenland contribution to Arctic SDI.
verify_notes: Operational, Greenland NunaGIS portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NunaGIS 是格陵兰测绘机构 Asiaq（Greenland Survey）运营的格陵兰矢量空间数据服务，涵盖行政边界、水文及能源与基础设施等主题。数据通过 WMS、WFS 及 GeoJSON 提供，并以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 等格式发布，是格陵兰向北极 SDI 贡献的本地数据来源。许可条款未明确标注。适用于格陵兰区域的资源、基础设施与环境规划及北极研究。
desc_en: NunaGIS is the geospatial data service of Asiaq – Greenland Survey, offering vector layers for Greenland covering administrative boundaries, hydrography and energy/infrastructure themes. Data are delivered via WMS, WFS and GeoJSON and published in Shapefile and GeoJSON formats, serving as Greenland's contribution to the Arctic SDI. Licensing terms are not explicitly stated. It is useful for regional planning, infrastructure and environmental work and Arctic studies focused on Greenland.

name: AUS - Australia outline (ASGS Ed. 3)
notes: Continental polygon used as ASGS national level.
verify_notes: JS-rendered SPA, minimal scrapeable text | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集是澳大利亚统计局（ABS）基于澳大利亚统计地理标准第三版（ASGS Ed. 3）发布的澳大利亚大陆国家级轮廓多边形。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可开放提供，格式包括 Shapefile、GeoPackage 及 FeatureServer 服务。作为 ASGS 体系的国家层级边界，适用于全国制图底图、统计数据汇总与空间分析。
desc_en: This dataset is the Australia continental outline polygon published by the Australian Bureau of Statistics (ABS) as the national level of the Australian Statistical Geography Standard, Edition 3 (ASGS Ed. 3). Released under CC BY 4.0, it is available as Shapefile, GeoPackage and a FeatureServer service. As the ASGS national boundary, it serves as a base layer for nationwide mapping, statistical aggregation and spatial analysis across Australia.

name: Austro-Hungarian Empire 1910 (v 1.0) Feature Server
provider: ArcGIS Hub (community share, sourced from CHGIS-style work)
notes: Useful for cross-border historical demographic mapping.
verify_notes: Token Required; service exists but needs auth; try ?f=pjson | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为奥匈帝国 1910 年（v1.0）历史行政边界，通过 ArcGIS Hub 社区共享，采用类似 CHGIS 历史地理信息系统的方法编制。数据以 Esri FeatureServer 服务形式提供并可导出为 shapefile，许可未明确（可能为开放）。适用于跨境历史人口与社会经济制图、历史地理及帝国行政区划研究。
desc_en: This dataset represents the administrative boundaries of the Austro-Hungarian Empire as of 1910 (v1.0), shared via ArcGIS Hub and compiled in a CHGIS-style historical-GIS approach. It is served as an Esri FeatureServer with shapefile export, with licensing unspecified (likely open). It is useful for cross-border historical demographic and socioeconomic mapping, historical geography and the study of the empire's internal administrative divisions.

name: BANO - Base d'Adresses Nationale Ouverte (France)
notes: Provides commune-level admin linkage
verify_notes: updated daily; 16M+ FR addresses | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BANO（开放国家地址库）由 OpenStreetMap France 维护，提供覆盖法国全境的地址点数据，并可关联至市镇（commune）级行政区划。数据以 ODbL 许可发布，通过 data.gouv.fr 直接下载，格式包括 Shapefile、CSV 与 GeoJSON。适用于地理编码、地址匹配、配送规划及市镇级空间统计分析。
desc_en: BANO (Base d'Adresses Nationale Ouverte) is an open national address database for France maintained by OpenStreetMap France, providing address points with commune-level administrative linkage. Released under the ODbL license, it is available for direct download from data.gouv.fr in Shapefile, CSV and GeoJSON formats. It supports geocoding, address matching, delivery and logistics planning, and commune-level spatial statistics across France.

name: BarbarossaWang/cn-atlas (TopoJSON/GeoJSON)
notes: 基于 ruiduobao/shengshixian.com 2023 版本 (Tianditu 派生)
verify_notes: Derived from ruiduobao/shengshixian.com 2023 edition | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: cn-atlas（GitHub，BarbarossaWang）提供中国省、市、县三级行政边界，格式为 TopoJSON 与 GeoJSON，适合 Web 地图与可视化使用。数据派生自 ruiduobao/shengshixian.com 2023 版本（源自天地图）。仓库未见明确 LICENSE，使用前需注意授权情况。适用于前端地图渲染、行政区划可视化与轻量级空间分析。
desc_en: cn-atlas (GitHub, BarbarossaWang) provides China's provincial, prefecture and county-level administrative boundaries in TopoJSON and GeoJSON, well suited to web maps and visualization. The data are derived from the ruiduobao/shengshixian.com 2023 release (itself Tianditu-derived). No explicit LICENSE is visible in the repository, so licensing should be checked before reuse. It is useful for front-end map rendering, administrative-division visualization and lightweight spatial analysis.

name: Belgium WFS catalog (community-maintained list)
theme_raw: administrative units, cadastral, statistical sectors WFS endpoints in Belgium
license: catalog itself MIT-ish; data per provider
feature_count: ~400+ WFS services (Belgium 21, Brussels 45, Flanders 200+, Wallonia 1, World 6)
notes: Lightweight aggregation; useful starting point for federated discovery.
verify_notes: Actively maintained, latest commit 2026-04-21, 183 commits; mirror site wfs.michelstuyts.be | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一个由社区维护的比利时 WFS 服务目录（Codeberg，gis-projects/Belgium-WFS），汇总了约 400 多个 WFS 端点，覆盖比利时（21）、布鲁塞尔（45）、佛兰德斯（200+）、瓦隆（1）及世界范围（6），最近更新于 2026-04-21，涉及行政边界与 POI/地点等主题。该目录本身不含数据，而是端点清单，许可未明确。适用于比利时联邦化地理数据发现与服务接入的起点。
desc_en: This is a community-maintained catalog of Belgian WFS services (Codeberg, gis-projects/Belgium-WFS), aggregating roughly 400+ WFS endpoints across Belgium (21), Brussels (45), Flanders (200+), Wallonia (1) and World (6), last updated 2026-04-21, spanning administrative boundaries and POI/places. Rather than data itself, it is a lightweight list of endpoints, with licensing unspecified. It serves as a useful starting point for federated discovery and access to Belgian geospatial services.

name: bennyistanto/geodata
theme_raw: boundaries, climate, hydrography, hazards, POI, transport, utilities
notes: Curated multi-theme vector collection.
verify_notes: Active repo for Indonesia geodata compilation; no license file visible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: bennyistanto/geodata 是由 Benny Istanto 整理的多主题矢量数据集合，涵盖行政边界、POI/地点与交通运输等主题，覆盖印度尼西亚及部分全球子集。数据以 GeoJSON 与 ESRI Shapefile 格式托管于 GitHub。仓库未见明确 LICENSE，复用前需确认授权。适用于印尼及多国区域的制图、参考底图与空间分析。
desc_en: bennyistanto/geodata is a curated multi-theme vector collection assembled by Benny Istanto, covering administrative boundaries, POI/places and transportation, with a focus on Indonesia plus selected global subsets. The data are hosted on GitHub in GeoJSON and ESRI Shapefile formats. No explicit LICENSE is visible, so terms should be confirmed before reuse. It is useful for mapping, reference base layers and spatial analysis across Indonesia and multiple countries.

name: Bharatmaps administrative layers
notes: Government source contributing to SHRUG village/town shapes.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Bharatmaps 是印度国家信息中心（NIC）/印度政府提供的国家级地理门户，发布印度各级行政边界图层。数据遵循 NDSAP / 印度开放政府数据政策，通过门户浏览及 WMS 等矢量服务访问。该政府数据源也为 SHRUG 等村镇形状数据提供支撑。适用于印度全国行政制图、政务空间应用与社会经济分析。
desc_en: Bharatmaps is a national geoportal from NIC / Government of India publishing administrative boundary layers across all of India's administrative levels. Data follow the NDSAP / Open Government Data India policy and are accessed via portal browsing and WMS/vector services. This government source also contributes to village/town shapes used in datasets such as SHRUG. It suits nationwide administrative mapping, e-governance applications and socioeconomic analysis in India.

name: Bigemap 全国行政边界 (省/市/县/乡镇)
provider: Bigemap 软件 (商业, 公开免费部分)
notes: 商业软件附带的公开数据, 教程贴常出现
verify_notes: 301 HTTPS->HTTP redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集是 Bigemap 软件附带的中国省/市/县/乡镇四级行政边界数据，属于商业软件公开免费部分，需注册后下载，格式为 shp。这类数据常见于各类教程贴中。适用于中国行政区划制图、空间叠加分析与教学演示，具体精度与更新情况以官方说明为准。
desc_en: This dataset is the China administrative boundary data (province / city / county / township levels) bundled with the commercial Bigemap software, offered as a free, registration-required download in Shapefile format. It frequently appears in tutorials and how-to posts. It is suitable for administrative-division mapping, spatial overlay analysis and instructional use in China, with exact resolution and update status best confirmed from the official documentation.

name: Bird (2003) Plate Boundaries – fraxen/tectonicplates
provider: Peter Bird (UCLA), repackaged on GitHub by Hugo Ahlenius
theme_raw: 板块边界 / tectonic plate boundaries
notes: Classic Bird 2003 paper supplement, widely reused.
verify_notes: License is ODC-BY rather than CC-BY | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集是 Peter Bird（2003）全球板块边界数据，由 Hugo Ahlenius 在 GitHub 上重新打包发布（fraxen/tectonicplates），呈现全球构造板块及其边界。数据采用 ODC-BY 1.0 许可，可直接下载，格式包括 shapefile、GeoJSON 与 KML，约 5 MB。作为 Bird 2003 经典论文（doi:10.1029/2001GC000252）的补充材料，被广泛复用，适用于地球科学、地震构造与全球尺度地质制图。
desc_en: This dataset is the global tectonic plate boundaries from Peter Bird (2003), repackaged on GitHub by Hugo Ahlenius (fraxen/tectonicplates), depicting Earth's plates and their boundaries. Released under ODC-BY 1.0, it is available for direct download in shapefile, GeoJSON and KML (about 5 MB). As the supplement to the classic Bird 2003 paper (doi:10.1029/2001GC000252), it is widely reused for earth science, seismotectonics and global-scale geological mapping.

name: BirdLife Important Bird and Biodiversity Areas (IBA) boundaries
license_now: Request-based; non-commercial via form, commercial via IBAT
notes: Historically the seed dataset that grew into the KBA framework.
verify_notes: Data request form for IBAs/KBAs | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为国际鸟盟（BirdLife International）的重点鸟类及生物多样性区域（IBA）边界，覆盖全球逾 13,000 个 IBA（多边形及约 350 个点）。数据以 Esri shapefile 形式，通过 DataZone 申请表获取：非商业用途经表单申请，商业用途通过 IBAT 获取。该数据集是后来发展为关键生物多样性区域（KBA）框架的起始数据。适用于生物多样性保护规划、栖息地评估与环境影响分析。
desc_en: This dataset comprises BirdLife International's Important Bird and Biodiversity Areas (IBA) boundaries, covering more than 13,000 IBAs globally (polygons plus around 350 points). Provided as Esri shapefiles, access is request-based through DataZone—non-commercial via an online form and commercial via IBAT. Historically it was the seed dataset that grew into the wider Key Biodiversity Areas (KBA) framework. It supports biodiversity conservation planning, habitat assessment and environmental impact analysis.

name: BKG VG250 / VG5000 Administrative Boundaries WFS (Germany)
theme_raw: German Verwaltungsgebiete (Bund, Länder, Kreise, Gemeinden) carrying Gemeindeschlüssel for census joining
notes: Companion to Zensus 2022 atlas; both downloadable on same INSPIRE-compliant SDI.
verify_notes: Service URL: https://sgx.geodatenzentrum.de/wfs_vg250; updated 2026-02-13 | lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: 该服务由德国联邦测绘与大地测量局（BKG）提供，发布德国 VG250（1:250,000）/VG5000 行政边界，覆盖德国各级行政区划，状态为 2025-01-01，更新周期约一年。数据通过 WFS 2.0、WMS 提供，也支持 Shapefile、GeoPackage 下载，采用 Datenlizenz Deutschland 署名 2.0 许可。它是 2022 年人口普查（Zensus 2022）地图集的配套边界，可在同一 INSPIRE 合规的 SDI 上下载。适用于德国行政制图与人口社会经济统计关联分析。
desc_en: Provided by Germany's Federal Agency for Cartography and Geodesy (BKG), this service publishes the VG250 (1:250,000) / VG5000 administrative boundaries covering all of Germany's administrative levels, with a reference date of 2025-01-01 and an annual update cycle. Data are available via WFS 2.0 and WMS, plus Shapefile and GeoPackage downloads, under the Datenlizenz Deutschland Attribution 2.0 license. It is the companion boundary set to the Zensus 2022 atlas, downloadable from the same INSPIRE-compliant SDI, and supports German administrative mapping and population/socioeconomic analysis.

desc_zh: 该数据集为三江源国家公园边界矢量数据，由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）/三极大数据平台提供，以 Shapefile 格式表达三江源国家公园的范围边界。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，免费提供但需登录下载。适用于国家公园管理、保护地规划、生态环境监测及三江源区域研究。
desc_en: This dataset is the boundary vector data of Sanjiangyuan National Park, provided by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC) / Big Earth Data Platform for Three Poles, delineating the park's extent in Shapefile format. It is released under CC BY 4.0 and is free to download with login required. It is useful for national park management, protected-area planning, ecological and environmental monitoring, and research focused on the Sanjiangyuan (Three Rivers' Source) region.

name: Brazil States
license_now: Not on page (package is MIT upstream)
notes: 27 federation units (states + DF).
verify_notes: geobr v2.0.0 docs page active | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该数据集提供巴西州级行政边界，源自巴西地理与统计局（IBGE），通过 geobr R 包发布，涵盖多个年份。数据共 27 个联邦单元（含各州及联邦区），以 GeoPackage / sf 对象形式提供。geobr 包上游为 MIT 许可（页面未单独标注数据许可）。适用于巴西全国制图、区域统计分析与时间序列行政区划比较。
desc_en: This dataset provides Brazil's state-level administrative boundaries, sourced from IBGE and delivered through the geobr R package across multiple years. It comprises the 27 federation units (states plus the Federal District), available as GeoPackage / sf objects. The geobr package is MIT-licensed upstream (no separate data license stated on the page). It is useful for nationwide mapping, regional statistical analysis and multi-year comparison of Brazil's administrative geography.

name: Built Up Areas (Dec 2022) Boundaries GB BGG
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
license_now: No Licence Provided (mentions OS + ONS IPR)
formats_now: ArcGIS Hub, REST GeoService, CSV, SHP, GeoJSON, KML, FileGDB, GeoPackage, SQLite GDB, XLSX
verify_notes: updated 27 May 2026; 10 distributions | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为英国国家统计局（ONS）发布的 2022 年 12 月版大不列颠建成区（Built Up Areas）边界（BGG），覆盖大不列颠地区，刻画城镇与建成区范围。提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 格式开放获取，页面未提供明确许可，但涉及 Ordnance Survey 与 ONS 的知识产权。适用于城市化分析、土地利用与城乡规划及人口分布研究。
desc_en: This dataset is the Built Up Areas (December 2022) boundaries for Great Britain (BGG) published by the Office for National Statistics, covering Great Britain and delineating the extents of towns and built-up areas. It is openly available in Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML; no explicit license is stated, though Ordnance Survey and ONS intellectual property rights apply. It supports urbanization analysis, land-use and settlement planning, and population-distribution research.

name: CA Geographic Boundaries
verify_notes: CA County/State/Places boundaries from Census TIGER 2023 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为美国加利福尼亚州地理边界，由加州政府提供，涵盖州内行政边界及地点范围。数据以 Shapefile 格式开放获取，许可未明确标注。适用于加州范围内的制图底图、行政区划分析、空间叠加与区域规划研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides the geographic boundaries of the U.S. state of California, supplied by the State of California, covering administrative boundaries and places within the state. It is openly available in Shapefile format, with licensing unspecified. It is useful as a base mapping layer for California and for administrative-division analysis, spatial overlays and regional planning research.

name: CAFF Arctic Biodiversity Data Service – Protected Areas, CAVM, CAFF boundary
provider: Conservation of Arctic Flora and Fauna (Arctic Council working group)
theme_raw: circumpolar Arctic boundary, vegetation, protected areas
notes: Hard-to-find cross-border Arctic Council source; includes Circumpolar Arctic Vegetation Map (CAVM) and the canonical CAFF area boundary.
verify_notes: GeoNetwork search returned 400; root catalog likely OK, query string format may be invalid | lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: 该数据集来自北极动植物保护工作组（CAFF，北极理事会下属）的北极生物多样性数据服务（ABDS），包含环极北极的保护区、环北极植被图（CAVM）及 CAFF 区域边界。数据以 shapefile 与 WMS 形式通过 GeoNetwork 直接下载，许可遵循 CAFF/ABDS 条款（实际接近 CC-BY）。这是较难获取的跨境北极理事会数据源，适用于北极生物多样性、植被与保护地的环极研究。
desc_en: This dataset comes from the Arctic Biodiversity Data Service (ABDS) of CAFF (Conservation of Arctic Flora and Fauna, an Arctic Council working group), and includes circumpolar protected areas, the Circumpolar Arctic Vegetation Map (CAVM) and the canonical CAFF area boundary. It is available as shapefiles and WMS via direct GeoNetwork download under CAFF/ABDS terms (effectively CC-BY-like). As a hard-to-find cross-border Arctic Council source, it supports circumpolar research on biodiversity, vegetation and protected areas.

name: Cambodia Admin Boundaries Levels 1-3 (khm_adm1_un / khm_adm2_un / khm_adm3_un)
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该数据集为柬埔寨第 1–3 级行政边界（khm_adm1_un / khm_adm2_un / khm_adm3_un），由世界粮食计划署（WFP）/联合国柬埔寨提供，覆盖柬埔寨全境多级行政区划。数据以 shapefile 及 WFS 形式开放获取，遵循 UN/WFP 数据条款。适用于人道主义响应、行政区划制图、统计汇总与区域空间分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides Cambodia's administrative boundaries at levels 1–3 (khm_adm1_un / khm_adm2_un / khm_adm3_un), supplied by WFP / UN Cambodia and covering the country's multi-tier administrative divisions. It is openly available as shapefiles and WFS under UN/WFP data terms. It is well suited to humanitarian response, administrative-boundary mapping, statistical aggregation and regional spatial analysis.

name: CAMELS-GB v2 – catchment boundaries and hydrometeorological attributes for 671 GB catchments
notes: Directly comparable vector reference for G2G gauged catchments; widely cited alongside G2G work.
verify_notes: CAMELS-GB v2; 671 GB catchments | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CAMELS-GB v2 由英国生态水文中心（UKCEH）/EIDC 发布，提供大不列颠 671 个流域的集水区边界及水文气象属性，时间跨度 1970–2022。数据以 Shapefile 加 CSV 形式开放下载，采用开放政府许可（OGL）。该数据集是 G2G 等水文模型测站流域可直接对照的矢量参考，被广泛引用。适用于水文建模、流域分析、径流与气候研究。
desc_en: CAMELS-GB v2, published by UKCEH / EIDC, provides catchment boundaries and hydrometeorological attributes for 671 Great Britain catchments over 1970–2022. It is openly downloadable as Shapefile plus CSV under the Open Government Licence. The dataset is a directly comparable vector reference for gauged catchments used in models such as G2G and is widely cited alongside that work. It supports hydrological modelling, catchment analysis, and runoff and climate research.

name: CDC OneMap Administrative Boundaries
notes: Reference boundary layers used to join all OneMap thematic services.
verify_notes: MapServer subpath 404; folder exists | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该服务为美国疾控中心（CDC）OneMap 行政边界图层，覆盖美国各州、县、人口普查区（tract）及邮编制表区（ZCTA）。数据以 FeatureServer/GeoJSON 形式，通过 ArcGIS REST MapServer 访问，属于公有领域。这些参考边界图层用于关联 OneMap 各类专题服务。适用于公共卫生制图、人口统计关联、疾病分布分析与空间流行病学研究。
desc_en: This service provides the CDC OneMap administrative boundary layers, covering U.S. states, counties, census tracts and ZIP Code Tabulation Areas (ZCTAs). Data are accessed via an ArcGIS REST MapServer as FeatureServer/GeoJSON and are in the Public Domain. These reference boundary layers are used to join the full range of OneMap thematic services. They support public-health mapping, demographic linkage, disease-distribution analysis and spatial epidemiology.

name: CEC North American Terrestrial Ecoregions (Levels I-III)
file_size: Map Package 160.19 MB; Shapefile 33.6 MB; PDF 5.21 MB
notes: Trinational ecoregion boundaries used for biodiversity planning
verify_notes: Contact dcroteau@cec.org for license details | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为北美环境合作委员会（CEC）的北美陆地生态区（I–III 级）边界，覆盖加拿大、墨西哥与美国，III 级共划分 182 个生态区。数据以 Shapefile 提供并免费下载（地图包约 160 MB，Shapefile 约 33.6 MB，另有 PDF）。页面未明确标注许可。作为三国协作的生态区划界，适用于生物多样性保护规划、生态系统评估与区域环境研究。
desc_en: This dataset is the CEC North American Terrestrial Ecoregions (Levels I–III) boundaries, covering Canada, Mexico and the USA, with 182 ecological regions at Level III. It is freely downloadable as Shapefile (map package ~160 MB, shapefile ~33.6 MB, plus a PDF). Licensing is not explicitly stated on the page. As a trinational ecoregion delineation, it supports biodiversity conservation planning, ecosystem assessment and regional environmental research.

name: Ceremonial County Boundaries of England
verify_notes: last update 10 Feb 2016 (stale); previews unavailable | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该数据集为英格兰礼仪郡（Ceremonial Counties）边界，由住房、社区与地方政府部（MHCLG）提供，覆盖英格兰，呈现具有礼仪职能的郡级行政区划。数据采用 Ordnance Survey 开放数据许可，开放获取，格式包括 SHP、KML、GeoJSON 及 WMS、WFS 服务。适用于英格兰行政与礼仪区划制图、区域统计关联与历史地理分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides the ceremonial county boundaries of England, supplied by MHCLG, covering England and depicting the ceremonial county divisions. Released under the Ordnance Survey Open Data Licence, it is openly available in SHP, KML and GeoJSON formats, plus WMS and WFS services. It is useful for mapping England's ceremonial and administrative geography, regional statistical linkage and historical-geographic analysis.

name: CGAZ — Comprehensive Global Administrative Zones (ADM0)
notes: Seamless global layer
verify_notes: Raw path returns 404; main branch may have reorganized CGAZ release paths | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: CGAZ（综合全球行政区划）ADM0 层由威廉与玛丽学院 geoLab 出品，是 geoBoundaries 项目的全球国家级（ADM0）无缝图层，并对争议地区做了专门处理。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可从 GitHub raw 直接下载，提供 Shapefile（约 100MB）、GeoJSON（约 400MB）及 GeoPackage（约 150MB）。适用于全球尺度制图、国家级空间分析与跨国数据汇总。
desc_en: CGAZ (Comprehensive Global Administrative Zones) ADM0 is produced by William & Mary's geoLab as the seamless global country-level (ADM0) layer of the geoBoundaries project, with explicit handling of disputed areas. Released under CC BY 4.0, it is downloadable directly from GitHub raw in Shapefile (~100MB), GeoJSON (~400MB) and GeoPackage (~150MB). It is well suited to global-scale mapping, country-level spatial analysis and cross-national data aggregation.

name: Chicago Community Areas
notes: 77 community area polygons
verify_notes: JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为芝加哥社区区（Community Areas），由芝加哥市/Esri Hub 提供，包含芝加哥市著名的 77 个社区区多边形。数据为公开数据，开放获取，格式包括 Shapefile、GeoJSON 与 KML。这套划分是芝加哥城市统计与社会研究的标准空间单元。适用于城市分析、社会经济制图、邻里研究与空间数据关联。
desc_en: This dataset provides Chicago's Community Areas, supplied by the City of Chicago / Esri Hub, comprising the city's well-known 77 community area polygons. The data are public and openly available in Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML formats. These community areas are the standard spatial units for Chicago's urban statistics and social research. The dataset supports urban analysis, socioeconomic mapping, neighborhood studies and spatial data linkage.

name: Chicago Data Portal - Geographic Boundaries
license_now: City of Chicago Terms of Use
notes: Includes the iconic 77 Community Areas, wards, neighborhoods, police districts.
verify_notes: Chicago Data Portal facilities & boundaries category accessible. | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 芝加哥数据门户的地理边界目录由芝加哥市提供，汇集了多类城市行政与地理边界，包括标志性的 77 个社区区、选区（wards）、邻里、警区等。数据通过 Socrata API 免费获取，格式涵盖 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、KMZ，遵循芝加哥市使用条款。适用于城市治理、空间统计、邻里与公共安全分析及城市数据可视化。
desc_en: The Geographic Boundaries category of the Chicago Data Portal, provided by the City of Chicago, gathers a range of municipal administrative and geographic boundaries, including the iconic 77 Community Areas, wards, neighborhoods and police districts. Data are freely available via the Socrata API in Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and KMZ formats under the City of Chicago Terms of Use. It supports urban governance, spatial statistics, neighborhood and public-safety analysis, and city-data visualization.

name: chilemapas - Chilean Administrative Maps
theme_raw: administrative boundaries (regiones, provincias, comunas, censal zones)
notes: https://pacha.dev/chilemapas/
verify_notes: License now GPL-3 (was MIT in source) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: chilemapas 是一个 R 包（CRAN），提供智利行政区划地图，数据源自智利国家统计局（INE）。数据以 sf 对象形式提供，采用 GPL-3.0 许可。该包便于在 R 环境中直接调用智利各级行政边界。适用于智利全国及区域制图、统计可视化与空间分析。
desc_en: chilemapas is an R package (CRAN) providing Chilean administrative maps, with data sourced from INE Chile (the national statistics institute). The boundaries are delivered as sf objects under the GPL-3.0 license. The package makes Chile's administrative boundaries readily available within the R environment. It is useful for nationwide and regional mapping of Chile, statistical visualization and spatial analysis.

name: China Administrative Regions GIS Data: 1:1M, County Level, v1
notes: County polygons + provincial/prefecture layers
verify_notes: SEDAC server timeout | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该数据集为中国行政区划 GIS 数据（1:1M，县级，v1，1990 年），由哥伦比亚大学 CIESIN/SEDAC 的 China Dimensions 项目发布，包含 1990 年中国县级多边形及省、地区层级图层。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，需 Earthdata 登录免费下载，格式为 Shapefile。适用于历史行政区划研究、人口与社会经济时空分析及长期变化对比。
desc_en: This dataset is the China Administrative Regions GIS Data (1:1M, county level, v1, July 1990), released by CIESIN/SEDAC (China Dimensions) at Columbia University, containing 1990 county polygons plus provincial and prefecture layers. It is released under CC BY 4.0 and is free to download with an Earthdata login, in Shapefile format. It supports research on historical administrative divisions, spatiotemporal population and socioeconomic analysis, and long-term change comparison.

name: China County/District Boundaries (district.shp)
provider: GaryBikini (community), source: Amap Web Services API
notes: Level-4 admin polygons; finest level in the repo.
verify_notes: Same as above | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该数据集为中国县/区级边界（district.shp），来自社区项目 GaryBikini/ChinaAdminDivisonSHP，源数据取自高德地图 Web 服务 API，覆盖中国全部县级行政区划，是该仓库中最精细的第四级边界。数据采用 MIT 许可，可从 GitHub 免费下载，格式为 ESRI Shapefile（含 WGS84 与 GCJ-02 坐标），版本 v24.02.06（2024-02-06，doi:10.5281/zenodo.10624971）。适用于县级制图、空间统计与区划分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides China's county/district-level boundaries (district.shp) from the community project GaryBikini/ChinaAdminDivisonSHP, sourced from the Amap Web Services API and covering all county-level divisions of China—the finest (level-4) tier in the repository. Released under the MIT license, it is freely downloadable from GitHub as ESRI Shapefile in both WGS84 and GCJ-02, version v24.02.06 (2024-02-06; doi:10.5281/zenodo.10624971). It suits county-level mapping, spatial statistics and division analysis.

name: China Prefecture-level City Boundaries (city.shp)
provider: GaryBikini (community), source: Amap Web Services API
notes: Level-3 admin polygons.
verify_notes: Same as above | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该数据集为中国地级市边界（city.shp），来自社区项目 GaryBikini/ChinaAdminDivisonSHP，源数据取自高德地图 Web 服务 API，覆盖中国全部地级市，为该仓库第三级行政边界。数据采用 MIT 许可，可从 GitHub 免费下载，格式为 ESRI Shapefile（含 WGS84 与 GCJ-02 坐标），版本 v24.02.06（2024-02-06，doi:10.5281/zenodo.10624971）。适用于地级市制图、区域统计与空间分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides China's prefecture-level city boundaries (city.shp) from the community project GaryBikini/ChinaAdminDivisonSHP, sourced from the Amap Web Services API and covering all prefecture-level cities—the level-3 tier in the repository. Released under the MIT license, it is freely downloadable from GitHub as ESRI Shapefile in both WGS84 and GCJ-02, version v24.02.06 (2024-02-06; doi:10.5281/zenodo.10624971). It is useful for prefecture-city mapping, regional statistics and spatial analysis.

name: China Province Boundaries (province.shp)
provider: GaryBikini (community), source: Amap Web Services API
coverage: All 34 provinces / autonomous regions / municipalities / SARs
notes: Level-2 admin polygons.
verify_notes: Same as above | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该数据集为中国省级边界（province.shp），来自社区项目 GaryBikini/ChinaAdminDivisonSHP，源数据取自高德地图 Web 服务 API，覆盖全部 34 个省、自治区、直辖市及特别行政区，为该仓库第二级行政边界。数据采用 MIT 许可，可从 GitHub 免费下载，格式为 ESRI Shapefile（含 WGS84 与 GCJ-02 坐标），版本 v24.02.06（2024-02-06，doi:10.5281/zenodo.10624971）。适用于全国省级制图、统计汇总与空间分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides China's province-level boundaries (province.shp) from the community project GaryBikini/ChinaAdminDivisonSHP, sourced from the Amap Web Services API and covering all 34 provinces, autonomous regions, municipalities and SARs—the level-2 tier in the repository. Released under the MIT license, it is freely downloadable from GitHub as ESRI Shapefile in both WGS84 and GCJ-02, version v24.02.06 (2024-02-06; doi:10.5281/zenodo.10624971). It suits nationwide provincial mapping, statistical aggregation and spatial analysis.

name: ChinaGeoJson - County/District-level Boundaries
notes: Most granular level mirrored from DataV.GeoAtlas.
verify_notes: County folder at repo root | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该数据集为中国县/区级边界（ChinaGeoJson），由 zhChuXiao 维护，是阿里巴巴 DataV.GeoAtlas 的镜像，覆盖中国全部约 2800 多个县级单元，是该镜像中最精细的层级。数据采用 MIT 许可，以 GeoJSON 格式按 adcode（行政区划代码）逐个直接下载。适用于 Web 地图可视化、县级空间统计与行政区划分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides China's county/district-level boundaries (ChinaGeoJson), maintained by zhChuXiao as a mirror of Alibaba's DataV.GeoAtlas, covering all roughly 2,800+ county-level units of China—the most granular level in the mirror. Released under the MIT license, it is offered as GeoJSON for direct download per adcode (administrative-division code). It is useful for web-map visualization, county-level spatial statistics and administrative-division analysis.

name: ChinaGeoJson - Province-level Boundaries
coverage: All 34 PRC province-level units (incl. HK, Macau, Taiwan)
notes: Files named by 6-digit adcode or Chinese name.
verify_notes: Path appears restructured; province folder at repo root, not under geojson/ | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该资源是 ChinaGeoJson 仓库中的省级行政边界集合，镜像自阿里巴巴 DataV.GeoAtlas，覆盖中国全部 34 个省级行政单位（含香港、澳门、台湾）。数据以 GeoJSON 格式提供，文件按 6 位行政区划代码（adcode）或中文名称命名，便于检索与按需加载。采用 MIT 许可证，可直接下载，特别适合 ECharts、Leaflet、Mapbox 等前端地图可视化和省级专题图绘制。
desc_en: This is the province-level boundary collection within the ChinaGeoJson repository, mirrored from Alibaba's DataV.GeoAtlas. It covers all 34 province-level units of the PRC, including Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan. Files are delivered as GeoJSON and named by 6-digit administrative code (adcode) or Chinese name, making lookup and on-demand loading straightforward. Released under the MIT license, it can be downloaded directly and is well suited to web-mapping libraries such as ECharts, Leaflet, and Mapbox, as well as province-level thematic mapping.

name: ChinaGeoJson - 中国国家边界 (china.json)
access: Open download via GitHub raw / git clone
notes: Single national outline file; mirrored from DataV.GeoAtlas V3.
verify_notes: china.json 159KB present in repo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: china.json 是 ChinaGeoJson 仓库中的中国国家边界轮廓文件，镜像自 DataV.GeoAtlas V3，体积约 159KB。它以单个 GeoJSON 文件给出全国整体边界，适合作为底图轮廓、国家级专题图或地图裁剪掩膜使用。可通过 GitHub raw 链接或 git clone 直接获取，仓库采用 MIT 许可证（上游遵循 DataV.GeoAtlas 条款），轻量且易于集成到各类 Web 地图项目中。
desc_en: china.json is the national boundary outline file in the ChinaGeoJson repository, mirrored from DataV.GeoAtlas V3 and roughly 159KB in size. It provides the country's overall outline as a single GeoJSON file, ideal as a basemap outline, a backdrop for national thematic maps, or a clipping mask. It can be fetched directly via GitHub raw links or git clone. The repository uses the MIT license (with upstream DataV.GeoAtlas terms), and its small footprint makes it easy to drop into web-mapping projects.

name: ChinaGeoJson - 区县 (county/)
notes: Most granular admin level in repo.
verify_notes: GitHub caps directory listing; 1753 entries omitted | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 ChinaGeoJson 仓库中粒度最细的区县级行政边界目录，覆盖中国约 2800 个县/区单位（仓库列出 1753 个条目）。数据来源于阿里巴巴 DataV.GeoAtlas，以 GeoJSON 格式按行政区划代码组织，方便按县级单元加载和拼接。采用 MIT 许可证、开放下载，适用于县域尺度的数据可视化、热力图与精细化空间分析。
desc_en: This is the county/district directory of the ChinaGeoJson repository, the most granular administrative level it offers, covering roughly 2,800 county-level units of China (the repo lists 1,753 entries). Sourced from Alibaba's DataV.GeoAtlas, the data is organized as GeoJSON files keyed by administrative code, allowing county units to be loaded and assembled individually.
