Released under MIT and openly downloadable, it suits county-scale visualization, choropleth and heat mapping, and fine-grained spatial analysis.

name: ChinaGeoJson - 地级市 (citys/)
notes: Per-city polygons indexed by adcode; suitable for ECharts/Leaflet.
verify_notes: prefecture city GeoJSON files present | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该目录提供中国地级市层级的行政边界，来源于阿里巴巴 DataV.GeoAtlas，以 GeoJSON 格式按行政区划代码（adcode）逐市存储。每个城市为独立的多边形文件，便于按需调用与组合。采用 MIT 许可证、开放下载，特别适合 ECharts、Leaflet 等前端框架做地级市尺度的专题地图与数据可视化。
desc_en: This directory provides prefecture-level city boundaries for China, sourced from Alibaba's DataV.GeoAtlas and stored as GeoJSON polygons indexed by administrative code (adcode), one file per city. The per-city structure makes targeted loading and assembly easy. Released under the MIT license and openly downloadable, it is particularly suited to prefecture-scale thematic maps and data visualization in front-end frameworks such as ECharts and Leaflet.

name: ChinaGeoJson - 省级行政区 (province/)
access: Open, batch download via included Node.js script
notes: Each province as separate file keyed by adcode.
verify_notes: 34 province GeoJSON files | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 ChinaGeoJson 仓库的省级行政区目录，覆盖中国 34 个省级行政单位，数据源自阿里巴巴 DataV.GeoAtlas。每个省份为按行政区划代码命名的独立 GeoJSON 文件，仓库还附带 Node.js 脚本支持批量下载。采用 MIT 许可证、开放获取，适用于省级专题制图、Web 地图底图及空间数据可视化。
desc_en: This is the province-level directory of the ChinaGeoJson repository, covering the 34 province-level units of China with data sourced from Alibaba's DataV.GeoAtlas. Each province is a separate GeoJSON file keyed by administrative code, and the repository ships a Node.js script for batch downloading. Released under the MIT license and openly accessible, it serves province-level thematic mapping, web-map basemaps, and spatial data visualization.

name: CIA World Data Bank II (WDBII)
notes: Second core input to GSHHG (rivers + borders); the retrospective discusses its origin.
verify_notes: Archived page (last modified 2004); CIA WDB II text conversion | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CIA World Data Bank II (WDBII) 是美国中央情报局早年编制的全球矢量地理数据库，由 EVL 提供镜像。它包含全球海岸线、河流与政治边界等基础要素，是 GSHHG 海岸线数据集的两大核心输入之一（提供河流与边界部分）。数据以 ASCII 矢量格式（可转换为 shapefile）发布，通过 FTP 镜像获取，许可状态未明确标注但通常视为美国公有领域，适合作为全球底图与历史地理研究的参考数据。
desc_en: The CIA World Data Bank II (WDBII) is a global vector geographic database compiled by the US CIA in earlier decades, mirrored here by EVL. It contains base features such as global coastlines, rivers, and political borders, and serves as one of the two core inputs to the GSHHG dataset (supplying its rivers and borders). Distributed as ASCII vector data (convertible to shapefile) via an FTP mirror, its license is unspecified but generally treated as US public domain. It remains useful as a reference for global basemaps and historical geography.

name: City boundary and urban district boundaries, Vienna, 1920
provider: Gruber et al. (paper supplement on Zenodo)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
notes: Includes background reproduction data; cited Scientific Data descriptor
verify_notes: DOI resolves to Zenodo record; dataset accessible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集来自 Gruber 等人在 Scientific Data 发表的数据描述论文附件，提供 1920 年维也纳的城市边界及 21 个城区边界（含 2020 年对比数据）。数据以 shapefile 格式发布，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可证，可从 Zenodo 直接下载（核心数据集压缩包约 105.6 MB，含背景复原数据的完整资料约 5.9 GB）。它适用于城市历史地理、城区演变与历史制图的重建研究。
desc_en: This dataset accompanies a Scientific Data descriptor by Gruber et al., providing the 1920 city boundary and 21 urban district boundaries of Vienna, alongside 2020 comparison data. Delivered as shapefiles under a CC-BY-4.0 license, it can be downloaded directly from Zenodo (the core dataset archive is about 105.6 MB; the full package with background reproduction data totals around 5.9 GB). It supports research in urban historical geography, district evolution, and historical map reconstruction.

name: City of Cape Town Open Data Portal - suburb boundaries
license: Open (City of Cape Town Open Data licence)
notes: Municipal-level open equivalent to AfriGIS suburb boundaries for Cape Town.
verify_notes: 该 dataset id 已 404；City of Cape Town Open Data Portal 重组，需要在新门户重新检索 suburb boundaries | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该数据集来自开普敦市开放数据门户，提供开普敦都会区的郊区（suburb）边界。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 FeatureServer/WFS 等多种形式提供，可直接下载或通过 REST 服务调用，采用开普敦市开放数据许可。作为市政级官方开放数据，它是该地区郊区边界的权威开放替代来源，适用于城市规划、社区统计与本地空间分析。
desc_en: This dataset comes from the City of Cape Town Open Data Portal and provides suburb boundaries for the Cape Town metropolitan area. It is offered as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and FeatureServer/WFS, accessible via direct download or REST services under the City of Cape Town Open Data licence. As an authoritative municipal open dataset, it serves as the open equivalent to commercial suburb boundaries for the region and supports urban planning, neighbourhood statistics, and local spatial analysis.

name: Civitasv/DataV_GeoJSON
license: 代码 MIT (数据沿用阿里 DataV)
notes: 为 DataV 接口提供 git 离线镜像, 避免阿里接口波动; GCJ-02
verify_notes: Minimal activity (~4 commits); data from Aliyun DataV, June 2020 admin codes, GCJ02 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Civitasv/DataV_GeoJSON 是阿里巴巴 DataV 接口的 Git 离线镜像快照（约 2020 年 6 月），覆盖中国国、省、市、区县各级行政边界，以 GeoJSON 格式提供。其主要价值在于规避阿里在线接口的波动，提供稳定可控的本地数据源。坐标采用 GCJ-02 火星坐标系，仓库未明确声明许可证，适合中文前端地图项目离线集成使用。
desc_en: Civitasv/DataV_GeoJSON is an offline Git snapshot mirror of Alibaba's DataV API (around June 2020), covering China's national, provincial, prefecture, and county administrative boundaries in GeoJSON format. Its main value is providing a stable, self-hosted data source that avoids fluctuations of the online Alibaba endpoint. Coordinates use the GCJ-02 (Mars) system, and no license is stated in the repository. It suits offline integration in Chinese front-end mapping projects.

name: CnOpenData 1:25万 / 1:100万 中国基础地理数据 (含行政区划)
provider: CnOpenData (中央财经大学数据平台)
coverage: 全国陆域 + 主要岛屿 (816 / 77 图幅)
license: 学术免费申请 (高校登记)
license_now: authorized by 国家基础地理信息中心; no CC license stated
notes: 替代 webmap.cn 的高校学术分发渠道; 含详细图幅元数据
verify_notes: Page redirects users to webmap.cn for actual downloads; compliance with CN map review required | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由 CnOpenData（中央财经大学数据平台）提供，是 1:25 万与 1:100 万比例尺的中国基础地理数据，含行政区划及多类基础要素，覆盖全国陆域及主要岛屿（816 与 77 幅图幅，约 12 个图层）。数据经国家基础地理信息中心授权，以 Shapefile 格式分发，需注册获取。它是 webmap.cn 之外面向高校的学术分发渠道，含详细图幅元数据，适合学术研究与基础制图。
desc_en: Provided by CnOpenData (a data platform at the Central University of Finance and Economics), this is China's basic geographic dataset at 1:250,000 and 1:1,000,000 scales, including administrative divisions and other base layers, covering the national land area and major islands (816 and 77 map sheets, about 12 layers). Authorized by the National Geomatics Center of China and distributed as Shapefile (registration required), it serves as an academic distribution channel for universities alternative to webmap.cn, with detailed sheet metadata for research and base mapping.

name: COD Services API (HDX)
formats: ESRI Feature Service, WFS, WMS, KML, GeoJSON via pcode service
notes: Programmatic access to all COD-AB layers; underused entry point versus direct dataset pages
verify_notes: HDX 403 to bot UA | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: COD Services API 由 OCHA 与 ITOS 提供，是访问联合国 Common Operational Datasets 行政边界（COD-AB）图层的全球编程接口。它通过 ESRI Feature Service、WFS、WMS、KML 及基于 P-code 的 GeoJSON 服务提供全球各国行政边界的程序化访问，许可开放。相比逐个数据集页面，该 REST API 是一个常被忽视但高效的统一入口，特别适合人道主义响应、批量集成与自动化制图工作流。
desc_en: The COD Services API, provided by OCHA and ITOS, is a global programmatic entry point to the UN Common Operational Datasets administrative boundary (COD-AB) layers. It offers programmatic access to country administrative boundaries worldwide via ESRI Feature Service, WFS, WMS, KML, and a P-code-based GeoJSON service, under an open license. Compared with browsing individual dataset pages, this REST API is an underused but efficient unified gateway, well suited to humanitarian response, bulk integration, and automated mapping workflows.

name: colmaps - Colombian Maps
notes: Counterpart for Colombia.
verify_notes: Repo available, 100% R, no LICENSE file visible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: colmaps 是一个 R 包，提供哥伦比亚的行政边界地图，数据基于哥伦比亚国家统计局（DANE）。要素以 SpatialPolygons / sf 对象形式提供，便于在 R 环境中直接进行制图与空间分析。仓库未明确声明许可证。它是面向哥伦比亚的边界数据对应方案，适合统计制图、专题分析及与 DANE 统计数据的连接。
desc_en: colmaps is an R package providing administrative boundary maps for Colombia, based on data from Colombia's national statistics agency DANE. Features are exposed as SpatialPolygons / sf objects, making mapping and spatial analysis in R straightforward. The repository does not explicitly state a license. It is the Colombian counterpart for boundary data, suited to statistical mapping, thematic analysis, and joining with DANE statistics.

name: Comoros - Subnational Administrative Boundaries (COD-AB)
notes: Example of small-island state COD; rarely available elsewhere
verify_notes: HDX 403 to bot UA | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 该数据集来自 OCHA 的 Common Operational Datasets，提供科摩罗（Comoros）从 0 级到 3 级的次国家行政边界。数据以 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage 格式开放提供。作为小岛屿国家的 COD 行政边界，它在其他来源中较为罕见，可作为科摩罗权威的边界参考，适用于人道主义协调、统计制图及岛屿与海岸带相关的空间分析。
desc_en: This dataset, part of OCHA's Common Operational Datasets, provides subnational administrative boundaries for the Comoros from admin level 0 to 3. It is openly available as Shapefile and GeoPackage. As a COD for a small-island state, it is rarely available from other sources and serves as an authoritative boundary reference for the Comoros, supporting humanitarian coordination, statistical mapping, and island and coastal spatial analysis.

name: cosmogony
verify_notes: Active Rust project; 102 stars, latest v0.14.6 (2024) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: cosmogony 由 OSM Without Borders / Qwant 开发，从 OpenStreetMap 中提取全球行政区划，并构建出带有层级关系的完整行政区树。数据以 cosmogony 专用的 GeoJSON（JSON-lines）格式提供，可从 GitHub 获取源码并下载预构建产物。代码采用 Apache-2.0、数据采用 ODbL 许可。它特别适合需要明确父子层级关系的地理编码、地址解析与全球行政边界整合场景。
desc_en: Developed by OSM Without Borders / Qwant, cosmogony extracts administrative divisions worldwide from OpenStreetMap and builds a complete hierarchy tree of administrative zones with parent-child relationships. Data is provided in cosmogony's GeoJSON (JSON-lines) format, with source code and prebuilt downloads available on GitHub. The code is Apache-2.0 licensed and the data is under ODbL. It is especially suited to geocoding, address parsing, and global boundary integration where explicit hierarchical relationships are needed.

name: Counties and Unitary Authorities (Dec 2024) Boundaries UK BUC
license_now: No licence provided on page (OGL inferred)
formats_now: CSV, Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, File GDB, GPKG, SQLite GDB, XLSX, REST
verify_notes: multi-format | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由英国国家统计局（ONS）发布，提供 2024 年 12 月版的英国郡（Counties）与单一管理区（Unitary Authorities）边界，采用 BUC（Generalised Clipped to coastline）综合化裁剪版本。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 及 WFS 等多种形式开放提供，页面未标注许可证但通常适用开放政府许可（OGL）。它是英国行政统计制图与区域分析的权威参考边界。
desc_en: Published by the UK Office for National Statistics (ONS), this dataset provides the December 2024 boundaries of Counties and Unitary Authorities for the United Kingdom, in the BUC (generalised, clipped to coastline) version. It is openly available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, and WFS; while no licence is shown on the page, the Open Government Licence is typically inferred. It is an authoritative reference boundary for UK administrative statistics mapping and regional analysis.

name: Countries that have signed MoUs in the Belt and Road Initiative (BRI)
coverage: 149 BRI MoU signatory countries (up to Mar 2022)
notes: Companion vector dataset in same BRI collection.
verify_notes: HKU Datahub returns 403 to WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 该数据集由香港大学 DataHub / BRINFAITH 项目发布（Man & Palmer, 2022），收录截至 2022 年 3 月已签署一带一路合作备忘录的 149 个国家，并以国家多边形 Shapefile 配合属性表呈现。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可、开放下载。作为 BRI 系列中的配套矢量数据，它适合用于一带一路相关的国别分析、政策研究与全球空间可视化。
desc_en: Published via HKU DataHub / the BRINFAITH project (Man & Palmer, 2022), this dataset records the 149 countries that had signed Belt and Road Initiative MoUs up to March 2022, presented as country polygons (Shapefile) with an accompanying attribute table. Released under CC BY 4.0 and openly downloadable, it is the companion vector dataset within the BRI collection and suits country-level analysis, policy research, and global spatial visualization related to the Belt and Road Initiative.

name: Country Codes (DataHub core)
notes: Contains centroid lat/lon; useful for join keys.
verify_notes: ISO source caveat for commercial use | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Country Codes 是 DataHub.io 维护的核心数据集，汇总全球各国的标准代码（ISO 3166 等）并附带国家质心经纬度。数据以 CSV/JSON 格式开放提供，采用 ODC-PDDL-1.0（公有领域）许可。其包含的质心坐标和多种代码字段使其非常适合作为表格数据与地理数据连接的关键字典，广泛用于数据清洗、国别匹配与简易制图。
desc_en: Country Codes is a core dataset maintained by DataHub.io that compiles standard codes for the world's countries (including ISO 3166) along with country centroid latitude and longitude. Provided openly as CSV/JSON under the ODC-PDDL-1.0 (public domain) license, its centroid coordinates and multiple code fields make it an ideal lookup dictionary for joining tabular and geographic data. It is widely used for data cleaning, country matching, and simple mapping.

name: country-levels-export
theme_raw: Full-planet admin extracts indexed by ISO + FIPS
license_now: OSM / CC0 / US Census / IBGE mixed
notes: OSM-derived, machine-readable codes for joining tabular data
verify_notes: export repo, minimally maintained | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: country-levels-export 由 Zsolt Ero 维护，提供从 OpenStreetMap 派生的全球国家及次国家级行政边界，并附带机器可读的标准代码，便于与表格数据连接。数据以 GeoJSON 格式通过 GitHub 提供，许可情况为混合来源（OSM / CC0 / 美国人口普查局 / IBGE 等）。它适合需要稳定代码映射的批量数据集成、地理编码与跨数据集关联分析。
desc_en: Maintained by Zsolt Ero, country-levels-export provides OSM-derived global country and sub-country administrative boundaries together with machine-readable standard codes for joining tabular data. Data is delivered as GeoJSON via GitHub, with mixed licensing across sources (OSM / CC0 / US Census / IBGE). It suits bulk data integration, geocoding, and cross-dataset linkage where stable code mappings are required.

name: CShapes 1.x legacy historical boundaries (1946-2016)
access: Direct download from ICR shapefile page
doi_or_citation: Weidmann, Kuse, Gleditsch (2010) The Geography of the International System: The CShapes Dataset
notes: Earlier vintage of the boundary corpus, retained for backward compatibility
verify_notes: ETH Zurich ICR group, maintained | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CShapes 1.x 是苏黎世联邦理工学院 ICR 发布的历史国家边界数据集（Weidmann、Kuse、Gleditsch, 2010），覆盖 1946–2016 年间全球独立国家的边界及首都随时间的变化。数据以 Shapefile 格式直接下载，采用 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 许可。作为更早版本的边界语料库，它为向后兼容而保留，适用于国际关系、冲突研究及时间序列的历史地理分析。
desc_en: CShapes 1.x is a historical country boundary dataset from ETH Zurich's ICR (Weidmann, Kuse, Gleditsch, 2010), covering the boundaries and capitals of the world's independent states over 1946–2016 as they change through time. Data is downloadable directly as Shapefile under a CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 license. As an earlier vintage of the boundary corpus retained for backward compatibility, it serves international relations, conflict research, and time-series historical geography analysis.

name: CShapes OGC API Features service (ldproxy demo)
theme_raw: Historical state boundaries via OGC API
formats: GeoJSON, vector tiles, OGC API Features (also WFS-like access)
access: Public OGC API Features endpoint (no auth)
notes: Programmatic / streaming access to CShapes polygons; complements bulk download
verify_notes: CShapes 2.0 ldproxy API; 1886-2019 boundaries | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 CShapes 2.0 历史边界数据集的 OGC API Features 服务（基于 ldproxy 演示部署），覆盖 1886–2019 年间全球独立国家边界。它通过无需认证的公开 OGC API Features 端点提供 GeoJSON、矢量瓦片等流式访问，并继承 CShapes 2.0 的 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 许可。相比批量下载，该接口适合按需查询、过滤与在线集成，便于将历史边界多边形嵌入到 Web 应用与分析流程中。
desc_en: This is an OGC API Features service for the CShapes 2.0 historical boundary dataset, deployed as an ldproxy demo, covering the world's independent state boundaries from 1886 to 2019. It offers streaming access as GeoJSON and vector tiles through a public, no-auth OGC API Features endpoint, inheriting the CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 license of CShapes 2.0. Unlike bulk download, this interface suits on-demand querying, filtering, and online integration, making it easy to embed historical boundary polygons into web apps and analysis pipelines.

name: data.europa.eu (EU Open Data Portal) — statistical-units search
theme_raw: Federated catalog of EU + member-state statistical boundaries, including deprivation/poverty layers from member states
notes: Best entry point to find national INSEE IRIS, ISTAT comuni, Destatis Gemeinden, etc. in one search.
verify_notes: Portal active, 1.74M datasets, 209 catalogues | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: data.europa.eu 是欧盟开放数据门户，由欧盟出版局运营，汇集了覆盖欧盟及欧洲经济区的海量数据集（约 174 万个）。在行政区划与地点统计单元方面，它是查找各国细分统计地理（如法国 INSEE IRIS、意大利 ISTAT comuni、德国 Destatis Gemeinden 等）的最佳统一入口。数据格式多样（Shapefile、GeoJSON、WFS、GeoPackage 等），许可因数据集而异，门户还提供许可助手协助合规使用。
desc_en: data.europa.eu is the EU Open Data Portal, operated by the EU Publications Office, aggregating a vast collection of datasets (about 1.74 million) covering the EU and EEA. For administrative divisions and statistical units, it is the best single entry point for finding national fine-grained statistical geographies such as France's INSEE IRIS, Italy's ISTAT comuni, and Germany's Destatis Gemeinden. Formats vary (Shapefile, GeoJSON, WFS, GeoPackage), licensing varies by dataset, and the portal offers a Licensing Assistant to aid compliant reuse.

name: data.europa.eu - EU open data catalog (admin boundaries datasets)
theme_raw: federated EU member state admin datasets (commune/region/parish/planning units)
notes: Useful federated search for less-known national datasets (e.g. 'Digital Layers of Planning').
verify_notes: Page returns European Data Portal heading; minimal content extracted | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是欧盟开放数据门户中的一条行政边界类目录记录，由欧盟出版局维护，覆盖欧盟范围，并提供 WFS 端点用于联合检索各成员国数据。其价值在于帮助发现一些较冷门的国家级数据集（如各类规划数字图层）。数据以 WFS、GML、Shapefile 等形式提供，许可因记录而异，适合作为跨国行政边界与规划数据的探索性检索入口。
desc_en: This is an administrative-boundaries catalogue record within the EU Open Data Portal, maintained by the EU Publications Office, covering the EU and exposing WFS endpoints for federated search across member-state data. Its value lies in surfacing lesser-known national datasets (such as various 'Digital Layers of Planning'). Data is offered via WFS, GML, and Shapefile, with licensing varying by record. It works well as an exploratory entry point for cross-national administrative boundary and planning data.

name: data.geo.admin.ch STAC
theme_raw: national vector layers (TLM, boundaries, hydrography, transport)
notes: Authoritative Swiss vector products via STAC
verify_notes: Swiss Federal SDI STAC API operational | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是瑞士联邦地理信息平台 swisstopo 提供的 STAC API 端点，覆盖瑞士全境，是访问其权威矢量产品（行政边界、交通、水文等）的官方接口。数据以 GeoPackage、Shapefile、矢量瓦片及 WFS 等形式提供，遵循瑞士联邦空间数据基础设施（BGDI）的开放条款。通过开放的 STAC API，用户可程序化检索与下载瑞士官方地理空间数据，适合数据集成与自动化工作流。
desc_en: This is the STAC API endpoint of swisstopo, Switzerland's federal geoinformation platform, covering the whole of Switzerland and serving as the official interface to its authoritative vector products (administrative boundaries, transport, hydrography, and more). Data is available as GeoPackage, Shapefile, vector tiles, and WFS under the open terms of the Federal Spatial Data Infrastructure (BGDI). The open STAC API lets users discover and download official Swiss geospatial data programmatically, ideal for data integration and automated workflows.

name: data.gov.uk Wetlands of International Importance (Ramsar UK) + JNCC site boundaries
notes: Country-level Ramsar mirror; finer geometry than RSIS global file. DataMapWales hosts a Welsh-specific NRW Ramsar layer.
verify_notes: Hub redirected to main jncc.gov.uk resources path | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由 JNCC / Defra 通过 data.gov.uk 发布，提供英国境内具有国际重要性的湿地（拉姆萨尔湿地）及相关 JNCC 保护地的站点边界。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GeoPackage 格式提供（约 22.3 MB，覆盖 1976 至 2019 年间指定的站点），采用开放政府许可（OGL）。相比全球 RSIS 文件，它提供更精细的几何，是英国拉姆萨尔湿地的国家级镜像；威尔士部分另有 DataMapWales 的 NRW 专属图层。
desc_en: Published by JNCC / Defra via data.gov.uk, this dataset provides site boundaries for Wetlands of International Importance (Ramsar sites) in the UK and related JNCC protected sites. Data is offered as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and GeoPackage (about 22.3 MB, covering sites designated between 1976 and 2019) under the Open Government Licence. It offers finer geometry than the global RSIS file and serves as a country-level Ramsar mirror for the UK; a Welsh-specific NRW Ramsar layer is hosted separately on DataMapWales.

name: data_location (mumuy)
notes: 行政区划代码字典,与边界shp配套;广泛在中文IT社区使用
verify_notes: 活跃维护,数据更新至2025年11月,3.1k stars | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: data_location 由 mumuy 在 GitHub 维护，提供中国四级（省/市/区县/乡镇）行政区划代码字典，以 JSON 格式持续更新（最新数据约 2025 年 11 月）。它采用 MIT 许可、可直接下载，常与边界 shapefile 配套使用，在中文 IT 社区中应用广泛，适合做行政区划代码解析、地址联动选择与表格数据的区划匹配。
desc_en: Maintained by mumuy on GitHub, data_location provides a four-level (province/city/county/township) administrative-division code dictionary for China, delivered as JSON and updated regularly (latest data around November 2025). Released under the MIT license and directly downloadable, it is commonly paired with boundary shapefiles and is widely used in the Chinese developer community. It suits administrative-code parsing, cascading address selectors, and matching tabular data to divisions.

name: datahub.io GeoJSON collection
theme_raw: countries, admin1, continents, airports, rivers, ports
notes: Cross-links to multiple datasets/* GitHub repos.
verify_notes: Active; lists country/NUTS/admin1/US states | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Datahub.io 的 GeoJSON 数据集合，汇集多个面向全球的 GeoJSON / CSV 地理数据集，主题涵盖行政边界、水文等。该集合作为索引，交叉链接到多个 datasets/* GitHub 仓库，可通过网页或 Git 获取。许可因具体数据集而异，集合页面本身未统一标注，适合作为查找常用开放地理数据的便捷入口。
desc_en: This is the GeoJSON collection on Datahub.io, aggregating multiple global GeoJSON/CSV geographic datasets spanning themes such as administrative boundaries and hydrography. Functioning as an index, the collection cross-links to numerous datasets/* GitHub repositories and is accessible via the web or Git. Licensing varies by individual dataset and is not unified on the collection page. It serves as a convenient entry point for finding commonly used open geographic data.

name: datasets/geo-admin1-us
notes: Sourced from Natural Earth.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: geo-admin1-us 由开放知识基金会（Open Knowledge Foundation）维护，提供美国一级行政区（州）边界，数据来源于 Natural Earth。要素以 GeoJSON（DataPackage 格式）提供，可从 GitHub 或 datahub.io 获取。数据采用 ODC PDDL（公有领域）、代码采用 MIT 许可，轻量且规范，适合美国州级专题制图、教学示例与数据连接。
desc_en: geo-admin1-us, maintained by the Open Knowledge Foundation, provides first-level administrative (state) boundaries for the United States, sourced from Natural Earth. Features are offered as GeoJSON in DataPackage format, available from GitHub or datahub.io. The data is under ODC PDDL (public domain) and the code under MIT. Lightweight and well-structured, it suits US state-level thematic mapping, teaching examples, and data joins.

name: datos.gob.ar
lychee_status: Network error: Network error: Connection reset by peer (os error 54) (error sending request for url (https://datos.gob.ar/))
notes: Argentine national CKAN; hosts IGN admin boundaries and INDEC census geometries.
verify_notes: 1,235 datasets, active; built on CKAN/Andino | lychee:Network error: Network error: Connection reset by peer (os error 54) (error sending request for url (https://datos.gob.ar/))
desc_zh: datos.gob.ar 是阿根廷国家开放数据门户，基于 CKAN 平台，收录约 1235 个数据集。在地理方面，它托管由阿根廷国家地理局（IGN）发布的行政边界以及国家统计局（INDEC）的人口普查几何数据。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 等格式提供，可通过 CKAN API 访问，许可多为开放 / CC-BY，适合阿根廷的行政区划分析、人口与社会经济制图。
desc_en: datos.gob.ar is Argentina's national open data portal, built on CKAN and hosting about 1,235 datasets. Geographically, it hosts administrative boundaries published by Argentina's National Geographic Institute (IGN) and census geometries from the national statistics agency INDEC. Data is provided as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and KML, accessible via the CKAN API, mostly under open / CC-BY licenses. It suits administrative-division analysis and population and socioeconomic mapping for Argentina.

name: Delineate Anything Field Boundaries Ukraine 2025
notes: Listed in STAC Index as a pure-vector GPKG collection
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; may need source.coop auth/CDN headers | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为 2025 年乌克兰农田地块边界，由 khvzix 通过 source.coop 发布，属于 Delineate Anything 项目产物。数据以 GeoPackage（gpkg）格式提供，托管于 source.coop 的 S3 存储，并在 STAC Index 中以纯矢量集合登记，许可开放。它适用于农业监测、地块尺度遥感分析及乌克兰农田制图等场景。
desc_en: This dataset contains agricultural field boundaries for Ukraine in 2025, published by khvzix via source.coop as a product of the Delineate Anything project. Data is provided as GeoPackage (gpkg), hosted on source.coop's S3 storage and registered in the STAC Index as a pure-vector collection, under an open license. It suits agricultural monitoring, parcel-scale remote-sensing analysis, and field mapping across Ukraine.

name: Demographia World Urban Areas
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Land cover & land use
access: Annual PDF + companion CSV; city centroids/extents
notes: Source list of the 985 cities used by MSDCW.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Demographia World Urban Areas 由 Wendell Cox 咨询机构（Demographia）每年发布，覆盖全球人口超过 50 万的建成城市区，提供各城市的人口、面积及密度等数据。资料以 PDF 报告配套 CSV 形式发布（可地理编码到城市质心/范围），免费公开发布。它是 MSDCW 所用 985 个城市清单的来源，适合全球城市化对比、城市规模研究与人口密度分析。
desc_en: Demographia World Urban Areas is published annually by Wendell Cox Consultancy (Demographia), covering global built-up urban areas with populations over 500,000 and reporting each area's population, land area, and density. It is released as an annual PDF report with a companion CSV (geocodable to city centroids/extents) under a free public release. It is the source list of the 985 cities used by MSDCW, and suits global urbanization comparison, city-size research, and population-density analysis.

name: Digital Earth Africa Maps
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Continental vector overlays (waterbodies, cropland extent vectorized, admin)
verify_notes: Page accessible but JS-rendered; content not extractable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Digital Earth Africa Maps 是 Digital Earth Africa 平台的地图服务，覆盖整个非洲大陆，提供行政边界及土地覆盖/土地利用等图层。数据通过 WFS/WMS 服务以 GeoJSON、shapefile 等形式获取，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它依托卫星观测与分析就绪数据，适合非洲范围的环境监测、土地变化分析与区域可视化应用。
desc_en: Digital Earth Africa Maps is the mapping service of the Digital Earth Africa platform, covering the entire African continent and providing layers such as administrative boundaries and land cover/land use. Data is accessible via WFS/WMS services as GeoJSON and shapefile under a CC BY 4.0 license. Backed by satellite observations and analysis-ready data, it suits continent-wide environmental monitoring, land-change analysis, and regional visualization across Africa.

name: DIVA-GIS Free Spatial Data (by country)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Transportation | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Admin boundaries, roads, railroads, inland water, land cover, population, climate
notes: Common pick in CSDN '几个免费下载地理数据的国外网站' (aganliang/120067449)
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: DIVA-GIS Free Spatial Data 是 DIVA-GIS 项目提供的按国家组织的免费空间数据，覆盖全球各国，包含行政边界、交通、土地覆盖/利用等多种主题。数据以 ESRI Shapefile 矢量格式按国家直接下载，面向学术/非商业用途免费使用。作为经典的免费地理数据来源，它在中文社区的免费数据网站清单中常被推荐，适合教学、基础制图与各国基础空间数据快速获取。
desc_en: DIVA-GIS Free Spatial Data offers free per-country spatial data from the DIVA-GIS project, covering countries worldwide with themes including administrative boundaries, transportation, and land cover/use. Data is provided as ESRI Shapefile vectors downloadable directly per country, free for academic and non-commercial use. A classic free geographic data source frequently recommended in community lists of free data sites, it suits teaching, basic mapping, and quickly obtaining base spatial data for individual countries.

name: diversitydatakids.org Child Opportunity Index (COI 2.0) boundaries
provider: Brandeis University, Institute for Child Youth and Family Policy
theme_raw: Composite neighbourhood opportunity index at census tract + ZIP
license: custom (free for non-commercial research with attribution)
notes: Less-known CKAN portal; useful for child poverty / opportunity research.
verify_notes: Moved to www.diversitydatakids.org/datasets | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 该数据集来自布兰迪斯大学儿童、青年与家庭政策研究所运营的 diversitydatakids.org 门户，提供其儿童机会指数（Child Opportunity Index, COI 2.0）的边界数据，覆盖美国。数据以 Shapefile 及通过 CKAN datastore 的 GeoJSON 形式提供，采用自定义许可（非商业研究署名免费使用）。作为相对冷门的 CKAN 门户，它适用于儿童贫困、机会公平与社会经济差异的研究与制图。
desc_en: This dataset comes from the diversitydatakids.org portal, operated by Brandeis University's Institute for Child, Youth and Family Policy, and provides boundary data for its Child Opportunity Index (COI 2.0), covering the USA. Data is offered as Shapefile and as GeoJSON via the CKAN datastore, under a custom license (free for non-commercial research with attribution). As a lesser-known CKAN portal, it supports research and mapping on child poverty, opportunity equity, and socioeconomic disparities.

name: DRC Admin Boundaries Level 1 (cod_adm1_un)
coverage: Democratic Republic of the Congo, admin1
notes: Follows GeoEnabler project standard structure.
verify_notes: WFP GeoNode 超时；建议改用 HDX COD-AB DRC | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该图层来自 WFP / UN OCHA 的 GeoNode 平台，提供刚果民主共和国（DRC）的一级行政边界（admin1）。数据遵循 GeoEnabler 项目的标准结构，以 WFS、WMS、Shapefile、GeoJSON 等多种 OGC 服务形式提供。许可详见其元数据。它是 DRC 行政边界的权威开放参考，适用于人道主义协调、统计制图与区域空间分析。
desc_en: This layer, from the WFP / UN OCHA GeoNode platform, provides first-level administrative boundaries (admin1) for the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC). It follows the standard structure of the GeoEnabler project and is offered through multiple OGC services including WFS, WMS, Shapefile, and GeoJSON, with licensing detailed in its metadata. It is an authoritative open reference for DRC administrative boundaries, supporting humanitarian coordination, statistical mapping, and regional spatial analysis.

name: DRC First-level administrative boundaries (cod_admbnda_adm1_rgc_20170711)
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该图层来自 WFP 的 GeoNode 平台，源自刚果民主共和国政府（RGC），提供 DRC 的一级行政边界（数据日期 2017-07-11）。数据以 Shapefile 及 WFS 等形式开放提供。作为基于官方来源的 COD 行政边界图层，它适用于刚果（金）境内的人道主义响应、统计协调与基础制图。
desc_en: This layer, from the WFP GeoNode platform and derived from the DRC government (RGC), provides first-level administrative boundaries for the DRC (data dated 2017-07-11). It is openly available as Shapefile and via WFS. As a COD administrative boundary layer based on an official source, it suits humanitarian response, statistical coordination, and base mapping within the Democratic Republic of the Congo.

name: drei01/geojson-world-cities
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
notes: 5-decimal precision (~1 m).
verify_notes: 37372 city polygons | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一个全球城市点位/边界的开源 GeoJSON 数据集，收录约 37,372 个城市，坐标精度约为小数点后 5 位（米级）。数据托管于 GitHub，采用 Apache-2.0 许可证，可自由用于商业与非商业项目。它格式简洁、易于在前端地图、数据可视化和地理编码中加载，适合作为全球城市定位的轻量参考数据，但作为社区项目，其更新频率和属性丰富度有限。
desc_en: An open GeoJSON dataset of world cities containing roughly 37,372 entries, with coordinates given to about 5 decimal places (~1 m precision). Hosted on GitHub under the permissive Apache-2.0 license, it is well suited for web maps, data visualization and lightweight geocoding where a simple global city reference is needed. As a community-maintained resource its attribute richness and update cadence are modest, but the clean GeoJSON format makes it easy to load directly in browsers and GIS tools.

name: eAtlas (AIMS) – Australian Tropical Reef Boundaries and Marine Datasets
provider: Australian Institute of Marine Science (AIMS), James Cook University
notes: Includes Coral Sea Mapping 2021–2025 dataset; MARS sediment DB.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; likely UA/bot block, site may still be live in browser | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: eAtlas 是由澳大利亚海洋科学研究所（AIMS）与詹姆斯库克大学维护的海洋与热带研究数据门户，重点覆盖澳大利亚热带海域及珊瑚三角区。其数据集包含珊瑚礁边界、海洋与海岸要素，并涵盖 2021–2025 年珊瑚海制图数据集及 MARS 沉积物数据库。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 WMS 服务提供，多数图层采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可（各图层有所不同），适用于海洋空间规划、珊瑚礁监测与生态研究。
desc_en: eAtlas, maintained by the Australian Institute of Marine Science (AIMS) and James Cook University, is a data portal focused on tropical Australia and the wider Coral Triangle. It hosts reef boundaries and marine and coastal layers, including the 2021–2025 Coral Sea Mapping dataset and the MARS sediment database. Data are distributed as Shapefile, GeoPackage and WMS, generally under CC-BY 4.0 (licensing varies per layer), supporting marine spatial planning, reef monitoring and ecological research.

name: echarts-countries-js / china-city-list (AMap derivative)
coverage: China, all prefecture cities and counties
notes: Map files derived from AMap district polylines; coordinates in GCJ-02 (some forks reprojected to WGS84).
verify_notes: Data subject to AMap license; commercial use needs AMap authorization | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 ECharts 地图社区维护的中国行政区划 GeoJSON 数据集，覆盖中国所有地级市与县级单元，常用于 ECharts 等可视化库的地图渲染。地图文件由高德（AMap）行政区划数据派生，坐标采用 GCJ-02 火星坐标系（部分分支已重投影为 WGS84）。代码以 MIT 许可发布，但底层数据受高德条款约束。适合中国区域数据可视化，使用时需注意坐标系与数据来源的合规性。
desc_en: A community-maintained GeoJSON dataset of Chinese administrative divisions covering all prefecture-level cities and counties, widely used to render maps in ECharts and similar visualization libraries. The map files are derived from AMap (Gaode) district polylines, with coordinates in the GCJ-02 system (some forks reproject to WGS84). The code is MIT-licensed while the underlying data remain subject to AMap's terms. It is convenient for China-focused data visualization, though users should mind the coordinate system and data-provenance compliance.

name: EEZ/IHO Intersect v5
notes: Union of EEZ v12 with IHO Sea Areas v3.
verify_notes: EEZ/IHO Intersect v5 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EEZ/IHO Intersect v5 是由比利时 VLIZ 旗下 Marine Regions 发布的全球海洋边界数据集，将专属经济区（EEZ v12）与国际海道测量组织（IHO）的海域划分（v3）求并集，得到按国家与海域双重归属切分的海洋多边形。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 WFS 服务提供，采用 Marine Regions 的 CC-BY 许可。它是海洋管辖、渔业管理和海洋空间分析中划分国家×海区单元的权威参考。
desc_en: EEZ/IHO Intersect v5, published by VLIZ's Marine Regions, is a global marine boundary dataset created by unioning the Exclusive Economic Zones (EEZ v12) with the IHO Sea Areas (v3). The result splits ocean space into polygons attributed by both country and named sea, distributed as Shapefile, GeoPackage and WFS under the Marine Regions CC-BY license. It is an authoritative reference for delineating country-by-sea units in marine jurisdiction, fisheries management and marine spatial analysis.

name: EHCVM Harmonised Household Survey Boundaries (WAEMU + Guinea + Chad, 2018)
notes: Regional harmonised survey boundary layer used as the SAE design domain in Edochie et al. 2025.
verify_notes: Catalog search interface active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是与世界银行 LSMS 及西非经济货币联盟（WAEMU）委员会 EHCVM 协调家庭调查配套的行政边界图层，覆盖 WAEMU 八国加几内亚与乍得，提供区域/省级单元（2018 年）。它作为小区域估计（SAE）的设计域被用于相关研究（如 Edochie 等 2025）。数据为调查配套 Shapefile，许可因研究而异（需注册下载）。适合区域贫困测度、调查抽样与社会经济空间分析。
desc_en: This administrative boundary layer accompanies the EHCVM harmonised household survey run by the World Bank LSMS and the WAEMU Commission, covering the eight WAEMU countries plus Guinea and Chad at regional/department level (2018). It served as the design domain for small-area estimation in studies such as Edochie et al. 2025. Provided as survey-companion shapefiles with mixed, study-specific licensing (registration required), it suits regional poverty mapping, survey sampling design and socioeconomic spatial analysis.

name: Elections Ontario Electoral District Shapefiles
license: Open-use data product licence (districts); limited-use (polling divisions)
license_now: Open use data product licence agreement (ED); Limited use for PD
notes: Authoritative provincial boundaries
verify_notes: License acceptance required | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是加拿大安大略省选举委员会发布的省级选区边界 Shapefile，覆盖安大略省全境，是该省选举地理的权威数据。下载需接受许可协议：选区（ED）边界采用开放使用数据产品许可，投票区（PD）则为限制使用。适用于选举分析、选区划界研究、人口与选民地理统计等场景。
desc_en: Authoritative provincial electoral district boundaries published by Elections Ontario, covering the entire province of Ontario, Canada. Distributed as Shapefiles with a licence-acceptance step: electoral district (ED) boundaries fall under an open-use data product licence, while polling division (PD) data are limited-use. The dataset supports electoral analysis, redistricting studies and demographic or voter geography work across Ontario.

name: EODC OGC API Features - world_administrative_boundaries collection
notes: Example OGC API - Features deployment frequently referenced in tutorials.
verify_notes: Powered by pygeoapi 0.16.0; license not stated on endpoint | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是地球观测数据中心（EODC）部署的一个 OGC API - Features 服务示例，提供全球行政边界集合（world_administrative_boundaries），数据源自 Opendatasoft 的世界行政区划。可通过 OGC API - Features 标准接口以 GeoJSON、JSON 或 HTML 形式访问，许可为开放。该服务常在教程中被引用，适合作为学习标准化要素 API 访问与全球行政边界查询的范例。
desc_en: An OGC API - Features deployment by the Earth Observation Data Centre (EODC) exposing a global world_administrative_boundaries collection derived from Opendatasoft's world ADM data. Features are accessible through the standard OGC API in GeoJSON, JSON or HTML and the data are open. Frequently cited in tutorials, it serves as a convenient reference example for learning standardized feature-API access and querying global administrative boundaries.

name: ESA WorldCover Statistics service (Terrascope/APEx) - vector I/O
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: On-demand zonal landcover statistics from vector polygons
license: Service free with Copernicus Data Space registration
license_now: proprietary (free with Copernicus Data Space registration)
access: openEO UDP via Copernicus Data Space
notes: Accepts user-supplied vector polygons (e.g. admin boundaries) to compute WorldCover class fractions
verify_notes: ESA APEx active service | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 VITO/Terrascope 在 ESA APEx 算法目录中提供的 ESA WorldCover 统计服务（2021 全球 10 米土地覆盖）。它接受用户提交的矢量多边形（如行政边界）作为输入，计算各 WorldCover 土地覆盖类别在多边形内的占比，输出 CSV。服务通过 Copernicus Data Space 的 openEO 用户自定义流程运行，免费但需注册（专有服务）。适合按区域统计土地覆盖构成的分析工作流。
desc_en: An ESA WorldCover statistics service offered by VITO/Terrascope within the ESA APEx algorithm catalogue, operating on the 2021 global 10 m land-cover product. It accepts user-supplied vector polygons (such as administrative boundaries) as GeoJSON input and computes the fraction of each WorldCover class within them, returning CSV output. Run as an openEO user-defined process via the Copernicus Data Space, it is free with registration (proprietary service) and suits zonal land-cover composition workflows.

name: Esri Living Atlas - World First Order Administrative Boundaries
theme_raw: global ADM1 (state/province) and ADM0 in FeatureService form
license: Esri terms; some layers open for non-commercial
notes: Some Living Atlas admin layers explicitly downloadable; license varies per item.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub item returns 404 Not Found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 这是 Esri Living Atlas 中由多源数据汇编的全球一级行政边界（World First Order Administrative Boundaries）图层，覆盖全球的省/州级单元。数据通过 ArcGIS Online 托管的 FeatureServer 提供，部分图层在条件允许时可下载为 Shapefile。许可遵循 Esri 条款，部分图层对非商业用途开放，具体随条目而异。适合在 ArcGIS 生态中快速接入全球一级行政边界做底图与分析。
desc_en: A compiled, multi-source global layer of first-order administrative boundaries within Esri's Living Atlas, covering province/state-level units worldwide. It is served as a hosted ArcGIS Online FeatureServer, with some layers downloadable as shapefile where permitted. Use is governed by Esri terms, with certain items open for non-commercial purposes and licensing varying per item. It is convenient for quickly bringing global ADM1 boundaries into the ArcGIS ecosystem for basemapping and analysis.

name: Ethiopia Kebele Boundaries (CSA / community shapefiles)
provider: Ethiopian Central Statistical Agency via community / WB Data Catalog
doi_or_citation: Ethiopia GIS Dataset 2016 (World Bank Data Catalog)
notes: Widely used in DHS / health spatial analyses for Ethiopia
verify_notes: 404 Not Found - dataset moved/removed | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 这是埃塞俄比亚最细一级行政单元（kebele，ADM4）的边界数据，源自埃塞俄比亚中央统计局（CSA），经社区整理后通过世界银行数据目录发布（2016）。数据为 Shapefile，按世界银行数据目录条款开放。该图层在埃塞俄比亚的 DHS 调查与健康/公共服务空间分析中被广泛使用，适合细粒度的人口、卫生与服务可及性研究。
desc_en: Boundaries of Ethiopia's lowest administrative tier, the kebele (ADM4), originating from the Ethiopian Central Statistical Agency (CSA) and distributed via the World Bank Data Catalog (2016) after community compilation. Provided as shapefile under the Data Catalog's open terms, this layer is widely used in DHS surveys and health and public-service spatial analyses for Ethiopia, making it well suited to fine-grained population, health and service-accessibility studies.

name: EuroBoundaryMap v7.0 (full European coverage)
verify_notes: EuroBoundaryMap v7.0 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EuroBoundaryMap v7.0 是由 EuroGeographics 编制、经欧洲环境署（EEA）空间数据基础设施分发的泛欧行政边界数据集，提供欧洲各国从国家到地方各级的统一行政区划。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoPackage 提供，采用有条件的许可。作为各国国家测绘机构权威数据的整合产品，它适用于跨欧洲的行政分析、统计制图与政策研究。
desc_en: EuroBoundaryMap v7.0 is a pan-European administrative boundary dataset compiled by EuroGeographics and distributed through the European Environment Agency's spatial data infrastructure. It provides harmonised administrative units across European countries from national down to local levels, supplied as Shapefile and GeoPackage under a conditional licence. Built from authoritative national mapping agency data, it underpins cross-European administrative analysis, statistical mapping and policy research.

name: European Field Boundaries (51M parcels, fiboa)
notes: Harmonisation of national IACS/LPIS layers; mirrored on Zenodo
verify_notes: Source Cooperative returns 'Product Not Found'; repo path likely moved/renamed (fiboa restructured). | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 fiboa 社区在 source.coop 上发布的欧洲农田地块边界数据集，覆盖欧盟范围，整合了各国 IACS/LPIS 农业地块申报数据，规模约 5100 万个地块。数据采用 fiboa 模式以 GeoParquet 和 GeoPackage 提供，许可为 CC-BY-4.0（各国混合），并在 Zenodo 镜像。它将各国异构的农田数据标准化，适合大规模农业监测、作物制图与农田变化分析。
desc_en: A European field-boundary dataset published by the fiboa community on source.coop, covering the EU and harmonising national IACS/LPIS agricultural parcel declarations into roughly 51 million parcels. Delivered in GeoParquet (fiboa schema) and GeoPackage under CC-BY-4.0 (with mixed national licensing) and mirrored on Zenodo, it standardizes heterogeneous national field data, making it valuable for large-scale agricultural monitoring, crop mapping and field-change analysis.

name: European NUTS Administrative Boundaries (GISCO)
notes: NUTS 2013 edition
verify_notes: NUTS L1/L2/L3, EPSG:4326, updated 2026-03-06 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是欧盟统计局 GISCO 的 NUTS 统计区划边界数据集（2013 版），覆盖欧盟，比例尺约 1:60M，坐标系为 EPSG:4326，经 DataHub 以 GeoJSON 形式打包发布。许可为 ODC-PDDL-1.0（公共领域）。NUTS 是欧盟统计与区域政策的标准地理单元，该轻量版本适合区域统计可视化、欧盟层面的宏观分析与教学，但低比例尺不适合精细制图。
desc_en: The Eurostat GISCO NUTS statistical region boundaries (2013 edition), covering the European Union at roughly 1:60M scale in EPSG:4326, repackaged by DataHub as GeoJSON under the public-domain ODC-PDDL-1.0 license. NUTS is the EU's standard geography for statistics and regional policy, so this lightweight version suits regional statistical visualization, EU-wide macro analysis and teaching, though the coarse scale is unsuitable for detailed cartography.

name: Extended Continental Shelves v2
notes: ECS submissions and recommendations dataset.
verify_notes: ECS v2; redirect verified, content not re-fetched | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Extended Continental Shelves v2 是 VLIZ/Marine Regions 发布的全球大陆架延伸（外大陆架）数据集，汇总各沿海国向《联合国海洋法公约》大陆架界限委员会提交的外大陆架申请及相关建议。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 WFS 提供，采用 Marine Regions 的 CC-BY 许可。适用于海洋边界、海底资源管辖与海洋治理研究。
desc_en: Extended Continental Shelves v2, from VLIZ's Marine Regions, is a global dataset of extended (outer) continental shelf claims, compiling coastal states' submissions to the UNCLOS Commission on the Limits of the Continental Shelf together with associated recommendations. Distributed as Shapefile, GeoPackage and WFS under the Marine Regions CC-BY license, it supports research on maritime boundaries, seabed resource jurisdiction and ocean governance.

name: Federal Electoral Boundaries (2022)
notes: 2022 federal electoral divisions
verify_notes: Federal Electoral Boundaries (2022) - ArcGIS Hub dataset page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是澳大利亚选举委员会（AEC）发布的 2022 年联邦选区（电选区）边界数据，覆盖澳大利亚全境。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 FeatureServer 服务提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 开放许可。它是 2022 年联邦大选所用选区划分的权威版本，适用于选举分析、选民地理研究与政策制图。
desc_en: The 2022 federal electoral division boundaries published by the Australian Electoral Commission (AEC), covering all of Australia. Provided as Shapefile, GeoJSON and a FeatureServer under the open CC BY 4.0 license, this is the authoritative set of divisions used for the 2022 federal election. It supports electoral analysis, voter geography research and policy-oriented cartography.

name: Federal Electoral Divisions (March 2025)
provider: Australian Electoral Commission via Digital Atlas
notes: Current federal electoral division polygons
verify_notes: Page reachable; title 'Federal Electoral Divisions (March 2025)' confirmed. License/formats not extracted by summary. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是澳大利亚选举委员会经 Digital Atlas 发布的联邦选区边界（2025 年 3 月版），覆盖澳大利亚全境，提供当前有效的联邦选区多边形。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 和 FeatureServer 提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 开放许可。作为最新版选区划分，适用于近期选举分析、选区变化对比与选民地理研究。
desc_en: Federal electoral division boundaries published by the Australian Electoral Commission via the Digital Atlas (March 2025 edition), covering all of Australia and providing the current set of division polygons. Supplied as Shapefile, GeoJSON and FeatureServer under the open CC BY 4.0 license, this up-to-date redistribution suits recent electoral analysis, comparison of boundary changes over time and voter geography research.

name: FEWS NET Administrative + Food Security Boundaries
provider: USAID Famine Early Warning Systems Network
coverage: Sub-Saharan Africa, Central America, parts of Asia
license_now: Linked to FEWS NET Data Attribution Policy (not CC, US Gov work)
notes: Historical archives of FSNAU/FEWS units used in food-security and conflict papers
verify_notes: Page alive; license via separate attribution policy URL. | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 这是美国国际开发署饥荒预警系统网络（FEWS NET）发布的行政与粮食安全边界数据，覆盖撒哈拉以南非洲、中美洲及部分亚洲地区，并包含 2009 年以来 FSNAU/FEWS 分析单元的历史归档。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 和 KML 提供，遵循 FEWS NET 数据署名政策（美国政府作品，非 CC）。广泛用于粮食安全监测、人道主义与冲突研究。
desc_en: Administrative and food-security boundaries from USAID's Famine Early Warning Systems Network (FEWS NET), covering sub-Saharan Africa, Central America and parts of Asia, with historical archives of FSNAU/FEWS analysis units dating from 2009. Distributed as Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML under the FEWS NET data attribution policy (US Government work rather than CC), it is widely used in food-security monitoring and humanitarian and conflict research.

name: France GeoJSON
notes: Multiple resolutions, post-2016 region reform versions
verify_notes: data from IGN AdminExpress / INSEE 2018 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Grégoire David 维护的法国行政区划 GeoJSON 数据集，覆盖法国各级行政边界（大区、省、市镇等），并提供多种分辨率及 2016 年大区改革后的版本。数据源自法国国家地理院（IGN）的 AdminExpress，采用 Licence Ouverte 开放许可，托管于 GitHub。它格式友好、易于在 Web 地图与数据可视化中使用，是法国地理分析的常用基础数据。
desc_en: A GeoJSON dataset of French administrative divisions maintained by Grégoire David, covering boundaries at multiple levels (regions, departments, communes) in several resolutions, including post-2016 region-reform versions. Sourced from IGN's AdminExpress and released under the open Licence Ouverte on GitHub, its web-friendly format makes it easy to use in online maps and visualizations, serving as a common base layer for French geographic analysis.

name: Freshwater Ecoregions of the World (FEOW)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Hydrography | Protected areas & biodiversity
coverage: Global (426 freshwater ecoregions, updated 2013 to HydroBASINS)
license: Free for non-commercial use with attribution
access: Shapefile / GeoJSON via ArcGIS Hub; also feow.org/download
notes: Tabular MHT classification included; HydroBASINS-aligned boundaries
verify_notes: Freshwater Ecoregions (FEOW) layer | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 全球淡水生态区（FEOW）是由大自然保护协会（TNC）与世界自然基金会（WWF）基于 Abell 等 2008 年研究编制的全球淡水生物地理分区数据集，划分了 426 个淡水生态区，2013 年更新以对齐 HydroBASINS 流域边界，并附主要生境类型（MHT）分类。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 和 KML 提供，可免费用于署名前提下的非商业用途。广泛用于淡水生物多样性评估与保护规划。
desc_en: The Freshwater Ecoregions of the World (FEOW), developed by TNC and WWF from Abell et al. (2008), is a global biogeographic dataset delineating 426 freshwater ecoregions, updated in 2013 to align with HydroBASINS watershed boundaries and including a major habitat type (MHT) classification. Available as Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML, free for non-commercial use with attribution, it is widely applied in freshwater biodiversity assessment and conservation planning.

name: FUNAI CMR - Terras Indígenas (Indigenous Lands)
notes: Official indigenous land polygons (regularized, declared, in study)
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden; may require referer or differs by endpoint | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是巴西国家印第安人基金会（FUNAI）遥感监测中心（CMR）发布的巴西原住民土地（Terras Indígenas）官方边界数据，涵盖各审批阶段（已批准/已宣告/研究中等）的原住民地块。数据通过 GeoServer 的 OWS（WFS）服务及 Shapefile、KML 下载提供，属开放政府数据。是巴西原住民territory研究、土地权属分析与亚马逊森林监测的权威来源。
desc_en: Official boundaries of Brazil's Indigenous Lands (Terras Indígenas) published by FUNAI's Remote Monitoring Centre (CMR), spanning lands at various legal stages (regularized, declared, under study). The data are served through GeoServer's OWS (WFS) interface and as Shapefile and KML downloads under an open-government license. It is the authoritative source for Indigenous territory research, land-tenure analysis and Amazon deforestation monitoring in Brazil.

name: Functional Urban Area (FUA) boundaries
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
notes: Boundary layer companion to Urban Atlas; defines core city + commuting zone.
verify_notes: Functional Urban Area boundaries Dec 2020 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 功能性城市区域（FUA）边界由欧洲环境署/哥白尼计划发布，覆盖 EEA38 范围内的 785 个功能性城市区域。每个 FUA 由核心城市及其通勤腹地组成，是 Urban Atlas 的配套边界图层。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoPackage 开放下载。适合城市化、通勤模式、城市增长与土地利用的跨城市可比分析。
desc_en: Functional Urban Area (FUA) boundaries published by the EEA/Copernicus programme, covering 785 FUAs across the EEA38 region. Each FUA combines a core city with its surrounding commuting zone and serves as the boundary companion to the Urban Atlas. Provided as Shapefile and GeoPackage for open download, the layer supports comparable cross-city analysis of urbanization, commuting patterns, urban growth and land use.

name: gaode_MAP_CUN (GitHub 配套抓取脚本+样例数据)
coverage: 中国高德 district 接口派生
notes: map.ruiduobao.com 数据生成上游脚本；可自行扩展
verify_notes: 564 stars; Amap admin division data | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 GitHub 用户 ruiduobao 发布的开源仓库，提供从高德（Gaode）行政区划接口抓取中国行政边界的脚本及样例数据，是 map.ruiduobao.com 数据生成的上游工具。脚本输出 GeoJSON/SHP，可自行扩展以获取所需层级的行政边界。代码开源（许可见仓库）。适合需要自行生成或更新中国行政区划矢量数据的用户，但数据派生自高德接口，需注意来源条款与坐标系。
desc_en: An open-source GitHub repository by ruiduobao providing scripts plus sample data to scrape Chinese administrative boundaries from the AMap (Gaode) district API, serving as the upstream tooling behind map.ruiduobao.com. The scripts output GeoJSON/SHP and can be extended to fetch boundaries at the desired level, with code released under the repo's license. It suits users who need to generate or update Chinese administrative vector data themselves, mindful of AMap's source terms and coordinate system.

name: GAUL 2015 Country boundaries (Level 0) - legacy
verify_notes: GAUL 2015 L0 page available; last updated Jan 2026 | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 这是联合国粮农组织（FAO）发布的 GAUL 2015 国家边界（Level 0）数据集（已为旧版/legacy），提供全球各国国界（2015 年状态）。数据为 Shapefile，采用 FAO GAUL 非商业许可。GAUL 长期是国际机构标准的行政边界参考，该 Level 0 版本适合全球尺度的国家级制图、统计汇总与早期数据的兼容对接。
desc_en: The FAO Global Administrative Unit Layers (GAUL) 2015 country boundaries at Level 0, now a legacy release, providing national borders worldwide as of 2015. Distributed as Shapefile under the non-commercial FAO GAUL license, GAUL has long been a standard administrative-boundary reference for international agencies. This Level 0 edition suits global-scale country mapping, statistical aggregation and compatibility with older datasets that referenced GAUL.

name: GAUL 2024 on awesome-gee-community-catalog (sat-io)
verify_notes: updated April 2025; L0/L1/L2 layers | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是通过 awesome-gee-community-catalog（sat-io）发布的 GAUL 2024 行政边界数据，作为 Google Earth Engine 的 FeatureCollection 资产提供，包含全球 L0/L1/L2 各级行政单元（2024 年版）。许可为 CC BY 4.0。它将最新的 FAO GAUL 行政边界带入 GEE 生态，便于在云端遥感分析中直接做按行政区的分区统计与掩膜，无需另行上传边界数据。
desc_en: GAUL 2024 administrative boundaries distributed through the awesome-gee-community-catalog (sat-io) as Google Earth Engine FeatureCollection assets, covering global L0/L1/L2 administrative units in the 2024 edition under CC BY 4.0. By bringing the latest FAO GAUL boundaries into the GEE ecosystem, it lets users perform zonal statistics and masking by administrative unit directly in cloud-based remote-sensing workflows without uploading their own boundaries.

name: GCTB: Global Annual City and Town Boundaries (1985-2022)
provider: Liu Liangyun, Zhang Xiao, Bai Ming - Aerospace Information Research Institute, CAS
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
notes: Two separate layers per year: Cities_Year and Towns_Year; derived from GLC_FCS30D land cover
verify_notes: GCTB high-resolution global city/town boundaries 1985-2022; published 2025-07-25. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GCTB（全球年度城镇边界，1985–2022）由中国科学院空天信息创新研究院刘良云、张肖、白明团队发布，是基于 GLC_FCS30D 土地覆盖数据派生的 30 米全球城镇边界产品。每年分别提供城市（Cities）与镇（Towns）两套矢量多边形图层（WGS-84），2000 年前为五年间隔、2000–2022 为逐年。数据总量约 17.0 GB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，发表于 Scientific Data。适合全球城市化进程、城镇扩张与城乡演变研究。
desc_en: GCTB (Global Annual City and Town Boundaries, 1985–2022), released by Liu Liangyun, Zhang Xiao and Bai Ming of the CAS Aerospace Information Research Institute, is a 30 m global urban-boundary product derived from the GLC_FCS30D land-cover dataset. It provides two separate vector polygon layers per year, Cities and Towns (WGS-84), at five-year intervals before 2000 and annually for 2000–2022. Totalling about 17.0 GB under CC-BY-4.0 and documented in Scientific Data, it suits research on global urbanization, town expansion and rural-urban dynamics.

name: GDL Coding Scheme and Shapefiles (PRIO mirror)
provider: Peace Research Institute Oslo (PRIO) mirror of GDL
theme_raw: subnational administrative regions harmonised for HDI reporting
doi_or_citation: GDL Coding Scheme; cf. Smits & Permanyer 2019
notes: Useful unauth mirror of the GDL regions used for conflict / development research.
verify_notes: Hosted with permission from GDL, v6.4 (Jan 2025) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是和平研究所奥斯陆（PRIO）镜像的全球数据实验室（GDL）编码方案与 Shapefile，提供全球约 1600 个次国家级行政单元的边界。该镜像无需注册即可直接下载，遵循 GDL 使用条款。GDL 区域被广泛用于发展与冲突研究（参见 Smits & Permanyer 2019），该 PRIO 镜像为获取这些区域边界提供了便捷免认证途径。
desc_en: A PRIO (Peace Research Institute Oslo) mirror of the Global Data Lab (GDL) coding scheme and shapefiles, providing boundaries for roughly 1,600 subnational units worldwide. The mirror offers direct download without registration under the GDL terms of use. GDL regions are widely used in development and conflict research (cf. Smits & Permanyer 2019), and this PRIO mirror is a convenient, unauthenticated way to obtain those region boundaries.

name: Geo Big Data Open Platform (CASEarth)
theme_raw: Earth big data incl. vector boundaries
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geobigdata.cn/))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geobigdata.cn/))
notes: re3data r3d100014025 - Geosciences subject.
verify_notes: ECONNREFUSED via WebFetch | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geobigdata.cn/))
desc_zh: 地球大数据开放平台（CASEarth）由中国科学院主办，是一个面向地学领域的多源地理空间数据门户，覆盖亚洲及全球。平台提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 WMS/WFS 服务，许可为混合开放。它已在 re3data 注册（r3d100014025，地学学科），整合行政边界等多类数据，适合区域到全球尺度的地学研究与数据共享。
desc_en: The Geo Big Data Open Platform (CASEarth), hosted by the Chinese Academy of Sciences, is a multi-source geospatial data portal for the geosciences covering Asia and the globe. It offers Shapefile, GeoJSON and WMS/WFS services under mixed-open licensing and is registered in re3data (r3d100014025, geosciences subject). Integrating administrative boundaries among other data types, it supports regional-to-global geoscientific research and data sharing.

name: geo-boundaries-us-110m
verify_notes: Active repo, derived from Natural Earth | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 datasets.io 发布的美国行政边界数据集，基于 Natural Earth 1:110M 比例尺数据，覆盖美国，以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 和 TopoJSON 提供，托管于 GitHub。数据为公共领域（源自 Natural Earth）。比例尺较粗，适合美国全国概览地图、Web 可视化与轻量级数据应用，不适合精细制图。
desc_en: A US administrative boundaries dataset published by datasets.io, based on Natural Earth's 1:110M data, covering the United States and provided as Shapefile, GeoJSON and TopoJSON on GitHub. The data are public domain (from Natural Earth). At this coarse scale it is best suited to national-overview maps, web visualizations and lightweight data applications rather than detailed cartography.

name: geo-ne-admin1
notes: Test datapackage for Natural Earth admin1
verify_notes: From Natural Earth | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 datasets.io 基于 Natural Earth 整理的全球一级行政边界（admin1）测试数据包，覆盖全球省/州级单元，以 GeoJSON 提供并托管于 GitHub。数据采用 PDDL（公共领域），代码为 MIT 许可。作为 datapackage 示例，它适合作为全球行政边界的轻量参考、数据管线测试与 Web 可视化原型。
desc_en: A Natural Earth-based test data package of global first-order administrative boundaries (admin1) curated by datasets.io, covering province/state-level units worldwide as GeoJSON on GitHub. The data are public-domain (PDDL) with MIT-licensed code. As a datapackage example, it works well as a lightweight global ADM1 reference and for data-pipeline testing and web-visualization prototyping.

name: geo-nuts-administrative-boundaries
verify_notes: NUTS levels 1,2,3 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 datasets.io 基于 Eurostat GISCO 整理的欧盟 NUTS 行政边界数据包，覆盖欧盟，以 GeoJSON 提供（EPSG:4326，约 1:60M 比例尺），托管于 GitHub/datahub.io。数据采用 PDDL 并附 GISCO 版权声明。它是 NUTS 统计区划的轻量开放版本，适合欧盟区域统计可视化与教学，但低比例尺不适合精细分析。
desc_en: A NUTS administrative boundaries data package from datasets.io based on Eurostat GISCO, covering the European Union as GeoJSON (EPSG:4326, ~1:60M scale) and hosted on GitHub/datahub.io. The data are released under PDDL with a GISCO copyright notice. This lightweight, open version of the NUTS statistical geography suits EU regional statistical visualization and teaching, though its coarse scale limits detailed analysis.

name: geo.be Administrative Units - INSPIRE WFS
theme_raw: Belgian administrative units (national, regional, provinces, arrondissements, municipalities, statistical sectors)
notes: Cross-walked INSPIRE schema. Includes cadastral admin boundaries.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是比利时通过 geo.be 提供的行政单元数据，由国家地理院（NGI）/联邦财政公共服务部发布，覆盖比利时全境，采用符合 INSPIRE 规范的交叉映射模式，并包含地籍行政边界。数据以 WFS 服务和 Shapefile 提供，属比利时开放数据。适合符合 INSPIRE 的跨欧洲互操作应用、行政分析与地籍相关研究。
desc_en: Belgian administrative units delivered via geo.be by the National Geographic Institute (NGI) and FPS Finance, covering all of Belgium under an INSPIRE-compliant, cross-walked schema and including cadastral administrative boundaries. The data are provided as a WFS service and Shapefile under Belgian open-data terms. They suit INSPIRE-aligned pan-European interoperability use cases, administrative analysis and cadastre-related research.

name: geoAr - Argentine Spatial Data
notes: Sibling package referenced from geobr docs.
verify_notes: Active on CRAN and GitHub | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: geoAr 是一个提供阿根廷空间数据的 R 包，由 PoliticaArgentina 维护，数据源自阿根廷国家统计与普查局（INDEC），覆盖阿根廷各级行政边界。它以 sf/GeoPackage 形式输出，采用 MIT 许可，是 geobr（巴西）文档中提及的姊妹包。适合在 R 中进行阿根廷行政边界获取、专题制图与社会经济空间分析。
desc_en: geoAr is an R package providing Argentine spatial data, maintained by PoliticaArgentina with boundaries sourced from Argentina's national statistics institute INDEC, covering administrative units across the country. It returns sf/GeoPackage objects under the MIT license and is the sibling package referenced from the geobr (Brazil) documentation. It is convenient for accessing Argentine administrative boundaries, thematic mapping and socioeconomic spatial analysis within R.

name: GeoBase (Canada)
provider: Natural Resources Canada / Canadian Council on Geomatics
notes: Original GeoBase site closed Jan 2015; products now redistributed via open.canada.ca and GeoGratis. Pure vector authoritative national framework data.
verify_notes: GeoBase closed Jan 2015; data moved to Open Government of Canada / GeoGratis | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoBase 是加拿大自然资源部与加拿大地理空间联合委员会提供的全国性权威基础地理框架数据，涵盖行政边界、交通和水文等矢量要素。数据以 Shapefile、FGDB、KML、GML 提供，采用加拿大开放政府许可（OGLC）。原 GeoBase 站点于 2015 年 1 月关闭，相关产品现通过 open.canada.ca 与 GeoGratis 再分发。适合加拿大全国尺度的基础地理与多主题空间分析。
desc_en: GeoBase is Canada's authoritative national geospatial framework, provided by Natural Resources Canada and the Canadian Council on Geomatics, comprising vector layers such as administrative boundaries, transportation and hydrography. Distributed as Shapefile, FGDB, KML and GML under the Open Government Licence – Canada (OGLC), the original GeoBase site closed in January 2015 and its products are now redistributed via open.canada.ca and GeoGratis. It suits national-scale framework mapping and multi-theme spatial analysis in Canada.

name: geoBoundaries CGAZ ADM1 v6.0.0
coverage: 199 entities incl. Taiwan, Kosovo, Greenland, Niue
notes: Open alternative to GAUL/GADM; ADM0/ADM1/ADM2 all available on GEE.
verify_notes: geoBoundaries ADM1 199 entities | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 William & Mary geoLab 发布的 geoBoundaries CGAZ ADM1 v6.0.0 数据，作为 Google Earth Engine 的 FeatureCollection 提供，包含 199 个实体的一级行政边界（含台湾、科索沃、格陵兰、纽埃等）。采用 CC BY 4.0 开放许可，ADM0/ADM1/ADM2 各级均可在 GEE 获取。它是 GAUL/GADM 的开放替代方案，适合云端遥感分析中的全球行政边界分区统计。
desc_en: geoBoundaries CGAZ ADM1 v6.0.0 from William & Mary's geoLab, available as a Google Earth Engine FeatureCollection covering first-order administrative boundaries for 199 entities (including Taiwan, Kosovo, Greenland and Niue) under CC BY 4.0, with ADM0/ADM1/ADM2 levels all available on GEE. As an open alternative to GAUL and GADM, it is well suited to global administrative-unit zonal statistics in cloud-based remote-sensing analysis.

name: geoBoundaries Dataverse versioned releases
access: open with stable DOIs per release
notes: Stable DOI-pinned versions for reproducible research.
verify_notes: lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: geoBoundaries 在 Harvard Dataverse 上的版本化发布，提供从 1.x 到 6.x 各版本带稳定 DOI 的全球行政区划边界数据。geoBoundaries 是开放、跨国可比的多级行政边界数据集，以宽松的 CC BY 4.0 许可证发布，格式为 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON。每个版本都通过 DOI 固定，便于可复现研究中引用特定快照（如 V6 的 DOI 为 10.7910/DVN/2RDT2K），适合学术分析、制图与边界比对等场景。
desc_en: Versioned releases of geoBoundaries hosted on Harvard Dataverse, spanning editions 1.x through 6.x, each pinned to a stable DOI. geoBoundaries is an open, globally comparable dataset of multi-level administrative boundaries distributed under the permissive CC BY 4.0 license in Shapefile and GeoJSON. DOI pinning (e.g. 10.7910/DVN/2RDT2K for V6) lets researchers cite an exact snapshot, making it well suited for reproducible studies, mapping, and boundary comparison across countries and time.

name: geoBoundaries Harvard Dataverse archive
notes: Cited static archive in PLOS paper
verify_notes: DOI redirects to Harvard Dataverse citation page | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: geoBoundaries 在 Harvard Dataverse 上的静态归档版本（DOI 10.7910/DVN/PGAIQY），作为相关 PLOS 论文引用的固定数据快照。该归档承载全球多级行政区划边界，格式为 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可证，可通过 DOI 直接下载。固定归档保证了引用与结果的可复现性，适合在已发表研究中作为权威边界来源使用。
desc_en: A static archived snapshot of geoBoundaries on Harvard Dataverse (DOI 10.7910/DVN/PGAIQY), serving as the pinned dataset cited in an associated PLOS paper. The archive holds global multi-level administrative boundaries in Shapefile and GeoJSON under CC BY 4.0, downloadable directly via DOI. As a frozen citation, it underpins reproducibility of published results and provides an authoritative boundary source for academic reuse.

name: Geocode Earth — International timezone polygons
notes: WOF-flavored timezone polygons; cf. evansiroky/timezone-boundary-builder.
verify_notes: Includes WOF extracts, admin boundaries, Placeholder, OSM streets | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Geocode Earth 提供的全球时区多边形数据，上游源自 evansiroky/timezone-boundary-builder 项目，并采用 Who's On First 风格组织。数据以 GeoJSON 格式发布，覆盖全球，将地表划分为对应各时区的面要素，许可证依其来源数据（WOF 与 OSM 系许可）。常用于将经纬度坐标映射到时区，支撑地理编码、时间换算与位置服务等应用。
desc_en: Global timezone polygons published by Geocode Earth, derived upstream from the evansiroky/timezone-boundary-builder project and organized in a Who's On First flavor. Delivered as GeoJSON with worldwide coverage, the data partition the Earth's surface into polygons keyed to time zones, under licenses inherited from its sources (WOF and OSM). It is commonly used to map latitude/longitude points to their time zone, supporting geocoding, time conversion, and location services.

name: Geocode Earth — Neighbourhood boundaries
notes: One of the few global open neighbourhood polygon sets with populations & translations — heavily reused (Mapbox, Pelias).
verify_notes: Free download whosonfirst-data-neighbourhood-latest.tar.bz2 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geocode Earth 提供的全球街区（neighbourhood）边界数据，作为 Who's On First 数据的提取产品，以 GeoJSON 发布，采用 Who's On First 许可证。这是少数覆盖全球的开放街区面数据集之一，附带人口属性与多语言名称翻译，被 Mapbox、Pelias 等项目广泛复用。适合细粒度地理编码、城市分析与本地化制图等场景。
desc_en: Global neighbourhood boundaries from Geocode Earth, extracted from the Who's On First gazetteer and released as GeoJSON under the Who's On First License. It is one of the few open, worldwide neighbourhood polygon sets that ship with population attributes and multilingual name translations, and is heavily reused by projects like Mapbox and Pelias. The data suit fine-grained geocoding, urban analysis, and localized cartography.

name: Geofabrik Administrative Boundaries (admin-polygons)
notes: 边界数据被层级化丰富过，比 OSM 原始 relation 更易用，行政区数据冷门替代方案
verify_notes: Custom admin polygons service | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geofabrik 发布的行政区划边界数据（admin-polygons），基于 OpenStreetMap 并按 admin_level 层级切分，覆盖全球。相比 OSM 原始的边界 relation，这份数据经过层级化整理与丰富，更便于直接使用，提供 GeoPackage、Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 格式，采用 ODbL 1.0 许可证。多数可免费下载（部分需注册），是获取 OSM 行政边界的一个实用替代方案。
desc_en: Administrative boundary polygons distributed by Geofabrik, built from OpenStreetMap and split by admin_level with global coverage. Compared with raw OSM boundary relations, this product is hierarchically organized and enriched for easier direct use, offered in GeoPackage, Shapefile, and GeoJSON under the ODbL 1.0 license. Most files are free to download (some require registration), making it a convenient alternative route to OSM-derived administrative boundaries.

name: GeoHive Administrative Boundaries Dataset (Ireland)
formats: RDF/Linked Data dump derived from OSi vector boundaries
notes: Full dump of data.geohive.ie admin boundaries; derived from OSi national mapping.
verify_notes: figshare blocks WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: GeoHive 爱尔兰行政区划数据集，是 data.geohive.ie 行政边界的完整转储，托管于 Figshare（DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.5235961）。数据派生自爱尔兰国家测绘机构 OSi 的矢量边界，以 RDF / 关联数据（Linked Data）形式发布，采用 CC BY 许可证。适合语义网应用、行政边界关联查询及爱尔兰区域统计分析。
desc_en: The GeoHive Administrative Boundaries Dataset for Ireland, a full dump of the boundaries from data.geohive.ie hosted on Figshare (DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.5235961). Derived from the vector boundaries of Ireland's national mapping agency OSi, it is published as an RDF/Linked Data dump under a CC BY license. It suits semantic-web applications, linked administrative-boundary queries, and regional statistical analysis for Ireland.

name: GeoJSON.cn (DataV / Aliyun derived national vector atlas)
provider: GeoJSON.cn community (sourced from 天地图 standard map)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Marine & coastal | Physical geography (natural earth)
theme_raw: China provincial/municipal/county boundaries, national coastline & physical layers
license: open (community-maintained, derives from 国家标准矢量地图)
license_now: Proprietary © 2024 GeoJSON.CN (free for national/provincial via API; paid for municipal/county)
notes: Common Chinese open data shortcut for natural features; coordinate system: WGS84 with audit number; pragmatically used in lieu of restricted gov downloads.
verify_notes: v1.6.3 (2025-12-14); data sourced from Tencent Maps (GCJ-02). Note: license is not simply CC; commercial tiered. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoJSON.cn 社区维护的中国矢量地图集，数据源自天地图标准底图（及 DataV/阿里云相关产品），提供行政区划、海岸线、自然地理等要素，格式为 GeoJSON 与 TopoJSON，坐标系为带审图号的 WGS84。国家级与省级数据可通过 API 免费获取，市县级为付费内容，版权归 GeoJSON.CN 所有。常作为获取中国自然要素与边界的便捷替代方案，用于前端可视化与制图。
desc_en: A vector atlas of China maintained by the GeoJSON.cn community, sourced from the Tianditu standard base map (and DataV/Aliyun-derived products), covering administrative boundaries, coastline, and natural-geography features. Offered in GeoJSON and TopoJSON in audited WGS84, national and provincial layers are free via API while municipal/county data are paid, under GeoJSON.CN's proprietary terms. It is a common shortcut for Chinese boundaries and natural features in web visualization and mapping.

name: geojson.hxkj.vip 实时行政区划边界 GeoJSON
license_now: 免费下载 (具体条款未在首页给出)
notes: 教程贴 (SegmentFault/掘金) 高频提及; 适合前端可视化
verify_notes: 页面内容稀疏, 但提到免费下载 GeoJSON 行政边界 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 HashTang 个人站点提供的中国实时行政区划边界 GeoJSON 数据，覆盖省、市、区县乃至街道四级。数据以 GeoJSON 格式直接下载，首页未明确给出具体许可条款，标称免费使用。该站点常在 SegmentFault、掘金等技术教程中被提及，适合前端地图可视化与快速原型开发。
desc_en: Real-time administrative boundary GeoJSON for China provided by HashTang's personal site, covering provinces, prefectures, county-level districts, and down to subdistricts. The data are offered as direct GeoJSON downloads and described as free, though the homepage does not spell out precise license terms. The site is frequently cited in Chinese developer tutorials (SegmentFault, Juejin) and is well suited to front-end map visualization and rapid prototyping.

name: GeoLink-UV 中国342城城中村矢量数据集
provider: 学术团队 (基于基础大模型) 2025
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
notes: 极冷门但高度专精: 中国唯一全国尺度的城中村矢量公开产品
verify_notes: arXiv ID 2602.18765 is invalid (future year); page returns corrupted/binary | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoLink-UV 中国342城城中村矢量数据集（arXiv:2602.18765 论文配套），由学术团队基于基础大模型框架于 2025 年制作。数据覆盖中国 342 个城市，以 Shapefile 矢量面形式提供城中村边界，作为论文补充材料开放。这是较为冷门但高度专精的产品，被称为中国唯一全国尺度的公开城中村矢量数据，适用于城市非正规聚落、城乡结构与城市更新研究。
desc_en: GeoLink-UV, a vector dataset of urban villages across 342 Chinese cities, released as a supplement to the paper arXiv:2602.18765 and produced by an academic team using a foundation-model framework (2025). It provides urban-village boundaries as Shapefile polygons covering 342 cities and is openly available with the paper. A niche but highly specialized product, it is described as China's only nationwide open urban-village vector dataset, useful for research on informal settlements, urban-rural structure, and urban renewal.

name: GeoLink-UV: Nationwide Urban Village Mapping Product for 342 Chinese Cities
provider: Zenodo (authors of arXiv:2602.18765, follow-up to CUGUV)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
coverage: China — 342 cities across all provinces, circa 2023
notes: Productized vector output of urban village boundaries derived via foundation-model framework; companion to CUGUV benchmark (DOI 10.1038/s41597-025-04701-w). Total ~2.6 GB.
verify_notes: Nationwide urban village mapping for 342 Chinese cities, 34 .gpkg files, 2.6 GB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoLink-UV 的 Zenodo 产品化发布版（DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18688062），覆盖中国 342 个城市、约 2023 年时点的城中村边界，按省/区组织为 34 个 GeoPackage 文件，总量约 2.6 GB，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可证开放下载。该数据通过基础大模型框架提取，是 CUGUV 基准（DOI 10.1038/s41597-025-04701-w）的配套产品，适合全国尺度的城中村制图与城市分析。
desc_en: The productized Zenodo release of GeoLink-UV (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18688062), mapping urban-village boundaries for 342 Chinese cities across all provinces circa 2023. It is organized as 34 provincial/regional GeoPackage files totaling about 2.6 GB and openly downloadable under CC BY 4.0. Derived through a foundation-model framework as a companion to the CUGUV benchmark (DOI 10.1038/s41597-025-04701-w), it supports nationwide urban-village mapping and urban analysis.

name: Geoportal.gov.pl PRG Administrative Boundaries WFS
provider: Poland - Główny Urząd Geodezji i Kartografii (GUGiK)
theme_raw: national register of boundaries (PRG): country, voivodeships, powiats, gminas
notes: Official national register of boundaries.
verify_notes: GUGIK service docs; usage stats show brak dostępu | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 波兰国家行政区划边界（PRG）的官方 WFS 服务，由波兰测绘与制图总局（GUGiK）通过 Geoportal.gov.pl 发布。数据为波兰官方行政边界登记册，覆盖全国各级行政单元，以 WFS / GML 形式提供，按开放数据条款（等同 CC-BY）使用。作为权威国家数据源，适合波兰境内的行政分析、空间统计与制图。
desc_en: An official WFS service for Poland's administrative boundaries (PRG), published by the national geodesy and cartography authority GUGiK through Geoportal.gov.pl. As Poland's official register of boundaries, it covers administrative units nationwide and is served via WFS/GML under open-data terms equivalent to CC-BY. As an authoritative national source, it suits administrative analysis, spatial statistics, and mapping within Poland.

name: GeoReferenced Electoral Districts (GRED)
provider: Constituency-Level Elections Archive (CLEA), Univ. of Michigan
notes: Designed to link with CLEA election returns
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: GeoReferenced Electoral Districts (GRED) 是由密歇根大学 Constituency-Level Elections Archive (CLEA) 维护的地理参考选区边界数据集，覆盖多国下议院（Lower Chamber）选举的选区。数据以 Shapefile 矢量形式提供，需注册后下载，按学术/开放条款使用。其设计目标是与 CLEA 选举结果数据对接，适合选举地理、代议政治与跨国比较研究。
desc_en: GeoReferenced Electoral Districts (GRED) is a dataset of georeferenced electoral-district boundaries maintained by the Constituency-Level Elections Archive (CLEA) at the University of Michigan, covering Lower Chamber elections across many countries. Provided as vector Shapefiles under academic/open terms with registration, it is designed to link directly with CLEA election returns, making it well suited to electoral geography, legislative politics, and cross-national comparative research.

name: Georgia Data Files (Harvard EDA) - Precinct Shapefiles with 2006-2008 Election Results
notes: Precinct boundaries + returns
verify_notes: DOI resolves to Harvard Dataverse citation page; page returns empty content via WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 美国佐治亚州选区（precinct）边界数据，含 2006–2008 年选举结果，来自哈佛选举数据档案（Harvard Election Data Archive, Dataverse；DOI 10.7910/DVN/VC5TPK）。数据以 Shapefile 提供，将选区边界与对应选举回报结合，按哈佛 Dataverse 条款通过 Dataverse 下载。适合选举地理分析、选区划分与投票行为研究。
desc_en: Precinct boundary shapefiles for the U.S. state of Georgia with 2006–2008 election results, from the Harvard Election Data Archive on Dataverse (DOI 10.7910/DVN/VC5TPK). The data pair precinct boundaries with their corresponding election returns in Shapefile format, downloadable via Dataverse under Harvard Dataverse terms. They support electoral geography, redistricting analysis, and studies of voting behavior.

name: Geoshape Choropleth Maps (historical municipality polygons)
theme_raw: Historical municipality polygons for choropleth visualization
license_now: not stated on page (parent CC BY 4.0)
notes: Choropleth-ready polygon derivative of the Historical Administrative Boundaries Dataset.
verify_notes: 1889-2023 city polygons from KSJ | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geoshape Choropleth 是日本历史市町村行政边界的面状衍生产品，由 CODH/NII 提供，覆盖 1889–2023 年。数据以 GeoJSON / TopoJSON 矢量面形式发布，针对分级统计图（choropleth）制图优化，源自历史行政边界数据集（DOI 10.20676/00000447），母数据集采用 CC BY 4.0。适合日本历史人口、行政区演变与时序专题制图研究。
desc_en: Geoshape Choropleth provides choropleth-ready polygon derivatives of Japan's historical municipal boundaries from CODH/NII, spanning 1889–2023. The data are published as GeoJSON/TopoJSON vector polygons optimized for choropleth mapping, derived from the Historical Administrative Boundaries Dataset (DOI 10.20676/00000447) whose parent is CC BY 4.0. They suit research on Japan's historical demographics, administrative evolution, and time-series thematic cartography.

name: Geoshape Vector Tile Maps (historical boundaries)
license_now: not stated on page (parent CC BY 4.0)
notes: Web-optimized binary vector tile delivery of the historical boundary corpus.
verify_notes: Historical admin vector tile maps 1889-2023 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geoshape Vector Tile 是日本历史行政边界（1889–2023）的网络优化矢量瓦片产品，由 CODH/NII 提供。数据以 Mapbox Vector Tiles（MVT/PBF）形式通过开放瓦片端点交付，便于在 Web 地图中高效渲染海量历史边界，源自历史行政边界语料（DOI 10.20676/00000447），母数据集采用 CC BY 4.0。适合交互式历史地图与时序可视化。
desc_en: Geoshape Vector Tiles deliver a web-optimized rendering of Japan's historical administrative boundaries (1889–2023) from CODH/NII. The corpus is served as Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT/PBF) through open tile endpoints, enabling efficient display of large historical boundary collections in web maps, derived from the same dataset (DOI 10.20676/00000447) whose parent is CC BY 4.0. It is ideal for interactive historical mapping and time-series visualization.

name: geouy - Uruguay Spatial Data
theme_raw: administrative and statistical boundaries (departamentos, secciones, localidades)
notes: Same family of national geo-data wrappers.
verify_notes: License now GPL-3 (was MIT) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: geouy 是一个用于获取乌拉圭官方空间数据的 R 包，数据来源于乌拉圭国家统计局（INE）。它以 R 的 sf 对象形式提供乌拉圭行政区划等地理数据，通过 CRAN 安装，采用 GPL-3.0 许可证。属于一类国家级地理数据 R 封装工具，适合在 R 工作流中便捷加载乌拉圭边界，用于空间分析与制图。
desc_en: geouy is an R package for accessing official spatial data of Uruguay, sourced from the national statistics institute INE. It exposes Uruguayan administrative boundaries and other geographies as R sf objects, installable via CRAN under the GPL-3.0 license. Belonging to a family of national geo-data R wrappers, it makes it easy to load Uruguay's boundaries within R workflows for spatial analysis and mapping.

name: GeoWB (World Bank geospatial platform)
theme_raw: Vector viewer / API gateway for WB Official Boundaries
formats: Vector tiles / REST API / WFS-like services
access: Open web platform and API; sign-in may be required for some functions
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geowb.worldbank.org/))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geowb.worldbank.org/))
notes: Programmatic / map-service access path to the Official Boundaries vectors referenced in the blog.
verify_notes: Connection refused at fetch time | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geowb.worldbank.org/))
desc_zh: GeoWB 是世界银行的地理空间平台，提供对其官方行政边界（Official Boundaries）矢量数据的程序化与地图服务访问，覆盖全球。数据通过矢量瓦片、REST API 及类 WFS 服务交付，官方边界内容采用 CC BY 4.0 许可证；平台与 API 开放访问，部分功能可能需登录。适合在世界银行框架下进行全球边界制图与发展数据分析。
desc_en: GeoWB is the World Bank's geospatial platform offering programmatic and map-service access to its Official Boundaries vector data with global coverage.
