The boundaries are delivered through vector tiles, a REST API, and WFS-like services, with the Official Boundaries content licensed under CC BY 4.0; the platform and API are openly accessible, though some functions may require sign-in. It suits global boundary mapping and development-data analysis aligned with World Bank conventions.

name: German Index of Socioeconomic Deprivation (GISD)
theme_raw: Socioeconomic deprivation index by administrative unit
formats: Tabular (CSV) joinable to municipal/district shapefiles; syntax provided
notes: Vector geometry must be joined via AGS keys to BKG VG250 layer; updated version: zenodo.14781119
verify_notes: GISD by RKI, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.6840304. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 德国社会经济剥夺指数（GISD），由罗伯特·科赫研究所发布于 Zenodo（DOI 10.5281/zenodo.6840304），覆盖德国从市镇到 NUTS-2 各级、时间跨度 1998–2021 年。数据以可连接的表格（CSV）形式提供，并附有处理脚本，需通过 AGS 行政编码与 BKG VG250 矢量边界连接以获得几何，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可证（另有更新版 zenodo.14781119）。适合健康不平等与社会经济地理研究。
desc_en: The German Index of Socioeconomic Deprivation (GISD) from the Robert Koch Institute on Zenodo (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.6840304), covering Germany from municipality to NUTS-2 level over 1998–2021. It is distributed as joinable tabular CSV with accompanying syntax; geometries are obtained by joining via AGS keys to the BKG VG250 vector layer, under CC BY 4.0 (with an updated version at zenodo.14781119). It supports research on health inequalities and socioeconomic geography.

name: GHS-SMOD Urban Centres Boundaries (E2020, R2023A) Shapefile
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
license_now: GHSL data policy (free reuse with citation)
verify_notes: JRC GHSL SMOD 2020 1km Mollweide; actual file downloads | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GHS-SMOD 城市中心（Urban Centres）边界矢量数据（E2020, R2023A），来自欧盟联合研究中心的全球人居层（JRC GHSL）。该产品基于 GHSL 城乡分级模型，提取 2020 年全球高密度城市中心（urban centres）的边界，以 Shapefile 形式通过 FTP 直接下载，遵循 GHSL 数据政策（免费复用并需引用）。适合全球城市化、城市范围界定与人口聚集研究。
desc_en: GHS-SMOD Urban Centres boundaries (E2020, R2023A) from the EU Joint Research Centre's Global Human Settlement Layer (JRC GHSL). Based on the GHSL degree-of-urbanisation model, it extracts the boundaries of the world's high-density urban centres for 2020 as a Shapefile, available via direct FTP under the GHSL data policy (free reuse with citation). It supports research on global urbanisation, urban-extent delineation, and population concentration.

name: GIS of Mexican States, Municipalities and Islands, v1
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Marine & coastal
notes: Georeferenced population vector layers
verify_notes: SEDAC server timeout | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 墨西哥州、市镇与岛屿 GIS 数据集（v1），由哥伦比亚大学 CIESIN/SEDAC 提供，覆盖墨西哥各级行政单元及岛屿。数据以 Shapefile 形式发布，含地理参考的人口相关矢量图层，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可证，需免费的 NASA Earthdata 账号下载。适合墨西哥的行政分析、人口分布与海岸/岛屿研究。
desc_en: A GIS dataset of Mexican states, municipalities, and islands (v1) from CIESIN/SEDAC at Columbia University, covering Mexico's administrative units and islands. Released as Shapefiles with georeferenced population-related vector layers under CC BY 4.0, it requires a free NASA Earthdata login to download. It suits administrative analysis, population distribution, and coastal/island studies for Mexico.

name: gis5g 地球资源数据云 2021 全国城乡划分代码
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
coverage: China 全国 town-level urban/rural class
notes: 国家统计局城乡分类代码的矢量化版本, 冷门但研究常用 (城乡二元结构)
verify_notes: Last updated 2025-08-15 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: gis5g 地球资源数据云提供的 2021 年全国城乡划分代码（矢量化版本），覆盖中国全国乡镇/村级城乡分类，源自国家统计局城乡分类代码。数据规模约 60 余万个村（居）委会，以 shp/csv 提供，需注册下载，许可条款未明确说明。属冷门但研究常用的数据，适合城乡二元结构、人口与区域发展分析。
desc_en: A vectorized version of China's 2021 nationwide urban-rural classification codes, provided by the gis5g resource cloud and derived from the National Bureau of Statistics' urban-rural code system, covering town/village-level classifications across China. Spanning over 600,000 village/residents' committees, it is offered in shp/csv with registration required and unspecified license terms. A niche but commonly used dataset, it suits research on urban-rural dual structure, population, and regional development.

name: gisrsdata.com 行政区划数据汇总站
provider: 地信遥感数据汇 (gisrsdata.com 民间聚合)
notes: 目录型 catalog, 适合 phase2 顺藤摸瓜
verify_notes: Last updated 2022-10-17; aggregator page | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: gisrsdata.com（地信遥感数据汇）的行政区划数据汇总站，是一个民间聚合的中国多来源行政边界目录页面。它以目录形式索引多种 shp/geojson 行政区划数据，采用站点自有的专有条款（川 ICP 备 2021024989-4），支持直接下载。作为 catalog 型入口，适合作为顺藤摸瓜、查找更多中国行政边界数据源的检索起点。
desc_en: A roundup page of administrative-boundary data on gisrsdata.com, a community aggregator mirroring multiple sources of Chinese administrative boundaries. It catalogs various shp/geojson administrative-division datasets under the site's own proprietary terms (Sichuan ICP 2021024989-4), with direct downloads. As a catalog-style entry point, it is useful as a starting place to discover and trace additional sources of Chinese administrative-boundary data.

name: Global Administrative Boundaries - Countries (GAUL 2015)
license: GAUL terms (restricted for some sub-units; open via WFP GeoNode)
notes: Country polygons from FAO GAUL 2015, served via WFP GeoNode GeoServer WFS.
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out (>60s); WFP GeoNode often slow/intermittent | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 全球行政区划——国家级边界（GAUL 2015），即 FAO 全球行政单元图层（GAUL）2015 版的国家（admin0）多边形，由世界粮食计划署（WFP）通过其 GeoNode/GeoServer WFS 提供。数据通过 WFS 以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 等形式开放下载，遵循 GAUL 条款（部分次级单元使用受限）。GAUL 是联合国机构间广泛使用的标准化全球边界，适合国际人道与统计制图。
desc_en: Global administrative boundaries — country level (GAUL 2015), the admin0 country polygons of FAO's Global Administrative Unit Layers, served by the World Food Programme via its GeoNode/GeoServer WFS. The data are openly available through WFS as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and KML under GAUL terms (with restrictions on some sub-units). GAUL is a standardized global boundary set widely used across UN agencies, suiting international humanitarian and statistical mapping.

name: Global Administrative Boundaries - Provinces (GAUL 2015) - admin2
notes: GAUL 2015 admin2 provinces mirror.
verify_notes: WFP GeoNode timed out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 全球行政区划——省/二级单元（GAUL 2015 admin2），FAO GAUL 2015 的 admin2 级行政单元镜像，由 WFP GeoNode 提供。数据通过 OGC 服务（WFS、WMS）及 Shapefile、GeoJSON 等格式访问，遵循 FAO GAUL 条款。作为 GAUL 标准全球边界的更细层级，适合国际机构在国家以下尺度的人道、农业与统计分析。
desc_en: Global administrative boundaries — admin2 provinces/second-level units (GAUL 2015), a mirror of FAO GAUL 2015's admin2 layer provided via WFP GeoNode. The data are accessible through OGC services (WFS, WMS) and formats such as Shapefile and GeoJSON under FAO GAUL terms. As a finer tier of the standard GAUL global boundaries, it suits sub-national humanitarian, agricultural, and statistical analysis by international agencies.

name: Global Boundaries for WFP Activities (ACR 2018)
formats_now: GeoJSON, KML, Shapefile, GML, CSV, Excel, WMS, WFS
verify_notes: Metadata last modified 2025-09-30; 18 resources | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: WFP 业务用全球边界（ACR 2018），世界粮食计划署用于其活动的全球行政边界数据集，此处为 AmeriGEOSS 上的镜像。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 提供，支持直接下载及 WFS 访问，覆盖全球；页面标注“未提供许可证”，使用前需自行确认条款。适合人道行动规划与全球业务区划参考。
desc_en: Global Boundaries for WFP Activities (ACR 2018), the World Food Programme's set of global administrative boundaries used for its operations, here mirrored on AmeriGEOSS. The data are provided as Shapefile and GeoJSON with direct download plus WFS access and global coverage; the page states no license is provided, so terms should be verified before reuse. It suits humanitarian operations planning and global operational-boundary reference.

name: Global International Boundaries - OSM (HDX)
notes: Useful where COD-AB ADM0 stitching is inconsistent
verify_notes: HDX 403 to crawler | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 全球国际边界——OSM 版（HDX），由 OpenStreetMap/HOT 社区维护、发布在人道数据交换平台（HDX）上的全球国境线数据，覆盖全球，采用 ODbL 许可证，提供 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON。该数据在 COD-AB 等官方 ADM0 边界拼接不一致时尤为有用，适合人道制图、全球底图与跨境分析。
desc_en: Global International Boundaries — OSM (HDX), worldwide international borders sourced from the OpenStreetMap/HOT community and published on the Humanitarian Data Exchange, covering the globe under the ODbL license in Shapefile and GeoJSON. It is especially useful where official ADM0 boundaries such as COD-AB are inconsistently stitched together, suiting humanitarian mapping, global basemaps, and cross-border analysis.

name: Global Layers with INFORM Attributes (2019)
theme_raw: Admin boundaries enriched with INFORM risk index
verify_notes: 60s timeout | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 带 INFORM 属性的全球图层（2019），由 WFP GeoNode 发布，覆盖全球 admin0–admin1 级行政单元，并关联 INFORM 风险指数属性。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GML、KML 及 WFS 形式在图层页面提供，遵循 WFP 开放条款。适合全球与国家级风险评估、人道优先级排序与灾害管理分析。
desc_en: Global Layers with INFORM Attributes (2019), published by WFP GeoNode, covering admin0–admin1 administrative units worldwide joined with INFORM risk-index attributes. The data are available from the layer page as Shapefile, GeoJSON, GML, KML, and via WFS under WFP open terms. They suit global and national risk assessment, humanitarian prioritization, and disaster-management analysis.

name: Global Urban Boundary (GUB)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
doi_or_citation: Li et al. 2020 Sci. Bull., doi:10.1016/j.scib.2019.12.007
notes: Vector derivative used by CLCD authors for urban LC comparison
verify_notes: 404 Not Found - page appears moved/removed at Tsinghua ESS data site | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 全球城市边界（Global Urban Boundary, GUB），由清华大学宫鹏/李雪团队制作，覆盖全球、时间跨度 1990–2018 年（约每 5 年一期）。数据以 Shapefile 矢量形式直接下载，免费供学术使用，对应论文 Li 等 2020 年发表于 Science Bulletin（DOI 10.1016/j.scib.2019.12.007）。它是从全球土地覆盖产品衍生的城市范围矢量，常被 CLCD 等研究用于城市土地覆盖对比，适合城市扩张与城市化时序研究。
desc_en: Global Urban Boundary (GUB), produced by the Gong/Li group at Tsinghua University, covering the globe from 1990 to 2018 at roughly five-year intervals. The data are available as direct Shapefile downloads, free for academic use, corresponding to Li et al. 2020 in Science Bulletin (DOI 10.1016/j.scib.2019.12.007). A vector derivative of global land-cover products delineating urban extents, it is often used (e.g., by CLCD authors) for urban land-cover comparison and suits studies of urban expansion and urbanization over time.

name: GlobeLand30 - 30 m Global Land Cover (vector available per tile on request)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Land cover (raster primary; vector polygons derivable / partially distributed)
formats: GeoTIFF (raster); Shapefile polygon for select aggregations
doi_or_citation: Chen et al., 2015 ISPRS J. Photogramm.
notes: Mainly raster — listed only for the vectorized administrative summary product
verify_notes: Page accessible (catalog search interface) but GlobeLand30-specific license/format text not surfaced on this entry page; requires deeper navigation. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GlobeLand30 是 30 米分辨率的全球地表覆盖产品，由国家基础地理信息中心（NGCC）/自然资源部制作，覆盖全球，含 2000/2010/2020 三个年份。主体为 GeoTIFF 栅格，并对部分聚合产品提供 Shapefile 多边形（此处主要指其矢量化的行政汇总产品）。免费供非商业科研使用，需在 globallandcover.com / webmap.cn 注册，对应 Chen 等 2015 年 ISPRS J. 论文。适合全球与区域土地覆盖变化分析。
desc_en: GlobeLand30 is a 30 m global land-cover product produced by China's NGCC / Ministry of Natural Resources, covering the globe for epochs 2000, 2010, and 2020. It is primarily delivered as GeoTIFF raster, with Shapefile polygons offered for select aggregations (referenced here for its vectorized administrative-summary product). Free for non-commercial scientific use with registration at globallandcover.com / webmap.cn, it corresponds to Chen et al. 2015 in the ISPRS Journal and suits global and regional land-cover change analysis.

name: GlobeLand30 全球30米地表覆盖矢量产品
provider: 国家基础地理信息中心 (NGCC) / 自然资源部 (中国向UN赠送)
theme_raw: 全球地表覆盖 10类 (耕地, 森林, 草地, 灌木地, 湿地, 水体, 苔原, 人造地表, 裸地, 冰川)
license: open (用户协议, 注明来源)
formats: raster TIFF (主) + 部分矢量边界产品; 用户可矢量化
doi_or_citation: Chen J, Chen L, Liao A et al. ISPRS J Photogramm 2015
notes: 863计划成果, 是中国向联合国提供的首个公共地理信息产品; 严格说原生为栅格但发布版含矢量边界及全球城市边界
verify_notes: Site did not respond within 60s timeout | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GlobeLand30 全球 30 米地表覆盖矢量产品官网，由国家基础地理信息中心（NGCC）/自然资源部制作，覆盖全球。该产品是国家 863 计划成果，也是中国向联合国赠送的首个公共地理信息产品；原生主要为 TIFF 栅格，发布版另含部分矢量边界产品（包括全球城市边界），用户也可自行矢量化。需注册下载，按用户协议开放使用（须注明来源），对应 Chen 等 2015 年 ISPRS J. 论文。适合全球土地覆盖研究与制图。
desc_en: The official site of GlobeLand30, a 30 m global land-cover product from China's NGCC / Ministry of Natural Resources with global coverage. A product of the national 863 Program, it was China's first public geographic-information product donated to the United Nations; natively it is mainly TIFF raster, while the released version also includes some vector boundary products (including global urban boundaries), and users may vectorize it. Downloadable with registration under a user agreement requiring attribution, it corresponds to Chen et al. 2015 in the ISPRS Journal and suits global land-cover research and mapping.

name: GloCAB Cropland Field Boundary Dataset
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
coverage: regional: Brazil, Ukraine, USA, Canada, Russia
notes: 190,832 manually digitised field polygons over 22 regions; byproduct of cropland burned-area initiative
verify_notes: GloCAB Cropland Field Boundary Dataset live. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GloCAB 农田地块边界数据集，由马里兰大学团队（Hall、Argueta、Giglio）制作，发布于 Zenodo（DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10479122）。数据为人工数字化的农田地块多边形，覆盖巴西、乌克兰、美国、加拿大、俄罗斯等 22 个区域，约 190,832 个地块，约 20 米分辨率，时间约为 2002 年年中至 2020 年，以 Shapefile（压缩矢量）提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可证。该数据是农田燃烧面积研究的副产品，适合农田制图、地块分割与遥感验证。
desc_en: The GloCAB Cropland Field Boundary Dataset, produced by a University of Maryland team (Hall, Argueta, Giglio) on Zenodo (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10479122). It comprises about 190,832 manually digitized cropland field polygons across 22 regions including Brazil, Ukraine, the USA, Canada, and Russia, at roughly 20 m and spanning mid-2002 to 2020, provided as zipped Shapefiles under CC BY 4.0. A byproduct of a cropland burned-area initiative, it suits cropland mapping, field segmentation, and remote-sensing validation.

name: GMT supplementary DCW (Digital Chart of the World) borders
notes: Companion product to GSHHG borders distributed by the same authors.
verify_notes: Index of remote datasets, per-dataset licensing | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GMT 补充 DCW（Digital Chart of the World）边界数据，由 Generic Mapping Tools (GMT) 项目重新打包的全球行政与国境边界，覆盖全球。数据以 Shapefile / GMT 格式作为 GMT 远程数据集通过 HTTP 获取，许可证依各原始来源而定。它是 GMT 同一团队发行的 GSHHG 海岸线/边界数据的配套产品，适合科学制图与 GMT 工作流中的底图绘制。
desc_en: GMT supplementary DCW (Digital Chart of the World) borders, the global administrative and national boundaries repackaged by the Generic Mapping Tools project with worldwide coverage. The data are available as GMT remote datasets over HTTP in Shapefile/GMT format, with licensing inherited per original source. A companion to the GSHHG coastline/border data distributed by the same authors, it suits scientific cartography and basemap rendering within GMT workflows.

name: GPWv3 National Administrative Boundaries
notes: Polygonized pixel boundaries of GPWv3 admin units; rectilinear edges. Largely superseded but still cited in legacy population studies.
verify_notes: SEDAC legacy host timing out; GPW v3 superseded by v4/v4.11 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GPWv3 国家行政边界，由 NASA SEDAC/CIESIN 发布，覆盖全球、约 2000 年时点。该数据为 GPWv3 人口网格输入行政单元的多边形化边界，因源自像元而呈现直角（rectilinear）边缘，以 Esri Shapefile 提供，采用 CC BY 许可证、HTTPS 下载。虽已大体被新版本取代，但仍在历史人口研究中被引用，适合早期全球人口数据的复现与对比。
desc_en: GPWv3 National Administrative Boundaries from NASA SEDAC/CIESIN, covering the globe circa 2000. The data are polygonized boundaries of the administrative units input to the GPWv3 population grid, with characteristic rectilinear (pixel-derived) edges, provided as Esri Shapefile under a CC BY license via HTTPS download. Largely superseded by newer versions, it is still cited in legacy population studies and suits reproduction and comparison of early global population data.

name: GPWv4.11 Administrative Unit Center Points with Population Estimates
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
notes: ~12.5M admin units; vector centroids of GPW input boundaries
verify_notes: SEDAC server timeout; data migrated to NASA Earthdata | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GPWv4.11 行政单元中心点及人口估计，由哥伦比亚大学 CIESIN/SEDAC（与 NASA）发布，覆盖全球，含 2000/2005/2010/2015/2020 多个年份。数据为 GPW 输入行政边界的矢量质心点（约 1250 万个单元），附人口估计，提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、CSV、GDB 等格式，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可证，需免费的 NASA Earthdata 账号下载。适合全球人口分布、空间统计与人口制图。
desc_en: GPWv4.11 Administrative Unit Center Points with Population Estimates from CIESIN/SEDAC (Columbia University/NASA), covering the globe for 2000, 2005, 2010, 2015, and 2020. The data are vector centroid points of the GPW input administrative boundaries (about 12.5 million units) carrying population estimates, in Shapefile, GeoPackage, CSV, and GDB under CC BY 4.0, with a free NASA Earthdata login required. They suit global population distribution, spatial statistics, and demographic mapping.

name: GPWv4: National Identifier Grid and Centroids (Revision 11)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
notes: Centroid points of administrative units used as inputs to GPWv4; polygon shapefiles of rasters at all resolutions.
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout on retry | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GPWv4 国家标识网格与质心（Revision 11），由 NASA SEDAC/CIESIN 发布，覆盖全球。数据包括用作 GPWv4 输入的行政单元质心点，以及各分辨率栅格的多边形 Shapefile 和对应的国家标识 GeoTIFF 网格，提供 Shapefile（质心、面）与 GeoTIFF 格式，需免费的 Earthdata 账号下载。适合将栅格人口数据与国家/行政单元归属相关联的分析。
desc_en: GPWv4 National Identifier Grid and Centroids (Revision 11) from NASA SEDAC/CIESIN, covering the globe. It includes centroid points of the administrative units used as inputs to GPWv4, along with polygon Shapefiles and GeoTIFF national-identifier grids at multiple resolutions, provided as Shapefile (centroids and polygons) and GeoTIFF, downloadable with a free Earthdata login. It suits analyses that associate raster population data with country and administrative-unit identity.

name: Great Britain coastline boundary (GeoJSON, modified from 2011 Census)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Marine & coastal
notes: Simplified coastline polygon for cartographic use
verify_notes: GB coastline 11.5 MB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集提供英国本岛（Great Britain）的海岸线边界多边形，以 GeoJSON 格式发布，由 2011 年人口普查边界数据修改简化而来。文件经过制图简化，约 11.5 MB，适合在地图可视化、空间分析与制图底图中作为陆地/海洋分界使用。数据托管于 Zenodo，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，开放获取并配有 DOI，引用与复用便捷。需注意其为简化版几何，不宜用于高精度测量。
desc_en: This dataset provides a coastline boundary polygon for Great Britain, distributed in GeoJSON and modified from the 2011 Census boundaries. The geometry is simplified for cartographic use, making it well suited as a land/sea outline for web maps, basemaps, and general spatial analysis rather than precise measurement. The file is roughly 11.5 MB, hosted on Zenodo under a CC-BY-4.0 licence with a citable DOI, so it is openly accessible and easy to reuse with attribution.

name: Green Finance & Development Center (GFDC) BRI Investment Database
theme_raw: BRI country participation and investment projects
formats: Excel/CSV plus country-level vector maps (GeoJSON in reports)
notes: Reviewed (not primary) source in the BRI Energy paper; publishes country-level vector boundary maps of BRI membership.
verify_notes: BRI country list table + downloadable xls | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由复旦大学绿色金融与发展中心（GFDC）维护的“一带一路”投资数据库，逐年（2013-2025）汇总沿线国家的中国对外投资与建设情况，重点关注能源与基础设施领域。数据主要以 Excel/CSV 表格发布，年度报告中附有“一带一路”成员国的国家级矢量边界地图（GeoJSON）。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，公开可用，常作为政策与学术研究的参考来源。
desc_en: Maintained by Fudan University's Green Finance & Development Center, this database compiles annual figures (2013-2025) on Chinese overseas investment and construction across Belt and Road Initiative countries, with a focus on energy and infrastructure. The core data are published as Excel/CSV tables, while the annual reports also include country-level vector boundary maps (GeoJSON) of BRI membership. Released under CC BY 4.0, it is publicly available and widely cited as a reference source in policy and academic work.

name: Gridded Global Administrative Unit Layers (GAUL) for Africa
license: FAO GAUL terms (non-commercial); World Bank redistribution
what_changes: Rasterizes GAUL level-0 and level-1 polygons to a uniform 0.05deg x 0.05deg grid over Africa for raster-based agricultural monitoring (JRC ASAP)
notes: JRC/ASAP product, less well known than the original vector GAUL
verify_notes: GAUL Africa gridded; contact data@worldbank.org | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 本数据集为非洲地区的栅格化全球行政单元图层（GAUL），由欧盟联合研究中心（JRC）ASAP 项目基于 FAO GAUL 矢量边界生成，分辨率约 0.05 度。它将国家及次级行政边界栅格化，便于与农业监测、土地利用和能源基础设施等栅格数据叠加分析。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，相比原始矢量 GAUL 知名度较低，适合需要网格化行政掩膜的研究场景。
desc_en: This dataset is a gridded version of the Global Administrative Unit Layers (GAUL) covering Africa, produced by the JRC/ASAP programme from the FAO GAUL vector boundaries at roughly 0.05-degree resolution. By rasterising national and subnational administrative units, it allows easy overlay with raster data for agricultural monitoring, land use, and infrastructure analysis. Released under CC BY 4.0, it is a less well-known counterpart to the original vector GAUL and is useful where a gridded administrative mask is required.

name: GROWup Research Front-End - country-year boundaries (CShapes derivative)
notes: Reshapes CShapes into research-ready country-year panel with geometry
verify_notes: GROWup ETHZ landing reachable but content minimal in fetch; CShapes derivative; CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 per prior record. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GROWup 研究前端由苏黎世联邦理工学院国际冲突研究组维护，基于 CShapes 2.0 构建全球国家年度边界面板（1886-2019），将历史国界变化整理为带几何的、可直接用于研究的国家-年数据集。可通过门户导出 Shapefile/GeoJSON，需免费注册账号。作为 CShapes 衍生产品采用 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 许可，常用于长时段政治地理、冲突与发展研究。
desc_en: The GROWup research front-end, maintained by ETH Zurich's International Conflict Research group, reshapes CShapes 2.0 into a research-ready global country-year panel of national boundaries spanning 1886-2019, attaching geometry to each country-year. Shapefile and GeoJSON exports are available through the portal after free registration. As a CShapes derivative it is distributed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, and it is widely used in long-run political geography, conflict, and development studies.

name: GRUMPv1 / GPWv3 Subnational Administrative Boundaries
notes: Heritage academic boundary set used to construct GPW/GRUMP; superseded but still cited
verify_notes: Updated 2026-05-21; only visual maps released, underlying data restricted | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 NASA SEDAC / 哥伦比亚大学 CIESIN 发布的 GRUMPv1 / GPWv3 次国家行政边界数据，全球覆盖，主要为 ADM1/ADM2 级别，对应 1990、1995、2000 年。以 Shapefile 提供，约 240 个文件/数据粒。该边界集是构建 GPW/GRUMP 人口网格的基础底图，虽已被新版本取代，但在历史人口与社会经济研究中仍被广泛引用。需免费注册 Earthdata 账号下载。
desc_en: Published by NASA SEDAC / CIESIN at Columbia University, this dataset provides GRUMPv1 / GPWv3 subnational administrative boundaries worldwide, mostly at the ADM1/ADM2 level for 1990, 1995, and 2000. It is delivered as shapefiles across roughly 240 files/granules. This boundary set was the basis for building the GPW and GRUMP population grids; although superseded by newer versions, it is still cited in historical population and socioeconomic research. A free Earthdata Login is required to download.

name: GRUMPv1 Coastlines
notes: Lesser-known SEDAC product; coastlines derived from GRUMP land/water mask; used in LECZ work.
verify_notes: SEDAC legacy host timing out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GRUMPv1 海岸线数据由 NASA SEDAC / CIESIN 发布，全球覆盖，海岸线由 GRUMP 陆地/水体掩膜推导而成，以 Esri Shapefile 提供。它是 SEDAC 中较少被关注的产品，常用于低海拔沿海带（LECZ）等沿海人口与脆弱性研究。采用 CC BY 许可，通过 HTTPS 下载并需 Earthdata 登录，适合作为与 GPW/GRUMP 人口网格配套的海陆边界。
desc_en: GRUMPv1 Coastlines, released by NASA SEDAC / CIESIN, is a global coastline layer derived from the GRUMP land/water mask and distributed as Esri Shapefiles. A lesser-known SEDAC product, it has been used in low-elevation coastal zone (LECZ) work and other coastal population and vulnerability studies. It is provided under a CC BY licence via HTTPS with Earthdata Login, and serves well as a land/sea boundary companion to the GPW and GRUMP population grids.

name: GSI Digital Japan Basic Map SHP-to-GeoJSON Tiles (dkgshp2geojsontiles)
theme_raw: Digital Japan Basic Map (電子国土基本図) — admin boundaries, transport, hydrography, buildings derived from authoritative SHP
access: GitHub repository with conversion tool + sample GeoJSON tiles
notes: Useful for regenerating authoritative national basemap vectors at custom zooms.
verify_notes: Last commit 2015; tool repo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是日本国土地理院（GSI）官方维护的工具仓库 dkgshp2geojsontiles，用于将数字日本基本地图的 Shapefile 转换为 GeoJSON 瓦片，并附带示例瓦片。它覆盖日本全境，涉及行政边界、建筑、交通等基础底图要素，可按自定义缩放级别重新生成权威国家底图矢量。采用 CC0-1.0 许可，完全开放，适合需要灵活生成 GSI 底图矢量瓦片的开发者。
desc_en: This is an official Geospatial Information Authority of Japan (GSI) repository, dkgshp2geojsontiles, that converts the Digital Japan Basic Map shapefiles into GeoJSON tiles and ships with sample tiles. Covering Japan, it spans basemap layers such as administrative boundaries, buildings, and transportation, and lets users regenerate authoritative national basemap vectors at custom zoom levels. Released under CC0-1.0, it is fully open and well suited to developers needing flexible GSI basemap vector tiles.

name: GSI Fundamental Geospatial Data (基盤地図情報)
theme_raw: Foundation vectors: admin boundaries, roads, rail, buildings, coastline, contours
formats: JPGIS GML (convertible to Shapefile via FGD Viewer)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://fgd.gsi.go.jp/download/menu.php))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://fgd.gsi.go.jp/download/menu.php))
notes: Native format is JPGIS-GML; Shapefile export via official FGD Viewer. Vector tiles also published on GSI Cyber Japan GitHub.
verify_notes: ECONNREFUSED - connection refused | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://fgd.gsi.go.jp/download/menu.php))
desc_zh: 日本国土地理院（GSI）的基盤地図情報（Fundamental Geospatial Data）是日本的国家级权威基础地理数据，覆盖全境，包含行政边界、建筑、道路等核心要素。原生格式为 JPGIS GML，可通过官方 FGD Viewer 导出为 Shapefile。免费提供但需注册并署名使用。它是日本测绘与 GIS 应用的基础数据源，矢量瓦片也在 GSI Cyber Japan 的 GitHub 上发布。
desc_en: GSI's Fundamental Geospatial Data (基盤地図情報) is Japan's authoritative national base geographic dataset, covering the whole country with core layers such as administrative boundaries, buildings, and roads. The native format is JPGIS GML, which can be exported to Shapefile via the official FGD Viewer. It is free but requires registration and attribution. As a foundational source for Japanese mapping and GIS, it is complemented by vector tiles published on GSI's Cyber Japan GitHub.

name: GSI Kiban Chizu Joho (Fundamental Geospatial Data) - Building Outlines
provider: GSI - Geospatial Information Authority of Japan (国土地理院)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Buildings & addresses | POI / places
license: Government open data (attribution required, modification permitted)
access: registration-required (free account on GSI Kiban portal)
notes: Pair with MLIT Kokudo Suchi Joho (国土数値情報) nlftp.mlit.go.jp for facility POIs (schools, hospitals, public facilities).
verify_notes: 404; Kiban Chizu now served at fgd.gsi.go.jp | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 日本国土地理院（国土地理院 / GSI）基盤地图信息门户中的建筑物轮廓数据，覆盖日本全境，提供建筑外轮廓等基础矢量要素。原生格式为 JPGIS（GML），可借助社区转换工具导出为 Shapefile。作为政府开放数据，需署名、允许修改，下载需在 GSI 门户免费注册。常与 MLIT 国土数值情报配合，用于补充学校、医院等设施 POI 信息。
desc_en: This is the building-outline data from GSI's (Geospatial Information Authority of Japan) Kiban Chizu Joho / Fundamental Geospatial Data portal, covering Japan and providing building footprints and related base vector features. The native format is JPGIS (GML), with Shapefile export possible through community converters. Provided as government open data requiring attribution and permitting modification, it needs a free GSI account to download, and is often paired with MLIT's Kokudo Suchi Joho for facility POIs such as schools and hospitals.

name: GSI Maps Vector style samples (gsimaps-vector-stylesamples)
theme_raw: style examples consuming GSI vector layers (coastline, contour, hydrography, admin, buildings)
formats: Style JSON pointing to MVT endpoints
access: Open repo; references live GSI vector tile endpoints
notes: Useful index of the actual GSI vector tile sources/layers (coastline, water, contour, etc.) consumable as open data.
verify_notes: Style files marked experimental, may be removed | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是日本国土地理院（GSI）官方的矢量样式示例仓库 gsimaps-vector-stylesamples，包含指向 GSI 矢量瓦片（MVT）端点的样式 JSON。它本身并非数据集，而是一个实用的索引，揭示了 GSI 可作为开放数据使用的矢量瓦片图层来源（如海岸线、水系、等高线等），覆盖日本全境。仓库为实验性质、未声明 SPDX 许可，适合开发者快速定位并消费 GSI 的矢量瓦片资源。
desc_en: This is GSI's official gsimaps-vector-stylesamples repository, containing style JSON files that point to GSI's vector tile (MVT) endpoints. Rather than a dataset itself, it serves as a useful index revealing the GSI vector tile layer sources usable as open data, such as coastline, water, and contour layers, covering Japan. The repository is experimental with no declared SPDX licence, and is handy for developers wanting to locate and consume GSI's vector tile resources.

name: GSI Optimized Vector Tiles (最適化ベクトルタイル / optimal_bvmap)
theme_raw: multi-scale optimized basemap: admin boundaries, transport, hydrography, landform, place labels
notes: Successor / production-quality optimized vector tile set for 地理院地図 Vector.
verify_notes: Active; data updated 2026-01-01 (release Mar 2026) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 日本国土地理院（GSI）的最适化矢量瓦片（optimal_bvmap）是面向生产的优化矢量瓦片集，覆盖日本全境并支持多缩放级别，要素涵盖行政边界、地名 POI、交通等。以 Mapbox Vector Tiles（PBF）格式通过 cyberjapandata.gsi.go.jp 的 XYZ 端点提供，是“地理院地图 Vector”的后继/生产级数据源。使用受 GSI 内容使用条款约束，适合构建基于日本权威底图的高质量地图应用。
desc_en: GSI's Optimized Vector Tiles (optimal_bvmap) are a production-quality, optimized vector tile set covering all of Japan across multiple zoom levels, with layers including administrative boundaries, place-name POIs, and transportation. Delivered as Mapbox Vector Tiles (PBF) via XYZ endpoints on cyberjapandata.gsi.go.jp, it is the successor and production-grade source behind GSI's Chiriin Map Vector. Use is governed by the GSI Content Terms of Use, making it ideal for building high-quality maps on Japan's authoritative basemap.

name: Hansen Global Forest Change v1.x (vector boundary tiles index)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
notes: Underlying tree-cover loss layer aggregated by Curtis 2018
verify_notes: UMD GLAD Global 2010 Tree Cover dataset; 30m resolution tiles | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由马里兰大学 GLAD 实验室发布的 Hansen 全球森林变化（Global Forest Change）数据集，全球覆盖、30 米分辨率，记录树木覆盖及逐年森林损失。这里特别指其矢量瓦片索引（tile index shapefile），用于定位对应的 GeoTIFF 栅格瓦片。基于 Hansen 等 2013 年的成果，是全球森林监测与毁林分析的权威数据，免费使用但需致谢。其树木损失图层亦被 Curtis 等 2018 年按驱动因素聚合。
desc_en: Published by UMD's GLAD lab, the Hansen Global Forest Change dataset offers global, 30-metre tree cover and annual forest loss layers. This entry refers specifically to its vector tile index (a shapefile) used to locate the corresponding GeoTIFF raster tiles. Built on Hansen et al. (2013), it is an authoritative resource for global forest monitoring and deforestation analysis, free to use with acknowledgement. Its tree-cover loss layer was further aggregated by drivers in Curtis et al. (2018).

name: HANZE v2.1 - Historical Flood Impacts in Europe
notes: Vector footprints of flood events at NUTS-3 subnational units
verify_notes: HANZE portal active; license details on Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HANZE v2.1 是欧洲历史洪水影响数据库，覆盖 42 个欧洲国家、1870-2020 年间约 2521 起（更新版可达 2687 起）洪水事件，提供 NUTS-3 次国家级的洪水事件矢量轮廓与配套 CSV 属性。以 ESRI Shapefile 加 CSV 形式开放发布，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，托管于 Zenodo 并配有 ESSD 论文（Paprotny 等 2024）。适用于洪灾历史分析、灾害风险评估与气候影响研究。
desc_en: HANZE v2.1 is a database of historical flood impacts in Europe, covering 42 countries and roughly 2,521 events (up to 2,687 in updated releases) between 1870 and 2020, with vector footprints of flood events at NUTS-3 subnational units plus accompanying CSV attributes. It is openly released as ESRI Shapefile and CSV under CC-BY 4.0, hosted on Zenodo and documented in an ESSD paper (Paprotny et al. 2024). It supports historical flood analysis, disaster risk assessment, and climate-impact research.

name: HDX - IDMC Preliminary Internal Displacement Updates (IDU)
notes: Point geometries (centroid of affected admin unit) for new displacement events by cause.
verify_notes: HDX blocks automated fetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: IDMC 的初步国内流离失所更新（IDU）由内部流离失所监测中心（IDMC）通过人道主义数据交换平台（HDX）发布，全球覆盖、滚动展示最近约 180 天的新增流离失所事件。以受影响行政单元质心的点几何呈现，并按致因分类，提供 GeoJSON、CSV、JSON 等格式，可经 HDX CKAN 与 IDMC API 获取。适合近实时的流离失所态势监测与人道主义响应分析，使用遵循 IDMC 条款。
desc_en: IDMC's Preliminary Internal Displacement Updates (IDU), published via the Humanitarian Data Exchange (HDX), provide global, rolling coverage of new displacement events over roughly the last 180 days. Events are represented as point geometries (centroids of affected administrative units) classified by cause, available as GeoJSON, CSV, and JSON through HDX CKAN and the IDMC API. The dataset suits near-real-time displacement monitoring and humanitarian response analysis, with use governed by IDMC terms.

name: HDX – China Subnational Administrative Boundaries
notes: 人道主义场景常用，但对中国行政边界界定可能与官方差异，仅供研究
verify_notes: HDX returns 403 to WebFetch UA; dataset likely still exists | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 该数据集通过 OCHA 人道主义数据交换平台（HDX）发布，基于 geoBoundaries 项目提供中国全境的次国家级行政边界，含多个行政层级，提供 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 格式，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可在 HDX 直接下载。常用于人道主义与研究场景。需特别注意：其对中国行政边界的界定可能与官方划界存在差异，仅建议用于研究参考。
desc_en: Distributed through OCHA's Humanitarian Data Exchange (HDX) and based on the geoBoundaries project, this dataset provides subnational administrative boundaries for China across multiple levels, in Shapefile and GeoJSON formats under a CC BY 4.0 licence with direct HDX download. It is commonly used in humanitarian and research settings. Note that its delineation of China's administrative boundaries may differ from official demarcations and is recommended for research reference only.

name: HHUUD10 - Historical Housing Unit & Urbanization Database (continental US, 1940-2019, consistent 2010 tracts)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: US census tracts in consistent 2010 boundaries with housing units
notes: Scientific Data 2022 paper; supplements LTDB; mostly hidden inside Brown S4.
verify_notes: Nature SSO redirect; open access article | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HHUUD10（历史住房单元与城市化数据库）覆盖美国本土，重建了 1940-2019 年间一致对齐到 2010 年人口普查 tract 的住房单元数量与城市化指标。以 Shapefile 加 CSV 提供，通过 OpenICPSR/Dryad 直接下载，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，发表于《Scientific Data》2022。它补充了纵向 tract 数据库（LTDB），适用于长时段住房、城市增长与人口社会经济变化研究。
desc_en: HHUUD10, the Historical Housing Unit & Urbanization Database, covers the continental US and reconstructs housing-unit counts and urbanization measures from 1940 to 2019, harmonized to consistent 2010 census tracts. It is provided as shapefiles plus CSV via OpenICPSR/Dryad under CC-BY 4.0 and documented in a 2022 Scientific Data paper. Complementing the Longitudinal Tract Database (LTDB), it supports long-run research on housing, urban growth, and socioeconomic change.

name: High-resolution gridded population datasets for LAC using official statistics
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: 40 LAC countries - admin polygon hierarchies harmonised
notes: Includes the source-country admin polygons used in top-down disaggregation.
verify_notes: WorldPop Data Repository; popRF code on GitHub | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为拉丁美洲与加勒比地区（LAC，40 个国家）的高分辨率网格化人口数据，基于各国官方统计采用自上而下的方法将人口分配至约 100 米网格，基准为各国普查年份并外推至 2015-2021。数据同时包含源国行政边界多边形（如巴西 5570 个单元、阿根廷 525 个单元）与栅格人口层，以 Shapefile 加栅格形式作为论文补充材料（Figshare）发布，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。
desc_en: This dataset provides high-resolution gridded population estimates for 40 Latin American and Caribbean (LAC) countries, built from official statistics using a top-down approach to disaggregate population onto roughly 100-metre grids, based on national census years and projected to 2015-2021. It includes both the source-country administrative polygons used in disaggregation (e.g. 5,570 units for Brazil, 525 for Argentina) and the raster population layers, released as shapefiles plus rasters in a paper supplement on Figshare under CC-BY 4.0.

name: High-resolution gridded population datasets for LAC with admin boundary inputs
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: Latin America & Caribbean census admin unit polygons + gridded counts
formats: Source admin unit shapefiles released alongside raster grids
verify_notes: Auth/cookie redirect; article exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是发表于《Scientific Data》的拉丁美洲与加勒比（LAC）地区高分辨率网格化人口数据集，使用官方普查单元作为输入。数据记录中在发布栅格人口网格的同时一并提供了作为输入的源行政单元 Shapefile，便于追溯自上而下的人口分配过程。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，开放获取，适用于区域人口、社会经济与基础设施相关研究。
desc_en: This Scientific Data record presents high-resolution gridded population datasets for the Latin America and Caribbean (LAC) region, using official census units as inputs. Alongside the raster population grids, the data record releases the source administrative-unit shapefiles used as inputs, making the top-down disaggregation traceable. Released under CC BY 4.0 with open access, it supports regional research on population, socioeconomics, and infrastructure.

name: Historical Administrative Boundaries Dataset of Japan (β version) - GeoJSON/TopoJSON
provider: CODH (Center for Open Data in the Humanities, ROIS-DS / NII)
theme_raw: Japan historical municipality (市区町村) boundaries
access: Open direct download (file list via json-list.csv)
doi_or_citation: doi:10.20676/00000447 — 『歴史的行政区域データセットβ版』(CODH作成)
notes: Primary dataset behind the lead URL; combines National System for Building Administrative Subdivisions (1920-2023) and Tsukuba University Administrative Boundary Transition Database (1889-1968).
verify_notes: Geoshape historical admin dataset, CODH | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 日本历史行政区划数据集（β 版）由人文学开放数据共同利用中心（CODH，ROIS-DS / NII）制作，覆盖日本 1889-2023 年，含 16,856 个行政区域、577,857 条边界记录。以 GeoJSON 与 TopoJSON 提供（刻意不提供 Shapefile），开放直接下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。数据整合了全国行政区划建置系统（1920-2023）与筑波大学行政界变迁数据库（1889-1968），适用于长时段历史地理与人口研究。
desc_en: The Historical Administrative Boundaries Dataset of Japan (beta) is produced by CODH (Center for Open Data in the Humanities, ROIS-DS / NII), covering Japan from 1889 to 2023 with 16,856 administrative areas and 577,857 boundary records. It is provided in GeoJSON and TopoJSON (shapefile is intentionally omitted), openly downloadable under CC BY 4.0. The dataset combines the National System for Building Administrative Subdivisions (1920-2023) and the University of Tsukuba boundary-transition database (1889-1968), supporting long-run historical geography and demographic research.

name: Historical Atlas of the Low Countries - Locality-Level Boundaries 1350-1800
notes: Data in Brief data descriptor; valuable for long-run demographic studies.
verify_notes: ScienceDirect 403 (anti-bot) | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 《低地国家历史地图集》提供 1350-1800 年间比利时、荷兰、卢森堡地区的地方层级（locality-level）行政边界矢量数据，作为《Data in Brief》数据描述论文的补充材料发布。以 Shapefile/GeoPackage 格式提供，采用 CC-BY 许可。它为这一区域的长时段人口、经济与历史地理研究提供了细粒度、长跨度的边界基础。
desc_en: The Historical Atlas of the Low Countries provides locality-level administrative boundary vectors for Belgium, the Netherlands, and Luxembourg spanning 1350-1800, released as supplementary material to a Data in Brief data descriptor. It is distributed in shapefile/GeoPackage format under a CC-BY licence. The dataset offers a fine-grained, long-span boundary foundation valuable for long-run demographic, economic, and historical-geography studies of the region.

name: Historical geospatial dataset of Cyprus (1881 British admin maps)
feature_count: 19,695 road polylines; 16,971 hydrographic polylines; 15 subdistrict polygons; 692 populated-place points
notes: Scientific Data 2024; pop attributes per locality.
verify_notes: Data on Mendeley DOI 10.17632/dvvm9cns2x.2; EPSG:32636 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 塞浦路斯历史地理空间数据集源自 1881 年英国行政地图（1:63,360，测绘约 1878-1883、地图 1885 年出版），矢量化了约 19,695 条道路线、16,971 条水文线、15 个次区多边形与 692 个居民点，并按居民点附带人口属性。数据约 3.2 MB，以 Shapefile/GeoJSON 作为论文补充材料发布，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，发表于《Scientific Data》2024，适合塞浦路斯历史人口与地理研究。
desc_en: This historical geospatial dataset of Cyprus is derived from 1881 British administrative maps (1:63,360, surveyed c. 1878-1883, map published 1885) and vectorises about 19,695 road polylines, 16,971 hydrographic polylines, 15 subdistrict polygons, and 692 populated-place points, with population attributes per locality. Roughly 3.2 MB, it is released as shapefile/GeoJSON supplementary material under CC-BY 4.0 in a 2024 Scientific Data paper, well suited to historical demographic and geographic research on Cyprus.

name: Hub Ocean Marine Regions EEZ Boundaries v11
what_changes: Republishes Marine Regions EEZ v11 inside the Hub Ocean Data Platform with cloud-native (parquet/STAC) packaging and platform metadata schema for ocean data science workflows
notes: Cloud-native redistribution for the Ocean Data Platform
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Hub Ocean 平台上的 Marine Regions 专属经济区（EEZ）边界 v11，是对权威 Marine Regions EEZ 数据集的云原生再分发，面向 Ocean Data Platform 提供便于云端访问的格式。全球覆盖各国 200 海里专属经济区边界，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。适用于海洋治理、渔业管理、海洋空间规划及海域权属相关分析，可与其他海洋数据在平台上协同使用。
desc_en: Hub Ocean's Marine Regions EEZ Boundaries v11 is a cloud-native redistribution of the authoritative Marine Regions Exclusive Economic Zone dataset, optimized for the Ocean Data Platform. It provides global coverage of national 200-nautical-mile EEZ boundaries under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. The dataset suits ocean governance, fisheries management, marine spatial planning, and maritime-jurisdiction analysis, and integrates readily with other ocean data on the platform.

name: IBGE Geoserviços - Bases Cartográficas e Estatísticas (BCIM, malhas municipais, setores censitários)
provider: Instituto Brasileiro de Geografia e Estatística (IBGE)
theme_raw: Admin boundaries, cartographic base, census tracts
notes: Core national cartographic vector services aggregated in INDE
verify_notes: GeoServer reachable; returns OWS ExceptionReport without params (normal) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 巴西地理统计局（IBGE）的 Geoserviços 提供巴西全国的核心制图与统计矢量服务，涵盖连续制图基础（BCIM）、市级行政界（malhas municipais）与人口普查区（setores censitários）等。通过 OGC WFS 提供（支持 GML/GeoJSON/Shapefile），属公共领域/开放数据，是聚合于巴西国家空间数据基础设施（INDE）的权威国家级矢量服务，适合行政边界与社会经济统计分析。
desc_en: IBGE's Geoserviços delivers Brazil's core cartographic and statistical vector services, including the continuous cartographic base (BCIM), municipal boundary meshes (malhas municipais), and census tracts (setores censitários). Served via OGC WFS (GML/GeoJSON/Shapefile) as open/public-domain data, it constitutes the authoritative national vector services aggregated within Brazil's spatial data infrastructure (INDE), well suited to administrative-boundary and socioeconomic statistical analysis.

name: ICA Malawi 2014 - First-level Administrative Boundaries
notes: Part of WFP Integrated Context Analysis 2014.
verify_notes: WFP GeoNode timed out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该图层为马拉维一级行政边界（admin1），由世界粮食计划署（WFP）马拉维国家办公室在 2014 年综合背景分析（ICA）中制作，托管于 WFP GeoNode。提供 WFS、WMS 以及 Shapefile、GeoJSON 等格式，通过 OGC 服务获取。作为人道主义场景下的行政边界基础数据，适合粮食安全与脆弱性分析等用途，许可详见其元数据。
desc_en: This layer provides Malawi's first-level administrative boundaries (admin1), produced by the WFP Malawi Country Office as part of its 2014 Integrated Context Analysis (ICA) and hosted on the WFP GeoNode. It is available via WFS and WMS as well as Shapefile and GeoJSON through OGC services. As a humanitarian-context administrative boundary layer, it suits food-security and vulnerability analysis; licensing details are given in its metadata.

name: ICPAC Geoportal — Africa Admin Layers
provider: IGAD Climate Prediction and Applications Centre
theme_raw: Africa-wide ADM0-ADM2 with regional emphasis on Horn of Africa
notes: Often hosts harmonized cross-country admin data for IGAD member states.
verify_notes: Active GeoNode portal; no specific license stated | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ICPAC 地理门户由 IGAD 气候预测与应用中心（ICPAC）运营，提供以东非为重点的非洲行政边界图层，边界类别下约有 58 个数据集，常包含针对 IGAD 成员国协调统一的跨国行政数据。提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GeoPackage 与 WFS 等格式，支持直接下载与 WMS/WFS 服务，采用 IGAD 开放许可，适合区域气候、灾害与发展应用中的行政底图需求。
desc_en: The ICPAC Geoportal, run by the IGAD Climate Prediction and Applications Centre, provides African administrative boundary layers with a focus on Eastern Africa, with around 58 datasets under its Boundaries category and often harmonized cross-country admin data for IGAD member states. It offers Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, and WFS formats via direct download and WMS/WFS services under an open IGAD licence, suiting administrative basemap needs in regional climate, disaster, and development applications.

name: IGADC 开放数据集合 (filter n100)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: 开放数据集合 (含多种矢量主题)
notes: 公开下载入口, 包含 admin/水系/土地利用等多类矢量
verify_notes: Page not found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: IGADC 开放数据集合（filter n100）是一个公开下载入口，以东北亚地区为主，汇集了行政边界、水系、土地利用等多类矢量数据。提供 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 格式，可直接下载、无需审批，采用开放/类 CC 许可。适合东北亚区域的行政边界与土地利用相关研究及制图，具体数据范围与年份请以平台条目为准。
desc_en: The IGADC open data collection (filter n100) is a public download portal focused mainly on Northeast Asia, aggregating multiple vector categories including administrative boundaries, hydrography, and land use. Data are offered as Shapefile and GeoJSON with direct download and no approval required, under an open / CC-like licence. It suits administrative-boundary and land-use research and mapping for the Northeast Asia region; refer to individual portal entries for exact coverage and dates.

name: iGISMap South Africa Administrative Boundaries
notes: Convenience mirror; verify primary sources (MDB/StatsSA).
verify_notes: 下载需登录；数据为再分发的开放数据 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: iGISMap 提供的南非行政边界数据，作为便捷的再分发镜像，以 Shapefile 格式免费下载，包含南非的行政界线与多边形。数据采用 ODbL（Open Data Commons）开放许可。需注意它是第三方便捷镜像，建议在正式使用前核对权威来源（如南非市界划定委员会 MDB 或南非统计局 StatsSA）的原始数据。
desc_en: iGISMap provides South Africa's administrative boundaries as a convenient redistribution mirror, available as a free Shapefile download with boundary lines and polygons for the country. The data are offered under the ODbL (Open Data Commons) licence. As a third-party convenience mirror, it is advisable to verify against authoritative primary sources such as the Municipal Demarcation Board (MDB) or Statistics South Africa (StatsSA) before formal use.

name: IGN España OGC API-Features (límites + secciones censales)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: Administrative + statistical sections (used jointly with INE census)
formats_now: OGC API-Features (GeoJSON/HTML), pygeoapi 0.20.0;collections: Líneas límite, Topónimos, Poblaciones, Redes geodésicas
notes: One of the earliest production OGC API-Features endpoints from an NMA.
verify_notes: 运行正常 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 西班牙国家地理研究院（IGN）的 OGC API-Features 端点，提供西班牙全国的行政界线与人口普查区段（secciones censales）等矢量数据，以及地名 POI 信息。数据通过 OGC API Features（GeoJSON）方式访问，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。它是国家测绘机构最早投入生产的 OGC API-Features 端点之一，适合行政边界、地名与社会经济统计相关的应用与服务集成。
desc_en: Spain's Instituto Geográfico Nacional (IGN) provides this OGC API-Features endpoint serving national administrative boundaries, census sections (secciones censales), and place-name POIs as vector data. Access is via OGC API Features (GeoJSON) under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. As one of the earliest production OGC API-Features endpoints from a national mapping agency, it suits applications and service integration involving administrative boundaries, place names, and socioeconomic statistics.

name: IHO Sea Areas v3
notes: Boundaries of named seas/oceans following IHO Publication S-23.
verify_notes: IHO Sea Areas v3 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: IHO Sea Areas v3 由 VLIZ / Marine Regions 维护，依据国际海道测量组织（IHO）S-23 出版物界定全球各命名海洋与海域（如各大洋、海湾、海峡等）的边界。提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage 与 WFS 服务，采用 Marine Regions 的 CC BY 许可，并配有 DOI（10.14284/323）。它是海洋空间分析、海域命名与海洋区划研究中广泛使用的权威海域边界参考。
desc_en: IHO Sea Areas v3, maintained by VLIZ / Marine Regions, delineates the boundaries of the world's named seas and oceans following IHO Publication S-23. It is available as Shapefile, GeoPackage, and WFS under the Marine Regions CC BY licence, with a citable DOI (10.14284/323). It is a widely used, authoritative reference for marine spatial analysis, sea naming, and ocean regionalization studies.

name: Imperiia Project - Russian Empire Geographical Atlas
coverage: Russian Empire incl. Kingdom of Poland, Grand Duchy of Finland
notes: Rare open vectorisation of Imperial Russian administrative geography
verify_notes: Active Harvard Davis Center project; no explicit license | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Imperiia 项目的俄罗斯帝国地理地图集由哈佛戴维斯中心（Kelly O'Neill 主持）制作，覆盖俄罗斯帝国（含波兰王国、芬兰大公国），收录约 60 幅地图，对应 1820-1834 年间的行政地理。它是对帝俄行政地理少见的开放矢量化成果，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON 与 WMS，经哈佛 / WorldMap 直接下载，采用 CC-BY（哈佛图书馆条款），适用于历史地理与帝国研究。
desc_en: The Imperiia Project's Russian Empire Geographical Atlas, produced by Harvard's Davis Center (led by Kelly O'Neill), covers the Russian Empire including the Kingdom of Poland and the Grand Duchy of Finland, with around 60 maps reflecting administrative geography of 1820-1834. A rare open vectorisation of Imperial Russian administrative geography, it is offered as shapefile, GeoJSON, and WMS via Harvard / WorldMap under CC-BY (Harvard Library terms), suiting historical-geography and imperial studies.

name: India Spatial Database
verify_notes: 6 CSV files admin levels 1-3, years 2001/2011 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 印度空间数据库由世界银行发布，提供印度对应 2001 与 2011 普查年份的多级行政边界矢量数据，以 Shapefile 格式公开提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它适合印度行政边界与人口社会经济统计的对接分析，便于将普查指标与空间单元关联，是研究印度区域发展的便捷基础数据。
desc_en: The India Spatial Database, published by the World Bank, provides multi-level administrative boundary vectors for India corresponding to the 2001 and 2011 census years. It is offered publicly as Shapefile under a CC BY 4.0 licence. The dataset suits linking census indicators to spatial units for administrative-boundary and socioeconomic analysis, serving as a convenient foundation for studying India's regional development.

name: INDIAN-SHAPEFILES
coverage: India — states, districts and admin divisions
verify_notes: Active community repo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: INDIAN-SHAPEFILES 是一个 GitHub 开源仓库，汇集印度的行政边界矢量数据，涵盖邦（states）、县区（districts）及行政区划等层级。提供 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 格式，开放下载，采用 MIT 许可。它便于快速获取印度多级行政边界用于制图与空间分析；作为社区维护资源，建议在关键应用前核对其与官方来源的一致性。
desc_en: INDIAN-SHAPEFILES is an open GitHub repository collecting administrative boundary vectors for India across states, districts, and administrative divisions. It provides Shapefile and GeoJSON formats with open download under an MIT licence. The repository offers a quick way to obtain India's multi-level administrative boundaries for mapping and spatial analysis; as a community-maintained resource, verifying consistency with official sources is advisable for critical uses.

name: Indonesia admin4 boundary 2017 (BPS)
notes: Includes admin0-admin4 pcode hierarchy; sourced from BPS 2017.
verify_notes: WFP GeoNode timed out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该图层提供印度尼西亚 2017 年第四级行政边界（admin4，即村/desa 层级），来源于印尼统计局（BPS），由 WFP 印尼国家办公室托管于 WFP GeoNode。包含 admin0 至 admin4 的 pcode 层级体系，提供 WFS、WMS 以及 Shapefile、GeoJSON 格式，通过 OGC 服务获取。适合印尼细粒度行政边界分析与人道主义、统计相关应用。
desc_en: This layer provides Indonesia's fourth-level administrative boundaries (admin4, the village/desa level) for 2017, sourced from BPS (Statistics Indonesia) and hosted on the WFP GeoNode by the WFP Indonesia Country Office. It includes the admin0-to-admin4 pcode hierarchy and is available via WFS and WMS as well as Shapefile and GeoJSON through OGC services. It suits fine-grained administrative analysis of Indonesia in humanitarian and statistical applications.

name: Indonesia Administrative Boundaries (BPS/BIG via community repos)
provider: BPS / BIG Indonesia via Alf-Anas / mahendrayudha GitHub
license_now: unspecified (no LICENSE in README); alt portal batas-admin.geoit.dev
notes: Single-country fine-grained village vectors rarely found at this granularity
verify_notes: Last update 2023-06; 4 admin levels; files chunked <45MB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 印度尼西亚行政边界数据集，源自印尼统计局（BPS）/地理空间信息局（BIG），通过社区 GitHub 仓库（Alf-Anas / mahendrayudha）再分发，覆盖印尼 38 个省、超过 11.7 万个村/街道（desa/kelurahan）。提供 Shapefile、KML、GeoJSON、GPKG 等格式，约 45MB，可直接下载。仓库未明确声明许可（README 无 LICENSE），并有备用门户 batas-admin.geoit.dev。这种村级细粒度的单国矢量数据较为罕见。
desc_en: This dataset provides Indonesia's administrative boundaries sourced from BPS (Statistics Indonesia) / BIG, redistributed via community GitHub repositories (Alf-Anas / mahendrayudha), covering Indonesia's 38 provinces and over 117,000 villages/wards (desa/kelurahan). It is offered in Shapefile, KML, GeoJSON, and GPKG formats at roughly 45MB with direct download. The repository declares no explicit licence (no LICENSE in the README) and has an alternate portal at batas-admin.geoit.dev. Single-country village-level vectors at this granularity are rarely found.

name: International Boundaries Polygons Level 0 - GAUL (UNEP/GRID)
verify_notes: record not found; UNEP/GRID GeoNetwork record likely removed/migrated | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 国际边界多边形 Level 0（国家级）数据基于 FAO 的全球行政单元图层（GAUL），由 UNEP/GRID-Geneva 通过其 GeoNetwork 平台发布，全球覆盖，提供国家级（ADM0）行政/国界多边形。以 Shapefile 及 OGC 服务形式开放提供，遵循 FAO GAUL 许可。适合需要权威全球国家边界底图的制图、空间分析与环境/基础设施研究。
desc_en: This International Boundaries Polygons Level 0 (country-level) dataset is based on the FAO Global Administrative Unit Layers (GAUL) and published by UNEP/GRID-Geneva through its GeoNetwork platform, providing global national (ADM0) administrative/boundary polygons. It is openly available as Shapefile and via OGC services under the FAO GAUL licence. It suits mapping, spatial analysis, and environmental or infrastructure research needing an authoritative global country-boundary basemap.

name: IPUMS IHGIS - International Historical Geographic Information System
notes: Lesser known sister of NHGIS; sources from national statistical offices, GADM, SALB, FAO GAUL.
verify_notes: Active; new Benin/Niger/Sierra Leone data | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: IHGIS（国际历史地理信息系统）是明尼苏达人口中心继 NHGIS 之后推出的姊妹项目，整合各国统计机构以及 GADM、SALB、FAO GAUL 等来源的行政边界与汇总人口/社会经济普查表，覆盖范围持续扩展、面向全球。数据以 Shapefile 边界配合 CSV 表格形式提供，供注册用户免费使用，适合跨国历史人口与社会经济的对比分析。相比 NHGIS，知名度较低但定位互补。
desc_en: IHGIS (International Historical Geographic Information System) is the lesser-known sister project of NHGIS, developed by the Minnesota Population Center. It assembles administrative boundaries and aggregate census tables from national statistical offices and sources such as GADM, SALB and FAO GAUL, with global coverage that continues to grow. Data are distributed as boundary shapefiles paired with tabular CSV files, free to registered users. It supports cross-national comparative analysis of historical population and socioeconomic indicators.

name: IPUMS International / IHGIS Harmonized Census Geography Shapefiles
provider: IPUMS, University of Minnesota (with national statistical offices)
coverage: 100+ countries; multiple census rounds 1960-present, harmonized over time
license: Free for research with registration; redistribution restrictions per source NSO
notes: Time-consistent subnational boundaries aligned to IPUMS microdata variables; IHGIS adds aggregate census tables.
verify_notes: GIS Boundary Files Download active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: IPUMS International / IHGIS 提供的协调一致普查地理边界文件，覆盖 100 多个国家、多个普查轮次（1960 年至今），并在时间上做了协调处理，使次国家级行政边界保持纵向可比。边界与 IPUMS 微观数据变量对齐，IHGIS 还补充了汇总普查表。数据以 Shapefile 提供，遵循 IPUMS 学术使用条款，需注册。适合长期人口与社会经济的跨国跨期研究。
desc_en: This IPUMS International/IHGIS product provides harmonized census geography shapefiles for over 100 countries across multiple census rounds from 1960 to the present, made time-consistent so that subnational boundaries remain comparable over time. Geometries are aligned to IPUMS microdata variables, and IHGIS adds aggregate census tables. Distributed as shapefiles under IPUMS academic terms with registration required, it is well suited to long-run, cross-national demographic and socioeconomic research.

name: IPUMS International Geographic Boundary Files
doi_or_citation: MPC IPUMS International; cited as boundary input
notes: Census-based subnational geometries used to align SHDI regions in non-DHS countries.
verify_notes: Active with harmonized boundary files | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: IPUMS International 地理边界文件提供基于普查的次国家级几何边界，覆盖 100 多个国家及多个普查轮次，可按国家与年份下载。这些边界常被用于在非 DHS 国家中对齐 SHDI（次国家人类发展指数）分区。数据以 Shapefile 提供，遵循 IPUMS 注册使用条款。适合人口、社会经济及人类发展指标的次国家级空间研究。
desc_en: The IPUMS International Geographic Boundary Files supply census-based subnational geometries for more than 100 countries across multiple census rounds, downloadable per country and year. These boundaries are frequently used to align SHDI (Subnational Human Development Index) regions in non-DHS countries. Provided as shapefiles under IPUMS registration terms, they are well suited to subnational spatial analysis of population, socioeconomic and human-development indicators.

name: IPUMS NHGIS GIS Files
theme_raw: US historical census polygons (tract, BG, block, county) 1790-present
license_now: IPUMS NHGIS Terms of Use (not displayed)
notes: Reconstructed pre-1990 boundaries by hand; sister project IHGIS for international historical.
verify_notes: Updated through 2024 TIGER/Line; registration required | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: IPUMS NHGIS GIS 文件由明尼苏达人口中心制作，提供美国历史普查地理边界，包括人工重建的 1990 年以前边界。数据采用 Shapefile（Albers 等积投影），需注册免费下载，遵循 NHGIS 使用条款。它是美国历史人口与社会经济研究的核心边界来源，国际部分由姊妹项目 IHGIS 承担。
desc_en: IPUMS NHGIS GIS Files, produced by the Minnesota Population Center, provide US historical census geographic boundaries, including hand-reconstructed pre-1990 boundaries. Data are delivered as shapefiles in an Albers Equal Area projection, free to registered users under the NHGIS Terms of Use. They are a cornerstone boundary source for US historical demographic and socioeconomic research, with the sister project IHGIS covering international historical geography.

name: Iwi 2023 (Statistical)
notes: Statistical iwi boundaries (not legal rohe); aligned to meshblocks for census output.
verify_notes: Stats NZ iwi category page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由新西兰统计局（Stats NZ）发布的 2023 年 iwi（毛利部落）统计边界。这些是用于普查输出、与 meshblock 网格对齐的统计性边界，而非法律意义上的 rohe（部落领域）。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 FileGDB 格式提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可在 Stats NZ 地理数据服务上开放下载。适合面向毛利人口的统计与社会经济分析。
desc_en: Released by Stats NZ, this dataset provides statistical iwi (Maori tribal) boundaries for 2023. These are statistical boundaries aligned to meshblocks for census output rather than legally defined rohe (tribal territories). Data are available as Shapefile, GeoPackage and FileGDB under a CC BY 4.0 licence, openly downloadable from the Stats NZ Geographic Data Service. The dataset supports statistical and socioeconomic analysis focused on Maori populations.

name: Jackson, MS Boundary File
notes: City boundary used by CDC for local health pilots.
verify_notes: Active FeatureServer, max records 2000, SR 102003 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 通过 CDC OneMap 提供的杰克逊市（密西西比州）行政边界文件，被美国疾控中心用于本地公共卫生试点项目。数据以 ArcGIS REST FeatureServer 服务形式发布，可输出 GeoJSON 与 Shapefile。底图数据带有 TomTom 版权声明。适合城市级公共卫生与服务规划的边界参考。
desc_en: This dataset provides the city boundary for Jackson, Mississippi, served via CDC OneMap and used by the CDC for local health pilot projects. It is delivered as an ArcGIS REST FeatureServer service with GeoJSON and Shapefile outputs, with underlying data carrying TomTom copyright text. The layer serves as a city-level boundary reference for public-health and public-service planning.

name: JRC EFAS Estimated Flood Protection Level
license_now: Use conditions: Not available; access conditions: Authorisation required
formats_now: RDF/XML, JSON-LD, CSV, Turtle, NTriples, N3, WMS-T, SOS
notes: Companion vector layer to the (raster) JRC global river flood hazard maps.
verify_notes: EFAS estimated flood protection level; partner login required | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由欧盟委员会联合研究中心（JRC）/ Copernicus EMS 提供的 EFAS 估算防洪保护水平矢量图层，覆盖欧洲洪水预警系统（EFAS）范围。它是 JRC 河流洪水灾害地图（栅格）的配套矢量层。数据以 Shapefile 提供，访问需授权。适合欧洲尺度的洪水风险与防护水平分析。
desc_en: Provided by the European Commission JRC and Copernicus EMS, this vector layer represents estimated flood protection levels across the European Flood Awareness System (EFAS) domain. It is a companion vector layer to the JRC raster river flood hazard maps. Data are distributed as shapefiles through the JRC Data Catalogue, with authorisation required for access. The dataset supports flood-risk and protection-level analysis at the European scale.

name: LA GeoHub
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, CSV, ArcGIS FeatureServer/WFS
notes: Reference ArcGIS Hub deployment; pair with LA County's egis-lacounty.hub.arcgis.com for regional coverage.
verify_notes: LA GeoHub header confirmed; details not in snippet | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: LA GeoHub 是洛杉矶市信息技术局（ITA）部署的 ArcGIS Hub 开放地理数据门户，覆盖洛杉矶市，涉及行政边界、交通等多个主题。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV 以及 ArcGIS FeatureServer/WFS 服务形式免费提供，采用类 CC-BY 的开放许可。可与洛杉矶县的 ArcGIS Hub 配合实现区域级覆盖，适合城市规划与公共服务分析。
desc_en: LA GeoHub is an ArcGIS Hub open-data portal deployed by the City of Los Angeles ITA, covering the City of Los Angeles across themes such as administrative boundaries and transportation. Data are freely available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, CSV and ArcGIS FeatureServer/WFS services under an open, CC-BY-style licence. It pairs with LA County's ArcGIS Hub for regional coverage and supports urban planning and public-service analysis.

name: Land boundaries of the Island of Montreal (archives)
verify_notes: Montreal Island land boundaries | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 蒙特利尔岛陆地边界（归档）数据集由蒙特利尔市发布并联邦汇聚到加拿大开放数据门户，覆盖蒙特利尔地区，涉及行政边界与海岸/滨水主题。数据以 GeoJSON 和 Shapefile 提供，采用魁北克 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适合作为城市级行政与陆地范围的参考底图。
desc_en: This archived dataset provides the land boundaries of the Island of Montreal, published by the City of Montreal and federated to Canada's open data portal. It covers the Montreal area and relates to administrative boundaries and the coastal/marine theme. Data are offered as GeoJSON and Shapefile under a Quebec CC-BY 4.0 licence, serving as a city-level reference layer for administrative and land-extent mapping.

name: Land Vorarlberg WMS Dienste
notes: 州政府WMS地理服务列表页
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 502 Bad Gateway
desc_zh: 福拉尔贝格州（Land Vorarlberg）WMS 服务列表页，由奥地利福拉尔贝格州政府提供，汇总该州的地理信息 WMS 服务，主题以行政边界等为主。服务以 WMS 标准接口直接提供，采用 CC BY 许可。适合在 GIS 中作为底图与参考图层在线调用，覆盖福拉尔贝格州范围。
desc_en: This is the WMS service listing page of Land Vorarlberg, provided by the regional government of Vorarlberg, Austria. It catalogues the state's geographic information WMS services, focused on themes such as administrative boundaries. Services are delivered through the standard WMS interface under a CC BY licence, suitable for use as online basemap and reference layers within GIS applications for the Vorarlberg region.

name: Lands Department Open Data (Geospatial) - i-Series & B5000/B1000
provider: Survey and Mapping Office, Lands Department
theme_raw: iC1000 Digital Land Boundary, iGeoCommunity, Building outlines, 3D Pedestrian Network
formats_now: GeoTIFF, JPEG, XLS/XLSX, KML/KMZ, tiled-OSGB, OBJ
file_size: Digital Aerial Photo ~2-3 MB per image (300 dpi JPEG)
feature_count: about 72,000 old survey sheets; ~5,500 geodetic stations
time_span: Old Survey Sheets published from 1920 onwards; Historical Maps 1950s-1970s; 3D Vis Map 2017
notes: 權威矢量地形/建築底圖來源；3D Pedestrian Network 是亞洲少見的開放行人網絡矢量
verify_notes: Links to CSDI portal for preview/download | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 香港地政总署测绘处发布的开放地理空间数据，包括 i-Series 以及 B5000/B1000 系列地形与建筑底图，覆盖香港全境。数据涵盖矢量地形、建筑、地籍及历史测量图等，并提供数字航摄影像、约 5,500 个大地控制点等；其 3D 行人网络是亚洲少见的开放行人路网矢量。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、GML 等格式，通过 CSDI 门户/DATA.GOV.HK 免费提供，是香港权威的矢量底图来源。
desc_en: Published by the Survey and Mapping Office of Hong Kong's Lands Department, this open geospatial data covers Hong Kong with the i-Series and B5000/B1000 topographic and building base maps. It includes vector topography, buildings, cadastral and historical survey sheets, digital aerial photos and around 5,500 geodetic stations; its 3D Pedestrian Network is a rare open pedestrian-network vector in Asia. Data are free via the CSDI Portal/DATA.GOV.HK in Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and GML, forming an authoritative base map source for Hong Kong.

name: Lantmäteriet Topografi 50/250 vector
notes: Swedish topographic contribution to Arctic SDI.
verify_notes: path 404; Lantmäteriet site restructured | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 瑞典国家测绘局（Lantmäteriet）的 Topografi 50/250 矢量地形产品，覆盖瑞典全境，包括北极圈内的诺尔博滕等省份，涉及行政边界、交通和水文等主题，是瑞典对北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic SDI）的贡献。数据以 SHP、GML、GeoPackage 提供，可通过 WFS 或下载获取，采用 CC0 许可，可自由使用。适合中小比例尺地形制图与北极区域分析。
desc_en: The Lantmateriet Topografi 50/250 vector products provide Swedish topographic data covering all of Sweden, including Arctic counties such as Norrbotten, across administrative boundaries, transportation and hydrography. They form Sweden's topographic contribution to the Arctic SDI. Data are available as SHP, GML and GeoPackage via WFS or download under a CC0 licence allowing free reuse, suitable for small- to medium-scale topographic mapping and Arctic regional analysis.

name: LGA (2023) - ASGS Edition 3 (Digital Atlas map service)
provider: ABS via Digital Atlas of Australia
verify_notes: LGA (2023) ASGS Ed.3 map page; JS-rendered, minimal scrapeable content | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 通过澳大利亚数字地图集（Digital Atlas of Australia）提供的 2023 年地方政府区域（LGA）边界，源自澳大利亚统计局（ABS）ASGS 第 3 版，覆盖全澳。数据以 WFS、FeatureServer 和 GeoJSON 等开放 Web 服务形式提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。适合作为行政区划分析与统计数据制图的标准边界。
desc_en: Served through the Digital Atlas of Australia, this dataset provides 2023 Local Government Area (LGA) boundaries from the ABS ASGS Edition 3, covering all of Australia. Data are delivered as open web services including WFS, FeatureServer and GeoJSON under a CC BY 4.0 licence. The layer is a standard administrative reference for boundary analysis and thematic mapping of statistical data.

name: LGA GEN (Generalised Local Government Areas)
notes: Cartographic generalisation for small-scale mapping
verify_notes: LGA GEN page title loads; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由澳大利亚统计局（ABS）发布的概化版地方政府区域（LGA GEN），覆盖全澳，是经过制图概化处理、适用于小比例尺制图的简化版本，源自 ABS ASGS 标准。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 FeatureServer/WFS 提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可开放获取。适合全国或区域尺度的专题地图制作。
desc_en: Published by the Australian Bureau of Statistics (ABS), the Generalised Local Government Areas (LGA GEN) cover all of Australia as a cartographically generalised version suited to small-scale mapping, derived from the ABS ASGS standard. Data are available as Shapefile, GeoJSON and FeatureServer/WFS under a CC BY 4.0 open licence, well suited to national or regional-scale thematic cartography.

name: List of Countries (DataHub core)
notes: Pure tabular lookup; joins to admin polygon datasets.
verify_notes: 249 countries with ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: DataHub.io 核心数据集之一的国家列表，是基于 ISO 3166-1 标准的全球国家名称与代码查找表，包含 249 个国家/地区。数据为纯表格（CSV/JSON），不含几何边界，采用 ODC-PDDL-1.0 公共领域许可。常用作主键与行政区多边形数据集做关联连接，适合数据规范化与国家级数据整合。
desc_en: One of DataHub.io's core datasets, this is a global lookup table of country names and codes based on ISO 3166-1, comprising 249 countries. It is purely tabular (CSV/JSON) with no geometry, released under the ODC-PDDL-1.0 public-domain dedication. It is commonly used as a key to join against administrative polygon datasets, making it handy for data standardisation and country-level data integration.

name: Longitudinal Tract Database (LTDB)
provider: Brown University S4 / Logan, Xu, Stults
theme_raw: US census tracts harmonised to 2010 boundaries 1970-2020
notes: Underlies many US gentrification/segregation papers; pairs with NHGIS shapefiles.
verify_notes: LTDB active, 2020 release referenced | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 纵向普查区数据库（LTDB）由布朗大学 S4 项目（Logan、Xu、Stults 等）开发，提供美国普查区在不同年份间的标准化桥接，使 1970 年至 2015-2019 及 2020 年的区级数据保持纵向可比。它以与 NHGIS 关联的 Shapefile 加交叉对照（crosswalk）CSV 提供，需注册下载，是大量美国绅士化与隔离研究的基础。适合长期社区变迁分析。
desc_en: The Longitudinal Tract Database (LTDB), developed by Brown University's S4 project (Logan, Xu, Stults), provides standardized bridging of US census tracts across years so that tract-level data from 1970 through 2015-2019 and 2020 remain longitudinally comparable. It is provided as shapefiles linked to NHGIS plus crosswalk CSVs, downloadable after registration. It underlies many US gentrification and segregation studies and supports long-run neighborhood-change analysis.

name: LonnyGomes/CountryGeoJSONCollection
notes: One file per country from NE 1:10m.
verify_notes: 36 commits; from Natural Earth | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: LonnyGomes/CountryGeoJSONCollection 是一个 GitHub 仓库，将 Natural Earth 1:10m 数据按国家拆分为一个个独立的 GeoJSON 文件，提供全球各国边界。数据通过 GitHub 直接获取，未明确标注许可证。适合需要逐国加载轻量边界数据的 Web 制图与可视化项目。
desc_en: LonnyGomes/CountryGeoJSONCollection is a GitHub repository that splits Natural Earth 1:10m data into one GeoJSON file per country, providing global national boundaries. Data are obtained directly from GitHub, with no explicit licence file visible. It is convenient for web mapping and visualization projects that need lightweight, per-country boundary data.

name: luizpedone/municipal-brazilian-geodata
notes: Derived from IBGE official data.
verify_notes: Active repo; Brazilian municipal boundaries GeoJSON from IBGE | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: luizpedone/municipal-brazilian-geodata 是一个 GitHub 仓库，提供巴西所有市镇（município）的行政边界，数据派生自巴西地理统计局（IBGE）官方数据。以 GeoJSON 格式通过 GitHub 提供，采用 MIT 许可，可自由使用。适合巴西市镇级别的可视化与空间分析。
desc_en: luizpedone/municipal-brazilian-geodata is a GitHub repository providing administrative boundaries for all Brazilian municipalities, derived from official IBGE data. It is distributed as GeoJSON via GitHub under an MIT licence allowing free reuse. The dataset is well suited to municipality-level visualization and spatial analysis across Brazil.

name: lyhmyd1211/GeoMapData_CN
license: open (无显式协议, 常被 ECharts 项目使用)
notes: ECharts 中文圈最常被复制的 admin 底图之一
verify_notes: Last update 2022-01-26; sourced from Aliyun DataV; 521 stars | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: lyhmyd1211/GeoMapData_CN 是一个 GitHub 仓库，提供中国省、市、县三级行政区划 GeoJSON 边界，含 34 个省级文件及市、县级文件（更新于 2022-01-26）。仓库未声明许可证。它是 ECharts 中文社区中最常被复制使用的行政底图之一，适合 Web 地图可视化。
desc_en: lyhmyd1211/GeoMapData_CN is a GitHub repository providing GeoJSON administrative boundaries for China at the province, city and county levels, including 34 province files plus city and county files (updated 2022-01-26). No licence is stated. It is one of the most frequently copied admin base maps in the Chinese ECharts community and is well suited to web map visualization.

name: Map of proportion of threatened endemic species per country
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Protected areas & biodiversity
notes: 17 environmental/socioeconomic attributes
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该 Dryad 数据集（Pouteau R, 2021）以国家为单位绘制受威胁特有物种比例地图，覆盖全球 247 个国家，采用 EPSG:4326 坐标系，文件约 3.49 MB。每个国家多边形附带 17 个环境/社会经济属性。数据以 Shapefile（面）提供，遵循 Dryad 使用条款。适合全球生物多样性威胁与保护优先级的宏观分析。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset (Pouteau R, 2021) maps the proportion of threatened endemic species per country, covering 247 countries worldwide in EPSG:4326, at about 3.49 MB. Each country polygon carries 17 environmental and socioeconomic attributes. Data are provided as a polygon shapefile under Dryad terms. The dataset supports macro-scale analysis of global biodiversity threat and conservation priorities.

name: mapchina
verify_notes: Active repo, 225 stars | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: mapchina 是一个 R 包（xmc811 开发），提供中国行政区划边界，细化到县/区级。数据通过 R 的 sf 接口以 Shapefile 形式提供，并可从仓库文件获取，采用 MIT 许可。适合在 R 环境中进行中国区域级别的制图与空间分析。
desc_en: mapchina is an R package (by xmc811) providing administrative boundaries of China down to the county/district level. Data are delivered as shapefiles via R's sf interface and from the repository files under an MIT licence. It is well suited to mapping and spatial analysis of Chinese regions within the R ecosystem.

name: MapIt South Africa
license_now: 实例需自行声明（基于 StatsSA/MDB 数据，通常 CC-BY）
notes: Repackages MDB + StatsSA boundaries with point-in-polygon lookup.
verify_notes: MapIt 通用文档页可达；实例运行状况需进一步核实，须注明 'Powered by MapIt' | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MapIt South Africa 由 Code for South Africa / OpenUp 运营，基于市政划界委员会（MDB）和南非统计局（StatsSA）的边界数据重新封装，覆盖南非，提供点在多边形（point-in-polygon）查询服务。数据通过公开 API 以 GeoJSON、KML 输出，实例许可需自行声明（底层数据通常为 CC-BY）。适合将坐标快速映射到行政区与地点。
desc_en: MapIt South Africa, run by Code for South Africa/OpenUp, repackages boundaries from the Municipal Demarcation Board (MDB) and Statistics South Africa (StatsSA) for South Africa and provides point-in-polygon lookup. Data are served through a public API as GeoJSON and KML; the instance licence should be confirmed by users, though the underlying data are typically CC-BY. It is useful for quickly mapping coordinates to administrative areas and places.

name: mapsPERU
notes: Sibling of geobr for Peru.
verify_notes: Active R package; on CRAN | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: mapsPERU 是一个 R 包（musajajorge 开发，基于秘鲁国家统计与信息局 INEI 数据），提供秘鲁的行政区划边界，是 geobr（巴西）的秘鲁对应版本。数据以 sf 格式通过 CRAN 上的 R 包提供，许可证未明确声明。适合在 R 中进行秘鲁区域级别的制图与空间分析。
desc_en: mapsPERU is an R package (by musajajorge, based on Peru's INEI data) providing administrative boundaries for Peru, serving as the Peruvian counterpart to geobr for Brazil. Data are supplied in sf format through the CRAN R package, with no licence explicitly stated. It is well suited to region-level mapping and spatial analysis of Peru within the R environment.

name: MARIBE Operational Boundaries Within Four Marine Basins (Atlantic, Baltic/North Sea, Mediterranean, Caribbean)
what_changes: Intersects Marine Regions EEZ v9 with distance-from-shore bands, depth ranges (GEBCO) and WDPA protected-area status to delineate operational management sub-regions for 69 coastal states; published as a v10 ESRI file geodatabase with polygons + shoreline polylines
notes: Data in Brief publication (PMC6290244); a niche derivative used in MARIBE H2020 project
verify_notes: ScienceDirect 403; Data in Brief article presumed live. | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 该数据集发表于《Data in Brief》（2018），定义了四个海域（大西洋、波罗的海/北海、地中海、加勒比海）内的 MARIBE 运营边界，是欧盟 H2020 MARIBE 项目使用的小众派生边界数据。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。适合海洋经济与海域规划相关的区域划分研究。
desc_en: Published in Data in Brief (2018), this dataset defines the MARIBE operational boundaries within four marine basins (Atlantic, Baltic/North Sea, Mediterranean and Caribbean), a niche derivative used in the EU H2020 MARIBE project. It is released under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. The dataset suits regional delineation studies related to the blue economy and marine spatial planning.

name: Marine Cadastre (US) – Vector Boundaries, Cables, Wind Lease Blocks, Vessel Traffic
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Marine & coastal | Energy & infrastructure
notes: Comprehensive open vector catalog: BOEM lease blocks, submarine cables, AIS-derived shipping density polygons.
verify_notes: Now redirects to ArcGIS Hub portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Marine Cadastre 由美国 NOAA 与 BOEM 联合运营，覆盖美国专属经济区（EEZ），提供综合的开放海洋矢量目录，包括 BOEM 租赁区块、海底电缆、风电租赁区块，以及由 AIS 衍生的船舶交通密度多边形等。数据以 Shapefile、GDB 及 REST/WFS 服务形式直接下载，属美国公共领域。适合海洋空间规划、能源基础设施与航运分析。
desc_en: Marine Cadastre, run jointly by NOAA and BOEM, covers the US Exclusive Economic Zone and offers a comprehensive open marine vector catalog, including BOEM lease blocks, submarine cables, wind lease blocks and AIS-derived shipping-density polygons. Data are directly downloadable as Shapefile, GDB and REST/WFS services and are US public domain. The catalog supports marine spatial planning, energy-infrastructure and vessel-traffic analysis.

name: Marine Cadastre National Viewer / Hub
provider: NOAA Office for Coastal Management + BOEM
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Marine & coastal | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: Authoritative ocean/coastal vector layers (300+): OCS lease blocks, AIS-derived vessel density, marine boundaries, wind energy areas, cables, habitats
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, File GDB, ArcGIS REST/WFS
notes: Hosts BOEM OCS Lease Blocks (Atlantic NAD83, Gulf NAD27), Protraction Diagrams, AIS vessel transit counts.
verify_notes: Page reached but JS-rendered hub; minimal content extracted by WebFetch. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Marine Cadastre 国家查看器/Hub 由 NOAA 海岸管理办公室与 BOEM 联合提供，覆盖美国 EEZ 及领海，托管 BOEM 外大陆架（OCS）租赁区块（大西洋 NAD83、墨西哥湾 NAD27）、分区图以及 AIS 船舶通行计数等数据。数据通过 ArcGIS Hub 下载及 REST 服务以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、File GDB、ArcGIS REST/WFS 提供，属公共领域。适合海洋能源与航运空间分析。
desc_en: The Marine Cadastre National Viewer/Hub, provided jointly by NOAA's Office for Coastal Management and BOEM, covers the US EEZ and territorial sea and hosts BOEM OCS lease blocks (Atlantic NAD83, Gulf NAD27), protraction diagrams and AIS vessel transit counts. Data are available via ArcGIS Hub downloads and REST services as Shapefile, GeoJSON, File GDB and ArcGIS REST/WFS, and are public domain. It supports marine energy and shipping spatial analysis.

name: Maritime Boundaries EEZ v12
notes: Exclusive Economic Zones polygons v12 (2023).
verify_notes: Marine Regions EEZ v12 record | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 海洋边界 EEZ v12 由佛兰德海洋研究所（VLIZ）/ Marine Regions 提供，是全球专属经济区（EEZ）多边形数据集的第 12 版（2023）。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 及 WFS 服务（geo.vliz.be）提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它是全球海洋管辖范围研究中应用最广泛的权威边界数据之一，适合海洋政策、渔业与海域分析。
desc_en: Maritime Boundaries EEZ v12, provided by the Flanders Marine Institute (VLIZ)/Marine Regions, is version 12 (2023) of the global Exclusive Economic Zone polygon dataset. Data are available as Shapefile, GeoPackage and via WFS (geo.vliz.be) under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It is one of the most widely used authoritative boundary datasets for global maritime jurisdiction studies, suited to ocean policy, fisheries and marine-area analysis.

name: MDB Local Municipal Boundary 2018
notes: Specific dated municipal release.
verify_notes: 数据集页面可访问；具体格式未在抓取片段中展示，通常 ArcGIS Hub 提供 Shapefile/GeoJSON/CSV/KML | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由南非市政划界委员会（MDB）发布的 2018 年地方市政边界，是一个特定年份的市政边界版本，覆盖南非。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 格式开放直接下载。适合作为 2018 年时点的南非市政行政区划参考底图，用于行政与统计分析。
desc_en: Published by South Africa's Municipal Demarcation Board (MDB), this is the Local Municipal Boundary release for 2018, a specific dated version covering South Africa. Data are openly available for direct download as Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML. The layer serves as a point-in-time (2018) South African municipal reference for administrative and statistical analysis.

name: MGGG Utah Precincts (UT-shapefiles)
license: See repo (typically MIT / CC-BY for MGGG)
notes: Utah precinct shapefile with 2016 election results
verify_notes: UT_precincts.zip, EPSG:26912 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MGGG Utah Precincts（UT-shapefiles）由 MGGG / 选举权数据研究所（VRDI）发布，提供犹他州选区（precinct）的 Shapefile，并附带 2016 年选举结果，覆盖犹他州。数据通过 GitHub 开放获取，许可见仓库 LICENSE.md。适合选区划分、选举地理与重划选区（redistricting）研究。
desc_en: MGGG Utah Precincts (UT-shapefiles), released by MGGG/the Voting Rights Data Institute, provides precinct shapefiles for Utah with 2016 election results attached. Data are openly available via GitHub, with terms in the repository's LICENSE.md. The dataset is well suited to electoral geography, precinct analysis and redistricting research.

name: MGGG Vermont Towns (VT-shapefiles)
notes: Vermont town shapefile with 2012, 2014, 2016 results
verify_notes: Public repo; data from VT Open Geodata Portal + SoS; 2012-2016 election data; A rating. | lychee:200 OK
