desc_zh: MGGG Vermont Towns（VT-shapefiles）由 MGGG 发布，提供佛蒙特州城镇（town）的 Shapefile，并附带 2012、2014、2016 年的选举结果，覆盖佛蒙特州。数据通过 GitHub 开放获取，仓库内含 LICENSE.md（条款未在此概述）。适合选举地理与重划选区相关研究。
desc_en: MGGG Vermont Towns (VT-shapefiles), released by MGGG, provides town shapefiles for Vermont with 2012, 2014 and 2016 election results attached. Data are openly available via GitHub, with a LICENSE.md present in the repository (terms not summarized here). The dataset supports electoral geography and redistricting research at the town level.

name: Micronesia (FSM) - Subnational Administrative Boundaries (COD-AB)
notes: Cold dataset; one of few authoritative FSM admin vector sources
verify_notes: HDX 403 to crawler; site live | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 密克罗尼西亚联邦（FSM）次国家级行政边界（COD-AB），由联合国人道协调厅（OCHA）发布于 HDX 平台，覆盖密克罗尼西亚联邦。这是少数权威的 FSM 行政矢量来源之一，属较少更新的冷数据集。数据以 Shapefile 提供，开放使用。适合人道响应、行政管理与统计制图。
desc_en: This dataset provides Subnational Administrative Boundaries (COD-AB) for the Federated States of Micronesia (FSM), published by OCHA on the HDX platform and covering FSM. It is one of the few authoritative FSM administrative vector sources and is a relatively cold, infrequently updated dataset. Data are provided as shapefiles under an open licence, suited to humanitarian response, administration and statistical mapping.

name: MLIT 国土数値情報 行政区域 (N03)
provider: Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism (Japan)
theme_raw: 都道府県・市町村 (prefecture & municipality)
license: Government of Japan standard terms of use (open with attribution)
license_now: 国土数値情報 open data terms (2018+); attribution required (国土地理院)
notes: Complemented by Geoshape 歴史的行政区域 dataset (NII) for historical municipalities.
verify_notes: Active, latest spec v3.1 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 日本国土数值情报「行政区域」（N03）由日本国土交通省（MLIT）发布，覆盖日本全境，提供市町村级行政边界，时间跨度自 1920 年（大正九年）至 2023 年（令和五年）。数据以 Shapefile、GML/JPGIS、GeoJSON 提供，遵循国土数值情报开放数据条款（需署名国土地理院）。可与 NII 的 Geoshape 历史行政区域数据互补，适合日本行政与历史地理研究。
desc_en: Japan's National Land Numerical Information 'Administrative Boundaries' (N03), published by the Ministry of Land, Infrastructure, Transport and Tourism (MLIT), covers all of Japan with municipal-level boundaries spanning 1920 (Taisho 9) to 2023 (Reiwa 5). Data are available as Shapefile, GML/JPGIS and GeoJSON under the National Land Numerical Information open data terms (attribution to the GSI required). It complements NII's Geoshape historical administrative dataset and suits administrative and historical geography research in Japan.

name: modood/Administrative-divisions-of-China
coverage: China 省/市/区县/乡镇/村 五级 (代码+名称)
formats: JSON/CSV/SQL (无几何, 但是国内引用最多的 lookup 表)
notes: 无矢量, 但常作为 admin code 主键, 与上面带几何的项目配合使用
verify_notes: 项目已停止数据更新 (README 提示数据不再更新, 最新 release 2023-09); 五级行政区划 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: modood/Administrative-divisions-of-China 是国内引用最多的中国行政区划查找表之一，覆盖省/市/区县/乡镇/村五级（代码+名称），包含 34 个省、333 个市、2,856 个区县、39,447 个乡镇、649,066 个村（截至 2023-06-30）。数据以 JSON/CSV/SQL 提供，不含几何，采用 WTFPL 许可。常作为行政编码主键与带几何的数据集配合使用。
desc_en: modood/Administrative-divisions-of-China is one of the most widely cited Chinese administrative-division lookup tables, covering five levels (province/city/county/township/village) with codes and names: 34 provinces, 333 cities, 2,856 counties, 39,447 townships and 649,066 villages (as of 2023-06-30). Data are provided as JSON/CSV/SQL without geometry under a WTFPL licence. It is commonly used as an admin-code key alongside geometry-bearing datasets.

name: Mosaic Historical GIS — Albania 1918
notes: Early 20th-century Albanian admin units
verify_notes: 301 to international.ipums.org | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Mosaic 历史 GIS — 阿尔巴尼亚 1918，由 Mosaic 项目 / MPIDR / IPUMS 提供，覆盖 1918 年阿尔巴尼亚北部与中部的早期 20 世纪行政单元。数据以 Shapefile（zip）提供，限非商业科研用途，注册后免费下载。适合历史人口与历史地理的研究。
desc_en: Mosaic Historical GIS — Albania 1918, provided by the Mosaic Project/MPIDR/IPUMS, covers early twentieth-century administrative units of northern and central Albania in 1918. Data are distributed as a zipped shapefile for non-commercial scientific use, free to download after registration. The dataset suits historical population and historical-geography research.

name: Mosaic Historical GIS — Austro-Hungarian Empire 1910
license: Non-commercial scientific use; registration + citation required
notes: Imperial-era admin units, useful for census-linked historical GIS
verify_notes: 301 to international.ipums.org | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Mosaic 历史 GIS — 奥匈帝国 1910，由 Mosaic 项目 / MPIDR / IPUMS 提供，覆盖 1910 年奥匈帝国的帝国时期行政单元，涉及行政边界与人口/社会经济主题。数据以 Shapefile（zip）提供，限非商业科研用途，需注册并引用，注册后免费下载。适合与普查关联的历史 GIS 与历史人口研究。
desc_en: Mosaic Historical GIS — Austro-Hungarian Empire 1910, provided by the Mosaic Project/MPIDR/IPUMS, covers the imperial-era administrative units of the Austro-Hungarian Empire in 1910, relating to administrative boundaries and population/socioeconomic themes. Data are distributed as a zipped shapefile for non-commercial scientific use, requiring registration and citation, and are free to download after registration. The dataset is useful for census-linked historical GIS and historical demography.

name: Mosaic Historical GIS — Europe 30 States 1900-2003
notes: Compiled multi-country admin time-series; useful baseline for European historical GIS
verify_notes: Permanent redirect | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 由马普人口研究所（MPIDR）牵头的 Mosaic 项目编制的历史 GIS 数据集，覆盖 30 个欧洲国家 1900 至 2003 年间的行政区划边界。它将多国、长时段的行政单元拼接为统一的矢量时间序列，是开展欧洲历史人口、社会经济与边界变迁研究的基础底图。数据以 Shapefile（zip）形式提供，注册后可免费下载，仅限非商业科研用途。
desc_en: A historical GIS dataset compiled by the Mosaic Project (MPIDR/IPUMS) covering administrative boundaries across 30 European states from 1900 to 2003. It assembles a harmonized, multi-country vector time series of administrative units, serving as a baseline for European historical demography, socioeconomic analysis, and the study of boundary change. Distributed as zipped Shapefiles and free to download after registration, it is restricted to non-commercial scientific use.

name: Mosaic Historical GIS — Federal Republic of Germany 1990-2009
notes: Post-reunification Kreise time series
verify_notes: Moved to international.ipums.org | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Mosaic 项目发布的德国历史 GIS 数据，聚焦两德统一后（1990-2009）德意志联邦共和国的行政边界，提供该时期 Kreise（县级）单元的时间序列。它适用于追踪统一后德国行政地理的演变，支持人口与区域研究。数据为 Shapefile（zip），注册后免费下载，限非商业科研使用。
desc_en: Part of the Mosaic historical GIS series, this dataset covers administrative boundaries of the reunified Federal Republic of Germany from 1990 to 2009, providing a time series of Kreis (district) units for the period. It supports tracking the evolution of post-reunification German administrative geography for demographic and regional studies. Provided as zipped Shapefiles, free after registration, and limited to non-commercial scientific use.

name: Mosaic Historical GIS — FRG & GDR 1949-1989
notes: Cold War-era German admin units
verify_notes: Moved to international.ipums.org; likely requires IPUMS login | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Mosaic 项目的德国历史 GIS 数据，覆盖冷战时期（1949-1989）西德（联邦德国）与东德（民主德国）的行政区划单元。它记录了分裂时期两德的行政边界，是研究冷战时代德国人口、政治地理与社会经济的重要矢量底图。数据以 Shapefile（zip）提供，注册后免费下载，仅限非商业科研用途。
desc_en: A Mosaic historical GIS dataset covering administrative units of West Germany (FRG) and East Germany (GDR) during the Cold War era, 1949-1989. It documents the divided German administrative boundaries of the period, offering a valuable vector baseline for studying Cold War-era German demography, political geography, and socioeconomics. Distributed as zipped Shapefiles, free after registration, and restricted to non-commercial scientific use.

name: Mosaic Historical GIS — German Empire 1871-1945
notes: Kreise/Provinzen of Imperial & Weimar Germany
verify_notes: Moved to international.ipums.org | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Mosaic 项目编制的历史 GIS 数据，覆盖 1871 至 1945 年德意志帝国及魏玛时期的行政区划，包括 Kreise（县）与 Provinzen（省）等单元。它为研究帝国及战间期德国的人口、行政地理与历史变迁提供权威矢量底图。数据为 Shapefile（zip），注册后免费下载，限非商业科研使用。
desc_en: A Mosaic historical GIS dataset covering administrative geography of the German Empire and Weimar era from 1871 to 1945, including Kreise (districts) and Provinzen (provinces). It provides an authoritative vector baseline for studying the demography, administrative geography, and historical change of Imperial and interwar Germany. Available as zipped Shapefiles, free after registration, and limited to non-commercial scientific use.

name: Mosaic Historical GIS — Kurland (Latvia) 1797
notes: Rare 18th-century Baltic vector dataset
verify_notes: Permanent redirect to international.ipums.org | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Mosaic 项目发布的一份罕见 18 世纪波罗的海历史 GIS 数据，描绘 1797 年库尔兰公国（今拉脱维亚地区）的行政边界。作为少有的早期波罗的海矢量数据，它对历史人口与历史地理研究尤为珍贵。数据以 Shapefile（zip）提供，注册后免费下载，仅限非商业科研用途。
desc_en: A rare 18th-century Baltic historical GIS dataset from the Mosaic Project, mapping the administrative boundaries of the Duchy of Kurland (in present-day Latvia) for 1797. As one of few early Baltic vector datasets available, it is especially valuable for historical demography and historical geography research. Provided as zipped Shapefiles, free to download after registration, and restricted to non-commercial scientific use.

name: Mosaic Historical GIS — Poland 1770-1978
notes: Long time-series of Polish admin geography
verify_notes: 301 to international.ipums.org | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Mosaic 项目编制的波兰历史 GIS 数据，时间跨度从 1770 年波兰-立陶宛联邦到 1978 年波兰人民共和国，提供长时段的波兰行政地理矢量序列。它涵盖瓜分、复国与社会主义时期的边界变迁，适合历史人口与边界演变研究。数据为 Shapefile（zip），注册后免费下载，限非商业科研使用。
desc_en: A Mosaic historical GIS dataset spanning Polish administrative geography from the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth in 1770 to the People's Republic of Poland in 1978, offering a long vector time series. It captures boundary change across partition, restoration, and the socialist era, making it well suited to historical demography and the study of boundary evolution. Distributed as zipped Shapefiles, free after registration, and limited to non-commercial scientific use.

name: Mosaic Historical GIS — Serbia 1865-1895
notes: Late-19th-century Serbian okrug boundaries
verify_notes: Same redirect pattern as other Mosaic supplementals | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Mosaic 项目发布的塞尔维亚历史 GIS 数据，覆盖 1865 至 1895 年塞尔维亚公国及王国时期的 okrug（州/县）行政边界。它为研究 19 世纪晚期巴尔干地区的人口与行政地理提供矢量底图。数据以 Shapefile（zip）形式提供，注册后免费下载，仅限非商业科研用途。
desc_en: A Mosaic historical GIS dataset covering the okrug (district) administrative boundaries of the Principality and Kingdom of Serbia from 1865 to 1895. It provides a vector baseline for studying late-19th-century Balkan demography and administrative geography. Available as zipped Shapefiles, free to download after registration, and restricted to non-commercial scientific use.

name: MosaicDB Census Microdata Boundaries
provider: IPUMS / Univ. Berkeley historical census mosaic
coverage: Europe + parts of N. America 19th-20th century
notes: Companion to MPIDR; allows cross-walking to Mosaic IPUMS microdata
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out after 60s | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: MosaicDB 历史 GIS 文件是 Mosaic 历史人口微观数据项目（NIH 资助）的配套矢量边界库，覆盖 19 至 20 世纪的欧洲及部分北美地区。它的核心价值在于可与 Mosaic/IPUMS 普查微观数据交叉关联，便于将人口属性映射到历史行政单元上。数据以 Shapefile 提供，面向学术用户免费但需注册，限非商业科研用途。
desc_en: The MosaicDB historical GIS files are the boundary companion to the NIH-funded Mosaic historical census microdata project, covering Europe and parts of North America across the 19th and 20th centuries. Their key strength is the ability to crosswalk to Mosaic/IPUMS census microdata, allowing population attributes to be mapped onto historical administrative units. Provided as Shapefiles, they are free for academic users but require registration and are limited to non-commercial scientific use.

name: Mozambique Smallholder Field Boundaries
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
notes: Niche smallholder reference set
verify_notes: 4 gpkg files, 5.4MB total | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Estes 等人发布的莫桑比克北部小农田块边界数据集，托管于 Zenodo。它是一份针对小农农业地块的参考矢量数据，可用于农田制图、遥感地块分割模型的训练与验证等用途。数据以 Shapefile 提供，约 5.4MB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可直接下载。作为区域性小农参考集，覆盖范围有限。
desc_en: A dataset of smallholder field boundaries for northern Mozambique released by Estes et al. and hosted on Zenodo. It provides a reference vector layer of smallholder agricultural parcels, useful for cropland mapping and for training or validating remote-sensing field-delineation models. Distributed as a roughly 5.4MB Shapefile under a CC-BY-4.0 license and directly downloadable, it is a niche, regionally focused reference set.

name: MRC Administrative Boundaries (SDE.ADMIN_b_admin)
coverage: Cambodia, Laos, Thailand, Vietnam, Myanmar, China (LMB+UMB)
formats_now: Feature dataset (国家/省/区/边界线 多要素类)
notes: Multi-country admin polygons/lines for the whole Mekong basin
verify_notes: IW:LEARN 存档页可达；SDE.ADMIN_b_admin 详细元数据完整，UTM zone 48 / Indian 1960 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 湄公河委员会（MRC）发布的行政边界数据集，覆盖整个湄公河流域，涉及柬埔寨、老挝、泰国、越南、缅甸及中国（上下湄公河流域）。它以 ESRI 要素数据集形式提供行政区的面与线要素，适合跨境流域管理与水资源、环境分析。数据为 Shapefile，通过 MRC 数据门户按需申请下载，遵循 MRC 数据政策。
desc_en: An administrative boundary dataset from the Mekong River Commission covering the entire Mekong basin, spanning Cambodia, Laos, Thailand, Vietnam, Myanmar, and China (the lower and upper Mekong basins). It provides administrative polygon and line features as an ESRI feature dataset, well suited to transboundary basin management and water and environmental analysis. Distributed as Shapefiles via the MRC Data Portal on request, subject to MRC data policy.

name: MRC Data Portal — Lower Mekong Basin Admin Layers
theme_raw: ADM0-ADM2 of Lower Mekong (KH, LA, TH, VN, MM partial)
coverage: Cambodia, Laos, Thailand, Vietnam, parts of Myanmar/China
notes: Cross-border body dataset; useful for transboundary Mekong basin analyses.
verify_notes: page loaded but minimal content extracted; MRC portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 湄公河委员会（MRC）数据门户提供的下湄公河流域行政图层，覆盖柬埔寨、老挝、泰国、越南及部分缅甸、中国地区。作为跨境流域机构的官方数据，它对开展湄公河流域的跨国行政与环境分析尤为有用。数据以 Shapefile、GDB 等格式提供，需注册后按 MRC 开放数据政策访问。
desc_en: Administrative layers for the Lower Mekong Basin made available through the Mekong River Commission's data portal, covering Cambodia, Laos, Thailand, Vietnam, and parts of Myanmar and China. As official data from a transboundary basin authority, it is particularly useful for cross-border administrative and environmental analysis of the Mekong. Provided in formats such as Shapefile and GDB, accessible after registration under MRC's open data policy.

name: msfootprint: Python package for extracting Microsoft global building footprints by user-defined boundary
what_changes: Tooling+archived release that subsets Microsoft global footprints to arbitrary AOIs (country/ROI) for reproducible downstream use
notes: Niche utility release; software-as-data on Zenodo
verify_notes: msfootprint v0.1.24; note record license CC-BY-4.0 though code itself MIT. | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: msfootprint 是一个发布于 Zenodo 的 Python 工具包，用于按用户自定义边界提取微软全球建筑物轮廓数据。它属于“软件即数据”的发布形式，便于研究者在指定区域内裁切和获取建筑足迹，服务于城市分析、人口估算等应用。代码采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。作为小众实用工具发布，元数据较为简略。
desc_en: msfootprint is a Python package released on Zenodo for extracting Microsoft's global building footprints within a user-defined boundary. Published as software-as-data, it helps researchers clip and retrieve building footprints for a chosen area, supporting urban analysis, population estimation, and similar applications. The code is released under a CC-BY-4.0 license. It is a niche utility release with limited accompanying metadata.

name: MTBS Burned Area Boundaries
verify_notes: MTBS direct download tool consolidated to USGS Burn Severity portal | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: MTBS（Monitoring Trends in Burn Severity）燃烧区边界数据由美国农业部林务局与美国地质调查局联合维护，覆盖全美 1984 年至今的大型火灾。它提供火灾过火范围的矢量边界，广泛用于野火趋势、灾害评估与生态恢复研究。数据以 Shapefile / FeatureCollection 形式提供，属公共领域，可直接下载使用。
desc_en: The MTBS (Monitoring Trends in Burn Severity) burned area boundaries are maintained jointly by the USDA Forest Service and USGS, covering large fires across the United States from 1984 to the present. They provide vector perimeters of fire-affected areas, widely used for wildfire trend analysis, hazard assessment, and ecological recovery studies. Provided as Shapefiles or FeatureCollections in the public domain, the data is freely available for direct download.

name: mxmaps - Mexican Choropleth Maps
notes: De-facto Mexican counterpart to geobr.
verify_notes: License now BSD-3 (was GPL-3); GitHub-only install | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: mxmaps 是由 Diego Valle-Jones 开发的 R 包，基于 INEGI 数据提供墨西哥各级行政区划的等值线（choropleth）制图功能。它内置墨西哥的州、市镇等矢量边界，可直接以 sf / data.frame 形式使用，是绘制墨西哥专题地图的常用工具，相当于墨西哥版的 geobr。代码采用 BSD 3-Clause 许可，通过 R 包分发。
desc_en: mxmaps is an R package by Diego Valle-Jones that provides choropleth mapping for Mexican administrative divisions using INEGI data. It bundles vector boundaries for Mexican states and municipalities, usable directly as sf or data.frame objects, making it a de-facto Mexican counterpart to geobr for thematic mapping. The package is distributed via R under a BSD 3-Clause license.

name: National Highways Open Data (England)
notes: Strategic Road Network model, Highway Boundary (RedLine)
verify_notes: portal title returned, JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英格兰国家公路局（National Highways）的开放数据平台，提供战略道路网（SRN）模型与公路边界（RedLine）等行政与交通相关矢量数据，覆盖英格兰。它支持道路网络分析、规划与基础设施管理等应用。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 及 WFS 等多种格式开放提供，采用英国开放政府许可（OGL）。
desc_en: The open data platform of National Highways (England), providing administrative and transport-related vector data such as the Strategic Road Network model and the Highway Boundary (RedLine), covering England. It supports road network analysis, planning, and infrastructure management. Data is openly available in multiple formats including Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, and WFS under the UK Open Government Licence (OGL).

name: National-scale 1-km hospital travel time and accessibility in China (Yin et al., Scientific Data 2024)
notes: Stratified by primary/secondary/tertiary hospitals; SHP aggregations at multi-admin levels.
verify_notes: 同上；nature.com 走 idp 授权重定向 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Yin 等人发表于《Scientific Data》（2024）的全国尺度 1 公里医院出行时间与可达性数据集，覆盖中国 13,776 家医院，并按一级、二级、三级医院分层。数据提供格网、县、市、省多级行政聚合，可用于医疗资源可达性与公共服务公平性分析。格式包括 Shapefile、CSV 及 GeoTIFF 栅格，采用 CC-BY 许可，开放获取。
desc_en: A national-scale 1-km hospital travel-time and accessibility dataset for China by Yin et al., published in Scientific Data (2024), covering 13,776 hospitals stratified by primary, secondary, and tertiary tiers. It provides aggregations at grid, county, city, and province levels, supporting analyses of healthcare accessibility and public-service equity. Available as Shapefiles, CSV, and GeoTIFF rasters under a CC-BY license, the dataset is openly accessible.

name: Natural Earth
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] Top-level portal, but the canonical Natural Earth vector data home
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Natural Earth 是广受欢迎的公共领域矢量与栅格地图数据集，提供多个比例尺（1:10m、1:50m、1:110m）的全球文化与自然地理数据，包括国界、行政区、城市、河流、海岸线等。它专为制图设计，要素经过精心配准与综合，是制作世界专题地图的事实标准底图之一。数据属公共领域，可直接免费下载。
desc_en: Natural Earth is a popular public-domain vector and raster map dataset providing global cultural and physical geography at multiple scales (1:10m, 1:50m, 1:110m), including country borders, administrative divisions, cities, rivers, and coastlines. Built specifically for cartography, its features are carefully registered and generalized, making it a de-facto standard basemap for world thematic maps. The data is public domain and freely available for direct download.

name: NCEI Climate Divisions Shapefile (CONUS + AK)
notes: Used to join with nClimDiv monthly T/P time-series. Documented via NCEI Climate-at-a-Glance and NOAA PSL.
verify_notes: File no longer at this path | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: NOAA NCEI 发布的美国气候分区（Climate Divisions）矢量边界，覆盖美国本土 344 个气候分区及阿拉斯加。该数据集常用于与 nClimDiv 月度气温/降水时间序列关联，支持区域气候监测与分析。数据以 Shapefile（面要素）形式直接 ZIP 下载，属公共领域，相关文档见 NCEI Climate-at-a-Glance 与 NOAA PSL。
desc_en: Vector boundaries of U.S. climate divisions published by NOAA NCEI, covering 344 divisions across the contiguous United States plus Alaska. The dataset is commonly joined with nClimDiv monthly temperature and precipitation time series to support regional climate monitoring and analysis. Provided as a polygon Shapefile via direct ZIP download in the public domain, with documentation through NCEI Climate-at-a-Glance and NOAA PSL.

name: NCES EDGE Open Data - Public School & District Locations
provider: US Dept of Education / NCES (ArcGIS Hub)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Public services
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, FeatureServer, WFS via ArcGIS Hub
notes: Authoritative annually-updated public school and LEA point/boundary layers (EDGE).
verify_notes: NCES open data portal landing accessible; content client-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国教育部国家教育统计中心（NCES）的 EDGE 开放数据门户，基于 ArcGIS Hub 提供全美公立学校与学区（LEA）的点位及边界图层。作为权威且年度更新的教育地理数据，它广泛用于教育可达性、资源配置与社会经济分析。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、FeatureServer 及 WFS 等形式开放提供，属公共领域。
desc_en: The EDGE open data portal of the U.S. Department of Education's NCES, served via ArcGIS Hub, providing point locations and boundary layers for public schools and local education agencies (LEAs) across the United States. As authoritative, annually updated education geography, it is widely used for accessibility, resource allocation, and socioeconomic analysis. Available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, FeatureServer, and WFS in the public domain.

name: NCES EDGE Public School Locations
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Public services
access: Direct download + REST services at nces.ed.gov/opengis
notes: Also includes public LEAs and school district boundaries; verified live.
verify_notes: Latest data is 2024-25 school year | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NCES EDGE 公立学校位置数据，由美国教育部国家教育统计中心维护，按学年（SY）年度发布全美公立学校点位，并包含公立学区（LEA）及学区边界。它是教育地理研究的权威来源，适用于学校可达性与教育公平分析。数据以 Shapefile 及 ArcGIS REST/MapServer（可经服务获取 GeoJSON）提供，可直接下载，属美国政府公共领域。
desc_en: NCES EDGE public school locations, maintained by the U.S. Department of Education's NCES, releasing point locations of public schools by school year (SY) across the United States, along with public LEAs and school district boundaries. It is an authoritative source for education geography, suited to school accessibility and equity analysis. Provided as Shapefiles and via ArcGIS REST/MapServer (with GeoJSON through services) for direct download, in the U.S. government public domain.

name: NextGIS Open Data – China
theme_raw: 中国基础矢量（OSM 衍生：道路、水系、行政、POI 等）
formats_now: ESRI Shape, GeoPackage, Geodatabase, GeoJSON, PDF, CSV, TAB, PBF, XML, GeoTIFF
notes: 为 QGIS/ArcGIS 直接可用的清洗版 OSM 数据
verify_notes: NextGIS China data page; multi-format download index | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NextGIS 提供的中国区开放数据，基于 OpenStreetMap 清洗整理而来，涵盖行政边界、POI、交通等多个图层，并按国家及全球分区组织。其数据已整理为可在 QGIS/ArcGIS 中直接使用的清洗版 OSM 格式。提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON、PBF、SQL 等多种格式，采用 ODbL 1.0 许可，网站下载，部分需注册。
desc_en: NextGIS open data for China, derived and cleaned from OpenStreetMap, spanning administrative boundaries, POIs, transportation, and other layers, organized by country and global regions. The data is packaged as cleaned OSM ready for direct use in QGIS/ArcGIS. Available in Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON, PBF, and SQL formats under the ODbL 1.0 license, via website download with some parts requiring registration.

name: NLS Finland Topographic Database (Maastotietokanta)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Hydrography | Land cover & land use
notes: Finnish topographic contribution; NLS Finland hosts Arctic SDI Geoportal.
verify_notes: NLS FI Topographic DB open | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 芬兰国家土地测量局（Maanmittauslaitos）的地形数据库（Maastotietokanta），是覆盖全芬兰（含拉普兰北极地区）的权威地形矢量数据，包含行政边界、水文、土地利用等要素。它是芬兰国家级基础地理数据，并通过北极 SDI 地理门户支持北极地区应用。数据以 SHP、GML、GeoPackage 提供，可经 WFS / Atom feed 访问，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。
desc_en: The Topographic Database (Maastotietokanta) of the National Land Survey of Finland, an authoritative topographic vector dataset covering all of Finland including Arctic Lapland, with administrative boundaries, hydrography, land cover, and other features. As Finland's national base geographic data, it also supports Arctic applications through the Arctic SDI Geoportal hosted by NLS Finland. Provided as SHP, GML, and GeoPackage with WFS and Atom feed access under a CC BY 4.0 license.

name: NLS Iceland IS 50V vector dataset
provider: National Land Survey of Iceland (Landmælingar Íslands)
notes: Icelandic contribution to Arctic SDI basemap.
verify_notes: LMI rebranded to Náttúrufræðistofnun (natt.is) | lychee:Timeout
desc_zh: 冰岛国家土地测量局（Landmælingar Íslands）的 IS 50V 矢量数据集，是覆盖全冰岛的权威基础地理数据，包含行政边界、水文及海岸/海洋等要素。作为冰岛对北极 SDI 底图的贡献，它适用于国家级制图、环境与海岸研究。数据以 SHP、GeoPackage 提供，可经 WFS / 下载访问，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。
desc_en: The IS 50V vector dataset from the National Land Survey of Iceland (Landmælingar Íslands), an authoritative base geographic dataset covering all of Iceland with administrative boundaries, hydrography, and marine/coastal features. As Iceland's contribution to the Arctic SDI basemap, it suits national-scale cartography and environmental and coastal studies. Provided as SHP and GeoPackage with WFS and download access under a CC BY 4.0 license.

name: NSW State Boundary (Geoscape)
verify_notes: data.gov.au 403 to bot | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 新南威尔士州州界数据，由 NSW DCS Spatial Services 与 Geoscape 提供，是澳大利亚新南威尔士州的权威行政边界矢量数据。它适用于州级制图、空间分析与各类区域研究的底图。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 格式开放提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。
desc_en: The NSW State Boundary dataset, provided by NSW DCS Spatial Services and Geoscape, is the authoritative administrative boundary for the state of New South Wales, Australia. It serves as a base layer for state-level cartography, spatial analysis, and regional studies. Openly available as Shapefile and GeoPackage under a CC BY 4.0 license.

name: NSW Suburb/Locality Boundaries (Geoscape)
verify_notes: HTTP 403 to WebFetch; site likely needs browser headers | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Geoscape Australia 提供的新南威尔士州郊区/地方（suburb/locality）边界数据，是该州细分行政地理的权威矢量数据集，常用于地址定位、区域统计与本地化分析。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 格式开放提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。
desc_en: Suburb/locality boundaries for New South Wales provided by Geoscape Australia, an authoritative vector dataset of the state's fine-grained administrative geography, commonly used for address localization, area-based statistics, and local analysis. Openly available as Shapefile and GeoPackage under a CC BY 4.0 license.

name: NYC Neighborhood Tabulation Areas 2020
notes: Aggregated census tract geographies
verify_notes: JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 纽约市规划局（NYC Department of City Planning）发布的 2020 年社区统计区（Neighborhood Tabulation Areas, NTA）数据。NTA 是由人口普查地块聚合而成的社区级地理单元，便于在稳定的社区尺度上汇总人口与社会经济数据。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 形式公开提供，可自由下载。
desc_en: The 2020 Neighborhood Tabulation Areas (NTAs) published by the NYC Department of City Planning. NTAs are neighborhood-level geographies aggregated from census tracts, designed for summarizing population and socioeconomic data at a stable neighborhood scale. Available publicly as Shapefile and GeoJSON, the data is freely downloadable.

name: NYC Open Data - Geospatial datasets (Socrata)
provider: NYC OTI / Department of City Planning
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Energy & infrastructure
license_now: NYC Open Data Terms of Use
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, CSV, Socrata GeoService API
notes: Main hub. Each dataset has direct shapefile/GeoJSON download endpoints (e.g. /resource/{id}.geojson).
verify_notes: NYC Open Data catalog browse page accessible. | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 纽约市开放数据平台（基于 Socrata）的地理空间数据集入口，由纽约市技术与创新办公室（OTI）及规划局维护，覆盖纽约市的行政边界、地点（POI）、能源与基础设施等多类主题。它是获取纽约市官方地理数据的主门户，每个数据集均提供直接的 shapefile/GeoJSON 下载端点。免费、无需认证，遵循纽约市开放数据使用条款。
desc_en: The geospatial entry point of the NYC Open Data platform (built on Socrata), maintained by the NYC Office of Technology and Innovation and the Department of City Planning, covering administrative boundaries, places (POIs), energy, and infrastructure across New York City. It is the main hub for official NYC geographic data, with each dataset offering direct shapefile/GeoJSON download endpoints. Free with no authentication, under the NYC Open Data Terms of Use.

name: OCHA Common Operational Datasets (COD-AB Admin Boundaries)
notes: Endorsed by national governments; used across the UN system.
verify_notes: HTTP 444 - WAF/bot block | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国人道主义事务协调厅（UN OCHA）的通用业务数据集（COD-AB 行政边界）。这是经各国政府认可的标准化行政边界数据，覆盖所有人道主义重点国家，广泛用于联合国系统内的应急响应、协调与人道主义分析。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON 形式开放提供，采用 CC-BY-IGO 许可。
desc_en: The Common Operational Datasets (COD-AB Administrative Boundaries) from UN OCHA. These are standardized administrative boundaries endorsed by national governments, covering all humanitarian-priority countries and widely used across the UN system for emergency response, coordination, and humanitarian analysis. Openly available as Shapefile, GeoPackage, and GeoJSON under a CC-BY-IGO license.

name: OEMC / Planet 51M Europe Field Boundaries
license_now: CC-BY 4.0 (OEMC release, 与原描述一致)
notes: Continental scale ML-derived parcels; hosted via OEMC STAC
verify_notes: 数据在 source.coop 与 Zenodo (record 14229033) 公开 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenEarthMonitor（OEMC）与 Planet 合作发布的欧洲农田地块边界数据集，基于机器学习从约 30 米分辨率、2022 年 6 月影像中提取，经筛选后保留约 5,140 万个地块（原约 8,950 万）。作为大陆尺度的 AI 提取地块数据，它适用于农业监测、土地利用与作物制图研究。数据以 GeoParquet / FlatGeobuf 提供，经 OEMC STAC 托管，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可直接下载。
desc_en: A pan-European field boundary dataset released by OpenEarthMonitor (OEMC) and Planet, derived via machine learning from roughly 30m imagery dated June 2022, retaining about 51.4 million fields after filtering (from an initial ~89.5 million). As continental-scale, AI-derived parcels, it suits agricultural monitoring, land-use, and crop mapping research. Provided as GeoParquet/FlatGeobuf hosted through the OEMC STAC under a CC-BY 4.0 license and directly downloadable.

name: OHM Admin Boundary Vector Tiles
lychee_status: Network error: Network unreachable. Check internet connection or VPN settings (error sending request for url (https://vtiles.openhistoricalmap.org/maps/ohm_admin.json))
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden | lychee:Network error: Network unreachable. Check internet connection or VPN settings (error sending request for url (https://vtiles.openhistoricalmap.org/maps/ohm_admin.json))
desc_zh: OpenHistoricalMap（OHM）的行政边界矢量切片服务，提供带时间维度（time-sliced）的全球历史行政边界。它允许按历史时点查询和渲染行政区划，适合历史地图制作与时空可视化应用。数据以 MVT（.pbf）矢量切片形式公开提供，采用 ODbL 许可。
desc_en: The administrative boundary vector tiles from OpenHistoricalMap (OHM), providing time-sliced global historical administrative boundaries. It allows querying and rendering administrative divisions at historical points in time, suited to historical map-making and spatiotemporal visualization. Provided publicly as MVT (.pbf) vector tiles under an ODbL license.

name: ok_geo4_*.csv (中国乡镇/街道四级边界)
provider: xiangyuecn (高德地图为主, 腾讯地图补充)
theme_raw: 乡镇/街道级行政区划边界
coverage: 中国大陆 省-市-区-乡镇 四级 (~4万+ polygons)
license: MIT (代码), 数据声明半开放, level4 部分需要付费或申请, 预览页可查看覆盖范围
license_now: 商业付费协议 (¥10-¥1498); 公益用途可申请免费 (最多5省)
access: partial-open (部分免费, 完整 level4 边界需付费/申请)
doi_or_citation: GitHub Release 同 ok_geo, 见 geo-level4.html 预览
notes: 中文圈罕见的乡镇级 polygon 数据源, 是 DataV.GeoAtlas/高德 district API 之外少数公开渠道
verify_notes: level4 乡镇边界需付费; 免费部分为 1-3 级 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 xiangyuecn 整理的中国乡镇/街道四级行政边界数据（ok_geo4_*.csv），以高德地图为主、腾讯地图补充，覆盖中国大陆省-市-区-乡镇四级共约 4 万多个面要素。它是中文圈罕见的公开乡镇级 polygon 数据源，可经 AreaCity-Geo-Transform-Tools 转换为 Shapefile/GeoJSON。数据以 CSV 提供，部分免费、完整四级边界需付费或申请（公益用途可申请免费，最多 5 省）。
desc_en: Township/sub-district fourth-level administrative boundaries for China (ok_geo4_*.csv) compiled by xiangyuecn, sourced mainly from AutoNavi (Amap) with Tencent Maps as a supplement, covering the province-city-district-township hierarchy of mainland China with roughly 40,000+ polygons. It is a rare openly accessible township-level polygon source for the Chinese-language community, convertible to Shapefile/GeoJSON via AreaCity-Geo-Transform-Tools. Provided as CSV, partly free, with full level-4 boundaries requiring payment or application (free for non-profit use, up to five provinces).

name: ONS Open Geography Portal - UK statistical and administrative boundaries
provider: Office for National Statistics (UK) - ArcGIS Hub
theme_raw: output areas, LSOA, MSOA, wards, local authorities, constituencies, regions
notes: Westminster Parliamentary Constituencies July 2024 WFS endpoint confirmed.
verify_notes: HTTP 400 Bad Request on this WFS request | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国国家统计局（ONS）开放地理门户提供的英国统计与行政边界数据，基于 ArcGIS Hub。此端点为 2024 年 7 月威斯敏斯特议会选区（Westminster Parliamentary Constituencies）边界的 WFS 服务，覆盖整个英国。它是获取英国官方统计地理的权威来源，适用于选区分析与统计数据制图。数据以 FeatureServer JSON、WFS、GeoJSON、shapefile 提供，采用开放政府许可 v3（OGL）。
desc_en: UK statistical and administrative boundaries from the ONS Open Geography Portal, served via ArcGIS Hub. This endpoint is the WFS service for the July 2024 Westminster Parliamentary Constituencies boundaries, covering the entire United Kingdom. It is an authoritative source for official UK statistical geography, suited to constituency analysis and statistical mapping. Available as FeatureServer JSON, WFS, GeoJSON, and shapefile under the Open Government Licence v3.

name: Open Buildings - HDX humanitarian country extracts
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Buildings & addresses | Humanitarian & conflict
theme_raw: Country-level building footprints for humanitarian response
coverage: 20 curated countries (e.g. Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana, Bangladesh, Indonesia, etc.)
access: Open download per country dataset page
notes: Pre-clipped to admin boundaries; easier than S2 sharded raw files
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: HDX（人道主义数据交换平台）上的 Open Buildings 国家级提取数据，由 UN OCHA 基于 Google 开放建筑物数据整理，覆盖约 20 个精选国家（如肯尼亚、尼日利亚、加纳、孟加拉国、印度尼西亚等）。数据已预先按行政边界裁切，比原始 S2 分片文件更易使用，适合人道主义与城市分析。提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、含坐标的 CSV，采用 CC BY-4.0 / ODbL v1.0 许可，按国家页面开放下载。
desc_en: Open Buildings country-level extracts on HDX (Humanitarian Data Exchange), curated by UN OCHA from Google's open building footprints, covering about 20 selected countries (e.g. Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana, Bangladesh, Indonesia). The data is pre-clipped to administrative boundaries, making it easier to use than the raw S2-sharded files, and suits humanitarian and urban analysis. Provided as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and CSV with coordinates under CC BY-4.0 / ODbL v1.0, with open download per country page.

name: Open Canada — Statistics Canada Census Tract / Boundary mirror catalog
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: Census tracts, dissemination blocks, federal electoral districts, designated places
feature_count: approximately 10 million records (ODA addresses, related catalogue)
notes: CKAN API exposes machine-readable metadata for automation.
verify_notes: redirects to new search.open.canada.ca host | lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: 加拿大开放数据平台上的加拿大统计局普查区/边界相关目录，提供普查地理（如传播区、普查区等）矢量边界。它是获取加拿大官方人口统计地理的入口，适用于人口与社会经济分析。数据以 shapefile、GML、KML 等格式经 CKAN 直接下载，CKAN API 提供可机读元数据便于自动化，采用加拿大开放政府许可。
desc_en: A catalog on the Open Canada platform for Statistics Canada census tract and boundary data, providing vector boundaries of census geographies (such as dissemination areas and census tracts). It is an entry point to official Canadian census geography, suited to population and socioeconomic analysis. Available as shapefile, GML, and KML via direct CKAN download, with a CKAN API exposing machine-readable metadata for automation, under the Open Government Licence — Canada.

name: Open Development Mekong Datahub – Admin Boundaries
theme_raw: ADM0-3 for Cambodia, Laos, Myanmar, Thailand, Vietnam
formats_now: PDF, HTML, WMS, CSV, JPEG, XLSX, JSON, XML, SHP, GeoJSON, KML, GeoTIFF, KMZ
notes: Strong on Cambodian commune-level boundaries which are otherwise hard to find.
verify_notes: 13,483+ datasets; entries dated May 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由东西方管理研究所开放发展倡议运营的 Open Development Mekong 数据中心的行政边界数据，覆盖湄公河区域。其目录包含逾 1.3 万项条目，尤其在柬埔寨乡级（commune）边界方面资料丰富，是这类细分边界少有的公开来源。数据以 GeoJSON、Shapefile、CSV 提供，可直接下载；站点采用 CC BY-SA 4.0，单个数据集许可各异。
desc_en: Administrative boundary data from the Open Development Mekong datahub, run by the Open Development Initiative (East-West Management Institute), covering the Mekong region. Its catalog holds over 13,000 items and is especially strong on Cambodian commune-level boundaries, which are otherwise hard to find. Provided as GeoJSON, Shapefile, and CSV for direct download; the site uses CC BY-SA 4.0, while individual dataset licenses vary.

name: Open Geo Data Education
notes: Curated educational vector datasets: tectonic plates, shipwrecks, Roman roads, UK boundaries, etc.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由伦敦国王学院的 Andrea Ballatore 维护的开放地理数据教学合集，面向地理空间分析的课堂教学与练习。仓库收录了一批经过精选的矢量数据集，如构造板块、沉船点、罗马道路、英国行政边界等，地理重点覆盖全球以及英国、伦敦和洛杉矶等区域。数据以 GeoJSON 和 GeoPackage 等易用格式通过 GitHub 提供，按各数据集署名、限教育非商业用途，适合 GIS 入门教学与示例。
desc_en: An open educational collection of geospatial vector datasets curated by Andrea Ballatore (King's College London) for teaching GIS and spatial analysis. It bundles ready-to-use layers such as tectonic plates, shipwrecks, Roman roads and UK administrative boundaries, with a geographic focus on the globe plus the UK, London and Los Angeles. Data is distributed via a GitHub repository in convenient GeoJSON and GeoPackage formats. Licensing is per-dataset attribution for educational, non-commercial use, making it well suited to classroom exercises and demonstrations.

name: Open Geospatial Data by Esri China (Hong Kong)
provider: Esri China (HK) Ltd. (聚合多個政府部門)
theme_raw: 行政界線、3D-BIT00 buildings、交通、教育
license_now: not stated on landing page (HK OGDL by source)
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, ArcGIS REST FeatureService
notes: 被學術文獻多次引用的二級聚合站；對 LandsD 3D-BIT00 Building Models Level 1 提供 vector tile 與 feature service
verify_notes: Esri China (Hong Kong) Open Geospatial Data portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Esri 中国（香港）运营的开放地理空间数据门户，基于 ArcGIS Hub 聚合多个香港政府部门的数据。主题涵盖行政边界、建筑与地址、交通等，地理范围为香港。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 以及 ArcGIS REST FeatureService 等形式提供，便于直接调用或下载。该站点是被学术文献多次引用的二级聚合平台，并为地政总署 3D-BIT00 一级建筑模型提供矢量瓦片与要素服务。许可以各数据来源（香港政府开放数据许可）为准。
desc_en: An open geospatial data portal run by Esri China (Hong Kong) on ArcGIS Hub, aggregating datasets from multiple Hong Kong government departments. It covers administrative boundaries, buildings and addresses, and transportation for the Hong Kong area. Data is offered as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and ArcGIS REST FeatureServices for direct consumption or download, and the site notably serves vector tiles and feature services for the Lands Department 3D-BIT00 Level 1 building models. Frequently cited in academic work as a secondary aggregator, with licensing following each source's terms.

name: Open Maps for Europe - Open Cadastral Map
theme_raw: Annex I: Cadastral Parcels, Administrative Units, Buildings, Addresses
verify_notes: Page loads but content extraction limited; Open EuroGeographics licence applies | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 EuroGeographics 提供的“欧洲开放地图—开放地籍图”，汇集成员国测绘机构的地籍参考数据。当前覆盖波兰、荷兰、捷克和西班牙，并在持续扩展。主题聚焦行政边界与建筑/地块信息，数据通过 WFS/WMS 服务和 GeoPackage 下载方式获取，采用 EuroGeographics 开放许可。适用于跨欧洲的地块参考、土地管理与制图等场景。
desc_en: Open Cadastral Map, part of EuroGeographics' Open Maps for Europe programme, brings together cadastral reference data from national mapping and cadastral authorities. Current coverage spans Poland, the Netherlands, Czechia and Spain, with the list growing over time. It centres on administrative boundaries and building/parcel information, delivered through WFS/WMS services and GeoPackage downloads under the EuroGeographics open licence. The dataset supports pan-European parcel referencing, land administration and cartographic applications.

name: OpenStreetMap Administrative Boundaries (Wambacher extract)
notes: Cited as crowdsourced alternative; quality varies by country.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Wambacher 提供的 OpenStreetMap 行政边界提取工具，可从全球 OSM 数据中按任意已映射的行政层级导出边界。数据源自 OpenStreetMap 众包贡献，覆盖全球，常被用作官方边界的开放替代来源。支持 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 和 GeoPackage 等格式，通过免费网页工具按需提取，遵循 ODbL 1.0 许可。需要注意各国数据的完整度与质量因社区贡献程度而异。
desc_en: A free web extraction tool by Wambacher that exports OpenStreetMap administrative boundaries at any OSM-mapped admin level for anywhere in the world. Sourced from crowdsourced OpenStreetMap contributions, it offers global coverage and is widely cited as an open alternative to official boundary datasets. Output is available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and GeoPackage, generated on demand under the ODbL 1.0 licence. As with all OSM-derived data, completeness and accuracy vary considerably from one country to another depending on community mapping effort.

name: OpenStreetMap+ Protected nature areas of continental Europe (merged with IUCN status & Natura 2000)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Transportation | Protected areas & biodiversity
notes: OpenGeoHub release; reconciles OSM, WDPA and Natura 2000 boundaries
verify_notes: OSM+ Protected nature areas Europe; ETRS89/LAEA | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 OpenGeoHub 在 Zenodo 发布的“OpenStreetMap+ 欧洲大陆自然保护区”数据集，将 OSM 的保护区要素与 IUCN 保护等级和 Natura 2000 边界进行融合协调。覆盖欧洲大陆，提供经过对齐的保护区多边形矢量数据。以 GeoPackage/Shapefile 多边形形式开放发布，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，并带有正式 DOI。适用于欧洲生物多样性、保护区分析与多源边界比对研究。
desc_en: An OpenGeoHub release hosted on Zenodo that merges OpenStreetMap protected-area features for continental Europe with IUCN protection status and Natura 2000 boundaries into a single reconciled layer. It covers continental Europe and supplies harmonised protected-area polygons. The data is openly published as GeoPackage/Shapefile vector polygons under a CC-BY 4.0 licence with a citable DOI. It is useful for European biodiversity work, protected-area analysis and comparing boundary delineations across multiple authoritative sources.

name: OSNI Open Data - Largescale Boundaries (County Boundaries)
formats_now: SHP, KML, CSV, GeoJSON, ArcGIS REST JSON
verify_notes: last updated 2022-01-10 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 由北爱尔兰土地与财产服务局（OSNI）发布的开放大比例尺县界数据，覆盖北爱尔兰的县级行政边界。数据以 Shapefile 格式开放提供，采用英国开放政府许可（OGL）。适用于北爱尔兰区域的行政区划制图、空间分析及与其他官方数据集的叠加分析。
desc_en: Open large-scale county boundary data published by Land & Property Services / OSNI, covering the county-level administrative boundaries of Northern Ireland. It is provided openly as Shapefile under the UK Open Government Licence. The dataset suits administrative mapping, spatial analysis and overlay with other official datasets across Northern Ireland.

name: OSPAR Data and Information Management System (ODIMS)
theme_raw: NE Atlantic MPAs, dumping sites, monitoring stations, region boundaries
formats_now: spatial layers, MS Excel, metadata, WMS/WFS web services
notes: Includes OSPAR MPA network polygons, official OSPAR sub-region boundaries — not in WDPA detail.
verify_notes: Active; 1004 submissions; copyright 2015-2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OSPAR 委员会的数据与信息管理系统（ODIMS），是东北大西洋海洋环境保护的官方数据门户，覆盖 OSPAR 区域 I–V。系统收录上千项提交，包含数百个图层与地图，提供 OSPAR 海洋保护区（MPA）网络多边形及官方分区边界等。数据以 Shapefile 和 WMS/WFS 服务形式提供，采用 CC0 许可。其保护区与分区边界细节是 WDPA 等通用数据库所不具备的，适合海洋空间规划与区域环境分析。
desc_en: The OSPAR Data and Information Management System (ODIMS) is the official data portal of the OSPAR Commission for protection of the North-East Atlantic, covering OSPAR regions I–V. It hosts over a thousand submissions spanning hundreds of layers and maps, including OSPAR Marine Protected Area network polygons and official OSPAR sub-region boundaries. Data is served as Shapefile and via WMS/WFS under a CC0 licence. Its MPA and sub-region detail goes beyond what general databases such as WDPA provide, supporting marine spatial planning and regional environmental analysis.

name: Other (cross-state) Suburb/Locality Boundaries (Geoscape)
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Geoscape Australia 提供的跨州（其他）郊区/地方边界数据，属于 Geoscape 行政边界系列；该系列各州通常单独打包，本数据集汇集不归属单一州的郊区/地方界线。覆盖澳大利亚，以 Shapefile 和 GeoPackage 格式开放发布，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。适用于澳大利亚的地址定位、区域统计与空间分析。
desc_en: Cross-state "Other" suburb/locality boundaries from Geoscape Australia, part of the Geoscape Administrative Boundaries suite in which states are normally packaged separately; this dataset captures localities that do not fall under a single state package. It covers Australia and is openly released as Shapefile and GeoPackage under a CC BY 4.0 licence. The data supports address location, regional statistics and spatial analysis across Australia.

name: PakData GISData
notes: Four admin levels (national/provincial/division/district)
verify_notes: Pakistan admin boundaries from GADM | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: PakData 在 GitHub 上发布的巴基斯坦 GIS 边界数据，派生自 GADM 全球行政区划数据。提供国家、省、专区和县四个行政层级的边界，覆盖巴基斯坦全境。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 和 TopoJSON 格式提供，便于网页制图与空间分析。由于来源于 GADM，具体许可需参考 GADM 的使用条款。
desc_en: Pakistan GIS boundary data published on GitHub by PakData and derived from the GADM global administrative areas database. It provides four administrative levels (national, provincial, division and district) covering all of Pakistan. The data is offered in Shapefile, GeoJSON and TopoJSON formats, convenient for web mapping and spatial analysis. As it is GADM-derived, its licensing follows GADM's terms of use, which should be checked before reuse.

name: Papua New Guinea Admin Boundaries Level 2 (png_adm2_un)
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 由世界粮食计划署（WFP）/ 联合国发布的巴布亚新几内亚二级（ADM2）行政边界数据，托管于 WFP 的 GeoNode 平台。覆盖巴布亚新几内亚，提供第二级行政区划界线。数据以 Shapefile 和 WFS 服务形式开放提供，遵循联合国/WFP 使用条款。适用于人道主义响应、统计制图及区域规划等用途。
desc_en: Level-2 (ADM2) administrative boundaries for Papua New Guinea published by WFP / the UN and hosted on WFP's GeoNode platform. It covers Papua New Guinea at the second administrative tier. The data is openly available as Shapefile and via WFS service under UN/WFP terms of use. It is suited to humanitarian response, statistical mapping and regional planning applications.

name: path-avmap av-map-data
notes: Waymo, Cruise, Zoox, WeRide etc. service boundaries with timeline events.csv
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: path-avmap 社区维护的自动驾驶（AV）运营范围数据集，记录 Waymo、Cruise、Zoox、WeRide 等公司在全球各城市的服务边界，时间跨度自 2017 年至今，并附带 events.csv 记录边界变化的时间线。数据以 GeoJSON 格式在 GitHub 上发布，采用 MIT 许可。适用于自动驾驶服务扩张追踪、城市出行研究与可视化分析。
desc_en: A community-maintained dataset of autonomous-vehicle service boundaries tracking operators such as Waymo, Cruise, Zoox and WeRide across global cities from 2017 to the present, with an accompanying events.csv documenting a timeline of boundary changes. The data is published on GitHub in GeoJSON format under the MIT licence. It is useful for tracking AV service expansion, studying urban mobility and producing visual analyses of how operating areas evolve over time.

name: PC01 1991/2001 town & village polygons (SEDAC carry-forward)
provider: NASA SEDAC / CIESIN Columbia (referenced by SHRUG)
doi_or_citation: Meiyappan et al.; cited in Asher et al. 2021
notes: Source for the pre-2011 historical layers carried forward through SHRUG town/village keys
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout; SEDAC migrated to earthdata.nasa.gov in 2024-2025, URL may be stale | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NASA SEDAC / 哥伦比亚大学 CIESIN 发布的印度村镇级地理与社会经济数据集，包含 1991 年（及配套的 2001 年）印度村庄和城镇多边形。该数据是 SHRUG 项目向前延续 2011 年前历史图层时所引用的来源，通过村镇键值实现历史关联。以 Shapefile 格式提供，需 Earthdata 登录免费获取，遵循 SEDAC（CC BY）条款。适用于印度长时段社会经济与人口空间研究。
desc_en: An India village- and town-level geospatial socio-economic dataset published by NASA SEDAC / CIESIN at Columbia University, containing 1991 (and, via a companion, 2001) village and town polygons. It is the source carried forward for pre-2011 historical layers in the SHRUG project through town/village keys. The data is provided as Shapefile, free to access with an Earthdata login under SEDAC's CC BY terms. It supports long-run socio-economic and demographic spatial research on India.

name: PDOK (Dutch INSPIRE services - BAG, BGT, BRK)
theme_raw: Annex I: Addresses, Buildings, Cadastral Parcels, Admin Units
formats_now: OGC APIs / WFS / WMS / vector tiles
verify_notes: 225 NL government geodatasets, monitored uptime | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: PDOK 是荷兰国家测绘机构 Kadaster 运营的公共地理数据平台，提供符合 INSPIRE 标准的核心基础数据服务，包括地址与建筑登记（BAG）、大比例尺地形图（BGT）和地块登记（BRK）。覆盖荷兰全境，数据以 WFS、GeoPackage 和 GML 等格式通过开放服务与下载方式提供，属开放政府数据。是荷兰行政边界、建筑与地址等权威基础地理信息的主要来源。
desc_en: PDOK is the Dutch national geodata platform operated by Kadaster, delivering INSPIRE-compliant core reference services including the addresses-and-buildings register (BAG), the large-scale topographic map (BGT) and the cadastral register (BRK). It covers the Netherlands and provides data as WFS, GeoPackage and GML through open services and downloads as open government data. PDOK is the authoritative source for Dutch administrative boundaries, buildings and addresses, widely used as foundational geographic information.

name: Pobal HP Deprivation Index — Small Area boundaries (Ireland)
theme_raw: Haase-Pratschke deprivation index attached to Small Area & Electoral Division
notes: Specifically a deprivation-index vector — a rare hosted-with-attributes example.
verify_notes: Greater Dublin Area, 2006-2011 census aggregated to ED level | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由爱尔兰 Pobal 与中央统计局（CSO）发布的 Pobal HP 贫困指数小区域（Small Area）边界数据，覆盖爱尔兰共和国，基于 2006 和 2011 年人口普查。该数据集较为特别之处在于矢量边界直接附带贫困指数属性，便于社会经济分析。以 Shapefile、CSV 和 GeoPackage 格式通过 data.gov.ie 直接下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。适用于爱尔兰的贫困、社会剥夺与区域不平等研究。
desc_en: The Pobal HP Deprivation Index Small Area boundaries published by Pobal and CSO Ireland, covering the Republic of Ireland and based on the 2006 and 2011 Censuses. The dataset is notable for hosting vector boundaries already joined with deprivation-index attributes, a relatively rare combination. It is provided as Shapefile, CSV and GeoPackage via direct download from data.gov.ie under a CC BY 4.0 licence. The data supports analysis of deprivation, social disadvantage and regional inequality across Ireland.

name: Princeton Gerrymandering Project Open Precincts (rehosted by RDH)
coverage: All 50 US states, various election years
access: Free download via openprecincts.org; rehosted in RDH portal
notes: Tracks data quality/completeness scores per state; partner source to RDH
verify_notes: Domain now redirects to seed-net.org; Princeton Gerrymandering Project Open Precincts moved/sunset | lychee:Timeout
desc_zh: 普林斯顿选区划分项目（PGP）的 Open Precincts 数据，并由 Redistricting Data Hub（RDH）重新托管。覆盖美国全部 50 个州的多个选举年份，提供选区（precinct）边界。每个州附带数据质量与完整度评分，是 RDH 的合作来源。数据以 Shapefile 格式通过 openprecincts.org 免费下载，开放访问（CC BY）。适用于选区划分研究、选举地理与公平划界分析。
desc_en: Open Precincts data from the Princeton Gerrymandering Project (PGP), also rehosted through the Redistricting Data Hub (RDH). It covers all 50 US states across various election years, providing voting precinct boundaries, with per-state data-quality and completeness scores, and serves as a partner source to RDH. The data is freely downloadable as Shapefile from openprecincts.org under open access (CC BY). It supports redistricting research, electoral geography and analysis of fair district drawing.

name: Province and Territory Cartographic Boundary Files - 2011 Census
verify_notes: Last modified 2022-02-24 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 加拿大统计局发布的 2011 年人口普查省与地区制图边界文件，覆盖加拿大全部省和地区。制图边界文件是为统计制图与可视化优化的版本，提供 SHP 和 GML 格式，采用加拿大开放政府许可（OGL-Canada）。适用于加拿大省级人口与社会经济数据的制图、专题分析及与普查统计的关联。
desc_en: Province and territory cartographic boundary files for the 2011 Census, published by Statistics Canada and covering all Canadian provinces and territories. Cartographic boundary files are simplified versions optimised for statistical mapping and visualisation. They are provided in SHP and GML formats under the Open Government Licence – Canada. The dataset suits mapping and thematic analysis of provincial population and socio-economic data, and linkage with census statistics.

name: Provinces/Territories Cartographic Boundary File - 2016 Census
verify_notes: Last modified 2022-02-23 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 加拿大统计局发布的 2016 年人口普查省与地区制图边界文件，覆盖加拿大全部省和地区，是 2011 年版的更新。制图边界文件为统计制图与可视化进行了优化，提供 SHP 和 GML 格式，采用加拿大开放政府许可（OGL-Canada）。适用于基于 2016 年普查的省级人口与社会经济专题制图和空间分析。
desc_en: Provinces/territories cartographic boundary file for the 2016 Census, published by Statistics Canada and covering all Canadian provinces and territories as an update to the 2011 edition. The cartographic boundary file is optimised for statistical mapping and visualisation, provided in SHP and GML formats under the Open Government Licence – Canada. It supports thematic mapping and spatial analysis of provincial population and socio-economic data based on the 2016 Census.

name: QuickMapTools Boundaries
theme_raw: 任意国家 ADM0–ADM5 行政边界按需导出
formats: GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, GeoPackage, TopoJSON, FlatGeobuf
formats_now: GeoJSON, Shapefile (ZIP), TopoJSON, KML, GeoPackage, FlatGeobuf
notes: 格式转换便利，适合快速取数
verify_notes: Functional boundary export tool; data from geoBoundaries CDN | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: QuickMapTools 提供的行政边界在线下载工具，数据基于 geoBoundaries 全球开放行政边界数据库，覆盖全球各级行政区划。其特色在于支持 GeoJSON、Shapefile、KML、GeoPackage、TopoJSON、FlatGeobuf 等多种格式的网页交互式导出，格式转换便利，适合快速取数。沿用 geoBoundaries 的 CC BY 4.0 许可。适用于需要快速获取并转换标准行政边界的制图与分析场景。
desc_en: An online boundary-download tool from QuickMapTools, built on the geoBoundaries open global administrative boundaries database and covering administrative units worldwide at multiple levels. Its strength is interactive web export to many formats, including GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, GeoPackage, TopoJSON and FlatGeobuf, making format conversion and quick data retrieval easy. It inherits geoBoundaries' CC BY 4.0 licence. The tool suits mapping and analysis workflows that need standard administrative boundaries fetched and reformatted rapidly.

name: r5r companion datasets / aopdata
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: urban accessibility hexagonal grids + admin overlays
formats_now: R package, sf, H3 hex grid
notes: IPEA sibling package to geobr, vector hex grids.
verify_notes: v1.1.2 release Jan 2026; CRAN+GitHub | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由巴西应用经济研究院（IPEA）维护的 aopdata，是 r5r 与 geobr 的配套数据包，提供 20 多个巴西都市区的数据。数据以 H3 六边形格网（sf 对象）形式组织，主题涉及行政边界、土地利用与基础设施等，可用于可达性与城市出行分析。通过 R 包分发。许可在页面上未明确显示，使用前建议核实。适合巴西城市可达性与空间公平研究。
desc_en: aopdata, maintained by Brazil's Institute for Applied Economic Research (IPEA), is a companion dataset to the r5r and geobr packages, providing data for 20-plus Brazilian metropolitan areas. The data is organised as H3 hexagonal grids (sf objects) spanning administrative boundaries, land use and infrastructure themes, intended for accessibility and urban mobility analysis. It is distributed via an R package. Licensing is not explicitly stated on the page and should be verified before reuse. It suits research on urban accessibility and spatial equity in Brazil.

name: Ramsar Wetlands of Australia FeatureServer
provider: Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water (DCCEEW)
notes: Authoritative Ramsar boundaries. Service name 'ogc_services' suggests linked OGC interfaces (WMS/WFS) too.
verify_notes: 服务活跃，支持 Query/ApplyEdits/ExtractChanges | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由澳大利亚气候变化、能源、环境与水部（DCCEEW）发布的澳大利亚拉姆萨尔湿地要素服务，提供权威的拉姆萨尔国际重要湿地边界，覆盖澳大利亚。数据通过 ArcGIS FeatureServer（可经 REST 输出 GeoJSON）提供，最大记录数为 10000；服务命名 ogc_services 暗示同时可能提供 WMS/WFS 等 OGC 接口。一般采用澳大利亚政府 CC-BY 许可。适用于湿地保护、生物多样性与环境规划分析。
desc_en: A Ramsar Wetlands of Australia feature service published by the Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water (DCCEEW), providing authoritative boundaries of Ramsar wetlands of international importance across Australia. The data is served via an ArcGIS FeatureServer (with GeoJSON available through REST) with a MaxRecordCount of 10,000, and the 'ogc_services' service name suggests linked OGC interfaces such as WMS/WFS may also be available. It generally carries an Australian Government CC-BY licence and supports wetland conservation, biodiversity and environmental planning analysis.

desc_zh: 由 Redistricting Data Hub（RDH，联合 VEST、MGGG、PGP 等合作方）发布的与选举结果连接的选区边界数据，针对 2016 年美国大选，覆盖全部 50 个州。数据将选区地理多边形与定量选举结果连接，主要由 VEST 提供。以 Shapefile 格式按州下载，需免费注册账户，并遵循其重新托管规范。适用于划界分析、选举地理与政治科学研究。
desc_en: Precinct boundaries joined with election results, published by the Redistricting Data Hub (RDH) with partners VEST, MGGG and PGP, for the 2016 US general election across all 50 states. The dataset links geographic precinct polygons with quantitative election returns, primarily supplied by VEST. It is available as per-state Shapefile downloads after free account registration and subject to RDH's rehosting standards. The data supports redistricting analysis, electoral geography and political-science research.

name: Regional Development Australia (RDA) 2014-15 regions
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; likely bot block | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 由澳大利亚政府发布的 2014-15 区域发展澳大利亚（RDA）区域边界数据，覆盖澳大利亚全境。RDA 区域用于划分区域发展规划与协调，本数据集提供相应的边界界线。以 Shapefile 格式提供，采用 CC-BY 许可。适用于区域发展规划、资源分配与区域统计分析。
desc_en: Regional Development Australia (RDA) regions for 2014-15, published by the Australian Government and covering all of Australia. RDA regions are used to organise regional development planning and coordination, and this dataset provides the corresponding boundary delineations. It is supplied as Shapefile under a CC-BY licence. The data suits regional development planning, resource allocation and regional statistical analysis.

name: Rimagination/ggmapcn - Tianditu derived boundaries
notes: 来源标注为 Tianditu，已简化

desc_zh: Rimagination 在 GitHub 上发布的 ggmapcn，提供基于天地图（Tianditu）派生的中国行政边界数据，覆盖全国三级行政区划。数据以 R 的 sf 对象/GeoJSON 形式提供，并已做简化处理，便于在 R 中进行中国地图绘制。边界来源标注为天地图。页面未明确显示许可，使用前建议查看仓库的 DESCRIPTION/LICENSE 文件。适合中国地图可视化与制图。
desc_en: ggmapcn, published on GitHub by Rimagination, provides Tianditu-derived administrative boundaries for China covering three administrative levels nationwide. The data is supplied as R sf objects / GeoJSON and has been simplified for convenient map drawing in R. Boundaries are attributed to Tianditu as their source. No licence is shown on the page, so the repository's DESCRIPTION/LICENSE files should be checked before reuse. The dataset is suited to visualising and producing maps of China within the R ecosystem.

name: Rosreestr / Roscartography Arctic topographic services
notes: Russian contribution to Arctic SDI; access has been intermittent post-2022.
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout; site likely region-restricted (Russia) | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 俄罗斯联邦 Rosreestr（联邦地籍与制图局）提供的北极地区地形服务，覆盖俄罗斯北极区域，是俄罗斯对北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic SDI）的贡献。数据以 WMS 形式提供，访问受限，需遵循机构条款。注意自 2022 年以来该服务的可用性时有中断。主题涉及行政边界与水文，适用于北极区域的参考制图。
desc_en: Arctic topographic services provided by Rosreestr (the Russian Federation's federal cadastre and cartography authority), covering the Russian Arctic and forming Russia's contribution to the Arctic Spatial Data Infrastructure (Arctic SDI). Data is offered via WMS with restricted access subject to agency terms. Note that service availability has been intermittent since 2022. Covering administrative boundaries and hydrography themes, it is intended for reference mapping of the Arctic region.

desc_zh: Emelieh21 在 GitHub 上的 Russian-Gistory 项目，尝试以开放矢量形式重建二战后苏联（USSR）的州（oblast）行政边界，提供 1950、1959 和 1990 年等多个时间切片。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoJSON 格式直接从 GitHub 下载。README 未声明许可，仓库元数据标注为 MIT，使用前建议核实。这是少见的开放苏联州界尝试，适合历史地理与边界变迁研究。
desc_en: Russian-Gistory, a GitHub project by Emelieh21, is a rare attempt to reconstruct post-WWII Soviet (USSR) oblast administrative boundaries as open vector data, with time slices including 1950, 1959 and 1990. The data is available as Shapefile and GeoJSON via direct GitHub download. The README states no licence while the repository metadata claims MIT, so this should be verified before reuse. It is a valuable lead for historical geography and the study of changing administrative boundaries over time.

name: SA State Boundary (Geoscape)

desc_en: The South Australia state boundary from the Geoscape Administrative Boundaries suite, published by South Australia's Department for Environment and Water (DEW) / Geoscape and covering the state of South Australia. It provides the state-level administrative boundary. The data is openly available as Shapefile and GeoPackage under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It is suited to mapping, spatial analysis and administrative referencing across South Australia.

desc_en: South Australia state electoral boundaries published by Geoscape Australia / the SA Electoral Commission, covering the state of South Australia and providing the boundaries of state electoral districts. The data is openly available as Shapefile and GeoPackage under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It supports electoral geography analysis, redistricting and mapping of voting statistics across South Australia.

name: SALB Boundaries Comparison Metadata (GRID3 technical report)

desc_en: An SALB boundaries comparison metadata technical report from GRID3 (Geo-Referenced Infrastructure and Demographic Data for Development), covering priority Sub-Saharan African countries. The report provides a provenance index and cross-walk linking SALB boundary IDs to openly re-released polygons, making it a useful traceability reference. It is delivered as a PDF with companion CSV/Shapefile tables, with the vector cross-walk tables shared on the GRID3 data portal, presumably under a CC BY open licence. The report supports verifying boundary provenance and analysing data lineage.

desc_en: Administrative boundaries for the Democratic Republic of the Congo (COD) under the UN SALB (Second Administrative Level Boundaries) programme, maintained by the DRC national authority together with UN SALB. Covering the DRC, it provides officially endorsed administrative boundary delineations. The data is openly available as Shapefile under the SALB Terms of Use. It is suited to humanitarian, development planning and statistical mapping applications.

desc_en: Administrative boundaries for Mozambique (MOZ) under the UN SALB programme, maintained by the Mozambican national authority together with UN SALB and covering Mozambique. It provides officially endorsed administrative boundary delineations, openly available as Shapefile under the SALB Terms of Use. The dataset is suited to humanitarian, development planning and statistical mapping applications.

name: SALB Niger (NER) administrative boundaries
provider: Institut Géographique National du Niger / UN SALB
notes: Historic table at /system/files/historic_data/NER_HIST_DATA.xlsx
verify_notes: Data marked Unvalidated | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国 SALB 项目下尼日尔（NER）的行政边界数据，由尼日尔国家地理研究所（IGN Niger）与联合国 SALB 共同维护，覆盖尼日尔。提供经官方认可的行政区划界线，并附带历史沿革表格（xlsx）。以 Shapefile 格式开放下载，遵循 SALB 使用条款。适用于人道主义、发展规划与统计制图等用途。
desc_en: Administrative boundaries for Niger (NER) under the UN SALB programme, maintained by the Institut Géographique National du Niger together with UN SALB and covering Niger. It provides officially endorsed boundary delineations along with a historic table (xlsx) documenting changes over time. The data is openly downloadable as Shapefile under the SALB Terms of Use. It is suited to humanitarian, development planning and statistical mapping applications.

name: SALB Nigeria (NGA) administrative boundaries
provider: Office of the Surveyor General of the Federation / UN SALB
verify_notes: Datasets Unvalidated | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国 SALB 项目下尼日利亚（NGA）的行政边界数据，由联邦测量长办公室（OSGOF）与联合国 SALB 共同维护，覆盖尼日利亚。提供经官方认可的行政区划界线，并附带历史 xlsx 表格（NGA_HIST_DATA.xlsx）；部分内容标注为待审核、尚未验证。以 Shapefile 格式开放提供，遵循 SALB 使用条款。适用于人道主义、发展规划与统计制图等用途。
desc_en: Administrative boundaries for Nigeria (NGA) under the UN SALB programme, maintained by the Office of the Surveyor General of the Federation together with UN SALB and covering Nigeria. It provides officially endorsed boundary delineations along with a historic xlsx table (NGA_HIST_DATA.xlsx), with some content marked as unvalidated and pending review. The data is openly available as Shapefile under the SALB Terms of Use. It is suited to humanitarian, development planning and statistical mapping applications.

name: SALB Senegal (SEN) administrative boundaries
notes: Contributor: Agence Nationale de l'Aménagement du Territoire
verify_notes: Datasets Unvalidated | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为联合国 SALB（第二行政级别边界）项目下塞内加尔的官方行政区划矢量边界，由塞内加尔国家国土整治局（ANAT）提供。数据以 Shapefile 格式开放下载，包含国家级及次级行政单元边界，并经联合国统一规范化处理。它常用于人道主义协调、统计制图与跨国数据对齐，是塞内加尔权威边界的可靠来源。使用须遵循 SALB 使用条款。
desc_en: This dataset provides Senegal's official administrative boundaries within the UN SALB (Second Administrative Level Boundaries) programme, contributed by the national land-management agency ANAT. Distributed as openly downloadable Shapefiles, it covers national and subnational administrative units that have been standardized to UN reference norms. It is widely used for humanitarian coordination, statistical mapping, and harmonizing cross-country datasets, serving as an authoritative source for Senegalese boundaries. Use is governed by the SALB Terms of Use.

name: SALB South Africa (ZAF) boundaries
provider: South Africa national authority / UN SALB
verify_notes: No active downloads; under review | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为联合国 SALB 项目下南非的官方行政边界，由南非国家主管机构提供并经 UN SALB 规范化。数据以 Shapefile 格式开放获取，涵盖国家级及次级行政单元，适用于人道主义、统计与制图工作中对权威边界的需求。作为联合国认可的标准化边界，它便于与其他国家数据进行一致性对接。使用须遵守 SALB 使用条款。
desc_en: This dataset delivers South Africa's official administrative boundaries within the UN SALB programme, supplied by the national authority and standardized by UN SALB. Available as openly accessible Shapefiles, it spans national and subnational units suitable for humanitarian, statistical, and cartographic work requiring authoritative boundaries. As a UN-endorsed, normalized boundary product, it supports consistent integration with datasets from other countries. Use is subject to the SALB Terms of Use.

name: Sanjiangyuan National Park Space-Air-Ground Ecological Monitoring Data Platform (catalog)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Sanjiangyuan vector datasets catalog (boundaries, land use, monitoring stations)
notes: Catalog page enumerating multiple vector layers for the park
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout (60s); Sanjiangyuan platform may be slow | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是三江源国家公园天空地一体化生态监测数据平台的数据目录页，由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）的子门户托管。该目录列举了面向三江源国家公园的多种矢量产品，涵盖行政边界、土地覆盖与土地利用等主题。平台服务于公园生态监测、保护管理与科研分析。数据通常以 Shapefile 等矢量格式提供，使用须遵循 TPDC 用户协议。
desc_en: This is the catalog page of the Sanjiangyuan National Park Space-Air-Ground Integrated Ecological Monitoring Data Platform, hosted on a sub-portal of the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC). It enumerates multiple vector products for the park, spanning administrative boundaries and land cover/land use themes. The platform supports ecological monitoring, conservation management, and scientific analysis of the park. Layers are typically provided as Shapefiles and other vector formats, with use governed by the TPDC user agreement.

name: Sanjiangyuan region extent dataset (2018)
notes: Includes per-source watershed boundary, total boundary, and county boundaries within each watershed
verify_notes: TPDC SPA; minimal HTML to fetcher | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为三江源地区 2018 年范围边界数据，由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，以 Shapefile 格式提供。数据兼具行政与水文边界属性，包含按水系划分的分区流域边界、研究区总边界，以及各流域内的县级边界。它适用于三江源生态保护、流域分析与区域统计研究。使用须遵循 TPDC 用户协议。
desc_en: This dataset defines the 2018 extent of the Sanjiangyuan (Three-River Source) region, released by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC) in Shapefile format. Combining administrative and hydrographic boundaries, it includes per-source watershed boundaries, the overall study-area boundary, and county boundaries within each watershed. It supports ecological conservation, watershed analysis, and regional statistical research for the Sanjiangyuan area. Use is governed by the TPDC user agreement.

name: Sarawak Logging Concessions
notes: Sub-national logging concession boundaries
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub about page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为马来西亚沙捞越州的伐木特许区边界，由世界资源研究所（WRI）旗下的 Global Forest Watch（GFW）平台发布。数据为次国家级矢量边界，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON 与 KML 等格式，采用 CC BY 4.0 开放许可。它常用于森林治理、毁林监测与土地利用透明度分析，帮助追踪沙捞越的商业采伐范围。
desc_en: This dataset maps logging concession boundaries in Sarawak, Malaysia, published on the Global Forest Watch (GFW) platform run by the World Resources Institute (WRI). It provides sub-national vector boundaries in Shapefile, GeoJSON, and KML formats under a CC BY 4.0 license. It is commonly used for forest governance, deforestation monitoring, and land-use transparency analysis, helping track the extent of commercial timber operations across Sarawak.

name: Secciones Nacionalidades

desc_zh: 这是一个名为 Secciones Nacionalidades 的个人 GitHub 仓库，可能包含与行政区划相关的矢量数据，可直接下载。由于属个人维护项目而非权威开源数据集，其覆盖范围、许可与数据质量需进一步核实。建议在使用前确认数据来源、更新情况与授权条款，谨慎用于正式分析。
desc_en: This is a personal GitHub repository named Secciones Nacionalidades that may contain administrative-boundary-related vector data available for direct download. As a personally maintained project rather than an authoritative open dataset, its coverage, licensing, and data quality require verification. Users should confirm the data provenance, update status, and usage terms before relying on it for formal analysis.

name: SGIS Statistical Boundary Data
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: Census statistical boundaries (si-do, si-gun-gu, eup-myeon-dong, output areas, grids)

desc_zh: SGIS 统计地理信息边界数据由韩国统计厅（KOSTAT）提供，覆盖韩国全境的行政与统计边界。数据以 Shapefile 格式发布，包含细粒度的统计输出区（output-area）多边形，这类边界在英文资源中较少被收录。它整合了行政边界、人口社会经济与基础设施等主题，常用于人口统计、区域分析与可视化。数据采用 KOGL 第 1 型开放许可，门户下载需注册。
desc_en: SGIS Statistical Boundary Data is provided by Statistics Korea (KOSTAT), covering administrative and statistical boundaries across South Korea. Distributed as Shapefiles, it includes fine-grained statistical output-area polygons rarely indexed in English-language sources. Spanning administrative boundaries, population/socioeconomic, and infrastructure themes, it is widely used for demographic statistics, regional analysis, and visualization. The data is offered under the KOGL Type 1 open license, with portal downloads requiring registration.

name: shengshixian.com 行政区划代码与边界配套表 (源码与数据)

desc_zh: 该 GitHub 仓库为 shengshixian.com（map.ruiduobao.com 的开源同名前身/姊妹项目）提供中国大陆五级行政区划的代码与配套数据。数据以 GeoJSON 配合 SQL 与代码形式提供，包含行政区划代码与边界配套表，便于脚本批量取用。仓库采用 MIT 许可，适合开发者构建行政边界查询、可视化或数据对接流程。
desc_en: This GitHub repository backs shengshixian.com (the open-source predecessor/sibling of map.ruiduobao.com), providing code and accompanying data for China's five-level administrative divisions. It supplies GeoJSON together with SQL tables and code, including administrative codes paired with boundary data, designed for programmatic bulk retrieval. Released under the MIT license, it suits developers building boundary lookup, visualization, or data-integration pipelines.

name: SHRUG Administrative Atlas of India layers
provider: Office of the Registrar General & Census Commissioner of India
theme_raw: Census of India authoritative state/district vector base

desc_zh: 该资源为印度行政地图集相关图层，由印度总登记官与人口普查专员办公室发布，覆盖印度全国。数据以 PDF 地图为主并可派生矢量边界，是 SHRUG（次区域发展研究）用于对齐其行政多边形的参考底图。它整合了行政边界与人口社会经济主题，采用印度政府开放数据（NDSAP）政策，可开放下载。
desc_en: This resource provides Administrative Atlas layers for India from the Office of the Registrar General & Census Commissioner, covering the entire nation. Distributed primarily as PDF maps with derivable vector boundaries, it serves as the reference cartography used to align SHRUG's administrative polygons. Spanning administrative-boundary and population/socioeconomic themes, it is openly downloadable under the Government of India's NDSAP open-data policy.

name: Simplemaps China GIS
theme_raw: 中国一级行政区（省）边界
notes: 教学/可视化轻量底图

desc_zh: Simplemaps 中国 GIS 提供中国一级行政区划（ADM1，省级）的轻量矢量边界，由 Simplemaps 制作。数据采用 WGS84 坐标系，提供 GeoJSON 与 Shapefile 格式，可在网页直接下载，免费版采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它适合教学、快速可视化与作为轻量底图使用，便于非专业用户快速制图。
desc_en: Simplemaps China GIS offers lightweight vector boundaries for China's first-level administrative divisions (ADM1, provincial level), produced by Simplemaps. Provided in WGS84 as GeoJSON and Shapefile with direct web download, the free version is licensed under CC BY 4.0. It is well suited for teaching, quick visualization, and use as a lightweight basemap, enabling non-specialists to map rapidly.

name: Slope data of the Green Silk Road (v1.0) — accompanying vector AOI
coverage: Pan-Third Pole / Green Silk Road belt
notes: Vector boundary of the Green Silk Road study extent accompanies slope raster
verify_notes: TPDC EN SPA; minimal HTML to fetcher | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为绿色丝绸之路坡度数据（v1.0）及其配套的矢量研究区范围，由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布。数据包含坡度栅格与界定泛第三极/绿色丝绸之路带研究范围的矢量边界 Shapefile，兼具行政与交通主题。它适用于地形分析、廊道规划与区域环境研究。使用须遵循 TPDC 用户协议。
desc_en: This dataset comprises Slope data of the Green Silk Road (v1.0) together with its accompanying vector area-of-interest, released by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC). It contains a slope raster plus a vector boundary Shapefile delimiting the Pan-Third Pole / Green Silk Road belt study extent, spanning administrative and transportation themes. It supports terrain analysis, corridor planning, and regional environmental research. Use is governed by the TPDC user agreement.

name: songjian/cnstats 国家统计局数据爬虫
notes: 非直接矢量,但抓取的统计数据可与边界shp做属性关联;构建普查单元的标准流程
verify_notes: Crawler for stats.gov.cn | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: cnstats 是 songjian 维护的国家统计局数据爬虫工具，用于抓取中国全国普查与年鉴统计数据，覆盖 31 个省份和 40 多个主要城市，含 200 多个指标代码（指标代码约每五年变动）。数据以 JSON 输出，并非直接矢量，但抓取的统计数据可与行政边界 Shapefile 做属性关联，是构建普查单元分析的标准流程。仓库采用 MIT 许可。
desc_en: cnstats, maintained by songjian, is a scraper for China's National Bureau of Statistics data, harvesting national census and yearbook statistics across 31 provinces and 40-plus major cities with 200-plus indicator codes (codes change roughly every five years). Output is JSON rather than direct vectors, but the scraped statistics can be joined as attributes to administrative-boundary Shapefiles, forming a standard workflow for census-unit analysis. The repository is MIT-licensed.

name: Source Cooperative — vector GeoParquet datasets
coverage: Global; 60+ GeoParquet vector datasets (fiboa fields, kerner-lab, etc.)
notes: Hosts fiboa field-boundary collections per country — strong non-English / non-mainstream coverage (DE, AT, NL, FR, DK, FI, US-USDA, etc.).
verify_notes: Radiant Earth project; S3-compatible cloud-native | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Source Cooperative 是 Radiant Earth 运营的开放数据托管平台，提供 60 多个 GeoParquet 矢量数据集（如 fiboa 田块边界、kerner-lab 等）。数据以 GeoParquet、FlatGeobuf 及 STAC 形式通过开放 S3 提供，许可因数据集而异。它尤其覆盖德、奥、荷、法、丹、芬及美国 USDA 等非英语或非主流来源的田块边界集合，适合云原生地理数据分析。
desc_en: Source Cooperative, operated by Radiant Earth, is an open data hosting platform offering 60-plus GeoParquet vector datasets such as fiboa field boundaries and kerner-lab collections. Data is served via open S3 as GeoParquet, FlatGeobuf, and STAC, with licensing varying per dataset. It is notable for hosting fiboa field-boundary collections across non-English or non-mainstream sources (DE, AT, NL, FR, DK, FI, US-USDA, and more), making it well suited to cloud-native geospatial analysis.

name: South Africa COD-AB (Subnational Administrative Boundaries)
verify_notes: HDX 对 WebFetch 返回 403（Cloudflare）；实际数据集仍存在，许可 CC-BY-IGO | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 该数据集为南非的 COD-AB（次国家行政边界通用操作数据集），由 OCHA HDX 平台发布，源自南非 MDB 2016 边界。数据提供 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage 格式，可在 HDX 免费下载。作为联合国通用操作数据集（COD），它是人道主义响应中权威且标准化的南非行政边界来源，采用 CC-BY-IGO 许可。
desc_en: This dataset provides South Africa's COD-AB (Common Operational Dataset for subnational administrative boundaries), published on the OCHA HDX platform and sourced from the country's MDB 2016 boundaries. Available as Shapefiles and GeoPackage with free HDX download, it serves as the authoritative, standardized administrative-boundary source for South Africa in humanitarian response as a UN Common Operational Dataset, under a CC-BY-IGO license.

name: South Africa GeoPortal (Esri Africa)

desc_zh: 南非地理门户（Esri Africa）由 Esri 东非合作伙伴运营，提供南非的行政边界与能源基础设施等多类图层。数据通过 FeatureServer/WFS、GeoJSON 与 Shapefile 等形式发布，部分图层需登录免费获取，许可因图层而异。它适合在 Esri 生态中进行制图、空间分析与服务集成，是获取南非区域地理数据的便捷入口。
desc_en: The South Africa GeoPortal (Esri Africa), operated by Esri's Eastern Africa partners, offers layers covering administrative boundaries and energy/infrastructure themes for South Africa. Data is published via FeatureServer/WFS, GeoJSON, and Shapefile, with some layers free upon login and licensing varying by layer. It suits mapping, spatial analysis, and service integration within the Esri ecosystem and provides a convenient entry point to South African regional geodata.

desc_zh: 该资源为南非国家数据门户的空间数据集合，由南非政府发布，覆盖南非全境的行政边界等主题。数据以 Shapefile 与 CSV 等格式免费提供，遵循开放政府数据政策。作为官方开放数据入口，它适合获取南非各类政府空间与统计数据，用于政策分析、研究与公共服务。
desc_en: This resource is the spatial dataset collection of South Africa's National Data Portal, published by the Government of South Africa and covering administrative boundaries and related themes nationwide. Data is provided free in formats such as Shapefile and CSV under an Open Government data policy. As an official open-data gateway, it is well suited for accessing the country's government spatial and statistical data for policy analysis, research, and public services.

desc_en: southkorea-maps is a GitHub project aggregating South Korea's administrative boundaries across provinces, municipalities, and submunicipalities, drawing on KOSTAT, GADM, POPONG, and Wikimedia sources. It provides multiple formats including Shapefile, GeoJSON, TopoJSON, KML, and SVG for open download. Licensing varies by source (e.g., GADM non-commercial, POPONG CC BY 4.0), so users should check the applicable sub-license for each layer before use.

name: Spatial Data Repository (DHS Program)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Public services

desc_zh: DHS Program 空间数据仓库由美国国际开发署（USAID）DHS 项目与 ICF 运营，覆盖约 90 个中低收入国家。数据包含 GPS 调查簇点、行政边界等矢量（栅格 GeoTIFF 另行提供），以 Shapefile 形式开放（需注册），采用 ODC 许可。它在全球卫生地理研究中被广泛引用，常用于将健康与人口调查数据与空间位置关联分析。
desc_en: The DHS Program Spatial Data Repository, run by USAID's DHS Program and ICF, covers around 90 low- and middle-income countries. It provides vector data including GPS survey cluster points and administrative boundaries (with GeoTIFF rasters available separately) as openly downloadable Shapefiles under registration, licensed via ODC. Heavily cited in global health geography, it is commonly used to link health and demographic survey data to spatial locations for analysis.

desc_en: This GitHub repository (ssfxz/tianditu) provides a scraper for harvesting China's three-level administrative divisions from Tianditu, plus a GeoJSON conversion script (Convert2GeoJSON), covering provincial, prefecture, and county levels. Data is delivered as TXT with conversion tooling and is openly accessible, though the repository specifies no license. It suits developers needing programmatic access to Chinese boundary GeoJSON; users should note the data provenance and licensing before use.
