notes: Canonical London boundary pack widely cited in academic work.
verify_notes: WebFetch 403; page likely live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 伦敦统计 GIS 边界文件由大伦敦政府（GLA）发布，覆盖伦敦的选区（ward）、LSOA、MSOA、OA 输出区与各自治市（borough）等多级统计边界。数据提供 Shapefile 与 MapInfo TAB 格式，可免费直接下载，采用开放政府许可（OGL）。它是被学术研究广泛引用的伦敦标准边界数据包，常用于城市分析与统计制图。
desc_en: The Statistical GIS Boundary Files for London are published by the Greater London Authority (GLA), covering wards, LSOAs, MSOAs, output areas, and boroughs across London. Provided as Shapefile and MapInfo TAB with free direct download under the Open Government Licence (OGL), it is the canonical London boundary pack widely cited in academic work and is commonly used for urban analysis and statistical mapping.

name: Statistics Canada — Dissemination Area & Block Boundary Files
theme_raw: Dissemination Areas (DA), Dissemination Blocks, Census Tracts, CSD, FSA
license_now: Statistics Canada Open Licence (per product pages)
notes: Also mirrored on open.canada.ca catalog with persistent DOIs.
verify_notes: 2021 and 2016 versions available; 2006 provincial files no longer available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为加拿大统计局的传播区（Dissemination Area）与区块边界文件，覆盖加拿大全境，含 2006、2011、2016 与 2021 等每五年一次的普查版本。数据提供 Shapefile 与 GML 格式，可直接下载，采用加拿大统计局开放许可，并在 open.canada.ca 上以持久 DOI 镜像。它是加拿大普查地理分析的基础边界数据。
desc_en: This dataset comprises Statistics Canada's Dissemination Area and Block boundary files, covering all of Canada with five-yearly census vintages including 2006, 2011, 2016, and 2021. Provided as Shapefile and GML for direct download under the Statistics Canada Open Licence, it is also mirrored on open.canada.ca with persistent DOIs. It is the foundational boundary data for Canadian census geography analysis.

name: Stats SA Census 2011 Enumeration Areas
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: Enumeration Areas (~100-250 households), Small Areas, sub-place
notes: 2022 census boundaries also being released. Western Cape GIS portal hosts mirrored versions.
verify_notes: Page describes enumeration areas / place name boundaries | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为南非统计局（Stats SA）发布的 2011 年普查普查区（Enumeration Areas）边界，覆盖南非全境。数据以 Shapefile 格式直接下载（也可通过 GeoSpatial.gov.za 合作伙伴获取），整合行政边界、地名与人口社会经济主题。普查区是南非最细的普查统计单元，2022 年普查边界亦在陆续发布。使用须遵循 Stats SA 署名要求。
desc_en: This dataset provides the Census 2011 Enumeration Area boundaries published by Statistics South Africa (Stats SA), covering the entire country. Available as directly downloadable Shapefiles (also via GeoSpatial.gov.za partners), it spans administrative-boundary, place-name, and population/socioeconomic themes. Enumeration areas are South Africa's finest census statistical units, with 2022 census boundaries also being released. Use is subject to Stats SA attribution requirements.

name: StatsSA Main Place / Sub-place Boundaries (via SA-Maps)
license_now: 未声明 LICENSE（数据源自 Demarcation Board / IEC / StatsSA / CSIR）
notes: Sub-place is the closest open analog to AfriGIS suburb boundaries.
verify_notes: 仓库活跃度低（37 commits）；无明确 LICENSE，需回到原始数据源确认许可 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该 GitHub 镜像（SA-Maps）提供南非统计局（StatsSA）的主地（Main Place）与子地（Sub-place）边界，覆盖南非全境，数据源自 Demarcation Board、IEC、StatsSA 与 CSIR。提供 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 格式，通过 GitHub 获取。子地是最接近 AfriGIS 郊区边界的开放替代品，但仓库未声明许可证，使用前需核实数据授权。
desc_en: This GitHub mirror (SA-Maps) provides Statistics South Africa's Main Place and Sub-place boundaries for the whole of South Africa, with data originating from the Demarcation Board, IEC, StatsSA, and CSIR. Offered as Shapefile and GeoJSON via GitHub, the sub-place layer is the closest open analog to AfriGIS suburb boundaries. The repository declares no explicit license, so users should verify data licensing before use.

name: Subnational HDI version archive (shapefiles by version)
theme_raw: historical SHDI region geometries by release
notes: Lets researchers reproduce historical SHDI maps with the original boundary version.
verify_notes: 404 Not Found; URL likely moved/renamed | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该资源为 Global Data Lab 提供的次国家人类发展指数（SHDI）历史版本边界存档，按版本（v3 至 v6.4）提供全球次国家级 Shapefile 与 CSV。注册后免费下载，按版本归档。它让研究者能够使用与各版本对应的原始边界，复现历史 SHDI 地图，确保时间序列分析中边界与指标的一致性。
desc_en: This resource is Global Data Lab's archive of versioned boundary files for the Subnational Human Development Index (SHDI), offering global subnational Shapefiles and CSVs by version (v3 through v6.4). Free with GDL registration and organized as versioned downloads, it lets researchers reproduce historical SHDI maps using the original boundary version, ensuring consistency between boundaries and indicators in time-series analysis.

name: Subnational Human Development Database (SHDI) + GDL boundary shapefiles
theme_raw: subnational HDI, education, health, income polygons
notes: Scientific Data 2019 data descriptor; one of the most cited subnational dev databases.
verify_notes: Free registration required to download | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 次国家人类发展数据库（SHDI）由荷兰拉德堡德大学的 Global Data Lab 发布，覆盖 161 个国家约 1800 个区域。数据提供区域边界 Shapefile 及 CSV/XLSX 指标表，注册后可下载。它源自《Scientific Data》2019 年数据描述论文（Smits & Permanyer, doi:10.1038/sdata.2019.38），是被引用最多的次国家发展数据库之一，广泛用于区域发展与公共服务研究。
desc_en: The Subnational Human Development Database (SHDI), published by Global Data Lab at Radboud University, covers roughly 1,800 regions across 161 countries. It provides region-boundary Shapefiles alongside CSV/XLSX indicator tables, downloadable upon registration. Stemming from a 2019 Scientific Data descriptor (Smits & Permanyer, doi:10.1038/sdata.2019.38), it is one of the most cited subnational development databases and is widely used in regional development and public-services research.

name: Suburbs and Localities (SAL 2021) – ASGS Ed. 3
notes: Mesh Block approximation of gazetted localities
verify_notes: SAL 2021 page title loads; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为澳大利亚统计局（ABS）发布的郊区与地方（SAL 2021）边界，属澳大利亚统计地理标准（ASGS）第三版，覆盖澳大利亚全国。数据由网格区块（Mesh Block）近似公报地名构成，提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage 与 WFS，采用 CC BY 4.0 开放许可。它适用于人口统计、区域分析与基于地名的空间制图。
desc_en: This dataset provides Australia's Suburbs and Localities (SAL 2021) boundaries from the Australian Bureau of Statistics (ABS), part of ASGS Edition 3 and covering the entire nation. Built as Mesh Block approximations of gazetted localities, it is offered as Shapefile, GeoPackage, and WFS under a CC BY 4.0 license. It supports demographic statistics, regional analysis, and place-name-based spatial mapping.

name: Survey of India Digital Vector Database (1:1M) + OSM 1:50k
theme_raw: National topographic vectors (admin, transport, hydro, hypsography, vegetation)
license: Paid/licensed for most products; Nakshe portal offers free Open Series Map PDFs (Aadhaar login)
notes: Free vector access is restricted; 1:50k OSM topo full-sheet shapefile is the main vector product offered.
verify_notes: Free admin/village boundary DBs; other products paid; maintenance window noted | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源由印度测量局（Survey of India）提供数字矢量数据库（1:1M）及 1:50k OSM 地形数据，覆盖印度全国，含行政边界、交通与水文等主题。数据以 Shapefile 与文件地理数据库（.gdb）格式，通过 Online Maps Portal 或 Nakshe 门户获取。免费矢量访问受限，1:50k OSM 全图幅 Shapefile 是其主要提供的矢量产品，使用须遵循测量局条款。
desc_en: This resource from the Survey of India offers a Digital Vector Database (1:1M) plus 1:50k OSM topographic data, covering India nationally with administrative-boundary, transportation, and hydrography themes. Data is provided as Shapefile and File Geodatabase (.gdb) via the Online Maps Portal or Nakshe portal. Free vector access is restricted, with the 1:50k OSM full-sheet Shapefile being the main vector product offered, under Survey of India terms.

name: Survey of India Downloads
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] 国家测绘机构下载页, 可能含矢量数据, 但也可能仅为软件/文档下载导航
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是印度测量局（Survey of India）的下载页面，作为国家测绘机构的资源导航入口，可能包含行政边界等矢量数据，也可能主要为软件或文档下载导航。其具体内容、格式与许可需进一步核实。建议使用前确认页面所提供的实际数据类型与授权条款，再决定是否用于分析。
desc_en: This is the downloads page of the Survey of India, India's national mapping agency, serving as a resource navigation entry point. It may contain vector data such as administrative boundaries, or may primarily provide software and documentation downloads. Its specific contents, formats, and licensing require verification. Users should confirm the actual data types and usage terms offered before relying on it for analysis.

name: Taiwan MOI 鄉鎮市區界線 / 縣市界線
provider: 內政部 / 國土測繪中心 (MOI Taiwan)
license: 政府資料開放授權條款 (Open Government Data License 1.0, ~CC-BY)
license_now: 政府資料開放授權條款-第1版 (Open Government Data License v1)
time_span: 上架日期 2015-10-07; 更新頻率 不定期更新
notes: Also accessible via maps.nlsc.gov.tw download portal; village-level (村里) is separate dataset.
verify_notes: Metadata updated Dec 2025; TWD97 coordinate system | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为台湾内政部国土测绘中心（MOI）发布的乡镇市区界线与县市界线，覆盖台湾全境。数据以 Shapefile（TWD97 经纬度）格式直接下载，2015 年上架并不定期更新，也可通过 maps.nlsc.gov.tw 门户获取。村里级边界为独立数据集。数据采用政府资料开放授权条款第 1 版，适合行政区划制图与区域分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides Taiwan's township/district and county/city boundaries published by the National Land Surveying and Mapping Center under the Ministry of the Interior (MOI), covering all of Taiwan. Offered as directly downloadable Shapefiles in TWD97 lon/lat (first listed 2015, updated irregularly), it is also available via the maps.nlsc.gov.tw portal, with village-level boundaries as a separate dataset. Released under the Open Government Data License v1, it suits administrative mapping and regional analysis.

name: TAS State Electoral Boundaries (Geoscape)
verify_notes: data.gov.au 403 to bot | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为澳大利亚塔斯马尼亚州的州选区边界，由 TasElec 与 Geoscape 提供，覆盖塔斯马尼亚州。数据提供 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage 格式，开放获取，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它作为 Geoscape 行政边界系列的一部分，适用于选举地理分析、区域规划与公共制图。
desc_en: This dataset provides Tasmania's state electoral boundaries, supplied by TasElec and Geoscape and covering the state of Tasmania. Available as Shapefile and GeoPackage with open access under a CC BY 4.0 license, it forms part of the Geoscape Administrative Boundaries series. It is suited to electoral geography analysis, regional planning, and public mapping.

name: TerraBrasilis (PRODES + Biomes vector)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
coverage: Brazil (Amazon, Cerrado, Pantanal, Caatinga, Mata Atlantica, Pampa)
doi_or_citation: Assis et al. 2019 ISPRS Int. J. Geo-Inf.
notes: Full INDE-compliant SDI; biome boundaries + yearly deforestation polygons.
verify_notes: Endpoint live but requires service=WMS/WFS&request=GetCapabilities; bare /ows returns OGC exception. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: TerraBrasilis 由巴西国家空间研究院（INPE）运营，提供 PRODES 毁林监测与生物群系矢量数据，覆盖巴西亚马逊、塞拉多、潘塔纳尔、卡廷加、大西洋森林与潘帕斯等生物群系。数据通过 WMS、WFS、WCS、CSW 等 OGC 服务提供，含生物群系边界与逐年毁林多边形。作为符合 INDE 规范的空间数据基础设施，它广泛用于亚马逊毁林监测与环境研究（Assis et al. 2019）。
desc_en: TerraBrasilis, operated by Brazil's National Institute for Space Research (INPE), provides PRODES deforestation monitoring and biome vector data covering Brazil's Amazon, Cerrado, Pantanal, Caatinga, Mata Atlantica, and Pampa biomes. Served through OGC services (WMS, WFS, WCS, CSW), it includes biome boundaries and yearly deforestation polygons. As a fully INDE-compliant spatial data infrastructure, it is widely used for Amazon deforestation monitoring and environmental research (Assis et al. 2019).

name: TIGER/Line Shapefile, 2023, Nation, U.S., International Boundaries
verify_notes: Census TIGER 2023 international boundaries | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为美国人口普查局（U.S. Census Bureau）发布的 2023 年 TIGER/Line 国际边界 Shapefile，覆盖美国与加拿大、美国与墨西哥的国界线。数据以 Shapefile 格式开放，采用 CC0 1.0 公共领域许可。作为 TIGER/Line 系列的一部分，它适合需要权威美国国界矢量的制图与空间分析应用。
desc_en: This dataset provides the U.S. Census Bureau's 2023 TIGER/Line Shapefile for international boundaries, covering the U.S.-Canada and U.S.-Mexico borders. Distributed as openly available Shapefiles under a CC0 1.0 public-domain dedication, it forms part of the TIGER/Line series. It is well suited to mapping and spatial analysis requiring authoritative U.S. international boundary vectors.

name: TIGERweb REST Services (US Census Bureau)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | POI / places | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: TIGER admin geography: states, counties, places, tracts, block groups, blocks, AIAN, school districts, voting districts
notes: Distinct from USGS govunits; TIGERweb is the canonical Census Bureau REST endpoint family.
verify_notes: Last revised 2026-01-01 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: TIGERweb REST 服务由美国人口普查局提供，覆盖美国及其属地，含行政边界、地名与人口社会经济等主题。数据通过 ArcGIS REST MapServer（JSON）与 WMS 提供，覆盖 2012 至 2026 年的多个年份。作为普查局权威的 REST 端点系列，它有别于 USGS 的 govunits，属美国公共领域，适合在线地理服务集成与动态制图。
desc_en: The TIGERweb REST Services from the U.S. Census Bureau cover the United States and its territories, spanning administrative-boundary, place, and population/socioeconomic themes. Data is delivered via ArcGIS REST MapServer (JSON) and WMS across vintages from 2012 to 2026. As the Census Bureau's canonical REST endpoint family, it is distinct from USGS govunits, sits in the U.S. public domain, and suits online geospatial service integration and dynamic mapping.

name: Township boundary data of Sanjiangyuan National Park (2015)
formats: Shapefile (with PAC codes, township & county names)
verify_notes: TPDC dataset landing; content loads via JS, WebFetch sees minimal HTML | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为三江源国家公园 2015 年乡镇边界数据，由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，覆盖三江源国家公园。数据以 Shapefile 格式提供，含行政区划代码（PAC）以及乡镇与县名称属性，注册后免费下载。它适用于公园内行政管理、生态保护规划与区域统计分析，使用须遵循 TPDC 用户协议。
desc_en: This dataset provides 2015 township boundary data for Sanjiangyuan (Three-River Source) National Park, released by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC) and covering the park. Supplied as Shapefiles with administrative codes (PAC) plus township and county name attributes, it is free to download upon registration. It supports administrative management, conservation planning, and regional statistical analysis within the park, governed by the TPDC user agreement.

name: Travel to Work Areas (TTWA) Boundaries
formats_now: PDF, SHP (Ultra Generalised/Super Generalised/Generalised/Full Extent/Full Clipped), ZIP
verify_notes: last updated 13 Jan 2017; 2001 & 2011 versions | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该数据集为英国国家统计局（ONS）发布的通勤区（Travel to Work Areas, TTWA）边界，覆盖英国全境。TTWA 是依据通勤流划定的功能性劳动力市场区域。数据提供 SHP、KML、GeoJSON 与 WFS 等多种格式，开放获取，采用开放政府许可（OGL v3.0）。它常用于劳动力市场、区域经济与通勤模式分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides the Travel to Work Areas (TTWA) boundaries published by the UK Office for National Statistics (ONS), covering the United Kingdom. TTWAs are functional labour-market areas defined from commuting flows. Offered in multiple formats including SHP, KML, GeoJSON, and WFS with open access under the Open Government Licence (OGL v3.0), it is commonly used for labour-market, regional-economy, and commuting-pattern analysis.

name: Türkiye - Subnational Administrative Boundaries (COD-AB)
notes: Heavily referenced after 2023 earthquake response
verify_notes: HDX 403 to bot UA | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 土耳其的次国家级行政边界数据集（COD-AB），由联合国人道事务协调厅（OCHA）联合土耳其统计局（TUIK）发布于 HDX 平台，覆盖 admin 0 至 admin 2 三级行政区划。数据采用开放许可，提供 Shapefile、EMF 及地理数据库等格式。作为联合国人道响应中的通用操作数据集（COD），它在 2023 年土耳其大地震救援中被广泛引用，是人道、统计与制图分析的权威基础边界。
desc_en: This dataset provides Türkiye's subnational administrative boundaries (a Common Operational Dataset, COD-AB) published on HDX by OCHA together with the Turkish statistical office TUIK, covering administrative levels 0 through 2. Released under an open licence, it is distributed as Shapefile, EMF and geodatabase formats. As an authoritative humanitarian reference layer, it was heavily referenced during the 2023 earthquake response and is widely used for humanitarian operations, statistical aggregation and mapping across Turkey.

name: U.S. Census TIGER/Line & Cartographic Boundary (Tracts, BGs, Blocks)
provider: U.S. Census Bureau via data.gov CKAN
coverage: USA tracts, block groups, blocks, ZCTAs, places
notes: Authoritative US statistical geography
verify_notes: Census TIGER/Line; updated 2025-10 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国人口普查局发布的 TIGER/Line 及制图边界文件，涵盖人口普查区（tract）、街区组（block group）、街区（block）、ZCTA 邮编区及地名等统计地理单元，通过 data.gov 的 CKAN 目录发布。数据采用 CC0 1.0 公共领域许可，提供 Shapefile、KML、GDB 格式，并可经 TIGERweb 的 REST/WFS/WMS 服务在线访问。每个普查区目标人口约 4000（范围 1200–8000），是美国官方统计地理的权威来源，广泛用于人口、社会经济与空间分析。
desc_en: The U.S. Census Bureau's TIGER/Line and Cartographic Boundary files provide statistical geography for the United States, including census tracts, block groups, blocks, ZCTAs and places, distributed via the data.gov CKAN catalog. Released under CC0 1.0 (public domain), they are available as Shapefile, KML and GDB and also served through TIGERweb REST/WFS/WMS. Tracts target roughly 4,000 people (1,200–8,000), making this the authoritative basis for U.S. demographic, socioeconomic and spatial analysis.

name: UK Indices of Multiple Deprivation (IMD) - LSOA boundaries + scores
notes: GeoDS re-publishes all four nations harmonised; canonical small-area deprivation dataset.
verify_notes: Last updated 2025-06-05 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国多重剥夺指数（IMD）数据集，由社区与地方政府部（MHCLG）相关机构产出、并经地理数据服务（GeoDS）统一再发布，将英格兰、威尔士、苏格兰和北爱尔兰四地的小区（LSOA）边界与剥夺评分相结合。覆盖年份约 2000–2020（英格兰含 2015、2019 等多个版本，苏格兰为 2004–2020）。数据采用英国开放政府许可（OGL），提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON 和 CSV 格式，是研究小区域社会经济剥夺的权威基准数据。
desc_en: The UK Indices of Multiple Deprivation (IMD) dataset pairs small-area (LSOA) boundaries with deprivation scores, originating from MHCLG and re-published in harmonised form across all four UK nations by the Geographic Data Service (GeoDS). It spans roughly 2000–2020 (England editions including 2015 and 2019; Scotland 2004–2020). Released under the UK Open Government Licence and provided as Shapefile, GeoJSON and CSV, it is the canonical reference for small-area deprivation analysis in the United Kingdom.

name: UN Clear Map / UN Geoportal services
formats: Vector tiles, WMS/WFS, Shapefile via ArcGIS portal
notes: ArcGIS-based portal hosting UN Clear Map and operational layers.
verify_notes: UN Geoportal SPA; content loads via JS, WebFetch sees empty | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国地理信息门户（UN Geoportal），由联合国地理空间信息部门与 UN Open GIS 倡议运营，基于 ArcGIS 平台托管联合国 Clear Map 及各类业务图层。覆盖全球范围，主要聚焦行政边界等主题，提供矢量瓦片、WMS/WFS 服务以及经 ArcGIS 门户下载的 Shapefile。数据遵循联合国使用条款，是获取联合国官方制图与边界图层的入口门户。
desc_en: The UN Geoportal, operated by the UN Geospatial Information Section and the UN Open GIS initiative, is an ArcGIS-based platform hosting UN Clear Map and a range of operational layers with global coverage focused on administrative boundaries. It offers vector tiles, WMS/WFS services and Shapefile downloads via the ArcGIS portal. Governed by UN terms of use, it serves as the entry point for accessing the UN's official cartography and boundary layers.

name: UN Clear Map / UNmap (UN GeoPortal)
theme_raw: International + administrative boundaries, populated places, transport
formats: Shapefile, FGDB, vector tile services, WMS
access: Open via ArcGIS portal; some via gis@un.org
notes: Authoritative UN boundary depiction; often required for UN deliverables
verify_notes: UN GeoPortal group page; minimal content extracted but URL resolves | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国 Clear Map / UNmap，由联合国制图科（DOS）通过 UN GeoPortal 提供，是联合国官方、政治中立的全球边界描绘，常被指定用于联合国交付成果。覆盖全球，包含行政边界、地名/兴趣点及交通等要素，提供 Shapefile、FGDB、矢量瓦片服务及 WMS。数据采用联合国条款（非商业用途），可经 ArcGIS 门户开放获取，部分需通过 gis@un.org 申请。
desc_en: UN Clear Map / UNmap, provided by the UN Cartographic Section (DOS) through the UN GeoPortal, is the United Nations' authoritative and politically neutral global boundary depiction, often required for UN deliverables. With global coverage, it includes administrative boundaries, places/POI and transportation, distributed as Shapefile, FGDB, vector tile services and WMS. Released under UN non-commercial terms, it is openly accessible via the ArcGIS portal, with some layers available on request through gis@un.org.

name: UN Geo Hub (UNGIS)
notes: UN-GIS flagship hub; PMTiles/vector tiles widely used; aggregates datasets across UN system
verify_notes: UN GeoHub landing reachable; fetch content minimal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国 Geo Hub（UN-GIS），由联合国地理空间信息科运营，是 UN-GIS 的旗舰数据中心，汇聚联合国系统各机构的全球地理空间数据集，主题涵盖行政边界与人道/冲突等。提供 GeoJSON、矢量瓦片、PMTiles 及 WMS 等格式，其中 PMTiles 与矢量瓦片被广泛采用。数据许可各异，多数采用 CC-BY 4.0，支持开放的网页下载访问。
desc_en: The UN Geo Hub (UN-GIS), run by the UN Geospatial Information Section, is the UN-GIS flagship hub that aggregates global geospatial datasets from across the UN system, spanning administrative boundaries and humanitarian/conflict themes. It serves data as GeoJSON, vector tiles, PMTiles and WMS, with its PMTiles and vector tile offerings widely adopted. Licensing varies, with many layers under CC-BY 4.0, and content is openly available via web download.

name: UN Geospatial BNDA (simplified, current)
notes: Underused dataset; the canonical UN reference for disputed-area neutral boundaries.
verify_notes: UN intellectual property; revocable license | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国地理空间 BNDA（简化版，当前）数据集，提供联合国官方的全球行政边界，并以政治中立方式处理争议地区，是争议边界的权威参考。该版本以 Earth Engine FeatureCollection 形式提供，便于在遥感与云端分析工作流中调用。数据采用联合国 Geodata 许可（非商业用途、需署名）。它是一个常被低估但具权威性的中立边界来源。
desc_en: The UN Geospatial BNDA (simplified, current) dataset provides the United Nations' official global administrative boundaries with neutral treatment of disputed areas, making it the canonical reference for politically sensitive boundaries. Distributed as an Earth Engine FeatureCollection, it integrates easily into remote-sensing and cloud analysis workflows. It is released under UN Geodata terms (non-commercial, attribution required) and remains an underused yet authoritative source for neutral boundary depiction.

name: UN Geospatial — General Maps (country boundaries, world map)
notes: Official UN world map; includes country boundaries used in UN cartography.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国地理空间信息科发布的通用地图（General Maps），包括官方世界地图与国家边界，是联合国制图所采用的权威全球底图。覆盖全球，聚焦行政边界主题，提供 Shapefile、KML 及网络服务等格式。数据在联合国地图使用许可条款下开放获取，常用于符合联合国官方边界描绘要求的制图与可视化场景。
desc_en: The UN Geospatial Information Section's General Maps provide the official UN world map and country boundaries that underpin United Nations cartography, with global coverage focused on administrative boundaries. They are available as Shapefile, KML and web services, openly accessible under UN map permission terms. This is the authoritative base reference for producing maps and visualisations that must conform to the UN's official boundary depiction.

name: UNEP Environmental Data Explorer — geospatial layers
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Hydrography | Land cover & land use
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geodata.grid.unep.ch/))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geodata.grid.unep.ch/))
notes: 500+ environmental variables including vector boundaries (watersheds, dams, protected areas).
verify_notes: Connection refused - server appears down | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geodata.grid.unep.ch/))
desc_zh: 联合国环境规划署环境数据浏览器（UNEP/GRID）的地理空间图层，提供全球范围的环境变量数据，涵盖行政边界、水文与土地覆盖/利用等主题。数据集包含 500 多个环境变量，其中也包括流域、水坝、保护区等矢量边界图层，提供 Shapefile、GeoTIFF 及 KML 格式。数据在 UNEP 条款下开放获取，适合全球环境综合分析。
desc_en: The UNEP Environmental Data Explorer (UNEP/GRID) offers global geospatial layers covering administrative boundaries, hydrography and land cover/land use. The collection comprises over 500 environmental variables, including vector boundary layers such as watersheds, dams and protected areas, distributed as Shapefile, GeoTIFF and KML. Released openly under UNEP terms, it supports integrated global environmental analysis across many thematic domains.

name: UNESCO Sites Navigator (World Heritage / Biosphere / Geoparks)
theme_raw: World Heritage core + buffer zones; Biosphere Reserves; Global Geoparks
notes: Replaces previous WHC GIS pages; only authoritative source for georeferenced WH boundaries
verify_notes: WebFetch returned 403 on both attempts; likely bot-protection, page itself may be live in browser | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国教科文组织 Sites Navigator，由世界遗产中心提供，覆盖世界遗产、生物圈保护区及世界地质公园的地理信息，是获取这些遗址地理参考边界的权威来源。它取代了此前的 WHC GIS 页面，按遗址提供 Shapefile、KML 和 GeoJSON 下载。数据遵循教科文组织条款并需署名，覆盖全球，适用于遗产保护、规划与制图。
desc_en: UNESCO's Sites Navigator, provided by the World Heritage Centre, delivers geospatial information for World Heritage sites, Biosphere Reserves and UNESCO Global Geoparks, and is the authoritative source for their georeferenced boundaries. Replacing the previous WHC GIS pages, it offers per-site downloads in Shapefile, KML and GeoJSON. Governed by UNESCO terms with attribution required, it provides global coverage for heritage conservation, planning and mapping applications.

name: URA Master Plan 2019 Subzone Boundary (No Sea) — GeoJSON
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
notes: De-facto base layer for any Singapore urban analytics; pair with Planning Area & Region layers.
verify_notes: URA Master Plan 2019 subzone; last updated Dec 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 新加坡市区重建局（URA）2019 总体规划分区边界（无海域版）GeoJSON 数据，通过 data.gov.sg 发布，覆盖新加坡全境的规划分区（subzone）。文件约 3 MB，提供 GeoJSON（另有 KML 版本），采用新加坡开放数据许可，免费获取。它是新加坡城市分析的事实标准基础图层，通常与规划区（Planning Area）和大区（Region）图层配合使用。
desc_en: This dataset provides Singapore's URA Master Plan 2019 Subzone boundaries (no-sea variant) in GeoJSON, published by the Urban Redevelopment Authority via data.gov.sg and covering all planning subzones across Singapore. The roughly 3 MB file is offered as GeoJSON (with a KML variant) under the Singapore Open Data Licence and is free to access. It serves as the de-facto base layer for Singapore urban analytics and is typically paired with the Planning Area and Region layers.

name: US Cadastre Data Theme (NGDA)
notes: Vector parcel theme catalog
verify_notes: FGDC API endpoint returns 404 | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 美国地籍数据主题（NGDA Cadastre），由美国联邦地理数据委员会（FGDC）提供，是国家地理空间数据资产中的矢量宗地（parcel）主题目录，覆盖美国全境。数据属于美国公共领域，提供 GeoJSON、Esri 及 Shapefile 等格式，开放获取。它面向土地权属、地籍与产权相关的空间分析与数据发现。
desc_en: The US Cadastre Data Theme (NGDA), provided by the Federal Geographic Data Committee, is a catalog of the vector parcel theme within the National Geospatial Data Asset framework, with nationwide coverage of the United States. As US public domain data, it is available in GeoJSON, Esri and Shapefile formats and openly accessible. It supports discovery and spatial analysis related to land ownership, cadastre and property records.

name: US Census Metropolitan/Micropolitan Statistical Areas (CBSA) boundaries
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Buildings & addresses | Population & socioeconomic
notes: Used in the paper for metropolitan/micropolitan stratification of classified buildings.
verify_notes: Vintage 2025 dataset 2020-2025 available | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 美国人口普查局发布的都市/小都市统计区（CBSA）边界数据，依据管理与预算办公室（OMB）的界定，覆盖全美所有 CBSA。数据属于美国政府公共领域，通过 TIGER/制图边界文件以 Shapefile 提供，开放获取，本数据为 2025 版本。它常用于按都市/小都市层级对建筑或人口要素进行分层与统计分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides the U.S. Census Bureau's Metropolitan and Micropolitan Statistical Area (CBSA) boundaries, based on OMB delineations and covering all CBSAs nationwide. As US Government public domain data, it is distributed as Shapefile via TIGER/Cartographic Boundary Files and is openly accessible, in a 2025 edition. It is commonly used for metropolitan/micropolitan stratification of population, building and other socioeconomic features.

name: US Census TIGER 2020 (Blocks, Tracts, Counties, Roads)
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国人口普查局 TIGER 2020 数据，包含街区（blocks）、普查区（tracts）、县（counties）及道路等要素，覆盖美国 2020 年地理。数据通过 Google Earth Engine 以 FeatureCollection 形式提供，也有 Shapefile 格式，遵循人口普查局条款。它是美国 2020 普查地理与人口、社会经济及交通分析的核心矢量基础。
desc_en: The US Census TIGER 2020 dataset includes blocks, tracts, counties and roads, covering U.S. geography as of 2020. It is available as a Google Earth Engine FeatureCollection as well as Shapefile, under U.S. Census Bureau terms. As a core vector foundation for the 2020 census geography, it supports demographic, socioeconomic and transportation analysis across the United States.

name: US Department of State – Large Scale International Boundaries (LSIB) via GeoNode
provider: US DoS Office of the Geographer
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geonode.state.gov/))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geonode.state.gov/))
notes: Diplomatic reference boundaries; differs from GADM/geoBoundaries on disputes.
verify_notes: Connection refused; site may be down or blocking | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geonode.state.gov/))
desc_zh: 美国国务院地理学家办公室的大比例尺国际边界数据（LSIB），通过 GeoNode 平台发布，是美国外交参考的全球边界数据。覆盖全球，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 KML（经 GeoNode WFS），可浏览、按 WFS 服务或直接下载获取。数据属于美国政府公共领域。值得注意的是，LSIB 在争议地区的边界描绘与 GADM、geoBoundaries 等数据集存在差异。
desc_en: The US Department of State's Large Scale International Boundaries (LSIB), from the Office of the Geographer and published via GeoNode, are the U.S. diplomatic reference boundaries with global coverage. They are available as Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML through GeoNode WFS, accessible via browse, WFS or direct download, and are US Government public domain. Notably, LSIB's depiction of disputed areas differs from datasets such as GADM and geoBoundaries.

name: USA Census Block Group Boundaries (ArcGIS Hub)
provider: Esri / U.S. Census Bureau via ArcGIS Hub
coverage: USA block groups with 2020 census population attributes
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub item reachable; content minimal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国人口普查局街区组（Block Group）边界数据，由 Esri 通过 ArcGIS Hub 发布，并附带 2020 年普查人口属性，覆盖全美街区组。数据属于人口普查公共领域，提供要素服务（Feature Service）、GeoJSON 及 Shapefile，可通过 ArcGIS Hub 条目与要素服务访问。它适用于人口与社会经济空间分析及小区域统计制图。
desc_en: This dataset provides U.S. Census block group boundaries with 2020 census population attributes, published by Esri via ArcGIS Hub and covering block groups nationwide. As Census public domain data, it is offered as a Feature Service, GeoJSON and Shapefile, accessible through the ArcGIS Hub item and Feature Service. It supports demographic and socioeconomic spatial analysis and small-area statistical mapping.

name: USDA Forest Service FSGeodata Clearinghouse
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: 国家森林边界、火情、林业管理
notes: 权威美国林业矢量
verify_notes: USDA FS FSGeodata Clearinghouse; shapefiles not available for all datasets | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国农业部林务局 FSGeodata Clearinghouse，提供美国全境的林业相关地理空间数据，涵盖行政边界与土地覆盖/利用等主题。数据属于公共领域，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、WFS 及 REST 服务，可下载或经网络服务访问。它是美国国有林、林务局辖区与林业要素的权威矢量来源。
desc_en: The USDA Forest Service FSGeodata Clearinghouse provides forestry-related geospatial data for the entire United States, covering administrative boundaries and land cover/land use themes. As public domain data, it is distributed as Shapefile, GeoJSON, WFS and REST services, available by download or web service. It is the authoritative vector source for national forests, Forest Service administrative units and related forestry features in the U.S.

name: USDA NASS Cropland Data Layer (CDL) — boundary/vector layers
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use
formats: Raster GeoTIFF + vector shapefile (county/ASD/state/region boundary layers per state)
formats_now: Raster (10m + 30m); separate Crop Sequence Boundaries product (vector)
notes: Although primary product is raster, NASS now ships per-state vector shapefile alongside; CropScape API at nassgeodata.gmu.edu.
verify_notes: 2025 National CDL released; vector boundaries are a distinct product | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国农业部 NASS 农田数据图层（CDL）的边界/矢量配套图层，覆盖美国本土（CONUS）。CDL 主产品为 10 米分辨率作物分类栅格（2025 全国 CDL 约 9.8 GB，序列覆盖 2008–2025），但 NASS 现也按州提供县/农业统计区/州/区域边界的矢量 Shapefile。数据为美国政府公共领域，可直接下载，并可通过 CropScape API（nassgeodata.gmu.edu）访问。
desc_en: This is the boundary/vector companion to the USDA NASS Cropland Data Layer (CDL), covering the conterminous United States. While the primary CDL product is a 10 m crop-classification raster (the 2025 national CDL is about 9.8 GB, with a 2008–2025 series), NASS now also ships per-state vector shapefiles for county, ASD, state and region boundaries. The data is US Government public domain, available by direct download and through the CropScape API at nassgeodata.gmu.edu.

name: USGS National Hydrologic Geospatial Fabric (NHGF) via Fabric pygeoapi
theme_raw: rivers, catchments, waterbodies, HUC boundaries, reference gages
formats: OGC API Features (GeoJSON), Mapbox Vector Tiles
notes: 31 vector feature collections: NHDPlusV2 flowlines/waterbodies/catchments/areas, Gages-II reference gages + basins, HUC02-12 boundaries (NHDPlusV2, NHDPlusHR, WBD 2020, WBD 2025). Modern OGC API endpoint; replaces legacy WFS workflows.
verify_notes: OGC API Features service operational | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局国家水文地理框架（NHGF），通过 Fabric pygeoapi 端点提供，覆盖美国本土及属地。它包含 31 个矢量要素集合，如 NHDPlusV2 河流线/水体/汇水区、Gages-II 参考水文站及流域、以及 HUC02–12 流域边界（含 WBD 2020/2025 等多版本）。数据采用 CC0 1.0 公共领域许可，通过现代化的 OGC API Features（GeoJSON）与 Mapbox 矢量瓦片提供，取代了传统 WFS 工作流。
desc_en: The USGS National Hydrologic Geospatial Fabric (NHGF), served via the Fabric pygeoapi endpoint, covers the conterminous United States plus territories. It comprises 31 vector feature collections, including NHDPlusV2 flowlines, waterbodies and catchments, Gages-II reference gages and basins, and HUC02–12 boundaries (with WBD 2020 and 2025 editions). Released as CC0 1.0 (public domain), it is delivered through a modern OGC API Features (GeoJSON) interface and Mapbox Vector Tiles, replacing legacy WFS workflows.

name: USGS National Map - Governmental Units
notes: States, counties, congressional districts, places
verify_notes: active ArcGIS REST service | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局 National Map 的政府单元（Governmental Units）服务，覆盖美国全境，提供州、县、国会选区及地名等行政与地名要素。数据属于美国公共领域，通过 ArcGIS FeatureServer/MapServer 服务提供，也可经 The National Map（TNM）下载 Shapefile。它是美国官方民政边界的权威在线来源。
desc_en: The USGS National Map Governmental Units service covers the entire United States, providing administrative and place features including states, counties, congressional districts and populated places. As US public domain data, it is delivered through ArcGIS FeatureServer/MapServer services, with Shapefile downloads available via The National Map (TNM). It is an authoritative online source for official U.S. civil boundaries.

name: USGS National Map Governmental Unit Boundaries (govunits) WFS/MapServer
provider: U.S. Geological Survey (USGS) - The National Map
theme_raw: administrative boundaries (state, county, federal, Native American, congressional districts, MCDs, incorporated/unincorporated places)
formats: WFS GML / ArcGIS REST JSON / Shapefile / FileGDB via TNM download
notes: Multiple parallel endpoints exist (services.nationalmap.gov, cartowfs.nationalmap.gov). Authoritative US civil boundaries.
verify_notes: USGS ArcGIS REST 端点返回 403 (可能 UA/参数过滤); 实际服务通常仍存在, 需在浏览器或带参访问 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局 The National Map 的政府单元边界（govunits）服务，提供 WFS/MapServer 端点，覆盖美国全境的官方民政边界。数据属于美国联邦公共领域，提供 WFS GML、ArcGIS REST JSON，以及经 TNM 下载的 Shapefile 与 FileGDB。需注意存在多个并行端点（如 services.nationalmap.gov 与 cartowfs.nationalmap.gov），均为权威美国民政边界来源。
desc_en: The USGS The National Map Governmental Unit Boundaries (govunits) service offers WFS/MapServer endpoints with nationwide coverage of official U.S. civil boundaries. As US federal public domain data, it is available as WFS GML, ArcGIS REST JSON, and Shapefile/FileGDB via TNM download. Note that multiple parallel endpoints exist (such as services.nationalmap.gov and cartowfs.nationalmap.gov), all serving as authoritative sources for U.S. civil boundaries.

name: USGS Polygons of Global Undersea Features (OFR 2014-1040)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Geology, soil & geomorphology | Marine & coastal
theme_raw: polygon boundaries of undersea features for geographic searches
notes: Companion polygon layer for the GEBCO gazetteer features; great for ocean basin / submarine geomorphology bounding.
verify_notes: 311 polygon features; primary distribution at pubs.usgs.gov/of/2014/1040/ | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局《全球海底地物多边形》数据集（OFR 2014-1040，Harris 等），以 Shapefile 形式提供全球 311 个海底地物多边形，是 GEBCO 地名词典海底地物的配套面状图层。数据属于美国公共领域，可直接下载。它非常适合用于洋盆、海底地貌的范围界定与海洋地质/地貌分析。
desc_en: The USGS Polygons of Global Undersea Features (OFR 2014-1040, Harris et al.) provides 311 polygons of seafloor features worldwide as Shapefile, serving as the companion polygon layer to the GEBCO gazetteer of undersea features. As US public domain data, it is available by direct download. It is well suited to delineating ocean basins and submarine geomorphology and to marine geological and geomorphic analysis.

name: USGS The National Map – WFS Services
theme_raw: 水文 NHD、行政区划、地名、交通、结构物
formats_now: DEM, vector GIS, NAIP imagery, topo maps
access: OGC WFS 端点 + 批量下载
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: 含 cartowfs.nationalmap.gov 与 hydro.nationalmap.gov WFS 端点
verify_notes: TNM Downloader, Bulk Download Manager, TNM Access API | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局 The National Map 的 WFS 服务集合，覆盖美国全境，涵盖行政边界、交通与水文等主题。数据属于公共领域，提供 WFS、WMS、Shapefile 及 FileGDB，可通过 OGC WFS 端点（含 cartowfs.nationalmap.gov 与 hydro.nationalmap.gov）或批量下载获取。它是美国官方多主题地理空间数据的权威访问入口。
desc_en: The USGS The National Map WFS services provide nationwide U.S. coverage across administrative boundaries, transportation and hydrography. As public domain data, they are available as WFS, WMS, Shapefile and FileGDB, accessible through OGC WFS endpoints (including cartowfs.nationalmap.gov and hydro.nationalmap.gov) or bulk download. They form an authoritative access point to official multi-theme U.S. geospatial data.

name: Venezuela Administrative Boundaries adm3 (ven_admbnda_adm3_20180502)
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout; WFP geonode same as above. | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 委内瑞拉第三级行政边界数据（ven_admbnda_adm3_20180502），由世界粮食计划署（WFP）/联合国委内瑞拉团队通过 WFP GeoNode 发布，覆盖委内瑞拉的 admin 3 级行政区划。数据提供 Shapefile 与 WFS 服务，遵循联合国/WFP 使用条款，开放获取，适用于人道与统计层面的空间分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides Venezuela's administrative level 3 boundaries (ven_admbnda_adm3_20180502), published by WFP / UN Venezuela through the WFP GeoNode and covering the country's admin 3 divisions. It is available as Shapefile and via WFS under UN/WFP terms of use and is openly accessible. It supports humanitarian and statistical spatial analysis at the subnational level in Venezuela.

name: Wake County Open Data
notes: Cited county-level example in search results
verify_notes: Wake County NC open data portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国北卡罗来纳州威克县（Wake County）开放数据门户，基于 ArcGIS 平台，覆盖该县范围，涵盖行政边界、建筑与地址、交通等主题。数据采用开放许可，提供 Shapefile、KML 及 GeoJSON 格式，可直接下载。它是县级开放地理数据的典型示例，适用于本地规划、地址与基础设施分析。
desc_en: Wake County Open Data is the ArcGIS-based open data portal for Wake County, North Carolina, covering the county and spanning administrative boundaries, buildings and addresses, and transportation. Released under an open licence, it provides Shapefile, KML and GeoJSON for direct download. It serves as a representative county-level open geospatial data source, useful for local planning, addressing and infrastructure analysis.

name: Watershed Boundary Dataset (WBD) & NHD
theme_raw: 美国流域 + 河流网络
license_now: US public domain (federal data); managed under FGDC/NGDA
formats_now: NHD (retired 2023-10-01), WBD, NHDPlus HR; 现主推 3D Hydrography Program (3DHP)

verify_notes: NHD 已于 2023-10-01 退役, 数据仍可下载; 新一代 3DHP 接替 | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局的流域边界数据集（WBD）与国家水文数据集（NHD），覆盖美国及其属地，是美国官方的水文与流域边界数据。数据属于美国联邦公共领域，在 FGDC/NGDA 框架下管理，提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage 与 File GDB 格式，可直接下载。新一代的 3D 水文产品（3DHP）正逐步成为其后续版本。
desc_en: The USGS Watershed Boundary Dataset (WBD) and National Hydrography Dataset (NHD) cover the United States and its territories, providing the nation's official hydrography and watershed boundaries. As US federal public domain data managed under the FGDC/NGDA framework, they are available as Shapefile, GeoPackage and File GDB by direct download. The newer 3D Hydrography Program (3DHP) is emerging as their successor.

name: WFP HDX vector dataset collection
theme_raw: Admin boundaries, logistics, market locations, food security operational layers
license: CC BY-IGO / HDX terms (varies per dataset)
notes: 446+ WFP datasets; complementary mirror of many GeoNode layers.
verify_notes: HDX returned 403 to WebFetch; site is alive but blocks bot | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 世界粮食计划署（WFP）在联合国人道数据交换平台（HDX）上的矢量数据集合，按国家提供全球范围的数据，主题以行政边界为主。该集合包含 446 个以上 WFP 数据集，是其多个 GeoNode 图层的互补镜像。提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GeoPackage 及带坐标的 CSV 格式，通过 HDX 下载 API 访问，许可因数据集而异（如 CC BY-IGO 等 HDX 条款）。
desc_en: This is WFP's vector dataset collection on the UN OCHA Humanitarian Data Exchange (HDX), offered per country with global coverage and focused primarily on administrative boundaries. Comprising over 446 WFP datasets, it acts as a complementary mirror of many GeoNode layers. It is available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage and CSV-with-coordinates via the HDX download API, with licensing varying per dataset (such as CC BY-IGO and other HDX terms).

name: WFP Regional Bureau Revised ADM2 (rbd_bnd_adm2_gaul_revised)
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout; WFP geonode may be slow or migrated. | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: WFP 区域局修订版 ADM2 边界数据（rbd_bnd_adm2_gaul_revised），由 WFP EME GIS 团队基于 GAUL 修订而成，覆盖全球第二级行政区划。数据通过 WFP GeoNode 开放提供，格式为 Shapefile 与 WFS 服务，遵循 WFP 使用条款，适用于人道运营与跨国统计分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides WFP's Regional Bureau revised ADM2 boundaries (rbd_bnd_adm2_gaul_revised), produced by WFP EME GIS as a revision of the GAUL boundaries with global coverage of second-level administrative divisions. It is openly available through the WFP GeoNode as Shapefile and via WFS under WFP terms of use, supporting humanitarian operations and cross-country statistical analysis.

name: WHO Global Health Observatory — boundaries and health geodata
license_now: WHO Terms of Use; permissions required
notes: WHO boundary shapefiles used in disease mapping.
verify_notes: GHO operational; APIs do not include COVID-19 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界卫生组织全球卫生观察站（GHO）提供的边界与卫生地理数据，覆盖全球，主题涵盖行政边界与公共服务。数据提供 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON（经 API），其中 WHO 边界 Shapefile 常用于疾病制图与卫生指标的空间分析。数据遵循 WHO 使用条款，部分用途需申请许可。
desc_en: The WHO Global Health Observatory (GHO) provides boundaries and health geodata with global coverage, spanning administrative boundaries and public services. Data is available as Shapefile and GeoJSON via API, with WHO boundary shapefiles commonly used in disease mapping and spatial analysis of health indicators. It is governed by WHO Terms of Use, with permissions required for some applications.

name: Wisconsin Data Files (Harvard EDA) - Precinct Shapefiles with 2002-2008 Election Results
notes: Ward-level boundaries joined with returns
verify_notes: DOI resolves to Harvard Dataverse; SPA blocks WebFetch content extraction | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 威斯康星州数据文件（哈佛选举数据档案库，Dataverse），将选区（ward/precinct）边界与 2002–2008 年选举结果相结合，覆盖美国威斯康星州。数据以 Shapefile 形式通过 Harvard Dataverse 提供并附 DOI（10.7910/DVN/6G4HOS），遵循 Dataverse 使用条款。它将选区级边界与选票结果连接，适用于选举地理与政治分析研究。
desc_en: The Wisconsin Data Files from the Harvard Election Data Archive (Dataverse) join ward/precinct boundaries with 2002–2008 election results, covering the state of Wisconsin, USA. Distributed as Shapefile via Harvard Dataverse with a DOI (10.7910/DVN/6G4HOS) under Dataverse terms, it links ward-level boundaries with electoral returns. It is well suited to electoral-geography and political-science research.

name: WOF admin per-country repos (e.g. -mx, -ua, -ee, -my, -ps)
notes: Legacy per-country split (whosonfirst-data-admin-{cc}) — still referenced for diff/audit; rare countries (Palestine PS, Estonia EE, Malaysia MY, Ukraine UA) maintained here.
verify_notes: 86 commits; light maintenance; admin places for Mexico | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Who's On First（WOF）的按国家行政数据仓库（如 -mx、-ua、-ee、-my、-ps），采用历史遗留的按国家拆分方式，以 GeoJSON 包形式通过 GitHub 提供。数据遵循 WOF 许可。这些仓库虽属旧版拆分，仍被用于差异比对与审计，部分较少见的国家（如巴勒斯坦 PS、爱沙尼亚 EE、马来西亚 MY、乌克兰 UA）仍在此维护。
desc_en: These are Who's On First (WOF) per-country admin data repositories (such as -mx, -ua, -ee, -my, -ps), using the legacy per-country split and distributed as GeoJSON bundles on GitHub under the WOF license. Although a legacy arrangement, they are still referenced for diffing and auditing, and several less-common countries (Palestine PS, Estonia EE, Malaysia MY, Ukraine UA) continue to be maintained here.

name: WOF Combined SQLite distributions (admin / postcode / constituency)
notes: Recommended modern entry point; replaces legacy mapzen S3 dumps.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Who's On First（WOF）的合并 SQLite 发行版，由 Geocode Earth 提供，涵盖行政区划、邮编及选区等全球数据。数据以 SQLite（.db.bz2）及 GeoJSON 包形式通过 HTTPS 直接下载，遵循 Who's On First 许可。它是当前推荐的 WOF 数据入口，取代了已弃用的 Mapzen S3 转储。
desc_en: The WOF Combined SQLite distributions, provided by Geocode Earth, bundle global Who's On First data spanning admin, postcode and constituency placetypes. They are available as SQLite (.db.bz2) and GeoJSON bundles via HTTPS direct download under the Who's On First License. This is the recommended modern entry point for WOF data, replacing the legacy Mapzen S3 dumps.

name: WOF Shapefile distributions (per-country admin)
notes: Shapefile builds with denormalized name/placetype/hierarchy fields — easier for GIS tools than raw GeoJSON.
verify_notes: admin, postalcode, constituency bundles | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Who's On First（WOF）的 Shapefile 发行版，由 WOF / Geocode Earth 提供，按国家覆盖全球行政区划与地名/兴趣点。数据以 Shapefile 形式通过 HTTPS 提供，并对名称、地物类型与层级等字段进行了去规范化（denormalized）处理。相比原始 GeoJSON，这种带扁平化属性的 Shapefile 构建更便于在常规 GIS 工具中使用，遵循 WOF 许可。
desc_en: The WOF Shapefile distributions, from Who's On First / Geocode Earth, cover global administrative divisions and places per country. Delivered as Shapefile over HTTPS, they include denormalized name, placetype and hierarchy fields. Compared to raw GeoJSON, these Shapefile builds with flattened attributes are easier to use in standard GIS tools, and they are released under the WOF license.

name: World Bank Global Administrative Divisions (Earth Engine community catalog mirror)
provider: World Bank, mirrored to Google Earth Engine community catalog
formats: Earth Engine FeatureCollection (vector), exportable to shapefile/GeoJSON
notes: Convenient ingestion path for remote-sensing workflows that need WB boundaries as vector features
verify_notes: WB Official Boundaries; updated Nov 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界银行全球行政区划（WB-GAD），镜像至 Google Earth Engine 社区目录，覆盖全球 admin 0/1/2 三级行政边界。数据以 Earth Engine FeatureCollection 形式提供，可导出为 Shapefile 或 GeoJSON，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，通过 GEE 资产路径开放访问。它为需要世界银行边界作为矢量要素的遥感工作流提供了便捷的接入路径。
desc_en: The World Bank Global Administrative Divisions (WB-GAD), mirrored to the Google Earth Engine community catalog, cover global administrative boundaries at levels 0, 1 and 2. Provided as an Earth Engine FeatureCollection exportable to Shapefile or GeoJSON, it is released under CC BY 4.0 and openly accessible via a GEE asset path. It offers a convenient ingestion route for remote-sensing workflows that need World Bank boundaries as vector features.

name: World Bank Global Administrative Divisions (WB-GAD on Source Cooperative)
provider: World Bank, redistributed by Source Cooperative / GeographyIS
access: Cloud-optimized open access via Source Cooperative S3
notes: Cloud-native redistribution of the WB high-resolution boundaries for analytics workflows
verify_notes: WB GAD admin0/1/2 + ocean mask; last updated Dec 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界银行全球行政区划（WB-GAD），由 Source Cooperative / GeographyIS 再分发，覆盖全球 admin 0/1/2 三级行政边界。该版本以云原生格式 GeoParquet 与 FlatGeobuf 提供（也可转换为 Shapefile/GeoJSON），采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，通过 Source Cooperative 的 S3 云优化方式开放访问。它面向需要世界银行高分辨率边界的分析工作流。
desc_en: The World Bank Global Administrative Divisions (WB-GAD), redistributed by Source Cooperative / GeographyIS, cover global administrative boundaries at levels 0, 1 and 2. This cloud-native redistribution provides GeoParquet and FlatGeobuf (convertible to Shapefile/GeoJSON), released under CC BY 4.0 and openly accessible via Source Cooperative's cloud-optimized S3. It targets analytics workflows that need the World Bank's high-resolution boundaries.

name: World Bank Global Subnational Atlas of Poverty (GSAP) Boundaries
formats: Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON (boundaries distributed alongside the atlas / via World Bank Official Boundaries)
notes: Lined-up subnational poverty estimates joined to admin1 polygons; geometries align with WB Official Boundaries.
verify_notes: Public access; last updated 2025-10-15; covers 168+ economies | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界银行全球次国家贫困地图集（GSAP）边界数据，将
desc_en: The World Bank Global Subnational Atlas of Poverty (GSAP) boundary dataset joins lined-up subnational poverty estimates to admin level-1 polygons across more than 168 economies, with estimates for years such as 2010, 2019, 2021 and 2023. Geometries align with the World Bank's Official Boundaries, enabling cross-country comparable poverty mapping. Distributed in Shapefile, GeoPackage and GeoJSON formats under a CC-BY-4.0 license, it is openly available and well suited to poverty analysis, regional development and anti-poverty policy research.

name: World Boundaries and Places
notes: Reference layer of boundaries and populated places
verify_notes: page loads, JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Esri Living Atlas 发布的
desc_en: World Boundaries and Places, published by Esri Living Atlas, is a global reference layer combining administrative boundaries with populated places. It is delivered as vector tiles and a FeatureServer, intended primarily as cartographic reference and basemap overlay content for web maps and GIS applications. It lets users quickly display country and regional boundaries together with key place names. Use is governed by Esri's terms of service.

name: World Countries Generalized (Esri)
notes: Generalized country polygons; widely used reference layer
verify_notes: page loads, JS-rendered details not in snippet | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Esri Living Atlas 的
desc_en: World Countries Generalized, from Esri Living Atlas, provides simplified (generalized) country polygons for the globe and is a widely used reference basemap layer. It is openly downloadable in Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and FeatureServer formats, making it convenient for small-scale maps, global overview graphics and thematic basemaps. Distributed for free use under Esri's Master License Agreement, its generalized geometry suits visualization rather than precise measurement.

name: World EEZ v12 (Marine Regions / Flanders Marine Institute)
notes: Authoritative global EEZ polygons + maritime boundary lines
verify_notes: World EEZ v12 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由佛兰德海洋研究所（VLIZ）Marine Regions 项目维护的世界专属经济区（EEZ）第12版数据集（2023年），是全球海洋管辖范围的权威参考。数据以 Shapefile 提供，既有 EEZ 多边形，也有海洋边界线要素，配有 DOI（10.14284/628），采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放获取。广泛用于海洋空间规划、渔业管理、海洋治理与跨界海域研究。
desc_en: World EEZ v12 (2023), maintained by the Marine Regions project at the Flanders Marine Institute (VLIZ), is an authoritative global delineation of Exclusive Economic Zones. It is distributed as Shapefiles containing both EEZ polygons and maritime boundary lines, carries a citable DOI (10.14284/628), and is openly available under CC-BY-4.0. The dataset is widely applied in marine spatial planning, fisheries management, ocean governance and transboundary maritime studies.

name: World Maritime Boundaries (NGA on ArcGIS Hub)
theme_raw: Maritime boundaries / Maritime claims (12 nm, 24 nm, 200 nm EEZ etc.)
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, GeoPackage, File GDB (ArcGIS Hub export)
notes: The 'Maritime Boundary Database' referenced in the lead - line features of claimed maritime zones.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub item; minimal content via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由美国国家地理空间情报局（NGA）通过 ArcGIS Hub 发布的世界海洋边界数据集，源自 NGA 海洋边界数据库，以线要素形式表示各国主张的海洋管辖区域边界，覆盖全球。数据可经 ArcGIS Hub 导出为 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、GeoPackage、File GDB 等多种格式，属美国公有领域，可自由下载使用。适用于海洋边界参考、海事与海洋治理分析。
desc_en: World Maritime Boundaries, published by the U.S. National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency (NGA) via ArcGIS Hub, derives from NGA's Maritime Boundary Database and represents claimed maritime-zone limits as line features for the whole globe. It can be exported from ArcGIS Hub in Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, GeoPackage and File GDB formats and is in the U.S. public domain, freely usable. It supports maritime boundary reference and ocean governance analysis.

name: xyanmi/MapData (China admin GeoJSON)
notes: 轻量数据集，适合可视化
verify_notes: China provincial/city/national boundaries | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GitHub 用户 xyanmi 维护的中国行政区划 GeoJSON 数据集，覆盖省级和地级行政单元。数据采用轻量的 GeoJSON 格式，体量小、易于在 Web 地图和前端可视化中直接调用，适合做行政边界底图和数据可视化。仓库未见明确的 LICENSE 文件，使用前建议确认授权情况。
desc_en: MapData, maintained by GitHub user xyanmi, is a lightweight collection of China administrative-boundary GeoJSON covering provincial and prefecture levels. Its compact GeoJSON format makes it easy to load directly in web maps and front-end visualizations, suiting boundary basemaps and data visualization use. No explicit LICENSE file is visible in the repository, so it is advisable to confirm licensing before reuse.

name: Zensus 2022 Atlas Grids + Boundaries (Destatis/BKG)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Buildings & addresses | POI / places
theme_raw: 2022 census population, households, buildings at 100m/1km/10km grids and Gemeinde
formats: CSV, Shapefile, WFS via BKG, ArcGIS Hub mirrors
notes: Replaces Zensus 2011 grids; ArcGIS Living Atlas Germany also publishes derived layers.
verify_notes: 应用存活但前端渲染,WebFetch仅得到标题;Zensus 2022 Atlas正常运行 | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 德国联邦统计局（Destatis）与联邦测绘局（BKG）发布的 2022年人口普查（Zensus 2022）格网与边界图集数据，覆盖德国全境。数据提供普查统计格网及配套行政边界，并涉及建筑、地址和地名等专题，格式包括 CSV、Shapefile，并可通过 BKG 的 WFS 与 ArcGIS Hub 镜像获取。该格网取代了 Zensus 2011 版本，采用德国数据许可 2.0（署名），可直接下载，适用于人口与社会经济空间分析。
desc_en: The Zensus 2022 Atlas grids and boundaries, published by Germany's Federal Statistical Office (Destatis) with the Federal Agency for Cartography (BKG), cover the whole of Germany. It provides census statistical grids alongside administrative boundaries and touches on buildings, addresses and places, offered as CSV and Shapefile and via BKG WFS and ArcGIS Hub mirrors. Replacing the Zensus 2011 grids, it is published under Datenlizenz Deutschland 2.0 (attribution) for direct download, supporting demographic and socioeconomic spatial analysis.

name: 一带一路沿线34个关键节点区域人口公里格网+矢量边界 (GPWv4, 2015)
provider: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Population & socioeconomic | Humanitarian & conflict
theme_raw: 受影响人口估算 (难民/IDP 暴露人口的底图)
coverage: BRI 34 个关键节点 (含中东/南亚冲突走廊), 2015
formats: Raster grid + 节点区域矢量边界 (shp)
notes: 主体为格网, 附 34 节点区矢量；纳入因人道暴露人口分析需要节点矢量。
verify_notes: TPDC dataset page; metadata limited in snippet | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布的
desc_en: This TPDC dataset provides population data for 34 key node regions along the Belt and Road, based on GPWv4 for the year 2015. The core is a one-kilometre population grid, accompanied by vector boundaries (Shapefile) for the 34 node areas, which include conflict corridors in the Middle East and South Asia, enabling overlay of population exposure with specific regions. Released under the TPDC sharing policy with free registration, it is commonly used for humanitarian exposure, regional development and risk-assessment research.

name: 一带一路沿线地区沿海港口与机场分布图（2018）
provider: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 (TPDC)
theme_raw: humanitarian_conflict (proxy: 援助投送/物流节点)
license: CC-BY 4.0 / TPDC 数据共享协议
notes: 源自 Natural Earth，按 BRI 65 国边界裁剪；可作为援助/物资投送候选节点的代理图层。非专门人道主义数据集。
verify_notes: TPDC dataset page reachable; content largely JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布的
desc_en: This TPDC dataset maps coastal ports and airports along the Belt and Road region for 2018, covering 65 BRI countries. Derived from Natural Earth and clipped to the boundaries of the 65 countries, it provides airport and port point features as Shapefiles. Distributed under the TPDC sharing policy with registration for free download, it can serve as a proxy layer for aid logistics or transport hubs, though it is not a dedicated humanitarian dataset.

name: 三江源国家公园界线矢量数据集
coverage: 三江源国家公园（长江、黄河、澜沧江源）

desc_zh: TPDC 时空三极平台发布的三江源国家公园界线矢量数据集，覆盖长江、黄河、澜沧江三大源头所在的三江源国家公园区域。数据以 Shapefile 提供，是相对冷门但被三江源生态与社会研究反复引用的非常规保护区边界资源。需注册获取，适用于国家公园管理、源区生态保护与高原可持续发展研究。
desc_en: Published on the TPDC poles platform, this dataset provides the vector boundary of the Sanjiangyuan (Three-River-Source) National Park, encompassing the headwater region of the Yangtze, Yellow and Lancang rivers. Delivered as a Shapefile, it is a relatively niche but frequently cited boundary resource for ecological and social research on the source region. Access requires registration. It suits national-park management, headwater conservation and plateau sustainability studies.

name: 上合组织区域范围矢量数据(2020)
notes: 区域范围多边形矢量
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: GCdataPR（全球变化科学研究数据出版系统）发布的上海合作组织区域范围矢量数据（2020年），以多边形形式给出上合组织成员国的区域范围。数据为 Shapefile 格式，采用 CC-BY 许可可开放下载，适合做上合组织相关的区域概览图、跨国合作与地缘专题分析的底图。
desc_en: This GCdataPR dataset provides a 2020 vector extent of the Shanghai Cooperation Organisation (SCO) region, delineating the member states' area as polygons. Supplied as a Shapefile under a CC-BY license for open download, it is convenient as a basemap for SCO-related regional overview maps and for cross-country cooperation and geopolitical thematic analysis.

name: 东三省民国时期 1:400万 行政区划及基础地理数据集 (1912年)
provider: IGADC / 东北黑土科学数据中心
theme_raw: 历史行政区划 / 基础地理
formats: shapefile (省界/大区/县/道路/铁路/电线/县市村屯)

desc_zh: IGADC / 东北黑土科学数据中心发布的东三省民国时期（1912年）1:400万行政区划及基础地理数据集，覆盖中国东北三省。数据以 Shapefile 提供省界、大区、县、道路、铁路、电线、县市村屯等多类要素，是较为稀缺的历史 GIS 资源，含交通与居民点点位。需注册下载，适用于历史地理、东北区域演变与历史制图研究。
desc_en: Published by IGADC / the Northeast Black Soil science data centre, this dataset covers the three Northeastern provinces of China for the Republican era (1912) at 1:4,000,000 scale. As Shapefiles it provides provincial boundaries, regions, counties, roads, railways, power lines and settlements, making it a scarce historical-GIS resource that includes transport and settlement points. It requires registration to download and suits historical geography, Northeast regional evolution and historical cartography research.

name: 东北亚地理科学数据中心 国家基础地理 1:400万 数据
provider: 东北亚地理科学数据中心 (IGADC, 中科院东北地理所)
coverage: China 国界、省界、地市、县、九段线、湖泊 (1:400万底图)
notes: 小比例尺全国底图的官方源, 适合做总图/插图; 区别于 1:100万更细的数据库版本
verify_notes: 404 Not Found - page moved or removed | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 东北亚地理科学数据中心（IGADC，中科院东北地理所）发布的国家基础地理1:400万数据，包含中国国界、省界、地市、县、九段线、湖泊等图层，是小比例尺全国底图的官方源。数据以 Shapefile 提供（全包约10MB），学术免费、需注册下载。适合制作全国总图、插图等小比例尺成果，区别于更精细的1:100万数据库版本。
desc_en: This IGADC dataset (Institute of Geography and Agroecology, CAS Northeast) provides national base geography at 1:4,000,000 scale, including China's national boundary, provincial boundaries, prefectures, counties, the nine-dash line and lakes. It is an authoritative source for small-scale national basemaps, supplied as Shapefiles (about 10 MB packaged), free for academic use with registration. It suits national overview maps and figures, and differs from the finer 1:1,000,000 database version.

name: 中国 1:400万 数字地貌数据集 (矢量)
provider: 中科院地理所 (李炳元/陈志明 编), RESDC 分发
theme_raw: 地貌类型 / 构造地貌 (点线面)
access: 注册；部分通过姊妹平台 (TPDC/poles) 镜像
notes: 国内地貌区划权威矢量产品；非英语世界少见
verify_notes: RESDC homepage reachable; Chinese text encoding garbled in fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由中科院地理所（李炳元、陈志明编）编制、资源环境科学数据平台（RESDC）分发的中国1:400万数字地貌数据集（矢量），覆盖中国及邻区。数据以 Shapefile 提供（Albers/Krasovsky 1940 投影），是国内地貌区划的权威矢量产品，在非英语世界较为少见。采用 RESDC 协议，需注册获取，部分通过 TPDC/poles 等姊妹平台镜像，适用于地貌区划、地学与生态研究。
desc_en: Compiled by the Institute of Geographic Sciences, CAS (eds. Li Bingyuan and Chen Zhiming) and distributed by the Resource and Environmental Science Data Platform (RESDC), this 1:4,000,000 digital geomorphology dataset for China (vector) covers China and adjacent areas. Provided as Shapefiles in an Albers/Krasovsky 1940 projection, it is an authoritative domestic geomorphological-regionalization product, rarely seen outside the Chinese-language world. Under the RESDC policy it requires registration, with mirrors on sister platforms (TPDC/poles), supporting geomorphology, geoscience and ecological research.

name: 中国1:250万数字地质图空间数据库 (CGS)
provider: 中国地质调查局 / 地质科学数据出版系统
notes: 含断层、岩性单元边界、火山口、钻孔等10类要素
verify_notes: Connection refused | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国地质调查局（CGS）通过地质科学数据出版系统发布的中国1:250万数字地质图空间数据库，覆盖中国大陆及近海。数据以 Shapefile / MapGIS 矢量格式提供，包含断层、岩性单元边界、火山口、钻孔等约十类要素，配有 DOI（10.31035/cg2017S103）。为公开版，需注册获取，适用于区域地质、构造与资源勘查等研究。
desc_en: Published by the China Geological Survey (CGS) via its geoscience data publishing system, the 1:2,500,000 digital geological map spatial database covers the Chinese mainland and adjacent seas. Delivered as Shapefile / MapGIS vectors, it contains around ten feature classes including faults, lithological-unit boundaries, craters and boreholes, with a DOI (10.31035/cg2017S103). It is an open version requiring registration, suited to regional geology, tectonics and resource exploration research.

name: 中国2020年城市矢量边界数据 (含双季稻10m分布配套)
provider: 探险家的数据窝 / 多家高校转发
license: unknown (个人/教程平台共享, 推测衍生自 GAIA/GUB)
notes: 属于中文圈典型博客二传; 数据其实派生自 GAIA + GUB + GISA; 列入展示来源生态
verify_notes: Derived from GAIA; 10 points or 6 for members | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由中文数据博客
desc_en: Reposted by the Chinese data blog \"Explorer's Data Nest\" and several universities, this dataset offers China urban vector boundaries for 2020 (bundled with a 10 m double-cropping-rice distribution) covering China. Provided as Shapefiles with unspecified licensing, it requires membership points to download. Its urban boundaries are actually derived from existing GAIA, GUB and GISA products, making it a typical Chinese-community re-distribution included mainly to illustrate the data-sharing ecosystem.

name: 中国2020年夏季洪涝救灾专题数据 (Flood 2020)
formats: shapefile (flood extent polygons, affected admin areas) + raster
formats_now: HTML index, links to multi-thematic datasets
notes: Includes vector inundation extents and affected admin boundaries.
verify_notes: 2020 Summer Flood Disaster Relief thematic page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家地球系统科学数据中心地理资源分中心（NESSDC）发布的中国2020年夏季洪涝救灾专题数据，覆盖长江等主要洪涝流域。数据包含矢量淹没范围多边形、受灾行政区边界（Shapefile）及配套栅格，可作为公开专题下载。版权为 geodata.cn 保留。适用于洪涝灾害评估、应急响应与灾后分析研究。
desc_en: Published by the Geographic Resources Sub-center of NESSDC, this Flood 2020 thematic dataset covers China's major flood basins in the summer of 2020, such as the Yangtze. It includes vector inundation-extent polygons, affected administrative boundaries (Shapefile) and accompanying raster, available as a public thematic download. Rights are reserved by geodata.cn. The data supports flood-disaster assessment, emergency response and post-disaster analysis.

name: 中国东北地区区域分布数据
theme_raw: 行政区划 / 区域边界
coverage: 中国东北 (黑/吉/辽 + 内蒙东四盟)
verify_notes: Page not found; URL likely fabricated/invalid path | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 东北亚地理科学数据中心（IGADC）发布的中国东北地区区域分布数据，覆盖黑龙江、吉林、辽宁三省及内蒙古东四盟。数据以 Shapefile 提供，需在线申请获取，适用于东北区域研究、区划分析与底图制作。
desc_en: Published by IGADC, this dataset describes the regional distribution of Northeast China, covering Heilongjiang, Jilin and Liaoning plus the four eastern leagues of Inner Mongolia. It is supplied as Shapefiles and requires an online application to obtain. The data suits Northeast regional studies, zoning analysis and basemap preparation.

name: 中国县级城市矢量边界 (China County-Level Cities)
coverage: 中国全国二级行政区（含县、县级市、市辖区、自治县、旗、林区、特区）
notes: 基于国家县级行政图栅格配准 + 边界矢量化 + 实地调研
verify_notes: 中国县级城市矢量边界; 10积分; 144k views | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 地理空间数据云（GSCloud）发布的中国县级城市矢量边界数据，覆盖全国二级行政区，包括县、县级市、市辖区、自治县、旗、林区、特区等类型。数据以矢量多边形（Shapefile）提供，基于国家县级行政图栅格配准、边界矢量化并结合实地调研。需注册并使用积分下载，适用于县级行政分析、空间统计与制图。
desc_en: Published by Geospatial Data Cloud (GSCloud), this dataset provides vector boundaries of China's county-level cities, covering the nation's second-level administrative units including counties, county-level cities, urban districts, autonomous counties, banners, forestry districts and special zones. Supplied as vector polygons (Shapefile), it was produced by georeferencing the national county administrative map, vectorizing boundaries and incorporating field surveys. Download requires registration and points, supporting county-level administrative analysis, spatial statistics and mapping.

name: 中国地图矢量数据 (China base vector map)
provider: 东北亚地理科学数据中心
theme_raw: 行政区划 / 基础地理
notes: 链接在搜索结果中出现, 直接访问当前 404, 需经 /filter/d101 入口
verify_notes: HTTP 404 Not Found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 东北亚地理科学数据中心发布的中国地图矢量数据（全国底图），以 Shapefile 形式提供全国范围的基础行政边界。采用申请审批制获取。该链接在搜索结果中出现，但直接访问当前返回404，需经数据中心的 /filter/d101 入口进入，适用于全国底图制作与行政区参考。
desc_en: Published by the Northeast Asia geographic science data centre, this China base vector map provides national administrative boundaries as Shapefiles for the whole country. Access is by application and approval. The link appears in search results but currently returns a 404 on direct access, requiring entry via the centre's /filter/d101 portal. It suits national basemap production and administrative reference.

name: 中国天然径流量格点数据集 CNRD v1.0 (1961-2018)
doi_or_citation: Miao et al., Earth Syst. Sci. Data
notes: 格点为主, 配套子流域矢量边界
verify_notes: TPDC page loads but details are JS-rendered; landing page confirmed | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 TPDC 与兰州大学发布的中国天然径流量格点数据集 CNRD v1.0（1961–2018年），覆盖中国。数据主体为 netCDF 格点产品，并配套子流域矢量边界（多边形），相关方法见 Miao 等发表于 Earth System Science Data 的论文。采用 TPDC 自定义协议，需注册下载，适用于水文、水资源评估与气候变化背景下的径流研究。
desc_en: Published by TPDC and Lanzhou University, the China Natural Runoff Dataset CNRD v1.0 (1961–2018) covers China. Its core is a gridded netCDF product, accompanied by sub-basin vector boundaries (polygons), with methods documented by Miao et al. in Earth System Science Data. Distributed under a custom TPDC policy requiring registration, it supports hydrology, water-resource assessment and runoff research under climate change.

name: 中国自然保护区名录与矢量边界数据集 (List and Vector Boundaries of Nature Reserves in China)
provider: 中国自然保护区标本资源共享平台 (papc.cn) / Zenodo
coverage: 全国 3398 个自然保护区 (国家级 424、省级 994、县市级 1922)
notes: 由中国自然保护区标本资源共享平台整理发布，含保护级别/类型/建立年份/面积等属性
verify_notes: China nature reserves boundaries | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由中国自然保护区标本资源共享平台（papc.cn）整理并经 Zenodo 发布的中国自然保护区名录与矢量边界数据集，覆盖全国3398个自然保护区，其中国家级424个、省级994个、县市级1922个。数据以 Shapefile（打包为 RAR）提供，含保护级别、类型、建立年份、面积等属性，配有 DOI（10.5281/zenodo.14875797），采用 CC-BY-4.0 开放获取，适用于生物多样性保护、保护区管理与生态研究。
desc_en: Compiled by China's Nature Reserve Specimen Resource Sharing Platform (papc.cn) and released on Zenodo, this dataset lists and provides vector boundaries for 3,398 nature reserves nationwide, comprising 424 national, 994 provincial and 1,922 county/municipal reserves. Supplied as Shapefiles (packaged as RAR) with attributes such as protection level, type, year of establishment and area, it carries a DOI (10.5281/zenodo.14875797) and is openly available under CC-BY-4.0, supporting biodiversity conservation, reserve management and ecological research.

name: 乌克兰 1:1000万 基础地理背景数据集 (2012-2015)
provider: IGADC / 东北黑土科学数据中心
theme_raw: 基础地理 / 国界 / 水系 / 交通
notes: 黑土带跨境基础地理数据, 含国家边界/水系/路网图层
verify_notes: Page not found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: IGADC / 东北黑土科学数据中心发布的乌克兰1:1000万基础地理背景数据集（2012–2015年），覆盖乌克兰。数据以 Shapefile 提供，包含国家边界、水系、路网等图层，属黑土带跨境基础地理数据。需注册下载，适用于乌克兰及黑土区跨境研究的背景底图与区域分析。
desc_en: Published by IGADC / the Northeast Black Soil science data centre, this dataset provides base geographic context for Ukraine at 1:10,000,000 scale (2012–2015). Supplied as Shapefiles, it includes national boundaries, hydrography and road networks as transboundary base geography for the black-soil belt. It requires registration to download and serves as background basemap and regional-analysis material for Ukraine and cross-border black-soil studies.

name: 俄罗斯布里亚特共和国 1:100万 行政区划数据
coverage: 俄罗斯 布里亚特共和国
notes: 罕见的中俄跨境东北亚区划矢量, 价值高
verify_notes: Page not found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: IGADC 发布的俄罗斯布里亚特共和国1:100万行政区划数据，覆盖布里亚特共和国。数据以 Shapefile 提供，属较为罕见的中俄跨境东北亚区划矢量，对跨境区域研究价值较高。需注册下载，适用于东北亚区划分析、跨境合作与底图制作。
desc_en: Published by IGADC, this dataset provides the administrative divisions of Russia's Republic of Buryatia at 1:1,000,000 scale, covering the republic. Supplied as Shapefiles, it is a relatively rare China–Russia transboundary Northeast-Asian administrative vector of high value for cross-border research. It requires registration to download and suits Northeast Asia zoning analysis, cross-border cooperation and basemap preparation.

name: 全国19大核心城市群矢量边界
provider: 知乎数据社区(基于国家发改委文件) - 镜像于多个CSDN/学社
theme_raw: 城市群边界(京津冀/长三角/成渝等)
notes: 国务院/发改委城市群规划的非官方矢量化版本;CSDN/知乎流通广泛;原始边界为国家发改委文件附图
verify_notes: Zhihu 403 (anti-bot) | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 知乎数据社区基于国家发改委城市群规划文件整理的全国19大核心城市群矢量边界，并在 CSDN、学社等平台广泛镜像流通。数据以 Shapefile 提供，原始边界来自国务院/发改委城市群规划附图，属非官方矢量化版本，许可未明确（基于政府公开规划）。适用于城市群空间研究与规划参考的辅助底图。
desc_en: Compiled by the Zhihu data community from China's NDRC urban-agglomeration planning documents, this dataset delineates the vector boundaries of 19 major urban agglomerations nationwide, and is widely mirrored on CSDN and similar platforms. Provided as Shapefiles, it is an unofficial vectorization of the original boundaries from State Council/NDRC planning annexes, with licensing unclear (based on public government plans). It serves as auxiliary reference material for urban-agglomeration spatial studies and planning.

name: 北京大学开放研究数据平台 (PKU Open Research Data)
provider: 北京大学图书馆 (Harvard Dataverse 定制版)
theme_raw: 综合（社科/生科/地球与环境为主）
license: 按数据集而异（CC0/CC-BY 常见）
formats: 主要为 tabular/调查数据；部分 dataverse 接收 shapefile（Dataverse 原生支持 SHP+SHX+DBF+PRJ 自动识别）
access: 开放，部分数据集需登录
notes: 实际矢量地理数据集占比很低；以 CFPS/CHARLS/古籍/生信为主。地理空间使用需逐个 dataverse 检索关键词「shp」「边界」
verify_notes: Peking University Open Research Data; Dataverse-based | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 北京大学图书馆运营的开放研究数据平台（基于 Harvard Dataverse 定制版），以中国为主，注册于 re3data（r3d100011589）。平台主要承载表格类与调查数据（如 CFPS、CHARLS、古籍、生物信息等），矢量地理数据占比很低；Dataverse 原生支持 SHP+SHX+DBF+PRJ 自动识别。多数数据开放，部分需登录。检索空间数据时需逐个 Dataverse 用
desc_en: The PKU Open Research Data platform, run by Peking University Library on a customized Harvard Dataverse, is China-focused and registered in re3data (r3d100011589). It mainly hosts tabular and survey data (e.g. CFPS, CHARLS, classical texts, bioinformatics), with very few vector geospatial datasets; Dataverse natively recognizes SHP+SHX+DBF+PRJ bundles. Most data are open while some require login. Finding spatial data means searching individual dataverses for keywords like \"shp\" or \"boundary\".

name: 南京/上海/北京等城市 cn/map GeoJSON 库
theme_raw: 城市地理 - 含交通 (子图层)
notes: 主要为行政边界，交通要素需从子文件挑选；可作为城市级辅助底图
verify_notes: 仓库存在 130 star，但未发现明确 LICENSE 文件 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GitHub 组织 cn/map 维护的中国主要城市（南京、上海、北京等）GeoJSON 数据库，主要为行政边界，部分文件含交通要素。数据以 GeoJSON 格式直接下载，可作为城市级辅助底图。仓库 README 未显示明确许可，使用前建议确认授权。
desc_en: Maintained by the GitHub organization cn/map, this repository provides GeoJSON data for major Chinese cities such as Nanjing, Shanghai and Beijing, consisting mainly of administrative boundaries with some transport features in sub-files. Distributed as directly downloadable GeoJSON, it can serve as an auxiliary city-level basemap. No explicit license is shown in the README, so confirming authorization before reuse is advisable.

name: 国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心 (NCDC) 冻土/沙漠矢量集
provider: 中国科学院西北生态环境资源研究院 (CAREERI)
coverage: country (China) + Belt-and-Road regions (e.g., 中巴经济走廊)
notes: Catalog includes: China permafrost distribution, CPEC permafrost shp, sand desert boundaries, Gobi extents, snow cover masks. 450 TB total holdings, 60% of national cryosphere data.
verify_notes: Redirects to /portal/ | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心（NCDC，依托中科院西北生态环境资源研究院）发布的冻土/沙漠矢量集，覆盖中国及一带一路区域（如中巴经济走廊）。目录涵盖中国冻土分布、CPEC 冻土、沙漠边界、戈壁范围、积雪掩膜等，以 Shapefile 与栅格提供。中心总藏量约450TB，约占全国冰冻圈数据的60%，采用开放（引用、学术）协议，需注册下载，适用于冰冻圈与寒区环境研究。
desc_en: The National Cryosphere Desert Data Center (NCDC, hosted by CAS's Northwest Institute of Eco-Environment and Resources) offers permafrost and desert vector collections covering China and Belt-and-Road regions such as the China–Pakistan Economic Corridor. Its catalogue includes China permafrost distribution, CPEC permafrost, sand-desert boundaries, Gobi extents and snow-cover masks, in Shapefile and raster. Holding around 450 TB total, roughly 60% of national cryosphere data, it is open for cited academic use with registration, supporting cryosphere and cold-region research.

name: 国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心 沙漠与荒漠化矢量集
notes: 含八大沙漠边界、沙脊线等矢量
verify_notes: Connection refused | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心（NCDC，兰州寒旱所）发布的沙漠与荒漠化矢量集，覆盖中国主要沙漠。数据以 Shapefile 提供，包含八大沙漠边界、沙脊线等矢量要素。采用注册申请方式获取，适用于荒漠化监测、沙漠地貌与寒旱区生态研究。
desc_en: Published by the National Cryosphere Desert Data Center (NCDC, Lanzhou cold/arid institute), this desert and desertification vector collection covers China's major deserts. Supplied as Shapefiles, it includes boundaries of the eight large deserts and dune-ridge lines. Access is by registration and application. The data suits desertification monitoring, desert geomorphology and cold-arid-region ecological research.

name: 国家卫健委流动人口数据平台 (geodata.cn wjw)
provider: 国家地球系统科学数据中心 / 国家卫健委
theme_raw: 流动人口社会经济统计
formats: 表格+矢量边界(省/市/县单元)
notes: 可下载分省/市/县流动人口属性,与行政矢量配合
verify_notes: 302 redirect to trailing-slash HTTP URL | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家地球系统科学数据中心联合国家卫健委建设的流动人口数据平台，覆盖全国并含多年份数据。平台提供分省、市、县单元的流动人口属性表格，并配套相应行政区矢量边界，可结合使用。数据采用限申请使用方式获取，适用于人口流动、公共卫生与社会经济空间分析。
desc_en: Built by the National Earth System Science Data Center together with the National Health Commission, this floating-population data platform covers the whole of China across multiple years. It provides migrant-population attribute tables at provincial, municipal and county levels, together with corresponding administrative vector boundaries for joint use. Access is restricted to approved applications. The data supports population-mobility, public-health and socioeconomic spatial analysis.

name: 国家地震科学数据中心 - 社会地震学数据 (历史地震/烈度区划矢量)
provider: 国家地震科学数据中心 (CEA)
verify_notes: China National Earthquake Science Data Center homepage; 50+ datasets | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家地震科学数据中心（中国地震局，CEA）的社会地震学数据，包含历史地震与烈度区划等矢量，覆盖中国。数据以 Shapefile 与表格形式提供，需注册下载，适用于地震灾害评估、烈度区划分析与防灾减灾研究。
desc_en: Provided by the National Earthquake Science Data Center (China Earthquake Administration, CEA), this social-seismology data includes historical earthquakes and seismic-intensity zonation vectors covering China. It is supplied as Shapefiles and tables and requires registration to download. The data suits earthquake-hazard assessment, intensity-zonation analysis and disaster-prevention research.

name: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 (TPDC) data portal
provider: 中科院青藏高原研究所 (TPDC)
theme_raw: Infrastructure-adjacent layers (hydropower, dam-affected rivers, admin boundaries)
notes: 2500+ datasets; search dam/reservoir/transmission keywords
verify_notes: Homepage reachable but content sparse in fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC，中科院青藏高原研究所）的数据门户，聚焦青藏高原及中国，藏有2500余个数据集。数据格式涵盖 Shapefile、NetCDF、GeoTIFF 等，主题涉及行政边界、水文、能源与基础设施等，可用大坝、水库、输电等关键词检索。多数数据采用 CC-BY-NC 等研究类许可，免费注册即可获取，是高原与中国地学研究的重要数据来源。
desc_en: The National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC, Institute of Tibetan Plateau Research, CAS) is a data portal focused on the Tibetan Plateau and China, holding more than 2,500 datasets. Formats span Shapefile, NetCDF and GeoTIFF across themes including administrative boundaries, hydrography, energy and infrastructure, searchable with keywords such as dam, reservoir and transmission. Most data carry research licenses such as CC-BY-NC and are available with free registration, making it a key source for plateau and China geoscience research.

name: 大型国际重要湿地 (Ramsar) 边界及遥感分类数据集 (2001, 2013)
provider: 全球变化科学研究数据出版系统 (GeoDOI)
coverage: 全球 100 处大型 (>20万 hm²) Ramsar 湿地
notes: 包含国际重要湿地边界与遥感分类
verify_notes: 全球变化科学研究数据出版系统门户 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球变化科学研究数据出版系统（GeoDOI）发布的大型国际重要湿地（拉姆萨尔，Ramsar）边界及遥感分类数据集（2001、2013年），覆盖全球100处面积大于20万公顷的大型 Ramsar 湿地。数据以 Shapefile、KMZ 提供，包含国际重要湿地边界与遥感分类结果，采用 GeoDOI 协议开放获取，适用于湿地保护、水文与生态遥感研究。
desc_en: Published by the Global Change Research Data Publishing system (GeoDOI), this dataset provides boundaries and remote-sensing classification of large internationally important (Ramsar) wetlands for 2001 and 2013, covering 100 large Ramsar wetlands worldwide each exceeding 200,000 hectares. Supplied as Shapefile and KMZ, it includes wetland boundaries and remote-sensing classification results, openly available under the GeoDOI policy. It suits wetland conservation, hydrology and ecological remote-sensing research.

name: 大运河地理信息开放共享服务平台 (GCH-GIS)
provider: 大运河文化研究 / 国家社科基金平台
coverage: China - Grand Canal (京杭/隋唐/浙东)
notes: 罕见的大运河专题 GIS, 含运河线、文化遗产点、沿线行政; 中文圈极冷门
verify_notes: Connection closed unexpectedly | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 大运河地理信息开放共享服务平台（GCH-GIS），由大运河文化研究/国家社科基金平台建设，覆盖中国大运河（京杭、隋唐、浙东运河）。平台为 Web GIS，可导出 GeoJSON，含运河线、文化遗产点及沿线行政等要素，可通过 API 或抓取获取。这是较为罕见的大运河专题 GIS，在中文圈也极为冷门，适用于运河遗产、历史地理与文化研究。
desc_en: The Grand Canal Geographic Information Open Sharing Service Platform (GCH-GIS), built under Grand Canal cultural research and national social-science funding, covers China's Grand Canal (the Beijing–Hangzhou, Sui–Tang and Eastern Zhejiang canals). It is a web GIS with exportable GeoJSON, containing canal lines, cultural-heritage points and adjacent administrative features, accessible via API or scraping. As a rare thematic GIS even within the Chinese-language community, it suits canal-heritage, historical-geography and cultural research.

name: 天地图 国家标准矢量地图 (GeoJSON/TopoJSON) - 全国底图
notes: CGCS2000 / EPSG:4490, code+gb 属性
verify_notes: Now versioned at file.geojson.cn/tiandi/0.3.0/ | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: geojson.cn 提供的天地图国家标准矢量地图（全国底图），是对天地图官方数据（审图号 GS(2024)0650）的再分发，覆盖中国全国。数据以 GeoJSON、TopoJSON 格式通过免费 HTTP 接口开放获取，坐标系为 CGCS2000（EPSG:4490），含 code 与 gb 等属性，适合 Web 地图开发与全国行政底图可视化。
desc_en: Provided by geojson.cn, this national standard vector basemap is a re-distribution of official Tianditu data (review number GS(2024)0650), covering the whole of China. It is openly available via a free HTTP endpoint in GeoJSON and TopoJSON, uses the CGCS2000 coordinate system (EPSG:4490) and includes attributes such as code and gb. It is well suited to web-map development and national administrative basemap visualization.

name: 天地图 数据API (WFS/WMS) - 行政区划 + 全球地表覆盖图层
provider: 国家地理信息公共服务平台 (天地图, 自然资源部)
theme_raw: 行政区划 / 水系 / 道路 / 地表覆盖
coverage: 中国 + 全球地表覆盖图层(嵌入 GlobeLand30)
formats: WFS / WFS-G / WMS / WMTS, geojson 导出
notes: WFS 接口可直接在 QGIS 中加载抓取; 中文圈最易程序化访问的官方矢量
verify_notes: Site did not respond within 60s; Tianditu APIs typically require key registration | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 天地图数据API是中国国家地理信息公共服务平台（自然资源部主管）提供的官方在线地理服务接口，通过 WFS/WFS-G/WMS/WMTS 等标准协议发布行政区划、交通等矢量图层，并嵌入了全球地表覆盖（GlobeLand30）数据，覆盖中国并延伸至全球。它支持导出 GeoJSON，可直接在 QGIS 中加载抓取，是中文圈最易程序化访问的官方权威矢量数据源之一。使用需申请 Key 并注明来源，遵循开放但需署名的条款。典型用途包括底图叠加、行政边界获取与地表覆盖分析。
desc_en: The Tianditu Data API is the official online geospatial service of China's National Geomatics Public Service Platform, run by the Ministry of Natural Resources.
