It serves administrative boundaries, transportation and other vector layers through standard OGC protocols (WFS/WFS-G/WMS/WMTS) and embeds global land-cover (GlobeLand30) layers, covering China and extending globally. Data can be exported as GeoJSON and loaded directly into QGIS, making it one of the most programmatically accessible authoritative Chinese vector sources. Use requires a developer Key and source attribution under an open-but-attributed license. Typical uses include basemaps, boundary retrieval and land-cover analysis.

name: 天地图省级行政区划矢量 (示例: 浙江 330000)
notes: 按 6 位 code 拼接 URL 批量下载
verify_notes: Versioned path now under file.geojson.cn/tiandi/0.3.0/ | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该接口由 geojson.cn 提供，基于天地图数据封装，按 6 位行政区划编码（如浙江为 330000）拼接 URL，即可批量获取中国 34 个省、直辖市、自治区及特别行政区的省级行政边界。数据以 GeoJSON 和 TopoJSON 格式免费开放，TopoJSON 拓扑结构紧凑、利于前端可视化。它免去了底层服务调用的复杂度，是 Web 地图、数据可视化和省级行政边界快速获取的常用免费入口。
desc_en: Provided by geojson.cn and derived from Tianditu data, this endpoint lets you batch-download provincial administrative boundaries for all 34 of China's provinces, municipalities, autonomous regions and special administrative regions by concatenating a six-digit division code into the URL (e.g. 330000 for Zhejiang). Data is offered free as GeoJSON and TopoJSON, the latter's compact topology being convenient for front-end rendering. By removing the complexity of low-level service calls, it serves as a popular free entry point for web maps, data visualization and quick provincial-boundary retrieval.

name: 政府資料開放平臺 - 內政部國土測繪中心圖資集合 (ct=417)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: 地理空間綜合 (boundaries, land use, cadastre indices)
notes: data.gov.tw 中地理類核心子集；涵蓋 Primary Statistical Release Area (dataset/20597) 等冷門人口統計矢量
verify_notes: Portal loads but listing shows 'No data' in fetched view; filters present for file format | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是台湾政府资料开放平台（data.gov.tw）中内政部国土测绘中心（NLSC/MOI）图资类别（ct=417）的数据集合，是该平台地理类核心子集，涵盖行政区划界线、土地覆盖与利用、人口及社会经济等主题，覆盖范围为台湾全境。数据提供 SHP、GML、GeoJSON、CSV（含坐标）等多种格式，遵循台湾政府资料开放授权条款（OGDL）。集合中还包含初级统计发布区等较冷门的人口统计矢量，适用于行政边界、土地与人口空间分析。
desc_en: This is the collection of map datasets under category ct=417 (the National Land Surveying and Mapping Center, NLSC/MOI) on Taiwan's open data platform, data.gov.tw. As the platform's core geographic subset, it spans administrative boundaries, land cover and land use, and population and socioeconomic themes covering all of Taiwan. Data is available in SHP, GML, GeoJSON and CSV-with-coordinates under the Taiwan Open Government Data License (OGDL). The collection also includes lesser-known demographic vectors such as Primary Statistical Release Areas, supporting boundary, land-use and population spatial analysis.

name: 政府資料開放平臺 - 直轄市、縣市界線(TWD97經緯度)
provider: 內政部國土測繪中心 (NLSC, MOI)
license: 政府資料開放授權條款-第1版 (Taiwan OGDL v1)
license_now: 政府資料開放授權條款-第1版 (Taiwan OGDL v1)
notes: 高引用基礎圖層；88k+ 下載；同系列尚有鄉鎮市區界、村里界 (dataset/7441, 7440)
verify_notes: 台湾县市界线 TWD97 经纬度，AA 无障碍合规 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为台湾内政部国土测绘中心发布的直辖市与县市界线（采用 TWD97 经纬度坐标），覆盖台湾全境，是高引用度的基础行政边界图层，累计下载逾 8.8 万次、浏览逾 26 万次（2015 年上架，元数据持续更新至 2025 年底）。数据以 SHP 和 GML 格式提供，免登录直接下载，遵循台湾政府资料开放授权条款第 1 版。同系列还包含乡镇市区界与村里界，适用于行政区划制图与各类空间统计分析。
desc_en: This dataset is the municipality and county/city boundary layer (in TWD97 lon/lat coordinates) published by Taiwan's NLSC/MOI, covering all of Taiwan. It is a heavily cited foundational administrative-boundary layer with over 88,000 downloads and 267,000 views (uploaded 2015, metadata maintained through late 2025). Data is provided as SHP and GML with free, no-login direct download under Taiwan OGDL v1. Companion datasets in the same series cover township/district and village boundaries. It is widely used for administrative mapping and spatial statistical analysis.

name: 江苏浙江矢量地图 (Jiangsu & Zhejiang Vector Maps)
coverage: 江苏省、浙江省（含苏州、无锡等市级 shp）
verify_notes: 江苏/浙江省矢量地图; 2积分; ArcGIS兼容 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为地理空间数据云（GSCloud）提供的江苏省、浙江省矢量地图，包含苏州、无锡等市级行政边界 shapefile，覆盖范围为两省及其下辖市级单元。数据以 ArcGIS 兼容的 Shapefile 格式提供（2019 年 10 月上传），需注册并使用积分下载。适用于长三角区域行政边界制图、空间叠加与区域分析等场景。
desc_en: This dataset offers vector maps of Jiangsu and Zhejiang provinces from Geospatial Data Cloud (GSCloud), including city-level administrative boundary shapefiles such as Suzhou and Wuxi, covering the two provinces and their constituent municipalities. Data is provided in ArcGIS-compatible Shapefile format (uploaded October 2019) and requires registration with credit-point redemption to download. It is suited to administrative-boundary mapping, spatial overlay and regional analysis in the Yangtze River Delta.

name: 澳門特別行政區政府數據開放平台 (data.gov.mo)
theme_raw: 少量地理坐標 (POI, 公交站點) + 行政分區
formats: CSV w/coords, JSON, 少量 GeoJSON
notes: 嚴格意義矢量資料極少；多為點 POI；DSCC 並未上架完整 SHP/GeoJSON 圖層 — 列入以反映澳門開放矢量現狀
verify_notes: Landing page accessible; details on inner pages | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳门特别行政区政府数据开放平台（data.gov.mo）由澳门特区政府运营，发布澳门本地的开放数据，主题涉及行政区划与兴趣点（POI）等。其严格意义上的矢量地理数据较为有限，多以含坐标的 CSV、JSON 形式发布点位 POI，少量提供 GeoJSON，尚未完整上架 SHP/GeoJSON 行政图层。数据遵循澳门开放数据使用条款，免费下载。该平台收录于此主要用以反映澳门开放矢量数据的现状。
desc_en: The Macao SAR Government Open Data Platform (data.gov.mo) is operated by the Macao SAR Government and publishes local open data covering themes such as administrative areas and points of interest. Strictly vector geospatial data is fairly limited, with most content released as coordinate-bearing CSV or JSON point POIs and only a small amount of GeoJSON; full SHP/GeoJSON administrative layers are not yet hosted. Data is freely downloadable under Macao's open data terms. It is included here mainly to reflect the current state of open vector data in Macao.

name: 生态科学数据中心 (eco.gssdc.cn) 物候、植被、生态系统矢量集
provider: 中科院 生态科学数据中心 (Global Change Ecology)
theme_canonical: Administrative boundaries | Hazards & disasters | Protected areas & biodiversity
notes: Searchable catalog; hosts 中国西部 1:100万数字地貌, 1:100万植被, eco-station boundaries. Crossref with disaster.casnw.net mirror.
verify_notes: Ecological Science Data Center homepage, login required for most datasets | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 生态科学数据中心（eco.gssdc.cn，隶属中科院全球变化生态学方向）是一个可检索的科学数据目录，聚焦中国及青藏高原区域，主题涵盖行政区划、灾害、保护地与生物多样性等。其托管资源包括中国西部 1:100 万数字地貌、1:100 万植被以及生态站边界等矢量数据，并涉及物候、植被、生态系统等专题，跨数据集时间跨度约 1980–2024 年，数据总量逾 10 TB。数据以 shapefile 提供，需注册访问，面向学术使用，适合区域生态与地学研究。
desc_en: The Ecological Science Data Center (eco.gssdc.cn, under the Chinese Academy of Sciences' global-change ecology stream) is a searchable scientific data catalog focused on China and the Tibetan Plateau, spanning administrative boundaries, hazards, protected areas and biodiversity. It hosts vector resources such as Western China 1:1,000,000 digital geomorphology and vegetation maps and eco-station boundaries, alongside phenology, vegetation and ecosystem datasets, with cross-dataset coverage roughly 1980-2024 and over 10 TB total. Data is provided as shapefiles under registration-required, academic-use access, suited to regional ecological and geoscience research.

name: 行政区划+水系+道路 SHP 综合包 (zhuanlan/CSDN 教程聚合)
provider: 成都途远GIS / CSDN/知乎博主聚合
theme_raw: 道路 + 行政区划 + 水系
license_now: 原创整理 (基于 OSM/政府公开)
notes: 中文教程圈最常被引用的 "一站式下载" 入口；含行政区划、县界、道路、河流
verify_notes: Aggregator blog covering admin+water+road SHP sources | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源是成都途远GIS 等中文 GIS 博客（聚合自 CSDN、知乎等）整理的全国行政区划、水系、道路 SHP 综合下载包，基于 OSM 及政府公开数据整理，比例尺约 1:100 万、年份约 2019。数据以 shapefile 提供，可直接下载，包含行政区划、县界、道路、河流等图层。作为中文教程圈最常被引用的“一站式下载”入口，它便于初学者快速获取全国基础矢量底图，但作为二次整理数据，使用时需留意来源与现势性。
desc_en: This resource is a one-stop national download package of administrative-division, hydrography and road shapefiles, curated by Chinese GIS blogs (Chengdu Tuyuan GIS, aggregating CSDN/Zhihu posts) and compiled from OSM and public government data at roughly 1:1,000,000 scale, around 2019. Provided as directly downloadable shapefiles, it bundles administrative divisions, county boundaries, roads and rivers. As the most frequently cited 'one-stop download' in Chinese tutorial circles, it lets beginners quickly obtain national base vectors, though as re-compiled data its provenance and currency warrant care.

name: 辽宁省市级行政区划矢量数据 (2015)
verify_notes: Page not found; URL likely fabricated/invalid path | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该数据集为 IGADC 提供的辽宁省市级行政区划矢量数据（2015 年），覆盖辽宁省，采用 Albers 等面积投影的 shapefile 格式，适于面积计算与区域统计。数据通过注册申请共享方式获取。适用于辽宁省行政边界制图、市级单元空间分析等用途。
desc_en: This dataset, provided by IGADC, contains municipal-level administrative boundary vectors for Liaoning Province (2015), covering the province in shapefile format with an Albers equal-area projection well suited to area calculation and regional statistics. It is obtained through registration and a sharing application. The data supports administrative-boundary mapping and city-level spatial analysis within Liaoning.

name: 青藏高原边界综合数据集（TPBoundary 集成）
notes: 四套不同准则的 TP 边界整合：海拔 2500/3000、高浮地形 HF、综合 New；高被引
verify_notes: National Tibetan Plateau Data Center portal reachable but content rendered by JS | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 青藏高原边界综合数据集（TPBoundary）由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，整合了四套不同界定准则的青藏高原范围：基于海拔 2500 米、3000 米的边界、基于高浮地形（HF）的边界，以及综合考量的 New 边界。数据以 Shapefile 提供，遵循 CC BY 4.0 许可，需注册下载（DOI:10.11888/Geogra.tpdc.270099）。作为高被引基础边界数据，它为青藏高原区域研究中范围界定的标准化提供了重要参考。
desc_en: The integrated Tibetan Plateau boundary dataset (TPBoundary), released by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), consolidates four boundary definitions of the plateau based on different criteria: elevation thresholds of 2500 m and 3000 m, high-relief (HF) terrain, and a comprehensive 'New' boundary. Data is provided as Shapefiles under CC BY 4.0 with registration required (DOI:10.11888/Geogra.tpdc.270099). As a highly cited foundational boundary product, it offers an important reference for standardizing the spatial extent used in Tibetan Plateau research.

name: 高德开放平台 POI 搜索 / 行政区 API
license: custom (商业平台 ToS, 学术使用普遍)
notes: 非纯开源但事实标准；几乎所有 CSDN 教程的 POI 起点；需要 Key 与配额；二次分发受限
verify_notes: Amap open platform developer portal active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 高德开放平台（AutoNavi/阿里巴巴）提供 POI 搜索与行政区查询 API，覆盖中国，号称约 7000 万 POI、3500 万地址、300 余城市。数据以 JSON 返回，可转换为 GeoJSON 或 shapefile。它虽非纯开源、需申请 Key 并受配额与二次分发限制，但已成为事实标准，是几乎所有中文 POI 教程的起点。适用于地址解析、兴趣点检索与行政区划查询等位置服务场景。
desc_en: The Amap (AutoNavi/Alibaba) open platform provides POI search and administrative-district query APIs covering China, reportedly with around 70 million POIs, 35 million addresses and over 300 cities. Data is returned as JSON and can be converted to GeoJSON or shapefile. Though not truly open-source, requiring a Key with quota and redistribution restrictions, it has become a de facto standard and the starting point for nearly all Chinese POI tutorials. It is used for geocoding, point-of-interest retrieval and administrative-district lookup in location-based services.

name: 黑河流域生态水文样带矢量边界集 (Heihe Eco-Hydrological Transect / Sub-basin Boundaries)
license_now: Copyright Gansu Province Science Data Center; per-dataset license
formats_now: TIF and others; strict review mode
notes: Catalog reports ~515 Heihe entries; sub-basin and observation transect polygons are part of HiWATER series
verify_notes: Search results page for Heihe keyword | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为黑河流域生态水文样带与子流域矢量边界集，由甘肃生态科学数据中心托管，覆盖黑河流域上、中、下游，属于 HiWATER 系列的一部分。目录中约有 515 条黑河相关条目，其中包含子流域和观测样带多边形。数据以 Shapefile 提供，需提交申请并经审核后获取，版权归甘肃省科学数据中心、按数据集分别授权。适用于流域水文、生态水文过程与观测网络相关研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides eco-hydrological transect and sub-basin vector boundaries for the Heihe River Basin, hosted by the Gansu Ecological Science Data Center and covering the basin's upper, middle and lower reaches as part of the HiWATER series. The catalog reports around 515 Heihe-related entries, including sub-basin and observation-transect polygons. Data is provided as Shapefiles obtained via application and review, copyrighted by the Gansu Science Data Center with per-dataset licensing. It supports basin hydrology, eco-hydrological process and observation-network research.

name: Geofabrik OSM Shapefile Extracts (transport layers)
theme_raw: roads, railways, transport POIs | Roads, railways, airports, ports, public transit (multi-modal) | OSM roads, buildings, water, land use, POIs
file_size: Europe 32.1 GB; North America 17.7 GB; Asia 14.8 GB; Africa 7.4 GB
notes: Also offers OGC-conformant WMS and a Shortbread vector tile API. Default shapefile package separates roads/railways into ready-to-use layers. | Merged duplicate Geofabrik OSM Downloads (https://download.geofabrik.de/)
verify_notes: Daily updates | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geofabrik 的 OpenStreetMap 下载页，按地区(大洲、国家、子区域)分发 OSM 提取数据，是最常用的开放 OSM 矢量数据源之一。提供 osm.pbf 与 Shapefile 等格式，遵循 ODbL 许可，可直接下载。适用于路网、POI、土地利用等要素的 GIS 分析、地图渲染及离线导航与路由数据准备。
desc_en: Geofabrik's OpenStreetMap download page distributes OSM extracts by region (continents, countries, sub-regions) and is one of the most widely used open OSM vector sources. It offers osm.pbf and Shapefile formats under the ODbL licence for direct download. It is suited to GIS analysis of road networks, POIs and land use, map rendering, and preparing offline navigation and routing data.

name: OpenStreetMap Waterways (extracts)
theme_raw: rivers, streams, canals, lakes, reservoirs, dams, ditches | buildings | POI / points of interest
formats: OSM PBF, Shapefile (Geofabrik), GeoJSON, Vector Tiles (Shortbread, OMT)
notes: Mainstream anchor. Higher detail than HydroSHEDS in well-mapped regions; missing in others. Now exposed via OSMF vector tiles.
verify_notes: 最后更新 2026-01-26；积极维护，>50 个 value 文档 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该资源对应 OpenStreetMap 的 waterway 标签体系（约 50 个文档化取值），由全球志愿者贡献，是获取河流、运河、溪流等水系矢量数据的主流入口。OSM 水系数据可通过 PBF、Geofabrik 的 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 Shortbread/OMT 矢量瓦片获取，覆盖全球。在测绘良好的地区其细节高于 HydroSHEDS，但在欠测绘地区可能缺失。地图数据遵循 ODbL（维基页面内容为 CC-BY-SA），适用于水文制图与水网分析。
desc_en: This resource corresponds to OpenStreetMap's waterway tagging scheme (around 50 documented values), contributed by volunteers worldwide and serving as a mainstream entry point for rivers, canals and streams as vector data. OSM waterway data is available via PBF, Geofabrik shapefiles, GeoJSON and Shortbread/OMT vector tiles, covering the globe. In well-mapped regions it offers finer detail than HydroSHEDS, though it may be missing in under-mapped areas. Map data is under ODbL (the wiki page itself CC-BY-SA), supporting hydrographic mapping and river-network analysis.

name: Google Open Buildings (v3) footprints - Africa
coverage: Africa, Southeast Asia, South Asia, LatAm (~1.8B polygons; ~183M used for African cities)
formats_now: CSV (WKT polygons), Google Earth Engine asset
access: open download (S3 / GCS tiles by S2 cell)
notes: Source of 183M building polygons across ~6,000 African cities for morphology indicators.
verify_notes: Dual license; V3 dataset | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Google Open Buildings（v3）是 Google Research 通过卫星影像与深度学习生成的建筑物轮廓数据集，覆盖非洲、东南亚、南亚和拉丁美洲，约 18 亿个多边形（其中约 1.83 亿用于非洲约 6000 个城市的形态指标研究）。数据以 GeoJSON 和含 WKT 的 CSV 提供建筑多边形与质心，按 S2 网格分块从 S3/GCS 开放下载，v3 推理完成于 2023 年 5 月，遵循 CC BY 4.0/ODbL。它是全球数据稀缺地区建筑足迹研究的重要数据源。
desc_en: Google Open Buildings (v3) is a building-footprint dataset generated by Google Research from satellite imagery and deep learning, covering Africa, Southeast Asia, South Asia and Latin America with roughly 1.8 billion polygons (about 183 million used for morphology indicators across ~6,000 African cities). Data provides building polygons and centroids as GeoJSON and CSV-with-WKT, openly downloadable from S3/GCS in S2-cell tiles, with v3 inference completed in May 2023 under CC BY 4.0/ODbL. It is a key source for building-footprint research in data-scarce regions of the Global South.

name: Microsoft Global ML Building Footprints
theme_raw: AI 提取建筑物轮廓 | AI-derived building footprints | buildings
notes: Anchor; widely cited as input in EUBUCCO, GBA, From Footprints to Functions, GHS-OBAT.
verify_notes: Active; last update Feb 2026; ~1.4B footprints | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Microsoft Global ML Building Footprints 由微软（Maps 与 AI for Good）通过机器学习从卫星影像提取，覆盖全球约 14 亿栋建筑（不含中国），时间跨度约 2014–2024 年。数据以按 quadkey 组织的行分隔 GeoJSON 和 parquet 提供，可从 GitHub 与 Azure 直接下载，遵循 CDLA Permissive 2.0 许可。作为旗舰级建筑足迹数据，它被 EUBUCCO、GBA、From Footprints to Functions、GHS-OBAT 等众多研究广泛引用作为输入。
desc_en: Microsoft Global ML Building Footprints, produced by Microsoft (Maps and AI for Good) via machine learning on satellite imagery, covers roughly 1.4 billion buildings worldwide (excluding China) over approximately 2014-2024. Data is provided as quadkey-organized line-delimited GeoJSON and parquet, downloadable directly from GitHub and Azure under the CDLA Permissive 2.0 license. As a flagship building-footprint product, it is widely cited as input by EUBUCCO, GBA, From Footprints to Functions, GHS-OBAT and many other studies.

name: HOTOSM Country OSM Exports (buildings/roads/places/waterways/POIs)
theme_raw: OSM thematic vectors | Roads, railways, airports, ferry terminals per country | POI (health, education, financial)
notes: Daily/weekly auto-pipeline; thousands of country-theme combinations (e.g., hotosm_*_buildings, _roads, _populated_places, _waterways, _points_of_interest)
verify_notes: WebFetch 返回 403 Forbidden（HDX 反爬）。HOT 组织页通常仍存在，但本次无法核实。 | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: HOTOSM 国家级 OSM 提取由人道主义 OpenStreetMap 团队（HOT）通过自动化管线发布于 HDX 平台，覆盖约 230 个国家/地区并自动刷新，提供建筑、道路、地名、水系、POI 等主题的国家-主题组合（如 hotosm_*_buildings、_roads、_waterways 等），数量达数千。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、KML、GeoJSON 提供，可按数据集直接下载，遵循 ODbL（OSM）许可。它是人道主义响应、灾害准备与发展规划中获取标准化国别 OSM 数据的常用来源。
desc_en: HOTOSM country OSM exports, published by the Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team via an automated pipeline on HDX, cover around 230 countries and regions with auto-refresh, offering thousands of country-theme combinations across buildings, roads, places, waterways and POIs (e.g. hotosm_*_buildings, _roads, _waterways). Data is provided as Shapefile, GeoPackage, KML and GeoJSON for per-dataset direct download under the ODbL (OSM) license. It is a common source of standardized country-level OSM data for humanitarian response, disaster preparedness and development planning.

name: Humanitarian OpenStreetMap (HOT) Export - Sahel Settlements
theme_raw: settlements / POIs | 按主题/区域定制 OSM 抽取（道路/建筑/水点等） | Country/region custom OSM extracts (roads, health, water, buildings)
notes: Companion HOT extracts often used alongside Geofabrik for finer humanitarian POIs.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源为人道主义 OpenStreetMap 团队（HOT）的 Export 工具所生成的萨赫勒地区聚落数据提取，覆盖乍得、马里、尼日尔、几内亚等国，主题涵盖建筑与地址、POI、交通。数据以 SHP、GeoJSON、GeoPackage 等格式开放导出，遵循 ODbL（OSM）许可。它常与 Geofabrik 提取配合使用，以获取更精细的人道主义 POI，适用于人道主义制图与应急响应。
desc_en: This resource is a Sahel settlements extract produced by the Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team (HOT) Export tool, covering Chad, Mali, Niger and Guinea across buildings/addresses, POI and transportation themes. Data is openly exported as SHP, GeoJSON and GeoPackage under the ODbL (OSM) license. It is often used alongside Geofabrik extracts to obtain finer humanitarian POIs, supporting humanitarian mapping and emergency response.

name: IGN BD TOPO - Thème Transport (routes, voies ferrées)
theme_raw: Road segments, railway tracks, airports, ports | buildings, addresses, POI (PAI) | buildings (3D vector description of territory)
notes: Mirrored on data.gouv.fr; includes troncon_de_route, troncon_de_voie_ferree, aerodrome, transport_par_cable.
verify_notes: geoservices.ign.fr migrated to cartes.gouv.fr | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: IGN BD TOPO 的交通主题由法国国家地理院（IGN）发布，覆盖法国本土及海外省（DROM），是权威的大比例尺地形矢量数据库。该主题包含道路段（troncon_de_route）、铁路段、机场及缆车运输等要素。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 PostgreSQL dump 提供，可直接下载并在 data.gouv.fr 镜像，遵循 Etalab 开放许可 2.0。适用于法国交通网络制图、路网分析与国家级基础地理建库。
desc_en: The Transport theme of IGN's BD TOPO, published by France's national mapping agency (IGN), covers metropolitan France and the overseas departments (DROM) as an authoritative large-scale topographic vector database. The theme includes road sections (troncon_de_route), rail sections, aerodromes and cable transport. Data is provided as Shapefile, GeoPackage and PostgreSQL dump for direct download, mirrored on data.gouv.fr, under the Etalab Open License 2.0. It supports French transport-network mapping, routing analysis and national base-geography databases.

name: OpenAddresses Sources Tree (GitHub)
theme_raw: source descriptor (JSON) — 指向原始矢量端点 | addresses (points) | address/parcel/building source manifests
formats: 指向 SHP / GeoJSON / WFS / ArcGIS FeatureService / CSV / GeoPackage 等原始端点
notes: 冷门用法：直接挖各国 source JSON 拿到政府原始矢量端点（含 CN/HK/TW/KR/JP/RU/SA/QA/KZ 等罕见入口）。
verify_notes: Repo active with open issues/PRs | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenAddresses 的 sources 目录托管于 GitHub，按 ISO-2 国家代码组织（涵盖 ae/ar/au/ca/cn/de/fr/hk/jp/kr/ru/sa/tw/us/za 等数十个国家/地区）。其每个 source JSON 指向各国政府发布的原始矢量端点，格式包括 SHP、GeoJSON、WFS、ArcGIS FeatureService、CSV、GeoPackage 等。元数据遵循 CC0，通过 Git/HTTP 访问。一种冷门而实用的用法是直接挖取这些 source 文件，获得 CN/HK/TW/KR/JP/RU 等地难得的政府原始地址与矢量数据入口。
desc_en: OpenAddresses' sources directory, hosted on GitHub and organized by ISO-2 country code (covering dozens of countries including ae/au/ca/cn/de/fr/hk/jp/kr/ru/sa/tw/us/za), holds source JSON files that point to original government-published vector endpoints in formats such as SHP, GeoJSON, WFS, ArcGIS FeatureService, CSV and GeoPackage. Metadata is under CC0 and accessible via Git/HTTP. A lesser-known but useful approach is mining these source files directly to reach hard-to-find official address and vector endpoints for CN, HK, TW, KR, JP, RU and other regions.

name: datos.gob.es - Spanish Cadastre (Catastro) building footprints
theme_raw: buildings + parcels | buildings, cadastral parcels, addresses | buildings
coverage: Spain (excluding Pais Vasco/Navarra which have own cadastres)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://www.catastro.minhap.es/webinspire/index.html))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://www.catastro.minhap.es/webinspire/index.html))
notes: Among the most complete national open cadastral building datasets; backbone of EUBUCCO Spain portion.
verify_notes: connection refused; service may have moved to sedecatastro.gob.es / INSPIRE endpoints | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://www.catastro.minhap.es/webinspire/index.html))
desc_zh: 西班牙地籍（Catastro）建筑足迹由西班牙总地籍局发布，覆盖西班牙全境（巴斯克与纳瓦拉地区有各自地籍系统除外），是最完整的国家级开放地籍建筑数据集之一，也是 EUBUCCO 西班牙部分的数据基础。数据以符合 INSPIRE 的 GML 及按市镇划分的 shapefile 提供，可通过直接下载、ATOM 与 WFS 访问，遵循 Catastro 开放使用条款可自由再利用。适用于建筑足迹、城市形态与房产相关空间分析。
desc_en: Spanish Cadastre (Catastro) building footprints, published by Spain's Directorate-General for Cadastre, cover all of Spain (except the Basque Country and Navarre, which run their own cadastres) and form one of the most complete national open cadastral building datasets, underpinning the Spanish portion of EUBUCCO. Data is provided as INSPIRE GML and per-municipality shapefiles, accessible via direct download, ATOM and WFS, freely reusable under Catastro's open-use conditions. It supports building-footprint, urban-morphology and property-related spatial analysis.

name: OpenStreetMap Buildings + POI Themed Extracts (Geofabrik / Daylight Map)
provider: OSM contributors via Geofabrik / Meta Daylight
theme_raw: buildings + POI + addresses | QA-validated OSM snapshot + ML buildings/roads add-ons | Curated, QA'd OSM planet snapshot
license_now: 开放许可（继承 OSM ODbL 等上游）
formats_now: OSM PBF / OSC.gz / TSV / JSON / TGZ
notes: Daylight provides curated, validated, citation-ready OSM snapshots used heavily in data-paper supplements.
verify_notes: 页面公告 2024-05-03 'Sunsetting Daylight'，但 v1.58 于 2024-11-12 发布；项目处于归档/收尾阶段，下载仍可用。 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源提供 OpenStreetMap 建筑与 POI 的专题提取，由 Geofabrik 与 Meta 的 Daylight Map 项目发布，覆盖全球。Daylight 提供经过筛选、验证、可直接引用的 OSM 快照（如版本 1.58），格式包括 shapefile、PBF 与 parquet，可直接下载，许可继承上游 OSM（ODbL 等）。因其稳定与可复现，这类策划过的 OSM 快照在数据论文的补充材料中被大量使用，适用于全球建筑、POI 与交通要素分析。
desc_en: This resource provides themed OpenStreetMap building and POI extracts, released via Geofabrik and Meta's Daylight Map project, covering the globe. Daylight offers curated, validated and citation-ready OSM snapshots (e.g. version 1.58) in shapefile, PBF and parquet for direct download, with licensing inherited from upstream OSM (ODbL and others). Thanks to their stability and reproducibility, these curated snapshots are heavily used in data-paper supplements, supporting global building, POI and transportation feature analysis.

name: From Footprints to Functions (Global semantic building dataset, OpenBuildingMap GEM)
provider: GEM Foundation / authors of Scientific Data 2025
theme_raw: buildings semantic classification | Buildings | buildings with function semantics
notes: Conflates Google Open Buildings + MS Global ML + OSM with GEM building taxonomy labels and source provenance per footprint.
verify_notes: redirects to IdP auth; article likely accessible in browser | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: From Footprints to Functions（OpenBuildingMap GEM）是由 GEM 基金会及 Scientific Data 2025 论文作者发布的全球语义建筑数据集，覆盖全球、含约 27 亿个建筑足迹，分为 200 个分区。它将 Google Open Buildings、微软 Global ML 足迹与 OSM 融合，并为每个足迹附加 GEM 建筑分类标签与数据来源溯源信息。数据以 GeoParquet、FlatGeobuf 和 PMTiles 提供，可直接下载，遵循 CC-BY-4.0（OSM 子集为 ODbL，DOI:10.1038/s41597-025-06132-z）。适用于全球建筑功能、暴露度与风险评估研究。
desc_en: From Footprints to Functions (OpenBuildingMap GEM), released by the GEM Foundation and the authors of a 2025 Scientific Data paper, is a global semantic building dataset covering the world with around 2.7 billion footprints in 200 partitions. It conflates Google Open Buildings, Microsoft Global ML footprints and OSM, attaching GEM building-taxonomy labels and per-footprint source provenance. Data is provided as GeoParquet, FlatGeobuf and PMTiles for direct download under CC-BY-4.0 (OSM subset ODbL, DOI:10.1038/s41597-025-06132-z). It supports global building-function, exposure and risk-assessment research.

name: Kontur Population (H3 hexagons)
theme_raw: Population density per H3 hexagon (400m, 3km, 22km) | population density (vector hex)
notes: Vector hex format rather than raster — easy to spatially join. Built from GHSL+Meta HRSL+OSM+Microsoft Buildings.
verify_notes: HDX 403 to WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: Kontur Population 是由 Kontur 发布的全球人口数据集，独特之处在于采用 H3 六边形矢量网格（而非栅格），覆盖全球并提供 400 米分辨率的国家子集，便于空间连接。数据融合 GHSL、Meta HRSL、OSM 与微软建筑足迹生成，以 GeoPackage（矢量六边形）提供，衍生版本含 PMTiles，可从 HDX 直接下载，遵循 CC-BY-4.0。适用于人口分布制图、灾害暴露评估与可达性分析。
desc_en: Kontur Population, released by Kontur, is a global population dataset distinguished by its use of H3 hexagonal vector cells rather than rasters, covering the globe with country subsets at 400 m resolution for easy spatial joins. Built by fusing GHSL, Meta HRSL, OSM and Microsoft building footprints, it is provided as GeoPackage vector hexagons (with PMTiles in derivatives) for direct download from HDX under CC-BY-4.0. It is suited to population-distribution mapping, disaster-exposure assessment and accessibility analysis.

name: Urban morphology indicators dataset (DBMetrics_v2 / BuildingSize)
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: derived urban form indicators per agglomeration | per-city urban morphology indicators (joined to Africapolis IDs) | urban morphology indicators per city
license_now: none listed (all rights reserved by default)
notes: Tabular companion to the vector Africapolis polygons - join key = Africapolis agglomeration ID.
verify_notes: no LICENSE file visible on repo landing | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集（DBMetrics_v2 / BuildingSize）是城市形态指标数据，由 Prieto-Curiel 等论文作者发布于 GitHub，覆盖约 6000 个非洲城市聚集区，是矢量 Africapolis 多边形的表格型配套数据，可通过 Africapolis 聚集区 ID 连接。数据以 CSV 提供，开放于 GitHub，但未显式声明许可（默认保留所有权利），为 PNAS 论文（10.1073/pnas.2214254120）的配套数据。适用于非洲城市破碎度、建筑规模与城市形态研究。
desc_en: This dataset (DBMetrics_v2 / BuildingSize) provides urban morphology indicators, released on GitHub by Prieto-Curiel and co-authors, covering around 6,000 African urban agglomerations as a tabular companion to the vector Africapolis polygons, joinable via the Africapolis agglomeration ID. Data is provided as CSV, openly available on GitHub but with no license stated (all rights reserved by default), as companion data to a PNAS paper (10.1073/pnas.2214254120). It supports research on African urban fragmentation, building size and urban form.

name: 3D-GloBFP - Global 3D Building Footprint Dataset
provider: Sun Yat-sen University et al. (Che, Zhou)
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: buildings with height | 全球建筑轮廓 + 高度 | buildings (related to urban LU)
notes: First global building-footprint-scale height map using EO + XGBoost. Multiple Zenodo records per continent.
verify_notes: 3D-GloBFP v2 (2025) 活跃 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 3D-GloBFP 是由中山大学等机构（Che、Zhou 等）发布的全球三维建筑足迹数据集，覆盖全球各大洲（美洲、非洲、亚洲、欧洲、大洋洲），数据时点约 2020 年。它是首个利用对地观测影像结合 XGBoost 在全球建筑足迹尺度上生成的建筑高度数据集。数据以按区域分块的 shapefile 提供，v2 总量约 40.3 TB，可从 Zenodo 直接下载（按大洲多记录），遵循 CC-BY-4.0（DOI:10.5194/essd-16-5357-2024）。适用于全球三维城市建模、建筑体量与气候研究。
desc_en: 3D-GloBFP, released by Sun Yat-sen University and collaborators (Che, Zhou et al.), is a global 3D building-footprint dataset covering all continents (the Americas, Africa, Asia, Europe and Oceania) for roughly 2020. It is the first building-height product generated at global building-footprint scale using Earth-observation imagery and XGBoost. Data is provided as region-tiled shapefiles, totaling about 40.3 TB for v2, downloadable directly from Zenodo across multiple per-continent records under CC-BY-4.0 (DOI:10.5194/essd-16-5357-2024). It supports global 3D urban modeling, building-volume and climate research.

name: BDOT10k - Budynki
provider: GUGiK (Head Office of Geodesy and Cartography)
notes: National Topographic Database including Buildings layer; also Budynki LoD1 nationwide.
verify_notes: lychee:timeout
desc_zh: BDOT10k 建筑物图层（Budynki）由波兰国家测绘与地图总局（GUGiK）发布，覆盖波兰全境，是国家地形数据库 BDOT10k（比例尺约 1:10,000）的建筑物图层，同时提供全国 LoD1 建筑模型。数据以 shapefile 和 GML 提供，可下载，自 2020 年 7 月起开放、可用于任何用途。作为权威的国家级建筑矢量数据，适用于建筑足迹分析、城市制图与三维建模。
desc_en: The BDOT10k Buildings layer (Budynki), published by Poland's Head Office of Geodesy and Cartography (GUGiK), covers all of Poland as the buildings layer of the national topographic database BDOT10k (about 1:10,000 scale), also offering nationwide LoD1 building models. Data is provided as shapefile and GML for download and has been open for any use since July 2020. As authoritative national building vectors, it supports building-footprint analysis, urban mapping and 3D modeling.

name: GlobalBuildingAtlas (GBA) - Polygon + Height + LoD1
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | Land cover & land use
license: CC-BY-4.0 (vector subset of OSM+MS under ODbL)
formats_now: 未在论文页明示矢量格式；数据在 mediaTUM 与 HuggingFace
notes: Quality-based fusion of OSM, Google Open Buildings, MS footprints + height regression. Code at github.com/zhu-xlab/GlobalBuildingAtlas. Also released on Hugging Face hf/6771.
verify_notes: GlobalBuildingAtlas ESSD 2025 已发表 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GlobalBuildingAtlas（GBA）由慕尼黑工业大学（Zhu 团队，ESSD 2025）发布，是覆盖全球、约 27.5 亿栋建筑的多边形、高度与 LoD1 数据集，分辨率约 3 米、数据时点约 2019 年（含 2018 年补充）。它通过基于质量的融合方法整合 OSM、Google Open Buildings 与微软足迹，并结合高度回归生成 3D LoD1 模型与高度栅格。数据以矢量多边形、3D LoD1 与栅格高度提供，可直接下载，遵循 CC-BY-4.0（DOI:10.5194/essd-17-6647-2025）。代码与数据另发布于 GitHub 和 Hugging Face。
desc_en: GlobalBuildingAtlas (GBA), released by TU Munich (Zhu group, ESSD 2025), is a global dataset of roughly 2.75 billion buildings providing polygons, heights and LoD1 at about 3 m resolution for around 2019 (with 2018 fill-in). It applies quality-based fusion of OSM, Google Open Buildings and Microsoft footprints together with height regression to produce 3D LoD1 models and height rasters. Data is provided as vector polygons, 3D LoD1 and raster height for direct download under CC-BY-4.0 (DOI:10.5194/essd-17-6647-2025), with code on GitHub and copies on Hugging Face.

name: Microsoft Building Footprints (ms-buildings)
theme_raw: AI-derived building footprints | Buildings / footprints | buildings
notes: Flagship vector collection on MPC; vector tile rendering supported in Explorer.
verify_notes: Page returned minimal content but accessible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Microsoft Building Footprints（ms-buildings）是微软 Planetary Computer（MPC）上的旗舰矢量集合，覆盖全球约 10 亿以上建筑足迹，按多国 quadkey 分区。数据以 GeoParquet 和 Mapbox 矢量瓦片（含 TileJSON 端点）提供，通过 STAC API 与 Azure Blob（abfs）访问，遵循 ODbL 许可，并支持在 MPC Explorer 中进行矢量瓦片渲染。适用于云原生大规模建筑足迹分析与可视化。
desc_en: Microsoft Building Footprints (ms-buildings) is a flagship vector collection on Microsoft Planetary Computer (MPC), covering over roughly 1 billion footprints worldwide partitioned by multi-country quadkeys. Data is provided as GeoParquet and Mapbox Vector Tiles (with a TileJSON endpoint), accessed via the STAC API and Azure Blob (abfs) under the ODbL license, with vector-tile rendering supported in MPC Explorer. It is suited to cloud-native large-scale building-footprint analysis and visualization.

name: OSMnx-derived street networks (per-city)
theme_raw: city-level street network graphs | Street networks, buildings, POIs from OSM | Download/model street networks & POIs from OSM as vector graphs
access: Python API → GeoPackage/GeoJSON; pre-computed graphs on Harvard Dataverse
notes: De-facto comparison/reproduction toolkit for MSDCW-style block extraction.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OSMnx 是由 Geoff Boeing 与社区开发的 Python 工具（MIT 许可），可从 OpenStreetMap 提取、构建并分析任意城市的街道网络，覆盖全球任何有 OSM 数据的城市。它支持将网络导出为 GraphML、GeoPackage 和 Shapefile，并通过 Python API 生成 GeoPackage/GeoJSON，Harvard Dataverse 上还提供预计算的城市图。作为城市街网分析与街区提取的事实标准工具（Boeing 2017, CEUS），它广泛用于可复现的城市形态研究。
desc_en: OSMnx is a Python tool by Geoff Boeing and the community (MIT license) for retrieving, constructing and analyzing street networks for any city from OpenStreetMap, covering any OSM-mapped city worldwide. It exports networks to GraphML, GeoPackage and Shapefile and produces GeoPackage/GeoJSON via its Python API, with pre-computed city graphs also available on Harvard Dataverse. As the de facto toolkit for street-network analysis and block extraction (Boeing 2017, CEUS), it is widely used for reproducible urban-morphology research.

name: USGS National Structures Dataset (TNM)
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | POI / places | Hazards & disasters
theme_raw: buildings/POI (schools, fire, hospitals, gov facilities, campgrounds, historic sites) | Man-made structures POIs | Schools, hospitals, fire stations, law enforcement, post offices, cemeteries, etc.
formats: ESRI File Geodatabase, Shapefile, REST MapServer
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: Volunteer-edited authoritative POI layer; supports disaster planning/Homeland Security base maps.
verify_notes: 404 Not Found - page likely moved/removed | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 美国国家结构数据集（USGS National Structures Dataset, TNM）由美国地质调查局发布，覆盖美国及其领地，是经志愿者编辑的权威 POI/结构物图层，包含学校、医院、消防站等公共建筑设施。数据以 ESRI 文件地理数据库、Shapefile 及 REST MapServer 提供，可通过 TNM Downloader 直接下载，并支持 WFS/MapServer 服务，属公有领域（美国政府作品）。适用于灾害规划、应急响应与国土安全底图制作。
desc_en: The USGS National Structures Dataset (TNM), published by the U.S. Geological Survey, covers the United States and its territories as a volunteer-edited authoritative POI/structures layer including schools, hospitals, fire stations and other public facilities. Data is provided as ESRI File Geodatabase, Shapefile and REST MapServer, downloadable directly via the TNM Downloader with WFS/MapServer services, and is in the public domain as a U.S. Government work. It supports disaster planning, emergency response and Homeland Security base maps.

name: VIDA Combined Google-Microsoft-OSM Open Buildings
theme_raw: buildings (deduplicated union) | Buildings — combined global footprints
license: CDLA-Permissive 2.0 + ODbL share-alike for OSM portion
notes: Lesser-known but highly useful: deduplicates Microsoft+Google+OSM; ideal for global building completeness work.
verify_notes: Source Cooperative 返回 'Product Not Found' 错误页；该 repo 路径可能已变更，建议查 source.coop/vida 新路径 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: VIDA Combined Google-Microsoft-OSM Open Buildings 由 VIDA 通过 Source Cooperative 发布，将微软、Google 与 OSM 三大建筑足迹数据源去重合并为统一的全球数据集。数据以云原生的 GeoParquet 提供，可从 S3 直接下载，遵循 CDLA-Permissive 2.0（OSM 部分附加 ODbL 共享条款）。它虽相对小众，却对全球建筑完整性研究非常实用，免去了自行融合多源足迹的工作，适用于建筑覆盖度评估与全球暴露度分析。
desc_en: VIDA Combined Google-Microsoft-OSM Open Buildings, released by VIDA through Source Cooperative, deduplicates and merges the Microsoft, Google and OSM building-footprint sources into a unified global dataset. Data is provided as cloud-native GeoParquet for direct download from S3 under CDLA-Permissive 2.0 (with ODbL share-alike for the OSM portion). Though relatively lesser-known, it is highly useful for global building-completeness work, sparing users from conflating multiple footprint sources, and supports coverage assessment and global exposure analysis.

name: 3D GRB Vlaanderen (Buildings)
license: Free open data (Flemish open data license)
notes: Authoritative Flemish 3D building footprints (LoD2). Listed in EUBUCCO ingestion sources.
verify_notes: Page loads but content JS-rendered (Downloadtoepassing Digitaal Vlaanderen) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 3D GRB Vlaanderen（建筑）由佛兰德斯地理信息局（AGIV）发布，覆盖比利时佛兰德斯地区，是权威的佛兰德斯三维建筑足迹数据（LoD2）。数据以 shapefile、GeoPackage 和 CityGML 提供，可下载，遵循佛兰德斯开放数据许可免费使用，并被列为 EUBUCCO 的数据来源之一。适用于区域三维城市建模、建筑分析与城市规划。
desc_en: 3D GRB Vlaanderen (Buildings), published by the Agency for Geographical Information Flanders (AGIV), covers the Flanders region of Belgium as authoritative Flemish 3D building footprints (LoD2). Data is provided as shapefile, GeoPackage and CityGML for download, free under the Flemish open data license, and is listed among EUBUCCO's ingestion sources. It supports regional 3D urban modeling, building analysis and urban planning.

name: ALKIS Hausumringe / Hauskoordinaten
provider: Bundesamt fur Kartographie und Geodaesie (BKG) + state surveying offices (Germany)
theme_raw: buildings + address coordinates | address points + building outlines
notes: Several Bundeslaender (e.g. NRW, BB, BW, NI, HH, BE, TH) now provide ALKIS Hausumringe under Datenlizenz DE; coverage is now nearly nationwide open.
verify_notes: Hauskoordinaten not visible in first page of 108 open-data products; search catalog needed | lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: ALKIS Hausumringe / Hauskoordinaten 是德国的建筑物轮廓与房屋坐标数据，由联邦测绘局（BKG）及各州测绘机构提供，覆盖德国（按州逐步开放）。目前北威州、勃兰登堡、巴符州、下萨克森、汉堡、柏林、图林根等多个联邦州已在 Datenlizenz Deutschland 2.0 / CC BY 下开放，覆盖范围已接近全国。数据以 Shapefile 和 GML 提供，可按州直接下载并见于 GovData 目录。适用于建筑足迹分析、地址定位与国家级制图。
desc_en: ALKIS Hausumringe / Hauskoordinaten are Germany's building outlines and house coordinates, provided by the Federal Agency for Cartography and Geodesy (BKG) and state surveying offices, covering Germany on a state-by-state basis. Several Bundeslaender (e.g. NRW, Brandenburg, Baden-Wuerttemberg, Lower Saxony, Hamburg, Berlin, Thuringia) now offer ALKIS Hausumringe under Datenlizenz Deutschland 2.0 / CC BY, with coverage now nearly nationwide. Data is provided as Shapefile and GML for direct download per Land and via the GovData catalog. It supports building-footprint analysis, address geolocation and national mapping.

name: ArcGIS Living Atlas - ACS Demographic & Poverty Feature Layers
theme_raw: ACS poverty, income, housing, age, education at state/county/tract | global street, POI, building vectors
license: Esri Master License Agreement (free for public/non-commercial; attribution required)
formats: Hosted FeatureService (ArcGIS Online), GeoJSON via REST
notes: 100+ topic layers, paired polygon + centroid layers; auto-updates with ACS releases.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub group page loads but content JS-rendered; not extractable via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该 ArcGIS Living Atlas 群组由 Esri 提供（数据源自美国人口普查局 ACS），收录覆盖美国的人口、贫困等人口统计与社会经济专题要素图层，包含 100 余个主题图层，多为成对的多边形与质心图层，并随 ACS 发布自动更新。数据以 ArcGIS Online 托管 FeatureService 形式提供，可通过 REST 输出 GeoJSON 并经 API 访问，遵循 Esri 主许可协议（面向公共/非商业用途免费，需署名）。适用于美国人口与社会经济空间分析及专题制图。
desc_en: This ArcGIS Living Atlas group, provided by Esri with data from the US Census ACS, hosts demographic and socioeconomic feature layers on poverty, population and related topics covering the USA, with over 100 topic layers, many as paired polygon and centroid layers, that auto-update with ACS releases. Data is offered as ArcGIS Online hosted FeatureServices, with GeoJSON available via REST and API access, under the Esri Master License Agreement (free for public/non-commercial use with attribution required). It supports US demographic and socioeconomic spatial analysis and thematic mapping.

name: Australia GNAF - Geocoded National Address File
license: Open (G-NAF Open End User Licence) - free since 2016
formats: CSV with coords (convertible to point shapefile/GeoJSON)
time_span: updated daily or weekly depending on state/territory (G-NAF Live)
notes: Underlies sources/au/countrywide.json.
verify_notes: License details on linked copyright/terms pages | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: G-NAF（地理编码的国家地址文件）是澳大利亚权威的官方地址数据集，由 Geoscape Australia 维护，并通过 data.gov.au 开放发布。它覆盖全澳，将地址与经纬度坐标关联，常用于地址匹配、地理编码、配送与公共服务规划。数据以带坐标的 CSV 提供，可转换为点状 shapefile 或 GeoJSON，并随各州更新频率定期刷新（G-NAF Live）。使用受 Geoscape 条款约束，但提供开放的 Core/Open 版本。
desc_en: G-NAF (the Geocoded National Address File) is Australia's authoritative national address dataset, maintained by Geoscape Australia and published openly via data.gov.au. It links addresses across the country to latitude/longitude coordinates and is widely used for geocoding, address matching, delivery logistics, and public-service planning. Data is distributed as CSV with coordinates (convertible to point shapefile or GeoJSON) and refreshed on a daily-to-weekly basis depending on the state or territory. Use is governed by Geoscape terms, with open Core/Open editions available.

name: Awesome CityGML (Open 3D Semantic City Models)
theme_raw: Semantic 3D building / city vector models (LoD1-4) | Curated catalog of GeoJSON datasets + tools
formats_now: CityGML, OBJ, FBX, SKP, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, GML, DWG, DXF, KML, glTF
feature_count: More than 215 million buildings freely available; 2.75 billion global LoD1; 68 regions/cities + 2 artificial + 1 world
notes: Verified: catalog of open semantic 3D vector datasets.
verify_notes: Curated list of 3D city models | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Awesome CityGML 是一个社区维护的精选索引，汇总全球开放的语义化三维城市模型数据。它收录了 22 个以上国家、68 个地区或城市的市政级数据集，主要采用 CityGML、CityJSON 格式，部分提供 3D Tiles。目录指向超过 2.15 亿栋可免费获取的建筑，以及约 27.5 亿栋的全球 LoD1 模型。该资源采用 MIT 许可，是寻找开放三维语义建筑数据的便捷入口，适合城市建模、能耗模拟与可视化研究。
desc_en: Awesome CityGML is a community-curated index that catalogs open semantic 3D city-model datasets from around the world. It aggregates municipal datasets across 22+ countries and 68 regions or cities, predominantly in CityGML and CityJSON formats with some 3D Tiles. The catalog points to more than 215 million freely available buildings plus roughly 2.75 billion global LoD1 models. Released under the MIT license, it serves as a convenient entry point for locating open 3D semantic building data, useful for urban modeling, energy simulation, and visualization research.

name: BAG - Basisregistratie Adressen en Gebouwen
theme_raw: addresses + building polygons (with year built, function, area) | addresses + building footprints
formats: GML/XML (BAG Extract); REST API; WFS via PDOK
notes: Includes construction year, intended use; one of the cleanest national cadastral building registers.
verify_notes: Monthly full extract + daily mutations; eHerkenning required since 2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BAG（地址与建筑基础登记）是荷兰国家土地登记机构 Kadaster 维护的官方建筑与地址登记库，覆盖荷兰全境。它是欧洲最干净、最权威的国家级建筑登记之一，包含建造年份、用途等属性。数据以 GML/XML（BAG Extract）形式直接下载，并通过 PDOK 提供 REST API 与 WFS 服务，按月或按日更新。采用 CC 公共领域标识，可自由用于城市规划、统计分析与地图制作。
desc_en: BAG (Basisregistratie Adressen en Gebouwen, the Addresses and Buildings Base Register) is the official Dutch national register of buildings and addresses, maintained by Kadaster and covering the entire Netherlands. It is among Europe's cleanest and most authoritative national building registers, including attributes such as construction year and intended use. Data is available as GML/XML via BAG Extract and through a REST API and WFS served by PDOK, with monthly or daily updates. Released under a CC Public Domain Mark, it is freely usable for urban planning, statistics, and mapping.

name: BAN - Base Adresse Nationale (France)
provider: IGN / DINUM / La Poste / OpenStreetMap France
formats_now: CSV, MVT vector tiles, WFS, WMS, Addok
time_span: daily updates; weekly snapshots for past year, monthly archives for prior years
notes: Primary FR address source referenced under sources/fr/
verify_notes: Daily updates by department/national | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BAN（国家地址库）是法国官方的权威地址参考数据集，由 IGN、DINUM、法国邮政与 OpenStreetMap France 共同维护，覆盖法国本土及海外省，约 2600 万个地址。它是法国地理编码与地址服务的主数据源，提供带经纬度的 CSV、GeoJSON 和 Shapefile，可按省份批量下载。数据每日更新，并保留近一年的周快照与更早的月度归档。采用开放许可（Licence Ouverte / etalab-2.0），可自由用于地理编码、配送和公共服务。
desc_en: BAN (Base Adresse Nationale) is France's authoritative national address reference dataset, jointly maintained by IGN, DINUM, La Poste, and OpenStreetMap France, covering metropolitan France and overseas departments with roughly 26 million addresses. It is the primary source for French geocoding and address services, offered as CSV with lat/lon, GeoJSON, and Shapefile, downloadable in bulk by département. Data is updated daily, with weekly snapshots retained for the past year and monthly archives for earlier periods. Released under the open Licence Ouverte (etalab-2.0), it is free for geocoding, delivery, and public-service uses.

name: Canada Open Database of Addresses (ODA) - Statistics Canada
provider: Statistics Canada (compiled from provincial/municipal open sources)
formats: CSV with lon/lat (convertible to vector point)
notes: sources/ca/* uses ODA + provincial portals (BC Civic Addresses, Alberta, Ontario MPAC-derived).
verify_notes: v1.0 ~10M records, 20+ standardized variables | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 加拿大开放地址数据库（ODA）由加拿大统计局从各省与市级开放数据源汇编而成，覆盖加拿大全国，但各省的覆盖程度不一。它包含约一千万条带经纬度的地址记录，可转换为矢量点。数据以 CSV 形式批量开放，采用加拿大开放政府许可。该数据库是构建加拿大地址数据的顶层来源，常与 BC、Alberta、Ontario 等省级门户结合使用，适用于地理编码、人口分析和服务规划。
desc_en: The Canada Open Database of Addresses (ODA) is compiled by Statistics Canada from provincial and municipal open sources and covers the country nationally, though coverage varies by province. It contains roughly 10 million address records with longitude/latitude that can be converted to vector points. Distributed in bulk as CSV under the Open Government Licence – Canada, it serves as a top-level source for Canadian address data, often combined with provincial portals (BC, Alberta, Ontario). It supports geocoding, demographic analysis, and service planning.

name: CMAB - China Multi-Attribute Building Dataset
coverage: China, 3,667 natural cities, ~31M buildings, 23.6 billion m^2 rooftops
formats_now: 未明示（含代码与处理后数据）
feature_count: total rooftop area of 23.6 billion square meters in 3,667 natural cities in China
notes: First national multi-attribute building dataset: rooftop, height, structure, function, age, style, quality. Built with OCRNet + XGBoost + CLIP + YOLOv8 on RS + 60M street-view images.
splink_merged_from: CMAB - China Multi-Attribute Building Dataset (32M 建筑)
verify_notes: CMAB v5 (2025-03) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CMAB（中国多属性建筑数据集）由清华大学龙瀛团队发布，是首个全国范围的多属性建筑数据集。它覆盖中国 3667 个自然城市、约 3100 万栋建筑，屋顶总面积达 236 亿平方米，包含屋顶、高度、结构、功能、年代、风格与质量等多维属性。数据为矢量多边形加属性表（shapefile/parquet），采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，第 5 版于 2025 年发布。它结合遥感影像、6000 万张街景与多种深度学习模型构建，适合城市研究与建筑分析。
desc_en: CMAB (the China Multi-Attribute Building dataset), released by Tsinghua University's Long Ying group, is the first nationwide multi-attribute building dataset. It covers 3,667 natural cities across China with about 31 million buildings totaling 23.6 billion square meters of rooftop area, and includes rooftop, height, structure, function, age, style, and quality attributes. Provided as vector polygons with attribute tables (shapefile/parquet) under CC-BY-4.0, with Version 5 published in 2025. It was built from remote-sensing imagery and 60 million street-view images using OCRNet, XGBoost, CLIP, and YOLOv8, making it valuable for urban research and building analysis.

name: Daylight Map Distribution of OpenStreetMap
theme_raw: OSM full planet + Microsoft/Esri building footprints | Quality-checked global OSM snapshot
formats: OSM PBF + GeoParquet (osm_features ~1B features; osm_elements ~7B nodes; earth table)
notes: Verified. Athena-optimized parquet; preferred over raw planet.osm for analytics.
verify_notes: Quarterly updates by Meta | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Daylight 是 OpenStreetMap 的一个经过质量检查的全球地图发行版，由 Meta 发起并通过 AWS Open Data 托管。它对原始 OSM 数据进行了清理与稳定化，更适合大规模分析使用。数据提供 OSM PBF 与针对 Athena 优化的 GeoParquet 格式（osm_features 约 10 亿要素，osm_elements 约 70 亿节点），存放于 S3 上免费获取。采用 ODbL 许可，在分析场景中通常优于直接使用 planet.osm。
desc_en: Daylight is a quality-checked global distribution of OpenStreetMap, sponsored by Meta and hosted through AWS Open Data. It cleans and stabilizes raw OSM data to make it more suitable for large-scale analytics. The distribution provides OSM PBF along with Athena-optimized GeoParquet (osm_features with roughly 1 billion features and osm_elements with about 7 billion nodes), freely available on S3. Released under the ODbL license, it is generally preferred over raw planet.osm for analytical workloads.

name: devdatalab/shrug-public (code + spatial helpers)
theme_raw: tooling for SHRUG polygons | tooling + polygon release tags
formats_now: Issue tracker repo; data via SHRUG site
notes: Crosswalk scripts between shrid and raw census polygons; useful when building custom merges.
verify_notes: v2.1 Pakora release Oct 2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Development Data Lab 的 SHRUG（共享社会经济地理数据库）公开代码仓库，提供针对印度的空间辅助工具与代码。它包含在 shrid 标识符与原始人口普查多边形之间转换的 crosswalk 脚本，并提供 Stata、Python 与 shapefile 辅助工具。最新版本 v2.1 于 2024 年发布。该仓库在构建印度自定义数据合并、跨年度行政区匹配时尤为有用，许可证以官方文档（docs.devdatalab.org）为准。
desc_en: This is the Development Data Lab's public code repository for SHRUG (the Socioeconomic High-resolution Rural-Urban Geographic dataset), providing spatial helpers and code focused on India. It includes crosswalk scripts that translate between the shrid identifier and raw census polygons, along with Stata, Python, and shapefile helpers. The latest release is v2.1 (2024). The repository is especially useful when building custom data merges or matching administrative units across census years for India; licensing is governed by the official documentation at docs.devdatalab.org.

name: East Asian Buildings - 280M Building Footprints Vector Dataset
provider: Sun Yat-sen University (Shi et al.) / Zenodo
coverage: East Asia: China, Japan, North Korea (DPRK), South Korea, Mongolia; 2,897 cities; 281,093,433 buildings
doi_or_citation: 10.5281/zenodo.8174931 ; Shi et al. (2024) 'The Last Puzzle of Global Building Footprints—Mapping 280 Million Buildings in East Asia Based on VHR Images', Journal of Remote Sensing, DOI 10.34133/remotesensing.0138
notes: Single archive bundles all five countries; particularly valuable for DPRK and Mongolia where almost no other open building vector data exists. Companion paper DOI 10.34133/remotesensing.0138 details derivation from VHR imagery (OA 89.63%, F1 82.55%).
verify_notes: Zenodo DOI redirect, normal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: East Asian Buildings 是一个覆盖东亚的建筑足迹矢量数据集，由中山大学 Shi 等人发布于 Zenodo。它涵盖中国、日本、朝鲜、韩国与蒙古共 2897 座城市、约 2.81 亿栋建筑，全部打包于一个 23.1 GB 的 shapefile 压缩档中。该数据由甚高分辨率影像派生（总体精度约 89.6%），采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它对朝鲜与蒙古等几乎没有其他开放建筑矢量数据的地区尤为珍贵，适合区域城市与人口研究。
desc_en: East Asian Buildings is a building-footprint vector dataset covering East Asia, released on Zenodo by Shi et al. of Sun Yat-sen University. It spans China, Japan, North Korea, South Korea, and Mongolia across 2,897 cities and about 281 million buildings, all bundled in a single 23.1 GB shapefile archive. Derived from very-high-resolution imagery (overall accuracy around 89.6%) and released under CC BY 4.0, it is particularly valuable for North Korea and Mongolia, where almost no other open building vector data exists, supporting regional urban and population studies.

name: Estonia LOD1 Building Models
notes: National LoD1 3D building models.
verify_notes: Attribution: Republic of Estonia Land and Spatial Development Board 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是爱沙尼亚土地委员会（Maa-amet）发布的全国 LoD1 三维建筑模型，覆盖爱沙尼亚全境，约 91.8 万个建筑对象。数据以 shapefile、地理数据库、Wavefront 与 CityGML 等多种格式提供，可直接下载，文件规模约数百 MB。采用爱沙尼亚开放数据许可（需署名）。这类官方 LoD1 模型适合城市三维可视化、太阳能潜力评估与建筑环境分析。
desc_en: This is the Estonian Land Board (Maa-amet) national LoD1 3D building model dataset, covering all of Estonia with roughly 918,000 building objects. Data is offered in several formats including shapefile, geodatabase, Wavefront, and CityGML, available for direct download at a few hundred megabytes per package. It is released under Estonia's open-data license with attribution required. Such authoritative LoD1 models are well suited to 3D urban visualization, solar-potential assessment, and built-environment analysis.

name: EUBUCCO v0.1 - European Building Stock
provider: TU Berlin / MCC (Milojevic-Dupont, Wagner, Nachtigall et al.)
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | Energy & infrastructure | Physical geography (natural earth)
theme_raw: buildings (type, height, floors, construction year) | buildings (with height/type/year attrs)
license: Mixed (per-source); aggregate distributed openly via Zenodo/Source.coop
license_now: 页面未明示 license (代码 GitHub 公开)
notes: Best harmonized cross-EU building dataset; bibliographic anchor for energy/climate research.
verify_notes: 最新版本 v0.2; 域名实际为 eubucco.org, eubucco.com 仍可达 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EUBUCCO 是迄今最佳的跨欧洲协调建筑数据集，由柏林工业大学与 MCC 团队（Milojevic-Dupont 等）构建。它整合并标准化了 EU27、英国、挪威与瑞士的建筑数据，包含超过 3.22 亿栋单体建筑。数据提供 GeoPackage、CSV 与 GeoParquet 格式，可直接下载或随论文补充材料获取（DOI: 10.1038/s41597-023-02040-2）。它是能源与气候研究的重要参考基准，适合建筑存量、能耗与城市形态分析。
desc_en: EUBUCCO is the best harmonized cross-European building dataset to date, built by teams at TU Berlin and MCC (Milojevic-Dupont et al.). It integrates and standardizes building data across the EU27 plus the UK, Norway, and Switzerland, comprising more than 322 million individual buildings. Data is provided in GeoPackage, CSV, and GeoParquet formats via direct download and paper supplements (DOI 10.1038/s41597-023-02040-2). It serves as a key bibliographic anchor for energy and climate research and supports building-stock, energy, and urban-form analyses.

name: French Cadastral Data (Etalab)
theme_raw: Cadastral parcels, buildings, sections | 法国地籍 (地块、建筑)
license_now: Open data (Licence Ouverte presumed, not stated on landing)
formats_now: Cadastral parcels/sections/buildings (formats not listed on landing)
notes: Non-English; granular parcel-level vector
verify_notes: Active French government open-data cadastre portal, run by DINUM | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是由法国财政总局（DGFiP）与 Etalab 发布的法国地籍数据，覆盖法国本土及海外省，提供地块级的精细矢量。数据以 GeoJSON、shapefile 与 EDIGÉO 等格式开放获取，通常遵循开放许可（Licence Ouverte）。该数据适合用于地块边界、产权与土地利用相关的分析，以及与地址、建筑数据的叠加。
desc_en: This is French cadastral data published by the DGFiP and Etalab, covering metropolitan France and overseas departments and providing granular parcel-level vectors. Data is openly available in GeoJSON, shapefile, and EDIGÉO formats, generally under an open license (Licence Ouverte). It is well suited to analyses involving parcel boundaries, property, and land use, and to overlaying with address and building datasets.

name: Geoscape G-NAF (Geocoded National Address File)
license: End User Licence based on CC-BY-4.0 (Open G-NAF)
notes: Authoritative AU addressing; ~5GB unpacked; mandatory attribution & EULA.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden; G-NAF dataset accessible via geoscape.com.au | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是通过 data.gov.au 发布的 Geoscape G-NAF（地理编码的国家地址文件），是澳大利亚权威的地址数据源，约 1590 万个地址。数据以管道分隔的 PSV 关系表形式提供，已完成地理编码，解压后约 5GB，需点击接受 EULA 并署名使用。开放版基于 CC-BY-4.0 的最终用户许可。它适用于全澳范围的地址匹配、地理编码与空间分析。
desc_en: This is the Geoscape G-NAF (Geocoded National Address File) distributed via data.gov.au, the authoritative Australian addressing source with roughly 15.9 million addresses. Data is provided as pipe-delimited PSV relational tables, fully geocoded, and is about 5GB unpacked, requiring click-through EULA acceptance and mandatory attribution. The open edition is under an end-user licence based on CC-BY-4.0. It supports nationwide address matching, geocoding, and spatial analysis across Australia.

name: GHS-OBAT — Global Human Settlement Open Building Attribute Table
what_changes: Enriches ~2.3 billion Overture building footprints with thematic attributes (construction epoch, height, residential/non-residential function, compactness) by fusing GHSL, OSM and national open datasets onto the Overture geometries.
notes: JRC Data Catalogue product accompanying a Scientific Data paper; one of the largest derivations of Overture buildings to date.
splink_merged_from: GHS-OBAT - Global Human Settlement Open Building Attribute Table
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GHS-OBAT（全球人居开放建筑属性表）是欧盟联合研究中心（JRC）数据目录中的产品，伴随一篇 Scientific Data 论文发布。它是迄今基于 Overture 建筑数据规模最大的衍生产品之一，提供建筑属性信息。数据采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可（DOI: 10.2905/3R0H-0M85）。该数据集适合全球或大区域的建筑属性分析与人居研究，元数据中部分细节（覆盖范围、格式）未完整给出。
desc_en: GHS-OBAT (the Global Human Settlement Open Building Attribute Table) is a product in the EU JRC Data Catalogue, accompanying a Scientific Data paper. It is among the largest derivations of Overture buildings to date, providing building-attribute information. The dataset is released under CC-BY 4.0 (DOI 10.2905/3R0H-0M85). It is suited to global or large-region building-attribute analysis and human-settlement research, though some metadata details such as exact coverage and formats are not fully specified here.

name: IdMyPhBuildingFootprints (Indonesia, Malaysia, Philippines)
notes: SEA-focused release; complements OSM and Overture Buildings.
verify_notes: ~88.6M polygons; ID/MY/PH | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是微软发布的印度尼西亚、马来西亚与菲律宾建筑足迹数据集，约 8860 万个由计算机自动提取的多边形。数据以 GeoJSON 格式开放获取，采用 ODbL 许可。它聚焦东南亚地区，可补充 OpenStreetMap 与 Overture Buildings 的覆盖，适合区域建筑制图、人口估算与灾害风险分析。
desc_en: This is Microsoft's building-footprints dataset for Indonesia, Malaysia, and the Philippines, comprising roughly 88.6 million computer-generated polygons. Data is openly available as GeoJSON under the ODbL license. Focused on Southeast Asia, it complements OpenStreetMap and Overture Buildings coverage and is well suited to regional building mapping, population estimation, and disaster-risk analysis.

name: KenyaNigeriaBuildingFootprints
notes: Country-level partitioned ZIPs.
verify_notes: ~50.5M polygons; Kenya+Nigeria | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是微软发布的肯尼亚与尼日利亚建筑足迹数据集，约 5050 万个由计算机自动提取的多边形，按国家分区打包为 ZIP。数据以 GeoJSON 格式开放获取，采用 ODbL 许可。它为非洲两个数据相对稀缺的国家提供大规模建筑矢量，适合人口估算、基础设施规划与人道主义应用。
desc_en: This is Microsoft's building-footprints dataset for Kenya and Nigeria, with roughly 50.5 million computer-generated polygons packaged as country-partitioned ZIPs. Data is openly available as GeoJSON under the ODbL license. It provides large-scale building vectors for two African countries with relatively sparse data, supporting population estimation, infrastructure planning, and humanitarian applications.

name: Microsoft Australia Building Footprints
verify_notes: 11.33M building polygons; EPSG:4326; imagery 2013-2018 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是微软发布的澳大利亚建筑足迹数据集，约 1133 万个由计算机自动提取的足迹，影像年代约为 2018 年。数据以 GeoJSON 格式提供，压缩包约 845MB，采用 ODbL 许可，可通过 Azure blob 直接下载。它为全澳提供机器生成的建筑矢量，适合与 G-NAF 等地址数据结合，用于建筑制图与空间分析。
desc_en: This is Microsoft's Australia Building Footprints dataset, comprising about 11.33 million computer-generated footprints with imagery vintage around 2018. Data is provided as GeoJSON in an approximately 845MB zip under the ODbL license, downloadable directly from Azure blob storage. It offers machine-generated building vectors for all of Australia, well suited to combining with address data such as G-NAF for building mapping and spatial analysis.

name: Microsoft Canadian Building Footprints
verify_notes: 11.84M buildings; last release Jun 2019 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是微软发布的加拿大建筑足迹数据集，约 1184 万个由计算机自动生成的足迹，覆盖加拿大所有省与地区。数据以按省打包的 GeoJSON 提供，解压后超过 3GB（安大略约 808MB，努纳武特仅约 1MB），采用 ODbL 许可，可通过 Azure blob 开放下载。它为全加拿大提供机器生成的建筑矢量，适合建筑制图、人口估算与空间分析。
desc_en: This is Microsoft's Canadian Building Footprints dataset, comprising about 11.84 million computer-generated footprints covering all provinces and territories. Data is provided as GeoJSON zipped per province, exceeding 3GB unzipped (Ontario around 808MB, Nunavut roughly 1MB), under the ODbL license and openly downloadable via Azure blob storage. It supplies machine-generated building vectors for all of Canada, well suited to building mapping, population estimation, and spatial analysis.

name: NAD - National Address Database (US DOT)
notes: Top-level US source aggregating state-contributed address points; referenced via sources/us/
verify_notes: WebFetch 返回 403 Forbidden，疑似 WAF/反爬；不代表站点失效，浏览器访问可能正常 | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: NAD（国家地址数据库）由美国交通部维护，是汇集各州贡献地址点的美国顶层地址数据源，约 8000 万个地址点。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON 与 CSV 等多种格式提供，可直接下载压缩包。作为联邦数据，它属于公有领域/开放许可。该数据库适合全美范围的地理编码、应急响应、交通与公共服务规划。
desc_en: NAD (the National Address Database) is maintained by the US Department of Transportation and serves as a top-level US address source aggregating state-contributed address points, totaling roughly 80 million points. Data is available in Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON, and CSV via direct download of zipped files. As a federal product it is public domain / openly licensed. The database supports nationwide geocoding, emergency response, transportation, and public-service planning.

name: NYC PLUTO + Building Footprints
provider: NYC Department of City Planning + NYC DoITT
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | POI / places | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: buildings + lot-level land use/POI | addresses + building footprints
notes: PLUTO links footprints to MapPLUTO lot polygons - rich for commercial floor area, year built, owner type.
verify_notes: nyc.gov 403 to WebFetch; page expected to be live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是纽约市规划局（DCP）与 DoITT 联合发布的 PLUTO 与建筑足迹数据，覆盖整个纽约市。PLUTO 将建筑足迹与 MapPLUTO 地块多边形关联，提供商业建筑面积、建造年份、业主类型等丰富属性。数据以 Shapefile、地理数据库与 CSV 形式开放获取。它是城市规划、房地产分析与土地利用研究的高价值数据源。
desc_en: This is the NYC PLUTO and building-footprints data jointly published by the NYC Department of City Planning and DoITT, covering the entire city. PLUTO links building footprints to MapPLUTO lot polygons, providing rich attributes such as commercial floor area, year built, and owner type. Data is openly available as Shapefile, geodatabase, and CSV. It is a high-value source for urban planning, real-estate analysis, and land-use research.

name: OneMap Singapore API (SLA)
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | POI / places | Public services
theme_raw: Authoritative base map, themes, geocoding | buildings + addresses + POIs
license: SLA terms; free with API key
formats: GeoJSON via REST, vector tiles, WMTS
notes: Complements data.gov.sg with live thematic layers (schools, hawker, eldercare). Less-known outside SG but widely cited.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OneMap 是新加坡土地管理局（SLA）提供的官方地图与地理空间 API，覆盖整个新加坡。它通过 REST 提供 GeoJSON，并支持矢量瓦片与 WMTS，补充 data.gov.sg 的众多实时专题图层（如学校、熟食中心、长者服务）。注册后可免费获取 API 密钥，使用受 SLA 条款约束。它在新加坡境内被广泛引用，适合本地地理编码、路径规划与城市服务应用。
desc_en: OneMap is the official map and geospatial API from the Singapore Land Authority (SLA), covering all of Singapore. It serves GeoJSON via REST and supports vector tiles and WMTS, complementing data.gov.sg with numerous live thematic layers such as schools, hawker centers, and eldercare. An API key is free with registration, with use governed by SLA terms. Widely cited within Singapore, it is well suited to local geocoding, routing, and urban-service applications.

name: OSM-Derived Building Classification Dataset for the United States (residential/non-residential)
provider: de Arruda et al. (Oak Ridge National Laboratory / GMU) — hosted on Open Science Framework
coverage: United States, all 50 states + DC; 67,705,475 buildings
formats: GeoPackage (.gpkg), one per US county; packaged in 8 ZIPs (metro/micropolitan/other)
doi_or_citation: Paper DOI 10.1038/s41597-024-04046-w (Sci Data, 2024). OSF project: osf.io/utgae
notes: UTM projected; classification derived from OSM tags + Microsoft Building Footprints; companion code at github.com/gmuggs/OSM-Building-Classification
verify_notes: Duplicate of row 2; OSF page accessible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是面向美国的 OSM 派生建筑分类数据集，由 de Arruda 等人（橡树岭国家实验室/乔治梅森大学）制作并托管于 OSF，覆盖全美 50 州及华盛顿特区，约 6770 万栋建筑，区分住宅与非住宅。数据以 GeoPackage 提供（每县一个，按都市/微都市分装于 8 个 ZIP），采用 UTM 投影，CC BY 4.0 许可。分类基于 OSM 标签与微软建筑足迹融合，附配套代码，适合机器学习训练与土地利用分析。
desc_en: This is an OSM-derived building-classification dataset for the United States, produced by de Arruda et al. (Oak Ridge National Laboratory / GMU) and hosted on OSF, covering all 50 states plus DC with about 67.7 million buildings labeled residential or non-residential. Data is provided as GeoPackage (one per county, packaged in 8 ZIPs by metro/micropolitan), in UTM projection under CC BY 4.0. The classification fuses OSM tags with Microsoft Building Footprints and ships with companion code, making it useful for machine-learning training and land-use analysis.

name: OSM-derived US Building Classification Dataset
provider: Oak Ridge National Lab / authors of Nature SD 2024
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | Land cover & land use
notes: Classifies USA Microsoft footprints using OSM features. Useful labelset for ML training.
verify_notes: Redirects to Nature IDP cookie consent | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是发表于 Scientific Data（2024）的美国 OSM 派生建筑分类数据集论文，由橡树岭国家实验室相关作者完成，覆盖全美约 6770 万栋建筑。该工作利用 OSM 要素对美国微软建筑足迹进行分类，提供 GeoPackage/parquet 格式数据，采用 CC BY 许可（DOI: 10.1038/s41597-024-04046-w）。它是面向建筑用途分类的高质量标注集，适合机器学习训练与土地利用研究。
desc_en: This is the Scientific Data (2024) publication of the OSM-derived US building-classification dataset, authored by Oak Ridge National Laboratory researchers and covering about 67.7 million buildings nationwide. The work classifies US Microsoft building footprints using OSM features, providing data in GeoPackage/parquet under a CC BY license (DOI 10.1038/s41597-024-04046-w). It is a high-quality labeled set for building-use classification, well suited to machine-learning training and land-use research.

name: SouthAmericaBuildingFootprints
notes: Country-partitioned downloads.
verify_notes: 44.5M building polygons; EPSG:4326 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是微软发布的南美洲建筑足迹数据集，约 4450 万个建筑多边形，覆盖南美所有国家，影像年代约为 2020–2021 年。数据以 GeoJSON 格式按国家分区下载，总量约 15GB，采用 ODbL 许可。它为南美提供大规模机器生成的建筑矢量，适合人口估算、城市增长监测与基础设施规划。
desc_en: This is Microsoft's South America Building Footprints dataset, with about 44.5 million building polygons covering all countries in the continent, with imagery vintage around 2020–2021. Data is downloadable as GeoJSON partitioned by country, totaling roughly 15GB, under the ODbL license. It provides large-scale machine-generated building vectors for South America, well suited to population estimation, urban-growth monitoring, and infrastructure planning.

name: SpaceNet
theme_raw: Buildings, roads, flood, off-nadir labels paired with imagery | building footprints, road networks, flood masks
coverage: Multiple global AOIs (Rio, Vegas, Khartoum, Paris, Shanghai, etc.)
notes: Foundational benchmark vector labels for geospatial ML
verify_notes: AWS Open Data registry entry live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SpaceNet 是地理空间机器学习领域的基础性基准数据集，由 SpaceNet LLC、Maxar 与 IQT CosmiQ 等合作发布。它覆盖里约、拉斯维加斯、喀土穆、巴黎、上海等多个全球感兴趣区，提供 GeoJSON 矢量标注（建筑、道路等）与配套的 Maxar 影像。数据托管于 AWS S3，许可方式因子集而异。SpaceNet 被广泛用于建筑提取、道路网络与变化检测等遥感深度学习任务的训练与评测。
desc_en: SpaceNet is a foundational benchmark dataset for geospatial machine learning, released by SpaceNet LLC, Maxar, and IQT CosmiQ. It covers multiple global areas of interest including Rio, Las Vegas, Khartoum, Paris, and Shanghai, providing GeoJSON vector labels (buildings, roads, and more) alongside companion Maxar imagery. Data is hosted on AWS S3, with licensing varying by subset. SpaceNet is widely used for training and evaluating remote-sensing deep-learning tasks such as building extraction, road-network mapping, and change detection.

name: Taiwan NLSC National Mapping Service Cloud (WFS)
theme_raw: buildings, POI, cadastre | 通用電子地圖 / 國土利用調查 / 基本地形圖 / 地籍圖
access: WFS / WMS / API (registration required for vector WFS)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://maps.nlsc.gov.tw/S09SOA/homePage.action?Language=EN))
notes: 18 vector WFS need application; many WMS/WMTS open with no registration
verify_notes: 60 秒内无响应; 站点可能慢或临时不可达 | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://maps.nlsc.gov.tw/S09SOA/homePage.action?Language=EN))
desc_zh: 这是台湾内政部国土测绘中心（NLSC）的国家测绘服务云，覆盖台湾全境，提供 200 多项服务、880 多个图层。服务通过 WFS（GML）、WMTS 与矢量瓦片发布，采用分级授权：多数 WMS/WMTS 无需注册即可开放使用，而 18 项矢量 WFS 及地籍数据需申请。它是获取台湾官方地形、地址与地籍空间数据的权威入口，适合制图与本地空间分析。
desc_en: This is Taiwan's National Mapping Service Cloud from the NLSC (Ministry of the Interior), covering all of Taiwan with over 200 services and 880+ layers. Services are published via WFS (GML), WMTS, and vector tiles under tiered access: most WMS/WMTS layers are open without registration, while 18 vector WFS services and cadastral data require application. It is the authoritative gateway to Taiwan's official topographic, address, and cadastral spatial data, well suited to mapping and local spatial analysis.

name: Uganda-Tanzania-Building-Footprints
notes: Early Africa release; complements Google Open Buildings.
verify_notes: Uganda 6.93M + Tanzania 11.01M buildings; EPSG:4326; AI for Humanitarian Action / HOT partnership | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是微软发布的乌干达与坦桑尼亚建筑足迹数据集，约 1794 万个建筑足迹（乌干达约 693 万、坦桑尼亚约 1101 万），于 2019 年发布。数据以 GeoJSON 格式开放获取，解压后乌干达约 1339MB、坦桑尼亚约 2202MB，采用 ODbL 许可。作为非洲早期发布的建筑矢量，它可补充 Google Open Buildings，适合人口估算与人道主义规划。
desc_en: This is Microsoft's Uganda and Tanzania Building Footprints dataset, with about 17.94 million footprints (roughly 6.93 million for Uganda and 11.01 million for Tanzania), released in 2019. Data is openly available as GeoJSON, with unzipped sizes of about 1,339MB for Uganda and 2,202MB for Tanzania, under the ODbL license. As an early African building-vector release, it complements Google Open Buildings and is well suited to population estimation and humanitarian planning.

name: 3D BAG
formats_now: CityJSON, GeoPackage, OBJ, WMS, WFS, FlatGeobuf, IFC
notes: National 3D building dataset combining BAG + AHN.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 3D BAG 是荷兰全国性的三维建筑数据集，由代尔夫特理工大学三维地理信息组与 Kadaster 联合制作。它将 BAG 建筑登记与 AHN 国家高程数据结合，生成多层次的三维建筑模型。数据以 GeoPackage、CityJSON 与 OBJ 格式提供，可下载或通过 API 获取，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它适用于城市三维可视化、太阳能潜力评估、噪声与风环境模拟等应用。
desc_en: 3D BAG is a national 3D building dataset for the Netherlands, produced jointly by TU Delft's 3D geoinformation group and Kadaster. It combines the BAG building register with the AHN national elevation data to generate multi-level 3D building models. Data is provided as GeoPackage, CityJSON, and OBJ via download or API, under a CC BY 4.0 license. It is well suited to 3D urban visualization, solar-potential assessment, and noise and wind-environment simulation.

name: 3D-Gebaeudemodell LoD2 NRW
notes: Authoritative state-wide LoD2 building models.
verify_notes: Path no longer exists; product structure restructured on opengeodata.nrw.de | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 这是 Geobasis NRW（科隆行政区政府）发布的北莱茵-威斯特法伦州 LoD2 三维建筑模型，覆盖德国 NRW 州全境。数据以 CityGML LoD2 格式打包提供，可直接下载，采用 dl-de/by-2-0 许可。作为州级权威的 LoD2 建筑模型，它带有屋顶结构等细节，适合城市三维建模、能耗与太阳能分析及可视化。
desc_en: This is the LoD2 3D building-model dataset for North Rhine-Westphalia, published by Geobasis NRW (Bezirksregierung Köln), covering the entire German state of NRW. Data is provided as packaged CityGML LoD2 for direct download under the dl-de/by-2-0 license. As an authoritative state-wide LoD2 building model with roof-structure detail, it is well suited to 3D urban modeling, energy and solar analysis, and visualization.

name: 3D-Gebäudemodell NRW LoD2
formats_now: CityGML, SLPK, WMS, OGC API, Scene Server
verify_notes: Updated formats now include OGC API and Scene Server | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Geobasis NRW 在 open.nrw 门户上发布的北莱茵-威斯特法伦州 LoD2 三维建筑模型，覆盖德国 NRW 州。数据以 CityGML 格式开放下载，采用 dl-zero-de/2.0 许可（接近公有领域）。它是州级权威的 LoD2 建筑矢量，适合三维城市建模、能耗与太阳能潜力分析及可视化。
desc_en: This is the LoD2 3D building-model dataset for North Rhine-Westphalia published by Geobasis NRW on the open.nrw portal, covering the German state of NRW. Data is openly downloadable in CityGML format under the dl-zero-de/2.0 license, which approximates public domain. It is an authoritative state-wide LoD2 building vector, well suited to 3D urban modeling, energy and solar-potential analysis, and visualization.

name: 3D-Gebäudemodelle LoD2 Bayern
notes: State-level LoD2 building vectors; EUBUCCO source gov-germany-bavaria.
verify_notes: Page loads (header/template visible); detailed product description not extracted by fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是巴伐利亚测绘局发布的巴伐利亚州 LoD2 三维建筑模型，覆盖德国巴伐利亚州。数据以 CityGML 格式开放下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它是州级权威的 LoD2 建筑矢量，也是 EUBUCCO 的德国数据源之一，适合三维城市建模、能耗与太阳能分析及可视化。
desc_en: This is the LoD2 3D building-model dataset for Bavaria, published by the Bavarian State Office for Survey and Geoinformation, covering the German state of Bavaria. Data is openly downloadable in CityGML format under a CC BY 4.0 license. It is an authoritative state-wide LoD2 building vector and also serves as one of EUBUCCO's German sources, well suited to 3D urban modeling, energy and solar analysis, and visualization.

name: 3D-GloBFP — Americas, Africa, Oceania (3D Global Building Footprints, 2020)
provider: Che, Y., Li, X., Liu, X. et al. (Sun Yat-sen University / collaborators)
notes: One of three regional partitions of 3D-GloBFP released with ESSD paper 10.5194/essd-16-5357-2024.
verify_notes: DOI resolves to Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 3D-GloBFP（带高度的全球三维建筑足迹，2020 年）面向美洲、非洲与大洋洲的区域分卷，由中山大学 Che 等人发布于 Zenodo。数据以按空间网格分块的 shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。它是随 ESSD 论文（10.5194/essd-16-5357-2024）发布的三个区域分卷之一，含建筑高度信息，适合城市形态、能耗与三维制图研究。
desc_en: This is the Americas, Africa, and Oceania regional partition of 3D-GloBFP (3D Global Building Footprints with height, year 2020), released on Zenodo by Che et al. of Sun Yat-sen University. Data is provided as shapefiles tiled by spatial grid under a CC-BY-4.0 license. It is one of three regional partitions released with the ESSD paper (10.5194/essd-16-5357-2024) and includes building-height information, well suited to urban-form, energy, and 3D-mapping research.

name: 3D-GloBFP — Asia (3D Global Building Footprints, 2020)

desc_zh: 这是 3D-GloBFP（带高度的全球三维建筑足迹，2020 年）面向亚洲的区域分卷，由 Che 等人发布于 Zenodo。数据以按空间网格分块的 shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。作为该全球三维建筑数据集的配套区域版本，它含建筑高度信息，适合亚洲范围的城市形态、能耗与三维制图研究。
desc_en: This is the Asia regional partition of 3D-GloBFP (3D Global Building Footprints with height, year 2020), released on Zenodo by Che et al. Data is provided as shapefiles tiled by spatial grid under a CC-BY-4.0 license. As a companion regional release of this global 3D building dataset, it includes building-height information, well suited to urban-form, energy, and 3D-mapping research across Asia.

name: 3D-GloBFP — Europe (3D Global Building Footprints, 2020)
provider: Che, Y., Li, X., Liu, X. et al.
notes: Companion regional release.
