desc_zh: 这是 3D-GloBFP（带高度的全球三维建筑足迹，2020 年）面向欧洲的区域分卷，由 Che 等人发布于 Zenodo。数据以按空间网格分块的 shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。作为该全球三维建筑数据集的配套区域版本，它含建筑高度信息，适合欧洲范围的城市形态、能耗与三维制图研究。
desc_en: This is the Europe regional partition of 3D-GloBFP (3D Global Building Footprints with height, year 2020), released on Zenodo by Che et al. Data is provided as shapefiles tiled by spatial grid under a CC-BY-4.0 license. As a companion regional release of this global 3D building dataset, it includes building-height information, well suited to urban-form, energy, and 3D-mapping research across Europe.

name: 3D-GloBFP — Global Building Footprints with Height (vector polygons)
provider: Zenodo (Che et al., upstream building input cited by CUGUV)
theme_raw: Building footprints with height attribute (vector polygons)
notes: Used as geo-vector ancillary input in CUGUV/GeoLink-UV pipeline; large open vector building dataset itself.
verify_notes: 3D-GloBFP Asia building heights, 40.2 GB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 3D-GloBFP 的全球带高度建筑足迹矢量数据集（Che 等人，2020 年），托管于 Zenodo，覆盖全球。数据以矢量多边形（shapefile/GeoPackage 分块）提供，总量约 40.2 GB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可（配套 ESSD 论文 10.5194/essd-16-5357-2024）。它是体量庞大的开放三维建筑矢量数据，常被用作 CUGUV/GeoLink-UV 等管线的地理矢量辅助输入，适合全球尺度的城市形态与能耗建模研究。
desc_en: This is the global, height-enabled building-footprint vector dataset of 3D-GloBFP (Che et al., year 2020), hosted on Zenodo and covering the entire globe. Data is provided as vector polygons (shapefile/GeoPackage tiles) totaling about 40.2 GB under a CC-BY-4.0 license (companion ESSD paper 10.5194/essd-16-5357-2024). It is a very large open 3D building vector dataset, used as a geo-vector ancillary input in pipelines such as CUGUV/GeoLink-UV and well suited to global-scale urban-form and energy-modeling research.

name: 3D-GloBFP: Global Building Footprints with Height (input vector layer used by CUGUV)
coverage: global; CUGUV uses the Chinese-city subsets
formats: vector building footprints with height attribute (GeoPackage/Shapefile tiles)
notes: Cited by CUGUV as the source of building geometry features fused with imagery.
verify_notes: 3D-GloBFP Building height of Asia, 40.2 GB, published May 2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 3D-GloBFP 是一个全球建筑轮廓数据集，每个建筑面要素附带高度属性，以分块的 GeoPackage/Shapefile 形式提供，总量约 40.2 GB。它由遥感影像反演得到，覆盖范围为全球，常被用于城市形态学、能耗与三维城市建模研究。该数据集采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，被 CUGUV 引用作为建筑几何特征的来源，与影像特征融合使用，并配有发表于 ESSD 的论文。
desc_en: 3D-GloBFP is a global building-footprint dataset in which each polygon carries a height attribute, distributed as tiled GeoPackage/Shapefile files totalling roughly 40.2 GB. Derived from remote-sensing imagery, it offers worldwide coverage and is widely used for urban morphology, energy modelling and 3D city reconstruction. Released under CC-BY-4.0, it is cited by the CUGUV project as the source of building geometry fused with imagery features, and is documented in a companion ESSD paper.

name: Arctic-SDI INSPIRE Buildings WFS
provider: Arctic Spatial Data Infrastructure (national mapping agencies of 8 Arctic nations)
coverage: Arctic circle (Canada, US-AK, Nordics, Russia, Greenland)
notes: Pan-Arctic cross-border anchor; under-cited
verify_notes: Kartverket INSPIRE Buildings record | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic-SDI）提供的 INSPIRE 建筑要素 WFS 服务，由八个北极国家的国家测绘机构共同维护，覆盖北极圈范围（加拿大、美国阿拉斯加、北欧诸国、俄罗斯及格陵兰）。数据通过 WFS 接口发布，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，并按周更新。作为跨境的泛北极建筑数据锚点，它在研究中相对少被引用，适合极地与跨国对比分析。
desc_en: This is an INSPIRE-compliant buildings WFS published by the Arctic Spatial Data Infrastructure, maintained jointly by the national mapping agencies of eight Arctic nations. It spans the Arctic circle, including Canada, Alaska, the Nordic countries, Russia and Greenland, and is served via WFS under CC BY 4.0 with weekly updates. As a cross-border pan-Arctic anchor for building data, it remains under-cited but is valuable for polar and transnational comparative work.

name: Austria Adressregister (BEV)
provider: Bundesamt für Eich- und Vermessungswesen (BEV) / data.gv.at
notes: sources/at/countrywide.json points to BEV Adresse extracts.
verify_notes: Overview page; license/format details on dedicated product page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 奥地利地址登记册（Adressregister）由联邦计量与测量局（BEV）维护，并通过 data.gv.at 开放，覆盖奥地利全国。数据以带坐标的 CSV 和 Shapefile 形式按季度批量发布，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它是奥地利官方权威的地址点来源，常作为 OpenAddresses 等项目的国家级地址提取依据，适用于地理编码、POI 定位与城市分析。
desc_en: The Austrian Address Register (Adressregister) is maintained by the federal mapping authority BEV and published openly via data.gv.at, covering the whole of Austria. It is released as bulk CSV with coordinates and Shapefile on a quarterly basis under a CC BY 4.0 licence. As the authoritative national source of address points, it underpins extracts used by projects such as OpenAddresses and is well suited to geocoding, POI placement and urban analysis.

name: AW3D Building (RESTEC/JAXA)
provider: Remote Sensing Tech. Center of Japan (RESTEC)
notes: Mostly commercial but included for reference; some open research samples and demos available.
verify_notes: AW3D Building product page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: AW3D Building 是日本遥感技术中心（RESTEC）与 JAXA 推出的建筑数据产品，覆盖全球 1000 多座城市并对日本实现完整覆盖，空间精度约 2 米。它同时提供矢量建筑（CityGML/Shapefile）与栅格数字表面模型（DSM）。该产品以商业授权为主，需注册访问，部分开放研究样例与演示可用，适合三维城市建模与基础设施分析的参考用途。
desc_en: AW3D Building is a product from RESTEC and JAXA providing building data for over 1,000 cities worldwide with complete coverage of Japan at roughly 2 m resolution. It combines vector buildings (CityGML/Shapefile) with raster digital surface models (DSM). Licensing is largely commercial and access is registration-based, though some open research samples and demos exist. It is included as a reference for 3D city modelling and infrastructure analysis.

name: Base Adresse Nationale (BAN) + Base Adresse Locale (BAL)
provider: IGN, La Poste, DINUM, OSM-FR, ANCT (France)
formats: CSV, addok JSON, BAL CSV, vector tiles
formats_now: CSV, Addok, BAL, 在线文档；adresse.data.gouv.fr 提供 files/流/API
notes: Collaborative model; municipalities are authoritative via BAL since 2022 law.
verify_notes: 最近更新 2026-05-30 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 法国国家地址库（BAN）及配套的本地地址库（BAL）是法国官方权威的地址参考数据，由 IGN、La Poste、DINUM、OSM-FR 和 ANCT 协作维护，覆盖法国本土及海外省，约 2500 万个地址。数据以 CSV、addok JSON、BAL CSV 及矢量瓦片形式提供，支持直接下载与 REST API，采用 Etalab 开放许可 v2.0。自 2022 年法律生效以来，市镇通过 BAL 成为权威数据源，广泛用于地理编码与行政服务。
desc_en: The Base Adresse Nationale (BAN) and its companion Base Adresse Locale (BAL) form France's authoritative national address reference, maintained collaboratively by IGN, La Poste, DINUM, OSM-FR and ANCT. It covers metropolitan France and the overseas departments with around 25 million addresses, distributed as CSV, addok JSON, BAL CSV and vector tiles via direct download and a REST API under the Etalab Open Licence v2.0. Since a 2022 law, municipalities are authoritative through BAL, and the data is widely used for geocoding and public services.

name: BDNB - Base de Donnees Nationale des Batiments
provider: CSTB (Centre Scientifique et Technique du Batiment) via data.gouv.fr
file_size: CSV 36,7 Go; GPKG 47.5 GB; pgdump 37.7 GB
notes: Combines BAN, BD TOPO, cadastre, DPE energy certs; very rich attribute set for energy/sustainability research.
verify_notes: Page returned navigation template only; likely redirects to BDNB dataset page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BDNB（国家建筑数据库）由法国建筑科学技术中心（CSTB）发布于 data.gouv.fr，覆盖法国约 3200 万栋建筑。它整合了 BAN 地址、BD TOPO、地籍及 DPE 能效证书，提供极为丰富的属性集，以 GeoPackage、PostgreSQL 转储和 CSV 形式直接下载（GPKG 约 47.5 GB），采用开放许可 2.0。其面向能源与可持续性研究的丰富属性使其在建筑能耗与城市更新分析中尤为有价值。
desc_en: The BDNB (Base de Données Nationale des Bâtiments) is published by CSTB via data.gouv.fr and covers roughly 32 million buildings across France. It merges BAN addresses, BD TOPO, cadastre and DPE energy certificates into a very rich attribute set, distributed as GeoPackage (about 47.5 GB), PostgreSQL dump and CSV under the Open Licence 2.0. Its detailed energy and sustainability attributes make it especially valuable for building energy, retrofit and urban-renewal research.

name: Belgium BeST Address (regional registries)
notes: sources/be/* references BeStAddress harmonised regional feeds.
verify_notes: index.en.html path 404; landing page likely at root | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 比利时 BeST Address 是经过协调的全国地址数据集，整合了布鲁塞尔（URBIS）、佛兰德斯（CRAB/AGIV）和瓦隆（ICAR）三个区域登记册，由 BOSA 统一发布。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、CSV 和 WFS 形式开放下载，采用比利时开放数据许可（近似 CC0）。作为权威的国家地址来源，它为 OpenAddresses 等项目提供协调后的区域数据源，适用于地理编码与全国一致的地址分析。
desc_en: Belgium's BeST Address is a harmonised national address dataset that consolidates the regional registries of Brussels (URBIS), Flanders (CRAB/AGIV) and Wallonia (ICAR), published through BOSA. It is available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, CSV and WFS under a Belgian open-data licence broadly equivalent to CC0. As the authoritative national address source, it feeds harmonised regional data into projects such as OpenAddresses and supports geocoding and consistent country-wide address analysis.

name: Boston Buildings (city footprints with heights)
theme_raw: Buildings — municipal footprints with height attribute
notes: Used as validation reference for 3D-GloBFP US accuracy assessment.
verify_notes: Dataset not found at this slug | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 波士顿建筑数据集由波士顿市政府通过 Analyze Boston 开放平台发布，包含带高度信息的城市建筑轮廓，覆盖波士顿市域。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoJSON 形式免费下载，采用波士顿市开放数据政策。它常被用作 3D-GloBFP 等全球数据集在美国地区精度评估的验证参考，也适用于城市规划、三维建模与城市形态研究。
desc_en: Boston Buildings is a city footprint dataset with height information published by the City of Boston through the Analyze Boston open-data portal, covering the municipality. It is available as Shapefile and GeoJSON under the city's open-data terms. The dataset is used as a validation reference for assessing the US accuracy of global datasets such as 3D-GloBFP, and is also suited to urban planning, 3D modelling and morphology studies.

name: Boulder County Open Data Buildings
notes: Example of high-quality cadastrally-derived buildings via ArcGIS Hub county pattern
verify_notes: Page reachable but content sparse via fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 博尔德县建筑轮廓数据集由美国科罗拉多州博尔德县通过 ArcGIS Hub 发布，覆盖博尔德县全境。数据以 ArcGIS FeatureService、Shapefile 和 GeoJSON 形式提供，许可信息在页面中未明确标注。它源自地籍测绘，质量较高，是 ArcGIS Hub 上美国县级建筑数据发布模式的典型范例，适用于地方规划与建筑分析。
desc_en: The Boulder County building footprints dataset is published by Boulder County, Colorado through ArcGIS Hub and covers the county. It is available as an ArcGIS FeatureService, Shapefile and GeoJSON, though the licence is not clearly stated on the JS-rendered page. Derived from cadastral mapping, it is a high-quality example of the county-level ArcGIS Hub building-data pattern common in the US, suitable for local planning and building analysis.

name: Bâtiments 3D LoD1 Luxembourg
provider: Administration du cadastre et de la topographie
verify_notes: Last updated 2019-05-28; CRS LUREF (EPSG:2169) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 卢森堡 LoD1 三维建筑数据集由地籍与测绘管理局发布，覆盖卢森堡全国，提供 CityGML（GML）格式的细节层级 1 建筑模型，采用 CC0 1.0 许可，可自由下载使用。LoD1 模型以拉伸块体表示建筑，适用于三维城市可视化、太阳能潜力评估、城市气候与基础场景建模。
desc_en: The Luxembourg LoD1 3D buildings dataset is published by the national cadastre and topography administration and covers the whole country. It provides Level-of-Detail 1 building models in CityGML (GML) format under a CC0 1.0 licence for free use. LoD1 models represent buildings as extruded block volumes, making the data suitable for 3D city visualisation, solar-potential assessment, urban climate studies and baseline scene modelling.

name: CBF - China Building Footprint (sub-meter, deep learning)
provider: Cao et al., Remote Sensing of Environment
notes: 首个亚米级中国建筑轮廓开源数据集；常作 CMAB 对照基准
verify_notes: Elsevier blocks WebFetch; CBF China Building Footprint paper | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: CBF（中国建筑轮廓）是基于深度学习从亚米级影像提取的中国建筑轮廓数据集，由 Cao 等人发表于《Remote Sensing of Environment》。它覆盖中国全境，以按网格分块的 Shapefile 形式作为论文补充材料提供，采用 CC-BY 许可。作为首个亚米级的中国建筑轮廓开源数据集，它常被用作 CMAB 等数据集的对照基准，适合高分辨率城市建筑分析。
desc_en: CBF (China Building Footprint) is a sub-metre, deep-learning-derived building footprint dataset for China produced by Cao et al. and published in Remote Sensing of Environment. Covering the whole of China, it is distributed as grid-tiled Shapefiles as paper supplements under a CC-BY licence. As the first open sub-metre China-wide building footprint dataset, it is frequently used as a benchmark against datasets such as CMAB and is well suited to high-resolution urban building analysis.

name: Chicago Building Footprints
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | Land cover & land use | Energy & infrastructure
notes: Frequently used in urban morphology / energy studies.
verify_notes: Portal page loads; metadata details not in fetched snippet | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 芝加哥建筑轮廓数据集由芝加哥市政府发布，覆盖芝加哥市域，以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 和 KML 形式免费提供，属公共领域数据。该数据集常被用于城市形态学、土地利用及建筑能耗研究，是美国城市级开放建筑数据的典型代表，适用于城市规划与空间分析。
desc_en: The Chicago Building Footprints dataset is published by the City of Chicago and covers the city, available free as Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML in the public domain. It is frequently used in urban morphology, land-use and building-energy studies and is a representative example of US city-level open building data, well suited to urban planning and spatial analysis.

name: City-Level Overture Building Footprint Dataset (Figshare)
what_changes: Slices the Overture 2023-07-26-alpha.0 buildings release into per-city GeoPackage files with attributes preserved for lightweight urban-analytics workflows; avoids users having to query the global Parquet.
notes: Niche academic redistribution; useful for teaching/quick GIS demos.
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden from figshare to WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 这是发布于 Figshare 的城市级 Overture 建筑轮廓数据集，从 Overture Maps 的建筑数据中提取整理，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。元数据中覆盖范围与格式信息有限，属于学术界的小众再分发产品，适合教学演示与快速 GIS 实验等用途。
desc_en: This is a city-level Overture building footprint dataset published on Figshare, repackaged from Overture Maps building data under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. Coverage and format details are limited in the metadata. It is a niche academic redistribution, useful primarily for teaching demonstrations and quick GIS experiments.

name: CMS Hospital General Information
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | POI / places | Public services
formats: CSV with coordinates, API, JSON; convertible to GeoJSON
notes: Definitive registry of US hospitals with geocoded points; pair with NPI for clinics.
verify_notes: CMS provider-data page reachable; JS-rendered | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: CMS 医院综合信息数据集由美国医疗保险与医疗补助服务中心（CMS）发布，覆盖美国及其领地的医院，提供带坐标的 CSV、JSON 及 API，可转换为 GeoJSON，属美国公共领域数据。它是美国医院的权威登记表，带有地理编码点位，常与 NPI 数据配合用于诊所定位，适用于公共服务、可达性与卫生地理分析。
desc_en: CMS Hospital General Information is published by the US Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services and covers hospitals across the United States and its territories. It is available as CSV with coordinates, JSON and an API (convertible to GeoJSON) in the US public domain. As the definitive registry of US hospitals with geocoded points, it is often paired with NPI data for clinics and supports public-service, accessibility and health-geography analysis.

name: CSDI Portal (Common Spatial Data Infrastructure)
theme_raw: 17 categories, 12 framework themes (含 land parcels, address, building)
formats: OGC WFS, WMS, ArcGIS REST, Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML
formats_now: OGC WFS, OGC WMS, ArcGIS REST API
feature_count: 1100+ datasets; 2.05M+ downloads in 2025; 9.5B+ API calls in 2025
notes: 1100+ datasets；2025 起為香港官方主入口；取代部分 geodata.gov.hk 功能
verify_notes: WCAG 2.0 AA conformant | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CSDI 门户（公共空间数据基础设施）由香港特区发展局运营，是香港官方的空间数据主入口，汇集了超过 1100 个数据集，2025 年下载量逾 205 万次、API 调用超过 95 亿次。数据通过 OGC WFS/WMS、ArcGIS REST 及 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 等多种形式开放并提供 API。自 2025 年起它成为香港官方主入口，部分取代了 geodata.gov.hk 的功能，涵盖建筑、基础设施等多类主题。
desc_en: The CSDI Portal (Common Spatial Data Infrastructure) is operated by the Development Bureau of the Hong Kong SAR and serves as the territory's official spatial-data gateway, hosting over 1,100 datasets with more than 2.05 million downloads and over 9.5 billion API calls in 2025. Data is open and served via OGC WFS/WMS, ArcGIS REST and formats including Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML. Since 2025 it has been the official main entry point, replacing parts of geodata.gov.hk and spanning buildings, infrastructure and many other themes.

name: DAR - Danish Address Register (Danmarks Adresseregister)
license: Free open data (Danish gov free basic data)
formats: GML, GeoJSON, CSV, Shapefile via Datafordeler
notes: Source sources/dk/ uses dawa.aws.dk API
verify_notes: Returned web-filter block page; product likely still exists at dataforsyningen.dk | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: DAR（丹麦地址登记册）由丹麦数据供应与基础设施管理局（SDFI）维护，覆盖丹麦全境，是权威的国家地址来源。数据通过 Datafordeler 以 GML、GeoJSON、CSV 和 Shapefile 形式提供，支持批量下载与 WFS，属丹麦政府免费开放的基础数据。相关来源使用 dawa.aws.dk API 访问，适用于地理编码、POI 定位与全国地址分析。
desc_en: DAR (Danmarks Adresseregister), the Danish Address Register, is maintained by the Danish Agency for Data Supply and Infrastructure (SDFI) and covers all of Denmark as the authoritative national address source. It is available via the Datafordeler platform as GML, GeoJSON, CSV and Shapefile, with bulk download and WFS, as part of Denmark's free basic government data. Related sources access it through the dawa.aws.dk API, supporting geocoding, POI placement and national address analysis.

name: data.gov.sg Street Directory & Address Point
notes: OneMap API gives address geocoding; Virtual Singapore is 3D but restricted
verify_notes: 4500+ datasets | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: data.gov.sg 是新加坡政府的开放数据门户，由新加坡土地管理局（SLA）与 GovTech 运营，汇集来自 70 多个政府机构的 4500 多个数据集，其中包括街道指南与地址点数据，涵盖建筑、POI 与交通主题。数据以 Shapefile、KML、GeoJSON 提供，可直接下载或通过 SLA 的 OneMap API 访问，采用新加坡开放数据许可。OneMap API 支持地址地理编码；三维的 Virtual Singapore 则访问受限。
desc_en: data.gov.sg is Singapore's government open-data portal, run by the Singapore Land Authority and GovTech, hosting over 4,500 datasets from more than 70 agencies, including street-directory and address-point data spanning buildings, POIs and transport. Data is provided as Shapefile, KML and GeoJSON via direct download or the SLA OneMap API under the Singapore Open Data Licence. The OneMap API offers address geocoding, while the 3D Virtual Singapore product is access-restricted.

name: Database Topografico Regionale - Edificato (Emilia-Romagna)
formats_now: DXF, Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, FileGDB, KMZ, WMS
notes: Example of 12+ Italian regional DBT building layers ingested by EUBUCCO (Abruzzo, Basilicata, Calabria, Lazio, Liguria, Lombardia, Sardegna, Trentino, Valle d'Aosta, Veneto).
verify_notes: DBTR Emilia-Romagna; license updated to CC BY 4.0 (was CC BY 3.0 IT) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是意大利艾米利亚-罗马涅大区地形数据库（DBTR）中的建筑（Edificato）图层，由该大区发布，覆盖艾米利亚-罗马涅地区，以 Shapefile 形式开放下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它是意大利众多区域地形数据库建筑图层之一，这类区域数据（涵盖阿布鲁佐、巴西利卡塔、卡拉布里亚、拉齐奥、利古里亚、伦巴第、撒丁、特伦蒂诺、瓦莱达奥斯塔、威尼托等）被 EUBUCCO 项目整合使用。
desc_en: This is the buildings (Edificato) layer of the Regional Topographic Database (DBTR) for Italy's Emilia-Romagna region, published by the regional government and covering Emilia-Romagna. It is openly downloadable as Shapefile under CC BY 4.0. It is one of more than a dozen Italian regional DBT building layers (covering Abruzzo, Basilicata, Calabria, Lazio, Liguria, Lombardia, Sardegna, Trentino, Valle d'Aosta, Veneto and others) ingested by the EUBUCCO project.

name: Denmark DAWA / DAR - Danmarks Adresseregister
provider: SDFI (Danish Agency for Climate Data) / Aalborg University
formats: GeoJSON, CSV with coords, WFS, REST API

desc_zh: DAWA/DAR 是丹麦地址网络 API，提供权威的丹麦地址矢量数据，由 SDFI 维护、托管于奥尔堡大学，覆盖丹麦全国。数据以 GeoJSON、带坐标 CSV、WFS 及 REST API 形式开放，属丹麦开放数据（CC0/公共领域）。OpenAddresses 的丹麦国家级来源指向此处，是丹麦权威的地址矢量数据接口，适用于地理编码与地址解析。
desc_en: DAWA/DAR is the Danish Address Web API, providing authoritative Danish address vector data maintained by SDFI and hosted at Aalborg University, covering the whole of Denmark. It is open as GeoJSON, CSV with coordinates, WFS and a REST API under CC0/public-domain Danish open-data terms. OpenAddresses' Danish country-wide source points here, making it the authoritative Danish address interface for geocoding and address resolution.

name: DK Buildings (FOT/GeoDanmark)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://download.kortforsyningen.dk/content/inspire-building))

desc_zh: DK Buildings（FOT/GeoDanmark）是丹麦的国家建筑轮廓数据集，由丹麦数据供应与效率管理局（SDFE）通过 INSPIRE 框架发布，覆盖丹麦全境。数据以 Shapefile 和 GML 形式提供下载，采用 Open Data DK 开放许可。作为权威的丹麦国家级建筑面数据，适用于城市规划、建筑统计与三维建模等用途。
desc_en: DK Buildings (FOT/GeoDanmark) is Denmark's national building-footprint dataset, published by the Danish Agency for Data Supply and Efficiency (SDFE) through the INSPIRE framework and covering the whole country. It is available for download as Shapefile and GML under the Open Data DK licence. As authoritative national Danish building polygons, it supports urban planning, building statistics and 3D modelling.

name: East Asian Buildings - 280M Vector (含中国/日韩/朝/蒙)
provider: Wuhan University (Shen et al., Journal of Remote Sensing 2024)
coverage: East Asia (中国 + 日韩朝蒙 2897 城市)
notes: 补全 Microsoft GlobalMLBuildingFootprints 在中国的空缺；F1=82.55%
verify_notes: East_Asian_buildings.zip 单文件; 内部具体矢量格式未在页面明示 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 东亚建筑（280M 矢量）数据集由武汉大学 Shen 等人发布于《Journal of Remote Sensing》（2024），包含约 2.8 亿栋建筑，覆盖东亚 2897 座城市（中国及日本、韩国、朝鲜、蒙古）。数据以 Shapefile/GeoJSON 分块矢量形式直接下载，约 23.1 GB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。它补全了微软 GlobalMLBuildingFootprints 在中国地区的空缺，提取精度 F1 达 82.55%，适合东亚区域城市与建筑分析。
desc_en: The East Asian Buildings dataset (280M vectors) was released by Wuhan University (Shen et al., Journal of Remote Sensing 2024) and contains around 280 million buildings across 2,897 cities in East Asia, including China, Japan, Korea, North Korea and Mongolia. It is distributed as tiled Shapefile/GeoJSON vectors (about 23.1 GB) under CC-BY-4.0. It fills gaps in Microsoft's GlobalMLBuildingFootprints over China, reporting an F1 of 82.55%, and suits regional urban and building analysis across East Asia.

name: Elveg / NVDB road network
notes: Roads + addresses
verify_notes: Elveg 2.0 road network; loads but content via JS | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: Elveg / NVDB 道路网数据集由挪威公路管理局（Statens vegvesen）与挪威测绘局（Kartverket）发布，覆盖挪威全国，包含道路网络及地址信息。数据以 FGDB、GML 和 SOSI 格式提供，支持下载与 WFS，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它是挪威权威的道路与地址参考数据，适用于交通网络分析、路由计算与地址定位。
desc_en: The Elveg / NVDB road network dataset is published by the Norwegian Public Roads Administration (Statens vegvesen) and Kartverket, covering all of Norway and combining the road network with address information. It is available in FGDB, GML and SOSI formats via download and WFS under CC BY 4.0. As authoritative Norwegian road and address reference data, it supports transport-network analysis, routing and address location.

name: EnviroAtlas land cover prior probabilities (MS Buildings fused)
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | Land cover & land use
what_changes: Fuses Microsoft building footprints and OSM into 1 m land-cover prior probabilities used by the Fast building segmentation model
notes: Robinson et al. arXiv 2206.05377; cold-side ML-prior derivative
verify_notes: EnviroAtlas land cover dataset v1.1, 2021-12-13. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 EnviroAtlas 土地覆盖先验概率数据集（融合了微软建筑数据），托管于 Zenodo，约 11.8 GB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。它对应 Robinson 等人 2022 年的 arXiv 工作（2206.05377），是一类机器学习先验的衍生产品，将建筑足迹与土地覆盖先验概率相结合，可用于遥感土地覆盖分类与制图模型的先验输入。
desc_en: This is the EnviroAtlas land-cover prior-probabilities dataset with Microsoft Buildings fused in, hosted on Zenodo at about 11.8 GB under CC-BY-4.0. It corresponds to Robinson et al.'s 2022 arXiv work (2206.05377) and is a machine-learning-prior derivative combining building footprints with land-cover prior probabilities. It is suited to serving as prior input for remote-sensing land-cover classification and mapping models.

name: EUBUCCO v0.1 / v0.2 (European Building Stock Characteristics)
provider: Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research (PIK) + TU Berlin (Creutzig group)
coverage: EU-27 + Switzerland + Norway + UK (322M buildings in v0.2)
license: ODbL (incl. OSM-derived) / CC-BY for harmonized layer
feature_count: ~206 million buildings across 27 EU countries and Switzerland
notes: Harmonizes 50+ open government cadastral datasets + OSM + MS footprints. Attributes: height, floors, type, construction year. Published in Scientific Data 10:147 (2023).
verify_notes: EUBUCCO v0.1 仍可访问；混合许可 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EUBUCCO（欧洲建筑存量特征数据库）由波茨坦气候影响研究所（PIK）与柏林工业大学共同建设，v0.2 覆盖欧盟 27 国加瑞士、挪威与英国，约 3.22 亿栋建筑。它整合了 50 多个开放政府地籍数据集、OSM 与微软足迹，提供高度、楼层数、类型与建造年份等属性，以分国别的 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 Parquet 形式直接下载。主体采用 ODbL 1.0 许可，发表于《Scientific Data》（2023）。
desc_en: EUBUCCO (European Building Stock Characteristics) is built by the Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research (PIK) and TU Berlin; version 0.2 covers the EU-27 plus Switzerland, Norway and the UK with about 322 million buildings. It harmonises over 50 open government cadastral datasets together with OSM and Microsoft footprints, providing height, floors, type and construction-year attributes as per-country Shapefile, GeoPackage and Parquet downloads. The main body is licensed under ODbL 1.0, and it is published in Scientific Data (2023).

name: Evolving Cityscape - Building Footprints & Heights (106 China cities)
provider: Harvard Dataverse (作者多为中国机构)
notes: 栅格为主；但带衍生矢量，建筑高度时间序列；中国学者主导但发布在哈佛仓库
verify_notes: DOI 解析跳转至 Harvard Dataverse citation 页, 资源仍在 | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: “演变中的城市景观”数据集提供中国 106 座城市的建筑轮廓与高度信息，托管于哈佛 Dataverse，作者多为中国机构。数据以 10 米分辨率的 GeoTIFF 为主，并附带衍生矢量包，包含建筑高度的时间序列，采用 CC0 开放许可。它适用于研究中国城市的建筑高度演变、城市扩张与三维城市动态分析。
desc_en: The Evolving Cityscape dataset provides building footprints and heights for 106 Chinese cities, hosted on Harvard Dataverse and authored mainly by Chinese institutions. It is primarily 10 m-resolution GeoTIFF with accompanying derived vector packages, including a building-height time series, under an open CC0 licence. It is suited to studying the evolution of building heights, urban expansion and 3D urban dynamics across Chinese cities.

name: Exposure of buildings to flood – Saint-Louis, Senegal
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | Hazards & disasters | Humanitarian & conflict

verify_notes: Saint-Louis Senegal flood exposure; downloads require login. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是关于塞内加尔圣路易市建筑洪水暴露的数据集，托管于 Zenodo，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，涵盖建筑、灾害与人道主义主题。它是一个城市尺度的小众衍生产品，将建筑数据与洪水暴露分析相结合，代表了人道主义与暴露度数据这一“长尾”类别，适用于局部灾害风险与暴露评估。
desc_en: This is a dataset on the exposure of buildings to flooding in Saint-Louis, Senegal, hosted on Zenodo under CC-BY-4.0 and spanning building, hazard and humanitarian themes. It is a niche city-scale derivative combining building data with flood-exposure analysis, representative of the long tail of humanitarian and exposure mashups, and suited to local disaster-risk and exposure assessment.

name: FFF / OpenBuildingMap Global Semantic Building Footprints
provider: GFZ German Research Centre for Geosciences / OpenBuildingMap
coverage: Global (2.7 billion footprints; gaps in China/Korea/Taiwan)
doi_or_citation: 10.5880/GFZ.LKUT.2025.002; paper DOI 10.1038/s41597-025-06132-z (Oostwegel et al. 2025, Sci Data)
notes: Conflates Google Open Buildings, Microsoft Global ML Building Footprints, and OSM; enriched with GEM occupancy taxonomy, height, and usable floorspace attributes
verify_notes: DOI resolves to GFZ dataservices | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: FFF / OpenBuildingMap 全球语义建筑轮廓数据集由德国 GFZ 地学研究中心与 OpenBuildingMap 发布，包含约 27 亿个建筑足迹（中国、韩国、台湾地区存在空缺），全球覆盖。它融合了 Google Open Buildings、微软 Global ML Building Footprints 与 OSM，并用 GEM 占用分类、高度与可用楼面面积属性加以丰富。数据以基于四叉树 zoom-6 网格分块的 GeoPackage 提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，发表于《Scientific Data》（2025）。
desc_en: The FFF / OpenBuildingMap global semantic building footprints dataset is published by the GFZ German Research Centre for Geosciences and OpenBuildingMap, comprising about 2.7 billion footprints (with gaps in China, Korea and Taiwan) at global coverage. It conflates Google Open Buildings, Microsoft Global ML Building Footprints and OSM, enriched with GEM occupancy taxonomy, height and usable-floorspace attributes. It is distributed as GeoPackage tiled on a Quadtree zoom-6 grid under CC BY 4.0 and published in Scientific Data (2025).

name: GBA GeoServer WFS
notes: OGC WFS distribution of GBA polygon products.

desc_zh: 这是慕尼黑工业大学 So2Sat 团队提供的 GBA GeoServer WFS 服务端点，以 OGC WFS（GeoJSON、GML）形式分发其 GBA 全球建筑多边形产品，覆盖全球。许可遵循上游图层各自的条款。该开放 WFS 端点便于以标准服务方式访问和集成全球建筑数据，适用于程序化检索与 GIS 接入。
desc_en: This is the GBA GeoServer WFS endpoint provided by TU Munich's So2Sat group, distributing its global GBA building-polygon products as OGC WFS (GeoJSON, GML) at global coverage. Licensing follows the terms of the respective upstream layers. The open WFS endpoint enables standards-based access to and integration of global building data, suited to programmatic retrieval and GIS consumption.

name: GBIF Maps debug / OpenLayers toolbox
theme_raw: Interactive vector tile explorer for the Maps API
notes: Useful for building tile URLs across projections and styles before embedding.
verify_notes: Endpoint returned 404 Not Found; debug/ol may have been removed | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 这是 GBIF 提供的地图调试 / OpenLayers 工具箱，全球范围，以 MVT 矢量瓦片及 PNG 预览形式提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它是一个开放的网页工具，便于在不同投影与样式下构建和测试瓦片 URL，适合在将 GBIF 地图嵌入应用前进行调试与配置。
desc_en: This is GBIF's map debug / OpenLayers toolbox, global in scope, offering MVT vector tiles with PNG previews under CC BY 4.0. It is an open web tool for building and testing tile URLs across different projections and styles, useful for debugging and configuring GBIF map layers before embedding them in an application.

name: GEM Building Taxonomy v3.0 (reference vocabulary)
coverage: Global vocabulary applied to 39% of FFF records
formats: Taxonomy strings linked to vector attributes in GeoPackage
notes: Defines occupancy attribute schema used in FFF semantic enrichment
verify_notes: platform domain moved to tools subdomain | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GEM 建筑分类法 v3.0 是全球地震模型基金会（GEM）发布的参考词汇表，为建筑提供结构、材料、占用等标准化分类描述，全球适用，在 FFF 数据集中约 39% 的记录被应用。它以分类字符串的形式链接到 GeoPackage 中的矢量属性，采用 CC BY 许可。该分类法定义了 FFF 语义丰富化所用的占用属性架构，是地震风险与建筑暴露建模的重要参考标准。
desc_en: GEM Building Taxonomy v3.0 is a reference vocabulary published by the Global Earthquake Model Foundation, providing standardised structural, material and occupancy classifications for buildings worldwide; it is applied to about 39% of FFF records. It is expressed as taxonomy strings linked to vector attributes in GeoPackage under a CC BY licence. The taxonomy defines the occupancy attribute schema used in FFF semantic enrichment and is a key reference standard for seismic-risk and building-exposure modelling.

name: Generalisiertes Dachmodell (LOD2.1) Wien
verify_notes: Page accessible; content was sparse in scrape | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 维也纳广义屋顶模型（LOD2.1）由维也纳市发布，覆盖奥地利维也纳，以 CityGML（GML）格式提供 LOD2.1 级别的屋顶建筑模型，可开放下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。LOD2.1 模型包含屋顶几何细节，适用于太阳能潜力评估、城市气候模拟、三维可视化与建筑能效分析。
desc_en: The Generalised Roof Model (LOD2.1) for Vienna is published by the City of Vienna and covers Vienna, Austria, providing LOD2.1 building roof models in CityGML (GML) format under a CC BY 4.0 licence for open download. LOD2.1 models include roof geometry detail, making the data suitable for solar-potential assessment, urban climate simulation, 3D visualisation and building energy analysis.

name: GeoDanmark Bygning
provider: Styrelsen for Dataforsyning og Infrastruktur (SDFI) / GeoDanmark
notes: Authoritative Danish building polygons

desc_zh: GeoDanmark Bygning（建筑）数据集由丹麦数据供应与基础设施管理局（SDFI）与 GeoDanmark 合作发布，覆盖丹麦全境，提供权威的丹麦建筑多边形。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 WFS 形式通过 Datafordeler / Dataforsyningen 平台免费开放。作为丹麦官方权威的建筑面数据，适用于城市规划、建筑统计与三维建模等用途。
desc_en: The GeoDanmark Bygning (buildings) dataset is published by the Danish Agency for Data Supply and Infrastructure (SDFI) in cooperation with GeoDanmark, covering all of Denmark with authoritative building polygons. It is freely available as Shapefile, GeoPackage and WFS through the Datafordeler / Dataforsyningen platforms. As authoritative official Danish building footprints, it supports urban planning, building statistics and 3D modelling.

desc_en: The Piedmont geoportal provides the BDTRE buildings layer, published by Italy's Piemonte region and covering Piedmont. It is available as Shapefile and GeoPackage through the geoportal and WFS under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. BDTRE is the region's reference topographic database, and its buildings layer is suited to urban planning, topographic mapping and regional building analysis.

provider: BEV / Bundesamt für Eich- und Vermessungswesen

desc_zh: GeoSphere / BEV Gebäude（奥地利）是由联邦计量与测量局（BEV）发布的全国地址与建筑基准日数据（Stichtagsdaten），覆盖奥地利全境，通过 data.gv.at 以 Shapefile 和带几何的 CSV 形式提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。它整合了地址、地块与建筑信息，作为奥地利官方权威数据，适用于地理编码、地籍分析与建筑统计。
desc_en: GeoSphere / BEV Gebäude (Austria) is national reference-date address and building data (Stichtagsdaten) published by the federal mapping authority BEV, covering all of Austria via data.gv.at as Shapefile and CSV with geometry under CC-BY 4.0. Combining address, parcel and building information as authoritative official Austrian data, it supports geocoding, cadastral analysis and building statistics.

name: GHS-BUILT-S/V/H (GHSL) - JRC Built-up Layers
formats: raster primary, vector aggregates per admin unit
notes: Mainly raster; included because GHS-OBAT vector layer pairs with it. Anchor reference.
verify_notes: License not stated on collection page; commonly CC-BY-4.0 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GHS-BUILT-S/V/H 是欧盟联合研究中心（JRC）全球人居层（GHSL）中的建成区图层，提供全球范围的建成区面积、体积与高度信息，以栅格为主，并附带按行政单元聚合的矢量产品。数据通过 JRC 数据目录直接下载，页面未明确标注许可。它是 GHSL P2023A 产品包的一部分，与矢量化的 GHS-OBAT 图层配套，是全球建成环境分析的重要锚点参考。
desc_en: GHS-BUILT-S/V/H are the built-up layers of the EC Joint Research Centre's Global Human Settlement Layer (GHSL), providing global built-up surface, volume and height information, primarily as raster with vector aggregates per administrative unit. The data is downloadable from the JRC Data Catalogue, with licensing unspecified on the page. Part of the GHSL P2023A package, it pairs with the vector GHS-OBAT layer and serves as a key anchor reference for global built-environment analysis.

name: GHS-OBAT R2024A — Open Building Attributes (GeoPackage)
verify_notes: FTP directory active, V1-0 subdir present | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GHS-OBAT（Open Building ATtributes）R2024A 是欧盟委员会联合研究中心（JRC）全球人居层 GHSL 计划下的全球建筑物属性数据集。它在全球范围（2024 版）提供建筑物轮廓及相关属性，以 GeoPackage 与 CSV 格式按瓦片通过 FTP 直接发布。该数据常用于城市制图、人口与暴露度评估、能源与气候模拟等研究，是 GHSL 系列产品对建筑物专题的补充。具体许可条款请参见随附的 copyright.txt。
desc_en: GHS-OBAT (Open Building ATtributes) R2024A is a global building-attribute dataset from the European Commission's Joint Research Centre under the Global Human Settlement Layer (GHSL) programme. It provides building footprints with associated attributes worldwide for the 2024 edition, distributed as tiled GeoPackage and CSV files over direct FTP. The data are widely used for urban mapping, population and exposure assessment, and energy and climate modelling, complementing the broader GHSL product family on the buildings theme. Licensing details are given in the accompanying copyright.txt.

name: GLAMOUR - Global Building Morphology (含中国)
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | Hydrography | Physical geography (natural earth)
theme_raw: 建筑形态 (高度/容积率/形状) 矢量化
notes: 面向城市气候/水文模拟；中国学者参与，矢量+栅格并存
verify_notes: Redirects to Nature IDP auth; paper exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GLAMOUR 是 Cao 等人于 2024 年发表在《Scientific Data》上的全球建筑形态学数据集，覆盖全球（含中国），有中国学者参与。它面向城市气候与水文模拟，同时提供矢量（shapefile）与栅格（GeoTIFF）两类产品，描述建筑物的形态特征。数据以论文补充材料形式开放，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。该数据适用于城市冠层参数化、地表能量平衡与城市水文等建模研究。
desc_en: GLAMOUR is a global building-morphology dataset published by Cao et al. in Scientific Data (2024), with contributions from Chinese researchers and global coverage that includes China. Designed to support urban climate and hydrological modelling, it provides both vector (shapefile) and raster (GeoTIFF) products describing building morphological characteristics. Released as a paper supplement under a CC-BY-4.0 licence, it is suited to urban canopy parameterisation, surface energy balance, and urban hydrology studies.

name: Global Building Dataset (GBD) - Training labels
notes: Diverse architectural styles for ML training; complements WHU dataset.
verify_notes: ~800k samples, 12.2GB v1; created at Wuhan U. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Global Building Dataset (GBD) 训练标签数据集由武汉等地学者发布于 Zenodo，v1 版覆盖非洲、澳大利亚与南美洲，提供影像切片与配套矢量标签，总量约 12.2GB。其特色在于涵盖多样的建筑风格，旨在为机器学习的建筑物提取与分割提供训练样本，可与 WHU 等数据集互补。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，适合用于训练和评估跨区域建筑物识别模型。
desc_en: The Global Building Dataset (GBD) training labels, released on Zenodo by academic authors associated with Wuhan, cover Africa, Australia, and South America in version 1. It provides image chips paired with vector labels (about 12.2 GB) spanning diverse architectural styles, intended to supply training samples for machine-learning building extraction and segmentation, complementing datasets such as WHU. Distributed under a CC-BY-4.0 licence, it suits training and evaluating cross-regional building-detection models.

name: GlobalBuildingAtlas (GBA) ODbL Polygons - Part I
formats_now: 建筑多边形, 5°×5° 瓦片, EPSG:4326
notes: Global building polygons fused from ODbL-licensed sources (OSM + Microsoft GMLBF).
verify_notes: 462 GB; 源自 OSM + Microsoft GlobalMLBuildingFootprints; viewer 不可用 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GlobalBuildingAtlas (GBA) ODbL 多边形 Part I 由慕尼黑工业大学朱晓香实验室发布，提供全球范围的建筑物多边形。该子集专门融合 ODbL 许可的来源（OpenStreetMap 与 Microsoft GMLBF），以 ODbL 1.0 许可在 Hugging Face 上开放，规模约 462 GB，格式兼容 GeoPackage/shapefile。它是 GBA 全球建筑图谱的开放许可部分，适合用于全球城市制图与建筑物分析。
desc_en: GlobalBuildingAtlas (GBA) ODbL Polygons — Part I, released by TU Munich's Zhu Xiao Xiang Lab, provides global building polygons. This subset is fused exclusively from ODbL-licensed sources (OpenStreetMap and Microsoft GMLBF) and is shared openly on Hugging Face under ODbL 1.0, totalling roughly 462 GB in GeoPackage/shapefile-compatible vector format. It represents the open-licensed portion of the GBA building atlas and supports global urban mapping and building analysis.

name: GlobalBuildingAtlas - GBA.Polygon (Building Footprints)
notes: Includes GBA.Height (raster) and GBA.LoD1 (3D); code at github.com/zhu-xlab/GlobalBuildingAtlas
verify_notes: TUM mediaTUM record | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GlobalBuildingAtlas 的 GBA.Polygon 建筑物轮廓层由慕尼黑工业大学通过 mediaTUM 发布，号称覆盖全球约 27.5 亿个建筑多边形。其包含 OSM 与 Microsoft 等组件，相应部分采用 ODbL 许可，并提供 Hugging Face 镜像。该图谱还配套 GBA.Height（栅格高度）与 GBA.LoD1（三维）产品，代码托管于 GitHub。它是一套大规模全球建筑物数据，适用于城市形态、能耗与三维建模研究。
desc_en: The GBA.Polygon building-footprint layer of GlobalBuildingAtlas, published by TU Munich via mediaTUM, reportedly comprises about 2.75 billion building polygons worldwide. It incorporates OSM and Microsoft components, with those parts under ODbL, and is mirrored on Hugging Face. The atlas is accompanied by GBA.Height (raster) and GBA.LoD1 (3D) products, with code on GitHub. This large-scale global building dataset supports research on urban morphology, energy demand, and 3D city modelling.

name: GlobalBuildingAtlas LoD1 (GBA.LoD1) - Part II
notes: Building footprints with LoD1 height extrusions; companion to GBA.Polygon.
verify_notes: 1.05 TB; 与 ODbLPolygon 合用时注意许可冲突 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GlobalBuildingAtlas LoD1 (GBA.LoD1) Part II 由慕尼黑工业大学发布，在建筑物轮廓基础上叠加 LoD1 高度拉伸，生成全球范围的三维建筑模型，提供矢量多边形与 LoD1 的 CityJSON/JSON 格式，规模约 1.05 TB。它是 GBA.Polygon 的配套产品，采用 CC BY-NC 4.0（非商业）许可，通过 Hugging Face 开放，适合三维城市建模、日照与能耗分析等用途。
desc_en: GlobalBuildingAtlas LoD1 (GBA.LoD1) — Part II, released by TU Munich, extrudes building footprints to LoD1 heights to produce global 3D building models, delivered as vector polygons plus LoD1 CityJSON/JSON and totalling about 1.05 TB. A companion to GBA.Polygon, it is shared openly on Hugging Face under a CC BY-NC 4.0 (non-commercial) licence and suits 3D city modelling, solar potential, and energy-demand analysis.

name: GlobalBuildingAtlas open footprints (Hugging Face)
notes: Mirror of OSM+Microsoft components from GlobalBuildingAtlas
verify_notes: Hugging Face dataset GBA.ODbLPolygon | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 GlobalBuildingAtlas 开放轮廓在 Hugging Face 上的镜像，提供其 OSM 与 Microsoft 组件的全球开放许可子集，以 ODbL 许可发布，格式为建筑物矢量多边形。它便于直接通过 Hugging Face 获取 GBA 中可自由再用的部分，适用于全球建筑物制图与机器学习等任务。
desc_en: This is a Hugging Face mirror of the GlobalBuildingAtlas open footprints, providing the global open-licensed subset built from its OSM and Microsoft components under an ODbL licence, delivered as vector building polygons. It offers convenient direct access to the freely reusable portion of GBA via Hugging Face and supports global building mapping and machine-learning workflows.

name: GlobalBuildingAtlas Polygon (GBA.Polygon)
notes: Full global polygon layer including non-ODbL sources.
verify_notes: HuggingFace returned 401 to WebFetch; dataset likely exists but requires auth/login to view card. | lychee:Rejected status code: 401 Unauthorized
desc_zh: GlobalBuildingAtlas Polygon (GBA.Polygon) 由慕尼黑工业大学在 Hugging Face 上发布，是包含非 ODbL 来源在内的完整全球建筑物多边形层，坐标系为 EPSG:3857（Web 墨卡托）。其许可情况请以 Hugging Face 数据卡为准。作为 GBA 系列的核心矢量层，它适用于全球尺度的建筑物制图、城市分析与三维建模的输入。
desc_en: GlobalBuildingAtlas Polygon (GBA.Polygon), released by TU Munich on Hugging Face, is the full global building-polygon layer including non-ODbL sources, provided in EPSG:3857 (Web Mercator). Licensing should be checked on the Hugging Face dataset card. As the core vector layer of the GBA series, it supports global-scale building mapping, urban analysis, and as input for 3D modelling.

name: GRB - Grootschalig Referentiebestand (Flanders buildings)
notes: Flemish large-scale reference incl. building polygons
verify_notes: 503 Service Unavailable - likely bot protection | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: GRB（Grootschalig Referentiebestand，大比例尺参考底图）是比利时弗兰德斯地区由 Informatie Vlaanderen 维护的大比例尺地形参考数据，包含建筑物多边形等要素。数据通过 Geopunt 下载或 WFS 服务提供 shapefile、GeoPackage 等格式，遵循弗兰德斯开放数据的自由再用政策。它是该地区权威的官方参考数据，适用于城市规划、地籍与基础设施管理等用途。
desc_en: GRB (Grootschalig Referentiebestand, large-scale reference base) is the large-scale topographic reference dataset for Flanders, Belgium, maintained by Informatie Vlaanderen, including building polygons among other features. It is available as shapefile, GeoPackage, and WFS via Geopunt downloads under Flanders' free-reuse open-data policy. As the region's authoritative reference data, it supports urban planning, cadastral work, and infrastructure management.

name: GSI Japan Building Vector Tiles
formats: Mapbox Vector Tiles (PBF), shapefile via NLNI
notes: Cold pick: actually pre-rendered MVT direct from GSI; NLNI provides shapefile gov-wide layers
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GSI 日本建筑物矢量瓦片由日本国土地理院（GSI）发布，覆盖日本全国，以预渲染的 Mapbox 矢量瓦片（PBF）形式直接提供建筑物等要素，按季度更新；通过 NLNI（国土数值情报）还可获取全国范围的 shapefile 图层。数据遵循 GSI 使用条款。它适合作为网页地图底图与日本建筑物空间分析的权威官方来源。
desc_en: GSI Japan Building Vector Tiles, published by the Geospatial Information Authority of Japan (GSI), cover the whole of Japan and deliver buildings and other features as pre-rendered Mapbox Vector Tiles (PBF) directly from GSI, updated quarterly; nationwide shapefile layers are additionally available via NLNI. The data follow GSI's terms of use and serve as an authoritative official source for web-map basemaps and building-level spatial analysis in Japan.

name: Hausumringe / ALKIS Gebäude (Lower Saxony, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Saxony-Anhalt, NRW, Berlin, Brandenburg, Thuringia, Hamburg)
provider: German Bundesländer surveying agencies (LGLN, LAiV, LVermGeo, etc.)
notes: EUBUCCO ingests many state-level open ALKIS/Hausumringe releases
verify_notes: page returned 404; AdV site reorganised | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: Hausumringe / ALKIS Gebäude 是德国多个联邦州（下萨克森、梅前州、萨克森-安哈尔特、北威州、柏林、勃兰登堡、图林根、汉堡等）测绘机构发布的官方建筑物轮廓数据，汇总自各州的开放发布。数据来自权威的 ALKIS 地籍系统，提供 shapefile、GeoPackage 等格式，许可多为 DL-DE/BY-2.0（各州略有差异）。EUBUCCO 等项目即整合了这些州级开放数据，适用于建筑物制图与城市分析。
desc_en: Hausumringe / ALKIS Gebäude are official building-outline datasets from the surveying agencies of several German states (Lower Saxony, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Saxony-Anhalt, NRW, Berlin, Brandenburg, Thuringia, Hamburg), aggregated from per-state open releases. Derived from the authoritative ALKIS cadastre, they are provided as shapefile and GeoPackage, typically under DL-DE/BY-2.0 (varying by state). Projects such as EUBUCCO ingest these state-level open releases for building mapping and urban analysis.

name: Helsinki Region Infoshare (HRI)
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | Transportation | Land cover & land use
notes: Long-running showcase CKAN with rich urban vector data (zoning, buildings, transport).
verify_notes: Helsinki Region Infoshare active | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Helsinki Region Infoshare (HRI) 是赫尔辛基市等机构运营的区域开放数据门户，覆盖芬兰赫尔辛基都会区，提供丰富的城市矢量数据，涵盖建筑物、土地利用/分区、交通等专题。门户基于 CKAN 构建并提供 API，数据格式包括 Shapefile、GeoJSON、WFS、GML，多以 CC-BY 4.0 许可发布。作为长期运行的开放数据典范，它适合城市研究、规划与应用开发。
desc_en: Helsinki Region Infoshare (HRI), run by the City of Helsinki and partners, is a regional open-data portal for the Helsinki metropolitan area of Finland, offering rich urban vector data across buildings, land use/zoning, and transport. Built on CKAN with an API, it provides Shapefile, GeoJSON, WFS, and GML, mostly under CC-BY 4.0. A long-running showcase open-data service, it supports urban research, planning, and application development.

name: HOTOSM South Africa Buildings (OpenStreetMap Export)
verify_notes: HDX 403 to WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: HOTOSM 南非建筑物数据是人道主义 OpenStreetMap 团队（HOT）从 OpenStreetMap 中导出的南非建筑物图层，通过 HDX 人道主义数据交换平台发布。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、GeoPackage 等格式，采用 ODbL 许可。它便于在灾害响应、规划与人道主义行动中使用南非的 OSM 建筑物数据，覆盖与完整性取决于 OSM 社区贡献。
desc_en: HOTOSM South Africa Buildings is a country-level building layer extracted from OpenStreetMap by the Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team (HOT) and distributed via the HDX Humanitarian Data Exchange. It is provided as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, and GeoPackage under the ODbL licence. The dataset makes South Africa's OSM building data readily usable for disaster response, planning, and humanitarian work, with coverage and completeness depending on OSM community contributions.

name: IBGE CNEFE 2022 - National Address File for Statistical Purposes
provider: IBGE - Instituto Brasileiro de Geografia e Estatistica
notes: 2022 release added geocoded coordinates - first nationwide point address layer for Brazil; rarely cited outside Brazil.
verify_notes: FTP path returns 404; IBGE may have restructured CNEFE 2022 path | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: IBGE CNEFE 2022 是巴西地理统计局（IBGE）为统计目的建立的全国地址文件，配合 2022 年人口普查发布，约含 1.06 亿条地址。2022 版首次为地址加入了地理编码坐标，成为巴西首个全国性的点状地址图层。数据以定宽 TXT（含经纬度）格式通过 FTP 直接下载，属政府开放数据。它适用于人口统计、地理编码与城市分析，但在巴西以外较少被引用。
desc_en: IBGE CNEFE 2022 is Brazil's national address file for statistical purposes, compiled by IBGE alongside the 2022 census and containing roughly 106 million addresses. The 2022 edition added geocoded coordinates for the first time, making it Brazil's first nationwide point address layer. It is distributed as fixed-width TXT with latitude/longitude via direct FTP download as open government data. It supports demographic statistics, geocoding, and urban analysis, though it is rarely cited outside Brazil.

name: IGN España — API-Features (IDEE, pygeoapi)
theme_raw: National cartography (hydro, transport, land use, addresses)
notes: Spanish-language, INSPIRE-aligned national feature API; less referenced internationally.
verify_notes: 50+ datasets; pygeoapi 0.20.0 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: IGN España API-Features 是西班牙国家地理研究院（IGN）在国家空间数据基础设施 IDEE 框架下、基于 pygeoapi 提供的 OGC API Features 服务，覆盖西班牙全国，包含建筑物、交通、水文等专题要素。数据以 GeoJSON/JSON-LD 形式开放，符合 INSPIRE 规范，采用 CC-BY 4.0 IGN 许可。该接口为西班牙语界面、面向国家级要素查询，在国际上引用较少，适合空间数据集成与分析。
desc_en: IGN España API-Features is an OGC API Features service provided by Spain's National Geographic Institute (IGN) within the IDEE national spatial data infrastructure, built on pygeoapi. Covering all of Spain, it exposes themes such as buildings, transport, and hydrography as GeoJSON/JSON-LD, aligned with INSPIRE and licensed under CC-BY 4.0 IGN. The Spanish-language, INSPIRE-aligned national feature API is less referenced internationally and suits spatial data integration and analysis.

name: INSPIRE - Batiments 3D LoD1 (Wallonie)
notes: INSPIRE-compliant building footprints for Wallonia.
verify_notes: INSPIRE 3D Buildings LoD1 2013-2014 metadata page | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: INSPIRE Bâtiments 3D LoD1（瓦隆）由比利时瓦隆大区公共服务机构发布，提供瓦隆地区符合 INSPIRE 规范的 LoD1 三维建筑物轮廓数据，格式为 GML/shapefile，遵循瓦隆开放数据政策。它将建筑物轮廓与 LoD1 高度信息结合，适用于三维城市建模、能耗评估与区域规划。
desc_en: INSPIRE Bâtiments 3D LoD1 (Wallonia), published by the public service of Wallonia, Belgium, provides INSPIRE-compliant LoD1 3D building footprints for the Walloon region in GML/shapefile under Walloon open-data terms. By combining building outlines with LoD1 height information, it supports 3D city modelling, energy-demand assessment, and regional planning.

name: INSPIRE Buildings (Annex III) - Lithuania
verify_notes: Lithuania INSPIRE Buildings Annex III; monthly update | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: INSPIRE Buildings（附录 III）立陶宛由立陶宛 INSPIRE 地理门户发布，提供覆盖立陶宛全国、符合 INSPIRE 建筑物主题规范的数据，通过 WFS 与 GML 下载服务提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。它是立陶宛国家级的官方建筑物数据，适用于跨欧洲数据整合、城市与基础设施分析。
desc_en: INSPIRE Buildings (Annex III) — Lithuania, published via the Lithuanian INSPIRE Geoportal, provides INSPIRE-compliant building-theme data covering the whole of Lithuania, delivered through WFS and GML download services under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. It is the national authoritative building dataset for Lithuania, suited to pan-European data integration and urban and infrastructure analysis.

name: INSPIRE Download Service of the Buildings of Navarra
license_now: CC BY 4.0; no limitations on public access
notes: Sub-national Spanish buildings dataset; useful niche vector example beyond Madrid catastro.
verify_notes: Endpoint: https://inspire.navarra.es/services/BU/wfs | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 纳瓦拉建筑物 INSPIRE 下载服务由 Tracasa Instrumental / 纳瓦拉政府提供，覆盖西班牙纳瓦拉自治区，以 WFS 2.0.0 与 GML 形式开放符合 INSPIRE 规范的建筑物数据，许可为 CC BY 4.0 且对公众访问无限制。作为西班牙的次国家级（地区）建筑物数据，它是马德里地籍之外有用的小众矢量示例，适用于区域建筑物制图与分析。
desc_en: The INSPIRE Download Service of the Buildings of Navarra, provided by Tracasa Instrumental / Gobierno de Navarra, covers the Navarra region of Spain and serves INSPIRE-compliant building data via WFS 2.0.0 and GML under CC BY 4.0 with no public-access limitations. As a sub-national Spanish buildings dataset, it offers a useful niche vector example beyond the Madrid cadastre for regional building mapping and analysis.

name: INSPIRE theme Buildings (BU)
provider: Czech Office for Surveying, Mapping and Cadastre (CUZK)
notes: National INSPIRE Buildings dataset; one of EUBUCCO national sources.
verify_notes: Czech ČÚZK geoportal accessible | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: INSPIRE Buildings (BU) 由捷克测绘与地籍局（ČÚZK）发布，提供覆盖捷克全国、符合 INSPIRE 规范的建筑物主题数据，以 GML 格式通过下载或 WFS 服务开放。作为捷克的国家级官方建筑物数据，它也是 EUBUCCO 整合的国家来源之一，适用于城市分析与跨欧洲数据整合。
desc_en: INSPIRE theme Buildings (BU), published by the Czech Office for Surveying, Mapping and Cadastre (ČÚZK), provides INSPIRE-compliant building data covering the whole of Czechia, available as GML via download or WFS services. As the national authoritative building dataset for Czechia and one of EUBUCCO's national sources, it supports urban analysis and pan-European data integration.

name: Italy - ANNCSU / Civic Numbers (regional address files)
formats: Shapefile, CSV via comune open data
notes: Catalog under sources/it/
verify_notes: Territorial bases census 1991-2021; WGS84 UTM32N | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 意大利 ANNCSU / 门牌号（地区地址文件）涉及意大利各市镇的街道与门牌号地址数据，与 ISTAT 的国家街道与门牌号档案相关，按市镇发布、覆盖部分地区。数据通过各市镇开放数据以 Shapefile、CSV 等格式提供，通常采用 CC-BY 类许可。它适用于地理编码、地址匹配与城市统计分析，覆盖完整度因市镇而异。
desc_en: Italy — ANNCSU / Civic Numbers refers to street and house-number address data for Italian municipalities, linked to ISTAT's national archive of streets and civic numbers, released per comune with partial coverage. The data are provided through municipal open-data portals as Shapefile and CSV, typically under CC-BY-style licences. They support geocoding, address matching, and urban statistical analysis, with completeness varying by municipality.

name: Japan Address Base Registry (ABR) / Digital Agency
formats_now: CSV; ABR Geocoder tool on GitHub
notes: Emerging authoritative source; complements sources/jp using GSI numerical info and ISJ.
verify_notes: Town/district data officially released 2025-06-01; street/house data still in development | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 日本地址基础登记簿（ABR）由日本数字厅（Digital Agency）建设，覆盖日本全国，是新兴的权威地址来源。数据提供含坐标的 CSV、GeoJSON 与矢量瓦片（MVT）等格式，支持批量下载与 API，依使用条款采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它补充了基于 GSI 数值情报与 ISJ 的日本地址数据，适用于地理编码、地址标准化与行政数字化应用。
desc_en: The Japan Address Base Registry (ABR), developed by Japan's Digital Agency, covers the nation and is an emerging authoritative address source. It provides CSV with coordinates, GeoJSON, and vector tiles (MVT), with both open bulk download and API access, under a CC BY 4.0 licence per its terms of service. It complements Japanese address data based on GSI numerical information and ISJ, supporting geocoding, address standardisation, and digital-government applications.

name: Japan Footprint Dataset (sekilab)
feature_count: approximately 50 million building footprints located within Japan
notes: Extracted from Mapbox satellite via instance segmentation. Complements OSM in Japan where OSM is sparse.
verify_notes: Data on S3 bucket sekilab-public-data; ~50M footprints, license MIT (note: license_known said CC-BY) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 日本建筑物轮廓数据集（sekilab）由东京大学关本研究室发布，覆盖日本全国约 5000 万个建筑物，分辨率约 0.6 米。其通过实例分割从 Mapbox 卫星影像中提取得到，以 shapefile / GeoJSON 提供，采用 MIT 许可。该数据在 OSM 覆盖稀疏的日本地区可作有力补充，适合作为建筑物提取与城市分析的数据源及机器学习样本。
desc_en: The Japan Footprint Dataset (sekilab), released by the Sekimoto Lab at the University of Tokyo, covers about 50 million buildings across Japan at roughly 0.6 m resolution. Extracted from Mapbox satellite imagery via instance segmentation, it is provided as shapefile and GeoJSON under an MIT licence. It complements OSM in parts of Japan where OSM is sparse and serves as a data source for building extraction, urban analysis, and machine-learning training.

name: JRC Digital Building Stock Model (DBSM-R2023)
license_now: Open Data Commons Open Database License v1.0 (ODbL)
formats_now: RDF/XML, JSON-LD, CSV, HTML, Turtle, NTriples, N3; FTP 下载 jeodpp.jrc.ec.europa.eu
feature_count: individual building footprints covering all countries of the European Union (EU27)
notes: Lesser-known counterpart to EUBUCCO with different conflation logic
verify_notes: P4 标 CC-BY-4.0, 但 JRC 页面元数据现为 ODbL-1.0 — 许可证记录需修正 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: JRC 数字建筑存量模型（DBSM-R2023）由欧盟委员会联合研究中心发布，覆盖欧盟 27 国（EU27），提供各成员国的单体建筑物轮廓。数据以 GeoPackage 与 FlatGeobuf 格式通过 JRC 数据目录直接下载，采用 ODbL v1.0 许可。它是 EUBUCCO 之外、采用不同融合逻辑的较少为人知的对应产品，适用于建筑物存量、能耗与暴露度评估等研究。
desc_en: The JRC Digital Building Stock Model (DBSM-R2023), published by the European Commission's JRC, covers the EU27 and provides individual building footprints for all member states. It is distributed as GeoPackage and FlatGeobuf via the JRC data catalogue under the ODbL v1.0 licence. A lesser-known counterpart to EUBUCCO that uses different conflation logic, it supports research on building stock, energy demand, and exposure assessment.

name: Juso 도로명주소 - Korean Road-Name Address Open Data
provider: Korea Ministry of Interior and Safety
notes: Authoritative Korean addressing; less well known internationally; nationwide shapefile bulk downloads available after free registration.
verify_notes: API endpoint returns 404 on direct GET; may require POST/key; doc URL may have moved | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: Juso 道路名地址是韩国行政安全部提供的权威道路名地址开放数据，覆盖韩国全国。数据以 Shapefile、TXT 与 API 形式提供，采用公共 Nuri 第 1 类许可，需免费注册后可批量下载全国 shapefile。作为韩国官方的地址体系，它在国际上知名度较低，适用于地理编码、地址标准化与配送、城市分析等应用。
desc_en: Juso Road-Name Address is the authoritative Korean road-name address open data provided by Korea's Ministry of the Interior and Safety, covering the entire Republic of Korea. It is offered as Shapefile, TXT, and API under the Public Nuri Type 1 licence, with nationwide shapefile bulk downloads available after free registration. As Korea's official addressing system, it is less well known internationally and supports geocoding, address standardisation, delivery, and urban analysis.

name: Kadaster BAG (Addresses & Buildings)
formats: WFS GML/GeoJSON, OGC API Features, Vector Tiles
formats_now: OGC API (JSON, HTML, Vector Tiles, Mapbox styles, OpenAPI v3)
access: WFS / OGC API Features / OGC API Vector Tiles
notes: Migrating from BAG WFS to OGC API Features; gold-standard national register
verify_notes: P4 标 CC0/open, 实际为 PDM 1.0 (语义近似 CC0); 无需登录, 免费 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Kadaster BAG（地址与建筑物）是荷兰土地登记局 Kadaster 通过 PDOK 平台提供的国家级地址与建筑物基础登记数据，覆盖荷兰全国并每日更新。数据通过 WFS（GML/GeoJSON）、OGC API Features 与矢量瓦片提供，采用公共领域标记（PDM 1.0）。BAG 是荷兰公认的黄金标准国家登记簿，目前正从 BAG WFS 迁移至 OGC API Features，适用于地址、建筑物与城市管理的各类应用。
desc_en: Kadaster BAG (Addresses & Buildings) is the Dutch national base registry of addresses and buildings, provided by the Kadaster via the PDOK platform, covering the whole of the Netherlands with daily updates. It is served through WFS (GML/GeoJSON), OGC API Features, and vector tiles under the Public Domain Mark 1.0. BAG is the recognised gold-standard national register, currently migrating from BAG WFS to OGC API Features, and supports a wide range of address, building, and urban-management applications.

name: KakumaAerial Dataset (Refugee Camp Building & Solar Footprints)
theme_raw: Refugee camp building footprints, solar panels, toilets, roof materials
coverage: Kakuma & Kalobeyei refugee camps, Turkana, Kenya
formats_now: GeoTIFF, GeoJSON, Shapefile, PNG chips, YAML
notes: Companion to 'Mapping Refugee Camps with AI' paper
verify_notes: KakumaAerial dataset ~19.3 GB; historical version 1.5 TB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Kakuma 航空数据集发布于 Zenodo，覆盖肯尼亚图尔卡纳郡的 Kakuma 与 Kalobeyei 难民营，提供建筑物与太阳能板轮廓，含 GeoJSON、Shapefile 矢量及 GeoTIFF 栅格影像，总量约 19.3 GB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。它是论文《用 AI 测绘难民营》的配套数据，适用于人道主义制图、营地基础设施评估与建筑物/光伏提取的机器学习研究。
desc_en: The KakumaAerial Dataset, released on Zenodo, covers the Kakuma and Kalobeyei refugee camps in Turkana, Kenya, providing building and solar-panel footprints with GeoJSON and Shapefile vectors plus GeoTIFF rasters, totalling about 19.3 GB under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. It is the companion to the paper 'Mapping Refugee Camps with AI' and supports humanitarian mapping, camp-infrastructure assessment, and machine-learning research on building and solar-panel extraction.

name: King County / WA State address points
notes: Referenced in sources/us/wa/king.json
verify_notes: Minimal content fetched but portal reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: King County / 华盛顿州地址点数据由金县 GIS 中心发布，覆盖华盛顿州金县（含西雅图），提供地址点要素。数据通过 ArcGIS Hub 的 FeatureService 与下载以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 形式提供，遵循金县开放数据条款。作为该县权威的地址点来源，它适用于地理编码、应急响应与城市分析。
desc_en: King County / WA State address points, published by the King County GIS Center, cover King County, Washington (including Seattle) and provide address-point features. The data are available as Shapefile and GeoJSON through an ArcGIS Hub FeatureService and downloads under King County open-data terms. As the county's authoritative address-point source, it supports geocoding, emergency response, and urban analysis.

name: Lantmateriet Topografi 10 / Topografi 50 - Buildings (Sweden)
license: CC0 / Lantmateriet free use (since 2022 open release)
notes: Sweden opened up most Lantmateriet topographic layers in 2022 - building polygons and addresses now under open licence; not yet well surfaced internationally.
verify_notes: 产品列表页 404，Lantmäteriet 已重组站点；建议改用 /sv/geodata/geodata-produkter 或 OGD 门户 | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: Lantmäteriet Topografi 10 / Topografi 50 建筑物数据由瑞典国家土地测量局发布，覆盖瑞典全国，提供地形数据中的建筑物图层，格式为 GeoPackage 与 shapefile，可直接下载。瑞典自 2022 年起开放了大部分 Lantmäteriet 地形图层，建筑物多边形与地址改为开放许可（CC0 / 免费使用）。该数据是瑞典权威的官方地形要素，适用于制图、规划与空间分析。
desc_en: Lantmäteriet Topografi 10 / Topografi 50 — Buildings, published by Sweden's national land survey Lantmäteriet, covers the whole of Sweden and provides the building layer of the topographic data as GeoPackage and shapefile for direct download. Since Sweden's 2022 open release, most Lantmäteriet topographic layers, including building polygons and addresses, are under an open licence (CC0 / free use). As authoritative official topographic data, it supports mapping, planning, and spatial analysis, and is not yet well surfaced internationally.

name: Lantmäteriet / Lantmateriverket open addresses (Sweden)
notes: Referenced under sources/se/
verify_notes: Product page exists; details on Geotorget | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Lantmäteriet 开放地址（瑞典）由瑞典国家土地测量局发布，覆盖瑞典全国，提供地点地址数据，格式包括 Shapefile、GeoPackage 与 GML，通过 GeoTorget 下载及 WFS 服务获取。自 2022 年开放数据发布以来，该数据采用 CC0 许可。它是瑞典权威的官方地址来源，适用于地理编码、地址匹配与城市分析。
desc_en: Lantmäteriet open addresses (Sweden), published by Sweden's National Land Survey, cover the whole of Sweden and provide location-address data as Shapefile, GeoPackage, and GML via GeoTorget downloads and a WFS service. Since the 2022 open-data release, the data are under a CC0 licence. As Sweden's authoritative official address source, it supports geocoding, address matching, and urban analysis.

name: Louisville Metro Building Outlines (with heights)
theme_raw: Buildings — LiDAR-derived footprints with height attributes
notes: Validation reference for 3D-GloBFP.
verify_notes: Dataset not found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: Louisville Metro 建筑物轮廓（含高度）由 LOJIC / 路易斯维尔市政府发布，覆盖美国肯塔基州杰斐逊县/路易斯维尔，提供带高度属性的建筑物轮廓。数据通过 ArcGIS Hub 以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 与 FeatureServer 形式开放下载，遵循 LOJIC 开放数据条款。它曾被用作 3D-GloBFP 的验证参考，适用于三维城市建模与本地规划分析。
desc_en: Louisville Metro Building Outlines (with heights), published by LOJIC / Louisville Metro Government, cover Jefferson County / Louisville, Kentucky, USA, providing building outlines with height attributes. The data are openly available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and a FeatureServer via ArcGIS Hub under LOJIC open-data terms. Used as a validation reference for 3D-GloBFP, it supports 3D city modelling and local planning analysis.

name: MTBF-33 Multi-Temporal Building Footprint (US 33 counties, 1900-2015)
notes: Harmonized from county cadastral + tax assessor data. Useful for training historical settlement extraction models.
verify_notes: MTBF-33 accessible; per-county shapefiles | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MTBF-33 多时相建筑物轮廓数据集由科罗拉多大学博尔德分校/NCAR 的 Uhl 与 Leyk 发布，覆盖美国 33 个县、约 620 万个建筑物，时间跨度 1900–2015 年（逐年）。数据由县级地籍与税务评估数据协调融合而成，提供 shapefile / geopackage，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。它适用于历史聚落扩张研究及训练历史建筑物提取模型。
desc_en: The MTBF-33 Multi-Temporal Building Footprint dataset, released by Uhl & Leyk (CU Boulder / NCAR), covers 33 US counties with about 6.2 million footprints annually from 1900 to 2015. Harmonised from county cadastral and tax-assessor data, it is provided as shapefile and geopackage under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. It supports studies of historical settlement growth and the training of historical building-extraction models.

name: MTBF-33: Multi-temporal building footprint dataset for 33 US counties (1900-2015)
theme_canonical: Buildings & addresses | Land cover & land use
what_changes: Vector building footprints time-stamped with construction dates; uses SEDAC/CIESIN ancillary population and urban-extent layers for validation and rural/urban stratification.
notes: Cold derivative leveraging SEDAC for historical urbanisation context.
verify_notes: MTBF-33 building footprints 1900-2015 33 US counties | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 MTBF-33 多时相建筑物轮廓数据集（美国 33 个县，1900–2015）的同行评议论文（Scientific Data 2022），介绍该数据集的构建方法与用途。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，并借助 SEDAC 提供历史城市化背景。该论文为使用 MTBF-33 进行历史聚落与城市化分析提供了方法与说明依据。
desc_en: This is the peer-reviewed paper (Scientific Data 2022) for the MTBF-33 multi-temporal building footprint dataset covering 33 US counties from 1900 to 2015, documenting the dataset's construction and applications. The data are under a CC BY 4.0 licence and leverage SEDAC for historical urbanisation context. The paper provides the methodological and descriptive basis for using MTBF-33 in historical settlement and urbanisation analysis.

name: N50 Kartdata
theme_raw: topographic base map (land cover, hydrography, transport, buildings, contours, coastline)
notes: Includes kystkontur (coastline) referenced to mean high water
verify_notes: Geonorge metadata page loads via JS; entry exists | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: N50 Kartdata 由挪威测绘局（Kartverket）发布，是挪威 1:50000 比例尺的国家地形数据，涵盖建筑物、交通、水文等专题，并包含以平均高潮位为基准的海岸线（kystkontur）。数据提供 FGDB、GML、SOSI、PostGIS 等格式，以及 WMS/WFS 服务，采用 CC BY 4.0（Norge digitalt）许可。它是挪威权威的官方地形底图，适用于制图、规划与多专题空间分析。
desc_en: N50 Kartdata, published by the Norwegian Mapping Authority (Kartverket), is Norway's national 1:50,000-scale topographic data spanning buildings, transport, and hydrography, and including the coastline (kystkontur) referenced to mean high water. It is available as FGDB, GML, SOSI, and PostGIS, plus WMS/WFS services, under a CC BY 4.0 (Norge digitalt) licence. It is Norway's authoritative official topographic base, suited to mapping, planning, and multi-theme spatial analysis.

name: National Address Points
notes: Nationally consistent address point dataset
verify_notes: National Address Points page exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: National Address Points 由 Geoscape / PSMA 发布，覆盖澳大利亚全国，是全国一致的地址点数据集。数据以 GeoJSON 与 FeatureServer 形式开放，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。作为澳大利亚权威、统一的地址点来源，它适用于地理编码、应急服务、配送与城市分析等广泛应用。
desc_en: National Address Points, published by Geoscape / PSMA, cover the whole of Australia and form a nationally consistent address-point dataset. The data are openly available as GeoJSON and via a FeatureServer under a CC BY 4.0 licence. As Australia's authoritative, unified address-point source, it supports geocoding, emergency services, delivery, and urban analysis across a wide range of applications.

name: National Land Survey Finland - Building Inquiry Service
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden to fetcher; site likely blocks bots | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 芬兰国家土地测量局（MML）建筑物查询服务覆盖芬兰全国，提供官方建筑物数据，格式为 shapefile，通过开放下载/服务获取，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。作为芬兰权威的国家级建筑物来源，它适用于建筑物制图、城市规划与空间分析。
desc_en: The National Land Survey of Finland (MML) Building Inquiry Service covers the whole of Finland and provides official building data as shapefile through an open download/service under a CC BY 4.0 licence. As Finland's authoritative national building source, it supports building mapping, urban planning, and spatial analysis.

name: New Zealand Street Address (LINZ)
formats_now: Shapefile, GeoPackage, CSV, KML, WFS, WMTS
notes: OpenAddresses sources/nz references LDS WFS endpoints.
verify_notes: LINZ Data Service standard formats | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 新西兰土地信息局（LINZ）发布的全国街道地址权威矢量数据集，覆盖新西兰全境，记录街道地址点位及相关属性。数据通过 LINZ Data Service 免费开放，提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON 以及 WFS 服务等多种格式，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。常用于地理编码、地址匹配、规划与应急服务，也是 OpenAddresses 新西兰来源所引用的官方端点。
desc_en: An authoritative national street address point dataset published by Land Information New Zealand (LINZ), covering all of New Zealand. It records address locations together with related attributes such as street names and address numbers. Distributed openly through the LINZ Data Service under CC BY 4.0, it is available as Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON and via a WFS endpoint. It is widely used for geocoding, address matching, planning and emergency services, and serves as the official source referenced by OpenAddresses for New Zealand.

name: NLS Finland INSPIRE Building & Address WFS
notes: INSPIRE-compliant endpoint discoverable through EU INSPIRE Geoportal; comparable services exist for most EU member states.
verify_notes: INSPIRE Finnish building data; metadata stamp 2024-05-16; WFS endpoint at maanmittauslaitos.fi | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 芬兰国家土地测量局（Maanmittauslaitos）提供的 INSPIRE 兼容建筑与地址 WFS 服务，覆盖芬兰全国，可通过欧盟 INSPIRE 地理门户检索发现。数据以 GML、WFS 2.0 与 ATOM 形式提供，遵循芬兰开放数据 CC BY 4.0 许可。该服务于 2016 年创建并持续更新（最近更新 2024-05-16），是欧盟成员国按 INSPIRE 指令发布建筑/地址主题的典型范例，适用于跨境数据集成与地理编码。
desc_en: An INSPIRE-compliant Building and Address WFS service from the National Land Survey of Finland (Maanmittauslaitos), covering Finland and discoverable through the EU INSPIRE Geoportal. Data is served as GML via WFS 2.0 and ATOM feeds under the NLS open-data CC BY 4.0 licence. Created in 2016 and regularly updated (last update 2024-05-16), it exemplifies the harmonised building/address theme that EU member states publish under the INSPIRE Directive, making it useful for cross-border integration and geocoding.

name: NYC Building Footprints
provider: NYC Department of Information Technology & Telecommunications (NYC OpenData)
theme_raw: Buildings — municipal footprints with HEIGHT_ROOF, GROUND_ELEV attributes
notes: Validation reference for 3D-GloBFP.
verify_notes: Dataset 404; NYC Open Data may have re-slugged | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 纽约市开放数据平台发布的建筑轮廓矢量数据集，由纽约市信息技术与电信局维护，覆盖纽约市五个行政区。数据包含建筑物的二维轮廓多边形及相关属性，免费开放下载，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、File GDB 等格式。该图层是城市级权威建筑足迹的代表，常用于城市规划、应急管理与三维建模，并被用作 3D-GloBFP 等全球建筑数据集的验证参考。
desc_en: A vector dataset of building footprints published on the NYC OpenData portal and maintained by the NYC Department of Information Technology & Telecommunications, covering the five boroughs of New York City. It provides 2D footprint polygons with associated attributes and is freely downloadable as Shapefile, GeoJSON and File GDB. As an example of authoritative city-scale footprints, it supports urban planning, emergency management and 3D modelling, and is used as a validation reference for global building datasets such as 3D-GloBFP.

name: oa2osm
notes: Pipes OA address GeoJSON into OSM-compatible XML
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenAddresses 维护的开源工具 oa2osm，用于将 OpenAddresses 的地址 GeoJSON 数据转换为 OSM 兼容的 XML 格式，便于将开放地址数据导入 OpenStreetMap 生态。项目托管于 GitHub，采用 MIT 许可。它本身不是数据集而是数据处理管线，适用于地址数据迁移、导入与质量比对等工作流。
desc_en: oa2osm is an open-source tool maintained by OpenAddresses that converts OpenAddresses address GeoJSON into OSM-compatible XML. It lets users pipe authoritative open-address data into the OpenStreetMap ecosystem for import, comparison or enrichment. Hosted on GitHub under the MIT licence, it is a data-processing pipeline rather than a dataset itself, and is typically used in address-data migration and conflation workflows.

name: Open BeSt Addresses (Belgium)
notes: Belgian authoritative address dataset referenced by OA sources
verify_notes: Belgium address conversion tools | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Open BeSt Addresses 是比利时的权威开放地址数据集，由 OSoC 与联邦 BOSA 相关方整理发布，覆盖比利时全境。数据以 GeoJSON 和 CSV 形式开放下载，被 OpenAddresses 作为比利时来源引用。BeSt 整合了比利时三个大区的官方地址登记，适用于地理编码、地址校验与全国性空间分析。
desc_en: Open BeSt Addresses is Belgium's authoritative open address dataset, compiled and published via OSoC/BOSA and covering the whole of Belgium. It is openly downloadable as GeoJSON and CSV and is referenced as the Belgian source by OpenAddresses. BeSt consolidates the official address registers of Belgium's three regions, making it suitable for geocoding, address validation and nationwide spatial analysis.

name: Open Buildings 2.5D Temporal V1
what_changes: Adds annual building presence, fractional counts and heights (2016-2023) at 4 m from Sentinel-2, vectorizable per footprint of V3 polygons.
notes: First-party Google extension of V3 polygons; primarily raster but commonly joined to V3 vectors.
verify_notes: Open Buildings 2.5D Temporal, 2016-2023, 4m res; Africa/SAsia/SEAsia/LatAm/Caribbean. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Google Research 发布的 Open Buildings 2.5D Temporal V1，是 Open Buildings V3 建筑多边形的官方时序扩展，通过 Google Earth Engine 数据目录提供。该数据集在 V3 足迹基础上加入了建筑高度及随时间变化的信息，主要以栅格形式提供，常与 V3 矢量多边形联合使用。采用 CC BY 4.0 或 ODbL v1.0 双许可，适用于城市增长监测、人口与可达性分析等研究。
desc_en: Open Buildings 2.5D Temporal V1 is a first-party Google Research extension of the Open Buildings V3 polygons, served through the Google Earth Engine Data Catalog. It augments the V3 footprints with building-height and temporal (change-over-time) information, and is primarily raster but commonly joined to the V3 vector polygons. Released under a dual CC BY 4.0 / ODbL v1.0 licence, it supports urban-growth monitoring, population estimation and accessibility analyses, particularly across the Global South.

name: Open Buildings V3 Polygons (Earth Engine FeatureCollection)
theme_raw: Building footprint polygons as EE vector FeatureCollection
formats: Earth Engine FeatureCollection (vector); exportable to Shapefile/GeoJSON/GPKG
notes: Server-side spatial filtering; ee.FeatureCollection
verify_notes: 1.8B building polygons; requires EE access | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Open Buildings V3 是 Google Research 基于高分辨率卫星影像自动提取的建筑足迹数据集，覆盖约 5800 万平方公里的全球南方地区（非洲、南亚、东南亚、拉美等）。数据以 Earth Engine FeatureCollection 矢量形式提供，可导出为 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GPKG，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它支持服务端空间过滤，免费 Earth Engine 账号即可访问，是数据稀缺地区人口估算、规划与人道主义应用的重要基础数据。
desc_en: Open Buildings V3 is a Google Research dataset of building footprints automatically detected from high-resolution satellite imagery, covering roughly 58 million km² of the Global South (Africa, South and Southeast Asia, Latin America). It is provided as an Earth Engine FeatureCollection supporting server-side spatial filtering, exportable to Shapefile, GeoJSON or GeoPackage, and licensed under CC BY 4.0. Freely accessible with an Earth Engine account, it is a key resource for population estimation, planning and humanitarian work in data-scarce regions.

name: Open Data DC - Building Footprints
notes: Example of city-scale authoritative footprints; many US cities (NYC PLUTO, LA County, SF, Boston, Chicago, Philadelphia) offer similar layers via ArcGIS Hub / Socrata.
verify_notes: Page loads with Building Footprints title; full metadata behind JS | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国华盛顿特区开放数据平台（DC OCTO/DC GIS）发布的建筑轮廓数据集，覆盖华盛顿特区，提供建筑物二维足迹多边形。数据属公共领域，可直接下载 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、FGDB 等格式。它是城市级权威建筑足迹的范例；纽约、洛杉矶县、旧金山、波士顿、芝加哥、费城等众多美国城市也通过 ArcGIS Hub 或 Socrata 提供类似图层。
desc_en: A building-footprint dataset published on the Open Data DC portal by DC OCTO / DC GIS, covering Washington, DC and providing 2D footprint polygons of buildings. Released into the public domain, it can be directly downloaded as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML or FGDB. It is an example of authoritative city-scale footprints; many other US cities such as New York, LA County, San Francisco, Boston, Chicago and Philadelphia offer comparable layers via ArcGIS Hub or Socrata.

name: open-buildings CLI / Python tool (Source Cooperative format conversions)
theme_raw: Tooling that converts Google Open Buildings CSVs to vector formats
license: Apache-2.0 (tool); data remains CC BY-4.0 / ODbL
formats: Converts WKT CSV → GeoJSON / FlatGeobuf / GeoParquet / Shapefile / GPKG
access: pip install open-buildings; also publishes converted GeoParquet on Source Cooperative
notes: Practical entrypoint for analysts wanting native vector formats
verify_notes: Maintainer notes code unmaintained; recommends Overture Maps | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: open-buildings 是由 Chris Holmes 与 OpenGeos 社区维护的命令行/Python 工具，用于把 Google Open Buildings 等以 WKT CSV 形式发布的建筑数据转换为 GeoJSON、FlatGeobuf、GeoParquet、Shapefile、GPKG 等原生矢量格式。项目采用 Apache-2.0 许可，可通过 pip 安装，并在 Source Cooperative 上发布转换后的 GeoParquet。它是分析人员获取云原生矢量建筑数据的实用入口。
desc_en: open-buildings is a CLI/Python tool maintained by Chris Holmes and the OpenGeos community that converts building data published as WKT CSV (such as Google Open Buildings) into native vector formats including GeoJSON, FlatGeobuf, GeoParquet, Shapefile and GPKG. Licensed under Apache-2.0 and installable via pip, it also publishes converted GeoParquet on Source Cooperative. It offers analysts a practical entrypoint for working with cloud-native vector building data.

name: OpenAddresses Europe (Kaggle 镜像)
notes: 被引用较多的非官方再发行，便于一次性下欧洲快照。
verify_notes: Kaggle page accessible but details not surfaced in fetch (likely JS-rendered) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenAddresses Europe 是 OpenAddresses 欧洲地址数据在 Kaggle 上的非官方再发行镜像，覆盖比利时、德国、法国、荷兰、奥地利、瑞士、丹麦、瑞典、挪威、芬兰、西班牙、葡萄牙、捷克、波兰、意大利等多国。数据以 CSV（含经纬度及地址字段）提供，各来源采用 CC BY 类许可，需 Kaggle 账号下载。该镜像便于一次性获取欧洲地址快照，被较多引用。
desc_en: OpenAddresses Europe is an unofficial Kaggle mirror of OpenAddresses' European address data, covering many countries including Belgium, Germany, France, the Netherlands, Austria, Switzerland, Denmark, Sweden, Norway, Finland, Spain, Portugal, Czechia, Poland and Italy. It is provided as CSV with longitude/latitude and address fields, under CC BY-type licences per source, and requires a Kaggle account. The mirror is convenient for grabbing a one-shot Europe-wide address snapshot and is frequently cited.

name: OpenAddresses on data.gov.be (比利时再用)
notes: OA 多语言条目的范例（同源拆 NL/FR 两条 metadata）。
verify_notes: Page updated 2025-05; underlying BeST-address CSV linked | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: data.gov.be 上的 OpenAddresses 比利时再用条目，是国家开放数据门户回链 OpenAddresses 的范例，覆盖比利时。由于比利时的荷语/法语双语制度，同一来源被拆分为荷兰语与法语两路元数据条目。数据以 CSV/GeoJSON 形式开放（许可未明确标注），适用于比利时地址数据的定位与获取。
desc_en: The OpenAddresses entry on data.gov.be is an example of a national open-data portal linking back to OpenAddresses, covering Belgium. Reflecting the country's Dutch/French bilingual setup, the same source is split into separate Dutch- and French-language metadata records. The data is openly available as CSV/GeoJSON (with an unspecified open licence) and is useful for locating and obtaining Belgian address data.

name: OpenAddresses on data.public.lu (卢森堡 reuse)
notes: 非英语小国通过国家门户回链 OA 的典型；适合定位 LU 矢量地址快照。
verify_notes: Listed as CC0; p4 said CC-BY | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: data.public.lu 上的 OpenAddresses 卢森堡再用条目，是非英语小国通过国家开放数据门户回链 OpenAddresses 的典型案例，覆盖卢森堡。数据以 CSV/GeoJSON 形式提供，采用 CC0 1.0 许可，可匿名访问。该条目便于定位卢森堡的矢量地址快照，适用于地理编码与小范围空间分析。
desc_en: The OpenAddresses reuse on data.public.lu is a typical case of a smaller non-English-speaking country linking back to OpenAddresses through its national open-data portal, covering Luxembourg. The data is offered as CSV/GeoJSON under a CC0 1.0 licence with anonymous access. The entry makes it easy to locate a vector address snapshot for Luxembourg, suitable for geocoding and local spatial analysis.

name: OpenAddresses on Geocode Earth
notes: Documents how OA vector data feeds the Pelias geocoder
verify_notes: Lists OpenAddresses, WOF, OSM, Geonames, TIGER, India Post | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geocode Earth 的数据来源参考文档，说明 OpenAddresses 等矢量数据如何作为下游输入接入 Pelias 地理编码引擎，覆盖全球。各来源遵循其原始许可（ODbL、CC BY 4.0 等）。该页面本身是文档而非数据集，对理解开放地址数据在商业/开源地理编码服务中的应用链路很有价值。
desc_en: Geocode Earth's data-sources reference documentation describes how OpenAddresses and other vector data feed downstream into the Pelias geocoding engine, with global coverage. Each underlying source retains its original licence (ODbL, CC BY 4.0, etc.). The page is documentation rather than a dataset itself, and is valuable for understanding how open address data flows into commercial and open-source geocoding services.

name: OpenBuildingMap (OBM) - GEM Risk Engine
doi_or_citation: Pittore et al., associated with From Footprints to Functions
notes: Earthquake exposure-oriented building data; complements footprint-only datasets with occupancy/storeys.
verify_notes: 主域名 404；OpenBuildingMap 可能迁移至 GEM/openquake 子域 | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: OpenBuildingMap（OBM）由 GFZ 波茨坦地学中心与 GEM 基金会合作开发，是面向地震风险与暴露评估的全球建筑数据集，按国家逐步扩展。除建筑足迹外，它还提供占用类型、楼层数等语义属性，可补充仅含几何信息的足迹数据集。数据以 GeoJSON 和 API 形式开放（CC BY），常用于灾害风险建模、暴露分析与人居研究。
desc_en: OpenBuildingMap (OBM), developed by GFZ Potsdam together with the GEM Foundation, is a global building dataset oriented toward earthquake risk and exposure assessment, growing country by country.
