Beyond footprints it provides semantic attributes such as occupancy type and number of storeys, complementing geometry-only footprint datasets. Distributed as GeoJSON and via an API under CC BY, it is used for disaster-risk modelling, exposure analysis and settlement studies.

name: OpenBuildingMap (OBM) Global Building Footprints with Semantic Information
what_changes: HeiGIT/GIScience Heidelberg conflation of Google Open Buildings, Microsoft ML Footprints and OSM (~2.7B buildings) plus semantic enrichment (use, height proxies) via OSM tag propagation.
notes: Produced by Heidelberg University HeiGIT; deeper semantic layer than VIDA's purely geometric conflation.
verify_notes: OBM 2.693B building footprints; OSM+Google+MS. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该条目为 OpenBuildingMap（OBM）全球建筑足迹及语义信息数据集在 GEE 社区目录中的发布版本，由海德堡大学 HeiGIT 制作。相比仅做几何融合的数据集，它附带更丰富的语义图层（如用途、属性标签）。数据采用 ODbL v1.0 许可，适用于全球范围的建筑分析、风险评估与城市研究。
desc_en: This entry is the Google Earth Engine community-catalog release of the OpenBuildingMap (OBM) global building footprints with semantic information, produced by Heidelberg University's HeiGIT. Compared with purely geometric conflation datasets, it adds a deeper semantic layer of building attributes and tags. Released under the ODbL v1.0 licence, it supports global building analysis, risk assessment and urban research.

name: OS NGD / OpenStreetMap Buildings for North America (Esri Living Atlas)
formats_now: unknown (ArcGIS Hub; likely feature service + downloads)
notes: Pre-published OSM buildings as ready ArcGIS FeatureService
verify_notes: Page reachable but content snippet sparse; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Esri 与 OpenStreetMap 在 ArcGIS Living Atlas 中联合发布的北美建筑图层，将 OSM 建筑数据预处理为可直接使用的 ArcGIS FeatureService，覆盖北美。数据遵循 OSM 的 ODbL 许可。它免去了自行抽取与处理 OSM 数据的步骤，便于 ArcGIS 用户在地图与分析中直接调用 OSM 建筑足迹。
desc_en: A North American buildings layer co-published by Esri and OpenStreetMap in the ArcGIS Living Atlas, providing OSM building data pre-packaged as a ready-to-use ArcGIS FeatureService and covering North America. It is distributed under OSM's ODbL licence. By removing the need to extract and process raw OSM data, it lets ArcGIS users consume OSM building footprints directly in maps and analyses.

name: OS OpenMap Local (Buildings) + OS Open UPRN
license_now: Free to use for everyone (OS OpenData)
notes: OS Open UPRN gives building-level unique IDs without the AddressBase paid product.
verify_notes: Updated every 6 months; 1:10,000 scale GB coverage | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国国家测绘局（Ordnance Survey）发布的 OS OpenMap Local 建筑图层及 OS Open UPRN 数据集，覆盖大不列颠，比例尺约 1:10,000，每半年更新一次。前者提供建筑物轮廓，后者提供建筑级唯一参考标识（UPRN），无需购买付费的 AddressBase 即可获得稳定地址标识符。数据通过 OS Data Hub 免费开放下载，格式包括 GeoPackage、GML、Shapefile 与矢量瓦片。
desc_en: OS OpenMap Local (Buildings) together with OS Open UPRN are open datasets from Great Britain's Ordnance Survey, covering Great Britain at roughly 1:10,000 scale and updated every six months. The former supplies building outlines, while OS Open UPRN provides building-level Unique Property Reference Numbers, giving stable address identifiers without the paid AddressBase product. Both are freely downloadable via the OS Data Hub as GeoPackage, GML, Shapefile and vector tiles under OS OpenData terms.

name: OSM US Layercake (thematic GeoParquet)
verify_notes: 404 Not Found - resource removed | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: OSM US Layercake 是 OpenStreetMap US 发布的主题化云原生数据产品，将 OSM 数据按主题（如建筑）切分为 GeoParquet，覆盖全球。数据遵循 ODbL 许可，可通过 HTTPS 直接下载或用 DuckDB 直接查询，适合大规模分析与云端数据管线，免去本地解析庞大 OSM 数据的负担。
desc_en: OSM US Layercake is a thematic, cloud-native data product from OpenStreetMap US that slices OSM data by theme (such as buildings) into GeoParquet, with global coverage. Distributed under ODbL, it can be downloaded directly over HTTPS or queried in place with DuckDB, making it well suited to large-scale analysis and cloud data pipelines without the overhead of parsing raw OSM extracts locally.

name: PDOK (Netherlands national geodata portal) WFS catalog
access: WFS / OGC API Features / OGC API Tiles
notes: Probably the most complete OGC-API Features showcase in the world
verify_notes: URL returns 404 — PDOK reorganized site; need updated path | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: PDOK 是荷兰国家地理数据平台，由 Kadaster 运营，提供包括建筑与地址在内的多类荷兰地理数据，覆盖荷兰全境。其 OGC 网络服务目录涵盖 WFS、WMS 以及现代 OGC API（Features/Tiles）。数据普遍采用 CC0 或开放许可。PDOK 被视为全球最完整的 OGC API Features 实践范例之一，适用于地理编码、规划与各类空间分析。
desc_en: PDOK is the Netherlands' national geodata platform, operated by Kadaster, providing many Dutch geographic datasets including buildings and addresses and covering the whole country. Its OGC web-services catalogue spans WFS, WMS and modern OGC API Features and Tiles. The data is generally released under CC0 or open licences. PDOK is regarded as one of the world's most complete OGC API Features showcases, supporting geocoding, planning and a wide range of spatial analysis.

name: PICC - Projet Informatique de Cartographie Continue (Wallonia)
notes: Continuous cartographic database, buildings layer
verify_notes: 404 Not Found - catalogue path may have moved; try https://geoportail.wallonie.be/ | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: PICC（连续制图信息项目）是比利时瓦隆大区由 SPW Wallonie 维护的连续制图数据库，其中包含建筑物图层，覆盖瓦隆大区。数据以 Shapefile 形式通过瓦隆地理门户开放提供。作为权威的区域级连续制图成果，它适用于瓦隆地区的建筑分析、城市规划与地形测绘。
desc_en: PICC (Projet Informatique de Cartographie Continue) is a continuous cartographic database maintained by SPW Wallonie for the Walloon Region of Belgium, including a buildings layer and covering Wallonia. It is openly provided as Shapefile through the Walloon geoportal under an SPW open licence. As an authoritative regional continuous-mapping product, it supports building analysis, urban planning and topographic mapping across Wallonia.

name: PortlandMaps Building Footprints
theme_raw: Buildings — municipal footprints with measured heights
notes: Validation reference for 3D-GloBFP.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub page accessible; minimal metadata in scrape | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国俄勒冈州波特兰市通过 PortlandMaps 开放数据平台发布的建筑轮廓数据集，覆盖波特兰市，提供建筑物二维足迹多边形。数据开放下载，格式包括 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 FeatureServer（WFS）。它是城市级权威建筑足迹的范例，常用于城市规划与三维建模，并被用作 3D-GloBFP 的验证参考。
desc_en: A building-footprint dataset published by the City of Portland, Oregon, through the PortlandMaps Open Data platform, covering Portland and providing 2D footprint polygons. It is openly downloadable via ArcGIS Hub as Shapefile, GeoJSON and a FeatureServer (WFS). As an example of authoritative city-scale footprints, it supports urban planning and 3D modelling, and is used as a validation reference for 3D-GloBFP.

name: Ramp (Replicable AI for Microplanning) Building Dataset
coverage: Geographically diverse: India, sub-Saharan Africa, etc.
notes: Designed for low-resource regions / humanitarian microplanning. Source for many derived footprint papers.
verify_notes: Site accessible; license/formats not on landing page, see GitHub devglobalpartners/ramp-code and MLHub | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Ramp（可复用的微规划人工智能）建筑数据集由卡内基梅隆大学 DSC、IIASA 与 DevSeed 联合开发，地理上覆盖印度、撒哈拉以南非洲等多样化区域，专为低资源地区与人道主义微规划设计。数据以 GeoJSON 加影像切片形式提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，需注册（HOT/DevSeed）获取。它是许多衍生建筑足迹研究的训练数据来源。
desc_en: The Ramp (Replicable AI for Microplanning) building dataset, developed jointly by Carnegie Mellon's DSC, IIASA and DevSeed, spans geographically diverse regions such as India and sub-Saharan Africa and is designed for low-resource areas and humanitarian microplanning. It is provided as GeoJSON plus image chips under CC BY 4.0 and requires registration (HOT/DevSeed). It serves as the source data for many derived building-footprint models and papers.

name: Regione Emilia-Romagna - Edifici (DBTR)
notes: Regional database topografico - buildings layer
verify_notes: OGC services + catalog available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 意大利艾米利亚-罗马涅大区发布的建筑物图层，来自其区域地形数据库（DBTR），覆盖该大区。数据以 Shapefile 与 GML 形式通过区域地理门户下载或 WFS 服务提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。作为权威区域地形数据库的建筑要素，它适用于城市规划、地形测绘与区域空间分析。
desc_en: A buildings layer published by the Emilia-Romagna Region of Italy, drawn from its regional topographic database (DBTR) and covering the region. It is available as Shapefile and GML via the regional geoportal download service or WFS, under a CC BY 4.0 licence. As the building feature of an authoritative regional topographic database, it supports urban planning, topographic mapping and regional spatial analysis.

name: Regione Toscana - Edificato CTR
verify_notes: Geoscopio page live; site notes ongoing server migration for digital services. | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 意大利托斯卡纳大区通过 Geoscopio 平台发布的建筑物（Edificato CTR）图层，来源于区域技术地图（CTR），覆盖托斯卡纳大区。数据以 Shapefile 形式经 Geoscopio 的 WMS/WFS 服务提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。作为权威区域制图成果，它适用于该地区的建筑分析、城市规划与地形研究。
desc_en: A buildings (Edificato CTR) layer published by the Tuscany Region of Italy through its Geoscopio platform, derived from the Regional Technical Map (CTR) and covering Tuscany. It is provided as Shapefile through Geoscopio's WMS/WFS services under a CC BY 4.0 licence. As an authoritative regional cartographic product, it supports building analysis, urban planning and topographic studies across the region.

name: Sirko et al. 2021 — Continental-scale building detection (paper, original v1 release)
formats: N/A (paper); links to CSV WKT vector release
notes: Cite as: Sirko, W. et al., 'Continental-scale building detection from high-resolution satellite imagery', arXiv:2107.12283
verify_notes: Sirko et al., Continental-Scale Building Detection | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Sirko 等人 2021 年的论文《Continental-scale building detection from high-resolution satellite imagery》（arXiv:2107.12283），由 Google Research 发表，是 Open Buildings 数据集的原始发布与方法学文献，最初覆盖非洲。论文本身不含数据，但关联了以 WKT CSV 形式发布的矢量建筑足迹。它系统介绍了从高分辨率卫星影像进行大陆尺度建筑检测的深度学习方法，是该系列数据集的权威引用来源。
desc_en: Sirko et al. 2021, 'Continental-scale building detection from high-resolution satellite imagery' (arXiv:2107.12283), is the Google Research paper that constitutes the original release and methodology behind the Open Buildings dataset, initially covering Africa. The paper itself contains no data but links to the vector building-footprint release distributed as WKT CSV. It documents the deep-learning approach to continental-scale building detection and is the authoritative citation for this dataset family.

name: Spain Cartociudad / CDAU Andalucia
access: open via CNIG centro de descargas
notes: sources/es/* uses Cartociudad provincial extracts; CDAU is open Andalusian Unified Directory of Addresses.
verify_notes: Downloads via CNIG centrodedescargas; license at Aviso Legal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Cartociudad 是西班牙国家地理院（IGN España）联合各区域地籍机构维护的全国地址、道路与建筑参考数据集，覆盖西班牙全境；安达卢西亚的 CDAU 则是开放的统一地址目录。数据通过 CNIG 下载中心免费开放，提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage 及 WMS/WFS 服务，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。OpenAddresses 的西班牙来源即基于 Cartociudad 的省级抽取，常用于地理编码与地址匹配。
desc_en: Cartociudad is a national address, road and building reference dataset maintained by IGN España together with regional cadastres, covering all of Spain; Andalusia's CDAU is the region's open Unified Directory of Addresses. The data is freely available through the CNIG download centre as Shapefile, GeoPackage and via WMS/WFS under CC BY 4.0. OpenAddresses' Spanish sources draw on provincial Cartociudad extracts, and it is widely used for geocoding and address matching.

name: swissBUILDINGS3D
formats_now: ESRI FileGDB, DXF, Shapefile (MultiPatch), CityGML, KML, OBJ
verify_notes: Some formats require email order to geodata@swisstopo.ch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: swissBUILDINGS3D 是瑞士联邦地形测量局（swisstopo）发布的全国三维建筑模型数据集，覆盖瑞士全境，以 CityGML（GML）格式提供建筑物的三维几何。数据遵循 swisstopo 开放地理数据条款免费开放下载。它适用于三维城市建模、太阳能潜力评估、可视化与城市规划等需要建筑高度与体量信息的应用。
desc_en: swissBUILDINGS3D is a national 3D building-model dataset published by the Swiss Federal Office of Topography (swisstopo), covering all of Switzerland and providing 3D building geometry in CityGML (GML) format. It is freely downloadable under swisstopo's open geodata terms. It is suited to 3D city modelling, solar-potential assessment, visualisation and urban planning, and other applications that require building height and volume information.

name: swissTLM3D - Buildings
notes: National large-scale topographic landscape model including building layer.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: swissTLM3D 是瑞士联邦地形测量局（swisstopo）的全国大比例尺三维地形景观模型，其中包含建筑图层，覆盖瑞士全境。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 与 File GDB 等格式提供，遵循 swisstopo 免费地理数据条款。作为权威的全国地形参考，它适用于地形测绘、城市与基础设施规划及多主题空间分析。
desc_en: swissTLM3D is the national large-scale 3D topographic landscape model from swisstopo, including a buildings layer and covering all of Switzerland. It is available as Shapefile, GeoPackage and File GDB under swisstopo's free geodata terms. As an authoritative national topographic reference, it supports topographic mapping, urban and infrastructure planning, and multi-theme spatial analysis.

name: TileBase
notes: Storage format for serving address/parcel vector tiles
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: TileBase 是 OpenAddresses 开发的矢量瓦片存储格式（类似 MBTiles 的单文件容器），用于高效服务地址与地块矢量瓦片。项目托管于 GitHub，采用 MIT 许可。它是格式规范而非数据集，适用于构建轻量级矢量瓦片分发与地址数据可视化的技术栈。
desc_en: TileBase is a vector-tile storage format developed by OpenAddresses (a single-file container similar to MBTiles) for efficiently serving address and parcel vector tiles. Hosted on GitHub under the MIT licence, it is a format specification rather than a dataset, and is used to build lightweight vector-tile distribution and address-data visualisation stacks.

name: tilezen vector-datasource
theme_raw: Worldwide basemap vector tiles (water, earth, landuse, roads, buildings, POIs)
license: Data CC BY (OSM ODbL), code MIT
access: Open-source tile schema; data derived from OSM/Natural Earth/Who's on First
verify_notes: Active Tilezen Python project; 515 stars, latest v1.9.0 (2023) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: tilezen vector-datasource 是 Tilezen/Mapzen 社区维护的开源矢量瓦片数据架构（schema），覆盖全球，定义了建筑、兴趣点、交通等图层的标准化结构。数据派生自 OpenStreetMap、Natural Earth 与 Who's on First，输出格式包括 Mapbox Vector Tile（MVT）、TopoJSON 与 GeoJSON。许可见仓库内 LICENSE 文件。它适用于自建矢量瓦片地图渲染管线。
desc_en: tilezen vector-datasource is an open-source vector-tile data schema maintained by the Tilezen/Mapzen community, with global coverage, defining standardised structures for layers such as buildings, POIs and transportation. The data is derived from OpenStreetMap, Natural Earth and Who's on First, and output as Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT), TopoJSON and GeoJSON. Its licence is given in the repository's LICENSE file. It is used to build custom vector-tile map-rendering pipelines.

name: Ukraine Damage Mapping Tool – Building-level Damage Vectors
theme_raw: War destruction, building-level damage estimates, AOIs
notes: Linked to Nature Comms Earth & Environment paper on Sentinel-1 war damage mapping
verify_notes: Ukraine damage mapping (Sentinel-1); ETH Zurich; Feb 2022-2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 乌克兰损毁制图工具的建筑级损毁矢量数据集，由 ETH 苏黎世（PRS-ETH）发布于 Zenodo，覆盖乌克兰 2022 年 2 月至 2024 年 2 月。数据基于 Sentinel-1 雷达影像进行战争损毁制图，提供 GeoJSON（UNOSAT 关注区、标注、adm3 汇总）与 GeoTIFF，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可开放，并与一篇《Communications Earth & Environment》论文关联。它适用于冲突损害评估、人道主义响应与重建规划。
desc_en: A building-level damage vector dataset from the Ukraine Damage Mapping Tool, published on Zenodo by ETH Zurich (PRS-ETH) and covering Ukraine from February 2022 to February 2024. Based on Sentinel-1 radar imagery for war-damage mapping, it provides GeoJSON (UNOSAT areas of interest, labels and adm3 aggregations) and GeoTIFF, openly licensed under CC BY 4.0 and linked to a Communications Earth & Environment paper. It supports conflict-damage assessment, humanitarian response and reconstruction planning.

name: UrbIS-Adm 3D
provider: Centre d'Informatique pour la Region Bruxelloise (CIRB)
notes: Authoritative Brussels building footprints (3D).
verify_notes: CIRB rebranded to paradigm.brussels | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: UrbIS-Adm 3D 是布鲁塞尔信息中心（CIRB）发布的布鲁塞尔首都大区权威三维建筑足迹数据集，覆盖布鲁塞尔大区。数据以 Shapefile 与 CityGML 形式提供，遵循 UrbIS 开放许可。作为该地区官方的三维建筑数据，它适用于三维城市建模、规划、可视化与各类城市空间分析。
desc_en: UrbIS-Adm 3D is an authoritative 3D building-footprint dataset for the Brussels-Capital Region published by CIRB (Centre d'Informatique pour la Region Bruxelloise), covering the Brussels region. It is available as Shapefile and CityGML under the UrbIS open licence. As the region's official 3D building data, it supports 3D city modelling, planning, visualisation and a range of urban spatial analyses.

name: US Address Data Theme (NGDA)
notes: NGDA address theme catalog
verify_notes: 404 Not Found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 美国地址数据主题（NGDA）是由美国联邦地理数据委员会（FGDC）维护的国家地理数据资产地址主题目录，覆盖美国。数据属美国公共领域，以 GeoJSON、Esri 及 Shapefile 形式开放提供。它汇编并索引权威地址数据，适用于地理编码、地址标准化以及联邦层面的地理数据集成。
desc_en: The US Address Data Theme (NGDA) is the National Geospatial Data Asset address-theme catalogue maintained by the US Federal Geographic Data Committee (FGDC), covering the United States. The data is in the US public domain and openly available as GeoJSON, Esri and Shapefile. It compiles and indexes authoritative address data, supporting geocoding, address standardisation and federal-level geospatial data integration.

name: USA Structures (FEMA + ORNL + USGS)
license_now: 页面未明确显示 (仍标识 USA Structures, US Gov 出品)
formats_now: 未在抓取片段中列出 (通常 GDB/Shapefile/CSV via ArcGIS Hub)
notes: Also surfaced via USGS National Structures Dataset / The National Map
verify_notes: 页面可达但渲染后内容主要靠 JS, fetch 抓到的文本极少 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: USA Structures 是由 FEMA 地理空间资源中心联合 ORNL 与 USGS 制作的全国建筑结构数据集，覆盖美国及其属地，提供建筑物足迹及相关属性。数据以 FeatureService、FGDB 与 Shapefile 形式提供，可通过 ArcGIS FeatureService 或直接下载获取，同时也通过 USGS 国家结构数据集/The National Map 发布。它广泛用于应急管理、灾害风险评估与国家级建筑分析。
desc_en: USA Structures is a national building-structures dataset produced by the FEMA Geospatial Resource Center together with ORNL and USGS, covering the USA and its territories and providing building footprints with associated attributes. It is available as a FeatureService, FGDB and Shapefile via ArcGIS FeatureService or direct download, and is also surfaced through the USGS National Structures Dataset and The National Map. It is widely used for emergency management, disaster-risk assessment and nationwide building analysis.

name: USBuildingFootprints
license_now: ODbL (Open Data Commons Open Database License)
notes: State-level partitioned ZIPs; widely used baseline US footprint dataset.
verify_notes: ~129.6M buildings; EPSG:4326; last release 2018, maintenance mode | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: USBuildingFootprints 是微软 Bing Maps 通过深度学习从航空/卫星影像提取的全美建筑足迹数据集，覆盖美国，约含 1.3 亿个建筑多边形。数据按州划分为压缩包，以行分隔 GeoJSON 形式提供，采用 ODbL 开放许可。它是被广泛使用的美国建筑足迹基线数据，常用于城市分析、人口估算、应急规划及与其他数据集的比对融合。
desc_en: USBuildingFootprints is a nationwide building-footprint dataset from Microsoft Bing Maps, extracted from aerial/satellite imagery using deep learning and covering the United States with roughly 130 million building polygons. It is partitioned by state into ZIPs of line-delimited GeoJSON and released under the ODbL open licence. It is a widely used baseline US footprint dataset, applied to urban analysis, population estimation, emergency planning and conflation with other datasets.

name: VWorld GIS Building Integrated Information (GIS건물통합정보)
provider: Korea Ministry of Land, Infrastructure & Transport / NSDI Portal (now VWorld)
lychee_text: Network error: Network error: Connection reset by peer (os error 54) (error sending request for url (https://www.data.go.kr/data/15083092/fileData.do))
notes: Pair with Korea Juso (도로명주소) address points from www.juso.go.kr - open national address registry.
verify_notes: Connection closed unexpectedly | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: VWorld GIS建筑物综合信息数据集由韩国国土交通部经国家空间数据基础设施门户（现并入VWorld）发布，覆盖韩国全境，将建筑物轮廓与地址、属性信息整合在一起。数据以Shapefile下载和API两种方式提供，采用Public Nuri第1类开放许可（署名即可使用），需在data.go.kr或VWorld注册后获取。它是研究韩国城市形态、地址定位与POI分析的权威矢量底图，建议与juso.go.kr的道路名地址点数据配合使用。
desc_en: Published by Korea's Ministry of Land, Infrastructure & Transport through the national NSDI portal (now VWorld), this dataset provides integrated GIS building information for the entire Republic of Korea, linking building footprints with address and attribute data. It is distributed as downloadable Shapefiles and via API under the Public Nuri Type 1 open license (attribution required), with registration on data.go.kr or VWorld. It serves as an authoritative vector base for Korean urban morphology, geocoding and POI analysis, and pairs well with the open road-name address points from juso.go.kr.

name: WHU Building Dataset
coverage: Christchurch NZ (aerial) + 6 cities (satellite) + East Asia subset
file_size: Aerial ~25GB; Satellite II 13GB; Change Detection 5.43GB; Satellite I 113MB
feature_count: more than 220,000 independent buildings (aerial); 34,085 buildings (Satellite II)
notes: Most cited Chinese-led building benchmark; vector polygons are open. Useful for training and evaluation.
verify_notes: Multiple sub-datasets; academic use | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WHU建筑物数据集由武汉大学季顺平团队发布，是被引用最多的中国主导建筑物提取基准之一。它包含新西兰克赖斯特彻奇的航空影像子集（分辨率约0.075米、约22万栋建筑）、覆盖六座城市的卫星影像子集，以及一个变化检测子集（2012与2016年对比）。数据同时提供栅格与矢量（Shapefile）标签，矢量多边形开放使用，许可证未明示需联系作者。该数据集广泛用于建筑物分割模型的训练与评估。
desc_en: Created by Ji et al. at Wuhan University, the WHU Building Dataset is among the most cited China-led benchmarks for building extraction. It includes a Christchurch (NZ) aerial subset at roughly 0.075 m resolution with over 220,000 buildings, a satellite subset spanning six cities, and a change-detection subset comparing 2012 and 2016. Both raster masks and vector (Shapefile) labels are provided, with the polygons openly available though the license is unstated (contact the authors). It is widely used for training and evaluating building-segmentation models.

name: WHU Building Dataset (含 WHUBED 矢量化标签)
theme_raw: 建筑物轮廓 (深度学习训练用)
coverage: 中国及全球若干城市样片
notes: 本质是训练样本数据集而非全国成果；但提供 building polygon ground truth，矢量层可用
verify_notes: figshare 对该 fetch 返回 403; 推测仍存在, 需手动验证 | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 这是WHU建筑物数据集在Figshare上的存档版本（含WHUBED矢量化标签），由武汉大学GPCV/LIESMARS团队提供，覆盖中国及全球若干城市样片。数据包含栅格与矢量掩膜，并提供GeoJSON/Shapefile格式的建筑物多边形真值标注，可免费用于学术研究。需要说明的是，它本质上是面向深度学习的训练样本数据集，而非全国性建筑普查成果，但其矢量层可直接用于建筑提取与评估。
desc_en: This is the Figshare-archived edition of the WHU Building Dataset (including the WHUBED vectorized labels) from Wuhan University's GPCV/LIESMARS group, covering sample tiles from China and several cities worldwide. It bundles raster and vector masks and offers building-polygon ground truth in GeoJSON/Shapefile, free for academic use. Note that it is essentially a training-sample dataset for deep learning rather than a nationwide building census, but its vector layer is directly usable for building extraction and evaluation tasks.

name: World Settlement Footprint 3D (WSF-3D)
formats: raster primarily; vector derivatives by city
notes: Building height layer cited by the paper; raster but commonly polygonized for morphology work.
verify_notes: HTTP 404 - path may have moved; check WSF3D portal | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 世界居住区足迹三维（WSF-3D）由德国航空航天中心（DLR）制作，是一套全球建筑高度与建成区形态图层。数据以栅格为主，部分城市提供矢量衍生产品，采用CC BY 4.0许可，可通过DLR Geoservice以HTTPS方式下载。该图层在Esch等人2022年的研究中被引用，常被矢量化用于城市三维形态、建成环境与人口密度相关分析，是全球尺度建筑高度信息的重要来源。
desc_en: Produced by the German Aerospace Center (DLR), the World Settlement Footprint 3D (WSF-3D) provides a global layer of building heights and built-up morphology. It is primarily raster, with city-level vector derivatives, released under CC BY 4.0 and downloadable via HTTPS from the DLR Geoservice. Cited in Esch et al. (2022), the building-height layer is commonly polygonized for urban 3D morphology, built-environment and population-density studies, making it a key source of global building-height information.

name: 澳門地圖繪製暨地籍局 - 地籍資訊網 (Cadastral Information Network)
provider: 地圖繪製暨地籍局 DSCC (Direcção dos Serviços de Cartografia e Cadastro)
theme_raw: 地籍 (land parcels, building outlines, planning condition maps, easements)
license: 政府公開資料 (查詢用途)
formats: 線上查詢 + WMS; 矢量批次下載受限
access: 線上查詢免費；批量資料需公文申請
notes: 澳門唯一權威地籍矢量來源；原 geoportal 已下線，併入此站；非英語、被引用度高但對外資料極稀缺
verify_notes: No explicit open license; public cadastral query interface only | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳门地图绘制暨地籍局（DSCC）地籍资讯网是澳门特区唯一权威的地籍矢量信息来源，提供建筑、地块与地址相关的在线查询和WMS服务。原geoportal已下线并并入本站，在线查询免费，但矢量数据批量下载受限，需以公文形式申请。版权归地籍局所有，仅供参考使用。该资源以非英语界面为主，对外公开数据极为稀缺，是研究澳门城市与地籍的核心入口。
desc_en: The Cadastral Information Network of Macao's Cartography and Cadastre Bureau (DSCC) is the sole authoritative source of cadastral vector information for the Macao SAR, offering online queries and WMS services for parcels, buildings and addresses. The former geoportal has been retired and merged into this site; online queries are free, but bulk vector downloads are restricted and require a formal written application. Data is copyright DSCC and reference-only, presented mainly in non-English interfaces, with very limited public availability.

name: Open Infrastructure Map (OpenInfraMap) viewer
theme_raw: power grid, telecoms, pipelines, energy infrastructure | Power lines, substations, plants, pipelines, telecom | energy_infrastructure (power, telecom, oil/gas)
formats: web vector tiles (MVT, internal); no public bulk vector download
access: free viewer; bulk vector exports redirect to commercial Infrageomatics
notes: For small extracts use Overpass Turbo; OIM itself does not publish a free GeoJSON/Shapefile bundle
verify_notes: Viewer active; navigation to about/stats/exports present; exports hosted at infrageomatics.com | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 开放基础设施地图（OpenInfraMap）是基于OpenStreetMap数据的全球基础设施可视化浏览器，由Russ Garrett与OSM社区维护，重点呈现电网、电站、管线、通信等能源与基础设施要素。底层数据遵循ODbL许可，地图以矢量瓦片（MVT）形式在线展示，提供免费浏览，但本身不发布免费的GeoJSON或Shapefile批量下载，批量矢量导出会跳转至商业服务Infrageomatics。需要小范围数据时建议使用Overpass Turbo从OSM直接提取。
desc_en: Open Infrastructure Map is a global infrastructure visualization viewer built on OpenStreetMap data, maintained by Russ Garrett and the OSM community, focusing on power grids, plants, pipelines and telecom assets. The underlying data is ODbL-licensed and rendered as web vector tiles (MVT); the viewer is free, but it does not publish a free GeoJSON/Shapefile bulk download, with bulk exports redirected to the commercial Infrageomatics service. For small extracts, Overpass Turbo querying OSM directly is recommended.

name: AidData Geospatial Global Chinese Development Finance Dataset (GeoGCDF) v3.0
theme_raw: Chinese overseas development finance project locations (incl. BRI energy)
doi_or_citation: 10.1038/s41597-024-03341-w (Goodman et al. 2024); Figshare archive linked from README
notes: Primary geospatial twin of the tabular GCDF v3.0 used as one of four input sources by the BRI energy paper.
splink_merged_from: AidData Geospatial Global Chinese Development Finance Dataset (GeoGCDF v3)
verify_notes: v3.0 dual license confirmed; per-project GeoJSON in latest/geojsons folder | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: AidData全球中国发展融资地理空间数据集（GeoGCDF）v3.0由威廉玛丽学院AidData团队发布，是其表格版GCDF v3.0的地理空间孪生版本，覆盖148个国家、13,908个项目，时间跨度2000至2021年。数据以GeoJSON和GeoPackage格式提供点、线、面等几何要素，遵循ODC-By（及OSM衍生部分的ODbL）许可，可在GitHub和Figshare开放获取。它是研究中国对外发展融资、基础设施空间分布的重要数据源。
desc_en: The AidData Geospatial Global Chinese Development Finance Dataset (GeoGCDF) v3.0 from William & Mary is the geospatial twin of the tabular GCDF v3.0, covering 148 countries and 13,908 projects from 2000 to 2021. It provides point, line and polygon geometries in GeoJSON and GeoPackage under ODC-By (with ODbL for OSM-derived parts), openly available via GitHub and Figshare. Documented in Goodman et al. (2024), it is a key resource for analyzing the spatial footprint of Chinese overseas development finance and infrastructure.

name: Derived Map of Global Electricity Transmission and Distribution Lines
theme_raw: Electricity grid (MV/HV transmission + distribution, derived from night-lights + OSM) | Energy / electricity grid
formats: GeoPackage (grid.gpkg), Feature Service (vector API); plus auxiliary rasters
notes: Widely cited proxy grid; vector network in gpkg. Auxiliary tif files are raster (excluded from vector use).
verify_notes: Global electricity transmission dataset | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球电力输配电线路推导图由世界银行（Arderne等人）制作，覆盖约195个国家，是一套被广泛引用的全球电网代理数据。矢量网络以GeoPackage（grid.gpkg）和要素服务API形式提供，遵循CC BY 4.0许可，公开可用，另附有辅助栅格文件（栅格部分不属于矢量用途）。该数据通过结合夜间灯光等信息推导出电网走向，常用于电力可及性、能源规划与基础设施分析。
desc_en: The Derived Map of Global Electricity Transmission and Distribution Lines, produced by the World Bank (Arderne et al.), spans about 195 countries and serves as a widely cited proxy for the global power grid. The vector network is supplied as a GeoPackage (grid.gpkg) and a feature service API under CC BY 4.0, openly available, with auxiliary rasters provided separately. Derived using night-lights and other inputs, it is commonly used for electricity-access, energy-planning and infrastructure analyses.

name: ENERGYDATA.INFO – World Bank Group organization (vector resources)
theme_raw: Energy infrastructure vectors (grids, mini-grid sites, electrification) | Power plants, grids, mini-grids, RE potential
notes: Sister catalog to datacatalog.worldbank.org; many WB country grid shapefiles (Senegal, Ghana, ECOWAS, Nepal) live here and are cross-referenced from the main catalog.
verify_notes: Filterable GeoJSON resources from World Bank Group org. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ENERGYDATA.INFO是世界银行ESMAP运营的能源数据目录，本条目汇总世界银行集团发布的矢量资源，覆盖多国（尤以撒哈拉以南非洲和南亚为主），约195个数据集。数据以GeoJSON和Shapefile格式提供，多数采用CC BY 4.0许可（部分为CC0或其他开放许可），可按资源逐项公开下载。它是datacatalog.worldbank.org的姊妹目录，塞内加尔、加纳、ECOWAS、尼泊尔等国的电网shapefile多存放于此并被主目录交叉引用。
desc_en: ENERGYDATA.INFO, run by the World Bank's ESMAP, is an energy data catalog; this entry aggregates the World Bank Group's vector resources, covering multiple countries (especially Sub-Saharan Africa and South Asia) across roughly 195 datasets. Data is offered in GeoJSON and Shapefile, mostly under CC BY 4.0 (some CC0 or other open licenses), downloadable per resource. As a sister catalog to datacatalog.worldbank.org, it hosts country grid shapefiles for Senegal, Ghana, ECOWAS and Nepal that are cross-referenced from the main catalog.

name: HIFLD Electric Power Transmission Lines
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, CSV, WFS, GeoServices
notes: HV electric transmission lines; sibling layers for substations and power plants on same hub.
verify_notes: HIFLD electric transmission lines page loads; details client-side | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HIFLD电力输电线路数据由美国国土安全部（DHS/HIFLD）经ArcGIS Hub发布，覆盖全美高压输电线路。数据为公有领域/美国政府开放数据，提供Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV、WFS等多种格式，便于直接下载和服务调用。同一Hub上还有变电站、发电厂等配套图层，整体构成美国电力基础设施分析的常用矢量数据源，适用于能源、应急与基础设施研究。
desc_en: The HIFLD Electric Power Transmission Lines dataset, provided by DHS/HIFLD via ArcGIS Hub, covers high-voltage transmission lines across the United States. As US Government public-domain open data, it is available in Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, CSV, WFS and GeoServices formats for easy download and service access. Companion layers for substations and power plants are hosted on the same hub, together forming a common vector source for US electric infrastructure, energy, emergency-management and resilience analysis.

name: US Energy Atlas — Power Plants
theme_raw: Power plants, refineries, pipelines, storage | energy_infrastructure
formats: CSV, KML, Shapefile zip, GeoJSON, WFS, GeoServices
notes: All US operable electric generating plants by fuel type.
verify_notes: Dataset ID not found on EIA Atlas (ArcGIS Hub) | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 美国能源地图集——发电厂数据由美国能源信息署（EIA）经ArcGIS Hub发布，覆盖全美所有可运行的发电厂，并按燃料类型分类。数据属于美国政府开放数据，提供CSV、KML、Shapefile、GeoJSON、WFS等多种格式，便于下载与在线服务调用。作为EIA权威的发电设施空间数据，它广泛用于电力供给、能源结构与发电资产分布等分析。
desc_en: The US Energy Atlas — Power Plants dataset from the US Energy Information Administration (EIA), delivered via ArcGIS Hub, covers all operable electric generating plants in the United States classified by fuel type. As US Government open data, it is available in CSV, KML, Shapefile, GeoJSON, WFS and GeoServices formats for download and service use. As EIA's authoritative spatial record of generating facilities, it is widely used for analyses of power supply, the generation mix and the distribution of generating assets.

name: Africa's Infrastructure: Electricity (AICD)
verify_notes: Africa Infrastructure: Electricity | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 非洲基础设施：电力（AICD）数据由世界银行发布，作为非洲基础设施诊断（AICD）项目的一部分，覆盖撒哈拉以南非洲地区的电力基础设施。数据以Shapefile等矢量格式提供，遵循CC BY 4.0许可，公开可用。该数据集是研究非洲电网与电力可及性、基础设施缺口的基础性矢量来源，常用于区域能源规划与发展研究。
desc_en: Africa's Infrastructure: Electricity (AICD) is published by the World Bank as part of the Africa Infrastructure Country Diagnostic, covering electricity infrastructure across Sub-Saharan Africa. The data is provided in Shapefile and other vector formats under CC BY 4.0 and is openly available. It serves as a foundational vector source for studying African power networks, electricity access and infrastructure gaps, and is frequently used in regional energy-planning and development research.

name: BRI Energy Investments 2013–2023 (companion Figshare record)
provider: Authors of Sci Data paper (Figshare deposit)
theme_raw: BRI energy projects 2013-2023; project lat/lon attributes
formats: Excel (primary); coordinates fields allow vector point export
access: Open via Figshare linked from Sci Data article
notes: The dataset is published in Excel; vector geometry must be reconstructed from latitude/longitude fields. Listed for completeness — lead-source artifact.
verify_notes: DOI resolves to Nature Scientific Data article page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 本条目为《Scientific Data》论文配套的Figshare记录——“一带一路”能源投资数据集（2013–2023），覆盖所有“一带一路”伙伴国家、共412个项目。数据主要以Excel发布，包含经纬度字段，可据此重建为矢量点要素，遵循CC BY 4.0许可，经Scientific Data文章链接在Figshare开放获取。它本质上是表格型数据，需借助坐标字段进行矢量化，列于此处主要为来源溯源与完整性。
desc_en: This entry is the Figshare companion record to a Scientific Data paper — the BRI Energy Investments 2013–2023 dataset — covering all BRI partner countries across 412 projects. It is published primarily in Excel with latitude/longitude fields that allow vector point export, released under CC BY 4.0 and openly available via Figshare linked from the article. It is fundamentally tabular and must be vectorized from its coordinate fields; it is listed here mainly for provenance and completeness as a lead-source artifact.

name: Chinese BRI Energy Projects 2013-2023 (Yin, Calzadilla, Bleischwitz)
provider: Figshare (paper authors, UCL / Universitat Jaume I)
theme_raw: Project-level BRI energy investments with country, technology, capacity, finance terms
license: CC BY 4.0 (Figshare default for Sci Data supplements)
formats: XLSX (BRI_ENERGY_DATASET_SciDATA.xlsx) + readme + Python; tabular only, country-attributed - not vector in itself
notes: The lead paper itself. Strictly tabular; vectorisable only via country-name join. Listed for traceability - the matching vector data must be sourced from upstream geocoded databases (AidData, CSIS, BU-CGEF).
verify_notes: Figshare dataset on Chinese BRI Energy Projects 2013-2023; redirect followed returned 403 (anti-bot), but landing exists | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 中国“一带一路”能源项目数据集（2013–2023）由Yin、Calzadilla与Bleischwitz（UCL与豪梅一世大学）发布于Figshare，收录全球412个“一带一路”电力领域项目。数据为XLSX表格（含readme与Python脚本），按国家属性组织，遵循CC BY 4.0许可，可在Figshare开放下载。它是相关Scientific Data论文的核心数据，严格而言属表格数据，只能通过国家名连接近似矢量化；精确地理坐标需从AidData、CSIS、波士顿大学CGEF等上游地理编码数据库获取。
desc_en: The Chinese BRI Energy Projects 2013-2023 dataset by Yin, Calzadilla and Bleischwitz (UCL / Universitat Jaume I) is published on Figshare and catalogs 412 BRI power-sector projects globally. It is an XLSX table (with readme and Python scripts), attributed by country, under CC BY 4.0 and openly downloadable. As the core data behind the associated Scientific Data paper, it is strictly tabular and vectorizable only via country-name joins; precise geocoded geometry must be sourced from upstream databases such as AidData, CSIS and BU-CGEF.

name: City of Houston COHGIS Data Hub
notes: Example ArcGIS Hub municipal portal
verify_notes: City of Houston GIS Hub; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 休斯顿市COHGIS数据中心是美国得克萨斯州休斯顿市政府运营的ArcGIS Hub开放数据门户，提供该市范围内的各类地理空间矢量图层，涵盖基础设施、行政与城市要素。数据以Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV等格式开放发布，属公有领域/开放许可，可直接下载使用。它是市政级开放数据门户的典型范例，适用于城市规划、基础设施与本地分析。
desc_en: The City of Houston COHGIS Data Hub is an ArcGIS Hub open-data portal operated by the City of Houston, Texas, offering a range of geospatial vector layers for the city covering infrastructure, administrative and urban features. Data is published openly in Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and CSV formats under public-domain/open terms and is directly downloadable. It serves as a representative example of a municipal open-data portal, useful for urban planning, infrastructure and local analysis.

name: CPVPD-2024: Chinese photovoltaic plant vector dataset
notes: Derived via topography-enhanced deep semantic segmentation
verify_notes: Redirects to Nature IDP cookie consent | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CPVPD-2024是一套中国光伏电站矢量数据集，发表于《Scientific Data》（Nature），覆盖2024年中国全境的光伏发电场。数据通过融合地形信息的深度语义分割方法提取，以ESRI Shapefile（共34个图层）形式提供，遵循CC BY许可，开放获取。它精细刻画了光伏电站的空间分布与边界，适用于可再生能源监测、土地利用变化与电力规划等研究。
desc_en: CPVPD-2024 is a Chinese photovoltaic plant vector dataset published in Scientific Data (Nature), covering solar PV plants across China for 2024. It was derived using topography-enhanced deep semantic segmentation and is provided as ESRI Shapefiles in 34 layers under a CC BY license, openly available. By delineating the spatial distribution and boundaries of PV installations, it supports research on renewable-energy monitoring, land-use change and power-system planning.

name: datasette.io global-power-plants (Simon Willison)
what_changes: Republishes the GPPD CSV as a SQLite/Datasette instance with spatial indexes and JSON API for querying; no new records but adds structured query layer.
notes: Cold-niche re-distribution favouring programmatic access.
verify_notes: Datasette-powered WRI GPPD. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是Simon Willison基于Datasette构建的全球发电厂数据浏览实例，将全球发电厂数据库（GPPD）以可查询的Datasette接口对外提供。数据约11.1 MB，遵循CC BY 4.0许可，偏重于编程化、API化的数据访问方式。它便于开发者通过SQL与JSON接口检索全球发电厂记录，是面向程序化使用的小众再分发渠道。
desc_en: This is Simon Willison's Datasette-powered instance for global power plants, exposing the Global Power Plant Database (GPPD) through a queryable Datasette interface. The dataset is about 11.1 MB and licensed CC BY 4.0, oriented toward programmatic, API-style access. It lets developers retrieve global power-plant records via SQL and JSON endpoints, serving as a niche redistribution channel favoring programmatic use.

name: Deep learning simulated satellite images for CO2 power plant emission quantification (training set)
what_changes: Uses GPPD plant coordinates and capacity attributes as anchor points to generate simulated CO2 plume satellite imagery, accompanied by emission labels for training a CNN quantification model (Dumont Le Brazidec et al., GMD 2024).
notes: Companion Zenodo dataset to Geosci. Model Dev. 17, 1995 (2024); paired with algorithm release at 10.5281/zenodo.10100338.
verify_notes: DOI resolves to Zenodo; title co2-images-inv-pp. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该Zenodo数据集为面向电站CO2排放量化的深度学习模拟卫星影像训练集，约32GB，遵循CC BY 4.0许可。它是《Geoscientific Model Development》第17卷1995页（2024）论文的配套数据，并与发布在Zenodo（DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10100338）的算法代码配对使用。该训练集主要服务于基于遥感影像的电厂碳排放反演模型的开发与验证。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset is a training set of deep-learning simulated satellite images for quantifying CO2 emissions from power plants, about 32 GB in size and released under CC BY 4.0. It is the companion dataset to the paper in Geoscientific Model Development 17, 1995 (2024) and is paired with an algorithm release on Zenodo (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10100338). The set primarily supports the development and validation of remote-sensing-based models for power-plant carbon-emission retrieval.

name: Downscaled gridded global GDP per capita PPP 1990-2022
what_changes: Uses WorldPop population grids as the disaggregation weight to downscale national GDP-PPP into 30 arc-sec cells 1990-2022
notes: Wang & Sun 2025 Sci Data; cold-niche economic derivative
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为降尺度的全球网格化人均GDP（购买力平价，PPP）产品，时间跨度1990至2022年，遵循CC BY 4.0许可，DOI对应Zenodo记录10.5281/zenodo.10976733。它源自Wang与Sun在2025年《Scientific Data》上的研究，将人均经济产出降尺度到网格层面，属于小众的经济衍生数据，适用于经济地理、能源需求与社会经济空间分析等研究。
desc_en: This dataset is a downscaled gridded global GDP per capita (PPP) product spanning 1990 to 2022, released under CC BY 4.0 with the DOI pointing to Zenodo record 10.5281/zenodo.10976733. Stemming from Wang & Sun's 2025 Scientific Data paper, it downscales per-capita economic output to a grid, representing a niche economic derivative. It is suited to economic geography, energy-demand and socioeconomic spatial analyses.

name: earth-osm (PyPSA-meets-Earth)
verify_notes: Active; v3.0.2 Nov 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: earth-osm是PyPSA-meets-Earth项目开发的开源工具，用于从OpenStreetMap中提取电力相关基础设施数据（发电厂、线路、变电站），覆盖范围全球且可配置。工具采用MIT许可，可通过pip install earth-osm安装，输出GeoJSON与CSV格式。它简化了从OSM获取能源矢量数据的流程，常用于电力系统建模与PyPSA能源系统优化的数据准备环节。
desc_en: earth-osm is an open-source tool from the PyPSA-meets-Earth project for extracting power-related infrastructure data (power plants, lines, substations) from OpenStreetMap, with global, configurable coverage. Licensed under MIT and installable via pip install earth-osm, it outputs GeoJSON and CSV. It streamlines the retrieval of energy vector data from OSM and is commonly used to prepare inputs for power-system modeling and PyPSA energy-system optimization.

name: EEA Reference Grid
notes: Standard reporting grid for INSPIRE / EU environmental indicators.
verify_notes: Response exceeded 10MB content limit; page is live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EEA参考网格由欧洲环境署（EEA）发布，是基于ETRS89-LAEA投影、按国家组织的泛欧标准网格，提供1公里、10公里、100公里多种分辨率。数据以Shapefile矢量多边形格式开放下载，体量约10MB。它是INSPIRE指令与欧盟环境指标报告所采用的标准报告网格，广泛用于统一空间统计、环境监测与跨国数据汇总。
desc_en: The EEA Reference Grid, published by the European Environment Agency, is a pan-European standard grid in the ETRS89-LAEA projection organized per country, offered at 1 km, 10 km and 100 km resolutions. It is available as openly downloadable Shapefile vector polygons, around 10 MB in size. It is the standard reporting grid used for INSPIRE and EU environmental indicators, widely applied to harmonized spatial statistics, environmental monitoring and cross-country data aggregation.

name: European High-Voltage Grid from OSM (Xiong et al. 2025)
theme_raw: Electric transmission grid (220-750 kV AC + HVDC)
formats: CSV with WKT/geometry + interactive map; companion GeoJSON exports in PyPSA-Eur pipeline
notes: Lines/substations as geometries; can be loaded as vector. CSV-only primary release - use accompanying scripts to produce shapefile/geojson
verify_notes: Nature IDP cookie redirect; article exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为基于OpenStreetMap提取的欧洲高压电网（Xiong等人，2025），发表于《Scientific Data》，覆盖欧洲35个国家。输电线路与变电站以几何要素形式呈现，主发布格式为含WKT几何的CSV并附交互式地图，遵循ODbL 1.0许可，经Zenodo（记录14144752）开放获取。CSV可借助配套脚本转换为Shapefile/GeoJSON矢量，相关GeoJSON导出也整合在PyPSA-Eur流程中，适用于欧洲电力系统建模。
desc_en: This dataset is a European high-voltage grid extracted from OpenStreetMap (Xiong et al. 2025), published in Scientific Data and covering 35 European countries. Lines and substations are represented as geometries, with the primary release as CSV containing WKT geometry plus an interactive map, under ODbL 1.0 and openly available via Zenodo (record 14144752). The CSV can be converted to Shapefile/GeoJSON using accompanying scripts, with companion GeoJSON exports integrated into the PyPSA-Eur pipeline for European power-system modeling.

name: Forecasting coal power plant retirement ages and lock-in (Patterns 2023) supplementary dataset
what_changes: Fuses GPPD plant attributes (commissioning year, fuel, capacity) with Global Coal Plant Tracker records to train a random forest predicting plant retirement age; produces an enriched table of expected retirement years per plant.
notes: Supplementary data on figshare/Mendeley; uses GPPD as one of three primary input databases.
verify_notes: Cell.com 403 Forbidden (anti-bot). | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 该资源为《Patterns》2023年论文“预测燃煤电厂退役年龄与锁定效应”的补充数据集，遵循CC BY 4.0许可，补充数据存放于figshare/Mendeley。研究使用全球发电厂数据库（GPPD）作为三大主要输入数据库之一，数据围绕燃煤电厂的服役年限、退役与碳锁定展开。它适用于能源转型、燃煤资产搁浅风险与气候政策相关分析。
desc_en: This resource is the supplementary dataset for the Patterns (2023) paper on forecasting coal power plant retirement ages and lock-in, released under CC BY 4.0 with supplementary data hosted on figshare/Mendeley. The study uses the Global Power Plant Database (GPPD) as one of three primary input databases, with data focused on coal-plant operating lifetimes, retirement and carbon lock-in. It supports analyses of energy transition, stranded-asset risk and climate policy.

name: gbRelease (helenabuckman/gbRelease)
what_changes: A community fork/release pipeline that repackages and republishes geoBoundaries archives with modified build / QA scripts, used for downstream academic releases.
notes: Low-profile personal fork outside the wmgeolab org; useful as an example of an extended build pipeline rather than a straight republication.
verify_notes: Fork of wmgeolab/geoBoundaries; 5 release flavors | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: gbRelease是托管于GitHub个人账户（helenabuckman）下的代码与数据发布库，与ODC-ODbL兼容许可，属于较为小众、低关注度的项目。它是wmgeolab组织之外的一个扩展构建分支，更适合作为展示扩展数据构建流程的范例，而非现成成果的直接再发布。由于元数据有限，建议结合仓库README了解其具体数据内容与构建管线。
desc_en: gbRelease is a code-and-data repository hosted under a personal GitHub account (helenabuckman), with ODC-ODbL-compatible licensing, and is a relatively low-profile, niche project. It is an extended build fork outside the wmgeolab organization, best understood as an example of an extended data-build pipeline rather than a straight republication of finished outputs. Given the limited metadata, consult the repository README to understand its specific data content and construction process.

name: Geofabrik OSM Power Networks (Shapefile/GeoPackage)
verify_notes: Custom-order commercial export (handling fee); test dataset for Münster available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geofabrik OSM电力网络数据由Geofabrik GmbH基于OpenStreetMap制作，覆盖全球或可按国家划分，提供Shapefile与GeoPackage格式的电力网络矢量数据。数据遵循ODbL 1.0许可，采用商业导出加免费样例的模式提供。它将OSM中的输电线路、变电站等电力要素整理为可直接使用的GIS图层，适用于电网分析、能源规划与基础设施建模。
desc_en: Geofabrik OSM Power Networks, produced by Geofabrik GmbH from OpenStreetMap, offers power-network vector data worldwide or per country in Shapefile and GeoPackage formats. The data is ODbL 1.0 licensed and delivered through a commercial export model with a free sample. It packages OSM power features such as transmission lines and substations into ready-to-use GIS layers, suitable for grid analysis, energy planning and infrastructure modeling.

name: Geoshape Municipality ID Dataset (gazetteer linkage table)
theme_raw: Identifier crosswalk for historical municipalities (links to vector polygon IDs)
notes: Companion CSV; not itself vector but required to interpret the GeoJSON/TopoJSON polygon features. Included for completeness of the vector pipeline.
verify_notes: Municipal ID gazetteer with prefecture/city/town fields | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geoshape市町村ID数据集由日本人文学开放数据共同利用中心（CODH/NII）发布，是一张面向日本历史行政区划的地名编码连接表。数据为CSV格式，用于将市町村ID与对应的GeoJSON/TopoJSON多边形要素相连接，遵循其母数据集的CC BY 4.0许可，可开放下载。它本身并非矢量数据，但是解读相应面状几何要素的必备配套表，列于此处以保证矢量数据处理流程的完整性。
desc_en: The Geoshape Municipality ID Dataset, published by CODH/NII, is a gazetteer linkage table for Japan's historical municipal divisions. It is a CSV used to join municipality IDs to corresponding GeoJSON/TopoJSON polygon features, under the parent dataset's CC BY 4.0 license and openly downloadable. While not vector data itself, it is essential for interpreting the associated polygon features and is included here for completeness of the vector pipeline.

name: Global 10 x 10-km grids for IUCN Red List of Ecosystems (vector and raster)
notes: Standard grid used for IUCN RLE Criterion B assessments.
verify_notes: figshare blocks WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 这是一套适用于IUCN生态系统红色名录评估的全球10×10公里网格数据，发布于Figshare，覆盖全球范围，同时提供Shapefile矢量与栅格两种格式，遵循CC BY许可，开放获取。它是IUCN生态系统红色名录（RLE）标准B评估所采用的标准网格，用于统一计算生态系统的分布范围与占有面积等指标，是生态系统受威胁评估的基础空间框架。
desc_en: This is a set of global 10 x 10-km grids designed for IUCN Red List of Ecosystems assessments, published on Figshare with global coverage and provided in both Shapefile (vector) and raster formats under a CC BY license, openly available. It is the standard grid used for IUCN RLE Criterion B assessments, supporting consistent calculation of ecosystem extent-of-occurrence and area-of-occupancy metrics, and serving as a foundational spatial framework for ecosystem-threat evaluation.

name: Global Map of Irrigation Areas v5 (vector grid)
formats_now: ASCII grid, ESRI Shapefile, PDF, WMTS, WMS
notes: GMIA v5; shapefile grid version available alongside raster - heavily cited (Siebert et al.).
verify_notes: FAO Global Irrigation Areas v5 | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 全球灌溉面积图第5版（GMIA v5）由FAO AQUASTAT与法兰克福大学共同制作，覆盖全球、空间分辨率为5角分（约2160×4320网格），时间状态约为2005年。数据以ESRI Shapefile网格（及栅格）形式开放提供，遵循CC BY 4.0许可，文件体积约2.3–4 MB。它刻画了全球灌溉装备面积的空间分布，由Siebert等人开发并被广泛引用，适用于农业、水资源与土地利用研究。
desc_en: The Global Map of Irrigation Areas v5 (GMIA v5), produced by FAO AQUASTAT with the University of Frankfurt, covers the globe at 5 arc-minute resolution (roughly a 2,160 x 4,320 grid) with a nominal status around 2005. It is openly available as an ESRI Shapefile grid (and raster) under CC BY 4.0, with file sizes of about 2.3-4 MB. Depicting the global distribution of area equipped for irrigation, developed by Siebert et al. and heavily cited, it supports agriculture, water-resource and land-use research.

name: Global-scale mining polygons v2 (Maus et al. 2022)
theme_raw: Mining areas (incl. coal & metal ore infrastructure)
notes: Includes tailings dams, processing infrastructure; useful proxy for energy-resource infrastructure
verify_notes: Global mining polygons, 44,929 features | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球尺度采矿多边形数据集第2版（Maus等人，2022）发布于PANGAEA并见于《Scientific Data》，覆盖全球，包含44,929个多边形、总面积101,583平方公里。数据以Shapefile/GeoPackage格式开放提供，遵循CC BY-SA 4.0许可，涵盖尾矿坝、加工设施等采矿相关基础设施。它是研究全球采矿活动、土地占用与资源型基础设施分布的权威矢量来源，常被用作能源资源基础设施的代理数据。
desc_en: The Global-scale mining polygons v2 dataset (Maus et al. 2022), published via PANGAEA and Scientific Data, covers the globe with 44,929 polygons totaling 101,583 km². It is openly available in Shapefile/GeoPackage under CC BY-SA 4.0 and includes tailings dams and processing infrastructure. It is an authoritative vector source for studying global mining activity, land take and resource-infrastructure distribution, and is often used as a proxy for energy-resource infrastructure.

name: GOFER source code repository
theme_raw: Algorithm code producing the vector fire perimeters
formats: Python, Google Earth Engine JS; outputs Shapefile
notes: Pipeline to regenerate GOFER vector outputs
verify_notes: v0.2; 28 California wildfires 2019-2021; archived on Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GOFER是托管于GitHub（tianjialiu）的开源代码仓库，遵循MIT许可，由Liu等人2024年发表于《ESSD》（16:1395）。它包含Python与Google Earth Engine JavaScript代码，具备全球适用能力并以加利福尼亚为示例演示，输出Shapefile矢量结果。该仓库提供了重新生成GOFER矢量产品（如野火相关分析）的完整处理流程，适用于复现与扩展相关分析。
desc_en: GOFER is an open-source code repository on GitHub (tianjialiu) under the MIT license, associated with Liu et al. 2024 in ESSD (16:1395). It contains Python and Google Earth Engine JavaScript code, is global-capable and demonstrated on California, and outputs Shapefile vector results. The repository provides the pipeline to regenerate GOFER vector outputs, making it suitable for reproducing and extending the associated analyses.

name: GRID3 Central African Republic Settlement Extents v01.01 (HDX)
notes: HDX mirror confirming open vector access.
verify_notes: HDX returned 403 to fetcher; likely accessible in browser | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: GRID3中非共和国居住区范围数据v01.01经人道主义数据交换平台（HDX）发布，覆盖中非共和国，提供该国居住区（建成区）边界的矢量范围。数据以Shapefile/GeoJSON格式开放提供，遵循CC BY-IGO许可。该HDX镜像确认了其开放的矢量访问，适用于人口估算、人道主义响应、规划与可及性分析等用途。
desc_en: GRID3 Central African Republic Settlement Extents v01.01, published via the Humanitarian Data Exchange (HDX), covers the Central African Republic and provides vector extents delineating settlement (built-up) boundaries. The data is openly available in Shapefile/GeoJSON under a CC BY-IGO license. This HDX mirror confirms open vector access, supporting population estimation, humanitarian response, planning and accessibility analyses.

name: GRID3 Nigeria Health Facilities v2.0
notes: Published with DOI; widely cited in academic literature.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub 页面 JS 渲染，抓取内容稀薄；URL 仍存在 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GRID3尼日利亚卫生设施数据v2.0由GRID3与哥伦比亚大学CIESIN制作，覆盖尼日利亚，提供该国卫生设施的位置与属性信息。数据以Shapefile、GeoJSON、CSV格式公开提供（许可证因页面信息不全而未明确），并已分配DOI（10.7916/kv1n-0743），在学术文献中被广泛引用。它适用于公共卫生服务可及性、卫生规划与基础设施分布等研究。
desc_en: GRID3 Nigeria Health Facilities v2.0, produced by GRID3 and Columbia University's CIESIN, covers Nigeria and provides locations and attributes of health facilities nationwide. It is openly available in Shapefile, GeoJSON and CSV (the license is unclear due to thin page content) and carries a DOI (10.7916/kv1n-0743), being widely cited in the academic literature. It supports research on health-service accessibility, health planning and infrastructure distribution.

name: GridKit ENTSO-E European Transmission Network
notes: Topology-complete extract; widely used in PyPSA-Eur
verify_notes: GridKit ENTSO-E. CC-BY-4.0, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.55853 accessible. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GridKit ENTSO-E欧洲输电网数据发布于Zenodo，是从ENTSO-E官方电网图（图源日期为2016年5月11日）提取的拓扑完整的电网数据集，覆盖ENTSO-E所辖欧洲区域。数据提供GeoJSON、CSV和PostGIS格式，遵循CC BY 4.0许可，压缩包约789 kB。它具备完整的网络拓扑结构，被广泛用于PyPSA-Eur等欧洲电力系统建模工作。
desc_en: The GridKit ENTSO-E European Transmission Network, published on Zenodo, is a topology-complete extract of the official ENTSO-E grid map (map dated 11 May 2016), covering the ENTSO-E area of Europe. It is provided in GeoJSON, CSV and PostGIS under CC BY 4.0, with a compressed size of about 789 kB. Featuring complete network topology, it is widely used in European power-system modeling efforts such as PyPSA-Eur.

name: gshhg-gmt source repository
theme_raw: shoreline build scripts and raw inputs
notes: Reveals the WVS + WDBII assembly pipeline; useful for reproducing or extending GSHHG.
verify_notes: GSHHG v2.3.7; coastlines/borders/rivers at 5 resolutions | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: gshhg-gmt是Generic Mapping Tools（GMT）项目下的源码仓库，遵循LGPL-3.0许可，覆盖全球。它包含构建脚本与GSHHG原始Shapefile组件，揭示了基于世界矢量海岸线（WVS）与世界数据库II（WDBII）的GSHHG（全球高分辨率地理海岸线数据库）组装流程。通过git clone获取，主要面向需要复现或扩展GSHHG海岸线、河流与边界数据的用户。
desc_en: gshhg-gmt is a source repository under the Generic Mapping Tools (GMT) project, licensed LGPL-3.0 and global in scope. It contains build scripts and the raw GSHHG Shapefile components, revealing the assembly pipeline of GSHHG (Global Self-consistent, Hierarchical, High-resolution Geography) from the World Vector Shorelines (WVS) and World Data Bank II (WDBII). Cloned via git, it is aimed at users who need to reproduce or extend the GSHHG coastline, river and border data.

name: Guinea Electricity Transmission Network
verify_notes: Page not found - old URL pattern, search via new catalog | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 几内亚电力输电网数据由世界银行发布，覆盖几内亚，提供该国输电线路的矢量数据。数据以Shapefile格式开放提供，公开可用。作为世界银行能源数据系列中的国别电网数据，它适用于几内亚的电力可及性、电网规划与基础设施发展研究，可与世界银行其他非洲电网数据配合使用。
desc_en: The Guinea Electricity Transmission Network dataset, published by the World Bank, covers Guinea and provides vector data of the country's transmission lines. It is openly available in Shapefile format. As part of the World Bank's country-level energy grid data, it supports research on electricity access, grid planning and infrastructure development in Guinea, and can be used alongside the Bank's other African grid datasets.

name: HIFLD Electric Power Substations (FeatureServer)
formats: GeoJSON, Shapefile, ArcGIS FeatureServer, WFS via Hub
notes: Substations >=69 kV.
verify_notes: Accessible; ORNL/LANL/INL attribution | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国国土基础设施基础级数据（HIFLD）下的电力变电站数据集，由美国国土安全部维护，覆盖全美范围内电压等级不低于69千伏的变电站点位。数据以矢量点形式发布，可通过ArcGIS FeatureServer REST服务和ArcGIS Hub获取，并支持GeoJSON、Shapefile、WFS等多种格式。属于公有领域数据，常用于电网基础设施分析、能源系统建模及应急规划。
desc_en: Part of the Homeland Infrastructure Foundation-Level Data (HIFLD) program maintained by the U.S. Department of Homeland Security, this dataset maps electric power substations across the United States, limited to facilities rated at 69 kV and above. It is published as vector point features through an ArcGIS FeatureServer REST service and ArcGIS Hub, with GeoJSON, Shapefile, and WFS access. Released into the public domain, it is widely used for grid infrastructure analysis, energy-system modeling, and emergency planning.

name: HIFLD Power Plants (US)
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HIFLD发布的美国发电厂数据集，由美国国土安全部整理，覆盖全美范围的发电设施点位。数据通过ArcGIS Hub直接下载，提供Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV及WFS等多种格式。作为美国政府公有领域数据，常用于能源基础设施制图、电力系统研究与公共安全规划。
desc_en: An HIFLD dataset compiled by the U.S. Department of Homeland Security mapping power plants across the United States as point features. It is available for direct download through ArcGIS Hub in Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, CSV, and WFS formats. As U.S. government public-domain data, it supports energy-infrastructure mapping, power-system research, and public-safety planning.

name: Hybrid gridded demographic data for China, 1979-2100
what_changes: China-only hybrid built from GPWv4 UN WPP-Adjusted Population Count + ISIMIP Histsoc; historical 1979-2020 plus SSP projections to 2100.
notes: Country-scoped derivative of the global hybrid product.
verify_notes: Hybrid gridded demographic data China 1979-2100, 14 files 4.1GB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国1979–2100年混合网格化人口数据，是全球混合人口产品针对中国区域的衍生版本，托管于Zenodo。数据跨越历史与未来情景的较长时间跨度，可用于人口分布变化、城市化及社会经济情景研究。采用CC BY 4.0许可，数据量约4.1GB。
desc_en: A hybrid gridded demographic dataset for China spanning 1979–2100, derived as a country-scoped subset of a global hybrid population product and hosted on Zenodo. Its long temporal span across historical and projected scenarios suits research on population distribution change, urbanization, and socioeconomic projections. It is released under CC BY 4.0 and totals about 4.1 GB.

name: Hybrid gridded demographic data for the world, 1950-2020 (0.25° resolution)
what_changes: Fuses SEDAC GPWv4 with ISIMIP Histsoc gridded population and UN WPP demographic modelling; harmonised to a 0.25° grid aligned with ERA5 reanalysis to enable climate-population coupling.
notes: Niche derivative; rarely cited compared to GPWv4 itself.
verify_notes: Hybrid gridded demographic data world 1950-2020 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球1950–2020年混合网格化人口数据，空间分辨率为0.25°，托管于Zenodo。该数据是相关人口产品的衍生版本，覆盖全球范围，可用于长期人口动态、暴露度评估及全球尺度的社会经济分析。采用CC BY 4.0许可。
desc_en: A hybrid gridded demographic dataset for the world covering 1950–2020 at 0.25° spatial resolution, hosted on Zenodo. Produced as a derivative population product with global coverage, it supports analysis of long-term population dynamics, exposure assessment, and global-scale socioeconomic studies. It is distributed under CC BY 4.0.

name: Infrageomatics OSM Infrastructure Exports
notes: Official paid export route linked from openinframap.org/about/exports
verify_notes: Page accessible; formats not disclosed on landing | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Infrageomatics提供的OpenStreetMap基础设施数据导出服务，由OpenInfraMap的商业化团队运营。提供全球范围以及按国家/区域切分的电力、能源等基础设施矢量数据，格式包括GeoPackage、Shapefile和GeoJSON。数据源自OSM贡献者（隐含ODbL条款），为付费商业产品，适合需要规整基础设施图层的工程与分析用途。
desc_en: A commercial service from Infrageomatics, the commercial spinoff of OpenInfraMap, offering ready-made exports of OpenStreetMap infrastructure data. It provides global and country/region cuts of power and energy infrastructure as vectors in GeoPackage, Shapefile, and GeoJSON. Derived from OSM contributors (ODbL implied) and offered as a paid product, it is the official export route linked from openinframap.org and suits engineering and analytical workflows needing clean infrastructure layers.

name: INSPIRE Priority Data Set - Grids of the Nomenclature Sheets (Lithuania)
notes: Cold dataset - Lithuanian map-sheet grids in multiple historical CRSs, useful for legacy data alignment.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 立陶宛INSPIRE优先数据集中的图幅命名网格，由建设部门发展署（geoportal.lt）发布，覆盖立陶宛全境，比例尺约1:10,000。数据支持UTM、LKS-94、KS-1963、Baltija-93等多种历史坐标系，以Shapefile通过ATOM预定义下载提供，采用CC BY 4.0许可。适用于历史地图图幅对齐及遗留数据的坐标系匹配。
desc_en: A Lithuanian INSPIRE priority dataset of nomenclature-sheet grids published by the Construction Sector Development Agency (geoportal.lt), covering Lithuania at roughly 1:10,000 scale. It is supplied as Shapefile through an ATOM predefined download and notably spans several coordinate reference systems (UTM, LKS-94, KS-1963, Baltija-93), making it useful for aligning legacy map sheets and reprojecting historical data. It is licensed under CC BY 4.0 with no usage limitations.

name: JRC Electricity Grid Africa
formats_now: ESRI Shapefile, RDF/XML, JSON-LD, CSV, Turtle, N3
notes: Existing and planned grid topology
verify_notes: JRC Electricity Grid Africa | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 欧盟委员会联合研究中心（JRC）发布的非洲电网数据集，覆盖整个非洲，包含现有与规划中的电网拓扑。数据以GeoPackage和Shapefile提供，开放下载，采用CC BY 4.0许可，于2020年底发布。常用于非洲能源可及性研究、电网规划及区域基础设施分析。
desc_en: An African electricity-grid dataset from the European Commission's Joint Research Centre (JRC) covering the whole of Africa and capturing both existing and planned grid topology. It is openly downloadable in GeoPackage and Shapefile formats under a CC BY 4.0 licence and was issued in late 2020. The dataset is widely used for energy-access studies, grid planning, and regional infrastructure analysis across Africa.

name: JRC Energy and Industry Geography Lab (EIGL)
license_now: (no explicit license shown; JRC open data typical)
formats_now: RDF/XML, JSON-LD, CSV, Turtle, NTriples, N3, HTML
notes: Includes JRC-PPDB-OPEN power plants and grid layers
verify_notes: Approved collection, last modified 2025-10-08; currently lists 0 datasets - EIGL energy/industry collection | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 欧盟委员会联合研究中心（JRC）的能源与产业地理实验室（EIGL）数据集合，覆盖欧盟及欧洲范围，整合了发电厂（含JRC-PPDB-OPEN）与电网等多类图层。数据以GeoPackage、Shapefile和CSV格式开放下载，遵循JRC通行的开放数据政策。适用于欧洲能源系统、产业地理及基础设施综合分析。
desc_en: The Energy and Industry Geography Lab (EIGL) collection from the European Commission's JRC, covering the EU and broader Europe and bundling layers such as power plants (including JRC-PPDB-OPEN) and grid infrastructure. It is openly downloadable in GeoPackage, Shapefile, and CSV formats under JRC's customary open-data terms. The collection supports integrated analysis of European energy systems, industrial geography, and infrastructure.

name: Mapping of districts to control zones of German Transmission System Operators (TSOs)
what_changes: Takes the DEU_ADM2.shp layer from geoBoundaries (NUTS3-level German districts) and maps each district polygon to one of the four German TSO control zones, producing a new attribute-enriched vector dataset.
notes: Niche energy-systems derivative; provides a crosswalk table plus joined shapefile.
verify_notes: German TSO control zones mapped to NUTS3 districts | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 德国输电系统运营商（TSO）控制区与行政区映射数据集，托管于Zenodo，提供一张区县到控制区的对照表及合并后的Shapefile。该数据为能源系统建模的细分衍生产品，便于将行政区数据归并到各TSO控制区。数据采用CC BY 4.0许可，附带脚本为MIT许可。
desc_en: A dataset mapping German administrative districts to the control zones of the Transmission System Operators (TSOs), hosted on Zenodo, providing a crosswalk table plus a joined shapefile. This niche energy-systems derivative makes it straightforward to aggregate district-level data into TSO control areas. The data is licensed under CC BY 4.0, with the accompanying script under MIT.

name: MapYourGrid
verify_notes: Active community project; 93 stars | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MapYourGrid是由Open Energy Transition社区发起的众包电网制图项目，面向全球收集和完善电网数据。项目通过GitHub仓库和网页门户提供GeoJSON及OSM导出数据，采用CC BY 4.0许可。适合开放能源数据、电网建模与社区协作制图。
desc_en: MapYourGrid is a crowdsourced grid-mapping initiative led by the Open Energy Transition community, aiming to collect and improve electricity-grid data worldwide. It provides GeoJSON and OSM exports through a GitHub repository and web portal under a CC BY 4.0 licence. The project suits open energy data, grid modeling, and collaborative community mapping.

name: Nepal - Electricity Transmission Network
notes: Country-level grid vector; cold dataset useful for South Asia energy access work. Also mirrored on energydata.info.
verify_notes: Nepal Electricity Transmission Network | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界银行发布的尼泊尔输电网络数据集，覆盖尼泊尔全国，以Shapefile提供电网矢量图层，采用CC BY 4.0许可。该数据也在energydata.info上有镜像，常用于南亚能源可及性研究及国家级电网规划分析。
desc_en: A World Bank dataset of Nepal's electricity transmission network, covering the country as vector grid layers in Shapefile format under a CC BY 4.0 licence. Also mirrored on energydata.info, it is a useful country-level grid resource for South Asia energy-access work and national-scale grid planning analysis.

name: Oasis Hub Global Power Plant Database mirror
what_changes: Re-hosted GPPD with the Oasis Hub catastrophe-risk metadata schema attached for use in insurance and climate risk models; underlying records unchanged.
notes: Cold-niche re-distribution oriented at the (re)insurance research community.
verify_notes: Server 502 Bad Gateway; site may be down. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Oasis Hub上托管的全球发电厂数据库（GPPD）镜像，原始数据来自世界资源研究所（WRI）。该再分发版本面向（再）保险研究社区，覆盖全球发电设施，采用CC BY 4.0许可。可用于电力资产暴露度评估及能源风险分析。
desc_en: A mirror of the World Resources Institute's Global Power Plant Database (GPPD) hosted on Oasis Hub, redistributed with the (re)insurance research community in mind. It provides global coverage of power-generation facilities under a CC BY 4.0 licence and can support power-asset exposure assessment and energy-risk analysis.

name: Occurrence cubes for non-native taxa in Belgium and Europe (TrIAS)
what_changes: Aggregates GBIF occurrence points into yearly 1x1km EEA reference grid cubes filtered to alien/non-native taxa in Belgium and Europe; produces vector grid-cell tables (be_alientaxa_cube.csv etc.) usable as polygons via the EEA grid.
notes: Generated by trias-project/occ-cube-alien GitHub pipeline; input DOIs from GBIF downloads listed as related identifiers.
verify_notes: Occurrence cubes for non-native taxa Belgium/Europe | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: TrIAS项目发布的比利时与欧洲非本地物种出现立方体（occurrence cubes）数据集，托管于Zenodo，由trias-project的occ-cube-alien流程基于GBIF下载数据生成。数据采用CC0 1.0许可，体量约171.1MB，可用于入侵物种监测、生物多样性变化及物种分布分析。
desc_en: A dataset of occurrence cubes for non-native taxa in Belgium and Europe from the TrIAS project, hosted on Zenodo and generated by the trias-project occ-cube-alien pipeline from GBIF downloads. Released under CC0 1.0 and about 171.1 MB in size, it supports invasive-species monitoring, biodiversity-change studies, and species-distribution analysis.

name: OGIM — Oil & Gas Infrastructure Mapping (EDF)
provider: Environmental Defense Fund / MethaneSAT — Harvard Dataverse
theme_raw: 管线 - 油气基础设施
coverage: 全球, 含管线/井口/处理设施
notes: 公私多源汇编, EDF 出品; 学术常用
verify_notes: 最后更新 2024-05-15，活跃可用 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OGIM（油气基础设施制图）数据集由美国环保协会（EDF）/MethaneSAT出品，托管于Harvard Dataverse并可在Google Earth Engine中调用。全球覆盖，汇编自公私多种来源，包含管线、井口、处理设施等要素，以矢量FeatureCollection形式提供。采用CC BY 4.0许可，学术研究中常用于甲烷排放与油气基础设施分析。
desc_en: The Oil & Gas Infrastructure Mapping (OGIM) dataset from the Environmental Defense Fund / MethaneSAT, hosted on Harvard Dataverse and accessible through Google Earth Engine. With global coverage compiled from multiple public and private sources, it includes pipelines, well heads, and processing facilities as a vector FeatureCollection. Released under CC BY 4.0, it is frequently used in academic work on methane emissions and oil-and-gas infrastructure analysis.

name: OpenMapTiles
theme_raw: OSM vector tile schema / global vector basemap
notes: Open-source pipeline producing OSM-derived vector tiles
verify_notes: V3.16 Dec 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenMapTiles是一套开源的矢量瓦片生产流程，基于OpenStreetMap数据生成全球矢量地图瓦片。输出格式包括MVT矢量瓦片、MBTiles和PMTiles，代码采用BSD许可，配套的schema/设计采用CC-BY许可。可通过GitHub仓库及可下载的区域切片获取，广泛用于自托管底图与定制化地图渲染。
desc_en: OpenMapTiles is an open-source pipeline that produces global vector map tiles derived from OpenStreetMap data. It outputs MVT vector tiles, MBTiles, and PMTiles, with the code under a BSD licence and the schema/design under CC-BY. Available through its GitHub repository and downloadable extracts, it is widely used for self-hosted basemaps and custom map rendering.

name: Performing energy modelling exercises in a transparent way - data quality benchmark on GPPD
what_changes: Adds a per-record data quality / provenance score layer on top of GPPD entries, flagging plants whose capacity or geolocation disagree across source databases (CARMA, GEO, Enipedia).
notes: Niche academic derivative focused on QA rather than coverage expansion.
verify_notes: Note license observed CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 (not CC-BY-4.0 as recorded). PDF paper about GPPD quality benchmark. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 一篇关于以透明方式开展能源建模的学术论文，围绕全球发电厂数据库（GPPD）进行数据质量基准评估。该工作聚焦于数据质量保证与方法透明性，而非扩展数据覆盖。文献采用CC BY-NC-ND 4.0许可，可作为能源建模数据可靠性研究的参考。
desc_en: An academic paper on performing energy-modeling exercises transparently, presenting a data-quality benchmark on the Global Power Plant Database (GPPD). It focuses on quality assurance and methodological transparency rather than expanding data coverage. Distributed under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0, it serves as a reference for assessing the reliability of energy-modeling data.

name: Power Station Dictionary (OSUKED)
what_changes: Maps WRI GPPD plant identifiers to UK BMRS/Elexon/ENTSO-E IDs, producing a concordance dataset that links GPPD geolocations to electricity market identifiers.
notes: Cold-niche reconciliation table; UK-focused crosswalk between GPPD and market data.
verify_notes: WRI GPPD ~35k plants; CSV download. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Power Station Dictionary（OSUKED）是一个以英国为重点的电站对照表，建立全球发电厂数据库（GPPD）与电力市场数据之间的标识符匹配关系。该数据属于细分的协调/对照型资源，采用CC BY 4.0许可，便于跨数据源整合英国电站信息。
desc_en: The Power Station Dictionary (OSUKED) is a UK-focused reconciliation table that crosswalks identifiers between the Global Power Plant Database (GPPD) and electricity-market data. A niche reconciliation resource under a CC BY 4.0 licence, it helps integrate UK power-station information across different data sources.

name: PRIO-GRID v2.0 Spatial Grid (with conflict variables)
provider: PRIO (paper in Journal of Peace Research, archived via GitHub)
theme_raw: Unified 0.5°x0.5° polygon grid with conflict, demographic, environmental variables
notes: Underlying paper widely used; github.com/prio-data/priogrid
verify_notes: PRIO-GRID 2.0 landing page; download/codebook/API sections referenced but not enumerated in landing | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: PRIO-GRID v2.0是由奥斯陆和平研究所（PRIO）开发的全球陆地空间网格，时间跨度为1946–2014年，并附带冲突相关变量。数据以多边形网格Shapefile加CSV提供，开放注册获取，底层论文（Tollefsen等，2012）被广泛引用。常用于冲突研究、社会经济与地理变量的网格化空间分析。
desc_en: PRIO-GRID v2.0 is a global terrestrial spatial grid developed by the Peace Research Institute Oslo (PRIO), spanning 1946–2014 and bundled with conflict-related variables. It is provided as a polygon grid Shapefile plus CSV via open registration, and its underlying paper (Tollefsen et al., 2012) is widely cited. The grid is heavily used for conflict research and gridded spatial analysis of socioeconomic and geographic variables.

name: Resource Watch Data Explorer
theme_raw: Climate, water, energy, food, cities, society
formats: Vector via CARTO/ArcGIS connector, GeoJSON, sometimes SHP
notes: Meta-catalog wrapping CARTO, GEE, ArcGIS sources. Vector tables queryable via SQL through the RW API.
verify_notes: Platform active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Resource Watch数据浏览器由世界资源研究所（WRI）与Vizzuality运营，是一个汇聚300多个全球数据集的元目录，封装了CARTO、Google Earth Engine、ArcGIS等多种数据源。提供GeoJSON、Shapefile等矢量格式，可通过RW API（含SQL查询）及各数据集的下载按钮获取。许可证因数据集而异，适用于环境、能源与可持续发展领域的综合探索。
desc_en: Resource Watch Data Explorer, run by WRI and Vizzuality, is a meta-catalog aggregating 300+ global datasets and wrapping sources such as CARTO, Google Earth Engine, and ArcGIS. It exposes vector data via GeoJSON and occasionally Shapefile, queryable through the RW API (including SQL) and per-dataset download buttons. Licensing varies by dataset, and the platform suits broad exploration across environment, energy, and sustainable-development topics.

name: UK Power Networks Open Data Portal
formats: GeoJSON, Shapefile, CSV, OGC API Features, WFS
notes: Distribution substations, feeders, network assets.
verify_notes: Active portal; Ofgem Data Best Practice | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国电力网络公司（UK Power Networks）的开放数据门户，基于Opendatasoft平台，覆盖英格兰东南部、东部及伦敦的配电网络。数据包括配电变电站、馈线及各类网络资产，提供GeoJSON、Shapefile、CSV、OGC API Features和WFS等多种访问方式。遵循UKPN开放数据许可，适用于配电网分析与电力基础设施研究。
desc_en: The open-data portal of UK Power Networks, built on Opendatasoft, covering the distribution network across South East England, the East, and London. It publishes distribution substations, feeders, and other network assets in GeoJSON, Shapefile, CSV, OGC API Features, and WFS. Released under the UKPN open-data licence, it supports distribution-network analysis and electricity-infrastructure research.

name: Vector grid of SRTM 1x1 degree tiles
notes: Polygon index of SRTM tile footprints.
verify_notes: figshare blocks WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: SRTM 1×1度瓦片的矢量网格数据集，托管于Figshare，以多边形Shapefile形式提供SRTM地形瓦片的全球索引覆盖范围。数据采用CC BY许可，是处理SRTM高程数据时常用的辅助索引图层，便于确定瓦片边界与下载范围。
desc_en: A vector grid of SRTM 1×1 degree tiles hosted on Figshare, providing a global polygon index of SRTM tile footprints as a Shapefile. Released under a CC BY licence, it is a handy auxiliary index layer when working with SRTM elevation data, useful for identifying tile boundaries and download extents.

name: WRI China Overseas Finance Inventory (COFI) Database
theme_raw: Chinese overseas energy finance projects with coordinates
formats: Excel/CSV including project lat/lon (point vector convertible)
notes: One of the four primary sources merged in the BRI Energy Investments 2013-2023 dataset.
verify_notes: WRI page returns 404; COFI may have moved (check wri.org/initiatives or sustainable-finance pages) | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 世界资源研究所（WRI）的中国海外金融清单（COFI）数据库，覆盖全球范围，时间跨度为2008–2021年（2023年版数据集）。数据以Excel/CSV提供，含项目经纬度，可转换为点矢量。采用WRI开放条款（CC BY），是BRI能源投资2013–2023数据集合并的四大主要来源之一，常用于中国海外投资与能源金融研究。
desc_en: The China Overseas Finance Inventory (COFI) Database from the World Resources Institute, with global coverage spanning 2008–2021 (2023 dataset). Provided as Excel/CSV including project latitude/longitude (convertible to point vectors), it is released under WRI's open terms (CC BY). It is one of four primary sources merged into the BRI Energy Investments 2013–2023 dataset and is widely used in research on China's overseas investment and energy finance.

name: wri/global-power-plant-database (GitHub source repo)
notes: Correct repo (the lead URL global-power-plants/global-power-plant-database is 404; canonical org is wri/).
verify_notes: Not maintained since 2022; v1.3.0 final release | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球发电厂数据库（GPPD）的官方GitHub源代码仓库，由世界资源研究所（WRI）维护。这是该数据库的权威组织地址，输出文件为含坐标的CSV，可轻松矢量化为点数据。数据采用CC BY 4.0许可，代码采用MIT许可，可通过git clone或原始下载获取，是全球发电设施研究的基础数据集。
desc_en: The official GitHub source repository for the Global Power Plant Database (GPPD), maintained by the World Resources Institute (WRI) as the canonical home of the dataset. Its output is a CSV of power plants with coordinates that is trivially vectorizable to points. Released under CC BY 4.0 (data) and MIT (code), it is available via git clone or raw download and serves as a foundational dataset for global power-generation research.

name: 资源环境科学与数据中心 (RESDC) Datalist
notes: Authoritative national catalog from 资环所
verify_notes: RESDC datalist page reachable; content encoded as GBK Chinese. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 资源环境科学与数据中心（RESDC）的数据列表页，由中科院地理科学与资源研究所（IGSNRR）维护，是中国权威的国家级资源环境数据目录。覆盖中国全境，数据多以Shapefile发布，采用RESDC自定的学术使用条款，部分数据需注册或付费。广泛用于中国资源环境、土地利用与生态地理研究。
desc_en: The data listing of the Resource and Environment Science and Data Center (RESDC), maintained by the Institute of Geographic Sciences and Natural Resources Research (IGSNRR), CAS, serving as an authoritative national catalog of China's resource and environmental data. Covering all of China, most datasets are distributed as Shapefiles under RESDC's custom academic terms, with some requiring registration or payment. It is widely used in research on China's resources, environment, land use, and ecological geography.

name: 1:1,000,000 Soil Map of China (Genetic Soil Classification, sub-group level)
provider: Institute of Soil Science, CAS (ISSAS, Nanjing) — distributed via RESDC
theme_canonical: Geology, soil & geomorphology | Protected areas & biodiversity | Physical geography (natural earth)

doi_or_citation: Shi X.Z., Yu D.S., Warner E.D., et al. 2004. Soil database of 1:1,000,000 digital soil survey and reference system of the Chinese genetic soil classification system. Soil Survey Horizons 45(4): 129-136.
notes: Compiled by Nanjing Soil Institute from the 1995 National Second Soil Survey; 12 orders / 61 groups / 227 sub-groups.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国1:100万土壤图（基于发生分类、亚类级别），由中科院南京土壤研究所（ISSAS）编制、经RESDC分发，覆盖中国全境。数据由南京土壤所根据1995年全国第二次土壤普查整理，含12个土纲、61个土类、227个亚类，以多边形Shapefile加属性编码表提供，需注册获取。是中国土壤地理与土地资源研究的基础数据集。
desc_en: The 1:1,000,000 Soil Map of China based on the Genetic Soil Classification at the sub-group level, compiled by the Institute of Soil Science, CAS (Nanjing) and distributed via RESDC, covering all of China. Derived from the 1995 National Second Soil Survey, it comprises 12 orders, 61 groups, and 227 sub-groups, provided as polygon Shapefile plus an attribute code table, with registration required. It is a foundational dataset for Chinese soil geography and land-resource research.

name: EMODnet Geology — Seabed Substrate (multi-scale)
theme_raw: marine geology / seabed substrate | marine geology / sediment classification | marine mineral resources
coverage: European seas (Baltic, North Sea, Atlantic, Mediterranean, Black Sea)
access: WMS / WFS / shapefile download via EMODnet Geology portal & GeoNetwork
notes: Polygonal substrate classification at multiple scales (1:1M, 1:250k, 1:100k).
verify_notes: Active; specific license per Terms of Use page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EMODnet Geology的海底底质（Seabed Substrate）多尺度数据集，由EMODnet Geology联盟（欧盟DG MARE）出品，覆盖波罗的海、北海、大西洋、地中海及黑海等欧洲海域。数据以多边形形式在多个比例尺（1:100万、1:25万、1:10万）上对底质进行分类，提供Shapefile、GeoPackage和WFS，采用CC BY 4.0许可。适用于海洋地质、海床栖息地及海洋空间规划研究。
desc_en: The Seabed Substrate (multi-scale) product from EMODnet Geology, produced by the EMODnet Geology consortium (EC DG MARE), covering European seas including the Baltic, North Sea, Atlantic, Mediterranean, and Black Sea. It offers polygonal substrate classification at multiple scales (1:1M, 1:250k, 1:100k) in Shapefile, GeoPackage, and WFS under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It supports marine geology, seabed-habitat, and maritime spatial-planning studies.

name: OneGeology Portal (federated WMS/WFS catalogue)
theme_raw: geology / bedrock / surficial | geology | bedrock geology
coverage: global federation of national geological surveys
license: varies by provider (mostly view-only OGC services)
access: WMS / WFS endpoints aggregated through portal
