desc_zh: OneGeology门户是一个联邦式的地质WMS/WFS目录，由OneGeology倡议（托管于英国地质调查局BGS）运营，汇聚全球各国地质调查机构的地质数据。数据通过聚合的WMS和WFS（GML）端点提供。该倡议已于2025–2026年正式结束，但门户与元数据目录在过渡期内仍可访问，适用于跨国地质制图与数据发现。
desc_en: The OneGeology Portal is a federated WMS/WFS catalogue of geological data run by the OneGeology Initiative (hosted by the British Geological Survey), aggregating data from national geological surveys worldwide. Access is through pooled WMS and WFS (GML) endpoints. Although the initiative formally closed in 2025–2026, the portal and metadata catalogue remain accessible during the transition, supporting cross-national geological mapping and data discovery.

name: EMODnet Coastlines (World + Satellite-Derived European at LAT/MSL/MHW)
theme_raw: coastline (multi-tidal-datum) | Coastlines, depth contours, source survey footprints | Marine bathymetry, coastlines, geology
notes: Rare WFS exposing tide-referenced coastlines (LAT/MSL/MHW) for Europe.
verify_notes: HTTP 400 without GetCapabilities request params; service is live | lychee:Rejected status code: 502 Bad Gateway
desc_zh: EMODnet Bathymetry提供的海岸线数据集（全球海岸线及欧洲卫星反演的LAT/MSL/MHW潮位参考线），由Deltares与欧盟DG MARE出品。数据通过WFS发布，也提供Shapefile和GeoJSON，采用CC BY 4.0许可。其特色在于较少见的潮位参考海岸线（最低天文潮位/平均海平面/平均高潮位），适用于海岸带、潮汐与海洋制图研究。
desc_en: An EMODnet Bathymetry coastlines dataset providing a world coastline plus satellite-derived European tidal lines referenced to LAT, MSL, and MHW, produced by Deltares and EU DG MARE. It is served via WFS and also available as Shapefile and GeoJSON under a CC BY 4.0 licence. Its distinctive feature is the rarely available tide-referenced coastlines (Lowest Astronomical Tide / Mean Sea Level / Mean High Water), useful for coastal, tidal, and marine mapping studies.

name: 省级 1:100 万土壤类型图 (2018) — 西藏/江苏/宁夏/新疆等
provider: 国家土壤科学数据中心 (南京土壤所)

desc_zh: 分省1:100万土壤类型图（2018年版），由国家土壤科学数据中心（南京土壤所）发布，按省份以矢量形式提供，涵盖西藏、江苏、宁夏、新疆等多个省区。数据以Shapefile格式提供，需注册获取，版权归geodata.cn所有（无明确开放许可）。适用于省级土壤类型分布与土地资源研究。
desc_en: Provincial 1:1,000,000 soil-type maps (2018 edition) published by the National Soil Science Data Center (Institute of Soil Science, Nanjing), provided as per-province vectors covering regions such as Tibet, Jiangsu, Ningxia, and Xinjiang. The data is supplied in Shapefile format, requires registration, and is copyrighted to geodata.cn with no explicit open licence. It suits provincial-scale soil-type distribution and land-resource research.

name: 1:1,000,000 Soil Map of China (Chinese Soil Taxonomy / CST reference)
provider: ISSAS Nanjing — Soil Science Database (CSDB), CAS
access: CSDB soil sub-center portal (WebGIS query + dataset request)

desc_zh: 中国1:100万土壤图（中国土壤系统分类CST参照版），由中科院南京土壤研究所土壤科学数据库（CSDB）发布，覆盖中国全境。该数据作为发生分类与系统分类之间的参照基准衔接版本，提供多边形Shapefile（按需）及WebGIS WMS查询服务，可在CSDB土壤分中心门户注册请求获取，供非商业科研免费使用。
desc_en: The 1:1,000,000 Soil Map of China using the Chinese Soil Taxonomy (CST) reference, published by the Soil Science Database (CSDB) of the Institute of Soil Science, CAS (Nanjing), covering all of China. It serves as a reference-benchmark linkage between the Genetic Soil Classification of China and Soil Taxonomy, available as polygon Shapefiles on request plus WebGIS WMS query. It is free for non-commercial scientific use via the CSDB soil sub-center portal with registration.

name: BGS OneGeology Bedrock (UK 1:625k) + offshore 1:1M
notes: Reference implementation for OneGeology; uses CGI vocabulary URIs. Several other national surveys mirror this pattern.
verify_notes: World Mineral Statistics, UK Onshore Bedrock Geology WFS | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国地质调查局（BGS）的OneGeology基岩地质数据，包括英国1:62.5万陆地基岩图及1:100万海域图。数据通过WFS 2.0、GeoSciML 4.1及OGC API Features发布，采用带署名的开放政府许可（OGL）。作为OneGeology的参考实现，使用CGI词汇URI，被多家国家地质调查机构效仿，适用于地质制图与跨国地质数据互操作。
desc_en: The British Geological Survey's OneGeology bedrock geology, including UK onshore bedrock at 1:625,000 and offshore at 1:1,000,000. It is served via WFS 2.0, GeoSciML 4.1, and OGC API Features under the Open Government Licence with attribution. As a reference implementation for OneGeology using CGI vocabulary URIs, it is mirrored in pattern by several national surveys and supports geological mapping and cross-national geodata interoperability.

theme_raw: soil typological & geographical units | SGDBE polygon geometry + SMU/STU attributes

desc_zh: 欧洲土壤数据库v2（SGDBE），由欧盟JRC的ESDAC发布，覆盖欧洲及欧亚地区，是一份1:100万比例尺的矢量土壤图（2004年版）。数据以Shapefile加属性表提供，约40MB，需注册认证后下载，遵循ESDAC使用条款。广泛用于欧洲土壤制图、土地评价与农业环境研究。
desc_en: The European Soil Database v2 (SGDBE) from the JRC's ESDAC, covering Europe and Eurasia as a 1:1,000,000 vector soil map (2004 edition). It is provided as Shapefile plus attribute tables, about 40 MB in size, and requires registration/authentication to download under ESDAC terms. It is widely used for European soil mapping, land evaluation, and agri-environmental research.

name: FAO Digital Soil Map of the World

desc_zh: 联合国粮农组织（FAO）的世界数字土壤图，托管于FAO GeoNetwork，全球覆盖，通过OGC标准服务（WFS、WMS）及Shapefile提供。数据采用CC BY-IGO 3.0许可，是经典的全球土壤参考数据集，常与HWSD（协调世界土壤数据库）配合使用，适用于全球尺度土壤、农业与环境建模。
desc_en: The FAO Digital Soil Map of the World, hosted on the FAO GeoNetwork with global coverage and delivered through OGC services (WFS, WMS) and Shapefile. Released under CC BY-IGO 3.0, it is a classic global soil reference dataset often paired with the Harmonized World Soil Database (HWSD), and it supports global-scale soil, agriculture, and environmental modeling.

name: Geological Survey of Canada — Generalised Geological Map of Canada

desc_zh: 加拿大地质调查局（GSC）的加拿大综合地质图，由加拿大自然资源部出品，覆盖加拿大全境，包含1:500万、1:100万等多个比例尺的编图成果。数据提供Shapefile、GeoTIFF及WMS服务，遵循加拿大开放政府许可，是OneGeology加拿大节点。适用于全国尺度地质制图与区域地质研究。
desc_en: The Generalised Geological Map of Canada from the Geological Survey of Canada (Natural Resources Canada), covering all of Canada with compilations at multiple scales (1:5M, 1:1M). It is available as Shapefile download, GeoTIFF, and WMS under the Open Government Licence – Canada, and serves as the OneGeology node for Canada. It suits national-scale geological mapping and regional geology research.

name: GeoMAP (v.2022-08) continent-wide detailed geological dataset of Antarctica

desc_zh: GeoMAP（v.2022-08）是南极洲大陆尺度的详细地质数据集，由SCAR GeoMAP行动组制作、通过PANGAEA发布，比例尺为1:25万，包含99,080个矢量多边形要素。数据提供ArcGIS地理数据库、QGIS GeoPackage及KMZ等矢量格式，可经DOI落地页开放下载，采用CC BY 4.0许可。是南极地质研究的权威基础数据集。
desc_en: GeoMAP (v.2022-08) is a continent-wide detailed geological dataset of Antarctica produced by the SCAR GeoMAP Action Group and published via PANGAEA at 1:250,000 scale, comprising 99,080 vector polygon features. It is provided in vector formats including ArcGIS file geodatabase, QGIS GeoPackage, and KMZ, openly downloadable from its DOI landing page under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It is an authoritative foundational dataset for Antarctic geological research.

name: NGU Bedrock Map of Norway N250
notes: OneGeology Norway; includes Quaternary surficial datasets.
verify_notes: NGU datasets path 404; site reorganized | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 挪威地质调查局（NGU）发布的全国基岩地质图（N250 系列），覆盖挪威全境，以矢量多边形表达岩性与地质单元，并配套第四纪松散沉积物等地表地质数据集。数据通过 WMS/WFS 在线服务及 SHP、GeoPackage 格式下载提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可自由使用并署名。作为 OneGeology 挪威节点的核心产品，适用于区域地质制图、资源勘查、工程地质与环境评估等用途。
desc_en: Published by the Geological Survey of Norway (NGU), this is the national bedrock geological map of Norway at the N250 scale, representing lithological and geological units as vector polygons, with accompanying Quaternary surficial deposit datasets. It is distributed through WMS/WFS web services and as SHP and GeoPackage downloads under a CC BY 4.0 licence. As the OneGeology Norway contribution, it supports regional geological mapping, resource exploration, engineering geology and environmental assessment across mainland Norway.

name: Rock Glacier Inventories (RoGIs) in 12 areas worldwide
theme_canonical: Geology, soil & geomorphology | Physical geography (natural earth)
notes: Multi-operator consensus inventory with InSAR moving areas and geomorphological outlines
splink_merged_from: Rock Glacier Inventories (RoGI) in 12 areas worldwide
verify_notes: DOI redirects to Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集汇编了全球 12 个研究区、横跨 5 大洲 10 个国家的岩石冰川清单（RoGIs），以 GeoPackage 矢量格式发布。它通过多操作员共识方法编制，结合 InSAR 探测的运动区与地貌学勾绘的轮廓，刻画山地多年冻土环境中的岩石冰川分布与活动性。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放获取，并与 ESSD 论文（essd-17-4125-2025）关联，适用于多年冻土研究、冰冻圈监测与方法标准化对比。
desc_en: This dataset compiles Rock Glacier Inventories (RoGIs) across 12 study areas spanning 10 countries on 5 continents, distributed as GeoPackage vector files. Built through a multi-operator consensus approach, it combines InSAR-detected moving areas with geomorphological outlines to characterise rock glacier distribution and activity in mountain permafrost environments. Released openly under CC-BY-4.0 and linked to an ESSD paper (essd-17-4125-2025), it supports permafrost research, cryosphere monitoring and standardised inventory comparison.

name: USGS State Geologic Map Compilation (SGMC) WFS
license_now: US Public Domain (Fees: none, Access Constraints: none)
notes: Harmonized state geologic maps; vector polygons of lithologic units.

desc_zh: 美国地质调查局（USGS）州地质图汇编（SGMC）的 WFS 服务，覆盖美国本土，将各州地质图协调整合为统一的岩性单元矢量多边形。数据通过开放的 WFS 接口以 GML、GeoJSON 等格式提供，属于美国公共领域、无使用费用和访问限制。该产品为全国尺度地质制图、岩性分析、资源与灾害评估提供了一致的基础地质底图。
desc_en: This is the Web Feature Service for the USGS State Geologic Map Compilation (SGMC), covering the conterminous United States by harmonising individual state geological maps into consistent vector polygons of lithologic units. It is served via an open WFS endpoint in GML and GeoJSON formats, in the US public domain with no fees or access constraints. The dataset provides a uniform base geology layer for national-scale geological mapping, lithological analysis, and resource and hazard assessment.

name: 中国 1:400万数字地貌数据集 / 1:4M Digital Geomorphology of China

desc_zh: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布的中国 1:400 万数字地貌数据集，以 shapefile 矢量格式覆盖中国全境。它是 1:100 万精细地貌数据集的较粗尺度对应产品，便于在全国尺度上概览地貌类型与空间格局。数据需注册下载，通常采用 CC-BY 类许可，适用于宏观地貌区划、教学制图、生态与环境背景分析等用途。
desc_en: Released by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), this is a 1:4,000,000 digital geomorphology dataset of China in shapefile vector format covering the entire country. It serves as the coarser-scale counterpart to the 1:1M geomorphology dataset, offering a convenient national overview of landform types and spatial patterns. Access requires registration, typically under a CC-BY-style licence, and it suits macro-scale geomorphological zoning, thematic cartography and ecological or environmental context analysis.

desc_zh: 该数据集由青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC Poles）发布，提供 2019 年"一带一路"关键节点区域的土壤类型与属性数据。数据以面状 shapefile 矢量加属性表的形式组织，刻画相关区域的土壤类型分布及其理化属性。需注册获取，限学术用途，适用于土壤资源评估、农业与生态规划，以及"一带一路"沿线区域的环境研究。
desc_en: Published by the TPDC Poles platform, this dataset provides soil type and attribute data for key node regions along the Belt and Road Initiative for 2019. It is organised as polygon shapefile vectors with an accompanying attribute table, characterising soil type distribution and physico-chemical properties across these regions. Access requires registration and is restricted to academic use, supporting soil resource assessment, agricultural and ecological planning, and environmental research along the BRI corridor.

name: Allen Coral Atlas - Global Reef Extent & Geomorphic/Benthic Maps
provider: Allen Coral Atlas (ASU, UQ, Planet, NGS)

desc_zh: Allen 珊瑚地图集（由亚利桑那州立大学、昆士兰大学、Planet 与国家地理等合作）提供全球热带浅海珊瑚礁范围及地貌/底栖生境矢量地图。数据按珊瑚礁省（reef province）分块，以 GeoJSON、shapefile 多边形格式提供，需注册下载，适用于矢量空间分析；商业用途需另行获得许可。该产品支持珊瑚礁保护、海洋空间规划与生境制图。
desc_en: The Allen Coral Atlas (a collaboration of ASU, the University of Queensland, Planet and National Geographic) provides global maps of shallow tropical coral reef extent and geomorphic/benthic habitats as vector layers. Data are tiled by reef province and offered as GeoJSON and shapefile polygons, with registration required for download and licensing needed for commercial use. The product supports reef conservation, marine spatial planning and habitat mapping across the world's shallow tropical reefs.

name: Allen Coral Atlas - Western Micronesia benthic & geomorphic maps
notes: 12 geomorphic + 6 benthic classes
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Allen 珊瑚地图集中西密克罗尼西亚区域的底栖与地貌生境地图子集，托管于 Zenodo。数据以 Shapefile 矢量格式提供，包含 12 个地貌类与 6 个底栖类，刻画该区域浅海珊瑚礁的生境结构。采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放获取，适用于区域珊瑚礁制图、生境分类与海洋保护研究。
desc_en: This is the Western Micronesia subset of the Allen Coral Atlas benthic and geomorphic habitat maps, hosted on Zenodo. Provided as Shapefile vectors, it includes 12 geomorphic classes and 6 benthic classes characterising the shallow reef habitat structure of the region. Released openly under CC-BY-4.0, it supports regional reef mapping, habitat classification and marine conservation research.

name: Allen Coral Atlas – Geomorphic Zonation & Benthic Habitat v2
provider: Arizona State University Center for Global Discovery & Conservation Science / Planet / NUS / UQ
license_now: not stated on homepage (see Data Attribution / Resources)

desc_zh: Allen 珊瑚地图集第 2 版地貌分带与底栖生境产品，由亚利桑那州立大学全球发现与保护科学中心联合 Planet、新加坡国立大学与昆士兰大学制作，覆盖全球热带浅海珊瑚礁。数据按珊瑚礁省以 GeoJSON 格式提供，需注册下载，同时在 Google Earth Engine 目录中以 ACA/reef_habitat/v2_0 提供。许可条款见数据归属页面，适用于珊瑚礁监测、保护规划与生境分析。
desc_en: This is version 2 of the Allen Coral Atlas geomorphic zonation and benthic habitat product, produced by ASU's Center for Global Discovery and Conservation Science with Planet, NUS and the University of Queensland, covering global shallow tropical reefs. Data are provided as GeoJSON tiled by reef province with registration required, and are also available in the Google Earth Engine catalogue as ACA/reef_habitat/v2_0. Licensing is detailed on the data attribution pages, and it supports reef monitoring, conservation planning and habitat analysis.

name: Antarctic continental shelf break (shapefile)
provider: PANGAEA / Scott Polar Research Institute, U. Cambridge
theme_raw: Polar / Marine geology — shelf break line
coverage: Circum-Antarctic shelf break, digitised at 1:300,000 from IBCSO v1.0
verify_notes: Antarctic continental shelf break | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由剑桥大学斯科特极地研究所制作、托管于 PANGAEA 的环南极陆架坡折线数据集。该线状要素以 1:300,000 比例尺从 IBCSO v1.0 海底地形数据数字化而成，刻画南极大陆架与陆坡之间的边界。数据为 ESRI Shapefile 格式、约 322 KB，采用 CC-BY-3.0 许可开放下载，适用于南大洋地貌、海洋地质与海底制图研究。
desc_en: Hosted on PANGAEA and produced by the Scott Polar Research Institute, University of Cambridge, this dataset delineates the circum-Antarctic continental shelf break. The line feature was digitised at 1:300,000 scale from the IBCSO v1.0 bathymetry, marking the boundary between the Antarctic shelf and slope. Distributed as an ESRI Shapefile of about 322 KB under a CC-BY-3.0 licence, it supports Southern Ocean geomorphology, marine geology and seafloor mapping research.

name: BGR Geological Map of Germany 1:1,000,000 (GK1000)
notes: OneGeology DE; harmonised with IGME 5000.
verify_notes: BGR returned 400 to WebFetch UA; URL pattern still in use | lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: 德国联邦地球科学与自然资源研究所（BGR）发布的德国 1:100 万地质图（GK1000），覆盖德国全境，以矢量形式表达地质单元。数据通过 SHP 和 WMS 提供，按 BGR 使用条款开放获取。它是 OneGeology 德国节点产品，并与泛欧 IGME 5000 地质图相协调，适用于全国尺度地质概览、跨境地质对比与区域规划。
desc_en: Published by the Federal Institute for Geosciences and Natural Resources (BGR), this is the Geological Map of Germany at 1:1,000,000 (GK1000), covering the whole of Germany with geological units in vector form. It is provided as SHP and WMS under BGR's open terms. As the OneGeology Germany contribution, harmonised with the pan-European IGME 5000 map, it supports national-scale geological overviews, cross-border correlation and regional planning.

name: BGR INSPIRE Geological Map of Germany 1:250,000 (GÜK250) WFS
notes: INSPIRE-compliant geology theme: base/overlay layers, structures, geomorphic features, quartz veins.
verify_notes: Root path returns 404; specific INSPIRE service endpoints exist under /services.bgr.de subpaths | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: BGR 提供的德国 1:25 万地质图（GÜK250）INSPIRE 下载服务，覆盖德国全境，通过 WFS 以 INSPIRE GML 模型发布，包含地质单元（GeologicUnit）、地质构造（GeologicStructure）和自然地貌要素（NaturalGeomorphologicFeature）等图层。数据符合 INSPIRE 地质主题规范，按 BGR 条款开放，适用于符合欧盟空间数据基础设施要求的地质制图、构造与地貌分析。
desc_en: This is BGR's INSPIRE Download Service for the Geological Map of Germany at 1:250,000 (GÜK250), covering all of Germany and served via WFS using the INSPIRE GML data model, with layers including GeologicUnit, GeologicStructure and NaturalGeomorphologicFeature. Compliant with the INSPIRE geology theme and open under BGR terms, it supports geological mapping, structural and geomorphological analysis aligned with EU spatial data infrastructure requirements.

name: BGS Bedrock and Superficial Geology 1:625k (OGC WFS)
license_now: BGS/NERC - commercial use allowed; copyright retained
notes: 5 feature types: Bedrock Lithology/Lithostratigraphy/Age, Superficial Lithology, Seabed Sediments 1:1M; GeoSciML 4.1 / CGI vocab.
verify_notes: 6 feature types incl. 625k bedrock + 1M seabed | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国地质调查局（BGS）1:62.5 万基岩与表层地质 OGC WFS 服务，覆盖英国及其大陆架。服务提供 5 类要素，包括基岩岩性、岩石地层、年代、表层岩性以及 1:100 万海底沉积物，采用 GeoSciML 4.1 与 CGI 词表标准。数据通过 WFS 2.0 以 GeoJSON、Shapefile、KML、GML 等格式开放，BGS/NERC 保留版权但允许商业使用，适用于地质制图与岩性分析。
desc_en: This is the British Geological Survey (BGS) Bedrock and Superficial Geology OGC WFS at 1:625,000, covering the United Kingdom and its continental shelf. It exposes five feature types, including bedrock lithology, lithostratigraphy and age, superficial lithology, and 1:1M seabed sediments, using the GeoSciML 4.1 and CGI vocabularies. Served via WFS 2.0 in GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML and GML, with BGS/NERC retaining copyright while permitting commercial use, it supports geological mapping and lithological analysis.

name: BGS Bedrock Geology OneGeology Download Service (WFS 2.0)

desc_zh: 英国地质调查局（BGS）面向 OneGeology 的基岩地质下载服务，覆盖英国，通过 WFS 2.0 以 GeoSciML 4.1 模型并采用 CGI URI 词表提供数据，符合 OneGeology 标准。数据受 NERC 版权约束。该服务适用于国际地质数据协调、跨节点地质对比与基于标准的基岩地质制图。
desc_en: This is the BGS Bedrock Geology OneGeology Download Service, covering the United Kingdom and delivered via WFS 2.0 using the GeoSciML 4.1 model with CGI URI vocabularies, conformant to OneGeology standards. The data are subject to NERC copyright. The service supports international geological data harmonisation, cross-node correlation and standards-based bedrock geology mapping.

name: BGS Geology 625k (DiGMapGB-625)
formats_now: Shapefile, GeoPackage, WMS, WFS, OGC API Features, RDF

verify_notes: OGCAPI-Features now listed | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国地质调查局的 BGS Geology 625k（DiGMapGB-625）数据集，以 1:62.5 万比例尺覆盖大不列颠及北爱尔兰，提供数字化基岩与表层地质单元。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 及 OGC WMS/WFS 形式提供，采用开放政府许可（OGL）免费开放，属于 BGS OpenGeoscience 计划，适用于区域地质制图、教学、规划与环境评估。
desc_en: This is the BGS Geology 625k (DiGMapGB-625) dataset, covering Great Britain and Northern Ireland at 1:625,000 scale with digital bedrock and superficial geological units. Available as Shapefile, GeoPackage and OGC WMS/WFS, it is released free under the Open Government Licence as part of BGS OpenGeoscience, supporting regional geological mapping, education, planning and environmental assessment.

name: BRGM Geological Map of France 1:1,000,000

desc_en: This is the Geological Map of France at 1:1,000,000 from BRGM (the French Geological Survey), covering metropolitan France and the overseas departments (DOM), delivered through the InfoTerre portal, WMS/WFS services and SHP downloads. It is the OneGeology France contribution, with the portal also offering products at multiple scales. Use is subject to the site's terms of use, supporting national geological overviews, cross-border correlation and resource and environmental research.

desc_zh: BRGM GeoServices 提供的法国 1:100 万地质图 OGC 网络服务，覆盖法国本土及海外地区，通过 WMS 和 WFS（GML）发布，并可经 InfoTerre 获取 SHP。作为 OneGeology 法国节点，还提供 1:5 万、1:25 万、1:100 万等多种比例尺。数据采用法国开放许可（Licence Ouverte），适用于在线地质制图、空间分析与多尺度地质研究。
desc_en: This is the BRGM GeoServices OGC web service for the Geological Map of France at 1:1,000,000, covering metropolitan and overseas France, published via WMS and WFS (GML), with SHP available through InfoTerre. As the OneGeology France node, it also offers multiple scales including 1:50k, 1:250k and 1:1M. Released under the French Open Licence (Licence Ouverte), it supports online geological mapping, spatial analysis and multi-scale geological research.

name: China Geological Survey — 1:2.5M Geological Map of China (OneGeology CN)

desc_en: Published by the China Geological Survey (CGS), this is the 1:2,500,000 Geological Map of China, serving as the OneGeology China national tile available publicly via WMS. The underlying vector (shp) data are not openly redistributed, but the WMS is publicly accessible. Copyright is held by CGS with no explicit reuse licence stated. The product supports national-scale geological overviews, international data harmonisation and cross-border correlation.

name: China Soil Information Grids / SoilGrids-China vector tessellation
provider: Liu F., Zhang G.L. et al., ISSAS Nanjing
license: Open on request; some layers CC-BY
formats: Raster primary; vector polygon legend layers available

desc_zh: 由南京土壤研究所刘峰、张甘霖等编制的中国土壤信息格网（SoilGrids-China），以 90 米分辨率覆盖中国全境。主产品为栅格，并提供可用于制图的矢量多边形图例图层。部分图层采用 CC-BY 许可、按需开放，相关成果发表于《科学通报》（2022）。数据适用于全国尺度土壤属性建模、数字土壤制图与农业、生态及环境研究。
desc_en: Compiled by Liu F., Zhang G.L. and colleagues at the Institute of Soil Science (ISSAS) in Nanjing, this is the National Soil Information Grids of China at 90 m resolution covering the entire country. The primary product is raster, with companion vector polygon legend layers useful for cartography. Some layers are CC-BY and open on request, with results published in Science Bulletin (2022). It supports national-scale soil property modelling, digital soil mapping and agricultural, ecological and environmental research.

name: Database of Ice-Rich Yedoma Permafrost (IRYP), link to ESRI shapefiles
coverage: Northern Hemisphere yedoma regions (Russia, Alaska, Yukon)
formats: ESRI Shapefiles (polygons + points): yedoma distribution Russia, Alaska, Yukon; field sites; photos

desc_zh: 由 AWI 制作、托管于 PANGAEA 的富冰 Yedoma 多年冻土数据库（IRYP），覆盖北半球俄罗斯、阿拉斯加和育空等 Yedoma 区域。数据以 ESRI Shapefile 提供，包含多边形与点要素，涵盖各区域 Yedoma 分布、野外站点及照片，压缩包约 24 MB。采用 CC-BY-3.0 许可开放下载，适用于多年冻土、碳储量与北极环境变化研究。
desc_en: Produced by AWI and hosted on PANGAEA, this is the Database of Ice-Rich Yedoma Permafrost (IRYP), covering Northern Hemisphere yedoma regions in Russia, Alaska and Yukon. It is provided as ESRI Shapefiles with polygons and points, including yedoma distribution, field sites and photos, in a zip of about 24 MB. Released openly under CC-BY-3.0, it supports research on permafrost, carbon stocks and Arctic environmental change.

name: EGDI 1:1M Pan-European Surface Geology (OGC service)
provider: EuroGeoSurveys / EGDI (hosted by Geological Survey of Slovenia)

desc_zh: 欧洲地质数据基础设施（EGDI）的 1:100 万泛欧地表地质 OGC 服务，由 EuroGeoSurveys 主导、斯洛文尼亚地质调查局托管，覆盖欧洲大陆。它汇集各国符合 INSPIRE 的 WFS，以 GeoSciML Portrayal（GSML-P）提供 GeologicUnitView、Age、Lithology 等图层。数据开放、无使用费与访问限制，适用于泛欧尺度地质制图、岩性与年代分析及跨境地质协调。
desc_en: This is the EGDI 1:1M Pan-European Surface Geology OGC service, led by EuroGeoSurveys and hosted by the Geological Survey of Slovenia, covering continental Europe. It harvests INSPIRE-conformant national WFSs and delivers GeoSciML Portrayal (GSML-P) layers such as GeologicUnitView, Age and Lithology. Open with no fees or access constraints, it supports pan-European geological mapping, lithological and age analysis, and cross-border harmonisation.

name: EJP SOIL - INSPIRE Soil download guidance
formats_now: WFS, GML, WCS, JSON (OGC API), SensorThings
verify_notes: GitHub-pages guidance doc, actively maintained; advocates modern OGC API over WFS/GML. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EJP SOIL 联盟提供的 INSPIRE 土壤数据下载指引，面向欧盟范围，汇集各国符合 INSPIRE 的土壤数据服务端点目录。数据可通过 WFS、GML、GeoPackage 等形式获取，具体许可见站点说明。该资源适用于查找和接入欧洲土壤空间数据、跨国土壤数据集成与基于 INSPIRE 的土壤制图工作。
desc_en: Provided by the EJP SOIL consortium, this is guidance for downloading INSPIRE-compliant soil data across the EU, compiling a catalogue of conformant national soil data endpoints. Data can be accessed via WFS, GML and GeoPackage, with licensing detailed on the site. The resource supports discovering and connecting to European soil spatial data, cross-country soil data integration and INSPIRE-based soil mapping.

name: EMBRAPA GeoInfo - Agropecuária e Solos

desc_zh: 巴西农业研究公司（EMBRAPA）GeoInfo 平台的农牧业与土壤地理数据服务，覆盖巴西全国，通过 GeoServer OWS 接口以 WFS 和 Shapefile 形式开放提供。内容涵盖土壤学（pedologia）、农业气候风险区划（ZARC）及各类农牧业地图。数据开放获取，适用于巴西土壤与农业资源研究、农业规划与环境分析。
desc_en: This is the EMBRAPA GeoInfo platform's agricultural and soil geospatial data service, covering all of Brazil and openly provided via a GeoServer OWS interface as WFS and Shapefile. It includes pedology, agroclimatic risk zoning (ZARC) and various agricultural and livestock maps. Openly accessible, it supports Brazilian soil and agricultural resource research, agricultural planning and environmental analysis.

name: EMODnet Geology — Seabed Substrate, Pre-Quaternary & Quaternary Geology, Geomorphology

desc_zh: EMODnet Geology 由 GTK、BGR、ISPRA、GSI 等欧洲地质机构组成的联盟制作，提供覆盖欧洲各海域的海底底质、前第四纪与第四纪地质及海底地貌等数据产品。数据为多尺度（1:10 万至 1:100 万）协调矢量多边形，以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 WFS 形式提供，采用 CC-BY 许可开放，适用于海洋地质、海底制图与海洋空间规划。
desc_en: Produced by the EMODnet Geology consortium of European geological institutions (GTK, BGR, ISPRA, GSI and others), this provides seabed substrate, pre-Quaternary and Quaternary geology and seabed geomorphology products covering Europe's seas. The data are harmonised multi-scale vector polygons (1:100k to 1:1M) offered as Shapefile, GeoPackage and WFS under a CC-BY licence, supporting marine geology, seabed mapping and maritime spatial planning.

name: Erosion rates of the Sobo-Sise yedoma permafrost cliff, Lena Delta (link to shape files)
verify_notes: Sobo-Sise yedoma erosion rates; DOI 10.1594/PANGAEA.918505 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 AWI 制作、托管于 PANGAEA 的数据集，记录西伯利亚北极勒拿河三角洲 Sobo-Sise Yedoma 多年冻土崖的侵蚀速率。数据包含 3 个 GIS shapefile（崖线与侵蚀多边形等），文件约 48.4 kB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放下载。它适用于北极海岸/河岸侵蚀、多年冻土退化与气候变化影响研究。
desc_en: Produced by AWI and hosted on PANGAEA, this dataset documents erosion rates of the Sobo-Sise yedoma permafrost cliff in the Lena River Delta of the Siberian Arctic. It comprises three GIS shapefiles (cliff line and erosion polygons) totalling about 48.4 kB, released openly under CC-BY-4.0. It supports research on Arctic coastal and riverbank erosion, permafrost degradation and climate-change impacts.

name: ESDB Google Earth KMZ files
theme_raw: European Soil Database in KML for GE
verify_notes: 73 attribute maps from ESDB v2 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 欧盟联合研究中心（JRC）欧洲土壤数据中心（ESDAC）提供的 ESDB（欧洲土壤数据库）Google Earth KMZ 文件，覆盖欧洲，以 KMZ/KML 矢量格式开放下载，便于在 Google Earth 中直观浏览欧洲土壤数据库的图层。数据版权归欧洲共同体所有，适用于土壤数据可视化、教学展示与区域土壤背景概览。
desc_en: Provided by the European Soil Data Centre (ESDAC) at the EU Joint Research Centre, these are Google Earth KMZ files of the European Soil Database (ESDB), covering Europe in KMZ/KML vector format for open download. They allow intuitive visualisation of ESDB layers within Google Earth. Copyright is held by the European Communities, and the files suit soil data visualisation, educational display and regional soil overviews.

desc_zh: 由 FAO 与 IIASA 联合制作的协调世界土壤数据库 v1.2（HWSD），是全球性的土壤参考数据集，将各区域土壤数据整合为统一的土壤制图单元（SMU）及链接属性数据库。主分发为栅格加属性库，FAO 目录同时提供 SMU 矢量多边形衍生产品。数据采用 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 许可，可直接下载，广泛用于全球土壤评估、农业与气候建模。
desc_en: Jointly produced by FAO and IIASA, the Harmonized World Soil Database v1.2 (HWSD) is a global soil reference dataset that integrates regional soil data into consistent Soil Mapping Units (SMU) with a linked attribute database. The primary distribution is raster plus attribute database, while the FAO catalogue also hosts SMU polygon vector derivatives. Released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 with direct download, it is widely used for global soil assessment and agricultural and climate modelling.

name: Geo Big Data Open Platform (KIGAM)
provider: Korea Institute of Geoscience and Mineral Resources (KIGAM)
formats: geospatial datasets (Korean-language portal); registration required for some
notes: Non-English (Korean) national geoscience portal, rarely cited outside Korea. Portal: https://data.kigam.re.kr/

desc_zh: 韩国地质资源研究院（KIGAM）的地质大数据开放平台，面向韩国本土提供各类地学空间数据集。门户以韩语为主，部分数据需注册获取，访问方式包含开放与受限两类。该平台是韩国国家级地学数据门户，在韩国以外较少被引用，适用于韩国区域地质、矿产资源与灾害研究。
desc_en: This is the Geo Big Data Open Platform run by the Korea Institute of Geoscience and Mineral Resources (KIGAM), providing a range of geoscientific spatial datasets for the Republic of Korea. The portal is primarily in Korean, with some data requiring registration and a mix of open and restricted access. As a national-level geoscience portal rarely cited outside Korea, it supports regional geology, mineral resource and hazard research.

desc_en: Published by the Geological Survey of Austria (GBA), this is the Geological Map of Austria at 1:500,000, covering the whole of Austria and provided via WMS and WFS services and as SHP. It is licensed under CC BY 4.0 for free use with attribution. As the OneGeology Austria contribution, it supports national-scale geological overviews, cross-border correlation and regional planning and research.

name: Geological map of the southern Red Sea & western Gulf of Aden region
coverage: Southern Red Sea, W. Gulf of Aden
notes: Geological map at 1:3,100,000 scale with shapefiles
verify_notes: Geological map of southern Red Sea & western Gulf of Aden; modified 2024-07-15 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 托管于 Zenodo 的南红海与西亚丁湾区域地质图数据集，以 1:310 万比例尺覆盖该区域，提供 Shapefile 矢量格式。该地质图刻画了红海裂谷南段与亚丁湾西部的地质单元与构造格局。数据采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可开放获取，适用于区域构造地质、裂谷演化与板块边界研究。
desc_en: Hosted on Zenodo, this is a geological map of the southern Red Sea and western Gulf of Aden region at 1:3,100,000 scale, provided as Shapefile vectors. The map depicts geological units and structural patterns of the southern Red Sea rift and western Gulf of Aden. Released openly under CC-BY 4.0, it supports research on regional tectonics, rift evolution and plate boundaries.

name: Geomorphology model input shapefile dataset (ArcGIS Pro)
notes: Three-tier-legend geomorphological mapping inputs, reusable model
verify_notes: Figshare returned 403 to WebFetch; likely UA/bot block | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 托管于 Figshare（阿姆斯特丹大学/应用科学大学）的地貌模型输入 shapefile 数据集，以奥地利福拉尔贝格州为案例区。数据包含三级图例的地貌制图输入及配套的 ArcGIS Pro 符号化文件，构成可复用的地貌建模模板。采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放获取，适用于地貌制图方法、模型构建与教学示范。
desc_en: Hosted on Figshare (University of Amsterdam/Amsterdam University of Applied Sciences), this is a geomorphology model input shapefile dataset with Vorarlberg, Austria as a case study. It includes three-tier-legend geomorphological mapping inputs and accompanying ArcGIS Pro symbology files, forming a reusable modelling template. Released openly under CC-BY-4.0, it supports geomorphological mapping methodology, model building and teaching demonstrations.

name: Geoscience Australia Surface Geology OGC Services
notes: National bedrock + regolith units; AGSO/AuScope WFS uses GeoSciML and MinOccML.
verify_notes: Portal landing page loads; specific OGC service endpoints not enumerated on root | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 澳大利亚地球科学局（Geoscience Australia）的地表地质 OGC 服务，以 1:100 万和 1:250 万比例尺覆盖澳大利亚全国，提供基岩与风化层（regolith）单元。数据通过 WFS、WMS 开放，采用 GeoSciML、EarthResourceML 与 MinOccML 标准，许可为 CC-BY 4.0，适用于全国尺度地质制图、矿产资源与岩性分析。
desc_en: This is Geoscience Australia's Surface Geology OGC services, covering the whole of Australia at 1:1M and 1:2.5M scales with bedrock and regolith units. Served openly via WFS and WMS using the GeoSciML, EarthResourceML and MinOccML standards under a CC-BY 4.0 licence, it supports national-scale geological mapping, mineral resource assessment and lithological analysis.

name: GeoSciML / IGME 5000 — 1:5M International Geological Map of Europe
provider: BGR (Commission for the Geological Map of the World)

desc_zh: IGME 5000——1:500 万欧洲国际地质图，由 BGR（代表世界地质图委员会）协调制作，覆盖欧洲，是泛欧地质单元协调的成果。数据以 SHP 和 WMS 形式提供，WMS 公开开放，并通过 OneGeology Europe 发布。该图适用于大陆尺度地质概览、跨国地质对比与教学制图。
desc_en: This is IGME 5000, the International Geological Map of Europe at 1:5,000,000, coordinated by BGR on behalf of the Commission for the Geological Map of the World, covering Europe as a pan-European harmonisation of geological units. Provided as SHP and open WMS and served via OneGeology Europe, it supports continental-scale geological overviews, transnational correlation and thematic cartography.

name: GIS dataset of glacial geomorphology, southern Baltic Ice Stream Complex, Poland
notes: 5,461 landforms across 8 categories (drumlins, MSGL, eskers, ribbed moraines, etc.)
verify_notes: DOI redirects to Zenodo; dataset open | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 托管于 Zenodo 的波兰中西部南波罗的海冰流复合体冰川地貌 GIS 数据集，覆盖约 65,000 平方公里。数据以 GeoPackage 格式提供，包含 8 个类别共 5,461 个地貌要素（如鼓丘、巨型冰川槽线 MSGL、蛇形丘、肋状冰碛等）。采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可开放获取，并与 ESSD 论文（essd-13-4635-2021）关联，适用于第四纪冰川地貌、冰盖动力学与地貌制图研究。
desc_en: Hosted on Zenodo, this is a GIS dataset of glacial geomorphology for the southern Baltic Ice Stream Complex in central-west Poland, covering about 65,000 km². Provided in GeoPackage format, it contains 5,461 landforms across 8 categories, including drumlins, mega-scale glacial lineations (MSGL), eskers and ribbed moraines. Released openly under CC-BY 4.0 and linked to an ESSD paper (essd-13-4635-2021), it supports Quaternary glacial geomorphology, ice-sheet dynamics and landform mapping research.

name: Global Biophysical Typology of Mangroves v3
provider: Worthington, Walton, zu Ermgassen, Friess, Murray et al. (TNC/UNEP-WCMC consortium)
theme_canonical: Geology, soil & geomorphology | Marine & coastal | Physical geography (natural earth)
notes: Ancillary typology layer aligned to GMW v3.12–3.14; classifies patches as deltaic / estuarine / lagoonal / open coast.
verify_notes: Global Biophysical Typology of Mangroves v3, 11.1GB, 1996-2020 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球红树林生物物理类型 v3 数据集，由 TNC、UNEP-WCMC 等机构的 Worthington、Murray 等学者编制，覆盖全球，包含 3,983 个地貌单元，时段涵盖 1996、2007–2020 年及合成图层。数据以 Shapefile 提供，体量约 11.1 GB，与全球红树林分布图 GMW v3.12–3.14 对齐，将红树林斑块分类为三角洲型、河口型、潟湖型与开放海岸型。采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，适用于红树林生态、海岸地貌与蓝碳研究。
desc_en: This is the Global Biophysical Typology of Mangroves v3, compiled by Worthington, Murray and colleagues across TNC and UNEP-WCMC, covering the world with 3,983 geomorphic units spanning 1996, 2007–2020 and a composite. Provided as Shapefile at about 11.1 GB and aligned to Global Mangrove Watch v3.12–3.14, it classifies mangrove patches as deltaic, estuarine, lagoonal or open coast. Released under CC-BY-4.0, it supports mangrove ecology, coastal geomorphology and blue-carbon research.

name: Global Seafloor Geomorphic Features Map (GSFM / Blue Habitats)
formats_now: PDF, JPG, PNG (spatial data via Access Data section)

verify_notes: Maintained by GRID-Arendal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球海底地貌要素图（GSFM / Blue Habitats），由 Harris 等人（2014）与 GRID-Arendal 制作，覆盖全球海底。数据以压缩 Shapefile 提供，包含 131,192 个多边形，覆盖峡谷、海山、陆架、海沟等 29 类海底地形。页面未明确给出许可，可直接下载，是海洋地貌与海底制图研究中常被引用的基础数据集。
desc_en: This is the Global Seafloor Geomorphic Features Map (GSFM / Blue Habitats), produced by Harris et al. (2014) and GRID-Arendal, covering the global seafloor. Provided as a zipped Shapefile, it contains 131,192 polygons across 29 classes of seafloor terrain including canyons, seamounts, shelves and trenches. No licence is stated on the page and it is available for direct download, serving as a widely cited base dataset in marine geomorphology and seafloor mapping research.

name: Global submarine landform dataset (terrain-knowledge driven)
notes: Global classification of submarine landforms
verify_notes: Redirects to Nature IDP auth; article likely accessible in browser | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一套发表于《Scientific Data》的全球海底地貌矢量数据集，采用地形知识驱动的方法对海底地貌类型进行分类与划界。数据以矢量多边形（Shapefile）形式提供，覆盖全球海域，采用 CC-BY 开放许可。它适用于海洋地质、地貌制图、海底环境分区以及与海洋空间规划相关的研究，为统一描述全球海底地貌格局提供了基础数据。
desc_en: Published in Scientific Data (Nature), this is a global dataset of submarine landforms generated through a terrain-knowledge-driven classification approach. Delivered as vector polygons in shapefile format under a CC-BY licence, it provides worldwide coverage of seafloor geomorphic features. The dataset is well suited to marine geology, geomorphological mapping, seabed habitat zonation and marine spatial planning, offering a consistent framework for characterising global submarine landform patterns.

name: GSI Japan Seamless Digital Geological Map of Japan 1:200,000
notes: OneGeology Japan node; flagship seamless harmonised map.
verify_notes: GSJ Seamless returned 400 to WebFetch; service generally CC BY 4.0 | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 由日本产业技术综合研究所地质调查总合中心（GSJ/AIST）发布的1:20万无缝数字地质图，是日本全境经统一拼接与协调处理的旗舰地质数据集，也是 OneGeology 日本节点。数据提供 SHP、GeoJSON、矢量切片及 WMS/WMTS 等多种访问方式，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它广泛用于区域地质分析、资源勘查、灾害评估与教学，是了解日本基岩地质格局的权威来源。
desc_en: Produced by the Geological Survey of Japan (AIST), this 1:200,000 Seamless Digital Geological Map is a flagship, nationally harmonised geological dataset and serves as the OneGeology Japan node. It is available as SHP, GeoJSON and vector tiles, alongside WMS/WMTS services, under a CC BY 4.0 licence. Widely used for regional geological analysis, resource exploration, hazard assessment and education, it is the authoritative reference for Japan's bedrock geology.

name: GTK Bedrock of Finland 1:200,000
notes: OneGeology FI; bedrock 1:200k and superficial 1:20k–1:1M.
verify_notes: GTK Hakku page reachable; minimal content in fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由芬兰地质调查局（GTK）通过 Hakku 门户发布的芬兰基岩地质数据，主图比例尺为1:20万，并提供从1:2万到1:100万的多尺度地表沉积物图层，是 OneGeology 芬兰节点。数据以 SHP、GeoPackage 下载及 WMS/WFS 服务形式提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，适用于芬兰区域地质研究、矿产勘查与环境规划。
desc_en: Distributed through the Geological Survey of Finland's (GTK) Hakku portal, this dataset covers the bedrock of Finland at 1:200,000, complemented by superficial deposit layers ranging from 1:20,000 to 1:1,000,000, and forms the OneGeology Finland node. It is offered as SHP and GeoPackage downloads plus WMS/WFS services under a CC-BY 4.0 licence, supporting regional geology, mineral exploration and environmental planning across Finland.

desc_zh: FAO/IIASA 协调世界土壤数据库（HWSD）v1.x 的中国部分，其中国图斑源自南京土壤研究所（ISSAS）的1:100万土壤数据。数据为矢量制图单元与30弧秒栅格属性联接，遵循 FAO 开放数据条款，可从 FAO 直接下载。它常用于全球与区域尺度的土壤属性建模、农业评估和环境模拟，中国区数据可追溯至南京土壤所的数字化成果。
desc_en: This is the China component of the FAO/IIASA Harmonized World Soil Database v1.x, whose Chinese polygons derive from the Institute of Soil Science (ISSAS Nanjing) 1:1,000,000 soil mapping. The data combine vector mapping units with a 30 arc-second raster attribute join and are distributed under FAO open-data terms via direct download. Commonly applied in global and regional soil-property modelling, agricultural assessment and environmental simulation, its China sheet traces back to ISSAS digitisation.

name: Harmonized World Soil Database v2.0 (HWSD)
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden to WebFetch; may be reachable in browser | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 由 IIASA 与 FAO 联合发布的协调世界土壤数据库（HWSD）v2.0，是全球范围的权威土壤地理数据库。数据包含栅格图层与矢量制图单元多边形，并配套丰富的土壤属性表，开放获取。它广泛用于农业潜力评估、碳储量与水文建模、气候与生态模拟等需要全球一致土壤信息的研究，是 v1.2 的重要更新版本。
desc_en: Released by IIASA and FAO, the Harmonized World Soil Database v2.0 is an authoritative global soil geographic database. It combines raster layers with vector mapping-unit polygons and an extensive set of soil attribute tables, and is openly available. The dataset underpins agricultural potential assessment, soil carbon and hydrological modelling, and climate and ecological simulation wherever globally consistent soil information is required, representing a major update over version 1.2.

name: ICGC WMS Geoindex
notes: 地质索引 WMS 服务
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由加泰罗尼亚制图与地质研究所（ICGC）提供的地质索引（Geoindex）WMS 服务，用于在线浏览和查询地质相关图幅与索引信息。服务采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，以标准 WMS 接口对外发布，便于集成到 GIS 与 Web 地图应用中。它适合作为获取加泰罗尼亚地区地质制图资源的入口与底图服务。
desc_en: Provided by the Cartographic and Geological Institute of Catalonia (ICGC), this Geoindex WMS service exposes geological map-sheet and index information for online browsing and querying. Delivered through a standard WMS interface under a CC BY 4.0 licence, it integrates readily into GIS and web-mapping applications. It serves as a convenient gateway and base-map service for accessing geological cartographic resources in the Catalonia region.

name: Inventory of landslides triggered by extreme rainfall, Marche-Umbria, Italy (Sept 2022)
notes: 5 shapefiles of landslide polygons + field photos on Figshare
verify_notes: 303 redirect to nature IDP authorize (cookie consent flow); article itself likely live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一份针对2022年9月意大利马尔凯-翁布里亚极端降雨事件触发滑坡的编目数据集，发表于《Scientific Data》。数据以多个 Shapefile 形式记录滑坡多边形，并在 Figshare 上附有野外照片，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。它适用于降雨型滑坡的灾害分析、易发性建模与灾后评估，为极端天气诱发地质灾害研究提供了实测样本。
desc_en: This dataset, published in Scientific Data, inventories landslides triggered by the extreme rainfall event of September 2022 in the Marche-Umbria region of Italy. It comprises several shapefiles of landslide polygons accompanied by field photographs hosted on Figshare, under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. The inventory supports rainfall-induced landslide hazard analysis, susceptibility modelling and post-event assessment, providing observed samples for studying geohazards driven by extreme weather.

name: ISRIC Soil Geographic Databases catalogue
theme_raw: SOTER national and global soil polygon databases

desc_zh: ISRIC 维护的土壤地理数据库目录，汇集了包括 SOTER 系列在内的全球及区域土壤地理数据集。数据通常以 Shapefile 或 GeoPackage 形式提供，开放下载，采用 CC-BY 许可。该目录是查找和获取标准化土壤地理空间数据的重要入口，适用于土壤制图、土地评价、环境与农业建模等多种研究用途。
desc_en: Maintained by ISRIC, this catalogue brings together global and regional soil geographic databases, including the SOTER series. The datasets are typically distributed as shapefiles or GeoPackages under a CC-BY licence with open download access. It is a key entry point for discovering and obtaining standardised soil geospatial data, supporting soil mapping, land evaluation, and environmental and agricultural modelling.

name: Jiangsu / Yangtze Delta Soil Type Vector (1:200k regional)
doi_or_citation: ISSAS internal publications; cited in Yu D.S. et al. papers
notes: Higher-resolution regional polygons referenced in ISSAS papers but not on RESDC.

desc_zh: 由南京土壤研究所（ISSAS）维护的长江三角洲及江苏、安徽地区的较高分辨率土壤类型矢量数据（约1:20万区域尺度）。数据以 Shapefile 形式提供，需按申请方式获取并联系相关研究人员。它在 ISSAS 的相关论文中被引用，适用于区域土壤分类、土地利用与农业环境研究，是比全国尺度数据更精细的区域补充。
desc_en: Maintained by the Institute of Soil Science (ISSAS Nanjing), this is a higher-resolution regional soil-type vector dataset for the Yangtze River Delta and Jiangsu/Anhui provinces at roughly 1:200,000 scale. Provided as shapefiles on a request basis through contact with the researchers, it is referenced in ISSAS publications. It supports regional soil classification, land-use and agro-environmental research, offering finer detail than nationwide soil datasets.

name: LRIS Portal
theme_raw: Land resource, soils, ecosystems vector layers
notes: Niche scientific vector portal
verify_notes: LRIS Portal landing reachable; details not visible in excerpt | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由新西兰 Manaaki Whenua–Landcare Research 运营的 LRIS（土地资源信息系统）门户，提供新西兰的土壤、地质与地貌等科学矢量数据。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 下载及 WFS 服务形式提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它是面向科研的专业矢量数据门户，适用于土地资源评估、土壤与生态研究及环境规划。
desc_en: Operated by Manaaki Whenua – Landcare Research, the LRIS Portal provides scientific vector datasets on soils, geology and landforms for New Zealand. Data are available as shapefiles and GeoPackages for download and via WFS services, under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It is a specialised research-oriented vector portal supporting land-resource assessment, soil and ecological studies, and environmental planning across New Zealand.

name: Natural Science Institute of Iceland (NÍ) Vistgerdir / coastline / glaciers vector layers
provider: Náttúrufræðistofnun Íslands (Iceland Institute of Natural History)
theme_canonical: Geology, soil & geomorphology | Marine & coastal | Physical geography (natural earth)
notes: Icelandic contribution to Arctic SDI.

desc_zh: 由冰岛自然历史研究所（NÍ）发布的矢量数据图层，涵盖生境（Vistgerðir）、海岸线、冰川等自然地理与地质地貌要素，覆盖冰岛全境。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 形式提供，并支持 WMS/WFS 服务，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，是冰岛对北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic SDI）的贡献。适用于生态、冰川与海岸研究及环境管理。
desc_en: Published by the Icelandic Institute of Natural History (NÍ), these vector layers cover habitat (Vistgerðir) mapping, coastline and glaciers, spanning all of Iceland. Provided as shapefiles and GeoPackages with WMS/WFS services under a CC BY 4.0 licence, they form Iceland's contribution to the Arctic Spatial Data Infrastructure. The data support ecological, glaciological and coastal research as well as environmental management.

name: OCTOPUS Database
theme_raw: Quaternary geomorphology, cosmogenic 10Be/26Al, luminescence, radiocarbon, denudation rates
formats: OGC WFS, WMS, vector layers (catchments, sample points)
notes: Underused outside Quaternary geomorphology community; fully OGC-compliant. Portal at https://octopusdata.org
verify_notes: OCTOPUS database, OGC compliant | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OCTOPUS 数据库由澳大利亚伍伦贡大学与 AuScope 维护，汇编了宇宙成因核素等第四纪地貌研究数据，覆盖澳大利亚及印度-太平洋地区，并包含全球性的核素数据汇编。数据通过完全符合 OGC 标准的 WFS/WMS 服务提供集水区、采样点等矢量图层，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它在第四纪地貌与侵蚀速率研究中价值突出。
desc_en: Maintained by the University of Wollongong and AuScope, the OCTOPUS database compiles cosmogenic-isotope and related Quaternary geomorphology data covering Australia and the Indo-Pacific, alongside global compilations. It delivers vector layers such as catchments and sample points through fully OGC-compliant WFS and WMS services under a CC BY 4.0 licence. The resource is especially valuable for Quaternary geomorphology and erosion-rate research, though underused beyond that community.

name: PRoGI v1.0 – Peruvian Rock Glacier Inventory
theme_canonical: Geology, soil & geomorphology | Physical geography (natural earth)
notes: 2,338 rock glaciers, two vector layers (markers + footprint polygons)
verify_notes: DOI redirects to PANGAEA landing page (302) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: PRoGI v1.0 是秘鲁岩川冰川（rock glacier）编目数据集，发表于 ESSD 并存储于 PANGAEA，覆盖秘鲁安第斯山地区。数据集包含 2,338 个岩川冰川，提供标记点与边界多边形两个矢量图层，格式为 GeoPackage，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。它适用于高山冻土、冰冻圈与气候变化研究以及山地地貌制图。
desc_en: PRoGI v1.0 is the Peruvian Rock Glacier Inventory, published in ESSD and archived at PANGAEA, covering the Peruvian Andes. It catalogues 2,338 rock glaciers across two vector layers — point markers and footprint polygons — in GeoPackage format under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. The inventory supports research on mountain permafrost, the cryosphere and climate change, as well as alpine geomorphological mapping.

name: Queensland geology and structural framework GIS - July 2012
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由昆士兰地质调查局发布的昆士兰地质与构造框架 GIS 数据集（2012年7月版），覆盖澳大利亚昆士兰州。数据以 Shapefile 和 MapInfo TAB 格式提供，采用 CC-BY 许可，通过 data.gov.au 开放获取。它适用于区域地质制图、构造分析、矿产勘查与土地资源管理等研究。
desc_en: Released by the Geological Survey of Queensland, this Queensland geology and structural framework GIS dataset (July 2012 edition) covers the state of Queensland, Australia. It is provided in shapefile and MapInfo TAB formats under a CC-BY licence and is openly accessible via data.gov.au. The dataset supports regional geological mapping, structural analysis, mineral exploration and land-resource management.

name: RER2023: landslide inventory of the May 2023 Emilia-Romagna event
notes: Polygon attrs: type, geology, GLI, NFS%, reclassified type
verify_notes: RER2023 landslide inventory, ~81000 polygons | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: RER2023 是2023年5月意大利艾米利亚-罗马涅地区滑坡事件的编目数据集，存储于 Zenodo。数据包含约81,000个滑坡多边形（ESRI Shapefile），属性涵盖滑坡类型、地质背景、GLI 指标、林地占比及重分类类型，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放获取。它适用于大规模降雨型滑坡灾害分析、易发性建模与灾后评估。
desc_en: RER2023 is an inventory of landslides triggered by the May 2023 Emilia-Romagna event in Italy, archived on Zenodo. It contains roughly 81,000 landslide polygons in ESRI shapefile format, with attributes including landslide type, geology, a GLI index, forest-cover percentage and reclassified type, under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. The dataset supports large-scale rainfall-induced landslide hazard analysis, susceptibility modelling and post-event assessment.

name: RLBJ – Inventory of shallow landslides, July 2023 Beijing
notes: 15,383 landslide records distributed via Figshare
verify_notes: Redirects to Nature SSO authorize endpoint | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: RLBJ 是2023年7月北京浅层滑坡的编目数据集，发表于《Scientific Data》并通过 Figshare 分发，覆盖中国北京地区。数据集包含15,383条滑坡记录，提供点与多边形两类 Shapefile，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。它适用于强降雨触发的浅层滑坡灾害研究、易发性评估与城市周边地区防灾减灾分析。
desc_en: RLBJ is an inventory of shallow landslides from the July 2023 Beijing event, published in Scientific Data and distributed via Figshare, covering the Beijing area of China. It comprises 15,383 landslide records provided as point and polygon shapefiles under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. The dataset supports research on rainfall-triggered shallow landslides, susceptibility assessment and disaster-risk analysis in and around urban regions.

name: SGU Bedrock Geology of Sweden
notes: OneGeology SE; both bedrock and Quaternary vector layers.
verify_notes: SGU map viewer hub live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由瑞典地质调查局（SGU）提供的瑞典基岩地质数据，同时包含基岩与第四纪矢量图层，是 OneGeology 瑞典节点。数据以 SHP、GeoPackage 下载及 WMS/WFS 服务形式提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。它适用于区域地质研究、矿产与地下水勘查、工程地质与环境规划，是了解瑞典地质格局的权威数据来源。
desc_en: Provided by the Geological Survey of Sweden (SGU), this resource delivers bedrock geology together with Quaternary vector layers for Sweden and serves as the OneGeology Sweden node. Data are available as SHP and GeoPackage downloads plus WMS/WFS services under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. It supports regional geology, mineral and groundwater exploration, engineering geology and environmental planning, and is an authoritative source on Sweden's geology.

name: SGU Bedrock Map of Sweden 1:1,000,000
notes: OneGeology Sweden node; multiple scales (1:50k, 1:250k, 1:1M).
verify_notes: SGU bedrock viewer subpath 404 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 瑞典地质调查局（SGU）的瑞典基岩地质图，主比例尺为1:100万，并提供1:5万、1:25万等多种尺度，是 OneGeology 瑞典节点。数据以 WMS、WFS、SHP 及 GeoPackage 形式提供，采用 CC0/CC BY 许可。它适用于不同详尽程度的区域地质制图、资源勘查与教学，是瑞典基岩地质的官方权威数据。
desc_en: The Geological Survey of Sweden's (SGU) Bedrock Map of Sweden is published at 1:1,000,000 alongside finer scales such as 1:50,000 and 1:250,000, and forms the OneGeology Sweden node. It is available via WMS and WFS services and as SHP and GeoPackage downloads under CC0/CC BY terms. The dataset supports regional geological mapping at varying levels of detail, resource exploration and education, as Sweden's official bedrock geology reference.

name: Soil Data Access (SDA) web services
verify_notes: USDA-NRCS Soil Data Access | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由美国农业部自然资源保护局（USDA NRCS）提供的土壤数据访问（SDA）网络服务，可按需查询并返回美国土壤空间要素。服务通过 SOAP/REST 接口提供类似 WFS 的空间数据访问，作为美国政府数据开放使用。它是动态获取 SSURGO/STATSGO2 土壤属性与图斑的程序化入口，适用于农业、水文与土地管理建模。
desc_en: Provided by USDA NRCS, the Soil Data Access (SDA) web services let users query and retrieve U.S. soil spatial features on demand. The service exposes WFS-like spatial access through SOAP/REST interfaces and is openly available as U.S. Government data. It is the programmatic gateway for dynamically pulling SSURGO/STATSGO2 soil attributes and map units, supporting agricultural, hydrological and land-management modelling.

name: SORET-CN: 1:2,500,000 Geomorphology and Lithology Vector Dataset of China
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 521 Unknown status code
notes: Nationwide seamless geomorph + lithology vector layer; surfaced via SciDB search.
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 521 Unknown status code
desc_zh: SORET-CN 是覆盖中国全境的1:250万无缝地貌与岩性矢量数据集，据 ScienceDB 编目发布，以 Shapefile 多边形形式提供，应为 CC-BY 类开放许可（以 ScienceDB 落地页为准）。该数据将地貌与岩性信息整合为一套全国连续的矢量图层，适用于全国尺度的地貌分区、岩性背景分析与地学制图研究。
desc_en: SORET-CN is a nationwide, seamless 1:2,500,000 geomorphology and lithology vector dataset for China, catalogued via ScienceDB and provided as shapefile polygons under an apparently CC-BY-style open licence (confirm on the ScienceDB landing page). It integrates geomorphic and lithological information into a single continuous national vector layer, supporting country-scale geomorphological zonation, lithological context analysis and geoscientific mapping.

name: SSURGO - Soil Survey Geographic Database
access: Open via Web Soil Survey & Geospatial Data Gateway
lychee_status: Network error: HTTP/2 protocol error. Server may not support HTTP/2 properly (error sending request for url (https://www.nrcs.usda.gov/resources/data-and-reports/soil-survey-geographic-database-ssurgo))

notes: Primary US detailed soil polygon dataset
verify_notes: fetch timed out after 60s | lychee:Network error: HTTP/2 protocol error. Server may not support HTTP/2 properly (error sending request for url (https://www.nrcs.usda.gov/resources/data-and-reports/soil-survey-geographic-database-ssurgo))
desc_zh: SSURGO（土壤调查地理数据库）是美国农业部 NRCS 维护的最详细土壤多边形数据集，覆盖美国本土。数据以 Shapefile 配合属性表的形式提供，属于美国政府公共领域数据，可通过 Web Soil Survey 与地理空间数据网关开放获取。它是美国精细尺度土壤制图、农业规划、水文与环境建模的核心数据源。
desc_en: SSURGO, the Soil Survey Geographic Database, is the most detailed soil polygon dataset maintained by USDA NRCS, covering the United States. It is delivered as shapefiles linked to attribute tables, is in the U.S. Government public domain, and is openly accessible through Web Soil Survey and the Geospatial Data Gateway. SSURGO is the core data source for fine-scale U.S. soil mapping, agricultural planning, and hydrological and environmental modelling.

name: STATSGO2 - U.S. General Soil Map
lychee_status: Network error: HTTP/2 protocol error. Server may not support HTTP/2 properly (error sending request for url (https://www.nrcs.usda.gov/resources/data-and-reports/description-of-statsgo2-database))
lychee_text: Network error: HTTP/2 protocol error. Server may not support HTTP/2 properly (error sending request for url (https://www.nrcs.usda.gov/resources/data-and-reports/description-of-statsgo2-database))
