desc_zh: STATSGO2（美国通用土壤图）是 USDA NRCS 提供的较小比例尺、覆盖美国及其属地的概略性土壤地理数据库。数据以 Shapefile 形式提供，属于公共领域，开放获取。相较于精细的 SSURGO，它更适合区域到全国尺度的土壤制图、宏观农业与水文评估及环境综合分析。
desc_en: STATSGO2, the U.S. General Soil Map, is a smaller-scale, generalised soil geographic database from USDA NRCS covering the United States and its territories. It is provided as shapefiles in the public domain with open access. Compared with the detailed SSURGO, it is better suited to regional-to-national soil mapping, broad-scale agricultural and hydrological assessment, and integrated environmental analysis.

name: Surface Geology of Australia (1:1M, 1:2.5M, 1:5M)
notes: Polygon + line; stratigraphy, age, lithology attributes
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden to WebFetch (likely WAF/bot block); dataset itself usually CC BY 4.0 on data.gov.au | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由澳大利亚地球科学局（Geoscience Australia）发布的澳大利亚地表地质数据集，提供1:100万、1:250万和1:500万多种比例尺，覆盖澳大利亚全境。数据包含多边形与线要素，属性涵盖地层、年代与岩性，提供 Shapefile、文件地理数据库、MapInfo 及 WMS 等格式，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，是国家级地质制图的权威数据。
desc_en: Published by Geoscience Australia, the Surface Geology of Australia dataset is available at 1:1,000,000, 1:2,500,000 and 1:5,000,000 scales covering the whole continent. It contains polygon and line features with stratigraphy, age and lithology attributes, distributed as shapefile, file geodatabase, MapInfo and WMS under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It is the authoritative national-scale geological mapping resource for Australia.

name: USGS Geologic Map of Alaska WFS
notes: Vector geologic units of Alaska.
verify_notes: Feature types: akgeol (Alaska Lithology), akfault (Alaska Faults) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由美国地质调查局（USGS）提供的阿拉斯加地质图 WFS 服务，以矢量形式发布阿拉斯加地质单元。数据通过开放的 WFS 接口提供，支持 GML 与 GeoJSON 输出，属于美国公共领域数据。它适用于区域地质分析、资源勘查与 GIS 集成应用，便于以编程方式直接获取阿拉斯加的地质矢量要素。
desc_en: Provided by the U.S. Geological Survey, this WFS service publishes the geologic map units of Alaska as vector features. Delivered through an open WFS interface with GML and GeoJSON output, the data are in the U.S. public domain. The service supports regional geological analysis, resource exploration and GIS integration, enabling programmatic access to Alaska's geologic vector features.

name: USGS Geologic Map of North America (GMNA / DS-424)
formats_now: Shapefile, Geodatabase, GeoTIFF, JPEG, KMZ, PDF
notes: 1:5,000,000 scale; published 2009
verify_notes: GMNA resources page available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: USGS 北美地质图（GMNA / DS-424）是覆盖北美与中美洲（含海底）的1:500万比例尺地质图，于2009年出版，由 USGS 国家地质图数据库（NGMDB）维护。数据以 Shapefile 与文件地理数据库形式直接下载，属于美国公共领域。它适用于大陆尺度的地质综合分析、构造与岩性格局研究及制图教学。
desc_en: The USGS Geologic Map of North America (GMNA / DS-424) is a 1:5,000,000-scale geological map covering North and Central America including the seafloor, published in 2009 and maintained by the USGS National Geologic Map Database (NGMDB). It is available for direct download as shapefiles and a file geodatabase in the U.S. public domain. The map supports continental-scale geological synthesis, tectonic and lithological analysis, and cartographic education.

name: USGS Global Assessment of Undiscovered Mineral Resources — combined GIS
theme_raw: Permissive tracts for Cu, PGE, potash, REE, Ni laterite, Sn/W, etc.
formats_now: GIS files, PDF reports, spatial databases, interactive maps
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: Umbrella for 22 regional deposit-type GIS compilations; less mainstream than MRDS.
verify_notes: USGS Global Mineral Resource Assessment page | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: USGS 全球未发现矿产资源评价的综合 GIS 数据集，是22个区域、按矿床类型编制的 GIS 汇编的总入口，覆盖全球，于2013年完成。数据以文件地理数据库与 Shapefile 形式按评价单元开放下载，属于美国公共领域，包含约225幅允许成矿区（permissive tracts）。它适用于全球矿产潜力评估、勘查靶区圈定与资源政策研究。
desc_en: This USGS combined GIS dataset underpins the Global Assessment of Undiscovered Mineral Resources, acting as an umbrella for 22 regional deposit-type GIS compilations with global coverage, completed in 2013. It is openly downloadable per assessment as file geodatabases and shapefiles in the U.S. public domain, including around 225 permissive-tract plates. The data support global mineral-potential assessment, exploration targeting and resource-policy research.

name: USGS MRData WFS (mineral resources, geologic provinces)
license_now: USGS standard (US public domain implied); no explicit license on the listing page
notes: Includes Geologic Provinces of the World (2000 Petroleum Assessment), volcano DBs, etc.
verify_notes: Active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 USGS 矿产资源计划提供的 MRData WFS 服务，以 WFS 1.1.0 接口发布矿产资源、地质省等矢量数据，覆盖全球与美国，含世界地质省（2000年石油评价）、火山数据库等图层。数据按 USGS 标准默认作为美国公共领域使用（列表页未明示许可）。它适用于矿产与油气资源研究、地质省划分及 GIS 集成分析。
desc_en: Provided by the USGS Mineral Resources Program, the MRData WFS service publishes mineral-resource and geologic-province vector data through a WFS 1.1.0 interface, with global and U.S. coverage. It includes layers such as the Geologic Provinces of the World (2000 Petroleum Assessment) and volcano databases. The data follow USGS standard terms, implicitly U.S. public domain (no explicit licence on the listing page), and support mineral and petroleum resource research, province delineation and GIS integration.

name: USGS ScienceBase Catalog
access: Web catalog + REST API; per-item WFS endpoints auto-generated
notes: Hosts US/Australia geology shapefiles (item 623a013ed34e915b67cddcfa).
verify_notes: USGS Trusted Digital Repository | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: USGS ScienceBase 目录是美国地质调查局的科学数据管理与发布平台，托管大量美国及全球的地质等矢量数据集。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 及 WFS/WMS 等形式提供，遵循 USGS 用户协议并按条目设定许可，可通过 Web 目录与 REST API 访问，并为条目自动生成 WFS 端点。它是发现和获取 USGS 多领域地理空间数据的综合入口。
desc_en: The USGS ScienceBase Catalog is the U.S. Geological Survey's scientific data-management and publishing platform, hosting numerous U.S. and global geological vector datasets. Data are available as shapefiles, GeoJSON, KML and via WFS/WMS, under the USGS User Agreement with per-item licensing, accessible through a web catalogue and REST API with auto-generated per-item WFS endpoints. It is a comprehensive entry point for discovering and obtaining USGS geospatial data across many domains.

name: USGS Sediment-hosted Zn-Pb (SEDEX & MVT) Deposits of the World
formats_now: Shapefile, KML, WMS, WFS, CSV, DBF
notes: Underused outside economic geology community.
verify_notes: Sediment-hosted Zn-Pb deposits | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 USGS 发布的全球沉积型锌-铅（SEDEX 与 MVT）矿床数据集，源自2009年 USGS 出版物，覆盖全球。数据以 Shapefile、KML 及 WFS 形式开放下载并支持 OGC 服务，作为美国公共领域数据使用。它适用于经济地质、成矿规律分析与全球金属矿产资源研究，在经济地质领域外较少被使用。
desc_en: Published by the USGS from a 2009 publication, this dataset compiles the world's sediment-hosted Zn-Pb (SEDEX and MVT) deposits with global coverage. It is openly available as shapefiles, KML and via WFS/OGC services in the U.S. public domain. The data support economic geology, metallogenic analysis and global metal-resource research, though they remain underused outside the economic geology community.

name: World Karst Aquifer Map (WOKAM)
notes: Lesser-known; first global karst aquifer polygon dataset.
verify_notes: Moved permanently to geoportal.bgr.de | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界岩溶含水层图（WOKAM）由 BGR、IAH 与 KIT 联合编制，是首个全球岩溶含水层多边形数据集，相关成果发表于 Chen 等2017年《Hydrogeology Journal》。数据以 Shapefile 形式直接下载，采用 BGR/IAH 自定义的开放许可。它适用于全球岩溶水文地质、地下水资源与脆弱性评估研究，尽管知名度相对较低。
desc_en: The World Karst Aquifer Map (WOKAM), compiled by BGR, IAH and KIT, is the first global polygon dataset of karst aquifers, with results published by Chen et al. (2017) in the Hydrogeology Journal. It is available as a direct shapefile download under a custom BGR/IAH open licence. The map supports global karst hydrogeology, groundwater-resource and vulnerability assessment research, despite being relatively little known.

name: WoSIS GraphQL API
theme_raw: Spatial GraphQL over WoSIS soil profiles
access: Open GraphQL endpoint; GraphiQL UI at /wosis/graphiql
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: Novel spatial-aware API (2023+); supports bbox/polygon filters returning vector features. Underused outside ISRIC training material.
verify_notes: 405 on GET expected for POST-only GraphQL endpoint; service alive | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: ISRIC 的 WoSIS GraphQL API 是一个具备空间感知能力的新型接口（2023年后推出），支持以边界框或多边形过滤并返回矢量化的土壤剖面要素，可输出 GeoJSON，并提供 GraphiQL 交互界面。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放访问。它适用于程序化获取全球土壤剖面观测数据，服务于土壤制图、建模与数据科学应用。
desc_en: ISRIC's WoSIS GraphQL API is a novel spatial-aware endpoint (introduced from 2023) that supports bounding-box and polygon filters returning vectorised soil-profile features with GeoJSON-capable output, and offers a GraphiQL UI. The data are openly accessible under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. It enables programmatic retrieval of global soil-profile observations for soil mapping, modelling and data-science applications, though it is underused beyond ISRIC training material.

name: WRB Reference Soil Groups map (FAO Soils Portal)
verify_notes: Overview portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 FAO 土壤门户提供的世界土壤资源参考基础（WRB）参比土壤组图，是基于 WRB 分类体系的全球土壤分组数据集。数据以 Shapefile 与 WMS 形式提供，开放访问，使用须遵循 FAO 相关条款。它适用于全球尺度的土壤分类制图、土地评价、生态与农业研究，便于按国际统一标准比较各地土壤类型。
desc_en: Provided through the FAO Soils Portal, the WRB Reference Soil Groups map is a global soil-grouping dataset based on the World Reference Base classification system. It is available as shapefiles and via WMS with open access, subject to FAO terms of use. The map supports global-scale soil classification mapping, land evaluation, and ecological and agricultural research, enabling comparison of soil types worldwide under a consistent international standard.

name: 中国1:10万沙漠(沙地)分布数据集
provider: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 / 国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心
notes: 中国首个 1:10 万沙漠空间数据库，含流动/固定沙地等属性
verify_notes: China 1:100k desert dataset; login required to download; 340.7 MB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国1:10万沙漠（沙地）分布数据集由国家青藏高原/冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心发布，是中国首个1:10万沙漠空间数据库，覆盖中国全境。数据以 Shapefile 形式提供（约340.7 MB），包含流动沙地、固定沙地等类型属性，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放获取。它适用于荒漠化监测、土地退化评估与生态环境研究。
desc_en: This 1:100,000 desert (sandy land) distribution dataset for China, released by the National Tibetan Plateau / Cryosphere and Desert Science Data Center, is China's first 1:100,000 desert spatial database covering the whole country. It is provided as a shapefile (about 340.7 MB) with attributes such as mobile and fixed sandy land, under a CC-BY-4.0 licence with open access. The dataset supports desertification monitoring, land-degradation assessment and eco-environmental research.

name: 全国1:20万数字地质图（公开版）空间数据库
provider: 全国地质资料馆 / 地质科学数据出版中心 (NGAC)
coverage: 全国 1163 幅图，覆盖约 72% 国土
notes: 区域地质调查最详 1:20 万地质图矢量数据库
verify_notes: WebFetch 超时；可能反爬或慢响应 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 全国1:20万数字地质图（公开版）空间数据库由全国地质资料馆与地质科学数据出版中心（NGAC）发布，共1163幅图，覆盖约72%国土，是区域地质调查中最详尽的1:20万地质图矢量数据库。数据以 Shapefile/MapGIS 格式提供，公开版注册后即可下载。它适用于区域地质研究、矿产勘查、工程与环境地质等多种应用。
desc_en: The national 1:200,000 Digital Geological Map (public edition) spatial database, released by the National Geological Archives and the geoscience data publishing centre (NGAC), comprises 1,163 map sheets covering roughly 72% of China's territory and is the most detailed 1:200,000 geological vector database from regional geological surveys. It is provided in shapefile/MapGIS formats, downloadable after registration in the public edition. The database supports regional geology, mineral exploration, and engineering and environmental geology applications.

name: 湟水-洮河中下游土壤侵蚀矢量分区 (Huangshui-Taohe Soil Erosion Zones)
coverage: Yongjing County (Gansu), Minhe County (Qinghai) - upper Yellow River
formats: Shapefile derived from 2 m satellite mapping (raster + vector zones)
notes: Companion vector zoning to the raster erosion-intensity grid
verify_notes: Huangshui-Taohe soil erosion 2013-2017; 52.3 MB; raster not vector - mismatch with vector classification | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 湟水-洮河中下游土壤侵蚀矢量分区数据集由甘肃生态科学数据中心提供，覆盖黄河上游的甘肃永靖县与青海民和县。数据基于2 m 卫星影像制图，以 Shapefile 形式提供侵蚀分区（约52.3 MB），采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，需登录并经审核获取。它是配套侵蚀强度栅格的矢量分区数据，适用于水土流失评估与流域生态治理研究。
desc_en: Provided by the Gansu Ecological Science Data Center, this dataset delineates soil-erosion zones in the middle-lower Huangshui-Taohe basin of the upper Yellow River, covering Yongjing County (Gansu) and Minhe County (Qinghai). Derived from 2 m satellite mapping, it is supplied as shapefile erosion zones (about 52.3 MB) under a CC BY 4.0 licence, accessible after login and review. As the vector companion to a raster erosion-intensity grid, it supports soil-erosion assessment and watershed ecological-management research.

name: 黄土高原分中心数据集 (Loess Plateau Sub-center)
formats: shapefile (gully networks, watershed boundaries, terraces, land use)
notes: Curated vector products on erosion and gully systems.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 黄土高原分中心数据集由国家地球系统科学数据中心黄土高原分中心（中科院地球环境研究所）建设维护，聚焦中国黄土高原地区的地质、土壤与地貌主题。数据以矢量形式提供，涵盖沟壑网络、流域边界、梯田和土地利用等侵蚀与沟道系统相关的精选产品，格式为shapefile。通过目录式平台登录下载，遵循NESSDC数据共享政策，各数据集配有独立的NESSDC DOI，适用于水土流失研究、地貌分析与流域管理。
desc_en: Curated by the Loess Plateau Sub-center of China's National Earth System Science Data Center (IEE-CAS), this collection focuses on the geology, soils, and geomorphology of the Loess Plateau in China. It delivers vector products on erosion and gully systems, including gully networks, watershed boundaries, terraces, and land use, distributed as shapefiles. Data are obtained through catalog-based login download under the NESSDC sharing policy, with per-dataset DOIs. The datasets support soil-erosion research, geomorphological analysis, and watershed management.

name: GEM Global Active Faults Database (GAF-DB)
theme_raw: Earthquake / active faults | Earthquake faults | earthquake faults
notes: Authoritative global active fault traces with kinematics & slip-rate attributes
verify_notes: 仓库活跃 (177★, 48 forks)，最新 release 2019-08；持续维护中。 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GEM全球活动断层数据库（GAF-DB）由GEM基金会发布，是一套权威的全球活动断层迹线数据，收录约13,500条断层。数据附带运动学类型、滑动速率等属性，整合自2002至2021年间的多项研究成果。提供GeoJSON、GeoPackage、KML和Shapefile等多种格式，采用CC-BY-SA 4.0许可开放获取。该数据库是全球地震危险性评估、构造研究和断层活动分析的重要基础参考。
desc_en: The GEM Global Active Faults Database (GAF-DB), released by the GEM Foundation, is an authoritative compilation of roughly 13,500 active fault traces worldwide. Each fault carries attributes such as kinematics and slip rate, drawn from source publications spanning 2002 to 2021. It is openly available under CC-BY-SA 4.0 in multiple formats, including GeoJSON, GeoPackage, KML, and Shapefile. The database is a key reference for global seismic-hazard assessment, tectonic studies, and analysis of fault activity.

name: NIFC WFIGS Interagency Fire Perimeter History
theme_raw: Wildfire perimeters (historic) | wildfire perimeters | historical wildfire perimeters
coverage: United States (USFS, BLM, BIA, FWS, NPS, CalFire, WFIGS)
notes: Authoritative interagency burn-perimeter polygons; current-year layer also available.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub page, JS-rendered | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: NIFC野火协同地理空间信息系统（WFIGS）跨机构火灾边界历史数据集由美国国家跨机构消防中心发布，汇集了美国境内多家机构（USFS、BLM、BIA、FWS、NPS、CalFire等）的历史火灾过火边界多边形。数据为权威的跨机构火场记录，并配有当年图层。提供Shapefile、GeoJSON、File GDB及REST/WFS服务，属公有领域，可通过NIFC开放数据ArcGIS Hub免费获取，广泛用于火灾历史分析与火险研究。
desc_en: Published by the U.S. National Interagency Fire Center (NIFC), this WFIGS Interagency Fire Perimeter History dataset aggregates historical burn-perimeter polygons across U.S. agencies including USFS, BLM, BIA, FWS, NPS, and CalFire. It serves as an authoritative interagency record of fire footprints, with a current-year layer also provided. Available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, File GDB, and REST/WFS services, it is public domain and freely accessible via the NIFC Open Data ArcGIS Hub, widely used for fire-history analysis and wildfire research.

name: Copernicus EMS Rapid Mapping vector products
theme_raw: flood, fire, landslide rapid mapping | floods, fires, earthquakes, storms
notes: Per-event delineation & damage grading vectors; JRC catalogue mirrors archive
verify_notes: Permanent redirect to mapping.emergency.copernicus.eu/activations | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 哥白尼应急管理服务（Copernicus EMS）快速测绘矢量产品由欧盟哥白尼EMS与联合研究中心（JRC）提供，针对全球灾害激活事件生成应急地图。每次激活提供灾情范围勾画与损毁分级矢量数据，格式包括Shapefile、KML和GeoJSON，按事件组织，JRC目录同步存档。数据遵循哥白尼自由再利用政策开放获取，适用于洪水、地震、火灾等突发灾害的快速损失评估与应急响应支持。
desc_en: Copernicus EMS Rapid Mapping vector products, provided by the EU Copernicus EMS and the JRC, generate emergency maps for disaster activations worldwide. Each activation yields delineation and damage-grading vectors organized per event, in formats such as Shapefile, KML, and GeoJSON, with the JRC catalogue mirroring the archive. The data are openly available under the Copernicus free-reuse policy and support rapid loss assessment and emergency response for events including floods, earthquakes, and wildfires.

name: FEMA National Flood Hazard Layer (NFHL)
theme_raw: Flood (1% / 0.2% annual chance floodplains, SFHA) | flood hazard
notes: De-facto national reference floodplain vector layer.
verify_notes: 403 from WebFetch; FEMA may block bot UA; site is otherwise live | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: FEMA国家洪水危险图层（NFHL）由美国联邦应急管理署（FEMA）发布，是覆盖美国已编制数字洪水保险费率图（DFIRM）地区的洪泛区矢量数据，被视为美国洪水风险的事实国家参考图层。数据提供县级/州级Shapefile、KMZ及WMS/REST服务，属美国联邦公有领域，可通过FEMA地图服务中心获取，广泛用于洪水风险管理、保险费率厘定与土地利用规划。
desc_en: The FEMA National Flood Hazard Layer (NFHL), released by the U.S. Federal Emergency Management Agency, provides floodplain vector data for areas of the United States where Digital Flood Insurance Rate Maps (DFIRMs) exist, serving as the de-facto national reference for flood risk. It is distributed as county/state Shapefiles, KMZ, and WMS/REST services, is U.S. federal public domain, and is accessible through the FEMA Map Service Center. It is widely used for flood-risk management, insurance rating, and land-use planning.

name: Multi-temporal landslide inventory Southern Kyrgyzstan (multi-sensor optical 1986–2013)
license_now: CC BY 4.0 (GFZ data services 标注)
notes: Verified vector polygons in standard shapefile.
verify_notes: DOI 解析经 dataservices.gfz.de -> gfz-potsdam.de 两跳 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为吉尔吉斯斯坦南部多时相滑坡编目，由GFZ数据服务发布，基于1986至2013年间多传感器光学遥感影像编制，研究区约2,500平方公里。数据以标准Shapefile多边形形式提供，经过验证，记录了该地区随时间变化的滑坡分布。采用CC BY 4.0许可开放下载，适用于滑坡时序演化分析、滑坡敏感性建模与区域地质灾害研究。
desc_en: This multi-temporal landslide inventory for Southern Kyrgyzstan, published by GFZ Data Services, was compiled from multi-sensor optical imagery spanning 1986 to 2013 over a study area of about 2,500 km². It is provided as verified polygon shapefiles documenting landslide occurrence through time. Released under CC BY 4.0 for open download, it supports analysis of landslide temporal evolution, susceptibility modelling, and regional geohazard research.

name: RER2023 - May 2023 Emilia-Romagna Landslide Inventory
formats: ESRI shapefile (polygons) with rich attribute table
notes: Manually classified; geological unit, GLI, harmonized type attributes
verify_notes: data hosted on Zenodo; v2 update planned end-2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: RER2023是2023年5月意大利艾米利亚-罗马涅大区滑坡编目，发表于ESSD并存档于Zenodo。数据集覆盖超过6,000平方公里，包含80,997个人工分类的滑坡多边形，属性丰富，含地质单元、GLI及统一化的滑坡类型等字段，参考分辨率约0.2米。以ESRI shapefile格式提供，约43.6 MB（RAR压缩包），采用CC BY 4.0许可开放获取，适用于极端降雨触发滑坡的研究与灾害评估。
desc_en: RER2023 is a landslide inventory of the May 2023 event in Emilia-Romagna, Italy, published in ESSD and archived on Zenodo. Covering more than 6,000 km², it contains 80,997 manually classified landslide polygons with a rich attribute table including geological unit, GLI, and harmonized type, at roughly 0.2 m reference resolution. Delivered as an ESRI shapefile (about 43.6 MB RAR archive) under CC BY 4.0, it supports study and assessment of rainfall-triggered landslides.

name: USGS Quaternary Fault and Fold Database of the United States
theme_raw: Earthquake / active faults | Quaternary fault lines
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: Lines/polygons of Quaternary-active faults with attributes (slip rate, age, kinematics).
verify_notes: Quaternary Fault and Fold Database; updated Feb 2026 | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 美国第四纪断层与褶皱数据库由美国地质调查局（USGS）维护，收录美国本土及近海第四纪活动断层。数据以线和多边形形式呈现，附带滑动速率、活动年代、运动学类型等属性。提供Shapefile（约16MB ZIP）和KMZ格式，属USGS公有领域，可直接下载，是美国地震危险性评估与活动构造研究的权威基础数据。
desc_en: The USGS Quaternary Fault and Fold Database of the United States, maintained by the U.S. Geological Survey, catalogues onshore and offshore Quaternary-active faults across the country. Faults are represented as lines and polygons with attributes such as slip rate, age, and kinematics. Available as a Shapefile (about 16 MB ZIP) and KMZ, it is USGS public domain and directly downloadable, serving as an authoritative basis for U.S. seismic-hazard assessment and active-tectonics research.

name: Brazil Disaster Risk Areas
notes: Landslide/flood risk polygons (BATER project).
verify_notes: geobr v2.0.0 docs; 2010 data only | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 巴西灾害风险区数据通过geobr R包提供，源自巴西CEMADEN与IBGE的BATER项目，覆盖巴西全国。数据为滑坡与洪水风险多边形，以GeoPackage/sf格式输出，可经geobr包便捷读取，属开放数据。该数据适用于巴西城市与区域尺度的地质灾害与洪水风险分析、应急规划及人口暴露评估。
desc_en: Brazil Disaster Risk Areas are provided through the geobr R package, sourced from CEMADEN and IBGE via the BATER project, covering the whole of Brazil. The data consist of landslide and flood risk polygons delivered in GeoPackage/sf format and conveniently read through the geobr package as open data. They support geohazard and flood-risk analysis, emergency planning, and population-exposure assessment at urban and regional scales across Brazil.

name: California Geological Survey - Alquist-Priolo Earthquake Fault Zones
formats_now: Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, GeoPackage, FGDB, CSV, ArcGIS REST
access: California Open Data Portal + CGS Information Warehouse
notes: Official regulatory polygons; complements Seismic Hazard Zones layer.
verify_notes: CGS Alquist-Priolo fault hazard zones | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 加州地质调查局（CGS）Alquist-Priolo地震断层带数据由加州保护部发布，覆盖美国加利福尼亚州，是依据Alquist-Priolo法案划定的官方监管多边形，用于限制活动断层迹线上的建设。数据提供Shapefile、GeoJSON及REST/WFS服务，采用CC BY许可，可通过加州开放数据门户与CGS信息库获取，与地震危险区图层互补，广泛用于场地评估与土地利用监管。
desc_en: The California Geological Survey Alquist-Priolo Earthquake Fault Zones, published by the California Department of Conservation (CGS), cover the state of California and consist of official regulatory polygons established under the Alquist-Priolo Act to restrict construction across active fault traces. Available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and REST/WFS services under CC BY, they are accessible via the California Open Data Portal and the CGS Information Warehouse. They complement the Seismic Hazard Zones layer and are widely used for site evaluation and land-use regulation.

name: CDC/ATSDR Social Vulnerability Index (SVI) FeatureService
provider: CDC ATSDR Geospatial Research, Analysis and Services Program (GRASP)
theme_raw: Composite social vulnerability (16 ACS variables), 4 themes
formats: ArcGIS REST FeatureServer, File GDB, CSV
notes: Heavily cited in disaster, COVID and equity research; tract-level polygons exposed via REST.
verify_notes: Active; includes SVI 2022 and historical 2000/2010/2014 layers | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: CDC/ATSDR社会脆弱性指数（SVI）要素服务由美国疾控中心ATSDR地理空间研究、分析与服务计划（GRASP）发布，覆盖美国及其领地。数据以人口普查区（tract）尺度多边形通过ArcGIS REST要素服务发布，同时提供File GDB和CSV。该指数综合反映社区在灾害面前的社会脆弱性，属美国政府公有领域，在灾害、新冠及公平性研究中被广泛引用。
desc_en: The CDC/ATSDR Social Vulnerability Index (SVI) FeatureService, published by the CDC ATSDR Geospatial Research, Analysis and Services Program (GRASP), covers the United States and its territories. The data are tract-level polygons exposed via an ArcGIS REST FeatureServer, with File GDB and CSV also available. The index summarizes communities' social vulnerability to hazards and, as U.S. government public domain, is heavily cited in disaster, COVID, and equity research.

name: Country-level Fire Perimeter Datasets (FIREDpy, 2001-2021)
notes: FIREDpy spatio-temporal flooding of MODIS MCD64A1
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden from WebFetch; may still be accessible via browser | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 国家级火灾边界数据集（FIREDpy，2001-2021）发布于Figshare并配套Scientific Data论文，按国家组织，覆盖2001至2021年的全球火灾事件。该产品基于FIREDpy算法对MODIS MCD64A1燃烧面积产品进行时空聚合，生成单个火灾的边界多边形。数据以Shapefile格式提供，采用CC-BY 4.0许可开放获取，适用于全球火灾活动制图、火情时空格局与碳排放相关研究。
desc_en: The country-level Fire Perimeter Datasets (FIREDpy, 2001-2021), released on Figshare alongside a Scientific Data paper, are organized by country and cover global fires from 2001 to 2021. The product uses the FIREDpy algorithm to spatio-temporally aggregate the MODIS MCD64A1 burned-area product into individual fire-perimeter polygons. Provided as Shapefiles under CC-BY 4.0, it supports global fire mapping, analysis of spatio-temporal fire patterns, and carbon-emission research.

name: Florida Disaster GIS Open Data
notes: Hurricane/evacuation vector layers
verify_notes: Florida Disaster open data hub; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 佛罗里达灾害GIS开放数据由佛罗里达州应急管理司发布，覆盖美国佛罗里达州，主要提供飓风、疏散等相关矢量图层，并涉及能源与基础设施主题。数据格式包括Shapefile、GeoJSON和KML，开放获取，适用于飓风应急规划、疏散路线分析及州域灾害管理与基础设施风险评估。
desc_en: Florida Disaster GIS Open Data, published by the Florida Division of Emergency Management, covers the state of Florida and offers vector layers focused on hurricanes and evacuation, with relevance to energy and infrastructure themes. Provided openly as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and KML, the data support hurricane emergency planning, evacuation-route analysis, and statewide disaster management and infrastructure risk assessment.

name: GDACS Disaster Alerts (GeoJSON/KML feeds)
theme_raw: multi-hazard (EQ, FL, TC, TS, VO, WF, DR)
notes: Per-event subfolders contain affected-area polygons, exposure & impact layers
verify_notes: Redirects to http with trailing slash | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球灾害预警与协调系统（GDACS）灾害预警由JRC与联合国OCHA联合运营，提供近实时全球灾害事件信息。每个事件子目录包含受影响区域多边形、暴露与影响图层，格式涵盖GeoJSON、KML、WMS和Shapefile。数据采用CC BY许可开放获取，适用于地震、热带气旋、洪水等灾害的快速预警、影响估算与国际人道主义响应协调。
desc_en: GDACS Disaster Alerts, operated jointly by the JRC and UN OCHA, provide near-real-time information on global disaster events. Each event subfolder contains affected-area polygons together with exposure and impact layers, in formats including GeoJSON, KML, WMS, and Shapefile. Released under CC BY for open access, the feeds support rapid alerting, impact estimation, and coordination of international humanitarian response for earthquakes, tropical cyclones, floods, and other hazards.

name: Geo-Disasters (EM-DAT climate-event GAUL geocoding, 1990-2023)
license: Mixed: event table CC-BY; GAUL geometries must be stripped for commercial reuse
what_changes: 9,217 EM-DAT climate-disaster events (floods, storms, landslides, heat, wildfires, droughts) manually geocoded to GAUL 2015 polygons; vector deliverable carries event metadata
notes: Lesser-known companion dataset to EM-DAT; explicit GAUL dependency
verify_notes: Tandfonline returns 403 to WebFetch (likely bot block) | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Geo-Disasters是EM-DAT气候类灾害事件的GAUL地理编码数据集（1990-2023），作为EM-DAT的鲜为人知配套产品发布。数据将气候灾害事件与GAUL行政区几何关联，含约2015个多边形。许可较为复杂：事件表为CC-BY，但GAUL几何须在商业再利用前剥离。该数据适用于全球气候灾害的空间统计、暴露分析与长时序趋势研究，使用时需注意GAUL几何的依赖与许可限制。
desc_en: Geo-Disasters is a GAUL-geocoded companion to EM-DAT covering climate-related disaster events from 1990 to 2023, a lesser-known counterpart to the headline EM-DAT product. It links climate events to GAUL administrative geometries, comprising roughly 2,015 polygons. Licensing is mixed: the event table is CC-BY, but the GAUL geometries must be stripped for commercial reuse. The dataset supports spatial statistics, exposure analysis, and long-term trend studies of climate disasters, with the GAUL dependency and its licensing as a key caveat.

name: Geocoded Disasters (GDIS) v1
formats_now: CSV, Geodatabase, GeoPackage, RData, PDF, PNG
notes: Polygon geometries linked to EM-DAT/GLIDE IDs
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 地理编码灾害数据集（GDIS）v1由NASA SEDAC、CIESIN与PRIO联合制作，覆盖全球1960至2018年，包含9,924起灾害、39,953个地点。数据将行政区多边形几何与EM-DAT及GLIDE标识符关联，格式为Shapefile加CSV。遵循EOSDIS数据使用政策开放获取（需注册并引用），是将全球灾害损失记录空间化、开展暴露与脆弱性分析的重要数据。
desc_en: The Geocoded Disasters (GDIS) v1 dataset, produced by NASA SEDAC, CIESIN, and PRIO, spans the globe from 1960 to 2018 and covers 9,924 disasters across 39,953 locations. It links administrative-unit polygon geometries to EM-DAT and GLIDE identifiers, distributed as shapefiles plus CSV. Available openly under the EOSDIS Data Use policy (registration and citation required), it is a key resource for spatializing global disaster-loss records and conducting exposure and vulnerability analysis.

name: GFDRR ThinkHazard! / Innovation Lab GeoNode hazard layers
theme_raw: Multi-hazard (earthquake, flood, landslide, volcano, tsunami, wildfire, cyclone, drought)
formats: Underlying datasets via GeoNode WFS/WMS (Shapefile, GeoJSON where openly licensed)
formats_now: Web map; data download via Data Map
access: Underlying layers: GFDRR Innovation Lab GeoNode (geonode-gfdrrlab.org)
notes: ThinkHazard! itself is summary; raw vector hazard layers linked from each source page.
verify_notes: GFDRR ThinkHazard portal active, EN/FR/ES | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GFDRR ThinkHazard! 与创新实验室GeoNode灾害图层由世界银行/GFDRR提供，覆盖全球国家及次国家尺度，涵盖11种自然灾害类型。ThinkHazard! 本身为危险性汇总工具，原始矢量危险图层则通过各来源页面链接的GFDRR创新实验室GeoNode（WFS/WMS）获取，凡开放许可处提供Shapefile或GeoJSON。该资源适用于项目层面的灾害筛查、风险知情决策与跨灾种暴露评估。
desc_en: GFDRR ThinkHazard! and the Innovation Lab GeoNode hazard layers, provided by the World Bank/GFDRR, cover the globe at country and sub-national scales across 11 natural hazard types. ThinkHazard! itself is a hazard-summary tool, while the raw vector hazard layers are accessed through the GFDRR Innovation Lab GeoNode (WFS/WMS) linked from each source page, offered as Shapefile or GeoJSON where openly licensed. The resource supports project-level hazard screening, risk-informed decisions, and multi-hazard exposure assessment.

name: GLIDE — GLobal IDEntifier number (disaster events catalog)
notes: Used as join key with EM-DAT/GDIS polygons
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GLIDE（全球灾害标识号）是由ADRC、OCHA与UNDP等机构维护的灾害事件目录，覆盖全球，时间跨度自20世纪初至今。它为每起灾害事件分配统一标识号，常用作与EM-DAT、GDIS多边形数据连接的关键字段。数据通过CSV提供，并经合作伙伴以KML/GeoJSON形式呈现，开放获取，是跨数据库整合灾害记录、追踪历史灾害事件的重要枢纽。
desc_en: GLIDE (the GLobal IDEntifier number) is a disaster-event catalogue maintained by ADRC, OCHA, UNDP, and partners, covering the globe from the early twentieth century to the present. It assigns a unified identifier to each disaster event and is widely used as a join key with EM-DAT and GDIS polygon data. Provided as CSV and exposed as KML/GeoJSON through partners, it is openly accessible and serves as a hub for integrating disaster records across databases and tracking historical events.

name: Global Coseismic Landslide Mapping Dataset
access: Open via DOI link in paper
notes: Multi-source high-resolution remote sensing imagery
verify_notes: Fang et al. 2024 coseismic landslides | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球同震滑坡制图数据集发表于ESSD（哥白尼），收录全球分布的地震触发滑坡。数据基于多源高分辨率遥感影像编制，以Shapefile多边形形式提供，通过论文中的DOI链接开放获取，采用CC-BY 4.0许可。该数据集适用于同震滑坡的全球格局研究、地震-滑坡触发机制分析及滑坡敏感性与危险性建模。
desc_en: The Global Coseismic Landslide Mapping Dataset, published in ESSD (Copernicus), compiles earthquake-triggered landslides distributed worldwide. Built from multi-source high-resolution remote-sensing imagery, it is provided as polygon shapefiles and openly accessible via the DOI link in the paper under CC-BY 4.0. The dataset supports global-scale study of coseismic landslide patterns, analysis of earthquake-landslide triggering mechanisms, and landslide susceptibility and hazard modelling.

name: Global Fire Atlas (individual fire perimeters & ignitions)
notes: SHP_perimeters.zip (2.8GB) + SHP_ignitions.zip with size/duration/spread attributes
verify_notes: ~7.4GB; 2002-Feb 2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球火灾图集（Global Fire Atlas）提供单个火灾的边界与起火点数据，发布于Zenodo并配套ESSD论文，覆盖全球2002年至2024年2月。数据以Shapefile提供过火多边形与起火点，并附带火灾规模、持续时间、蔓延速度等属性，含SHP_perimeters.zip与SHP_ignitions.zip，总量约2.8GB。采用CC BY 4.0许可开放获取，是研究全球火灾动态、火行为与碳循环的重要数据源。
desc_en: The Global Fire Atlas provides individual fire perimeters and ignition points, released on Zenodo with an accompanying ESSD paper, covering the globe from 2002 to February 2024. It delivers burn polygons and ignition points as shapefiles with attributes such as fire size, duration, and spread rate, packaged as SHP_perimeters.zip and SHP_ignitions.zip totalling about 2.8 GB. Openly available under CC BY 4.0, it is a key source for studying global fire dynamics, fire behaviour, and the carbon cycle.

name: GOFER algorithm code & data archive (concept DOI)
notes: Concept DOI resolving to latest version
verify_notes: Concept DOI redirect to Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GOFER算法代码与数据存档（概念DOI）发布于Zenodo，覆盖美国加利福尼亚州2019至2021年。该存档包含算法代码及衍生数据，数据为Shapefile与CSV，代码为Python/JS，所给DOI为概念DOI，始终解析到最新版本。数据采用CC-BY 4.0、代码采用MIT许可开放获取，适用于火场边界追踪算法的复现、火灾蔓延分析与方法学研究。
desc_en: The GOFER algorithm code and data archive (concept DOI) is hosted on Zenodo and covers California from 2019 to 2021. It bundles algorithm code with derived data, where the data are Shapefile and CSV and the code is in Python/JS; the cited concept DOI always resolves to the latest version. Released openly under CC-BY 4.0 for data and MIT for code, it supports reproducing fire-perimeter tracking algorithms, fire-spread analysis, and methodological research.

name: HANZE catalogue of modelled flood footprints in Europe (1950-2020)
notes: Modelled vector flood event footprints complementing HANZE-Events
verify_notes: ~2.6GB total, ~15000 modelled floods 1950-2020 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: HANZE欧洲建模洪水印迹目录（1950-2020）发布于Zenodo，覆盖欧洲1950至2020年。数据以矢量Shapefile形式提供建模得到的洪水事件淹没印迹，作为HANZE-Events数据库的补充，总量约2.6GB。采用CC BY 4.0许可开放获取，适用于欧洲长时序洪水暴露与损失分析、历史洪水重建及防洪规划研究。
desc_en: The HANZE catalogue of modelled flood footprints in Europe (1950-2020), released on Zenodo, covers Europe from 1950 to 2020. It provides modelled vector flood-event footprints as shapefiles, complementing the HANZE-Events database, totalling about 2.6 GB. Openly available under CC BY 4.0, it supports long-term flood exposure and loss analysis in Europe, historical flood reconstruction, and flood-management planning.

name: HMA GLOF Database (High Mountain Asia)
notes: Version-controlled comprehensive GLOF inventory
verify_notes: ESSD article live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 高山亚洲冰湖溃决洪水（HMA GLOF）数据库发表于ESSD，覆盖高山亚洲地区，是一份版本受控的综合性冰湖溃决洪水编目。数据以矢量点和多边形（Shapefile）形式提供，通过DOI开放获取，采用CC-BY 4.0许可。该数据库适用于冰冻圈灾害研究、冰湖溃决洪水风险评估及气候变化影响下的山地灾害分析。
desc_en: The HMA GLOF Database, published in ESSD, covers High Mountain Asia and is a version-controlled, comprehensive inventory of glacial lake outburst floods. It is provided as vector points and polygons (shapefile), openly accessible via DOI under CC-BY 4.0. The database supports cryosphere-hazard research, GLOF risk assessment, and analysis of mountain hazards under climate change.

name: Luangwa Rift Active Fault Database v1.0
formats_now: GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, GMT, Geopackage, ZIP
notes: Regional active fault database supplementing GEM GAF-DB coverage gaps
verify_notes: Luangwa Rift Active Fault Database v1.0; ~70.4 kB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Luangwa裂谷活动断层数据库v1.0发布于Zenodo，覆盖赞比亚Luangwa裂谷地区，是一份区域性活动断层数据库，用于补充GEM全球活动断层数据库（GAF-DB）在该地区的覆盖空白。数据以Shapefile/GeoJSON格式提供，体量约70.4 kB，采用CC-BY 4.0许可开放获取，适用于东非裂谷系区域地震危险性评估与活动构造研究。
desc_en: The Luangwa Rift Active Fault Database v1.0, released on Zenodo, covers the Luangwa Rift in Zambia and is a regional active-fault database that supplements coverage gaps in the GEM Global Active Faults Database (GAF-DB). Provided as Shapefile/GeoJSON at about 70.4 kB and openly available under CC-BY 4.0, it supports regional seismic-hazard assessment and active-tectonics research in the East African Rift System.

name: Mainland China Surface Rupture Database (MCSRD)
feature_count: surface ruptures associated with 72 historical and instrumental earthquakes
notes: Companion to Frontiers in Earth Science paper
verify_notes: MCSRD v1.0 published 2026-03-24; only sample data publicly downloadable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国大陆地表破裂数据库（MCSRD）发布于Zenodo，覆盖中国大陆地区，整理了与72次历史及仪器记录地震相关的地表破裂。数据以Shapefile格式提供，总量约2.5 MB（样本125.0 kB），采用CC BY 4.0许可开放获取，是Frontiers in Earth Science论文的配套数据集，适用于地震地表破裂研究、古地震分析与活动断层危险性评估。
desc_en: The Mainland China Surface Rupture Database (MCSRD), released on Zenodo, covers mainland China and compiles surface ruptures associated with 72 historical and instrumental earthquakes. Provided as shapefiles totalling about 2.5 MB (sample 125.0 kB) and openly available under CC BY 4.0, it is a companion to a Frontiers in Earth Science paper. The database supports study of earthquake surface ruptures, paleoseismic analysis, and active-fault hazard assessment.

name: Maxar Open Data Program
formats: COG imagery + STAC GeoJSON item/collection geometries
notes: STAC items provide GeoJSON footprints/AOIs alongside rasters
verify_notes: AWS S3 no-sign-request access | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Maxar开放数据计划由Maxar Technologies发布，面向全球灾害事件提供高分辨率卫星影像。数据以云优化GeoTIFF（COG）影像配合STAC GeoJSON项目/集合几何呈现，STAC条目提供影像足迹与关注区域（AOI）的GeoJSON矢量。数据托管于AWS S3（s3://maxar-opendata/），采用CC BY-NC 4.0许可，适用于灾后快速制图、损毁评估与人道主义响应等非商业用途。
desc_en: The Maxar Open Data Program, released by Maxar Technologies, provides high-resolution satellite imagery for disaster events worldwide. Data are delivered as Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF imagery alongside STAC GeoJSON item and collection geometries, with STAC items supplying GeoJSON footprints and AOIs next to the rasters. Hosted on AWS S3 (s3://maxar-opendata/) under CC BY-NC 4.0, it supports post-disaster rapid mapping, damage assessment, and humanitarian response for non-commercial use.

name: NDH: Global Landslide Hazard Distribution v1
notes: Part of Natural Disaster Hotspots collection; landslide hazard zones.
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out; SEDAC content migrated to Earthdata | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NDH全球滑坡危险性分布v1由NASA SEDAC、CIESIN与CHRR制作，覆盖全球，是自然灾害热点（Natural Disaster Hotspots）系列的组成部分，描绘全球滑坡危险性分区。数据以Shapefile和GeoTIFF格式提供，免费获取，适用于全球与区域尺度的滑坡危险性识别、风险热点分析及灾害暴露与减灾规划。
desc_en: NDH: Global Landslide Hazard Distribution v1, produced by NASA SEDAC, CIESIN, and CHRR, covers the globe as part of the Natural Disaster Hotspots collection and delineates landslide hazard zones worldwide. Provided as Shapefile and GeoTIFF and freely available, it supports global and regional landslide-hazard identification, risk-hotspot analysis, and exposure and mitigation planning.

name: NIFC / NWCG Wildland Fire Perimeters (current + historical)
notes: Interagency Fire Perimeter History + WFIGS current incident locations/perimeters
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub portal - content fetch limited | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NIFC/NWCG野地火灾边界（当前与历史）由美国国家跨机构消防中心发布，覆盖美国，提供实时与历史火场数据，包括跨机构火灾边界历史与WFIGS当前火情位置/边界。数据格式涵盖Shapefile、GeoJSON、WFS和矢量瓦片，开放获取（隐含公有领域），适用于火灾态势感知、火情历史分析及应急响应支持。
desc_en: NIFC/NWCG Wildland Fire Perimeters (current and historical), published by the U.S. National Interagency Fire Center, cover the United States and provide both real-time and historical fire footprints, including the Interagency Fire Perimeter History and WFIGS current incident locations and perimeters. Available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, WFS, and vector tiles under open (implied public-domain) access, they support fire situational awareness, fire-history analysis, and emergency response.

name: NIFC WFIGS Current Interagency Fire Perimeters
formats_now: Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, CSV, ArcGIS REST
access: NIFC Open Data ArcGIS Hub (refresh ~5 min)
notes: Operational perimeters for ongoing incidents.
verify_notes: WFIGS current fire perimeters; content client-side rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NIFC WFIGS当前跨机构火灾边界由NIFC/WFIGS发布，覆盖美国，提供正在进行的火灾事件的作业边界。数据以Shapefile、GeoJSON及REST/WFS服务形式呈现，约每5分钟刷新一次，属NIFC公有领域，可通过NIFC开放数据ArcGIS Hub获取，适用于实时火情监测、应急指挥与疏散决策支持。
desc_en: The NIFC WFIGS Current Interagency Fire Perimeters, published by NIFC/WFIGS, cover the United States and provide operational perimeters for ongoing fire incidents. Delivered as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and REST/WFS services with roughly five-minute refresh, the data are NIFC public domain and accessible via the NIFC Open Data ArcGIS Hub. They support real-time fire monitoring, incident command, and evacuation decision support.

name: SEDAC ArcGIS REST MapServer - Natural Disaster Hotspots (WMS/WFS-style services)
notes: Map services exposing NDH layers as queryable vector features.
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out; ArcGIS endpoint may be deprecated | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: SEDAC自然灾害热点ArcGIS REST地图服务由NASA SEDAC与CIESIN提供，覆盖全球，以地图服务形式将自然灾害热点（NDH）系列图层暴露为可查询的矢量要素。数据通过ArcGIS REST、WMS和KML访问，开放服务，适用于多灾种危险性的在线可视化、空间查询与全球灾害风险的快速浏览与集成分析。
desc_en: The SEDAC ArcGIS REST MapServer for Natural Disaster Hotspots, provided by NASA SEDAC and CIESIN, covers the globe and exposes the Natural Disaster Hotspots (NDH) layers as queryable vector features through map services. Accessible via ArcGIS REST, WMS, and KML as open services, it supports online visualization of multi-hazard risk, spatial querying, and rapid browsing and integration of global disaster-risk information.

name: State of Wildfires 2024-25 regional summaries (GADM L1)
what_changes: Aggregates burned-area, fire-emission and individual-fire statistics to UC Davis GADM v3.6 Level-1 polygons; redistributed as regional summary tables keyed to GADM.
notes: Companion to ESSD State of Wildfires series; less mainstream than the headline product, uses GADM as the reporting geometry.
verify_notes: State of Wildfires 2024-25 regional summaries, v2025.0 Aug 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: State of Wildfires 2024-25区域汇总（GADM L1）发布于Zenodo，是ESSD《野火状况》系列的配套数据集，相比主产品更为小众，采用GADM一级行政区作为报告几何。数据采用CC BY 4.0许可开放获取，提供区域尺度的野火汇总信息，适用于全球野火年度态势评估、区域火情对比与基于行政区的火灾统计分析。
desc_en: The State of Wildfires 2024-25 regional summaries (GADM L1), released on Zenodo, are a companion to the ESSD State of Wildfires series and less mainstream than the headline product, using GADM Level-1 administrative units as the reporting geometry. Openly available under CC BY 4.0, they provide region-level wildfire summaries and support annual global wildfire assessment, regional fire comparison, and administrative-unit fire statistics.

name: UN-SPIDER Knowledge Portal — disaster vector layers
formats_now: GIS data, satellite data, learning resources
notes: Emergency mapping vector products from UN-SPIDER and partners.
verify_notes: UN-SPIDER active; multilingual | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UN-SPIDER知识门户灾害矢量图层由联合国外空司UN-SPIDER运营，覆盖全球，按事件提供来自UN-SPIDER及其合作伙伴的应急测绘矢量产品。数据格式包括Shapefile、KML和GeoJSON，遵循联合国开放政策开放获取，适用于灾后快速测绘、影响范围评估及发展中国家的空间技术减灾能力建设支持。
desc_en: The UN-SPIDER Knowledge Portal disaster vector layers, operated by UNOOSA/UN-SPIDER, cover the globe and provide event-based emergency-mapping vector products from UN-SPIDER and its partners. Available as Shapefile, KML, and GeoJSON under UN open access, they support post-disaster rapid mapping, impact-extent assessment, and capacity building in space-based disaster-risk reduction, particularly in developing countries.

name: Unified Global Landslide Catalogue (UGLC)
formats_now: PDF, XML, BibTeX, RIS; data on Zenodo & GitHub
lychee_status: Network error: Network error: Connection reset by peer (os error 54) (error sending request for url (https://essd.copernicus.org/preprints/essd-2025-482))
notes: Harmonized integration of pre-existing landslide inventories
verify_notes: UGLC preprint; >1M landslide records; Zenodo zenodo.org/records/16755044 | lychee:Network error: Network error: Connection reset by peer (os error 54) (error sending request for url (https://essd.copernicus.org/preprints/essd-2025-482))
desc_zh: 统一全球滑坡目录（UGLC）以ESSD预印本形式发布，配套Zenodo与GitHub，覆盖全球，整合超过100万起滑坡事件，划分为105个瓦片。该数据集对已有滑坡编目进行了协调统一整合，以矢量点和多边形形式提供，采用CC BY 4.0许可开放获取，适用于全球滑坡敏感性建模、灾害统计分析及多源滑坡数据的标准化研究。
desc_en: The Unified Global Landslide Catalogue (UGLC), released as an ESSD preprint with companion Zenodo and GitHub archives, covers the globe and integrates more than one million landslide events across 105 tiles. It harmonizes pre-existing landslide inventories and is provided as vector points and polygons under CC BY 4.0 for open access. The catalogue supports global landslide susceptibility modelling, hazard statistics, and standardization research across multi-source landslide data.

name: UNOSAT Flood Portal — Satellite-derived flood extents
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (http://floods.unosat.org/geoportal/catalog/download/download.page))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (http://floods.unosat.org/geoportal/catalog/download/download.page))
notes: Standardized geodatabase exported as shapefiles per event
