desc_zh: UNOSAT洪水门户提供卫星反演的洪水范围数据，由联合国训研所UNOSAT运营，覆盖2007年以来的全球洪水事件。数据采用标准化地理数据库，按事件导出为Shapefile与ESRI geodatabase格式，采用CC BY-NC许可开放获取。该数据适用于洪水灾害快速评估、淹没范围分析及人道主义响应等非商业用途，是联合国应急制图体系的重要组成部分。
desc_en: The UNOSAT Flood Portal provides satellite-derived flood extents, operated by UNITAR/UNOSAT, covering global flood events since 2007. The data use a standardized geodatabase exported per event as shapefiles and ESRI geodatabases, openly available under CC BY-NC. They support rapid flood-hazard assessment, inundation-extent analysis, and humanitarian response for non-commercial use, forming a key part of the UN emergency-mapping system.

name: USGS ShakeMap shape.zip + GeoJSON feed
notes: shape.zip per event; ComCat real-time GeoJSON feeds
verify_notes: Redirect to http with trailing slash | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: USGS ShakeMap shape.zip与GeoJSON数据源由USGS国家地震信息中心（NEIC）提供，覆盖全球，含自20世纪以来的历史地震（Atlas）及实时事件。每个事件提供shape.zip（MMI烈度等值线Shapefile）与GeoJSON，并通过ComCat提供实时GeoJSON数据流。数据属美国政府公有领域，开放获取，适用于地震烈度评估、震后快速影响估算与地震灾害响应。
desc_en: The USGS ShakeMap shape.zip and GeoJSON feeds, provided by the USGS NEIC, cover the globe and include historical earthquakes since the 1900s (Atlas) as well as real-time events. Each event offers a shape.zip with MMI intensity contours as shapefiles plus GeoJSON, while ComCat provides real-time GeoJSON feeds. As U.S. government public domain and openly accessible, the data support shaking-intensity assessment, rapid post-earthquake impact estimation, and earthquake-hazard response.

name: USGS U.S. Quaternary Faults (ArcGIS Hub / Feature Service)
notes: Quaternary Fault and Fold Database; also exposed via ScienceBase WMS/WFS
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub page, JS-rendered (formats not visible to fetcher) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局（USGS）发布的美国第四纪断层与褶皱数据库，以矢量形式记录全美范围内被认为在第四纪（约260万年以来）活动过的断层与褶皱构造。数据通过 ArcGIS 要素服务（FeatureServer）发布，并提供 KMZ 与 Shapefile 下载，同时经 ScienceBase 提供 WMS/WFS 访问。作为美国政府公共领域数据，可自由使用，是地震危险性评估、活动构造研究和防灾规划的权威基础图层。
desc_en: The USGS U.S. Quaternary Faults dataset is a vector layer documenting faults and folds across the United States considered to have been active during the Quaternary period (roughly the last 2.6 million years). Drawn from the USGS Quaternary Fault and Fold Database, it is delivered through an ArcGIS FeatureServer with KMZ and shapefile downloads, and is also exposed via ScienceBase WMS/WFS endpoints. Released as U.S. government public domain data, it serves as an authoritative reference for seismic hazard assessment, active-tectonics research and disaster planning.

name: Washington DNR Tsunami Hazard Areas MapServer
notes: Cascadia subduction & local crustal fault tsunami scenarios
verify_notes: Functional ArcGIS REST MapServer | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 美国华盛顿州自然资源部（WA DNR）地质与地球资源处发布的海啸危险区数据，覆盖华盛顿州沿海地带。该数据基于卡斯卡迪亚俯冲带及局部地壳断层的海啸情景模拟，标识潜在淹没范围与危险区。数据通过 ArcGIS MapServer 服务提供（可导出要素，单次最多2000条记录），亦可下载 Shapefile，版本为2.2（2025年7月）。属华盛顿州开放数据，适用于沿海防灾、应急疏散规划与风险评估。
desc_en: Published by the Washington State Department of Natural Resources (DGER), this dataset maps tsunami hazard areas along Washington's coastline. It delineates potential inundation zones derived from modeled Cascadia subduction-zone and local crustal-fault tsunami scenarios. The data are served through an ArcGIS MapServer (feature export capped at 2,000 records per request, version 2.2, July 2025) with shapefile download available. Provided under Washington State open-data terms, it supports coastal hazard mitigation, evacuation planning and risk assessment.

name: 中国大陆1:400万活动构造空间数据库 (CN-faults / China Active Tectonics)
provider: 国家地震科学数据中心 (NESDC, CEA)
coverage: 中国大陆全境; ~200条活动断裂、2000+几何/运动学参数
license: 科研使用, 引用邓起东等编《中国活动构造图1:400万》
access: 在线下载, 部分需注册
notes: GMT 中文手册镜像可直接获取 shp/gmt 版本: https://docs.gmt-china.org/6.2/dataset-CN/CN-faults/
verify_notes: National Earthquake Science Data Center - socioseismology section | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由国家地震科学数据中心（NESDC，中国地震局）发布的中国大陆1:400万活动构造空间数据库，矢量记录覆盖中国大陆全境的约200条活动断裂及2000余项几何与运动学参数。数据源自邓起东等编《中国活动构造图（1:400万）》，提供 Shapefile 与 GMT（.gmt）格式，部分需注册下载；GMT 中文手册镜像（CN-faults）可直接获取 shp/gmt 版本。适用于地震危险性分析、活动构造制图与地学研究，使用时需按要求引用。
desc_en: Released by China's National Earthquake Science Data Center (NESDC, CEA), the CN-faults database is a 1:4,000,000 vector compilation of active tectonics across mainland China, covering roughly 200 active faults with over 2,000 geometric and kinematic parameters. It is based on Deng Qidong et al.'s Map of Active Tectonics in China (1:4M) and distributed as Shapefile and GMT (.gmt) formats, with a convenient mirror available through the GMT-China documentation. Intended for research use with required citation, it underpins seismic hazard analysis and active-tectonics mapping.

name: 全球重大林火灾害数据集 (2018.01-2019.06)
provider: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 (TPDC)
coverage: 全球重大火灾(含中国山西2019.3)
verify_notes: TPDC dataset page; minimal content extracted but page resolves | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布的全球重大林火灾害数据集，时间覆盖2018年1月至2019年6月。该数据汇编了此期间全球范围内的重大火灾事件（含2019年3月中国山西火灾），以 Excel 表格与 ArcGIS Shapefile 形式提供灾害位置与相关属性。遵循 TPDC 数据使用政策，注册后可下载，适用于火灾灾害分析、应急响应研究与全球灾害事件统计。
desc_en: Hosted by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), this dataset compiles major forest-fire disasters worldwide between January 2018 and June 2019, including the March 2019 Shanxi fire in China. It provides event locations and associated attributes in Excel tables and ArcGIS shapefiles. Distributed under TPDC's data-use policy with registration-based download, it supports fire-hazard analysis, emergency-response studies and global disaster-event compilation.

name: 四川长宁6.0级地震救灾数据直通车 (Changning M6.0 earthquake thematic)
formats: shapefile (epicenter point, intensity polygons, affected admin units)
notes: One of a series of rapid-response disaster thematic packages.
verify_notes: Sichuan Changning M6.0 earthquake relief thematic page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家地球系统科学数据中心（NESSDC）发布的四川长宁6.0级地震救灾数据直通车专题包，聚焦四川长宁地震灾区。数据以 Shapefile 形式提供震中点位、烈度分布多边形及受影响行政区划等要素，是该中心一系列灾害快速响应专题产品之一。可公开下载，适用于地震应急响应、灾情评估与救灾决策支持。版权归 geodata.cn 所有，使用需遵循其条款。
desc_en: Provided by China's National Earth System Science Data Center (NESSDC), this thematic package supports relief efforts for the Changning M6.0 earthquake in Sichuan. It supplies shapefile layers including the epicenter point, intensity-distribution polygons and affected administrative units, and is one of a series of rapid-response disaster thematic releases. Available as a public thematic download under geodata.cn terms, it aids earthquake emergency response, damage assessment and relief decision-making.

name: UCDP Georeferenced Event Dataset (GED) v25.1
formats: Shapefile, CSV, RData, Excel, SQL (geocoded points)
notes: Original UCDP release also mirrors on ucdp.uu.se in shapefile format
verify_notes: UCDP GED v25.1; published 2025-10-20; covers 1989-2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 乌普萨拉冲突数据项目（UCDP）发布的地理参考事件数据集（GED）v25.1，全球覆盖，时间跨度为1989年1月至2024年12月。该数据集以地理编码点位记录单次有组织暴力事件，包含时间、地点、行为方、死亡人数等详细属性，是冲突研究领域权威的高分辨率事件级数据。提供 Shapefile、CSV、RData、Excel 与 SQL 格式，采用 ODbL v1.0 开放数据库许可，广泛用于和平与冲突研究、危机预警与人道分析。
desc_en: The UCDP Georeferenced Event Dataset (GED) v25.1, from the Uppsala Conflict Data Program, records individual events of organized violence worldwide from January 1989 through December 2024. Each geocoded point carries detailed attributes such as date, location, actors and fatalities, making it an authoritative high-resolution, event-level conflict dataset. Distributed as Shapefile, CSV, RData, Excel and SQL under the ODC ODbL v1.0 license, it is widely used in peace and conflict research, early-warning and humanitarian analysis.

name: ACLED Last 7 Days (SDGs Today Hub)
notes: Rolling 7-day window of ACLED events on ArcGIS Hub.
verify_notes: ACLED Last 7 Days dataset page on SDGs Today hub; title confirmed | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由可持续发展解决方案网络（SDSN）SDGs Today 平台托管的 ACLED 近7天武装冲突事件数据，全球覆盖，提供滚动的7天时间窗口。数据来自 ACLED（武装冲突地点与事件数据项目），以要素服务、GeoJSON 与 CSV 形式发布于 ArcGIS Hub 开放数据门户，记录近期暴力冲突、抗议与战事事件的地点与属性。遵循 ACLED 使用条款，适用于近实时冲突监测、人道形势研判与态势感知。
desc_en: Hosted on the SDGs Today (SDSN) ArcGIS Hub, this dataset presents ACLED armed-conflict events from a rolling 7-day window, worldwide. Sourced from the Armed Conflict Location & Event Data project, it provides recent violence, protest and battle events with locations and attributes as a feature service, GeoJSON and CSV. Subject to ACLED's terms of use, it supports near-real-time conflict monitoring, humanitarian situational awareness and crisis tracking.

name: Global Ports (WFP SDI-T Logistics Database)
formats: Zipped Shapefile, GeoJSON, WFS via WFP GeoNode
notes: Authoritative for humanitarian logistics planning
verify_notes: HDX 403 to crawler | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 世界粮食计划署（WFP）物流集群通过 SDI-T 物流数据库发布的全球港口点位数据集，全球覆盖。该数据以点要素记录世界各地港口位置及相关属性，是人道主义物流规划的权威参考。提供压缩 Shapefile、GeoJSON，并通过 WFP GeoNode 提供 WFS 服务，采用 CC-BY-IGO 许可。适用于救援物资调配、供应链规划与人道应急后勤分析。
desc_en: Maintained by the WFP Logistics Cluster as part of its SDI-T Logistics Database, this dataset provides global port locations as point features with associated attributes, and is an authoritative reference for humanitarian logistics planning. It is available as zipped Shapefile and GeoJSON, with WFS access through the WFP GeoNode, under a CC-BY-IGO license. It supports relief supply routing, supply-chain planning and humanitarian logistics analysis.

name: HDX - Sudan UNHCR Refugee Camps
notes: Country-level camp dataset; example of UNHCR-on-HDX collection.
verify_notes: HDX blocks automated fetch; functional in browser | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 联合国难民署（UNHCR）经人道数据交换平台（HDX）发布的苏丹难民营数据集，覆盖苏丹境内。数据以点或多边形要素记录难民营/安置点位置，是 UNHCR 在 HDX 上国别难民营数据集合的代表之一。提供 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 格式，采用 CC BY-IGO 许可，通过 CKAN 开放下载。适用于难民安置分析、人道援助协调与流离失所形势监测。
desc_en: Published by UNHCR through the Humanitarian Data Exchange (HDX), this dataset locates refugee camps and settlements in Sudan. Provided as Shapefile and GeoJSON under a CC BY-IGO license and openly downloadable via CKAN, it is one example of UNHCR's country-level camp collections on HDX. It supports displacement monitoring, humanitarian-aid coordination and settlement analysis.

name: Humanitarian GIS Hub (Esri / OCHA partners)
notes: Catalog of humanitarian feature services (camps, conflict, logistics, aid).
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub - Humanitarian GIS Hub landing accessible; content sparse in fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Esri 援助与发展团队联合 OCHA 等伙伴运营的人道主义 GIS Hub，是一个全球性的人道空间数据目录门户。平台汇集难民营、冲突、物流、援助等多类主题的要素服务，以要素服务、GeoJSON 与 Shapefile 等形式提供开放访问。各数据集许可视来源而定（混合许可）。适用于人道应急响应、协调规划与跨机构数据共享。
desc_en: The Humanitarian GIS Hub, run by Esri's Aid & Development team with OCHA partners, is a global catalog portal of humanitarian spatial data. It aggregates feature services across themes such as camps, conflict, logistics and aid, offered openly as feature services, GeoJSON and Shapefile via ArcGIS Hub. Licensing varies per dataset (mixed). It supports humanitarian emergency response, coordination planning and inter-agency data sharing.

name: SimpleGADM (American Red Cross)
license: GADM terms (academic / non-commercial); scripts under repo license
what_changes: Topology-error-corrected, MapShaper-simplified, encoding-normalized, dissolved into separate level layers; about half the original file size while preserving small features.
notes: Built on GADM v2 by the American Red Cross / Missing Maps community for humanitarian web-mapping; an obscure but functional derivative.
verify_notes: Uses MapShaper/PostGIS for GADM simplification | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SimpleGADM 是美国红十字会与 Missing Maps 社区基于 GADM v2 行政边界构建的简化派生数据集，面向人道主义网络地图应用。它对 GADM 行政区划数据进行了适配优化，便于轻量级在线展示。属相对小众但实用的派生产品，README 未明确说明许可。适用于人道制图、行政边界展示与社区地图项目。
desc_en: SimpleGADM is a derivative dataset built by the American Red Cross and the Missing Maps community on top of GADM v2 administrative boundaries, tailored for humanitarian web-mapping. It adapts GADM's administrative divisions for lightweight online display. An obscure but functional product, its README does not state an explicit license. It is suited to humanitarian cartography, boundary visualization and community mapping projects.

name: UNHCR eSite Hub (GIS Core Database)
notes: Camp/settlement features with API links for WMS/WFS/GeoServices.
verify_notes: eSite Hub reachable; login may be required for downloads | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国难民署（UNHCR）的 eSite Hub 是其 GIS 核心数据库门户，全球覆盖。平台提供难民营/安置点要素及相关属性，支持 GeoJSON、KML、Shapefile（zip）下载，并提供 WMS、WFS 等地理服务 API 端点。遵循 UNHCR 使用条款，可开放下载与服务调用。适用于难民安置管理、人道空间分析与系统集成。
desc_en: UNHCR's eSite Hub is the agency's GIS core-database portal with global coverage. It provides camp and settlement features with associated attributes, available as GeoJSON, KML and zipped Shapefile, alongside WMS, WFS and GeoServices API endpoints. Offered under UNHCR terms with open download and service access, it supports settlement management, humanitarian spatial analysis and systems integration.

name: UNHCR organization on HDX (1000+ datasets)
verify_notes: HDX returns 403 to bot | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 联合国难民署（UNHCR）在 OCHA 人道数据交换平台（HDX）上的机构主页，汇集逾千个全球性数据集。内容涵盖难民营、流离失所人口、安置点等多类人道主题，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV 等多种格式，采用 CC BY / CC BY-IGO 许可，开放访问。适用于难民与流离失所研究、人道援助规划与全球趋势分析。
desc_en: This is UNHCR's organization page on OCHA's Humanitarian Data Exchange (HDX), bringing together over 1,000 datasets worldwide. It spans humanitarian themes such as refugee camps, displaced populations and settlements, offered in Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and CSV under CC BY / CC BY-IGO licenses with open access. It supports refugee and displacement research, humanitarian planning and global trend analysis.

name: Natural Earth Physical Vectors (Coastline, Rivers, Lakes, Mountains, Geographic Lines)
theme_canonical: Hydrography | Marine & coastal | Physical geography (natural earth)
theme_raw: physical_natural (coastline, rivers, lakes, glaciated areas, geographic lines, physical labels) | Multi-theme physical marine | Coastline, ocean polygon, marine geography names, bathymetry contours
license_now: Public domain (page shows 'All rights reserved' boilerplate but Natural Earth is PD)
file_size: Coastline 2.93 MB; Bathymetry 14.86 MB; Lakes 2.24 MB; Rivers 1.98 MB
notes: Standard global cartographic anchor; physical layer set includes coastline, rivers w/ lake centerlines, lakes+reservoirs, glaciated areas, antarctic ice shelves, bathymetry depth contours (vector), geographic lines, graticules.
verify_notes: v5.1.1; 2.5M+ downloads | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Natural Earth 物理矢量数据集是一套全球公共领域制图基础图层，比例尺为1:1000万（10m），由志愿者维护、NACIS 托管。物理图层组包括海岸线、河流（含湖泊中心线）、湖泊与水库、冰川覆盖区、南极冰架、海底测深等深线（矢量）、地理参考线与经纬网。以 Shapefile 提供，可直接下载。作为标准的全球制图锚定数据，广泛用于底图制作、专题地图与可视化。
desc_en: Natural Earth Physical Vectors is a public-domain set of global cartographic base layers at 1:10 million (10m) scale, volunteer-maintained and hosted by NACIS. The physical suite includes coastlines, rivers with lake centerlines, lakes and reservoirs, glaciated areas, Antarctic ice shelves, vector bathymetry depth contours, geographic lines and graticules, all as directly downloadable shapefiles. A standard global cartographic anchor, it is widely used for basemaps, thematic mapping and visualization.

name: HydroSHEDS HydroRIVERS / HydroLAKES / HydroBASINS / HydroATLAS
theme_raw: global river reaches, lake polygons, sub-basin polygons, hydro-environmental attributes | watershed polygons, river network lines, lake polygons | Rivers, lakes, watersheds, hydro-environmental attributes
license: HydroSHEDS open license (free for scientific, educational, commercial)
license_now: HydroSHEDS terms (free for sci/edu/commercial) — see Terms of Use
formats: Shapefile, GeoPackage; also exposed via GEE
notes: De facto global anchor. Not an OGC API service itself, but ubiquitously republished through WFS/feature services in many national portals; HydroSHEDS V2 will introduce OGC interfaces.
verify_notes: v2 under development; product release scheduled 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HydroSHEDS 是由世界自然基金会（WWF）与麦吉尔大学等共同维护的全球水文地理数据体系，包括 HydroRIVERS（河网）、HydroLAKES（湖泊）、HydroBASINS（流域）与 HydroATLAS（属性增强）等产品。基于数字高程模型推导，是全球水文分析的事实标准数据。提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage，并通过 Google Earth Engine 发布；许可对科研、教育及商业用途免费。广泛用于流域分析、水资源研究与生态建模，HydroSHEDS V2 将引入 OGC 接口。
desc_en: HydroSHEDS, maintained by WWF, McGill University and partners, is a global hydrography data suite comprising HydroRIVERS (river networks), HydroLAKES, HydroBASINS (watersheds) and HydroATLAS (attribute-enriched layers). Derived from digital elevation models, it is the de facto global standard for hydrological analysis. Distributed as Shapefile and GeoPackage and also via Google Earth Engine, it is free for scientific, educational and commercial use. It underpins watershed analysis, water-resources research and ecological modeling, with OGC interfaces planned in HydroSHEDS V2.

name: 中国1:100万主要河流数据集 (2002)
theme_raw: hydrography / rivers | lake / hydrography | protected areas in basin
license_now: Registration + approval required; citation/acknowledgement mandatory; no redistribution
notes: 1:1,000,000 base river network, foundational vector layer.
verify_notes: NESSDC lake-watershed center; strict review mode | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由国家地球系统科学数据中心湖泊-流域分中心（中科院南京地理与湖泊研究所，NIGLAS）发布的中国1:100万主要河流数据集（2002年），覆盖中国全境。该数据以线要素提供1:1000000比例尺的基础河网，是水文与水资源研究的基础矢量图层。需登录注册并经审批后下载，使用须按要求引用致谢、不得再分发。适用于流域分析、水系制图与区域水资源研究。
desc_en: Published by the Lake-Watershed Sub-center of NESSDC (NIGLAS, CAS), this dataset provides China's major rivers at 1:1,000,000 scale (2002 edition), covering the whole country. It supplies a base river network as line features and serves as a foundational vector layer for hydrology and water-resources research. Download requires login, registration and approval, with mandatory citation and no redistribution. It supports watershed analysis, river-network mapping and regional water studies.

name: EU-Hydro River Network Database (v1.3, Nov 2020)
theme_raw: Rivers, lakes, drainage network, catchments | hydrography | photo-interpreted river network + water body polygons
notes: Pre-packaged per major basin. Available via WEkEO and EEA SDI catalog too.
verify_notes: EPSG:3035; 2006-2012 temporal range | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EU-Hydro 河网数据库（v1.3，2020年11月）由哥白尼陆地监测服务（CLMS）与欧洲环境署（EEA）发布，覆盖 EEA39 区域（欧洲、西巴尔干及土耳其）。数据提供拓扑连贯的高质量河网与排水信息，基于2006-2012年参考数据，按主要流域分包发布。提供 ESRI 文件地理数据库、SQLite 与 Shapefile 格式，需注册下载，采用哥白尼开放数据政策。适用于水文建模、洪水分析与欧洲尺度水资源管理。
desc_en: The EU-Hydro River Network Database (v1.3, Nov 2020), from the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service and EEA, covers the EEA39 area (Europe plus the Western Balkans and Turkey). It provides a topologically coherent, high-quality river and drainage network based on 2006-2012 reference data, packaged per major basin. Available as ESRI File Geodatabase, SQLite and shapefile under Copernicus open-data policy with registration required, it supports hydrological modeling, flood analysis and Europe-wide water management.

name: Glacial lake inventory — Upper Indus basin (Swat, Chitral, Gilgit, Hunza, Shigar, Shyok, Shingo, Astor, Jhelum)
theme_raw: glacial lakes | lakes (multi-temporal) | lake ice phenology
formats: Shapefile + attribute table (type, orientation, width, area, depth, length)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en))
notes: Polygon inventory with rich morphometric attributes.
verify_notes: lychee:Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en))
desc_zh: 由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）三极平台发布的冰湖编目数据集，覆盖上印度河流域（巴基斯坦/喀喇昆仑地区，含 Swat、Chitral、Gilgit、Hunza、Shigar、Shyok、Shingo、Astor、Jhelum 等子流域）。数据以多边形形式编目冰湖，并附丰富的形态属性（类型、朝向、宽度、面积、深度、长度）。提供 Shapefile 及属性表，注册后下载，遵循 TPDC 数据使用政策。适用于冰川湖溃决洪水（GLOF）风险评估与高山区水文研究。
desc_en: Distributed through TPDC's Three Poles platform, this glacial-lake inventory covers the Upper Indus basins of Pakistan and the Karakoram, including the Swat, Chitral, Gilgit, Hunza, Shigar, Shyok, Shingo, Astor and Jhelum sub-basins. It catalogs glacial lakes as polygons with rich morphometric attributes (type, orientation, width, area, depth, length), provided as Shapefile with an attribute table under TPDC policy and registered download. It supports glacial-lake-outburst-flood (GLOF) risk assessment and high-mountain hydrology research.

name: Global Dam Watch (GDW) consensus database
theme_raw: barriers (dams, weirs) + reservoir polygons | dams + reservoirs + barriers | energy_infrastructure (dams/reservoirs)
doi_or_citation: Mulligan et al. 2020 (GOODD) 10.1038/s41597-020-0362-5; Lehner et al. GRanD
feature_count: 41,145 barrier locations and 35,295 associated reservoir polygons
notes: Many derived ArcGIS FeatureServer layers republish this. Underlies HydroSHEDS-linked workflows.
verify_notes: 41,145 barriers + 35,295 reservoir polygons; download via Google Form | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Global Dam Watch（GDW）共识数据库由 GDW 联盟（融合 GRanD、GOODD、FHReD 等来源协调而成）发布，全球覆盖，包含41145个拦河障碍物位置及35295个相关水库多边形。它是全球大坝与水库的权威整合数据集，许多 ArcGIS 要素服务图层由其派生，并与 HydroSHEDS 相关工作流衔接。提供 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage，采用 CC BY 许可，可直接下载。适用于水资源管理、河流连通性与生态影响研究。
desc_en: The Global Dam Watch (GDW) consensus database, produced by the GDW consortium by harmonizing sources such as GRanD, GOODD and FHReD, provides 41,145 barrier locations and 35,295 associated reservoir polygons worldwide. It is an authoritative integrated record of global dams and reservoirs, with many ArcGIS feature services derived from it and ties to HydroSHEDS-linked workflows. Distributed as Shapefile and GeoPackage under CC BY with direct download, it supports water-resources management, river-connectivity and ecological-impact studies.

name: Global River Widths from Landsat (GRWL) - vector centerlines
theme_raw: river centerline polylines with width attributes | river centerlines with width (incl. canal class) | river centerlines & widths
file_size: GRWL_vector_V01.01.zip: 3.1 GB; mask 393.8 MB; summary 43.2 MB
feature_count: 829 ESRI shapefile polylines of river centerlines
notes: Used in paper for river width / discharge calibration; vector centerlines available.
verify_notes: GRWL Database, June 2018 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Global River Widths from Landsat（GRWL）数据集由 Allen 与 Pavelsky（北卡罗来纳大学）发布，全球覆盖，包含超过5800万次河宽测量。数据基于30米分辨率 Landsat 影像提取河流中心线矢量与河宽信息，用于河宽与径流量标定研究。提供 Shapefile 格式（矢量中心线约3.1GB），采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可经 Zenodo 开放下载。适用于全球河流形态、水文连通性与遥感水文研究。
desc_en: The Global River Widths from Landsat (GRWL) dataset, by Allen & Pavelsky (UNC), provides over 58 million river-width measurements worldwide. Derived from 30 m Landsat imagery, it delivers river-centerline vectors and width information used for river-width and discharge calibration. Available as shapefiles (vector centerlines about 3.1 GB) under CC-BY-4.0 with open Zenodo download, it supports global river-morphology, hydrological-connectivity and remote-sensing hydrology research.

name: Lehner & Doll Global Lakes and Wetlands Database (GLWD)
theme_raw: global lakes, reservoirs, wetlands (3 levels) | Lakes, reservoirs, wetlands | 33-class lakes & wetlands inland surface waters
license: Free for scientific, educational, commercial use (HydroSHEDS-aligned terms)
feature_count: 33 waterbody and wetland types; 18.2 million km2 of wetlands
notes: GLWD v2 (Lehner et al. 2024) released as full vector global wetlands dataset - now hosted under HydroSHEDS umbrella.
verify_notes: Page active; license/format details on separate download page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Lehner 与 Döll 编制的全球湖泊与湿地数据库（GLWD），全球覆盖。该数据库划分33类水体与湿地类型，涵盖约1820万平方公里湿地，提供 Shapefile（1-2级）与栅格（3级，约500米）格式。原始版本（Lehner & Döll 2004）为该领域经典数据集；GLWD v2（Lehner 等 2024）已作为全球矢量湿地数据集发布，现纳入 HydroSHEDS 体系托管。适用于湿地制图、生态评估与水文水资源研究。
desc_en: The Global Lakes and Wetlands Database (GLWD), compiled by Lehner & Döll, covers the world with 33 waterbody and wetland types and some 18.2 million km² of wetlands. It is provided as shapefiles (levels 1-2) and raster (level 3, about 500 m). The original Lehner & Döll (2004) version is a classic in the field, while GLWD v2 (Lehner et al. 2024) has been released as a full global vector wetlands dataset, now hosted under the HydroSHEDS umbrella. It supports wetland mapping, ecological assessment and hydrology research.

name: 湖泊-流域科学数据中心 / Lake-Basin Science Data Center
provider: 中国科学院南京地理与湖泊研究所 (NIGLAS)
theme_raw: lakes & basins / 湖泊流域 | hydrography / watershed | lakes / basins portal
license_now: Copyright geodata.cn 2003-2025 (no explicit open license declared on homepage)
doi_or_citation: Ma R. et al. 2022 Sci. Data; doi:10.1038/s41597-022-01649-z (CODCLAB)
notes: Includes lake outlines, basins, dam/reservoir locations, Wang Sumin 中国湖泊 records derivatives. Companion: NIGLAS data.niglas.ac.cn.
verify_notes: Active site, lake/watershed datasets browseable; formats not visible from homepage | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 湖泊-流域科学数据中心由中国科学院南京地理与湖泊研究所（NIGLAS）运营，主要覆盖中国（部分全球）湖泊与流域数据。内容包括湖泊边界、流域、坝/水库位置及王苏民《中国湖泊》记录的派生数据等，以 Shapefile 为主，需注册下载。门户主页未明确声明开放许可。配套有 NIGLAS 数据中心（data.niglas.ac.cn）。适用于湖泊学、流域水文与水环境研究。
desc_en: The Lake-Basin Science Data Center, operated by the Nanjing Institute of Geography and Limnology (NIGLAS, CAS), focuses on lake and watershed data for China with some global coverage. It includes lake outlines, basins, dam/reservoir locations and derivatives of Wang Sumin's Lakes of China records, mainly as shapefiles with registration-based download. No explicit open license is declared on the homepage, and a companion portal exists at data.niglas.ac.cn. It supports limnology, watershed hydrology and aquatic-environment research.

name: BasinATLAS v1.0 (shapefile)
theme_raw: hydrology / catchments + attributes | hydro-environmental attributes (basins) | hydrology
notes: HydroBASINS levels 1-12 enriched with 56 hydro-environmental variables.
verify_notes: Figshare downloader returns 403 to bot; resource likely alive via browser | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: BasinATLAS v1.0 是 HydroATLAS 体系的组成部分，由麦吉尔大学 HydroLAB 团队发布于 figshare，全球覆盖。它在 HydroBASINS 1-12级流域单元基础上，附加了56项水文-环境变量（如气候、地形、土壤、土地覆盖等）。以 Shapefile 提供（约3.98GB），采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可直接下载。适用于流域尺度的水文环境分析、生态建模与水资源研究。
desc_en: BasinATLAS v1.0, part of the HydroATLAS framework, is published on figshare by McGill's HydroLAB with global coverage. It enriches HydroBASINS watershed units at levels 1-12 with 56 hydro-environmental variables spanning climate, terrain, soils and land cover. Provided as shapefile (about 3.98 GB) under CC-BY 4.0 with direct download, it supports basin-scale hydro-environmental analysis, ecological modeling and water-resources research.

name: Global Forest Watch Open Data Portal (ArcGIS Hub)
theme_raw: Forests, land use, concessions, conservation | forest concessions, IFL, plantations, indigenous lands | Forest cover & drivers
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, CSV, WFS, GeoServices, vector tiles
access: Open via ArcGIS Hub UI + REST/WFS endpoints
notes: Root portal; each dataset page exposes Hub item ID, FeatureServer URL, and download links. Backed by ArcGIS Online (hosted FeatureServers).
verify_notes: Portal home reached but page is JS-heavy; content not fully extractable via fetch. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Global Forest Watch（GFW）开放数据门户由世界资源研究所（WRI）运营，基于 ArcGIS Hub，全球覆盖并含大量国别图层。该门户汇集森林变化、土地覆盖、水文等主题的空间数据，各数据集页面提供 Hub 条目 ID、要素服务 URL 与下载链接。支持 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV、WFS、矢量瓦片等多种格式，默认采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适用于森林监测、毁林分析与环境治理研究。
desc_en: The Global Forest Watch (GFW) Open Data Portal, run by the World Resources Institute on ArcGIS Hub, has global coverage with many country layers. It aggregates spatial data on forest change, land cover and hydrography, with each dataset page exposing a Hub item ID, FeatureServer URL and download links. Backed by hosted feature services, it offers Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, CSV, WFS and vector tiles, defaulting to a CC-BY 4.0 license. It supports forest monitoring, deforestation analysis and environmental governance.

name: Global Mangrove Watch (GMW) v3.0 — Annual Mangrove Extent (1996–2020)
provider: Aberystwyth University / JAXA / soloEO / Wetlands International (Bunting et al.)
theme_raw: mangrove extent / coastal wetlands | 红树林 / mangrove extent + change (1996–2020) | Coastal habitat (mangroves)
file_size: 5.3 GB total; vector ~182-194 MB/year; raster ~66-68 MB/year
notes: Primary dataset published with the Bunting et al. 2022 RS paper; vector shapefiles per epoch.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Global Mangrove Watch（GMW）v3.0 是全球红树林年度分布数据集，覆盖1996至2020年共11个时相，由 Bunting 等（阿伯里斯特威斯大学、JAXA、Wetlands International 等）发布。数据基于卫星遥感绘制全球红树林范围，记录到1996年约152604平方公里、2020年约147359平方公里。提供 Shapefile、GeoTIFF 与 XLSX（总计约5.3GB），采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，经 Zenodo 下载。适用于红树林监测、海岸带生态与碳汇研究。
desc_en: Global Mangrove Watch (GMW) v3.0 is a global annual mangrove-extent dataset spanning 11 epochs from 1996 to 2020, released by Bunting et al. (Aberystwyth University, JAXA, Wetlands International and partners). Mapped from satellite imagery, it records about 152,604 km² of mangroves in 1996 and 147,359 km² in 2020. Provided as Shapefile, GeoTIFF and XLSX (about 5.3 GB total) under CC-BY-4.0 via Zenodo, it supports mangrove monitoring, coastal-ecosystem and blue-carbon research.

name: GloRiC v1.0 (Global River Classification)
provider: HydroSHEDS associated - Ouellet Dallaire et al.
theme_raw: river type classification | river classification (Canada) | Global river reach classification (hydrology, physiography, climate)
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GloRiC v1.0（全球河流分类）由 Ouellet Dallaire 等编制，属 HydroSHEDS 关联产品，全球覆盖，包含约850万条河段。该数据基于水文、气候与形态特征对全球河流进行分类，为河流生态与水文研究提供统一分类框架。以 Shapefile 提供（约575MB），可经 HTTP 直接下载，遵循 HydroSHEDS 使用条款。适用于河流类型分析、淡水生态评估与水系研究。
desc_en: GloRiC v1.0 (Global River Classification), by Ouellet Dallaire et al., is a HydroSHEDS-associated product with global coverage spanning about 8.5 million river reaches. It classifies the world's rivers by hydrological, climatic and morphological characteristics, providing a consistent typology for river-ecology and hydrology research. Distributed as a shapefile (about 575 MB) via direct HTTP under HydroSHEDS terms, it supports river-type analysis, freshwater-ecosystem assessment and river-network studies.

name: GMBA Mountain Inventory v2.0
provider: Global Mountain Biodiversity Assessment (Univ. Bern) / EarthEnv
theme_raw: hierarchical global mountain ranges (polygons) | 山脉 / mountain ranges (hierarchical polygons) | mountain ranges
doi_or_citation: Snethlage et al. 2022, doi:10.1038/s41597-022-01256-y; dataset doi:10.48601/earthenv-t9k2-1407
notes: Best authoritative open mountain-range polygon layer; uses rivers to split ranges; companion to GMBA k3binds, K2/K3 classifications.
verify_notes: GMBA v2: All/Basic/300 Selection layers; custom download tool | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GMBA 山脉编目 v2.0 由全球山地生物多样性评估（GMBA，伯尔尼大学）与 EarthEnv 发布，全球覆盖，是权威的开放山脉范围多边形图层。数据利用河流分割山脉，提供标准版（8327个重叠多边形）与广义版（8616个）等多个子集，并配套 K2/K3 分类与 gmbaR 工具包。以 ESRI Shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可直接下载。适用于山地生物多样性、气候与地理研究。
desc_en: The GMBA Mountain Inventory v2.0, from the Global Mountain Biodiversity Assessment (University of Bern) and EarthEnv, offers global coverage and is the authoritative open polygon layer of mountain ranges. It uses rivers to split ranges and provides multiple subsets, including a Standard set (8,327 overlapping polygons) and a Broad set (8,616), with companion K2/K3 classifications and the gmbaR package. Distributed as ESRI shapefile under CC-BY-4.0 with direct download, it supports mountain-biodiversity, climate and geographic research.

name: Major hydrological basins of the world
notes: Derived from HydroSHEDS + Hydro1K; verified direct shapefile download.
verify_notes: FAO catalog, last update 2026-02-17 | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: FAO AQUASTAT 发布的世界主要水文流域数据集，全球覆盖，以多边形划分世界主要流域。该数据派生自 HydroSHEDS 与 Hydro1K，提供全球尺度统一的流域边界图层（约2011年发布，无更新计划）。以 ESRI Shapefile 提供，采用 CC BY-SA 4.0 许可，可开放下载且下载链接已验证。适用于水资源评估、跨境流域分析与全球水文研究。
desc_en: Published by FAO AQUASTAT, the Major Hydrological Basins of the World dataset provides global coverage, delineating the world's principal river basins as polygons. Derived from HydroSHEDS and Hydro1K, it offers a consistent global-scale basin-boundary layer (released around 2011, with no planned updates). Available as ESRI Shapefile under CC BY-SA 4.0 with verified open download, it supports water-resources assessment, transboundary-basin analysis and global hydrology research.

name: National Hydro Network (NHN) - GeoBase
theme_raw: Rivers, lakes, drainage network | lakes, rivers, streams, canals, islands, obstacles, dams, drainage network, toponymy | hydrography
formats_now: WMS, GPKG, SHP, FGDB, KMZ, GML
notes: FTP index at ftp.maps.canada.ca/pub/nrcan_rncan/vector/geobase_nhn_rhn/index/. Nova Scotia Hydrographic Network (NSHN) is a finer provincial complement.
verify_notes: Last modified 2022-11-07; ongoing maintenance | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 加拿大国家水文网络（NHN，GeoBase）由加拿大自然资源部发布，覆盖加拿大全境。该数据以1:50000比例尺提供权威的地表水文要素（水道、湖泊、河流网络等），是加拿大基础地理空间数据之一。提供 GML、KML、Shapefile、GeoPackage 多种格式，采用加拿大开放政府许可，可直接下载（FTP 索引可用）。适用于水文建模、洪水分析与国家级地理空间应用；新斯科舍水文网络（NSHN）为更精细的省级补充。
desc_en: The National Hydro Network (NHN, GeoBase), from Natural Resources Canada, covers all of Canada. At 1:50,000 scale, it provides authoritative surface-water features such as watercourses, lakes and river networks, and is one of Canada's foundational geospatial datasets. Available as GML, KML, shapefile and GeoPackage under the Open Government Licence - Canada with direct download (an FTP index is available), it supports hydrological modeling, flood analysis and national geospatial applications; the Nova Scotia Hydrographic Network (NSHN) is a finer provincial complement.

name: NCEI Bathymetric Data Viewer - Survey Footprints / Tracklines
theme_raw: Multibeam survey footprints, singlebeam tracklines, NOS hydrographic survey outlines, crowdsourced bathymetry tracks | Seafloor / bathymetric contours | Multibeam tracklines, NOS hydro survey footprints, BAG footprints, ENC vector charts
formats: Shapefile, KML, GeoJSON via ArcGIS REST query
notes: Vector layers (footprints/tracklines) are distinct from the raster DEMs - this is the metadata index of where surveys exist.
verify_notes: Trailing-slash redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NOAA NCEI（前 NGDC）的测深数据查看器提供调查覆盖范围/航迹线的矢量图层，覆盖全球海域。该数据是记录测深调查存在位置的元数据索引，与栅格 DEM 产品不同，用于查询特定区域有哪些测深观测。可通过地图查看器及 ArcGIS REST 服务访问，输出 Shapefile、KML、GeoJSON，属公共领域数据。适用于海洋测深数据发现、调查规划与水深数据管理。
desc_en: The NOAA NCEI (formerly NGDC) Bathymetric Data Viewer provides vector layers of survey footprints and tracklines covering the global oceans. Distinct from the raster DEM products, these are a metadata index of where bathymetric surveys exist, used to discover available observations for a given area. Accessible via a map viewer and ArcGIS REST services with Shapefile, KML and GeoJSON output, the public-domain data support bathymetric data discovery, survey planning and depth-data management.

name: RiverATLAS v1.0 (shapefile)
theme_raw: hydrology / rivers + attributes | hydro-environmental attributes (rivers) | hydrology / rivers
notes: ~8.5M river reaches with 281 hydro-environmental attributes.
verify_notes: Figshare downloader returns 403 to bot | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: RiverATLAS v1.0 是 HydroATLAS 体系的组成部分，由麦吉尔大学 HydroLAB 团队发布于 figshare，全球覆盖，包含约850万条河段。每条河段附加281项水文-环境属性（气候、地形、土壤、土地覆盖、人为影响等），为河流尺度的环境分析提供丰富信息。以 Shapefile 提供（约2.55GB），采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可直接下载。适用于河流生态、水文连通性与淡水保护研究。
desc_en: RiverATLAS v1.0, part of the HydroATLAS framework, is published on figshare by McGill's HydroLAB with global coverage spanning about 8.5 million river reaches. Each reach is enriched with 281 hydro-environmental attributes covering climate, terrain, soils, land cover and human pressures, providing rich information for reach-scale environmental analysis. Provided as shapefile (about 2.55 GB) under CC-BY 4.0 with direct download, it supports river-ecology, hydrological-connectivity and freshwater-conservation research.

name: Basin90m - Global dataset of drainage system shapes
theme_raw: Hydrology - drainage basins & rivers | 流域 / drainage basin morphology (1.6M basins)
coverage: Global, 667,629 basins >50 km², 90 m DEM derived
feature_count: 667,629 drainage basins with areas over 50 km2
notes: Vector basins and river network shapefiles by continent and stream order
verify_notes: ESSD paper, dataset hosted at GFZ DOI 10.5880/GFZ.4.6.2023.004 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Basin90m 是全球排水系统形态数据集（Lin 等，ESSD 2024），由 GFZ 数据服务发布，全球覆盖，包含667629个面积超过50平方公里的流域，基于90米分辨率 DEM 推导。数据以 Shapefile 形式按大洲和河流级别提供流域多边形与河网线要素。采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可经 DOI 开放下载（约7.8GB与2.5GB两部分）。适用于全球水文建模、流域分析与河网研究。
desc_en: Basin90m (Lin et al., ESSD 2024) is a global dataset of drainage-system shapes published via GFZ Data Services, covering 667,629 basins larger than 50 km² and derived from a 90 m DEM. It provides basin polygons and river-network lines as shapefiles organized by continent and stream order. Released under CC-BY-4.0 with open DOI-based download (about 7.8 GB and 2.5 GB components), it supports global hydrological modeling, basin delineation and river-network research.

name: China Reservoir Database (CRD) v1.1 — all reservoirs
provider: Song et al. (ESSD); hosted on Zenodo
license: Open (CC BY 4.0 per Zenodo/ESSD convention; not explicitly stated on record)
file_size: 40.1 GB (this version); 50.3 GB total all versions
notes: CRD_v11_all_reservoirs layer with location, inundation area, estimated storage, river order, discharge, residence time
verify_notes: Zenodo DOI redirect, normal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国水库数据库（CRD）v1.1 由 Song 等（ESSD）编制并托管于 Zenodo，覆盖中国全境，包含97435个水库多边形、总面积约50085平方公里。CRD_v11_all_reservoirs 图层提供位置、淹没面积、估算库容、河流级别、流量与滞留时间等属性。以 Shapefile 与 CSV 提供（本版本约40.1GB），通常采用 CC BY 4.0 许可（记录页未明确声明），可直接下载。适用于水资源管理、水库蓄水分析与水文研究。
desc_en: The China Reservoir Database (CRD) v1.1, by Song et al. (ESSD) and hosted on Zenodo, covers all of China with 97,435 reservoir polygons totaling about 50,085 km². The CRD_v11_all_reservoirs layer carries attributes such as location, inundation area, estimated storage, river order, discharge and residence time. Provided as Shapefile and CSV (about 40.1 GB for this version), typically under CC BY 4.0 (not explicitly stated on the record) with direct download, it supports water-resources management, reservoir-storage analysis and hydrology research.

name: China Reservoir Dataset (CRD) - SciDB mirror
notes: Domestic Chinese mirror of CRD; sometimes more accessible than Zenodo in CN.
verify_notes: ScienceDB landing page reachable; content sparse via fetch (likely JS-rendered) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国水库数据集（CRD）的 Science Data Bank（科学数据银行，中科院）镜像，覆盖中国全境，是 CRD 的国内镜像版本，在中国境内访问通常比 Zenodo 更便捷。提供 Shapefile 与 CSV 格式，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，开放访问。内容与 CRD 一致，记录中国水库的位置与水文属性。适用于水资源管理、水库分析与国内水文研究。
desc_en: This is the Science Data Bank (CAS) mirror of the China Reservoir Dataset (CRD), covering all of China. As a domestic mirror of CRD, it is often more accessible than Zenodo within China. Provided as Shapefile and CSV under CC BY 4.0 with open access, its content matches CRD, documenting Chinese reservoir locations and hydrological attributes. It supports water-resources management, reservoir analysis and domestic hydrology research.

name: China-LDRL: Large Dams, Reservoirs, and Lakes of China (2019)
theme_raw: hydrography / surface water infrastructure | hydrography / dams
formats: Shapefile (3 layers: large dams, large lakes, large reservoirs)
notes: Primary dataset of the paper; large dams with class/lon/lat/reservoir-ID, lake polygons with area/perimeter, reservoir polygons linked to dam IDs.
verify_notes: Figshare landing returns 403 to WebFetch; DOI itself resolves | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: China-LDRL（中国大型水坝、水库与湖泊数据集，2019年）由 Wang 等（ESSD 2022）发布于 figshare，覆盖中国2019年现状。数据包含三个图层：大型水坝（含类别、经纬度、关联水库 ID）、大型湖泊（含面积、周长）与大型水库多边形（关联水坝 ID）。以 Shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，开放下载。作为该论文的核心数据集，适用于水资源管理、大坝-水库-湖泊关联分析与水文研究。
desc_en: China-LDRL (Large Dams, Reservoirs, and Lakes of China, 2019), by Wang et al. (ESSD 2022) and published on figshare, reflects China's status in 2019. It comprises three layers: large dams (with class, longitude/latitude and linked reservoir ID), large lakes (with area and perimeter) and large reservoir polygons linked to dam IDs. The primary dataset of the paper, it is provided as shapefiles under CC-BY 4.0 with open download, supporting water-resources management, dam-reservoir-lake linkage analysis and hydrology research.

name: DARTS - Retrogressive Thaw Slumps (Arctic)
theme_canonical: Hydrography | Land cover & land use | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: Arctic land disturbance | thermokarst/permafrost lake polygons
formats_now: GeoTIFF, SHP, GeoJSON, GPKG, LAS, NetCDF, Parquet, CSV
notes: Vector polygons of thaw slumps from DL pipeline; rare niche
verify_notes: Registry has 480 datasets; CKAN API available | lychee:Rejected status code: 502 Bad Gateway
desc_zh: DARTS 是德国阿尔弗雷德·韦格纳研究所北极冻土地理空间中心发布的退化性融冻滑塌（retrogressive thaw slumps）矢量数据集，覆盖泛北极地区。数据通过深度学习识别管线从遥感影像提取热融滑塌多边形，托管于 CKAN 平台，提供 Shapefile/GeoPackage 格式，含约 480 个子数据集，采用开放许可。它是研究北极永久冻土退化、碳释放与地貌变化的稀缺专题资源。
desc_en: DARTS, from AWI's Arctic Permafrost Geospatial Centre, is a pan-Arctic vector inventory of retrogressive thaw slumps. The polygons are extracted from remote-sensing imagery using a deep-learning pipeline and served via a CKAN catalogue spanning roughly 480 component datasets in Shapefile/GeoPackage form under open licensing. It is a rare, niche resource for studying permafrost degradation, thaw-driven landscape change and associated carbon release across the high latitudes.

name: FWS National Wetlands Inventory (fws-nwi)
theme_raw: Wetlands / hydrography | Wetlands polygons + riparian + lines
notes: Polygon wetlands geometries by state.
verify_notes: JS-rendered page; reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国国家湿地清查（NWI）由美国鱼类及野生动物管理局制作，是覆盖全美各州及领地的权威湿地矢量数据集，以多边形描绘湿地范围与类型。此版本由 Microsoft Planetary Computer 从原始 Shapefile/GDB 转换为 GeoParquet，通过 STAC 目录与 Azure Blob 提供，属公有领域。常用于湿地保护、水文分析、土地利用规划与生态评估。
desc_en: The FWS National Wetlands Inventory is the US Fish & Wildlife Service's authoritative mapping of wetland extent and type as polygons across the United States and its territories. This release, hosted on the Microsoft Planetary Computer, converts the source shapefiles/GDB into cloud-friendly GeoParquet accessible through STAC and Azure Blob, and is in the public domain. It underpins wetland conservation, hydrologic analysis, land-use planning and ecological assessment work.

name: Global River Topology (GRIT) vector datasets
theme_raw: Hydrology / river networks | bifurcating river network incl. canals, distributaries, deltas
notes: Tributary + distributary global river network; 7 regional files
verify_notes: GRIT v0.6, ~27.6 GB total | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球河流拓扑数据集（GRIT）是 2024 年发布的全球河网矢量产品，独特之处在于同时刻画了支流（汇流）与分流（分汊）的复杂拓扑结构，更真实地表达三角洲与多河道地区。数据以 GeoPackage 提供（EPSG:8857 与 4326），按 7 个区域文件组织，总量约 27.6 GB，采用 CC-BY-NC 4.0 许可。适用于水文建模、河网连通性与洪水分析研究。
desc_en: The Global River Topology (GRIT) dataset is a 2024 global river-network vector product distinguished by representing both tributary (converging) and distributary (branching) channels, capturing deltas and multi-thread reaches more realistically than tree-only networks. It is distributed as GeoPackage files in EPSG:8857 and 4326, organised into seven regional files totalling about 27.6 GB, under CC-BY-NC 4.0. GRIT supports hydrological modelling, network-connectivity studies and flood analysis.

name: Global spatial dataset of mangrove genus distribution (seaward & riverine)
theme_raw: 红树林属级分布 | mangrove species composition
notes: 冷门：在 Bunting 范围之上叠加 genus level zonation；Figshare/Zenodo 仓库托管。
verify_notes: Nature SSO redirect; article typically accessible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Sun 等人 2024 年发表于《Scientific Data》的全球红树林属级分布数据集，区分向海与河岸两类生境。它在 Bunting 等全球红树林范围底图之上叠加了属（genus）级别的带状分带信息，以 Shapefile 与 CSV 形式作为论文补充资料发布（托管于 Figshare/Zenodo），采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适用于热带海岸带生态、红树林生物多样性与碳储研究。
desc_en: This is a global mangrove genus-distribution dataset by Sun et al. (Scientific Data, 2024) that distinguishes seaward and riverine settings. Building on established global mangrove extent maps such as Bunting's, it adds genus-level zonation, released as Shapefile and CSV paper supplements via Figshare/Zenodo under CC-BY 4.0. It is a specialised layer for tropical coastal ecology, mangrove biodiversity and blue-carbon research.

name: GLOBathy global lakes bathymetry dataset
what_changes: Generates bathymetric maps for 1.4M+ HydroLAKES waterbodies via GIS framework using HydroLAKES geometric/geophysical attributes
notes: 1:1 aligned to HydroLAKES IDs
verify_notes: Nature IDP cookie redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GLOBathy 是全球湖泊水深（测深）数据集，为全球范围的湖泊提供水下地形/深度估算。其要素与 HydroLAKES 的湖泊 ID 一一对应，便于与该旗舰湖泊数据库联合使用。数据采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。常用于湖泊蓄水量计算、水量平衡、生态与气候模型中的湖泊参数化。
desc_en: GLOBathy is a global lake bathymetry dataset providing estimated underwater depth/geometry for lakes worldwide. Its records are aligned one-to-one with HydroLAKES lake IDs, making it straightforward to join with that flagship global lake database. Released under CC-BY 4.0, it is widely used for estimating lake storage volumes, water-balance studies, and parameterising lakes in ecological and climate models.

name: GLRSED - Global Lakes/Reservoirs Surface Extent Dataset
provider: Bai et al. - ESSD/Geoscience Data Journal
formats_now: PDF preprint; data on Zenodo doi 10.5281/zenodo.8121174
lychee_status: Network error: Network error: Connection reset by peer (os error 54) (error sending request for url (https://essd.copernicus.org/preprints/essd-2023-216))
notes: Integration of HydroLAKES + GRanD + OSM with multi-source attribute fusion
verify_notes: Preprint; revision not accepted in ESSD but dataset still available | lychee:Network error: Network error: Connection reset by peer (os error 54) (error sending request for url (https://essd.copernicus.org/preprints/essd-2023-216))
desc_zh: GLRSED（全球湖泊/水库表面范围数据集）由 Bai 等人发布，是一个全球性湖库矢量产品，通过融合 HydroLAKES、GRanD 大坝/水库数据库与 OpenStreetMap，并进行多源属性整合而成。数据以 Shapefile/GeoPackage 直接下载提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适用于湖库面积统计、水资源管理与水文水生态分析。
desc_en: GLRSED, the Global Lakes/Reservoirs Surface Extent Dataset by Bai et al., is a global vector product created by integrating HydroLAKES, the GRanD dam/reservoir database and OpenStreetMap with multi-source attribute fusion. It is provided as directly downloadable Shapefile/GeoPackage under CC-BY 4.0. The dataset supports inventories of lake and reservoir surface area, water-resource management and broader hydrological and limnological analysis.

name: GSHHG – Global Self-consistent, Hierarchical, High-resolution Geography
theme_raw: Coastline / shoreline polygons + rivers/borders | 海岸线/湖泊/河流
license: LGPL (data public domain components, code LGPL)
doi_or_citation: Wessel, P., and W.H.F. Smith (1996). JGR 101(B4), 8741-8743.
notes: Anchor dataset for global coastlines; hierarchical (land/lake/island-in-lake/pond-on-island).
verify_notes: Latest v2.3.7 (2017); page last updated 2018 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GSHHG（全球自洽分层高分辨率地理数据库）是由夏威夷大学 Wessel 与 Smith 维护的经典全球海岸线与水陆边界矢量数据集，源自 NOAA 早期数据。它采用分层结构（陆地、湖泊、岛中湖、湖中岛/塘等），提供多种分辨率，格式为 Shapefile 与 netCDF（供 GMT 使用），v2.3.7 于 2017 年发布，采用 LGPL 许可。是全球制图与海岸线分析的基础锚定数据集。
desc_en: GSHHG (Global Self-consistent, Hierarchical, High-resolution Geography), maintained by Wessel & Smith at the University of Hawaii from earlier NOAA data, is the classic global vector dataset of coastlines and land/water boundaries. It uses a hierarchical structure (land, lake, island-in-lake, pond-on-island) at multiple resolutions and ships as Shapefile and netCDF for GMT; version 2.3.7 dates to 2017, released under the LGPL. It is a foundational anchor layer for global mapping and coastline analysis.

name: GSriver: An improved global river vector dataset based on multi-source river data fusion
theme_raw: Hydrology / rivers | 航道 - 河流+运河矢量
notes: Fuses OSM waterways, HydroRIVERS, Global River Topology; Russia stored separately for size
verify_notes: Redirects to Nature IDP cookie consent; article exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GSriver 是一个通过多源河流数据融合改进的全球河流矢量数据集，发表于《Scientific Data》。它整合了 OSM 水道、HydroRIVERS 与全球河流拓扑（GRIT）等来源，以 Shapefile 形式开放发布（CC-BY 许可），因数据量大俄罗斯部分单独存放。适用于全球及区域尺度的河网制图、水文建模与连通性分析。
desc_en: GSriver is an improved global river vector dataset produced by fusing multiple river data sources, published in Scientific Data. It integrates OSM waterways, HydroRIVERS and the Global River Topology, and is released openly as Shapefile under a CC-BY licence, with Russia stored separately because of its size. It supports global and regional river-network mapping, hydrological modelling and connectivity analysis.

name: Hydrological basins in North America
notes: Regional sub-basin polygons.
verify_notes: FAO Hydrological basins in North America | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 这是 FAO AQUASTAT 发布的北美洲水文流域矢量数据集，以多边形描绘该大陆的子流域单元，比例尺约 1:500 万，于 2021 年发布，格式为 ESRI Shapefile，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。作为区域性流域划分产品，常用于跨国水资源评估、流域尺度水文统计与制图参考。
desc_en: This FAO AQUASTAT dataset provides hydrological basins for North America as sub-basin polygons at roughly 1:5,000,000 scale, published in 2021 as an ESRI Shapefile under CC-BY 4.0. As a regional basin delineation it is commonly used for transboundary water-resource assessment, basin-scale hydrological statistics and cartographic reference.

name: Hydrological basins in South America
notes: Continental delineation; less-cited regional counterpart to the global product.
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 这是 FAO AQUASTAT 发布的南美洲水文流域矢量数据集，以多边形勾画该大陆的流域划分，比例尺约 1:500 万，2021 年发布，格式为 ESRI Shapefile，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。它是全球流域产品的区域对应版本，引用相对较少，适用于大陆尺度水资源评估与流域分析。
desc_en: This FAO AQUASTAT dataset delineates hydrological basins for South America as polygons at about 1:5,000,000 scale, published in 2021 as an ESRI Shapefile under CC-BY 4.0. A less-cited regional counterpart to the global basin product, it suits continental-scale water-resource assessment and basin-level hydrological analysis.

name: Inland water bodies in Africa
notes: Derived from Digital Chart of the World 1:1M; lake/lagoon/reservoir polygons with names and area.
verify_notes: FAO Water bodies in Africa | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 这是 FAO AQUASTAT 发布的非洲内陆水体矢量数据集，以多边形表示湖泊、潟湖与水库，并附带名称和面积属性。数据派生自 1:100 万比例尺的《数字世界图集》（Digital Chart of the World，1998 版），通过开放直接链接以 ESRI Shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适用于非洲水资源制图与区域水体统计。
desc_en: This FAO AQUASTAT dataset maps inland water bodies across Africa as polygons of lakes, lagoons and reservoirs with name and area attributes. It is derived from the 1:1,000,000-scale Digital Chart of the World (1998 edition) and offered as an ESRI Shapefile via an open direct link under CC-BY 4.0. It supports continental water-resource mapping and regional waterbody inventories.

name: JRC Global Surface Water - Vector Permanent Water (derived)
theme_raw: global surface water occurrence (vectorized via tools) | Surface water permanence
formats_now: 页面未明示 (实际下载页提供 GeoTIFF)
notes: Strictly raster, but ubiquitously vectorized into lake/river polygons by downstream products (HydroLAKES v2 candidates, GLAD).
verify_notes: JRC Global Surface Water Explorer；最新数据更新到 2021 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: JRC 全球地表水数据集由欧盟委员会联合研究中心制作，基于近 38 年的卫星影像刻画地表水的出现、变化与季节性。原始产品为 GeoTIFF 栅格（Pekel 等 2016 年发表于《Nature》），免费开放，但被广泛通过 Google Earth Engine 或社区工具矢量化为湖泊/河流多边形，供下游产品使用。是全球水体动态、洪水与干旱监测的权威基础数据。
desc_en: The JRC Global Surface Water dataset, from the European Commission Joint Research Centre, characterises the occurrence, change and seasonality of surface water from roughly 38 years of satellite imagery. The native product (Pekel et al., Nature 2016) is free, open GeoTIFF raster, but it is ubiquitously vectorised into lake and river polygons by downstream products via Earth Engine and community tools. It is an authoritative basis for global water-dynamics, flood and drought monitoring.

name: Lake-TopoCat (HydroLAKES-TopoCat v1.1)
formats_now: Shapefile (SHP), SLD style files; metadata in ISO-19139/DCAT-AP/RDF
notes: Adds catchment polygons + drainage topology to HydroLAKES
verify_notes: Mirrored on Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7916729. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Lake-TopoCat（HydroLAKES-TopoCat v1.1）由 Sikder 等人发布，在全球 HydroLAKES 湖泊数据库基础上补充了每个湖泊的汇水流域多边形与排水拓扑关系。数据以 Shapefile/GeoPackage 直接下载提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，并有配套 ESSD 论文。适用于湖泊连通性、湖泊上下游传输与流域尺度水文分析。
desc_en: Lake-TopoCat (HydroLAKES-TopoCat v1.1) by Sikder et al. augments the global HydroLAKES database with per-lake catchment polygons and drainage topology. It is provided as directly downloadable Shapefile/GeoPackage under CC-BY 4.0, documented in an ESSD paper. The dataset enables analysis of lake connectivity, upstream-downstream routing and catchment-scale hydrology.

name: LakeATLAS v1.0 (shapefile)
notes: HydroLAKES polygons enriched with hydro-environmental attributes.
verify_notes: Figshare downloader returns 403 to bot | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: LakeATLAS v1.0 是 McGill HydroLAB（Lehner 等，2022）发布的全球湖泊属性数据集，将 HydroLAKES 湖泊多边形与丰富的水文-环境属性（如气候、地形、土地覆盖、人类影响等）相结合。数据以 Shapefile 形式通过 figshare 提供（约 1.5 GB），采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。是湖泊生态、水质与全球湖泊比较研究的重要属性基础。
desc_en: LakeATLAS v1.0, from McGill's HydroLAB (Lehner et al., 2022), enriches HydroLAKES lake polygons with a broad suite of hydro-environmental attributes covering climate, terrain, land cover and human-impact descriptors. It is distributed as a roughly 1.5 GB Shapefile on figshare under CC-BY 4.0. The dataset is a key attribute foundation for lake ecology, water-quality and comparative global lake studies.

name: Major rivers of the world
notes: Polyline rivers; complements the basins layer.
verify_notes: FAO Major rivers | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 这是 FAO AQUASTAT 发布的全球主要河流矢量数据集，以折线（polyline）形式表示世界主要河流，比例尺约 1:1000 万，2014 年发布，格式为 ESRI Shapefile，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。它与 AQUASTAT 流域图层互补，适用于全球尺度水系制图、概览展示与水资源参考。
desc_en: This FAO AQUASTAT dataset represents the world's major rivers as polylines at roughly 1:10,000,000 scale, published in 2014 as an ESRI Shapefile under CC-BY 4.0. Complementing the AQUASTAT basins layer, it is suited to global-scale river cartography, overview mapping and water-resource reference.

name: MERIT Hydro & MERIT Hydro–Vector
provider: Yamazaki Lab, U. Tokyo; Lin et al.
theme_raw: river network, flow direction, width, HAND | Global hydrography - flow direction, river width, vectorized network
notes: 基于MERIT DEM；vector版同时含河流segment + 流域 + intermittent fraction
verify_notes: Old page redirects to global-hydrodynamics.github.io | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MERIT Hydro 及其矢量版由东京大学 Yamazaki 实验室（Lin 等）基于 MERIT DEM 制作，是覆盖全球（90°N 至 60°S）的高质量水文地形数据集。栅格版提供流向、汇流累积、河宽等图层；矢量版同时包含河段、流域单元与间歇性河流比例等信息，格式含 GeoTIFF 与 Shapefile/GeoPackage。需注册下载，采用 CC-BY-NC 4.0（科研用途）许可。广泛用于全球水文建模与河网分析。
desc_en: MERIT Hydro and its vector release, from the University of Tokyo's Yamazaki Lab (Lin et al.), are high-quality global hydrography products spanning 90 N to 60 S, derived from the MERIT DEM. The raster version supplies flow direction, accumulation and river width, while the vector version adds river segments, unit catchments and intermittent-flow fractions, in GeoTIFF and Shapefile/GeoPackage. Distributed under CC-BY-NC 4.0 for research with registration, it is widely used for global hydrological modelling and river-network analysis.

name: MERIT Hydro Vector (MERIT-Basins riv_pfaf shapefiles)
provider: Lin et al. / University of Tokyo
theme_raw: Global vector river flowlines + catchments | river reaches, unit catchments (~2.94M reaches)
access: Free download (registration via parent MERIT Hydro)
notes: ~58M river flowlines, 156,571 watersheds, organized by Pfafstetter level-2 basins
verify_notes: distributed via Google Drive, Globus, TPDC | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MERIT-Basins（riv_pfaf shapefiles）是基于 MERIT Hydro 衍生的全球河网与流域矢量数据集（Lin 等 2021），约 90 m 源分辨率，覆盖除南极外的全球。数据含约 5800 万条河流线段与 156,571 个流域，按 Pfafstetter 二级流域组织，以 Shapefile 提供，免费注册下载，采用 CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0 及 UCSD/CW3E 许可。是大尺度河流路由与水文建模的常用矢量基础。
desc_en: MERIT-Basins (riv_pfaf shapefiles) is a global river-network and watershed vector dataset derived from MERIT Hydro (Lin et al., 2021) at roughly 90 m source resolution, covering the globe except Antarctica. It contains about 58 million river flowlines and 156,571 watersheds organised by Pfafstetter level-2 basins, distributed as Shapefile with free registered download under CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0 plus a UCSD/CW3E licence. It is a common vector foundation for large-scale river routing and hydrological modelling.

name: MERIT-Basins / MERIT-Hydro vector network
provider: Lin, Yamazaki, Pan et al. (Scientific Data 2021)
theme_raw: 河流网 / global river network with variable drainage density | 航道 - 全球河网 (DEM 派生)
notes: Hosted at reachhydro.org / Princeton; cited heavily as Scientific Data paper.
verify_notes: Nature IDP cookie consent redirect; article accessible in browser | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Lin、Yamazaki、Pan 等人 2021 年发表于《Scientific Data》的 MERIT-Basins / MERIT-Hydro 全球矢量河网论文，提供河流线段与单元集水区两类矢量要素。数据托管于 reachhydro.org / Princeton，以 Shapefile 直接下载，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。作为 Scientific Data 论文被大量引用，是全球水文矢量分析的权威参考。
desc_en: This is the Lin, Yamazaki, Pan et al. (Scientific Data, 2021) paper describing the MERIT-Basins / MERIT-Hydro global vector river network, providing river flowlines and unit catchments. The data are hosted at reachhydro.org / Princeton for direct Shapefile download under CC-BY 4.0. Heavily cited as a Scientific Data publication, it is an authoritative reference for global hydrological vector analysis.

name: Spatially constrained global glacial lakes inventory
theme_raw: global glacial lakes | Glacial lakes / hydrology
notes: 全球级别，比仅HMA更广
verify_notes: Nature IDP auth redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一个 2025 年发表于《Scientific Data》的空间约束型全球冰湖清查数据集，覆盖全球冰川分布区，比仅限高山亚洲（HMA）的产品更广。它以受空间约束的方式识别冰湖，提供 Shapefile/GeoPackage 格式，作为论文补充资料发布，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适用于冰川退缩、冰湖溃决洪水（GLOF）风险与高山水文研究。
desc_en: This is a spatially constrained global glacial-lakes inventory published in Scientific Data (2025), covering glaciated regions worldwide and thus broader than products limited to High Mountain Asia. Glacial lakes are delineated under spatial constraints and released as Shapefile/GeoPackage paper supplements under CC-BY 4.0. It supports research on glacier retreat, glacial-lake outburst flood (GLOF) hazard and mountain hydrology.

name: SWORD (SWOT River Database)
notes: Integrates GRWL, MERIT-Hydro, HydroBASINS, GROD
verify_notes: SWORD v17b published 2025-04-28; actively maintained | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SWORD（SWOT 河流数据库）由北卡罗来纳大学与 NASA SWOT 任务团队制作，是为 SWOT 卫星观测设计的全球河流矢量数据库，覆盖宽度 ≥30 m 的河流，包含节点（nodes）与河段（reaches）要素。它整合了 GRWL、MERIT-Hydro、HydroBASINS 与 GROD 等多源数据，以 Shapefile 与 netCDF 形式通过 Zenodo 发布，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。是卫星测高与全球河流水文研究的关键基础。
desc_en: SWORD (the SWOT River Database), produced by UNC and the NASA SWOT mission, is a global river vector database built for SWOT satellite observations, covering rivers at least 30 m wide with node and reach features. It integrates GRWL, MERIT-Hydro, HydroBASINS and GROD, and is published on Zenodo as Shapefile and netCDF under CC-BY 4.0. It is a key foundation for satellite altimetry and global river-hydrology research.

name: USGS National Hydrography Dataset (NHD) MapServer / WFS
theme_raw: rivers, streams, lakes, ponds, canals, springs, dams, gages | hydrography (rivers, lakes)
formats_now: PNG/JPG/PDF/SVG images; JSON, GeoJSON, PBF queries; WMS, SOAP; Esri File GDB, Shapefile downloads
notes: Classic ESRI services. NHD is being deprecated in favor of 3DHP (3D Hydrography Program) but services remain active. WFS available alongside REST.
verify_notes: Active, data refreshed April 2026; high-res (1:24k) and medium-res (1:100k) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是美国地质调查局（USGS）The National Map 提供的国家水文数据集（NHD）地图服务，覆盖全美，以 ArcGIS REST MapServer、WMS 与 WFS 形式提供约 13 个图层（约 1:24,000 分辨率，单次查询上限 2000 条记录）。NHD 正逐步被 3DHP（三维水文计划）取代，但服务仍然可用，数据属美国公有领域。适用于美国河流、湖泊与水文要素的在线查询与制图。
desc_en: This is the USGS National Hydrography Dataset (NHD) map service from The National Map, covering the United States and exposing about 13 layers at roughly 1:24,000 scale (2,000-record query cap) via ArcGIS REST MapServer, WMS and WFS. NHD is being deprecated in favour of the 3D Hydrography Program (3DHP), but these public-domain services remain active. It supports online query and mapping of US rivers, lakes and hydrographic features.

name: WISE WFD Reference Spatial Datasets (RBD, surface/groundwater bodies, monitoring sites)
notes: RiverBasinDistrict, SubUnit, SurfaceWaterBody (polygon+centreline), GroundWaterBody, MonitoringSite.
verify_notes: Page exceeded content length but loads | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是欧洲环境署（EEA）与欧委会环境总司联合发布的 WISE 水框架指令（WFD）参考空间数据集，覆盖欧盟及 EFTA 国家，对应 2010 与 2016 两个报告周期。数据包含流域区（RBD）、子单元、地表水体（多边形与中心线）、地下水体与监测站点等图层，以 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage 开放下载。适用于欧洲水政策、水体状态评估与跨国水管理研究。
desc_en: This is the WISE Water Framework Directive reference spatial dataset from the EEA and DG ENV, covering EU and EFTA countries for the 2010 and 2016 reporting cycles. It includes River Basin Districts, sub-units, surface water bodies (polygons and centrelines), groundwater bodies and monitoring sites, downloadable as Shapefile and GeoPackage. It supports European water policy, water-status assessment and transboundary water-management analysis.

name: World Bank Non-Determined Legal Status Areas (NDLSA)
theme_raw: Disputed / non-determined legal status polygons | Ocean / hydrographic mask
access: Open download from Development Data Hub (bundled with Official Boundaries package)
file_size: Admin 1 Additional Attributes: 299.6 KB; Admin 2 Additional Attributes: 5.7 MB
notes: Distinguishes contested zones consistent with WB neutral cartographic policy - rare openly licensed equivalent.
verify_notes: Same WB dataset; includes ocean mask layer | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是世界银行制图部门发布的非确定法律地位区域（NDLSA）数据集，作为世界银行官方边界包的一部分，标注全球范围内边界状态未决或存在争议的区域，与世行中立制图政策保持一致。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON 与 GeoPackage 格式，可从开发数据中心开放下载，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。是少有的开放许可争议区划界参考数据。
desc_en: This is the World Bank Cartography Unit's Non-Determined Legal Status Areas (NDLSA) dataset, part of the World Bank Official Boundaries package, marking regions with unresolved or contested boundary status consistent with the Bank's neutral cartographic policy. It is provided as Shapefile, GeoJSON and GeoPackage for open download from the Development Data Hub under CC-BY 4.0. It is a rare, openly licensed reference for delineating contested zones.

name: World Karst Aquifer Map (WHYMAP WOKAM)
provider: BGR / UNESCO WHYMAP (Chen, Goldscheider, Auler et al.)
theme_raw: 喀斯特含水层 / karst aquifers (carbonate + evaporite) | karst / carbonate lithology / hydrogeology
notes: Underused outside hydrogeology; one of few global karst polygon layers.
verify_notes: BGR-hosted; no explicit open license; contact BGR for use terms | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界岩溶含水层图（WOKAM）由 BGR 与 UNESCO WHYMAP 计划（Chen、Goldscheider、Auler 等）制作，是全球尺度的岩溶（喀斯特）含水层分布图，比例尺约 1:2500 万。数据以 Shapefile 与 WMS 形式开放提供（另有 PDF 地图），由 BGR 开放许可。它是少数全球岩溶多边形图层之一，在水文地质领域之外仍较少被利用，适用于地下水、岩溶系统与水资源评估。
desc_en: The World Karst Aquifer Map (WOKAM), produced by BGR and the UNESCO WHYMAP programme (Chen, Goldscheider, Auler et al.), is a global-scale map of karst aquifer distribution at about 1:25,000,000. It is openly available as Shapefile and WMS (plus PDF maps) under a BGR open licence. As one of few global karst polygon layers, it remains underused outside hydrogeology and supports groundwater, karst-system and water-resource assessment.

name: WWF HydroATLAS Basins Level 12 (GEE asset)
notes: Cloud-hosted vector access to BasinATLAS L12.
verify_notes: Active GEE dataset catalog page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 WWF HydroATLAS 流域第 12 级（最精细级别）的 Google Earth Engine 矢量资产（Linke 等 2019），将 BasinATLAS L12 子流域以云端 FeatureCollection 形式提供，可在 Earth Engine 中直接查询与导出。每个流域附带 56 个变量、共 281 个属性的水文-环境信息，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适用于全球流域尺度的水文、生态与环境分析。
desc_en: This is the Google Earth Engine vector asset for WWF HydroATLAS Basins level 12 (the finest level; Linke et al., 2019), exposing BasinATLAS L12 sub-basins as a cloud-hosted, queryable and exportable FeatureCollection. Each basin carries 56 hydro-environmental variables across 281 attributes, under CC-BY 4.0. It supports global basin-scale hydrological, ecological and environmental analysis directly in Earth Engine.

name: 中国土壤特征数据集 (2010)
provider: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 (TPDC)
notes: 基于 1:100 万土壤图与 8595 个土壤剖面
verify_notes: 60s timeout; TPDC moved to data.tpdc.ac.cn newer paths | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国土壤特征数据集（2010）由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，覆盖中国全境，基于 1:100 万土壤图与 8595 个土壤剖面编制，提供土壤类型与理化属性信息。数据同时包含 Shapefile 矢量与栅格格式，开放获取，采用 CC-BY 许可。适用于土壤制图、农业、水文与生态环境建模中的土壤参数化。
desc_en: The China Soil Characteristics Dataset (2010), released by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), covers all of China and is compiled from a 1:1,000,000 soil map together with 8,595 soil profiles, providing soil type and physico-chemical attributes. It is distributed in both Shapefile vector and raster form as open data under CC-BY. It supports soil mapping and soil parameterisation in agricultural, hydrological and eco-environmental modelling.

name: 中国湿地分布数据集 (CAS Wetlands / NIGLAS)
provider: 中国科学院东北地理与农业生态研究所 (NEIGAE) 湿地遥感团队
theme_raw: 湿地分类 (3大类12亚类) | wetlands
coverage: 中国 + 大型国际重要湿地
notes: 中文圈最权威国家级湿地矢量, 含Ramsar大型国际重要湿地遥感分类; 通过 nesdc + geodoi 发布
verify_notes: TLS self-signed certificate error | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国湿地分布数据集由中国科学院东北地理与农业生态研究所（NEIGAE）湿地遥感团队（毛德华等，2024）制作，覆盖中国并含大型国际重要湿地，是中文学界最权威的国家级湿地矢量产品之一。数据通过遥感分类得到，提供 Shapefile 矢量与 10 m 栅格，含 Ramsar 国际重要湿地分类，经 NESDC 与 geodoi 共享，需注册下载。适用于湿地保护、监测与生态研究。
desc_en: The China Wetlands dataset, produced by the wetland remote-sensing team at the CAS Northeast Institute of Geography and Agroecology (NEIGAE; Mao Dehua et al., 2024), covers China plus major internationally important wetlands and is among the most authoritative national wetland vector products in the Chinese literature. Derived from remote-sensing classification, it provides Shapefile vectors and 10 m raster, includes Ramsar wetlands, and is shared via NESDC and geodoi with registration. It supports wetland conservation, monitoring and ecological research.

name: 中国湿地空间分布专题数据集 (China Wetland Spatial Distribution 2020)
provider: National Earth System Science Data Center (NESSDC) / Mao et al.
license_now: National Earth System Science Data Center, all rights reserved (no explicit open license)
formats: shapefile / GeoTIFF (object-based classification of Landsat 8 OLI products vectorised)
access: Web download via thematic page after registration
doi_or_citation: Mao et al. 2020, China Wetland Map based on Landsat 8 OLI
notes: Includes mangrove and Spartina alterniflora coastal sublayers.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国湿地空间分布专题数据集（2020）由国家地球系统科学数据中心（NESSDC）/毛等发布，覆盖全国，基于 Landsat 8 OLI 影像的面向对象分类并矢量化，包含红树林与互花米草等海岸湿地子图层。数据提供 Shapefile 与 GeoTIFF 格式，经注册后从专题页面下载，版权归数据中心所有（无明确开放许可）。适用于全国湿地制图、海岸带与生态环境研究。
desc_en: The China Wetland Spatial Distribution thematic dataset (2020), from the National Earth System Science Data Center (NESSDC) and Mao et al., covers China nationwide, derived from object-based classification of Landsat 8 OLI imagery and vectorised, with coastal sublayers including mangrove and Spartina alterniflora. It is provided as Shapefile and GeoTIFF, downloadable from the thematic page after registration, with rights reserved by the data centre (no explicit open licence). It supports national wetland mapping, coastal-zone and eco-environmental research.

name: 中国第二次冰川编目数据集（V1.0，2006-2011）
provider: TPDC / 时空三极环境大数据平台
lychee_status: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/zh-hans/data/f92a4346-a33f-497d-9470-2b357ccb4246))

doi_or_citation: Guo W. et al., J. Glaciol., 2015
notes: 国内权威冰川矢量编目；含名称、流域码、GLIMS 码、面积、高程等丰富属性
verify_notes: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 - 第二次冰川编目; 页面内容少 | lychee:Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/zh-hans/data/f92a4346-a33f-497d-9470-2b357ccb4246))
desc_zh: 中国第二次冰川编目数据集（V1.0，2006-2011）由国家青藏高原科学数据中心 / 时空三极环境大数据平台发布，覆盖中国全境冰川，是国内权威的冰川矢量编目（Guo W. 等，J. Glaciol. 2015）。数据以 Shapefile 提供，含冰川名称、流域码、GLIMS 码、面积、高程等丰富属性，需注册下载。适用于冰川变化、冰冻圈与水资源研究。
desc_en: The Second Glacier Inventory of China (V1.0, 2006-2011), released via TPDC and the spatiotemporal three-poles big-data platform, covers glaciers across China and is the authoritative national glacier vector inventory (Guo W. et al., J. Glaciol., 2015). It is provided as Shapefile with rich attributes including glacier name, basin code, GLIMS code, area and elevation, downloadable with registration. It supports glacier-change, cryosphere and water-resource research.

name: 全国 1:25万 三级水系流域数据集 (PKU CUES)
provider: 北京大学城市与环境学院 GeoData
theme_raw: hydrography - rivers + basins | 中国生态/海洋功能区
license: PKU CUES 协议 (引用要求)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://cuesdata.pku.edu.cn/index.php?a=show&c=content&id=1729))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://cuesdata.pku.edu.cn/index.php?a=show&c=content&id=1729))
notes: 北大公开数据库, 中国高校水系矢量重要免费来源
verify_notes: Connection refused; server may be down or restricted | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://cuesdata.pku.edu.cn/index.php?a=show&c=content&id=1729))
desc_zh: 全国 1:25 万三级水系流域数据集由北京大学城市与环境学院 GeoData（CUES）发布，覆盖中国，提供 1:25 万比例尺的三级水系与流域矢量划分，格式为 Shapefile，需注册下载，使用须遵循 PKU CUES 引用协议。作为高校公开数据库，是中国水系矢量数据的重要免费来源，适用于流域分析、水文与区域地理研究。
desc_en: The national 1:250,000 third-level river-system and basin dataset, released by Peking University's College of Urban and Environmental Sciences GeoData (CUES), covers China and provides third-level drainage networks and basin delineations at 1:250,000 scale as Shapefile, downloadable with registration under the PKU CUES citation terms. As an open university database, it is an important free source of Chinese river-system vectors for basin analysis, hydrology and regional geography research.

name: 2000-2022 中国河流水系变化矢量数据集 (含河道水面宽度/中心线)
provider: 中国科学院南京地理与湖泊研究所 NIGLAS
coverage: 中国 (767 个>10km² 湖泊+全国河网)
notes: 中文圈水体矢量数据稀缺资源; 内含河面中心线/网络节点拓扑结构
verify_notes: 原 CAS 新闻页 404, 链接已失效 | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 2000-2022 中国河流水系变化矢量数据集由中国科学院南京地理与湖泊研究所（NIGLAS，王晓龙等，2022）制作，覆盖中国全国河网及 767 个面积大于 10 km² 的湖泊，记录河道水面宽度与中心线及其变化。数据以点/线/面 Shapefile 与栅格形式提供，含河网中心线与节点拓扑结构，开放共享但需注册下载。是中文圈稀缺的水体矢量与水系变化研究资源。
desc_en: The 2000-2022 China river-system change vector dataset, from the CAS Nanjing Institute of Geography and Limnology (NIGLAS; Wang Xiaolong et al., 2022), covers China's national river network plus 767 lakes larger than 10 km2, capturing channel water-surface width, centrelines and their changes. It is provided as point/line/polygon Shapefile and raster with centreline and node topology, openly shared but requiring registration. It is a scarce Chinese-language resource for waterbody vectors and river-system change analysis.

name: Africa Groundwater Atlas country GIS datasets
provider: British Geological Survey (BGS) + African geological surveys
notes: Strong cross-border coverage; underused outside hydrogeology community.
verify_notes: License now CC BY-SA, differs from OGL BGS | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 非洲地下水图集 GIS 数据集由英国地质调查局（BGS）联合非洲各国地质调查机构制作，覆盖非洲大陆及 43 个国家，提供与水文地质、含水层相关的矢量图层。数据以 Shapefile 直接下载，采用 CC-BY-SA 许可（MacDonald 等，2012）。其跨境覆盖能力强，但在水文地质社群之外较少被使用，适用于地下水资源评估与含水层研究。
desc_en: The Africa Groundwater Atlas GIS datasets, produced by the British Geological Survey (BGS) with African geological surveys, cover the continent and 43 countries, providing hydrogeology- and aquifer-related vector layers. They are offered as directly downloadable Shapefile under CC-BY-SA (MacDonald et al., 2012). With strong cross-border coverage yet underused outside hydrogeology, they support groundwater-resource assessment and aquifer research.

name: Algal blooms in global large lakes (MODIS 2003-2022)
what_changes: Lookup table linking GLAKES IDs to HydroLAKES IDs; applies MODIS-derived bloom severity to 1,956 large lakes
notes: Niche bloom climatology product
verify_notes: Algal blooms intensify in global large lakes 2003-2022 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一个基于 MODIS（2003-2022）的全球大型湖泊藻华（algal blooms）数据集，刻画全球大湖中藻华的发生分布与时间变化气候态。数据通过 Zenodo 发布（约 72.9 MB），采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。作为一个专题型藻华气候态产品，适用于湖泊富营养化、水质监测与长期生态变化研究。
desc_en: This is a global large-lake algal-bloom dataset based on MODIS (2003-2022), characterising the occurrence and long-term climatology of algal blooms in the world's large lakes. It is published on Zenodo (about 72.9 MB) under CC-BY 4.0. As a niche bloom-climatology product, it supports research on lake eutrophication, water-quality monitoring and long-term ecological change.

name: ANA SNIRH - Hidrografia, Bacias, Outorgas
access: ArcGIS REST + shapefile downloads via metadados.snirh.gov.br
notes: Base Hidrográfica Ottocodificada Multiescalas (BHO)
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out after 60s; ArcGIS WMS endpoint may be slow or unresponsive. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ANA SNIRH 是巴西国家水资源局（Agência Nacional de Águas）发布的水文地理、流域与取水许可（outorgas）数据服务，覆盖巴西全国，核心为多尺度奥托编码水文底图（BHO，Base Hidrográfica Ottocodificada Multiescalas）。数据通过 ArcGIS REST、WMS/WFS 服务及 metadados.snirh.gov.br 的 Shapefile 下载提供，开放获取。适用于巴西河网、流域管理与水权分析。
desc_en: ANA SNIRH provides hydrography, basin and water-use-permit (outorgas) data from Brazil's National Water Agency (Agência Nacional de Águas), covering the whole country, centred on the multi-scale Otto-coded hydrographic base (BHO, Base Hidrográfica Ottocodificada Multiescalas). It is served via ArcGIS REST, WMS/WFS and Shapefile downloads from metadados.snirh.gov.br as open data. It supports Brazilian river-network, basin-management and water-rights analysis.

name: Aqueduct 4.0 Water Risk Atlas (vector)
notes: Often surfaced through Resource Watch as vector; companion repo at github.com/wri/aqueduct40_data_download holds the SHP/GPKG bundles.
verify_notes: Aqueduct 4.0 released 2023-08-16 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Aqueduct 4.0 水风险图集由世界资源研究所（WRI）发布，是覆盖全球的水风险评估矢量数据集，基于 HydroBASINS 流域多边形提供基线水压力、缺水、洪水等多项水风险指标。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON 与 file GDB 开放下载（GitHub 与 WRI 数据门户），采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，并常通过 Resource Watch 平台展示。是全球水资源风险与可持续发展分析的权威工具。
desc_en: Aqueduct 4.0 Water Risk Atlas, from the World Resources Institute (WRI), is a global water-risk vector dataset providing baseline water stress, scarcity, flood and other risk indicators over HydroBASINS-derived polygons. It is openly downloadable as Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON and file GDB from GitHub and the WRI data portal under CC-BY 4.0, and is often surfaced via Resource Watch. It is an authoritative tool for global water-risk and sustainability analysis.

name: Basin90m - Global Drainage Basins and Rivers (ESSD 2024)
formats: ESRI Shapefile (basins 7.8 GB, rivers 2.5 GB) + XLSX attributes
notes: Published in ESSD 2024; compatible with QGIS/ArcGIS/GeoPandas
verify_notes: DOI resolves to GFZ data services | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Basin90m 是由 GFZ Data Services 发布、基于约 90 米分辨率地形数据构建的全球流域与河网矢量数据集，包含约 667,629 个面积大于 50 平方公里的流域。数据以 ESRI Shapefile 格式提供（流域约 7.8 GB、河流约 2.5 GB），并附 XLSX 属性表，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可在 QGIS、ArcGIS 与 GeoPandas 中直接使用。相关成果发表于 ESSD（2024），适用于全球水文建模、流域划分与河网分析。
desc_en: Basin90m is a global drainage-basins and rivers vector dataset published by GFZ Data Services, delineating roughly 667,629 basins larger than 50 km2 from approximately 90 m terrain data. It is distributed as ESRI Shapefiles (basins ~7.8 GB, rivers ~2.5 GB) with accompanying XLSX attribute tables under a CC BY 4.0 licence, and is directly usable in QGIS, ArcGIS and GeoPandas. Documented in an ESSD 2024 article, it supports global hydrological modelling, watershed delineation and river-network analysis.

name: BGS Aquifer Designation / DiGMapGB Hydrogeology
notes: Look at BGS OGC services portal (https://map.bgs.ac.uk/) - exposes Hydrogeology_625k and others as WMS/WFS.
verify_notes: Redirected from www2 to www domain | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源为英国地质调查局（BGS）提供的含水层划定与水文地质（DiGMapGB Hydrogeology）数据，覆盖整个英国，通过 BGS 的 OGC 服务门户以 WMS、WFS 形式发布，并提供 ESRI GIS 与 KML 等格式。数据采用 Open Government Licence v3.0，可经地图服务（如 map.bgs.ac.uk）调用 Hydrogeology_625k 等图层。适用于地下水分布、含水层属性查询及水文地质制图等应用。
desc_en: This British Geological Survey resource provides aquifer designation and hydrogeology (DiGMapGB) data covering the United Kingdom, exposed through BGS OGC service portals as WMS and WFS alongside ESRI GIS and KML formats. Released under the Open Government Licence v3.0, layers such as Hydrogeology_625k can be consumed via map.bgs.ac.uk. It is suited to groundwater mapping, aquifer-property queries and broader hydrogeological characterisation across the UK.

name: BGS Hydrogeology 625k + Aquifer Designation dataset
provider: British Geological Survey (with Environment Agency for aquifer designation)
license_now: mixed: free view via Magic/GeoIndex; commercial £0.35/km²
notes: Hydrogeology 625k also downloadable via OS Data Hub. Useful for groundwater layer beyond surface.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BGS 水文地质 625k 与含水层划定数据集由英国地质调查局与英格兰环境署联合制作，覆盖英国及英格兰与威尔士，比例尺约 1:50,000。数据以 shapefile 与 KML 提供，可经 Magic/GeoIndex 免费浏览，部分商业用途按面积收费；Hydrogeology 625k 亦可通过 OS Data Hub 下载。该数据补充了地表水之外的地下水图层，适用于含水层管理与地下水资源评估。
desc_en: The BGS Hydrogeology 625k and Aquifer Designation dataset, produced by the British Geological Survey with the Environment Agency, covers the UK and England & Wales at roughly 1:50,000 scale. It is available as shapefile and KML, with free viewing via Magic/GeoIndex and per-km2 charges for some commercial use; Hydrogeology 625k is also downloadable through the OS Data Hub. It provides a groundwater layer beyond surface hydrography, useful for aquifer management and groundwater resource assessment.

name: BRGM West Africa (ECOWAS) Hydrogeological Map / SIGES
license: Etalab Open License / specific terms per layer
notes: BRGM runs multiple SIGES (Système d'Information sur la Gestion des Eaux Souterraines) regional portals each with OGC services - cold but very rich.
verify_notes: News article about 2022 ECOWAS hydrogeological map | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为法国地质调查局（BRGM）牵头、与 BGR/BGS/EAWAG/UNESCO 协作发布的西非（ECOWAS 15 国）水文地质图，比例尺约 1:5,000,000，于 2022 年发布，并覆盖法国本土。数据通过 BRGM 的 SIGES 区域地下水信息门户以 WMS、WFS 及 Shapefile 形式提供。适用于区域地下水管理、含水层认识与跨国水资源规划等用途，资料丰富但较少被广泛引用。
desc_en: This dataset is the BRGM-led hydrogeological map of West Africa (the 15 ECOWAS states), produced collaboratively with BGR, BGS, EAWAG and UNESCO at about 1:5,000,000 scale and published in 2022, also covering metropolitan France. It is served through BRGM's regional SIGES groundwater-information portals as WMS, WFS and Shapefile. The data supports regional groundwater management, aquifer characterisation and transboundary water-resource planning, offering rich but under-cited coverage.

name: Catchment-Averaged Monthly Evaporation Timeseries (1984-2020) from GRACE-like TWS
what_changes: Aggregates evaporation timeseries within HydroSHEDS-derived (GRDC) watershed shapes
notes: Niche evaporation product; uses HydroSHEDS basin polygons as spatial unit
verify_notes: Catchment-Averaged Monthly Evaporation Timeseries 1984-2020; 11 files ~33KB each | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供 1984–2020 年逐月流域平均蒸散发时间序列，基于类 GRACE 陆地水储量（TWS）反演得到，并以 HydroSHEDS 流域多边形作为空间单元。数据体量很小（约 33 KB），采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。这是一个较为专门的蒸发产品，适用于流域尺度水量平衡、蒸散发趋势分析与水文模型驱动数据的对比研究。
