desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides catchment-averaged monthly evaporation time series for 1984–2020, derived from GRACE-like terrestrial water-storage estimates and aggregated over HydroSHEDS basin polygons as spatial units. It is a very small file (about 33 KB) released under CC-BY-4.0. As a niche evaporation product, it is suited to catchment-scale water-balance studies, evaporation trend analysis and benchmarking of hydrological-model outputs.

name: China Lake Basins comprehensive physical/human-dimension dataset
theme_canonical: Hydrography | Population & socioeconomic | Physical geography (natural earth)
notes: Lake catchment polygons with physical & socioeconomic attributes.
verify_notes: China lake basins CODCLAB, Scientific Data 2022 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为中国主要湖泊流域的自然—人文综合数据集，包含 767 个湖泊流域和 805 个子流域（针对面积大于 10 平方公里的湖泊），以 shapefile 多边形加属性表形式提供（约 17.8 MB），采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。属性涵盖 1984–2020 年湖泊范围、1980–2015 年气候及 1990–2015 年人口等多维信息。适用于湖泊流域水文、生态与社会经济耦合研究。
desc_en: This dataset is a comprehensive physical and human-dimension compilation for China's major lake basins, comprising 767 lake basins and 805 sub-basins for lakes larger than 10 km2, supplied as shapefile polygons with attributes (about 17.8 MB) under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. Attributes span lake extent (1984–2020), climate (1980–2015) and population (1990–2015). Published in Scientific Data (2022), it supports coupled hydrological, ecological and socioeconomic studies of lake catchments.

name: China-LDRL: Surface Water Bodies, Large Dams, Reservoirs, Lakes in China (2019)
formats_now: PDF/XML article; dataset via Figshare DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.16964656.v3 (Shapefile for dams, lakes, reservoirs)
feature_count: 2,418 large dams; 2,194 large reservoirs; 3,051 large lakes; ~3.52 million surface water polygons
notes: Independent GEE-based map; useful cross-check vs. NIGLAS catalog. Mirror: huanghe.ac.cn metadata page.
verify_notes: Active ESSD article confirmed | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: China-LDRL 数据集刻画了 2019 年中国的地表水体、大型水坝、水库与湖泊，包括约 2,418 座大坝、2,194 座大型水库、3,051 个大型湖泊以及约 352 万个地表水多边形，空间分辨率约 30 米。数据以 shapefile 形式作为 ESSD 论文配套发布，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。基于 Google Earth Engine 独立制图，适用于水资源调查、水库管理及与 NIGLAS 等已有目录的交叉验证。
desc_en: China-LDRL maps China's surface water bodies, large dams, reservoirs and lakes for 2019, comprising roughly 2,418 large dams, 2,194 large reservoirs, 3,051 large lakes and about 3.52 million surface-water polygons at ~30 m resolution. It is provided as shapefiles in the supplement of an ESSD paper under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. Built independently on Google Earth Engine, it supports water-resource inventories, reservoir management and cross-checking against existing catalogues such as the NIGLAS dataset.

name: CODCLAB 中国湖泊型流域自然-人文综合数据集
provider: 中科院南京地理与湖泊研究所
notes: Scientific Data 论文配套, 矢量层在 figshare 公开
verify_notes: CODCLAB dataset confirmed CC-BY-4.0; figshare distribution with DOI | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CODCLAB 是中国科学院南京地理与湖泊研究所发布的中国湖泊型流域自然—人文综合数据集，覆盖 767 个湖泊及流域和 805 个子流域（湖泊面积大于 10 平方公里），以 shapefile（二级流域）、栅格与 CSV 提供，约 17.8 MB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。属性涵盖 1984–2020 年湖泊范围、1980–2015 年气候与 1990–2015 年人口。作为 Scientific Data 论文配套，适用于湖泊流域综合分析。
desc_en: CODCLAB is a comprehensive physical–human dataset of China's lake-type basins from the Nanjing Institute of Geography and Limnology (CAS), covering 767 lakes and basins plus 805 sub-basins for lakes larger than 10 km2. It is delivered as shapefiles (Level 2), raster and CSV (about 17.8 MB) under CC-BY-4.0, with attributes spanning lake extent (1984–2020), climate (1980–2015) and population (1990–2015). Released as the companion to a Scientific Data paper, it supports integrated lake-catchment analysis.

name: Copernicus EU-Hydro (River Network and Drainage)
license: Copernicus open data (essentially free reuse with attribution)
notes: Pan-European authoritative drainage and coastline; underused outside EU policy work.
verify_notes: Page reachable; license/format detail on subpages | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Copernicus EU-Hydro 是由欧洲环境署（EEA）与哥白尼陆地监测服务提供的泛欧权威河网与排水数据集，覆盖 EEA39 范围，包含河流网络与海岸线信息。数据以 shapefile 和 GeoPackage 提供，采用哥白尼开放数据政策（署名后基本可自由再利用），需注册哥白尼陆地账户下载。适用于欧洲尺度的水文分析、洪水与流域研究及陆海边界制图。
desc_en: Copernicus EU-Hydro is a pan-European authoritative river-network and drainage dataset from the EEA and the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service, covering the EEA39 area and including coastline information. It is distributed as shapefile and GeoPackage under Copernicus open-data terms (essentially free reuse with attribution), with download requiring a Copernicus Land account. It supports continental-scale hydrological analysis, flood and catchment studies and land–sea boundary mapping, and remains underused outside EU policy work.

name: Dataset of river basins map over the TP (2016)
verify_notes: TPDC page reachable; JS-rendered details | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为 2016 年青藏高原河流流域分布图，由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，覆盖青藏高原范围，以 Shapefile 矢量格式提供。数据按 TPDC 使用条款开放，需登录后免费下载。适用于青藏高原区域的流域划分、水文分析及高原冰冻圈与水循环相关研究。
desc_en: This dataset is a 2016 map of river basins over the Tibetan Plateau, distributed by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC) as Shapefile vector data covering the plateau. It is provided under TPDC terms, free after login. The data is suited to watershed delineation, hydrological analysis and studies of the plateau's cryosphere and water cycle.

name: FHReD (Future Hydropower Reservoirs and Dams)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://globaldamwatch.org/fhred))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://globaldamwatch.org/fhred))
notes: Companion inventory referenced for completeness comparisons.
verify_notes: Connection refused; site may have moved/restructured | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://globaldamwatch.org/fhred))
desc_zh: FHReD（未来水电水库与大坝数据库）由 Zarfl 等人编制，记录全球约 3,700 座规划或在建的未来水电大坝点位，以点状 Shapefile 提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该数据集常作为大坝清单完整性比较的参考，适用于全球水电开发、河流连通性与生态影响评估等研究。
desc_en: FHReD (Future Hydropower Reservoirs and Dams) is an inventory compiled by Zarfl et al. recording roughly 3,700 planned or under-construction future hydropower dams worldwide as point features in Shapefile format under a CC BY 4.0 licence. Often cited for completeness comparisons against other dam inventories, it supports research on global hydropower development, river connectivity and ecological-impact assessment.

name: Future glacial lakes from subglacial overdeepenings (HMA)
feature_count: subglacial overdeepenings with surface area >10^5 m^2 (and >10^4 m^2 in full inventory)
notes: 独家 — 全球唯一公开的未来GLOF lake矢量
verify_notes: License listed as 'Other (Open)' on Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由 Furian 等人（cryotools）发布，刻画高山亚洲地区由冰下过深洼地形成的未来冰川湖，记录表面积大于 10^5 平方米（完整清单中含大于 10^4 平方米）的潜在湖泊，以 shapefile 提供，约 5.1 MB，2020 年 11 月公开。这是目前公开的、较为独特的未来冰湖（潜在 GLOF 来源）矢量数据，适用于冰川退缩、冰湖溃决洪水（GLOF）风险与冰冻圈灾害研究。
desc_en: This dataset, released by Furian et al. (cryotools), identifies future glacial lakes forming in subglacial overdeepenings across High Mountain Asia, recording potential lakes with surface areas above 10^5 m2 (and above 10^4 m2 in the full inventory). It is provided as a shapefile (~5.1 MB), published in November 2020. As a rare openly available vector of prospective future lakes, it supports research on glacier retreat, glacial-lake outburst flood (GLOF) hazard and cryosphere risk.

name: GeoDAR - Georeferenced Global Dams and Reservoirs
notes: Tripled dam count vs GRanD; absorbed GRanD v1.3 features
verify_notes: GeoDAR Wang et al. 2022 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoDAR 是全球地理参考大坝与水库数据集，包含约 25,000 个大坝点位和 7,320 个水库多边形，以点与面 Shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可在 Zenodo 开放下载。该数据集将大坝数量较 GRanD 提升约三倍，并整合了 GRanD v1.3 要素。适用于全球水库蓄水、大坝清查与水资源管理研究。
desc_en: GeoDAR is a georeferenced global dams-and-reservoirs dataset containing about 25,000 dam points and 7,320 reservoir polygons, supplied as point and polygon Shapefiles under a CC-BY 4.0 licence and openly downloadable from Zenodo. Published in ESSD (Wang et al., 2022), it roughly triples the dam count relative to GRanD and absorbs GRanD v1.3 features. It supports global reservoir-storage, dam-inventory and water-management research.

name: GeoDAR v1.1 - Georeferenced global Dams And Reservoirs
notes: Cited as comparison dataset; ~24k georeferenced dams harmonized from ICOLD register.
verify_notes: GeoDAR v1.1 - 24,783 dam points + 21,515 reservoir polygons; ESSD 2022 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoDAR v1.1 是 Wang 等人（2022）在 Zenodo 发布的全球地理参考大坝与水库数据集，包含约 24,000 座基于 ICOLD 注册册协调得到的地理参考大坝，以及配套水库多边形，提供大坝点与水库面 Shapefile，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，开放下载。常作为对比数据集使用，适用于全球大坝与水库的清查、定位及水资源研究。
desc_en: GeoDAR v1.1 is the georeferenced global Dams And Reservoirs dataset released on Zenodo by Wang et al. (2022), harmonising about 24,000 georeferenced dams from the ICOLD register together with reservoir polygons. It provides dam-point and reservoir-polygon Shapefiles under a CC BY 4.0 licence with open download. Frequently used as a comparison dataset, it supports global dam and reservoir inventory, georeferencing and water-resource studies.

name: Glacial Lake Inventory of High-Mountain Asia (1990 & 2018)
notes: 27,205 lakes (1990) / 30,121 lakes (2018); 27.7 MiB. Frequently paired with SGI-2 in cryosphere studies.
verify_notes: Glacial Lake Inventory High-Mountain Asia 1990-2018 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 高山亚洲冰湖编目（1990 与 2018）由中科院西北生态环境资源研究院经 NCDC 发布，覆盖高山亚洲（67–104°E，26–54°N），提供 1990 与 2018 两个时相的冰湖多边形 Shapefile（1990 年 27,205 个、2018 年 30,121 个，约 27.7 MiB），采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，注册后免费获取。适用于冰湖演化、冰川退缩与冰湖溃决洪水风险等冰冻圈研究。
desc_en: This Glacial Lake Inventory of High-Mountain Asia provides 1990 and 2018 snapshots from NIEER (CAS) via NCDC, covering High-Mountain Asia (67–104E, 26–54N). It supplies polygon shapefiles of 27,205 lakes (1990) and 30,121 lakes (2018), about 27.7 MiB, under a CC BY 4.0 licence and free after registration. It supports cryosphere research on glacial-lake evolution, glacier retreat and GLOF hazard, and is frequently paired with SGI-2 inventories.

name: GLEV - Global Lake Evaporation Volume dataset
what_changes: Provides monthly lake evaporation volume estimates for 1.42M HydroLAKES waterbodies using HydroLAKES geometry as base inventory
notes: Zhao et al. Nature 2022; niche per-lake evaporation product
verify_notes: GLEV global lake evaporation volume 1985-2018 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GLEV（全球湖泊蒸发量数据集）由 Zhao 等人（Nature 2022）发布，提供逐个湖泊的蒸发量产品，数据体量约 11.9 GB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可在 Zenodo 下载。这是一个较为专门的湖泊蒸发产品，适用于全球湖泊水量平衡、蒸发损失估算与气候变化对湖泊影响的研究。
desc_en: GLEV (Global Lake Evaporation Volume) is a per-lake evaporation product released by Zhao et al. (Nature 2022), comprising about 11.9 GB of data under a CC-BY-4.0 licence and downloadable from Zenodo. As a niche evaporation dataset, it supports research on global lake water balance, evaporative-loss estimation and the effects of climate change on lakes.

name: Global Database of Historic Glacier Lake Outburst Floods
theme_canonical: Hydrography | Hazards & disasters | Physical geography (natural earth)
coverage: Global; 3,151 reported GLOFs across 9 mountain regions
notes: 57 attributes per event; v3.1 May 2023
verify_notes: ESSD article live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据库为全球历史冰湖溃决洪水（GLOF）记录，涵盖 9 个山地区域、共 3,151 起报告的 GLOF 事件，每个事件含 57 项属性，以矢量点加表格形式提供（兼容 shapefile/geopackage），采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可在 Zenodo 开放获取（v3.1，2023 年 5 月）。适用于冰湖溃决洪水的灾害评估、时空分析与冰冻圈灾害研究。
desc_en: This global database of historic glacial-lake outburst floods (GLOFs) compiles 3,151 reported events across nine mountain regions, with 57 attributes per event, delivered as vector points plus tabular data (shapefile/geopackage compatible). Published in ESSD (Lützow & Veh, 2023; v3.1, May 2023) under a CC-BY 4.0 licence and openly available on Zenodo, it supports GLOF hazard assessment, spatio-temporal analysis and cryosphere disaster research.

name: Global database of river width, slope, catchment area, meander wavelength, sinuosity, and discharge (Frasson et al.)
what_changes: Catchment area computed from HydroSHEDS flow-direction/accumulation grids; attached to SWORD-style river reaches
notes: Frasson et al. 2019, GRL; uses HydroSHEDS as geomorphic backbone
verify_notes: Global database of river width/slope/catchment area | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由 Frasson 等人（2019，GRL）发布，提供全球河流的宽度、坡度、汇水面积、河曲波长、弯曲度与流量等几何与水文参数，以 HydroSHEDS 作为地貌骨架，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可在 Zenodo 下载。适用于河流地貌、水文几何关系及全球河流形态与流量研究。
desc_en: This dataset by Frasson et al. (2019, GRL) provides a global database of river width, slope, catchment area, meander wavelength, sinuosity and discharge, using HydroSHEDS as its geomorphic backbone. It is released under a CC-BY-4.0 licence and downloadable from Zenodo. The data supports research on river geomorphology, hydraulic-geometry relationships and global river morphology and discharge.

name: Global Depth of Closure (DoC) dataset
notes: Hydrodynamic indicator input.
verify_notes: DoC dataset ~780k coastal points at 4TU.ResearchData DOI | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球闭合深度（Depth of Closure, DoC）数据集由 Athanasiou 等人（Deltares）发布，覆盖全球砂质海岸，提供点/线矢量形式的闭合深度估计值，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可经 4TU.ResearchData 或 Zenodo 获取。闭合深度是描述海岸剖面有效水深的水动力指标，适用于海岸演变、海平面上升影响与海岸工程研究。
desc_en: The Global Depth of Closure (DoC) dataset by Athanasiou et al. (Deltares) covers the world's sandy coasts, providing point/line vector estimates of the depth of closure under a CC-BY 4.0 licence and available via 4TU.ResearchData or Zenodo. Depth of closure is a hydrodynamic indicator of the active coastal-profile depth, making the data useful for coastal-evolution, sea-level-rise impact and coastal-engineering studies.

name: Global Lakes and Wetlands Database GLWD v2
formats: Vector (polygons) and raster; includes coastal mangrove/saltmarsh/tidal polygons
notes: Major update of GLWD with high-resolution coastal wetland vectors
verify_notes: GLWD v2, June 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GLWD v2 是全球湖泊与湿地数据库（Global Lakes and Wetlands Database）的重大更新，覆盖全球范围，提供矢量（多边形）与栅格产品，并新增高分辨率的海岸红树林、盐沼与潮汐湿地多边形，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可经论文 DOI 开放获取。作为 Lehner 等人（ESSD 2025）发布的旗舰水文数据集，适用于湿地制图、水文与生态建模及碳与生境评估。
desc_en: GLWD v2 is a major update of the Global Lakes and Wetlands Database covering the whole world, providing vector (polygon) and raster products and adding high-resolution coastal mangrove, saltmarsh and tidal-wetland polygons under a CC-BY 4.0 licence, openly available via the paper DOI. Published as a flagship hydrography dataset by Lehner et al. (ESSD 2025), it supports wetland mapping, hydrological and ecological modelling, and carbon and habitat assessment.

name: Global Lakes/Reservoirs Surface Extent Dataset (GLRSED)
notes: Geoscience Data Journal 出版；冷门但补充 HydroLAKES 漏掉的水体
verify_notes: Wiley paywall/payment required for fetch; article likely accessible via browser | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: GLRSED（全球湖泊/水库表面范围数据集）由 Bai 等人发布于 Geoscience Data Journal，覆盖全球，以 shapefile 提供湖泊与水库的表面范围，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可经论文附件获取。该数据集较为冷门，可补充 HydroLAKES 等数据库遗漏的水体，适用于全球地表水范围统计与湖库制图研究。
desc_en: GLRSED (Global Lakes/Reservoirs Surface Extent Dataset) by Bai et al., published in the Geoscience Data Journal, provides global lake and reservoir surface extents as shapefiles under a CC-BY-4.0 licence, available via the paper supplement. A relatively obscure product, it complements water bodies missed by databases such as HydroLAKES, supporting global surface-water extent statistics and lake/reservoir mapping.

name: Global river and lake vector dataset (2010)
provider: A Big Earth Data Platform for Three Poles (TPDC / CAS)
license: TPDC data use policy (open with attribution / registration)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (http://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en/data/66145a93-42c8-41cc-8b0a-12f2b7e5d948))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (http://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en/data/66145a93-42c8-41cc-8b0a-12f2b7e5d948))
notes: Vector polygons/lines for global rivers and lakes; refined with 30 m imagery ±2-3 yr around 2010.
verify_notes: lychee:Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (http://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en/data/66145a93-42c8-41cc-8b0a-12f2b7e5d948))
desc_zh: 该数据集为约 2010 年的全球河流与湖泊矢量数据，由三极大数据平台（TPDC / 中科院）发布，覆盖全球，以 Shapefile 提供河流（线）与湖泊（面）矢量，并利用 2010 年前后 ±2–3 年的 30 米影像进行细化。数据按 TPDC 使用政策开放（署名/注册），注册后可网络下载。适用于全球水系制图、水文分析与多源水体数据对比。
desc_en: This dataset provides global river and lake vectors for around 2010, released by the Big Earth Data Platform for Three Poles (TPDC / CAS) and covering the world, with river (line) and lake (polygon) features as Shapefiles refined using 30 m imagery within roughly ±2–3 years of 2010. It is open under TPDC's data-use policy (attribution/registration) and downloadable after registration. The data suits global hydrography mapping, hydrological analysis and multi-source water-body comparison.

name: Global River Networks and Water Resources Zones Divisions (GRNWRZ) v2
theme_raw: global river network + WRZ basin polygons
notes: 中国团队发布；定义水资源管理zone — 较少被西方文献引用
verify_notes: Nature IDP auth redirect; page exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GRNWRZ v2（全球河网与水资源分区）由武汉大学 Zhang 等人发布，覆盖全球，以按大洲组织的 shapefile 提供河网及水资源管理分区，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可经论文附件获取。该数据集由中国团队发布，重点定义水资源管理 zone，西方文献引用较少，适用于全球河网分析、水资源分区与流域管理研究。
desc_en: GRNWRZ v2 (Global River Networks and Water Resources Zones Divisions) by Zhang et al. (Wuhan University) covers the globe, providing river networks and water-resources management zones as per-continent shapefiles under a CC-BY-4.0 licence via the paper supplement. Developed by a Chinese team and emphasising the definition of water-management zones, it is less cited in Western literature and supports global river-network analysis, water-resource zoning and basin-management research.

name: Global River Topology (GRIT)
provider: Wortmann et al. — Eos 2024 / Nature Geoscience supplement
theme_raw: 航道 - 含分流+运河+出口
coverage: 全球 19.6M km, 31k 出口, 67k 分流
notes: 首个含分流的全球河网, 通航分析最佳基底之一
verify_notes: Article about GRIT global river network | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GRIT（全球河流拓扑）由 Wortmann 等人发布，是首个包含河流分流（bifurcation）与运河的全球河网数据集，覆盖约 1,960 万公里水道、约 81.8 万个汇流点、6.7 万个分流点与 3.1 万个出口，分辨率约 30 米，以含拓扑分支的矢量形式提供。文章文本采用 CC BY-NC-ND 3.0。作为首个含分流的全球河网，它是通航与河网拓扑分析的理想基底。
desc_en: GRIT (Global River Topology) by Wortmann et al. is the first global river network to include river bifurcations and canals, covering about 19.6 million km of waterways with roughly 818,000 confluences, 67,000 bifurcations and 31,000 outlets at ~30 m resolution, delivered as topologically branched vectors (article text under CC BY-NC-ND 3.0). As the first bifurcation-aware global river network, it is one of the best base layers for navigation and river-network topology analysis.

name: Global Subnational River Borders
what_changes: Identifies river segments that coincide with GAUL admin-1 boundaries; produces a new vector layer of subnational river borders worldwide
notes: Niche derivative used in border/conflict and hydro-political studies
verify_notes: Global Subnational River Borders GSRB.zip 40.3MB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Global Subnational River Borders 数据集提供全球以河流为界的次国家级（行政区）边界，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，数据约 40.3 MB，可在 Zenodo 下载。这是一个较为专门的派生数据集，常用于边界与冲突研究及水政治（hydro-political）分析，适用于探讨河流作为行政与政治边界的相关议题。
desc_en: The Global Subnational River Borders dataset provides subnational administrative boundaries that follow rivers worldwide, released under a CC BY 4.0 licence (about 40.3 MB) and downloadable from Zenodo. A niche derivative product, it is used in border and conflict research and hydro-political analysis, supporting studies of rivers as administrative and political boundaries.

name: GLWD v2 – Global Lakes and Wetlands Database (upgrade)
notes: Lehner et al. 2025, ESSD; includes ~3.5M lake/wetland polygons
verify_notes: DOI 正确解析至 figshare 最终页面 | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 该 Figshare 资源为全球湖泊与湿地数据库 GLWD v2 的升级版（论文发表于 ESSD），覆盖全球（不含南极洲），空间分辨率约 15 角秒，包含约 350 万个湖泊/湿地多边形。数据以 ESRI File Geodatabase（矢量多边形）加 GeoTIFF 提供，采用 CC-BY 许可，开放获取。作为 Lehner 等人（2025）发布的旗舰数据集，适用于全球湿地与湖泊制图及水文生态建模。
desc_en: This Figshare resource is the upgraded Global Lakes and Wetlands Database (GLWD v2), with the accompanying paper in ESSD, covering the globe (excluding Antarctica) at about 15 arc-seconds and including roughly 3.5 million lake/wetland polygons. It is distributed as an ESRI File Geodatabase (vector polygons) plus GeoTIFF under a CC-BY licence with open access. As a flagship dataset by Lehner et al. (2025), it supports global wetland and lake mapping and hydro-ecological modelling.

name: GMS Lakes / Inland Waterbodies (>1 sq.km)
notes: Inland waterbody polygons larger than 1 km^2.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 该数据集为大湄公河次区域（GMS）面积大于 1 平方公里的内陆水体，由亚洲开发银行 GMS 项目发布，以多边形 Shapefile 与 KMZ 形式提供内陆湖泊与水体范围，按 ADB GMS 开放使用条款开放下载。适用于区域水资源调查、湖泊与水体制图及次区域水文与环境分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides inland water bodies larger than 1 km2 across the Greater Mekong Subregion (GMS), published by the ADB GMS programme as polygon Shapefile and KMZ files delineating inland lakes and water bodies under ADB GMS open-use terms with open download. It supports regional water-resource inventories, lake and water-body mapping, and subregional hydrological and environmental analysis.

name: GMS Main Rivers and Tributaries
notes: Polyline alignments of main rivers and tributaries.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 该数据集为大湄公河次区域（GMS）主要河流与支流的线状走向，由亚洲开发银行 GMS 项目发布，以折线 Shapefile 与 KMZ 形式提供主干河流与支流的几何对齐，按 ADB GMS 开放使用条款开放下载。适用于区域水系制图、河流连通性与次区域水文分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides the polyline alignments of main rivers and tributaries across the Greater Mekong Subregion (GMS), published by the ADB GMS programme as polyline Shapefile and KMZ files under ADB GMS open-use terms with open download. It is suited to regional river-network mapping, connectivity analysis and subregional hydrological studies.

name: GMS Major River Basins and Catchments
notes: Polygons of major river basins and catchments.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 该数据集为大湄公河次区域（GMS）主要河流流域与汇水区的多边形，由亚洲开发银行 GMS 项目发布，以多边形 Shapefile 与 KMZ 形式提供主要流域与集水区范围，按 ADB GMS 开放使用条款开放下载。适用于区域流域划分、水资源管理与次区域水文与环境规划。
desc_en: This dataset provides polygons of major river basins and catchments across the Greater Mekong Subregion (GMS), published by the ADB GMS programme as polygon Shapefile and KMZ files under ADB GMS open-use terms with open download. It supports regional watershed delineation, water-resource management and subregional hydrological and environmental planning.

name: GRADES - Global Reach-level A priori Discharge Estimates
notes: Discharge tied to MERIT Basins vector reaches; the headline dataset of this paper.
verify_notes: Page not found; GRADES has moved, search reachhydro.org | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: GRADES（全球河段先验流量估计）由 Lin 等人/普林斯顿团队发布，覆盖全球约 294 万个河段，提供 NetCDF 流量数据并与 MERIT Basins 矢量河段关联，采用开放研究使用方式，可开放下载。其流量估计绑定到 MERIT 河段，是该研究的核心成果，适用于全球河流流量建模、水文站点先验估计与河网水量分析。
desc_en: GRADES (Global Reach-level A priori Discharge Estimates) by Lin et al. / Princeton covers about 2.94 million river reaches worldwide, providing discharge in NetCDF linked to MERIT Basins vector reaches under open research terms with open download. With discharge tied to MERIT reaches as its headline product, it supports global river-discharge modelling, a-priori estimation for hydrological reaches and river-network water-balance analysis.

name: Greater Mekong Hydro Basins Level 3
provider: Open Development Mekong / Environment Operations Center (derived from HydroSHEDS)
coverage: Cambodia, Lao PDR, Myanmar, Thailand, Vietnam
license_now: CC BY-SA 4.0 (ODMekong); original FAO terms apply
formats_now: Shapefile, GeoPackage, KML, GeoJSON, CSV, WMS
notes: Level 3 hydrological basin polygons across GMS
verify_notes: License now CC BY-SA 4.0 (was listed as CC-BY) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 大湄公河次区域三级水文流域数据集由 Open Development Mekong / 环境运营中心基于 HydroSHEDS 派生，覆盖柬埔寨、老挝、缅甸、泰国与越南，提供三级水文流域多边形，格式包括 SHP、KML、GeoJSON、CSV 与 WMS，采用 CC BY-SA 4.0 许可（同时受原始 FAO 条款约束）。适用于次区域流域划分、跨境水资源管理与水文分析。
desc_en: The Greater Mekong Hydro Basins Level 3 dataset, derived from HydroSHEDS by Open Development Mekong and the Environment Operations Center, covers Cambodia, Lao PDR, Myanmar, Thailand and Vietnam, providing Level 3 hydrological basin polygons in SHP, KML, GeoJSON, CSV and WMS formats under a CC BY-SA 4.0 licence (with original FAO terms also applying). It supports subregional watershed delineation, transboundary water management and hydrological analysis.

name: GSI Experimental FGD Vector Tiles - Coastlines
license: GSI Content Terms of Use (attribution required)
notes: Coastline layer extracted from Fundamental Geospatial Data (基盤地図情報); JP-only authoritative source.
verify_notes: Tile template; tested 0/0/0 returned 404 (expected for out-of-range tile or service retired) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源为日本国土地理院（GSI）实验性基盤地图情报（FGD）矢量瓦片中的海岸线图层，覆盖日本全国（自 2015 年 10 月起），以 GeoJSON 矢量瓦片形式（z=18）通过免费 HTTP XYZ 端点提供，遵循 GSI 内容使用条款。海岸线提取自基盤地图信息，是日本权威海岸线数据源，适用于日本海岸制图、海岸线分析与 Web 地图应用。
desc_en: This resource is the coastline layer from the Geospatial Information Authority of Japan (GSI) experimental Fundamental Geospatial Data (FGD) vector tiles, covering all of Japan (since October 2015) as GeoJSON vector tiles (z=18) over free HTTP XYZ endpoints under GSI content terms. Extracted from Japan's Fundamental Geospatial Data, it is an authoritative national coastline source, suited to Japanese coastal mapping, shoreline analysis and web-mapping applications.

name: GSI Japan Global Map / Numerical Map 25000 - rivers and lakes
notes: Global Map Japan layers downloadable from GSI; National Land Numerical Information (nlftp.mlit.go.jp) has complementary river/dam shapefiles.
verify_notes: Global Map Japan v2.x vector / v1.x raster | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为日本国土地理院（GSI）的 Global Map / 数值地图 25000 中的河流与湖泊图层，覆盖日本并提供全球框架，以 shapefile 形式提供（v2.2 全套约 9.2 MB，时段约 2000–2016），遵循 GSI 网站使用条款。可从 GSI 下载，国土数值情报（nlftp.mlit.go.jp）另有补充的河流与大坝数据。适用于日本水系制图、河湖矢量分析与基础地理信息应用。
desc_en: This dataset provides the rivers and lakes layers from the Geospatial Information Authority of Japan (GSI) Global Map / Numerical Map 25000, covering Japan within a global frame, supplied as shapefiles (v2.2 full set about 9.2 MB, spanning roughly 2000–2016) under GSI website terms. Downloadable from GSI, with complementary river and dam shapefiles available via National Land Numerical Information (nlftp.mlit.go.jp), it supports Japanese hydrography mapping and base geospatial applications.

name: GSI River Centerline Vector Tiles (河川中心線 / experimental_rvrcl)
notes: Dedicated experimental layer for river centerline vectors.
verify_notes: Minimal maintenance, original 2015 experiment | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源为日本国土地理院（GSI）的实验性河川中心线（河川中心線 / experimental_rvrcl）矢量瓦片，覆盖日本，以 GeoJSON 瓦片形式通过 cyberjapandata.gsi.go.jp 下的 XYZ 端点提供，遵循 GSI 内容使用条款。该图层专门提供河流中心线矢量，适用于日本河网制图、河流走向分析与 Web 地图应用。
desc_en: This resource is the Geospatial Information Authority of Japan (GSI) experimental river centerline (河川中心線 / experimental_rvrcl) vector tiles covering Japan, served as GeoJSON tiles via XYZ endpoints under cyberjapandata.gsi.go.jp and the GSI content terms. As a dedicated layer for river-centerline vectors, it supports Japanese river-network mapping, channel-alignment analysis and web-mapping applications.

name: GSriver — global SAR/optical river vector
notes: 冷门 figshare 投稿；细节需进一步验证
verify_notes: figshare returned 403 Forbidden to WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: GSriver 是 2025 年发布于 Figshare 的全球 SAR/光学融合河流矢量数据集，覆盖全球，以 shapefile 提供，采用 Figshare 默认的 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可直接下载。该数据集较为冷门，细节仍需进一步核实，初步适用于全球河网制图与多源遥感河流提取的对比研究。
desc_en: GSriver is a global SAR/optical river vector dataset posted to Figshare in 2025, covering the world and provided as shapefiles under Figshare's default CC-BY-4.0 licence with direct download. An obscure submission whose details warrant further verification, it is tentatively suited to global river-network mapping and comparison of multi-source remote-sensing river extraction.

name: GSriver: Global river vector dataset (HydroRIVERS + OSM + GRIT fusion)
notes: High-accuracy global river network with topology, published in Scientific Data 2025.
verify_notes: 403 from WebFetch; figshare often blocks bots but page generally available | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: GSriver 是一套全球河流矢量数据集，通过融合 HydroRIVERS、OpenStreetMap 与 GRIT 等多个数据源构建，旨在提供高精度且具备拓扑关系的全球河网。数据按大洲组织，以压缩 Shapefile 格式提供，采用 CC BY 许可。相关成果于 2025 年发表在《Scientific Data》。它适用于水文建模、河流连通性分析、流域研究及全球尺度的地理空间制图等场景，相比单一来源的河网在完整性和准确性上有所提升。
desc_en: GSriver is a global river vector dataset built by fusing HydroRIVERS, OpenStreetMap, and GRIT sources to deliver a high-accuracy, topologically consistent river network. Distributed as zipped shapefiles organised by continent under a CC BY licence, it was published in Scientific Data in 2025. The dataset is suited to hydrological modelling, river connectivity analysis, watershed studies, and global-scale geospatial mapping, offering improved completeness and accuracy relative to single-source river networks.

name: HDCO: High-precision Dataset of China's Oases
theme_canonical: Hydrography | Land cover & land use | Physical geography (natural earth)
notes: Polygons with attributes for climate, landform, hydrology of each oasis; ScienceDB-deposited.
verify_notes: Nature SSO redirect; article exists (HDCO oases dataset) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HDCO 是一套中国绿洲高精度矢量数据集，以多边形形式刻画了全国 1,466 个绿洲，总面积约 277,375.56 平方公里。每个绿洲多边形附带气候、地貌、水文等属性信息，数据存储于 ScienceDB 并以 CC BY 4.0 许可开放下载，采用 Shapefile 格式。该数据集可用于干旱区研究、绿洲生态与水资源评估、土地利用变化分析以及区域可持续发展规划等领域。
desc_en: HDCO is a high-precision vector dataset of China's oases, delineating 1,466 oases covering roughly 277,375.56 km² as polygons. Each oasis carries attributes describing its climate, landform, and hydrology. Provided as shapefile polygons under CC BY 4.0 and deposited in ScienceDB, the dataset supports dryland research, oasis ecology and water-resource assessment, land-use change analysis, and regional sustainable-development planning across arid and semi-arid China.

name: HELCOM Map and Data Service - Baltic catchments, rivers, coastal hydro
theme_raw: Baltic sea drainage, sub-basins, rivers, monitoring
notes: Includes harmonised river typology and Ramsar overlays for Baltic.
verify_notes: HELCOM Metadata catalogue homepage minimal SSR | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据服务由赫尔辛基委员会（HELCOM）提供，覆盖波罗的海排水流域涉及的 9 个国家，包含流域、河流及沿岸水文等矢量图层。数据通过 Shapefile 和 WFS 服务提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，并包含协调统一的河流类型划分及拉姆萨尔湿地叠加信息。它常用于波罗的海区域的跨境水环境管理、富营养化评估、海洋与沿海空间规划等研究与应用。
desc_en: Provided through HELCOM's Map and Data Service, this resource covers the Baltic Sea drainage basin spanning nine countries, offering vector layers for catchments, rivers, and coastal hydrography. Available as shapefiles and via WFS under a CC BY 4.0 licence, it includes harmonised river typology and Ramsar wetland overlays. The data underpins transboundary water management, eutrophication assessment, and marine and coastal spatial planning across the Baltic region.

name: High-resolution LULC for greater Mariño watershed (2019)
verify_notes: Nature Sci Data; idp redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为秘鲁大马里尼奥（greater Mariño）流域提供 2019 年的高分辨率土地利用/土地覆盖（LULC）信息，同时包含矢量（GeoPackage）与栅格两种形式。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可开放获取，发表于《Scientific Data》。它适用于安第斯山区的水文与土地利用研究、流域生态评估、土地变化监测以及地方水资源与环境管理的支撑分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides high-resolution land-use/land-cover (LULC) information for the greater Mariño watershed in Peru for 2019, delivered as both vector (GeoPackage) and raster outputs. Released openly under CC BY 4.0 and published in Scientific Data, it supports hydrological and land-use studies in the Andean region, watershed ecological assessment, land-change monitoring, and local water-resource and environmental management.

name: Hydrography90m
provider: Amatulli, Garcia Marquez, Sethi et al. (ESSD 2022)
theme_raw: 高分辨率水系 / global stream network + sub-catchments
formats_now: raster and vector tiles via hydrography.org
file_size: individual tiles from a few MB to 2 GB
feature_count: 726 million unique stream segments; 1.6 million drainage basins
notes: Vector stream segments and sub-catchments — alternative to MERIT-Basins.
verify_notes: Dataset DOI: 10.18728/igb-fred-762.1 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Hydrography90m 是一套全球 90 米（3 角秒）分辨率的高分辨率水文数据集，提供河段、子流域、排水流域等矢量产品，并伴有相应栅格。数据规模庞大，包含约 7.26 亿条独立河段和约 160 万个流域，按瓦片分发，单瓦片从数 MB 到 2 GB 不等。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，发表于 ESSD（2022）。它是 MERIT-Basins 的替代方案，广泛用于全球与区域水文建模、河网分析及淡水生态研究。
desc_en: Hydrography90m is a global high-resolution hydrographic dataset at 90 m (3 arc-seconds) providing vector stream segments, sub-catchments, and drainage basins alongside companion rasters. It is large in scale, with about 726 million unique stream segments and roughly 1.6 million basins, distributed as tiles ranging from a few megabytes to 2 GB. Released under CC BY 4.0 and published in ESSD (2022), it serves as an alternative to MERIT-Basins for global and regional hydrological modelling and freshwater ecology research.

name: Hydrography90m - Global high-resolution hydrographic vector dataset
notes: Vector outputs: stream segments, drainage basins, sub-catchments, regional units
verify_notes: Layers page intact; R package hydrographr available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Hydrography90m 全球高分辨率水文矢量数据集的图层下载入口，由柏林 IGB 研究所与 Amatulli 等人维护，分辨率约 90 米（3 角秒）。矢量输出包括河段、排水流域、子流域及区域单元，并配套 GeoTIFF 栅格，提供 GeoPackage 与 Shapefile 格式，按瓦片开放下载，该入口采用 CC BY-NC 4.0 许可。适用于全球与区域水文建模、河网拓扑分析和淡水生态研究。
desc_en: This is the layer-access portal for the Hydrography90m global high-resolution hydrographic vector dataset, maintained by IGB Berlin and Amatulli et al. at roughly 90 m (3 arc-seconds) resolution. Vector outputs include stream segments, drainage basins, sub-catchments, and regional units, accompanied by GeoTIFF rasters, in GeoPackage and shapefile formats with tile-based download. Offered here under CC BY-NC 4.0, it supports global and regional hydrological modelling, stream-network topology analysis, and freshwater ecology.

name: HydroLAKES (hydrolakes)
notes: Global lake polygon vector dataset.
verify_notes: JS-rendered page; reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HydroLAKES 是由 WWF 与麦吉尔大学发布的全球湖泊多边形矢量数据集，收录约 140 万个面积大于 10 公顷的湖泊，是 HydroSHEDS 体系的重要组成部分。此处通过微软 Planetary Computer 提供，数据由 Shapefile 转换为 GeoParquet，并经 STAC 与 Azure Blob 访问，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它广泛用于全球湖泊水量评估、水文连通性分析以及湖泊生态与气候研究。
desc_en: HydroLAKES, from WWF and McGill University, is a global lake-polygon vector dataset of about 1.4 million lakes larger than 10 ha and a core component of the HydroSHEDS family. Delivered here via the Microsoft Planetary Computer as GeoParquet (converted from shapefile) and accessible through STAC and Azure Blob under CC BY 4.0, it is widely used for global lake-volume estimation, hydrological connectivity analysis, and lake ecology and climate studies.

name: Hydrological basins in Africa
notes: Continental sub-basin polygons, commonly cited in African water-resources studies.
verify_notes: updated 2025-06-24 | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 该数据集由 FAO AQUASTAT 提供，覆盖整个非洲大陆的水文子流域多边形，比例尺约 1:5,000,000，以 ESRI Shapefile 格式开放下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。作为非洲水资源研究中常被引用的基础流域边界图层，它适用于跨境流域管理、区域水文分析、水资源规划以及与气候、农业相关的空间评估。
desc_en: Provided by FAO AQUASTAT, this dataset delineates hydrological sub-basin polygons across the African continent at a scale of about 1:5,000,000, distributed as ESRI shapefiles under a CC BY 4.0 licence. A frequently cited reference layer in African water-resources studies, it supports transboundary basin management, regional hydrological analysis, water-resource planning, and spatial assessments linked to climate and agriculture.

name: Hydrological basins in Europe
verify_notes: Hydrological Basins in Europe | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 该数据集由 FAO AQUASTAT 提供，包含覆盖整个欧洲的水文流域多边形，以 Shapefile 格式开放获取，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。作为大陆尺度的流域边界参考图层，它适用于欧洲范围的水资源评估、跨境流域管理、区域水文与环境分析，以及与农业和气候相关的空间研究。
desc_en: Provided by FAO AQUASTAT, this dataset contains hydrological basin polygons covering Europe, distributed openly as shapefiles under a CC BY 4.0 licence. As a continental-scale basin-boundary reference layer, it supports Europe-wide water-resource assessment, transboundary basin management, regional hydrological and environmental analysis, and spatial studies related to agriculture and climate.

name: HydroWASTE v1.0 (wastewater treatment plants)
verify_notes: Figshare downloader returns 403 to bot | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: HydroWASTE v1.0 是一套全球污水处理厂矢量数据集，收录 58,502 座处理厂，由 Ehalt Macedo 等人在 HydroSHEDS 框架下编制，发表于 ESSD（2022）。数据以 Shapefile/CSV 格式提供（约 2.3 MB），通过 Figshare 直接下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它适用于水质与污染负荷评估、河流接纳水体分析、污水排放与水资源管理及相关环境研究。
desc_en: HydroWASTE v1.0 is a global vector dataset of 58,502 wastewater treatment plants, compiled by Ehalt Macedo et al. within the HydroSHEDS framework and published in ESSD (2022). Provided as shapefile/CSV (about 2.3 MB) via direct Figshare download under CC BY 4.0, it supports water-quality and pollution-load assessment, analysis of receiving rivers, wastewater-discharge and water-resource management, and related environmental research.

name: ICGC WMS Coastline
notes: 海岸线 WMS 数据服务
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源是加泰罗尼亚地图与地理信息研究所（ICGC）提供的海岸线 WMS 网络地图服务，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。作为在线地图服务，它以标准 OGC WMS 接口提供海岸线图层，便于在 GIS 软件或网页地图中叠加调用，适用于沿海制图、海岸带管理、空间规划及相关地理参考用途。具体覆盖范围以服务发布为准。
desc_en: This resource is a coastline WMS web map service from the Catalan Institute of Cartography and Geology (ICGC), offered under a CC BY 4.0 licence. Delivered through a standard OGC WMS interface, it provides a coastline layer that can be overlaid in GIS software or web maps for coastal cartography, coastal-zone management, spatial planning, and general georeferencing. Exact coverage follows the published service extent.

name: India-WRIS water resource layers (basin, sub-basin, watershed, rivers, water-body, canals, dams)
provider: Central Water Commission / Ministry of Jal Shakti
theme_raw: Basins, rivers, canals, dams, water bodies
notes: WMS-only for many layers; CGWB groundwater wells freely downloadable. Bhuvan / ISRO River Basin Atlas complements.
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out at 60s; possibly geo-blocked or slow | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: India-WRIS 是印度中央水利委员会（隶属水利部）建设的全国水资源信息系统，提供流域、子流域、集水区、河流、水体、运河、水坝等矢量图层。多数图层通过 WMS/WFS 服务发布，部分可下载 Shapefile，并提供 API 接口；中央地下水委员会的地下水监测井数据可自由下载。数据为政府开放数据（需署名）。它适用于印度水资源规划、流域管理、水利基础设施分析及相关研究，并可与 Bhuvan/ISRO 河流流域图集互补。
desc_en: India-WRIS, built by the Central Water Commission under the Ministry of Jal Shakti, is India's national water-resources information system offering vector layers for basins, sub-basins, watersheds, rivers, water bodies, canals, and dams. Most layers are served via WMS/WFS with some shapefile downloads and an API, while CGWB groundwater wells are freely downloadable. Released as government open data with attribution, it supports water-resource planning, basin management, and infrastructure analysis, complementing the Bhuvan/ISRO River Basin Atlas.

name: Integrated Hydrological Units of the UK – Catchments
notes: National vector catchment framework; reference layer for UK hydrology papers including G2G family.
verify_notes: GB only, excludes NI | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国综合水文单元（IHU）集水区数据集由 UKCEH 通过 EIDC 发布，提供覆盖全英国的国家级矢量集水区框架，采用 ESRI Shapefile 格式，遵循 IHU 许可。作为英国水文研究的标准参考图层（包括 G2G 系列模型），它适用于流域划分、水文建模、洪水与水资源分析及国家尺度的环境评估。
desc_en: The Integrated Hydrological Units (IHU) of the UK – Catchments, published by UKCEH through the EIDC, provides a national vector catchment framework covering the United Kingdom in ESRI shapefile format under the IHU licence. As a standard reference layer for UK hydrology, used by the G2G family of models among others, it supports catchment delineation, hydrological modelling, flood and water-resource analysis, and national-scale environmental assessment.

name: Integrated Hydrological Units of the UK – Hydrometric Areas with Coastline
notes: NRFA-aligned hydrometric area vector polygons.
verify_notes: Integrated Hydrological Units, Hydrometric Areas with Coastline | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集是英国综合水文单元（IHU）体系中的水文测量区（含海岸线）图层，由 UKCEH 通过 EIDC 发布，提供与国家河流流量档案（NRFA）对齐的水文测量区矢量多边形，采用 Shapefile 格式并遵循 IHU 许可。它兼具水文与海岸要素，适用于英国水文测量区划分、径流站点关联分析、流域研究及沿海水文应用。
desc_en: This dataset is the Hydrometric Areas with Coastline layer of the UK's Integrated Hydrological Units (IHU), published by UKCEH through the EIDC. It provides hydrometric-area vector polygons aligned with the National River Flow Archive (NRFA), in shapefile format under the IHU licence. Combining hydrological and coastal features, it supports hydrometric-area delineation, gauging-station linkage, catchment studies, and coastal hydrology applications across the UK.

name: Inventory dataset of glacial lakes in the Sikkim Region, India (2000)
notes: Companion sibling to other High Mountain Asia glacial-lake inventories.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为印度锡金地区 2000 年的冰湖编目，由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）/三极平台发布，以 Shapefile 矢量格式提供，需注册后下载，遵循 TPDC 数据使用政策。作为高山亚洲（High Mountain Asia）系列冰湖编目的组成部分，它适用于冰湖变化监测、冰湖溃决洪水（GLOF）风险评估及冰川-湖泊耦合等研究。
desc_en: This dataset is an inventory of glacial lakes in the Sikkim region of India for the year 2000, released through the TPDC / Three Poles platform as shapefile vector data, available via registered download under the TPDC data-use policy. As a companion within the High Mountain Asia glacial-lake inventory family, it supports glacial-lake change monitoring, glacial-lake outburst flood (GLOF) risk assessment, and glacier–lake coupling studies.

name: Inventory of Glacial Lakes in High Mountain Asia (HMA-GLI 2016 & 2022)
notes: 双仓储（Zenodo + PANGAEA）；31,698 个湖
verify_notes: HMA glacial lakes 2022 inventory (31,698 lakes); newer version exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HMA-GLI 是高山亚洲（High Mountain Asia）冰湖编目数据集，提供 2016 与 2022 两期数据，由 Kumar 与 Vijay 编制，共收录 31,698 个冰湖，以 Shapefile 格式提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。数据采用 Zenodo 与 PANGAEA 双仓储发布，总规模约 54.4 GB。它适用于高山冰湖多时相变化分析、冰湖溃决洪水风险评估、冰川消融与水文响应等研究。
desc_en: HMA-GLI is an inventory of glacial lakes across High Mountain Asia for 2016 and 2022, compiled by Kumar and Vijay and comprising 31,698 lakes in shapefile format under a CC BY 4.0 licence. The dataset is published across dual repositories (Zenodo and PANGAEA) at about 54.4 GB. It supports multi-temporal change analysis of high-mountain glacial lakes, glacial-lake outburst flood risk assessment, and studies of glacier melt and hydrological response.

name: Inventory of glacial lakes in west China (2015)
notes: Cross-checked with HydroLAKES; referenced in lake/glacier coupling studies
verify_notes: TPDC catalog reachable; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为中国西部地区 2015 年的冰湖编目，由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，以 Shapefile 矢量格式提供，免费但需登录下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。数据与 HydroLAKES 进行过交叉核验，常用于湖泊-冰川耦合研究。它适用于西部冰湖分布与变化分析、冰湖溃决洪水风险评估及高寒区水资源研究。
desc_en: This dataset is an inventory of glacial lakes in western China for 2015, released by the TPDC as shapefile vector data, freely available with login under a CC BY 4.0 licence. Cross-checked against HydroLAKES and cited in lake–glacier coupling studies, it supports analysis of glacial-lake distribution and change in western China, glacial-lake outburst flood risk assessment, and water-resource research in cold, high-altitude regions.

name: Lakes & Reservoirs (10m)
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Natural Earth 的全球湖泊与水库矢量数据集，比例尺为 1:10,000,000（10m），以 Shapefile 格式通过 CDN 公开提供，属于公有领域，可自由使用。作为 Natural Earth 物理地理图层的一部分，它适用于全球与区域尺度的小比例尺制图、底图制作、数据可视化及一般地理参考，但不适合高精度水文分析。
desc_en: This is Natural Earth's global Lakes and Reservoirs vector dataset at 1:10,000,000 (10m) scale, distributed as a shapefile via CDN in the public domain for free use. As part of Natural Earth's physical layers, it is well suited to small-scale global and regional cartography, base-map production, data visualisation, and general georeferencing, but not to high-precision hydrological analysis.

name: Lakes, Rivers and Glaciers in Canada - CanVec Series - Hydrographic Features
verify_notes: Last modified 2025-12-22; Geospatial Data Extraction Tool available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集来自加拿大 CanVec 系列水文要素，由加拿大自然资源部（NRCan）发布，覆盖全加拿大的湖泊、河流与冰川等水文要素，提供 Shapefile 与文件地理数据库（FGDB）格式，遵循加拿大开放政府许可（OGL-Canada）。作为加拿大权威的国家级水文矢量数据，它适用于水文制图、流域分析、土地与资源管理及环境研究。
desc_en: This dataset is part of Canada's CanVec series of hydrographic features, published by Natural Resources Canada (NRCan), covering lakes, rivers, and glaciers across Canada in shapefile and File Geodatabase (FGDB) formats under the Open Government Licence – Canada. As an authoritative national hydrographic vector product, it supports hydrographic mapping, watershed analysis, land and resource management, and environmental research.

name: LakeTEMP - global lake surface water temperature & ice phenology
what_changes: Adds Landsat-8-derived surface water temperature observations (2013-2021) and ice cover duration predictions keyed to HydroLAKES IDs for ~1.4M lakes
notes: Reilly et al. RSE 2024; uses HydroLAKES unique IDs
verify_notes: LakeTEMP global LSWT + lake ice phenology | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: LakeTEMP 是一套全球湖泊表面水温与冰情物候数据集，由 Reilly 等人于 2024 年发表在《Remote Sensing of Environment》，并采用 HydroLAKES 的唯一湖泊 ID 进行关联，数据规模约 1.27 GB，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它适用于湖泊热状况与气候变化研究、冰封期物候分析、湖泊生态评估及全球湖泊监测等用途。
desc_en: LakeTEMP is a global dataset of lake surface-water temperature and ice phenology, published by Reilly et al. in Remote Sensing of Environment (2024) and keyed to HydroLAKES unique lake IDs. About 1.27 GB in size and released under CC BY 4.0, it supports research on lake thermal regimes and climate change, ice-cover phenology analysis, lake ecology assessment, and global lake monitoring.

name: LINZ Nautical Charts
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] 海图服务总入口, 含数据但是栏目页
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是新西兰土地信息局（LINZ）的航海海图服务总入口，提供新西兰及相关海域的海图产品，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可直接获取。该页面为海图栏目入口，汇集多种海图数据与服务，适用于航海导航、海洋与沿海空间规划、海岸带管理及相关地理参考用途。具体数据内容以入口下各产品页为准（标注待核实）。
desc_en: This is the entry portal for nautical charts from Land Information New Zealand (LINZ), providing chart products for New Zealand and its surrounding waters under a CC BY 4.0 licence. Serving as a charts landing page that aggregates multiple chart datasets and services, it supports maritime navigation, marine and coastal spatial planning, coastal-zone management, and related georeferencing. Specific contents depend on the individual product pages (flagged as needing verification).

name: Lithological/alteration maps for CRM exploration – Aramo (Spain) pilot site
notes: Lithology & hydrothermal alteration polygons for critical raw materials pilot
verify_notes: Lithological/alteration maps Aramo Spain; files restricted pending curation | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为西班牙阿拉莫（Aramo）试点区的岩性与蚀变地图，面向关键原材料（CRM）勘查，提供岩性及热液蚀变多边形，同时包含矢量（Shapefile）与栅格形式，发布于 Zenodo，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它适用于矿产勘查、岩性与蚀变填图、地质制图及关键原材料相关的资源潜力评估等研究与应用。
desc_en: This dataset comprises lithological and alteration maps for the Aramo pilot site in Spain, produced for critical raw materials (CRM) exploration. It provides lithology and hydrothermal-alteration polygons in both vector (shapefile) and raster forms, published on Zenodo under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It supports mineral exploration, lithological and alteration mapping, geological cartography, and resource-potential assessment related to critical raw materials.

name: MSC GeoMet OGC API — Environment and Climate Change Canada
notes: Flagship pygeoapi production deployment; vector collections for hydrometric stations, alerts, climate normals, hurricanes.
verify_notes: 100+ collections; pygeoapi 0.20.0 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MSC GeoMet OGC API 由加拿大气象局（隶属加拿大环境与气候变化部 ECCC）运营，是一套基于 pygeoapi 的旗舰生产部署，通过 OGC API - Features（GeoJSON）提供矢量数据集合，遵循加拿大开放政府许可。其矢量集合涵盖水文监测站、预警、气候平均值与飓风等。它适用于天气与气候数据获取、水文与气象监测、灾害预警分析及加拿大区域的地理空间应用。
desc_en: The MSC GeoMet OGC API, operated by the Meteorological Service of Canada within ECCC, is a flagship pygeoapi production deployment that serves vector data collections via OGC API – Features (GeoJSON) under the Open Government Licence – Canada. Its vector collections include hydrometric stations, alerts, climate normals, and hurricanes. It supports weather and climate data access, hydrological and meteorological monitoring, hazard-alert analysis, and geospatial applications across Canada.

name: Natural England Ramsar Sites (England)
formats: ArcGIS Hub FeatureServer, GeoJSON, WFS, KML, Shapefile
notes: Defra geoportal exposes many wetland and water designations as Hub FeatureServer + WFS/WMS.
verify_notes: Page reachable but minimal content extracted; ArcGIS Hub item | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为英格兰的拉姆萨尔（Ramsar）国际重要湿地边界，由英格兰自然署（Natural England）/环境食品与农村事务部（Defra）发布，提供 ArcGIS Hub FeatureServer、GeoJSON、WFS、KML 与 Shapefile 等多种访问方式，遵循开放政府许可 v3.0。它适用于湿地保护与管理、生物多样性与栖息地评估、环境影响分析及空间规划等用途。
desc_en: This dataset delineates the boundaries of Ramsar internationally important wetlands in England, published by Natural England / Defra and available via ArcGIS Hub FeatureServer, GeoJSON, WFS, KML, and shapefile under the Open Government Licence v3.0. It supports wetland conservation and management, biodiversity and habitat assessment, environmental impact analysis, and spatial planning, and sits alongside Defra's broader portfolio of wetland and water designations.

name: Near-global freshwater-specific environmental variables for biodiversity analyses at 1 km (Domisch et al.)
what_changes: Builds 1 km gridded freshwater env variables accumulated along the HydroSHEDS 1 km stream network with upstream connectivity
notes: Domisch, Amatulli, Jetz 2015, Scientific Data; under-cited compared to HydroATLAS
verify_notes: Nature IDP cookie redirect; article presumed alive | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由 Domisch、Amatulli 与 Jetz（2015，《Scientific Data》）发布，提供近全球范围、约 1 公里分辨率、面向淡水生态的专用环境变量，用于生物多样性分析，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。这些变量沿河网与子流域刻画淡水环境特征。它适用于淡水物种分布建模、河流生物多样性研究及水生生态保护规划，相比 HydroATLAS 引用较少但具参考价值。
desc_en: Published by Domisch, Amatulli, and Jetz (Scientific Data, 2015), this dataset provides near-global, freshwater-specific environmental variables at about 1 km resolution for biodiversity analyses, under a CC BY 4.0 licence. The variables characterise freshwater conditions along stream networks and sub-catchments. It supports freshwater species-distribution modelling, river biodiversity research, and aquatic conservation planning, and is comparatively under-cited relative to HydroATLAS despite its value.

name: North American Lake-River Routing Product (BasinMaker)
what_changes: Regional (North American) lake-river routing network derived using HydroLAKES as the lake input layer via BasinMaker GIS toolbox
notes: v2.1; obscure regional derivative useful for hydrologic modelling
verify_notes: North American Lake-River Routing v2.1 BasinMaker | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是北美湖泊-河流汇流路径产品（North American Lake-River Routing Product），由 BasinMaker 工具生成（v2.1），发布于 Zenodo，规模约 1.9 GB，采用 MIT 许可。该产品提供整合湖泊与河流的汇流网络，是用于水文模型构建的区域性派生数据。它适用于北美范围的水文路由与径流建模、湖泊-河流连通性分析及流域建模研究。
desc_en: This is the North American Lake-River Routing Product (version 2.1), generated with the BasinMaker tool and published on Zenodo at about 1.9 GB under an MIT licence. It provides an integrated lake-and-river routing network as a regional derivative product built for hydrological modelling. It supports hydrological routing and runoff modelling across North America, lake–river connectivity analysis, and watershed-modelling research.

name: OS Open Rivers (Great Britain)
notes: 144,000+ km of named watercourses with flow direction. Pairs with BGS Hydrogeology 625k on same OS Data Hub.
verify_notes: JS-heavy page; minimal content via fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OS Open Rivers 由英国军械测量局（Ordnance Survey）发布，覆盖整个大不列颠岛，包含超过 144,000 公里的命名水道并带有流向信息，提供 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage 格式，推测采用 OGL v3 许可（页面为 JS 渲染）。作为权威的国家级河网矢量数据，它适用于水文建模、河流连通性与流向分析、洪水研究及地图制作，可与同平台的 BGS 1:625k 水文地质数据配合使用。
desc_en: OS Open Rivers, published by Ordnance Survey, covers all of Great Britain with more than 144,000 km of named watercourses including flow direction, provided in shapefile and GeoPackage formats under a presumed OGL v3 licence (the page is JS-rendered). As an authoritative national river-network vector dataset, it supports hydrological modelling, connectivity and flow-direction analysis, flood studies, and cartography, and pairs with BGS Hydrogeology 625k on the same OS Data Hub.

name: OSM Water Layer (Yamazaki et al., U-Tokyo)
theme_raw: OSM-derived global water surface (lines + polygons cleaned)
notes: Useful when raw OSM waterway is too noisy; cleaned, hydrologically consistent product. Also in awesome-gee-community-catalog.
verify_notes: Yamazaki Lab moved to global-hydrodynamics.github.io | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OSM Water Layer 由东京大学水文实验室（Yamazaki 等，2019）发布，是一套全球水体数据集，从 OpenStreetMap 中提取并经清洗，生成水文一致的产品，提供 GeoTIFF 及 Shapefile 派生格式，继承 OSM 的 ODbL 许可。当原始 OSM 水道数据过于噪杂时，该产品尤为有用。它适用于全球河流与水体制图、水文建模及遥感水体提取的参考与验证。
desc_en: The OSM Water Layer, from the University of Tokyo Hydrology Lab (Yamazaki et al., 2019), is a global water-body dataset extracted and cleaned from OpenStreetMap to yield a hydrologically consistent product, provided as GeoTIFF and shapefile derivatives under the OSM-inherited ODbL licence. Especially useful when raw OSM waterway data is too noisy, it supports global river and water-body mapping, hydrological modelling, and reference or validation for remote-sensing water extraction.

name: Parameter fields for the Hydrological Discharge (HD) model at 0.5° and 5 Min
what_changes: River directions and DEM-based routing parameters re-gridded from HydroSHEDS for the MPI-ESM HD model at 0.5° and 5'
notes: Hagemann & Ho-Hagemann, Zenodo; obscure model-input derivative
verify_notes: HD hydrological model parameters at 0.5deg and 5min, v5.0.0 Jun 2021 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为水文汇流（HD）模型在 0.5° 与 5 分（约 5 Min）分辨率下的参数场，由 Hagemann 与 Ho-Hagemann 发布于 Zenodo，采用 CC BY-SA 4.0 许可。它是一套用于驱动 HD 径流汇流模型的模型输入派生数据。该数据适用于全球与区域尺度的河流径流汇流模拟、水文-气候耦合建模及相关地球系统模型研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides parameter fields for the Hydrological Discharge (HD) model at 0.5° and 5-minute resolution, published by Hagemann and Ho-Hagemann on Zenodo under a CC BY-SA 4.0 licence. It is a model-input derivative designed to drive the HD river-routing model. The data supports global and regional river-discharge routing simulation, coupled hydrology–climate modelling, and related Earth-system model research.

name: Ramsar Wetlands of Australia (ERIN)
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, ESRI Feature Service
notes: National Australian Ramsar polygons.
verify_notes: Hub page reachable; details not extracted from snippet | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为澳大利亚的拉姆萨尔（Ramsar）国际重要湿地边界，由澳大利亚气候变化、能源、环境与水利部（DCCEEW）下属的环境资源信息网络（ERIN）发布，通过 ArcGIS Hub 开放，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 及 ESRI 要素服务等格式，采用 CC BY 许可。它适用于澳大利亚的湿地保护与管理、生物多样性与栖息地评估、环境规划及相关研究。
desc_en: This dataset delineates the boundaries of Australia's Ramsar internationally important wetlands, published by ERIN within DCCEEW and made openly available through ArcGIS Hub in shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, and ESRI Feature Service formats under a CC BY licence. It supports wetland conservation and management, biodiversity and habitat assessment, environmental planning, and related research across Australia.

name: River depths and widths dataset for Poland
notes: 波兰河流深度宽度矢量数据集论文
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为波兰河流的深度与宽度矢量数据，对应发表于《Scientific Data》的相关论文，采用 CC BY 许可，可直接下载，格式可能为 Shapefile/CSV。它提供沿河网的河道几何属性（深度、宽度），适用于波兰范围的水文与水力建模、河道形态分析、洪水与水资源研究及河流地貌相关应用。具体要素数量与年份以原始数据为准。
desc_en: This dataset provides river depth and width vector data for Poland, associated with a paper in Scientific Data, released under a CC BY licence with direct download and likely in shapefile/CSV format. It supplies channel-geometry attributes (depth and width) along the river network, supporting hydrological and hydraulic modelling, channel-morphology analysis, flood and water-resource research, and fluvial-geomorphology applications across Poland. Exact counts and reference year follow the source data.

name: River network & hydro-geomorphological parameters at 1/12 deg (Zenodo 6482906)
theme_canonical: Hydrography | Geology, soil & geomorphology | Energy & infrastructure
notes: Gridded only - included as reference; NOT pure vector
verify_notes: DOI redirects to Zenodo record (GRWL related) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集提供全球 1/12 度分辨率的河网及水文-地貌参数，由 Schrapffer 等人发布于 Zenodo，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。需注意其为格网（NetCDF）形式而非纯矢量，此处作为参考收录。数据涵盖河网与河道相关的水文地貌参数，适用于全球与区域尺度的水文路由建模、地表水文过程模拟及地球系统模型的输入与参数化研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides a global river network and hydro-geomorphological parameters at 1/12 degree resolution, published by Schrapffer et al. on Zenodo under a CC BY 4.0 licence. Note that it is gridded (NetCDF) rather than pure vector and is included here as a reference. Covering river-network and channel-related hydro-geomorphological parameters, it supports global and regional river-routing modelling, land-surface hydrological simulation, and input or parameterisation for Earth-system models.

name: River Networks of Cambodia
formats_now: Shapefile (delivered as GeoPackage), GeoJSON, KML, DB_TABLE, ZIP
notes: Polyline river network with basin/sub-basin names and Strahler order
verify_notes: Copyright marked unclear on page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为柬埔寨河网，由环境行动中心（gms-eoc.org）通过 Open Development Mekong 平台发布，包含带有流域/子流域名称及 Strahler 河流等级的线状河网，提供 Shapefile（压缩包）与 WMS 服务。许可不甚明确，ODMekong 平台一般采用 CC BY-SA 4.0。它适用于柬埔寨及湄公河流域的水文分析、河网与流域研究、水资源规划及环境管理。
desc_en: This dataset is the river network of Cambodia, published by the Environment Operations Center (gms-eoc.org) through the Open Development Mekong platform, comprising a polyline river network with basin/sub-basin names and Strahler stream order, provided as zipped shapefile and via WMS. Its licence is unclear, though the ODMekong platform generally uses CC BY-SA 4.0. It supports hydrological analysis, river-network and basin studies, water-resource planning, and environmental management in Cambodia and the wider Mekong basin.

name: Rivers & Lake Centerlines (10m)
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Natural Earth 的全球河流与湖泊中心线矢量数据集，比例尺为 1:10,000,000（10m），以 Shapefile 格式通过 CDN 公开提供，属于公有领域，可自由使用。作为 Natural Earth 物理地理图层的一部分，它适用于全球与区域尺度的小比例尺制图、底图制作和数据可视化，但不适合高精度水文分析。
desc_en: This is Natural Earth's global Rivers and Lake Centerlines vector dataset at 1:10,000,000 (10m) scale, distributed as a shapefile via CDN in the public domain for free use. As part of Natural Earth's physical layers, it is well suited to small-scale global and regional cartography, base-map production, and data visualisation, but not to high-precision hydrological analysis.

name: Rivers of America (Central)
verify_notes: Rivers of America (Central) v1.0 | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 该数据集由 FAO AQUASTAT 提供，包含中美洲地区的河流矢量数据，以 Shapefile 格式开放获取，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。作为区域尺度的河网参考图层，它适用于中美洲的水资源评估、流域与河网分析、跨境水管理及与农业、气候相关的空间研究。具体要素细节以原始数据为准。
desc_en: Provided by FAO AQUASTAT, this dataset contains river vector data for Central America, distributed openly as shapefiles under a CC BY 4.0 licence. As a regional-scale river-network reference layer, it supports water-resource assessment, basin and river-network analysis, transboundary water management, and spatial studies related to agriculture and climate in Central America. Specific feature details follow the source data.

name: Rivers of Europe
verify_notes: Rivers of Europe dataset, active FAO catalog | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 由联合国粮农组织 AQUASTAT 发布的欧洲河流矢量数据集，以 Shapefile 格式提供覆盖欧洲范围的河流线状要素。该数据可用于区域水文分析、流域制图、农业用水评估与环境研究等场景。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可开放获取并要求署名，适合作为欧洲水系背景底图与多源水文数据整合的基础图层。
desc_en: Published by FAO AQUASTAT, this vector dataset represents the river network of Europe as linear features in Shapefile format. It is suited to regional hydrological analysis, watershed mapping, agricultural water assessment and environmental studies across the continent. Distributed under a CC-BY-4.0 licence, it is openly available with attribution, making it a convenient base layer for European hydrography and for integrating multiple water-related datasets.

name: SeaVoX Salt and Fresh Water Body Gazetteer v19
notes: Hierarchical sea-area gazetteer used in SeaDataNet.
verify_notes: SeaVoX gazetteer v19 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SeaVoX 咸淡水体地名表 v19 由 VLIZ/SeaVoX（BODC 与 Marine Regions）维护，是一个全球范围的层级化海域与水体命名参考体系，广泛用于 SeaDataNet 元数据的标准化标注。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage 与 WFS 服务，可下载或在线调用，采用 Marine Regions 的 CC BY 许可。其层级结构便于按不同尺度划定海域，适合海洋数据编目与跨数据集对齐。
desc_en: The SeaVoX Salt and Fresh Water Body Gazetteer v19, maintained by VLIZ/SeaVoX (BODC and Marine Regions), is a global hierarchical reference for naming sea areas and water bodies, widely used to standardise SeaDataNet metadata. It is delivered as Shapefile, GeoPackage and via WFS, available for download or live query under the Marine Regions CC BY licence. Its nested structure supports delineating sea areas at multiple scales, aiding marine data cataloguing and cross-dataset harmonisation.

name: SeaVoX Sea Areas Polygons (v17+)
notes: Used widely for SeaDataNet/EMODnet metadata harmonisation; finer breakdown than IHO S-23.
verify_notes: Current version v19 (2023); DOI 10.14284/590 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SeaVoX 海域多边形数据集（v17 及以后版本）由 BODC/SeaDataNet 下的 SeaVoX 管理组维护，提供全球海域的多边形划分，比 IHO S-23 标准更为细致。数据以 Shapefile 和 WFS 形式发布，约 1:250,000 比例尺（v19, 2023），广泛应用于 SeaDataNet 与 EMODnet 的元数据协调。许可未明确声明，通常按 BODC/VLIZ 惯例采用 CC-BY，适合海洋空间分析与海域归属标注。
desc_en: The SeaVoX Sea Areas Polygons (v17+) are maintained by the SeaVoX governance group within BODC/SeaDataNet, offering a global polygon partition of sea areas with finer breakdown than the IHO S-23 standard. Provided as Shapefile and via WFS at roughly 1:250,000 scale (v19, 2023), they are widely used to harmonise SeaDataNet and EMODnet metadata. The licence is not explicitly stated but commonly follows BODC/VLIZ CC-BY practice, supporting marine spatial analysis and sea-area attribution.

name: TPDC Global Lake and River Vector Dataset (2010) + 30 m global lakes/rivers (Liu et al.)
provider: National Tibetan Plateau / Third Pole Environment Data Center
doi_or_citation: Liu et al., see TPDC entry
notes: China-side dataset that fills gaps where HydroLAKES is coarse; FTP download via FlashFXP-style client.
verify_notes: TPDC page loads but content is JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布的全球湖泊与河流矢量数据集（2010），并包含 Liu 等基于 30 米遥感的全球湖河数据，可在 HydroLAKES 较粗的区域补充更细的中国侧水体信息。数据以 Shapefile 形式经 FTP 提供，需注册获取，遵循 TPDC 开放署名条款。适合全球及中国水文制图、湖泊河流提取与水资源研究。
desc_en: Hosted by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), this global lake and river vector dataset (2010), together with Liu et al.'s 30 m global lakes and rivers, complements HydroLAKES where the latter is coarse, particularly on the China side. Delivered as Shapefile via FTP under registration, it follows TPDC's open-with-attribution terms. It supports global and China-focused hydrological mapping, lake and river extraction, and water-resource research.

name: Tree Cover Loss by Dominant Driver (Curtis et al. 2018 derivative, GFW)
provider: World Resources Institute / Global Forest Watch
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, CSV via GFW Data API (vector aggregates)
notes: Vector aggregation of the Curtis et al. 2018 driver raster; available as polygon/feature service
verify_notes: Slug not found - may need year suffix | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 全球森林观察（GFW，世界资源研究所）发布的「按主导驱动因素划分的树木覆盖损失」数据，是对 Curtis 等 2018 年驱动因素栅格的矢量聚合，覆盖全球 2001 年至今。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV 等格式，并可经 GFW Data API 获取，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。可用于分析森林损失的主要成因（如农业、林业、城市化等）及空间分布趋势。
desc_en: Published by Global Forest Watch (World Resources Institute), Tree Cover Loss by Dominant Driver is a vector aggregation of the Curtis et al. 2018 driver raster, covering the globe from 2001 onward. It is available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and CSV, and through the GFW Data API, under a CC BY 4.0 licence. The dataset supports analysis of the principal causes of forest loss, such as agriculture, forestry and urbanisation, and their spatial trends.

name: UKSCAPE-G2G NI river flow (UKCP18-driven) with catchment/station ancillary
notes: One of six datasets enumerated in Table 1 of essd-15-2533-2023.
verify_notes: NI 1km climate projections 1980-2080 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由英国生态水文中心（UKCEH/EIDC）发布的 UKSCAPE-G2G 北爱尔兰河川流量数据集，基于 UKCP18 气候情景驱动，覆盖 1980 至 2080 年，附带流域与水文站辅助文件。数据以 NetCDF 加辅助文件提供，采用开放政府许可（OGL），可开放获取。适合气候变化情景下的河流流量模拟、水资源规划与流域水文研究，是 ESSD 论文中列举的系列数据集之一。
desc_en: Published by UKCEH via EIDC, this UKSCAPE-G2G dataset provides UKCP18-driven river flow projections for Northern Ireland spanning 1980-2080, with ancillary catchment and gauging-station files. It is delivered as NetCDF plus ancillary files under the Open Government Licence and is openly available. The dataset suits river-flow simulation under climate scenarios, water-resource planning and catchment hydrology, and is one of six datasets enumerated in the associated ESSD paper.

name: UKSCAPE-G2G Northern Ireland river flow + station/catchment files (observed)
notes: Companion NI dataset to the ESSD paper.
verify_notes: DOI redirects to CEH catalogue | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UKSCAPE-G2G 北爱尔兰河川流量（观测驱动）数据集由 UKCEH/EIDC 发布，覆盖 1980 至 2011 年，是上述 UKCP18 情景数据集的观测配套版本，同样附带水文站与流域辅助文件。数据以 NetCDF 形式提供，采用开放政府许可，可开放获取。适合河流流量模型率定、历史水文重建与流域研究，是 ESSD 论文配套的北爱尔兰数据集。
desc_en: This UKSCAPE-G2G Northern Ireland river flow dataset (observation-driven) from UKCEH/EIDC covers 1980-2011 and is the observed-baseline companion to the UKCP18-driven version, likewise supplied with gauging-station and catchment ancillary files. It is provided as NetCDF under the Open Government Licence and is openly available. The dataset supports model calibration, historical hydrological reconstruction and catchment studies, and accompanies the related ESSD paper.

name: UNECE E-Waterway / Blue Book inland waterway network
notes: Niche but unique - actually represents canal alignments not just rivers.
verify_notes: UNECE returns 403 to bot | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 联合国欧洲经济委员会（UNECE）发布的 E-水道 / 蓝皮书内河航道网络数据，覆盖欧洲 E 级内河航道体系。数据以 Shapefile 提供，采用 UN 自定义开放数据条款，可直接下载。其特点是描绘运河与河流的实际走向（真实形状）而非仅河流中心线，适合内河航运分析、货运统计与交通基础设施研究等专门用途。
desc_en: Published by the UN Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE), the E-Waterway / Blue Book dataset represents the European E-class inland waterway network. It is provided as Shapefile under custom UN open-data terms and is directly downloadable. A distinctive feature is that it depicts the real alignments of canals and rivers rather than mere centrelines, making it useful for inland navigation analysis, freight statistics and transport-infrastructure studies.

name: US Census TIGER/Line Coastline & Hydrography
notes: Useful for US coastline + linear/area water; updated each Census cycle.
verify_notes: data.gov 元数据页可达, 链至 Census TIGER 下载 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国人口普查局通过 data.gov 发布的 TIGER/Line 海岸线与水文数据（2019 版），覆盖全美，提供海岸线及线状/面状水体要素。数据为 Shapefile 格式，属美国公共领域（CC0），可直接下载，每个普查周期更新。常用于美国海岸线制图、水文背景图层构建以及与人口、社会经济数据的空间叠加分析。
desc_en: Released by the US Census Bureau via data.gov, the 2019 TIGER/Line Coastline and Hydrography data cover the United States, providing coastline plus linear and areal water features. Distributed as Shapefile in the US public domain (CC0), it is directly downloadable and refreshed each census cycle. It is commonly used for US coastline mapping, hydrographic base layers, and spatial overlay with population and socioeconomic data.

name: USGS NHDPlus High Resolution (NHDPlus HR)
coverage: CONUS, HI, PR, parts of AK
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: Routed hydrography + catchments + VAA tables; heavily used in research.
verify_notes: Production paused; USGS focusing on 3D Hydrography Program (3DHP) | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局（USGS）的 NHDPlus 高分辨率数据集（NHDPlus HR）是全美权威的水文要素产品，覆盖美国本土、夏威夷、波多黎各及部分阿拉斯加，约含两千七百万条河流线要素，比例尺约 1:24,000。数据以压缩 File GDB 提供，通过 TNM 下载器按 HU4 流域单元获取，属 USGS 公共领域。包含路由水系、汇水区及增值属性（VAA）表，广泛用于水文建模与研究。
desc_en: USGS NHDPlus High Resolution (NHDPlus HR) is the authoritative national hydrography product for the United States, covering CONUS, Hawaii, Puerto Rico and parts of Alaska with around 27 million flowline features at roughly 1:24,000 scale. Delivered as zipped File GDB via The National Map downloader by HU4 unit and in the USGS public domain, it bundles routed hydrography, catchments and value-added attribute (VAA) tables, and is heavily used in hydrological modelling and research.

name: Vector-based Global River Network accounting for variable drainage density
notes: Global vector river network; relevant to SciDB-discoverable hydrography.
verify_notes: MERIT Hydro-Vector global river network, Scientific Data 2021 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一份发表于 Scientific Data 并经 ScienceDB 镜像的全球矢量河网数据集，特点是考虑了可变排水密度，使河网在不同区域更贴合实际水文条件，并可提取中国子集。数据以 Shapefile/GeoPackage 线状要素提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可开放下载。适合全球及区域尺度的河网分析、水文连通性研究与流域建模。
desc_en: This vector global river network, published in Scientific Data and mirrored on ScienceDB, is distinctive for accounting for variable drainage density so the network better matches actual hydrological conditions across regions, with a China subset extractable. It is provided as Shapefile/GeoPackage line features under a CC-BY 4.0 licence and is openly downloadable. The dataset suits global and regional river-network analysis, hydrological connectivity research and catchment modelling.

name: WHYMAP - World-wide Hydrogeological Mapping and Assessment Programme
formats_now: Maps, web map apps and services (WMS implied)
notes: Companion to IGRAC datasets; gives global groundwater resource polygons not basins.
verify_notes: References 2023 news; no explicit open license | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WHYMAP（世界水文地质制图与评估计划）由德国 BGR 联合 UNESCO、IAH、IAEA 与 CGMW 合作开展，提供全球尺度的水文地质与地下水资源参考图，约 1:25,000,000 比例尺，自 2000 年启动。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoTIFF 形式直接下载，许可遵循 BGR 与 UNESCO 条款（无明确开放许可）。它给出全球地下水资源分级多边形，是地下水资源宏观评估的权威参考。
desc_en: WHYMAP, the World-wide Hydrogeological Mapping and Assessment Programme, is run by Germany's BGR with UNESCO, IAH, IAEA and CGMW, providing global hydrogeological and groundwater reference maps at roughly 1:25,000,000 scale and launched in 2000. Data are directly downloadable as Shapefile and GeoTIFF under BGR and UNESCO terms (no explicit open licence). It delivers classified global groundwater-resource polygons and is an authoritative reference for macro-scale groundwater assessment.

name: WHYMAP Groundwater Resources of the World
notes: 全球地下水主流参考；矢量分级
verify_notes: BGR Geoportal distribution; license requires contacting whymap@bgr.de | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WHYMAP「世界地下水资源」图由 BGR 联合 UNESCO IHP/IGRAC 制作，是全球地下水资源的主流参考产品，约 1:25,000,000 比例尺，补给量参考时段为 1961–1990 年。数据以 Shapefile 矢量分级形式提供，并附 1:25M 与 1:40M 的 PDF 地图，可直接下载，页面未明确许可。适合全球地下水资源分布与含水层潜力的宏观评估与制图。
desc_en: The WHYMAP Groundwater Resources of the World map, produced by BGR with UNESCO IHP/IGRAC, is a leading global reference for groundwater resources at roughly 1:25,000,000 scale, with recharge rates referenced to 1961-1990. It is provided as classified Shapefile vectors alongside 1:25M and 1:40M PDF maps, directly downloadable, with no explicit licence stated on the page. It suits macro-scale assessment and mapping of global groundwater distribution and aquifer potential.

name: WISE EIONET Spatial dataset
notes: River basin districts, surface water bodies, monitoring sites.
verify_notes: Public + Internal (Eionet auth) versions; coverage 2001-2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WISE EIONET 空间数据集由欧洲环境署（EEA/WISE）发布，覆盖欧盟，提供流域区（River Basin Districts）、地表水体与监测站点等水环境矢量要素。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoPackage（SQLite）格式开放下载，遵循 EEA 标准再利用条款。适合欧洲水框架指令（WFD）相关的水体管理、监测网络分析与流域尺度环境研究。
desc_en: Published by the European Environment Agency (EEA/WISE), the WISE EIONET Spatial dataset covers the EU and provides water-environment vector features including River Basin Districts, surface water bodies and monitoring sites. It is openly downloadable as Shapefile and GeoPackage (SQLite) under EEA standard re-use terms. The dataset supports Water Framework Directive water-body management, monitoring-network analysis and catchment-scale environmental research across Europe.

name: WISE WFD Surface Water Body centrelines
coverage: Pan-European river centrelines as reported under WFD
notes: Companion to polygonal WFD water bodies; useful for river network analysis.
verify_notes: WISE WFD surface water body centrelines v1.9 (Sept 2025) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WISE WFD 地表水体中心线数据由欧洲环境署（EEA）发布，是各成员国依据水框架指令（WFD）上报的泛欧河流中心线，作为面状 WFD 水体数据的配套。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoPackage 提供，可开放下载。其线状结构便于河网拓扑分析、河流连通性评估与跨欧洲水体管理研究。
desc_en: The WISE WFD Surface Water Body centrelines, published by the EEA, are pan-European river centrelines reported by member states under the Water Framework Directive, serving as a companion to the polygonal WFD water bodies. The data are provided as Shapefile and GeoPackage and are openly downloadable. Their linear structure supports river-network topology analysis, connectivity assessment and water-body management studies across Europe.

name: World Bank Water Data portal (wbwaterdata.org) - curated hydrography layers
theme_raw: Aggregator of hydrography, lakes, basins, dams
notes: CKAN catalogue surfaces lesser-known regional layers (e.g. Mekong, Indus tributary atlases).
verify_notes: World Bank water data hub | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界银行水数据门户（wbwaterdata.org）是一个 CKAN 目录，汇集了全球范围的水文与水资源矢量图层，并收录了不少较少见的区域数据（如湄公河、印度河支流图集等）。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 等格式直接下载，许可方式不一，多数为 CC-BY。适合全球及区域水资源分析、跨境流域研究与发展项目的水文背景数据获取。
desc_en: The World Bank Water Data portal (wbwaterdata.org) is a CKAN catalogue aggregating global hydrography and water-resource vector layers, including lesser-known regional datasets such as Mekong and Indus tributary atlases. Data are directly downloadable as Shapefile and GeoJSON under a mix of licences, most commonly CC-BY. It suits global and regional water-resource analysis, transboundary basin studies and sourcing hydrological context for development projects.

name: World Water Bodies — Esri open dataset
notes: Paper lists 'World Waterbodies' as input; canonical open vector equivalent.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub dataset page accessible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 「世界水体」数据集由 Esri 联合 USGS 提供，是全球水体（湖泊、河流、海洋等）的权威开放矢量底图。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 和矢量切片形式开放下载，采用开放/署名许可。常作为全球制图与可视化的标准水体底图，也是不少研究中「World Waterbodies」输入图层的规范开放替代来源。
desc_en: World Water Bodies, provided by Esri with USGS, is an authoritative open vector base layer of global water bodies including lakes, rivers and oceans. It is openly available as Shapefile, GeoJSON and vector tiles under an open/attribution licence. Widely used as a standard water base map for global cartography and visualisation, it also serves as the canonical open equivalent of the 'World Waterbodies' input layer cited in many studies.

name: WRI Aqueduct Water Risk V4 Baseline Annual
notes: Vector form of Aqueduct; monthly + future scenarios are sibling assets.
verify_notes: 13 water risk indicators | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WRI Aqueduct 水风险 V4 基线（年度）数据集由世界资源研究所发布，是 Aqueduct 水风险评估的矢量形式，以子流域多边形承载逾百项属性，覆盖全球基线情景。数据以 Earth Engine FeatureCollection 提供，采用 WRI 开放许可（请求署名）；其月度与未来情景为同系列资产。适合水资源压力、洪旱风险等综合水风险的全球评估与制图。
desc_en: WRI Aqueduct Water Risk V4 Baseline Annual, from the World Resources Institute, is the vector form of the Aqueduct water-risk framework, carrying over 100 attributes on sub-basin polygons for the global baseline scenario. It is provided as an Earth Engine FeatureCollection under WRI's open licence with attribution requested, with monthly and future-scenario siblings available. It suits global assessment and mapping of composite water risk including water stress and flood and drought exposure.

name: WWF HydroSHEDS Free Flowing Rivers
license: HydroSHEDS license (free for non-commercial; commercial on request)
license_now: Free for non-commercial and commercial use (HydroSHEDS license)
notes: Less-cited than HydroSHEDS basins but unique for connectivity work.
verify_notes: Polylines based on SRTM 2000 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WWF HydroSHEDS 自由流动河流数据集由 WWF 与麦吉尔大学制作，是 HydroSHEDS 体系中的全球河流连通性产品，以线状 FeatureCollection 标识河流的自由流动状态。数据通过 Earth Engine 提供，遵循 HydroSHEDS 许可（可用于商业与非商业用途）。相较于更常被引用的 HydroSHEDS 流域数据，它在河流连通性与碎片化分析方面具有独特价值。
desc_en: WWF HydroSHEDS Free Flowing Rivers, developed by WWF and McGill University, is the global river-connectivity product within the HydroSHEDS family, flagging the free-flowing status of rivers as a line FeatureCollection. It is available through Earth Engine under the HydroSHEDS licence permitting both commercial and non-commercial use. Less cited than the HydroSHEDS basins, it is uniquely valuable for river connectivity and fragmentation analysis.

name: 中国一级河流空间分布数据 / Major Rivers of China (1:1M derived)
provider: 中国科学院资源环境科学与数据中心 (RESDC) / osgeo.cn mirror
notes: Convenient extracted layer of Yangtze, Yellow, Heilongjiang, Pearl etc. Useful when full 1:1M dataset is overkill.
verify_notes: China primary river spatial distribution; download details not on page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国一级河流空间分布数据来自中国科学院资源环境科学与数据中心（RESDC），经 osgeo.cn 镜像提供，源自国家 1:100 万基础地理数据派生，覆盖全中国主要河流。数据以 Shapefile 提供，可直接下载，许可不甚明确（属 NGCC 1:1M 派生产品）。该图层便捷地提取了长江、黄河、黑龙江、珠江等主干河流，适合在无需完整 1:1M 数据时进行区域水系制图。
desc_en: The Major Rivers of China dataset, from the Chinese Academy of Sciences' Resource and Environment Science and Data Center (RESDC) and mirrored on osgeo.cn, is derived from the national 1:1,000,000 base mapping and covers China's principal rivers. It is provided as Shapefile for direct download, with an unclear licence as a derivative of NGCC 1:1M data. Conveniently extracting trunk rivers such as the Yangtze, Yellow, Heilongjiang and Pearl, it suits regional hydrographic mapping when the full 1:1M dataset is excessive.

name: 中国湿地生态与环境数据中心矢量集 (IGADC 镜像)
provider: 中科院东北地理与农业生态研究所 / 湿地数据中心
coverage: 中国 (重点东北沼泽湿地)
notes: 包含三江/松嫩平原湿地分布矢量, 与 IGADC 同构
verify_notes: HTTP 404 Not Found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 中国湿地生态与环境数据中心矢量集（IGADC 镜像）由中科院东北地理与农业生态研究所/湿地数据中心维护，重点覆盖中国东北沼泽湿地，包含三江平原、松嫩平原等湿地分布矢量。数据以 Shapefile 提供，需注册申请审批后获取。适合东北湿地资源调查、生态保护规划与湿地变化研究等用途。
desc_en: The wetland ecology and environment vector collection (IGADC mirror), maintained by the CAS Northeast Institute of Geography and Agroecology / wetland data centre, focuses on the marsh wetlands of Northeast China, including wetland distributions on the Sanjiang and Songnen Plains. Provided as Shapefile under registration and approval, it suits Northeast China wetland inventory, conservation planning and wetland-change research, structurally consistent with the IGADC holdings.

name: 伊春尾矿库泄漏救灾数据 (Yichun mining accident thematic)
formats: shapefile (admin boundaries, hydrology, point of incident)
notes: Companion vector layers for impacted river basin.
verify_notes: Yichun 3.28 Luming mining tailings leakage thematic data portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 伊春尾矿库泄漏救灾数据由国家地球系统科学数据中心（NESSDC）地理资源分中心发布，是针对黑龙江伊春尾矿库泄漏事故的专题矢量数据，包含行政边界、水文与事故点位等图层。数据以 Shapefile 提供，可公开下载，许可为 geodata.cn 版权所有。适合该事故受影响河流流域的应急评估、污染扩散分析与救灾决策支持。
desc_en: The Yichun mining accident thematic dataset, released by the NESSDC Geographic Resources Sub-center, provides vector layers for the tailings-dam leak incident in Yichun, Heilongjiang, including administrative boundaries, hydrology and the incident point. Provided as Shapefile for public thematic download under geodata.cn all-rights-reserved terms, it supports emergency assessment of the affected river basin, contamination-spread analysis and disaster-response decision-making.

name: 青藏高原高寒湿地制图 (Qinghai-Tibet Plateau Alpine Wetland Mapping)
