coverage: 青藏高原约 159,256 km²（占中国湿地 ~28%）
formats: 矢量 shp（基于 10m 遥感解译）
notes: 包含河流湿地、湖泊湿地、沼泽湿地等类型
verify_notes: 青藏高原高寒湿地制图 10m, Sentinel-2 2022, DL生成 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 青藏高原高寒湿地制图数据由地理空间数据云（GSCloud）发布，基于 10 米遥感解译，覆盖约 159,256 平方公里（约占中国湿地的 28%），区分河流湿地、湖泊湿地、沼泽湿地等类型。数据以矢量 Shapefile 提供，需注册下载。适合青藏高原湿地分布制图、高寒生态系统研究与湿地保护与变化监测等用途。
desc_en: The Qinghai-Tibet Plateau Alpine Wetland Mapping dataset from GSCloud is based on 10 m remote-sensing interpretation, covering about 159,256 km² (around 28% of China's wetlands) and distinguishing river, lake and marsh wetland types. Provided as vector Shapefile under registration, it suits mapping of plateau wetland distribution, alpine ecosystem research and wetland conservation and change monitoring.

name: 黄河上游河流矢量图 (Eco-Science Data Center)
provider: 中科院 西北生态环境资源研究院 / disaster.casnw.net
coverage: Yellow River upper reaches (source to Toudaoguai)
lychee_status: Network error: SSL certificate hostname mismatch. Check URL spelling (error sending request for url (https://disaster.casnw.net/metadata/c779c1b5-1d26-4c61-8102-e23ca9b53923))
lychee_text: Network error: SSL certificate hostname mismatch. Check URL spelling (error sending request for url (https://disaster.casnw.net/metadata/c779c1b5-1d26-4c61-8102-e23ca9b53923))
notes: Cold/Arid 区域专项, 黄河源至头道拐
verify_notes: TLS certificate altname invalid; site likely misconfigured or stale | lychee:Network error: SSL certificate hostname mismatch. Check URL spelling (error sending request for url (https://disaster.casnw.net/metadata/c779c1b5-1d26-4c61-8102-e23ca9b53923))
desc_zh: 黄河上游河流矢量图由中科院西北生态环境资源研究院通过 disaster.casnw.net 发布，覆盖黄河上游（源头至头道拐）河段，属寒区旱区区域专项数据。数据以 Shapefile 提供，需注册获取，遵循 CASNW 协议。适合黄河源区与上游流域的水系制图、生态水文研究与水资源管理分析。
desc_en: The Yellow River upper-reaches river vector map, released by the CAS Northwest Institute of Eco-Environment and Resources via disaster.casnw.net, covers the Yellow River from its source to Toudaoguai as a cold and arid region thematic dataset. Provided as Shapefile under registration and the CASNW agreement, it suits hydrographic mapping, eco-hydrological research and water-resource management for the Yellow River source and upper basin.

name: 黑河流域1:100万植被类型图 (Heihe River Basin 1:1,000,000 Vegetation Type Map)
notes: Classic 1:1M vegetation polygon layer commonly used for Heihe ecohydrology studies
verify_notes: Heihe River Basin 1:1M vegetation map; 5.8 MB; registration required | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 黑河流域 1:100 万植被类型图由甘肃生态科学数据中心（eco.gssdc.cn）发布，覆盖中国西北黑河流域，以数字化矢量多边形表示植被类型。数据为 Shapefile 格式（约 5.8 MB），采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，需登录并申请后获取。该 1:1M 植被多边形图层是黑河生态水文研究中常用的经典数据，适合流域植被分布与生态过程分析。
desc_en: The Heihe River Basin 1:1,000,000 Vegetation Type Map, published by the Gansu Ecological Science Data Center (eco.gssdc.cn), covers the Heihe Basin in northwest China with digitised vector polygons of vegetation types. Provided as Shapefile (about 5.8 MB) under CC BY 4.0 with login and application required, this classic 1:1M vegetation polygon layer is commonly used in Heihe ecohydrology studies and suits analysis of basin vegetation distribution and ecological processes.

name: Urban Atlas 2018 / 2021 (vector)
theme_raw: urban land cover & use (19 urban + 9 rural classes) | Urban land use/cover for Functional Urban Areas | Urban LCLU
coverage: ~790 Functional Urban Areas (>50k pop.) in EEA38 + UK
formats_now: Vector; via Copernicus Browser, S3, OData, STAC APIs
notes: Higher-thematic-detail companion to CLC for cities; also has 2012-2018 and 2018-2021 Change vector products.
verify_notes: Now also distributed through Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 城市图集（Urban Atlas）2018/2021 由哥白尼陆地监测服务（CLMS）与欧洲环境署发布，覆盖 EEA38 及英国约 790 个人口超过 5 万的功能城市区，提供高专题精度的城市土地利用矢量数据，是 CORINE 在城市尺度上的补充。数据以 SQLite 地理数据库或 Shapefile（仅矢量）直接下载，遵循哥白尼数据政策，并附 2012–2018 与 2018–2021 变化产品。适合城市土地利用与扩张分析。
desc_en: Urban Atlas 2018/2021, from the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service and EEA, covers around 790 Functional Urban Areas above 50,000 inhabitants across EEA38 plus the UK, providing high-thematic-detail urban land-use vectors that complement CORINE at city scale. It is directly downloadable as SQLite geodatabase or Shapefile (vector only) under the Copernicus data policy, with 2012-2018 and 2018-2021 change products available. It suits urban land-use and expansion analysis.

name: JRC GHS Functional Urban Areas (GHS-FUA)
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: Functional urban areas (commuting zones) for global urban centers | Urban centres plus commuting zones (FUAs) | population_socioecon
license_now: Open and free (JRC/EC; CC-BY-4.0 per JRC data catalogue)
formats_now: ZIP via JRC Data Catalogue, Mollweide EPSG:54009, 1 km
notes: Endorsed by UN Statistical Commission Degree-of-Urbanisation method. Companion GHS-UCDB (urban centre database) is also vector.
verify_notes: GHS-FUA R2019A; download link via JRC data catalogue. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: JRC 全球人居层功能城市区（GHS-FUA）由欧盟委员会联合研究中心（JRC）与 OECD 制作，覆盖全球 9,032 个功能城市区（2015 年时期）。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoPackage 提供，开放免费（CC-BY-4.0）。该数据采用经联合国统计委员会认可的城市化程度（Degree of Urbanisation）方法，配套有 GHS-UCDB 城市中心数据库，适合全球城市定义、跨国城市比较与城镇化研究。
desc_en: JRC GHS Functional Urban Areas (GHS-FUA), produced by the EC Joint Research Centre with the OECD, cover 9,032 functional urban areas globally for the 2015 epoch. Provided as Shapefile and GeoPackage, the data are open and free under CC-BY-4.0. Built on the Degree of Urbanisation method endorsed by the UN Statistical Commission and paired with the GHS-UCDB urban centre database, it suits global city definition, cross-country urban comparison and urbanisation research.

name: CORINE Land Cover (CLC) 2018 — Vector
provider: European Environment Agency / Copernicus Land Monitoring Service
theme_raw: land cover (CLC 44-class) — Europe-wide LULC | Pan-European LULC, 44 classes | European LC
license: Free for any use with attribution (Copernicus data and information policy)
formats: ESRI File Geodatabase, SQLite, shapefile (vector); WMS/REST
doi_or_citation: DOI registered separately for raster/vector versions
notes: Anchor dataset. Includes Change layers (CLC-Change) also in vector. Free login required at Copernicus Data Space.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CORINE 土地覆盖（CLC）2018 矢量版由欧洲环境署/哥白尼陆地监测服务发布，覆盖 EEA39（欧盟、欧洲自由贸易联盟、西巴尔干及土耳其），是泛欧土地覆盖的基准数据集，约 100 米分辨率、每六年更新。数据以 ESRI File Geodatabase、SQLite、Shapefile 矢量及 WMS/REST 形式提供，遵循哥白尼数据政策（免费、需署名），并包含变化图层。适合欧洲土地覆盖变化监测与环境规划。
desc_en: CORINE Land Cover (CLC) 2018 vector, from the EEA and Copernicus Land Monitoring Service, covers EEA39 (EU, EFTA, Western Balkans and Türkiye) and is the benchmark pan-European land-cover dataset at roughly 100 m resolution with six-yearly updates. It is provided as ESRI File Geodatabase, SQLite, Shapefile vectors and via WMS/REST under the Copernicus data policy (free with attribution), and includes CLC-Change layers. It suits European land-cover change monitoring and environmental planning.

name: GHSL Urban Centre Database (UCDB) R2024A
notes: Sibling worldwide city polygon dataset commonly cross-referenced with MSDCW/Demographia.
verify_notes: ghs_ucdb2024.php 404s; canonical UCDB landing is ghs_ucdb.php (R2024A release listed there) | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: GHSL 城市中心数据库（UCDB）R2024A 由欧盟委员会联合研究中心 GHSL 项目发布，覆盖全球一万余个城市中心，时期跨越 1975–2025 年。数据以 GeoPackage、Shapefile 和 CSV 提供，可直接下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。作为全球城市多边形数据集，常与 MSDCW、Demographia 等城市清单交叉参照，适合全球城市规模、人口与城镇化动态分析。
desc_en: The GHSL Urban Centre Database (UCDB) R2024A, from the European Commission JRC GHSL programme, covers more than 10,000 urban centres worldwide across epochs from 1975 to 2025. Provided as GeoPackage, Shapefile and CSV for direct download under CC BY 4.0, this global city-polygon dataset is commonly cross-referenced with MSDCW and Demographia listings and suits analysis of global city size, population and urbanisation dynamics.

name: USGS Protected Areas Database of the US (PAD-US 4.1)
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Marine & coastal | Protected areas & biodiversity
theme_raw: Protected lands / conservation | Protected land polygons (often used as LULC ground truth) | protected lands (parks, forests, wilderness) — LU classes
formats: File GDB, Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON, KMZ
access: ScienceBase by DOI region / state / national
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: De facto standard for US conservation analyses; multi-feature-class (Fee, Designation, Easement, Marine).
verify_notes: PAD-US 4.1 current; DOI 10.5066/P96WBCHS | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 美国保护区数据库（PAD-US 4.1）由 USGS GAP 项目发布，覆盖全美，是美国保护与保育分析的事实标准。数据提供 File GDB、Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON、KMZ 等多种格式，通过 ScienceBase 按区域、州或全国级别下载，属美国公共领域。其包含产权（Fee）、指定（Designation）、地役权（Easement）与海洋等多个要素类，适合保护地分布、土地管理与生物多样性保护研究。
desc_en: The USGS Protected Areas Database of the United States (PAD-US 4.1), from the USGS GAP programme, covers the USA and is the de facto standard for national conservation analyses. It is provided in File GDB, Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON and KMZ via ScienceBase by region, state or national extent in the US public domain. Its multiple feature classes (Fee, Designation, Easement, Marine) suit protected-area mapping, land management and biodiversity-conservation research.

name: GRUMPv1 Urban Extent Polygons, Revision 02
license: CC BY (NASA Earthdata, free with Earthdata Login)
notes: Polygons of urban extent derived from nighttime lights + settlement buffers; includes settlement names. Widely cited; one of the first global named urban polygon layers.
verify_notes: SEDAC slow / timed out; site moved to earthdata.nasa.gov in 2024 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GRUMPv1 城市范围多边形（修订 02）由 NASA SEDAC/哥伦比亚大学 CIESIN 发布，覆盖全球约 1995 年的城市范围，基于夜间灯光与居民点缓冲区提取，并附居民点名称。数据以 Esri Shapefile 提供，需 Earthdata 登录后经 HTTPS 下载，采用 CC BY 许可。作为最早的全球命名城市多边形图层之一，被广泛引用，适合早期城镇化格局与城市扩张的历史基线研究。
desc_en: GRUMPv1 Urban Extent Polygons, Revision 02, from NASA SEDAC/CIESIN at Columbia University, depict global urban extents circa 1995, derived from nighttime lights and settlement buffers and including settlement names. Provided as Esri Shapefile via HTTPS download with an Earthdata Login under a CC BY licence, it was one of the first global named urban polygon layers and is widely cited, suiting historical baseline studies of early urbanisation and urban expansion.

name: Catchment Scale Land Use of Australia (CLUM)
provider: ABARES, Department of Agriculture, Fisheries and Forestry
theme_raw: land use (ALUM v8 classification) | Agricultural land use & commodities | Land use
notes: True vector source compiled from state ACLUMP partners — rare national-scale LU vector.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; likely bot/anti-scrape block, page itself presumed alive | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳大利亚集水区尺度土地利用（CLUM）由 ABARES（澳大利亚农业、渔业和林业部）发布，覆盖全澳，是由各州 ACLUMP 合作方汇编的全国级土地利用矢量数据，较为稀有。数据以 Esri Shapefile 矢量包加 50 米栅格形式直接下载，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适合全国与区域土地利用分析、农业用地评估与土地利用变化研究。
desc_en: Catchment Scale Land Use of Australia (CLUM), published by ABARES within the Department of Agriculture, Fisheries and Forestry, covers Australia and is a rare national-scale land-use vector dataset compiled from state ACLUMP partners. It is directly downloadable as an Esri shapefile vector package plus a 50 m raster under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. It suits national and regional land-use analysis, agricultural-land assessment and land-use change research.

name: CORINE Land Cover (CLC) vector
theme_raw: Land cover / land use | Land cover
formats: ESRI File Geodatabase, SQLite/Spatialite vector (≈GPKG), Shapefile
formats_now: GDB, Spatialite, GeoTIFF, ESRI REST, OGC WMS
verify_notes: CORINE Land Cover datahub page accessible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CORINE 土地覆盖（CLC）矢量数据由欧洲环境署/哥白尼陆地监测服务发布，覆盖泛欧地区，提供 1990、2000、2006、2012、2018 各参考年份及变化图层，采用 44 类土地覆盖分类、约 100 米分辨率。数据以 ESRI File Geodatabase、SQLite/Spatialite 矢量（近似 GPKG）及 Shapefile 提供，免费、需经 CLMS 注册。适合长时序欧洲土地覆盖变化分析与环境监测。
desc_en: CORINE Land Cover (CLC) vector, from the EEA and Copernicus Land Monitoring Service, covers pan-Europe across reference years 1990, 2000, 2006, 2012 and 2018 plus change layers, using a 44-class scheme at roughly 100 m resolution. It is provided as ESRI File Geodatabase, SQLite/Spatialite vector (approximately GPKG) and Shapefile, free with registration via CLMS. It suits long-term European land-cover change analysis and environmental monitoring.

name: INEGI Marco Geoestadístico (AGEB, manzanas, localidades)
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: AGEB urbana/rural, manzanas, municipios, localidades | AGEBs (basic geostatistical areas urban/rural), manzanas, localidades, municipios | National geostatistical framework (states, municipios, AGEBs, manzanas)
license: Términos de libre uso de información de INEGI
formats: Shapefile, KML, GeoPackage; ArcGIS REST via Mapa Digital
notes: Official tabulation unit for the 2020 Censo de Población y Vivienda; AGEB is the analogue of US census tracts.
verify_notes: Marco Geoestadistico landing page; details on subpages | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: INEGI 地理统计框架（Marco Geoestadístico）由墨西哥国家统计与地理研究所（INEGI）发布，覆盖墨西哥全国，提供 AGEB（基本地理统计区）、街区（manzanas）与居民点（localidades）等统计单元矢量。数据以 Shapefile、KML、GeoPackage 及 ArcGIS REST（Mapa Digital）形式直接下载，遵循 INEGI 自由使用条款。AGEB 类似美国普查区，是 2020 年人口与住房普查的官方统计单元，适合人口与社会经济空间分析。
desc_en: INEGI's Marco Geoestadístico, published by Mexico's National Institute of Statistics and Geography, covers the whole country and provides statistical-unit vectors including AGEB (basic geostatistical areas), blocks (manzanas) and localities (localidades). It is directly downloadable as Shapefile, KML, GeoPackage and via ArcGIS REST (Mapa Digital) under INEGI's free-use terms. AGEB, the analogue of US census tracts, is the official tabulation unit for the 2020 census, suiting population and socioeconomic spatial analysis.

name: LECZ Urban-Rural Population and Land Area Estimates, v3
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic | Marine & coastal
theme_raw: Coastal / Population | Coastal exposure | Coastal Deltas
notes: Low-elevation coastal zone polygons with urban/rural population for 1990, 2000, 2015.
verify_notes: SEDAC server timeout | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 低海拔沿海带（LECZ）城乡人口与陆地面积估算 v3 由 NASA SEDAC/CIESIN 发布，覆盖 234 个国家，提供低海拔沿海带多边形及其 1990、2000、2015 年的城乡人口估算。数据以 Shapefile、CSV 与 GeoTIFF 提供，免费获取。适合海平面上升、沿海洪涝暴露与沿海人口风险等评估，是沿海脆弱性与气候适应研究的常用数据。
desc_en: LECZ Urban-Rural Population and Land Area Estimates, v3, from NASA SEDAC/CIESIN, covers 234 countries, providing low-elevation coastal zone polygons with urban and rural population estimates for 1990, 2000 and 2015. It is available free as Shapefile, CSV and GeoTIFF. The dataset suits assessment of sea-level rise, coastal flood exposure and coastal population risk, and is widely used in coastal vulnerability and climate-adaptation research.

name: 国家林业和草原科学数据共享服务平台 (forestdata.cn) - 林地/湿地/草地数据集
provider: 国家林业和草原科学数据中心 (中国林科院资源所)
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Hazards & disasters | Protected areas & biodiversity
theme_raw: 森林/草地/湿地 矢量 / 林业一张图 | protected_areas | wildfire / forest fire
license: open (实名注册, 学术使用)
notes: 国内唯一以林草为主题的国家数据中心; 含 CSTR 持久标识, 提供 WMTS 地图 API 可用于程序化访问
verify_notes: Forest data portal live; ICP 京ICP备11030415号-2; contact datacenter@ifrit.ac.cn | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家林业和草原科学数据共享服务平台（forestdata.cn）由国家林业和草原科学数据中心（中国林科院资源所）运营，是国内唯一以林草为主题的国家级科学数据中心。平台汇集中国林地、湿地、草地等矢量数据，覆盖范围以中国为主，提供 Shapefile 下载以及 WMTS 地图服务接口，可用于程序化访问与在线制图。数据集附带 CSTR 持久标识符，便于引用追溯。访问需注册，许可条款在首页未明确说明，使用前建议核对。该平台适合林草资源管理、生态评估及灾害与保护地相关分析。
desc_en: Operated by China's National Forestry and Grassland Science Data Center (Chinese Academy of Forestry), forestdata.cn is the country's only national data center dedicated to forest and grassland themes. It hosts vector datasets on forest land, wetlands, and grasslands covering China, delivered as shapefiles plus a WMTS map API for programmatic access and web mapping. Records carry CSTR persistent identifiers for citation. Access requires registration, and licensing is not clearly stated on the homepage, so terms should be checked. The platform suits forestry resource management, ecological assessment, and protected-area or hazard-related analysis.

name: 1900-2019年中国土地利用和覆盖变化数据集 (HLU CN)
provider: 国家生态科学数据中心 NESDC (中国科学院生态环境研究中心)
theme_raw: 百年长时间序列土地利用 | 水稻 (耕地子类)
license: open (NESDC 共享协议, 需引用)
license_now: NESDC sharing agreement (attribution + usage statement, platform holds IP)
formats: raster + 部分矢量边界, 需注册下载确认
formats_now: direct download / batch API / JSON metadata
notes: 历史重建型 LULC, 含历史地图数字化的矢量底图; 适合做长周期人为活动驱动分析
verify_notes: Requires user registration and explicit citation | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为 1900—2019 年中国土地利用和覆盖变化（HLU CN）历史重建产品，由国家生态科学数据中心 NESDC（中国科学院生态环境研究中心）发布，覆盖中国全境，时间跨度逾一个世纪。数据以栅格为主，并包含历史地图数字化得到的部分矢量边界底图，适合开展长周期人类活动驱动的土地变化分析。下载需注册并确认使用声明，遵循 NESDC 共享协议（署名加用途说明，平台保留知识产权）。它为研究中国近现代土地利用演变与人地关系提供了难得的长时序基础数据。
desc_en: This is a historical reconstruction of China's land use and land cover change (HLU CN) spanning 1900-2019, released by NESDC (Research Center for Eco-Environmental Sciences, CAS) and covering all of China across more than a century. The product is primarily raster but includes vector boundary base maps digitized from historical maps, making it well suited to long-term analysis of human-driven land change. Download requires registration and acceptance of a usage statement under the NESDC sharing agreement (attribution plus usage declaration, with IP held by the platform). It offers a rare long time series for studying modern China's land-use evolution and human-environment relationships.

name: 1:1,000,000 Vegetation Map of China (TPDC mirror)
theme_raw: vegetation / land cover | 植被类型
notes: Authoritative national vegetation-type polygons; frequently used for TP studies.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 1:100 万中国植被图（TPDC 镜像）由中国科学院编制，是中国权威的国家级植被类型矢量数据，以 Shapefile 形式提供植被类型多边形，覆盖包括青藏高原在内的中国全境。该图常被用作生态、气候与高原研究的基础植被底图，是相关分析中广泛引用的标准资料。数据通过国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）镜像分发，需注册下载，遵循 TPDC 数据使用政策。其权威性与较高的制图比例尺使其适合区域至全国尺度的植被分类与生态系统研究。
desc_en: The 1:1,000,000 Vegetation Map of China (TPDC mirror), compiled by the Chinese Academy of Sciences, is an authoritative national dataset of vegetation-type polygons delivered as a shapefile and covering all of China including the Tibetan Plateau. It is widely used as a base vegetation layer for ecological, climate, and plateau studies and is a standard reference in such work. Distributed via the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center, it requires registered download under the TPDC data use policy. Its authoritative status and detailed mapping scale make it suitable for regional-to-national vegetation classification and ecosystem research.

name: Anthropogenic Biomes of the World, Version 2 (Anthromes v2) historical polygons
theme_raw: Land use / Historical | Land use / biomes
formats: GeoTIFF primarily; shapefile derivatives via SEDAC map services / WMS
notes: Collection page links time slices. Vector exports are derivative — verify per slice; included here for the WMS/vector tile delivery alongside raster.
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 世界人为生物群区第 2 版（Anthromes v2）由 NASA SEDAC 与 Ellis 等人发布，刻画 1700、1800、1900 和 2000 年四个时间断面的全球人为生态系统格局，将人类对生态系统的塑造分类制图。数据主要以 GeoTIFF 栅格提供，并可通过 SEDAC 地图服务/WMS 获取矢量与瓦片派生产品。采用 CC BY 许可，经由 HTTPS 和 Earthdata Login 访问。它适合全球长时序人类活动与土地利用演化研究；矢量导出为派生成果，使用前应按时间断面核实。
desc_en: Anthropogenic Biomes of the World, Version 2 (Anthromes v2), from NASA SEDAC and Ellis et al., maps global human-shaped ecosystems for four time slices: 1700, 1800, 1900, and 2000, classifying how humans have transformed the biosphere. The data are provided primarily as GeoTIFF rasters, with vector and tile derivatives available through SEDAC map services and WMS. Released under CC BY, it is accessed via HTTPS with Earthdata Login. It supports global long-term studies of human activity and land-use change; vector exports are derivative and should be verified per slice before use.

name: CLCD - China Annual Land Cover Dataset (1985-2024)
provider: 武汉大学 杨杰 / 黄昕 团队 (Wuhan University)
theme_raw: 中国年度土地覆盖 (9类) | national LULC
formats: GeoTIFF (raster, 原生); 可由用户矢量化
notes: ESSD 高引论文; 严格上栅格, 但因其代码连同 polygonize/vectorize 教程在 CSDN/知乎广泛传播, 常被作为矢量参考层使用; 列入因为它是中文圈最主流的LULC底图
verify_notes: v1.0.4 updated Jul 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CLCD（中国年度土地覆盖数据集，1985—2024）由武汉大学杨杰、黄昕团队制作，是中文学界最主流的土地利用/覆盖底图之一。数据为 30 米分辨率 GeoTIFF 栅格，覆盖中国全境，逐年提供，总量约 58.9 GB，单幅约 794—880 MB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可直接下载。其支撑论文发表于 ESSD（Yang & Huang, 2021）并被高频引用。该产品本质为栅格，但因配套矢量化教程在中文社区广泛传播，常被用作矢量参考层，适合长时序土地变化与生态环境分析。
desc_en: CLCD, the China Annual Land Cover Dataset (1985-2024) produced by the Yang Jie and Huang Xin team at Wuhan University, is one of the most widely used land cover base maps in the Chinese research community. It is delivered as 30 m GeoTIFF rasters covering China, provided annually, totaling about 58.9 GB with individual tiles around 794-880 MB, under CC-BY-4.0 with direct download. Its supporting paper (Yang & Huang, ESSD 2021) is highly cited. Although natively raster, accompanying vectorization tutorials are widely circulated, so it is often used as a vector reference layer for long-term land-change and eco-environmental analysis.

name: ESA WorldCover Polygons (wipfli) - PMTiles vector tiles v2
notes: Web-map-ready vector tileset derived from ESA WorldCover raster
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ESA WorldCover Polygons（wipfli）是由社区成员 Philipp Wipfli 基于 ESA WorldCover 栅格派生的全球土地覆盖矢量瓦片集，以 PMTiles 格式（约 401 MB，缩放级别 0—9）提供，可直接通过 HTTPS 下载。该数据将原始栅格转换为面向网页地图的矢量瓦片，便于在交互式地图中快速渲染和叠加展示。许可方面遵循 MIT（封装）与源数据 CC BY 4.0。它适合需要轻量、即用型全球土地覆盖矢量底图的 Web 制图与可视化场景，但分辨率受瓦片层级限制。
desc_en: ESA WorldCover Polygons by community member Philipp Wipfli is a global land cover vector tileset derived from the ESA WorldCover raster, delivered as PMTiles (about 401 MB, zoom 0-9) via direct HTTPS download. It converts the original raster into web-map-ready vector tiles for fast rendering and overlay in interactive maps. Licensing follows MIT for the packaging and CC BY 4.0 for the source data. It is well suited to web mapping and visualization needs that call for a lightweight, ready-to-use global land cover vector basemap, though detail is bounded by the tile zoom levels.

name: Esri/Impact Observatory 10m Land Cover (io-lulc-annual-v02)
theme_raw: Annual 9-class LULC; also available as vector tile service derivatives | Land cover
formats: COG primary (raster); polygonized derivatives via MVT rendering
notes: Listed as borderline — primary product is raster; included only because PC exposes polygon/tile vector views. Most users want it as raster — flag for exclusion if strict.
verify_notes: JS-rendered page; reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Esri/Impact Observatory 10 米土地覆盖（io-lulc-annual-v02）是由 Impact Observatory、Esri 与微软行星计算机（MPC）发布的全球年度土地覆盖产品，覆盖 2017 年至今，原生分辨率 10 米，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。主产品为 COG 栅格，但 MPC 通过 MVT 渲染提供面向矢量瓦片的多边形视图。它适合全球及区域尺度的逐年土地覆盖变化监测与分析；多数用户以栅格形式使用该数据，若需严格矢量数据集应注意其本质为栅格派生。
desc_en: Esri/Impact Observatory 10m Land Cover (io-lulc-annual-v02), published by Impact Observatory, Esri, and the Microsoft Planetary Computer, is a global annual land cover product covering 2017 to the present at native 10 m resolution under CC-BY-4.0. The primary product is COG raster, but the Planetary Computer exposes polygon/vector-tile views via MVT rendering. It supports global and regional annual land-cover change monitoring and analysis; most users consume it as raster, so its vector form should be understood as a derivative when strict vector data is required.

name: FAO Global Ecological Zones (GEZ) v2
theme_raw: ecological zones for forest reporting | Ecological/biome zones
formats_now: ESRI Shapefile (gez2010.zip); TIFF; WMS; PDF; JPG
notes: Used by FAO FRA reporting; complements WWF TEOW and Köppen-Geiger when forest classification dimension is needed.
verify_notes: FAO GEZ v2010 直接可下载 | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: FAO 全球生态区（GEZ）第 2 版由联合国粮农组织森林资源评估（FRA）项目发布，是全球尺度的生态区划矢量数据，以 Shapefile 形式提供，制图比例尺约 1:10 万，2010 年更新版在早期热带（1990）和全球（2000）覆盖基础上更新。采用 CC BY 4.0 开放许可，可通过 FAO 地图目录直接下载。该数据广泛用于 FAO FRA 森林报告，并在需要森林分类维度时与 WWF TEOW 生态区和 Köppen-Geiger 气候分区互为补充。
desc_en: FAO Global Ecological Zones (GEZ) v2, from the FAO Forest Resources Assessment programme, is a global vector dataset of ecological zones provided as a shapefile at roughly 1:100,000 scale, with the 2010 update building on earlier tropical (1990) and global (2000) coverage. Released under CC BY 4.0, it is freely downloadable from the FAO Map Catalog. It underpins FAO FRA forest reporting and complements WWF terrestrial ecoregions (TEOW) and Köppen-Geiger climate zones when a forest-classification dimension is needed.

name: geobr (R/Python) - Brazil official spatial datasets
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: Wrapper around IBGE statistical units (setores, weighting areas, urban concentrations, metropolitan regions) | Brazilian census tracts, municipalities, weighting areas
formats: GeoPackage via remote URLs, returns sf/GeoDataFrame
notes: Cleaner than raw IBGE FTP; resolves the topology bugs in original IBGE shapefiles.
verify_notes: v2.0.0; data through 2025-2026 | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: geobr 是由巴西应用经济研究院（IPEA）开发的 R/Python 软件包，用于便捷获取巴西官方空间数据集，涵盖行政边界、城市、人口社会经济等 30 多种数据，比例尺低至约 1:25 万，时间跨度从 1872 年至 2025 年。数据来源于 IBGE（采用 CC-BY），软件包本身为 MIT 许可，通过 API 以 GeoPackage 形式远程加载并返回 sf 或 GeoDataFrame 对象。相比原始 IBGE FTP，geobr 数据更整洁，并修复了原始 Shapefile 中的拓扑错误，是处理巴西空间数据的理想入口。
desc_en: geobr is an R/Python package from Brazil's Institute for Applied Economic Research (IPEA) that streamlines access to official Brazilian spatial datasets, spanning administrative boundaries, cities, and population/socioeconomic layers across 30+ datasets down to about 1:250,000 scale and dates from 1872 to 2025. Data originate from IBGE (CC-BY) while the package itself is MIT-licensed, loading GeoPackages remotely via API and returning sf or GeoDataFrame objects. Cleaner than raw IBGE FTP, it also resolves topology bugs in the original IBGE shapefiles, making it an ideal entry point for Brazilian geospatial work.

name: GHS-UCDB R2024A — Urban Centre Database 2025 (GeoPackage)
notes: 473 indicators across 15 thematic domains; fixed (2025) and multi-temporal delineations
verify_notes: GHS-UCDB R2024A - newer version, license upgraded to CC BY 4.0 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GHS-UCDB R2024A（城市中心数据库 2025）由欧盟委员会联合研究中心（JRC）发布，是全球城市中心的权威矢量数据，包含 11,422 个经质量控制的城市中心，时间跨度覆盖 1970—2070 年（目标年以 1975—2030 每五年为间隔）。数据提供 GeoPackage、Shapefile、CSV 和 XLSX 格式，开放匿名访问，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。每个城市中心附带横跨 15 个主题领域的 473 项指标，并提供固定（2025）与多时相两套界定。它适合全球城市化、人口与社会经济空间分析。
desc_en: GHS-UCDB R2024A, the Urban Centre Database 2025 from the European Commission's JRC, is an authoritative global vector dataset of 11,422 quality-controlled urban centres spanning 1970-2070 (target years at five-year intervals from 1975 to 2030). It is offered as GeoPackage, Shapefile, CSV, and XLSX with open anonymous access under CC BY 4.0. Each urban centre carries 473 indicators across 15 thematic domains, with both fixed (2025) and multi-temporal delineations. It is well suited to global analysis of urbanization, population, and socioeconomic patterns.

name: GHS-WUP-DUC R2025A — Long-range DUC (WUP)
theme_raw: Degree of urbanisation, long-range projection | Urban centres tracked over time
verify_notes: GHS-WUP-DUC R2025A download links functional | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GHS-WUP-DUC R2025A 是 JRC 全球人类居住层（GHSL）与联合国经社部世界城市化展望（WUP）联合发布的长期密集城市集群（DUC）矢量数据，覆盖全球，时间跨度从 1975 年延伸至 2100 年的长期展望。数据以矢量格式（GPKG/SHP）提供，体量约 2.01 MB，开放获取，允许在适当署名前提下复用。该数据适合全球长时段城市化趋势、城市集群演变与未来情景的空间分析，是 GHSL 城市居住产品体系的组成部分。
desc_en: GHS-WUP-DUC R2025A is a long-range Dense Urban Cluster vector dataset jointly produced by JRC's Global Human Settlement Layer (GHSL) and UN DESA's World Urbanization Prospects (WUP), covering the globe with a long horizon extending from 1975 to 2100. It is delivered in vector formats (GPKG/SHP) at about 2.01 MB, openly available with reuse authorized given proper acknowledgment. The dataset suits global analysis of long-term urbanization trends, urban-cluster evolution, and future scenarios, forming part of the GHSL human-settlement product suite.

name: GISCO Urban Audit (URAU) 2024
theme_raw: Urban Audit — Cities, Greater Cities, Functional Urban Areas (FUA) | urban areas / functional urban areas
notes: Includes Cities (core city), Greater Cities, FUA polygons plus statistical IDs.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GISCO 城市统计（Urban Audit, URAU）2024 由欧盟统计局 GISCO 发布，覆盖全欧洲，提供核心城市（Cities）、大城市区（Greater Cities）和功能城市区（FUA）等多边形及对应统计 ID，并含 2001 至 2024 年间多个版本。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GeoPackage 和 TopoJSON 格式提供，可通过 HTTPS 批量下载并配有 datasets.json 索引，遵循 Eurostat/GISCO 下载条款。它是欧洲城市统计、跨城市可比分析与城市政策研究的标准空间参考。
desc_en: GISCO Urban Audit (URAU) 2024, from Eurostat's GISCO, covers all of Europe and provides polygons for core Cities, Greater Cities, and Functional Urban Areas (FUA) together with statistical identifiers, with editions spanning 2001 to 2024. It is available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, and TopoJSON via HTTPS bulk download with a datasets.json index, under Eurostat/GISCO download provisions. It serves as a standard spatial reference for European urban statistics, cross-city comparison, and urban policy research.

name: Intact Forest Landscapes (IFL) 2000/2013/2016/2020
theme_raw: Unfragmented primary forest polygons | forest intactness
notes: Authoritative IFL polygons; multi-epoch versions enable IFL degradation analysis. Mirror at intactforests.org/data.ifl.html.
verify_notes: Intact Forest Landscapes document page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 完整森林景观（Intact Forest Landscapes, IFL）由绿色和平、马里兰大学、世界资源研究所与 Transparent World 联合编制，是全球范围内无明显人类干扰的大面积完整森林景观的权威矢量数据，提供 2000、2013、2016 和 2020 多个时相，便于开展 IFL 退化与破碎化分析。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoJSON 格式提供，通过全球森林观察（GFW）及 intactforests.org 开放获取，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它广泛用于森林保护、生物多样性与碳储量等全球生态研究。
desc_en: Intact Forest Landscapes (IFL), compiled by Greenpeace, the University of Maryland, WRI, and Transparent World, is an authoritative global vector dataset of large, undisturbed forest landscapes, provided for multiple epochs (2000, 2013, 2016, 2020) to enable IFL degradation and fragmentation analysis. It is available as Shapefile and GeoJSON, openly accessible via Global Forest Watch and intactforests.org under CC BY 4.0. It is widely used in global research on forest conservation, biodiversity, and carbon stocks.

name: Managed Forest Concessions (multi-country, GFW)
theme_raw: Logging / timber concession polygons | concessions / logging
coverage: Cameroon, CAR, DRC, Republic of Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Liberia, Indonesia, etc.
notes: Compiled from national forestry ministries; quality varies by country. Notable for Central Africa coverage that is otherwise hard to obtain.
verify_notes: 404 Not Found - dataset path changed | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 受管理森林特许经营权（Managed Forest Concessions）由世界资源研究所汇编自各国林业主管部门资料，通过全球森林观察（GFW）发布，覆盖喀麦隆、中非、刚果（金）、刚果（布）、赤道几内亚、加蓬、利比里亚、印度尼西亚等多国。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 及 FeatureServer 形式开放下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。各国数据质量不一，但其对中部非洲森林特许区的覆盖尤为难得，适合森林治理、采伐监测与保护规划分析。
desc_en: Managed Forest Concessions, compiled by WRI from national forestry ministries and published via Global Forest Watch, covers Cameroon, CAR, DRC, Republic of Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Liberia, Indonesia, and other countries. It is openly downloadable as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, and FeatureServer under CC BY 4.0. Data quality varies by country, but its coverage of Central African concessions is otherwise hard to obtain, making it valuable for forest governance, logging monitoring, and conservation planning.

name: MapBiomas Land Cover & Use (Brazil, Pampa, Amazon, Chaco, Indonesia, Pan-Tropical)
theme_raw: Annual LULC, deforestation, pasture, mining, fire | annual LULC + transitions
coverage: Brazil + Pan-Amazon, Chaco, Atlantic Forest, Indonesia
license_now: not explicit on page (footer ©2026 All rights reserved); collection license historically CC-BY-SA 4.0
formats: GeoTIFF; vectorised exports via download tool (SHP/GeoJSON)
formats_now: Raster collections, vector (Rural Credit Monitor), statistics, Landsat mosaics, validation points
notes: Download tool returns vector clipped to user AOI; flagship LATAM LULC source
verify_notes: Active (10-year anniversary); explicit open license not stated on downloads page – check Terms of Use | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MapBiomas 土地覆盖与利用数据由 MapBiomas 联盟制作，是拉丁美洲旗舰级土地利用/覆盖产品，覆盖巴西及泛亚马逊、查科、大西洋森林和印度尼西亚等区域，时间序列自 1985 年起（2016 年起达 10 米分辨率）。原生数据为 GeoTIFF 栅格，下载工具可按用户感兴趣区导出矢量（SHP/GeoJSON）。可通过直接下载或 Google Earth Engine 访问。其支撑论文为 Souza 等（2020）。许可历史上为 CC-BY-SA 4.0，但页脚标注版权所有，使用前建议核实。适合长时序土地变化与生态监测。
desc_en: MapBiomas Land Cover & Use, produced by the MapBiomas consortium, is a flagship Latin American LULC product covering Brazil plus the Pan-Amazon, Chaco, Atlantic Forest, and Indonesia, with a time series from 1985 (10 m resolution since 2016). Native data are GeoTIFF rasters, while the download tool returns vector exports (SHP/GeoJSON) clipped to a user AOI. It is accessible via direct download or Google Earth Engine, with Souza et al. (2020) as the supporting paper. Licensing has historically been CC-BY-SA 4.0 though the page footer asserts all rights reserved, so terms should be verified. It suits long-term land-change and ecological monitoring.

name: Riparian Zones Land Cover/Land Use 2018 (vector)
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 河岸带土地覆盖/土地利用 2018（矢量）由哥白尼陆地监测服务（CLMS）发布，针对欧洲 Strahler 2—9 级河流的缓冲区，刻画河岸生态系统的土地覆盖与利用状况。数据以 ESRI 地理数据库（GDB）和 GeoPackage 格式提供，按流域分块下载，遵循哥白尼免费、完全且开放的数据政策。该产品适合河岸生态、河流廊道连通性、水生与陆地生态系统交互及流域管理相关研究，为欧洲尺度的河岸环境评估提供高质量矢量基础。
desc_en: Riparian Zones Land Cover/Land Use 2018 (vector), from the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service, maps land cover and use within buffers around Europe's Strahler order 2-9 rivers, characterizing riparian ecosystems. It is delivered as ESRI geodatabase (GDB) and GeoPackage, downloadable per catchment under Copernicus's free, full, and open data policy. The product suits research on riparian ecology, river-corridor connectivity, aquatic-terrestrial ecosystem interactions, and catchment management, providing a high-quality vector basis for European-scale riparian assessment.

name: Spatial Database of Planted Trees (SDPT v2)
provider: World Resources Institute / Global Forest Watch
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Protected areas & biodiversity
notes: GIS polygons with species + original source; useful for plantation vs natural forest split
verify_notes: Page reached but heading-only content; JS-rendered hub page. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 人工林空间数据库（Spatial Database of Planted Trees, SDPT v2）由世界资源研究所与全球森林观察（GFW）汇编，是全球性的人工种植林矢量数据，由各国数据集成而来，提供 Shapefile/GeoPackage 格式，可直接下载。每个多边形附带树种与原始数据来源信息，便于区分人工林与天然林。其技术说明发布于 2019 年，v2 版于 2023 年更新。许可信息未明确，使用前应核实。该数据适合森林碳核算、木材供应、造林监测与生物多样性评估等研究。
desc_en: The Spatial Database of Planted Trees (SDPT v2), compiled by WRI and Global Forest Watch, is a global vector dataset of planted forests assembled from national datasets, provided as shapefile/GeoPackage with direct download. Each polygon carries species and original-source attributes, helping distinguish plantations from natural forest. Documented in a 2019 WRI technical note with a v2 update in 2023, its license is unspecified and should be checked. The dataset suits forest carbon accounting, timber supply, afforestation monitoring, and biodiversity assessment.

name: 10m Land Cover 9-class (io-lulc-9-class)
notes: Documented in vector-rendering release notes.
verify_notes: JS-rendered page; reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 10 米土地覆盖 9 类（io-lulc-9-class）由 Impact Observatory、Esri 与微软联合发布，是全球 10 米分辨率、九分类的土地覆盖产品，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。数据主产品为栅格 COG，并通过 STAC 提供 geoparquet 项目级矢量资产，经由 STAC 接口与 Azure Blob 访问，其矢量渲染方式在发布说明中有记录。该数据适合全球及区域尺度的土地覆盖分类、变化监测与云原生分析；多数应用以栅格形式使用，矢量资产主要服务于检索与瓦片渲染。
desc_en: 10m Land Cover 9-class (io-lulc-9-class), jointly released by Impact Observatory, Esri, and Microsoft, is a global 9-class land cover product at 10 m resolution under CC BY 4.0. The primary product is raster COG, with geoparquet item-level vector assets exposed via STAC, accessed through the STAC API and Azure Blob, and its vector rendering is documented in the release notes. It suits global and regional land-cover classification, change monitoring, and cloud-native analysis; most use is raster, with the vector asset mainly serving search and tile rendering.

name: 1:100,000 desert (sand) distribution dataset in China
verify_notes: TPDC page reachable; JS-rendered details | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 1:10 万中国沙漠（沙地）分布数据集由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，刻画中国境内沙漠与沙地的空间分布，制图比例尺约 1:10 万。数据以 Shapefile 和 E00 格式提供，免费但需登录下载，遵循 TPDC 使用条款。该数据适合荒漠化研究、风沙环境评估、干旱区土地利用与生态治理规划等应用，为中国沙漠分布的空间分析提供权威矢量底图。
desc_en: The 1:100,000 desert (sand) distribution dataset for China, released by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), maps the spatial distribution of deserts and sandy lands across China at roughly 1:100,000 scale. It is provided as Shapefile and E00, free but requiring login, under TPDC terms. The dataset suits desertification research, aeolian-environment assessment, and arid-zone land-use and ecological-restoration planning, offering an authoritative vector base for analyzing China's desert distribution.

name: Africa Open DEAL (Africa Land cover, Crop, Pasture)
provider: FAO / AUC / PanAfrican Agency for the Great Green Wall
notes: Outputs of pan-African Collect Earth campaign; cross-border land use vector statistics
verify_notes: FAO openknowledge 403 to WebFetch; 浏览器中通常可达 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 非洲开放 DEAL（Africa Open DEAL：非洲土地覆盖、作物、牧场）由联合国粮农组织、非盟委员会与泛非绿色长城机构合作完成，覆盖全非洲，是泛非 Collect Earth 调查活动的成果，提供跨境土地利用矢量统计。数据通过 FAO SEPAL/HiH 以 Shapefile 形式分发，可作为论文附件或经 FAO HiH 直接下载，采用 CC-BY-NC-SA 许可。该数据适合非洲大陆尺度的土地利用、农业与牧场分布分析，以及荒漠化防治与可持续土地管理相关研究。
desc_en: Africa Open DEAL (Africa Land cover, Crop, Pasture), produced by FAO with the African Union Commission and the Pan-African Agency for the Great Green Wall, covers all of Africa as outputs of the continent-wide Collect Earth campaign, providing cross-border land-use vector statistics. It is distributed as shapefiles via FAO SEPAL/HiH, available as a paper supplement or direct download through FAO HiH, under CC-BY-NC-SA. The dataset suits continental-scale analysis of land use, cropland, and pasture distribution, and research on desertification control and sustainable land management.

name: Africapolis layer on Digital Earth Africa
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Energy & infrastructure
notes: Programmatic access to Africapolis polygons in a cloud-native pipeline
verify_notes: Africapolis 2015/2020 via DE Africa GeoServer/Datacube notebook | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Africapolis 图层（Digital Earth Africa 版）将 Africapolis 城市集聚区多边形集成到 Digital Earth Africa 的云原生数据管道中，覆盖非洲，提供对城市建成区与集聚区的程序化访问。数据以矢量形式（经 DE Africa 的 WFS / GeoJSON）开放获取，数据采用 CC BY 4.0、配套代码为 Apache-2.0。它适合非洲城市化、人口分布与基础设施相关的空间分析，尤其便于在云端环境中结合遥感数据开展批量处理与建模。
desc_en: The Africapolis layer on Digital Earth Africa integrates Africapolis urban agglomeration polygons into DE Africa's cloud-native data pipeline, covering Africa and offering programmatic access to built-up and agglomeration areas. The data are openly available in vector form (via DE Africa's WFS / GeoJSON), with data under CC BY 4.0 and code under Apache-2.0. It suits spatial analysis of African urbanization, population distribution, and infrastructure, and is especially convenient for batch processing and modeling alongside remote sensing in a cloud environment.

name: Agricultural land use (vector): German national crop type maps 2023
formats_now: GeoPackage (.gpkg, 9GB), PDF, SLD; also FlatGeobuf accessible
notes: Crop type & land use classes from S1/S2/Landsat fusion
verify_notes: German crop type map 2023, v2.0.1 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 德国 2023 年全国作物类型图是一套农业土地利用矢量数据，发布于 Zenodo，覆盖德国全境，时间为 2023 年。作物类型与土地利用类别基于 Sentinel-1、Sentinel-2 和 Landsat 多源遥感融合得到。数据以矢量格式（Shapefile/GPKG）提供，体量约 9 GB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，开放获取。该数据适合农业监测、作物制图、精准农业及国家尺度的土地利用分析等应用，为德国农田研究提供高质量的逐地块矢量基础。
desc_en: This is a vector dataset of Germany's 2023 national crop type maps, published on Zenodo, covering all of Germany for 2023. Crop type and land-use classes are derived from a fusion of Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, and Landsat imagery. The data are provided in vector formats (shapefile/GPKG) at about 9 GB under CC-BY-4.0 with open access. It suits agricultural monitoring, crop mapping, precision agriculture, and national-scale land-use analysis, offering a high-quality parcel-level vector basis for German cropland research.

name: Alaska Permafrost Thaw Database v2
lychee_status: Network error: Network error: Connection reset by peer (os error 54) (error sending request for url (https://essd.copernicus.org/articles/18/3147/2026))
notes: Niche Arctic LC related; permafrost vegetation disturbance polygons
verify_notes: Article published May 2026 | lychee:Network error: Network error: Connection reset by peer (os error 54) (error sending request for url (https://essd.copernicus.org/articles/18/3147/2026))
desc_zh: 阿拉斯加永久冻土消融数据库 v2 由美国地质调查局（USGS）与阿拉斯加大学费尔班克斯分校（UAF）发布于 ESSD，覆盖阿拉斯加地区，记录 19,540 个永久冻土消融位置（含 18,213 个突变型与 1,327 个非突变型），空间精度约 125 米，时间自 1950 年至今。数据以 Shapefile 加 CSV 形式提供，可直接下载，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。它是北极地区针对永久冻土植被扰动的专题矢量数据，适合气候变化、冻土退化与高纬度生态系统响应研究。
desc_en: The Alaska Permafrost Thaw Database v2, released in ESSD by USGS and the University of Alaska Fairbanks, covers Alaska and records 19,540 permafrost thaw locations (18,213 abrupt and 1,327 non-abrupt) at about 125 m resolution from 1950 to the present. It is provided as shapefile plus CSV with direct download under CC-BY-4.0. As a niche Arctic vector dataset of permafrost-related vegetation disturbance, it suits research on climate change, permafrost degradation, and high-latitude ecosystem response.

name: ATKIS Basis-DLM (Digital Landscape Model)
provider: BKG — Bundesamt für Kartographie und Geodäsie (Germany)
theme_raw: topographic landscape incl. land use, vegetation, settlement
notes: Free since 2021 (open data law); under-used outside DE; 36 themed shapefiles incl. Veg/Settlement/Water.
verify_notes: Active product catalog; paid (€2000+) for ATKIS Basis-DLM | lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: ATKIS Basis-DLM（数字景观模型）由德国联邦测绘与大地测量局（BKG）发布，是德国权威的基础地理矢量数据，覆盖德国全境，包含植被、居住、水体等 36 个主题的分主题 Shapefile。数据以 Shapefile、GML 和 GeoPackage 等格式按主题提供，可直接下载，依据德国数据许可（Datenlizenz Deutschland）等条款（视产品而定）。自 2021 年开放数据立法后免费提供，但在德国以外使用较少。它适合精细尺度的土地利用/覆盖、城乡规划、基础设施与环境分析。
desc_en: ATKIS Basis-DLM (Digital Landscape Model), from Germany's Federal Agency for Cartography and Geodesy (BKG), is an authoritative national vector dataset covering all of Germany, comprising 36 themed shapefiles including vegetation, settlement, and water. It is provided per theme as Shapefile, GML, and GeoPackage with direct download under terms such as Datenlizenz Deutschland (varying by product). Free since 2021 open-data legislation but under-used outside Germany, it suits fine-scale land use/cover, urban and regional planning, infrastructure, and environmental analysis.

name: Bioregional Assessment Programme - CLUM Catchment-scale Land Use
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 生物区域评估计划——CLUM 流域尺度土地利用数据由澳大利亚生物区域评估计划（Bioregional Assessment Programme）发布，覆盖该计划的评估区域，提供流域尺度的土地利用矢量信息。数据以 Shapefile 格式提供，采用 CC-BY 许可。该数据适合澳大利亚相关评估区内的土地利用现状分析、水资源与生态影响评估及区域规划研究，为流域尺度的土地利用空间分析提供基础数据支持。
desc_en: The Bioregional Assessment Programme - CLUM Catchment-scale Land Use dataset, from Australia's Bioregional Assessment Programme, covers the programme's assessment regions and provides catchment-scale land-use vector information. It is supplied as Shapefile under CC-BY. The dataset suits analysis of land-use status, water-resource and ecological impact assessment, and regional planning within Australia's assessment areas, offering a foundational basis for catchment-scale land-use spatial analysis.

name: BLM Public Land Survey System (PLSS) + Surface Management Agency
notes: PLSS underpins many US LULC analytical workflows; live FeatureServer
verify_notes: PLSS API endpoint on ArcGIS Hub | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BLM 公共土地测量系统（PLSS）及地表管理机构数据由美国土地管理局（BLM）发布，覆盖美国全境，是支撑大量美国土地利用分析工作流的基础测量框架数据，并附带地表管理机构信息。数据通过 ArcGIS FeatureServer（REST）/WFS 提供实时服务，并支持 Shapefile 格式，属公有领域（BLM）。PLSS 是美国土地权属、地籍与资源管理的基础网格，该实时 FeatureServer 适合土地权属、地块划分、资源管理与土地利用分析等应用。
desc_en: The BLM Public Land Survey System (PLSS) with Surface Management Agency data, from the U.S. Bureau of Land Management, covers the entire USA and provides the foundational survey framework underpinning many U.S. land-use analytical workflows, along with surface-management-agency information. It is served live via ArcGIS FeatureServer (REST)/WFS with Shapefile support, in the public domain (BLM). As the base grid for U.S. land tenure, cadastre, and resource management, this live FeatureServer suits land-tenure, parcel-delineation, resource-management, and land-use analysis.

name: Brazil Urban Footprints / Urban Areas
notes: Built-up urban polygons (2005, 2015 editions).
verify_notes: Urban area function, v2.0.0 | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 巴西城市足迹/城市区数据由 IBGE 经 geobr 软件包提供，覆盖巴西全国，刻画建成区城市多边形（含 2005 与 2015 两个版本）。数据以 GeoPackage / sf 形式通过 geobr 软件包加载，开放获取。该数据适合巴西城市化、建成区扩张、人口分布与城市规划相关的空间分析，借助 geobr 可便捷集成到 R/Python 工作流中，是研究巴西城市空间演变的实用矢量数据。
desc_en: Brazil Urban Footprints / Urban Areas, sourced from IBGE via the geobr package, covers all of Brazil and maps built-up urban polygons (in 2005 and 2015 editions). The data load as GeoPackage / sf through geobr and are openly available. The dataset suits spatial analysis of Brazilian urbanization, built-up expansion, population distribution, and urban planning, and via geobr it integrates conveniently into R/Python workflows, making it a practical vector source for studying Brazil's urban spatial evolution.

name: China Urban Land Use dataset CULU (2016-2022)
notes: Functional urban land use polygons; 4.5 GB
verify_notes: Record appears to be a journal PDF (Mediciego), NOT the CULU dataset - possible wrong ID; license is ND not BY | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国城市土地利用数据集 CULU（2016—2022）由武汉大学团队制作，覆盖中国城市地区，提供功能性城市土地利用多边形，按区域与年份组织（region_year.shp）。数据以 Shapefile 格式提供，体量约 4.5 GB，采用 CC-BY-ND-4.0 许可，可直接下载，配套论文（2024）在审。该数据适合中国城市内部功能分区、城市土地利用结构与时空变化分析，为城市规划、城市更新与精细化城市研究提供高分辨率的功能性土地利用矢量底图。
desc_en: The China Urban Land Use dataset CULU (2016-2022), produced by a Wuhan University team, covers China's urban regions and provides functional urban land-use polygons organized by region and year (region_year.shp). It is delivered as Shapefile at about 4.5 GB under CC-BY-ND-4.0 with direct download, with an accompanying paper (2024) under review. The dataset suits analysis of intra-urban functional zoning, urban land-use structure, and spatiotemporal change in China, offering a high-resolution functional land-use vector base for urban planning, renewal, and fine-grained city research.

name: ChinaPV: Spatial Distribution of Solar Photovoltaic Installations in China (2015, 2020)
provider: Hohai University & Institute of Geographic Sciences and Natural Resources Research, CAS (资环所)
notes: PV polygon ID, lat/lon, area, perimeter, province, urban/rural; OA >96%
verify_notes: ChinaPV dataset | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: ChinaPV：中国太阳能光伏装置空间分布（2015、2020）由河海大学与中国科学院地理科学与资源研究所（资环所）联合制作，覆盖中国大陆，提供 2015 与 2020 两个年份的光伏电站多边形矢量数据，整体准确率（OA）超 96%。数据以 ESRI Shapefile（WGS-84）格式提供，含光伏多边形 ID、经纬度、面积、周长、所属省份及城乡属性，开放发布于 Zenodo，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。它适合可再生能源布局、光伏占地与土地利用变化、能源与生态影响评估等研究。
desc_en: ChinaPV: Spatial Distribution of Solar Photovoltaic Installations in China (2015, 2020), produced by Hohai University and the Institute of Geographic Sciences and Natural Resources Research (CAS), covers mainland China and provides PV-installation polygons for 2015 and 2020 with overall accuracy above 96%. It is supplied as ESRI Shapefile (WGS-84) with polygon ID, latitude/longitude, area, perimeter, province, and urban/rural attributes, openly released on Zenodo under CC-BY-4.0. It suits research on renewable-energy siting, PV land take and land-use change, and energy-ecology impact assessment.

name: Chinese forest-grassland ecotone 1990-2020
notes: Ecography 2024
verify_notes: Chinese forest-grassland ecotone; data in RAR archive | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国森林-草地过渡带（1990—2020）数据由 Guo 等（2024）发布于 Dryad，配套论文见 Ecography 2024，覆盖中国 88.5°—123°E、27.5°—51°N 范围，逐年提供 1990—2020 年的森林-草地交错带空间分布。数据以 Shapefile 格式提供，体量约 165.75 KB，可开放下载，遵循 Dryad 使用条款。该数据适合研究森林-草地交错带的时空动态、生态过渡区对气候与人类活动的响应，以及北方农牧交错带的植被变化分析。
desc_en: The Chinese forest-grassland ecotone dataset (1990-2020), published by Guo et al. (2024) on Dryad with an accompanying Ecography 2024 paper, covers China within 88.5-123E and 27.5-51N, providing the annual spatial distribution of the forest-grassland transition zone from 1990 to 2020. It is supplied as Shapefile at about 165.75 KB with open download under Dryad terms. The dataset suits study of ecotone spatiotemporal dynamics, transition-zone response to climate and human activity, and vegetation change across northern China's farming-pastoral belt.

name: CLCplus Backbone vector layer 2021
verify_notes: News page from 2024-12-16, active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CLCplus Backbone 矢量图层 2021 由哥白尼陆地监测服务（CLMS）发布，覆盖 EEA39 区域（欧洲），是 CLC+ 产品体系中的骨干土地覆盖矢量层。数据以矢量格式（GDB/GeoPackage）提供，通过 CLMS 下载，遵循免费、完全且开放的数据政策。作为 CORINE 土地覆盖的新一代高分辨率延续，该图层适合欧洲尺度的土地覆盖制图、变化监测、环境与空间规划分析，为区域至大陆尺度的土地覆盖研究提供权威矢量基础。
desc_en: The CLCplus Backbone vector layer 2021, from the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service, covers the EEA39 region (Europe) and is the backbone land-cover vector layer of the CLC+ product suite. It is provided in vector formats (GDB/GeoPackage), downloadable via CLMS under a free, full, and open data policy. As the next-generation high-resolution successor to CORINE Land Cover, it suits European-scale land-cover mapping, change monitoring, and environmental and spatial-planning analysis, offering an authoritative vector basis for regional-to-continental land-cover research.

name: Coastal Zones Land Cover/Land Use (vector)
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Marine & coastal
verify_notes: Riparian Zones 2012 (revised 2021) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 海岸带土地覆盖/土地利用（矢量）由哥白尼陆地监测服务/欧洲环境署（EEA）发布，覆盖欧洲海岸线，刻画沿海地区的土地覆盖与利用状况。数据以 GeoPackage 格式提供，可直接下载，遵循哥白尼开放数据政策。该数据适合海岸带管理、沿海生态系统评估、海陆交互区土地利用变化及海岸侵蚀与规划相关研究，为欧洲海岸环境分析提供高质量矢量基础数据。
desc_en: Coastal Zones Land Cover/Land Use (vector), from the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service / European Environment Agency (EEA), covers the European coastline and characterizes coastal land cover and use. It is provided as GeoPackage with direct download under the Copernicus open data policy. The dataset suits coastal-zone management, coastal-ecosystem assessment, land-use change in land-sea interface areas, and research on coastal erosion and planning, offering a high-quality vector basis for European coastal-environment analysis.

name: Coastal Zones Land Cover/Land Use 2018
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Marine & coastal
verify_notes: CLMS product page reachable; dataset details loaded dynamically | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 海岸带土地覆盖/土地利用 2018 由哥白尼/欧洲环境署（EEA）发布，覆盖 EEA39 区域沿海向内陆 10 公里的海岸带条带，刻画 2018 年沿海地区的土地覆盖与利用状况。数据以 ESRI 地理数据库（GDB）、GeoPackage 和 Shapefile 格式提供，可下载，遵循免费、完全且开放的数据政策。该数据适合欧洲海岸带管理、沿海生态评估、海陆交互区土地利用变化监测及海岸规划等研究，是哥白尼海岸带产品系列的核心年度成果。
desc_en: Coastal Zones Land Cover/Land Use 2018, from Copernicus / the European Environment Agency (EEA), covers a 10 km inland coastal strip across the EEA39 region and characterizes coastal land cover and use for 2018. It is provided as ESRI geodatabase (GDB), GeoPackage, and Shapefile with download under a free, full, and open data policy. The dataset suits European coastal-zone management, coastal-ecosystem assessment, land-use change monitoring in the land-sea interface, and coastal planning, forming a core annual output of the Copernicus coastal-zone product line.

name: Comprehensive UAV LULC Serbia 27 sites
notes: Rare cm-scale vectorised LC; training+validation polygons
verify_notes: Nature SSO redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 塞尔维亚 27 个站点综合无人机 LULC 数据由贝尔格莱德大学制作，发表于 Scientific Data（2025），覆盖塞尔维亚 27 个站点，是少见的厘米级精细分辨率矢量土地覆盖数据集，提供训练/验证多边形与分割后的矢量成果。数据以 Shapefile 格式提供，可直接下载，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。该数据适合高分辨率土地覆盖分类、深度学习模型训练与验证、精细尺度遥感方法研究，为超高分辨率 LULC 制图提供宝贵的标注样本。
desc_en: The Comprehensive UAV LULC dataset for 27 sites in Serbia, produced by the University of Belgrade and published in Scientific Data (2025), covers 27 Serbian sites and is a rare cm-scale vector land-cover dataset providing training/validation polygons and segmented vector outputs. It is supplied as Shapefile with direct download under CC-BY-4.0. The dataset suits high-resolution land-cover classification, training and validation of deep-learning models, and fine-scale remote-sensing methodology, offering valuable labeled samples for very-high-resolution LULC mapping.

name: Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem (vector products)
theme_raw: Sentinel + Copernicus Land Monitoring vector layers (CLC, Urban Atlas, Riparian Zones)
notes: Listed in awesome-geospatial-data-sources; vector land-cover datasets confirmed
verify_notes: Active site, recent updates May 2026; license details in linked docs | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 哥白尼数据空间生态系统（矢量产品）由欧空局（ESA）/哥白尼运营，覆盖欧洲及全球，是哥白尼计划的统一数据访问门户，除栅格影像（TIFF）外亦提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 GeoJSON 等矢量土地覆盖产品。数据遵循哥白尼免费开放数据政策，需注册账户，并支持 S3 与 HTTPS 访问。该平台适合大规模对地观测数据获取、土地覆盖与环境监测以及云原生地理空间分析，是欧洲对地观测数据生态的核心入口之一。
desc_en: The Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem (vector products), operated by ESA/Copernicus, covers Europe and the globe as the unified access portal for the Copernicus programme, offering vector land-cover products in Shapefile, GeoPackage, and GeoJSON alongside raster imagery (TIFF). It follows Copernicus's free and open data policy, requires an account, and supports S3 and HTTPS access. The platform suits large-scale Earth-observation data retrieval, land-cover and environmental monitoring, and cloud-native geospatial analysis, serving as a central gateway to Europe's Earth-observation data ecosystem.

name: CUGUV: Comprehensive Urban-Village Dataset (urban village polygons across 15 Chinese cities)
provider: Figshare (China University of Geosciences, Wuhan / authors of Scientific Data paper)
theme_raw: urban morphology / informal settlements (urban villages, 城中村)
coverage: 15 major Chinese cities: Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Wuhan, Xi'an, Changsha, Harbin, Hefei, Haikou, Jinan, Shenyang, Taiyuan, Fuzhou, Xiamen
formats: vector polygons (845 manually digitized UV boundaries) plus 2,604 paired raster patches and binary masks; vector labels distributed alongside imagery
notes: Primary dataset released by the CUGUV benchmark paper (Scientific Data, 2025). 845 UV polygons are the vector ground truth.
verify_notes: CUGUV Dataset on figshare; landing 403 to bot but resolvable | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: CUGUV（综合城中村数据集）由中国地质大学（武汉）团队发布，覆盖北京、上海、广州、深圳、武汉、西安等15座中国主要城市的城中村空间分布。数据集包含845个人工数字化的城中村边界矢量多边形作为真值标注，并配套2604组栅格影像切片及二值掩膜，可用于城中村识别、深度学习语义分割与城市更新研究。成果发表于《Scientific Data》（2025），采用CC BY-NC-ND 4.0许可，经Figshare开放下载。
desc_en: CUGUV is a comprehensive urban-village dataset from China University of Geosciences (Wuhan), mapping informal urban-village settlements across 15 major Chinese cities including Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen and Wuhan. It provides 845 manually digitized urban-village boundary polygons as vector ground truth, paired with 2,604 raster image patches and binary masks. Released alongside a 2025 Scientific Data benchmark paper under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 on Figshare, it supports urban-village detection, deep-learning semantic segmentation and urban renewal studies.

name: Daylight Global Urban Areas
feature_count: 37,000 polygonal areas around the globe (or 1000-area light version)
notes: Open vectorised urban extents bundled with Daylight OSM distribution
verify_notes: No explicit license on page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Daylight 全球城市区域数据由 Meta 维护的 Daylight 地图分发项目提供，是与 Daylight OpenStreetMap 发行版捆绑的开放城市范围矢量产品。数据由 ESA WorldCover 2020 土地覆盖派生而来，以 Shapefile 形式提供约37000个全球城市多边形（另有约1000个区域的轻量版）。适用于全球城市边界制图、城市化分析与作为底图叠加，比例尺约1:100，基准年2020。
desc_en: Daylight Global Urban Areas, distributed by Meta's Daylight Map Distribution, is an open vectorised urban-extent layer bundled with the Daylight OpenStreetMap release. Derived from the ESA WorldCover 2020 land-cover product, it supplies roughly 37,000 urban polygons worldwide as shapefiles (with a lighter ~1,000-area version). It is useful for global urban boundary mapping, urbanisation analysis and as a basemap overlay, referenced to a 2020 base year.

name: Digital Earth Africa Cropland Extent (vector validation samples)
formats_now: COG raster (uint8); AWS S3; ODC; WMS/WCS (ows.digitalearth.africa)
notes: Validation shapefiles per AEZ are openly downloadable; pairs with STAC catalogue
verify_notes: 主要是 raster (mask/prob/filtered); 矢量验证样本需另行查找 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Digital Earth Africa 耕地范围验证样本是其非洲大陆耕地产品配套的矢量校验数据，按8个农业生态区（AEZ）组织。数据集主体为10米分辨率的COG栅格耕地范围（2019年），并提供约1800个验证样本点的Shapefile用于精度评估。采用CC-BY 4.0许可，可通过直接下载、STAC目录及S3访问，适合非洲农业遥感、耕地制图精度验证与机器学习训练。
desc_en: This Digital Earth Africa resource provides vector validation samples accompanying the continental Cropland Extent product, organised by eight agro-ecological zones. The main product is a 10 m COG raster cropland map for 2019, supplemented by roughly 1,800 validation sample points as shapefiles for accuracy assessment. Distributed under CC-BY 4.0 via direct download, a STAC catalogue and S3, it supports African agricultural remote sensing, cropland mapping validation and machine-learning training.

name: Digital Earth Africa Cropland Extent 2019
notes: Primary raster; vectorised cropland polygon products distributed via S3
verify_notes: Live on AWS Open Data Registry | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Digital Earth Africa 2019年耕地范围数据由 DE Africa 与澳大利亚地球科学局制作，覆盖整个非洲大陆，分辨率10米，时间范围为2019年全年。主产品为耕地范围栅格，同时通过 AWS S3 按国家分发矢量化耕地多边形瓦片。采用CC-BY 4.0许可，可直接下载，适用于粮食安全评估、农业监测与大尺度土地利用分析。
desc_en: Digital Earth Africa Cropland Extent 2019, produced by DE Africa and Geoscience Australia, covers the entire African continent at 10 m resolution for the full 2019 calendar year. The primary cropland-extent raster is complemented by vectorised cropland polygon tiles distributed per country via AWS S3. Released under CC-BY 4.0 with direct download, it supports food-security assessment, agricultural monitoring and continental-scale land-use analysis.

name: Ease of Social Distancing Index for sub-Saharan Africa (WorldPop)
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Public services
coverage: 49 countries + 3 territories, sub-Saharan Africa, 1,373 urban areas
notes: Primary published output of the Chamberlain et al. 2022 Sci Data paper; per-country polygon shapefile of index values plus urban extents & centres.
verify_notes: WOPR repository, categories include SocialDistancing | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集是 WorldPop（南安普顿大学）发布的撒哈拉以南非洲社交距离便利度指数，覆盖49个国家及3个地区共1373个城市区域。它以Shapefile（多边形与点）形式提供按国家组织的指数值、城市范围与城市中心。作为 Chamberlain 等2022年《Scientific Data》论文的主要成果，常用于公共卫生、疫情防控空间分析与城市人口密度研究，下载需同意相关使用条款。
desc_en: This WorldPop (University of Southampton) dataset is an Ease of Social Distancing Index for sub-Saharan Africa, covering 49 countries plus three territories and 1,373 urban areas. It is delivered as per-country polygon and point shapefiles of index values together with urban extents and centres. As the primary output of Chamberlain et al.'s 2022 Scientific Data paper, it supports public-health, pandemic-response spatial analysis and urban density research; download requires accepting the terms.

name: ESA WorldCover Polygons (wipfli) - GeoPackage
access: Direct HTTPS download from Cloudflare R2
notes: Polygons derived by downsampling, median filtering, sieving, polygonization and smoothing of ESA WorldCover 10m raster. Download: https://pub-726b01260c98468a9387cc0dfcb7386b.r2.dev/esa-worldcover-polygons-gpkg.tar
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该社区项目（作者 Philipp Wipfli）将 ESA WorldCover 10米全球土地覆盖栅格（2020/2021）通过降采样、中值滤波、筛除、矢量化与平滑处理，转换为全球矢量多边形，以 GeoPackage 格式提供，体积约55GB。代码采用MIT许可，数据采用CC-BY 4.0，可从 Cloudflare R2 直接下载。适合需要矢量形式土地覆盖、用于制图概化或与其他矢量叠加分析的用户。
desc_en: This community project by Philipp Wipfli converts the ESA WorldCover 10 m global land-cover raster (2020/2021) into global vector polygons through downsampling, median filtering, sieving, polygonization and smoothing, delivered as a GeoPackage of roughly 55 GB. The code is MIT-licensed and the data CC-BY 4.0, with direct HTTPS download from Cloudflare R2. It suits users needing vectorised land cover for cartographic generalisation or overlay analysis with other vector layers.

name: ESPON 2020 Database WFS - European territorial typologies
theme_raw: territorial typologies, functional urban areas, cross-border regions in Europe
coverage: Europe (ESPON cooperation area: EU + NO/CH/IS/LI + candidate)
notes: Useful for non-standard regional typologies (FUA, border regions).
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: ESPON 2020 数据库的 WFS/WMS 服务由 ESPON EGTC 提供，覆盖欧洲（EU加挪威、瑞士、冰岛、列支敦士登及候选国的 ESPON 合作区），通过 OGC 标准网络服务发布欧洲地域类型学数据。其特色在于提供功能性城市区（FUA）、边境区域等非标准区域划分类型，适用于欧洲区域政策研究、territorial 类型分析与空间规划，按 ESPON 使用政策开放。
desc_en: The ESPON 2020 Database WFS/WMS services, provided by ESPON EGTC, cover Europe (the ESPON cooperation area: EU plus Norway, Switzerland, Iceland, Liechtenstein and candidate states) and publish European territorial typologies via OGC web services. They are particularly valuable for non-standard regional typologies such as Functional Urban Areas and border regions, supporting European regional-policy research, territorial analysis and spatial planning under the ESPON usage policy.

name: Fukushima solar panels & radioactive waste storage mapping 2022-2023
notes: Contaminated waste deposits + solar panel polygons
verify_notes: Fukushima solar/waste mapping 2022-2023 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集为2022-2023年福岛地区太阳能电池板与放射性废物储存点的制图成果，覆盖日本福岛。数据以 Shapefile 形式提供4个图层，包含受污染废物堆放点与太阳能电池板多边形。采用CC-BY 4.0许可，开放下载，适用于福岛核事故后土地利用变化研究、太阳能设施扩张监测与放射性废物管理空间分析。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset maps solar panels and radioactive waste storage sites in Fukushima, Japan, for 2022-2023. It is provided as a shapefile with four layers, including contaminated-waste deposit locations and solar-panel polygons. Released under CC-BY 4.0 with open access, it supports post-disaster land-use change research, monitoring of solar-installation expansion and spatial analysis of radioactive-waste management following the Fukushima nuclear accident.

name: GAIA - Global Annual Impervious Area (vector annual urban extents)
formats: GeoTIFF; vector urban extent shapefiles for selected years
doi_or_citation: Gong et al. 2020 Remote Sens. Environ.
notes: Comparison dataset in CLCD paper; vector annual urban polygons derivable
verify_notes: 404 Not Found - GAIA page moved/removed | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: GAIA（全球年度不透水面积数据）由清华大学制作，提供1985至2018年逐年的全球不透水面/城市建成区分布，主产品为 GeoTIFF 栅格，并可为选定年份提供矢量城市范围 Shapefile。该数据是 CLCD 等研究的重要对比数据，免费用于学术用途，适用于长时序城市扩张监测、城市化动态分析与不透水面变化研究。
desc_en: GAIA (Global Annual Impervious Area), produced by Tsinghua University, provides annual global impervious-surface and urban built-up extents from 1985 to 2018. The main product is GeoTIFF raster, with vector urban-extent shapefiles available for selected years. Free for academic use, it serves as a key comparison dataset in studies such as CLCD and supports long-term urban-expansion monitoring, urbanisation dynamics and impervious-surface change analysis.

name: GFW Data API (v1/v2 - data-api.globalforestwatch.org)
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Protected areas & biodiversity
theme_raw: Forest change, concessions, protected areas, fires
notes: Programmatic access to GFW-curated vectors (e.g. wdpa_protected_areas, gfw_managed_forests, gfw_oil_palm) with version pinning.
verify_notes: GFW Help Center developer/API page reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GFW Data API 由世界资源研究所（WRI）的 Global Forest Watch 提供，是访问其精选全球矢量数据的编程接口。支持以 GeoJSON、矢量瓦片（PBF）及类 WFS 查询方式获取受保护区（wdpa_protected_areas）、管理林、油棕等图层，并支持版本锁定。默认采用CC BY 4.0许可，需免费 API 密钥，适用于森林监测、生物多样性保护与自动化空间数据集成应用。
desc_en: The GFW Data API, provided by WRI's Global Forest Watch, offers programmatic access to GFW-curated global vector datasets. It serves layers such as WDPA protected areas, managed forests and oil-palm extents via GeoJSON, vector tiles (PBF) and WFS-like queries, with version pinning. Released under a default CC BY 4.0 licence and requiring a free API key, it supports forest monitoring, biodiversity conservation and automated geospatial-data integration workflows.

name: GHS Urban Centre Database (GHS-UCDB R2019A, 2015 epoch)
notes: Used to delineate urban centres in the paper.
verify_notes: GHS-UCDB R2019A | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GHS 城市中心数据库（GHS-UCDB R2019A，2015基准年）由欧盟委员会联合研究中心（JRC）发布，是全球人类居住层（GHSL）框架下界定全球城市中心的权威矢量数据。以 Shapefile/GeoPackage 提供，包含各城市中心的人口、面积等属性，需署名后开放复用。广泛用于全球城市化分析、城市人口统计与城市可持续发展研究。
desc_en: The GHS Urban Centre Database (GHS-UCDB R2019A, 2015 epoch), released by the European Commission's Joint Research Centre, is an authoritative vector dataset delineating global urban centres within the Global Human Settlement Layer framework. Provided as shapefile and GeoPackage with attributes such as population and area per urban centre, it is openly reusable with attribution. It is widely used for global urbanisation analysis, urban demographics and sustainable-development research.

name: GHS-UCDB R2019A — Urban Centre Database 2015
notes: Release contemporary with Gao & O'Neill 2020.
verify_notes: GHS-UCDB R2019A | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GHS-UCDB R2019A 城市中心数据库（2015基准年）由欧盟委员会 JRC 在 Copernicus GHSL 框架下发布，是同期最广泛使用的全球城市中心矢量数据。以 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage 提供，开放免费，与 Gao & O'Neill（2020）等研究同期。适用于全球城市制图、城市人口与建成区分析及城市可持续发展评估。
desc_en: GHS-UCDB R2019A, the Urban Centre Database for base year 2015, is published by the EC JRC under the Copernicus GHSL programme and is among the most widely used global urban-centre vector datasets of its generation. Available as shapefile and GeoPackage, it is open and free and contemporary with Gao & O'Neill (2020). It supports global urban mapping, urban population and built-up analysis, and assessments of urban sustainable development.

name: GHS-UCDB R2024 - Global Human Settlement Urban Centre DB
notes: Functional urban areas with hundreds of attributes
verify_notes: 404 Not Found — GHS-UCDB page likely moved (new GHS portal at ghsl.jrc.ec.europa.eu). | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: GHS-UCDB R2024 是欧盟委员会 JRC 发布的最新一代全球人类居住层城市中心数据库，覆盖全球。以 GeoPackage（多边形加点）形式提供，每个城市中心附带数百项属性，包含人口、形态、经济与环境指标。采用CC-BY 4.0许可，开放直接下载，是全球功能性城市区与城市中心研究的权威参考，适用于城市化、城市气候与可持续发展分析。
desc_en: GHS-UCDB R2024 is the latest-generation Global Human Settlement Layer Urban Centre Database from the EC JRC, with global coverage. Delivered as a GeoPackage of polygons and points, each urban centre carries hundreds of attributes spanning population, morphology, economic and environmental indicators. Released under CC-BY 4.0 with direct download, it is an authoritative reference for global functional urban areas and urban-centre research, supporting urbanisation, urban-climate and sustainability analysis.

name: GLC_FCS30D 全球30m精细土地覆盖动态产品 (1985-2022)
provider: 中国科学院空天信息创新研究院 (AIR/CAS) - 刘良云团队
theme_raw: 全球土地覆盖 (35类精细分类)
formats_now: 36 ZIP archives (~194 GB), .lyr legend for ArcGIS
notes: 实为栅格, 但加入名单作为中文圈最权威的细分类土地覆盖参考; 同团队 GLC_FCS30 (2015/2020) 在 data.casearth.cn 同时分发
verify_notes: Newer version available - record is v1 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GLC_FCS30D 是中国科学院空天信息创新研究院（刘良云团队）发布的全球30米精细土地覆盖动态产品，覆盖全球，时间跨度1985-2022年。数据以 GeoTIFF 栅格提供，体积约194GB，采用CC-BY 4.0许可，发表于 ESSD（Zhang等，2024）。其精细分类体系使其成为中文圈最权威的土地覆盖参考之一；同团队的 GLC_FCS30（2015/2020）亦在 data.casearth.cn 分发。
desc_en: GLC_FCS30D is a global 30 m fine land-cover dynamic product from the Aerospace Information Research Institute, CAS (Liu Liangyun's group), with global coverage spanning 1985-2022. Distributed as GeoTIFF raster of roughly 194 GB under CC-BY 4.0 and published in ESSD (Zhang et al., 2024), its fine classification scheme makes it one of the most authoritative land-cover references in the Chinese research community. The related GLC_FCS30 (2015/2020) is also distributed via data.casearth.cn.

name: Global 1-km Downscaled Urban Land Extent Projection and Base Year Grids by SSP Scenarios, 2000-2100 (Gao & O'Neill code release)
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Energy & infrastructure
what_changes: Downscales the SEDAC 1/8-degree SSP urban-land projections to 1 km globally, releasing code and derived spatial layers that supersede the original coarse SEDAC product.
notes: Direct downscaled extension of a SEDAC-hosted projection dataset.
verify_notes: JingGaoLab urban land projections code | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集是 Gao & O'Neill 全球1公里降尺度城市土地范围预测及基准年格网的代码与数据发布，基于 SSP 情景，时间跨度2000-2100年。它是 SEDAC 托管的城市用地预测数据集的直接降尺度扩展，开放获取。适用于长期城市扩张情景模拟、气候变化综合评估与未来城市用地需求研究。具体格式与覆盖细节以发布页面为准。
desc_en: This Zenodo record is the code and data release for Gao & O'Neill's global 1-km downscaled urban land extent projections and base-year grids under SSP scenarios, spanning 2000-2100. It is a direct downscaled extension of a SEDAC-hosted urban-land projection dataset and is openly available. It supports long-term urban-expansion scenario modelling, integrated climate-change assessment and research on future urban land demand; exact formats and coverage details are given on the release page.

name: Global Human Settlement Layer - Settlement Model (GHS-SMOD) Vector
notes: Urban/rural domain stratification covariate referenced in SAE methodology.
verify_notes: GHSL moved under Copernicus Emergency human-settlement domain | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GHS-SMOD（全球人类居住层定居模型）矢量版由欧盟委员会 JRC 发布，覆盖全球，以 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage 形式提供矢量化的城乡分级（城市/城镇/乡村域）。需署名复用，是小区域估计（SAE）等方法中常用的城乡分层协变量。适用于城乡分类、人口分布建模与城市化程度分析。
desc_en: The vectorised Global Human Settlement Layer Settlement Model (GHS-SMOD), released by the EC JRC, has global coverage and provides urban-rural domain stratification (urban, town and rural classes) as shapefile and GeoPackage. Reusable with attribution, it is a common urban-rural stratification covariate in small-area estimation and related methods. It supports settlement classification, population-distribution modelling and degree-of-urbanisation analysis.

name: Global Mangrove Watch via GFW (mangrove forests vector)
provider: GMW consortium (Aberystwyth, JAXA, Wetlands International) republished by GFW
notes: GFW redistribution of GMW vectorized extent; useful when paired with GFW tree-cover loss for blue-carbon work.
verify_notes: Mangrove forests dataset page loads; full details require interaction | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集是 Global Mangrove Watch（由 Aberystwyth 大学、JAXA、Wetlands International 等组成的联盟）红树林范围矢量数据经 Global Forest Watch 转发的版本，覆盖全球热带地区。以 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 形式开放提供，采用CC BY 4.0许可。与 GFW 树木覆盖损失数据结合时，特别适用于蓝碳核算、红树林监测与海岸带生态保护研究。
desc_en: This dataset is Global Forest Watch's redistribution of the Global Mangrove Watch vectorised mangrove extent, produced by a consortium including Aberystwyth University, JAXA and Wetlands International, covering the global tropics. Openly available as shapefile and GeoJSON under CC BY 4.0, it is especially useful for blue-carbon accounting when paired with GFW tree-cover loss data, and supports mangrove monitoring and coastal-ecosystem conservation research.

name: Global planted forest data for timber species
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Protected areas & biodiversity
notes: Polygon data mirrored on Zenodo; Sci Data 2024
verify_notes: Planted forest data; code on Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该 Dryad 数据集为全球用材树种人工林数据，覆盖27个国家、涉及253个木材树种，以 GeoPackage（按国家分为27个文件）提供人工林多边形。数据同时在 Zenodo 镜像，相关论文发表于《Scientific Data》。采用 Dryad 使用条款，适用于人工林分布制图、林业资源评估、木材供应链与森林碳汇研究。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset provides global planted-forest data for timber species, covering 27 countries and 253 timber species, with planted-forest polygons delivered as GeoPackage in 27 per-country files. The data are mirrored on Zenodo and accompany a Scientific Data publication (Richardson et al., 2025). Distributed under Dryad terms, it supports planted-forest mapping, forestry resource assessment, timber supply-chain analysis and forest-carbon research.

name: Global urban projections under SSPs (2020-2100) — GEE
formats: Earth Engine ImageCollection (vectorisable to GeoJSON via reduceToVectors)
notes: Raster source but documented workflow to vectorise from GEE.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该条目来自 awesome-gee-community-catalog，汇集 SSP 情景下2020-2100年全球城市用地预测数据，覆盖全球。数据以 Google Earth Engine ImageCollection 形式提供，可通过 reduceToVectors 矢量化为 GeoJSON。Gao 版采用CC-BY 4.0、Chen 版采用CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0许可，经 GEE 开放访问，适用于未来城市扩张情景分析与气候-城市耦合研究。
desc_en: Catalogued by the awesome-gee-community-catalog, this entry compiles global urban-land projections under SSP scenarios for 2020-2100 with global coverage. The data are provided as Google Earth Engine ImageCollections and can be vectorised to GeoJSON via reduceToVectors. The Gao version is CC-BY 4.0 and the Chen version CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0, openly accessible through GEE, supporting future urban-expansion scenario analysis and climate-urban coupling research.

name: High-resolution social distancing feasibility in SSA cities
notes: Uses OSM-derived spatial units; relevant for slum-mapping research.
verify_notes: Nature SSO redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集随 Brooks 等（2022）发表于《Scientific Data》，提供撒哈拉以南非洲城市的高分辨率社交距离可行性评估。数据基于 OpenStreetMap 派生的空间单元，以 Shapefile/GeoPackage 形式作为论文补充材料提供，采用CC-BY 4.0许可。特别适用于贫民窟制图、城市公共卫生与疫情防控空间分析研究。
desc_en: Accompanying Brooks et al. (2022) in Scientific Data, this dataset provides high-resolution social-distancing feasibility assessments for sub-Saharan African cities. Built on OpenStreetMap-derived spatial units, it is supplied as shapefile/GeoPackage paper supplements under CC-BY 4.0. It is particularly relevant for slum mapping, urban public health and spatial analysis of pandemic-response measures in data-scarce settings.

name: HU Berlin European Primary Forest Database v2 (polygons)
theme_raw: Primary / old-growth forest patches in Europe
notes: Niche but heavily cited in EU forest-conservation literature.
verify_notes: European Primary Forest Database v2; 18,411 polygons, 33 countries | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HU Berlin 欧洲原始森林数据库 v2（多边形）由柏林洪堡大学制作，覆盖33个欧洲国家、时段2000-2019年，包含18411个原始森林斑块、总面积约4110万公顷。数据以 Earth Engine FeatureCollection 形式提供，采用CC BY 4.0许可。虽属小众，但在欧盟森林保护文献中被大量引用，适用于原始林识别、生物多样性保护与森林管理研究。
desc_en: The HU Berlin European Primary Forest Database v2 (polygons), produced by Humboldt University of Berlin, covers 33 European countries for 2000-2019 and comprises 18,411 primary-forest patches totalling about 41.1 million hectares. Delivered as an Earth Engine FeatureCollection under CC BY 4.0, it is niche but heavily cited in EU forest-conservation literature, supporting primary-forest identification, biodiversity protection and forest-management research.

name: ICGC WMS Vegetation
notes: 植被覆盖 WMS
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该服务为加泰罗尼亚地图与地质研究所（ICGC）提供的植被 WMS 网络地图服务，发布加泰罗尼亚地区的植被覆盖信息。采用CC BY 4.0许可，通过 WMS 标准接口在线访问，适用于区域植被制图、生态环境分析与作为底图叠加使用。具体覆盖时段与分辨率以 ICGC 服务说明为准。
desc_en: This service is a vegetation WMS web map service from the Cartographic and Geological Institute of Catalonia (ICGC), publishing vegetation-cover information for the Catalonia region. Released under CC BY 4.0 and accessible online through the standard WMS interface, it suits regional vegetation mapping, ecological analysis and use as a basemap overlay. Specific coverage period and resolution are defined in the ICGC service documentation.

name: INPE TerraBrasilis - PRODES/DETER Desmatamento Amazônia/Cerrado
notes: Yearly PRODES polygons + daily DETER alerts
verify_notes: TLD typo .inpe.x should be .inpe.br | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: INPE TerraBrasilis 提供巴西国家空间研究院的 PRODES 与 DETER 毁林监测数据，覆盖亚马逊、塞拉多、潘塔纳尔与大西洋森林等生物群系。PRODES 提供逐年毁林多边形，DETER 提供每日毁林预警。数据以 WFS、Shapefile、GeoJSON 形式发布，采用 TerraBrasilis CC-BY 许可，是亚马逊森林砍伐监测与环境执法的权威数据来源。
desc_en: INPE TerraBrasilis serves the Brazilian National Institute for Space Research's PRODES and DETER deforestation-monitoring data, covering the Amazon, Cerrado, Pantanal and Atlantic Forest biomes. PRODES provides annual deforestation polygons while DETER issues daily deforestation alerts. Distributed via WFS, shapefile and GeoJSON under the TerraBrasilis CC-BY licence, it is an authoritative source for Amazon deforestation monitoring and environmental enforcement.

name: INSPIRE Annex III Land Use 2018 - Luxembourg
verify_notes: Updated 2026-05-10 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为卢森堡 INSPIRE 附录 III 土地利用主题2018年数据，由卢森堡地理门户与土地管理局（ACT）发布，覆盖卢森堡全境。符合 INSPIRE 标准，以 Shapefile、GML 及 WFS 形式提供，采用 CC0 许可（公共领域），可直接下载或通过 WFS 访问。适用于土地利用规划、INSPIRE 合规应用与跨境欧洲空间数据整合。
desc_en: This dataset is Luxembourg's INSPIRE Annex III Land Use theme for 2018, published by the Luxembourg Géoportail and the Land Management Authority (ACT), covering all of Luxembourg. Compliant with the INSPIRE specification, it is provided as shapefile, GML and WFS under a CC0 (public-domain) licence, accessible by direct download or WFS. It supports land-use planning, INSPIRE-compliant applications and cross-border European spatial-data integration.

name: Japan KSJ National Land Numerical Information (土地利用細分メッシュ / 都市地域土地利用)
theme_raw: Land use mesh & urban land use
license_now: Government of Japan open data terms
notes: Detailed urban LULC vector; bilingual portal. No formal WFS but downloadable harmonised vector by prefecture
verify_notes: Active; FY2016 explicitly open data | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 日本国土数值情报（KSJ）的土地利用细分网格/都市地域土地利用数据由日本国土交通省（MLIT）发布，覆盖日本全国，分辨率100米，涵盖1976至2016年多个年份。提供详细的城市土地利用矢量（Shapefile、GML、GeoJSON），按都道府县下载，门户为日英双语，遵循日本政府开放数据条款，适用于长时序城市土地利用变化与城市规划研究。
desc_en: Japan's National Land Numerical Information (KSJ) Land Use Subdivision Mesh / urban-area land-use data, published by Japan's MLIT, covers the entire country at 100 m resolution across multiple years from 1976 to 2016. It provides detailed urban land-use vectors (shapefile, GML, GeoJSON) downloadable by prefecture through a bilingual portal under Japan's open government-data terms, supporting long-term urban land-use change analysis and urban planning.

name: Living Atlas / Esri Sentinel-2 10m Land Cover (Impact Observatory)
notes: Sometimes overlooked: ArcGIS Online exposes generalised vectors via Living Atlas FeatureServer
verify_notes: Page returns but scrape was thin on info; product still listed on Living Atlas | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: Esri Sentinel-2 10米土地覆盖数据由 Esri、Impact Observatory 与 Microsoft 合作制作（Karra 等，2021），覆盖全球，基于 Sentinel-2 影像，空间分辨率10米。数据通过 ArcGIS Living Atlas 以 COG、矢量瓦片及 FeatureServer 聚合形式提供，采用CC-BY 4.0许可。其中 FeatureServer 可输出概化矢量多边形，适用于全球土地覆盖制图、变化监测与 GIS 应用集成。
desc_en: The Esri Sentinel-2 10 m Land Cover dataset, produced by Esri, Impact Observatory and Microsoft (Karra et al., 2021), provides global land cover from Sentinel-2 imagery at 10 m resolution. Delivered through ArcGIS Living Atlas as COG, vector tiles and FeatureServer aggregates under CC-BY 4.0, it exposes generalised vector polygons via the Living Atlas FeatureServer. It supports global land-cover mapping, change monitoring and integration into GIS workflows.

name: Long-Term Back-Casted Urban Extents from Historical Maps (Uhl et al. 2021)
what_changes: Extends GHSL urban extents backward beyond 1975 by spatially constraining unsupervised colour-segmentation of scanned historical maps with GHSL-derived built-up footprints; produces vector urban extents for the early 20th century in selected regions.
notes: Niche derivative; back-casting framework rather than mainstream re-release.
