verify_notes: 1km grid population projections 2020-2100; figshare data | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 该数据集来自 Uhl 等（2021）发表于《Remote Sensing》的研究，基于历史地图反演长时序城市范围。论文提出从历史地图回溯城市建成区的框架方法，空间精度可达1米，采用CC BY 4.0许可。属于较小众的派生研究，更侧重方法论而非主流数据再发布，适用于历史城市化重建与长时序城市形态演变研究。
desc_en: This dataset stems from Uhl et al. (2021) in Remote Sensing, deriving long-term back-casted urban extents from historical maps. The paper presents a framework for back-casting urban built-up areas from historical cartography at resolutions down to 1 m, released under CC BY 4.0. It is a niche, methodology-focused derivative rather than a mainstream data re-release, supporting historical urbanisation reconstruction and long-term urban-form evolution studies.

name: LUCAS Copernicus 2022 in-situ polygons
notes: 137,966 radial polygons, 82 LC classes + 40 LU classes; doubled sample vs 2018
verify_notes: Redirects to JRC data catalog; content not re-fetched. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: LUCAS Copernicus 2022 实地多边形数据由欧盟委员会 JRC 发布，覆盖欧盟27国，时间为2022年全年。数据集包含137966个放射状实地调查多边形，涵盖82个土地覆盖类别与40个土地利用类别，样本量较2018年翻倍，以 GeoPackage 提供。是欧洲土地覆盖/利用验证、遥感分类训练与农业监测的重要实地参考数据。
desc_en: The LUCAS Copernicus 2022 in-situ polygons, published by the European Commission's JRC, cover the EU-27 across the full 2022 year. The dataset comprises 137,966 radial in-situ survey polygons spanning 82 land-cover and 40 land-use classes, doubling the 2018 sample size, and is provided as GeoPackage. It is a key in-situ reference for European land-cover/use validation, remote-sensing classification training and agricultural monitoring.

name: LUCAS Land Use and Land Cover change (LUC) v1.1
feature_count: 16 plant functional types (PFTs) plus non-vegetated classes
notes: Annual LULC 1950-2100 incl. urban, agriculture, forest fractions
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: LUCAS 土地利用与土地覆盖变化（LUC）v1.1 数据由 Hoffmann 等发表于 ESSD，覆盖欧洲，时间跨度1950-2100年。数据提供逐年土地利用/覆盖信息，包含16种植物功能类型（PFT）及非植被类别，涵盖城市、农业、森林比例，以 NetCDF 及按类矢量瓦片形式提供。采用CC-BY 4.0许可，适用于长时序土地变化建模与气候情景研究。
desc_en: The LUCAS Land Use and Land Cover Change (LUC) v1.1 dataset, published by Hoffmann et al. in ESSD, covers Europe over 1950-2100. It provides annual land-use/cover information across 16 plant functional types plus non-vegetated classes, including urban, agriculture and forest fractions, delivered as NetCDF and per-class vector tiles. Released under CC-BY 4.0, it supports long-term land-change modelling and climate-scenario research.

name: Madagascar Vavatenina LULC vector map
formats_now: HTML, PDF; ESRI Shapefile via CIRAD Dataverse
notes: Niche example of LULC paper-supplement vector; smallholder relevant
verify_notes: NCBI moved PMC to pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov; content alive | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为马达加斯加 Vavatenina 地区的土地利用/覆盖矢量图，由 Rakotomala 等（CIRAD）发表于《Scientific Data》。数据涵盖13个土地利用/覆盖类别，含2105个地面参考验证点，空间分辨率0.5米，时段2018-2019年，以 ESRI Shapefile 提供，采用CC-BY 4.0许可。是小农户区域高分辨率 LULC 制图的典型案例，适用于热带土地利用研究。
desc_en: This dataset is a land-use/land-cover vector map of the Vavatenina region, Madagascar, published by Rakotomala et al. (CIRAD) in Scientific Data. It spans 13 LULC classes with 2,105 georeferenced validation points at 0.5 m resolution for 2018-2019, delivered as ESRI shapefile under CC-BY 4.0. A notable example of smallholder-relevant high-resolution LULC mapping, it supports tropical land-use research and classification validation.

name: Mato Grosso Land Cover Change Maps (2001-2017)
formats_now: Tab-delimited text; compressed TIFF (per year); QGIS style; CSV training
notes: PANGAEA hosting; useful Amazon LU change benchmark
verify_notes: Newer Version 3 (2019) referenced | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Mato Grosso 土地覆盖变化图（2001-2017）由 Camara 等（INPE）制作，覆盖巴西马托格罗索州，提供逐年土地覆盖多边形（Shapefile）。数据集包含1892条已知标签的时间序列作为训练样本，托管于 PANGAEA，采用CC-BY 4.0许可。是亚马逊地区土地利用变化分析与遥感时间序列分类的实用基准数据。
desc_en: The Mato Grosso Land Cover Change Maps (2001-2017), produced by Camara et al. (INPE), cover the state of Mato Grosso, Brazil, providing annual land-cover polygons as shapefiles. The dataset includes 1,892 labelled time series as training samples, hosted on PANGAEA under CC-BY 4.0. It is a practical benchmark for Amazonian land-use change analysis and remote-sensing time-series classification.

name: MRC Land Use / Land Cover (Lower Mekong Basin)
notes: Cross-border regional org dataset; underused outside SE Asia.
verify_notes: Page loads but minimal content extracted by WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MRC 土地利用/土地覆盖数据由湄公河委员会发布，覆盖湄公河下游流域的柬埔寨、老挝、泰国与越南。数据通过 MRC 数据门户以 Shapefile 形式直接下载，遵循 MRC 开放数据政策（相关 MRC 技术报告第59号）。作为跨境区域机构数据，在东南亚以外利用较少，适用于湄公河流域土地利用、水资源管理与跨境环境规划研究。
desc_en: The MRC Land Use/Land Cover dataset, published by the Mekong River Commission, covers Cambodia, Laos, Thailand and Vietnam in the Lower Mekong Basin. It is provided as shapefiles via the MRC data portal under the MRC open-data policy (associated with MRC Technical Paper No. 59). As a cross-border regional-organisation dataset, it is underused outside Southeast Asia and supports basin land-use, water-resource management and transboundary environmental planning.

name: Natura 2000 (N2K) Land Cover/Land Use 2018
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Protected areas & biodiversity
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Natura 2000（N2K）土地覆盖/土地利用2018数据由哥白尼土地监测服务发布，覆盖欧盟 Natura 2000 保护区及2公里缓冲区。数据以 ESRI 地理数据库、GeoPackage 与 Shapefile 形式提供，免费、完整、开放。该数据专为生物多样性保护重点区域制作，适用于欧盟受保护区土地利用监测、栖息地评估与生态保护规划研究。
desc_en: The Natura 2000 (N2K) Land Cover/Land Use 2018 dataset, published by the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service, covers EU Natura 2000 sites plus a 2 km buffer. It is provided as ESRI geodatabase, GeoPackage and shapefile, free, full and open. Tailored to biodiversity-priority areas, it supports land-use monitoring within EU protected sites, habitat assessment and ecological-conservation planning across the Natura 2000 network.

name: NLSC 國土利用調查 (TW Land Use Survey)
provider: 內政部國土測繪中心 / 政府資料開放平臺 (Taiwan)
license: 政府資料開放授權條款 1.0 (≈CC-BY 4.0)
license_now: NLSC TW MOI copyright (Govt Data Open License presumed)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://maps.nlsc.gov.tw/))
notes: Detailed parcel-level 國土利用 polygons in OGD platform; check data.gov.tw for direct shapefile bundles.
verify_notes: Frameset-based interface; content under homePage.action | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://maps.nlsc.gov.tw/))
desc_zh: 国土利用调查数据由台湾内政部国土测绘中心发布，并经政府资料开放平台分发，覆盖台湾全境。数据提供地块级别的详细国土利用多边形，以 Shapefile 与 WMS 形式提供，可直接下载（直接 Shapefile 包可于 data.gov.tw 查询）。遵循台湾政府资料开放授权，适用于详细土地利用分析、城乡规划与国土管理研究。
desc_en: The National Land Use Survey, published by Taiwan's National Land Surveying and Mapping Center (Ministry of the Interior) and distributed via the government open-data platform, covers all of Taiwan. It provides detailed parcel-level national land-use polygons as shapefile and WMS with direct download (shapefile bundles via data.gov.tw). Released under Taiwan's open government-data licence, it supports fine-grained land-use analysis, urban-rural planning and national land management research.

name: NYC MapPLUTO (tax lot polygons)
provider: NYC Department of City Planning (BYTES of the Big Apple)
notes: Canonical urban parcel dataset; ~80 attributes per lot. Most-cited NYC vector dataset in urban research.
verify_notes: WebFetch returned 403 Forbidden; page likely live but blocks bots | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NYC MapPLUTO 是纽约市城市规划局（BYTES of the Big Apple）发布的税务地块多边形数据，覆盖纽约五个行政区约87万个税务地块。每个地块附带约80项属性（如分区、建筑面积、用途等），以 Shapefile 与 FileGDB 形式免费直接下载，属公共领域。它是纽约市最权威、被引用最多的城市地块矢量数据，广泛用于城市规划、房地产分析与城市研究。
desc_en: NYC MapPLUTO, published by the New York City Department of City Planning (BYTES of the Big Apple), provides tax-lot polygons covering roughly 870,000 lots across all five NYC boroughs. Each lot carries about 80 attributes (zoning, building area, land use and more), available as shapefile and FileGDB by free direct download in the public domain. It is the canonical, most-cited NYC parcel vector dataset, widely used in urban planning, real-estate analysis and urban research.

name: OECD/SWAC Africapolis green space (Digital Earth Africa)
notes: Cross-link between Africapolis and Digital Earth Africa STAC catalog
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由 Digital Earth Africa 发布，将 OECD/SWAC Africapolis 城市化数据中的城市绿地信息接入其 STAC 目录，覆盖非洲全部 54 个国家，包含 2015 和 2020 两个年度。数据以矢量形式通过 STAC 与 OGC API 提供，并采用 GeoParquet 等云原生格式，方便大规模分析。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它适合用于非洲城市扩张、土地利用与城市绿色空间的对比研究，并便于与 Digital Earth Africa 平台上的其他地球观测产品交叉分析。
desc_en: Published by Digital Earth Africa, this dataset cross-links OECD/SWAC Africapolis urban green-space information into the DE Africa STAC catalogue. It covers all 54 African countries for the years 2015 and 2020, delivered as vector data through STAC and OGC API endpoints in cloud-native formats such as GeoParquet. Released under CC BY 4.0, it supports continental-scale studies of urbanisation, land use and urban green space, and is designed to be analysed alongside other Earth-observation products on the Digital Earth Africa platform.

name: OpenSpaceGlobal (169 megacities urban open space)
notes: Very high-res polygons of parks, plazas, blue-green spaces; rare open city-level vector
verify_notes: Redirects through IDP authorize flow but article is publicly accessible after redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenSpaceGlobal 是由武汉大学等机构发布的全球城市开放空间数据集，覆盖全球 169 个大型城市（megacities）。它以高分辨率矢量多边形刻画公园、广场及蓝绿空间等城市开放空间，数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoTIFF 形式作为《Scientific Data》论文的补充材料提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。这类城市级矢量开放空间数据较为稀缺，适用于城市规划、宜居性评估、绿地可达性与公共空间研究。
desc_en: OpenSpaceGlobal, released by Wuhan University and collaborators, maps urban open spaces across 169 megacities worldwide. It delineates parks, plazas and blue-green spaces as very high-resolution vector polygons, distributed as Shapefile and GeoTIFF supplements to a Scientific Data paper under CC BY 4.0. City-level open-space vectors of this kind are relatively rare, making the dataset valuable for urban planning, liveability assessment, green-space accessibility analysis and public-space research.

name: OSM-derived multimodal urban morphology tiles (23 cities)
what_changes: Rasterizes OSM buildings, roads, railways, greenspace and water into 11,711 tile-level semantic label maps paired with bioclimatic variables for ML.
notes: Niche ML-ready tiled vector-to-raster derivative.
verify_notes: OSM-derived multimodal urban morphology across 23 cities; data DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17586383 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为基于 OpenStreetMap 派生的多模态城市形态瓦片数据，覆盖 23 个城市，将矢量数据转换为面向机器学习的栅格化瓦片产品。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，作为相关《Scientific Data》论文的成果发布。它属于较为专门的 ML-ready 衍生数据，适合用于城市形态分析、深度学习模型训练以及城市空间结构的跨城市比较研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides OpenStreetMap-derived, multimodal urban morphology tiles covering 23 cities, transforming vector data into machine-learning-ready, tiled vector-to-raster derivatives. Released under CC BY 4.0 in connection with a Scientific Data publication, it is a fairly niche, ML-ready product. It is well suited to urban-form analysis, training deep-learning models, and cross-city comparison of urban spatial structure.

name: Population cluster data for sub-Saharan Africa (urban-rural & electrification)
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic | Energy & infrastructure
notes: Scientific Data 2021; translates HRSL/WorldPop raster into vector clusters - very useful for energy/poverty work.
verify_notes: Nature SSO redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由 Falchetta 等人发布于《Scientific Data》(2021)，为撒哈拉以南非洲的人口聚落数据，区分城乡并附带电气化信息。它将 HRSL/WorldPop 等栅格人口数据转化为矢量聚类（cluster），以 GeoPackage 形式作为论文补充材料（Zenodo）提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该数据对能源规划、用电可及性、贫困与基础设施研究尤为有用，便于在聚落尺度上评估电力供给与社会经济状况。
desc_en: Published by Falchetta et al. in Scientific Data (2021), this dataset delivers population clusters for sub-Saharan Africa, distinguishing urban from rural settlements and including electrification information. It translates raster population layers such as HRSL/WorldPop into vector clusters, distributed as a GeoPackage supplement via Zenodo under CC BY 4.0. The data is particularly useful for energy access, poverty and infrastructure work, enabling settlement-level assessment of electricity provision and socioeconomic conditions.

name: Population, land use and economic exposure estimates for Europe at 100 m resolution from 1870 to 2020
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic
what_changes: Disaggregates historical European population and exposure to a 100 m grid by combining SEDAC GPW with national census micro-data and historical land-use reconstructions.
notes: Long-time-series downscaling of SEDAC population layers for Europe.
verify_notes: HANZE v2.0 Europe 100m exposure 1870-2020 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集提供欧洲 1870 至 2020 年间 100 米分辨率的人口、土地利用与经济暴露度估算，通过对 SEDAC 人口图层进行长时间序列降尺度重建得到。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，作为《Scientific Data》论文成果发布。它适合用于历史人口与城市化演变分析、灾害风险与经济暴露评估，以及长时序土地利用变化研究。
desc_en: This dataset offers population, land-use and economic-exposure estimates for Europe at 100 m resolution spanning 1870 to 2020, produced by long-time-series downscaling of SEDAC population layers. Released under CC BY 4.0 alongside a Scientific Data publication, it is suited to analysing historical population and urbanisation trends, assessing disaster risk and economic exposure, and studying long-term land-use change across the continent.

name: Radiant MLHub LandCoverNet (regional)
provider: Radiant Earth Foundation (catalog now migrated to Source Cooperative)
coverage: Africa, South America, Asia, Europe, Australia (regional v1 collections)
formats: GeoJSON vector labels (STAC label extension) + raster source
notes: Radiant MLHub formally sunset late 2024; mirrors live on Source Cooperative / AWS S3. URL may redirect — verify before citing in production.
verify_notes: Duplicate of index 14; mlhub.earth deprecated | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: LandCoverNet 是由 Radiant Earth Foundation 发布的土地覆盖标注数据集，包含非洲、南美、亚洲、欧洲、澳大利亚等区域的 v1 子集。它提供基于 STAC label 扩展的 GeoJSON 矢量标签以及配套的栅格源影像，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，常用于卫星影像土地覆盖分类的机器学习训练与验证。需要注意的是，Radiant MLHub 已于 2024 年底停止运营，数据镜像迁移至 Source Cooperative 与 AWS S3，原链接可能重定向，引用前应核实。
desc_en: LandCoverNet, from the Radiant Earth Foundation, is a land-cover labelling dataset with regional v1 collections spanning Africa, South America, Asia, Europe and Australia. It pairs GeoJSON vector labels (STAC label extension) with raster source imagery under CC BY 4.0, and is widely used for training and validating land-cover classification models on satellite imagery. Note that Radiant MLHub was sunset in late 2024 and the data now lives on Source Cooperative and AWS S3; the original URL may redirect, so verify before citing.

name: SANBI VEGMAP — National Vegetation Map of South Africa, Lesotho and eSwatini
notes: Detailed biome/vegetation polygons usable as land cover proxy.
verify_notes: HTTP 500 server error | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: VEGMAP 是南非国家生物多样性研究所（SANBI）发布的国家级植被图，覆盖南非、莱索托和斯威士兰（eSwatini）。它以详尽的生物群系与植被类型多边形描绘区域植被分布，可作为土地覆盖的代用数据。数据以 Shapefile、ESRI 地理数据库等格式提供，通过 BGIS 平台直接下载，采用免费、署名的开放许可。该图谱广泛用于生物多样性保护、生态系统制图与环境规划。
desc_en: VEGMAP is the national vegetation map of South Africa, Lesotho and eSwatini, produced by the South African National Biodiversity Institute (SANBI). It depicts biomes and vegetation types as detailed polygons that can serve as a land-cover proxy, distributed via the BGIS portal as Shapefile and ESRI geodatabase under a free, attribution-based open licence. The map is widely used for biodiversity conservation, ecosystem mapping and environmental planning.

name: SEDAC — Global 1/8 Degree Urban Land Extent Projection by SSP (v1, 2000-2100)
formats: GeoTIFF (polygonisable); CSV national totals; admin shp linkage
notes: Canonical SEDAC release of the paper's outputs.
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out (60s); SEDAC site often slow but typically up | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该数据集为 NASA SEDAC/CIESIN 发布的全球城市用地范围预测，分辨率为 1/8 度，按共享社会经济路径（SSP）情景给出 2000 至 2100 年的城市扩张预测。数据以 GeoTIFF 提供（可矢量化），并附国家级 CSV 汇总与行政区划链接，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它是该方法论文成果的权威 SEDAC 发布版本，适合用于全球城市化情景分析、长期土地利用规划与气候-城市相互作用研究。
desc_en: This NASA SEDAC/CIESIN dataset provides global urban land-extent projections at 1/8-degree resolution under Shared Socioeconomic Pathway (SSP) scenarios for 2000-2100. It is delivered as GeoTIFF (polygonisable) with national CSV totals and admin linkages under CC BY 4.0, and is the canonical SEDAC release of the underlying paper's outputs. The data supports global urbanisation-scenario analysis, long-term land-use planning and studies of climate-urban interactions.

name: Serviço Florestal Brasileiro - Cadastro Ambiental Rural (CAR), Florestas Públicas
theme_raw: Rural property registry, public forests, concessions
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://sistemas.florestal.gov.br/geoserver/ows))
notes: Cadastro Nacional de Florestas Públicas + CAR perímetros
verify_notes: lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://sistemas.florestal.gov.br/geoserver/ows))
desc_zh: 该服务由巴西林业服务局（SFB）提供，发布巴西的公共森林国家登记（Cadastro Nacional de Florestas Públicas）及农村环境登记（CAR）边界等矢量数据。数据通过 GeoServer 的 WFS 接口及 SICAR 平台下载获取，支持 Shapefile 等格式，CAR 公共图层为开放数据。它适合用于巴西森林管理、土地权属、环境合规与森林砍伐监测等研究与应用。
desc_en: Provided by the Brazilian Forest Service (SFB), this service publishes vector layers including the National Register of Public Forests and the Rural Environmental Registry (CAR) perimeters for Brazil. Data is available via a GeoServer WFS endpoint and the SICAR download platform in formats such as Shapefile, with the CAR public layer offered as open data. It supports forest management, land-tenure, environmental-compliance and deforestation-monitoring work across Brazil.

name: Shapefiles of the study area and land use classification (North China Plain)
notes: Study area + land-use polygon classification.
verify_notes: plos.figshare blocks WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 该数据集为某项华北平原研究的研究区与土地利用分类 Shapefile，由 Zhou 等人于《PLOS ONE》(2020) 发表并存放于 PLOS Figshare。数据包含研究区边界与土地利用分类多边形，采用 CC BY 许可，可开放获取。它适合用于华北平原区域的土地利用分析、农业与水资源研究，以及作为相关研究的可复现空间底图。
desc_en: This dataset comprises Shapefiles of the study area and land-use classification for a North China Plain study, published by Zhou et al. in PLOS ONE (2020) and archived on PLOS Figshare. It includes the study-area boundary and land-use classification polygons under a CC BY licence with open access. It is suited to regional land-use analysis, agriculture and water-resource studies, and as a reproducible spatial base for related research in the North China Plain.

name: South African National Land Cover (SANLC)
lychee_status: Network error: TLS handshake failed. Check SSL/TLS configuration (error sending request for url (https://egis.environment.gov.za/sa_national_land_cover_datasets))
lychee_text: Network error: TLS handshake failed. Check SSL/TLS configuration (error sending request for url (https://egis.environment.gov.za/sa_national_land_cover_datasets))
notes: Vector polygon version distributed by DFFE/GeoTerraImage; SANS 19144-2 compliant.
verify_notes: Unknown certificate verification error | lychee:Network error: TLS handshake failed. Check SSL/TLS configuration (error sending request for url (https://egis.environment.gov.za/sa_national_land_cover_datasets))
desc_zh: 南非国家土地覆盖数据集（SANLC）由南非环境部（DFFE）与 GeoTerraImage 制作发布，覆盖整个南非。它提供矢量多边形版本及配套栅格，符合 SANS 19144-2 土地覆盖分类标准，可通过环境部平台直接下载，采用免费署名的开放许可。该数据广泛用于南非土地利用变化监测、环境管理、规划与生态评估。
desc_en: The South African National Land Cover (SANLC) dataset is produced by South Africa's DFFE together with GeoTerraImage and covers the entire country. It is distributed as a vector polygon version plus accompanying raster, compliant with the SANS 19144-2 land-cover classification standard, available for direct download under a free, attribution-based open licence. The data is widely used for monitoring land-use change, environmental management, planning and ecological assessment in South Africa.

name: Sudbury / Abbotsford / San Antonio etc. City Land Use (ArcGIS Hub)
theme_raw: City zoning / future land use polygons
notes: Searchable mass of city LULC FeatureServers — many obscure regional polygons
verify_notes: Search results page for planning/land-use datasets | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一个 ArcGIS Hub 上的可检索入口，汇集了来自全球各市级开放数据门户的城市土地利用（LULC）矢量数据，例如 Sudbury、Abbotsford、San Antonio 等城市。数据多以 FeatureServer、GeoJSON 与 Shapefile 形式提供，许可证因来源而异。它便于一站式发现大量较为零散、不易找到的城市级规划与土地利用多边形，适用于城市规划比较与本地化空间分析。
desc_en: This is a searchable ArcGIS Hub entry point aggregating municipal land-use (LULC) vector layers from city open-data portals worldwide, such as Sudbury, Abbotsford and San Antonio. Layers are typically served as FeatureServer, GeoJSON and Shapefile, with licences varying by source. It offers a one-stop way to discover a large mass of otherwise obscure city-level planning and land-use polygons, useful for comparative urban planning and localised spatial analysis.

name: Texas Commission on Environmental Quality - Notices Of Violation
notes: data.gov 数据集 landing page
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为德克萨斯州环境质量委员会（TCEQ）的环境违规通知（Notices of Violation）记录，通过美国 data.gov 门户发布，可直接下载。数据遵循美国公共领域/data.gov 使用条款。它适合用于环境执法监测、合规分析以及德州环境监管相关的研究与公开问责工作。
desc_en: This dataset contains Notices of Violation issued by the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality (TCEQ), published through the US data.gov portal and available for direct download under US public-domain / data.gov terms. It is suited to environmental enforcement monitoring, compliance analysis, and research or public-accountability work related to environmental regulation in Texas.

name: UKCEH Land Cover Map (LCM) — Land Parcels GB
license: Bespoke licence — free for personal/non-commercial; commercial fees apply
license_now: Bespoke – UKCEH Data Licensing team negotiates licence per download
notes: Vector is restricted (NOT fully CC). Important caveat: only raster freely available; vector free for personal use only.
verify_notes: Published 2025; license workflow now explicitly 'contact for negotiation' rather than auto-grant | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UKCEH 土地覆盖图（LCM）的地块（Land Parcels）矢量产品由英国生态与水文中心制作，覆盖英国大不列颠（北爱尔兰单独发布）。它以 Shapefile/GeoPackage 形式提供面向地块的矢量土地覆盖。需特别注意：栅格版本可免费获取，而矢量版本受限——许可由 UKCEH 数据团队逐次协商，仅供个人用途免费，使用前需注册并核实许可条款。
desc_en: The UKCEH Land Cover Map (LCM) Land Parcels product, from the UK Centre for Ecology & Hydrology, covers Great Britain (Northern Ireland is published separately) as parcel-based vector land cover in Shapefile/GeoPackage. An important caveat: only the raster is freely available, while the vector is restricted—licensed on a per-download basis negotiated by the UKCEH data-licensing team and free for personal use only—so registration and licence checks are required before use.

name: Urban Areas (10m)
verify_notes: File exists, exceeds 10MB fetch cap | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Natural Earth 在 1:10m 比例尺下的全球城市建成区（Urban Areas）矢量数据，以 Shapefile 形式通过 CDN 直接下载。Natural Earth 是广受认可的免费公共领域底图数据集，制图质量高、风格一致。该城市区图层属于公共领域，适合用于小比例尺全球与区域制图、城市分布概览以及作为底图叠加要素。
desc_en: This is Natural Earth's global urban-areas vector layer at 1:10m scale, distributed as a Shapefile via CDN. Natural Earth is a widely trusted, free public-domain basemap dataset known for its high cartographic quality and consistent styling. Released into the public domain, this urban-areas layer is well suited to small-scale global and regional mapping, overviews of urban distribution, and use as a basemap overlay.

name: Urban Cities in Mexico
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由世界银行发布，提供墨西哥城市（Urban Cities）的矢量空间数据，以 Shapefile 形式公开提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它适合用于墨西哥城市分布与城市化分析、区域发展与社会经济研究，以及作为相关空间分析的城市边界参考。
desc_en: Published by the World Bank, this dataset provides vector spatial data of urban cities in Mexico, openly available as a Shapefile under CC BY 4.0. It is suited to analysing urban distribution and urbanisation in Mexico, supporting regional development and socioeconomic research, and serving as a reference for city boundaries in related spatial analyses.

name: USGS GAP National Terrestrial Ecosystems / Land Cover (vector PAD-US adjunct)
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: Vector ecological systems polygons for CONUS — often overlooked outside ecology community.
verify_notes: Last updated 2019; data by state/LCC region | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 该数据集为美国 USGS GAP（Gap Analysis Project）的国家陆地生态系统/土地覆盖数据，覆盖美国本土（CONUS 为 2011 年数据，阿拉斯加、夏威夷与波多黎各基于 2001 年影像）。它提供生态系统多边形的矢量版本，并有 Shapefile/GDB/GeoTIFF 等格式，属公共领域。该精细的生态系统分类数据常被生态学界以外的用户忽视，适用于生物多样性、栖息地与土地覆盖建模研究。
desc_en: This USGS Gap Analysis Project (GAP) dataset provides National Terrestrial Ecosystems / land-cover data for the United States, with CONUS at 2011 and Alaska, Hawaii and Puerto Rico based on 2001 imagery. It offers vector ecological-system polygons alongside Shapefile/GDB/GeoTIFF formats in the public domain. This fine-grained ecological-systems classification is often overlooked outside the ecology community, yet is valuable for biodiversity, habitat and land-cover modelling.

name: UV-Segformer code & ancillary data repository
theme_canonical: Land cover & land use | Energy & infrastructure
formats: code + pointers to CUGUV vector labels
notes: Hosts training/inference scripts; references Figshare and Zenodo vector inputs.
verify_notes: Urban village segmentation; depends on CUGUV dataset | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 UV-Segformer 模型的代码与辅助数据仓库，托管于 GitHub，由相关论文作者维护，对应 15 个中国城市（与 CUGUV 数据集一致）。仓库提供训练与推理脚本，并指向 Figshare 与 Zenodo 上的 CUGUV 矢量标签等输入数据，作为论文 10.1038/s41597-025-04701-w 的配套代码。其许可未明确说明。它适合用于城市矢量提取、深度学习语义分割方法的复现与扩展研究。
desc_en: This is the GitHub repository for the UV-Segformer model and its ancillary data, maintained by the paper's authors and corresponding to 15 Chinese cities (the same as CUGUV). It hosts training and inference scripts and points to CUGUV vector labels on Figshare and Zenodo, serving as the companion code for paper 10.1038/s41597-025-04701-w. No licence is explicitly stated. It is suited to reproducing and extending deep-learning semantic-segmentation methods for urban vector extraction.

name: UWWTD Agglomerations - INSPIRE Priority Data Set (Luxembourg)
provider: Administration de la gestion de l'eau, Luxembourg
notes: Reported under Urban Waste Water Treatment Directive 91/271/EEC. Small-country, public-domain license.
verify_notes: Hosted at EEA CDR | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为卢森堡的城市污水处理区（UWWTD Agglomerations），属 INSPIRE 优先数据集，由卢森堡水资源管理局发布，依据欧盟《城市污水处理指令》(91/271/EEC) 报送。数据以 Shapefile 形式通过 Eionet CDR 与 ATOM 提供，采用 CC0 1.0 公共领域许可。它适合用于污水处理基础设施、环境合规与水环境管理研究，是小国家、完全开放的权威报送数据。
desc_en: This dataset covers Luxembourg's urban waste-water agglomerations (UWWTD Agglomerations) as an INSPIRE Priority Data Set, published by Luxembourg's water-management administration and reported under the EU Urban Waste Water Treatment Directive (91/271/EEC). It is available as Shapefile via Eionet CDR and ATOM under a CC0 1.0 public-domain dedication. The data supports research on wastewater infrastructure, environmental compliance and water management, as authoritative, fully open reporting data for a small country.

name: WA Region Scheme - Applications (DPLH-021)
provider: WA Dept. of Planning, Lands and Heritage
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为西澳大利亚州区域规划方案的申请（Region Scheme - Applications），由西澳规划、土地与遗产部（DPLH）发布，通过澳大利亚 data.gov.au 平台提供，以 Shapefile 形式发布，采用 CC BY 许可。它适合用于西澳的土地利用规划、区域开发审批跟踪以及城市与区域发展研究。
desc_en: This dataset contains Region Scheme applications for Western Australia, published by the WA Department of Planning, Lands and Heritage (DPLH) via Australia's data.gov.au platform as a Shapefile under a CC BY licence. It is suited to land-use planning, tracking regional development approvals, and urban and regional development research in Western Australia.

name: WRI / IUCN Atlas of Forest Landscape Restoration Opportunities
notes: Backing FeatureServer queryable through Esri REST
verify_notes: Atlas of Forest Landscape Restoration Opportunities; navigation present | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 森林景观恢复机会图谱（Atlas of Forest Landscape Restoration Opportunities）由世界资源研究所（WRI）、IUCN 与马里兰大学（UMD）合作制作，覆盖全球，识别可进行森林与景观恢复的区域。数据通过 ArcGIS Online FeatureServer 提供（可经 Esri REST 查询），并有 GeoTIFF 栅格镜像，WRI 数据采用 CC BY 许可。它适合用于全球森林恢复潜力评估、气候减缓与生态修复规划。
desc_en: The Atlas of Forest Landscape Restoration Opportunities, produced by WRI, IUCN and the University of Maryland, is a global dataset identifying areas suitable for forest and landscape restoration. It is served via an ArcGIS Online FeatureServer (queryable through Esri REST) with a GeoTIFF raster mirror, with WRI data offered under CC BY. The dataset supports global assessment of restoration potential, climate-mitigation planning and ecological-restoration prioritisation.

name: Yangambi (DRC) Land Cover Change & Validation
notes: 852,025 km^2 mapped with up to 32 LC classes
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为刚果民主共和国 Yangambi 地区的土地覆盖变化与验证数据，由 Szantoi 等人（JRC）制作并存放于 PANGAEA，覆盖非洲、加勒比与太平洋（ACP）区域，制图面积达 852,025 平方公里，最多包含 32 个土地覆盖类别。数据以 Shapefile 形式直接下载（约 2GB），采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它适合用于热带森林监测、土地覆盖分类验证与 REDD+ 相关研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides land-cover change and validation data for the Yangambi area in the DRC, produced by Szantoi et al. (JRC) and archived on PANGAEA. Covering ACP (Africa/Caribbean/Pacific) areas, it maps some 852,025 km² with up to 32 land-cover classes, distributed as a roughly 2 GB Shapefile under CC BY 4.0. It is suited to tropical-forest monitoring, land-cover classification validation and REDD+-related research.

name: 国土数値情報 土地利用細分メッシュ / 都市地域土地利用 (KSJ Land Use)
license: 国土数値情報利用約款 (open, attribution required, effectively CC-BY compatible)
license_now: Mixed: CC-BY 4.0 and Non-Commercial (per dataset); some CC-BY 4.0 with partial restrictions
formats_now: Shapefile, GeoJSON, XML (JPGIS 2.1), Raster (some), TXT/CSV legacy
notes: 国土数値情報 (KSJ) is the canonical Japanese LULC vector source, separate from JAXA HRLULC raster.
verify_notes: License now explicitly tagged per dataset; per-dataset check required | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国土数值情报（KSJ）由日本国土交通省（MLIT）提供，是日本权威的土地利用矢量数据来源，包含土地利用细分网格与都市地域土地利用等产品，覆盖全日本。数据以 Shapefile 与 GML 形式直接下载，许可证因数据集而异（部分为 CC BY 4.0，部分含非商业或局部限制使用前需核实）。它独立于 JAXA 的 HRLULC 栅格产品，广泛用于日本国土规划、土地利用分析与城市研究。
desc_en: The National Land Numerical Information (KSJ), provided by Japan's MLIT, is the canonical Japanese land-use vector source, including land-use subdivision mesh and urban-area land-use products covering all of Japan. Data is available for direct download as Shapefile and GML, with licences varying by dataset (some CC BY 4.0, some non-commercial or partially restricted, so verify before use). Distinct from JAXA's HRLULC raster, it is widely used for national land planning, land-use analysis and urban research in Japan.

name: 桥沟流域下垫面 / 土地利用矢量数据集 2014-2018 (Qiaogou Basin Land Use Vectors)
coverage: Qiaogou small watershed, Loess Plateau gully region
formats: Shapefile (ArcGIS polygons digitized from Gaofen-1 imagery)
notes: Multi-year LULC vector polygons useful for Loess Plateau erosion modelling
verify_notes: Qiaogou watershed underlying surface 2014-2018; 15.3 MB; review required. Format is tabular not vector - mismatch with theme | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为桥沟流域 2014–2018 年的下垫面/土地利用矢量数据，由甘肃生态科学数据中心发布，覆盖黄土高原沟壑区的桥沟小流域。数据基于高分一号影像数字化为 ArcGIS 多边形，以 Shapefile 形式提供（约 15.3 MB），需提交信息后下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它适合用于黄土高原水土流失建模、小流域土地利用变化与生态恢复研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides land-use / land-surface vectors for the Qiaogou small watershed in the gully region of the Loess Plateau for 2014-2018, released by the Gansu Ecological Science Data Center. The polygons were digitised from Gaofen-1 imagery into ArcGIS Shapefiles (about 15.3 MB), available after information submission under CC BY 4.0. It is well suited to soil-erosion modelling, small-watershed land-use change analysis and ecological-restoration research on the Loess Plateau.

name: 高分1号土地利用矢量数据集 (Gaofen-1 LU dataset)
provider: 中国科学院遥感所 / 科学数据银行 ScienceDB
notes: 稀缺: 真正高分辨率国产卫星派生的县级矢量样本数据
verify_notes: 中国科学数据 platform record; full metadata not extracted | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 高分一号土地利用矢量数据集由中国科学院遥感所制作、通过科学数据银行（ScienceDB）发布，覆盖中国选样县域。数据基于国产高分一号卫星影像派生为县级矢量多边形样本，以 Shapefile 形式提供，需注册获取，采用中国科学数据 CC BY 开放许可。这类真正高分辨率的国产卫星派生县级矢量样本较为稀缺，适用于土地利用分类、样本训练与遥感方法研究。
desc_en: The Gaofen-1 Land Use vector dataset was produced by the Institute of Remote Sensing (CAS) and published via ScienceDB, covering sampled counties in China. Derived from China's domestic Gaofen-1 satellite imagery, it provides county-level vector polygon samples as Shapefiles, available after registration under an open CC BY licence. Such genuinely high-resolution, domestically-derived county-level vector samples are relatively scarce, making the dataset valuable for land-use classification, sample training and remote-sensing methodology research.
