notes: Vector polygons of mangrove extent and gain/loss; mirrored on AWS Open Data and Google Earth Engine.
verify_notes: SSL certificate expired on data.unep-wcmc.org — site currently inaccessible via HTTPS. | lychee:Network error: SSL certificate expired. Site needs to renew certificate (error sending request for url (https://data.unep-wcmc.org/datasets/45))
desc_zh: 全球红树林观察（Global Mangrove Watch, GMW）v3.0 由 Aberystwyth 大学、soloEO、Wetlands International、UNEP-WCMC 与 JAXA 等机构合作发布，覆盖全球热带地区。它以矢量多边形刻画红树林分布范围及其增减变化，提供 Shapefile、GeoTIFF 与 xlsx 等格式直接下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，并在 AWS Open Data 与 Google Earth Engine 上有镜像。该数据是红树林监测、海岸带保护与蓝碳研究的权威基准。
desc_en: Global Mangrove Watch (GMW) v3.0 is produced by Aberystwyth University, soloEO, Wetlands International, UNEP-WCMC and JAXA, covering the global tropics. It maps mangrove extent and gain/loss as vector polygons, available for direct download as Shapefile, GeoTIFF and xlsx under CC BY 4.0, and mirrored on AWS Open Data and Google Earth Engine. The dataset is an authoritative benchmark for mangrove monitoring, coastal-zone conservation and blue-carbon research.

name: Copernicus Marine – Exclusive Economic Zones and Territorial Seas (external product)
provider: Mercator Ocean / Copernicus Marine Service (republished VLIZ)
theme_raw: EEZ/territorial seas | EEZ + territorial sea polygons | EEZ + Territorial Seas (mirror)
feature_count: EEZ v11 (up to 200 nautical miles) + Territorial Seas v4 (up to 12 nautical miles)
notes: Useful alternative pipeline if users already authenticated with Copernicus.
verify_notes: Sourced from VLIZ Maritime Boundaries | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该产品为 Copernicus Marine 服务再发布的全球专属经济区（EEZ）与领海数据，源自 VLIZ 的海洋边界数据，包含 EEZ v11（最远 200 海里）与领海 v4（最远 12 海里）。数据以 Shapefile 形式通过 FTP 与 STAC/API 提供，采用 Copernicus 免费开放许可。对已通过 Copernicus 认证的用户而言，它提供了便捷的海洋边界获取管道，适用于海洋管理、海域权属与海洋空间规划。
desc_en: This product is the Copernicus Marine Service's republication of global Exclusive Economic Zones (EEZ) and Territorial Seas, derived from VLIZ maritime boundaries, comprising EEZ v11 (up to 200 nautical miles) and Territorial Seas v4 (up to 12 nautical miles). It is delivered as Shapefile via FTP and STAC/API under the Copernicus free and open licence. For users already authenticated with Copernicus, it offers a convenient pipeline for maritime boundaries useful in ocean governance and marine spatial planning.

name: Global Islands (USGS / Esri / UNEP-WCMC)
doi_or_citation: Sayre et al. 2019, A new 30 meter resolution global shoreline vector and associated global islands database.
notes: ~370k island polygons + continental mainland; 22.5k 'big islands' named. Also mirrored on data.gov and UNEP-WCMC resources portal.
verify_notes: USGS outgoing dir no longer available at this path | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 全球岛屿数据集（Global Islands）由 USGS、Esri、UNEP-WCMC 与 Island Conservation 合作制作，覆盖全球，约含 37 万个岛屿多边形及大陆主体，其中约 2.25 万个大岛已命名。数据源自 Sayre 等人（2019）的 30 米全球海岸线矢量与岛屿数据库，以 Shapefile 与文件地理数据库提供，属 USGS 公共领域，并在 data.gov 与 UNEP-WCMC 平台有镜像。它适合用于岛屿生物地理、海岸带与保护规划研究。
desc_en: The Global Islands dataset, produced by USGS, Esri, UNEP-WCMC and Island Conservation, covers the world with roughly 370,000 island polygons plus continental mainland, of which about 22,500 'big islands' are named. Derived from Sayre et al. (2019)'s 30 m global shoreline vector and islands database, it is distributed as Shapefile and file GDB in the USGS public domain, and mirrored on data.gov and UNEP-WCMC. It suits island biogeography, coastal-zone and conservation-planning research.

name: GCL_FCS30 – Global Coastline Dataset with Fine Classification (2010–2020)
provider: Aerospace Information Research Institute, CAS (Liu et al.)
theme_raw: 海岸线 / coastline (typology: artificial, biogenic, sandy, muddy, rocky, estuary) | Coastline | 全球海岸线时序
notes: Scientific Data paper; vector classification 30m fine-grained; rare for having multi-class coastline types vs. simple shoreline.
verify_notes: Redirects to Nature IDP authorization | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GCL_FCS30 是中国科学院空天信息创新研究院（Liu 等人）发布的全球海岸线精细分类数据集，覆盖全球，分辨率 30 米，时间跨度 2010–2020 年。它以 Shapefile（EPSG:4326）形式直接下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，作为《Scientific Data》论文成果发布，并有 Zenodo 镜像。与简单海岸线相比，该数据具有多类别的海岸线类型划分，较为少见，适合海岸带变化监测、海岸类型分析与海洋制图。
desc_en: GCL_FCS30 is a global, finely-classified coastline dataset released by the Aerospace Information Research Institute, CAS (Liu et al.), at 30 m resolution spanning 2010-2020. It is available for direct download as Shapefile (EPSG:4326) under CC BY 4.0, published with a Scientific Data paper and a Zenodo mirror. Unlike simple shorelines, it provides multi-class coastline types—a relatively rare feature—making it valuable for coastal-change monitoring, coastline-type analysis and marine cartography.

name: Global coastal transect types (Hulskamp et al. 2023)
notes: Companion classification feeding the GCC indicator framework.
splink_merged_from: Global Coastal Transect System - coastal typology (Hulskamp et al. 2023)
verify_notes: DOI redirects but final Zenodo record returned HTTP 410 Gone | lychee:Rejected status code: 410 Gone
desc_zh: 全球海岸横断面类型数据集由 Hulskamp 等人（Deltares，2023）发布，覆盖全球海岸线，以 500 米间隔的横断面进行分类。数据以 Shapefile/GeoPackage（点）形式提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，存放于 Zenodo。它是支撑全球海岸变化（GCC）指标框架的配套分类数据，适合用于海岸类型分析、海岸脆弱性与海岸带变化研究。
desc_en: The global coastal transect-types dataset, released by Hulskamp et al. (Deltares, 2023), covers the world's coastlines, classified along 500 m transects. It is provided as Shapefile/GeoPackage (points) under CC BY 4.0 and archived on Zenodo. As the companion classification feeding the Global Coastal Change (GCC) indicator framework, it supports coastline-type analysis, coastal-vulnerability assessment and coastal-zone change research.

name: NOAA / NGA World Vector Shoreline Plus (WVS-Plus)
provider: NOAA Office for Coastal Management / NGA
theme_raw: global shoreline | Coastline | global vector shoreline
notes: Authoritative US/NGA global shoreline reference; multiple resolution libraries to match map scale.
verify_notes: Server returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch (likely bot block); page may exist for browser users | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 世界矢量海岸线增强版（World Vector Shoreline Plus, WVS-Plus）由 NOAA 海岸管理办公室与 NGA 提供，覆盖全球，是美国/NGA 权威的全球海岸线参考数据。数据以 Shapefile 形式直接下载，属美国公共领域，并提供多种分辨率版本以匹配不同地图比例尺。它适合用于全球与区域海岸线制图、航海与海洋空间分析的底图参考。
desc_en: World Vector Shoreline Plus (WVS-Plus), provided by NOAA's Office for Coastal Management and NGA, is an authoritative US/NGA global shoreline reference covering the world. It is available for direct download as Shapefile in the US public domain, offered in multiple resolution libraries to match different map scales. It is well suited to global and regional shoreline mapping and as a base reference for nautical and marine spatial analysis.

name: PANGAEA Geoscience Repository (coastline change DOIs, e.g., Portugal 1958-2010)
theme_raw: coastline change + geo features | Georeferenced earth & environmental data | Marine cores, sediment, geochemistry (incl. foram occurrences)
notes: Dataset-per-DOI; useful for finding regional coastline-evolution polylines tied to published papers.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: PANGAEA 是由 AWI 与 MARUM 运营的地球科学数据仓库，遵循开放科学与 FAIR 原则，以数据集对应 DOI 的方式发布大量研究数据，涵盖 15 个以上科学领域。其中包含许多与已发表论文绑定的区域海岸线变化数据（如葡萄牙 1958–2010 海岸线），多以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 形式作为论文补充材料提供，许可证逐数据集而定。它适合检索特定区域的海岸演变折线及相关地球科学数据。
desc_en: PANGAEA is an Earth-science data repository operated by AWI and MARUM, following open-science and FAIR principles and publishing large volumes of research data on a one-DOI-per-dataset basis across more than 15 scientific domains. It hosts many regional coastline-change datasets tied to published papers (e.g., Portugal 1958-2010), typically provided as Shapefile or GeoJSON paper supplements with per-dataset licences. It is ideal for finding regional coastline-evolution polylines and related geoscience data.

name: Antarctic Digital Database (ADD) coastline
theme_raw: Antarctic coastline / ice shelves / rock outcrop | 南极海岸线 + 地形 / Antarctic coastline, ice fronts, rock outcrops, contours
notes: Source of the Antarctic levels in GSHHG; referenced as the authoritative successor for southern high-latitude shoreline.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 南极数字数据库（Antarctic Digital Database, ADD）由 SCAR 与英国南极调查局（BAS）维护，提供南极洲的权威海岸线及相关地理要素数据。数据以 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage 形式通过网络门户及 API 获取，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。ADD 是 GSHHG 中南极图层的来源，被视为南极高纬度海岸线的权威基准，适合用于南极制图、冰盖边缘与极地环境研究。
desc_en: The Antarctic Digital Database (ADD), maintained by SCAR and the British Antarctic Survey (BAS), provides authoritative coastline and related geographic features for Antarctica. Data is available as Shapefile and GeoPackage via a web portal and API under CC BY 4.0. ADD is the source of the Antarctic levels in GSHHG and is regarded as the authoritative reference for southern high-latitude shoreline, making it valuable for Antarctic mapping, ice-margin studies and polar environmental research.

name: EEA Coastline (for analysis)
notes: Derived from EuroGlobalMap; used as EEA standard coastline.
verify_notes: v3.0 active, last modified 2026-01-27 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EEA 分析用海岸线（EEA Coastline for analysis）由欧洲环境署（EEA）发布，覆盖欧洲海岸线，包含折线与多边形，时间范围约 1995–2017 年。数据派生自 EuroGlobalMap，以 Shapefile（折线）形式开放下载，是 EEA 的标准海岸线参考。它适合用于欧洲海岸带分析、环境指标计算以及作为欧洲范围空间分析的一致海岸线底图。
desc_en: The EEA Coastline (for analysis), published by the European Environment Agency, covers Europe's coastline as both polylines and polygons, spanning roughly 1995-2017. Derived from EuroGlobalMap, it is openly downloadable as Shapefile (polyline) and serves as the EEA's standard coastline reference. It is suited to European coastal-zone analysis, computing environmental indicators and providing a consistent coastline base for Europe-wide spatial analysis.

name: FAO Major Fishing Areas / GFCM Geographical Sub-Areas (GSAs) / Fisheries Restricted Areas (FRAs)
theme_raw: Fishery management areas | Marine statistical areas
license_now: not explicitly stated (FAO terms apply, generally CC-BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO)
notes: Includes FAO statistical areas, sub-areas, GFCM GSAs and Mediterranean FRAs (legally binding closures).
verify_notes: GSAs page accessible; resolution doc + shapefile zip | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由 FAO 渔业部与 GFCM 提供，包含 FAO 主要捕捞区（全球 27 个主要区）及其子区、GFCM 地理子区（GSA）与地中海/黑海的禁渔限制区（FRA）。数据以压缩 Shapefile 形式直接下载，许可证未明确说明（一般适用 FAO 条款，多为 CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO）。其中部分 FRA 为具法律约束力的禁渔区，适用于渔业管理、海域划界与海洋空间规划研究。
desc_en: Provided by FAO Fisheries and the GFCM, this dataset includes FAO Major Fishing Areas (27 global major areas) and sub-areas, GFCM Geographical Sub-Areas (GSAs), and Mediterranean/Black Sea Fisheries Restricted Areas (FRAs). It is available for direct download as zipped Shapefiles, with the licence not explicitly stated (FAO terms generally apply, typically CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO). Some FRAs are legally binding closures, making the data valuable for fisheries management, maritime delimitation and marine spatial planning.

name: GISCO Coastal Lines (COAS) 2016
notes: Useful as cartographic basemap layer.
verify_notes: Coastal lines: 2006, 2010, 2013, 2016 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由欧盟统计局 GISCO 维护的欧洲海岸线矢量数据集，提供 2006、2010、2013、2016 多个年份版本。数据以多比例尺形式发布，覆盖欧洲沿海地区，适合作为制图底图图层使用。提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GeoPackage 和 TopoJSON 等多种格式，可通过 HTTPS 批量下载，遵循 Eurostat/GISCO 的下载使用条款。常用于欧洲范围的地图制作、空间分析与可视化背景叠加。
desc_en: A European coastline vector dataset maintained by Eurostat's GISCO unit, available in multiple editions (2006, 2010, 2013, 2016) and several cartographic scales. It covers European coastlines and is primarily intended as a clean basemap layer for mapping and visualization. The data is distributed in Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage and TopoJSON via HTTPS bulk download, under GISCO's standard download provisions. It is widely used for European-scale cartography, spatial analysis backdrops and reference overlays.

name: Global high resolution coastline database (Maxar 2009–2023)
notes: Sub-meter scale satellite-derived shoreline; underused but extremely high-resolution.
verify_notes: Nature IDP cookie consent redirect; article accessible in browser | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 一项发表于《Nature Scientific Data》（2025）的全球高分辨率海岸线数据库，基于 Maxar 高分辨率卫星影像（2009–2023）提取，达到亚米级尺度。数据以矢量 Shapefile 形式提供，作为论文附件公开，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可证。其极高的空间分辨率使其适用于精细海岸线变化研究、海岸地貌制图及高精度制图需求，是一份尚未被广泛使用但质量很高的全球海岸线资源。
desc_en: A global high-resolution coastline database published in Nature Scientific Data (2025), derived from Maxar high-resolution satellite imagery spanning 2009–2023 at sub-meter scale. The shoreline is delivered as vector Shapefiles via the paper supplement under a CC-BY-4.0 license. Its exceptionally fine resolution makes it suitable for detailed shoreline-change analysis, coastal geomorphology mapping and high-precision cartography. It remains comparatively underused despite its quality, offering a strong alternative to coarser global coastline products.

name: Global mangroves & salt marshes coastal protection layer (van Zelst et al. 2021)
provider: van Zelst et al. via Nature Communications supplementary / Zenodo
theme_raw: coastal vegetation protection (vector) | mangroves / salt marshes protective vegetation
notes: Vegetation protection vector inputs cited by GCC
verify_notes: Redirect to Nature; login wall on follow-up | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 van Zelst 等人（2021，《Nature Communications》）发布的全球红树林与盐沼海岸防护图层。数据沿全球海岸提供植被防护相关的矢量输入，涵盖海洋海岸与生物多样性主题，采用 CC-BY 4.0 开放许可，可通过论文附件或 Zenodo 获取，格式为 Shapefile/GeoPackage。该数据常被用作基于自然的海岸防护指标，是相关海岸气候与防灾研究的重要输入。
desc_en: A global mangrove and salt-marsh coastal-protection layer from van Zelst et al. (2021, Nature Communications). It provides vegetation-based protection vector inputs along the world's coasts, spanning marine/coastal and biodiversity themes, released under CC-BY 4.0 via the paper supplement or a Zenodo deposit in Shapefile/GeoPackage form. The dataset is frequently used as a nature-based coastal-protection indicator and serves as an input to coastal climate and flood-risk assessments.

name: osmcoastline tool (source)
theme_raw: tooling for coastline extraction | coastline extraction tool + outputs
formats: C++ source; outputs SpatiaLite + shapefile (land_polygons, water_polygons, lines, error_lines, error_points, rings)
notes: Reference implementation that produces all of the above datasets from raw planet.osm.pbf; enables custom resolutions and regional cuts.
verify_notes: Active, latest release v2.5.0 (2026-01-18) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: osmcoastline 是 Jochen Topf（osmcode）开发的开源命令行工具，用于从原始 planet.osm.pbf 数据中提取海岸线，是 OSM 海岸线产品的参考实现。工具以 C++ 编写，采用 GPL-3.0-or-later 许可，可输出陆地多边形、水域多边形、海岸线、错误线/点及环等多个数据集（SpatiaLite 与 Shapefile）。它支持自定义分辨率和区域裁剪，适合需要自行生成或更新 OSM 海岸数据的用户。
desc_en: osmcoastline is an open-source command-line tool by Jochen Topf (osmcode) that extracts coastlines from raw planet.osm.pbf data and serves as the reference implementation behind OSM coastline products. Written in C++ and licensed GPL-3.0-or-later, it outputs land_polygons, water_polygons, lines, error_lines, error_points and rings as SpatiaLite and Shapefile. It enables custom resolutions and regional cuts, making it ideal for users who need to generate or refresh OSM-derived coastline datasets themselves.

name: 中国海岸线数据集 (1985-2020, Coastal Data Engine)
provider: 华东师范大学 河口海岸学国家重点实验室 (SKLEC, ECNU)
coverage: 中国大陆沿海 1985-2020 每5年
license_now: 未明示许可证；版权 ECNU SKLEC，需联系作者
formats: 矢量 (基于 Landsat 30m / Sentinel-2 10m 提取的海岸线 shp)
formats_now: 未列出 (基于 Landsat/Sentinel-2 派生岸线)
notes: 高校实验室海岸线数据库,5年间隔时间序列
verify_notes: 页面无明确许可证字段；与 license_p4 描述一致 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由华东师范大学河口海岸学国家重点实验室（SKLEC）发布的中国海岸线数据集，覆盖中国大陆沿海，时间跨度 1985–2020 年，按每 5 年一期构成时间序列。海岸线基于 Landsat 30m 与 Sentinel-2 10m 影像提取，以矢量 Shapefile 形式提供。该数据需通过邮件向作者申请获取，版权归 ECNU SKLEC 所有。适合中国海岸线长期演变、岸线变化与海岸带管理研究。
desc_en: A China coastline dataset published by the State Key Laboratory of Estuarine and Coastal Research (SKLEC) at East China Normal University, covering mainland China's coast from 1985 to 2020 as a time series at five-year intervals. Shorelines are extracted from Landsat 30 m and Sentinel-2 10 m imagery and provided as vector Shapefiles. Access requires an email request to the authors, with copyright held by ECNU SKLEC. It suits long-term shoreline-evolution, coastline-change and coastal-zone management studies for China.

name: Assessing Global Elevation Models for Mapping the Low Elevation Coastal Zone (LECZ)
what_changes: Re-derives LECZ masks using multiple newer DEMs (e.g. CoastalDEM, MERIT, FABDEM) to benchmark SEDAC's canonical LECZ vector/raster delineation and quantify error sensitivity.
notes: Methodological re-evaluation of the SEDAC LECZ product.
verify_notes: Global DEM LECZ assessment publication | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 一份关于评估全球高程模型用于绘制低海拔海岸带（LECZ）的研究数据集，发布于 Zenodo，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该工作对 SEDAC 的 LECZ 产品进行了方法学上的重新评估，比较不同全球 DEM 在划定低海拔海岸带时的表现。适合海岸洪水与海平面上升暴露分析、DEM 选择评估等研究参考。具体格式与覆盖范围以 Zenodo 记录为准。
desc_en: A research dataset on assessing global elevation models for mapping the Low Elevation Coastal Zone (LECZ), deposited on Zenodo under CC BY 4.0. It offers a methodological re-evaluation of the SEDAC LECZ product, comparing how different global DEMs perform when delineating low-lying coastal areas. It is useful for coastal-flood and sea-level-rise exposure analysis and for informing DEM selection in such studies. Exact formats and coverage are documented in the Zenodo record.

name: AusSeabed Marine Data Portal (Geoscience Australia)
theme_raw: Bathymetry, backscatter, marine features (incl. vector contours, survey extents)
notes: National federated portal aggregating Geoscience Australia, AIMS, CSIRO, Parks Australia.
verify_notes: WebFetch failed with TLS chain error; site may still be live in browser | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: AusSeabed 海洋数据门户由澳大利亚地球科学局（Geoscience Australia）牵头的 AusSeabed 联盟运营，汇聚 Geoscience Australia、AIMS、CSIRO、Parks Australia 等机构的海洋数据，覆盖澳大利亚专属经济区及南极领地。数据采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、NetCDF 及 WMS/WFS 服务，可通过 WFS 访问。适合海底测绘、海洋空间规划与海洋环境研究。
desc_en: The AusSeabed Marine Data Portal is a national federated platform led by Geoscience Australia and the AusSeabed federation, aggregating data from Geoscience Australia, AIMS, CSIRO and Parks Australia. It covers Australia's EEZ and Antarctic territory under a CC-BY 4.0 license, offering Shapefile, GeoPackage, NetCDF and WMS/WFS services accessible via WFS. The portal supports seabed mapping, marine spatial planning and marine environmental research across Australian waters.

name: Australian Marine Parks
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳大利亚海洋公园数据集，由 Parks Australia / DCCEEW 发布，覆盖澳大利亚联邦水域（Commonwealth waters）的海洋保护区边界。数据采用 CC-BY 许可，公开提供 Shapefile 与 WFS 服务。该数据属于海洋与海岸及生物多样性保护主题，适合海洋保护区管理、空间规划及保护成效分析等用途。
desc_en: The Australian Marine Parks dataset, published by Parks Australia / DCCEEW, delineates marine protected area boundaries within Australia's Commonwealth waters. It is openly available as Shapefile and via WFS under a CC-BY license. Spanning marine/coastal and biodiversity-protection themes, it supports marine protected area management, spatial planning and conservation-effectiveness analysis.

name: BirdLife/IUCN Marine IBAs (mIBA) e-atlas layer
coverage: Global oceans; subset distributed nationally (e.g., Ireland)
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 500 Internal Server Error
notes: Often missed because mIBAs are subsumed within the global IBA shapefile; specific marine-only extracts exist via partners.
verify_notes: Server error 500 on Biodiversity Ireland dataset page | lychee:Rejected status code: 500 Internal Server Error
desc_zh: 由 BirdLife International 海洋项目发布的海洋重要鸟区（Marine IBAs, mIBA）电子图集图层，覆盖全球海洋，并在部分国家门户（如爱尔兰）以子集形式分发。数据以 Shapefile 提供，遵循 BirdLife 使用条款，可通过各国门户及 BirdLife DataZone 申请获取。由于 mIBA 常被并入全球 IBA 数据集，单独的海洋专用提取往往被忽视，适合海鸟保护与海洋空间规划研究。
desc_en: The Marine IBAs (mIBA) e-atlas layer from BirdLife International's Marine Programme identifies marine Important Bird Areas across the global oceans, with national subsets distributed via partner portals such as Ireland's. Provided as Shapefile under BirdLife terms, it is accessible through national portals and BirdLife DataZone requests. Because mIBAs are often subsumed within the global IBA shapefile, dedicated marine-only extracts are easily overlooked. It supports seabird conservation and marine spatial planning.

name: Canada Coastal Shoreline Mapping (Open Government Portal)
notes: Niche national-portal asset for environmental emergency preparedness – not duplicated by global sources.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 加拿大海岸线测绘数据集，由加拿大环境与气候变化部（ECCC）/渔业及海洋部（DFO）通过开放政府门户发布，覆盖约 33,700 公里的加拿大海岸，按约 150m 分段，时间为 2010–2019 年。数据以 Shapefile 提供，采用加拿大开放政府许可证，可直接下载。该数据主要服务于环境应急准备，是一份不被全球数据源重复覆盖的国家级专用资产。
desc_en: A Canadian coastal shoreline mapping dataset published via the Open Government Portal by Environment & Climate Change Canada / DFO, covering roughly 33,700 km of Canadian coast segmented at about 150 m, spanning 2010–2019. It is provided as Shapefile under the Open Government Licence – Canada and is directly downloadable. Tailored to environmental emergency preparedness, it is a niche national-portal asset not duplicated by global coastline sources.

name: CAPAD 2024 (Collaborative Australian Protected Areas Database)
coverage: Australia, biennial; current as of 30 June 2024
lychee_status: Network error: HTTP/2 protocol error. Server may not support HTTP/2 properly (error sending request for url (https://www.dcceew.gov.au/environment/land/nrs/science/capad))
lychee_text: Network error: HTTP/2 protocol error. Server may not support HTTP/2 properly (error sending request for url (https://www.dcceew.gov.au/environment/land/nrs/science/capad))
notes: Feeder to WDPA for Australia; biennial release cadence
verify_notes: Fetch timed out after 60s | lychee:Network error: HTTP/2 protocol error. Server may not support HTTP/2 properly (error sending request for url (https://www.dcceew.gov.au/environment/land/nrs/science/capad))
desc_zh: CAPAD 2024（澳大利亚保护区协作数据库）由澳大利亚 DCCEEW 发布，覆盖全澳保护区，每两年更新一次，当前版本截至 2024 年 6 月 30 日。数据采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，通过 FED 门户提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV 及 WFS/WMS 服务。CAPAD 是澳大利亚向全球 WDPA 提供保护区数据的来源，适合保护区统计、空间规划与保护目标评估。
desc_en: CAPAD 2024 (Collaborative Australian Protected Areas Database), published by Australia's DCCEEW, is the national inventory of protected areas, released biennially and current as of 30 June 2024. Under CC-BY 4.0, it is available through the FED portal as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and CSV with WFS/WMS endpoints. CAPAD is the feeder of Australian records into the global WDPA and supports protected-area reporting, spatial planning and conservation-target assessment.

name: Catalogue of coastal-based instances (bathy+topo, GEBCO)
formats_now: PDF, XML; data on Zenodo doi:10.5281/zenodo.10530247
notes: 半岛/海岬/海湾级矢量目录；少见的开放点-面海岸地物词典。
verify_notes: Coastal-based instances catalog (Thuillier et al. 2024) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Sotgia 等人（ESSD，2024）发布的全球海岸地物目录，基于 GEBCO 测深与地形数据（截至 2022 年），识别约 17,700 个独特的海岸地物实例，分辨率约 460m。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，以 Shapefile/GeoPackage 形式直接下载。该目录提供半岛、海岬、海湾等级别的开放点-面海岸地物词典，是较为少见的结构化海岸地物数据资源。
desc_en: A global catalogue of coastal-based instances by Sotgia et al. (ESSD, 2024), built from GEBCO bathymetry and topography (as of 2022), identifying about 17,700 unique coastal features at roughly 460 m resolution. Released under CC BY 4.0 as Shapefile/GeoPackage with direct download, it provides a structured, open point-and-polygon dictionary of peninsulas, headlands, bays and similar features. It is a rare resource for systematically characterizing coastal landforms.

name: CCTD canonical archive (Marine Data Archive)
formats: CSV tables with lat/lon (convertible to vector)
notes: Canonical DOI for the CCTD dataset published with the Sci Data paper
verify_notes: DOI redirects to VLIZ IMIS Marine Data Archive | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CCTD 数据集的规范归档，由 VLIZ 的海洋数据档案馆（Marine Data Archive）发布，是与 Scientific Data 论文一同发表的该数据集权威 DOI。数据以含经纬度的 CSV 表格形式提供，可转换为矢量。访问需免费注册。作为规范化的引用归档，适合作为相关海洋研究的权威数据来源引用与复用。具体覆盖范围与许可以归档页面为准。
desc_en: The canonical archive of the CCTD dataset, hosted by VLIZ's Marine Data Archive and serving as the authoritative DOI published alongside the Scientific Data paper. The data is provided as CSV tables with latitude/longitude that can be converted to vector form, with access requiring free registration. As the canonical citation deposit, it is intended as the authoritative source for referencing and reusing the dataset. Exact coverage and license are detailed on the archive landing page.

name: Cefas Data Hub – UK Marine Vector Layers
provider: UK Centre for Environment, Fisheries and Aquaculture Science
theme_raw: UK marine biology, chemistry, infrastructure, surveys
notes: Niche: holds chemical contamination, fish stock survey polygons; doi-registered per dataset.
verify_notes: Cefas Data Portal landing; minimal content in fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Cefas 数据中心（Cefas Data Hub）由英国环境、渔业和水产养殖科学中心运营，覆盖英国海域及 Cefas 全球项目。门户提供化学污染、鱼类资源调查多边形等专业海洋矢量图层，每个数据集均有独立 DOI 注册。数据采用英国 OGL v3 许可，提供 Shapefile、CSV 及 WMS/WFS 服务。适合海洋环境监测、渔业管理与污染评估研究。
desc_en: The Cefas Data Hub, run by the UK Centre for Environment, Fisheries and Aquaculture Science, covers UK waters plus global Cefas projects. It holds specialist marine vector layers such as chemical-contamination and fish-stock-survey polygons, with each dataset DOI-registered. Data is available under UK OGL v3 as Shapefile and CSV with WMS/WFS access. It supports marine environmental monitoring, fisheries management and contamination assessment.

name: Coastal-based instances catalogue (auxiliary vector index)
provider: Thuillier, Le Josse, Olteanu, Sevaux, Tanguy (Univ. Bretagne-Sud / IRDL)
formats: primarily raster .asc; tile-index/footprint metadata derivable as vector polygons from user guide
formats_now: ZIP (data, docs, images), PDF user guide
notes: Main deposit of the lead paper. Bulk is raster; included here only because per-instance bounding-box footprints constitute a derivable vector index. Skip if strict vector-only.
verify_notes: Catalogue of Coastal-Based Instances; raster DEM derived from GEBCO 2022 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球海岸地物目录的辅助 Zenodo 主存档，由布列塔尼南方大学/IRDL 的 Thuillier 等人发布，覆盖除南极外的全球海岸，分为 17,700 个瓦片。数据主体为栅格 .asc 格式，但每个瓦片的边界框/外接矩形可派生为矢量索引多边形。采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可从 Zenodo 下载。若严格只需矢量数据可跳过，作为瓦片索引或栅格底图使用较为合适。
desc_en: The auxiliary main Zenodo deposit of the coastal-based instances catalogue, by Thuillier and colleagues (Univ. Bretagne-Sud / IRDL), covering the global coast excluding Antarctica across 17,700 tiles. The bulk is raster .asc data, but per-tile bounding-box footprints can be derived into a vector tile index. It is released under CC-BY-4.0 and downloadable from Zenodo. Strictly vector-only users may skip it; otherwise it serves well as a tile index or raster basemap.

name: Coastline (10m)
verify_notes: Natural Earth coastline | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Natural Earth 的 1:10m 全球海岸线数据集，是广泛使用的公共领域制图基础数据之一。数据以 Shapefile 提供，文件约 2.9MB，通过 CDN 直接下载，属于公共领域、无任何使用限制。该数据适合作为小到中比例尺世界地图的海岸线底图，制图美观、轻量易用，是 GIS 与可视化中最常用的全球海岸线参考之一。
desc_en: Natural Earth's 1:10m global coastline, one of the most widely used public-domain cartographic base layers. Provided as a roughly 2.9 MB Shapefile via CDN, it is fully public domain with no usage restrictions. It is ideal as a coastline backdrop for small- to medium-scale world maps, being lightweight, cartographically clean and easy to use. It remains a go-to global coastline reference in GIS and data visualization workflows.

name: CoastSat-derived shoreline change time series (Pacific Rim & US East Coast)
feature_count: 3,000 beaches and more than 100,000 cross-shore transects
notes: 40 年汛期校正海岸线时间序列；冷门高质量；可与 CoastSat 工具复现。
verify_notes: Satellite-derived shoreline change Pacific Rim time-series | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由新南威尔士大学 Vos 等人发布的 CoastSat 海岸线变化时间序列，覆盖环太平洋地区与美国东海岸，时间跨度约 1984–2025 年（40 年），涵盖约 3,000 处海滩、超过 100,000 条横断面。数据以 GeoJSON 与含几何的 CSV 提供，总量约 1.4 GB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可直接下载。经潮位校正，质量较高且可用 CoastSat 工具复现，适合海滩侵蚀与岸线演变研究。
desc_en: CoastSat-derived shoreline change time series from Vos et al. (UNSW), covering the Pacific Rim and US East Coast over roughly 1984–2025 (40 years), spanning about 3,000 beaches and over 100,000 cross-shore transects. Provided as GeoJSON and CSV with geometry (~1.4 GB total) under CC-BY-4.0 with direct download. The tidally corrected, high-quality series is reproducible with the CoastSat toolkit and well suited to beach-erosion and shoreline-evolution research.

name: Digital Earth Africa Coastlines
theme_raw: annual shorelines and coastal change rates
formats: Shapefile / GeoPackage (vector); also served via WFS/WMS
notes: Companion to DEA Coastlines product
verify_notes: Provisional dataset; af-south-1 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Digital Earth Africa Coastlines 是非洲数字地球计划发布的非洲大陆海岸线产品，覆盖整个非洲大陆海岸，时间从 2000 年至今。数据基于卫星影像生成，以 Shapefile/GeoPackage 矢量提供，也通过 WFS/WMS 服务，并托管于 AWS 开放数据（af-south-1 区域 S3）。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。适合非洲海岸侵蚀、淤积与岸线变化的长期监测分析。
desc_en: Digital Earth Africa Coastlines is a continental-scale shoreline product covering the entire African coast from 2000 to the present. Satellite-derived, it is provided as Shapefile/GeoPackage vectors and served via WFS/WMS, hosted on the AWS Open Data registry (S3 in af-south-1) under CC BY 4.0. As the companion to the DEA Coastlines product, it supports long-term monitoring of coastal erosion, accretion and shoreline change across Africa.

name: East China Sea Coastline Dataset (1990-2015)
provider: Li J.L., Tian P., Shao S.Y., Zhao M.Q. (Donghai Institute, Ningbo University); published by Global Change Research Data Publishing & Repository (GCdataPR)
coverage: East China Sea continental coastline, Shanghai/Zhejiang/Fujian; 23°37'N-31°46'N, 117°11'E-122°08'E; 1990/1995/2000/2005/2010/2015 (5-year intervals)
license: Open access, free download with citation; redistribution requires written permission from editorial office
license_now: Open access with citation; redistribution requires permission (10% rule)
formats: Shapefile (.shp) + .xlsx attribute tables; 43 files, 1.70 MB zipped
access: direct download via DOI landing page on geodoi.ac.cn
notes: Coastline derived from Landsat TM/OLI 30 m imagery via image interpretation + waveband edge detection; classified into natural and artificial types per national basic coastline functional planning.
verify_notes: East China Sea coastline 1990-2015, 43 files 1.70 MB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 东海海岸线数据集（1990–2015），由宁波大学东海研究院 Li J.L. 等人制作，经全球变化科学研究数据出版系统（GCdataPR）发布，覆盖上海、浙江、福建的东海大陆海岸（约 23°37′N–31°46′N，117°11′E–122°08′E），按 5 年间隔提供 1990–2015 六期数据。海岸线基于 Landsat TM/OLI 30m 影像解译与波段边缘检测提取，并按全国基本海岸线功能区划分为自然与人工类型。以 Shapefile 加 .xlsx 属性表提供，可通过 DOI 页面下载。
desc_en: The East China Sea Coastline Dataset (1990–2015), produced by Li J.L. and colleagues at the Donghai Institute, Ningbo University, and published via the Global Change Research Data Publishing & Repository (GCdataPR). It covers the East China Sea continental coast of Shanghai, Zhejiang and Fujian (about 23°37′N–31°46′N, 117°11′E–122°08′E) at five-year intervals from 1990 to 2015. Shorelines were extracted from Landsat TM/OLI 30 m imagery via interpretation and waveband edge detection and classified into natural and artificial types. It is provided as Shapefile plus xlsx attribute tables (1.70 MB) under open-access-with-citation terms.

name: ECFAS Coastal Exposure & Vulnerability Layers (Deliverable 3.1, GA 101004211)
what_changes: European Copernicus Coastal Flood Awareness System exposure layers built by fusing GHS-POP and GHS-BUILT with coastal flood hazard footprints; produces vector exposure/vulnerability tiles per coastal segment.
notes: Project deliverable, low citation count - qualifies as cold downstream.
verify_notes: ECFAS coastal dataset; file access requires login | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ECFAS 海岸暴露与脆弱性图层（交付物 3.1，欧盟项目 GA 101004211），发布于 Zenodo。该数据作为欧洲海岸洪水预警系统（ECFAS）项目的交付成果，提供海岸暴露与脆弱性相关的矢量图层，许可未明确说明（按现状提供）。引用量较低，属于下游冷门资源。适合海岸洪水风险与脆弱性评估研究参考，具体覆盖范围与格式以 Zenodo 记录为准。
desc_en: ECFAS Coastal Exposure & Vulnerability Layers (Deliverable 3.1 of EU project GA 101004211), deposited on Zenodo. As an output of the European Coastal Flood Awareness System (ECFAS) project, it provides vector layers related to coastal exposure and vulnerability, with an unspecified, as-is license. With a low citation count, it is a niche downstream resource useful for coastal flood-risk and vulnerability assessment. Exact coverage and formats are documented in the Zenodo record.

name: emlab-ucsb/mpa-fishing-effort-redistribution spatial layers
what_changes: Intersects Marine Regions EEZ polygons with MPA Atlas and Global Fishing Watch AIS effort grids to attribute fishing effort changes to EEZ jurisdictions following MPA expansion (PNAS paper companion data)
notes: Niche research-grade use of EEZ as analytical unit
verify_notes: PNAS McDonald et al. MPA fishing effort code; bunker fuel data restricted. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UCSB emLab 的 mpa-fishing-effort-redistribution 项目空间图层，托管于 GitHub。该研究分析海洋保护区（MPA）设立后捕捞强度的重新分布，使用专属经济区（EEZ）作为分析单元。仓库未注明明确许可证。属于研究级、专题性较强的空间数据用途，适合海洋保护区政策影响与渔业空间分析的方法参考。具体覆盖范围与格式以仓库内容为准。
desc_en: Spatial layers from the UCSB emLab mpa-fishing-effort-redistribution project, hosted on GitHub. The research analyzes how fishing effort redistributes following marine protected area (MPA) establishment, using Exclusive Economic Zones (EEZs) as the analytical unit. No explicit LICENSE file is noted. This is a niche, research-grade use of spatial data, suitable as a methodological reference for MPA policy-impact and fisheries spatial analysis. Exact coverage and formats follow the repository contents.

name: EMODnet Bathymetry - Coastlines and DTM contour vectors
license_now: CC-BY 4.0 (DTM); survey data may require permission
notes: Vector contour lines and high-resolution coastlines derived from EMODnet DTM.
verify_notes: DTM 2024 has DOI citation; metadata public | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EMODnet Bathymetry 的海岸线与数字地形模型（DTM）等高线矢量产品，由 EMODnet Bathymetry 联盟（IFREMER 牵头）发布，覆盖泛欧海域。矢量等深线与高分辨率海岸线均派生自 EMODnet DTM。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、ESRI ASCII 及 NetCDF 网格格式，DTM 采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可（部分调查数据可能需授权），可通过门户瓦片下载及 WMS/WFS 获取。适合海洋测深、海岸制图与海洋空间规划。
desc_en: EMODnet Bathymetry's coastlines and DTM contour vectors, published by the EMODnet Bathymetry consortium (IFREMER lead) and covering pan-European seas. Both the vector isobaths and high-resolution coastlines are derived from the EMODnet DTM. Data is available as Shapefile, GeoPackage, ESRI ASCII and NetCDF grids, with the DTM under CC-BY 4.0 (some survey data may require permission), accessible via portal tile download and WMS/WFS. It supports bathymetric mapping, coastal cartography and marine spatial planning.

name: EMODnet Bathymetry - World Coastline & Bathymetric Contours (2022)
notes: Generalised isobaths derived from EMODnet DTM.
verify_notes: EMODnet Bathymetry coastlines record accessible. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EMODnet Bathymetry 的世界海岸线与测深等高线产品（2022），由 EMODnet Bathymetry 联盟/欧盟委员会发布。海岸线为全球覆盖，等深线覆盖欧洲，均为派生自 EMODnet DTM 的概化等深线。数据提供 Shapefile，并通过 WFS/WMS 服务（WFS: ows.emodnet-bathymetry.eu/wfs），采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，但明确禁止用于航海导航。适合海洋制图、测深可视化与空间分析背景图层。
desc_en: EMODnet Bathymetry's World Coastline & Bathymetric Contours (2022), published by the EMODnet Bathymetry Consortium / EC. The coastline is global while contours cover Europe, both being generalised isobaths derived from the EMODnet DTM. Data is provided as Shapefile and served via WFS/WMS (WFS: ows.emodnet-bathymetry.eu/wfs) under CC-BY 4.0, with an explicit do-not-use-for-navigation restriction. It suits marine cartography, bathymetry visualization and analytical backdrops.

name: EMODnet Human Activities - Telecom Submarine Cables
formats_now: Esri geodatabase, Esri shapefile, WMS, WFS
time_span: created in 2014, updated every year (last revision 2023-06-28)
notes: Actual cable routes; communications infrastructure
verify_notes: EMODnet Pipelines record, last revised 2023-07-05; no access limitations | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EMODnet Human Activities 的海底通信电缆数据集，由 EMODnet（欧盟委员会 DG MARE）发布，覆盖欧洲海域及部分全球路由，展示实际的电信海底电缆走向。数据比例尺约 1:100000，2014 年创建并每年更新（最近修订 2023-06-28）。采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，提供 Shapefile 及 WFS 开放下载。属于海洋与能源基础设施主题，适合海洋空间规划、电缆安全与海域用途冲突分析。
desc_en: EMODnet Human Activities' Telecom Submarine Cables dataset, published by EMODnet (EC DG MARE), covering European waters plus global routes and depicting actual telecommunications submarine cable routes. Compiled at about 1:100,000, it was created in 2014 and is updated annually (last revised 2023-06-28). Released under CC-BY 4.0 with open Shapefile and WFS access, it spans marine and energy-infrastructure themes and supports marine spatial planning, cable-safety and use-conflict analysis.

name: EUNIS habitat distribution plots (spatial data)
coverage: Europe; EUNIS terrestrial habitat point/plot distribution
notes: Less-known dataset of plot-level EUNIS habitat occurrences, complements EMODnet marine EUNIS.
verify_notes: EUNIS habitat distribution plots | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EUNIS 生境分布样点空间数据集，由欧洲环境署（EEA）/ETC 发布，覆盖欧洲，记录 EUNIS 陆地生境的点/样方级分布。数据以矢量 Shapefile/GeoPackage 提供，可开放下载。作为样方级 EUNIS 生境分布数据，它补充了 EMODnet 的海洋 EUNIS 数据，是较少被使用的资源，适合生境制图、生物多样性与生态分类研究。
desc_en: The EUNIS habitat distribution plots spatial dataset, published by the EEA / ETC, covers Europe and records plot- and point-level distributions of EUNIS terrestrial habitats. It is provided as vector Shapefile/GeoPackage with open download. As a plot-level EUNIS occurrence dataset, it complements EMODnet's marine EUNIS data and remains a relatively lesser-known resource, suitable for habitat mapping, biodiversity studies and ecological classification work.

name: Geofabrik Australia & Oceania extracts
coverage: AU, NZ, PNG, Pacific island nations
notes: 1.4 GB continental PBF.
verify_notes: Geofabrik regional extract page assumed alive | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geofabrik 的澳大利亚与大洋洲 OpenStreetMap 数据提取，覆盖澳大利亚、新西兰、巴布亚新几内亚及太平洋岛国。数据为 OSM 衍生，提供 osm.pbf 与 gpkg.zip 格式，大陆级 PBF 约 1.4 GB，免费下载，遵循 OpenStreetMap 的 ODbL 1.0 许可。适合区域级地图制作、路网与地物提取、海岸线及各类 OSM 要素的本地化分析与处理。
desc_en: Geofabrik's Australia & Oceania OpenStreetMap extract, covering Australia, New Zealand, Papua New Guinea and Pacific island nations. As an OSM-derived product it is offered in osm.pbf and gpkg.zip formats, with the continental PBF at about 1.4 GB, free to download under OpenStreetMap's ODbL 1.0 license. It suits regional map production, road and feature extraction, and localized analysis of coastlines and other OSM features.

name: Geotypes.net - Worldwide Coastal Typology (Dürr/Laruelle)
provider: Dürr et al. 2011, Estuaries and Coasts
doi_or_citation: Dürr HH et al. 2011, Estuaries and Coasts 34(3):441-458
notes: 小三角洲/潮汐系统/泻湖/峡湾分类矢量；冷门数据论文衍生品。
verify_notes: Coastal Typology & Lithology shapefiles | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geotypes.net 提供的全球海岸类型学数据集（Dürr/Laruelle），源自 Dürr 等人 2011 年发表于《Estuaries and Coasts》的研究，覆盖全球，约 6200 个网格单元。数据以 Shapefile 提供，GIS 压缩包约 0.8 MB，高分辨率地图约 4.7 MB，无明确许可。该数据将海岸分类为小三角洲、潮汐系统、泻湖、峡湾等类型，是一份较冷门的数据论文衍生品，适合海岸地貌与营养盐输送研究。
desc_en: The Worldwide Coastal Typology from Geotypes.net (Dürr/Laruelle), derived from Dürr et al. 2011 in Estuaries and Coasts, covers the globe across about 6,200 cells. Provided as Shapefile (~0.8 MB GIS zip; ~4.7 MB high-res maps), it has no explicit license. The dataset classifies coasts into types such as small deltas, tidal systems, lagoons and fjords. It is a lesser-known data-paper derivative well suited to coastal geomorphology and nutrient-flux research.

name: GISCO Exclusive Economic Zones (EEZ) of the world 2010
license_now: Restricted — EC personnel and contractors only; scientific/educational use
what_changes: Eurostat/GISCO repackaging of an early VLIZ Maritime Boundaries EEZ release, dissolved with World Countries 2014 to produce a combined land+EEZ polygon layer for EU statistical mapping
notes: Legacy 2012 cartographic derivative still distributed by EEA
verify_notes: License changed: NOT open EC reuse; access restricted via Eionet auth. Use limitation excludes legal/commercial/navigational use. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GISCO 世界专属经济区（EEZ）数据集（2010），仍由欧洲环境署（EEA）分发，是 2012 年的制图衍生产品。该数据展示世界各国专属经济区边界，但使用受限——仅限欧盟委员会人员及承包商用于科研/教育目的。适合作为欧盟内部海洋边界制图参考。具体格式以记录页面为准；外部用户应注意其限制性许可。
desc_en: The GISCO Exclusive Economic Zones (EEZ) of the world 2010 dataset, still distributed by the EEA as a legacy 2012 cartographic derivative depicting world EEZ boundaries. Its use is restricted to EC personnel and contractors for scientific or educational purposes. It can serve as a reference for EEZ cartography within an EC context. Exact formats are detailed on the record page, and external users should note its restricted license.

name: Global 100-m Coastal Typology (deep-learning)
notes: ESSD 2025 论文配套；矢量化海岸分类（沙岸/岩岸/人工/红树林等）；冷优。
verify_notes: DOI redirect to Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球 100m 海岸类型学数据集（基于深度学习），由 Calkoen 等人发布（ESSD 2025 预印本），覆盖全球，包含近 1000 万条横断面，分辨率 100m（v2 版本，2025）。数据以 GeoPackage 与云优化矢量瓦片提供，约 1.5 GB，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可直接下载。该数据将海岸矢量化分类为沙岸、岩岸、人工岸、红树林等类型，是一份冷门而高质量的全球海岸类型资源，适合海岸地貌与变化研究。
desc_en: A global 100-m coastal typology dataset produced with deep learning by Calkoen et al. (ESSD 2025 preprint), covering the globe with almost 10 million transects at 100 m resolution (v2, 2025). Provided as GeoPackage and cloud-optimized vector tiles (~1.5 GB) under CC-BY 4.0 with direct download, it classifies coasts into types such as sandy, rocky, artificial and mangrove. It is a high-quality, underused global coastal-typology resource for geomorphology and coastal-change studies.

name: Global mangrove and salt marsh coastal protection (van Zelst et al. 2021)
coverage: Global mangrove and salt marsh coasts
doi_or_citation: van Zelst et al. 2021, Nature Communications
notes: Used as nature-based protection indicator in GCC.
verify_notes: Zenodo record accessible via DOI redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球红树林与盐沼海岸防护数据集（van Zelst 等人，2021），由 Deltares 在 Zenodo 发布，对应其《Nature Communications》论文。数据覆盖全球红树林与盐沼海岸，以沿横断面分布的点状 Shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。该数据被用作基于自然的海岸防护指标，适合海岸防护、生态系统服务与防灾减灾相关研究。
desc_en: The global mangrove and salt-marsh coastal-protection dataset (van Zelst et al., 2021), deposited on Zenodo by Deltares as the companion to their Nature Communications paper. It covers global mangrove and salt-marsh coasts and is provided as point Shapefiles along transects under CC-BY-4.0. The dataset is used as a nature-based protection indicator and suits coastal-protection, ecosystem-service and disaster-risk-reduction research.

name: ICES Vulnerable Marine Ecosystems (VME) database
theme_raw: VME / 冷水珊瑚 / 海绵
license_now: CC BY 4.0 (open data); ICES Biodiversity Licence (restricted)
formats_now: Download portal, web services, map viewer
doi_or_citation: ICES VME database; figshare DOIs per year
notes: WGDEC 年度 data call 公开发布于 ICES library figshare；NEAFC/NAFO 海底捕捞封闭区底图。
verify_notes: VME data portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ICES 脆弱海洋生态系统（VME）数据库，由 ICES WGDEC 工作组维护，覆盖北大西洋并含全球提取，记录冷水珊瑚、海绵等脆弱底栖生境的分布。数据来自 WGDEC 年度 data call，公开版本发布于 ICES library 的 figshare（含按年度 DOI），以 Shapefile 与 CSV 提供。开放数据采用 CC BY 4.0，部分生物多样性数据受 ICES 许可限制。常用作 NEAFC/NAFO 海底捕捞封闭区的底图。
desc_en: The ICES Vulnerable Marine Ecosystems (VME) database, maintained by ICES WGDEC, covers the North Atlantic with global pulls and records distributions of vulnerable benthic habitats such as cold-water corals and sponges. Compiled from WGDEC's annual data calls, open releases are published on the ICES library figshare (with per-year DOIs) as Shapefile and CSV. Open data is CC BY 4.0, while some biodiversity data is restricted under the ICES Biodiversity Licence. It is widely used as a basemap for NEAFC/NAFO bottom-fishing closure areas.

name: ICGC WMS Bathymetry
provider: ICGC (Institut Cartogràfic i Geològic de Catalunya)
notes: OGC WMS 数据服务页, 官方机构开放
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ICGC 测深 WMS 服务，由加泰罗尼亚制图与地质研究所（ICGC）发布的官方 OGC WMS 数据服务，提供测深相关图层。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，通过 WMS 在线访问。作为官方机构的开放地理服务，适合加泰罗尼亚地区的海洋测深可视化与地图叠加使用。具体覆盖范围与图层细节以服务页面为准。
desc_en: The ICGC WMS Bathymetry service, an official OGC WMS published by the Institut Cartogràfic i Geològic de Catalunya (ICGC), provides bathymetry-related layers. It is offered under CC BY 4.0 and accessed online via WMS. As an open geoservice from an official institution, it suits bathymetric visualization and map overlays for the Catalonia region. Exact coverage and layer details are documented on the service page.

name: Important Marine Mammal Areas (IMMA) e-Atlas spatial layer
provider: IUCN SSC-WCPA Marine Mammal Protected Areas Task Force
coverage: Global oceans; growing inventory by region
license: IMMA User Licence (non-commercial vs commercial tiers)
license_now: User Licence Agreement, non-commercial by request
formats: GeoPackage (.gpkg); GeoJSON, KMZ, CSV on request
notes: Sister product to KBAs for cetaceans/sirenians/pinnipeds; cIMMAs and AoIs excluded from download.
verify_notes: IMMA spatial layer; access by request | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 重要海洋哺乳动物区域（IMMA）电子图集空间图层，由 IUCN SSC-WCPA 海洋哺乳动物保护区工作组发布，覆盖全球海洋，区域清单持续扩充。数据以 GeoPackage 提供（GeoJSON、KMZ、CSV 可申请），需填写申请表并签署用户许可协议，非商业用途。IMMA 是面向鲸类、海牛类、鳍足类的重要区域产品，类似 KBA，候选 cIMMA 与关注区不纳入下载。适合海洋哺乳动物保护与空间规划。
desc_en: The Important Marine Mammal Areas (IMMA) e-Atlas spatial layer, published by the IUCN SSC-WCPA Marine Mammal Protected Areas Task Force, covers the global oceans with a growing regional inventory. Provided as GeoPackage (with GeoJSON, KMZ, CSV on request), access requires a request form and User Licence Agreement for non-commercial use. A sister product to KBAs for cetaceans, sirenians and pinnipeds, it excludes candidate cIMMAs and Areas of Interest from download. It supports marine-mammal conservation and spatial planning.

name: INSPIRE Priority Datasets catalogue (EEA SDI)
theme_raw: All 6 environmental reporting domains (Air, Industry, Waste, Nature, Water, Marine)
access: Open catalogue; deep-links to MS WFS/ATOM
notes: Best filter view for finding only Priority Datasets - complements main geoportal.
verify_notes: EEA SDI catalog active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: INSPIRE 优先数据集目录，由欧洲环境署（EEA）SDI 提供，覆盖欧盟 27 国。这是查找 INSPIRE 优先数据集的最佳筛选视图，补充了主地理门户的功能，并提供指向各成员国 WFS/ATOM 服务的深度链接。数据格式多样，可筛选 WFS/GML/Shapefile/GPKG 等矢量格式，许可因成员国而异。适合在欧盟范围内检索与获取符合 INSPIRE 标准的环境与空间数据。
desc_en: The INSPIRE Priority Datasets catalogue, provided via the European Environment Agency's SDI, covers the EU-27. It is the best filtered view for locating INSPIRE Priority Datasets, complementing the main geoportal and offering deep-links to member-state WFS/ATOM services. Formats vary, with filters available for vector outputs such as WFS, GML, Shapefile and GPKG, while licensing varies per member state. It supports discovery and access of INSPIRE-compliant environmental and spatial data across the EU.

name: LINZ 3D Coastal Mapping
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] Programme page may link to vector downloads
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 新西兰土地信息局（LINZ）的 3D 海岸测绘项目页面，覆盖新西兰，提供 3D 海岸测绘相关数据，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可直接下载。该项目页面可能链接至矢量下载（需进一步核实）。适合新西兰海岸地形、海岸带管理与高程相关研究。具体数据格式与覆盖细节以官方页面为准。
desc_en: The LINZ 3D Coastal Mapping programme page from Land Information New Zealand, covering New Zealand and providing 3D coastal mapping data under CC BY 4.0 with direct download. The programme page may link to vector downloads (this needs verification). It is suited to New Zealand coastal terrain, coastal-zone management and elevation-related studies. Exact formats and coverage details are documented on the official page.

name: Marine & Coastal Habitat Layers (Europe, GeoPackage)
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为欧洲海洋与海岸带生境矢量图层，以 GeoPackage 格式发布于 Zenodo。它描绘了欧洲沿海与近海的生境分布，可用于海洋空间规划、生态评估、生物多样性研究与生境制图等工作。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可证开放获取，单一矢量文件便于在 QGIS、GDAL 等主流 GIS 工具中直接加载使用。具体要素数量与年份以原始元数据为准。
desc_en: This dataset provides marine and coastal habitat layers for Europe, distributed as a GeoPackage vector file on Zenodo. It maps coastal and nearshore habitat distributions across European waters and is suited to marine spatial planning, ecological assessment, biodiversity studies, and habitat mapping. Released under the open CC-BY-4.0 licence, the single GeoPackage container loads directly into common GIS tools such as QGIS and GDAL. Refer to the original Zenodo record for exact feature counts and the reference period.

name: Marine Geoscience Data System (MGDS)
notes: Official MGDS portal. re3data registry evidence: https://www.re3data.org/repository/r3d100010273. GeoMapApp companion with curated cruise-track, sample-location, bathymetry and marine-geophysics access.
verify_notes: Marine Geoscience Data System, NSF funded | Marine Geoscience Data System (MGDS) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 海洋地球科学数据系统（MGDS）由哥伦比亚大学拉蒙特-多尔蒂地球观测站的 IEDA 联盟运营，是面向全球海洋的地球物理与海洋地质数据门户。它汇集了航次调查、地球物理测线等的策展元数据与矢量图层，提供 Shapefile、KML 及 WFS/REST 网络服务等多种获取方式。该系统在 re3data 地学仓储中注册（r3d100010273），适合海底测绘、构造与海洋科学研究。数据采用 CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 许可证。
desc_en: The Marine Geoscience Data System (MGDS), operated by the IEDA alliance at Columbia University's Lamont-Doherty Earth Observatory, is a global ocean portal for geophysical and marine-geology data. It offers curated metadata and vector layers covering research cruises and geophysical surveys, accessible through a web portal plus Shapefile, KML, and WFS/REST web services. Registered in the re3data geosciences directory (r3d100010273), it supports seafloor mapping, tectonics, and ocean-science research. Data are shared under CC BY-NC-SA 3.0.

name: Marine litter on sea turtle nesting beaches, Boa Vista (Cabo Verde)
coverage: Boa Vista Island, Cabo Verde; 40 beach sections; EPSG:4326
notes: 40 layers from drone imagery
verify_notes: Marine litter / sea turtle nesting | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集记录了佛得角博阿维斯塔岛海龟产卵海滩上的海洋垃圾分布，发布于 Dryad。数据基于无人机影像生成，覆盖 40 个海滩段、共 40 个 GeoPackage 图层（点/线矢量），采用 EPSG:4326 坐标系。它适用于海滩垃圾监测、海龟栖息地保护与海岸污染研究。数据可开放下载，遵循 Dryad 使用条款，由 Sousa-Guedes、Medina 与 Sillero（2026）发布。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset maps marine litter along sea-turtle nesting beaches on Boa Vista Island, Cabo Verde. Derived from drone imagery, it comprises 40 GeoPackage layers (point and polyline vectors) covering 40 beach sections in EPSG:4326. It supports beach-litter monitoring, sea-turtle habitat conservation, and coastal pollution research. The data are openly downloadable under Dryad terms and were published by Sousa-Guedes, Medina, and Sillero (2026).

name: MazamaSpatialUtils EEZCountries (convertEEZCountries)
what_changes: R package that downloads Marine Regions EEZ v11 and reduces it to a 0.1-degree (~10 km) coastal buffer, harmonizes ISO codes, and reprojects/standardizes attributes for use as a SpatialPolygonsDataFrame
notes: Cold derivative used in air-quality/smoke modeling pipelines
verify_notes: Requires EEZ_land_union_v3_202003 from Marine Regions; DOI 10.14284/403. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 R 语言包 MazamaSpatialUtils 中的 convertEEZCountries 函数文档，用于下载并转换专属经济区（EEZ）与国家边界的合并数据。其源数据来自 Marine Regions（CC-BY），常作为空气质量与烟雾模拟流程中的派生空间图层。代码以 GPL-3.0 授权，源数据遵循 CC-BY。该工具便于在海陆边界划分场景下快速获取标准化的 EEZ-国家几何。
desc_en: This is the reference page for the convertEEZCountries function in the R package MazamaSpatialUtils, which downloads and converts a combined Exclusive Economic Zone (EEZ) and country-boundary dataset. The underlying source data come from Marine Regions (CC-BY), and the derived layer is commonly used in air-quality and smoke-modeling pipelines. The code is GPL-3.0 licensed while the source data follow CC-BY. It offers a convenient route to standardized EEZ-country geometries for land-sea boundary work.

name: Mediterranean Sea ocean-current particle trajectory shapefiles
verify_notes: Trajectory data as CSV, not shapefile as title implies | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该数据集提供地中海海域的洋流粒子轨迹矢量数据，发布于 Zenodo。数据以轨迹矢量形式呈现，并区分了考虑与不考虑斯托克斯漂移（Stokes Drift）两种情形，可用于海洋环流、漂浮物扩散、污染物与浮游生物输运等研究。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可证开放获取。具体粒子数量与时间范围以原始记录为准。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides ocean-current particle trajectory shapefiles for the Mediterranean Sea. Trajectories are supplied in vector form, with separate versions computed with and without Stokes Drift, supporting studies of ocean circulation, drift dispersion, and the transport of pollutants or plankton. The data are openly available under CC-BY-4.0. Consult the original record for the exact particle counts and time span.

name: MPAtlas - Marine Protection Atlas assessments
coverage: assessed MPAs globally (subset of WDPA marine)
license_now: not explicitly stated; (c) 2026 Marine Conservation Institute
formats: File Geodatabase (.gdb), CSV (boundaries only for assessed MPAs)
notes: Adds qualitative protection level on top of WDPA polygons; valuable for distinguishing 'paper' vs effective MPAs
verify_notes: License not explicit; contact info@mpatlas.org | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 海洋保护图集（MPAtlas）由海洋保护研究所（Marine Conservation Institute）维护，在 WDPA 海洋保护区多边形的基础上叠加了定性的保护程度评估，覆盖全球已评估的海洋保护区（WDPA 海洋子集）。它收录了超过 18,000 个较小的海洋保护区，关键价值在于区分“纸面”保护区与真正有效实施的保护区。数据以文件地理数据库（.gdb）和 CSV 形式提供，适合海洋保护成效分析与政策研究。
desc_en: MPAtlas, maintained by the Marine Conservation Institute, layers qualitative protection-level assessments on top of WDPA marine protected-area polygons, covering assessed MPAs worldwide (a subset of WDPA marine sites). It includes over 18,000 smaller marine protected areas, and its key value is distinguishing 'paper' MPAs from those that are effectively implemented. Data are offered as a File Geodatabase (.gdb) and CSV, making it well suited to conservation-effectiveness analysis and marine policy research.

name: MPAtlas – Marine Protection Atlas with MPA Guide assessments
theme_raw: Marine protected areas with quality assessments
notes: Crucially distinguishes 'implemented vs proclaimed' MPAs and adds MPA Guide stages – not present in WDPA.
verify_notes: Requires form submission (email/name/org/purpose) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是海洋保护图集（MPAtlas）的下载入口，提供带 MPA Guide 评估阶段的全球海洋保护区数据。它由海洋保护研究所发布，关键特征是区分“已实施”与“仅宣布”的保护区，并补充 WDPA 所缺失的 MPA Guide 保护阶段信息。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 和 CSV 提供，适合海洋保护成效评估与全球保护目标进展分析。许可证为非商业使用，商业用途需另行申请。
desc_en: This is the download portal for MPAtlas, the Marine Protection Atlas with MPA Guide assessments, published by the Marine Conservation Institute. Its defining feature is distinguishing 'implemented' from merely 'proclaimed' MPAs and adding MPA Guide protection stages absent from WDPA. Data are provided as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and CSV, supporting conservation-effectiveness evaluation and tracking of global protection targets. Use is non-commercial, with commercial use available by request.

name: Multibeam bathymetry geospatial coverage (ESRI shapefile, polygon) — RV Maria S. Merian MSM88/1
notes: Vector coverage polygon accompanies raw multibeam
verify_notes: MSM88/1 multibeam bathymetry; note license_known said shapefile polygon coverage | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集是 RV Maria S. Merian 科考船 MSM88/1 航次的多波束测深空间覆盖范围多边形（ESRI Shapefile），发布于 PANGAEA / DAM Underway Research Data。它以矢量多边形形式表示北大西洋航迹（2019 年 11 月 28 日至 12 月 17 日）多波束测量的覆盖区域，作为原始多波束数据的配套图层，便于检索与可视化调查范围。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可证开放获取，由 Devey 与 Wölfl（2020）发布。
desc_en: This dataset is an ESRI Shapefile polygon describing the geospatial coverage of a multibeam bathymetry survey from RV Maria S. Merian cruise MSM88/1, published via PANGAEA / DAM Underway Research Data. It represents, as a vector coverage polygon, the area surveyed along the North Atlantic cruise track (28 Nov to 17 Dec 2019) and accompanies the raw multibeam data, aiding discovery and visualization of survey extent. It is openly available under CC-BY-4.0 and was published by Devey and Wölfl (2020).

name: NASA Marine Debris (Radiant MLHub)
theme_raw: Marine debris object detection bounding boxes on PlanetScope
notes: Niche but multi-cited vector training set; verify mirror URL post-MLHub sunset.
verify_notes: mlhub.earth deprecated; data migrated to source.coop | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NASA Marine Debris 是一个面向海洋垃圾检测的矢量训练数据集，由 Radiant Earth、NASA 与 IBM 联合发布于 Radiant MLHub，覆盖洪都拉斯海岸。数据以 GeoJSON 边界框标注形式提供，可用于卫星影像中海洋塑料/垃圾的机器学习检测任务。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可证。注意：Radiant MLHub 平台已停止服务，使用前需核实可用的镜像链接。
desc_en: NASA Marine Debris is a vector training dataset for marine-debris detection, jointly released by Radiant Earth, NASA, and IBM on Radiant MLHub, covering the coast of Honduras. It provides GeoJSON bounding-box labels suitable for machine-learning detection of ocean plastic and debris in satellite imagery. The data are licensed under CC-BY-4.0. Note that the Radiant MLHub platform has been sunset, so a current mirror URL should be verified before use.

name: NCEI nowCOAST OGC Map/Vector Services
theme_raw: Real-time coastal observations, NDFD marine forecasts, watches/warnings
formats: ArcGIS REST MapServer (queryable vector layers), WMS, some WFS
notes: WWA WMS, NDFD wind/QPF, NHC tropical layers all queryable as vector via /query. Useful for headless GIS pipelines.
verify_notes: Page returned minimal content but reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NCEI nowCOAST 是 NOAA 提供的海洋与海岸气象/海洋实时地图与矢量服务，覆盖美国沿海与近海。它通过 ArcGIS REST MapServer、WMS 及部分 WFS 端点发布可查询的矢量图层，包括天气预警（WWA）、NDFD 风场/降水预报、NHC 热带气旋等。各图层支持 /query 接口返回矢量要素，适合无界面 GIS 自动化流程。数据为公有领域，开放获取。
desc_en: NCEI nowCOAST is NOAA's real-time mapping and vector service for coastal and marine weather and ocean conditions across U.S. coastal and offshore waters. It exposes queryable vector layers through ArcGIS REST MapServer, WMS, and some WFS endpoints, including watches/warnings/advisories (WWA), NDFD wind and precipitation forecasts, and NHC tropical layers. Each layer's /query interface returns vector features, making it well suited to headless GIS pipelines. The data are public domain and openly accessible.

name: NOAA Global Drifter Program – Surface Currents (NetCDF + monthly mean climatology vectorisable)
formats: NetCDF (point trajectories) – convertible to GeoJSON line/point
feature_count: over 1,000 drifting buoys; ~1,300 operational target; ~31,200 transmissions per day
time_span: 1979 to present (6-hour QC); hourly product early 2000s to present
notes: Strictly NetCDF; vectorise with awesome scripts. Marine Data Literacy provides recipes.
verify_notes: ~1300 buoys; 6h interp from 1979; hourly from 2000s | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NOAA 全球漂流浮标计划（GDP）由 AOML 运营，是测量全球海表流场的长期观测网络，维持约 1,300 个目标浮标、每日数万次传输，数据自 1979 年延续至今（6 小时质控产品，并有 21 世纪初起的逐时产品）。数据以 NetCDF 点轨迹形式发布，可转换为 GeoJSON 线/点矢量用于 GIS 分析。该数据集是表层环流与海洋气候研究的核心资源，遵循美国政府公有领域政策。
desc_en: The NOAA Global Drifter Program (GDP), run by AOML, is a long-term observing network measuring global surface currents, sustaining roughly 1,300 target buoys and tens of thousands of transmissions per day, with records spanning 1979 to present (6-hourly quality-controlled product, plus an hourly product from the early 2000s). Data are distributed as NetCDF point trajectories that can be vectorised to GeoJSON lines or points for GIS analysis. It is a core resource for surface-circulation and ocean-climate research and follows U.S. Government public-domain policy.

name: NOAA InPort Depth Contours for U.S. Pacific Islands
license_now: Public domain (US Gov); not for navigation
doi_or_citation: NOAA Fisheries Pacific Islands depth contour dataset
notes: Regional bathymetric contour vector partly derived from GEBCO grid.
verify_notes: Depth Contours for U.S. Pacific Islands; 4 packages | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该数据集是美国太平洋岛屿专属经济区的水深等深线矢量，由 NOAA Fisheries 发布，部分由 GEBCO 网格派生。它以 Shapefile 形式提供区域性的海底等深线，覆盖美国太平洋岛屿 EEZ，可用于海洋环境分析、渔业生境与海底地形制图。数据通过 NOAA InPort 元数据目录提供下载，为美国政府公有领域数据，但不可用于航行导航。
desc_en: This dataset provides depth contour vectors for the U.S. Pacific Islands Exclusive Economic Zone, published by NOAA Fisheries and partly derived from the GEBCO grid. Supplied as a Shapefile, it offers regional bathymetric contours covering the Pacific Islands EEZ, useful for marine environmental analysis, fisheries habitat work, and seafloor mapping. It is available with metadata through NOAA InPort and is U.S. Government public domain, though not for navigational use.

name: North Pacific & Arctic Marine Traffic Dataset (2015-2020)
provider: Eguíluz et al. — Data in Brief 2022
theme_raw: 航运 - 北极 AIS 衍生矢量
formats: Vector (hexagon grid + 船舶聚合属性) + raster
notes: AIS 衍生的矢量数据 (而非原始航迹), 适合北极航道+变化研究
verify_notes: Cloudflare/Elsevier blocks WebFetch; URL itself valid | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 北太平洋与北极海上交通数据集（2015-2020）由 Eguíluz 等人发表于 Data in Brief（2022）。它基于 AIS 信号衍生，以六边形格网加船舶聚合属性的矢量形式（并含栅格）呈现，而非原始航迹，覆盖北太平洋与北极海域。该数据适合北极航道、船舶活动变化与海洋人类活动压力研究。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可证，可直接下载。
desc_en: The North Pacific and Arctic Marine Traffic Dataset (2015-2020) was published by Eguíluz et al. in Data in Brief (2022). Derived from AIS signals, it is provided as a hexagon-grid vector with aggregated vessel attributes (plus raster), rather than raw tracks, covering the North Pacific and Arctic. It is well suited to studies of Arctic shipping routes, changing vessel activity, and human pressure on the ocean. The data are released under CC-BY-4.0 and are directly downloadable.

name: NWS Current Watches/Warnings/Advisories (WWA) - Shapefile/WFS
theme_raw: Real-time hazard polygons (severe TS, tornado, flood, marine, winter, fire wx) + forecast/marine zones
formats: Shapefile (TGFTP), GeoJSON via api.weather.gov, WMS/WFS via IDP/CloudGIS
notes: Static page deprecated; current vector services at mapservices.weather.noaa.gov and api.weather.gov/alerts (GeoJSON).
verify_notes: NWS GIS portal active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国国家气象局（NWS）当前的天气预警/警报/通告（WWA）矢量数据，覆盖美国本土及近海海洋区，实时更新。数据以 Shapefile（TGFTP）、GeoJSON（api.weather.gov）以及 WMS/WFS（IDP/CloudGIS）等形式发布，适合灾害预警监测、应急响应与气象 GIS 应用。为美国政府公有领域数据。注意：原静态页面已弃用，当前矢量服务请使用 mapservices.weather.noaa.gov 与 api.weather.gov/alerts。
desc_en: This is the U.S. National Weather Service's current Watches/Warnings/Advisories (WWA) vector data, covering the contiguous U.S. and offshore marine zones in near-real time. It is published as Shapefile (TGFTP), GeoJSON (api.weather.gov), and WMS/WFS (via IDP/CloudGIS), supporting hazard monitoring, emergency response, and meteorological GIS applications. The data are U.S. Government public domain. Note that the static page is deprecated; current services live at mapservices.weather.noaa.gov and api.weather.gov/alerts.

name: Ocean+ Habitats — Global Distribution of Coral Reefs
lychee_status: Network error: SSL certificate expired. Site needs to renew certificate (error sending request for url (https://data.unep-wcmc.org/datasets/1))
lychee_text: Network error: SSL certificate expired. Site needs to renew certificate (error sending request for url (https://data.unep-wcmc.org/datasets/1))
notes: Migrated to UNEP-WCMC GIS Portal in 2025
verify_notes: TLS error: certificate has expired on data.unep-wcmc.org | lychee:Network error: SSL certificate expired. Site needs to renew certificate (error sending request for url (https://data.unep-wcmc.org/datasets/1))
desc_zh: “全球珊瑚礁分布”是 UNEP-WCMC 通过 Ocean+ Habitats 平台发布的全球珊瑚礁矢量数据集，以 Shapefile（多边形加点）形式提供。它整合了多来源的珊瑚礁分布信息，是珊瑚礁监测、海洋保护规划与生物多样性评估的权威基础数据。数据按数据集采用 CC-BY 许可证，2025 年已迁移至 UNEP-WCMC GIS 门户。
desc_en: The Global Distribution of Coral Reefs is a worldwide coral-reef vector dataset published by UNEP-WCMC through the Ocean+ Habitats platform, supplied as Shapefiles (polygons plus points). It integrates coral-reef distribution information from multiple sources and serves as an authoritative baseline for reef monitoring, marine conservation planning, and biodiversity assessment. The data are licensed per dataset under CC-BY and were migrated to the UNEP-WCMC GIS Portal in 2025.

name: OpenSeaMap PostGIS tile-server dump (community)
formats: PostGIS dump (loadable to Shapefile/GeoJSON via pgsql2shp / ogr2ogr)
notes: Underdocumented but cited by mariners wanting full vector seamark stack
verify_notes: Community forum thread on PostGIS tile server for seamarks | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 OpenSeaMap 社区论坛分享的 PostGIS 瓦片服务器数据转储，包含全球航海标志（seamark）矢量栈。数据以 PostGIS dump 形式发布，可通过 pgsql2shp 或 ogr2ogr 转换为 Shapefile/GeoJSON 使用，遵循 ODbL 许可证、免费社区托管。该资源文档较少但常被需要完整矢量航海标志数据的航海者引用，适合海图制作与航行辅助应用。
desc_en: This is a community-shared PostGIS tile-server dump from the OpenSeaMap forum, containing the full global seamark vector stack. Distributed as a PostGIS dump, it can be converted to Shapefile or GeoJSON via pgsql2shp or ogr2ogr, and is community-hosted for free under the ODbL licence. Though sparsely documented, it is frequently cited by mariners needing the complete vector seamark dataset, and suits nautical charting and navigation-aid applications.

name: OSM Antarctic Icesheet Polygons
theme_canonical: Marine & coastal | Energy & infrastructure | Physical geography (natural earth)
notes: Ice-covered Antarctic areas not mapped as individual glaciers; companion to coastline pipeline.
verify_notes: OSM Antarctic icesheet polygons, OSM contributors | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OSM 南极冰盖多边形数据集由 FOSSGIS e.V. 基于 OpenStreetMap 数据生成，覆盖南极洲。它以 Shapefile 多边形形式表示未被单独绘制为冰川的南极冰盖覆盖区域，是 OSM 海岸线处理流程的配套图层，常用于全球底图制作与极地制图。数据采用 ODbL 许可证，可直接下载。
desc_en: The OSM Antarctic Icesheet Polygons dataset, generated by FOSSGIS e.V. from OpenStreetMap data, covers Antarctica. It represents, as Shapefile polygons, the ice-covered Antarctic areas that are not mapped as individual glaciers, serving as a companion to the OSM coastline-processing pipeline and commonly used in global basemap production and polar cartography. The data are available under the ODbL licence and can be downloaded directly.

name: OSPAR ODIMS - Marine Protected Areas & Data Streams
notes: Official OSPAR MPA network polygons; annual status reports.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OSPAR ODIMS 是 OSPAR 委员会的海洋数据信息管理系统，提供东北大西洋海洋保护区及多种数据流的官方矢量图层。它发布 OSPAR MPA 网络的多边形数据，并配套年度状态报告，适合区域海洋保护规划与海洋治理研究。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 WFS/WMS 服务形式提供，采用 CC0 许可证，可直接下载或通过 OGC 服务访问。
desc_en: OSPAR ODIMS is the OSPAR Commission's Data and Information Management System, providing official vector layers for marine protected areas and various data streams across the North-East Atlantic. It publishes the polygons of the OSPAR MPA network alongside annual status reports, supporting regional conservation planning and ocean-governance research. Data are offered as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and WFS/WMS services under a CC0 licence, available by direct download or OGC services.

name: PacIOOS GeoServer (Pacific Islands)
provider: University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa, SOEST / IOOS
theme_raw: Pacific coastal hazards, MPAs, jurisdictions, habitats
coverage: Hawaiʻi, American Samoa, CNMI, FSM, Guam, RMI, Palau
lychee_text: Network error: Network error: received fatal alert: HandshakeFailure (error sending request for url (https://geo.pacioos.hawaii.edu/geoserver/))
notes: One of few open vector catalogs covering Micronesia/Polynesia jurisdictions.
verify_notes: GeoServer endpoint at geo.pacioos.hawaii.edu | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: PacIOOS GeoServer 由夏威夷大学马诺阿分校 SOEST 运营、隶属于美国 IOOS，覆盖夏威夷、美属萨摩亚、北马里亚纳群岛、密克罗尼西亚联邦、关岛、马绍尔群岛和帕劳等太平洋岛屿辖区。它通过 WMS/WFS、Shapefile 和 KML 提供矢量图层，是少数覆盖密克罗尼西亚/波利尼西亚地区的开放矢量目录之一，适合海岸灾害、海洋观测与岛屿环境研究。数据多为公有领域/CC0。
desc_en: PacIOOS GeoServer, operated by the University of Hawaiʻi at Mānoa's SOEST under U.S. IOOS, covers Pacific island jurisdictions including Hawaiʻi, American Samoa, CNMI, the Federated States of Micronesia, Guam, the Marshall Islands, and Palau. It serves vector layers via WMS/WFS, Shapefile, and KML, and is one of the few open vector catalogs spanning Micronesia and Polynesia, suiting coastal-hazard, ocean-observing, and island-environment research. Most data are public domain or CC0.

name: Portuguese coastline between 1958–2010 in shapefile format
doi_or_citation: Ponte Lira, C et al. (2016) doi:10.1594/PANGAEA.853654
verify_notes: Portuguese coastline 1958-2010 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集记录了葡萄牙大陆海岸线 1958 至 2010 年的位置变化，以 ESRI Shapefile 线状矢量形式发布于 PANGAEA。它适用于海岸线变迁、海岸侵蚀与海平面影响等长期演变研究。数据体量约 1 MB，采用 CC-BY-3.0 许可证开放下载，由 Ponte Lira 等人（2016）发布。
desc_en: This dataset documents the position of the Portuguese mainland coastline from 1958 to 2010, published as ESRI Shapefile line vectors on PANGAEA. It supports studies of shoreline change, coastal erosion, and long-term coastal evolution under sea-level pressures. About 1 MB in size, it is openly downloadable under CC-BY-3.0 and was published by Ponte Lira et al. (2016).

name: S2Coast-2023 (Sentinel-2 enhanced composite shoreline)
notes: Niche community-curated alternative to OSM coastline.
verify_notes: S2Coast-2023; doc updated 2026-01-27; DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17092775 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: S2Coast-2023 是基于 Sentinel-2 增强合成影像提取的全球海岸线矢量数据，由 GEE 社区目录贡献者维护，对应 2023 年度合成。它以 ESRI Shapefile 形式提供，是 OSM 海岸线之外一个社区策展的高分辨率替代选择，适合海岸制图、海岸线变化监测与全球底图应用。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可证，可直接下载。
desc_en: S2Coast-2023 is a global shoreline vector extracted from a Sentinel-2 enhanced composite, maintained by GEE Community Catalog contributors and corresponding to a 2023 annual composite. Provided as ESRI Shapefiles, it offers a community-curated, high-resolution alternative to the OSM coastline, suiting coastal mapping, shoreline-change monitoring, and global basemap work. The data are released under CC-BY-4.0 and can be downloaded directly.

name: S2Coast-2023 Global 10-m Coastline
notes: 目前公开最细 10 m 全球海岸线之一；适合替换 GSHHG。
verify_notes: DOI redirect to Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: S2Coast-2023 全球 10 米海岸线由 Mao 等人发布于 Zenodo，是目前公开最精细的 10 米分辨率全球海岸线之一，基于 2023 年 Sentinel-2 影像提取。数据提供 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage 格式，主 Shapefile 约 1.5 GB、全套约 5.6 TB，适合替代 GSHHG 等较粗海岸线产品用于精细海岸制图与变化分析。数据采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可证，可直接下载。
desc_en: The S2Coast-2023 Global 10-m Coastline, published by Mao et al. on Zenodo, is among the finest publicly available global coastlines at 10-m resolution, extracted from 2023 Sentinel-2 imagery. It is provided as Shapefile and GeoPackage, with the main shapefile around 1.5 GB and the full release about 5.6 TB, making it a high-resolution replacement for coarser products like GSHHG in detailed coastal mapping and change analysis. The data are released under CC-BY 4.0 and downloadable directly.

name: U.S. Gulf and Atlantic coastal cities high flood risk
notes: Includes Python processing scripts; some originals restricted
verify_notes: Source data NOT redistributed due to licensing restrictions | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集聚焦美国墨西哥湾与大西洋沿岸城市的高洪水风险，发布于 Dryad，覆盖 8 个沿海城市。数据以 Shapefile 形式提供边界、损害点与风险区，含约 63,000 个一般损害点（极端情形约 19,000 个），并附带 Python 处理脚本。它适用于沿海洪水风险评估、气候适应规划与灾害管理研究。数据约 329.59 MB，遵循 Dryad 使用条款，部分原始数据受限，由 Dey 与 Shao（2026）发布。
desc_en: This Dryad dataset focuses on high flood risk in U.S. Gulf and Atlantic coastal cities, covering eight coastal cities. It provides Shapefiles of boundaries, damage points, and risk zones, with roughly 63,000 general damage points (about 19,000 under extreme scenarios) and accompanying Python processing scripts. It suits coastal flood-risk assessment, climate-adaptation planning, and disaster-management research. At about 329.59 MB, it follows Dryad terms with some originals restricted, and was published by Dey and Shao (2026).

name: UN Global Coastline (simplified, derived from GAUL 2006)
notes: Simplified coastline used for thematic mapping; lesser-known FAO product.
verify_notes: FAO map catalog API returned 502 Bad Gateway | lychee:Rejected status code: 502 Bad Gateway
desc_zh: 联合国全球海岸线（简化版）由 FAO 发布，派生自 GAUL 2006 行政边界数据集。它以 Shapefile 多边形形式提供简化的全球海岸线，主要用于专题制图与小比例尺背景底图。该产品知名度较低，遵循 FAO 数据政策，可开放获取。
desc_en: The UN Global Coastline (simplified) is published by FAO and derived from the GAUL 2006 administrative-boundary dataset. It provides a simplified global coastline as Shapefile polygons, primarily intended for thematic mapping and small-scale background basemaps. This is a lesser-known FAO product, available openly under the FAO data policy.

name: Watling et al. Deep Ocean Floor Biogeography (GOODS refined)
doi_or_citation: Watling L et al. 2013, Prog. Oceanogr. 111:91-112
notes: GOODS 精化版；shapefile 通常通过 corresponding author 或 BlueHabitats 镜像分发。
verify_notes: PDF file (Watling et al. 2013) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Watling 等人（2013）的深海海底生物地理分区是对 GOODS 分类的精化版本，覆盖全球深海，发表于 Progress in Oceanography（111:91-112）。该成果以矢量 Shapefile 形式划分深海生物地理区，是深海生态、底栖生境与保护规划研究的重要参考。Shapefile 通常通过通讯作者或 BlueHabitats 镜像分发，PDF 为学术开放获取。
desc_en: Watling et al. (2013) present a deep-ocean-floor biogeography that refines the GOODS classification, covering the global deep sea, published in Progress in Oceanography (111:91-112). The work delineates deep-sea biogeographic provinces as vector Shapefiles and is an important reference for deep-sea ecology, benthic-habitat, and conservation-planning research. The shapefile is typically distributed via the corresponding author or a BlueHabitats mirror, while the PDF is academically open.

name: 《中国科学数据》期刊 关联数据 (海岸线、海岛矢量)
provider: 中国科学院 / 中国科学数据期刊编辑部
access: 期刊页面或 ScienceDB 镜像下载
verify_notes: TLS certificate expired - HTTPS upgrade fails | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 《中国科学数据》期刊（ISSN 2096-2223）由中国科学院主办，随论文 DOI 发布关联的科学数据，其中包含海岸线、海岛等海洋海岸带矢量数据（如中国大陆海岸线 1990/2000/2010/2020 等）。数据多以 shp/geojson 格式提供，可通过期刊页面或 ScienceDB 镜像下载，普遍采用 CC-BY 许可证，适合海岸带变化与海洋专题研究。具体数据集随对应论文而定。
desc_en: The journal China Scientific Data (ISSN 2096-2223), hosted by the Chinese Academy of Sciences, releases associated datasets with each paper's DOI, including marine and coastal vector data such as coastlines and islands (e.g., China's mainland coastline for 1990/2000/2010/2020). Data are typically provided in shp/geojson formats, downloadable via the journal pages or ScienceDB mirrors and generally under CC-BY, suiting coastal-change and marine thematic research. Specific datasets vary by their associated papers.

name: 中国东海区大陆海岸线数据集 (1990-2015) / East China Sea Mainland Coastline Dataset
provider: 中国科学院烟台海岸带研究所 (YIC, CAS) / 《中国科学数据》
notes: Includes coastline type attribution (natural vs. artificial), fractal dimensions, change-intensity tables. 43 files, 3.68 MB. Cold but high-quality.
verify_notes: China five major estuaries coastline 1990-2015 dataset, DOI 10.3974/geodp.2019.03.05 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国东海区大陆海岸线数据集（1990-2015）由中国科学院烟台海岸带研究所（YIC）通过《中国科学数据》发布，覆盖东海区域大陆海岸带。数据以 Shapefile 加 xlsx 形式提供，含海岸线类型属性（自然/人工）、分形维数及变化强度等表格，共 43 个文件、约 3.68 MB。它适合海岸线类型演变、人工岸线扩张与海岸带变化研究，要求署名、不可商业再分发，DOI 为 10.11922/csdata.2019.0023.zh。
desc_en: The East China Sea Mainland Coastline Dataset (1990-2015) was published by the Yantai Institute of Coastal Zone Research (YIC, CAS) through China Scientific Data, covering the East China Sea mainland coast. Provided as Shapefile plus xlsx, it includes coastline-type attribution (natural vs. artificial), fractal dimensions, and change-intensity tables across 43 files totaling about 3.68 MB. It suits research on coastline-type evolution, artificial-shoreline expansion, and coastal change, requires attribution with no commercial redistribution, and carries DOI 10.11922/csdata.2019.0023.zh.

name: 中国科学院南京地理与湖泊研究所 科学数据中心
provider: 中科院南京地理所 NIGLAS
coverage: 中国湖泊与部分海岸带湿地
notes: 含海岸湿地/河口三角洲矢量
verify_notes: Connection refused; site may be down or moved | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国科学院南京地理与湖泊研究所（NIGLAS）科学数据中心是其专业数据共享平台，主要覆盖中国湖泊及部分海岸带湿地，包含海岸湿地与河口三角洲等矢量数据集。数据多以 Shapefile 形式按数据集提供，需注册申请、限科研用途，适合湖泊、湿地与河口环境研究。具体数据集内容以平台为准。
desc_en: The Scientific Data Center of the Nanjing Institute of Geography and Limnology (NIGLAS, CAS) is its specialized data-sharing platform, focused mainly on China's lakes and some coastal wetlands, including vector datasets of coastal wetlands and estuarine deltas. Data are generally provided per dataset as Shapefiles, require registration, and are restricted to research use, suiting lake, wetland, and estuarine environmental studies. Specific holdings should be confirmed on the platform.

name: 国家海洋科学数据中心 数据共享平台
provider: 国家海洋信息中心 (NMDIS) / 自然资源部
coverage: 中国近海与全球海洋专题
license_now: 未明示开放许可证；需注册申请，按国家海洋数据中心规定
formats: 包含矢量专题图层 (海洋功能区划/保护区/岸线),需登录获取
notes: 国家级海洋数据主中心,含海洋保护区、岸线等专题
verify_notes: 政府平台,需注册 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家海洋科学数据中心数据共享平台由国家海洋信息中心（NMDIS，自然资源部）运营，是国家级海洋数据主中心，覆盖中国近海与全球海洋专题。平台包含海洋功能区划、海洋保护区、岸线等专题矢量图层，需登录注册并经申请审核获取。许可证未明示开放协议，按国家海洋数据中心规定使用，适合海洋管理、保护区与岸线研究。
desc_en: The National Marine Data Sharing Platform, operated by the National Marine Data and Information Service (NMDIS) under China's Ministry of Natural Resources, is the country's principal marine data center, covering China's coastal seas and global ocean themes. It includes thematic vector layers such as marine functional zoning, protected areas, and coastlines, obtainable through registration and application review. No explicit open licence is stated; use follows the center's regulations, suiting marine management, MPA, and shoreline research.

name: 国家生态科学数据中心 — 全球 1:100万海洋数据集 (2012)
provider: 国家生态科学数据中心 / 灾害数据中心
formats: 矢量 shp (海岸线/海底地形/海洋要素)

desc_zh: 全球 1:100 万海洋数据集（2012）由国家生态科学数据中心/灾害数据中心提供，为 1:100 万比例尺的全球海洋矢量数据集，包含海岸线、海底地形与海洋要素等 Shapefile 图层。数据可通过元数据页注册申请获取，限科研使用，适合中小比例尺海洋制图与全球海洋专题分析。
desc_en: The Global 1:1,000,000 Marine Dataset (2012), provided by China's National Ecosystem Science Data Center / disaster data center, is a global marine vector dataset at 1:1,000,000 scale, comprising Shapefile layers of coastlines, seabed topography, and marine features. It is available by application through the metadata page, restricted to research use, and suited to small- and medium-scale marine cartography and global marine thematic analysis.

name: 科学数据银行 ScienceDB — 海岸带/海洋专题数据集
provider: 中国科学院 计算机网络信息中心 CNIC
coverage: 按数据集 (中国海岸带、红树林、海岛等多个矢量集)
license_now: 平台多采用 CC-BY 4.0 (按数据集而定),站点本身受服务条款约束
formats_now: 多 (CSV/NetCDF/Shapefile 等, 按数据集)
notes: 通用科学数据仓储,支持 DOI 引用
verify_notes: CNIC/CAS 维护 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 科学数据银行（ScienceDB）由中国科学院计算机网络信息中心（CNIC）运营，是通用型科学数据仓储，支持 DOI 引用。平台收录了多个海岸带与海洋专题矢量数据集，如中国海岸带、红树林、海岛等，数据以 shp/geojson/gpkg 等格式由作者上传。多数数据集采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可证（按数据集而定），可公开下载或申请获取，适合海洋海岸带各类研究。
desc_en: ScienceDB (Science Data Bank), operated by the Computer Network Information Center (CNIC) of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, is a general-purpose scientific data repository supporting DOI citation. It hosts numerous coastal and marine thematic vector datasets, such as China's coastal zone, mangroves, and islands, uploaded by authors in shp/geojson/gpkg and other formats. Most datasets use CC-BY 4.0 (per dataset) and are openly downloadable or available by request, suiting a wide range of marine and coastal research.

name: BBBike Extracts
theme_raw: Custom bbox OSM extracts | 约 250 个全球城市的预制 OSM 抽取 | Custom-bounded OSM vector extracts
formats: osm.pbf, shapefile, geojson, gpkg, csv, garmin, mapsforge, o5m
notes: Up to 24 vector output formats including GeoJSON/Shapefile/GeoPackage
verify_notes: Duplicate entry in batch. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BBBike Extracts 由 Slaven Rezic 维护，是一项基于 OpenStreetMap 数据的全球自定义区域提取服务，用户可通过自定义边界框或多边形请求任意地区的数据。它支持多达 24 种矢量输出格式，包括 osm.pbf、Shapefile、GeoJSON、GeoPackage、CSV、Garmin、Mapsforge、o5m 等，免费提供并通过邮件交付任务结果。数据遵循 ODbL 1.0 许可证，适合按需获取局部 OSM 矢量数据。
desc_en: BBBike Extracts, maintained by Slaven Rezic, is a worldwide on-demand extraction service built on OpenStreetMap data, letting users request any area via a custom bounding box or polygon. It supports up to 24 vector output formats, including osm.pbf, Shapefile, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, CSV, Garmin, Mapsforge, and o5m, and is free with results delivered by email. The data follow the ODbL 1.0 licence, making it ideal for obtaining localized OSM vector extracts on demand.

name: Data.gov (US) Geospatial Catalog
theme_raw: national geospatial federation | Meta-catalog (federal/state/local/tribal) | meta-catalog of all US federal & state LU/LC datasets
notes: Largest CKAN instance; >200k geospatial datasets harvested from federal/state/tribal sources via ckanext-spatial.
verify_notes: 541,700+ datasets; geospatial filter active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Data.gov 地理空间目录由美国总务管理局（GSA）运营，是美国政府最大的开放数据门户，整体收录超 54 万个数据集，其中地理空间类超过 20 万个，由联邦、州及部落机构通过 ckanext-spatial 汇聚。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、WFS、GML 等格式提供，多为美国公有领域（许可证因来源而异），可通过 CKAN API 与收割机制访问，是美国地理空间数据检索的核心入口。
