desc_en: The Data.gov Geospatial Catalog, run by the U.S. General Services Administration (GSA), is the largest U.S. government open-data portal, hosting over 540,000 datasets overall, of which more than 200,000 are geospatial, harvested from federal, state, and tribal sources via ckanext-spatial. Data are offered in formats such as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, WFS, and GML, mostly U.S. public domain (licences vary by source), and accessible through the CKAN API and harvesting. It is a central entry point for discovering U.S. geospatial data.

name: MGGG Pennsylvania VTDs (PA-shapefiles)
theme_raw: Voting tabulation districts | Pennsylvania VTDs with election results | Wisconsin wards with 2012-2018 election results
notes: PA VTD shapefiles with multi-cycle election results; central to Gerrymandering litigation work
verify_notes: VTD shapefiles, EPSG:26918 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MGGG 宾夕法尼亚州投票区（VTD）数据由计量地理学与选举团（MGGG）发布于 GitHub，覆盖宾夕法尼亚州 2010-2018/2020 年。数据以 Shapefile 形式提供 VTD 边界并附带多个选举周期的选举结果，是选区划分与选区不公（gerrymandering）诉讼分析的核心数据之一。许可证见仓库 LICENSE.md，开放获取，适合选举地理与政治地理研究。
desc_en: The MGGG Pennsylvania VTDs dataset, published on GitHub by the Metric Geometry and Gerrymandering Group (MGGG), covers Pennsylvania across roughly 2010-2018/2020. It provides VTD boundaries as Shapefiles together with multi-cycle election results, and has been central to redistricting and gerrymandering litigation analysis. The licence is specified in the repository's LICENSE.md, with open access, suiting electoral and political-geography research.

name: GEBCO 2021 Derived Contours & Contour Polygons (OpenDEM)
theme_raw: Bathymetric contour lines and polygons | bathymetry depth zones | bathymetry / isobaths
license_now: GEBCO 版本不同：2021 ODbL (经 OSM 裁剪) / 2019 Public Domain / 2014 非商用
formats_now: Shapefile (等高线/多边形) / WMS / COG / MVT
notes: Community-generated vector contours clipped by OSM water polygons; useful where GEBCO itself only ships raster.
verify_notes: 许可证按 GEBCO 年份不同；与 p4 'GEBCO terms (free, attribution)' 描述不完全一致，2021 版含 ODbL 限制。 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GEBCO 2021 派生等深线与等深线多边形由 OpenDEM 基于 GEBCO_2021 网格生成，覆盖全球海洋。这些社区生成的矢量等深线经 OSM 水体多边形裁剪，以 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage 形式提供，在 GEBCO 本身仅发布栅格的情况下尤为实用。许可证因 GEBCO 版本而异（2021 为 ODbL、2019 为公有领域、2014 为非商用），适合海底地形可视化与海洋制图。
desc_en: The GEBCO 2021 Derived Contours and Contour Polygons, generated by OpenDEM from the GEBCO_2021 grid, cover the global ocean. These community-generated vector contours are clipped by OSM water polygons and supplied as Shapefile and GeoPackage, which is especially useful since GEBCO itself ships only raster. Licensing varies by GEBCO version (2021 ODbL, 2019 public domain, 2014 non-commercial), and the data suit seafloor-topography visualization and marine cartography.

name: mledoze/countries
theme_raw: Country reference data | ISO 3166-1 country metadata + outlines | country reference data + lat/lon + simplified geometries
formats_now: JSON, CSV, XML, YAML, GeoJSON, TopoJSON
notes: Includes country attributes (currency, languages, calling codes).
verify_notes: v5.1.0 Feb 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: mledoze/countries 是一个广受欢迎的开源世界各国数据集，以多种格式（JSON、GeoJSON、YAML、CSV、XML）提供全球国家与地区的结构化信息。每条记录包含国名（多语言）、ISO 代码、首都、货币、官方语言、国际电话区号、所属地区与次地区等丰富属性，部分版本还附带国界几何，便于直接用于制图。该数据托管于 GitHub，采用 ODbL 许可，常被用作 Web 应用、表单下拉、数据清洗与地理编码的基础参照表。最新版本约为 2025 年初发布。
desc_en: mledoze/countries is a popular open dataset of the world's countries, distributed in multiple formats including JSON, GeoJSON, YAML, CSV and XML. Each record bundles rich attributes such as multilingual names, ISO codes, capitals, currencies, official languages, calling codes, and region/subregion groupings, with GeoJSON variants carrying border geometry for direct mapping. Hosted on GitHub under the ODbL license, it is widely used as a reference lookup for web applications, form dropdowns, data cleaning and lightweight geocoding. The latest release dates to early 2025.

name: OurAirports — countries.csv & regions.csv
theme_raw: ISO country / ISO 3166-2 region reference (attribute) | reference / lookup | reference / subnational regions
notes: Reference tables for joining; not a vector layer on their own — included for completeness of the OurAirports family
verify_notes: regions.csv reachable; headers id,code,local_code,name,continent,iso_country,wikipedia_link,keywords. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 OurAirports 项目提供的 countries.csv 与 regions.csv 参照表，列出全球国家及其下属行政区域（州/省等），共有 750 多条 region 记录。文件为纯 CSV、不含几何，主要作为查找表，用于将 OurAirports 的机场数据按国家与地区进行关联和分类。数据属于公有领域，可通过开放 HTTPS 直接下载，文件约 473 KB。它本身不是矢量图层，而是 OurAirports 数据家族中用于完整性补充的参照组件。
desc_en: These are the countries.csv and regions.csv reference tables from the OurAirports project, enumerating the world's countries and their first-order administrative regions, with over 750 region rows. Delivered as plain CSV with no geometry, they serve purely as lookup tables for joining and categorizing OurAirports' airport records by country and region. Released into the public domain and downloadable over open HTTPS (about 473 KB), they are not a standalone vector layer but a companion component included for completeness of the OurAirports data family.

name: 黄河下游河道变迁数据库（1855-2000，11个时段）
provider: NESDC 黄河中下游分中心
theme_raw: 历史河道变迁 | 湿地 | 河道/基础地理
doi_or_citation: 黄河中下游分中心, NESDC
notes: 罕见历史水系矢量时间序列
verify_notes: Non-standard port 8221 timed out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 黄河下游河道变迁数据库由国家地球系统科学数据中心黄河中下游分中心提供，记录了 1855 至 2000 年间黄河下游河道在 11 个时段的空间变迁。数据以 shapefile 矢量配合栅格形式呈现，是一份较为罕见的历史水系时间序列资料，适用于河道演变、洪泛与河流地貌的长期研究。数据面向科研用途，需注册申请后获取。
desc_en: The Lower Yellow River Channel Migration Database, provided by the Yellow River Middle-Lower Reaches sub-center of NESDC, documents the spatial shifts of the lower Yellow River channel across 11 time periods spanning 1855 to 2000. Delivered as shapefile vectors alongside raster layers, it is an uncommon historical fluvial time-series resource suited to studies of channel evolution, flooding and river geomorphology. The data is intended for research use and requires registration to access.

name: Circum-Arctic Map of Permafrost and Ground-Ice Conditions (Brown et al. 2002, IPA)
theme_raw: 冻土 / permafrost & ground ice | permafrost / ground ice
notes: Historical reference layer still cited; needs NSIDC Earthdata login.
verify_notes: Citation required; no explicit open license stated, NSIDC citation policy applies | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 环北极多年冻土与地下冰条件图（Brown 等，2002，国际冻土协会 IPA）是一份经典的环北极冻土参照矢量图层，由 NSIDC 以 GGD318 数据集发布。数据为 shapefile 格式，原始编制比例尺约为 1:1000 万，刻画了北半球高纬地区的冻土分布范围与地下冰含量等级。尽管编制年代较早（1997 原版，2002 第二版），该图至今仍被广泛引用，是冻土与寒区研究的基础底图。下载需 NSIDC Earthdata 登录。
desc_en: The Circum-Arctic Map of Permafrost and Ground-Ice Conditions (Brown et al. 2002, IPA), released by NSIDC as dataset GGD318, is a classic circum-Arctic reference layer for permafrost. Provided as shapefile at an original scale of roughly 1:10,000,000, it depicts permafrost extent and ground-ice content classes across the high-latitude Northern Hemisphere. Although compiled some time ago (1997 original, 2002 V2), it remains widely cited as a foundational basemap for permafrost and cold-region research. Download requires an NSIDC Earthdata login.

name: Circumpolar Arctic Vegetation Map (CAVM) – vector
provider: CAVM Team 2003 (Walker et al.); Alaska Geobotany Center
theme_raw: 北极植被分区 / arctic vegetation polygons | Arctic vegetation polygons
license_now: 未在页面明示, 数据通过 Mendeley Data / Arctic Data Center 发布 (含 DOI)
feature_count: over 400 plant communities grouped into 16 vegetation types
notes: Includes 15 physiognomic vegetation units + landscape-age shapefile (Raynolds 2009).
verify_notes: v2 Raster CAVM (2019) 已发布; 原 vector CAVM 仍可下载 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 环极地北极植被图（CAVM）由 CAVM 团队（Walker 等，2003）与阿拉斯加地植物学中心编制，覆盖整个环极地北极地区。矢量版本以多边形 shapefile 形式描绘北极苔原植被，将 400 多种植物群落归纳为约 15 个生理外貌植被单元，并配有景观年龄图层（Raynolds 2009）。该图是北极植被、生态与气候研究的权威底图，2003 年原始版本之后于 2019 年推出栅格更新版。数据通过 Mendeley Data / Arctic Data Center 发布并附带 DOI。
desc_en: The Circumpolar Arctic Vegetation Map (CAVM), compiled by the CAVM Team (Walker et al. 2003) and the Alaska Geobotany Center, covers the entire circumpolar Arctic. The vector edition portrays Arctic tundra vegetation as polygon shapefiles, grouping over 400 plant communities into roughly 15 physiognomic vegetation units, complemented by a landscape-age layer (Raynolds 2009). It is an authoritative basemap for Arctic vegetation, ecology and climate research; the 2003 original was followed by a 2019 raster update. The data is published with DOIs via Mendeley Data and the Arctic Data Center.

name: GEBCO Gazetteer of Undersea Feature Names (SCUFN)
provider: IHO-IOC GEBCO SCUFN, hosted by NOAA NCEI / IHO DCDB
theme_raw: Named undersea features (ridges, seamounts, trenches, canyons) | Undersea features (seamounts, ridges, trenches, canyons)
formats: Shapefile, KML, CSV, ArcGIS Feature Service, OGC API Features, WFS
lychee_status: Network error: Network unreachable. Check internet connection or VPN settings (error sending request for url (https://www.ngdc.noaa.gov/gazetteer))
notes: ~4k features; the authoritative seafloor-feature gazetteer.
verify_notes: GEBCO Gazetteer v5.0.8; CAS authentication for some functions | lychee:Network error: Network unreachable. Check internet connection or VPN settings (error sending request for url (https://www.ngdc.noaa.gov/gazetteer))
desc_zh: GEBCO 海底地名辞典（SCUFN）是全球海底地物命名的权威参照数据集，由 IHO-IOC GEBCO 海底地名小组委员会编制，托管于 NOAA NCEI 与 IHO DCDB。它收录约 4000 个已命名海底地物（如海山、海沟、海脊等）的位置与属性，提供 Shapefile、KML、CSV 等格式以及 ArcGIS Feature Service、OGC API Features 和 WFS 等在线服务。数据属公有领域开放使用，广泛用于海洋制图、科研引用与海底命名标准化。
desc_en: The GEBCO Gazetteer of Undersea Feature Names (SCUFN) is the authoritative reference for named seafloor features worldwide, compiled by the IHO-IOC GEBCO Sub-Committee on Undersea Feature Names and hosted at NOAA NCEI and the IHO DCDB. It catalogs about 4,000 named undersea features—seamounts, trenches, ridges and more—with their locations and attributes, offered as Shapefile, KML and CSV plus ArcGIS Feature Service, OGC API Features and WFS services. Public-domain and openly available, it is widely used for ocean mapping, scientific citation and standardization of seafloor naming.

name: GTFS Accra (Trufi)
theme_raw: Informal/formal public transit network (trotros) | Paratransit (trotro) routes & stops
formats: GTFS (stops as points, shapes.txt as polylines)
notes: Rare open feed of an African paratransit system
verify_notes: accra.gtfs.zip; license info may be outdated | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GTFS Accra（Trufi）是加纳首都阿克拉公共交通的 GTFS 数据集，由 Trufi 协会编制并通过 TUMI Datahub 分发。数据以标准 GTFS 格式提供，其中站点为点要素、shapes.txt 为线状路径，描述当地以小巴/合乘为主的非正规公交（paratransit）网络。这是一份较为罕见的非洲非正规公交开放数据，可用于出行规划、可达性分析与交通研究。许可证未明确标注，以 zip 压缩包直接下载。
desc_en: GTFS Accra (Trufi) is a GTFS dataset for public transport in Accra, Ghana, compiled by the Trufi Association and distributed via the TUMI Datahub. Delivered in standard GTFS format—stops as points and shapes.txt as polylines—it describes the city's predominantly minibus/paratransit network. As a rare open feed of an African paratransit system, it supports trip planning, accessibility analysis and transport research. The license is not specified, and the data is downloaded as a zip package.

name: GTFS Greater Cairo Region - Formal transit, Paratransit and Cairo Metro
theme_raw: Multimodal transit incl. informal microbuses + metro | Public transit (Metro + paratransit)
notes: One of the most complete paratransit-inclusive feeds in MENA.
verify_notes: ZIP plus GitHub mirror; Transport for Cairo | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这份 GTFS 数据集覆盖大开罗地区（GCR），整合了正规公交、非正规公交（paratransit）以及开罗地铁，由 TUMI 与 Transport for Cairo 编制。数据为标准 GTFS 格式，描述该都市区多模式的公共交通网络，是中东与北非地区最完整、包含非正规公交的交通数据之一，内容截至 2018 年 6 月。可直接下载，适用于多模式出行规划、可达性与城市交通研究。许可证未明确标注。
desc_en: This GTFS dataset covers the Greater Cairo Region, integrating formal transit, paratransit and the Cairo Metro, compiled by TUMI and Transport for Cairo. Provided in standard GTFS format, it describes the metropolitan area's multimodal public transport network and is among the most complete paratransit-inclusive feeds in the MENA region, current as of June 2018. Available for direct download, it supports multimodal trip planning, accessibility analysis and urban transport research. The license is not specified.

name: Maryland Data Files (Harvard EDA) - GIS Shapefile
notes: Maryland precinct GIS
splink_merged_from: Virginia Data Files (Harvard EDA) - GIS Shapefile
verify_notes: DOI resolves to Harvard Dataverse; SPA blocks WebFetch content extraction | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 马里兰州数据文件（哈佛选举数据档案）是哈佛选举数据档案在 Dataverse 上发布的马里兰州 GIS shapefile，覆盖该州的选区（precinct）边界。数据以矢量 shapefile 形式提供，可用于选举地理、选区划分、投票模式与政治地理研究。通过 Harvard Dataverse 下载，使用须遵循 Dataverse 的相关条款。
desc_en: The Maryland Data Files (Harvard Election Data Archive) is a GIS shapefile for the U.S. state of Maryland published on Dataverse by the Harvard Election Data Archive, covering the state's voting precinct boundaries. Provided as vector shapefiles, it supports electoral geography, redistricting, voting-pattern and political-geography research. It is downloaded through the Harvard Dataverse, with use subject to Dataverse terms.

name: Overpass API
theme_raw: Tag-filtered OSM feature queries | OSM thematic vector queries (any feature/tag)
notes: Standard tool for extracting thematic vector subsets of OSM
verify_notes: Active main page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Overpass API 是从 OpenStreetMap 数据库中按条件提取专题矢量子集的标准工具，由 OSM 社区（Roland Olbricht 主导）开发维护。用户可通过其查询语言读取全球任意区域、任意标签的 OSM 要素（点、线、面），结果以 OSM XML、JSON 输出，并可借助转换器生成 GeoJSON。该服务提供免费公共端点，也支持自建实例。数据遵循 OSM 的 ODbL 许可，广泛用于专题地图制作、空间分析与数据采集。
desc_en: The Overpass API is the standard tool for extracting thematic vector subsets from the OpenStreetMap database, developed and maintained by the OSM community (led by Roland Olbricht). Using its query language, users can read OSM features (points, lines, polygons) by tag for any region worldwide, with results returned as OSM XML or JSON and convertible to GeoJSON. It offers free public endpoints and can also be self-hosted. Governed by OSM's ODbL license, it is widely used for thematic mapping, spatial analysis and data harvesting.

name: Poverty Mapping Project: Unsatisfied Basic Needs (Bolivia/Mexico subnational)
feature_count: 11 Latin American countries (Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua, Peru)
notes: Less-mainstream PMP product; subnational UBN index polygons. Useful for Latin American poverty-environment studies.
verify_notes: NASA Earthdata; DOI 10.7927/H45X26V8 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 贫困制图项目——未满足基本需求（UBN）数据集由 NASA SEDAC / CIESIN 发布，提供拉丁美洲 11 国（阿根廷、玻利维亚、巴西、哥伦比亚、厄瓜多尔、萨尔瓦多、危地马拉、洪都拉斯、墨西哥、尼加拉瓜、秘鲁）的次国家级未满足基本需求贫困指数多边形，时间约为 1998–2001 年。数据以 Shapefile 配合 CSV 提供，作为 EOSDIS 开放数据无使用限制。它是相对小众的 PMP 产品，适合拉美地区的贫困—环境关联研究。
desc_en: The Poverty Mapping Project: Unsatisfied Basic Needs (UBN) dataset, released by NASA SEDAC / CIESIN, provides subnational UBN poverty-index polygons for 11 Latin American countries (Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Mexico, Nicaragua and Peru), covering roughly 1998–2001. Delivered as Shapefile with companion CSV and offered as unrestricted EOSDIS open data, it is a less-mainstream PMP product well suited to poverty–environment studies across Latin America.

name: Riparian Zones LCLU 2018 (vector)
coverage: EEA38+UK river catchments, buffer along rivers
notes: 55+ classes, MMU 0.5 ha, MMW 10 m; per-catchment packages
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 河岸带土地覆盖/土地利用 2018（矢量）是哥白尼陆地监测服务（CLMS / EEA）的产品，覆盖 EEA38 加英国的河流流域，沿河流缓冲带刻画河岸生态系统的土地覆盖与利用。数据提供 GPKG、SHP、GDB、FlatGeobuf、GML 等多种格式，含 55 类以上要素，最小制图单元 0.5 公顷、最小制图宽度 10 米，参考期约为 2017–2019 年，每六年更新一次，按流域分包下载。遵循哥白尼数据政策，适用于河流生态、生物多样性与水环境监测。
desc_en: Riparian Zones Land Cover/Land Use 2018 (vector) is a Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS / EEA) product covering river catchments across the EEA38 plus the UK, mapping land cover and use within buffer zones along rivers. Offered in GPKG, SHP, GDB, FlatGeobuf and GML, it features over 55 classes with a 0.5 ha minimum mapping unit and 10 m minimum width, a reference period around 2017–2019, and six-yearly updates packaged per catchment. Released under the Copernicus data policy, it supports riparian ecology, biodiversity and water-environment monitoring.

name: TUMI GTFS Analyzer (web tool / data backend)
theme_raw: Tool that streams GTFS shapes/stops vector data for ~1000 feeds | GTFS analytics and feed list
access: Web UI; underlying TUMI Datahub CKAN API
notes: Entry tool referenced in the lead; useful for harvesting feeds programmatically
verify_notes: TUMI GTFS Analyzer tool reachable | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: TUMI GTFS Analyzer 是 TUMI / GIZ 提供的网页工具及其数据后端，聚焦全球南方城市的公共交通 GTFS 数据。它提供网页界面用于浏览和分析各地交通数据（含通过 shapes.txt 表达的线状矢量），底层依托 TUMI Datahub 的 CKAN API，可用于批量、程序化地获取各类 GTFS 数据源。许可证因数据源而异，是检索与采集全球南方公交数据的入口工具。
desc_en: The TUMI GTFS Analyzer is a web tool and data backend from TUMI / GIZ focused on public-transport GTFS data for cities of the Global South. It offers a web UI for browsing and analyzing transit feeds (including line-vector geometry via shapes.txt), backed by the TUMI Datahub CKAN API for programmatic, bulk harvesting of feeds. Licensing varies per feed, and it serves as an entry point for discovering and collecting Global-South transit data.

name: 中国建成区矢量数据 (1975-2020)
provider: CSDN 数据社区 PPdata_Academy 分发 (派生自 GHSL + GAIA)
theme_raw: 城市建成区 | 城市建成区(城镇化代理)
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 521 Unknown status code
notes: 代表中文圈博客典型: 抓 GHSL+GAIA 二次处理打包; 列入用于追溯链
verify_notes: 1975-2020 5-year intervals; derived from GHSL | lychee:Rejected status code: 521 Unknown status code
desc_zh: 中国建成区矢量数据（1975–2020）是一份由 CSDN 数据社区（PPdata_Academy）分发的派生数据集，基于 GHSL 与 GAIA 全球建成区/不透水面产品二次处理打包，以 shapefile 形式提供 1975 至 2020 年间中国建成区范围。数据标注为 CC BY-SA 4.0，通过博客抓取获取。它代表中文圈博客常见的二次分发模式，列入此处主要用于数据来源链路的追溯；研究使用时建议回溯至 GHSL/GAIA 原始产品以确保权威性。
desc_en: China Built-up Area Vector Data (1975–2020) is a derivative dataset distributed via the CSDN data community (PPdata_Academy), repackaged from the GHSL and GAIA global built-up/impervious-surface products. It provides China's built-up extent from 1975 to 2020 as shapefiles, labeled CC BY-SA 4.0 and obtained by scraping the blog. Representative of common Chinese-blog secondary redistribution, it is included mainly for provenance tracing; for research use, tracing back to the original GHSL/GAIA products is recommended for authoritative accuracy.

name: 青藏高原所有湖泊数据集（2000）
theme_raw: 冰川（小众/非英语世界） | 湖泊
coverage: 青藏高原所有湖泊，2000 基准
notes: 含 >1 km^2 与小湖；常用于湖泊长期变化基线
verify_notes: connection refused | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 青藏高原所有湖泊数据集（2000）由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，以 2000 年为基准刻画青藏高原范围内的全部湖泊，既包含面积大于 1 平方公里的大中型湖泊，也涵盖小型湖泊。数据以 Shapefile 矢量提供，常被用作研究青藏高原湖泊长期变化的基线参照。下载需注册。
desc_en: The dataset of all lakes on the Tibetan Plateau (2000), released by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), maps every lake across the plateau using the year 2000 as a baseline, covering both larger lakes above 1 km² and smaller ones. Provided as Shapefile vectors, it is commonly used as a baseline reference for studying long-term lake change on the Tibetan Plateau. Download requires registration.

name: 1-km affordability-constrained accessibility to elderly care facilities in China (Scientific Data 2026)
formats: Shapefile aggregations + raster layers; facility points
verify_notes: Redirects to Nature IDP authorize endpoint; article likely accessible after IDP cookie | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是发表于《Scientific Data》（2026）的中国 1 公里养老设施可负担约束可达性数据集，覆盖全国，空间分辨率为 1 公里。数据在考虑费用可负担性约束的前提下，量化居民到养老设施的可达性，提供 Shapefile 聚合层、栅格图层以及设施点要素。采用 CC-BY 许可、开放获取，适用于人口老龄化、公共服务公平与城乡可达性研究。
desc_en: This is a dataset of 1-km affordability-constrained accessibility to elderly care facilities in China, published in Scientific Data (2026), covering the whole country at 1 km resolution. It quantifies residents' accessibility to elderly care facilities under affordability constraints, providing shapefile aggregation layers, raster layers and facility point features. Released open access under CC-BY, it supports research on population ageing, equity of public services and urban–rural accessibility.

name: 1:100,000 desertification development degree map of Daqintera (1958)
verify_notes: TPDC page reachable; JS-rendered details | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 达茂旗 1:10 万荒漠化发展程度图（1958）由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，记录了 1958 年中国达茂旗地区的荒漠化发展程度，制图比例尺为 1:10 万。数据以 Shapefile 矢量形式提供，是一份历史时点的荒漠化基础资料，可用于长期荒漠化变化、土地退化与生态演变研究。免费获取，需登录。
desc_en: The 1:100,000 desertification development degree map of Daqintera (1958), released by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC), records the degree of desertification development in China's Daqintera area in 1958 at a 1:100,000 scale. Provided as Shapefile vectors, it offers a historical baseline of desertification useful for studies of long-term desertification change, land degradation and ecological evolution. It is free to obtain with login required.

name: 2020 中国地级与省级高标准农田分布矢量
provider: 学者整理 (CSDN hu397313168) 派生政府公示数据
theme_raw: 永久基本农田 / 高标准农田
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 521 Unknown status code
notes: 永久基本农田正式数据无开源, 但自然资源部 yncx.mnr.gov.cn 微信小程序可查询; CSDN二传仅供研究参考
verify_notes: 349 prefecture + 31 province coverage; 279MB package | lychee:Rejected status code: 521 Unknown status code
desc_zh: 2020 中国地级与省级高标准农田分布矢量是由学者在 CSDN 整理、派生自政府公示数据的数据集，以 shapefile 形式提供地级和省级尺度的中国高标准农田分布，数据量约 279 MB。需注意，永久基本农田的正式数据并未开源（可通过自然资源部相关微信小程序查询），此 CSDN 二传仅供研究参考。数据标注为 CC BY-SA 4.0，通过抓取获取，使用时应注意权威性与时效性。
desc_en: The 2020 vector of high-standard farmland distribution at prefecture and provincial levels in China is a dataset compiled on CSDN by a scholar, derived from government-published data, providing the distribution of China's high-standard farmland at prefecture and provincial scales as shapefiles (about 279 MB). Note that official permanent basic-farmland data is not open-sourced (it can be queried via a Ministry of Natural Resources mini-program), so this CSDN re-distribution is for research reference only. Labeled CC BY-SA 4.0 and obtained by scraping, it should be used with attention to authority and timeliness.

name: 2024-2025 中国公园绿地 / AOI 兴趣面矢量
provider: OSM 衍生 + 知乎数据派 (基于 OSM landuse + leisure)
notes: 代表性中文圈博客分发的公园绿地AOI, 路线: OSM抓取->提取leisure/park+landuse/grass->分省打包
verify_notes: Zhihu 403 Forbidden to WebFetch; likely requires login/JS | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 2024–2025 中国公园绿地 / AOI 兴趣面矢量是知乎数据派分发、衍生自 OpenStreetMap 的数据集，通过抓取 OSM 的 leisure/park 与 landuse/grass 标签提取公园绿地兴趣面，按省、市分包，以 shapefile 多边形（GCS_WGS_1984）提供。该数据代表中文圈博客常见的 OSM 二次加工分发模式，可用于城市绿地、休闲空间与可达性分析。因衍生自 OSM，遵循 ODbL 许可。
desc_en: The 2024–2025 China park green-space / AOI polygon vector is an OpenStreetMap-derived dataset distributed by a Zhihu data community, built by scraping OSM leisure/park and landuse/grass tags to extract park green-space polygons, packaged by province and city as shapefile polygons (GCS_WGS_1984). Representative of the common Chinese-blog pattern of reprocessing and redistributing OSM, it can be used for urban green space, recreation and accessibility analysis. As an OSM derivative, it follows the ODbL license.

name: A new map of permafrost distribution on the Tibetan Plateau (2017)
provider: TPDC / Three Poles platform (Zou et al.)
formats: Shapefile / raster derivative (permafrost, seasonally frozen, unfrozen classes)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (http://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en/data/0231c972-8460-4691-a187-70e4cc356f60))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (http://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en/data/0231c972-8460-4691-a187-70e4cc356f60))
notes: Derived from MODIS LST 2003-2012; widely cited polygon classification.
verify_notes: lychee:Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (http://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en/data/0231c972-8460-4691-a187-70e4cc356f60))
desc_zh: 青藏高原多年冻土分布新图（2017）由 TPDC / 三极平台发布（Zou 等），覆盖青藏高原，将区域划分为多年冻土、季节冻土与非冻土等类别。数据基于 2003–2012 年 MODIS 地表温度（LST）推算，以 Shapefile 及栅格衍生形式提供，是该领域被广泛引用的多边形分类图。下载需注册，相关方法发表于《The Cryosphere》（2017）。
desc_en: A new map of permafrost distribution on the Tibetan Plateau (2017), released via TPDC / the Three Poles platform (Zou et al.), covers the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau and classifies the region into permafrost, seasonally frozen and unfrozen ground. Derived from 2003–2012 MODIS land surface temperature and provided as shapefile with raster derivatives, it is a widely cited polygon classification in the field. Download requires registration, and the methodology was published in The Cryosphere (2017).

name: ACOG Open Data Portal (Oklahoma)
notes: Council of Governments hub
verify_notes: ACOG (Oklahoma) open data; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ACOG 开放数据门户由美国中俄克拉荷马政府协会（Association of Central Oklahoma Governments）运营，提供其辖区——中俄克拉荷马地区的开放地理数据。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 等格式开放发布，涵盖区域规划与地方政府常见的地理图层。这是一个由地方政府委员会（COG）搭建的 ArcGIS Hub 实例，适用于区域规划、市政分析与本地 GIS 应用。
desc_en: The ACOG Open Data Portal, operated by the Association of Central Oklahoma Governments, provides open geospatial data for its jurisdiction in central Oklahoma, USA. Data is published openly in formats including Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML, covering geographic layers typical of regional planning and local government. As an ArcGIS Hub instance run by a council of governments, it supports regional planning, municipal analysis and local GIS applications.

name: Active fault database for the Atacama Fault System (N-Chile)
notes: Verified multi-format vector (incl. shapefile, KMZ).
verify_notes: DOI redirects to GFZ data services portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 阿塔卡马断裂系统（智利北部）活动断层数据库由 GFZ Data Services 发布（Mittelstädt & Victor, 2020），覆盖智利北部约 19°12′至 25°12′S 的范围，刻画该地区活动断层的空间分布。数据经核验，提供 Shapefile、KMZ、MPK 等多种矢量格式，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可、开放获取，适用于构造地质、地震危险性与断层活动研究。
desc_en: The active fault database for the Atacama Fault System (northern Chile), released by GFZ Data Services (Mittelstädt & Victor, 2020), covers roughly 19°12′–25°12′S in northern Chile and maps the spatial distribution of active faults in the region. The verified data is provided in multiple vector formats including Shapefile, KMZ and MPK, released openly under CC BY 4.0, and is suited to structural geology, seismic hazard and fault-activity research.

name: AidData GeoGCDF v3.0 Figshare archive
doi_or_citation: Goodman, S. et al. Sci Data 11, 656 (2024)
notes: Archived snapshot tied to the Scientific Data descriptor; landing page links to Figshare DOI.
verify_notes: Landing page; license details on GitHub repo | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: AidData 全球中国发展融资地理空间数据集 v3.0（Figshare 存档）由 AidData 发布，覆盖全球 148 个国家，以地理空间方式定位中国对外发展融资项目（如援助与贷款支持的基础设施）。数据提供 GeoJSON 与 GeoPackage 格式，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可、开放下载，与发表于《Scientific Data》（Goodman 等，2024）的数据描述论文相关联，落地页指向 Figshare DOI。适用于发展金融、地缘政治与基础设施研究。
desc_en: AidData's Geospatial Global Chinese Development Finance Dataset v3.0 (Figshare archive), released by AidData, covers 148 countries worldwide and geolocates Chinese overseas development-finance projects such as aid- and loan-backed infrastructure. Provided as GeoJSON and GeoPackage under CC BY 4.0 with open download, it is tied to a Scientific Data descriptor (Goodman et al., 2024), with the landing page linking to the Figshare DOI. It supports research on development finance, geopolitics and infrastructure.

name: Akron Open Data
notes: Example mid-size city Hub instance
verify_notes: page reachable, JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Akron Open Data 是美国俄亥俄州阿克伦市的开放数据门户，提供该市的市政地理数据，以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 等格式公开发布。数据涵盖中型城市常见的地理图层，可用于城市规划、市政服务与本地 GIS 应用。它是一个典型的中等规模城市 ArcGIS Hub 实例，面向公众开放访问。
desc_en: Akron Open Data is the open data portal of the City of Akron, Ohio, USA, providing the city's municipal geospatial data published openly in formats including Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML. The data covers geographic layers typical of a mid-size city and supports urban planning, municipal services and local GIS applications. It is a representative example of a mid-size city ArcGIS Hub instance with open public access.

name: AmeriGEOSS GeoNode - GAUL 2015 Countries (WFS proxy)
formats_now: Shapefile ZIP, GML 2.0/3.1.1, GeoJSON, KML, CSV, Excel, JPEG, PNG, PDF, OGC WMS/WFS
notes: GeoNode-based catalog with proxied OGC services. WFP GeoNode root: https://geonode.wfp.org/geoserver/ows
verify_notes: License field empty on landing; 18 resources available | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: AmeriGEOSS GeoNode — GAUL 2015 国家边界（WFS 代理）由 AmeriGEOSS / FAO / WFP GeoNode 提供，基于 FAO 的全球行政单元图层（GAUL）2015 版，呈现全球（侧重美洲）国家行政边界。数据通过 GeoNode 以 WFS 在线服务（代理 OGC 服务）方式提供。页面显示未提供明确许可，使用时需留意。该目录基于 GeoNode 平台，适合通过 OGC 服务集成行政边界。
desc_en: AmeriGEOSS GeoNode — GAUL 2015 Countries (WFS proxy), provided by the AmeriGEOSS / FAO / WFP GeoNode, is based on FAO's Global Administrative Unit Layers (GAUL) 2015 edition, presenting national administrative boundaries globally with an Americas focus. The data is served through GeoNode as a WFS (proxied OGC service). The page shows no license provided, so use with caution. This GeoNode-based catalog is well suited to integrating administrative boundaries via OGC services.

name: Amsterdam Django-GISServer Open Datasets
theme_raw: 阿姆斯特丹市政矢量（地块、绿地等）
notes: 开源 Django WFS 实现 + 该市开放数据样例
verify_notes: WFS 2.0 server, license is MPL-2.0 not CC0 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Amsterdam Django-GISServer 开放数据集由阿姆斯特丹市政府提供，是一个开源的 Django WFS 实现（采用 MPL-2.0 许可）及该市开放数据的应用样例。它通过 WFS 2.0 端点以 GML/GeoJSON 形式提供阿姆斯特丹的地理数据，既可作为搭建符合 OGC 标准的 WFS 服务的软件框架，也展示了市级开放数据的实际发布方式，适合开发者参考与本地地理数据集成。
desc_en: Amsterdam Django-GISServer Open Datasets, provided by the City of Amsterdam, is an open-source Django WFS implementation (MPL-2.0 licensed) together with sample open data for the city. It serves Amsterdam's geospatial data as GML/GeoJSON through WFS 2.0 endpoints, functioning both as a software framework for building OGC-compliant WFS services and as a demonstration of municipal open-data publishing—useful for developers and local geospatial data integration.

name: ANM - Processos Minerários e Áreas de Mineração (SIGMINE)
notes: Processos minerários ativos e arquivados
verify_notes: GeoServer OWS endpoint live; needs ?service=WMS&request=GetCapabilities. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ANM — 采矿权与矿区（SIGMINE）由巴西国家矿业局（ANM）提供，覆盖整个巴西，呈现活跃及已归档的采矿权处理过程（processos minerários）与矿区范围。数据通过 WFS 在线服务提供，并可经 SIGMINE 系统下载 Shapefile，属于开放数据。它是了解巴西矿业权属、勘探与采矿空间分布的权威来源，适用于矿业、环境与土地管理研究。
desc_en: ANM — Mining Processes and Mining Areas (SIGMINE), provided by Brazil's National Mining Agency (ANM), covers the whole of Brazil and presents active and archived mining-rights processes (processos minerários) and mining areas. The data is served via WFS and downloadable as Shapefile through the SIGMINE system as open data. It is an authoritative source on Brazil's mining tenure and the spatial distribution of exploration and mining, suited to mining, environmental and land-management research.

name: Annual Crop Inventory — Ground Truth Data (vector)
notes: Underused ground-truth vector polygons that pair with the AAFC ACI raster.
verify_notes: Ongoing; last update 2025-12-15 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 年度作物清查——地面验证数据（矢量）由加拿大农业及农业食品部（AAFC）提供，覆盖全加拿大，是与 AAFC 年度作物清查（ACI）栅格产品配套的地面真值矢量多边形，自 2011 年起逐年持续更新。数据以 Esri shapefile、文件地理数据库（FGDB）及 ArcGIS REST 服务形式直接下载，采用加拿大开放政府许可。这一相对未被充分利用的地面验证数据，可用于作物分类的训练与精度评估。
desc_en: The Annual Crop Inventory — Ground Truth Data (vector), provided by Agriculture and Agri-Food Canada (AAFC), covers all of Canada as ground-truth vector polygons paired with the AAFC Annual Crop Inventory (ACI) raster product, updated annually and ongoing since 2011. Available for direct download as Esri shapefile, file geodatabase (FGDB) and via ArcGIS REST under the Open Government Licence – Canada, this underused ground-truth data supports crop-classification training and accuracy assessment.

name: Area of Habitat (AOH) maps for the world's terrestrial birds and mammals
what_changes: Refines IUCN expert range polygons by intersecting with habitat preferences (land cover) and elevational limits to produce 100 m AOH rasters for 5,481 mammal and 10,651 bird species (incl. seasonal maps for 1,816 migratory birds).
notes: Lumbierres, Dahal, Soria et al., Sci Data 2022 (10.1038/s41597-022-01838-w). Canonical IUCN-AOH derivative.
verify_notes: Area of Habitat maps for terrestrial birds & mammals (153.65GB) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球陆生鸟类与哺乳动物栖息地面积（AOH）图（Lumbierres、Dahal、Soria 等，《Scientific Data》2022）提供全球陆生鸟类与哺乳动物的栖息地面积（Area of Habitat）图层，是基于 IUCN 物种分布数据并结合栖息地与海拔偏好精细化的经典 AOH 衍生产品。数据托管于 Dryad，体量约 153.65 GB，默认遵循 CC0 条款。它广泛用于生物多样性评估、物种保护与栖息地连通性研究。
desc_en: Area of Habitat (AOH) maps for the world's terrestrial birds and mammals (Lumbierres, Dahal, Soria et al., Scientific Data 2022) provide Area of Habitat layers for the world's terrestrial birds and mammals, a canonical AOH derivative that refines IUCN species range data with habitat and elevation preferences. Hosted on Dryad at about 153.65 GB and CC0 by default, it is widely used for biodiversity assessment, species conservation and habitat-connectivity research.

name: Area of habitat maps and validated occurrences for neotropical birds of conservation concern
what_changes: Subsets and refines IUCN range maps for threatened/data-deficient Neotropical birds, integrating curated occurrence validation to deliver region-specific AOH layers.
notes: Sci Data 2025; regional niche refinement of IUCN spatial data.
verify_notes: Nature IDP cookie redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 新热带受关注鸟类的栖息地面积图与已验证分布点是发表于《Scientific Data》（2025）的数据集，针对新热带（中南美洲）地区具保护关切的鸟类，提供其栖息地面积（AOH）图及经过验证的出现点位。该数据集是对 IUCN 空间数据在区域尺度上的生态位精细化，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，适用于鸟类保护、生物多样性评估与区域物种分布研究。
desc_en: Area of habitat maps and validated occurrences for neotropical birds of conservation concern is a dataset published in Scientific Data (2025) that, for Neotropical birds of conservation concern, provides Area of Habitat (AOH) maps together with validated occurrence records. It represents a regional-scale niche refinement of IUCN spatial data, released under CC-BY 4.0, and supports bird conservation, biodiversity assessment and regional species-distribution research.

name: Argo Float Trajectories (SEANOE / Argo GDAC)
theme_raw: 洋流（拉格朗日漂流轨迹）
formats: NetCDF + 衍生 GeoJSON/CSV 轨迹
notes: 原生 NetCDF；社区工具 (argopy) 可输出 GeoDataFrame；用于洋流路径与中层流速。
verify_notes: Active SEANOE landing page, current through 2026 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: Argo 浮标轨迹数据（SEANOE / Argo GDAC）由 Argo 计划发布，覆盖全球海洋。Argo 计划在全球海洋部署约 3000 个自由漂流的剖面浮标，每年采集约 10 万条剖面，该数据集提供这些浮标的轨迹，原生为 NetCDF 格式，并可经社区工具（如 argopy）输出 GeoJSON/CSV 轨迹或 GeoDataFrame。快照体量约 82 GB（2026-05-12），按月发布，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，常用于洋流路径与中层流速研究。
desc_en: Argo Float Trajectories (SEANOE / Argo GDAC), released by the Argo Programme, covers the global ocean. Argo deploys around 3,000 free-drifting profiling floats worldwide, collecting roughly 100,000 profiles per year, and this dataset provides their trajectories—natively in NetCDF and convertible to GeoJSON/CSV tracks or a GeoDataFrame via community tools such as argopy. The snapshot is about 82 GB (2026-05-12), released as monthly snapshots under CC BY 4.0, and is commonly used to study ocean-current paths and mid-depth velocities.

name: ASIG Geoportal INSPIRE (Albania)
verify_notes: Redirect loop; could not load | lychee:Rejected status code: 302 Found
desc_zh: ASIG Geoportal INSPIRE（阿尔巴尼亚）由阿尔巴尼亚国家地理信息局（ASIG）运营，提供覆盖阿尔巴尼亚的国家级地理数据，并遵循欧盟 INSPIRE 规范，以 WFS、WMS 等标准化在线服务方式发布。数据开放获取，适合通过 OGC 服务集成阿尔巴尼亚的官方地理图层，用于规划、制图与跨境地理信息互操作。
desc_en: ASIG Geoportal INSPIRE (Albania), operated by ASIG Albania, provides national geospatial data covering Albania, delivered through INSPIRE-compliant standardized services such as WFS and WMS. The data is openly available and well suited to integrating Albania's official geographic layers via OGC services for planning, mapping and cross-border geospatial interoperability.

name: ATCOG GIS Open Data Portal
notes: Regional COG ArcGIS Hub
verify_notes: ATCOG GIS Open Data Portal; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ATCOG GIS 开放数据门户由美国阿克-特克斯政府委员会（Ark-Tex Council of Governments）运营，覆盖东北德州与西南阿肯色地区，提供该区域的开放地理数据，以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 等格式发布。它是一个区域性政府委员会（COG）搭建的 ArcGIS Hub 实例，适用于区域规划、市政分析与本地 GIS 应用，面向公众开放访问。
desc_en: The ATCOG GIS Open Data Portal, operated by the Ark-Tex Council of Governments, covers northeast Texas and southwest Arkansas, USA, providing the region's open geospatial data in formats including Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML. As a regional council-of-governments ArcGIS Hub instance, it supports regional planning, municipal analysis and local GIS applications, with open public access.

name: Australia National Vegetation Information System (NVIS) v6/v7
theme_raw: extant + pre-1750 native vegetation groups (NVIS major vegetation groups)
access: direct-download via data.gov.au / Digital Atlas of Australia
notes: Pre-1750 layer is unique baseline-pre-European vegetation map; per-state download due to file size.
verify_notes: WebFetch blocked (likely WAF/anti-bot); page may still be accessible in browser | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳大利亚国家植被信息系统（NVIS）v6/v7 由澳大利亚政府气候变化、能源、环境与水部（DCCEEW）提供，覆盖全澳，是权威的国家级植被分类与分布数据集。数据以 shapefile 和 ESRI 文件地理数据库形式发布，可通过 data.gov.au 与澳大利亚数字地图集下载，因文件较大需按州分包获取。其独特之处在于含有一份欧洲人定居前（1750 年前）的植被基线图层，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，广泛用于生态、生物多样性与土地管理研究。
desc_en: The Australia National Vegetation Information System (NVIS) v6/v7, provided by the Australian Government's DCCEEW, covers all of Australia as the authoritative national vegetation classification and distribution dataset. Released as shapefile and ESRI file geodatabase via data.gov.au and the Digital Atlas of Australia, it is packaged per state due to large file sizes. A distinctive feature is its pre-1750 baseline layer of pre-European vegetation. Licensed under CC-BY-4.0, it is widely used for ecology, biodiversity and land-management research.

name: AWARE2.0 water scarcity basins (LCA characterization factors)
notes: Polygons with monthly characterization factors
verify_notes: AWARE2.0 water scarcity, 2.1 GB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: AWARE2.0 水资源稀缺流域（生命周期评价特征化因子）由 Zenodo 托管发布，提供 2024 年全球流域尺度的水资源稀缺数据。数据以矢量多边形形式呈现，每个流域附带逐月的特征化因子，是用于生命周期评价（LCA）中水资源稀缺影响评估的 AWARE 方法 2.0 版本。数据体量约 2.1 GB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可、开放获取，适用于水足迹、环境影响评价与可持续性研究。
desc_en: AWARE2.0 water scarcity basins (LCA characterization factors), hosted on Zenodo, provides global basin-scale water-scarcity data for 2024. Delivered as vector polygons with monthly characterization factors per basin, it represents version 2.0 of the AWARE method for assessing water-scarcity impacts in life-cycle assessment (LCA). About 2.1 GB in size and released openly under CC-BY-4.0, it supports water-footprint, environmental-impact assessment and sustainability research.

name: awesome-arcgis ArcGIS Open Data page
formats: GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, GML, GPX, GeoCSV
notes: Live successor of jwasilgeo/awesome-arcgis lead (original URL 404s); functions as the awesome list itself
verify_notes: awesome-arcgis curated catalog page reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是由 esri-es 社区维护的 awesome-arcgis 项目中关于 ArcGIS Open Data 的页面，属于 "awesome" 风格的资源清单。它汇总并指向运行在 ArcGIS Hub 之上的各类开放数据门户与数据集，覆盖范围全球，数据可经由门户以 GeoJSON、Shapefile、KML、GML、GPX、GeoCSV 等多种矢量格式导出。该页面是已失效的 jwasilgeo 原始链接的活跃接替者，本身充当资源索引，适合作为发现政府与机构开放地理数据的入口。许可证因各源数据集而异，多为 CC 系列。
desc_en: This is the ArcGIS Open Data page within the community-maintained awesome-arcgis project (by esri-es), a curated "awesome"-style resource list. It aggregates and links to open-data portals and datasets built on ArcGIS Hub, with global coverage and exports in formats such as GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, GML, GPX and GeoCSV. Serving as the live successor to a now-404 original link, it functions as a discovery index rather than a single dataset, making it a useful entry point for finding government and institutional open geospatial data. Licensing varies by underlying source, typically CC-style.

name: AZGeo Data (Arizona statewide)
notes: Statewide ArcGIS Hub
verify_notes: Arizona AZGeo Data Hub; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: AZGeo Data 是美国亚利桑那州地理信息委员会（AGIC）运行的全州级 ArcGIS Hub 开放数据门户。它集中发布覆盖亚利桑那州的各类权威矢量地理图层，数据可通过 Feature Service 在线调用，或导出为 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 等格式。门户以开放许可提供数据，便于政府、研究与公众在区域规划、制图与空间分析中复用，是获取亚利桑那州官方空间数据的主要渠道。
desc_en: AZGeo Data is a statewide ArcGIS Hub open-data portal operated by the Arizona Geographic Information Council (AGIC). It centralizes authoritative vector layers covering the state of Arizona, accessible online via Feature Services or downloadable as Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML. Provided under an open license, the portal supports reuse by government, research and the public for regional planning, mapping and spatial analysis, and serves as a primary gateway to Arizona's official geospatial data.

name: BBBike Pre-built City Extracts
verify_notes: Directory listing 200+ cities, updated 2026-05-31 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BBBike 城市预切提取服务由 BBBike.org 提供，从 OpenStreetMap 中预先裁切出全球约 250 个城市的矢量数据包，方便用户直接下载所需城市范围而无需自行处理整个 OSM。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、PBF 和 GeoPackage 等常用格式提供，沿用 OSM 的 ODbL 许可。它非常适合城市级制图、路网与兴趣点分析等场景，省去全球数据下载与裁剪的负担。
desc_en: BBBike provides pre-built city extracts derived from OpenStreetMap, offering ready-to-download vector packages for roughly 250 cities worldwide so users can grab a single city's data without processing the full OSM planet. Data is available in common formats including Shapefile, GeoJSON, PBF and GeoPackage, and inherits OSM's ODbL license. It is well suited to city-scale mapping, road-network and point-of-interest analysis, removing the overhead of downloading and clipping global datasets.

name: Bhuvan NRSC LULC 1:50,000 — Vector thematic maps
license: NRSC Bhuvan policy (free for academic & non-commercial)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://bhuvan.nrsc.gov.in/wiki/index.php/List_of_Vector_(Thematic_Maps)_datasets))
notes: Vector download requires Bhuvan account; cycles 1-3 documented in PDFs at bhuvan-app1.nrsc.gov.in.
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout after 60s | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://bhuvan.nrsc.gov.in/wiki/index.php/List_of_Vector_(Thematic_Maps)_datasets))
desc_zh: 这是印度国家遥感中心（NRSC，隶属 ISRO）Bhuvan 平台上的矢量专题图清单，重点包括 1:50,000 比例尺的土地利用/土地覆盖（LULC）矢量产品，覆盖印度全境。数据提供 Shapefile、KML 及 WMS/WFS 服务，多个制图周期的说明以 PDF 形式发布。下载矢量需注册 Bhuvan 账号，依 NRSC Bhuvan 政策免费用于学术与非商业用途，适合区域土地覆盖、规划与资源管理研究。
desc_en: This is the catalogue of vector thematic maps on Bhuvan, the geoportal of India's National Remote Sensing Centre (NRSC, under ISRO), notably the 1:50,000-scale Land Use/Land Cover (LULC) vector products covering all of India. Data is offered as Shapefile, KML and via WMS/WFS, with multiple mapping cycles documented in PDFs. Downloading vectors requires a Bhuvan account and is free for academic and non-commercial use under NRSC policy, supporting regional land-cover, planning and resource-management studies.

name: Bioregional Assessment areas v05
notes: ba_bioregion + ba_subregion polygons (GDA94 Albers)
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为澳大利亚生物区域评估计划（Bioregional Assessment Programme）发布的生物区域范围 v05，包含 ba_bioregion 与 ba_subregion 两类多边形要素，覆盖澳大利亚相关评估区域，采用 GDA94 Albers 投影。数据以 Shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY 许可。它界定了用于评估煤炭与煤层气开发对水资源及相关资产影响的空间单元，适合作为生态与水文影响研究的边界参考图层。
desc_en: This dataset is version 05 of the Bioregional Assessment areas published by Australia's Bioregional Assessment Programme, containing ba_bioregion and ba_subregion polygons in GDA94 Albers projection covering the relevant assessment regions of Australia. Provided as Shapefile under a CC-BY license, it delineates the spatial units used to assess impacts of coal and coal-seam-gas development on water resources and dependent assets, making it a useful boundary reference layer for ecological and hydrological impact studies.

name: BirdLife Endemic Bird Areas (EBAs)
provider: BirdLife International (mirrored on ArcGIS Hub / GFW / Resource Watch)
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON via ArcGIS Feature Service
notes: Older but heavily cited (Stattersfield et al. 1998); often used as biogeographic reference layer.
verify_notes: BirdLife Endemic Bird Areas dataset (ArcGIS Hub); details limited from fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该图层为国际鸟盟（BirdLife International）的特有鸟类区（Endemic Bird Areas, EBAs），全球共 218 个，是识别狭域分布鸟类集中地区的经典生物地理参考数据，源自 Stattersfield 等人 1998 年的奠基性工作。数据在 ArcGIS Hub（及 Global Forest Watch、Resource Watch 等）上镜像，可经 Feature Service 以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 形式开放下载。虽属较早成果但被广泛引用，常用作保护优先区分析与生物多样性研究的底图。
desc_en: This layer represents BirdLife International's Endemic Bird Areas (EBAs), 218 globally, a classic biogeographic reference identifying concentrations of range-restricted bird species, rooted in the foundational work of Stattersfield et al. (1998). Mirrored on ArcGIS Hub (and Global Forest Watch / Resource Watch), it is openly downloadable as Shapefile or GeoJSON via an ArcGIS Feature Service. Though an older product, it remains heavily cited and is widely used as a baseline layer for conservation-priority analysis and biodiversity research.

name: Brazil Base Hidrografica Ottocodificada (BHO) 2017 (5K + 50K)
provider: Agencia Nacional de Aguas e Saneamento Basico (ANA)
theme_raw: Drainage lines, drainage areas with Pfafstetter coding
license: Open (Brazilian Lei de Acesso a Informacao)
notes: 3.3M+ drainage sections with Otto Pfafstetter codes - excellent for basin nesting analyses.
verify_notes: ANA Brazil open data portal; minimal SSR content | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为巴西国家水资源与基本卫生署（ANA）发布的 2017 版 Otto 编码水文基础数据（BHO），提供 1:5,000 与 1:50,000 两种比例尺，覆盖巴西全境。数据采用 Pfafstetter（Otto）编码体系，含逾 330 万条河段，特别适合流域嵌套与上下游汇流分析。格式包括 GeoPackage 与 Shapefile，依巴西信息公开法以开放许可发布，是巴西水文网络建模的权威矢量基础。
desc_en: This dataset is the 2017 Ottocoded hydrographic base (BHO) published by Brazil's National Water and Sanitation Agency (ANA), provided at 1:5,000 and 1:50,000 scales covering all of Brazil. Using the Pfafstetter (Otto) coding system, it contains over 3.3 million drainage sections, making it especially well suited to basin-nesting and upstream-downstream connectivity analysis. Available as GeoPackage and Shapefile under an open license aligned with Brazil's access-to-information law, it is an authoritative vector foundation for Brazilian hydrographic network modeling.

name: Bunting Labs OSM Extract API
notes: Returns OSM vector features as GeoJSON for arbitrary bbox+tags
verify_notes: REST API extract service | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Bunting Labs 的 OSM 提取 API 是一项免费的 REST 服务，可按任意边界框（bbox）和标签实时返回 OpenStreetMap 矢量要素，输出为 GeoJSON，覆盖全球。它沿用 OSM 的 ODbL 许可，免去用户自行下载与解析庞大 OSM 数据的步骤，适合在应用、脚本或地图流程中按需获取小范围 OSM 要素，便于快速集成。
desc_en: Bunting Labs' OSM Extract API is a free REST service that returns OpenStreetMap vector features in real time for an arbitrary bounding box and tag set, delivering results as GeoJSON with global coverage. It inherits OSM's ODbL license and spares users from downloading and parsing the bulky OSM planet, making it convenient for fetching small-area OSM features on demand within apps, scripts or mapping pipelines for quick integration.

name: California Tsunami Inundation Maps (CGS)
formats: ArcGIS FeatureServer, WFS, WMS, GeoJSON, KML, shapefile
notes: Statewide modeled tsunami inundation polygons
verify_notes: Page returns 404; dataset may have moved on CA Open Data | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 该数据集为加州地质调查局（CGS）发布的海啸淹没图，以多边形形式给出沿加州海岸的建模海啸淹没范围，用于应急规划与疏散区划定。数据通过 ArcGIS FeatureServer 提供，并支持 WFS、WMS、GeoJSON、KML 及 Shapefile 等多种访问与格式，作为加州开放数据公开发布，是海岸灾害风险评估与防灾准备的重要参考图层。
desc_en: This dataset is the Tsunami Inundation Maps from the California Geological Survey (CGS), providing modeled tsunami inundation polygons along the California coast for emergency planning and evacuation zoning. Served via an ArcGIS FeatureServer and also accessible through WFS, WMS, GeoJSON, KML and Shapefile, it is published as California open data and serves as an important reference layer for coastal hazard risk assessment and disaster preparedness.

name: Caribbean Port Calls & Vessel Trajectory Dataset
provider: Iphar et al. — Ocean Engineering / Zenodo
theme_raw: 航运 - 港口靠泊+船舶轨迹
license_now: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (主) + CC BY-NC-ND 3.0 IGO (UN ground truth, 3 文件)
formats_now: CSV, GeoJSON, Shapefile, PNG, PDF, TXT (EPSG:4326)
notes: 含 quay 几何 + 每日定位 + 船型分类, 罕见的人工修正过的港口图层
desc_zh: 该数据集为加勒比海地区的港口停靠与船舶轨迹数据，由 Iphar 等人发表于《Ocean Engineering》并存于 Zenodo，覆盖加勒比海 528 个港口（2019 年），约 835 MB。数据包含码头（quay）几何、每日定位与船型分类，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON 与 CSV。主体采用 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 许可，另有 3 个联合国地面真值文件为 CC BY-NC-ND 3.0 IGO。其经人工修正的港口图层较为罕见，适合海事交通、港口与航运研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides Caribbean port calls and vessel trajectories, authored by Iphar et al. (Ocean Engineering) and archived on Zenodo, covering 528 ports in the Caribbean for 2019 (about 835 MB). It includes quay geometries, daily positions and vessel-type classification, delivered as Shapefile, GeoJSON and CSV. The main data is licensed CC BY-NC-SA 4.0, with three UN ground-truth files under CC BY-NC-ND 3.0 IGO. Its manually curated port layer is uncommon, making it valuable for maritime traffic, port and shipping research.

name: CCTD - Glossary
notes: Documentation for CCTD
verify_notes: CCTD glossary table | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是 NOAA 西南渔业科学中心（SWFSC）通过 ERDDAP 发布的 CCTD（California Current Trophic Database 等）数据集的术语表，属于配套文档资源，用于解释相关字段与名词含义。数据经 ERDDAP tabledap 接口访问，属 NOAA 公共领域。它本身不含空间几何，主要作为理解和正确使用 CCTD 主体数据的参考说明。
desc_en: This is the glossary for NOAA Southwest Fisheries Science Center's (SWFSC) CCTD dataset, served via ERDDAP as a companion documentation resource explaining fields and terminology. Accessed through the ERDDAP tabledap interface and in the NOAA public domain, it contains no spatial geometry itself and functions primarily as a reference for understanding and correctly using the main CCTD data.

name: CCTD - Predator Taxonomy table
notes: Companion table to CCTD spatial data
verify_notes: CCTD predator taxonomy; 143 taxa 1967-2019 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是 NOAA 西南渔业科学中心（SWFSC）经 ERDDAP 发布的 CCTD 数据集的捕食者分类表，作为 CCTD 空间数据的配套表格，记录捕食者的分类学信息。数据通过 ERDDAP tabledap 接口以 CSV、JSON 等格式获取，属 NOAA 公共领域。它可与 CCTD 主体数据关联，支持海洋食物网与捕食关系分析。
desc_en: This is the predator taxonomy table for NOAA SWFSC's CCTD dataset, served via ERDDAP as a companion table to the CCTD spatial data, recording taxonomic information for predator taxa. Accessible through the ERDDAP tabledap interface in formats such as CSV and JSON and in the NOAA public domain, it joins to the main CCTD data to support marine food-web and predation analysis.

name: CCTD - Prey Taxonomy table
notes: Companion table
verify_notes: CCTD prey taxonomy; 1,658+ taxa | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是 NOAA 西南渔业科学中心（SWFSC）经 ERDDAP 发布的 CCTD 数据集的被捕食者（猎物）分类表，作为 CCTD 空间数据的配套表格，记录猎物物种的分类学信息。数据通过 ERDDAP tabledap 接口访问，属 NOAA 公共领域。它与捕食者分类表及 CCTD 主体数据配合使用，支持海洋营养关系与食物网研究。
desc_en: This is the prey taxonomy table for NOAA SWFSC's CCTD dataset, served via ERDDAP as a companion table to the CCTD spatial data, recording taxonomic information for prey species. Accessed through the ERDDAP tabledap interface and in the NOAA public domain, it works alongside the predator taxonomy table and the main CCTD data to support studies of marine trophic relationships and food webs.

name: CDC COVID-19 Geospatial Layers
notes: County-level COVID case rates, vaccination, community transmission polygons.
verify_notes: lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该服务为美国疾控中心（CDC）发布的 COVID-19 地理空间图层，覆盖美国并提供县级与州级数据，内容包括县级病例率、疫苗接种与社区传播水平等多边形要素。数据通过 CDC 的 ArcGIS REST 服务目录提供，可导出为 GeoJSON、Shapefile 或 FeatureServer JSON，属公共领域。它适合疫情时空分析、公共卫生制图与区域风险评估。
desc_en: This service provides the US CDC's COVID-19 geospatial layers covering the United States at county and state level, including polygons of county case rates, vaccination and community transmission. Delivered through CDC's ArcGIS REST services folder and exportable as GeoJSON, Shapefile or FeatureServer JSON in the public domain, it supports spatiotemporal pandemic analysis, public-health mapping and regional risk assessment.

name: CDC/ATSDR SVI 2018
notes: Archival 2018 release for time-series comparability.
verify_notes: MapServer subpath 404; SVI2018 folder exists in services dir | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该服务为 CDC/ATSDR 的 2018 版社会脆弱性指数（Social Vulnerability Index, SVI），覆盖美国，提供普查区与县级数据。SVI 基于社会经济、家庭构成、少数族裔与住房交通等多类指标，衡量社区在灾害与公共卫生事件中的脆弱程度。数据经 ArcGIS REST MapServer 以 FeatureServer、GeoJSON 形式提供，属公共领域。此为存档版本，便于多年份时间序列对比分析。
desc_en: This service provides CDC/ATSDR's 2018 Social Vulnerability Index (SVI) covering the United States at census-tract and county level. SVI combines socioeconomic, household-composition, minority and housing-transport indicators to measure community vulnerability to disasters and public-health events. Served via an ArcGIS REST MapServer as FeatureServer and GeoJSON in the public domain, this archival 2018 release supports multi-year time-series comparison.

name: China Reservoir Database (CRD) - ~100,000 reservoirs
provider: Authors via ESSD / Zenodo (China research consortium)
file_size: 40.1 GB (this version); 50.3 GB total all versions
notes: Includes name, storage capacity; 50,085 km² inundation; 979.62 km³ storage
verify_notes: Note: dataset relocated to scidb.cn (DOI 10.57760/sciencedb.05331); files require login | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 中国水库数据库（CRD）汇集了中国约 97,435 座水库的矢量数据，发表于 ESSD（2022, 14, 4017）并存于 Zenodo。数据包含水库名称、库容等属性，总淹没面积约 50,085 平方公里，总库容约 979.62 立方公里，以 Shapefile 加 CSV 形式提供（本版本约 40 GB），采用 CC-BY 许可。它为中国水文、水资源管理与地表水变化研究提供了全面的水库本底数据。
desc_en: The China Reservoir Database (CRD) compiles vector data for roughly 97,435 reservoirs across China, published in ESSD (2022, 14, 4017) and archived on Zenodo. It includes attributes such as reservoir name and storage capacity, totaling about 50,085 km² of inundation area and roughly 979.62 km³ of storage, delivered as Shapefile plus CSV (about 40 GB for this version) under a CC-BY license. It provides comprehensive baseline reservoir data for Chinese hydrology, water-resource management and surface-water change research.

name: China-CEEC (16+1 Initiative)
notes: Companion vector dataset in same BRI geo-mapping collection.
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; bot protection. | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 该数据集来自香港大学 DataHub 的 BRINFAITH 地理制图合集（Man & Palmer, 2022），以多边形 Shapefile 形式呈现中国—中东欧国家合作（16+1 倡议）相关国家范围，覆盖中国及参与的中东欧国家。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可开放下载，作为同一带路（BRI）地理制图项目中的配套矢量图层，适合一带一路与区域合作的地理与政策研究。
desc_en: This dataset comes from the BRINFAITH geo-mapping collection on the University of Hong Kong DataHub (Man & Palmer, 2022), presenting the China-CEEC (16+1 Initiative) participating countries as polygon Shapefiles covering China and the involved Central/Eastern European states. Openly downloadable under a CC BY 4.0 license, it is a companion vector layer within the same Belt and Road (BRI) geo-mapping project, suited to geographic and policy research on BRI and regional cooperation.

name: ChinaPV - Vectorized solar PV installations across China (2015 & 2020)
coverage: China; PV installation polygons for 2015 and 2020
notes: Per-installation polygons with size attributes
verify_notes: Nature IDP cookie redirect; article exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ChinaPV 是覆盖中国 2015 年与 2020 年的太阳能光伏装置矢量数据集，发表于《Scientific Data》（2024）。数据以逐个光伏电站的多边形呈现，并附带规模等属性，可用于追踪中国光伏建设的空间分布与扩张。数据以 Shapefile 提供，经论文关联的 Figshare/Zenodo 开放获取，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，适合能源转型、土地利用与可再生能源研究。
desc_en: ChinaPV is a vector dataset of solar photovoltaic installations across China for 2015 and 2020, published in Scientific Data (2024). It represents PV facilities as per-installation polygons with size attributes, enabling tracking of the spatial distribution and expansion of China's solar buildout. Provided as Shapefile and openly accessible via Figshare/Zenodo linked to the paper under a CC-BY 4.0 license, it suits energy-transition, land-use and renewable-energy research.

name: ChinaPV GitHub repository
notes: Companion code repository for the ChinaPV Zenodo dataset
verify_notes: License not visible on page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 ChinaPV 数据集的配套代码仓库，由河海大学与中科院地理科学与资源研究所（IGSNRR）相关团队维护，托管于 GitHub。仓库提供生成与处理光伏装置矢量数据的 Python 代码及 Shapefile，覆盖中国，开放获取。它与 ChinaPV 的 Zenodo 数据集配合，便于复现方法、扩展分析或应用于其他光伏遥感提取任务。
desc_en: This is the companion code repository for the ChinaPV dataset, maintained by teams associated with Hohai University and the Institute of Geographic Sciences and Natural Resources Research (IGSNRR), hosted on GitHub. It provides Python code and Shapefiles for generating and processing the PV-installation vector data covering China, openly available. Paired with the ChinaPV Zenodo dataset, it facilitates method reproduction, extended analysis or application to other PV remote-sensing extraction tasks.

name: CKAN Demo / Federated Catalogs
theme_raw: Generic open-data catalog hosting many vector datasets
license_now: Mixed (CC-BY majority, CC-NC, OGL-UK, Other Open)
formats_now: CSV, JPEG, HTML, JSON, MP4, TXT
notes: Reference platform; many national portals (data.gov, data.gov.uk) run CKAN
verify_notes: CKAN demo registry, 13 datasets, API available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是开放知识基金会（Open Knowledge Foundation）维护的 CKAN 演示门户，作为 CKAN 开源数据目录平台的参考与示例实例，包含少量演示数据集，许可证混合（多为 CC-BY，亦有 CC-NC、英国 OGL 等）。数据可经 Web 界面与 API 访问，部分含 GeoJSON、KML、Shapefile 等格式。CKAN 是众多国家级开放数据门户（如 data.gov、data.gov.uk）的底层平台，此演示站适合了解其结构与 API。
desc_en: This is the CKAN demo portal maintained by the Open Knowledge Foundation, serving as a reference and example instance of the open-source CKAN data-catalogue platform, containing a small set of demo datasets with mixed licensing (mostly CC-BY, plus CC-NC, UK OGL and others). Data is accessible via web interface and API, with some GeoJSON, KML and Shapefile formats. As CKAN underpins many national open-data portals (e.g. data.gov, data.gov.uk), this demo is useful for learning its structure and API.

name: CNUC - Cadastro Nacional de Unidades de Conservação (Brazil)
notes: Attributes include ID_WCMC linking to WDPA; Portuguese-language portal often missed by global users
verify_notes: Updated to April 2026; multiple datasets 2018-2026 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该数据集为巴西环境部（MMA）发布的国家保护区登记册（CNUC），以 Shapefile 形式提供巴西全境的自然保护单元（保护区）边界，约每两月更新一次。属性中包含与世界保护区数据库（WDPA）对应的 ID_WCMC 字段，便于关联。数据采用 CC-BY 许可，经葡萄牙语开放数据门户直接下载，是巴西保护地分析的权威矢量来源，常被全球用户忽略。
desc_en: This dataset is Brazil's National Register of Conservation Units (CNUC), published by the Ministry of the Environment (MMA), providing protected-area boundaries for all of Brazil as Shapefiles with roughly bi-monthly updates. Attributes include an ID_WCMC field linking to the World Database on Protected Areas (WDPA). Available under a CC-BY license via direct download from the Portuguese-language open-data portal, it is an authoritative vector source for Brazilian protected-area analysis that global users often overlook.

name: Cold-Water Coral global occurrence dataset
notes: 合并 GBIF + NOAA Deep Sea Coral Base + ICES VME；可作为 VME 矢量底图。
verify_notes: Cold-water coral records dataset on Figshare; 817,559 records | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为全球冷水珊瑚（cold-water coral）出现记录，发表于《Scientific Data》（2023），合并了 GBIF、NOAA 深海珊瑚数据库与 ICES 脆弱海洋生态系统（VME）等来源，共约 817,559 条记录，覆盖全球。数据以带几何的 CSV 与点要素 Shapefile 形式作为论文补充材料提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。它可作为脆弱海洋生态系统的矢量底图，支持深海生物多样性与保护研究。
desc_en: This dataset is a global compilation of cold-water coral occurrences published in Scientific Data (2023), merging sources including GBIF, the NOAA Deep Sea Coral database and ICES Vulnerable Marine Ecosystems (VME), totaling about 817,559 records worldwide. Provided as the paper's supplement in geometry-bearing CSV and point Shapefile under a CC-BY 4.0 license, it can serve as a baseline VME vector layer supporting deep-sea biodiversity and conservation research.

name: Colorado Data Files (Harvard EDA) - Precinct Shapefile and Election Results
notes: Precinct polygons joined with election results
verify_notes: DOI resolves; landing page is JS/SPA, content not rendered via WebFetch; assume Harvard Dataverse default terms | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 该数据集来自哈佛选举数据档案（Harvard Election Data Archive，存于 Dataverse），为美国科罗拉多州（约 2008 年）的选区（precinct）数据文件，包含选区多边形并联接了选举结果。数据以 Shapefile 提供，遵循哈佛 Dataverse 的开放（接近 CC0）条款。它适合美国选举地理、选区划分与投票行为的空间分析研究。
desc_en: This dataset comes from the Harvard Election Data Archive (on Dataverse), providing precinct-level data files for Colorado, USA (circa 2008), containing precinct polygons joined with election results. Delivered as Shapefile under Harvard Dataverse's open, CC0-like terms, it suits spatial analysis of US electoral geography, districting and voting behavior.

name: Continent Codes (DataHub core)
notes: Reference table for joining.
verify_notes: Two-letter continent codes | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 DataHub.io 维护的大洲代码参考表，提供全球各大洲的标准代码与名称，便于与其他地理数据按大洲进行联接。数据以 CSV/JSON 形式开放提供，采用 ODC-PDDL-1.0 公共领域许可。它本身不含几何，是一个轻量的查找/联接参照表，常用于数据整理与空间分组聚合。
desc_en: This is the Continent Codes reference table maintained by DataHub.io, providing standard codes and names for the world's continents to facilitate joining other geographic data by continent. Offered openly as CSV/JSON under the ODC-PDDL-1.0 public-domain dedication, it contains no geometry itself and serves as a lightweight lookup/join reference, commonly used for data wrangling and spatial grouping.

name: Crime Data from 2020 to Present (LAPD)
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] 点数据带坐标但主要为表格,矢量性弱
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为洛杉矶市发布、经 data.gov 编目的 2020 年至今犯罪数据，记录报案犯罪事件并带有经纬度坐标，主体为表格型 CSV（可能另有 GeoJSON）。数据属美国政府公共领域，可直接下载。由于点位坐标存在但以表格形式为主，其矢量属性较弱；适合城市犯罪时空模式、热点与公共安全分析。
desc_en: This dataset is the City of Los Angeles' crime data from 2020 to present, catalogued on data.gov, recording reported crime incidents with latitude/longitude as primarily tabular CSV (possibly also GeoJSON). In the US public domain and directly downloadable, it has weak vector characteristics since coordinates exist but the format is mainly tabular. It suits analysis of urban crime spatiotemporal patterns, hotspots and public safety.

name: CY-Bench: Sub-national crop yield forecasting benchmark
what_changes: Benchmark dataset for maize and wheat yield forecasting; uses GAUL level-1 polygons to define forecasting units and to aggregate pixel-level predictors
notes: ML benchmark built on top of GAUL geometries
verify_notes: CY-Bench dataset 6.3GB; crop yield bench | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CY-Bench 是一个用于次国家级（sub-national）作物产量预测的机器学习基准数据集，托管于 Zenodo，约 6.3 GB，采用 EUPL 1.2 许可。它建立在 GAUL 行政边界几何之上，将气象、遥感等预测因子与各地作物产量对齐，为产量预报模型提供标准化的训练与评测框架。适合农业、粮食安全与机器学习方法的对比研究。
desc_en: CY-Bench is a machine-learning benchmark for sub-national crop yield forecasting, hosted on Zenodo at about 6.3 GB under an EUPL 1.2 license. Built on top of GAUL administrative geometries, it aligns predictors such as weather and remote-sensing data with regional crop yields to provide a standardized framework for training and evaluating yield-forecasting models. It suits research in agriculture, food security and comparative machine-learning methods.

name: dados-referenciais-abertos
notes: Ready-to-use bundles
verify_notes: Brazil admin boundaries; license previously unspecified | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: dados-referenciais-abertos 是由 fititnt 维护的 GitHub 项目，整理并提供巴西的开放参考地理数据，以即用型数据包形式发布，覆盖巴西。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON 与 TopoJSON 等格式，采用 ODC-DbCL 许可，可直接下载。它便于在制图与分析中快速获取巴西的行政与参考边界等基础矢量数据。
desc_en: dados-referenciais-abertos is a GitHub project maintained by fititnt that curates and provides open reference geographic data for Brazil as ready-to-use bundles covering the country. Data is offered in Shapefile, GeoJSON and TopoJSON under an ODC-DbCL license and is directly downloadable. It makes it easy to quickly obtain baseline vector data such as Brazilian administrative and reference boundaries for mapping and analysis.

name: dados.gov.br
notes: Brazilian Portal Brasileiro de Dados Abertos; CKAN-based; IBGE and ministry vector layers.
verify_notes: Brazilian open data portal, minimal content returned | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: dados.gov.br 是巴西联邦政府的开放数据门户（Portal Brasileiro de Dados Abertos），基于 CKAN 构建，覆盖巴西全国。门户汇集了 IBGE 及各部委的矢量图层，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 等格式，并可通过 CKAN API 访问，数据多以 ODbL 等开放许可发布。它是获取巴西官方地理与统计数据的主要入口，适合行政、统计与专题制图应用。
desc_en: dados.gov.br is the Brazilian federal government's open-data portal (Portal Brasileiro de Dados Abertos), built on CKAN and covering all of Brazil. It aggregates vector layers from IBGE and government ministries, offering Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML formats accessible via the CKAN API, with data typically under open licenses such as ODbL. It is a primary gateway to Brazil's official geographic and statistical data, suited to administrative, statistical and thematic mapping applications.

name: data.gov USGS National Geologic Map Database (NGMDB) Collection
license_now: Public Domain (US Govt; no explicit CC tag)
notes: Index to thousands of vector geologic map products
verify_notes: Updated 2025-08-21 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是经 data.gov 编目的美国地质调查局（USGS）国家地质图数据库（NGMDB）合集，覆盖美国及其领地。它是数以千计矢量地质图产品的索引，每幅图可分别下载，格式包括 Shapefile、GeoPackage、KML 等。数据属美国政府公共领域（未明确标注 CC）。该合集是获取美国权威地质制图矢量数据的核心入口，适合地质、矿产与地学研究。
desc_en: This is the USGS National Geologic Map Database (NGMDB) Collection catalogued on data.gov, covering the USA and its territories. It serves as an index to thousands of vector geologic map products, each downloadable per map in formats including Shapefile, GeoPackage and KML. The data is in the US government public domain (with no explicit CC tag). The collection is a central gateway to authoritative US geologic mapping vector data, suited to geology, mineral and earth-science research.

name: data.govt.nz
notes: Federates LINZ Data Service vector layers; uses ckanext-spatial + ISO19115 validators.
verify_notes: Bot-detection interstitial returned | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: data.govt.nz 是新西兰政府的开放数据目录，由 Stats NZ 与土地信息局（LINZ）支持，基于 CKAN 构建，覆盖新西兰全国。门户聚合并编目 LINZ Data Service 的矢量图层，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 及 WFS 访问，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，并使用 ckanext-spatial 与 ISO19115 元数据校验。它是获取新西兰官方空间数据的主要入口。
desc_en: data.govt.nz is New Zealand's government open-data catalogue, supported by Stats NZ and Land Information New Zealand (LINZ), built on CKAN and covering the whole country. It aggregates and catalogues LINZ Data Service vector layers, offering Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and WFS access under a CC-BY 4.0 license, using ckanext-spatial and ISO19115 metadata validators. It is a primary gateway to New Zealand's official geospatial data.

name: data.overheid.nl
notes: CKAN-based DCAT-AP/INSPIRE harvester pulling PDOK/Kadaster vector services.
verify_notes: Dutch open data portal live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: data.overheid.nl 是荷兰政府的开放数据门户，基于 CKAN 构建，覆盖荷兰全国，作为 DCAT-AP/INSPIRE 元数据收割器，汇集来自 PDOK 与 Kadaster 的矢量服务。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GML 及 WFS 等格式，并可通过 CKAN API 访问，许可以 CC0 / CC-BY 为主。它是查找与获取荷兰官方地理空间数据的主要入口。
desc_en: data.overheid.nl is the Dutch government's open-data portal, built on CKAN and covering the Netherlands, functioning as a DCAT-AP/INSPIRE harvester that aggregates vector services from PDOK and Kadaster. Data is offered in Shapefile, GeoJSON, GML and WFS formats and accessible via the CKAN API, primarily under CC0 / CC-BY licenses. It is a primary gateway for discovering and obtaining the Netherlands' official geospatial data.

name: datasets/country-codes (companion table)
theme_raw: Country code lookup (non-spatial but pairs with vector)
notes: Joins to geo-countries by ISO3
verify_notes: 975 stars | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 datasets.io 维护的国家代码参照表，托管于 GitHub，覆盖全球各国，以 CSV 形式提供 ISO 等标准代码及相关属性。它可按 ISO3 与 geo-countries 等几何数据集联接，采用 PDDL 许可（ISO 部分另有说明）。该表本身不含几何，主要用作数据整理中的查找与联接参照，常与国界数据配合使用。
desc_en: This is the datasets.io country-codes reference table hosted on GitHub, covering countries worldwide and providing ISO and other standard codes plus related attributes as CSV. It joins to geometry datasets such as geo-countries by ISO3 and is offered under a PDDL license (with an ISO caveat). The table itself contains no geometry and serves mainly as a lookup/join reference in data wrangling, commonly paired with country-boundary data.

name: datasets/geodata
verify_notes: Forked from geobabbler/geodata | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 datasets.io 维护的 geodata 仓库，托管于 GitHub，汇集多种地理矢量数据，内容来源与范围混合。仓库以开放许可提供多种矢量格式的数据，可直接下载。鉴于元数据较为概括，它适合作为获取通用参考地理数据的便捷来源，具体内容以仓库实际文件为准。
desc_en: This is the datasets.io geodata repository hosted on GitHub, gathering a variety of geographic vector data with mixed sources and coverage. It provides data in various vector formats under an open license and is directly downloadable. Given the general metadata, it is suited as a convenient source of general-purpose reference geographic data, with specifics determined by the repository's actual contents.

name: datasets/political_geography
verify_notes: Active but minimal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 datasets.io 维护的 political_geography 仓库，托管于 GitHub，提供与政治地理相关的全球矢量数据。仓库以开放许可发布矢量格式数据，可直接下载。它通常用于行政与政治边界等参考制图与联接分析；具体要素与属性以仓库实际文件为准。
desc_en: This is the datasets.io political_geography repository hosted on GitHub, providing global vector data related to political geography. It publishes vector-format data under an open license and is directly downloadable. It is typically used for reference mapping and join analysis of administrative and political boundaries, with specific features and attributes determined by the repository's actual contents.

name: dati.gov.it
notes: CKAN catalog harvesting regional geoportals (Lombardia, RNDT national geospatial repertorio).
verify_notes: WebFetch returned 403; likely bot-blocked but site is operational | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: dati.gov.it 是由意大利数字化转型局（AgID）运营的国家开放数据目录，覆盖意大利全国，基于 CKAN 并遵循 DCAT-AP_IT 规范，收割各区域地理门户（如伦巴第大区）及国家地理信息库（RNDT）的数据。门户提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、WFS、GML 等格式，并可通过 CKAN API 访问，许可以 CC-BY 4.0 / IODL 为主。它是查找意大利官方地理空间数据的主要入口。
desc_en: dati.gov.it is Italy's national open-data catalogue operated by AgID, covering the whole country, built on CKAN and following the DCAT-AP_IT profile, harvesting regional geoportals (such as Lombardia) and the national geospatial repository (RNDT). It offers Shapefile, GeoJSON, WFS and GML formats accessible via the CKAN API, primarily under CC-BY 4.0 / IODL licenses. It is a primary gateway for discovering Italy's official geospatial data.

name: DeepOWT - global offshore wind turbine deployment dataset
notes: Deep-learning derived from Sentinel-1; includes deployment-stage attribute
verify_notes: DeepOWT offshore wind turbines | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: DeepOWT 是一个全球海上风电机组部署数据集，由 Hoeser 等人 (2022) 基于 Sentinel-1 雷达影像通过深度学习方法提取，发表于 ESSD。数据覆盖全球范围，包含 9,941 台海上风机点位，记录了 2016 年三季度至 2021 年二季度间的部署阶段属性，并附带用于验证的多边形。数据以 GeoJSON 格式提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可在 Zenodo 开放下载。适用于海上风电发展监测、能源转型研究与遥感方法验证等场景。
desc_en: DeepOWT is a global offshore wind turbine (OWT) deployment dataset by Hoeser et al. (2022), published in ESSD. It was derived from Sentinel-1 radar imagery using deep learning and contains 9,941 turbine point locations with deployment-stage attributes spanning 2016 Q3 to 2021 Q2, alongside validation polygons. Distributed as GeoJSON under CC-BY-4.0 and openly available on Zenodo, it supports monitoring offshore wind expansion, energy-transition analysis, and benchmarking of remote-sensing detection methods.

name: Digital Earth Africa Waterbodies
formats: Shapefile/GeoPackage polygons + Parquet timeseries (COG for masks)
formats_now: Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF (COG), STAC v1.0.0; S3 af-south-1
notes: >700,000 waterbody polygons from 3 decades of Landsat
verify_notes: Healthy | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Digital Earth Africa Waterbodies 由 Digital Earth Africa 制作，基于三十年 Landsat 卫星观测，绘制了覆盖整个非洲大陆的水体多边形，包含逾 70 万个水体要素。数据提供 Shapefile/GeoPackage 多边形、Parquet 格式的时间序列以及 COG 掩膜，托管于 AWS（af-south-1 区域）的 S3 存储桶中，采用 CC-BY-4.0 开放许可。可用于水资源监测、地表水动态变化分析、干旱与洪水评估等研究。
desc_en: Digital Earth Africa Waterbodies maps over 700,000 waterbody polygons across continental Africa, derived from three decades of Landsat observations. It provides Shapefile/GeoPackage polygons, Parquet time-series of surface-water extent, and COG masks, hosted on AWS S3 (af-south-1) under CC-BY-4.0. The dataset is well suited to water-resource monitoring, surface-water dynamics, and drought or flood assessment across the continent.

name: Dirichlet tessellation of the study area (shapefile)
notes: Voronoi/Dirichlet polygons from a dengue spatial study.
verify_notes: plos.figshare blocks WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 该数据集是一项登革热媒介空间研究的补充材料，提供研究区域的 Dirichlet（Voronoi/泰森）镶嵌多边形，以 Shapefile 格式存储，托管于 PLOS Figshare 并采用 CC BY 许可。其覆盖范围限于该研究的特定区域，主要用于复现相关分析或作为空间统计、邻近域划分的参考。属于面向特定论文的小型派生数据集。
desc_en: This dataset is a supplementary file from a dengue-vector spatial study, providing a Dirichlet (Voronoi/Thiessen) tessellation of the study area as a Shapefile. Hosted on PLOS Figshare under CC BY, its extent is limited to that study's specific region. It is primarily useful for reproducing the original analysis or as a reference for spatial-statistics and proximity-based partitioning, and is best understood as a paper-specific derivative product.

name: EEA Geospatial Data Catalogue (GeoPackage filter)
notes: Faceted search of all vector GPKG datasets
verify_notes: HTTP 400 Bad Request - search endpoint may have changed | lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: 这是欧洲环境署 (EEA) 空间数据基础设施 (SDI) 地理空间数据目录的一个分面检索入口，预先筛选出以 GeoPackage 格式提供的矢量数据集。目录覆盖欧洲范围，汇集多个环境与地理主题的数据，许可条款因来源而异。它是一个数据发现与检索门户，便于用户按格式浏览并定位 EEA 发布的各类矢量产品，而非单一数据集本身。
desc_en: This is a faceted search entry into the European Environment Agency (EEA) Spatial Data Infrastructure catalogue, pre-filtered to vector datasets offered in GeoPackage format. Covering Europe, the catalogue aggregates many environmental and geographic themes, with licensing that varies by source. Rather than a single dataset, it serves as a discovery portal that lets users browse by format and locate the GeoPackage products published across the EEA's holdings.

name: EPA EJScreen Feature Service
provider: US EPA Office of Environmental Justice
formats: ArcGIS Hub FeatureService, File GDB, CSV
notes: EJScreen 2.32 currently; supplementary indexes use ACS demographics. Distinct from CDC EJI.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub返回403禁止,可能需要浏览器访问或资源已变更;EPA EJScreen本身仍公开 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EPA EJScreen Feature Service 由美国环境保护署环境正义办公室发布，是一套覆盖全美的环境正义筛查数据服务，当前版本为 EJScreen 2.32。它结合环境指标与基于 ACS 人口普查的社会人口指标，构建补充指数，用于识别可能存在环境正义关切的社区。数据通过 ArcGIS Hub FeatureService、File GDB 及 CSV 提供，属美国政府公共领域作品。需注意它与 CDC 的 EJI 是不同产品。
desc_en: The EPA EJScreen Feature Service, published by the US EPA Office of Environmental Justice, is a nationwide environmental-justice screening service (currently EJScreen 2.32). It combines environmental indicators with ACS-based demographic measures to build supplementary indexes that help flag communities of potential environmental-justice concern. Delivered via ArcGIS Hub FeatureService, File GDB, and CSV as a US-government public-domain product, it is distinct from the CDC's Environmental Justice Index (EJI).

name: Esri ArcGIS Open Data product page
notes: Lead/landing for the ecosystem behind the awesome-arcgis reference
verify_notes: Esri product information page; not a direct data repository | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Esri 的 ArcGIS Open Data 产品页面，作为开放数据发布生态系统的入口与说明页。该平台让政府机构与组织通过 ArcGIS Hub 发布开放数据，终端用户可按 KML、CSV、GeoJSON、Shapefile 等格式下载。它本身并非具体数据集，而是面向全球海量开放地理数据门户的导航与背景介绍，常作为 awesome-arcgis 等资源索引的牵引页。
desc_en: This is Esri's ArcGIS Open Data product page, serving as the landing and reference point for the open-data publishing ecosystem built on ArcGIS Hub. The platform lets governments and organizations publish open datasets that end users can download as KML, CSV, GeoJSON, or Shapefile. It is not a dataset itself but rather a navigation and background page for a global ecosystem of open geospatial data portals, often cited as a lead for the awesome-arcgis reference.

name: esri-dump (TypeScript)
notes: Node.js port of pyesridump
verify_notes: License listed MIT (known: ISC/MIT) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: esri-dump 是 OpenAddresses 维护的一个 TypeScript/Node.js 工具，是 pyesridump 的移植版本，可将任意 ArcGIS REST 服务端点中的要素导出为 GeoJSON。项目托管于 GitHub 并通过 npm 分发，采用 MIT 许可。它是一个数据提取工具而非数据集本身，适用于批量抓取在线发布的 ArcGIS 矢量服务、构建开放数据采集管线等场景。
desc_en: esri-dump is a TypeScript/Node.js tool maintained by OpenAddresses, a port of pyesridump that exports features from any ArcGIS REST endpoint to GeoJSON. Hosted on GitHub and distributed via npm under the MIT license, it is a data-extraction utility rather than a dataset. It is well suited to harvesting features from published ArcGIS vector services and to building open-data ingestion pipelines.

name: Fire-stop dataset for Russian Federation subjects (boreal fires)
what_changes: Extracts and re-uses the GADM polygons for Russian Federation 'federal subjects' as the spatial unit for boreal-fire stop analysis.
notes: Tied to the 'What are the limits to the growth of boreal fires?' study; obscure derivative subset of GADM Russia level-1.
verify_notes: Northeast Siberia fire perimeters 2012-2022 (~1.3 GB total) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为俄罗斯联邦各主体（一级行政区）的“防火止燃”（fire-stop）矢量数据，关联于一项研究北方针叶林火灾增长极限的论文，托管于 Zenodo，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，体量约 1.3 GB。从说明看，它是基于 GADM 俄罗斯一级行政边界的小众派生子集。由于元数据有限，具体要素内容与年份不详；适合复现该研究或开展北方林火相关的区域分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides a 'fire-stop' vector layer for the subjects (first-level administrative units) of the Russian Federation, tied to a study on the limits to the growth of boreal fires. Hosted on Zenodo under CC BY 4.0 at roughly 1.3 GB, it appears to be a niche derivative built on GADM's level-1 boundaries for Russia. With limited metadata, its exact feature content and time span are unclear; it is best suited to reproducing that study or to regional boreal-fire analysis.

name: Free GIS Data 分类目录 (rtwilson)
theme_raw: 500+ 免费 GIS 数据集汇总（含大量矢量源）
license: 目录本身 CC BY；各数据源各异
formats_now: Shapefile; KML; GeoJSON; GeoTIFF; NetCDF; CSV
notes: 可作为后续深挖的二级 lead 库
verify_notes: Directory of free GIS datasets | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Free GIS Data 是 Robin Wilson 维护的一个分类目录网站，按主题汇编了全球各类免费 GIS 数据的链接，指向 Shapefile、GeoJSON、WFS 等多种来源。它本身不托管数据，而是作为通过网页跳转浏览的二级索引库，许可条款随各原始来源而定。适合作为数据发现起点和后续深挖的牵引资源，帮助用户在众多主题下定位合适的开放地理数据源。
desc_en: Free GIS Data, maintained by Robin Wilson, is a categorized directory that compiles links to free GIS data worldwide, organized by theme and pointing to sources such as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and WFS. It does not host data itself but acts as a secondary index browsed via web links, with licensing determined by each original source. It is a useful starting point for data discovery and a lead library for deeper exploration across many thematic categories.

name: GADM-consolidated-shapefile (gozwei)
what_changes: Fetches per-country GADM 4.1 layers and concatenates Level-0 polygons into a single global shapefile (a consolidated file the GADM project no longer ships).
notes: Small community utility filling the gap left when GADM 4.x stopped distributing a one-file world layer.
verify_notes: Consolidates GADM 4.1 ADM0 into one shapefile via GeoPandas | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GADM-consolidated-shapefile 是 gozwei 维护的一个社区小工具/数据集，旨在填补 GADM 4.x 不再分发单文件全球图层后的空缺，提供整合后的 GADM 行政边界 Shapefile。项目托管于 GitHub，许可未明确说明。由于继承自 GADM，使用时须遵循 GADM 的数据许可条款。适合需要一体化全球行政区划单一文件的用户。
desc_en: GADM-consolidated-shapefile, maintained by gozwei, is a small community utility/dataset that fills the gap left when GADM 4.x stopped distributing a single-file worldwide layer, offering a consolidated Shapefile of GADM administrative boundaries. Hosted on GitHub with an unspecified license, it inherits GADM's underlying data and must be used under GADM's terms. It is convenient for users needing a unified, single-file global administrative-boundary layer.

name: GADM.jl (JuliaGeo)
