what_changes: Julia package that lazily downloads and parses GADM polygons into Julia GeoInterface multipolygons; adds caching and a typed admin-level API around the raw shapefiles.
notes: Niche Julia-ecosystem wrapper that re-exposes GADM as a programmatic dataset.
verify_notes: Julia wrapper for GADM; WGS84 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GADM.jl 是 JuliaGeo 生态中的一个 Julia 软件包，将 GADM 全球行政边界数据以编程方式重新暴露给 Julia 用户，便于按需下载和加载各级行政区划。软件包本身采用 MIT 许可，底层数据则遵循 GADM 的许可条款。它是一个面向 Julia 工作流的封装工具而非独立数据集，适合在 Julia 中进行空间分析、地理可视化与边界数据处理。
desc_en: GADM.jl is a Julia package in the JuliaGeo ecosystem that re-exposes GADM's global administrative-boundary data programmatically, letting Julia users download and load administrative levels on demand. The package is MIT-licensed while the underlying data follows GADM's terms. It is a wrapper for Julia workflows rather than a standalone dataset, and fits spatial analysis, geographic visualization, and boundary-data handling within the Julia environment.

name: GBIF Basemaps (gbif-basemaps)
theme_raw: Basemap tile generation (raster + vector base layers from OSM/Natural Earth)
notes: Niche - documents how tile.gbif.org base layers (e.g. EPSG:3575/3031) are produced; useful if you need polar-projection vector base layers.
verify_notes: 101 commits, 14 releases; tile server repo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GBIF Basemaps 是 GBIF 的开源项目，记录并构建 tile.gbif.org 底图图层的生成流程，特别支持极地投影（如 EPSG:3575 北极、EPSG:3031 南极）。它采用 OpenMapTiles 风格的矢量数据管线生成 PNG 瓦片，代码采用 Apache-2.0 许可，源数据则遵循各自许可。属较为小众的资源，适合需要极地投影矢量底图的生物多样性制图与可视化场景。
desc_en: GBIF Basemaps is GBIF's open-source project documenting and building the base layers served at tile.gbif.org, with particular support for polar projections (e.g. EPSG:3575 Arctic, EPSG:3031 Antarctic). It uses an OpenMapTiles-style vector pipeline to produce PNG tiles, with code under Apache-2.0 and source data under their own licenses. A niche resource, it is useful when polar-projection vector base layers are needed for biodiversity mapping and visualization.

name: GBIF Data Blog - shapefile workflows
theme_raw: Documentation/tutorials for converting GBIF DwC-A to shapefile/sf/gpkg
notes: Reference workflow; GBIF's own confirmation that native shapefile downloads are NOT offered and must be derived client-side.
verify_notes: Active blog post on shapefile workflows in R | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 GBIF 数据博客中关于 shapefile 工作流的教程文章，演示如何将 GBIF 物种出现记录处理为 Shapefile 或 GeoPackage 输出。内容覆盖全球数据，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它同时也是 GBIF 官方的说明：平台并不直接提供原生 shapefile 下载，需在客户端自行派生。适合需要将 GBIF 数据转换为矢量格式用于 GIS 分析的研究者参考。
desc_en: This is a tutorial post from the GBIF Data Blog covering shapefile workflows, showing how to turn GBIF occurrence records into Shapefile or GeoPackage outputs. Covering global data under CC BY 4.0, it also serves as GBIF's confirmation that native shapefile downloads are not offered and must be derived client-side. It is a useful reference for researchers needing to convert GBIF occurrence data into vector formats for GIS analysis.

name: GBIF Maps API v2 - Ad-hoc Vector Tiles
theme_raw: Ad-hoc filtered occurrence vector tiles for arbitrary searches
notes: Same parameter grammar as the occurrence search API; useful for live overlays over Leaflet/OpenLayers/MapLibre.
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: 这是 GBIF Maps API v2 的即席矢量瓦片端点，按 {z}/{x}/{y} 提供 MVT 格式的物种出现密度瓦片，覆盖全球。其查询参数语法与 GBIF 出现记录检索 API 一致，可灵活按物种、分类、地区等条件过滤。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，开放访问。非常适合在 Leaflet、OpenLayers 或 MapLibre 上构建实时生物多样性出现记录叠加图层。
desc_en: This is the GBIF Maps API v2 ad-hoc vector-tile endpoint, serving global species-occurrence density tiles in MVT format addressed by {z}/{x}/{y}. It shares the same parameter grammar as the GBIF occurrence search API, allowing flexible filtering by taxon, region, and more. Open under CC BY 4.0, it is well suited to building live biodiversity-occurrence overlays in Leaflet, OpenLayers, or MapLibre.

name: gbif/maps (source repo)
notes: Reference implementation; documents how density tiles are precomputed from occurrence cube.
verify_notes: GitHub repo live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: gbif/maps 是 GBIF 地图服务的开源参考实现仓库，托管于 GitHub，采用 Apache-2.0 许可。它记录了如何从 GBIF 的出现记录数据立方体预计算密度瓦片，并以 MVT 与 PNG 格式输出，覆盖全球数据。该仓库主要面向开发者，适合希望理解 GBIF 地图瓦片生成机制、或自建类似生物多样性密度可视化服务的技术人员参考。
desc_en: gbif/maps is the open-source reference implementation repository for GBIF's map services, hosted on GitHub under Apache-2.0. It documents how density tiles are precomputed from GBIF's occurrence data cube and served as MVT and PNG over global data. Aimed primarily at developers, it is a valuable reference for understanding GBIF's map-tile generation or for building comparable biodiversity density-visualization services.

name: GDL Area Database (Geospatial layer)
theme_raw: subnational indicators with linked region polygons
license_now: Citation required, not explicit OS license
notes: Source of indicator aggregations underpinning the SHDI; regions match the SHDI shapefile.
verify_notes: v0.2 active through 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GDL Area Database（地理空间图层）由 Global Data Lab 提供，覆盖 100 多个中低收入国家（LMIC），将次国家级区域的指标聚合数据与边界关联起来。它是支撑次国家人类发展指数（SHDI）的指标数据源，区域划分与 SHDI 的 Shapefile 一致，可通过 GDLCODE 进行连接。数据以 Shapefile 加 CSV 形式提供，使用需引用，并非显式开源许可。适合区域发展、不平等与人类发展研究。
desc_en: The GDL Area Database (geospatial layer) from Global Data Lab covers 100+ low- and middle-income countries, linking sub-national indicator aggregations to boundaries. It underpins the Sub-national Human Development Index (SHDI), with regions matching the SHDI shapefile and joinable via GDLCODE. Provided as Shapefile plus CSV, it requires citation rather than carrying an explicit open license. It suits research on regional development, inequality, and human development.

name: GEBCO isobath extractor (callumrollo gist)
access: GitHub gist; runs against GEBCO NetCDF
notes: Generates vector isobath GeoJSON for any geographic area from GEBCO data.
verify_notes: GEBCO isobath extractor gist, last active 2021-01-17 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 callumrollo 发布的 GitHub gist 脚本，可针对用户自定义的研究区域，从 GEBCO 海底地形 NetCDF 网格中提取等深线（isobath）并输出为 GeoJSON。脚本采用 MIT 许可，GEBCO 数据则为公共领域，理论上可应用于全球任意海域。它是一个数据生成工具而非现成数据集，适合海洋制图、海底地形分析等需要矢量等深线的场景。
desc_en: This is a GitHub gist script by callumrollo that extracts isobaths (depth contours) for a user-defined area of interest from GEBCO bathymetry NetCDF grids and outputs them as GeoJSON. The script is MIT-licensed while GEBCO data is public domain, giving it global potential. It is a data-generation tool rather than a ready-made dataset, well suited to producing vector isobaths for ocean mapping and seafloor-terrain analysis.

name: GEBCO Undersea Feature Names Gazetteer
license: free for any use with attribution
formats_now: spreadsheet, Shapefile, ArcGIS Feature REST, OGC API Features, WFS
notes: Underused source for named undersea relief; complements USGS Polygons of Undersea Features (OFR 2014-1040).
verify_notes: Hosted via IHO DCDB web map app | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GEBCO 海底地物名称地名录由 GEBCO 与 IHO/IOC 联合维护，提供全球海洋范围内已命名海底地物的矢量数据，包含海山、海沟、海脊等地形要素的名称与位置。数据以 Shapefile 和 KML 格式直接下载，使用需注明引用 IHO-IOC GEBCO 地名录。它是关于海底地形命名的权威但相对小众的来源，可与 USGS 海底地物多边形数据互为补充。
desc_en: The GEBCO Undersea Feature Names Gazetteer, maintained jointly by GEBCO and the IHO/IOC, provides vector data on named undersea features across the global oceans, including the names and locations of seamounts, trenches, ridges, and similar relief. Available as direct-download Shapefile and KML with attribution required (cite the IHO-IOC GEBCO Gazetteer), it is an authoritative if underused source for undersea nomenclature, complementing the USGS Polygons of Undersea Features.

name: Geo-LiM: Geo-Lithological Map of Central Europe
coverage: Central Europe (DE, FR, CH, AT, SI, N. Italy)
notes: Harmonized geo-lithological map 1:250k–1:1M; includes GRASS GIS scripts
verify_notes: Geo-LiM record open access | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geo-LiM 是一套面向中欧的协调地质-岩性图，覆盖德国、法国、瑞士、奥地利、斯洛文尼亚及意大利北部，比例尺约为 1:25 万至 1:100 万。数据以 GeoPackage 和 Shapefile 提供，托管于 Zenodo，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，并附带用于复现的 GRASS GIS 脚本。适合区域地质、岩性建模、土壤与水文背景分析及跨国数据协调研究。
desc_en: Geo-LiM is a harmonized geo-lithological map of Central Europe, covering Germany, France, Switzerland, Austria, Slovenia, and northern Italy at roughly 1:250k to 1:1M scale. Distributed as GeoPackage and Shapefile on Zenodo under CC-BY 4.0, it includes GRASS GIS scripts for reproducibility. The dataset suits regional geology, lithological modeling, soil and hydrological context analysis, and cross-border data-harmonization studies.

name: Geo-TIDE GeoJSON (Trucking Industry Decarbonization Explorer)
theme_raw: freight logistics facilities, routes, EV charging
notes: Quarterly updates; GitHub tutorials available
verify_notes: MIT Climate & Sustainability Consortium | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geo-TIDE GeoJSON（货运业脱碳探索器）由 MIT 气候与可持续发展联盟提供，覆盖美国，以 GeoJSON 格式提供与货运卡车脱碳分析相关的地理数据。数据托管于 AWS（us-west-2 区域）S3 存储桶，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，按季度更新，并配有 GitHub 教程。适合交通能源转型、货运排放与基础设施规划等研究与可视化应用。
desc_en: Geo-TIDE GeoJSON (the Trucking Industry Decarbonization Explorer) from the MIT Climate & Sustainability Consortium covers the United States, providing GeoJSON layers related to freight-trucking decarbonization analysis. Hosted on AWS S3 (us-west-2) under CC-BY-4.0, it is updated quarterly and accompanied by GitHub tutorials. The dataset supports research and visualization in transport energy transition, freight emissions, and infrastructure planning.

name: GeoDAR: Georeferenced global Dams And Reservoirs (v1.0/v1.1)
notes: Companion to ESSD paper; bridges GRanD attributes with global georeferencing
verify_notes: GeoDAR v1.0/v1.1 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoDAR 是全球大坝与水库地理参考数据集（v1.0/v1.1），由 Wang 等人 (2022) 发布于 ESSD。它在全球范围内整合了约 24,783 个大坝点位与 21,515 个水库多边形，将 GRanD 的属性信息与更广泛的全球地理参考相衔接。数据以 Shapefile（点与面）及 CSV 提供，托管于 Zenodo，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，开放下载。适合水资源管理、水文建模、淹没分析与水库变化研究。
desc_en: GeoDAR is a georeferenced global dams and reservoirs dataset (v1.0/v1.1) by Wang et al. (2022), published in ESSD. It compiles roughly 24,783 dam points and 21,515 reservoir polygons worldwide, bridging GRanD attributes with broader global georeferencing. Distributed as Shapefile (points and polygons) and CSV on Zenodo under CC-BY-4.0 and openly downloadable, it supports water-resource management, hydrological modeling, inundation analysis, and reservoir-change research.

name: Geofabrik Antarctica extract
notes: Only continent that ships gpkg.zip at top level (31.6 MB).
verify_notes: updated daily | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Geofabrik 提供的南极洲 OpenStreetMap 数据抽取，覆盖整个南极大陆，数据源自 OSM 并采用 ODbL 1.0 许可，免费下载。提供 osm.pbf 与 gpkg.zip 格式，约 31.6 MB；值得注意的是，南极是唯一在顶层直接提供 gpkg.zip 的大陆。适合极地制图、科考站点与地物分析等需要现成 OSM 矢量数据的场景。
desc_en: This is Geofabrik's Antarctica OpenStreetMap extract, covering the whole Antarctic continent. Sourced from OSM under ODbL 1.0 and free to download, it is offered in osm.pbf and gpkg.zip at about 31.6 MB; notably, Antarctica is the only continent shipping a gpkg.zip at the top level. It suits polar mapping, research-station and feature analysis, and any workflow needing ready-made OSM vector data.

name: Geofabrik Asia extracts
notes: GPKG not available for CN, IN, JP, ID, RU.
verify_notes: asia-latest.osm.pbf 14.8 GB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Geofabrik 提供的亚洲 OpenStreetMap 数据抽取，涵盖约 40 个亚洲国家与子区域，数据源自 OSM，采用 ODbL 1.0 许可，免费下载，整套约 14.8 GB。提供 osm.pbf 与 gpkg.zip 格式，但中国、印度、日本、印尼、俄罗斯等较大区域不提供 GPKG。适合区域路网、POI、行政边界等矢量数据的提取与 GIS 分析。
desc_en: This is Geofabrik's Asia OpenStreetMap extract, covering roughly 40 Asian countries and sub-regions. Sourced from OSM under ODbL 1.0 and free, the full set is about 14.8 GB and offered in osm.pbf and gpkg.zip, though GPKG is not available for larger regions such as China, India, Japan, Indonesia, and Russia. It suits extracting road networks, POIs, and administrative boundaries for GIS analysis.

name: Geofabrik Central America extracts
coverage: Belize, Guatemala, Honduras, Cuba, Haiti, etc.
notes: 737 MB continental file.
verify_notes: Geofabrik regional extract page assumed alive | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Geofabrik 提供的中美洲 OpenStreetMap 数据抽取，覆盖伯利兹、危地马拉、洪都拉斯、古巴、海地等国家，数据源自 OSM，采用 ODbL 1.0 许可，免费下载，整片大陆文件约 737 MB。提供 osm.pbf 与 gpkg.zip 格式。适合该区域的路网、兴趣点、行政区划等矢量数据提取与制图分析。
desc_en: This is Geofabrik's Central America OpenStreetMap extract, covering countries such as Belize, Guatemala, Honduras, Cuba, and Haiti. Sourced from OSM under ODbL 1.0 and free to download, the continental file is about 737 MB and offered in osm.pbf and gpkg.zip. It suits extraction of road networks, points of interest, and administrative divisions for mapping and GIS analysis in the region.

name: Geofabrik Europe extracts
notes: GPKG available for most countries except DE, FR, IT, NL, ES, UK, NO, PL, CZ, RU.
verify_notes: europe-latest.osm.pbf 32.1 GB; shp.zip unavailable for full Europe | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Geofabrik 提供的欧洲 OpenStreetMap 数据抽取，覆盖所有欧洲国家，数据源自 OSM，采用 ODbL 1.0 许可，免费下载，整套约 32.1 GB。提供 osm.pbf 与 gpkg.zip 格式，多数国家有 GPKG，但德国、法国、意大利、荷兰、西班牙、英国、挪威、波兰、捷克、俄罗斯等较大国家除外。适合欧洲范围的路网、POI 与行政边界等矢量数据分析。
desc_en: This is Geofabrik's Europe OpenStreetMap extract, covering all European countries. Sourced from OSM under ODbL 1.0 and free, the full set is about 32.1 GB and offered in osm.pbf and gpkg.zip; GPKG is available for most countries except larger ones such as Germany, France, Italy, the Netherlands, Spain, the UK, Norway, Poland, the Czech Republic, and Russia. It suits Europe-wide road, POI, and administrative-boundary analysis.

name: Geofabrik France sub-regions
notes: Region-level shapefiles available (e.g. Île-de-France).
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Geofabrik 提供的法国 OpenStreetMap 子区域数据抽取，覆盖法国本土各大区及海外地区，数据源自 OSM，采用 ODbL 1.0 许可，免费下载。提供 osm.pbf 与 shp.zip 格式，可按大区下载区域级 Shapefile（如法兰西岛大区）。适合法国各区域的路网、兴趣点与行政边界等矢量数据提取与本地化 GIS 分析。
desc_en: This is Geofabrik's France OpenStreetMap sub-region extract, covering all metropolitan French regions plus overseas territories. Sourced from OSM under ODbL 1.0 and free, it is offered in osm.pbf and shp.zip, with region-level shapefiles available (for example Île-de-France). It suits extraction of road networks, points of interest, and administrative boundaries for localized GIS analysis across French regions.

name: Geofabrik Germany sub-regions (Bundesländer)
theme_raw: OSM vector by German federal state
notes: Classic per-state shp.zip free shapefiles still offered.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Geofabrik 提供的德国 OpenStreetMap 子区域数据抽取，按全部 16 个联邦州（Bundesländer）划分，数据源自 OSM，采用 ODbL 1.0 许可，免费下载。提供 osm.pbf 以及经典的按州 shp.zip Shapefile。适合德国各联邦州的路网、兴趣点与行政边界等矢量数据提取，便于区域级别的本地化 GIS 分析与制图。
desc_en: This is Geofabrik's Germany OpenStreetMap sub-region extract, split across all 16 federal states (Bundesländer). Sourced from OSM under ODbL 1.0 and free, it is offered in osm.pbf and the classic per-state shp.zip shapefiles. It suits extraction of road networks, points of interest, and administrative boundaries for each German state, enabling localized state-level GIS analysis and mapping.

name: Geofabrik North America extracts
notes: US and Canada GPKG not offered due to size.
verify_notes: Geofabrik regional extract page assumed alive (pattern matches other regions) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Geofabrik 提供的北美洲 OpenStreetMap 数据抽取，覆盖加拿大、美国（分为 5 个子区域）、墨西哥与格陵兰，数据源自 OSM，采用 ODbL 1.0 许可，免费下载。提供 osm.pbf 格式，gpkg.zip 仅对格陵兰与墨西哥提供，美国和加拿大因体量过大不提供 GPKG。适合北美范围的路网、POI 与行政边界等矢量数据分析。
desc_en: This is Geofabrik's North America OpenStreetMap extract, covering Canada, the USA (in five sub-regions), Mexico, and Greenland. Sourced from OSM under ODbL 1.0 and free, it is offered in osm.pbf, with gpkg.zip provided only for Greenland and Mexico since GPKG is not offered for the USA and Canada due to size. It suits road-network, POI, and administrative-boundary analysis across North America.

name: Geofabrik Russian Federation sub-regions
theme_raw: OSM vector by Russian federal district
coverage: Central, Northwestern, Siberian, Far Eastern, etc.
notes: Continental-level gpkg not offered; sub-region gpkg available.
verify_notes: shapefile not available at this level | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Geofabrik 提供的俄罗斯联邦 OpenStreetMap 子区域数据抽取，按联邦管区划分，包括中央、西北、西伯利亚、远东等区域，数据源自 OSM，采用 ODbL 1.0 许可，免费下载。提供 osm.pbf 与按联邦管区的 gpkg.zip 格式；因体量过大，不提供大陆级别的整体 GPKG。适合俄罗斯各区域的路网、POI 与行政边界矢量数据分析。
desc_en: This is Geofabrik's Russian Federation OpenStreetMap sub-region extract, divided by federal district including Central, Northwestern, Siberian, and Far Eastern regions. Sourced from OSM under ODbL 1.0 and free, it is offered in osm.pbf and per-district gpkg.zip; a continental-level GPKG is not offered due to size. It suits road-network, POI, and administrative-boundary analysis across Russia's federal districts.

name: Geofabrik South America extracts
notes: 3.7 GB continental PBF.
verify_notes: Geofabrik regional extract page assumed alive | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Geofabrik 提供的南美洲 OpenStreetMap 数据抽取，覆盖所有南美洲国家，数据源自 OSM，采用 ODbL 1.0 许可，免费下载，整片大陆 PBF 文件约 3.7 GB。提供 osm.pbf 与 gpkg.zip 格式。适合南美范围内的路网、兴趣点与行政边界等矢量数据提取与 GIS 分析。
desc_en: This is Geofabrik's South America OpenStreetMap extract, covering all South American countries. Sourced from OSM under ODbL 1.0 and free to download, the continental PBF file is about 3.7 GB and offered in osm.pbf and gpkg.zip. It suits extraction of road networks, points of interest, and administrative boundaries for mapping and GIS analysis across South America.

name: Geoportal des Kantons Bern STAC
notes: Cantonal vector products served via STAC
verify_notes: Canton Bern STAC catalog with 270+ collections | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是瑞士伯尔尼州地理门户的 STAC 目录入口，通过 SpatioTemporal Asset Catalog 标准发布该州的矢量地理产品，覆盖伯尔尼州范围。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、DXF 等格式提供，开放访问（CC-BY）。适合需要伯尔尼州本地权威矢量数据的区域规划、地籍、基础设施与城市分析等应用，并可通过 STAC 进行程序化检索与集成。
desc_en: This is the STAC catalogue entry for the Geoportal of the Canton of Bern, Switzerland, publishing the canton's vector geodata products via the SpatioTemporal Asset Catalog standard, covering the Canton of Bern. Data is offered as Shapefile, GeoPackage, and DXF under open (CC-BY) terms. It suits regional planning, cadastral, infrastructure, and urban analysis needing authoritative local vector data, and supports programmatic discovery and integration through STAC.

name: Geoportal.gov.pl INSPIRE services
license_now: Open data (not explicitly stated on page)
formats_now: WMS, WMTS, WFS, WCS, ATOM, CSW
verify_notes: Polish geoportal INSPIRE services page active, maintained by GUGiK. | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是波兰测绘与制图总局 (GUGiK) 通过 Geoportal.gov.pl 提供的 INSPIRE 服务入口，覆盖波兰全国，依据欧盟 INSPIRE 指令发布地理空间数据。服务以 WFS、ATOM 及 GML 形式提供矢量数据访问。页面未明确说明许可，通常作为开放数据发布。适合需要符合 INSPIRE 标准的波兰国家级矢量数据的跨境互操作、空间规划与环境分析等应用。
desc_en: This is the INSPIRE services entry from Poland's Head Office of Geodesy and Cartography (GUGiK) via Geoportal.gov.pl, covering the whole of Poland and publishing geospatial data under the EU INSPIRE Directive. Vector access is provided through WFS, ATOM, and GML. Licensing is not explicitly stated on the page but is generally open. It suits INSPIRE-compliant national vector data for cross-border interoperability, spatial planning, and environmental analysis.

name: georgique/world-geojson
coverage: Global with state-level subdivisions for larger countries
notes: Compact polygons for web maps.
verify_notes: v3.4.0 Oct 2025; license changed to GPL-3.0 (was MIT) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: georgique/world-geojson 是一个 GitHub 上的开源数据集，提供全球各国的 GeoJSON 多边形，并为较大国家附带州/省级行政区划。数据采用 GPL-3.0 许可，多边形经过精简以适配 Web 地图渲染。它体量轻便、易于集成，适合在网页应用中绘制国家与次国家边界、做基础地理可视化或快速原型开发。
desc_en: georgique/world-geojson is an open-source dataset on GitHub providing GeoJSON polygons for countries worldwide, with state/province-level subdivisions for larger countries. Released under GPL-3.0, its polygons are simplified to suit web-map rendering. Lightweight and easy to integrate, it is well suited to drawing country and sub-national boundaries in web applications, basic geographic visualization, and rapid prototyping.

name: Geoscience Australia GEODATA TOPO 1:1M to 1:10M
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GEODATA TOPO 1:1M 至 1:10M 由澳大利亚地球科学局 (Geoscience Australia) 发布，是覆盖澳大利亚全境的多比例尺地形矢量数据集，比例尺范围从 1:100 万到 1:1000 万。数据以 Shapefile 格式提供，采用 CC-BY 许可。适合澳大利亚国家与区域尺度的地形制图、底图制作及综合性 GIS 分析等用途。
desc_en: GEODATA TOPO 1:1M to 1:10M, published by Geoscience Australia, is a multi-scale topographic vector dataset covering all of Australia at scales from 1:1 million to 1:10 million. Distributed as Shapefile under a CC-BY license, it suits national- and regional-scale topographic mapping, base-map production, and general-purpose GIS analysis across Australia.

name: GeoVectors corpus (regional OSM entity embeddings)
what_changes: OSM snapshot (10 Nov 2020) processed into per-region TSV embeddings of every OSM entity with Wikidata/DBpedia links; provides regional subsets (Europe-West/East, NA, SA, Antarctica, Poland, etc.) instead of full planet PBF.
notes: Knowledge graph + tag/location embeddings; cold-niche ML-oriented derivative.
verify_notes: GeoVectors KG v1.0; >980M OSM-derived entities, RDF | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoVectors 是一个区域级 OpenStreetMap 实体嵌入语料库，托管于 Zenodo，采用 ODC-ODbL 1.0 许可。它将 OSM 实体表示为知识图谱以及基于标签和位置的向量嵌入，是面向机器学习的派生数据集。由于元数据有限，具体覆盖范围与规模不详；适合地理空间表示学习、实体相似度计算、地点语义建模等冷门但前沿的 ML 研究场景。
desc_en: GeoVectors is a corpus of regional OpenStreetMap entity embeddings hosted on Zenodo under ODC-ODbL 1.0. It represents OSM entities as a knowledge graph plus tag- and location-based vector embeddings, making it an ML-oriented derivative dataset. With limited metadata, its exact coverage and scale are unclear; it suits niche but cutting-edge ML work in geospatial representation learning, entity similarity, and place-semantics modeling.

name: GFZ Data Services
provider: GFZ German Research Centre for Geosciences (Potsdam)
theme_raw: geodesy, seismology, tectonics, geomagnetism, GNSS station vectors
formats: DOI-published datasets incl. shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON for vector layers
notes: Strong source of fault databases (e.g., GEM), GNSS station inventories, tectonic vector layers as DOI-citable datasets.
verify_notes: GFZ Data Services; 8,496 datasets; updated 2026-03-24 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GFZ Data Services 是德国波茨坦地球科学研究中心运营的开放数据仓储，发布数千个可通过 DOI 引用的地球科学数据集，覆盖全球。它是断层数据库（如 GEM）、GNSS 台站清单、构造矢量图层等的重要来源，矢量图层常以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON 等格式提供。数据多采用 CC 等开放许可，适合地震学、大地测量和构造地质研究的可引用数据获取。
desc_en: GFZ Data Services is an open research data repository operated by the GFZ German Research Centre for Geosciences in Potsdam, publishing thousands of DOI-citable geoscience datasets with global coverage. It is a strong source for fault databases (e.g., GEM), GNSS station inventories, and tectonic vector layers, with vector data commonly distributed as shapefile, GeoPackage, or GeoJSON. Datasets are released under CC and other open licenses, making it well suited for citable data in seismology, geodesy, and tectonic research.

name: GHSL Tiling Schema Shapefile
verify_notes: Redirects to human-settlement.emergency.copernicus.eu domain | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是欧盟联合研究中心全球人居层（GHSL）使用的全球分幅网格 Shapefile，定义了 GHSL 系列产品所采用的瓦片划分方案。它以 Mollweide（ESRI:54009）等投影提供全球瓦片边界矢量，便于按格网组织和下载 GHSL 的人口、建成区等栅格数据。数据以 Shapefile 格式直接下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。
desc_en: This is the global tiling-schema shapefile used by the European Commission JRC's Global Human Settlement Layer (GHSL), defining the tile grid that GHSL products are organized around. It provides vector tile boundaries (in projections such as Mollweide, ESRI:54009) that help users index and download GHSL population and built-up raster layers by grid cell. The data is distributed as a directly downloadable shapefile under a CC BY 4.0 license.

name: GLiM - Global Lithological Map (source polygons referenced by OpenLandMap)
theme_raw: 1.25 million lithology polygons used as input to OpenLandMap lithology layer
notes: Underlying vector source behind the OpenLandMap lithology_usgs.ecotapestry raster collection; cite this if you need polygons, not the rasterised OpenLandMap product.
verify_notes: GLiM v1.0 dataset entry | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球岩性图（GLiM）是 Hartmann 与 Moosdorf 编制的全球地表岩石类型矢量数据集，包含约 1,235,400 个多边形，描述世界范围内的岩性分布。该 PANGAEA 版本提供原始矢量源（Shapefile），是 OpenLandMap 栅格化岩性产品的底层数据来源；若需要多边形而非栅格，应引用此数据集。采用 CC-BY 3.0 许可，可直接从 PANGAEA 下载。
desc_en: The Global Lithological Map (GLiM) by Hartmann and Moosdorf is a global vector dataset of surface rock types, comprising roughly 1,235,400 polygons describing lithology worldwide. This PANGAEA release provides the original vector source (shapefile) that underlies the rasterized OpenLandMap lithology product; cite this version when you need polygons rather than a gridded raster. It is available for direct download from PANGAEA under a CC-BY 3.0 license.

name: GLiM - Global Lithological Map (via CCGM)
formats: Shapefile (vector) at CCGM; gridded copy at PANGAEA
notes: 1,235,400 polygons of rock types
verify_notes: 403 to WebFetch; site usually online via browser | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是通过 CCGM/CGMW 与汉堡大学发布的全球岩性图（GLiM）矢量版本，包含约 1,235,400 个岩石类型多边形，覆盖全球。CCGM 提供矢量（Shapefile）成果，PANGAEA 提供栅格化镜像；矢量数据需通过 CCGM 订购获取。该数据适用于全球尺度的地质、地球化学与水文研究，许可遵循 CCGM 学术使用条款。
desc_en: This is the Global Lithological Map (GLiM) distributed via CCGM/CGMW in collaboration with the University of Hamburg, containing roughly 1,235,400 polygons of rock types with global coverage. CCGM serves the vector (shapefile) product while a gridded copy is mirrored at PANGAEA; the vector layer is obtained through a CCGM order. The dataset supports global-scale geology, geochemistry, and hydrology studies and is provided under CCGM academic-use terms.

name: Global Database of Tsunami Deposits
notes: Locations of tsunami deposits with bibliographic and thematic attributes
verify_notes: Global Tsunami Deposits DB; open access on Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球海啸沉积物数据库是一套全球范围的点状矢量数据集，记录了已识别的海啸沉积物地点，并附带文献和专题属性。它汇编了各地海啸沉积证据的位置，便于古海啸学、灾害评估和沉积记录研究。数据托管于 Zenodo，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放获取，配套发表于 Geoscience Data Journal。
desc_en: The Global Database of Tsunami Deposits is a global point vector dataset cataloguing geo-located sites of identified tsunami deposits, each annotated with bibliographic and thematic attributes. It compiles the locations of tsunami sedimentary evidence to support paleotsunami research, hazard assessment, and studies of depositional records. Hosted on Zenodo under a CC-BY-4.0 license, it is openly available and accompanied by a publication in the Geoscience Data Journal.

name: Global Distribution of Seagrasses v7.1
lychee_status: Network error: SSL certificate expired. Site needs to renew certificate (error sending request for url (https://data.unep-wcmc.org/datasets/7))
lychee_text: Network error: SSL certificate expired. Site needs to renew certificate (error sending request for url (https://data.unep-wcmc.org/datasets/7))
notes: Green & Short (2003) 数据层的第7次更新；含 OSPAR/MediSEH 等本地贡献。
verify_notes: SSL certificate expired; cannot fetch | lychee:Network error: SSL certificate expired. Site needs to renew certificate (error sending request for url (https://data.unep-wcmc.org/datasets/7))
desc_zh: 全球海草分布数据集 v7.1 由 UNEP-WCMC 与新罕布什尔大学 F. Short 合作维护，以点和多边形 Shapefile 形式提供全球海草床的已知分布。它是 Green & Short（2003）经典图层的第 7 次更新，整合了 OSPAR、MediSEH 等本地贡献数据，广泛用于海洋保护、蓝碳和栖息地制图。数据可直接下载，采用 CC-BY-NC 4.0 许可（非商业使用）。
desc_en: The Global Distribution of Seagrasses v7.1 is maintained by UNEP-WCMC together with F. Short (University of New Hampshire), providing the known global distribution of seagrass meadows as point and polygon shapefiles. It is the seventh update of the classic Green & Short (2003) layer and incorporates local contributions from sources such as OSPAR and MediSEH, supporting marine conservation, blue-carbon, and habitat mapping. The data is directly downloadable under a CC-BY-NC 4.0 (non-commercial) license.

name: Global Mangrove Watch — 1×1 degree tile vector index
notes: Tile index plus union/core vector layers for GMW v3 served via GEE.
verify_notes: Last updated 2024-09-08 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球红树林观测（GMW）1×1 度瓦片矢量索引由 GEE 社区目录基于 GMW v3 提供，包含瓦片分幅索引以及红树林范围的并集/核心矢量图层。数据以 GeoJSON、Earth Engine FeatureCollection 和 Shapefile 形式提供，可在 Google Earth Engine 中调用或下载，便于按区域访问全球红树林分布。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，派生自 GMW v3。
desc_en: The Global Mangrove Watch 1×1 degree tile vector index, served through the GEE Community Catalog and based on GMW v3, provides a tile index alongside union and core vector layers of mangrove extent. The data is available as GeoJSON, an Earth Engine FeatureCollection, and shapefile, allowing access either via Google Earth Engine or direct download for regional retrieval of mangrove distribution. It is licensed CC BY 4.0 and derived from GMW v3.

name: Global offshore wind turbine dataset (Zhang et al. 2021)
notes: Derived from Sentinel-1 SAR; WGS84 with country/sea attributes
verify_notes: figshare returns 403 to WebFetch (bot blocking); likely still alive in browser | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 全球海上风电机组数据集（Zhang 等，2021）提供全球范围内 6,924 个海上风机的点位置，时间跨度 2015-2019 年。数据由 Sentinel-1 SAR 影像提取，采用 WGS84 坐标，并附带所属国家和海域等属性，适用于可再生能源制图、海上风电监测和能源基础设施分析。以 Shapefile 格式开放发布，采用 CC0 1.0 公有领域声明。
desc_en: The Global Offshore Wind Turbine dataset (Zhang et al. 2021) provides point locations for 6,924 offshore wind turbines worldwide over 2015-2019. Derived from Sentinel-1 SAR imagery, it uses WGS84 coordinates and includes country and sea attributes, supporting renewable-energy mapping, offshore wind monitoring, and energy-infrastructure analysis. It is openly published as a shapefile under a CC0 1.0 public-domain dedication.

name: Global Plantation Planting Year Map
formats: raster + plantation polygon supplement on Zenodo
notes: Polygon supplement for selected regions; raster primary
verify_notes: Nature SSO redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球种植园种植年份图（Du 等，Scientific Data 2022）是一套全球尺度的人工林产品，主要以栅格形式给出种植园的建植年份，并在 Zenodo 上为部分区域提供配套的种植园多边形矢量补充。它适用于土地利用变化、碳核算和林业监测研究。数据可直接下载，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。
desc_en: The Global Plantation Planting Year Map (Du et al., Scientific Data 2022) is a global-scale plantation product that primarily delivers planting-year information as a raster, with a complementary polygon vector supplement for selected regions provided on Zenodo. It supports research on land-use change, carbon accounting, and forestry monitoring. The data is directly downloadable under a CC-BY-4.0 license.

name: Global Renewables Watch (GRW) - solar PV and wind turbine vector inventory
what_changes: Trains segmentation models on satellite imagery and validates against GPPD renewable plant entries, then extends GPPD by adding 375k individual wind turbines and 86k solar PV polygons not represented in GPPD's plant-level records.
notes: Microsoft + Planet + TransitionZero release; cross-references GPPD for ground truth at plant scale.
verify_notes: GRW preprint; dataset distribution not on arXiv page. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球可再生能源观测（GRW）是由 Microsoft、Planet 与 TransitionZero 联合发布的全球太阳能光伏和风机矢量清单，旨在从卫星影像中识别可再生能源设施的位置与范围。该数据集在电站尺度上交叉参照 GPPD 作为地面真值，适用于能源转型监测、容量评估和气候政策分析。采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。
desc_en: The Global Renewables Watch (GRW) is a global vector inventory of solar PV and wind-turbine installations released jointly by Microsoft, Planet, and TransitionZero, aimed at detecting the locations and footprints of renewable-energy facilities from satellite imagery. The dataset cross-references the Global Power Plant Database (GPPD) for plant-scale ground truth, supporting energy-transition monitoring, capacity assessment, and climate-policy analysis. It is released under a CC-BY-4.0 license.

name: Global sorghum production dataset (temperate-to-subtropical, 2000-2020)
what_changes: 27,222 subnational sorghum yield/area/production records aggregated to GAUL admin units; ships GAUL-clipped geometries alongside statistics
notes: Crop-specific subnational reissue keyed to GAUL
verify_notes: Global sorghum production 2000-2020 subnational; Zenodo DOI | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一套全球高粱生产数据集，覆盖温带至亚热带地区，时间跨度 2000-2020 年。它是按作物细分的次国家级统计重发布，行政编码对接 GAUL 体系，便于与全球行政边界数据衔接。该数据适用于粮食安全、作物产量趋势和农业经济研究，采用 CC BY 许可。
desc_en: This is a global sorghum production dataset spanning temperate-to-subtropical regions over 2000-2020. It is a crop-specific, subnational reissue of production statistics keyed to the GAUL administrative coding system for easy joining with global administrative boundaries. The dataset supports food-security, crop-yield trend, and agricultural-economics research and is released under a CC BY license.

name: Global Tidal Flat Ecosystems (1984-2019)
formats_now: GEE asset, GeoTIFF via Google Cloud Storage, UNEP-WCMC Ocean Data Viewer
doi_or_citation: Murray et al. 2022, Scientific Data; doi:10.1038/s41597-022-01635-5
notes: Nature 2019 + Scientific Data 2022 双论文支撑；矢量发布为聚合多边形。
verify_notes: Three access methods listed | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球潮间带生态系统数据集（Murray 等）描绘了 1984-2019 年间全球 60°N-60°S 范围内潮滩的分布，基于超过 70 万景 Landsat 影像分析得出，2.0 版本扩展至 2020 年。矢量成果以聚合多边形形式发布，并提供 GeoTIFF 栅格，广泛用于海岸带变化、湿地保护和蓝碳研究。数据可直接下载，通常采用 CC-BY 许可。
desc_en: The Global Tidal Flat Ecosystems dataset (Murray et al.) maps the distribution of tidal flats between 60°N and 60°S from 1984-2019, derived from analysis of over 700,000 Landsat images, with version 2.0 extending to 2020. The vector product is released as aggregated polygons alongside GeoTIFF rasters, and is widely used for coastal-change, wetland-conservation, and blue-carbon research. It is directly downloadable and commonly distributed under a CC-BY license.

name: GMS Economic Corridor Towns
notes: Town locations along GMS economic corridors.
verify_notes: Returned 403 Forbidden to WebFetch; possible bot/geo block. | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 大湄公河次区域（GMS）经济走廊城镇数据集由亚洲开发银行 GMS 项目提供，以点矢量形式标注 GMS 经济走廊沿线的城镇位置。它适用于区域发展规划、跨境交通和经济地理分析。数据以 Shapefile（点）和 KMZ 格式开放下载，遵循 ADB GMS 开放使用条款。
desc_en: The GMS Economic Corridor Towns dataset, provided by the Asian Development Bank's Greater Mekong Subregion program, marks the locations of towns along the GMS economic corridors as point vectors. It supports regional development planning, cross-border transport, and economic-geography analysis. The data is openly available as shapefile (point) and KMZ under ADB GMS open-use terms.

name: GMW Monthly Mangrove Loss Alerts — Africa
notes: Companion alert product cited alongside GMW v3 extent updates.
verify_notes: GMW 2020 v4.0.19, 10m resolution from Sentinel-2 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GMW 月度红树林损失预警（非洲）由阿伯里斯特威斯大学的全球红树林观测团队发布，以约 10 米分辨率提供非洲范围内逐月的红树林损失预警矢量。它是 GMW v3 红树林范围更新的配套预警产品，适用于红树林退化监测和近实时保护响应。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoPackage 格式在 Zenodo 上开放，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。
desc_en: The GMW Monthly Mangrove Loss Alerts for Africa, released by Aberystwyth University's Global Mangrove Watch team, provide monthly mangrove-loss alert vectors across Africa at roughly 10 m resolution. It is a companion alert product to the GMW v3 mangrove-extent updates, supporting degradation monitoring and near-real-time conservation response. The data is available on Zenodo as shapefile and GeoPackage under a CC-BY-4.0 license.

name: GOFER Earth Engine viewer app
theme_raw: Interactive viewer of GOFER fire polygons & lines
notes: Browse perimeters & active fire lines online
verify_notes: GOFER Product Visualization Earth Engine app frontend | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GOFER 是一款 Google Earth Engine 网页应用，用于在线浏览加州 2019-2021 年野火的火场周界和活跃火线。它以应用内矢量瓦片形式呈现 GOFER 火灾演进数据，便于无需下载即可交互查看火灾扩展过程。该应用免费开放，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。
desc_en: GOFER is a Google Earth Engine web application for browsing California wildfire perimeters and active fire lines for 2019-2021 online. It presents the GOFER fire-progression data as in-app vector tiles, allowing interactive inspection of fire spread without downloading. The viewer is openly accessible and licensed CC-BY 4.0.

name: GOFER v0.0 — ESSD Discussions snapshot
notes: Initial release accompanying essd-2023-389 preprint
verify_notes: DOI redirect to Zenodo; record present | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 GOFER v0.0 版本，是随 ESSD Discussions 预印本（essd-2023-389）发布的初始快照，包含加州 2019-2021 年野火的火场周界等矢量数据。数据以 Shapefile 和 CSV 格式开放，适用于火灾演进分析和野火研究的早期版本引用。采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，托管于 Zenodo。
desc_en: This is GOFER v0.0, the initial snapshot released alongside the ESSD Discussions preprint (essd-2023-389), containing California wildfire perimeters and related vectors for 2019-2021. The data is provided as shapefile and CSV for fire-progression analysis and early-version citation in wildfire research. It is hosted on Zenodo under a CC-BY 4.0 license.

name: GOFER v0.1 — ESSD published version
theme_raw: Hourly fire perimeters & active fire lines
notes: Version cited in ESSD 16, 1395 (2024)
verify_notes: GOFER v0.1 dataset, modified Dec 2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 GOFER v0.1 版本，对应发表于 ESSD 16, 1395 (2024) 的正式版数据集，提供加州 2019-2021 年野火的火场演进矢量。数据约 100.9 MB，以 Shapefile 和 CSV 格式开放，是论文引用的标准版本，适用于火灾扩展和消防响应研究。采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，托管于 Zenodo。
desc_en: This is GOFER v0.1, the published version corresponding to the ESSD 16, 1395 (2024) paper, providing fire-progression vectors for California wildfires from 2019-2021. Roughly 100.9 MB in size, it is distributed as shapefile and CSV and is the standard cited version for fire-spread and firefighting-response research. It is hosted on Zenodo under a CC-BY-4.0 license.

name: GOFER v0.11 (bug-fix release)
notes: Bug fixes to v0.1
verify_notes: DOI redirect to Zenodo record | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 GOFER v0.11 错误修复版本，在 v0.1 的基础上修正了若干问题，仍覆盖加州 2019-2021 年野火的火场演进矢量。数据以 Shapefile 和 CSV 格式开放发布，适用于需要最新修订数据的火灾分析。采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，托管于 Zenodo。
desc_en: This is GOFER v0.11, a bug-fix release that corrects several issues in v0.1 while still covering fire-progression vectors for California wildfires from 2019-2021. The data is openly distributed as shapefile and CSV for analyses needing the latest revised version. It is hosted on Zenodo under a CC-BY 4.0 license.

name: GOFER v0.12 (corrections release)
notes: Additional corrections
verify_notes: GOFER v0.12 Jan 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 GOFER v0.12 修订版本，在前一版本基础上加入了更多修正，覆盖加州 2019-2021 年野火的火场演进矢量，数据约 73.9 MB。以 Shapefile 和 CSV 格式开放，适用于火灾扩展分析和最新数据引用。采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，托管于 Zenodo。
desc_en: This is GOFER v0.12, a corrections release that adds further fixes over the previous version, covering fire-progression vectors for California wildfires from 2019-2021 at roughly 73.9 MB. It is distributed openly as shapefile and CSV for fire-spread analysis and up-to-date citation. The dataset is hosted on Zenodo under a CC-BY-4.0 license.

name: GovData.de
notes: ~150k datasets; federates state geoportals; map search uses ckanext-spatial bbox.
verify_notes: 151,275 datasets; active 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GovData.de 是德国的官方开放数据门户，汇集约 15 万个数据集，联合了各联邦州的地理门户。它通过遵循 DCAT-AP.de 标准的 CKAN API 提供服务，支持基于空间边界框的地图检索，数据格式包括 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GML 和 WFS。许可多为 DL-DE-BY-2.0 或 CC-BY，适用于德国行政、地理和公共信息的统一发现与获取。
desc_en: GovData.de is Germany's official open-data portal, aggregating around 150,000 datasets and federating the geoportals of the federal states. It is served through a CKAN API following the DCAT-AP.de standard and supports spatial bounding-box map search, with formats including shapefile, GeoJSON, GML, and WFS. Datasets are mostly licensed DL-DE-BY-2.0 or CC-BY, providing unified discovery and access to German administrative, geospatial, and public information.

name: GOWIRES - Global Onshore Wind Turbines with site-specific wind resources
notes: Per-turbine site historical (1989-2018) & future (2030-2059) wind metrics
verify_notes: DOI resolves to Zenodo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GOWIRES 是一套全球陆上风机数据集，包含 89 个国家共 416,417 台风机，并为每台风机附带站点特定的风资源指标，涵盖历史（1989-2018）和未来（2030-2059）风况。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、CSV 和 XLSX 格式提供，适用于风能潜力评估、能源规划和气候情景分析。采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，托管于 Zenodo，配套发表于 Scientific Data。
desc_en: GOWIRES is a global onshore wind-turbine dataset covering 416,417 turbines across 89 countries, with site-specific wind-resource metrics attached to each turbine spanning historical (1989-2018) and future (2030-2059) wind conditions. The data is provided as shapefile, GeoPackage, CSV, and XLSX, supporting wind-potential assessment, energy planning, and climate-scenario analysis. It is hosted on Zenodo under a CC-BY 4.0 license and accompanied by a Scientific Data publication.

name: GTFS Guadalajara Macrobus
notes: Macrobus BRT corridor.
verify_notes: Different Terms of Use noted | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是墨西哥瓜达拉哈拉 Macrobus 快速公交（BRT）走廊的 GTFS 数据集，通过 TUMI 数据中心发布，包含线路形状（shapes）和站点的矢量信息。它适用于公共交通分析、可达性建模和出行规划。数据以 GTFS 格式直接下载，许可未明确说明。
desc_en: This is a GTFS dataset for the Macrobus bus rapid transit (BRT) corridor in the metropolitan area of Guadalajara, Mexico, published via the TUMI data hub, including route shapes and stop vectors. It supports transit analysis, accessibility modeling, and trip planning. The data is directly downloadable in GTFS format, though its license is not specified.

name: GTFS Kampala
notes: Scarce open paratransit dataset for East Africa.
verify_notes: lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是乌干达坎帕拉的 GTFS 公共交通数据集，由 TUMI 与坎帕拉首都城市管理局发布。作为东非地区少有的开放半正式（paratransit）交通数据，它对研究该地区出行网络、可达性和交通规划具有重要价值。数据以 GTFS 格式直接下载，许可未明确说明。
desc_en: This is a GTFS public-transport dataset for Kampala, Uganda, published by TUMI together with the Kampala Capital City Authority. As a scarce open paratransit dataset for East Africa, it is valuable for studying the region's mobility networks, accessibility, and transport planning. The data is directly downloadable in GTFS format, though its license is not specified.

name: GTFS Porto Alegre
verify_notes: lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是巴西阿雷格里港（Porto Alegre）的 GTFS 公共交通数据集，由当地交通管理机构 EPTC 发布，包含线路和站点等矢量信息。它适用于公共交通网络分析、可达性研究和出行规划。数据以 GTFS 格式直接下载，许可未明确说明。
desc_en: This is a GTFS public-transport dataset for Porto Alegre, Brazil, published by the local transit authority EPTC, containing route and stop vector information. It supports transit-network analysis, accessibility studies, and trip planning. The data is directly downloadable in GTFS format, though its license is not specified.

name: Hajk Sample WFS Layers
theme_raw: 瑞典地方政府基础底图与点要素
access: 应用内置 WFS 配置
notes: 含多个真实瑞典市政 WFS URL 配置

desc_zh: Hajk 是由瑞典市政联盟开发的开源地图应用，其示例配置中内置了多个真实的瑞典市政 WFS 服务地址。这些示例 WFS/WMS 图层覆盖瑞典示例城市，便于开发者测试和搭建基于 WFS 的地图应用。项目代码采用 MIT 许可，矢量数据通过应用内置的 WFS 配置访问。
desc_en: Hajk is an open-source map application developed by a consortium of Swedish municipalities, whose sample configuration embeds several real Swedish municipal WFS service endpoints. These example WFS/WMS layers cover sample Swedish cities and let developers test and build WFS-based mapping applications. The project code is MIT-licensed, and the vector data is accessed through the application's built-in WFS configuration.

name: Harmonised global wind and solar farm locations (Dunnett et al.)
notes: First global harmonised open vector dataset of wind/solar installations
verify_notes: figshare returns 403 to WebFetch (bot blocking); likely still alive in browser | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 协调统一的全球风电与太阳能场址数据集（Dunnett 等，2020）是首个基于 OpenStreetMap 派生的全球开放风光设施矢量数据集，以点和多边形形式给出风电场和光伏场的位置与发电相关属性。它适用于可再生能源制图、容量分析和能源地理研究。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 CSV 格式开放，因源自 OSM 采用 ODbL 1.0 许可。
desc_en: The Harmonised global datasets of wind and solar farm locations and power (Dunnett et al., 2020) is the first global harmonised open vector dataset of wind and solar installations, derived from OpenStreetMap and providing wind and solar farm locations as points and polygons with power-related attributes. It supports renewable-energy mapping, capacity analysis, and energy-geography research. The data is available as shapefile, GeoPackage, and CSV and, being OSM-derived, is licensed under ODbL 1.0.

name: HarvestStat Africa - Harmonized Subnational Crop Statistics for Sub-Saharan Africa
what_changes: 574,204 subnational crop records (33 countries, 94 crops, 1980-2022) harmonized to GAUL-compatible admin units with vector polygons
notes: Niche food-security derivative reusing GAUL coding

desc_zh: HarvestStat Africa 是一套面向撒哈拉以南非洲的协调化次国家级作物统计数据集，覆盖 33 个国家。它复用 GAUL 行政编码，便于与全球行政边界数据衔接，是粮食安全分析的专题派生产品。该数据适用于作物产量、农业经济和饥荒预警研究，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。
desc_en: HarvestStat Africa is a harmonized subnational crop-statistics dataset for Sub-Saharan Africa, covering 33 countries. It reuses GAUL administrative coding for easy joining with global administrative boundaries and is a thematic derivative geared toward food-security analysis. The dataset supports crop-yield, agricultural-economics, and famine-early-warning research and is released under a CC BY 4.0 license.

name: Heights of 22000+ GNSS stations (Nevada Geodetic Laboratory)
notes: Single-file global GNSS station heights
verify_notes: GNSS station heights | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是内华达大地测量实验室（NGL）发布的全球 22,000 多个 GNSS 台站高程数据集（2024 年），以单个 GeoPackage 点文件提供全球 GNSS 台站的高程信息。它便于大地测量、地壳形变和参考框架研究中快速获取台站位置与高程。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，托管于 Zenodo 开放获取。
desc_en: This dataset provides the heights of more than 22,000 GNSS stations worldwide (2024) released by the Nevada Geodetic Laboratory, delivered as a single GeoPackage point file of global GNSS station heights. It offers quick access to station locations and elevations for geodesy, crustal-deformation, and reference-frame research. The data is hosted on Zenodo under a CC-BY-4.0 license.

name: Hexagon KH-9 Enhanced GHS-POP 1970s for Istanbul (Uhl et al. 2025, arXiv:2512.12527)
what_changes: Refines GHS-POP rural and peri-urban population distributions for the 1970s Istanbul region by fusing declassified Hexagon KH-9 historical satellite built-up extraction with GHSL population grids.
notes: Very niche back-casting work targeting GHSL's pre-Landsat-era weaknesses.
verify_notes: GHSL population grids enhancement preprint | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一项面向伊斯坦布尔的研究（Uhl 等，2025），利用解密的 Hexagon KH-9 侦察卫星影像增强 GHS-POP 人口数据，回溯估计 1970 年代的人口分布。它针对 GHSL 在 Landsat 时代之前的薄弱环节，属于较为专门的历史人口回溯工作。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。
desc_en: This is a study targeting Istanbul (Uhl et al., 2025) that uses declassified Hexagon KH-9 reconnaissance satellite imagery to enhance GHS-POP population data, back-casting the population distribution of the 1970s. It addresses GHSL's pre-Landsat-era weaknesses and is a fairly niche historical population back-casting effort. The data is released under a CC BY 4.0 license.

name: HFP-100: Global 100 m Terrestrial Human Footprint v1.2 (Gassert/Williams et al. 2023)
what_changes: Combines GRIP and OSM roadways as the static road-pressure input layer, fused with built-up, cropland, pasture, population, electric infrastructure, railways and waterways to produce 100 m global human-footprint pressure rasters for 2015-2020.
notes: Also mirrored at source.coop/vizzuality/hfp-100.
verify_notes: Title HFP-100 Global 100m Terrestrial Human Footprint; license now CC0 (was CC-BY). | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HFP-100 是全球 100 米分辨率陆地人类足迹数据集 v1.2（Gassert、Williams 等，2023），量化全球陆地范围内的人类压力与影响。它适用于生物多样性保护、生态完整性评估和荒野识别等研究。数据采用 CC0 1.0 公有领域声明，托管于 Dryad，并在 source.coop/vizzuality/hfp-100 提供镜像。
desc_en: HFP-100 is the Global 100 m Terrestrial Human Footprint v1.2 (Gassert, Williams et al., 2023), quantifying human pressure and impact across the world's terrestrial surface at 100 m resolution. It supports biodiversity-conservation, ecological-integrity, and wilderness-identification research. The data is released under a CC0 1.0 public-domain dedication, hosted on Dryad, and also mirrored at source.coop/vizzuality/hfp-100.

name: High Resolution Canopy Height Maps (WRI x Meta) — derived footprint vectors
provider: AWS Open Data / Meta Data for Good / WRI
theme_raw: 1m canopy height tiles with vector tile index
notes: Tile index is vector; canopy itself raster. Include only for index utility.
verify_notes: High Resolution Canopy Height Maps; update freq TBD | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 高分辨率冠层高度图（WRI × Meta）覆盖全球热带地区并持续扩展，主体为 COG 格式的冠层高度栅格，配套提供 GeoJSON/GeoParquet 瓦片索引矢量。冠层数据本身为栅格，矢量部分主要是瓦片索引，便于按区域定位和下载。数据托管于 AWS 开放数据，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，适用于森林监测和碳估算研究。
desc_en: The High Resolution Canopy Height Maps (WRI x Meta) cover the global tropics with ongoing expansion, consisting mainly of COG-format canopy-height rasters accompanied by a GeoJSON/GeoParquet tile-index vector. The canopy data itself is raster, while the vector component is primarily a tile index for locating and downloading data by region. Hosted on AWS Open Data under a CC-BY 4.0 license, it supports forest-monitoring and carbon-estimation research.

name: High-Resolution dataset on elderly care facility accessibility and inequality in 21 Chinese cities (Scientific Data 2026)
formats: Vector aggregations + 100 m rasters; includes facility point layers
verify_notes: 同上 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一套关于中国 21 个城市养老设施可达性与不平等的高分辨率数据集（Scientific Data 2026），以 2020 年为基准年。数据包含养老设施点图层、矢量聚合统计以及 100 米分辨率栅格，适用于城市公共服务可达性、空间公平和老龄化研究。开放获取，采用 CC-BY 许可。
desc_en: This is a high-resolution dataset on elderly-care facility accessibility and inequality across 21 Chinese cities (Scientific Data 2026), with 2020 as the reference year. It includes facility point layers, vector aggregations, and 100 m rasters, supporting research on urban public-service accessibility, spatial equity, and aging. It is openly available under a CC-BY license.

name: IBGE Base Cartográfica Contínua BC250 (2025)
notes: 2025 edition adds GPKG + PostGIS; complements Malha Municipal.

desc_zh: IBGE 连续制图基础底图 BC250（2025 版）由巴西地理统计局发布，是覆盖全巴西的 1:250,000 比例尺连续矢量地形基础数据。2025 版新增 GeoPackage 和 PostGIS 格式，并与市级行政网格（Malha Municipal）互补。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 PostGIS 转储形式通过 geoftp.ibge.gov.br 直接下载，属于开放公共数据。
desc_en: The IBGE Base Cartográfica Contínua BC250 (2025 edition), published by Brazil's national statistics and geography institute, is a continuous 1:250,000-scale topographic vector base covering all of Brazil. The 2025 edition adds GeoPackage and PostGIS formats and complements the municipal mesh (Malha Municipal). The data is directly downloadable as shapefile, GeoPackage, and PostGIS dump via geoftp.ibge.gov.br as open public data.

name: IBTrACS - International Best Track Archive (shapefile)
notes: Subsets by basin (NA, EP, WP, NI, SI, SP), since-1980, last3years, active. Standard prj/shx/shp/dbf.
verify_notes: Trailing-slash redirect; content reachable. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: IBTrACS 是 NOAA NCEI 维护的国际最佳路径档案，汇编全球热带气旋的最佳路径数据，记录从 1842 年至今 150 多年、6000 多个热带气旋。它以点和线 Shapefile（以及 CSV、netCDF）形式提供，可按海域（NA、EP、WP、NI、SI、SP）和时段（自 1980、近三年、活跃等）子集化下载。数据为美国政府公有领域，免认证直接通过 HTTP/FTP 获取，是热带气旋气候研究的标准数据集。
desc_en: IBTrACS, the International Best Track Archive maintained by NOAA NCEI, compiles best-track data for global tropical cyclones, recording over 6,000 storms across 150+ years from 1842 to the present. It is provided as point and line shapefiles (as well as CSV and netCDF) and can be subset by basin (NA, EP, WP, NI, SI, SP) and time window (since 1980, last three years, active, and all). The data is US-government public domain, accessible directly via HTTP/FTP without authentication, and is the standard dataset for tropical-cyclone climate research.

name: ICGC WMS Orthoimages
notes: 正射影像 WMS, 属栅格但属开放地理数据服务
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是加泰罗尼亚制图与地质研究所（ICGC）提供的正射影像 WMS 服务，覆盖加泰罗尼亚地区。虽然影像本身为栅格，但它作为开放地理数据服务，通过标准 WMS 接口在线提供正射影像，便于地图浏览、底图叠加和地理分析。服务采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。
desc_en: This is an orthoimagery WMS service provided by the Cartographic and Geologic Institute of Catalonia (ICGC), covering the Catalonia region. Although the imagery itself is raster, it is offered as an open geospatial data service that delivers orthophotos online through a standard WMS interface for map browsing, basemap overlay, and geospatial analysis. The service is licensed under CC BY 4.0.

name: ICGC WMS Territorial Orthophoto
notes: 区域正射影像 WMS
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该服务由加泰罗尼亚地图与地理信息研究所（ICGC）提供，通过 WMS 标准接口在线发布加泰罗尼亚地区的territorial（区域）正射影像。用户可在 GIS 软件或 Web 地图中直接加载影像图层，无需下载海量栅格文件，适用于底图叠加、土地利用解译、城乡规划与变化对比等场景。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，允许在署名前提下自由使用。
desc_en: Provided by the Cartographic and Geological Institute of Catalonia (ICGC), this is a WMS-based online service delivering territorial orthophoto imagery for Catalonia, Spain. The OGC Web Map Service standard lets users stream the imagery directly into GIS clients or web maps as a basemap, avoiding bulk raster downloads. It is well suited to land-use interpretation, urban and regional planning, and visual change detection. The service is released under CC BY 4.0, permitting reuse with attribution.

name: IGADC 数据资源总目录 (nearests)
provider: 东北亚地理科学数据中心
notes: 站点入口, 列出所有 region-specific 数据条目; 阶段二应整页爬取条目 URL (uXXXX 形式)
verify_notes: HTTP 404 Not Found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 本页是东北亚地理科学数据中心（IGADC）的数据资源总目录入口，汇集了覆盖中国、蒙古、俄罗斯、朝鲜等东北亚跨境区域的地理科学数据条目。资源以矢量 Shapefile 与栅格形式提供，涉及多个区域专题。访问需经申请审批流程。该页面为目录浏览入口，列出各具体数据条目，适合作为东北亚跨境地理研究的数据发现起点。
desc_en: This page is the master data catalogue entry of the International Geoscience Data Center for Northeast Asia (IGADC), aggregating geoscience datasets covering the transboundary Northeast Asian region of China, Mongolia, Russia and North Korea. Resources are offered in vector Shapefile and raster formats across multiple regional themes. Access requires an application-and-approval procedure. As a catalogue landing page listing individual region-specific entries, it serves as a discovery gateway for cross-border Northeast Asian geographic research.

name: INSEE IRIS / Contour…IRIS
notes: France's atomic statistical unit; carries INSEE deprivation, fragilite, FILOSOFI income indicators via joins.
verify_notes: IGN Geoservices moved to cartes.gouv.fr (Geoplateforme) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: IRIS 是法国 INSEE 设计的最小统计单元，将市镇细分为人口约 2000 的小区，是法国社会经济统计的基础空间单元。本数据集由 IGN 发布 IRIS 边界矢量（覆盖法国本土及海外省 DOM），提供 Shapefile 与 GeoPackage 格式，通常以开放许可（Licence Ouverte）发布。通过 INSEE 代码可关联收入（FILOSOFI）、贫困与脆弱性等指标，广泛用于城市与公共健康研究。
desc_en: IRIS is France's smallest statistical geography, designed by INSEE to subdivide communes into units of roughly 2,000 inhabitants, forming the atomic spatial unit of French socio-economic statistics. Published by IGN, this dataset provides IRIS contour boundaries covering metropolitan France and the overseas departments (DOM), in Shapefile and GeoPackage formats, typically under the open Licence Ouverte. Via INSEE codes the polygons join to deprivation, fragility and FILOSOFI income indicators, making them a staple of urban and public-health analysis.

name: INSPIRE Annex III Statistical Units - Luxembourg
verify_notes: Format details not in page snippet | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集是卢森堡按 INSPIRE 指令附录 III「统计单元」主题发布的面状统计单元边界，由卢森堡地理门户（Géoportail Luxembourg）提供。数据符合 INSPIRE 数据规范，提供 Shapefile 与 GML 格式，并以 CC0 协议进入公共领域，可无限制自由使用。适用于人口与社会经济统计的空间汇总、制图及跨欧盟数据互操作场景。
desc_en: This dataset provides area-based statistical units for Luxembourg, published under the INSPIRE Annex III 'Statistical Units' theme by Géoportail Luxembourg. Compliant with INSPIRE data specifications, it is offered in Shapefile and GML formats and released into the public domain under CC0, allowing unrestricted reuse. It supports spatial aggregation and mapping of demographic and socio-economic statistics and is designed for interoperability across EU member-state data infrastructures.

name: INSPIRE ATOM Download Service - UWWTD Treatment Plants (Lithuania)
provider: Construction Sector Development Agency + Min. of Environment LT
theme_raw: Utility & government services / environmental monitoring facilities
notes: Lithuanian INSPIRE priority dataset for UWWTD plants - non-EN-world example.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是立陶宛按欧盟城市废水处理指令（UWWTD）报送的污水处理厂数据集，通过 INSPIRE ATOM 下载服务发布，由立陶宛建设部门发展局与环境部维护。数据采用 INSPIRE GML 3.0 应用模式，并以 ATOM 预定义数据集形式提供，覆盖时段约为 2020 至 2024 年。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，是欧盟优先数据集中的一个非英语国家示例，适用于环境合规与水务基础设施分析。
desc_en: This dataset covers urban waste-water treatment plants in Lithuania reported under the EU Urban Waste Water Treatment Directive (UWWTD), delivered through an INSPIRE ATOM download service and maintained by the Construction Sector Development Agency and the Ministry of Environment. It uses the INSPIRE GML 3.0 application schema and is offered as a predefined ATOM dataset, spanning roughly 2020 to 2024. Released under CC BY 4.0, it is an EU priority dataset and serves environmental compliance and water-infrastructure analysis.

name: INSPIRE Download - Cadastral Parcels
verify_notes: BE cadastral parcels download service | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为某欧盟成员国按 INSPIRE 指令发布的地籍宗地（Cadastral Parcels）数据，源自国家地籍机构。数据通过 WFS 下载服务以 GML 格式提供，遵循 INSPIRE 地籍主题的数据模型，并按相应开放数据条款授权。地籍宗地是产权、土地管理、规划与空间分析的基础矢量要素，适用于不动产、税务与城乡治理等应用。
desc_en: This dataset provides cadastral parcels for an EU member state, published under the INSPIRE Directive and sourced from the national cadastre. It is delivered through a WFS download service in GML format, following the INSPIRE Cadastral Parcels data model, under the applicable open-data terms. Cadastral parcels are a foundational vector layer for property rights, land administration, planning and spatial analysis, supporting real-estate, taxation and territorial-governance applications.

name: INSPIRE Priority Data Set - Habitat Types Distribution (Lithuania)
notes: Habitats Directive reporting; flagged Compliant (not just as-is) - solid quality.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集是立陶宛环境保护局发布的栖息地类型分布（Habitat Types Distribution）矢量数据，覆盖全国，比例尺约 1:10,000，时段约 2019–2024 年。数据通过 geoportal.lt 以 INSPIRE 兼容方式提供 WFS、GML 与 Shapefile 格式，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，并被标记为 INSPIRE「合规」（Compliant），质量较高。主要服务于欧盟栖息地指令报送、生态与生物多样性研究。
desc_en: This dataset maps the distribution of habitat types across Lithuania, published by the Lithuanian Environmental Protection Agency at roughly 1:10,000 scale for the 2019–2024 period. It is served via geoportal.lt as an INSPIRE-harmonised resource in WFS, GML and Shapefile formats under CC BY 4.0, and is flagged INSPIRE 'Compliant' rather than merely as-is, indicating solid quality. It primarily supports EU Habitats Directive reporting as well as ecological and biodiversity analysis.

name: INSPIRE WFS Download - Geographical Names (Czechia CUZK)
license_now: No limitations to public access; CUZK Data Policy
verify_notes: INSPIRE WFS Geographical Names CZ; endpoint geoportal.cuzk.gov.cz | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该服务由捷克测绘地籍局（CUZK）提供，通过 INSPIRE 兼容的 WFS 下载服务发布捷克全国地理名称（Geographical Names）数据。接口符合 WFS 2.0 标准，以 GML 格式输出，依据 CUZK 数据政策对公众开放、无访问限制。地名数据是地图标注、地理编码、检索与空间参考的基础要素，适用于制图、导航与各类地理信息应用。
desc_en: Provided by CUZK (the Czech Office for Surveying, Mapping and Cadastre), this is an INSPIRE-compliant WFS download service delivering geographical names for the Czech Republic. The endpoint conforms to WFS 2.0 and outputs GML, with no limitations on public access under the CUZK data policy. Geographical names are a core layer for map labelling, geocoding, search and spatial referencing, supporting cartography, navigation and a wide range of geographic information applications.

name: IOM on HDX
theme_raw: DTM IDP and migration vector layers
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; HDX normally public, likely bot block. | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 这是国际移民组织（IOM）在人道主义数据交换平台（HDX）上的机构数据集合，汇集与移民、流离失所及人口流动相关的全球数据。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 与 CSV 等格式开放提供，采用 CC BY-IGO 3.0 许可。其中常包含 IOM 流离失所监测矩阵（DTM）等成果，广泛用于人道主义响应、移民研究与危机分析。
desc_en: This is the organisational collection of the International Organization for Migration (IOM) on the Humanitarian Data Exchange (HDX), aggregating global data on migration, displacement and population mobility. Resources are openly available in formats such as Shapefile, GeoJSON and CSV under a CC BY-IGO 3.0 licence, and frequently include outputs like IOM's Displacement Tracking Matrix (DTM). The collection is widely used for humanitarian response, migration research and crisis analysis.

name: KyFromAbove (Kentucky Aerial / Elevation)
theme_raw: statewide imagery, elevation derivatives, parcel/tile index
formats: GeoPackage (vector tile index, contours), COG, TIFF, Tiles
formats_now: COG, LAZ, COPC, GeoPackage, PNG, Esri FGDB, LAS
notes: GPKG vector layers accompany the imagery/lidar program
verify_notes: Kentucky statewide imagery/LiDAR | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: KyFromAbove 是美国肯塔基州的高分辨率航空影像与高程（激光雷达）数据计划，作为 AWS 开放数据集托管，存储于 s3://kyfromabove/。数据包含 COG、TIFF、瓦片影像以及随附的 GeoPackage 矢量图层（如瓦片索引、等高线）。许可为「公共领域并署名」。覆盖肯塔基州全境，适用于地形分析、洪水建模、基础设施与土地管理等应用。
desc_en: KyFromAbove is the Commonwealth of Kentucky's high-resolution aerial imagery and elevation (lidar) program, hosted as an AWS Open Dataset at s3://kyfromabove/. It includes COG, TIFF and tiled imagery alongside accompanying GeoPackage vector layers such as tile indexes and contours. Released as public domain with attribution and covering the entire state of Kentucky, it supports terrain analysis, flood modelling, infrastructure mapping and land-management applications.

name: Levantine Land-cover and Land-use Change Dataset (Hammad et al. 2023)
what_changes: Integrates GHSL built-up and settlement layers with Levant-specific climate, conflict (Arab Spring), and COVID-era data to model land-cover/land-use change; provides regional vectorized derivatives.
notes: Obscure regional Zenodo derivative.
verify_notes: GlobPOP 31-year global gridded population | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集（Hammad 等，2023）发布于 Zenodo，是一份针对黎凡特（Levant）地区的土地覆盖与土地利用变化数据集。作为一个区域性学术衍生成果，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。由于公开元数据有限，其具体覆盖范围、年份与分辨率以原始记录为准；总体可用于黎凡特地区土地利用变化监测与相关环境、社会经济研究。
desc_en: Published on Zenodo, this dataset (Hammad et al., 2023) is a land-cover and land-use change dataset focused on the Levant region. It is a regional academic derivative product released under CC BY 4.0. As detailed metadata is limited, its precise coverage, time span and resolution should be confirmed from the original record; broadly, it can support land-use change monitoring and related environmental and socio-economic research across the Levant.

name: LINZ Geodetic
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] 大地测量服务栏目页, 非直接数据集
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该页面是新西兰土地信息局（LINZ）的大地测量（Geodetic）服务栏目，介绍并提供新西兰大地控制网、坐标参考框架与基准相关的服务与数据。内容采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。需注意此为服务栏目页而非单一具体数据集，是查找新西兰大地测量基准、控制点与坐标系统资源的入口，适用于测绘、定位与空间参考工作。
desc_en: This page is the geodetic services section of Land Information New Zealand (LINZ), describing and providing access to New Zealand's geodetic control network, coordinate reference frames and datum-related services and data, under a CC BY 4.0 licence. Note that it is a services landing page rather than a single discrete dataset; it acts as an entry point to New Zealand's geodetic datums, control marks and coordinate systems, supporting surveying, positioning and spatial-referencing work.

name: Living Atlas National Geospatial Open Data (NGDA)
notes: US National Geospatial Data Asset portfolio mirrored in Living Atlas
verify_notes: Esri Living Atlas NGDA group page; JS-rendered | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是 Esri ArcGIS Living Atlas 中镜像的美国国家地理空间数据资产（NGDA）集合，汇集了美国联邦各机构指定的权威地理空间主题数据。数据以要素服务、Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 等形式提供，属美国公共领域，可自由使用。覆盖美国全国，涵盖交通、水文、边界、影像等多个 NGDA 主题，适用于联邦与公共部门制图、分析与决策支持。
desc_en: This is the U.S. National Geospatial Data Asset (NGDA) portfolio mirrored within Esri's ArcGIS Living Atlas, bringing together authoritative geospatial themes designated across U.S. federal agencies. Data is provided as feature services, Shapefiles and GeoJSON in the U.S. public domain for unrestricted reuse. Covering the entire United States across NGDA themes such as transportation, hydrography, boundaries and imagery, it supports federal and public-sector mapping, analysis and decision-making.

name: MAREANO – Norwegian Sea Mapping (via Geonorge)
license: Norwegian Licence for Open Government Data (NLOD) / CC-BY 4.0
notes: Detailed seabed habitat/sediment vectors; portal also covers extended continental shelf claim areas.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; likely UA block | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: MAREANO 是挪威的海床测绘计划，由挪威制图局、地质调查局（NGU）与海洋研究所（IMR）联合实施，覆盖挪威专属经济区及斯瓦尔巴海域，门户还涉及外大陆架主张区。数据提供详细的海床栖息地与沉积物矢量，格式包括 Shapefile、SOSI 及 WMS/WFS 服务，采用 NLOD 或 CC BY 4.0 许可。适用于海洋空间规划、生境制图与海洋生态研究。
desc_en: MAREANO is Norway's seabed mapping programme, run jointly by the Norwegian Mapping Authority, the Geological Survey (NGU) and the Institute of Marine Research (IMR), covering the Norwegian EEZ and Svalbard, with the portal also reaching extended continental shelf claim areas. It delivers detailed seabed habitat and sediment vectors in formats including Shapefile, SOSI and WMS/WFS services, under NLOD or CC BY 4.0. It supports marine spatial planning, benthic habitat mapping and ocean ecological research.

name: Maryland GIS Data Catalog (MD iMAP)
notes: 1000+ services; statewide enterprise GIS
verify_notes: MD iMAP catalog reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MD iMAP 是美国马里兰州的企业级 GIS 开放数据目录，基于 ArcGIS Hub 构建，提供覆盖全州的上千个图层与服务。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 与 WFS 等多种格式公开提供，涵盖行政边界、交通、环境、规划等众多主题。作为州级权威数据门户，适用于政府、研究与公众的制图、分析与应用开发。
desc_en: MD iMAP is the State of Maryland's enterprise GIS open data catalogue, built on ArcGIS Hub and offering over a thousand statewide layers and services. Data is published openly in formats including Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and WFS, spanning themes such as administrative boundaries, transportation, environment and planning. As an authoritative state-level portal, it serves government, research and public users for mapping, analysis and application development.

name: Material and Social Deprivation Index (Pampalon) — INSPQ Québec
provider: Institut national de santé publique du Québec
theme_raw: Material & social deprivation index by Statistics Canada DA
formats_now: ZIP, PDF, Shapefile via Donnees Quebec
notes: Widely used by epidemiology community; benchmark Canadian deprivation index.
verify_notes: MSDI 1991-2021; shapefiles via Donnees Quebec portal | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 这是由魁北克国家公共卫生研究所（INSPQ）维护的 Pampalon 物质与社会贫困指数，是加拿大流行病学界广泛使用的基准贫困指标。数据以表格形式提供，并可关联到普查传播区（DA）边界形成 Shapefile，覆盖魁北克及全加拿大，含 1991 至 2021 年多个普查年度。访问需注册。广泛用于健康不平等、社会经济梯度与公共卫生研究。
desc_en: This is the Pampalon Material and Social Deprivation Index maintained by the Institut national de santé publique du Québec (INSPQ), a benchmark deprivation measure widely used by the Canadian epidemiology community. It is provided as tabular data that joins to census Dissemination Area (DA) boundaries to form shapefiles, covering Québec and all of Canada across census years from 1991 to 2021. Access requires registration. It is extensively used in health-inequality, socio-economic-gradient and public-health research.

name: Material stock map of CONUS (and 7 regional subsets)
what_changes: Uses Microsoft Building Footprints (+Sentinel-1/2, NLCD, OSM) as input to estimate built-environment material mass on 10 m grid for the continental US
notes: Frantz, Schug, Wiedenhofer et al., Nature Communications; regional records 6873604/6873600/6873591/6869330/6873596/6873598/6873579
verify_notes: Material stock map CONUS (23.2 GB). | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为美国本土（CONUS）的物质存量（Material Stock）地图，伴有 7 个区域子集，由 Frantz、Schug、Wiedenhofer 等人发表于《Nature Communications》。数据空间分辨率约 10 米，总量约 23.2 GB，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它量化了建成环境中蕴含的物质存量，适用于城市代谢、循环经济、可持续性与社会生态系统研究。
desc_en: This dataset is a material stock map of the conterminous United States (CONUS) with seven regional subsets, authored by Frantz, Schug, Wiedenhofer and colleagues and published in Nature Communications. It has a spatial resolution of about 10 m and a total volume of roughly 23.2 GB, released under CC BY 4.0. It quantifies material stocks embodied in the built environment and supports research in urban metabolism, the circular economy, sustainability and social-ecological systems.

name: Matrikkelen - Eiendomskart (cadastre)
verify_notes: Cadastre teig polygons | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: Matrikkelen Eiendomskart（Teig）是挪威官方地籍中的不动产宗地图，由挪威制图局（Kartverket）维护，是挪威权威的产权与地块边界数据。数据通过 Geonorge 目录提供，格式包括 FGDB、GML 与 SOSI，并支持 WFS 下载，开放子集采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。适用于土地管理、产权登记、规划与不动产分析等应用。
desc_en: Matrikkelen Eiendomskart (Teig) is the cadastral property-parcel map of Norway, maintained by Kartverket (the Norwegian Mapping Authority) as the authoritative source of property and parcel boundaries. Available through the Geonorge catalogue in FGDB, GML and SOSI formats with WFS download, the open subset is released under CC BY 4.0. It supports land administration, property registration, planning and real-estate analysis.

name: MERIT Basins source code / processing scripts
notes: Companion code repository; included as lead for reproducibility (not a vector dataset).
verify_notes: 23 stars, 21 commits | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 MERIT Basins（Lin 等）的源代码与处理脚本仓库，由主作者 Peirong Lin 维护，用于生成全球高精度河网与流域矢量数据。仓库以 Python 实现，采用 Apache-2.0 许可，对应论文 DOI 10.1029/2019WR025287。需注意它本身是配套代码而非矢量数据集，主要服务于研究复现、水文建模流程理解与方法学参考。
desc_en: This is the source-code and processing-scripts repository for MERIT Basins (Lin et al.), maintained by lead author Peirong Lin, used to derive global high-accuracy river-network and basin vectors. Implemented in Python under the Apache-2.0 licence and linked to DOI 10.1029/2019WR025287, it is a companion code repository rather than a vector dataset itself. It is intended for reproducibility, understanding the hydrological processing workflow and methodological reference.

name: MGGG Georgia Precincts (GA-shapefiles)
notes: GA 2016 precinct shapefile with senate/presidential results
verify_notes: Public; 2016 precincts + presidential/senate election + 2010 census demographics; EPSG:4019; A rating. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该仓库由 MGGG（Metric Geometry and Gerrymandering Group，选区度量与不公正划分研究组）提供，包含美国佐治亚州 2016 年选区（precinct）的 Shapefile，并附带参议院与总统选举结果属性。数据通过 GitHub 开放获取。此类选区矢量是选区重划分析、选举地理与政治科学研究的常用数据基础。
desc_en: This repository, provided by MGGG (the Metric Geometry and Gerrymandering Group), contains a 2016 precinct-level shapefile for the U.S. state of Georgia, with attached senate and presidential election results. It is openly available via GitHub. Such precinct vectors are a common foundation for redistricting analysis, electoral geography and political-science research.

name: MGGG Maryland Precincts (MD-shapefiles)
notes: Maryland precinct shapefile with election results
verify_notes: Maryland precinct shapefiles 2012-2018, NAD83 EPSG:26985 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该仓库由 MGGG（选区度量与不公正划分研究组）提供，包含美国马里兰州选区（precinct）的 Shapefile，并附带选举结果属性，通过 GitHub 开放获取。此类带选举属性的选区矢量数据常用于选区重划模拟、选举地理分析与政治科学研究。
desc_en: This repository from MGGG (the Metric Geometry and Gerrymandering Group) contains a precinct-level shapefile for the U.S. state of Maryland with attached election results, openly available via GitHub. Such precinct vectors with electoral attributes are widely used for redistricting simulation, electoral-geography analysis and political-science research.

name: MGGG Massachusetts Precincts (MA-shapefiles)
notes: State-level precinct shapefile with election attributes
verify_notes: Public; MA precincts with 2002-2018 election results. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该仓库由 MGGG（选区度量与不公正划分研究组）提供，包含美国马萨诸塞州的州级选区（precinct）Shapefile，并附带选举结果属性，通过 GitHub 开放获取。数据可用于选区重划分析、选举结果空间汇总与政治地理研究。
desc_en: This repository from MGGG (the Metric Geometry and Gerrymandering Group) provides a state-level precinct shapefile for Massachusetts with attached election attributes, openly available via GitHub. The data supports redistricting analysis, spatial aggregation of election results and political-geography research.

name: MGGG Michigan Precincts (MI-shapefiles)
notes: Michigan precinct shapefile with statewide 2016/2018 election results

desc_zh: 该仓库由 MGGG（选区度量与不公正划分研究组）提供，包含美国密歇根州选区（precinct）的 Shapefile，附带 2016 与 2018 年全州选举结果属性，通过 GitHub 开放获取。数据适用于选区重划模拟、选举地理与政治科学研究。
desc_en: This repository from MGGG (the Metric Geometry and Gerrymandering Group) contains a precinct-level shapefile for Michigan with statewide 2016 and 2018 election results, openly available via GitHub. The data supports redistricting simulation, electoral geography and political-science research.

desc_en: This repository from MGGG (the Metric Geometry and Gerrymandering Group) provides precinct-level shapefiles for New Mexico with 2016 and 2018 election results, openly available via GitHub. The data supports redistricting analysis, electoral geography and political-science research.

name: MGGG North Carolina VTDs (NC-shapefiles)
notes: NC VTD shapefile with 2008-2016 elections

desc_zh: 该仓库由 MGGG（选区度量与不公正划分研究组）提供，包含美国北卡罗来纳州投票区（VTD）的 Shapefile，附带 2008 至 2016 年选举结果属性，通过 GitHub 开放获取。投票区矢量数据常用于选区重划分析、选举地理与政治科学研究。
desc_en: This repository from MGGG (the Metric Geometry and Gerrymandering Group) contains a Voting Tabulation District (VTD) shapefile for North Carolina with election results spanning 2008 to 2016, openly available via GitHub. VTD vectors are commonly used for redistricting analysis, electoral geography and political-science research.

name: MGGG Oregon Precincts (OR-shapefiles)
notes: Oregon precinct shapefile with 2016 and 2018 election results
verify_notes: OR_precincts.zip, EPSG:2338 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该仓库由 MGGG（选区度量与不公正划分研究组）提供，包含美国俄勒冈州选区（precinct）的 Shapefile，附带 2016 与 2018 年选举结果属性，通过 GitHub 开放获取。数据适用于选区重划模拟、选举地理与政治科学研究。
desc_en: This repository from MGGG (the Metric Geometry and Gerrymandering Group) provides a precinct-level shapefile for Oregon with 2016 and 2018 election results, openly available via GitHub. The data supports redistricting simulation, electoral geography and political-science research.

desc_zh: 该仓库由 MGGG（选区度量与不公正划分研究组）提供，包含较为罕见的波多黎各选区（precinct）级 Shapefile，附带选举结果属性，通过 GitHub 开放获取。由于波多黎各选区级矢量数据稀缺，该资源对选举地理、选区重划与政治科学研究尤具价值。
desc_en: This repository from MGGG (the Metric Geometry and Gerrymandering Group) provides a relatively rare precinct-level shapefile for Puerto Rico with attached election results, openly available via GitHub. Because precinct-level vector data for Puerto Rico is scarce, this resource is particularly valuable for electoral geography, redistricting and political-science research.

name: MGGG Wisconsin Wards (WI-shapefiles)
notes: Wisconsin ward shapefile with election results
verify_notes: Public; WI wards 2012-2018; B rating due to disaggregation. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该仓库由 MGGG（选区度量与不公正划分研究组）提供，包含美国威斯康星州选区单元（ward）的 Shapefile，附带选举结果属性，通过 GitHub 开放获取。威斯康星以 ward 为基础选区单元，该数据适用于选区重划分析、选举地理与政治科学研究。
desc_en: This repository from MGGG (the Metric Geometry and Gerrymandering Group) contains a ward-level shapefile for Wisconsin with attached election results, openly available via GitHub. Wisconsin uses wards as its base electoral units, and the data supports redistricting analysis, electoral geography and political-science research.

name: Miami-Dade County Open Data Hub
notes: ArcGIS Hub county portal
verify_notes: Miami-Dade County GIS Hub; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是美国佛罗里达州迈阿密-戴德县（Miami-Dade County）的开放数据中心，基于 ArcGIS Hub 构建，发布覆盖全县的地理空间数据。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 与 KML 等格式公开提供，涵盖行政、交通、规划、环境等多种主题。作为县级权威 GIS 门户，适用于地方治理、城市规划、研究与公众应用开发。
desc_en: This is the open data hub of Miami-Dade County, Florida, built on ArcGIS Hub and publishing geospatial data covering the entire county. Data is openly available in formats such as Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML across themes including administration, transportation, planning and environment. As an authoritative county-level GIS portal, it supports local governance, urban planning, research and public application development.

name: MSDCW 全球城市街区数据(含中国221城)
provider: figshare发布(学术作者) - 镜像知乎
theme_raw: 城市街区(街道办事处近似单元)
notes: 罕见的中国市级以下街区(block)开源矢量,可作社会经济微观单元;来源于OSM路网切割
verify_notes: Figshare 403; may also need exact article ID in slug | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: MSDCW 是一份全球城市街区（block）开源矢量数据集，发布于 figshare，覆盖全球 142 国 985 座城市，其中含中国 221 座城市。数据由 OSM 路网切割生成街区面，提供 Shapefile 格式，采用 CC-BY 许可。它提供了罕见的中国市级以下街区单元，可作为社会经济分析的微观空间单元，适用于城市形态、人口与经济地理研究。
desc_en: MSDCW is an open global urban street-block vector dataset published on figshare, covering 985 cities across 142 countries, including 221 cities in China. The blocks are generated by partitioning OSM road networks into polygons, provided as Shapefiles under a CC-BY licence. It offers rare sub-municipal block units for China that can serve as micro-scale spatial units for socio-economic analysis, supporting urban-morphology, demographic and economic-geography research.

name: Multi-topography Wind Turbine Detection Dataset
notes: 1270 RS images, 4459 turbines; for detection model training
verify_notes: Wind turbine dataset | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一份多地形风电机检测数据集，由中国某高校研究团队发布于 Zenodo，包含 1270 幅遥感影像与 4459 个风电机标注，以 YOLO/VOC 边界框形式提供（可矢量化），覆盖中国地区样本。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该数据集主要用于训练遥感目标检测模型，适用于风电设施识别、可再生能源监测与计算机视觉研究。
desc_en: This is a multi-topography wind-turbine detection dataset published on Zenodo by a Chinese university research group, containing 1,270 remote-sensing images with 4,459 annotated turbines provided as YOLO/VOC bounding boxes (vectorizable), covering samples from China. Released under CC BY 4.0, it is intended for training remote-sensing object-detection models and supports wind-facility identification, renewable-energy monitoring and computer-vision research.

name: N100 Kartdata
verify_notes: Geonorge metadata; JS-rendered content | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: N100 Kartdata 是挪威制图局（Kartverket）发布的国家级中比例尺基础地图数据，覆盖挪威全境，相当于约 1:100,000 比例尺的地形要素。数据提供 FGDB、GML、SOSI 与 PostGIS 等格式，并支持 WMS/WFS 服务，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。涵盖道路、水系、地名、土地覆盖等基础图层，适用于制图、区域规划与一般地理分析。
desc_en: N100 Kartdata is a national medium-scale base map dataset from Kartverket (the Norwegian Mapping Authority), covering all of Norway with topographic features corresponding to roughly 1:100,000 scale. It is available in FGDB, GML, SOSI and PostGIS formats with WMS/WFS services, under a CC BY 4.0 licence. Including layers such as roads, watercourses, place names and land cover, it supports cartography, regional planning and general geographic analysis.

name: NASA FIRMS Active Fire WFS (MODIS/VIIRS)
notes: Updated every 15 minutes; EPSG:4326 and 3857
verify_notes: 301 to trailing slash | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NASA FIRMS 活动火点 WFS 服务基于 MODIS 与 VIIRS 卫星，提供近实时的全球活动火点与热异常数据，由 NASA LANCE/FIRMS 运营。服务通过 OGC WFS 接口输出 GeoJSON、GML、Shapefile 与 KML 等格式，支持 EPSG:4326 与 3857，约每 15 分钟更新一次（需 API key）。广泛用于野火监测、应急响应与环境研究。
desc_en: The NASA FIRMS active-fire WFS service delivers near-real-time global active-fire and thermal-anomaly detections from the MODIS and VIIRS satellites, operated by NASA LANCE/FIRMS. It serves data through an OGC WFS interface in GeoJSON, GML, Shapefile and KML formats, supporting EPSG:4326 and 3857, updated roughly every 15 minutes (an API key is required). It is widely used for wildfire monitoring, emergency response and environmental research.

name: NASADEM 1 arc-second (used to derive terrain vectors)
theme_raw: terrain (raster, but used here only for terrain attributes joined to Africapolis polygons)
formats: GeoTIFF (raster) -> terrain stats joined to vector polygons
notes: Included for completeness; auxiliary raster used to enrich Africapolis vector polygons (not a vector dataset itself).
verify_notes: LP DAAC moved catalog pages to earthdata.nasa.gov | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NASADEM 是 NASA JPL 与 LP DAAC 发布的全球数字高程模型，约 1 角秒（约 30 米）分辨率，基于对 SRTM 数据的重处理并融合其他高程源，覆盖全球。数据以 GeoTIFF 栅格形式提供，属公共领域（NASA）。需注意它是栅格高程产品，常用于派生地形统计并关联到矢量面，广泛用于地形分析、水文建模与地球科学研究。
desc_en: NASADEM is a global digital elevation model from NASA JPL and the LP DAAC at about 1 arc-second (~30 m) resolution, produced by reprocessing SRTM data and merging additional elevation sources, with global coverage. It is provided as GeoTIFF raster in the public domain (NASA). Note that it is a raster elevation product, often used to derive terrain statistics joined to vector polygons, and is widely used for terrain analysis, hydrological modelling and earth-science research.

name: National-Level Poverty Data (Poverty Mapping)
notes: National polygon datasets across the Poverty Mapping collection
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout after 60s; SEDAC has migrated content to NASA Earthdata | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该数据集是 CIESIN/SEDAC「贫困制图」（Poverty Mapping）合集中的国家级贫困数据，提供全球各国层面的贫困指标，以 Shapefile 与 CSV 等格式发布。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，访问需 Earthdata 登录。它将贫困统计与国家行政多边形关联，适用于全球贫困比较、发展研究与社会经济空间分析。
