desc_en: This dataset is the national-level poverty data within the CIESIN/SEDAC Poverty Mapping collection, providing country-level poverty indicators worldwide in formats such as Shapefile and CSV. Released under CC BY 4.0, access requires an Earthdata login. It links poverty statistics to national administrative polygons and supports global poverty comparison, development research and socio-economic spatial analysis.

name: Native range estimates for red-listed vascular plants
what_changes: Builds plant-specific range proxies (POWO native regions for 47,675 species, GBIF occurrence density for 30,906, MaxEnt predictions for 27,208) to fill gaps where IUCN Red List spatial data are absent for plants.
notes: Borgelt et al., Sci Data 2022 (10.1038/s41597-022-01233-5); web portal plant-ranges.indecol.no.
verify_notes: Native range estimates for red-listed vascular plants; 47,675 species | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集提供全球受威胁（红色名录）维管植物的本地分布范围估计，覆盖约47,675个物种，是同类研究中规模可观的开放资源。数据以矢量地理形式发布，配套有 plant-ranges.indecol.no 网络门户，可用于生物多样性评估、物种灭绝风险与保护规划研究。数据源自 Borgelt 等人发表于 Scientific Data (2022) 的工作，采用 Dryad 平台条款（默认 CC0），可自由复用。
desc_en: This dataset provides modeled native range estimates for red-listed vascular plant species worldwide, spanning roughly 47,675 species and totaling about 981MB. Published as geospatial vector data with a companion web portal (plant-ranges.indecol.no), it supports biodiversity assessment, extinction-risk analysis, and conservation planning. It derives from Borgelt et al. (Scientific Data, 2022) and is distributed under Dryad terms, defaulting to CC0 for unrestricted reuse.

name: Natural Earth data in Goode's Homolosine projection
what_changes: Reprojects Natural Earth 1:50m Admin 0 map subunits to interrupted Goode Homolosine using QGIS 3.20.3; output is a re-cut interrupted vector dataset.
notes: Single-author Zenodo deposit, low-citation derivative.
verify_notes: Natural Earth 1:50m admin in Goode Homolosine projection | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是 Natural Earth 矢量数据在 Goode 等积投影（Homolosine）下的派生版本，比例约为1:50（即 1:50m 小比例尺）。它便于在等积全球地图中直接使用而无需自行重投影，适合制作全球专题图与可视化。数据托管于 Zenodo，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，为单作者派生型小型存档。
desc_en: This is a derivative of Natural Earth vector data reprojected into Goode's Homolosine (an equal-area projection), at roughly 1:50m small scale. It lets users drop equal-area global basemaps directly into thematic maps and visualizations without reprojecting themselves. Hosted on Zenodo under CC BY 4.0, it is a single-author derivative deposit aimed at convenience for cartographic work.

name: Natural Earth Dataset for GRASS GIS
what_changes: Repackages Natural Earth raster + vector layers as a ready-to-use GRASS GIS location in WGS84 (EPSG:4326) with mapsets and import scripts.
notes: By Baharmon; GRASS-GIS-specific repackaging, niche teaching/research use.
verify_notes: Natural Earth Dataset for GRASS GIS v2.0.0, Aug 2024, WGS84 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该资源是面向 GRASS GIS 的 Natural Earth 数据重新打包版本，便于在 GRASS 环境中直接导入并用于教学和研究。它属于针对特定 GIS 平台的小众再分发，采用 ODC-PDDL-1.0 公共领域许可。适合 GRASS GIS 课程演示与制图入门练习等用途。
desc_en: This is a repackaging of Natural Earth data tailored for GRASS GIS, making it straightforward to import and use within a GRASS workflow. Authored by Baharmon, it serves a niche teaching and research role for users of that platform. It is released under ODC-PDDL-1.0, placing the data in the public domain for free reuse.

name: NCEI Severe Weather Data Inventory (SWDI)
theme_raw: Integrated severe weather (NEXRAD-derived hail/tornado signatures, lightning, storm reports, warnings)
formats: Shapefile, KMZ, CSV, XML, JSON via spatial/temporal query API
access: Interactive map + REST web service; no auth
notes: One of the few NCEI products that natively exports shapefile via on-the-fly query. Includes NX3HAIL, NX3TVS, PLSR, WARN sublayers.
verify_notes: 301 to trailing-slash HTTP URL | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NCEI 严重天气数据库（SWDI）由 NOAA 国家环境信息中心维护，整合美国本土多十年的严重天气事件记录，包含冰雹（NX3HAIL）、龙卷涡旋（NX3TVS）、灾情报告（PLSR）、预警（WARN）等子图层。可通过交互式地图与 REST 网络服务按时空查询，并原生导出 Shapefile、KMZ、CSV、XML、JSON，无需认证。属公共领域数据，广泛用于风暴气候学、灾害分析与应急研究。
desc_en: NOAA NCEI's Severe Weather Data Inventory (SWDI) aggregates multi-decadal severe weather records across the contiguous US, with sublayers such as hail (NX3HAIL), tornado vortex signatures (NX3TVS), local storm reports (PLSR), and warnings (WARN). It is queryable by space and time through an interactive map and REST web service, and is one of the few NCEI products that natively exports Shapefile alongside KMZ, CSV, XML, and JSON. As public-domain data it is widely used for storm climatology, hazard analysis, and emergency research.

name: Neptune Sandbox / NSB (Cenozoic micropaleo occurrences)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://nsb.mfn-berlin.de/))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://nsb.mfn-berlin.de/))
notes: Cited as the prior largest database in the Triton paper.
verify_notes: Connection refused | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://nsb.mfn-berlin.de/))
desc_zh: Neptune Sandbox（NSB）由柏林自然博物馆维护，汇集全球海洋新生代（Cenozoic）微体古生物出现记录，以含经纬度点位的 CSV 形式导出。它长期是该领域规模较大的开放学术数据库，常用于深海钻探微化石、古海洋与生物地层研究。该库为后续 Triton 数据库的前身，按开放学术条款提供。
desc_en: Neptune Sandbox (NSB), maintained by the Museum für Naturkunde Berlin, compiles Cenozoic micropaleontological occurrence records from the global oceans, exported as CSV point data with latitude/longitude. Long regarded as the largest database of its kind, it underpins research in deep-sea microfossils, paleoceanography, and biostratigraphy. It served as the predecessor to the Triton database and is provided under open academic terms via a web app and downloads.

name: New Zealand Elevation (LINZ open elevation)
provider: Land Information New Zealand (LINZ) / Toitū Te Whenua
theme_raw: DEM/DSM tile index and capture extents
formats: STAC GeoJSON catalog (vector index) + COG rasters
notes: STAC GeoJSON tile/extents are queryable vector layers
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集为新西兰土地信息局（LINZ / Toitū Te Whenua）发布的全国开放高程数据，托管于 AWS 开放数据计划（s3://nz-elevation/）。它以 STAC GeoJSON 目录作为可查询的矢量索引，配合云优化 GeoTIFF（COG）栅格瓦片提供高程数据。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，适合地形分析、洪水建模与大规模云端处理工作流。
desc_en: This is Land Information New Zealand's (LINZ) open elevation data for the whole country, hosted on the AWS Open Data program (s3://nz-elevation/). It pairs a STAC GeoJSON catalog—itself a queryable vector index of tile extents—with Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF (COG) elevation rasters. Released under CC BY 4.0, it suits terrain analysis, flood modeling, and large-scale cloud-native processing workflows.

name: NOAA Continually Updated Shoreline Product (CUSP) via National Shoreline Data Explorer (NSDE)
coverage: USA (CONUS, AK, HI, PR, USVI, Pacific territories)
formats_now: CUSP downloads by region; interactive map
notes: Most authoritative US mean-high-water shoreline; superior to GSHHG for US use.
verify_notes: Active; regional downloads for Alaska, Gulf, Atlantic, Pacific Islands, etc. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NOAA 国家大地测量局（NGS）通过国家岸线数据浏览器（NSDE）发布持续更新岸线产品（CUSP），覆盖美国本土、阿拉斯加、夏威夷、波多黎各、美属维尔京群岛及太平洋属地。数据以 Shapefile 提供，可直接下载，是美国最权威的平均高潮线岸线产品，在美国本土用途上优于 GSHHG。属美国政府公共领域，常用于海岸测绘、潮汐与海岸带管理。
desc_en: NOAA's National Geodetic Survey publishes the Continually Updated Shoreline Product (CUSP) through the National Shoreline Data Explorer (NSDE), covering the US including CONUS, Alaska, Hawaii, Puerto Rico, the USVI, and Pacific territories. Delivered as directly downloadable Shapefiles, it is the most authoritative US mean-high-water shoreline and is preferred over GSHHG for US applications. As US Government public-domain data, it supports coastal mapping, tidal datum work, and coastal-zone management.

name: NOAA Global Drifter Program (GDP) - drifter trajectories
license_now: Not stated on page (NOAA public data)
notes: 6 小时插值轨迹；OSCAR/洋流路径矢量化最佳基础数据。
verify_notes: GDP ERDDAP server | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NOAA 全球漂流浮标计划（GDP）提供全球海洋表层漂流浮标的轨迹数据，包含1979年至今的6小时插值数据和自2000年代初起的逐时数据。数据通过 ERDDAP 提供 NetCDF、CSV 等格式（可转换为 GeoJSON）。这是海表流场和洋流路径矢量化研究的优质基础数据，广泛用于海洋环流与漂移物追踪分析。
desc_en: NOAA's Global Drifter Program (GDP) provides trajectories of surface drifting buoys across the global ocean, with 6-hourly interpolated data from 1979 onward and hourly data since the early 2000s. Served via ERDDAP in NetCDF, CSV, and other formats convertible to GeoJSON, it is a prime base for vectorizing surface currents and ocean-flow pathways. It is widely used in ocean circulation and drift-tracking research and provided as open NOAA data.

name: Nominatim
theme_raw: OSM-based geocoder; exposes vector geometries via API
verify_notes: Repo active; multi-license clarification | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Nominatim 是 OpenStreetMap 基金会维护的开源地理编码与逆地理编码引擎，基于全球 OSM 数据，支持将地址转换为坐标及反向查询。它可自行部署，也提供公共 API（nominatim.openstreetmap.org），输出 GeoJSON、JSON、XML 等格式。代码以 GPL 等开源许可发布，是开放地理编码生态中的核心组件，广泛用于地图检索与位置服务。
desc_en: Nominatim is the OpenStreetMap Foundation's open-source geocoding and reverse-geocoding engine, built on global OSM data to turn addresses into coordinates and back. It can be self-hosted or accessed through the public API at nominatim.openstreetmap.org, returning GeoJSON, JSON, and XML. Released under GPL and related open licenses, it is a cornerstone of the open geocoding ecosystem and is widely used for place search and location services.

name: NRCS Geospatial Data Gateway
theme_raw: Bulk download portal for SSURGO/STATSGO2 vector tiles
verify_notes: Moved to gdg.sc.egov.usda.gov | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NRCS 地理空间数据网关由美国农业部自然资源保护局（USDA NRCS）运营，是面向美国的开放地理数据分发平台，提供土壤、地形等多类地理数据集的下载。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 等格式开放获取，属公共领域。常用于农业、土壤调查、保护规划与流域管理等领域。
desc_en: The NRCS Geospatial Data Gateway, run by the USDA Natural Resources Conservation Service, is an open distribution platform for US geospatial data, offering downloads of soils, terrain, and related datasets. Data are provided as Shapefile and GeoPackage in the public domain with open access. It is commonly used for agriculture, soil survey, conservation planning, and watershed management.

name: NZ Place Names Gazetteer
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] 地名服务栏目页, 实际数据在子页
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 新西兰地名地名录由土地信息局（LINZ）发布，是新西兰官方地名权威数据来源，提供经核定地名及其位置信息，可直接下载。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该页面为地名服务栏目入口，实际数据集位于子页面，常用于地图标注、地名检索与地理参考。
desc_en: The NZ Place Names Gazetteer, published by Land Information New Zealand (LINZ), is the official authoritative source for New Zealand place names, providing gazetted names and their locations as a direct download under CC BY 4.0. This page is the place-names service landing area, with the actual dataset on subpages. It is typically used for map labeling, name search, and geographic referencing.

name: OGC API - Features Developer Hub (official public servers list)
notes: Official OGC-maintained catalogue of working OGC API Features servers (ldproxy, pygeoapi, GoKoala, CubeWerx, GNOSIS).
verify_notes: OGC API Features standard portal; active community | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OGC API - Features 开发者中心是开放地理空间联盟（OGC）官方维护的可用 OGC API Features 服务器目录，收录了 ldproxy、pygeoapi、GoKoala、CubeWerx、GNOSIS 等实现的演示与生产端点。这些服务按 OGC API Features 规范以 GeoJSON 提供要素数据，许可视各端点而定。它是开发者测试客户端、学习标准实现与查找公开要素服务的实用入口。
desc_en: The OGC API - Features Developer Hub is the Open Geospatial Consortium's officially maintained catalogue of working OGC API Features servers, covering demo and production endpoints from implementations like ldproxy, pygeoapi, GoKoala, CubeWerx, and GNOSIS. These serve feature data as GeoJSON per the OGC API Features standard, with licensing varying by endpoint. It is a practical entry point for testing clients, learning standard implementations, and finding public feature services.

name: OHM Landmass Vector Tiles
lychee_status: Network error: Network unreachable. Check internet connection or VPN settings (error sending request for url (https://vtiles.openhistoricalmap.org/maps/osm_land.json))
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden | lychee:Network error: Network unreachable. Check internet connection or VPN settings (error sending request for url (https://vtiles.openhistoricalmap.org/maps/osm_land.json))
desc_zh: 该数据集是 OpenHistoricalMap（OHM）提供的全球陆地块矢量瓦片图层，以 Mapbox 矢量瓦片（MVT/.pbf）形式公开发布。它用作历史地图的陆地底图，便于在 OHM 的时间维度地图中渲染海陆边界。数据采用 ODbL 许可，适合制作历史专题地图与时间可视化的基础图层。
desc_en: This is OpenHistoricalMap's (OHM) global landmass vector tile layer, published publicly as Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT/.pbf). It serves as a land basemap for historical maps, providing the land–water boundary for rendering within OHM's time-aware mapping. Released under ODbL, it is well suited as a base layer for historical thematic cartography and temporal visualization.

name: OHM Natural Earth Waterbodies Tiles
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该图层是 OpenHistoricalMap 基于 Natural Earth 数据生成的全球水体矢量瓦片，以 MVT（.pbf）形式公开提供，用于在历史地图中渲染河流、湖泊与海洋等水体。其底层 Natural Earth 数据为公共领域，OHM 瓦片层采用 ODbL。适合作为历史与时间维度地图的水系底图。
desc_en: This layer provides global waterbody vector tiles derived from Natural Earth by OpenHistoricalMap, published openly as MVT (.pbf) for rendering rivers, lakes, and oceans within historical maps. The underlying Natural Earth data is public domain while the OHM tile layer is ODbL. It works well as a hydrographic base layer for historical and time-aware cartography.

name: OHM Overpass API
formats: OSM XML, JSON, GeoJSON (via overpass turbo)
verify_notes: lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是 OpenHistoricalMap 的 Overpass API 端点，允许按标签、区域和时间条件对 OHM 历史地理数据进行灵活查询。结果可输出 OSM XML、JSON，并可经 overpass turbo 转为 GeoJSON。数据采用 ODbL 许可，是从 OHM 提取特定历史要素子集的主要查询工具，适合历史地理与时空分析研究。
desc_en: This is OpenHistoricalMap's Overpass API endpoint, enabling flexible queries over OHM's historical geographic data by tag, area, and time. Results are returned as OSM XML and JSON, and can be converted to GeoJSON via overpass turbo. Licensed under ODbL, it is the primary tool for extracting specific historical feature subsets from OHM, suited to historical-geography and spatiotemporal analysis.

name: OHM REST API 0.6
lychee_status: Network error: SSL certificate hostname mismatch. Check URL spelling (error sending request for url (https://www.openhistoricalmap.org/api/0.6))
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden to WebFetch; API likely requires specific OSM-style headers | lychee:Network error: SSL certificate hostname mismatch. Check URL spelling (error sending request for url (https://www.openhistoricalmap.org/api/0.6))
desc_zh: 这是 OpenHistoricalMap 的 REST API 0.6 接口，采用与 OpenStreetMap 相同的 API 版本规范，用于读取与编辑 OHM 的历史地理数据。接口以 OSM XML 格式交互。数据采用 ODbL 许可，主要面向编辑客户端与程序化访问，是 OHM 数据写入与同步的核心接口。
desc_en: This is OpenHistoricalMap's REST API 0.6, following the same API specification as OpenStreetMap, used to read and edit OHM's historical geographic data. It exchanges data in OSM XML. Licensed under ODbL, it primarily serves editing clients and programmatic access, acting as the core interface for writing to and syncing OHM data.

name: OHM Vector Tiles (general layer)
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; likely UA filter | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该资源是 OpenHistoricalMap 的通用矢量瓦片图层，以 Mapbox 矢量瓦片（.pbf）和 TileJSON 形式通过公共 XYZ 端点提供，包含 OHM 的主要历史地理要素。数据采用 ODbL 许可，适合作为带时间维度的历史地图主底图，用于网页地图渲染与历史时空可视化。
desc_en: This is OpenHistoricalMap's general-purpose vector tile layer, served via a public XYZ endpoint as Mapbox Vector Tiles (.pbf) with TileJSON, carrying OHM's main historical geographic features. Released under ODbL, it works as a primary base layer for time-aware historical maps and is suited to web-map rendering and historical spatiotemporal visualization.

name: Open Data Denmark
notes: Cross-municipality CKAN with cadastral/cycle-network and city vector layers.
verify_notes: Danish open data portal maintained by OS2 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Open Data Denmark 是丹麦多个市政当局组成的联合开放数据平台，覆盖丹麦全境，汇集各市的地籍、自行车网络与城市矢量图层等数据。平台基于 CKAN 提供 API 访问，数据格式包括 Shapefile、GeoJSON 和 WFS，许可因数据集而异（多为开放）。适合城市规划、交通分析与本地地理研究。
desc_en: Open Data Denmark is a cross-municipality CKAN platform run by a consortium of Danish municipalities, covering Denmark and aggregating cadastral, cycle-network, and city vector layers from member municipalities. It offers API access via CKAN with formats including Shapefile, GeoJSON, and WFS, under licenses that vary by dataset (mostly open). It suits urban planning, transport analysis, and local geographic research.

name: OpenFlights Airports & Routes
theme_raw: 航空 - 机场点 + 航线
formats: CSV → GeoJSON (~3,237 机场, 18,125 航线)
notes: 复杂网络/航空研究里的事实基准, 被数十篇论文复用
verify_notes: 页面返回 404 Not Found；OpenFlights data.html 可能已迁移或下线 | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: OpenFlights 机场与航线数据集提供全球机场和航线信息，约含3,237个机场和18,125条航线，以 CSV 形式发布并可转换为 GeoJSON 航线网络。数据采用 ODbL 许可（GitHub 上有镜像）。它是复杂网络与航空研究中的事实基准，被数十篇论文复用，适合航空网络建模与可视化。
desc_en: The OpenFlights Airports & Routes dataset provides global airport and route information—about 3,237 airports and 18,125 routes—released as CSV that can be converted into a GeoJSON route network. Distributed under ODbL with GitHub mirrors, it is a de facto benchmark in complex-network and aviation research reused across dozens of papers, and is well suited to air-network modeling and visualization.

name: OpenFlights Airports, Airlines & Routes DB
feature_count: over 10,000 airports; 5888 airlines; 67663 routes; 3321 airports; 548 airlines
notes: Heavily cited in air-network science papers (Guimera, Barrat). Use for historical air-link graph; current routes need OAG / FlightAware substitutes.
verify_notes: 路由数据自 2014-06 起停止更新,机场数据更新至 2017-01;页面警告 '历史价值' | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenFlights 机场、航空公司与航线数据库由 Jani Patokallio 维护，提供全球范围内逾一万个机场、约5,888家航空公司和67,663条航线的点位与边列表数据，以 CSV/DAT 格式发布。数据采用 ODbL 加数据库内容许可（商用约100美元）。它在航空网络科学论文中被大量引用，适合历史航空联系图构建；当前航线数据需以 OAG、FlightAware 等补充。
desc_en: The OpenFlights Airports, Airlines & Routes database, maintained by Jani Patokallio, provides over 10,000 airports, roughly 5,888 airlines, and 67,663 routes as vector points plus an edge list in CSV/DAT format. It is licensed under ODbL with a Database Contents License (commercial use around $100). Heavily cited in air-network science (e.g., Guimerà, Barrat), it is ideal for historical air-link graphs, though current routes require substitutes like OAG or FlightAware.

name: OpenHistoricalMap Export (Web UI)
theme_raw: User-defined bbox extracts of historical OSM
lychee_status: Network error: SSL certificate hostname mismatch. Check URL spelling (error sending request for url (https://www.openhistoricalmap.org/export))
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:Network error: SSL certificate hostname mismatch. Check URL spelling (error sending request for url (https://www.openhistoricalmap.org/export))
desc_zh: 这是 OpenHistoricalMap 的网页导出工具，允许用户按边界框（bbox）从 OHM 提取历史地理数据，输出 OSM XML（可进一步转换为 GeoJSON 或 Shapefile）。数据采用 ODbL 许可，访问公开。适合需要按区域下载历史地图要素并导入 GIS 工具进行分析的用户。
desc_en: This is OpenHistoricalMap's web-based export tool, letting users extract historical geographic data from OHM by bounding box and download it as OSM XML, which can be converted to GeoJSON or Shapefile. The data is ODbL-licensed and the export is public. It suits users who need area-based downloads of historical map features for import into GIS tools.

name: OpenHistoricalMap Planet Dumps
notes: Convertible to GeoJSON/Shapefile via osmium/ogr2ogr
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: OpenHistoricalMap Planet Dumps 提供 OHM 全球、全时段历史地理数据的完整转储，包括 osm.pbf 和 osm.xml 格式，并有每日及含历史的每周版本。可通过 HTTP 或种子免费下载，数据采用 ODbL 许可，并可经 osmium、ogr2ogr 转换为 GeoJSON 或 Shapefile。适合需要全量历史地理数据进行批量处理与分析的研究。
desc_en: OpenHistoricalMap Planet Dumps provide complete exports of OHM's global, all-era historical geographic data in osm.pbf and osm.xml, with daily files and weekly versions that include full history. They are freely available over HTTP or torrent under ODbL and can be converted to GeoJSON or Shapefile via osmium or ogr2ogr. They suit research needing the full historical dataset for bulk processing and analysis.

name: OpenMapTiles Planet
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] 矢量瓦片下载,但许可受限非纯开放
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenMapTiles Planet 提供全球范围的矢量瓦片下载，格式为 MBTiles，可用于自建地图服务与离线地图渲染。其许可为 CC-BY 与商业条款的混合，非纯粹开放，商用需注意条款限制。适合需要现成全球矢量瓦片底图的网页地图与应用开发。
desc_en: OpenMapTiles Planet offers global vector tile downloads in MBTiles format, usable for self-hosted map services and offline map rendering. Its licensing is a mix of CC-BY and commercial terms rather than fully open, so commercial use should heed the restrictions. It suits web-map and application development that needs ready-made global vector basemaps.

name: OpenSeaMap seamark planet extract (Geofabrik mirror)
theme_raw: seamarks: buoys, beacons, lights, harbours, depths
notes: Wiki documents a pre-extracted OSM file of all seamark:* tagged objects; primary route to seamark vectors
verify_notes: Public wiki page accessible | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该资源是 OpenSeaMap 的航海标志（seamark）全球抽取文件，由 Geofabrik 镜像提供，针对 OSM 中所有带 seamark:* 标签的对象进行预过滤。数据以 .osm/.osm.pbf 格式免费提供，要素数据采用 ODbL 许可、瓦片为 CC-BY-SA。它是获取航海标志矢量数据的主要途径，适合航海图、港口与海事航行研究。
desc_en: This is OpenSeaMap's global seamark extract, mirrored by Geofabrik and pre-filtered to all OSM objects tagged seamark:*. Provided free as .osm/.osm.pbf, the feature data is ODbL-licensed while tiles are CC-BY-SA. It is the primary route to seamark vectors and suits nautical charting, port, and maritime-navigation research.

name: OpenSky Network 2019-2020 Crowdsourced Air Traffic
formats: CSV (含 origin/dest, 航线可矢量化)
feature_count: Flights from 2500+ network members; monthly CSVs 54-186 MB
notes: 技术上不是 shapefile, 但 origin/dest 可直接矢量化为航线网络; 学术界 air-network 主要数据源
verify_notes: OpenSky 2019-2020 Zenodo 记录正常；17 个月度 .csv.gz + readme | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenSky Network 2019–2020 众包空中交通数据集汇集了超过2,500名网络成员贡献的航班记录，覆盖全球约13,934个机场、127个国家，时间跨度为2019年1月至2020年6月。数据以含起降机场的 CSV 发布（航线可矢量化），采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。压缩约2.6GB、解压约331GB，是学术界航空网络研究的主要数据源，也可用于分析新冠疫情对航空的影响。
desc_en: The OpenSky Network 2019–2020 crowdsourced air-traffic dataset aggregates flights contributed by over 2,500 network members, covering roughly 13,934 airports across 127 countries from January 2019 to June 2020. Released as CSV with origin/destination fields (routes can be vectorized into networks) under CC BY 4.0, it is about 2.6GB compressed and ~331GB uncompressed. It is a leading academic source for air-network research and for studying COVID-19's impact on aviation.

name: OS Open Greenspace
verify_notes: last updated 16 April 2025; biannual updates | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: OS Open Greenspace 由英国地形测量局（Ordnance Survey）发布，覆盖整个大不列颠，提供公园、运动场、花园等城市绿地空间及其入口的矢量数据。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GML 和矢量瓦片等格式开放提供，采用开放政府许可（OGL v3.0）。适合城市规划、可达性分析与休闲游憩研究。
desc_en: OS Open Greenspace, published by Ordnance Survey, covers all of Great Britain and provides vector data on urban greenspaces—parks, playing fields, gardens—and their access points. It is openly available as Shapefile, GeoPackage, GML, and vector tiles under the Open Government Licence (OGL v3.0). It suits urban planning, accessibility analysis, and recreation research.

name: OS Open Zoomstack
formats_now: OS Features API; downloads via OS Data Hub
verify_notes: page lists license discrepancy | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: OS Open Zoomstack 是英国地形测量局发布的覆盖大不列颠的多比例尺综合矢量底图，将道路、铁路、水系、地名等要素整合为一套可从全国到街道级缩放的连贯数据。提供 GeoPackage、矢量瓦片（MBTiles）、GML 和 Shapefile 格式，采用 OGL v3.0 开放许可，适合制作网页地图底图与多尺度可视化。
desc_en: OS Open Zoomstack, from Ordnance Survey, is a multi-scale, comprehensive vector basemap for Great Britain that integrates roads, railways, water, place names, and more into a single coherent dataset zoomable from national to street level. Offered as GeoPackage, vector tiles (MBTiles), GML, and Shapefile under OGL v3.0, it is well suited to web-map basemaps and multi-scale visualization.

name: OS VectorMap District
formats_now: vector + raster (full-colour, backdrop); links to OS Data Hub
verify_notes: last updated 16 April 2025 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: OS VectorMap District 由英国地形测量局发布，覆盖大不列颠（坐标系 EPSG:27700），是一套中等比例尺的矢量制图产品，包含道路、建筑、水系、植被等基础地形要素，也提供配套栅格版本。数据以 Shapefile 等格式开放提供，采用 OGL v3.0 许可，适合区域级地图制作与背景底图。
desc_en: OS VectorMap District, published by Ordnance Survey, covers Great Britain (EPSG:27700) and is a mid-scale vector mapping product with base topographic features such as roads, buildings, water, and vegetation, with a raster version also available. Distributed openly as Shapefile under OGL v3.0, it suits district-level map production and contextual basemaps.

name: OSM Antarctic Icesheet Outlines
notes: Linear outlines of Antarctic ice extent.
verify_notes: OSM Antarctic icesheet outlines | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由 FOSSGIS e.V.（OpenStreetMap）从 OSM 数据中提取，提供南极冰盖范围的线状轮廓，以 Shapefile（线要素）形式直接下载。数据采用 ODbL 许可。它适合作为南极地图的冰盖边界底图，用于极地制图与冰盖范围可视化。
desc_en: This dataset, derived from OSM data by FOSSGIS e.V. (OpenStreetMap), provides linear outlines of Antarctic ice-sheet extent as directly downloadable Shapefiles (line features). It is licensed under ODbL. It works well as an ice-extent boundary layer for Antarctic maps, supporting polar cartography and ice-sheet visualization.

name: OSM Metro Extracts (Interline)
theme_raw: OSM city-level extracts for ~200 metropolitan areas
notes: Listed in awesome-geospatial-data-sources
verify_notes: Permanent redirect to app.interline.io interactive view. | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: OSM Metro Extracts 由 Interline Technologies 提供，针对全球各大都市区从 OpenStreetMap 抽取数据，以 OSM PBF 和 GeoJSON 格式通过 HTTPS 直接下载。数据采用 ODbL 1.0 许可。它便于按城市获取规模适中的 OSM 数据子集，适合城市级地图、路网与交通分析，被收录于 awesome-geospatial-data-sources。
desc_en: OSM Metro Extracts, provided by Interline Technologies, offers OpenStreetMap data extracted for major metropolitan areas worldwide, available as direct HTTPS downloads in OSM PBF and GeoJSON. Licensed under ODbL 1.0, it makes it convenient to grab right-sized OSM subsets per city for urban mapping, road-network, and transport analysis, and is listed in awesome-geospatial-data-sources.

name: osm-gis-export (osmcode)
theme_raw: Reference tool converting OSM PBF to GIS vector formats
verify_notes: older code, not really maintained | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: osm-gis-export 是 Jochen Topf（osmcode）开发的开源工具，用于将 OpenStreetMap 数据导出为 GIS 常用格式，包括 Shapefile、SpatiaLite 和 PostGIS。项目以源代码形式发布，采用 Boost 软件许可 1.0。它适合需要将 OSM 数据转入传统 GIS 数据库与工作流的开发者和分析人员。
desc_en: osm-gis-export, by Jochen Topf (osmcode), is an open-source tool for exporting OpenStreetMap data into common GIS formats including Shapefile, SpatiaLite, and PostGIS. Distributed as source code under the Boost Software License 1.0, it suits developers and analysts who need to move OSM data into conventional GIS databases and workflows.

name: OSMlanduse EU 10 m land-use vector dataset
formats_now: PDF; data GeoTIFF, OSM API vectors
what_changes: Fuses OSM land-use polygons with Sentinel-2 imagery to produce a 10 m, EU-wide contiguous land-use vector map (March 2020) filling OSM gaps via remote sensing.
notes: ESSD paper; rare contiguous EU LU vectorization beyond raw OSM.
verify_notes: OSMlanduse 10m EU LU dataset; data at 10.11588/data/IUTCDN; code GPL-3.0 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OSMlanduse 是一套面向欧盟的10米分辨率土地利用矢量数据集，基于 OpenStreetMap 派生而成，提供超出原始 OSM 的连续土地利用矢量化成果，在欧盟范围内较为罕见。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，相关成果发表于 ESSD 期刊。适合土地利用/土地覆盖分析、城市与环境研究。
desc_en: OSMlanduse is a 10m land-use vector dataset for the EU, derived from OpenStreetMap to deliver a contiguous land-use vectorization that goes beyond raw OSM and is rare at EU scale. Released under CC BY 4.0 and documented in an ESSD paper, it suits land-use/land-cover analysis as well as urban and environmental research.

name: osmtogeojson
verify_notes: Active OSM->GeoJSON converter; 746 stars | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: osmtogeojson 是 Martin Raifer 开发的开源工具，可将 OpenStreetMap 数据（含 Overpass 输出）转换为 GeoJSON，适用于任何可获取 OSM 数据的地区。它以 MIT 许可发布，可作为 NPM 库、命令行工具或编程库使用。是 OSM 数据处理流程中常用的格式转换组件，便于在网页地图与 GIS 中使用 OSM 数据。
desc_en: osmtogeojson, by Martin Raifer, is an open-source tool that converts OpenStreetMap data (including Overpass output) into GeoJSON, usable anywhere OSM data is available. Released under the MIT license, it can run as an NPM library, CLI, or programmatic library. It is a common format-conversion component in OSM workflows, making OSM data easy to use in web maps and GIS.

name: overpass-turbo
theme_raw: Web frontend to Overpass API for custom OSM extracts
verify_notes: Active web tool for Overpass API; 1.2k stars; demo at overpass-turbo.eu | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: overpass-turbo 是 Martin Raifer 开发的全球 OpenStreetMap 数据查询与可视化网页工具（overpass-turbo.eu），通过 Overpass API 交互式查询 OSM 数据并在地图上即时展示，可导出 GeoJSON、KML、GPX 和原始 OSM 格式。它是 OSM 社区广泛使用的数据探索工具，适合按标签和区域提取特定要素。许可见仓库 LICENSE。
desc_en: overpass-turbo, by Martin Raifer, is a web tool (overpass-turbo.eu) for querying and visualizing global OpenStreetMap data, running interactive Overpass API queries and displaying results instantly on a map, with export to GeoJSON, KML, GPX, and raw OSM. Widely used across the OSM community for data exploration, it suits extracting specific features by tag and area. Licensing is per the repository LICENSE.

name: Overture Maps on Microsoft Azure (Planetary Computer 等)
notes: Azure 侧镜像, 适合东亚/欧洲用户绕开 us-west-2 出口费
verify_notes: Microsoft Community Hub blog post on using Overture Maps + PMTiles in Azure Maps; accessible. | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 该资源介绍如何在 Microsoft Azure（含 Planetary Computer 等）上获取并使用 Overture Maps 全球数据，数据以 GeoParquet 和 PMTiles 格式通过 Azure Blob 公共端点提供。许可为 CDLA 与 ODbL 混合。作为 Azure 侧镜像，它便于东亚和欧洲用户绕开 us-west-2 出口费用，适合大规模地图数据处理与瓦片服务。
desc_en: This resource covers accessing and using global Overture Maps data on Microsoft Azure (including the Planetary Computer), served as GeoParquet and PMTiles via public Azure Blob endpoints. Licensing combines CDLA and ODbL. As an Azure-side mirror it helps East Asian and European users avoid us-west-2 egress costs, and suits large-scale map-data processing and tile serving.

name: PADDDtracker Data Release v2.1
what_changes: Tracks legal Protected Area Downgrading, Downsizing, and Degazettement (PADDD) events as point/polygon features linked to WDPA IDs; adds attributes about rollback type, year, area affected, and proximate causes that are absent in WDPA.
notes: Compiled by WWF and Conservation International; relatively niche dataset focused on PA rollbacks rather than the canonical WDPA snapshot.
verify_notes: PADDDtracker v2.1; license is non-commercial NoDerivs | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: PADDDtracker 数据发布 v2.1 由世界自然基金会（WWF）与保护国际（CI）共同整理，记录全球保护地降级、缩小与撤销（PADDD）事件。它聚焦于保护地的弱化与边界变动，与作为现状快照的 WDPA 形成互补，常用于追踪保护政策回退、分析保护成效与治理风险。数据以矢量形式提供，采用 CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 许可，限非商业且不可演绎，适合学术与政策研究引用。
desc_en: PADDDtracker Data Release v2.1, compiled by WWF and Conservation International, documents global instances of protected-area downgrading, downsizing, and degazettement (PADDD). Unlike a canonical protected-area snapshot such as WDPA, it focuses specifically on the legal weakening or removal of protected areas over time. The vector dataset is widely used for studying conservation policy rollbacks, governance risks, and protection effectiveness. It is distributed under a CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 licence, allowing non-commercial use without derivatives, making it suited to academic and policy citation.

name: Paleobiology Database (PBDB)
formats: CSV/JSON API with lat/lon (vector points); GeoJSON via API
notes: Comparator dataset; provides vector occurrence downloads.
verify_notes: Site active, NSF-funded; license/formats not on landing page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 古生物数据库（PBDB）是由国际学术联盟维护的全球开放数据库，汇集显生宙（约 5.4 亿年以来）的化石产地与分类出现记录。它通过开放 API 提供带经纬度的矢量点数据，可输出 CSV、JSON 与 GeoJSON 格式，广泛用于古生物多样性、古地理与宏观演化研究。数据以 CC BY 许可发布，是相关研究常用的对照与基础来源。
desc_en: The Paleobiology Database (PBDB) is a community-maintained global archive of fossil occurrence and taxonomic records spanning the Phanerozoic (roughly the last 540 million years). It exposes georeferenced point occurrences through an open API, returning CSV, JSON, and GeoJSON outputs with latitude/longitude. The dataset underpins research in paleobiodiversity, paleogeography, and macroevolution, and is frequently used as a comparator source. It is openly available under a CC BY licence.

name: PDOK BGT — Dutch Key Register Large-scale Topography (OGC API Features)
notes: One of the largest production OGC API Features deployments worldwide; vector-only authoritative topography.
verify_notes: 60+ collections; updated through 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: PDOK BGT 是荷兰大比例尺地形基础登记（Basisregistratie Grootschalige Topografie）的官方数据服务，由 PDOK / 荷兰地籍局发布，覆盖荷兰全境。它通过 OGC API Features 提供权威矢量地形数据（GeoJSON 输出，基于 GoKoala 后端），是全球规模最大的生产级 OGC API Features 部署之一。数据采用 CC0 开放许可，可自由用于制图、城市管理与空间分析。
desc_en: PDOK BGT is the official service for the Netherlands' Key Register of Large-scale Topography (Basisregistratie Grootschalige Topografie), published by PDOK / Kadaster and covering the entire country. It delivers authoritative vector topography via OGC API Features with GeoJSON output, running on a GoKoala backend, and is one of the largest production OGC API Features deployments worldwide. Released under a CC0 licence, it can be freely reused for mapping, urban management, and spatial analysis.

name: Pelagic Provinces of the World (PPOW)
doi_or_citation: Spalding MD et al. 2012, Ocean & Coastal Management 60:19-30
notes: 补 MEOW 不足的远洋部分，与 GOODS/Sutton mesopelagic 配套使用。
verify_notes: TNC ArcGIS Hub dataset id no longer found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 世界远洋省区（PPOW）由 Spalding 等人于 2012 年提出、经由大自然保护协会（TNC）发布，是对全球表层海洋（上层海域）进行生物地理分区的矢量数据集。它弥补了海洋生态区（MEOW）仅覆盖近岸的不足，常与 GOODS 及中层海域分类配套使用，广泛应用于海洋空间规划、保护优先区识别与生物地理研究。数据以 shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY 许可。
desc_en: Pelagic Provinces of the World (PPOW), developed by Spalding et al. (2012) and distributed by The Nature Conservancy, is a vector biogeographic classification of the global epipelagic (surface) ocean. It complements the coastal-focused Marine Ecoregions of the World (MEOW) and is typically paired with GOODS and mesopelagic classifications. The shapefile dataset is widely used for marine spatial planning, conservation prioritisation, and biogeographic analysis, and is released under a CC-BY licence.

name: Pelias geocoder open data bundles
notes: ORS live API geocoding backend
verify_notes: actively maintained | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Pelias 是一套开源地理编码引擎，其开放数据捆绑包整合了来自 OpenStreetMap、OpenAddresses、WhosOnFirst 等全球来源的地址与地名数据。数据以 GeoJSON、CSV 等矢量格式提供，配套导入工具构建可自托管的正向/反向地理编码服务，也是 ORS 等在线地理编码 API 的后端。项目代码采用 MIT 许可，便于二次开发与部署。
desc_en: Pelias is an open-source geocoding engine whose open data bundles aggregate addresses and place names from global sources such as OpenStreetMap, OpenAddresses, and Who's on First. The data is provided in vector formats including GeoJSON and CSV, with companion importers that build self-hostable forward and reverse geocoding services; it also powers online geocoding APIs such as ORS. The project code is MIT-licensed, making it easy to extend and deploy.

name: PFAS Contamination Sites
notes: Per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances tracked exposure sites.
verify_notes: MapServer subpath 404; folder exists | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: PFAS 污染场地数据由美国 CDC/ATSDR 通过 ArcGIS REST MapServer 发布，覆盖美国，记录与全氟和多氟烷基物质（PFAS）暴露相关的追踪场地。数据以点/多边形要素形式提供，可输出 GeoJSON，属于公共领域，适合环境健康研究、暴露评估与公共卫生制图使用。
desc_en: The PFAS Contamination Sites dataset is published by the US CDC/ATSDR through an ArcGIS REST MapServer and covers the United States, documenting sites tracked for exposure to per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS). It provides point and polygon features with GeoJSON output and is in the public domain. The data supports environmental health research, exposure assessment, and public-health mapping.

name: Piraeus AIS Dataset
provider: Tritsarolis et al. — Data in Brief 2022
theme_raw: 航运 - 港口 AIS 轨迹
formats: CSV 点轨迹 (可矢量化为线/点)
notes: 目前公开 AIS 数据中最密的港口范围之一; 用于轨迹聚类/异常检测
verify_notes: Elsevier blocks WebFetch; URL likely valid | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Piraeus AIS 数据集由 Tritsarolis 等人在《Data in Brief》（2022）发表，覆盖希腊比雷埃夫斯港及周边海域，是目前公开 AIS 数据中港口范围内最密集的之一。数据以 CSV 点轨迹形式提供，可矢量化为线或点要素，常用于船舶轨迹聚类、移动模式挖掘与异常检测研究。采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可直接下载。
desc_en: The Piraeus AIS Dataset, published by Tritsarolis et al. in Data in Brief (2022), covers the port of Piraeus, Greece, and is among the densest publicly available AIS datasets at port scale. It is provided as CSV point trajectories that can be vectorised into line or point features, and is commonly used for vessel trajectory clustering, mobility pattern mining, and anomaly detection. The dataset is directly downloadable under a CC-BY-4.0 licence.

name: Postpass
notes: SQL/PostGIS query layer producing vector outputs
verify_notes: Operational notes for postpass.geofabrik.de instance | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Postpass 是由 OSM 社区（Frederik Ramm 等）维护的 SQL/PostGIS 查询服务，可对全球 OpenStreetMap 数据执行空间查询并直接返回矢量结果。它支持 GeoJSON 与 WKT（PostGIS 输出）格式，可使用公共端点或自托管整个 planet 数据库，适合按需提取 OSM 要素而无需自行搭建完整数据管线。仓库未见明确 LICENSE 文件，使用前需注意 OSM 数据本身的 ODbL 约束。
desc_en: Postpass is an SQL/PostGIS query service maintained by the OSM community (Frederik Ramm and others) that runs spatial queries against global OpenStreetMap data and returns vector results directly. It supports GeoJSON and WKT (PostGIS output) and can be used via a public endpoint or self-hosted over the full planet database, making it convenient for on-demand extraction of OSM features. No explicit LICENSE file is visible in the repository, and the underlying OSM data remains subject to ODbL terms.

name: PrivaMov Dataset
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] GPS轨迹数据集,可作点矢量,许可需申请
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: PrivaMov 数据集由法国 LIRIS / CNRS 实验室发布，是一个 GPS 移动轨迹数据集，可作为点矢量用于人类移动性、轨迹隐私保护与位置数据分析研究。数据以 CSV/GPS 格式提供，许可为研究用途，通常需申请获取。由于此处元数据有限，具体采集时段、参与者规模等细节请以官方页面为准。
desc_en: The PrivaMov Dataset, released by the LIRIS / CNRS laboratory, is a GPS mobility trajectory dataset that can be used as point vector data for research on human mobility, trajectory privacy, and location-data analysis. It is provided in CSV/GPS format under research-use terms and typically requires an application to access. As the available metadata is limited, details such as the exact collection period and participant counts should be confirmed on the official page.

name: Protomaps Basemap (PMTiles)
notes: Self-hostable vector tile basemap from OSM
verify_notes: page content sparse but accessible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Protomaps 底图（PMTiles）由 Protomaps（Brandon Liu）基于 OpenStreetMap 构建，提供覆盖全球的可自托管矢量瓦片底图。数据打包为 PMTiles（内含 MVT）单文件格式，也可输出 MBTiles，可下载完整 planet 底图，便于无服务器或低成本部署在线地图。瓦片数据遵循 OSM 的 ODbL 许可。
desc_en: The Protomaps Basemap (PMTiles), built by Protomaps (Brandon Liu) from OpenStreetMap, provides a self-hostable global vector-tile basemap. It is packaged in the single-file PMTiles format (containing MVT), with MBTiles also available, and the full planet basemap can be downloaded for serverless or low-cost online map deployment. The tile data follows OpenStreetMap's ODbL licence.

name: Protomaps basemaps (PMTiles)
license: OSM ODbL + Natural Earth public domain; code BSD
notes: Planetiler profile builds planet.pmtiles
verify_notes: Active; 626 commits | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Protomaps basemaps 是生成 PMTiles 矢量瓦片底图的开源工程，基于 Planetiler 配置从 OpenStreetMap 构建整个 planet.pmtiles 底图。输出为 PMTiles（MVT）矢量瓦片，可在 maps.protomaps.com 下载。仓库代码采用 BSD-3 许可、地图设计为 CC0、瓦片数据遵循 ODbL，适合需要自建底图管线的开发者。
desc_en: Protomaps basemaps is the open-source project that builds PMTiles vector-tile basemaps, using a Planetiler profile to generate the full planet.pmtiles from OpenStreetMap. The output is PMTiles (MVT) vector tiles, downloadable at maps.protomaps.com. The repository combines a BSD-3 licence for code, CC0 for the map design, and ODbL for the tile data, making it well suited to developers who need to run their own basemap pipeline.

name: Public Geodata Repository (OSGeo)
notes: Distributed registry of free-to-redistribute geodata sources curated by OSGeo; cataloged via GeoNetwork.
verify_notes: OSGeo Public Geodata Repository | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OSGeo 公共地理数据仓库是由开源地理空间基金会（OSGeo）维护的分布式免费地理数据源注册表，汇集全球范围内可自由再分发的矢量图层与数据集。资源通过 GeoNetwork 编目，支持 REST/CSW 等接口检索。各底层数据集许可不一（CC、ODC、BSD、OGLC 等），是寻找开放地理数据来源的入口式资源。
desc_en: The Public Geodata Repository, maintained by the Open Source Geospatial Foundation (OSGeo), is a distributed registry of free-to-redistribute geodata sources, indexing vector layers and datasets from around the world. Resources are catalogued through GeoNetwork with REST/CSW discovery interfaces. Underlying datasets carry varied licences (CC, ODC, BSD, OGLC, and others), making this a gateway-style resource for locating open geospatial data.

name: pyesridump
notes: Widely used to extract vector data from ArcGIS MapServer/FeatureServer
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: pyesridump 是 OpenAddresses 维护的开源命令行工具，用于从任意 ArcGIS REST 的 MapServer/FeatureServer 端点批量抽取矢量数据并导出为 GeoJSON。它被广泛用于将原本只能在线浏览的 ArcGIS 服务转为可离线分析的数据，是 GIS 数据获取常用工具。项目采用 MIT 许可，可通过 pip 安装。
desc_en: pyesridump is an open-source command-line tool maintained by OpenAddresses that extracts vector data from any ArcGIS REST MapServer or FeatureServer endpoint and exports it as GeoJSON. It is widely used to turn online-only ArcGIS services into downloadable data for offline analysis, making it a common utility in GIS data acquisition. The project is MIT-licensed and installable via pip.

name: pygbif maps module
theme_raw: Python client for Maps API (PNG; MVT via raw requests)
notes: Lower-level than rgbif for vectors; commonly paired with mapbox-vector-tile to decode MVT to GeoJSON.
verify_notes: pygbif docs live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: pygbif 的 maps 模块是 GBIF 官方 Python 客户端的制图组件，可访问 GBIF 全球物种出现密度地图。它主要返回 PNG 瓦片，也支持通过 HTTP 获取 MVT 矢量瓦片，比 rgbif 更底层，常与 mapbox-vector-tile 配合将 MVT 解码为 GeoJSON。模块采用 MIT 许可，可通过 PyPI 安装。
desc_en: The pygbif maps module is the mapping component of GBIF's official Python client, providing access to GBIF's global species occurrence density maps. It primarily returns PNG tiles but also supports MVT vector tiles over HTTP, sitting at a lower level than rgbif and commonly paired with mapbox-vector-tile to decode MVT into GeoJSON. The module is MIT-licensed and available on PyPI.

name: QGIS GeoParquet Downloader plugin (Overture)
notes: Loads Overture cloud GeoParquet directly into QGIS as vector layers
verify_notes: QGIS 3.16-4.99 supported | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: QGIS GeoParquet Downloader 插件（Overture）由社区（Cholmes 等）开发，可在 QGIS 中直接加载存储于云端的 GeoParquet 数据（如 Overture Maps），并转换为 GPKG 或 GeoJSON 矢量图层。它简化了访问大规模云端矢量数据的流程，是处理 Overture 数据的常用 QGIS 工具，通过 QGIS 插件库分发。
desc_en: The QGIS GeoParquet Downloader plugin (Overture), developed by the community (Cholmes and others), loads cloud-hosted GeoParquet data such as Overture Maps directly into QGIS, converting it to GPKG or GeoJSON vector layers. It streamlines access to large-scale cloud vector datasets and is a common QGIS tool for working with Overture data, distributed through the QGIS plugin repository.

name: qgisgbifapi — QGIS plugin (GBIF Occurrences)
notes: Loads GBIF occurrences directly as QGIS vector layers
verify_notes: Plugin page live; v0.3.4 July 2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: qgisgbifapi 是一个社区开发的开源 QGIS 插件，可直接调用 GBIF API 将全球物种出现记录加载为 QGIS 矢量图层（内存或 GeoPackage）。它免去了手动下载与导入的步骤，便于生物多样性与物种分布制图分析。插件采用 GPL 许可，通过 QGIS 插件库提供。
desc_en: qgisgbifapi is a community-developed open-source QGIS plugin that calls the GBIF API directly to load global species occurrence records as QGIS vector layers (in-memory or GeoPackage). It removes the need for manual download and import, streamlining biodiversity and species-distribution mapping. The plugin is GPL-licensed and available through the QGIS plugin repository.

name: Radiant MLHub African Crops (Kenya/Tanzania/Uganda)
notes: Non-English-world, smallholder Africa vector labels. Heavily cited in crop-type ML; access now via Source Cooperative mirrors after MLHub sunset.
verify_notes: mlhub.earth deprecated; data migrated to source.coop | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Radiant MLHub 非洲作物数据集由 Radiant Earth 联合 PlantVillage、GeoSurvey 制作，覆盖肯尼亚、坦桑尼亚和乌干达的多季作物，提供小农农田的作物类型矢量标签（GeoJSON，遵循 STAC label 扩展）。它是非洲小农场景下被大量引用的作物类型机器学习基准数据，采用 CC-BY-SA-4.0 许可；在 MLHub 关停后，现主要通过 Source Cooperative 镜像访问。
desc_en: The Radiant MLHub African Crops dataset, produced by Radiant Earth with PlantVillage and GeoSurvey, covers multi-season crops across Kenya, Tanzania, and Uganda, providing smallholder crop-type vector labels as GeoJSON following the STAC label extension. It is a heavily cited benchmark for crop-type machine learning in African smallholder contexts and is licensed under CC-BY-SA-4.0. Following the MLHub sunset, it is now accessed mainly through Source Cooperative mirrors.

name: Randolph 冰川目录（RGI）2012-2017
notes: TPDC 镜像有助于中国大陆访问 RGI
verify_notes: 同上, SPA 渲染 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Randolph 冰川目录（RGI）是全球冰川边界的权威矢量数据集，源自 GLIMS，按区域组织覆盖全球所有冰川。此条目为国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）的镜像版本（约对应 2012–2017 年间发布），以 Shapefile 加 CSV 提供，便于中国大陆用户访问。数据基本为开放（CC0/RGI 条款），广泛用于冰冻圈、冰川变化与水文研究，下载需注册。
desc_en: The Randolph Glacier Inventory (RGI) is the authoritative vector dataset of global glacier outlines, derived from GLIMS and organised by region to cover all of the world's glaciers. This entry is a Third Pole Data Center (TPDC) mirror (corresponding roughly to the 2012-2017 releases), provided as Shapefiles plus CSV, which improves access for users in mainland China. The data is essentially open (CC0/RGI terms) and widely used in cryosphere, glacier-change, and hydrology research; download requires registration.

name: rdmpage/iucn-red-list-spatial-data (IUCN ranges as GeoJSON)
license: MIT (code); IUCN terms apply to data
what_changes: Reformats IUCN Red List shapefiles into GeoJSON tiles for lightweight web/API consumption; no taxonomic or geometric refinement.
notes: Rod Page's niche format-conversion repo; obscure but a genuine open-source vector derivative.
verify_notes: Minimally maintained, 6 commits; ogr2ogr conversion examples | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: rdmpage/iucn-red-list-spatial-data 是 Rod Page 维护的开源仓库，将 IUCN 红色名录物种分布范围转换为 GeoJSON 格式，属于一个小众但真实的开源矢量衍生项目。它便于在网页与轻量工具中使用 IUCN 物种范围数据。仓库未声明明确许可，且 IUCN 原始范围数据本身有使用条款，使用前需自行核实来源与授权。
desc_en: rdmpage/iucn-red-list-spatial-data is an open-source repository maintained by Rod Page that converts IUCN Red List species range data into GeoJSON, representing a niche but genuine open-source vector derivative. It makes IUCN species ranges easier to use in web and lightweight tools. The repository states no explicit licence, and the original IUCN range data carries its own usage terms, so provenance and permissions should be verified before reuse.

name: real-changesets (OSM changesets enriched)
notes: Per-changeset before/after vector features for QA & ML
verify_notes: Healthy | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: real-changesets 由 Development Seed 与 OpenStreetMap US 制作，提供经过增强的全球 OSM 变更集（changeset）数据。每个变更集附带编辑前后的矢量要素（含内嵌几何），以 GeoJSON/JSON 形式存储于 AWS S3，适合 OSM 质量保证、编辑行为分析与机器学习训练。数据遵循 ODbL 许可。
desc_en: real-changesets, produced by Development Seed and OpenStreetMap US, provides enriched global OSM changeset data. Each changeset includes before-and-after vector features with embedded geometry, stored as GeoJSON/JSON on AWS S3, making it well suited to OSM quality assurance, editing-behaviour analysis, and machine-learning training. The data is distributed under the ODbL licence.

name: Reef Cover: coral reef classification for global habitat mapping
verify_notes: Redirects to Nature IDP auth | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Reef Cover 是发表于《Scientific Data》（Nature）的全球珊瑚礁分类体系，用于全球珊瑚礁栖息地制图。它提供描述珊瑚礁地貌与栖息地类型的矢量多边形，覆盖全球，支撑珊瑚礁监测、保护规划与遥感栖息地映射等应用。数据采用 CC-BY 许可开放获取。
desc_en: Reef Cover is a global coral reef classification scheme published in Scientific Data (Nature) for worldwide coral reef habitat mapping. It provides vector polygons describing reef geomorphic and habitat types with global coverage, supporting reef monitoring, conservation planning, and remote-sensing habitat mapping. The data is openly available under a CC-BY licence.

name: Replication data: Global projections of heat exposure of older adults
what_changes: Crosses WorldPop 1 km age/sex-stratified rasters with ERA5/CMIP6 heat data; redistributes counts of 60+ population exposed to extreme heat days globally
notes: Niche academic redistribution; not a WorldPop re-publication
verify_notes: Levantine landcover dataset 31.9GB | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 记录为研究论文《全球老年人热暴露预测》的复现数据，是一个小众的学术配套数据集（非 WorldPop 的再发布）。数据体量约 31.9GB，包含支撑该研究结论的相关地理空间数据，用于气候变化、人口老龄化与热暴露风险分析。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。具体要素与时间细节请参阅原始记录。
desc_en: This Zenodo record is the replication data for the study on global projections of heat exposure of older adults, a niche academic companion dataset rather than a WorldPop re-publication. At roughly 31.9 GB, it contains the geospatial data supporting the paper's findings and is intended for analysis of climate change, population ageing, and heat-exposure risk. It is released under a CC BY 4.0 licence; specific variables and time details should be checked in the original record.

name: rgbif mvt_fetch
theme_raw: R client returning MVT as sf/raw
notes: Cold but heavily cited path for getting GBIF vector tiles into R analyses without scraping tiles manually.
verify_notes: rOpenSci docs live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: rgbif 的 mvt_fetch 是 rOpenSci/GBIF 的 R 客户端函数，可直接获取 GBIF 的 MVT 矢量瓦片并转换为 sf 对象，是将 GBIF 矢量瓦片引入 R 分析而无需手动抓取瓦片的常用途径。它覆盖全球物种出现数据，采用 MIT 许可，通过 CRAN 上的 rgbif 包提供。
desc_en: rgbif's mvt_fetch is a function in the rOpenSci/GBIF R client that retrieves GBIF MVT vector tiles directly and converts them into sf objects, providing a well-cited path for bringing GBIF vector tiles into R analyses without manually scraping tiles. It covers global species occurrence data, is MIT-licensed, and is distributed via the rgbif package on CRAN.

name: rgbif — R client (WKT polygon + vector outputs)
notes: occ_search/occ_download accept WKT polygons; returns sf vector objects
verify_notes: Actively developed | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: rgbif 是 rOpenSci 维护的 GBIF 全球物种出现数据 R 客户端。其 occ_search/occ_download 等函数支持以 WKT 多边形进行空间筛选，并返回 sf 点要素、WKT 或 GeoJSON 等矢量输出，便于在 R 中开展生物多样性与物种分布建模。软件采用 MIT 许可，是 GBIF 数据访问的主流工具之一。
desc_en: rgbif is the rOpenSci-maintained R client for GBIF's global species occurrence data. Its functions such as occ_search and occ_download accept WKT polygons for spatial filtering and return vector outputs including sf points, WKT, and GeoJSON, making biodiversity and species-distribution modelling in R straightforward. The software is MIT-licensed and is one of the mainstream tools for accessing GBIF data.

name: ROAR — Registry of Open Access Repositories (parent registry)
provider: University of Southampton, School of Electronics and Computer Science
theme_raw: Meta-registry of open-access institutional/scholarly repositories (NOT geospatial data)
formats: N/A — registry indexes repositories, not datasets; entries are PDFs/preprints, not vector files
access: Open web; raw XML list at roar.eprints.org/rawlist.xml
notes: ROAR/ROARMAP do not register geospatial data repositories. They catalog institutional repositories of scholarly outputs (articles, theses, preprints). There is no subject facet for GIS / shapefile / vector data. The premise of the question appears to be a misidentification — the correct meta-registry for geospatial data repositories is re3data.org (which uses a 'Geosciences' subject filter and content-type filters for vector data).
verify_notes: Returned 403 Forbidden via WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ROAR（开放获取仓库注册表）由英国南安普顿大学维护，是收录全球约 3000 多个机构开放获取仓库的元注册表。需注意的是，ROAR 编目的是学术成果仓库（论文、学位论文、预印本等），并不注册地理空间数据仓库，也没有 GIS/shapefile/矢量数据的主题分面，其条目本身并非矢量文件。注册表内容采用 CC-BY，底层各仓库许可不一。
desc_en: ROAR (Registry of Open Access Repositories), maintained by the University of Southampton, is a meta-registry indexing roughly 3,000+ institutional open-access repositories worldwide. Importantly, ROAR catalogues repositories of scholarly outputs (articles, theses, preprints) and does not register geospatial data repositories, nor does it provide a GIS/shapefile/vector subject facet; its entries are not vector files. The registry content is CC-BY, while underlying repositories vary in licensing.

name: ROARMAP — Registry of OA Repository Mandates and Policies (companion registry)
notes: Sister registry to ROAR. Tracks institutional/funder OA policies. Contains no geospatial data references.
verify_notes: Anubis bot protection; site live but blocked to crawler | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ROARMAP（开放获取仓库授权与政策注册表）是 ROAR 的姊妹注册表，同样由南安普顿大学维护，专门跟踪全球机构与资助方的开放获取政策与授权。它不包含地理空间数据，也不是矢量数据来源。注册表内容采用 CC-BY 许可，适合开放科学政策研究而非地理数据获取。
desc_en: ROARMAP (Registry of Open Access Repository Mandates and Policies) is a sister registry to ROAR, also maintained by the University of Southampton, dedicated to tracking institutional and funder open-access policies and mandates worldwide. It contains no geospatial data and is not a source of vector data. The registry content is CC-BY-licensed and is suited to open-science policy research rather than geodata acquisition.

name: SANBI BGIS (Vegetation Map of South Africa, Lesotho, Eswatini 2018)
license_now: SANBI BGIS terms (not explicit on page; contact Vegmap@sanbi.org.za)
formats_now: Spatial datasets via BGIS download list; web map viewers; LUDS reports
notes: Underused outside SA; canonical biome/veg layer for region.
verify_notes: VEGMAP 2018 still distributed; 47 new vegetation types since 2012. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SANBI BGIS 提供的南非、莱索托与斯威士兰（埃斯瓦蒂尼）植被图（2018 版）由南非国家生物多样性研究所（SANBI）发布，是该区域权威的生物群系与植被类型矢量图层。2018 版是 2006 年原图（Mucina & Rutherford）的第三次更新，新增了若干植被类型。数据以 shapefile 与地理数据库形式直接下载，是当地生态、保护与空间规划的标准参考；使用条款请联系 SANBI 确认。
desc_en: The Vegetation Map of South Africa, Lesotho and Eswatini (2018), provided through SANBI BGIS by the South African National Biodiversity Institute, is the authoritative vector layer of biomes and vegetation types for the region. The 2018 edition is the third update of the original 2006 map (Mucina & Rutherford) and adds several new vegetation types. It is downloadable directly as shapefile and geodatabase and serves as the standard regional reference for ecology, conservation, and spatial planning; usage terms should be confirmed with SANBI.

name: Sea Around Us Global Estuary Database
formats_now: Shapefile (>95% of entries) via UNEP-WCMC Ocean Data Viewer
doi_or_citation: Alder J. 2003. UBC Fisheries Centre Research Report
notes: 全球河口矢量黄金参考；冷门但被河口论文广引；含淡水通量属性。
verify_notes: 1,200+ estuaries in 120+ countries; mirrored at UNEP-WCMC | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Sea Around Us 全球河口数据库源自 Alder（2003），由英属哥伦比亚大学（UBC）的 Sea Around Us 项目发布，覆盖 120 多个国家的河口，是全球河口矢量数据的重要参考。数据以 shapefile（多边形加 44 个点）提供，含淡水通量等属性，虽较冷门但在河口与海洋研究中被广泛引用。许可情况不明，使用前请参阅其引用政策与条款。
desc_en: The Sea Around Us Global Estuary Database, originating from Alder (2003) and distributed by the Sea Around Us project at the University of British Columbia, covers estuaries across 120+ countries and is a key reference for global estuary vector data. It is provided as a shapefile (polygons plus 44 points) including attributes such as freshwater flux, and although niche it is widely cited in estuary and marine research. Licensing is unclear, so its citation policy and terms should be reviewed before use.

name: Seamounts & Knolls of the World (Yesson 2011, 2020)
doi_or_citation: Yesson C et al. 2011, Deep-Sea Res I; doi:10.1594/PANGAEA.757563
notes: 33,452 海山 + 138,412 knolls 矢量化多边形；2020 更新版本含 ~4000 新海山。
verify_notes: Yesson seamounts/knolls (18 data points listed in metadata) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 《全球海山与海丘》（Yesson 等，2011，2020 更新）由 Yesson 等人发布于 PANGAEA，覆盖全球海洋，是海山与海丘的权威矢量数据集，包含约 33,452 座海山和 138,412 座海丘的多边形；2020 更新版新增约 4000 座海山。数据以 shapefile、KML、ASCII 提供，采用 CC-BY-3.0 许可，广泛用于深海生境、生物地理与海底地形研究。
desc_en: Seamounts & Knolls of the World (Yesson et al., 2011, with a 2020 update), published on PANGAEA, covers the global ocean and is the authoritative vector dataset of seamounts and knolls, containing polygons for roughly 33,452 seamounts and 138,412 knolls; the 2020 update adds about 4,000 new seamounts. It is provided as shapefile, KML, and ASCII under a CC-BY-3.0 licence and is widely used in deep-sea habitat, biogeography, and seafloor-topography research.

name: SEDAC Subnational HDI (Resource Watch derivative)
provider: WRI Resource Watch / SEDAC, based on GDL
theme_raw: SHDI joined to polygons for visualisation
notes: Open GeoJSON re-distribution of the SHDI polygons, no registration required.
verify_notes: Active SPA shell; detail content JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SEDAC 次国家级人类发展指数（HDI）是 WRI Resource Watch 基于全球数据实验室（GDL）与 SEDAC 数据制作的衍生图层，覆盖全球次国家级行政区，源自 Smits & Permanyer（2019）。它以 GeoJSON 与矢量瓦片形式开放再分发，无需注册即可直接下载或通过 API 访问，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，适合社会经济与区域发展空间分析。
desc_en: The SEDAC Subnational HDI is a Resource Watch (WRI) derivative layer based on the Global Data Lab and SEDAC data, covering subnational administrative units worldwide and derived from Smits & Permanyer (2019). It is openly redistributed as GeoJSON and vector tiles, downloadable directly or via API without registration, and licensed under CC BY 4.0, making it suitable for socioeconomic and regional-development spatial analysis.

name: SIOSE / Sistema de Información de Ocupación del Suelo en España
notes: Hierarchical hierarchical LULC vector; pioneered semantic LU coding now used in INSPIRE
verify_notes: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant; product search may show 404 without params | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SIOSE（西班牙土地占用信息系统）由西班牙国家地理院 IGN/CNIG 制作，覆盖西班牙全境，是一套层级化的土地利用/覆盖（LULC）矢量数据集。它率先采用语义化的土地利用编码，并已被 INSPIRE 采纳。数据提供 GeoPackage、SHP、GML 及 WFS 服务，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，适合国土规划、土地利用变化与环境监测分析。
desc_en: SIOSE (Sistema de Información de Ocupación del Suelo en España), produced by Spain's national mapping agency IGN/CNIG, covers the whole of Spain and is a hierarchical land-use/land-cover (LULC) vector dataset. It pioneered a semantic land-use coding scheme now used within INSPIRE. The data is available as GeoPackage, SHP, GML, and via WFS under a CC BY 4.0 licence, supporting territorial planning, land-use change, and environmental monitoring.

name: Slice OSM (Protomaps)
theme_raw: 任意 polygon 切片，最新 planet 抽取
access: 网页提交，邮件取件；免费
notes: FlatGeobuf 输出在 OSM 派生服务里独树一帜；非常冷门但被 OSM US 官方推
verify_notes: WebFetch 仅返回标题，页面内容稀薄，但 URL 可达；Protomaps slice 服务正常。 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Slice OSM 由 Protomaps 与 OpenStreetMap US 提供，是一项从全球 OSM 数据中按区域裁切提取数据的免费服务（网页提交、邮件取件）。它支持 PBF、GeoJSONSeq 以及 FlatGeobuf 输出，其中 FlatGeobuf 在 OSM 派生服务中较为独特。该服务虽较冷门，但获 OSM US 官方推荐，数据遵循 ODbL 许可。
desc_en: Slice OSM, provided by Protomaps and OpenStreetMap US, is a free service for extracting regional cut-outs from global OSM data (submitted via the web, delivered by email). It supports PBF, GeoJSONSeq, and FlatGeobuf output, with FlatGeobuf being a distinctive option among OSM-derived services. Though relatively niche, it is officially recommended by OSM US, and the data follows the ODbL licence.

name: Sophox
notes: Vector geometries retrievable via SPARQL queries
verify_notes: OSM+Wikidata linked-data endpoint | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Sophox 是由 Wikimedia 与 OSM 社区维护的语义查询服务，可通过 SPARQL 同时查询 OpenStreetMap 与 Wikidata 数据，并以 GeoJSON、WKT 形式返回矢量几何。它覆盖全球，适合将地理标签与知识图谱关联的高级查询场景。许可情况见其版权页（OSM 部分为 ODbL，Wikidata 衍生部分为 CC0），提供免费公共端点。
desc_en: Sophox is a semantic query service maintained by Wikimedia and the OSM community that allows SPARQL queries across both OpenStreetMap and Wikidata, returning vector geometries as GeoJSON and WKT. With global coverage, it suits advanced queries that link geographic tags with knowledge-graph data. Licensing is detailed on its copyright page (OSM portions under ODbL, Wikidata-derived portions CC0), and it offers a free public endpoint.

name: Source Cooperative — Overture GeoParquet Country / Quad partitions (Chris Holmes)
what_changes: Re-partitions Overture Places and Buildings into per-country and quad-key GeoParquet files for cloud-native spatial queries; adds spatial sorting and bbox columns for efficient DuckDB / GDAL access.
notes: Hosted on Source Cooperative by Radiant Earth; an unofficial but widely used repartitioning.
verify_notes: Experimental mid-2023 redistribution; superseded by official Overture releases | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Source Cooperative 上的 Overture GeoParquet（按国家/Quad 分区，由 Chris Holmes 维护）将 Overture Maps 的 Places 数据重新分区为按国家或四叉网格组织的 GeoParquet，托管于 Radiant Earth 运营的 Source Cooperative。它是一个非官方但被广泛使用的重分区版本，便于按地理范围高效下载与查询。页面未明确许可，使用前请核实 Overture 原始数据条款。
desc_en: The Source Cooperative Overture GeoParquet (country / quad partitions, maintained by Chris Holmes) repartitions Overture Maps Places data into GeoParquet organised by country or quad grid, hosted on Source Cooperative operated by Radiant Earth. It is an unofficial but widely used repartitioning that enables efficient download and querying by geographic extent. The licence is unspecified on the page, so the original Overture data terms should be verified before use.

name: South Carolina Data Files (Harvard EDA) - Election Results and Shapefiles 2008-2010
notes: Precinct vector + returns
verify_notes: DOI resolves to Harvard Dataverse; SPA blocks WebFetch content extraction | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 南卡罗来纳州数据文件（哈佛选举数据档案）包含 2008–2010 年南卡罗来纳州的选举结果与选区边界 shapefile，由哈佛选举数据档案（Dataverse）发布。数据为选区级矢量边界配合选举回报，适合选举地理、选区划分与政治学空间分析。通过 Harvard Dataverse 下载，遵循其使用条款。
desc_en: The South Carolina Data Files (Harvard Election Data Archive) contain 2008-2010 election results and precinct boundary shapefiles for South Carolina, USA, published via Harvard Dataverse. The dataset pairs precinct-level vector boundaries with election returns, making it suitable for electoral geography, redistricting, and political-science spatial analysis. It is downloadable through Harvard Dataverse under its usage terms.

name: Speedtest by Ookla Global Performance Maps
notes: Zoom-16 web-mercator tile polygons with download/upload metrics
verify_notes: Active, updated quarterly, AWS S3 us-west-2 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Ookla 全球网络性能地图数据集以网络墨卡托 zoom-16 瓦片多边形形式，按季度发布全球固网与移动宽带的下载、上传速度及延迟统计。数据托管于 AWS 开放数据 S3 桶，提供 Shapefile 与 Parquet（几何以 WKT 表达）格式，便于大规模空间分析。常用于数字鸿沟、网络覆盖与基础设施研究。采用 CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 许可，仅限非商业使用。
desc_en: Ookla's Global Performance Maps provide quarterly fixed and mobile broadband metrics—download/upload speeds and latency—aggregated into zoom-16 web-mercator tile polygons covering the entire globe. Hosted on the AWS Open Data S3 bucket, it ships as Shapefile and Parquet (geometry stored as WKT), making it well suited to large-scale spatial analysis of the digital divide, connectivity, and infrastructure. The data is released under a CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 licence, restricting use to non-commercial purposes with attribution and share-alike terms.

name: Statistics Finland Geoserver WFS
theme_raw: 芬兰统计单元（市、邮编、网格）
notes: 经典 WFS 教程示例端点，确实可达
verify_notes: WFS endpoint returns HTTP 400 without proper GetCapabilities query params (expected behavior) | lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: 芬兰统计局（Tilastokeskus）提供的 GeoServer WFS 端点，发布芬兰各类统计分区的矢量边界，可通过 GML 或 JSON 直接查询调取。该端点常被用作 WFS 入门教学示例，稳定可达。数据覆盖芬兰全境，按 CC BY 4.0 许可开放，适合统计制图、区域分析与 OGC 服务集成实践。
desc_en: This GeoServer WFS endpoint from Statistics Finland (Tilastokeskus) publishes vector boundaries of Finnish statistical areas, queryable directly as GML or JSON via the standard OGC WFS protocol. Widely used as a reliable teaching example for learning WFS, it covers all of Finland and is released under CC BY 4.0. It is well suited to statistical mapping, regional analysis, and hands-on practice integrating OGC web services into GIS workflows.

name: SteveCline/vector
notes: Vector GIS data editor for managing GeoJSON
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SteveCline/vector 是一个用于管理 GeoJSON 数据的矢量 GIS 数据编辑工具，托管于 GitHub 并附带示例数据。它面向矢量要素的查看与编辑操作，采用 MIT 许可证开放。该项目本质上是一个工具/编辑器而非权威数据集，适合需要轻量级 GeoJSON 编辑能力的开发与学习场景。
desc_en: SteveCline/vector is a vector GIS data editor for managing GeoJSON, hosted on GitHub with sample data included. It focuses on viewing and editing vector features and is released under the permissive MIT licence. Rather than being an authoritative dataset, the project is primarily a lightweight tool, useful for developers and learners who need simple, browser- or app-based GeoJSON editing capabilities in their workflows.

name: TGOS 地理資訊圖資雲服務平台
formats: WFS, WMS overlay via TGOS MAP API；外連 SHP/KML 下載
notes: 國家級 geospatial metadata 入口，非僅 NLSC 圖層；常被學術文獻引用
verify_notes: TGOS portal blocks WebFetch; likely live | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: TGOS 地理資訊圖資雲服務平台由台湾内政部建置，是国家级地理空间元数据与图资入口，整合来自各机关的矢量资料，并非仅限国土测绘中心（NLSC）图层。平台提供 WFS、WMS 叠图（透过 TGOS MAP API）及外连 SHP/KML 下载，多数免费，部分服务需注册。授权方式视原始机关而定，常被学术文献引用。
desc_en: TGOS is Taiwan's national geospatial portal, operated by the Ministry of the Interior, serving as a metadata and data hub that aggregates vector datasets from many government agencies—not just NLSC layers. It offers WFS, WMS overlays via the TGOS MAP API, and external SHP/KML downloads, mostly free though some services require registration. Licensing varies by the originating agency. The platform is frequently cited in academic research on Taiwan's geography.

name: TheUpshot presidential-precinct-map-2020
notes: GEOID, party vote counts, density per sq km
verify_notes: Hosted at int.nyt.com newsgraphics | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由《纽约时报》Upshot 团队发布的 2020 年美国总统选举投票区（precinct）级地图，覆盖全美但各州数据完整度不一。数据以 gzip 压缩的 GeoJSON 提供，包含 GEOID、各党得票数及每平方公里密度等属性，采用 MIT 许可证。常用于精细化的美国选举地理与政治分析。
desc_en: Released by The New York Times' Upshot, this is a precinct-level map of the 2020 U.S. presidential election covering the nation, though state-by-state completeness varies. Distributed as gzipped GeoJSON under an MIT licence, it includes attributes such as GEOID, party vote counts, and population density per square kilometre. The dataset is widely used for fine-grained analysis of American electoral geography, voting patterns, and political demography.

name: Three-Pole permafrost active-layer thickness post-processed product (1990-2015)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en/data/c5834576-0a20-4150-9b47-dece0d9a5900))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en/data/c5834576-0a20-4150-9b47-dece0d9a5900))
notes: Borderline vector — accompanying station/zonal vector layers; raster primary.
verify_notes: lychee:Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en/data/c5834576-0a20-4150-9b47-dece0d9a5900))
desc_zh: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布的三极冻土活动层厚度后处理产品，覆盖北极、南极及青藏高原，时间跨度 1990–2015 年。数据以栅格为主，附带站点/分区矢量图层，需注册下载，遵循 TPDC 数据使用政策。适合多年冻土动态、气候变化及寒区环境研究。
desc_en: Distributed by the Third Pole Environment Data Center (TPDC), this post-processed permafrost active-layer thickness product spans the Arctic, Antarctic, and Tibetan Plateau over 1990–2015. It is primarily a raster product accompanied by station and zonal vector layers, available via registered download under the TPDC data-use policy. It supports research on permafrost dynamics, climate change, and cold-region environmental processes across the three poles.

name: Tianditu 矢量底图 WMTS (vec_c / vec_w)
notes: 19 级；非纯矢量 tile, 但是矢量样式
verify_notes: Endpoint exists but requires registered tk= token | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 天地图矢量底图 WMTS 服务（vec_c 与 vec_w），提供覆盖全球与中国的矢量样式底图瓦片，共 19 级。vec_c 采用 EPSG:4490 经纬度投影，vec_w 采用 EPSG:3857 网络墨卡托，遵循 OGC WMTS 1.0.0 标准。瓦片为矢量样式渲染的栅格而非纯矢量瓦片，调用需申请天地图 API 密钥，是中国常用的权威底图服务。
desc_en: Tianditu's vector basemap WMTS service (vec_c and vec_w) delivers vector-styled basemap tiles covering China and the globe across 19 zoom levels. vec_c uses EPSG:4490 (geographic) while vec_w uses EPSG:3857 (web mercator), both following the OGC WMTS 1.0.0 standard. The tiles are vector-styled raster rather than true vector tiles, and access requires a Tianditu API key. It is a widely used authoritative basemap service in China.

name: TritonDB code repository
notes: Companion code; produces the vector-compatible occurrence tables.
verify_notes: Public repo, no LICENSE file shown | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: TritonDB 是与新生代浮游有孔虫数据库相关的配套代码仓库，由 I. Fenton 维护，包含 R 脚本及输入/输出 CSV，用于生成可与矢量数据兼容的物种出现记录表。覆盖全球、时间跨度为新生代，对应论文 DOI 10.1038/s41597-021-00942-7。适合古海洋学、生物多样性与古气候研究。
desc_en: TritonDB is the companion code repository for a Cenozoic planktonic foraminifera database, maintained by I. Fenton. It comprises R scripts plus input/output CSV files that produce vector-compatible species occurrence tables, with global coverage across the Cenozoic. The code accompanies the data paper at DOI 10.1038/s41597-021-00942-7 and supports research in palaeoceanography, biodiversity, and palaeoclimate reconstruction. No explicit licence is displayed on the repository.

name: UCLA Historical US Congressional District Shapefiles (CDmaps)
provider: UCLA Political Science (Lewis, DeVine, Pitcher, Martis)
feature_count: every U.S. Congressional District in use between 1789 and 2025
notes: Unique long historical time series, often cited in political-geography papers.
verify_notes: Updated Nov 2025 to v2.0.0, covers through 119th Congress | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UCLA 政治学系（Lewis、DeVine、Pitcher、Martis 等）编制的美国历史国会选区 Shapefile（CDmaps），涵盖 1789 年至 2025 年（至第 119 届国会）每一届国会的选区边界。数据提供 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON，采用 MIT 许可证，可直接下载。这一独特的长时段历史时间序列在政治地理研究中被广泛引用。
desc_en: Compiled by UCLA Political Science (Lewis, DeVine, Pitcher, and Martis), CDmaps provides historical U.S. Congressional District shapefiles for every Congress from 1789 through the 119th Congress (2025). Available as Shapefile and GeoJSON under an MIT licence with direct download, it offers a uniquely long historical time series of district boundaries. The dataset is frequently cited in political-geography and redistricting research for its comprehensive temporal coverage.

name: umap (uMap)
theme_raw: User-created map data on OSM layers
notes: Editor/publisher rather than canonical dataset
verify_notes: Active; v3.7.3 Apr 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: uMap 是由 OpenStreetMap France 维护的开源在线地图制作与发布工具，可基于 OSM 底图创建自定义地图，支持 GeoJSON、GPX、KML、CSV 的导入导出。它本质上是地图编辑/发布平台而非权威数据集，可自托管或使用 umap.openstreetmap.fr 公共实例，按 WTFPL 许可开放。适合协作制图、用户贡献内容与轻量地图分享。
desc_en: uMap is an open-source online map-making and publishing tool maintained by OpenStreetMap France, letting users create custom maps over OSM basemaps with import/export in GeoJSON, GPX, KML, and CSV. It is an editor and publisher rather than a canonical dataset, deployable self-hosted or via the public umap.openstreetmap.fr instance under the WTFPL licence. It is well suited to collaborative mapping, user-contributed content, and lightweight map sharing.

name: UN Vector Tile Toolkit — sample tiles and source data
notes: Open-source toolkit and sample vector tile datasets from the UN Open GIS Initiative.
verify_notes: Org moved to github.com/unvt per pinned repo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国矢量瓦片工具包（UN Vector Tile Toolkit）由 UN Open GIS Initiative 主导，是一套开源工具及示例数据，用于生产和分发 Mapbox 矢量瓦片（PBF）与 GeoJSON。覆盖全球，按 Unlicense/MIT 许可开放。适合需要在受限或离线环境中自建矢量瓦片基础设施的机构与开发者，尤其面向联合国及人道主义制图场景。
desc_en: The UN Vector Tile Toolkit, led by the UN Open GIS Initiative, is a set of open-source tools and sample datasets for producing and serving Mapbox Vector Tiles (PBF) and GeoJSON with global coverage. Released under Unlicense/MIT, it targets organisations and developers who need to build self-hosted vector-tile infrastructure, including in constrained or offline environments. It is particularly oriented toward UN operations and humanitarian mapping use cases.

name: unitedstates/districts
notes: By state and district number; shapefile output is a TODO
verify_notes: Published to theunitedstates.io | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: unitedstates/districts 提供美国第 113 届国会联邦立法选区的矢量边界，按州与选区编号组织，格式为 GeoJSON 与 KML，采用 CC0 1.0（公共领域）授权，托管于 GitHub。Shapefile 输出尚在计划中。数据简洁开放，适合美国政治地理、选民分析与公民技术应用。
desc_en: unitedstates/districts provides vector boundaries for U.S. 113th Congress federal legislative districts, organised by state and district number, in GeoJSON and KML formats. Released under the CC0 1.0 public-domain dedication and hosted on GitHub, it is freely reusable, with shapefile output noted as a future to-do. The clean, open dataset is well suited to American political-geography analysis, electoral applications, and civic-technology projects.

name: UNSD SDG Geospatial / UN-GGIM resources
formats: Links to national vector portals (SHP, GeoJSON, WFS)
notes: Aggregator of authoritative national vector datasets endorsed under UN-GGIM.
verify_notes: Operational, events scheduled through Nov 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UN-GGIM（联合国统计司全球地理空间信息管理）资源门户，汇集并背书各成员国权威矢量数据集，并提供通往各国地理空间门户的链接（涵盖 SHP、GeoJSON、WFS 等）。覆盖全球成员国，遵循联合国使用条款。它是面向 SDG 监测与国家地理空间数据治理的聚合入口，而非单一数据产品。
desc_en: The UN-GGIM portal (UN Statistics Division, Global Geospatial Information Management) aggregates and endorses authoritative national vector datasets from member states, providing links to national geospatial portals offering SHP, GeoJSON, WFS, and other formats. Covering UN member states globally and governed by UN terms of use, it is an aggregator and governance hub—supporting SDG monitoring and national geospatial data stewardship—rather than a single downloadable data product.

name: USFS Ecological Sections (Feature Layer)
notes: Section-level polygons used in NFS planning.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国农业部林务局（USDA Forest Service）发布的生态分区（Ecological Sections）要素图层，覆盖美国本土，提供 section 级别的生态区划多边形。数据可经开放 FeatureServer 访问，也可下载 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV，属美国政府公共领域。依据 Cleland 等 2007 年分类体系，常用于国家森林系统（NFS）规划与生态分析。
desc_en: Published by the USDA Forest Service, the Ecological Sections feature layer provides section-level ecoregion polygons for the continental United States. Available via an open FeatureServer and as downloadable Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, and CSV, it is in the U.S. Government public domain. Based on the Cleland et al. (2007) ecological classification, it is commonly used in National Forest System planning, ecosystem management, and regional ecological analysis across the U.S.

name: USGS Basement Domains of Conterminous US & Alaska (ds898) WFS
notes: Vector polygons of basement lithotectonic domains; useful for crustal/lithologic studies.
verify_notes: Feature types: domains (Basement_Domains), boundaries (Domain_boundaries) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局（USGS）ds898 基底构造域 WFS 服务，提供美国本土与阿拉斯加基底岩石构造域（basement domains）的矢量多边形，通过开放 WFS/GML 访问，属美国公共领域。该数据刻画地壳深部岩性-构造单元，适合地壳演化、岩性分区与区域构造地质研究。
desc_en: This USGS WFS service (ds898) delivers vector polygons of basement lithotectonic domains across the conterminous United States and Alaska, accessible via an open WFS/GML endpoint and in the U.S. public domain. The data characterise deep crustal lithotectonic units and are useful for studies of crustal evolution, lithologic provinces, and regional tectonics. It provides a standards-based way to integrate authoritative basement geology into GIS analyses.

name: USGS Carbonatites of the World (Nb-REE) GIS
formats_now: Shapefile, CSV, KML/KMZ, WMS 1.3.0, WFS 1.1.0, HTML
notes: Niche but heavily cited in REE supply-chain research.
verify_notes: Carbonatites of the world, Nb/REE deposits | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: USGS《世界碳酸岩（Nb-REE）GIS》数据集，汇编全球碳酸岩产地的矢量数据，提供 Shapefile、KML 及 WFS 访问，属美国公共领域。碳酸岩是铌和稀土元素的重要赋存岩类，该数据虽属小众，却在稀土供应链与关键矿产研究中被频繁引用，适合矿产资源评估与成矿研究。
desc_en: The USGS "Carbonatites of the World (Nb-REE)" GIS dataset compiles global occurrences of carbonatites as vector data, offered as Shapefile, KML, and via WFS in the U.S. public domain. Carbonatites are key host rocks for niobium and rare-earth elements, and although niche, the dataset is heavily cited in REE supply-chain and critical-minerals research. It supports mineral-resource assessment and metallogenic studies worldwide.

name: USGS EarthExplorer
access: Web app + bulk download + OGC services
notes: Common gateway for USGS vector and raster geoscience products.
verify_notes: Authentication required for downloads | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: USGS EarthExplorer 是检索和下载美国地质调查局地学数据的主要门户，覆盖全球，提供 Shapefile、KML 等矢量数据以及栅格影像，支持网页浏览、批量下载及 REST/WMS/WMTS 等 OGC 服务。各数据集授权依其 EULA 而定，下载通常需登录。它是获取 USGS 矢量与遥感产品的常用入口。
desc_en: USGS EarthExplorer is the primary gateway for searching and downloading USGS geoscience data with global coverage, offering vector formats such as Shapefile and KML alongside raster imagery, plus web browsing, bulk download, and OGC services (REST/WMS/WMTS). Licensing is per-dataset EULA and login is typically required. It is a common entry point for accessing the full breadth of USGS vector and remote-sensing products.

name: USGS Karst Map Compilation (USGS OFR 2014-1156)
license_now: USGS public domain (implied; no explicit statement)
formats_now: PDF report; GIS dataset ZIP (269 MB); KML (109 MB); XML metadata; README
notes: Polygon karst regions for CONUS; also ArcGIS Hub FeatureServer 'USA Karst'.
verify_notes: OFR 2014-1156 still hosted. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: USGS 喀斯特地图汇编（公开档案报告 OFR 2014-1156，Weary 与 Doctor 2014）以多边形 Shapefile 形式给出美国本土的喀斯特及可溶岩分布区，文件约 269 MB，可直接下载，属美国公共领域。另有 ArcGIS Hub 上的“USA Karst”FeatureServer。适合岩溶地貌、地下水脆弱性与灾害风险研究。
desc_en: The USGS Karst Map Compilation (Open-File Report 2014-1156, Weary & Doctor 2014) provides polygon shapefiles of karst and soluble-rock regions across the conterminous United States, roughly 269 MB and available for direct download in the U.S. public domain. A corresponding "USA Karst" FeatureServer is also available via ArcGIS Hub. The dataset supports research on karst landforms, groundwater vulnerability, and geohazard assessment.

name: USGS Network Linked Data Index (NLDI)
theme_raw: stream-network navigation, basin delineation, indexed water observations
notes: OGC API Processes wrap basin delineation and flowline navigation. Excellent for derived vector outputs.
verify_notes: 根路径返回 404；NLDI API 实际入口已迁移 (常见路径如 /api/nldi/linked-data) | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: USGS 网络链接数据索引（NLDI）由水务部门提供，是一套面向美国水文网络的 API，可按经纬点导航流线、上溯/下溯水系并界定流域。它通过 OGC API Processes 封装流域勾绘与流线导航功能，输出 GeoJSON，属美国公共领域。非常适合生成派生矢量成果，服务于水文分析与水资源研究。
desc_en: The USGS Network Linked Data Index (NLDI), from the Water Mission Area, is an API for navigating the U.S. hydrologic network—tracing flowlines and delineating upstream/downstream basins from a point. It wraps basin delineation and flowline navigation as OGC API Processes, returning GeoJSON, and is in the U.S. public domain. It is excellent for generating derived vector outputs in hydrologic analysis and water-resources research.

name: USGS Podiform Chromite Deposits of the World
formats_now: Shapefile, KML, WMS, WFS, CSV, HTML
notes: Companion to OFR 2009-1413; mostly used by ophiolite/tectonics researchers.
verify_notes: Podiform chromite deposits dataset accessible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: USGS《世界豆荚状铬铁矿矿床》数据集，收录全球 1,124 处豆荚状铬铁矿矿点，提供 Shapefile、KML 及 WFS 访问，属美国公共领域。该数据是公开档案报告 OFR 2009-1413 的配套成果，主要服务于蛇绿岩、地幔构造及铬铁矿成矿研究。
desc_en: The USGS "Podiform Chromite Deposits of the World" dataset catalogues 1,124 podiform chromite mineral deposits globally, available as Shapefile, KML, and via WFS in the U.S. public domain. It is the companion to Open-File Report 2009-1413 and is used mainly by researchers studying ophiolites, mantle tectonics, and chromite metallogeny, offering a ready-to-use vector layer for global mineral-deposit and tectonic analyses.

name: USGS Topo Map Vector Data (TNM Vector Topo)
formats_now: XML metadata; download via USGS landing page
notes: Underlying vectors for US Topo quad PDFs; less commonly used than thematic NHD/NTD layers.
verify_notes: Last updated Feb 2025 | lychee:200 OK
