desc_zh: USGS 地形图矢量数据（TNM Vector Topo）是支撑 US Topo 系列分幅 PDF 地形图的底层矢量要素，按美国 1:24,000 分幅组织，提供 File GDB 与 Shapefile，经 The National Map 分发，属美国政府公共领域。相比专题化的 NHD/NTD 图层，该集合使用较少，适合基础地形要素提取与制图。
desc_en: USGS Topo Map Vector Data (TNM Vector Topo) is the underlying vector feature collection behind the US Topo quadrangle PDF maps, organised by U.S. topographic quadrangles and distributed as File Geodatabase and Shapefile through The National Map, in the U.S. Government public domain. Less commonly used than thematic layers such as NHD or NTD, it is suited to extracting base topographic features and supporting cartographic production.

name: USPVDB - U.S. Large-Scale Solar PV polygon database
notes: Georectified polygons digitized over aerial imagery with EIA attributes
verify_notes: Nature IDP cookie redirect; article exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: USPVDB 是美国大型太阳能光伏（LSPV）电站多边形数据库（Fujita 等 2023，USGS 与 LBNL 合作），收录 3,699 处大型光伏设施多边形，基于航空影像数字化并经几何校正，附带 EIA 属性信息。数据经 USGS ScienceBase 开放，提供 Shapefile/GeoJSON，属公共领域，DOI 10.1038/s41597-023-02644-8。适合可再生能源、土地利用与能源转型研究。
desc_en: USPVDB is the U.S. Large-Scale Solar PV polygon database (Fujita et al. 2023, USGS–LBNL), containing 3,699 LSPV facility polygons digitised over aerial imagery, georectified, and enriched with EIA attributes. Distributed openly via USGS ScienceBase as Shapefile/GeoJSON in the public domain (DOI 10.1038/s41597-023-02644-8), it provides authoritative facility footprints for research on renewable energy siting, land use, and the U.S. energy transition.

name: Validation standard for AOH maps for terrestrial birds and mammals
what_changes: Provides validation data, summary statistics and code that benchmarks AOH-refined IUCN range maps against independent occurrence records; underpins GMD 15:5093 (2022).
notes: Dahal, Lumbierres, Butchart, Donald, Rondinini 2021. Niche methods/validation artefact, not a primary range release.
verify_notes: Validation standard for AOH maps; v3 2021-07-02 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 记录为陆生鸟类与哺乳动物“适宜栖息地面积”（Area of Habitat, AOH）地图的验证标准（Dahal、Lumbierres、Butchart、Donald、Rondinini 2021），属方法学与验证类成果，而非物种分布范围的原始发布。采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，适合生物多样性建模中 AOH 方法的评估与复现参考。
desc_en: This Zenodo record provides a validation standard for Area of Habitat (AOH) maps of terrestrial birds and mammals (Dahal, Lumbierres, Butchart, Donald & Rondinini 2021). It is a methodological and validation artefact rather than a primary species range release, distributed under CC-BY-4.0. It serves as a reference for assessing and reproducing AOH mapping methods in biodiversity and conservation modelling.

name: Vectorized rooftop area data for 90 cities in China
provider: Qian et al., Wuhan University (Scientific Data)
feature_count: 90 cities; validated on 180 km² test samples
notes: 数据托管在 figshare/Mendeley；可用于光伏潜力、城市热岛研究
verify_notes: Publication landing page lists Sci Data 2022 entry; license/format via DOI | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国 90 城市矢量化屋顶面积数据集（Qian 等，武汉大学，Scientific Data，2022 年 3 月），以约 1 米分辨率提供 90 个中国城市的建筑屋顶矢量多边形，并在 180 km² 测试样本上经过验证，格式为 Shapefile，托管于 figshare/Mendeley，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，DOI 10.1038/s41597-022-01168-x。适合屋顶光伏潜力评估与城市热岛研究。
desc_en: This dataset (Qian et al., Wuhan University, Scientific Data, March 2022) provides vectorised building rooftop polygons for 90 Chinese cities at roughly 1 m resolution, validated on 180 km² of test samples. Distributed as shapefiles via figshare/Mendeley under CC-BY-4.0 (DOI 10.1038/s41597-022-01168-x), it is well suited to estimating rooftop solar-PV potential, urban heat-island studies, and other building-scale urban analyses across China.

name: wdpar cleaned WDPA snapshots (Hanson 2022)
what_changes: R package that downloads raw WDPA, removes UNESCO Biosphere Reserves, dissolves overlapping geometries, repairs invalid polygons and buffers point records to equal-area circles, producing analysis-ready vector snapshots.
notes: Software-distributed derivative widely used to generate reproducible cleaned WDPA shapefiles for systematic conservation planning.
verify_notes: wdpar R package, WDPA + WDOECM interface | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: wdpar（Hanson 2022）是一个以软件形式分发的衍生工具，用于自动下载并清洗世界保护区数据库（WDPA）快照，生成可复现的清洁 WDPA Shapefile。采用 GPL-3 许可，DOI 10.21105/joss.04594。它在系统性保护规划中被广泛使用，便于标准化处理保护区边界以供空间优化分析。
desc_en: wdpar (Hanson 2022) is a software-distributed derivative that automatically downloads and cleans World Database on Protected Areas (WDPA) snapshots to produce reproducible, cleaned WDPA shapefiles. Released under GPL-3 (DOI 10.21105/joss.04594), it is widely used in systematic conservation planning to standardise protected-area boundaries, removing geometry errors and overlaps so the data can feed reliably into spatial prioritisation and optimisation analyses.

name: WOF Constituencies (US + Canada)
notes: Niche but cited — congressional districts etc. with WOF hierarchy.
verify_notes: 39 commits; marked work-in-progress; no releases | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Who's On First（WOF）选区数据集，覆盖美国与加拿大，提供国会选区等行政/选举单元的矢量边界，并嵌入 WOF 的地名层级体系，格式为 GeoJSON 与 SQLite，托管于 GitHub 及 Geocode Earth SQLite。授权遵循 WOF 许可。虽属小众但被引用，适合地名解析、行政层级关联与政治地理分析。
desc_en: The Who's On First (WOF) constituencies dataset covers the United States and Canada, providing vector boundaries for administrative/electoral units such as congressional districts, embedded within the WOF place hierarchy. Distributed as GeoJSON and SQLite via GitHub and Geocode Earth, under the WOF licence, it is niche but cited. It is useful for geocoding, linking administrative hierarchies, and political-geography analysis that benefits from WOF's structured place relationships.

name: World Atlas (TopoJSON/GeoJSON)
notes: Archived 2023 but stable redistribution of Natural Earth v4.1.0
verify_notes: repo archived 2023-03-03, read-only | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: World Atlas 由 Mike Bostock 维护，是 Natural Earth v4.1.0 的稳定再分发版本，提供 1:110m、1:50m、1:10m 三种比例尺的全球国界与陆地等矢量数据，格式为 TopoJSON 与 GeoJSON，可经 GitHub 或 jsDelivr CDN 获取，采用 ISC 许可。项目已于 2023 年归档但仍稳定可用，广泛用于 D3.js 等网页可视化制图。
desc_en: World Atlas, maintained by Mike Bostock, is a stable redistribution of Natural Earth v4.1.0, providing global boundaries and land features at 1:110m, 1:50m, and 1:10m scales as TopoJSON and GeoJSON. Available via GitHub and the jsDelivr CDN under the ISC licence, it was archived in 2023 but remains stable and is widely used for web-based cartography and visualisation with D3.js and similar tools.

name: World Bank Geospatial Poverty Portal (GSAP / SPID / SAE)
theme_raw: Subnational poverty headcount, GSAP global subnational layer, multidimensional poverty
notes: Vector polygon layer is exposed via the map services; download is per-country.
verify_notes: Beta portal; GSAP/SPID/SAE datasets listed | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界银行地理空间贫困门户（GSAP/SPID/SAE）整合约 166 个经济体、约 1,800 个次国家区域的贫困估计，并以矢量多边形图层通过地图服务暴露，可按国家导出 Shapefile/GeoJSON，下载为分国进行。数据遵循世界银行开放数据政策（推测 CC-BY-4.0）。适合次国家尺度的贫困、空间不平等与发展政策研究。
desc_en: The World Bank Geospatial Poverty Portal (GSAP/SPID/SAE) integrates poverty estimates for roughly 1,800 subnational areas across about 166 economies, exposing vector polygon layers via map services with per-country export to Shapefile/GeoJSON. Distributed under World Bank Open Data terms (implied CC-BY-4.0), it supports subnational analysis of poverty, spatial inequality, and development policy, providing harmonised boundaries joinable to standardised poverty indicators.

name: World Bank Small Area Estimation (SAE) & Poverty Mapping Collection
provider: World Bank Poverty GP + National Statistics Offices
notes: Cold but heavily cited; each country dataset bundles polygon shapefile with poverty estimates joinable by GIS_ID.
verify_notes: HTTP 404 Not Found; collection path likely changed | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 世界银行小区域估计（SAE）与贫困制图合集，由世界银行贫困实践局与各国国家统计局合作，覆盖非洲、亚洲、拉美及欧洲中亚的二十余个国家。每个国家数据集捆绑多边形 Shapefile 与贫困估计（含 CSV 及质心），可经 GIS_ID 关联，多数采用 CC BY 4.0（依国家而异），分国下载。被广泛引用，适合贫困空间分析与政策定位。
desc_en: The World Bank Small Area Estimation (SAE) and Poverty Mapping collection, produced with the World Bank Poverty GP and national statistics offices, covers 20-plus countries across Africa, Asia, LAC, and ECA. Each country dataset bundles a polygon shapefile with poverty estimates (plus CSV and centroids), joinable by GIS_ID, mostly under CC BY 4.0 (varies by country) with per-country download. Heavily cited, it supports spatial poverty analysis and policy targeting.

name: Zenodo dataset 15702414
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] Zenodo DOI 未知主题, 不一定矢量
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该条目为 Zenodo 上的一个数据集（DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15702414），可直接下载。现有元数据有限，主题、覆盖范围、格式与许可均未明确，是否为矢量数据尚需核实。建议在使用前直接查阅 Zenodo 记录页以确认具体内容与授权条款。
desc_en: This entry refers to a dataset archived on Zenodo (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15702414), available for direct download. The available metadata is sparse, with the subject, coverage, formats, and licence unspecified, and its status as vector data remains unverified. Users should consult the Zenodo record page directly to confirm the dataset's actual content, format, and licensing terms before use.

name: Zenodo record 14756233
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] Zenodo记录页,内容未知需核实
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该条目为 Zenodo 上的一个记录（records/14756233），可直接下载，许可可能为某种 Creative Commons 协议。当前元数据有限，具体主题、覆盖范围与格式均不明确，内容需进一步核实。建议直接访问 Zenodo 记录页确认数据集的实际内容与授权后再使用。
desc_en: This entry refers to a record archived on Zenodo (records/14756233), available for direct download, with a licence that is likely some Creative Commons variant. The current metadata is limited, leaving the specific subject, coverage, and formats unclear, so the content requires verification. Users should visit the Zenodo record page directly to confirm the dataset's actual contents and licensing before relying on it.

name: 一带一路沿线国家社会就业状况发展恢复力数据集（2000-2019）
provider: 时空三极环境大数据平台 / TPDC

desc_zh: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布的“一带一路沿线国家社会就业状况发展恢复力数据集（2000–2019）”，以国家面矢量加属性形式（ArcGIS Shapefile）呈现 BRI 沿线国家的就业恢复力指标。数据开放、需注册下载，遵循 TPDC 数据共享协议（需引用）。可作为冲突影响、社会脆弱性等研究的背景图层。
desc_en: Published by the Third Pole Environment Data Center (TPDC), this dataset on social employment resilience for Belt and Road Initiative countries (2000–2019) provides country-level vector polygons with attributes (ArcGIS Shapefile) capturing employment-resilience indicators along BRI routes. Openly available with registration under the TPDC data-sharing agreement (citation required), it can serve as a contextual layer for research on conflict impacts, socio-economic vulnerability, and development.

name: 中国 1:100万植被图 / 1:1M Vegetation Map of China (Hou Xueyu et al.)
provider: 中国科学院植物研究所/生态科学数据中心 (eco.gssdc.cn)
doi_or_citation: 侯学煜 主编《1:1000000中国植被图集》
feature_count: 11个植被类型组、54个植被型、796个群系和亚群系
notes: Definitive vegetation/biome polygon dataset for China, compiled by 250+ experts from 53 institutions. Albers China projection.
verify_notes: China 1:1M Vegetation Dataset; login required for download | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国 1:100 万植被图（侯学煜等主编《1:1000000 中国植被图集》），由中国科学院植物研究所/生态科学数据中心提供，是中国权威的植被/生物群区矢量数据集，含 11 个植被类型组、54 个植被型、796 个群系和亚群系，由 53 家机构 250 余位专家编制。格式为 Shapefile（约 880 MB，Albers 中国投影），采用 CC BY 4.0，需注册下载。适合植被、生态与生物地理研究。
desc_en: The 1:1,000,000 Vegetation Map of China (edited by Hou Xueyu et al.), provided by the Institute of Botany, CAS / Ecological Science Data Center, is the definitive vegetation and biome polygon dataset for China. It comprises 11 vegetation type groups, 54 vegetation types, and 796 formations and sub-formations, compiled by over 250 experts from 53 institutions. Distributed as Shapefile (~880 MB, Albers China projection) under CC BY 4.0 with registration, it underpins vegetation, ecological, and biogeographic research.

name: 中国30米年度耕地数据集 CACD (1986-2021)
provider: 南京大学 + 中科院南京土壤所 (Tu Yongxue et al.)
formats: raster (主), 配套矢量县级统计
notes: ESSD 2024; 与GLC_FCS30D耕地层相互验证; 重点用于耕地非农化研究
verify_notes: CACD dataset, 30m annual cropland 1986-2021 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国 30 米年度耕地数据集 CACD（1986–2021，Tu Yongxue 等，南京大学与中科院南京土壤所），以 30 米分辨率逐年刻画中国全境约 960 万平方公里的耕地变化，主体为栅格并配套县级矢量统计。发表于 ESSD 2024（DOI 10.5194/essd-16-2297-2024），采用 CC-BY-4.0，可直接下载，并与 GLC_FCS30D 耕地层相互验证，重点用于耕地非农化研究。
desc_en: The China Annual Cropland Dataset (CACD, 1986–2021; Tu Yongxue et al., Nanjing University and the Institute of Soil Science, CAS) maps cropland change across China's ~9.6 million km² at 30 m resolution annually, primarily as raster with accompanying county-level vector statistics. Published in ESSD 2024 (DOI 10.5194/essd-16-2297-2024) under CC-BY-4.0 with direct download, it is cross-validated against the GLC_FCS30D cropland layer and is used notably for research on cropland conversion to non-agricultural uses.

name: 中国中东部地区植被覆盖分类数据集（2013）
notes: 植被覆盖分类矢量
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国中东部地区植被覆盖分类数据集（2013），由 GCdataPR（全球变化科学研究数据出版系统）发布，提供中国中东部地区的植被覆盖分类矢量数据，格式包含 shp 与 tif，可开放下载，采用 CC BY 类许可（GCdataPR）。适合区域植被格局、土地覆盖与生态环境研究。
desc_en: This 2013 vegetation-cover classification dataset for central-eastern China, published via GCdataPR (the Global Change Research Data Publishing system), provides vector vegetation-cover classification data for the central-eastern region of China, in shp and tif formats with open download under a GCdataPR CC BY-style licence. It is suitable for research on regional vegetation patterns, land cover, and ecological-environmental conditions across central-eastern China.

name: 中国精细化水库空间数据集 CRD (Chinese Reservoir Dataset)
provider: 中国科学院南京地理与湖泊研究所 (宋春桥课题组)
lychee_status: Network error: SSL certificate error. Check certificate validity (error sending request for url (https://www.niglas.ac.cn/xwdt_1_1/yjjz/202209/t20220908_6510675.html))
lychee_text: Network error: SSL certificate error. Check certificate validity (error sending request for url (https://www.niglas.ac.cn/xwdt_1_1/yjjz/202209/t20220908_6510675.html))
doi_or_citation: Song C. et al., 2022, Earth Syst. Sci. Data
notes: 全国近10万水库, 比 GRanD/GeoDAR 更密集; 包含水域多边形+大坝点
verify_notes: TLS self-signed certificate error preventing fetch | lychee:Network error: SSL certificate error. Check certificate validity (error sending request for url (https://www.niglas.ac.cn/xwdt_1_1/yjjz/202209/t20220908_6510675.html))
desc_zh: 由中国科学院南京地理与湖泊研究所宋春桥课题组研制的中国精细化水库空间数据集（CRD），覆盖全国近十万座水库，相比 GRanD、GeoDAR 等全球库具有更高的密度和细致度。数据同时包含水域多边形与大坝点位，可用于水资源管理、水文模拟、地表水变化监测等研究。以 Shapefile 与 CSV 格式发布，需注册后用于科研用途，配套论文发表于 Earth System Science Data（2022）。
desc_en: The Chinese Reservoir Dataset (CRD), developed by Song Chunqiao's group at NIGLAS (Chinese Academy of Sciences), maps nearly 100,000 reservoirs across China, offering far denser coverage than global inventories such as GRanD and GeoDAR. It pairs water-body polygons with dam point locations, supporting water-resource management, hydrological modeling and surface-water change studies. Distributed as shapefiles plus CSV under a custom research license requiring registration, with an accompanying paper in Earth System Science Data (2022).

name: 中国高铁地图 china-gaotie-map (设计时速分级)
notes: 含 350/250/200 km/h 等级；可视化项目，但属性表与坐标可二次导出为矢量
verify_notes: Repo not found on GitHub | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 一个开源的中国高铁地图可视化项目，按设计时速（350、250、200 km/h 等）对线路进行分级。数据以 CSV/JSON 经纬度形式提供，可二次导出为矢量线要素。适合用于高铁网络制图、交通可视化与教学演示。许可证未明示，使用前建议核对仓库说明。
desc_en: An open-source visualization project mapping China's high-speed rail network, with lines classified by design speed (350, 250, 200 km/h, etc.). Coordinates are supplied as CSV/JSON and can be re-exported into vector line features. It suits rail-network cartography, transport visualization and teaching demos. The license is not stated, so users should check the repository before reuse.

name: 中巴经济走廊泥石流事件数据集 (2010-2022 / 1970-2022)
provider: 国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心 (NCDC)
notes: 已验证矢量(.shp)
verify_notes: Debris flow inventory China-Pakistan Economic Corridor 2010-2022; 851 KiB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心（NCDC）发布的中巴经济走廊（CPEC）泥石流事件数据集，记录走廊范围内 1970–2022 年的泥石流灾害事件。数据以约 851 KB 的 Shapefile 矢量形式提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可在线下载，适用于山地灾害评估、走廊沿线工程风险分析与防灾研究。
desc_en: Published by China's National Cryosphere Desert Data Center (NCDC), this dataset records debris-flow events along the China–Pakistan Economic Corridor (CPEC) over 1970–2022. Delivered as a roughly 851 KB shapefile under CC-BY-4.0 and available for direct download, it supports mountain-hazard assessment, engineering risk analysis along the corridor and disaster-prevention research.

name: 全球变化研究出版数据 (Global Change Research Publication Data)
formats: shapefile + raster (paper-companion vector layers: coastlines, ecoregions, land cover patches)
doi_or_citation: Each dataset tied to a peer-reviewed paper DOI
notes: Root thematic gateway; serves as index for many publication-anchored vector deposits.
verify_notes: Redirects HTTPS->HTTP with trailing slash | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家地球系统科学数据中心（NESSDC）的全球变化研究出版数据专题入口，汇集大量与同行评审论文绑定的数据成果。每个数据集对应一篇论文及其 DOI，内容涵盖海岸线、生态区、土地覆盖斑块等矢量图层及栅格产品，多采用 CC-BY 类许可，可直接下载。该入口主要作为论文配套数据的索引与发现门户。
desc_en: This is the Global Change Research Publication Data gateway of China's National Earth System Science Data Center (NESSDC), aggregating many datasets tied to peer-reviewed papers. Each deposit links to a publication DOI and includes vector layers such as coastlines, ecoregions and land-cover patches alongside raster products, mostly under CC-BY-type licenses with direct download. It chiefly serves as an index and discovery portal for publication-anchored data.

name: 北京大学一带一路大数据平台 (政治冲突/风险专题矢量)
provider: 北京大学城市与环境学院
theme_raw: BRI 政治冲突/风险国家级矢量
license: 学术使用, 注册申请
notes: 平台覆盖政治冲突、风险评估等专题；多为国家级面矢量+指标属性。部分需申请。
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout 60s | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 北京大学城市与环境学院建设的一带一路大数据平台，提供政治冲突、风险评估等专题的矢量数据，覆盖一带一路全域。数据多为国家级面状矢量并附带指标属性，可按主题导出为 SHP 或 GeoJSON。平台面向学术使用，部分内容需注册申请或校内访问，适合区域风险与地缘研究。
desc_en: Built by Peking University's College of Urban and Environmental Sciences, this Belt and Road big-data platform offers thematic vector data on political conflict and risk assessment across the BRI region. Layers are largely country-level polygons carrying indicator attributes, exportable as SHP or GeoJSON by theme. Intended for academic use, some content requires registration or on-campus access, supporting regional-risk and geopolitical research.

name: 北半球多年冻土及活动层地表监测数据与站点分布 (2001-2020)
license_now: All rights reserved; attribution + permission required
notes: Companion to CALM / GTN-P observation networks.
verify_notes: Page loads but specific dataset metadata fields not populated in rendered view | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 北半球多年冻土及活动层地表监测数据与站点分布数据集（2001–2020），由 NESSDC 地理资源分中心提供，作为 CALM、GTN-P 等观测网络的配套数据。内容包括监测站点点矢量与 CSV 观测记录，覆盖北半球冻土区，适用于冻土动态、活动层厚度与气候变化研究。数据需登录下载，使用须注明出处并获授权。
desc_en: This dataset covers permafrost and active-layer surface monitoring with station distribution across the Northern Hemisphere (2001–2020), provided by NESSDC's Geographic Resources sub-center as a companion to the CALM and GTN-P observation networks. It includes station point vectors plus CSV observation records, supporting permafrost-dynamics, active-layer-thickness and climate-change studies. Download is login-gated, with attribution and permission required.

name: 國土規劃地理資訊系統 (NSP NGIS)
theme_raw: 都市計畫 / 非都市土地使用分區 / 國家公園界
license_now: reference-only disclaimer; copyright MOI 城鄉發展分署
access: 線上瀏覽 + 圖資雲介接
feature_count: 圖徵顯示數量最多為1000筆
notes: 冷門但權威的都計矢量來源；介接 NLSC 服務雲
verify_notes: NSP NGIS accessible; data 'for reference only', cadastral disclaimers | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 台湾内政部国土管理署（NLMA）建设的国土规划地理信息系统（NSP NGIS），是覆盖台湾的都市与国土规划权威矢量来源。通过 WMTS、WFS 及部分 SHP 提供图资，并介接国土测绘中心（NLSC）服务云。数据涵盖约 2007–2015 年间不同年度图层，单次图徵显示上限约 1000 笔，仅供参考用途，著作权归属相关机关。
desc_en: The National Spatial Planning GIS (NSP NGIS), built by Taiwan's National Land Management Agency, is an authoritative vector source for urban and territorial planning across Taiwan. It serves data via WMTS, WFS and some shapefiles, connecting to the NLSC service cloud. Layers span several editions roughly between 2007 and 2015, with feature display capped near 1,000 records, offered for reference only under the agency's copyright.

name: 基于Sentinel卫星遥感与物候信息的新疆昌吉州地块级农作物分类数据集
notes: 地块级作物分类矢量
verify_notes: Sentinel-based Xinjiang Changji crop classification dataset landing accessible; license/formats not on overview | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 基于 Sentinel 卫星遥感与物候信息生成的新疆昌吉州地块级农作物分类数据集，由 GCdataPR（全球变化数据出版库）发布。数据以 Shapefile 矢量形式呈现地块级作物分类结果，采用 CC-BY 许可开放下载，可用于农业遥感、作物结构调查与精准农业研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides parcel-level crop classification for Changji Prefecture, Xinjiang, derived from Sentinel satellite imagery and phenological information, published by GCdataPR. Distributed as a shapefile presenting field-level crop labels under a CC-BY license with open download, it supports agricultural remote sensing, cropping-structure surveys and precision-agriculture research.

name: 天地图 GeoJSON 索引/元数据
coverage: 全国 + 省 + 市 + 县
notes: 列出所有可用 code、文件名、版本 (0.3.0, 2025-12-16)

desc_zh: geojson.cn 提供的天地图 GeoJSON 行政区划数据索引与元数据接口，覆盖全国及省、市、县各级。该 JSON 元数据列出所有可用行政区代码、文件名与版本（如 0.3.0，2025-12-16），是开放的 HTTP 接口，便于程序化检索并按需获取对应的行政边界 GeoJSON。
desc_en: Provided by geojson.cn, this is the index and metadata endpoint for Tianditu-based administrative-boundary GeoJSON, spanning national, provincial, prefecture and county levels. The JSON metadata lists every available administrative code, file name and version (e.g. 0.3.0, dated 2025-12-16). Served over open HTTP, it enables programmatic discovery and on-demand retrieval of boundary GeoJSON files.

name: 第二次中国冰川编目数据集 (CGI-2 / SGI-China)
provider: 中国科学院西北生态环境资源研究院 (CAREERI) / 国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心 (NCDC, semweb.csdb.cn/ncdc/)
doi_or_citation: Guo et al. 2015, J. Glaciology, doi:10.3189/2015JoG14J209
notes: Far higher detail than RGI for China; produced from Landsat TM/ETM+ and field investigation.
verify_notes: NCDC metadata page returns 404 Not Found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 第二次中国冰川编目数据集（CGI-2 / SGI-China），由中国科学院西北生态环境资源研究院（CAREERI）制作、国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心（NCDC）发布。基于 Landsat TM/ETM+ 影像与野外调查编制，主要覆盖中国西部，对中国境内冰川的刻画远比 RGI 精细。以 Shapefile 提供，需注册并引用，适用于冰川变化、水资源与气候研究。
desc_en: The Second Chinese Glacier Inventory (CGI-2 / SGI-China), produced by CAREERI (Chinese Academy of Sciences) and distributed via the NCDC, was compiled from Landsat TM/ETM+ imagery and field investigation, covering mainly western China. It depicts China's glaciers in far greater detail than the global RGI. Provided as a shapefile under a registration-and-citation policy, it supports glacier-change, water-resource and climate research (Guo et al., 2015).

name: Overture Maps Transportation Theme
theme_raw: Road & path segments + connectors (multi-modal) | global road/rail/water segments + connectors | transportation
formats: GeoParquet, PMTiles, accessible via S3/Azure + DuckDB
notes: Standard anchor source; subtypes road/rail/water. Connector points expose topology. Hosted on cloud object stores but accessible through STAC-like spatial filters.
verify_notes: Last updated 2026-05-20; release 2026-05-20.0; license not explicit on this page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Overture Maps 基金会（由 Meta、AWS、微软、TomTom、Esri 等支持）的交通主题数据，提供全球道路、铁路与水路网络。截至 2026 年 5 月版本含逾 3.37 亿条路段，连接点暴露了网络拓扑关系。数据以 GeoParquet、PMTiles 发布，托管于云对象存储，可经 S3/Azure 与 DuckDB 访问，采用 CDLA Permissive 2.0 与 ODbL（OSM 衍生部分）许可。
desc_en: The Transportation theme from the Overture Maps Foundation (backed by Meta, AWS, Microsoft, TomTom and Esri) delivers global road, rail and water networks. Its May 2026 release exceeds 337 million segments, with connector points exposing network topology. Published as GeoParquet and PMTiles on cloud object stores and queryable via S3/Azure and DuckDB, it is licensed under CDLA Permissive 2.0 plus ODbL for OSM-derived content, making it a standard base layer for transport analysis.

name: ACLED Conflict and Demonstrations Event Data (Living Atlas)
theme_raw: conflict_events | Bathymetric contour lines | vegetation / ecological tile units
notes: Daily-updated political violence and demonstration events as point feature layer; live + archive layers.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ACLED 冲突与示威事件数据（Esri Living Atlas 版），以点要素图层形式提供全球政治暴力与示威事件，每日更新并含历史归档图层。数据可通过 ArcGIS Online 要素服务以 GeoJSON、CSV、KML 等格式获取，适用于冲突监测、人道与安全风险分析。使用须遵循 ACLED 使用条款（署名、非商业）。
desc_en: ACLED Conflict and Demonstrations Event Data, in its Esri Living Atlas edition, delivers global political-violence and demonstration events as a point feature layer, updated daily with both live and archive layers. Accessible through ArcGIS Online as GeoJSON, CSV and KML, it supports conflict monitoring and humanitarian or security risk analysis. Use follows ACLED's terms requiring attribution and non-commercial reuse.

name: Annotated Dataset of Damaged Cultural Sites and Infrastructures in Ukraine
theme_raw: Damaged cultural heritage sites & science infrastructure | Oil & gas infrastructure (pipelines, wells, refineries, LNG, compressors)

desc_zh: 一个关于乌克兰受损文化遗址与基础设施的标注数据集，托管于 Zenodo，记录俄乌冲突期间约 211 处受损文化财产（占 UNESCO 所列 351 处的一部分），于 2024-12-29 发布。数据以含地理坐标字段的 CSV 及 TRIG/RDF 关联数据提供，可转换为 GeoJSON 点要素，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，适用于文化遗产损毁评估与冲突影响研究。
desc_en: Hosted on Zenodo, this annotated dataset documents damaged cultural sites and infrastructure in Ukraine during the Russian invasion, covering 211 damaged cultural properties (part of 351 UNESCO-listed), published on 29 December 2024. It is delivered as CSV with geolocation fields plus TRIG/RDF linked data and is convertible to GeoJSON points. Released under CC-BY 4.0, it supports heritage-damage assessment and conflict-impact research.

theme_raw: transport / airports | energy / power infrastructure | transport / railways
coverage: Greater Mekong Subregion (Cambodia, Laos, Myanmar, Thailand, Vietnam, Yunnan & Guangxi China)
notes: Point locations of international and domestic airports across the GMS.

desc_zh: 亚洲开发银行大湄公河次区域（GMS）项目发布的 GMS 机场数据，提供柬埔寨、老挝、缅甸、泰国、越南及中国云南、广西范围内国际与国内机场的点位。数据以 Shapefile 和 KMZ 格式开放下载（须署名），适用于次区域交通规划、连通性分析与基础设施研究。
desc_en: Published by the ADB's Greater Mekong Subregion Program, this dataset provides point locations of international and domestic airports across the GMS, spanning Cambodia, Laos, Myanmar, Thailand, Vietnam and China's Yunnan and Guangxi. Offered as shapefile and KMZ under open use with attribution, it supports subregional transport planning, connectivity analysis and infrastructure studies.

name: US Census TIGER/Line Shapefiles (Census Tracts, Block Groups, Blocks)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic
theme_raw: population_socioecon | Census tracts, block groups, blocks, ZCTA, congressional districts, school districts, urban areas | states, counties, tracts, block groups, blocks, places, congressional districts, ZCTA, school districts, AIANNH areas
coverage: United States; annual editions, including 2020 decennial geography
notes: Authoritative statistical geography: states, counties, tracts, block groups, blocks, ZCTAs, school districts. Joinable to ACS/Decennial demographic tables via GEOID.
verify_notes: 2025 vintage available; active | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 美国人口普查局发布的 TIGER/Line Shapefile，是美国权威的统计地理底图，包含州、县、普查区、街区组、街区、ZCTA、学区等各级边界，提供 2007–2025 多个年度版本（含 2020 年十年普查地理）。数据为公有领域、以 Shapefile 开放获取，可通过 GEOID 与 ACS、十年普查人口表连接，广泛用于人口、社会经济与区划分析。
desc_en: The US Census Bureau's TIGER/Line Shapefiles are the authoritative statistical-geography base for the United States, covering states, counties, tracts, block groups, blocks, ZCTAs and school districts, with annual editions from 2007 to 2025 including the 2020 decennial geography. Public-domain and openly available as shapefiles, they join to ACS and decennial demographic tables via GEOID, underpinning demographic, socioeconomic and districting analysis.

name: Foursquare Open Source Places (OS Places)
formats_now: 未在主页明示（详见 places.foursquare.com）
access: Open download via Source Cooperative / HuggingFace
notes: Foursquare is cited in the commentary as a major POI provider; in 2024 they released a fully open POI corpus under Apache 2.0, the most direct open follow-on to the paper's references.
verify_notes: Foursquare OS Places 主页活跃 (2024-11)，详细 schema/license 在文档子站 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Foursquare 开源地点数据（OS Places），覆盖全球 200 多个国家、逾 1 亿个兴趣点（POI）。数据以 Parquet/GeoParquet 点要素形式发布，可通过 Source Cooperative 与 HuggingFace 开放下载。作为 2024 年开放的大型 POI 语料，它为地理空间社区提供了一套基础性的全球地点底库，适用于地点检索、商业分析与地图构建。
desc_en: Foursquare's Open Source Places (OS Places) covers more than 100 million points of interest across 200-plus countries worldwide. Distributed as Parquet/GeoParquet point data and openly downloadable via Source Cooperative and HuggingFace, it became, on its 2024 release, one of the most significant fully open POI corpora. It serves as a foundational global places base for venue search, commercial analysis and map building.

name: Global Coal Plant Tracker (GCPT)
theme_raw: Coal-fired power plants worldwide (point vector) — overlaps BRI coal investments | Coal-fired generating units (>=30 MW) | Coal-fired power stations (point vector)
license_now: CC BY 4.0 (assumed; not on this page)
formats: Excel + GeoJSON/KML via map export; many derivatives in shapefile
formats_now: Interactive map, dashboard, Google Sheets, downloadable datasets
notes: Companion vector source for BRI coal investments referenced in the paper's methodology.
verify_notes: Page moved; likely new GEM download portal URL | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球能源监测组织（GEM）的全球燃煤电厂追踪器（GCPT），逐半年更新，覆盖全球燃煤电厂的状态、容量与位置。数据以 Excel 提供，并可通过地图导出为 GeoJSON/KML，亦有 Shapefile 衍生版本，需通过免费申请表获取。常用作能源基础设施与煤电投资研究的配套矢量来源。
desc_en: The Global Coal Plant Tracker (GCPT) from Global Energy Monitor is a semi-annually updated dataset of coal-fired power plants worldwide, recording status, capacity and location. Provided as Excel with map-based GeoJSON/KML export and various shapefile derivatives, it is obtained via a free request form. It is a common companion vector source for energy-infrastructure and coal-investment research.

name: Global database of Coastal Characteristics (GCC) v1.1
provider: Athanasiou et al. (Deltares / TU Delft), via Zenodo
theme_raw: coastal indicators (geophysical/hydrometeorological/socioeconomic) at ~730k points along global ice-free coastline, 1 km alongshore resolution | coastal indicators (geophysical/hydrometeorological/socioeconomic) per 1 km transect | coastal indicators (geophysical, hydrodynamic, socioeconomic)
coverage: global ice-free coastline (excludes Antarctica, Greenland, parts of Canada and Russia)
formats: CSV (point table with lat/lon attributes; convertible to point vector), YAML metadata
notes: Point vector dataset distributed as CSV (lat/lon + 80 indicators across 3 files: geophysical, hydrometeorological, socioeconomic).
verify_notes: GCC v1.1, ~730k coastal points, 437.6MB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球海岸特征数据库（GCC）v1.1，由 Athanasiou 等人（Deltares / 代尔夫特理工大学）制作并发布于 Zenodo，覆盖全球无冰海岸线（不含南极、格陵兰及加拿大、俄罗斯部分地区）。数据以含经纬度的 CSV 点表提供，跨地球物理、水文气象、社会经济三组共约 80 项指标，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，适用于海岸脆弱性与气候适应研究。
desc_en: The Global database of Coastal Characteristics (GCC) v1.1, by Athanasiou et al. (Deltares / TU Delft) and hosted on Zenodo, covers the global ice-free coastline (excluding Antarctica, Greenland and parts of Canada and Russia). It is distributed as CSV point tables carrying around 80 indicators across geophysical, hydrometeorological and socioeconomic groups, convertible to point vectors. Released under CC-BY 4.0, it supports coastal-vulnerability and climate-adaptation research.

name: GRUMPv1 Settlement Points, Revision 01
theme_canonical: POI / places | Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic
notes: Georeferenced settlement points with population; useful complement to urban extents.
verify_notes: SEDAC server timeout (duplicate) | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NASA SEDAC / CIESIN 的 GRUMPv1 居民点数据（修订版 01），提供全球带人口属性的地理参考居民点点要素。数据以 Esri Shapefile 点格式发布，通过 HTTPS 与 Earthdata 登录获取，采用 CC-BY 许可。它是城市范围数据的有益补充，适用于人口分布、城市化与社会经济空间分析。
desc_en: GRUMPv1 Settlement Points, Revision 01, from NASA SEDAC / CIESIN provides georeferenced global settlement points carrying population attributes. Distributed as Esri point shapefiles via HTTPS with Earthdata Login under a CC-BY license, it complements urban-extent datasets and supports population-distribution, urbanization and socioeconomic spatial analysis.

name: MODIS EVI-based Vegetation Phenology Dataset of Major Ecological Observation Stations in China (2001-2016)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Hydrography | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: vegetation phenology | hydrology / surface water | urban built-up extent
coverage: China, 45 ecological observation stations across 6 eco-geographic regions
license: CC-BY (per ScienceDB default; check landing page)
notes: Discovered via SciDB search; vector station points with phenology attributes.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 基于 MODIS EVI 的中国主要生态观测站植被物候数据集（2001–2016），由 ScienceDB（中国科学数据）发布，覆盖分布于 6 个生态地理区的 45 个生态观测站。数据为带物候属性的站点点矢量并附表格（shp/csv），可开放下载，适用于植被物候、生态监测与气候响应研究。许可一般为 CC-BY，使用前建议核对落地页。
desc_en: This MODIS EVI-based vegetation phenology dataset for major Chinese ecological observation stations (2001–2016), published on ScienceDB, covers 45 stations across six eco-geographic regions. It provides station point vectors with phenology attributes plus tabular files (shp/csv) for open download, supporting vegetation-phenology, ecological-monitoring and climate-response research. Licensing is typically CC-BY, though the landing page should be checked.

name: OSM 中国分省矢量数据 (含 amenity: hospital/school/police/fire_station 等POI)
provider: 麻辣GIS / OpenStreetMap 中文镜像整理
theme_canonical: POI / places | Land cover & land use | Public services
theme_raw: public_services POI | 土地覆盖 / 利用 (urban/farm/forest/water polygon) | 路网 + 多主题
license_now: OSM ODbL (data origin); author cautions against commercial use
notes: 中文圈广泛使用; pois.shp 含 fclass=hospital/school/police/fire_station/townhall 等
verify_notes: 2026 datasets behind paywall; older via WeChat verification; 7zip encrypted | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由麻辣GIS整理的 OSM 中国分省矢量数据，覆盖中国 31 个省份，源自 OpenStreetMap。数据以 Shapefile 与 GeoJSON 提供，其中 pois.shp 含 hospital、school、police、fire_station、townhall 等 fclass 类别的兴趣点。在中文 GIS 圈广泛使用，遵循 OSM ODbL 数据许可，作者提示谨慎用于商业用途，适用于公共服务设施与土地利用分析。
desc_en: Compiled by MalaGIS, this OSM China province-level vector data covers all 31 provinces and derives from OpenStreetMap. Provided as shapefiles and GeoJSON, its pois.shp includes amenity classes such as hospital, school, police, fire_station and townhall. Widely used in the Chinese GIS community, it follows OSM's ODbL data license, with the author cautioning against commercial use; it suits public-service-facility and land-use analysis.

name: EMODnet Human Activities — full WFS catalogue (wind farms, aggregates, dredging, shipwrecks, pipelines, cables, aquaculture, MPAs)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Marine & coastal | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: Marine human-use vector layers | energy_infrastructure (offshore wind) | MPAs, fishing zones, offshore installations
license_now: NONE (no fees / no access constraints) — 实际数据为 CC-BY
formats: WFS (GML/GeoJSON/Shapefile via GetFeature), bulk SHP via portal
notes: Single endpoint with 50+ vector layers; the canonical EU marine activity vector source.
verify_notes: WFS 端点活跃，60+ 图层。GetCapabilities 中 AccessConstraints=NONE。 | lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: EMODnet 人类活动专题（由欧盟 CINEA 支持）的完整 WFS 服务目录，覆盖欧洲海域，单一端点即提供 50 余个矢量图层，包括风电场、骨料开采、疏浚、沉船、管道、海缆、水产养殖与海洋保护区等。数据可经 WFS 以 GML/GeoJSON/Shapefile 输出，或经门户批量下载，实际为 CC-BY 开放，是欧盟海洋活动矢量的权威来源。
desc_en: The full WFS catalogue of EMODnet Human Activities (supported by the EU's CINEA) covers European seas, exposing over 50 vector layers from a single endpoint, including wind farms, aggregates, dredging, shipwrecks, pipelines, cables, aquaculture and MPAs. Data can be retrieved via WFS as GML/GeoJSON/Shapefile or bulk-downloaded through the portal, effectively under CC-BY. It is the canonical vector source for EU marine human activities.

name: GBIF Maps API v2 - Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT)
theme_raw: Species occurrence density (points/hex/square bins) | biodiversity occurrence density | ISO country filter on vector tiles
notes: Core vector product. Single 'occurrence' layer; objects carry total occurrence counts. Supports density (precalc) and adhoc sources, hex/square binning, taxonKey/year/country filters.
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: GBIF（全球生物多样性信息网络）Maps API v2 的 Mapbox 矢量切片（MVT）服务，提供全球物种出现记录的密度可视化。单一 occurrence 图层中的对象携带出现总数，支持密度（预计算）与即时查询两种数据源、六边形或方格分箱，并可按 taxonKey、year、country 过滤；支持 EPSG:3857、4326 及北极、南极投影。开放的 REST/瓦片 API 无需密钥，遵循 CC-BY 4.0。
desc_en: The GBIF Maps API v2 serves Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT) for global species-occurrence density. A single 'occurrence' layer carries total occurrence counts per object, supporting both precalculated density and ad-hoc sources, hex or square binning, and filters by taxonKey, year and country, across projections including EPSG:3857, 4326 and Arctic/Antarctic LAEA. The open REST/tile API needs no key and follows CC-BY 4.0, enabling biodiversity-pattern mapping.

name: Global Border Crossing Points (WFP SDI-T)
theme_raw: Logistics - border crossings | aid_logistics | Border crossing points used for humanitarian operations
notes: Status field (open/closed/unknown); rarely-cited but valuable for cross-border ops
verify_notes: HDX returns 403 to bot | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 世界粮食计划署（WFP）发布的全球边境口岸点数据，提供全球范围内的边境过境点位，并带有状态字段（开放/关闭/未知）。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 提供，并可经 geonode.wfp.org 的 WFS 获取，采用 CC-BY-IGO 许可。虽较少被引用，但对跨境人道行动与物流规划很有价值。
desc_en: Published by the World Food Programme (WFP), this dataset provides global border crossing points, each carrying a status field (open/closed/unknown). Available as shapefile and GeoJSON and via WFS at geonode.wfp.org under a CC-BY-IGO license, it is rarely cited yet valuable for cross-border humanitarian operations and logistics planning.

name: Global Power Plant Database v1.3.0 (WRI)
theme_raw: Energy / Power plants | Energy infrastructure (points) | energy_infrastructure (generation)
formats: CSV with lat/lon (point vector); also republished as GeoJSON/Shapefile via ArcGIS Hub & Earth Engine
doi_or_citation: Byers et al., 2021. Global Power Plant Database v1.3.0, WRI
notes: Canonical source. Final release Feb 2021; project no longer maintained.
verify_notes: v1.3.0 latest; not actively maintained since 2022 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界资源研究所（WRI）与谷歌合作的全球电厂数据库 v1.3.0，收录 164 个国家约 3 万座发电厂的位置、容量与燃料类型等信息。核心数据为含经纬度的 CSV 点矢量，亦有 GeoJSON/Shapefile 衍生版本，采用 CC-BY 4.0 开放许可。该库是被广泛引用的权威来源，最终版于 2021 年 2 月发布，项目已不再维护。
desc_en: The Global Power Plant Database v1.3.0, from the World Resources Institute and Google, catalogues around 30,000 power plants across 164 countries with location, capacity and fuel type. Its core form is a CSV point vector with lat/lon, also republished as GeoJSON and shapefile, under CC-BY 4.0. A canonical, widely cited source, its final release came in February 2021 and the project is no longer maintained.

name: Mobility Database (GTFS / GTFS-RT / GBFS catalog)
theme_raw: public transit feeds (worldwide GTFS routes, stops, shapes) | Public transit feeds, bike-share feeds | global GTFS aggregator
license: varies per feed; catalog metadata CC0/CC-BY
license_now: 未在首页明示（参考 Terms）
formats: GTFS (text+shapes.txt for line geometries), GTFS-RT, GBFS
feature_count: over 6000 transportation data feeds from over 99 countries
notes: Replaces TransitFeeds. Each feed contains stops (Point) and shapes (LineString) which can be loaded as vectors. Open API at api.mobilitydatabase.org.
verify_notes: 6000+ feeds 来自 99 国，活跃维护 | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 由非营利组织 MobilityData 与美国联邦交通管理局（FTA）维护的 Mobility Database，是全球 GTFS、GTFS-RT、GBFS 公共交通数据源的目录，收录来自 99 多个国家的 6000 余个数据源。它是 TransitFeeds 的继任者，每个 GTFS 源含站点（点）与线路形状（shapes.txt 线要素），可加载为矢量，通过开放 API（api.mobilitydatabase.org）访问，适用于公共交通网络与可达性分析。
desc_en: The Mobility Database, maintained by the non-profit MobilityData with the US FTA, is a global catalog of GTFS, GTFS-RT and GBFS transit feeds, indexing over 6,000 feeds from more than 99 countries. As the successor to TransitFeeds, each GTFS feed contains stops (points) and route shapes (shapes.txt line geometries) loadable as vectors, accessed through an open API at api.mobilitydatabase.org for transit-network and accessibility analysis.

name: OpenCellID — Global cell tower database
theme_raw: telecom infrastructure | Mobile/communication base stations (2G-5G points) | telecom / cell towers
formats: CSV with lat/lon (convertible to GeoJSON/GPKG); World Bank Data Catalog mirror
access: Free with API token; World Bank mirror
notes: ~40M cell tower observations; mirror at https://datacatalog.worldbank.org/search/dataset/0038043
verify_notes: Requires API token; downloads limited to last 18 months | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenCellID（由 Unwired Labs 运营）是全球最大的开放手机基站数据库，含约 4000 万条基站观测记录，覆盖全球。数据以含经纬度的 CSV 提供，可转换为 GeoJSON/GPKG，采用 CC-BY-SA 4.0 许可，需免费 API 令牌下载，世界银行数据目录亦有镜像。适用于通信基础设施、覆盖分析与定位研究。
desc_en: OpenCellID, operated by Unwired Labs, is the largest open database of mobile cell towers, holding around 40 million tower observations worldwide. Distributed as CSV with lat/lon (convertible to GeoJSON/GPKG) under CC-BY-SA 4.0, it requires a free API token to download and is also mirrored in the World Bank Data Catalog. It supports telecom-infrastructure, coverage and geolocation research.

name: Smithsonian Global Volcanism Program – Volcanoes of the World (VOTW)
theme_raw: Holocene + Pleistocene volcanoes (points), eruptions | Volcanoes & eruptions (Holocene + Pleistocene) | volcanoes / eruptions
formats: CSV, GML, GeoJSON, KML, Shapefile via WFS
notes: WFS lets you grab live shapefile/GeoJSON; central reference for volcano locations and eruption history.
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; site likely up but blocks fetcher | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 史密森学会全球火山计划（GVP）的世界火山数据库（VOTW），是全球火山位置与喷发历史的权威参考。数据可通过 API 与 WFS 实时获取，支持 CSV、GML、GeoJSON、KML、Shapefile 等格式，遵循史密森条款（署名后免费再利用）。适用于火山灾害评估、地质研究与喷发历史分析。
desc_en: The Smithsonian Global Volcanism Program's Volcanoes of the World (VOTW) is the central authoritative reference for global volcano locations and eruption history. Data is available live via API and WFS in CSV, GML, GeoJSON, KML and shapefile formats under Smithsonian terms allowing free reuse with attribution. It underpins volcanic-hazard assessment, geological research and eruption-history analysis (GVP 2013).

name: USGS MRDS — Mineral Resources Data System (global mines & prospects)
theme_raw: Mineral occurrences, deposits, prospects (global) | mineral resources / deposits | mineral deposits/occurrences
formats: Shapefile, File GDB, KML, CSV, WFS, WMS
notes: Flagship global point database; ~300k records. WFS endpoint at mrdata.usgs.gov/services/wfs/mrds
verify_notes: USGS 自 2011 起停止系统性更新，但 MRDS 仍开放下载。无 GeoJSON。 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局（USGS）矿产资源数据系统（MRDS），是全球旗舰级的矿山与矿点点数据库，含约 30 万条记录，覆盖全球。数据以 Shapefile、File GDB、KML、CSV 提供，并通过 WFS/WMS OGC 服务发布，属美国公有领域，可开放下载。适用于矿产资源评估、地质勘查与资源空间分析。
desc_en: The USGS Mineral Resources Data System (MRDS) is a flagship global point database of mines and prospects with roughly 300,000 records worldwide. Available as shapefile, File GDB, KML and CSV and served via OGC WFS/WMS, it is in the US public domain with open download. It supports mineral-resource assessment, geological prospecting and resource spatial analysis.

name: World Database on OECMs (WD-OECM)
theme_raw: Other Effective area-based Conservation Measures (polygons + points) | OECMs / conservation | protected_areas_biodiversity
notes: Companion to WDPA; tracks non-PA effective conservation areas (post-Kunming-Montreal GBF target 3)
verify_notes: references WDPA, WD-OECM, ICCA | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 UNEP-WCMC 与 IUCN 维护的世界 OECM 数据库（WD-OECM），是 WDPA 的配套产品，记录正式保护区之外的有效保护地（OECM），现含约 7,488 处，覆盖全球并随 WDPA 每月更新。数据以 Shapefile 和 GDB 提供，可经 Protected Planet 公开下载，与昆明-蒙特利尔全球生物多样性框架目标 3 直接相关。
desc_en: The World Database on OECMs (WD-OECM), maintained by UNEP-WCMC and IUCN, is a companion to the WDPA that tracks Other Effective area-based Conservation Measures beyond formal protected areas, currently around 7,488 globally and released monthly alongside the WDPA. Provided as shapefile and GDB via public download on Protected Planet, it directly informs Target 3 of the Kunming-Montreal Global Biodiversity Framework.

name: Arctic SDI Circumpolar Gazetteer (Place Names)
provider: Arctic SDI (federated: NRCan, GST/SDFI, NLS Finland, NLS Iceland, Kartverket, Rosreestr, Lantmäteriet, USGS)
theme_raw: place names / toponymy | Place names / toponymy (point vector)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://gazetteer.arctic-sdi.org/))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://gazetteer.arctic-sdi.org/))
notes: Federated gazetteer aggregating authoritative place names from the 8 Arctic NMAs.
verify_notes: connection refused | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://gazetteer.arctic-sdi.org/))
desc_zh: 北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic SDI）的环极地地名词典，整合了 8 个北极国家测绘机构（如加拿大 NRCan、芬兰 NLS、挪威 Kartverket、俄罗斯 Rosreestr、瑞典 Lantmäteriet、美国 USGS 等）的权威地名，覆盖北纬约 60 度以北的环极地区。数据通过 JSON 与 WFS Web 服务提供，开放使用并按来源署名，适用于北极制图与地名检索。
desc_en: The Arctic SDI Circumpolar Gazetteer is a federated place-names service aggregating authoritative toponyms from the eight Arctic national mapping agencies (including Canada's NRCan, Finland's NLS, Norway's Kartverket, Russia's Rosreestr, Sweden's Lantmäteriet and the USGS), covering the circumpolar Arctic north of roughly 60°N. Delivered via JSON and WFS web services under open per-source attribution, it supports Arctic cartography and gazetteer lookups.

name: Australian Hydrological Geospatial Fabric (Geofabric) V3 Web Services
provider: Bureau of Meteorology (BoM) + Geoscience Australia + CSIRO
theme_raw: watercourses, water bodies, canals, aquifers, monitoring points, catchments, drainage divisions | Watercourses, waterbodies, canals, aquifers, monitoring points, catchments
notes: Catchment hierarchy: 12 drainage divisions -> 191 river basins -> stream-segment subcatchments. Also exposes aquifer feature classes.
verify_notes: BoM Geofabric V3x, 40+ layers | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳大利亚水文地理要素（Geofabric）V3 Web 服务，由气象局（BoM）联合澳大利亚地球科学局与 CSIRO 制作，覆盖全澳。它构建了分级的流域体系：12 个流域分区 → 191 个河流流域 → 河段级子集水区，并提供含水层要素类。数据通过 ArcGIS MapServer、WMS、WFS 提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，适用于水文建模与流域管理。
desc_en: The Australian Hydrological Geospatial Fabric (Geofabric) V3 web services, produced by the Bureau of Meteorology with Geoscience Australia and CSIRO, cover all of Australia. It encodes a nested catchment hierarchy of 12 drainage divisions, 191 river basins and stream-segment subcatchments, and also exposes aquifer feature classes. Served via ArcGIS MapServer, WMS and WFS under CC-BY 4.0, it supports hydrological modeling and catchment management.

name: CDC PLACES - Local Data for Better Health (Census Tract/ZCTA/County)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Population & socioeconomic | Public services
theme_raw: public health / chronic disease prevalence | small-area health outcomes
notes: Census tract / ZCTA / county / place polygons with 36 health measures.
verify_notes: Folder listing OK | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 美国疾控中心（CDC）PLACES 项目数据，提供全美 50 州及哥伦比亚特区在普查区、ZCTA、县、地方等层级的健康相关测度（共 36 项）。数据为带健康属性的面要素，通过 ArcGIS REST FeatureServer/MapServer 以 GeoJSON、Shapefile 等格式开放获取，属公有领域，适用于公共卫生、健康公平与社区健康分析。
desc_en: CDC PLACES (Local Data for Better Health) provides 36 health measures for the United States (50 states plus DC) at census-tract, ZCTA, county and place levels. Delivered as polygon features with health attributes via ArcGIS REST FeatureServer/MapServer in GeoJSON and shapefile, it is public domain. It supports public-health, health-equity and community-health analysis.

name: CDC Social Determinants of Health (SDOH) Layers
notes: Companion layers to PLACES/SVI used in CDC Data Portal.
verify_notes: lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 美国疾控中心（CDC）健康社会决定因素（SDOH）图层，覆盖全美普查区与县级，是 PLACES、SVI 在 CDC 数据门户中的配套图层。数据以 GeoJSON、Shapefile 通过 ArcGIS REST 服务目录开放获取，属公有领域，适用于健康公平、社会脆弱性与公共服务相关的空间分析。
desc_en: The CDC Social Determinants of Health (SDOH) layers cover the United States at tract and county levels, serving as companion layers to PLACES and the SVI within the CDC Data Portal. Available as GeoJSON and shapefile through an ArcGIS REST services folder and in the public domain, they support health-equity, social-vulnerability and public-service spatial analysis.

name: CnOpenData 全国兴趣点 POI 数据
provider: CnOpenData (清华大学计算社会科学平台合作)
theme_raw: POI / 商业设施 / 停车场 / 充电桩 | public_services POI
license: custom (学术免费样例，全集需申请/付费)
license_now: 未明示 (注册/登录获取, 部分付费)
formats_now: 页面未列出具体文件格式 (CSV/JSON via 申请)
notes: 不严格 open；但被国内经管/社科论文广泛使用；含丰富细分库 (停车场、火锅店、充电桩)
verify_notes: 商业平台, 需注册; 没有明确许可证表述 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CnOpenData（与清华大学计算社会科学平台合作）的全国兴趣点 POI 数据，覆盖中国，含 17 个主要类别并按年度更新，细分库丰富（如停车场、火锅店、充电桩）。数据以 WGS84 Shapefile 与 CSV 提供，需注册/登录获取，部分付费。虽非严格开放，但在国内经管与社科论文中被广泛使用，适用于城市与商业空间研究。
desc_en: CnOpenData's national Points of Interest (POI) data, developed with Tsinghua University's computational social science platform, covers China across 17 major categories with annual updates and rich subcategories (parking lots, hot-pot restaurants, charging stations). Provided as WGS84 shapefile and CSV, it requires registration or login and is partly paid. Not strictly open, it is nonetheless widely used in Chinese economics and social-science research for urban and commercial spatial studies.

name: Comprehensive Vector Dataset of Bus Networks Across China 2024 (Scientific Data 2025) - includes bus-stop POIs as public transport service points
theme_raw: Transport / bus networks | public transport service points
notes: Adjacent public-service category (transit access points); useful when bundling public services.
verify_notes: Nature auth gate via WebFetch; article live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一份覆盖中国299个城市的公交网络综合矢量数据集，发表于《Scientific Data》（2025年）。数据以Shapefile形式提供公交站点、线路及拓扑关系，其中站点可作为公共交通服务点（POI）使用，适合城市可达性分析、公共服务设施评估与多源数据整合。数据采用CC-BY许可，开放获取，反映2024年的公交服务状况。
desc_en: A comprehensive vector dataset of bus networks across 299 Chinese cities, published in Scientific Data (2025). It provides stops, routes and topology as shapefiles, with bus-stop points usable as public-transport service POIs. The data supports urban accessibility analysis, public-service mapping and multi-source data integration. Released under a CC-BY licence with open access, it reflects 2024 transit service conditions.

name: EMODnet Biology — Species Distribution & Abundance vectors
theme_canonical: POI / places | Marine & coastal | Protected areas & biodiversity
theme_raw: marine biodiversity | marine biodiversity / species occurrences
doi_or_citation: EMODnet Biology gridded abundance / occurrence products
feature_count: more than 1,500 thematic biological datasets and an additional 50 data products
notes: Species occurrence points and gridded distribution vectors derived from EurOBIS.
verify_notes: Standards: Darwin Core, OGC, INSPIRE; R packages available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EMODnet Biology 是欧洲海洋观测与数据网络的生物学专题门户，由VLIZ运营，汇集欧洲各海域的物种分布与丰度矢量数据。数据源自EurOBIS，包含物种出现点位与网格化分布产品，提供超过1500个专题数据集及约50个数据产品。支持Shapefile、CSV和WFS访问，适用于海洋生物多样性研究、物种分布建模与生态评估，多数数据开放。
desc_en: EMODnet Biology is the marine biology portal of the European Marine Observation and Data Network, operated by VLIZ. It aggregates species distribution and abundance vectors for European seas, derived from EurOBIS, including occurrence points and gridded distribution products across more than 1,500 thematic datasets and around 50 data products. Available via Shapefile, CSV and WFS, it supports marine biodiversity research, species distribution modelling and ecological assessment, with most data openly accessible.

name: EMODnet Chemistry - Contaminant and eutrophication observation points
theme_raw: marine chemistry observation locations / litter | marine chemistry / contaminants
license_now: Public domain for aggregated products; some restricted
notes: Includes vector layers for beach litter sampling sites and seafloor marine litter.
verify_notes: Sixth phase runs until 2027 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EMODnet Chemistry 是欧洲海洋数据网络的化学专题门户，由OGS牵头的联盟维护，提供欧洲海域污染物与富营养化观测点位数据，时间跨度可追溯至上世纪。数据还包含海滩垃圾采样点和海底海洋垃圾的矢量图层。支持Shapefile、ODV、NetCDF和WFS等格式，聚合产品多为公共领域，适用于海洋环境质量评估与污染监测，部分数据存在使用限制。
desc_en: EMODnet Chemistry is the chemistry portal of the European Marine Observation and Data Network, maintained by a consortium led by OGS. It provides contaminant and eutrophication observation points for European seas, with eutrophication records spanning from the mid-20th century to 2021, plus vector layers for beach-litter sampling sites and seafloor marine litter. Offered as Shapefile, ODV, NetCDF and WFS, aggregated products are largely public domain, supporting marine environmental assessment and pollution monitoring; some layers carry access restrictions.

name: GEM per-country GeoJSON exporter
provider: Open Energy Transition (community wrapper around GEM)
theme_raw: Power plant points by country/status/technology | Energy
notes: Convenient vector export pathway for the GEM tracker layers relevant to BRI power projects.
verify_notes: Web UI at open-energy-transition.github.io/gem_per_country | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Open Energy Transition 社区围绕全球能源监测组织（GEM）数据构建的逐国别GeoJSON导出工具。它将GEM追踪器中的能源资产矢量图层按国家整理输出为GeoJSON，便于快速获取与BRI电力项目相关的地理要素。通过GitHub和网页界面开放访问，继承GEM的CC BY 4.0许可，适合能源基础设施空间分析与数据整合。
desc_en: This is a community-built per-country GeoJSON exporter from Open Energy Transition, wrapping Global Energy Monitor (GEM) tracker data. It organises GEM energy-asset vector layers by country and exports them as GeoJSON, offering a convenient pathway to features relevant to BRI power projects. Accessible via GitHub and a web UI and inheriting GEM's CC BY 4.0 licence, it suits energy-infrastructure spatial analysis and data integration.

name: Geoscience Data Repository for Geophysical Data (GDR)
provider: Natural Resources Canada – Earth Sciences Sector
theme_canonical: POI / places | Marine & coastal | Physical geography (natural earth)
theme_raw: aeromagnetic, gravity, borehole, geochemistry, marine geosciences
formats: mixed; vector point/line datasets via GDRDAP downloads
notes: ~9,000+ datasets; mainly geophysics but includes vector survey lines, station points. Portal: http://gdr.agg.nrcan.gc.ca/
splink_merged_from: Geoscience Data Repository for Geophysical Data (GDR - NRCan)
verify_notes: NRCan Geoscience Data Repository | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 地球科学数据库（GDR）由加拿大自然资源部地球科学部门运营，主要收录加拿大的地球物理数据，并包含部分矢量调查线和测站点位等要素。该库通过GDRDAP下载平台提供约9000多个数据集，遵循加拿大政府使用条款开放获取。适合加拿大区域的地球物理与地学综合研究、数据发现与检索。
desc_en: The Geoscience Data Repository (GDR), operated by Natural Resources Canada's Earth Sciences Sector, mainly holds geophysical data for Canada and also includes vector survey lines and station points. Offering roughly 9,000 datasets through the GDRDAP download platform under Government of Canada terms, it supports geophysical and geoscientific research, data discovery and retrieval across Canada.

name: Global Border Crossing Points (wld_poi_bcp_wfp)
theme_raw: humanitarian POI - border crossings | Border crossings (humanitarian POIs)
notes: Status (open/closed/unknown) of border crossings used for humanitarian operations.
verify_notes: WFP GeoNode timed out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 全球边境口岸点（Global Border Crossing Points）由世界粮食计划署（WFP）物流集群维护，是一套全球范围的边境口岸矢量点数据，记录各口岸的状态（开放/关闭/未知）。数据通过GeoNode开放获取，提供Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML和WFS等格式，主要服务于人道主义物流操作、跨境运输规划与应急响应分析。
desc_en: Global Border Crossing Points is a worldwide vector point dataset maintained by the WFP Logistics Cluster, recording the status (open/closed/unknown) of border crossings used in humanitarian operations. Distributed openly via GeoNode as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and WFS, it supports humanitarian logistics, cross-border transport planning and emergency-response analysis.

name: Global Energy Monitor — Global Integrated Power Tracker (GIPT)
theme_raw: Energy infrastructure / power plants (points) | Energy / Power plants (all fuels)
coverage: Global; cited as one of six upstream sources reviewed in BRI Energy Investments 2013-2023 dataset
license_now: not stated on page (GEM general CC BY 4.0)
doi_or_citation: Global Energy Monitor, Global Integrated Power Tracker (2024-2026 releases)
notes: GEM trackers (coal, gas, oil, solar, wind, hydropower, nuclear, bioenergy, geothermal) provide geocoded vector point data for power assets used to validate BRI projects.
verify_notes: Download-data subpage 404; data now under main project page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球综合电力追踪器（GIPT）由全球能源监测组织（GEM）维护，整合煤炭、天然气、石油、太阳能、风能、水电、核能、生物质和地热等多种电力资产的地理编码矢量点数据，覆盖全球。提供GeoJSON、含经纬度的CSV和KMZ格式，免费注册即可下载。该数据被广泛用于电力基础设施分析及BRI能源投资项目的验证。
desc_en: The Global Integrated Power Tracker (GIPT), maintained by Global Energy Monitor (GEM), consolidates geocoded vector point data for power assets spanning coal, gas, oil, solar, wind, hydropower, nuclear, bioenergy and geothermal worldwide. Available as GeoJSON, CSV with lat/lon and KMZ, it is openly downloadable after free registration. The tracker is widely used for power-infrastructure analysis and for validating BRI energy-investment projects.

name: Global Ports (wld_trs_ports_wfp)
theme_raw: transport POI - ports | transport / maritime ports
notes: Maintained with partner inputs through Logistics Cluster and Logistics Capacity Assessment.
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out; WFP GeoNode often slow/unreachable | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 全球港口（Global Ports）由世界粮食计划署（WFP）物流集群维护，是一套全球港口矢量点数据，通过物流集群和物流能力评估（LCA）的合作伙伴输入持续更新。数据经GeoNode开放获取，提供Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML和WFS格式，适用于人道主义物流、海运基础设施分析与全球供应链研究。
desc_en: Global Ports is a worldwide vector point dataset of seaports maintained by the WFP Logistics Cluster, kept current through partner inputs via the Logistics Cluster and Logistics Capacity Assessment. Available openly through GeoNode as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and WFS, it supports humanitarian logistics, maritime-infrastructure analysis and global supply-chain research.

name: Global Solar Power Tracker (GEM)
theme_raw: Energy / Solar | Utility-scale solar plants (point vector)
license_now: CC BY 4.0 (some records CC BY-NC 4.0 from TransitionZero)
feature_count: 103,940 solar farm phases tracked; 2,093 GW AC operating; 31 countries/areas (distributed solar)
verify_notes: February 2026 release; mixed license caveat for non-commercial subset | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球太阳能电力追踪器由全球能源监测组织（GEM）维护，覆盖全球装机容量不低于1兆瓦的公用事业级太阳能电站。2026年2月发布的版本追踪了约103,940个太阳能项目阶段、合计2,093吉瓦（AC）的运营容量。数据以Excel和GeoJSON格式提供，可通过网页下载，主要采用CC BY 4.0许可，适合可再生能源空间分析与能源转型研究。
desc_en: The Global Solar Power Tracker, maintained by Global Energy Monitor, covers utility-scale solar facilities of at least 1 MW worldwide. Its February 2026 release tracks about 103,940 solar farm phases totalling 2,093 GW AC of operating capacity. Offered as Excel and GeoJSON via web download and licensed mainly under CC BY 4.0 (some records CC BY-NC), it supports renewable-energy spatial analysis and energy-transition research.

name: GOODD (Global geOreferenced Database of Dams)
provider: Mulligan et al. / Global Dam Watch
license_now: Open (no explicit CC tag on landing page); cf. Nature Sci Data publication
notes: Point-only dam locations; cited in CRD intro as global benchmark.
splink_merged_from: GOODD - Global geOreferenced Database of Dams
verify_notes: GOODD has been superseded by GDW database; raw download still available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GOODD（全球地理参考大坝数据库）由Mulligan等人编制并通过Global Dam Watch发布，收录全球约38,000座大坝的位置点数据。数据以Shapefile点要素形式提供，仅含坝址位置，是全球大坝研究的基准数据集之一，开放获取，适用于水资源、水文连通性与河流碎片化分析，相关方法发表于《Nature Scientific Data》（2020）。
desc_en: GOODD (Global geOreferenced Database of Dams), compiled by Mulligan et al. and distributed via Global Dam Watch, records the locations of roughly 38,000 dams worldwide. Provided as point shapefiles giving dam positions only, it is a widely cited global benchmark, openly available and useful for water-resource, hydrological-connectivity and river-fragmentation analysis, with methods published in Nature Scientific Data (2020).

name: GRanD v1.01 Dams (points)
notes: Dam points with attributes (height, year, primary use). Pairs with reservoir polygons.
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout (60s) | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GRanD v1.01 大坝点数据由NASA SEDAC发布，是全球水库与大坝数据库的点矢量部分，提供坝点及高度、建成年份、主要用途等属性。数据为Esri Shapefile点格式，通过HTTPS并需Earthdata登录获取，采用CC BY-NC-SA许可。可与水库多边形配套使用，适用于全球水文、水资源管理与水库蓄水研究。
desc_en: GRanD v1.01 Dams, released by NASA SEDAC, is the point-vector component of the Global Reservoir and Dam database, providing dam points with attributes such as height, construction year and primary use. Distributed as Esri point shapefiles via HTTPS with Earthdata Login under a CC BY-NC-SA licence, it pairs with reservoir polygons and supports global hydrology, water-resource management and reservoir studies.

name: GRanD v1.3 - Global Reservoir and Dam Database
theme_raw: reservoirs (polygons) and dams (points) | reservoir polygons + dam points
notes: Cited dam/reservoir vector inventory.
verify_notes: GRanD v1.1 superseded by GDW; v1.3 has 7,320 records | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GRanD v1.3（全球水库与大坝数据库）由GRanD/GWSP/SEDAC团队维护，收录全球7,320余座大坝与水库的矢量记录，是被广泛引用的大坝与水库清单。数据以Shapefile形式通过SEDAC开放获取，核心方法发表于Lehner等人（2011）。适用于全球水文建模、水资源评估与水库蓄水分析，使用时需留意其免责声明。
desc_en: GRanD v1.3 (Global Reservoir and Dam Database), maintained by the GRanD/GWSP/SEDAC team, contains over 7,320 vector records of dams and reservoirs and is a widely cited dam-and-reservoir inventory. Distributed as shapefiles openly via SEDAC, with core methods published by Lehner et al. (2011), it supports global hydrological modelling, water-resource assessment and reservoir analysis; note its accompanying disclaimer.

name: GRIP global roads database (FAO catalog mirror)
license_now: ODbL (Open Data Commons Open Database License 1.0)
notes: Alternative access point with WMS/WFS exposure
verify_notes: Updated 2025-11-12; note license now ODbL not CC0 | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 这是全球道路清查项目（GRIP）数据库在粮农组织（FAO）Hand-in-Hand地理空间平台上的镜像入口。GRIP是一套全球道路矢量数据集，提供分级道路网络，并通过WMS/WFS服务暴露。数据采用ODbL开放数据库许可，开放获取，核心方法见Meijer等人（2018）。适用于全球交通可达性、基础设施规划与碎片化分析。
desc_en: This is a mirror of the Global Roads Inventory Project (GRIP) database on FAO's Hand-in-Hand Geospatial Platform. GRIP is a global vector road dataset providing a classified road network, here exposed via WMS/WFS services. Released under the ODbL open database licence with open access and based on Meijer et al. (2018), it supports global transport-accessibility, infrastructure-planning and fragmentation analysis.

name: HIFLD Fire and EMS Stations
notes: Point locations of fire & EMS stations; discontinued 2025 but mirrors and federal crosswalk available.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub page reachable; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HIFLD 消防与急救站数据由美国国土安全部HIFLD项目发布，提供全美消防站和急救服务站的点位数据。数据格式包括GeoJSON、Shapefile、KML、CSV和WFS，属公共领域，开放获取。该数据集于2025年停止维护，但仍有镜像和联邦数据源映射可用，适用于应急服务规划与公共安全分析。
desc_en: HIFLD Fire and EMS Stations, published by the U.S. Department of Homeland Security's HIFLD program, provides point locations of fire and emergency-medical-service stations across the United States. Available as GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, CSV and WFS in the public domain, the dataset was discontinued in 2025 but remains accessible via mirrors and a federal-source crosswalk, supporting emergency-service planning and public-safety analysis.

name: HIFLD Local Law Enforcement Locations
notes: Point dataset of municipal/county police HQs and substations.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub page JS-rendered; not extractable by WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HIFLD 地方执法机构位置数据由美国国土安全部HIFLD项目发布，提供全美市县级警察总部及分局的点位数据。数据以Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV格式开放下载，也可通过FeatureServer访问。适用于公共安全、应急响应规划与城市治理分析，是研究美国执法设施分布的常用矢量数据来源。
desc_en: HIFLD Local Law Enforcement Locations, published by the U.S. DHS HIFLD program, provides point locations of municipal and county police headquarters and substations across the United States. Available openly as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and CSV, and via a FeatureServer, it supports public-safety, emergency-response planning and urban-governance analysis as a common source on U.S. law-enforcement facilities.

name: HIFLD Open Data - Hospitals
formats: GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, CSV, WFS, WMS, GeoServices
notes: HIFLD Open was discontinued ~Sept 30, 2025; crosswalk to federal source services published; legacy mirrors still widely available.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub page JS-rendered; not extractable by WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HIFLD 医院数据由美国国土安全部HIFLD项目发布，提供全美医院的点位信息，属公共领域。数据支持GeoJSON、Shapefile、KML、CSV、WFS、WMS等多种格式与服务。HIFLD Open门户于2025年9月底停止维护，并发布了到联邦数据源的映射，但遗留镜像仍广泛可用。适用于公共卫生、医疗可达性与应急规划分析。
desc_en: HIFLD Open Data Hospitals, published by the U.S. DHS HIFLD program, provides point locations of hospitals across the United States in the public domain. It is available in formats and services including GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, CSV, WFS and WMS. The HIFLD Open portal was discontinued around 30 September 2025 with a crosswalk to federal sources, though legacy mirrors remain widely available, supporting public-health, healthcare-accessibility and emergency-planning analysis.

name: LINZ Data Service
theme_raw: Topo, cadastre, hydro, place names | 地形、地籍、水文、地名
notes: 新西兰权威开放矢量门户
verify_notes: LINZ Data Service landing reachable; full content not extracted by WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: LINZ Data Service 是新西兰土地信息局（LINZ）运营的权威开放矢量数据门户，提供新西兰的地形、水文、地籍、地名等多类地理空间数据。支持Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON、KML及WFS、OGC API等多种访问方式，采用CC-BY 4.0新西兰许可，开放获取。是研究新西兰国土信息与制图应用的核心数据平台。
desc_en: The LINZ Data Service is the authoritative open vector data portal run by Land Information New Zealand, providing topographic, hydrographic, cadastral, place-name and other geospatial data for New Zealand. Accessible via Shapefile, GeoPackage, GeoJSON, KML and WFS/OGC API formats under a CC-BY 4.0 NZ licence with open access, it is a core platform for New Zealand land-information and mapping applications.

name: NHC GIS - Hurricane Forecast Cone / Wind Radii / Best Track
theme_raw: Active TC forecast geometries (cone, track, wind swath) | tropical cyclone
coverage: Atlantic + East/Central Pacific basins; real-time, every 3-6 h
formats: Shapefile (zip), KML/KMZ, also via ArcGIS MapServer
notes: Layers: forecast points/track/cone, best-track wind swath, 34/50/64-kt wind radii, surface wind field. KMZ aggregator at /gis/kml/nhc.kmz.
verify_notes: Redirects to trailing slash. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NOAA国家飓风中心（NHC）GIS数据提供飓风预报锥、风圈半径和最佳路径等矢量产品，覆盖大西洋及东/中太平洋海域，实时更新（每3至6小时）。图层包括预报点/路径/锥、最佳路径风场扫描带及34/50/64节风圈半径等。数据为公共领域，提供Shapefile、KML/KMZ格式，并可通过HTTP、RSS和ArcGIS REST访问，适用于热带气旋监测与风险评估。
desc_en: NOAA National Hurricane Center (NHC) GIS data provides vector products including the forecast cone, wind radii and best track, covering the Atlantic and East/Central Pacific basins with real-time updates every 3-6 hours. Layers include forecast points, track and cone, best-track wind swaths and 34/50/64-kt wind radii. Public domain and offered as zipped Shapefile and KML/KMZ via HTTP, RSS feeds and ArcGIS REST, it supports tropical-cyclone monitoring and risk assessment.

name: NOAA IBTrACS v4 (tropical cyclone tracks)
theme_raw: International Best Track Archive for Climate Stewardship — cyclone tracks/points
notes: Cyclone vector layer; HURDAT2 Atlantic/Pacific are the US-only siblings.
verify_notes: Last updated May 2024; tropical cyclone tracks | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NOAA IBTrACS v4 是国际热带气旋最佳路径档案，由NOAA NCEI维护，覆盖全球，时间跨度自1841年至今。数据以沿气旋路径的点要素集（FeatureCollection）形式提供，属公共领域。该数据集整合多个机构的最佳路径记录，是全球热带气旋研究的权威矢量数据源，适用于气候、灾害与风险分析。
desc_en: NOAA IBTrACS v4 is the International Best Track Archive for Climate Stewardship, maintained by NOAA NCEI, covering tropical cyclones worldwide from 1841 to the present. Provided as a FeatureCollection of points along cyclone tracks in the public domain, it consolidates best-track records from multiple agencies and is the authoritative global cyclone vector source for climate, hazard and risk analysis (HURDAT2 covers the U.S. Atlantic/Pacific siblings).

name: openpoiservice (HeiGIT POI service)
theme_raw: POI vector data derived from OSM | POI
file_size: Planet: 128 GB RAM; Europe: 32 GB; Germany: 8 GB
notes: Companion vector POI service to openrouteservice
verify_notes: Active; 195 stars; OSM-derived POI db | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: openpoiservice 是海德堡大学GIScience团队（HeiGIT）开发的POI服务，基于OpenStreetMap数据，提供全球范围的兴趣点查询。它是openrouteservice的配套矢量POI服务，可自托管或通过HeiGIT API使用，采用Apache-2.0开源许可，基于PostGIS并提供GeoJSON API。自托管时全球数据需约128GB内存，适用于路线规划、可达性分析与位置服务开发。
desc_en: openpoiservice is a POI service developed by HeiGIT / GIScience Heidelberg, built on OpenStreetMap data to provide global points-of-interest queries. A companion vector POI service to openrouteservice, it can be self-hosted or used via the HeiGIT API under an Apache-2.0 licence, backed by PostGIS with a GeoJSON API. Self-hosting the full planet requires around 128 GB RAM; it supports routing, accessibility analysis and location-based service development.

name: OSM2POI Categorical Datasets (per-region academic supplements)
provider: Various Data-in-Brief / Earth Science Informatics authors
notes: Cluster of supplement datasets (Thailand 7,213 subdistricts; UK Overture; European hex). Pattern emerging in Data-in-Brief / Sci Data.
verify_notes: Elsevier blocks WebFetch; URL likely live in browser | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 这是一组来自《Data in Brief》《Earth Science Informatics》等期刊的OSM2POI分类数据集学术补充材料，由多位作者编制，覆盖特定区域（如欧洲、泰国分区等）。数据基于OpenStreetMap提取并分类，提供GeoPackage、CSV或Shapefile格式，多采用CC-BY-4.0许可。适用于区域POI分布研究、城市功能分析与设施可达性评估。
desc_en: This is a cluster of OSM2POI categorical dataset supplements from journals such as Data in Brief and Earth Science Informatics, compiled by various authors and covering specific regions (e.g., Europe, Thai subdistricts). Extracted and categorised from OpenStreetMap and provided as GeoPackage, CSV or Shapefile mostly under CC-BY-4.0, they support regional POI-distribution studies, urban-function analysis and facility-accessibility assessment.

name: OurAirports - Runways
theme_raw: transportation / aviation infrastructure | transportation / airport runways
formats: CSV (line vector via runway endpoint lat/lon pairs)
notes: Includes length, width, surface, lighting, LE/HE lat/lon/elev/heading/displaced threshold.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OurAirports 跑道数据提供全球机场跑道信息，含两端经纬度坐标，可作为线矢量使用。属性涵盖跑道长度、宽度、地面材质、照明，以及两端的经纬度、高程、航向和移位入口等。数据为公共领域，以CSV格式每日更新，开放获取，适用于航空基础设施分析、机场建模与全球航运研究。
desc_en: OurAirports Runways provides global airport runway data with endpoint coordinates, usable as line vectors. Attributes include runway length, width, surface and lighting, plus the lat/lon, elevation, heading and displaced threshold of each end. Public domain and distributed as CSV with daily updates and open access, it supports aviation-infrastructure analysis, airport modelling and global air-transport research.

name: OurAirports — airport-frequencies.csv
theme_raw: aviation radio frequencies per airport | aviation communications
coverage: Global; joins to airports.csv by airport_ref/airport_ident
formats: CSV (attribute table; geometry via airport join)
feature_count: likely 10,000+ records (IDs into the hundreds of thousands)
notes: Non-spatial alone; becomes point vector when joined to airports
verify_notes: CSV reachable; columns id, airport_ref, airport_ident, type, description, frequency_mhz. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OurAirports 机场频率数据提供全球机场的无线电通信频率信息，通过airport_ref/airport_ident字段与airports.csv关联。该表本身为非空间数据，但与机场点位连接后即可转为点矢量。数据为公共领域，以CSV格式通过HTTPS开放获取，适用于航空通信分析、机场属性整合与航运研究。
desc_en: OurAirports airport-frequencies.csv provides radio communication frequencies for airports worldwide, joining to airports.csv via airport_ref/airport_ident. The table is non-spatial on its own but becomes a point vector once joined to airport locations. Public domain and distributed as CSV over open HTTPS, it supports aviation-communication analysis, airport-attribute integration and air-transport research.

name: poi86 / Tailuo 第三方 POI 库 (高德/百度 镜像)
theme_raw: POI / 建筑轮廓 / 路网 | public_services POI
license: unknown (非官方再分发，部分付费)
license_now: 未明示, 数据来源含网络与网友标注
time_span: 2026年POI数据库, 每天持续更新
notes: 灰色地带数据，但 CSDN/知乎教程中频繁出现；可作为线索但 license 不明，不推荐严肃研究
verify_notes: License remains unstated; recommend caution for commercial use | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: poi86（太乐地图）是一个第三方POI数据库，镜像高德、百度等来源的中国兴趣点数据，号称持续每日更新（如北京约400万条）。提供CSV、Shapefile、Excel格式，需注册获取。其数据来源含网络与网友标注，许可不明、处于灰色地带，常见于教程类内容，可作为线索参考，但不推荐用于严肃研究。
desc_en: poi86 (Tailuo / arctiler) is a third-party POI database mirroring Chinese points-of-interest from sources such as Amap and Baidu, claiming continuous daily updates (e.g., around 4 million records for Beijing). It offers CSV, Shapefile and Excel with registration required. Its data origins include web scraping and crowd labelling, and with an unstated licence it sits in a grey area; it may serve as a lead but is not recommended for serious research.

name: U.S. Wind Turbine Database (USWTDB)
formats: Shapefile, GeoJSON, CSV, WFS, WMS, ArcGIS REST
feature_count: 48,956 wind turbines (2014 USGS source); 43,827 (2017 LBNL source)
notes: Individual turbine points with technical specs; updated quarterly.
verify_notes: USWTDB downloads remain active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国风力涡轮机数据库（USWTDB）由USGS、LBNL和DOE联合维护，提供美国（含海上）每台风力涡轮机的点位及技术参数。数据为公共领域，提供Shapefile、GeoJSON、CSV、WFS、WMS和ArcGIS REST等多种格式，季度更新。可通过直接下载、ArcGIS Hub和WFS访问，适用于可再生能源空间分析、风电规划与基础设施研究。
desc_en: The U.S. Wind Turbine Database (USWTDB), jointly maintained by USGS, LBNL and DOE, provides point locations and technical specifications for individual wind turbines across the United States, including offshore. Public domain and available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, CSV, WFS, WMS and ArcGIS REST with quarterly updates, it is accessible via direct download, ArcGIS Hub and WFS, supporting renewable-energy spatial analysis, wind-power planning and infrastructure research.

name: UNHCR Geoservices / GIS Core Database
theme_raw: Refugee camps, settlements, sites, people-of-concern locations | refugees
notes: Authoritative live feed for camp/settlement polygons & points; ODP portal at data.unhcr.org/en/geoservices/
verify_notes: UNHCR GIS Core Database Export Tool; recommends API over static downloads | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UNHCR Geoservices（GIS核心数据库）由联合国难民署维护，覆盖全球难民接纳国，提供难民营、安置点的多边形与点位等核心地理数据。数据以GeoJSON、CSV及REST/WFS服务形式开放，采用CC-BY 4.0许可，提供开放API和导出工具。是难民与流离失所人口空间研究的权威实时数据源。
desc_en: UNHCR Geoservices (GIS Core Database), maintained by UNHCR, covers refugee-hosting countries worldwide, providing core geographic data including camp and settlement polygons and points. Offered openly as GeoJSON, CSV and REST/WFS services under a CC-BY 4.0 licence with an open API and export tool, it is an authoritative live source for refugee and displacement spatial research.

name: USFS Forest Inventory and Analysis (fia)
provider: Microsoft Planetary Computer / USDA Forest Service
theme_canonical: POI / places | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Forest plots, conditions, trees, growth/mortality | Forestry / plots
access: STAC API; per-table GeoParquet assets in Azure
notes: Underused; point vector data joinable to tabular tree-level tables.
verify_notes: FIA dataset page on Planetary Computer reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国林务局森林资源清查与分析（FIA）数据通过微软Planetary Computer提供，覆盖美国全境，是USDA林务局的权威森林样地数据。数据以GeoParquet格式提供点要素及可连接的表格化树木级数据，通过STAC API访问，存储于Azure，属公共领域。该数据相对未被充分利用，适用于森林资源评估、碳储量与土地覆盖研究。
desc_en: USFS Forest Inventory and Analysis (FIA) data, served via Microsoft Planetary Computer, covers the United States as the USDA Forest Service's authoritative forest-plot dataset. Provided as GeoParquet point features joinable to tabular tree-level tables, accessed through a STAC API with assets in Azure and in the public domain, it is somewhat underused and supports forest-resource assessment, carbon-stock estimation and land-cover research.

name: WHO Geolocated Health Facilities Data (GHFD) initiative
theme_raw: National Health Facility Master Lists (HFML) | POI (health facilities)
formats: Country HFMLs typically published as CSV/GeoJSON/Shapefile via national MoH portals
notes: Global directory still in build-out; useful as a discovery index to national MoH vector datasets.
verify_notes: Active WHO initiative page; format/license details deferred to linked resources | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界卫生组织地理定位卫生设施数据（GHFD）倡议旨在汇集194个成员国的卫生设施位置数据，目前仍在滚动建设中，已有超过50家合作伙伴参与。该平台更像一个发现索引，指向各国卫生部门发布的设施主清单（HFML），后者通常以CSV、GeoJSON或Shapefile形式提供。适用于全球卫生设施可达性研究与数据发现，许可因来源而异。
desc_en: The WHO Geolocated Health Facilities Data (GHFD) initiative aims to compile health-facility locations across 194 Member States and is still being built out on a rolling basis, with more than 50 partners involved. It functions largely as a discovery index pointing to national Ministry-of-Health master facility lists, typically published as CSV, GeoJSON or Shapefile. It supports global health-facility accessibility research and data discovery, with licensing varying by source.

name: World-POI (Foursquare + OSM integrated)
theme_raw: Global POI enriched from FSQ + OSM | POI tabular + graph
notes: Methodology paper integrating FSQ commercial POIs with OSM metadata
verify_notes: World-POI Foursquare+OSM fusion, Oct 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: World-POI 是一项学术数据集（arXiv:2510.21342），整合了Foursquare商业POI与OpenStreetMap元数据，覆盖全球。数据以表格与图结构形式提供（CSV/Parquet，几何为点），规模约1TB，采用CC BY-NC-SA 4.0许可，随论文开放。适用于大规模POI建模、地点表征学习与多源POI数据融合方法研究。
desc_en: World-POI is an academic dataset (arXiv:2510.21342) integrating Foursquare commercial POIs with OpenStreetMap metadata at global scale. Provided in tabular and graph form (CSV/Parquet with point geometry) at around 1 TB under a CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 licence and released with the paper, it supports large-scale POI modelling, place representation learning and research into multi-source POI fusion methods.

name: A standardized European hexagon gridded dataset based on OpenStreetMap POIs (McCarty & Kim, Data in Brief 2023; data on Zenodo)
theme_raw: multi-amenity POI (health, education, emergency services, social)
formats_now: QGIS project (.qgz), OSM PBF, ZIP archives, Jupyter notebooks, hexagon grid
notes: OSM amenity categories include schools, hospitals, clinics, fire/police, social facilities.
verify_notes: European hexagon POI dataset; 37.8GB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一套基于OpenStreetMap POI构建的标准化欧洲六边形网格数据集（McCarty & Kim，《Data in Brief》2023，托管于Zenodo），覆盖欧洲大陆。数据以GeoPackage格式提供5至8级六边形分辨率，OSM设施类别涵盖学校、医院、诊所、消防/警察及社会服务设施等。采用CC-BY-4.0许可，规模约37.8GB，适用于区域服务可达性与城市功能网格分析。
desc_en: This is a standardized European hexagon gridded dataset built from OpenStreetMap POIs (McCarty & Kim, Data in Brief 2023, hosted on Zenodo), covering continental Europe. Provided as GeoPackage at hex resolutions 5-8, its OSM amenity categories include schools, hospitals, clinics, fire and police stations and social facilities. Released under CC-BY-4.0 at about 37.8 GB, it supports regional service-accessibility and gridded urban-function analysis.

name: ABS ASGS Geospatial Web Services (Mesh Blocks, SA1-SA4, LGA)
theme_raw: Statistical geography (ASGS Edition 3): MB, SA1, SA2, SA3, SA4, GCCSA, LGA, SAL
formats: ArcGIS REST FeatureServer (JSON, geoJSON, PBF), Shapefile, GeoPackage
formats_now: ArcGIS REST/SOAP; ASGS 2011-2025, ASGC, SEIFA2016, Commuting2016
notes: Three flavours: full, generalised (~2.5m), point. CC-BY makes it one of cleanest licences globally.
verify_notes: ASGS已发布2025版 | lychee:200 OK
