desc_zh: 澳大利亚统计局（ABS）ASGS地理空间网络服务提供澳大利亚的统计地理边界，包括网格块（Mesh Blocks）、SA1至SA4统计区和地方政府区（LGA）等。数据通过ArcGIS REST FeatureServer（JSON、GeoJSON、PBF）及Shapefile、GeoPackage提供，含完整、概化和点位三种形式，覆盖ASGS 2011-2025及ASGC等多版本。采用CC-BY-4.0许可，是全球许可最清晰的统计地理数据之一。
desc_en: The Australian Bureau of Statistics (ABS) ASGS Geospatial Web Services provide Australia's statistical geography boundaries, including Mesh Blocks, SA1-SA4 statistical areas and Local Government Areas. Served via ArcGIS REST FeatureServer (JSON, GeoJSON, PBF) plus Shapefile and GeoPackage in full, generalised and point flavours, covering multiple editions from ASGS 2011-2025 and ASGC. Released under CC-BY-4.0, it is among the cleanest-licensed statistical geographies globally.

name: ACLED - Armed Conflict Location & Event Data on HDX
license: ACLED Terms of Use (free with registration)
formats: CSV with coordinates, Shapefile (per region), API
notes: Native portal acleddata.com Data Export Tool also offers shapefiles
verify_notes: HDX returns 403 to bot | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: ACLED（武装冲突地点与事件数据）在HDX人道主义数据交换平台上发布，覆盖全球200多个国家并实时更新。数据记录带坐标的冲突事件，提供含经纬度的CSV、分区域Shapefile和API，免费注册即可获取，遵循ACLED使用条款。是冲突、安全与人道主义研究的权威事件级矢量数据源。
desc_en: ACLED (Armed Conflict Location & Event Data) is published on the HDX humanitarian data exchange, covering 200+ countries worldwide with real-time updates. It records geolocated conflict events and is offered as CSV with coordinates, per-region Shapefiles and an API, free with registration under ACLED's terms of use. It is an authoritative event-level vector source for conflict, security and humanitarian research.

name: AEI–Heritage China Global Investment Tracker (CGIT)
theme_raw: Chinese overseas investments and construction contracts (energy subset)
formats: Excel; tabular with country/location attributes (geocodable to point vectors)
notes: Primary source #3; tabular but routinely geocoded into point vectors in BRI studies.
verify_notes: Reflects 2025 figures | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: AEI-Heritage 中国全球投资追踪器（CGIT）由美国企业研究所（AEI）维护，记录2005年至今中国在全球的对外投资与建设项目，含国家和地点属性。数据以Excel表格形式提供，本质为表格数据，但可按地点地理编码为点矢量，在BRI研究中被广泛使用。公开可用，需正确引用，适用于中国海外投资与基础设施空间分析。
desc_en: The AEI-Heritage China Global Investment Tracker (CGIT), maintained by the American Enterprise Institute, records China's outbound investment and construction projects worldwide from 2005 to the present, with country and location attributes. Provided as Excel and inherently tabular, it is routinely geocoded into point vectors in BRI studies. Publicly available with proper citation required, it supports analysis of Chinese overseas investment and infrastructure.

name: AidData Global Chinese Development Finance Dataset, Version 3.0 (GeoCoded supplement)
theme_raw: Chinese overseas development finance projects (with geocoded subset)
coverage: Global Chinese overseas finance 2000-2021/23; primary source #1 of the BRI dataset
formats: CSV/Excel; GeoCoded subset published as shapefile/GeoJSON via AidData GeoQuery & GitHub
notes: Geocoded subset (point vector) is open; full tabular core is the primary input source 'AidData' for the BRI paper.
verify_notes: v3.0 published Nov 2023; geospatial supplement June 2024 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: AidData 全球中国发展融资数据集3.0版由威廉玛丽学院AidData团队编制，记录2000年至2021/23年中国海外发展融资项目，是BRI相关研究的核心数据源之一。核心以CSV/Excel提供，其地理编码子集通过AidData GeoQuery和GitHub以Shapefile/GeoJSON形式开放。地理编码点矢量子集开放获取，适用于中国海外融资与援助项目空间分析。
desc_en: AidData's Global Chinese Development Finance Dataset, Version 3.0, compiled by AidData at William & Mary, records Chinese overseas development finance from 2000 to 2021/23 and is a core source for BRI-related research. Its tabular core is provided as CSV/Excel, while a geocoded subset is openly published as shapefile/GeoJSON via AidData GeoQuery and GitHub. The geocoded point-vector subset is open and supports spatial analysis of Chinese overseas finance and aid projects.

name: Arctic SDI Metadata Catalogue
theme_raw: Metadata catalogue (CSW) indexing vector layers from partners
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://catalog.arctic-sdi.org/))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://catalog.arctic-sdi.org/))
notes: Entry point for discovering partner WFS/WMS endpoints.
verify_notes: lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://catalog.arctic-sdi.org/))
desc_zh: Arctic SDI 元数据目录由北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic SDI）运营，覆盖泛北极区域，是发现各成员国WFS/WMS服务端点的入口。数据以ISO 19139元数据标准提供，可通过CSW协议和网页搜索界面检索，开放获取。适用于北极地理空间数据发现、跨国数据整合与极地区域研究。
desc_en: The Arctic SDI Metadata Catalogue, operated by the Arctic Spatial Data Infrastructure, covers the pan-Arctic region and serves as an entry point for discovering partner WFS/WMS endpoints. Provided as ISO 19139 metadata and searchable via CSW and a web UI with open access, it supports Arctic geospatial data discovery, cross-national data integration and polar research.

name: ATSDR Environmental Database (hazardous sites)
notes: Point database of ATSDR-tracked toxic substance sites.
verify_notes: MapServer subpath 404; folder exists | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 美国毒物与疾病登记署(ATSDR)环境数据库的地理空间服务，以点要素形式记录其追踪的有毒物质相关场地。覆盖美国全境，通过 ArcGIS REST MapServer 提供 FeatureServer 点图层并可导出 GeoJSON。数据为公有领域(Public Domain)，可自由使用。适用于环境健康评估、有害场地空间分布分析及与人口、社区数据的叠加研究，是公共卫生与环境正义研究的有用基础数据。
desc_en: Geospatial service for the U.S. ATSDR Environmental Database, publishing point features for hazardous-substance sites the agency tracks. It covers the entire United States and is served through an ArcGIS REST MapServer as a point FeatureServer, with GeoJSON export available. The data is in the public domain and freely reusable. It is well suited to environmental-health assessment, mapping the spatial distribution of toxic sites, and overlay analysis with population or community data for public-health and environmental-justice research.

name: AURIN Data Catalogue (Australia socio-econ)
provider: Australian Urban Research Infrastructure Network (Univ. Melbourne)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Population & socioeconomic | Public services
theme_raw: SEIFA disadvantage indices, ABS socio-econ, health, journey-to-work, hospitals - many keyed to SA1/SA2/Mesh blocks
formats: WFS, GeoJSON, CSV via AURIN APIs
notes: AURIN federates dozens of state CKAN-style endpoints; WFS export available for many layers.
verify_notes: AURIN access management page (login required for data) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: AURIN(澳大利亚城市研究基础设施网络，由墨尔本大学运营)数据目录，汇聚澳大利亚社会经济、人口与公共服务等领域的大量空间数据。它整合了数十个州级 CKAN 式数据端点，许多图层支持 WFS 导出，并可通过 AURIN API 获取 GeoJSON、CSV 等格式。多数数据集采用 CC-BY 许可(逐集而定)。适用于城市研究、区域规划、社会经济分析及澳大利亚多源数据的统一检索与下载。
desc_en: AURIN (Australian Urban Research Infrastructure Network, run by the University of Melbourne) is a data catalogue federating a wide range of Australian socio-economic, demographic and public-services spatial data. It aggregates dozens of state-level CKAN-style endpoints, with many layers exposed via WFS and accessible as GeoJSON or CSV through AURIN's APIs. Most datasets are licensed CC-BY (per dataset). It is valuable for urban research, regional planning, socio-economic analysis, and unified discovery and download across many Australian data sources.

name: BBBike OSM Extracts
notes: OSM自定义区域提取下载
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BBBike 提供的 OpenStreetMap 数据提取服务，允许用户按自定义矩形区域裁剪并下载 OSM 数据。输出格式包括 osm.pbf、Shapefile 和 GeoJSON，数据遵循 ODbL 许可。相比按固定行政区分发的提取服务，BBBike 的优势在于可灵活选择任意感兴趣的范围，适合城市级或局部区域的 POI、路网与地物分析、地图制作及离线导航数据准备。
desc_en: BBBike's OpenStreetMap extract service lets users clip and download OSM data for custom rectangular areas of interest. Outputs are available as osm.pbf, Shapefile and GeoJSON, with the data licensed under ODbL. Unlike extracts distributed by fixed administrative regions, BBBike's strength is flexible selection of any bounding box, making it convenient for city-scale or local-area work with POIs, road networks and other features, for cartography, and for preparing offline routing data.

name: BBBike OSM Planet extracts
notes: BBBike的OSM planet下载目录
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BBBike 的 OSM planet 下载目录，提供基于全球 OpenStreetMap planet 数据生成的提取与衍生文件。格式包含 pbf、Shapefile 和 GeoJSON，遵循 ODbL 许可，可直接下载。适用于需要全球或大区域 OSM 矢量数据的应用，如地图渲染、路网与 POI 分析及数据处理流水线的输入源。
desc_en: BBBike's OSM planet download directory provides extracts and derived files generated from the global OpenStreetMap planet dataset. Files are offered as pbf, Shapefile and GeoJSON under the ODbL licence and available for direct download. It suits applications needing global or large-region OSM vector data, such as map rendering, road-network and POI analysis, and as an input source for data-processing pipelines.

name: Boston University Global Development Policy Center - China's Global Energy Finance (CGEF) geocoded layer
provider: Boston University Global Development Policy Center
theme_raw: China policy-bank energy lending to overseas governments (power plants by fuel type)
formats: CSV with lat/lon (point vector); interactive web map exports
doi_or_citation: Ray, Gallagher, Kring, et al., Boston U. GDP Center
notes: One of the four source databases the BRI Energy 2013-2023 paper consolidates; coordinates allow conversion to point GeoJSON.
verify_notes: BU China's Global Energy Finance landing page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 波士顿大学全球发展政策中心的“中国全球能源金融(CGEF)”地理编码图层，记录自 2000 年以来约 330 多笔中国对外能源贷款及相关项目，覆盖全球。数据以含经纬度的 CSV(点矢量)形式发布，可转换为点 GeoJSON，并提供交互式网络地图。采用免费、需署名的方式开放。它是“一带一路”能源研究常用的源数据库之一，适用于全球能源投资与基础设施的空间分析。
desc_en: Boston University Global Development Policy Center's China's Global Energy Finance (CGEF) geocoded layer documents roughly 330+ Chinese overseas energy loans and related projects from 2000 onward, with global coverage. The data is published as CSV with latitude/longitude (point vector), convertible to point GeoJSON, and accompanied by an interactive web map. It is free to use with attribution. As one of the source databases underpinning Belt and Road energy research, it supports spatial analysis of global energy finance and infrastructure.

name: BRGM InfoTerre Harmonized Geological Map WFS (France)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Geology, soil & geomorphology | Marine & coastal
notes: Harmonized geological maps, observation points with lithology, cavities, marine aggregates.
verify_notes: Service portal lists OGC services; INSPIRE-aligned | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 法国地质调查局(BRGM)InfoTerre 平台提供的协调统一地质图 OGC 服务，覆盖法国，比例尺从 1:100 万到 1:5 万。通过 WFS、WMS 和 KML 提供地质图、含岩性信息的观测点、洞穴及海洋骨料等数据，采用 Etalab 式开放许可(需署名)。适用于地质制图、岩性与构造分析、采矿与工程地质及海岸带研究。
desc_en: Harmonized geological map OGC services from BRGM (the Geological Survey of France) via the InfoTerre platform, covering France at scales from 1:1,000,000 to 1:50,000. Geological maps, lithology-attributed observation points, cavities and marine aggregates are delivered through WFS, WMS and KML under an open Etalab-style licence with attribution. It is suited to geological mapping, lithological and structural analysis, mining and engineering geology, and coastal-zone studies.

name: BRI_ENERGY_DATASET_SciDATA (project-level coordinates, companion Figshare)
provider: Figshare (associated with Scientific Data paper, Nedopil/Wang et al. 2026)
theme_raw: BRI Chinese overseas energy investments 2013-2023 (project coordinates)
formats: XLSX with lat/lon (vectorizable to GeoJSON/SHP; not natively published as vector)
notes: Lead's primary dataset. Published as Excel with project-level coordinates (vectorizable). Strictly tabular, not native vector — included as the canonical source the lead points to. Figshare DOI to be confirmed on landing page.
verify_notes: Homepage returned 403 to WebFetch (anti-bot); domain itself is operational - this entry uses generic figshare URL, real dataset DOI needed. | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 与《Scientific Data》论文(Nedopil/Wang 等，2026)配套发布于 Figshare 的 BRI 能源项目级数据集，覆盖 2013–2023 年“一带一路”伙伴国家的全球能源项目，并提供项目级经纬度坐标。数据以 XLSX 表格形式发布，可矢量化为 GeoJSON/SHP，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。它是该研究的主源数据集，适用于全球能源基础设施的空间分布与投资分析。
desc_en: A project-level Belt and Road energy dataset published on Figshare as a companion to a Scientific Data paper (Nedopil/Wang et al., 2026), covering global energy projects in BRI partner countries from 2013 to 2023 with project-level coordinates. It is released as XLSX with latitude/longitude, vectorizable to GeoJSON/SHP, under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. As the study's primary dataset, it supports spatial analysis of the distribution and financing of global energy infrastructure.

name: California Current Trophic Database (CCTD) - Food Habits Data
theme_raw: Marine ecology / predator-prey trophic data (geolocated point observations)
formats: ERDDAP tabledap: .geoJson, .kml, .csv, .json, .nc (vector point output via lat/lon)
formats_now: CSV, TSV, JSON, GeoJSON, NetCDF, KML, Excel, parquet, OPeNDAP
notes: Geolocated predator stomach/scat sampling points; downloadable as GeoJSON/KML
verify_notes: ERDDAP tabledap | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 由 NOAA 西南渔业科学中心(SWFSC)通过 ERDDAP 发布的“加州洋流营养级数据库(CCTD)”食性数据，覆盖加州洋流大型海洋生态系统(1967–2019)。数据为带经纬度的地理定位捕食者胃含物/粪便采样点，可经 ERDDAP tabledap 导出为 GeoJSON、KML、CSV、NetCDF 等格式，免注册开放获取，属 NOAA 公有领域。适用于海洋食物网、营养级关系与渔业生态研究。
desc_en: Food-habits data from the California Current Trophic Database (CCTD), served by NOAA's SWFSC through ERDDAP and spanning the California Current Large Marine Ecosystem from 1967 to 2019. Records are geolocated predator stomach and scat sampling points with latitude/longitude, exportable via ERDDAP tabledap as GeoJSON, KML, CSV or NetCDF, openly available without registration as NOAA public-domain data. It supports research on marine food webs, trophic relationships and fisheries ecology.

name: China's Gridded Manufacturing Firms Dataset
theme_raw: 制造业企业 POI / 商业设施
notes: 机器学习识别 + 公开企业注册库；冷门但被工业地理研究高频引用
verify_notes: Same Nature idp redirect pattern; article live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国格网化制造业企业数据集(《Scientific Data》2022)，覆盖中国，结合机器学习识别与公开企业注册库构建。数据以含经纬度的 CSV 发布，可衍生为 Shapefile 或 GeoJSON，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。该数据集虽相对小众，但在工业地理研究中被高频引用，适用于制造业空间格局、产业集聚与区域经济分析。
desc_en: China's Gridded Manufacturing Firms Dataset (Scientific Data, 2022) covers China and was built by combining machine-learning identification with public firm-registration records. It is published as CSV with latitude/longitude, derivable to Shapefile or GeoJSON, under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. Though relatively niche, it is frequently cited in industrial-geography research and is suited to analyzing manufacturing spatial patterns, industrial agglomeration and regional economic structure.

name: CLMS Dataset Catalogue (WFS/Atom endpoints)
notes: Programmatic access via CDSE OData and STAC
verify_notes: CLMS dataset catalog search interface active; results load dynamically | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 哥白尼陆地监测服务(CLMS)的数据集目录，提供 CLMS 全部产品的程序化访问端点，包括 WFS、Atom、OData 和 STAC。数据遵循“免费、完整、开放”政策，可通过哥白尼数据空间生态系统(CDSE)的 OData 与 STAC 接口检索与下载。适用于欧洲土地覆盖、植被、水体等环境监测数据的自动化获取与集成应用。
desc_en: The Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) dataset catalogue provides programmatic access endpoints, including WFS, Atom, OData and STAC, to the full range of CLMS products. The data follows a free, full and open policy and can be discovered and downloaded via the CDSE OData and STAC interfaces. It is well suited to automated retrieval and integration of European land-cover, vegetation and water-body monitoring data in environmental applications.

name: Composite Gazetteer of Australia
notes: National repository of Australia's approved place names; useful gazetteer for joining transport features.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由澳大利亚地球科学局(Geoscience Australia)维护的“澳大利亚复合地名录”，是全国官方核准地名的国家级权威库，覆盖澳大利亚全境。通过 MapServer REST(GeoJSON)、WMS 和 WFS 提供服务，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适用于地名检索、地理编码、与交通等要素的属性连接及制图标注。
desc_en: The Composite Gazetteer of Australia, maintained by Geoscience Australia, is the national authoritative repository of officially approved place names, covering all of Australia. It is served via MapServer REST (GeoJSON), WMS and WFS under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. It is useful for place-name lookup, geocoding, attribute-joining with transport and other features, and map labelling.

name: CPTOND-2025 GeoJSON preview/web service mirror
coverage: Same 350-city bus + 46-city metro coverage as primary release
access: HTTP direct (unauthenticated; mirror of project page)
notes: Linked from CPTOND project site https://jean89091515.github.io/CPTOND/ as the raw GeoJSON endpoint feeding the interactive map preview.
verify_notes: Connection refused; service offline | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: CPTOND-2025 项目的 GeoJSON 预览/网络服务镜像，由项目方(清华/作者自托管)提供，覆盖与主版本一致的 350 个城市公交及 46 个城市地铁数据。以分城市/分图层的 GeoJSON 提供，通过 HTTP 直接访问，无需认证，是项目页面交互式地图预览的原始数据端点。它作为图发布版本(figshare DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.29377427)的配套，适用于中国城市公共交通网络分析。
desc_en: A GeoJSON preview/web-service mirror for the CPTOND-2025 project, author/Tsinghua-hosted, covering the same 350-city bus and 46-city metro data as the primary release. It is provided as per-city, per-layer GeoJSON over direct, unauthenticated HTTP and serves as the raw endpoint feeding the project's interactive map preview. As a companion to the Figshare release (DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.29377427), it supports analysis of Chinese urban public-transport networks.

name: D-PLACE dataset derived from Olson et al. 2001 'Terrestrial Ecoregions of the World'
notes: WWF/Olson 2001 ecoregion polygons re-released through D-PLACE
verify_notes: P4 记录为 CC-BY 4.0，实际当前为 CC-BY-NC-4.0（含非商业限制） | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 通过 Zenodo 经由 D-PLACE 重新发布的 Olson 等(2001)《世界陆地生态区》数据集，覆盖全球陆地，提供 WWF/Olson 生态区多边形。数据以 Shapefile 格式提供，体积约 94.9 kB，采用 CC-BY-NC 4.0 许可。该生态区划分是生物地理与保护研究的经典基础，适用于生态分区、生物多样性分析及与保护区、物种数据的叠加。
desc_en: The Olson et al. (2001) 'Terrestrial Ecoregions of the World' dataset, re-released through D-PLACE via Zenodo, covering global terrestrial areas with the well-known WWF/Olson ecoregion polygons. It is provided as a Shapefile (about 94.9 kB) under a CC-BY-NC 4.0 licence. This ecoregion framework is a classic basis for biogeography and conservation, suited to ecological zoning, biodiversity analysis, and overlay with protected-area and species data.

name: data.gov - HIFLD Hospitals (GeoJSON resource)
notes: Data.gov catalog mirror of the HIFLD hospitals layer; convenient for scripted ingest.
verify_notes: Dataset slug not found; data.gov entry may have changed ID | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: Data.gov 上美国 HIFLD 医院图层的目录镜像，由美国总务管理局(GSA)发布，覆盖美国全境的医院点位。提供 GeoJSON、Shapefile、CSV、KML 等格式的直接下载链接，属美国公有领域。该镜像便于脚本化批量获取医院数据，适用于公共卫生、应急管理、可达性分析及医疗资源空间研究。
desc_en: A Data.gov catalog mirror of the U.S. HIFLD hospitals layer, published by the General Services Administration and covering hospital point locations across the United States. It offers direct-download URLs in GeoJSON, Shapefile, CSV and KML, and is in the U.S. public domain. The mirror is convenient for scripted, bulk ingestion and is suited to public health, emergency management, accessibility analysis and healthcare-resource spatial studies.

name: data.gov.uk - GP Practices and Surgeries
formats: CSV (with ODS codes / postcode -> geocoding); linked ODS ORD/FHIR APIs provide geographic data
notes: Combine with ONS NHS Postcode Directory or ODS FHIR API for point geometry.
verify_notes: Last data update 2016 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: data.gov.uk 上由英格兰国民保健署(NHS England)经 CKAN 发布的全科诊所与手术室数据，覆盖英格兰。数据以含 ODS 代码/邮编的 CSV 提供，需配合 ONS 邮编目录或 ODS FHIR API 进行地理编码以获得点几何，采用开放政府许可 v3.0(OGL)。适用于初级医疗服务可达性、医疗资源分布及公共服务规划研究。
desc_en: GP practices and surgeries data published on data.gov.uk by NHS England via CKAN, covering England. The dataset is provided as CSV with ODS codes and postcodes; point geometry requires geocoding by combining it with the ONS NHS Postcode Directory or the ODS FHIR API. It is licensed under the Open Government Licence v3.0. It supports research on primary-care accessibility, healthcare-resource distribution and public-services planning.

name: EarthChem Library
notes: Sample localities exportable as point vectors; DOI-assigned datasets.
verify_notes: EarthChem Library — repository marked CLOSED 2024-12-09 in re3data; entry flagged duplicate | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EarthChem Library 是一个开放的地球化学、岩石学与矿物学数据仓库，面向固体地球科学界提供样品级分析数据的存档与共享，支持按地理位置、样品类型与分析方法检索，常用于地质与地球化学研究的数据复用与汇编。
desc_en: EarthChem Library is an open repository for geochemical, petrological and mineralogical data, providing sample-based analytical datasets to the solid-earth science community. It supports discovery by location, sample type and analytical method, and is widely used for data reuse and compilation in geology and geochemistry research.

name: EMODnet Human Activities - Wind Farms
notes: Turbine count, capacity, status, year
verify_notes: TLS certificate hostname mismatch; catalogue likely defunct/replaced by emodnet.ec.europa.eu | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: EMODnet 海洋人类活动专题下的海上风电场数据集，由欧盟委员会 DG MARE 主导的 EMODnet 发布，覆盖 18 个欧洲国家。要素包含涡轮机数量、装机容量、状态和年份等属性，提供 Shapefile、WFS 和 CSV，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可开放下载或经 WFS 获取。适用于海上可再生能源规划、海洋空间规划及能源基础设施分析。
desc_en: The EMODnet Human Activities wind-farms dataset, published by EMODnet (under the EC's DG MARE) and covering 18 European countries. Features include turbine count, capacity, status and year, and are available as Shapefile, WFS and CSV under a CC-BY 4.0 licence via open download or WFS. It supports offshore renewable-energy planning, maritime spatial planning and energy-infrastructure analysis.

name: ERA RINF / TEN-T on TriplyDB
theme_raw: railway infrastructure (operational points, sections of line, electrification, tunnels)
formats: RDF Linked Data, GeoSPARQL, GeoJSON dump
notes: Niche but unique: full RINF as queryable RDF with WGS84 geometries. Useful for cross-border rail analytics.
verify_notes: TEN-T linked data, 29M+ statements; ERA published | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 欧盟铁路局(ERA)在 TriplyDB 上发布的 RINF / TEN-T 数据，覆盖欧洲大陆，以 RDF 关联数据形式提供完整的铁路基础设施登记信息(约 2930 万条三元组)，并带 WGS84 几何。支持 GeoSPARQL 查询及 GeoJSON 导出，许可未明确(默认按欧盟数据复用)。其独特之处在于可对铁路网进行语义化查询，适用于跨境铁路分析与交通基础设施研究。
desc_en: RINF / TEN-T data from the European Union Agency for Railways (ERA) published on TriplyDB, covering continental Europe and providing the full rail-infrastructure register as RDF Linked Data (about 29.3 million triples) with WGS84 geometries. It supports GeoSPARQL querying and a GeoJSON dump; licensing is not explicitly stated (EU reuse implied). Its distinctive strength is queryable semantic access to the rail network, suited to cross-border rail analytics and transport-infrastructure research.

name: Esri Aid & Development - ACLED Mirror
notes: ACLED conflict points republished via CartONG humanitarian hub.
verify_notes: Dataset URL returns 404; ACLED dataset likely moved/removed from this Esri Aid Dev hub | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 由 CartONG 在 Esri Aid&Dev 人道主义开放数据中心上转发的 ACLED(武装冲突地点与事件数据项目)镜像，覆盖全球的冲突事件点。提供 Feature Service、GeoJSON、CSV 和 Shapefile，通过 ArcGIS Hub 获取，使用须遵守 ACLED 使用条款。适用于冲突动态监测、人道主义响应、安全风险评估及冲突地理时空分析。
desc_en: An ACLED (Armed Conflict Location & Event Data Project) mirror republished by CartONG on the Esri Aid & Development humanitarian open-data hub, covering conflict-event points worldwide. It is available as a feature service, GeoJSON, CSV and Shapefile via ArcGIS Hub, with use governed by ACLED's terms of use. It supports conflict monitoring, humanitarian response, security-risk assessment and spatio-temporal analysis of conflict.

name: EU-Hydro River Network Database (Copernicus)
provider: European Environment Agency / Copernicus Land Monitoring Service
formats: ArcGIS REST MapServer, WMS, GDB, GeoPackage download
formats_now: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, WMS, KML, PNG/JPG
notes: Confirmed REST endpoint live. No first-class OGC API yet, but WMS + REST queryable. Drainage network plus catchments derived from EU-DEM.
verify_notes: 20 layers including river network by Strahler order | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EU-Hydro 河网数据库，由欧洲环境署(EEA)/哥白尼陆地监测服务发布，覆盖欧洲(EEA39)，含约 20 个图层。提供基于 EU-DEM 衍生的排水网络及流域汇水区，通过 ArcGIS REST MapServer、WMS 及可下载的 GDB/GeoPackage 获取，遵循 EEA/哥白尼署名条款。适用于水文建模、流域分析、河流连通性与欧洲水资源研究。
desc_en: The EU-Hydro River Network Database, published by the European Environment Agency / Copernicus Land Monitoring Service, covering Europe (EEA39) with about 20 layers. It provides a drainage network and catchments derived from EU-DEM, accessible via ArcGIS REST MapServer, WMS and downloadable GDB/GeoPackage under EEA/Copernicus attribution terms. It is suited to hydrological modelling, watershed analysis, river-connectivity studies and European water-resource research.

name: European Hexagon Gridded POI Dataset (OSM-derived)
coverage: Europe, 7.2M POIs reduced to 988k hex grid
formats: geopackage / CSV with H3 hex IDs
feature_count: 7,218,304 data points reduced to 988,575; hexagon counts 36,890 / 151,662 / 451,999 / 988,575
notes: Standardized POI taxonomy; useful for cross-country amenity comparison.
verify_notes: Article in Data in Brief; dataset on Zenodo 7885644 (ODbL since OSM-derived) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 欧洲六边形格网化 POI 数据集(基于 OSM)，由 KAIST 的 McCarty 与 Kim 构建，将欧洲约 720 万个 POI 聚合到约 98.8 万个 H3 六边形网格中。数据以 GeoPackage/CSV(含 H3 网格 ID)提供，采用标准化 POI 分类体系；元数据为 CC-BY 4.0、底层数据为 ODbL 1.0。适用于跨国设施可达性比较、城市便利度分析及空间统计研究。
desc_en: A European hexagon-gridded POI dataset derived from OpenStreetMap, built by McCarty and Kim (KAIST), aggregating roughly 7.2 million European POIs into about 988,000 H3 hexagonal cells. It is provided as GeoPackage/CSV with H3 hex IDs and uses a standardized POI taxonomy; metadata is CC-BY 4.0 while the underlying data is ODbL 1.0. It is suited to cross-country amenity comparison, urban convenience analysis and spatial-statistics research.

name: Foundation Rail Infrastructure - Railway Lines
notes: Line features: Railways, Rail Sidings, Tramlines including Light Rail. Companion stations point layer in same service.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳大利亚地球科学局(Geoscience Australia)“基础铁路基础设施”服务中的铁路线图层，覆盖澳大利亚全境，包含铁路、铁路侧线、有轨电车线(含轻轨)等线状要素，同一服务中另有配套车站点图层。通过 WFS 与 MapServer/FeatureServer(GeoJSON、JSON)提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适用于铁路网络分析、交通规划及基础设施研究。
desc_en: The railway-lines layer from Geoscience Australia's Foundation Rail Infrastructure service, covering all of Australia and including line features such as railways, rail sidings and tramlines (including light rail), with a companion station point layer in the same service. It is available via WFS and MapServer/FeatureServer (GeoJSON, JSON) under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. It is suited to rail-network analysis, transport planning and infrastructure research.

name: Foundation Rail Infrastructure - WFS endpoint
notes: WFS sibling endpoint for Foundation Rail layers.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳大利亚地球科学局“基础铁路基础设施”服务的 WFS 端点，是同名铁路图层的 WFS 配套接口，覆盖澳大利亚全境。通过 WFS GetCapabilities 提供 GML 及经 OGC 转换的 GeoJSON 等格式，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适用于以标准 OGC 接口程序化获取澳大利亚铁路线与车站矢量数据，便于交通与基础设施分析。
desc_en: The WFS endpoint for Geoscience Australia's Foundation Rail Infrastructure service, the WFS sibling interface to the rail layers and covering all of Australia. Via WFS GetCapabilities it provides GML and OGC-derived GeoJSON under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. It is suited to programmatic retrieval of Australian railway-line and station vector data through standard OGC interfaces for transport and infrastructure analysis.

name: GBIF Species Occurrences
notes: Massive point-vector occurrence dataset; updated monthly.
verify_notes: JS-rendered page; reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球生物多样性信息设施(GBIF)物种出现记录，经 Microsoft Planetary Computer 发布，覆盖全球约 20 亿余条记录，是规模庞大的点矢量出现数据集，每月更新。数据以 Parquet 格式(含经纬度)提供，通过 STAC 与 Azure Blob 访问，许可因子数据集而异(CC0/CC-BY/CC-BY-NC)。适用于物种分布建模、生物多样性评估、生态位与保护研究。
desc_en: Species-occurrence records from the Global Biodiversity Information Facility (GBIF), served via the Microsoft Planetary Computer, covering roughly 2 billion+ global records as a massive point-vector occurrence dataset updated monthly. The data is provided as Parquet with latitude/longitude, accessible through STAC and Azure Blob, with licensing varying by source dataset (CC0/CC-BY/CC-BY-NC). It is suited to species-distribution modelling, biodiversity assessment, niche modelling and conservation research.

name: Geo-locations and System Data of Renewable Energy Installations in Germany
notes: Points for wind, PV, bioenergy, hydro, storage; updated edition
verify_notes: German renewable energy installations; license is DL-DE-BY-2.0 not generic CC | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 德国可再生能源装置的地理位置与系统数据(经 Zenodo 发布)，覆盖德国(2024 年起的更新版)，以点要素记录风电、光伏、生物质能、水电及储能等设施。数据以 GeoPackage(.gpkg)格式开放提供，采用德国数据许可“署名”2.0。适用于德国能源转型分析、可再生能源空间分布研究及电网与基础设施规划。
desc_en: Geo-locations and system data of renewable-energy installations in Germany, published via Zenodo, covering Germany (an updated edition from 2024 onward) with point features for wind, PV, bioenergy, hydropower and storage. The data is openly provided as GeoPackage (.gpkg) under the Datenlizenz Deutschland Namensnennung 2.0. It is suited to analyzing Germany's energy transition, the spatial distribution of renewables, and grid and infrastructure planning.

name: Geo-Wiki Global Cropland validation samples
theme_canonical: POI / places | Land cover & land use
notes: Used by CLCD authors as independent validation sample set; point vector
verify_notes: Fritz et al. 2016 Geo-Wiki, 2,132,724 points | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geo-Wiki 全球耕地验证样本，由 IIASA/Geo-Wiki 经 PANGAEA 发布，覆盖全球(含密集的中国样本)，共约 213 万个点。数据以含经纬度的 CSV(点矢量)提供，可转换为 GeoJSON，采用 CC-BY 3.0 许可，开放下载。该样本集曾被 CLCD 等土地覆盖产品作者用作独立验证，适用于耕地/土地覆盖制图精度评估与校验。
desc_en: Geo-Wiki Global Cropland validation samples, published by IIASA/Geo-Wiki via PANGAEA, covering the globe (including dense China samples) with about 2,132,724 points. The data is provided as CSV with latitude/longitude (point vector), convertible to GeoJSON, under a CC-BY 3.0 licence and openly downloadable. Used as an independent validation set by authors of land-cover products such as CLCD, it is suited to accuracy assessment and validation of cropland and land-cover mapping.

name: geo2day OSM 国家级矢量层
theme_canonical: POI / places | Transportation | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: 按国家预切的 OSM 主题矢量（道路、铁路、水系、土地利用、POI）
access: 网页直接下载，部分需付费/订阅
notes: 非英语世界小厂；中国/东南亚国家在此可拿到不在 Geofabrik free 列表里的省级 shapefile，被多个 GIS 博客引用作为 Geofabrik 替代
verify_notes: 独立第三方 OSM 抽取服务，正常运营 (Copyright 2023–2025)。 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: geo2day.com 提供的基于 OpenStreetMap 的国家级矢量图层，按国家覆盖全球，遵循 ODbL 许可。提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GeoJSON 等格式(欧洲约 27.92GB、亚洲约 13.3GB、北美约 16.26GB、非洲约 6.92GB)，部分内容需付费/订阅。其特点是可获取部分不在 Geofabrik 免费列表中的省级 Shapefile，常被作为 Geofabrik 的替代来源，适用于 GIS 分析与制图。
desc_en: Country-level OSM-based vector layers from geo2day.com, covering the globe by country under an ODbL licence. It offers Shapefile, GeoPackage and GeoJSON (with regional volumes such as Europe ~27.92GB, Asia ~13.3GB, North America ~16.26GB, Africa ~6.92GB), with some content requiring payment or subscription. Its appeal is providing some province-level shapefiles not in Geofabrik's free listings, often used as a Geofabrik alternative for GIS analysis and cartography.

name: Geocode Earth — Cities/Towns/Villages/Localities
notes: Curated WOF locality slice — populated places worldwide.
verify_notes: HTTP 404 Not Found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: Geocode Earth 提供的城市/城镇/村庄/居民点(localities)数据，是经过整理的 Who's On First(WOF)居民点切片，覆盖全球的人口聚居地。数据以 GeoJSON 格式通过 HTTPS 提供，采用 WOF 许可。适用于地理编码、居民点参考、地图标注及与其他空间数据的连接分析。
desc_en: Geocode Earth's cities/towns/villages/localities data is a curated Who's On First (WOF) locality slice covering populated places worldwide. It is provided as GeoJSON over HTTPS under the WOF License. It is suited to geocoding, as a reference for populated places, for map labelling, and for joining with other spatial datasets.

name: GeoConnex Reference Features (pygeoapi)
provider: Internet of Water / Center for Geospatial Solutions
theme_raw: persistent identifiers for US hydrologic features (HUCs, gages, mainstems, reservoirs, aquifers)
notes: Aimed at linking water data via URIs. pygeoapi backend - clean OGC API Features endpoints with HTML landing pages per feature. Powers NLDI integrations.
verify_notes: P4 标注 CC0；当前页面显示 CC-BY 4.0，需注意许可证表述差异 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoConnex 参考要素服务，由 Internet of Water / 地理空间解决方案中心运营，覆盖美国，旨在通过 URI 关联各类水文数据。基于 pygeoapi 后端，提供符合 OGC API Features 标准的 GeoJSON、HTML 及 JSON-LD 端点，每个要素均有 HTML 着陆页，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。它支撑 NLDI 等集成，适用于水数据互联、水文要素引用与编目。
desc_en: GeoConnex Reference Features, run by the Internet of Water / Center for Geospatial Solutions, covering the United States and aimed at linking water data via URIs. Built on a pygeoapi backend, it offers clean OGC API Features endpoints (GeoJSON, HTML, JSON-LD) with an HTML landing page per feature, under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. It powers integrations such as the NLDI and is suited to linking water data and referencing and cataloguing hydrographic features.

name: Geofabrik Internal OSM
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] 需登录,OSM内部数据下载
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Geofabrik 提供的 OSM 内部数据下载服务，需登录获取，输出 osm.pbf 格式，遵循 ODbL 许可。相比公开提取，内部版本可包含完整的贡献者元数据(如用户名)。覆盖范围按 Geofabrik 区域划分。适用于需要 OSM 编辑历史与贡献者信息的研究与质量分析(具体可用性需自行验证)。
desc_en: Geofabrik's internal OSM data download service, which requires login and outputs osm.pbf under the ODbL licence. Compared with the public extracts, the internal edition can include full contributor metadata such as usernames. Coverage follows Geofabrik's regional divisions. It is suited to research and quality analysis that need OSM edit history and contributor information (availability should be verified independently).

name: Geofabrik OSM Extracts
notes: Classic open OSM vector data download portal
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Geofabrik GmbH 运营的经典开放 OSM 矢量数据下载门户，按地区分发 OpenStreetMap 提取数据。提供 PBF、Shapefile 及 osm.xml 等格式，遵循 ODbL 许可，可直接下载。它是社区广泛依赖的稳定 OSM 数据源，适用于地图制作、路网与 POI 分析及各类基于 OSM 的地理空间应用。
desc_en: The classic open OSM vector data download portal operated by Geofabrik GmbH, distributing OpenStreetMap extracts by region. It provides PBF, shapefile and osm.xml formats under the ODbL licence for direct download. A stable, community-relied-upon OSM source, it is suited to cartography, road-network and POI analysis, and a wide range of OSM-based geospatial applications.

name: GEOFON
formats: event catalogs (CSV/QuakeML); station metadata; vector event points
notes: Earthquake event catalog distributed as point-vector tables; backbone of EMSC and tsunami warning systems.
verify_notes: GEOFON | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GEOFON，由德国 GFZ 波茨坦地学研究中心运营的全球地震监测网络与数据中心。提供地震事件目录(CSV/QuakeML)、台站元数据及点矢量化的地震事件位置，覆盖全球地震台网，开放获取(版权所有，适用处为 CC0)。它是 EMSC 与海啸预警系统的重要数据支撑，适用于地震活动性分析、灾害评估与地球物理研究。
desc_en: GEOFON, a global seismic monitoring network and data centre operated by GFZ Potsdam (Germany). It provides earthquake event catalogs (CSV/QuakeML), station metadata and point-vectorizable event locations, covering a global seismic network, openly accessible (copyrighted, with CC0 where applicable). A backbone of the EMSC and tsunami-warning systems, it is suited to seismicity analysis, hazard assessment and geophysical research.

name: GeoIP2 IPv4 (DataHub core)
notes: Vectorizable point/polygon network-to-location lookups.
verify_notes: 31.9 MB GeoLite2-derived | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoIP2 IPv4(DataHub core)，基于 MaxMind GeoLite2、经 DataHub 发布的 IPv4 地址到地理位置查找数据，覆盖全球 IPv4 段。数据以含经纬度的 CSV(约 31.9 MB)提供，可矢量化为点/多边形网络-位置映射，采用 CC0/PDDL(需 MaxMind 署名)。适用于 IP 地理定位、网络流量空间分析及粗粒度用户分布研究。
desc_en: GeoIP2 IPv4 (DataHub core) is IPv4-address-to-location lookup data based on MaxMind GeoLite2 and published via DataHub, covering the global IPv4 space. It is provided as CSV with latitude/longitude (about 31.9 MB), vectorizable into point/polygon network-to-location lookups, under CC0/PDDL with MaxMind attribution. It is suited to IP geolocation, spatial analysis of network traffic and coarse-grained user-distribution studies.

name: GeoLink-UV / CUGUV 中国城中村制图
provider: 清华大学 FIB Lab + 合作方
theme_raw: 城中村 / 非正式聚落 矢量
notes: 中国冷门主题；可与建筑、POI 叠加分析城中村动态
verify_notes: Nature redirects through idp auth flow; article exists (GeoLink-UV/CUGUV) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoLink-UV / CUGUV 中国城中村制图数据集，由清华大学 FIB Lab 及合作方发布(《Scientific Data》),覆盖中国 342 个城市(CUGUV 部分含 15 个城市)。数据以面要素 Shapefile 形式提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可(论文补充材料)。作为相对小众的中国主题数据，可与建筑、POI 等数据叠加，适用于城中村空间分布、城市更新与城市化动态分析。
desc_en: The GeoLink-UV / CUGUV urban-village mapping dataset for China, published by Tsinghua University's FIB Lab and collaborators (Scientific Data), covering 342 Chinese cities (with 15 cities in the CUGUV portion). It is provided as polygon-feature Shapefiles under a CC-BY 4.0 licence as paper supplements. A relatively niche China-focused dataset, it can be overlaid with building and POI data and is suited to analyzing the distribution of urban villages, urban renewal and urbanization dynamics.

name: GeoNames - GNIS (US Geographic Names Information System)
formats_now: pipe-delimited TXT, File GeoDatabase (GDB), GeoPackage (GPKG), CSV
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
feature_count: up to 2000 geographic features per CSV download
time_span: refreshed every other month; legacy data last updated August 2021
notes: Lesser-known: hospitals, schools, churches, cemeteries phased out in 2014 but still part of historical files; useful complement to TNM Structures.
verify_notes: Active download portal; multiple format options | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: GNIS（地理名称信息系统）是美国地质调查局（USGS）和美国地名委员会维护的美国官方地名权威数据库，覆盖全美的地名、地物及行政区域要素。数据以管道分隔的 TXT 提供，也可通过国家地图（TNM）下载 shapefile，属公有领域，可自由使用。其历史档案中保留了 2014 年后逐步停止收录的医院、学校、教堂、墓地等要素，是 TNM 结构要素数据的良好补充，常用于地名查询、地理编码与制图。
desc_en: GNIS (Geographic Names Information System) is the authoritative U.S. database of place and feature names, maintained by USGS and the U.S. Board on Geographic Names. It covers geographic, cultural, and administrative features across the United States. Data is distributed as pipe-delimited TXT and as shapefiles via The National Map, all in the public domain and freely reusable. Historical files retain categories such as hospitals, schools, churches, and cemeteries that were phased out in 2014, making GNIS a useful complement to TNM Structures for geocoding, gazetteer lookups, and mapping.

name: GeoPlace INSPIRE Transport Networks WFS (Great Britain)
notes: Lesser-known INSPIRE-harmonised TN service for GB - complementary to OS APIs and useful for cross-EU INSPIRE workflows.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden; press release from 2014 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 GeoPlace LLP 提供的英国（大不列颠）INSPIRE 协调交通网络 Web 服务，按欧盟 INSPIRE 指令对交通要素进行了标准化建模。数据通过 WFS、WMS（INSPIRE GML）接口提供，需注册后访问。作为一项较少被关注的 INSPIRE 协调服务，它可与英国地形测量局（OS）的 API 互补，特别适用于跨欧盟、需要数据语义一致的 INSPIRE 工作流，便于在统一框架下集成与分析交通网络数据。
desc_en: This is GeoPlace LLP's INSPIRE-harmonised Transport Networks web service for Great Britain, modelling transport features according to the EU INSPIRE Directive. Data is served via WFS and WMS using INSPIRE GML and requires registration to access. As a lesser-known INSPIRE-compliant service, it complements Ordnance Survey APIs and is especially valuable for cross-EU workflows that need semantically harmonised data, allowing transport network features to be integrated and analysed within a common European framework.

name: Geoscience Australia Surface Hydrology (1:250k + 1:1M)
theme_raw: lines, polygons, points (national surface water dataset)
notes: Complements BoM Geofabric; GA hosts via ArcGIS Server with full WFS/WMS interface.
verify_notes: WFS endpoint returned HTTP 400; requires service/request parameters to validate | lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: 这是澳大利亚地球科学局（Geoscience Australia）发布的地表水文矢量数据服务，包含 1:25 万与 1:100 万比例尺的河流、湖泊等水系要素，覆盖整个澳大利亚。服务通过 ArcGIS Server 以 WFS、WMS 和 ArcGIS REST 接口提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，注明出处即可使用。该数据集是澳大利亚气象局 Geofabric 的补充，适用于水文分析、流域制图与环境管理等用途。
desc_en: This is Geoscience Australia's Surface Hydrology vector service, providing rivers, lakes, and related water features at 1:250k and 1:1M scales across Australia. It is delivered through ArcGIS Server with full WFS, WMS, and ArcGIS REST interfaces and is licensed under CC-BY 4.0, requiring only attribution. The dataset complements the Bureau of Meteorology's Geofabric and is suitable for hydrological analysis, catchment mapping, and environmental management, offering a standards-based way to query Australian surface water networks.

name: GeoSeer — OGC services search engine (WFS/WMS/WMTS/WCS)
notes: De-facto global registry for OGC endpoints; replaces the now-defunct Spatineo Directory search. Filter by service-type=WFS for vector-only.
verify_notes: GeoSeer spatial search engine; 3.5M datasets indexed; latest blog May 2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoSeer 是由 Jonathan Moules 开发的全球 OGC 空间服务搜索引擎，索引了 40 万余个在线服务中的 350 万多个数据集，涵盖 WFS、WMS、WMTS、WCS 等 OGC 接口。它通过解析各服务的 GetCapabilities 文档建立索引，提供免费网页检索和付费 API。作为已停运的 Spatineo Directory 的事实替代品，GeoSeer 是发现 OGC 端点的实用工具，可按服务类型（如 WFS）筛选矢量数据。其数据许可因来源而异。
desc_en: GeoSeer is a global search engine for OGC spatial services developed by Jonathan Moules, indexing more than 3.5 million datasets across over 400,000 live services and covering WFS, WMS, WMTS, and WCS endpoints. It builds its index by parsing GetCapabilities documents and offers free web search plus a paid API. As the de-facto successor to the now-defunct Spatineo Directory, it is a practical discovery tool for OGC endpoints, letting users filter by service type (e.g. WFS) for vector-only data. Underlying data licenses vary by source.

name: Geospatial database of travel times to obstetric emergency care in 15 Nigerian conurbations (Banke-Thomas et al., Scientific Data 2023)
notes: Includes geolocated EmOC facility point layers.
verify_notes: Nigeria obstetric emergency travel-times geospatial database | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Banke-Thomas 等人发表于《Scientific Data》（2023）的研究型空间数据集，估算了尼日利亚 15 个城市群中前往产科急诊（EmOC）服务的旅行时间。数据涵盖 2021 个具备功能的卫生设施，并包含 EmOC 设施的地理定位点图层。数据以 Shapefile、GeoTIFF 和 CSV 提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，开放获取。该数据集适用于医疗可及性分析、孕产妇健康研究与城市公共服务规划。
desc_en: Published by Banke-Thomas et al. in Scientific Data (2023), this geospatial database estimates travel times to obstetric emergency care (EmOC) across 15 Nigerian conurbations. It includes 2,021 functional health facilities and geolocated EmOC facility point layers. Data is provided as shapefiles, GeoTIFFs, and CSV under a CC-BY 4.0 license and is openly accessible. The dataset supports analyses of healthcare accessibility, maternal health research, and urban public-service planning, offering reproducible travel-time surfaces for emergency obstetric care in West African cities.

name: Geospatial Datasets Collection (Data Catalog filter)
theme_raw: Meta-entry: all vector-flagged datasets in the catalog
notes: Use the 'Geospatial Data Type = Vector' facet to enumerate the full vector inventory; useful as a discovery endpoint.
verify_notes: Catalog UI loads; search returned 0 results — possible filter/indexing issue | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是世界银行数据目录中按“地理空间数据类型 = 矢量”筛选的数据集合视图，而非单一数据集。它汇集了世界银行发布的全球及各国矢量地理数据，主题涵盖兴趣点、行政边界、基础设施等，格式多为 Shapefile、GeoJSON 或 GeoPackage，多数采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该筛选视图可作为发现端点，帮助用户检索世界银行完整的矢量数据清单，适用于发展研究与空间数据集成。
desc_en: This is a filtered collection view of the World Bank Data Catalog showing datasets tagged with Geospatial Data Type = Vector, rather than a single dataset. It aggregates the World Bank's global and country-level vector data spanning points of interest, administrative boundaries, infrastructure, and more, typically in Shapefile, GeoJSON, or GeoPackage formats and mostly under CC BY 4.0. The facet serves as a discovery endpoint for enumerating the full vector inventory, making it useful for development research and spatial data integration.

name: GLIMS Glacier Database
formats: WMS, WFS, KML, shapefile, GMT, MapInfo, GML
notes: GeoServer endpoint /glims/geoserver/ows supports both WMS and WFS GetCapabilities.
verify_notes: OWS endpoint live; requires service parameter (e.g. ?service=WMS) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GLIMS（全球陆地冰空间测量）冰川数据库由 NSIDC 与 GLIMS 联盟维护，是全球冰川范围与变化的权威矢量数据集，覆盖约占全球约 20 万条冰川 70% 的范围。数据通过 GeoServer 端点以 WMS、WFS、KML、shapefile、GMT、MapInfo、GML 等多种格式提供，采用署名开放许可。该数据集广泛用于冰川监测、气候变化研究与水资源评估，是冰冻圈科学的核心数据来源之一。
desc_en: The GLIMS (Global Land Ice Measurements from Space) Glacier Database, maintained by NSIDC and the GLIMS consortium, is an authoritative vector dataset of glacier outlines and change, covering roughly 70% of the world's ~200,000 glaciers. Its GeoServer endpoint serves data via WMS, WFS, KML, shapefile, GMT, MapInfo, and GML under an open, attribution-required policy. The database is widely used for glacier monitoring, climate-change research, and water-resource assessment, making it a cornerstone resource for cryosphere science.

name: Global Airport Database (Partow)
formats_now: delimited text, CSV, SQLite, PostgreSQL SQL, QGIS project
notes: Vectorizable point dataset.
verify_notes: 9300 airports, 16 fields | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Partow 全球机场数据库由 Arash Partow 编制，是一个开放的全球机场点位数据集，以 CSV 格式提供，包含经纬度坐标，可直接转换为矢量点图层。数据集采用 MIT 许可，使用十分自由。它适用于航空网络分析、可视化制图与地理编码等用途，是一个轻量、易用的全球机场参考数据源，常被开发者和研究者用于快速集成机场位置信息。
desc_en: The Global Airport Database compiled by Arash Partow is an open, worldwide point dataset of airports provided as CSV with longitude/latitude coordinates, readily convertible into a vector point layer. It is released under the permissive MIT license, allowing very flexible reuse. The dataset is well suited to aviation-network analysis, cartographic visualization, and geocoding, serving as a lightweight, easy-to-integrate global reference for airport locations frequently used by developers and researchers.

name: Global Airports
lychee_status: Network error: SSL certificate expired. Site needs to renew certificate (error sending request for url (https://old.datahub.io/dataset/global-airports))
lychee_text: Network error: SSL certificate expired. Site needs to renew certificate (error sending request for url (https://old.datahub.io/dataset/global-airports))
notes: IATA/ICAO codes; vector point dataset
verify_notes: TLS certificate has expired on old.datahub.io | lychee:Network error: SSL certificate expired. Site needs to renew certificate (error sending request for url (https://old.datahub.io/dataset/global-airports))
desc_zh: Global Airports 是由 DataHub 基于 OpenFlights 数据整理的全球机场数据集，以含经纬度的 CSV 提供，可转换为 GeoJSON 等矢量格式，并附带 IATA/ICAO 机场代码。数据采用 ODC-PDDL 及 OpenFlights 条款，开放下载。作为一个全球机场点位参考集，它常用于航线网络建模、旅行数据分析和地图可视化，便于将机场代码与地理坐标关联整合。
desc_en: Global Airports is a worldwide airport dataset curated by DataHub from OpenFlights data, provided as CSV with latitude/longitude and convertible to GeoJSON and other vector formats, including IATA and ICAO codes. It is available under ODC-PDDL and OpenFlights terms as an open download. As a global airport point reference, it is commonly used for route-network modelling, travel-data analysis, and map visualization, making it easy to link airport codes with geographic coordinates.

name: Global Energy Monitor — Global Oil & Gas Plant Tracker / Pipelines
theme_raw: Oil/gas power plants and pipelines (points + lines)
notes: Companion tracker; provides geometric line/point assets used to enrich BRI project records.
verify_notes: Footer no longer states CC-BY explicitly; contact required | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球能源监测组织（GEM）的全球油气厂追踪器与管道数据集，记录全球范围内油气处理设施及输油气管道的位置与属性。数据以含经纬度的 CSV、KMZ 和 GeoJSON 提供，包含点和线状几何，注册后可开放获取，但版权为保留所有权利，再利用需联系授权。该数据常用于能源基础设施分析，并可作为“一带一路”项目记录的补充，支持线路与设施级别的空间研究。
desc_en: Global Energy Monitor's Global Oil & Gas Plant Tracker and Pipelines dataset records the locations and attributes of oil and gas processing facilities and transmission pipelines worldwide. Data is provided as CSV with latitude/longitude, KMZ, and GeoJSON, including both point and line geometries, and is openly available after registration, though it is All Rights Reserved with reuse requiring contact for licensing. It is widely used for energy-infrastructure analysis and can enrich Belt-and-Road project records with line- and facility-level spatial detail.

name: Global Healthsites Mapping Project (HDX org)
notes: OSM-derived health facility commons; per-country downloads
verify_notes: HDX 403 to crawler | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 全球卫生设施制图项目（healthsites.io）在 HDX 上的组织页面，提供基于 OpenStreetMap 衍生的全球卫生设施数据，按国家分别下载。数据涵盖医院、诊所等公共卫生服务点，以 GeoJSON、Shapefile 和 CSV 提供，采用 ODbL 许可。作为开放的卫生设施公共数据集，它适用于医疗可及性分析、人道主义响应与公共卫生规划，尤其在数据稀缺地区具有重要参考价值。
desc_en: This is the HDX organization page for the Global Healthsites Mapping Project (healthsites.io), offering OpenStreetMap-derived health facility data available as per-country downloads. It covers hospitals, clinics, and other public health service points, distributed as GeoJSON, Shapefile, and CSV under the ODbL license. As an open commons of health facility locations, it supports healthcare-accessibility analysis, humanitarian response, and public-health planning, and is especially valuable in data-scarce regions where authoritative facility registries are limited.

name: Global Hydropower Tracker
theme_raw: Hydropower dams (point vector) — large share of BRI energy projects
license_now: Not explicit (citation required; '© 2026 Global Energy Monitor')
notes: Complementary point vector to the BRI energy dataset.
verify_notes: Project page live; March 2026 release referenced. License not openly stated. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球能源监测组织（GEM）的全球水电追踪器，记录世界各地水电站的位置、装机容量与状态等属性信息。数据可通过其地图以 Excel、KML、GeoJSON 形式获取，下载需填写表单，免费使用，但许可未明确，引用时需注明来源。该数据集兼具水文与能源基础设施主题，常用于可再生能源分析，并可作为“一带一路”能源项目的点状矢量补充，支持电力规划与环境评估研究。
desc_en: Global Energy Monitor's Global Hydropower Tracker records the locations, capacities, and operational status of hydropower plants around the world. Data can be obtained via its map interface as Excel, KML, and GeoJSON through a free, form-gated download; the license is not explicitly stated and citation of the source is required. Spanning both hydrography and energy-infrastructure themes, the dataset is widely used for renewable-energy analysis and serves as a complementary point vector for Belt-and-Road energy projects, supporting power planning and environmental assessment.

name: Global Wind Power Tracker
notes: Renewables BRI overlap.
verify_notes: Live; covers 166 countries; previously listed CC-BY may no longer apply - verify. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球能源监测组织（GEM）的全球风电追踪器，记录覆盖 166 个国家的风电场位置、装机容量与状态等信息。数据以 GeoJSON、KML、CSV 形式提供，通过表单开放获取，许可未明确说明（页脚标注保留所有权利）。作为全球可再生能源基础设施的点状矢量数据，它常用于风能资源与能源转型分析，并可与“一带一路”可再生能源项目数据叠加，支持电力部门研究与制图。
desc_en: Global Energy Monitor's Global Wind Power Tracker records wind farm locations, capacities, and status across 166 countries. Data is provided as GeoJSON, KML, and CSV via a form-based open download, with licensing not explicitly stated (the site footer notes All Rights Reserved). As a point-vector dataset of global renewable-energy infrastructure, it is commonly used for wind-resource and energy-transition analysis and can be overlaid with Belt-and-Road renewable project data to support power-sector research and mapping.

name: GloHydroRes - global hydropower plants & reservoirs
formats: XLSX, CSV with lat/lon (point geometry; convertible to vector)
notes: Tabular with coordinates; load as point vector. Included as borderline - not natively shapefile
verify_notes: GloHydroRes hydropower dataset | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GloHydroRes 是发布于 Zenodo 与《Scientific Data》（2025）的全球水电站与水库数据集，涵盖 128 个国家的 7,775 座水电站。数据以 XLSX 和含经纬度的 CSV 提供，为点几何，可转换为矢量图层，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，开放获取。它将水电站与对应水库相关联，适用于全球水文-能源系统分析、水资源管理与可再生能源研究，是较新的权威水电参考数据集。
desc_en: GloHydroRes is a global dataset of hydropower plants and their reservoirs published on Zenodo and in Scientific Data (2025), covering 7,775 plants across 128 countries. Data is provided as XLSX and CSV with latitude/longitude as point geometry, convertible into vector layers, under a CC-BY 4.0 open-access license. By linking power plants to their associated reservoirs, it supports global water-energy system analysis, water-resource management, and renewable-energy research, offering a recent and authoritative reference for hydropower infrastructure worldwide.

name: GOFER v0.2 — GOES-Observed Fire Event Representation (current release)
theme_raw: Wildfire hourly progression (perimeters, active-fire lines, ignition points)
notes: Current archived version; supersedes v0.0/v0.1/v0.11/v0.12
verify_notes: Zenodo concept DOI | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GOFER v0.2（GOES 观测火灾事件表征）是发布于 Zenodo 的野火数据集，基于 GOES 静止卫星观测重建火灾事件的时空发展，覆盖 2019–2021 年加州 28 场超过 5 万英亩的大型野火。数据以 Shapefile 和 CSV 提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，开放获取。它提供高时间分辨率的火灾蔓延边界，适用于野火行为分析、灾害应急与火灾建模研究。该版本为当前归档版，取代了早期 v0.0 至 v0.12。
desc_en: GOFER v0.2 (GOES-Observed Fire Event Representation) is a wildfire dataset on Zenodo that reconstructs the spatiotemporal progression of fires from GOES geostationary satellite observations, covering 28 large California wildfires over 50,000 acres during 2019–2021. Data is provided as shapefile and CSV under a CC-BY 4.0 open-access license. It offers high-temporal-resolution fire perimeters useful for wildfire-behavior analysis, disaster response, and fire modelling. This release is the current archived version, superseding earlier v0.0 through v0.12.

name: GRID3 sub-Saharan Africa Schools / Education Facilities (multiple country layers; published with academic DOIs)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Energy & infrastructure | Public services
notes: Country-level school point layers with assigned DOIs; cited in peer-reviewed literature.
verify_notes: GRID3 Data Hub page loaded but search results rendered client-side; limited extraction | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GRID3（地理参考基础设施与发展数据）由哥伦比亚大学 CIESIN 等机构主导，提供撒哈拉以南非洲的学校与教育设施点位图层，覆盖尼日利亚、刚果民主共和国、赞比亚等多个国家。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、CSV 提供，采用 CC-BY 许可，开放获取，并为多个国家图层分配了学术 DOI，已被同行评审文献引用。该数据适用于教育可及性分析、公共服务规划与发展研究。
desc_en: GRID3 (Geo-Referenced Infrastructure and Development Data), led by Columbia University's CIESIN and partners, provides school and education-facility point layers across sub-Saharan Africa, including Nigeria, the DRC, Zambia, and others. Data is available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and CSV under a CC-BY license, openly accessible, with several country layers assigned academic DOIs and cited in peer-reviewed literature. The dataset supports analyses of education accessibility, public-service planning, and development research in regions where authoritative facility data is often scarce.

name: Hasterok Global Geological Provinces & Tectonic Plates
provider: Hasterok et al., Earth-Sci. Reviews 2022; Zenodo
theme_raw: 地质构造 / tectonic plates + geological provinces
formats_now: raster + vector zip (1.2 GB) with QGIS project
notes: Modern, peer-reviewed replacement for legacy USGS plate maps; with crust/orogeny attributes.
verify_notes: Hasterok global tectonics | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Hasterok 等人（《Earth-Science Reviews》2022）发布于 Zenodo 的全球地质省与构造板块数据集，是对传统 USGS 板块图的现代化、经同行评审的替代。数据以 shapefile、KML、GMT 及 QGIS 工程文件提供，约 1.2 GB，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可直接下载。数据集包含地壳类型、造山带等属性，适用于全球构造分析、地质制图与地球动力学研究。
desc_en: This is the global Geological Provinces and Tectonic Plates dataset by Hasterok et al. (Earth-Science Reviews, 2022), hosted on Zenodo as a modern, peer-reviewed replacement for legacy USGS plate maps. Data is provided as shapefile, KML, GMT, and a QGIS project (~1.2 GB) under a CC-BY 4.0 license and available for direct download. It includes crustal type, orogeny, and related attributes, making it suitable for global tectonic analysis, geological mapping, and geodynamic research.

name: Hazardous Sites (haz_site)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Hazards & disasters | Public services
notes: Point layer for site-specific health assessments.
verify_notes: MapServer subpath 404; folder exists | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是美国 CDC/ATSDR 发布的危险场地（haz_site）点状矢量服务，覆盖美国境内用于场地特定健康评估的危险物质场所。数据通过 ArcGIS REST MapServer 提供，可输出点要素服务与 GeoJSON，属公有领域，可自由使用。该图层主要用于环境健康评估、污染场地分析与公共卫生研究，帮助识别与人群健康相关的危险场地分布。
desc_en: This is the Hazardous Sites (haz_site) point vector service published by the U.S. CDC/ATSDR, covering hazardous-substance sites across the United States used for site-specific health assessments. Data is served through an ArcGIS REST MapServer and can be output as a point feature service and GeoJSON; it is in the public domain and freely reusable. The layer is primarily used for environmental-health assessment, contaminated-site analysis, and public-health research to identify the distribution of hazardous sites relevant to community health.

name: Health Facilities (CNES)
notes: Geocoded hospitals/clinics
verify_notes: Source CNES (Ministry of Health) | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 这是通过 R 语言 geobr 包访问的巴西卫生设施（CNES）矢量点数据，来源于巴西国家卫生设施登记系统（CNES/DataSUS），按季度更新（约 2017 年至 2026 年）。数据以 sf 矢量点形式返回，包含地理编码的医院、诊所等设施。geobr 仓库采用 MIT 许可，开放使用。该数据适用于巴西医疗资源可及性分析、卫生服务规划与公共卫生空间研究。
desc_en: This dataset provides Brazilian health facilities (CNES) as vector points accessible through the R package geobr, sourced from Brazil's National Registry of Health Establishments (CNES/DataSUS) and updated quarterly (roughly 2017 to 2026). Data is returned as sf point geometry covering geocoded hospitals, clinics, and other facilities, with the geobr repository released under the MIT license. It supports analyses of healthcare accessibility in Brazil, health-service planning, and spatial public-health research.

name: Hidrográfico Portugal — Aids to Navigation OGC API Features
notes: Niche, non-English maritime authority endpoint listed in OGC's official registry; rarely cataloged elsewhere.
verify_notes: pygeoapi 0.16.dev0 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是葡萄牙水文研究所（Instituto Hidrográfico de Portugal）提供的助航标志（Aids to Navigation）OGC API Features 服务，覆盖葡萄牙海域。数据通过 OGC API Features 接口以 GeoJSON 形式开放提供，遵循该机构使用条款。作为葡萄牙官方海事机构的小众端点，它已列入 OGC 官方注册表，但在其他目录中较少收录。该服务适用于海事导航、航道安全分析与海洋空间数据应用。
desc_en: This is the Aids to Navigation OGC API Features service from Portugal's Hydrographic Institute (Instituto Hidrográfico de Portugal), covering Portuguese waters. Data is openly served through an OGC API Features endpoint as GeoJSON under the institute's terms of use. As a niche endpoint from a national maritime authority, it is listed in the OGC's official registry but rarely cataloged elsewhere. The service is suited to maritime navigation, fairway-safety analysis, and marine spatial data applications.

name: Holocene Volcanoes of the World (Smithsonian GVP)
theme_raw: 火山 / Holocene volcano points (1,422 features)
formats: shapefile / CSV (also redistributed via SPREP and ArcGIS Hub)
notes: Smithsonian is the authoritative source; vector point dataset for volcano-related studies.
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch (likely UA block); page exists in practice | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全新世火山数据库由史密森尼学会全球火山计划（GVP）维护，是全球全新世以来活动火山的权威矢量点数据集，覆盖全球范围。数据以 shapefile / CSV 提供，并通过 SPREP 和 ArcGIS Hub 等渠道再分发，采用 CC-BY 许可，需注明 GVP 出处。作为火山学研究的权威来源，它广泛用于火山灾害评估、地球动力学分析与全球火山活动制图。
desc_en: The Holocene Volcanoes of the World database is maintained by the Smithsonian Global Volcanism Program (GVP) and is the authoritative vector point dataset of volcanoes active during the Holocene worldwide. Data is provided as shapefile and CSV and redistributed via channels such as SPREP and ArcGIS Hub under a CC-BY license requiring attribution to GVP. As the definitive source for volcanological reference, it is widely used for volcanic-hazard assessment, geodynamic analysis, and global mapping of volcanic activity.

name: HOTOSM Canada Populated Places (OpenStreetMap Export)
verify_notes: HDX returns 403 to WebFetch; bot blocked | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 这是人道主义 OpenStreetMap 团队（HOT）从 OpenStreetMap 提取的加拿大居民点数据集，覆盖加拿大的城镇、村庄等聚居地点位要素。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoJSON 提供，采用 ODbL 许可，可直接下载。作为 OSM 衍生的开放数据，它适用于人道主义响应、基础地图制作与区位分析，是获取加拿大居民点矢量数据的便捷来源。
desc_en: This is a HOT (Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team) export of populated places in Canada derived from OpenStreetMap, covering towns, villages, and other settlement points across the country. Data is provided as Shapefile and GeoJSON under the ODbL license and available for direct download. As OSM-derived open data, it is well suited to humanitarian response, base-map production, and location analysis, offering a convenient source of vector settlement data for Canada.

name: HOTOSM Philippines (north) Health Facilities
verify_notes: HDX returns 403 to WebFetch; bot blocked, likely page exists | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 这是人道主义 OpenStreetMap 团队（HOT）从 OpenStreetMap 提取的菲律宾北部卫生设施数据集，覆盖该区域的医院、诊所等公共卫生服务点。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoJSON 提供，采用 ODbL 许可，可直接下载。作为 OSM 衍生的开放数据，它适用于人道主义响应、医疗可及性分析与公共卫生规划，便于在数据相对稀缺的地区获取卫生设施位置信息。
desc_en: This is a HOT (Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team) export of health facilities in northern Philippines derived from OpenStreetMap, covering hospitals, clinics, and other public health service points across the region. Data is provided as Shapefile and GeoJSON under the ODbL license and available for direct download. As OSM-derived open data, it supports humanitarian response, healthcare-accessibility analysis, and public-health planning, making facility locations available in a region where authoritative data can be limited.

name: HYCOM-OceanTrack: Eulerian fields + Lagrangian trajectories
formats_now: text pointer to AWS Open Data
notes: Trajectories as point/polyline vector layers
verify_notes: Zenodo record contains only url.txt pointing to AWS | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HYCOM-OceanTrack 是发布于 Zenodo 的全球海洋数据集，结合了基于 1/25° HYCOM 模式的欧拉场与拉格朗日轨迹，时间跨度约一年。数据以 NetCDF 及轨迹矢量形式提供，轨迹可作为点或折线矢量图层加载，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，开放获取。该数据集适用于海洋环流分析、漂移物追踪、海洋连通性与海洋-海岸研究，为海洋动力学建模提供可复用的轨迹数据。
desc_en: HYCOM-OceanTrack is a global ocean dataset on Zenodo combining Eulerian fields from the 1/25° HYCOM model with Lagrangian trajectories over a one-year period. Data is provided as NetCDF plus trajectory vectors, with trajectories loadable as point or polyline vector layers, under a CC-BY 4.0 open-access license. The dataset supports ocean-circulation analysis, drifter and particle tracking, marine connectivity studies, and marine-coastal research, offering reusable trajectory data for ocean-dynamics modelling.

name: ICCA Registry — Indigenous and Community Conserved Areas polygons
notes: Service endpoint: data-gis.unep-wcmc.org/server/rest/services/ProtectedSites/icca_registry/MapServer
verify_notes: active multilingual portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ICCA 登记册由 UNEP-WCMC 与 ICCA 联盟共同维护，记录全球范围内由原住民与社区保护的区域（ICCA）多边形数据。数据通过 ArcGIS MapServer（icca_poly 图层）以矢量多边形形式提供，并与 Protected Planet 关联，访问与使用须遵循基于知情同意的站点特定许可。该数据集适用于生物多样性保护、原住民权益研究与保护区规划，强调社区主导的保护治理。
desc_en: The ICCA Registry, maintained by UNEP-WCMC and the ICCA Consortium, records polygons of Indigenous and Community Conserved Areas (ICCAs) worldwide. Data is provided as vector polygons via an ArcGIS MapServer (the icca_poly layer) and linked with Protected Planet, with access governed by site-specific, consent-based terms. The dataset supports biodiversity conservation, Indigenous-rights research, and protected-area planning, emphasizing community-led conservation governance and the recognition of locally managed conserved territories.

name: IDMC IDU GeoJSON API
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://backend.idmcdb.org/api/idus-view-flat-geojson))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://backend.idmcdb.org/api/idus-view-flat-geojson))
notes: Direct GeoJSON endpoint of recent displacement events as points.
verify_notes: IDMC backend API endpoint refused connection; may be moved or restricted | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://backend.idmcdb.org/api/idus-view-flat-geojson))
desc_zh: 这是内部流离失所监测中心（IDMC）提供的 IDU（内部流离失所更新）GeoJSON API，以 GeoJSON FeatureCollection 形式直接输出全球近期的流离失所事件点位数据。该公共 API 覆盖全球范围，遵循 IDMC 使用条款。数据适用于人道主义监测、灾害与冲突导致的流离失所分析及应急响应，便于实时获取并集成最新的流离失所事件空间信息。
desc_en: This is the IDMC (Internal Displacement Monitoring Centre) IDU GeoJSON API, which directly outputs recent internal-displacement events worldwide as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection of points. The public API has global coverage and is provided under IDMC's terms of use. The data supports humanitarian monitoring, analysis of displacement driven by disasters and conflict, and emergency response, making it easy to retrieve and integrate up-to-date spatial information on displacement events in near real time.

name: IOM Displacement Tracking Matrix (DTM) data
theme_raw: IDP sites, mobility tracking, flow monitoring points
license: IOM open data; CC BY-IGO on HDX mirror
verify_notes: 403 to bot; site exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国际移民组织（IOM）的流离失所追踪矩阵（DTM）数据，系统采集并监测约 80 个国家（涵盖非洲、中东北非、亚洲及拉美加勒比地区）的人口流动与流离失所情况。数据以 Shapefile、地理数据库、KML/KMZ 及 API 形式提供，开放获取，HDX 镜像版采用 CC BY-IGO 许可。该数据广泛用于人道主义响应、移民与流离失所分析及应急规划，是全球流离失所监测的核心数据源之一。
desc_en: The IOM Displacement Tracking Matrix (DTM) systematically collects and monitors population movement and displacement across roughly 80 countries spanning Africa, MENA, Asia, and Latin America and the Caribbean. Data is provided as Shapefile, geodatabase, KML/KMZ, and via API, openly accessible, with the HDX mirror under a CC BY-IGO license. It is widely used for humanitarian response, migration and displacement analysis, and emergency planning, serving as a core data source for global displacement monitoring.

name: Iter-X Open POI Datasets
notes: Travel-oriented open POI repository.
verify_notes: Small project, 22 commits | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Iter-X 开放 POI 数据集是由 Iter-X 社区维护的面向旅行场景的开放兴趣点仓库，按国家和城市组织，覆盖全球范围。数据以 GeoJSON 及结构化 JSON 形式托管于 GitHub，采用 MIT 许可，使用十分自由。该数据集适用于旅行应用开发、行程规划、地图可视化与 POI 数据集成，是一个轻量、便于二次开发的全球兴趣点资源。
desc_en: The Iter-X Open POI Datasets is a travel-oriented open repository of points of interest maintained by the Iter-X community, organized by country and city with global coverage. Data is hosted on GitHub as GeoJSON and structured JSON under the permissive MIT license, allowing very flexible reuse. The dataset is well suited to travel-application development, itinerary planning, map visualization, and POI data integration, offering a lightweight global resource that is easy to build upon.

name: IUCN Red List Spatial Data on USGS ScienceBase mirror
theme_raw: Catalog/metadata pointer for IUCN spatial layers
license: IUCN Red List Terms of Use
notes: Useful as a citable, persistent metadata record for IUCN spatial layers in federal/NSDI workflows.
verify_notes: ScienceBase item timed out | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 IUCN 红色名录空间数据在 USGS ScienceBase 上的镜像元数据记录，对应 IUCN 全球物种分布的矢量图层。数据以 Shapefile 形式提供（实际下载经由 IUCN 链接），遵循 IUCN 红色名录使用条款，元数据开放获取。作为可引用的持久元数据记录，它适用于将 IUCN 空间数据纳入美国联邦/NSDI 工作流，支持物种分布、生物多样性保护与栖息地分析研究。
desc_en: This is a USGS ScienceBase mirror metadata record for the IUCN Red List spatial data, corresponding to IUCN's global species distribution vector layers. Data is provided as shapefiles (with the actual download via the IUCN link) under the IUCN Red List Terms of Use, while the metadata itself is openly accessible. As a citable, persistent metadata record, it is useful for incorporating IUCN spatial layers into U.S. federal/NSDI workflows and supports species-distribution, biodiversity-conservation, and habitat-analysis research.

name: JRC LUCAS Harmonized Copernicus Polygons 2018
theme_canonical: POI / places | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Harmonized EU land cover/land use survey polygons
notes: Non-English-origin (EU). Companion THLOC point series also on GEE.
verify_notes: 63,287 LUCAS Copernicus polygons | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是欧盟联合研究中心（JRC）发布的 LUCAS 协调 Copernicus 多边形 2018 数据集，是欧盟范围内土地利用/覆盖的协调矢量样本，包含 63,287 个多边形，观测窗口涵盖 2006–2019 年。数据通过 Google Earth Engine 以 FeatureCollection 形式提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该数据集适用于土地覆盖制图、遥感分类训练与验证及农业景观研究，并配有 GEE 上的 THLOC 点系列作为补充。
desc_en: This is the JRC LUCAS Harmonized Copernicus Polygons 2018 dataset from the EU Joint Research Centre, a harmonised EU-wide vector sample of land use/cover comprising 63,287 polygons with an observation window of 2006–2019. Data is provided through Google Earth Engine as a FeatureCollection under a CC BY 4.0 license. The dataset is suited to land-cover mapping, training and validation of remote-sensing classifiers, and agricultural-landscape research, accompanied by a companion THLOC point series also available on GEE.

name: Kerala 2018 Monsoon Landslide Inventory
notes: 1437 landslide points with attributes
verify_notes: Data at DANS doi:10.17026/dans-x6c-y7x2; 4728 landslides | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是发布于《Earth System Science Data》（ESSD，Hao 等 2020）的喀拉拉邦 2018 季风滑坡清单，记录了 2018 年印度喀拉拉邦季风期间发生的 1437 处滑坡点及其属性。数据以点状 Shapefile 和 KML 提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，开放获取。该数据集适用于滑坡灾害分析、易发性建模与降雨诱发型地质灾害研究，为区域防灾减灾提供可靠的滑坡参考数据。
desc_en: This is the Kerala 2018 Monsoon Landslide Inventory published in Earth System Science Data (ESSD; Hao et al., 2020), documenting 1,437 landslide points with attributes that occurred during the 2018 monsoon in Kerala, India. Data is provided as a point shapefile and KML under a CC-BY 4.0 open-access license. The dataset supports landslide-hazard analysis, susceptibility modelling, and research on rainfall-triggered geohazards, providing reliable reference data for regional disaster risk reduction.

name: LaICa – Revised landslide inventory of the Campania region
theme_canonical: POI / places | Geology, soil & geomorphology | Hazards & disasters
notes: Open landslide inventory with point/polygon shapefiles
verify_notes: Nature SciData article; auth redirect for crawler but page is live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: LaICa 是发表于《Scientific Data》（2023）的意大利坎帕尼亚大区修订版滑坡清单，覆盖该区域的滑坡灾害事件，包含点与多边形几何。数据以 Shapefile 和 CSV 提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，开放获取。该数据集横跨地质地貌与灾害两大主题，适用于滑坡易发性建模、地质灾害分析与区域风险评估，为坎帕尼亚地区的地质灾害研究提供了经过修订、属性丰富的参考数据。
desc_en: LaICa is a revised landslide inventory of the Campania region in Italy, published in Scientific Data (2023), covering landslide events across the region with both point and polygon geometries. Data is provided as Shapefile and CSV under a CC-BY 4.0 open-access license. Spanning geomorphology and hazards themes, the dataset is suited to landslide-susceptibility modelling, geohazard analysis, and regional risk assessment, offering a revised, attribute-rich reference for geological-hazard research in the Campania region.

name: LUCAS — Land Use/Cover Area frame Survey microdata
theme_canonical: POI / places | Land cover & land use | Geology, soil & geomorphology
theme_raw: in-situ LULC sample points (agro-environmental, soil, grassland)
license_now: Eurostat open re-use (not explicit on page)
formats: CSV with X/Y (convertible to point shapefile/geojson)
notes: Important ground-truth resource. Harmonised database covers 2006-2018; LUCAS 2022 published in 2024.
desc_zh: LUCAS（土地利用/覆盖面积框架调查）是欧盟统计局（Eurostat）的实地调查微观数据，覆盖欧盟 27 国（含英国历史数据），调查年份包括 2006、2009、2012、2015、2018 和 2022 年。数据以含 X/Y 坐标的 CSV 提供，可转换为点状 shapefile 或 GeoJSON，遵循 Eurostat 开放再利用条款。作为重要的地面真值资源，它广泛用于土地覆盖遥感分类、农业与土壤研究及景观监测。
desc_en: LUCAS (Land Use/Cover Area frame Survey) is Eurostat's in-situ survey microdata covering the EU-27 (plus historical UK data), with survey years including 2006, 2009, 2012, 2015, 2018, and 2022. Data is provided as CSV with X/Y coordinates, convertible to point shapefiles or GeoJSON, under Eurostat's open re-use terms. As an important ground-truth resource, it is widely used for land-cover remote-sensing classification, agricultural and soil studies, and landscape monitoring; the harmonised database covers 2006–2018, with LUCAS 2022 published in 2024.

name: Main Roads WA Open Data Hub
formats: FeatureServer/REST, WFS, WMS, GeoJSON, Shapefile, CSV
notes: Excellent ArcGIS Hub model: every layer has WFS endpoint, FeatureServer URL, and download options.
verify_notes: WA Main Roads open data portal | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是西澳大利亚主干道路管理局（Main Roads Western Australia）的开放数据中心，提供该州道路网络及相关交通基础设施的矢量数据。数据通过 ArcGIS Hub 以 FeatureServer/REST、WFS、WMS、GeoJSON、Shapefile、CSV 等多种格式提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该平台是 ArcGIS Hub 的优秀范例，每个图层均配有 WFS 端点、FeatureServer URL 与下载选项，适用于交通规划、道路资产管理与区域空间分析。
desc_en: This is the open data hub of Main Roads Western Australia, providing vector data on the state's road network and related transport infrastructure. Data is delivered through ArcGIS Hub in multiple formats including FeatureServer/REST, WFS, WMS, GeoJSON, Shapefile, and CSV under a CC BY 4.0 license. The portal is an exemplary ArcGIS Hub model in which every layer offers a WFS endpoint, FeatureServer URL, and download options, making it well suited to transport planning, road-asset management, and regional spatial analysis.

name: MassGIS Land Cover/Land Use 2016 (Massachusetts)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Land cover & land use
notes: Exemplar US state-level vector LULC with WFS endpoint; many other states follow same pattern via ArcGIS Hub
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden to scraper; page likely still exists in browser | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: MassGIS 发布的 2016 年马萨诸塞州土地覆盖/土地利用矢量数据集，覆盖整个马萨诸塞州。它将州域划分为各类土地覆盖与用地类型的多边形，适用于规划、环境评估、城市扩张与不透水面分析等。数据以州级开放/公有方式提供，支持 Shapefile、文件地理数据库（FGDB）及 WFS/WMS 服务，并可通过 ArcGIS FeatureServer 直接调用，是美国州级矢量 LULC 数据的典型范例。
desc_en: A 2016 land cover/land use vector dataset for the U.S. state of Massachusetts published by MassGIS. It partitions the state into polygons classified by cover and use type, supporting land-use planning, environmental assessment, impervious-surface mapping, and urban-growth analysis. The data is released under an open/public-domain state license and offered as Shapefile, File Geodatabase, and via WFS/WMS services, with direct access through an ArcGIS FeatureServer. It serves as a representative example of state-level vector LULC data in the United States.

name: MobilityData GTFS resources index
theme_raw: GTFS specification, validator, schedule/realtime feed registry pointers
notes: Linked from TUMI page as canonical GTFS resource; gateway to MobilityDatabase feed catalog.
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; site likely blocks bots | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: MobilityData 维护的 GTFS 资源索引，是访问全球公共交通数据的权威门户。GTFS（通用公交数据规范）描述线路、站点、班次时刻等信息，被世界各地运营商广泛采用。该页面充当 MobilityDatabase 数据目录的入口，汇集各地多以开放方式提供的 GTFS 数据源，适用于出行规划、可达性分析与交通研究。
desc_en: A GTFS resource index maintained by MobilityData, serving as a canonical gateway to public-transit data worldwide. GTFS (General Transit Feed Specification) describes routes, stops, schedules, and trips and is widely adopted by transit agencies globally. This page acts as an entry point to the MobilityDatabase feed catalog, aggregating largely openly licensed GTFS feeds. It supports trip planning, accessibility analysis, and transportation research.

name: Mosquito Alert - GBIF Mosquito Occurrence Dataset
what_changes: Combines citizen-science Mosquito Alert reports (2014-2021) with GBIF infrastructure to publish a harmonized georeferenced mosquito occurrence vector dataset focused on Europe (esp. Spain).
notes: Published into GBIF and archived on Zenodo; downstream geographic vector points for disease-vector mosquitoes.
verify_notes: Mosquito Alert citizen science GBIF dataset paper (PDF only on this record) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Mosquito Alert 项目的蚊虫出现记录数据集，源自公民科学观测并发布到 GBIF，同时在 Zenodo 上归档。数据以点矢量形式记录与疾病传播相关的蚊种出现位置，可用于病媒监测、物种分布建模与公共卫生研究。数据集采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，体积约 2.6MB。
desc_en: A mosquito occurrence dataset from the Mosquito Alert project, derived from citizen-science observations, published into GBIF, and archived on Zenodo. It provides geographic point vectors recording locations of disease-vector mosquito species, useful for vector surveillance, species distribution modeling, and public-health research. The dataset is licensed under CC BY 4.0 and is about 2.6 MB in size.

name: NASA COOLR - Cooperative Open Online Landslide Repository
notes: Successor of Global Landslide Catalog; point events with metadata.
verify_notes: 404 not found; NASA GPM landslides data page moved/removed | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: NASA COOLR（合作式开放在线滑坡库）是全球滑坡事件的开放数据集，由 NASA GPM/戈达德团队维护，是早期全球滑坡目录（Global Landslide Catalog）的继任者。数据以点要素记录滑坡事件及其元数据（时间、触发因素等），覆盖全球，适用于灾害评估、降雨诱发滑坡研究与风险制图。提供 Shapefile、文件地理数据库、CSV 及 ArcGIS REST 接口，并配有 Landslide Viewer 在线查看器，许可为开放/公有领域。
desc_en: NASA COOLR (Cooperative Open Online Landslide Repository) is an open global dataset of landslide events maintained by NASA GPM/Goddard, succeeding the earlier Global Landslide Catalog. It records landslide events as point features with metadata such as date and trigger, covering the globe and supporting hazard assessment, rainfall-triggered landslide studies, and risk mapping. It is available as Shapefile, File Geodatabase, CSV, and ArcGIS REST endpoints, with an online Landslide Viewer, under an open/public-domain license.

name: NASA COOLR Global Landslide Catalog FeatureServer
notes: Cooperative Open Online Landslide Repository (events + reports, points & polygons)
verify_notes: Combines GLC+citizen science; EPSG:4326 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NASA COOLR 全球滑坡目录的 ArcGIS FeatureServer 服务端点，由 NASA GSFC 提供。该接口以点（及配套报告，含点与多边形）形式提供合作式开放在线滑坡库中的滑坡事件，覆盖全球，可直接在 GIS 与 Web 应用中调用。适用于灾害监测、滑坡事件可视化与空间分析，数据为 NASA 公有领域，并另有 Shapefile、FGDB、CSV 等格式。
desc_en: An ArcGIS FeatureServer endpoint for the NASA COOLR Global Landslide Catalog, provided by NASA GSFC. It serves landslide events (with accompanying reports, including points and polygons) from the Cooperative Open Online Landslide Repository, covering the globe and directly consumable in GIS and web applications. It supports hazard monitoring, event visualization, and spatial analysis. The data is in the NASA public domain and is also available as Shapefile, FGDB, and CSV.

name: NASA SEDAC Global Landslide Catalog (COOLR)
notes: Point vectors of reported landslides; also via NASA Open Data Portal
verify_notes: Static export dated 2016-03; live catalog at NASA | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NASA SEDAC/GSFC 提供的全球滑坡目录（COOLR）导出数据，覆盖全球、时间跨度自 2007 年至今。数据以点矢量形式记录已报告的滑坡事件，可经由 data.gov 与 NASA 开放数据门户获取，适用于灾害分析、降雨诱发滑坡研究与风险评估。格式包括 GeoJSON、Shapefile 及带坐标的 CSV；使用前需接受相关条款。
desc_en: A Global Landslide Catalog (COOLR) export provided by NASA SEDAC/GSFC, covering the globe from 2007 to the present. It records reported landslide events as point vectors and is accessible via data.gov and the NASA Open Data Portal, supporting hazard analysis, rainfall-triggered landslide research, and risk assessment. Formats include GeoJSON, Shapefile, and CSV with coordinates; acceptance of terms and conditions is required before use.

name: NCEI Ocean Exploration Cruise Tracks (AGOL)
theme_raw: Expedition ship tracks (polylines/points) with cruise metadata
formats: Zipped shapefile, file geodatabase, CSV (submitter spec)
notes: Attributes: cruiseID, vessel, PI, dates, mission group. Niche but well-curated polyline dataset of US federal ocean expeditions.
verify_notes: PDF (659KB) downloaded successfully; content binary | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NOAA NCEI 海洋探测项目的考察航迹数据集，记录 Okeanos Explorer 及合作船只的科考航线，覆盖全球。数据以折线矢量呈现，属性包含航次编号、船名、首席科学家、起止日期与任务组等，适用于海洋探测活动复盘、航次档案管理与考察足迹分析。提供压缩 Shapefile、文件地理数据库与 CSV（按提交规范），通过 ArcGIS Online 要素服务与归档下载获取，数据为公有领域。
desc_en: A cruise-track dataset from NOAA NCEI's Ocean Exploration program, documenting expedition routes of the Okeanos Explorer and partner vessels, with global coverage. The data is provided as polyline vectors with attributes such as cruise ID, vessel, principal investigator, dates, and mission group, supporting expedition review, cruise archiving, and survey-footprint analysis. It is offered as zipped Shapefile, File Geodatabase, and CSV via AGOL feature services and archive downloads, in the public domain.

name: NCEI Paleo Data Search - Study Locations
provider: NOAA NCEI World Data Service for Paleoclimatology
theme_raw: Ice-core, sediment-core, tree-ring, coral, speleothem study sites
