formats: KML (Google Earth interface), JSON metadata via Paleo Web Service; convertible to shapefile/GeoJSON
notes: Native vector export is KML/JSON points; no shapefile but readily ogr2ogr-able. Underused for global proxy meta-analysis.
verify_notes: Reachable; content minimal in fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NOAA NCEI 世界古气候数据服务的古气候数据检索系统，汇集全球一万多项研究的位置信息。其矢量产物以 KML/JSON 点形式给出各研究地点，可经古气候 Web 服务的 REST API 与 KML 下载获取，并可用 ogr2ogr 转为 Shapefile/GeoJSON。适用于全球代用资料（proxy）的元分析、古气候研究站点检索与空间汇总，数据为公有领域。
desc_en: A paleoclimatology data search system from NOAA NCEI's World Data Service for Paleoclimatology, indexing the locations of over 10,000 studies. Its native vector output presents study sites as KML/JSON points, accessible through a Paleo Web Service REST API and KML download, and readily convertible to Shapefile/GeoJSON via ogr2ogr. It supports global proxy meta-analysis, study-site discovery, and spatial aggregation, and is in the public domain.

name: NCEI/WDS Global Historical Tsunami Database (Events + Runups)
theme_raw: Tsunami source events & runups (2100 BC - present)
formats: Tab-delimited (lat/lon, GIS-ready), KML, ArcGIS REST point layers
notes: Point vector data of source events (2,400+) and observed runups.
verify_notes: NCEI Global Historical Tsunami Database (G02151) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NOAA NCEI/世界数据服务的全球历史海啸数据库，收录源事件与观测到的爬高（runup），覆盖全球、时间自公元前 2100 年至今，包含 2400 多次海啸事件。数据以点矢量记录海啸源事件与各地观测爬高，适用于海啸灾害评估、历史事件研究与沿海风险分析。提供制表符分隔（含经纬度、GIS 就绪）、KML 及 ArcGIS REST 点图层，可经 HaZEL 检索访问，许可不受限制。
desc_en: A Global Historical Tsunami Database from NOAA NCEI/World Data Service, comprising source events and observed runups, covering the globe from 2100 BC to the present with over 2,400 tsunamis. The data records tsunami source events and observed runups as point vectors, supporting tsunami hazard assessment, historical event research, and coastal risk analysis. It is available as tab-delimited (GIS-ready lat/lon), KML, and ArcGIS REST point layers via HaZEL search, under an unrestricted license.

name: NDH: Global Cyclone Hazard Frequency and Distribution v1
notes: Cyclone frequency derived from 1,600+ storm tracks (1980-2000); ArcGIS MapServer endpoint available.
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out; SEDAC content migrated to Earthdata | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NASA SEDAC/CIESIN/CHRR 发布的全球气旋灾害频率与分布数据集（NDH v1），覆盖全球。其气旋频率由 1980–2000 年间 1600 多条风暴路径推导而来，适用于全球热带气旋风险评估、灾害制图与多灾种叠加分析。提供 Shapefile 与 GeoTIFF 格式，并有 ArcGIS MapServer 服务端点，可免费获取。
desc_en: A Global Cyclone Hazard Frequency and Distribution dataset (NDH v1) from NASA SEDAC/CIESIN/CHRR, covering the globe. Cyclone frequency is derived from more than 1,600 storm tracks spanning 1980–2000, supporting global tropical-cyclone risk assessment, hazard mapping, and multi-hazard overlay analysis. It is provided as Shapefile and GeoTIFF, with an ArcGIS MapServer endpoint available, and is free to access.

name: NGA Anti-Shipping Activity Messages (ASAM)
formats: CSV, GeoJSON, KML, Shapefile (via MSI ASAM data download)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://msi.nga.mil/Publications/ASAM))
notes: Time-stamped piracy/anti-shipping incident points - another under-utilized MSI vector dataset alongside WPI.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden；NGA MSI ASAM 实际仍提供 KMZ/Shapefile 下载，需要正常浏览器 UA | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://msi.nga.mil/Publications/ASAM))
desc_zh: 美国 NGA 海事安全办公室（MSI）发布的反船舶活动信息（ASAM）数据集，记录全球海盗及反船舶事件，覆盖全球。数据以带时间戳的点要素呈现，适用于海上安全分析、海盗热点识别与航运风险评估，是 MSI 系列（如世界港口指数 WPI）中一项常被忽视的矢量数据。提供 CSV、GeoJSON、KML 与 Shapefile，开放获取，属美国公有领域。
desc_en: An Anti-Shipping Activity Messages (ASAM) dataset published by the U.S. NGA Maritime Safety Information office, recording piracy and anti-shipping incidents worldwide with global coverage. The data is provided as time-stamped point features, supporting maritime-security analysis, piracy-hotspot identification, and shipping risk assessment, and is an under-utilized MSI vector dataset alongside the World Port Index. It is available as CSV, GeoJSON, KML, and Shapefile, openly accessible and in the U.S. public domain.

name: NGA GEOnet Names Server (GNS)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geonames.nga.mil/geonames/GNSHome/index.html))
notes: Standard worldwide point gazetteer.
verify_notes: TLS certificate verification failure | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://geonames.nga.mil/geonames/GNSHome/index.html))
desc_zh: 美国国家地理空间情报局（NGA）的 GEOnet 地名服务（GNS），是标准的全球地名词典（不含美国本土）。数据以点坐标形式提供各国地名及其属性，可按国家批量下载，并可转为 Shapefile/GeoJSON。它是国际地名标准化、地理编码与制图的权威参考来源，采用制表符分隔格式，属美国政府公有领域。
desc_en: The GEOnet Names Server (GNS) from the U.S. National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency (NGA) is a standard worldwide gazetteer (excluding the United States). It provides place names and attributes as point coordinates, available as bulk per-country downloads and convertible to Shapefile/GeoJSON. It serves as an authoritative reference for international toponym standardization, geocoding, and cartography. The data uses a tab-delimited format and is in the U.S. government public domain.

name: NHC Best Track GIS Archive (HURDAT2 polylines)
notes: Annual best-track lines and points
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NOAA 国家飓风中心（NHC）的最佳路径 GIS 归档数据，对应 HURDAT2 数据库，覆盖大西洋（1851 年起）与东北太平洋（1949 年起）。数据以逐年的最佳路径线与点（含风强、气压等）记录热带气旋历史轨迹，适用于飓风气候分析、风险评估与历史风暴回溯。以 Shapefile 格式开放提供，属美国政府公有领域。
desc_en: The Best Track GIS Archive from NOAA's National Hurricane Center (NHC), corresponding to the HURDAT2 database, covering the Atlantic (from 1851) and Eastern Pacific (from 1949). It records historical tropical-cyclone tracks as annual best-track lines and points, supporting hurricane climatology, risk assessment, and historical storm analysis. The data is openly provided as Shapefiles and is in the U.S. government public domain.

name: NOAA CO-OPS GIS Data Portal (Currents stations, predictions)
theme_raw: Current stations, current predictions, tidal currents
notes: Vector point/line layers for currents observation/prediction stations; not gridded currents.
verify_notes: 301 to trailing slash | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NOAA CO-OPS 的 GIS 数据门户，提供海流观测/预报站点等矢量图层，覆盖美国及其领地。数据为站点的点/线矢量（而非格网化海流场），适用于潮汐与海流站网检索、沿海导航与基础设施分析。通过开放的 ArcGIS FeatureService、WMS、WFS 等 REST/OGC 服务获取，属美国政府公有领域。
desc_en: The GIS Data Portal from NOAA CO-OPS, providing vector layers such as currents observation and prediction stations, covering the U.S. and its territories. The data consists of point/line vectors for stations (not gridded current fields), supporting station-network discovery, coastal navigation, and infrastructure analysis. It is served through open ArcGIS FeatureService, WMS, and WFS REST/OGC endpoints and is in the U.S. government public domain.

name: NOAA US Climate Normals Tabular
notes: Annual/monthly/daily station normals as point vector.
verify_notes: JS-rendered page; reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NOAA NCEI 的美国气候平年值（Climate Normals）表格数据集，覆盖美国约 1 万至 1.5 万个气象站。数据以点几何记录各站的年、月、日气候平年值，适用于气候基线对比、农业与能源规划及区域气候分析。以 GeoParquet（含点几何）形式提供，通过 STAC 目录与 Azure Blob 访问（经 Microsoft Planetary Computer），属公有领域。
desc_en: A U.S. Climate Normals tabular dataset from NOAA NCEI, covering roughly 10,000–15,000 weather stations across the United States. It records annual, monthly, and daily climate normals at each station as point geometries, supporting climate-baseline comparison, agricultural and energy planning, and regional climate analysis. It is provided as GeoParquet with point geometries, accessible via a STAC catalog and Azure Blob (through the Microsoft Planetary Computer), and is in the public domain.

name: Northern Hemisphere Permafrost map (Obu et al. 2018)
theme_raw: 冻土 / permafrost extent and ground temperature
notes: Has accompanying vector PERZONES shapefile; cited as modern replacement for Brown et al. 2002 IPA map.
verify_notes: Obu et al. 2018 NH permafrost; license is CC-BY-3.0 (not 4.0) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Obu 等人（2018）发布的北半球多年冻土图，托管于 PANGAEA，覆盖整个北半球、参照期为 2000–2016 年。除栅格外，还附带多年冻土分区矢量 Shapefile（PERZONES，EPSG:3995），被视为对经典 Brown 等（2002）IPA 冻土图的现代替代。适用于冻土分布研究、寒区工程与气候变化分析，采用 CC-BY-3.0 许可，可直接下载。
desc_en: A Northern Hemisphere permafrost map by Obu et al. (2018), hosted on PANGAEA and covering the entire Northern Hemisphere for the 2000–2016 reference period. Alongside a raster, it includes an accompanying permafrost-zonation vector Shapefile (PERZONES, EPSG:3995), regarded as a modern replacement for the classic Brown et al. (2002) IPA map. It supports permafrost-distribution studies, cold-region engineering, and climate-change analysis. It is licensed under CC-BY-3.0 and available for direct download.

name: Norwegian Polar Institute Svalbard / Jan Mayen / Antarctic vector datasets
theme_canonical: POI / places | Marine & coastal | Physical geography (natural earth)
theme_raw: Glaciers, coastline, terrain, place names, sea ice edge
notes: Includes Svalbard glacier inventory and high-resolution coastline; Arctic SDI partner.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 挪威极地研究所（NPI）的矢量数据门户，覆盖斯瓦尔巴、扬马延及南极地区。数据集涵盖海岸线、冰川清单等多主题矢量要素（如斯瓦尔巴冰川清单与高分辨率海岸线），适用于极地制图、冰川与海岸研究及环境监测。提供 GeoPackage、Shapefile、GeoJSON 等格式，并支持 WFS/WMS 服务，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，是北极空间数据基础设施（Arctic SDI）的合作伙伴。
desc_en: A vector data portal from the Norwegian Polar Institute (NPI), covering Svalbard, Jan Mayen, and the Antarctic. The datasets span multiple themes such as coastlines and glacier inventories, including the Svalbard glacier inventory and a high-resolution coastline, supporting polar mapping, glacier and coastal research, and environmental monitoring. The data is offered as GeoPackage, Shapefile, and GeoJSON with WFS/WMS services, under a CC BY 4.0 license, and NPI is an Arctic SDI partner.

name: Ocean Biodiversity Information System (OBIS) – species occurrence + Species Distribution Maps
theme_canonical: POI / places | Marine & coastal | Protected areas & biodiversity
formats: DwC-A, GeoJSON via API, parquet on AWS Open Data
notes: OBIS-SEAMAP (Duke) is a sister dataset focused on marine megafauna polygons/tracks: https://seamap.env.duke.edu
verify_notes: Site live; specific licenses per dataset | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 海洋生物地理信息系统（OBIS）是由 IOC-UNESCO 协调、30 多个节点组成的全球海洋物种分布数据网络。其汇集约 1.99 亿条物种观测、覆盖 20.5 万个海洋物种、7000 多个数据集，并提供物种分布图。适用于海洋生物多样性研究、物种分布建模与保护规划。数据可经 API 获取，格式包括 Darwin Core Archive、GeoJSON 及 AWS 开放数据上的 Parquet，许可按各数据集而定（通常为 CC-BY 4.0/CC0）。
desc_en: The Ocean Biodiversity Information System (OBIS) is a global marine species-distribution network coordinated by IOC-UNESCO with over 30 nodes. It aggregates roughly 199 million species observations across about 205,000 marine species and 7,000+ datasets, and provides species distribution maps. It supports marine biodiversity research, species distribution modeling, and conservation planning. Data is accessible via an API in Darwin Core Archive, GeoJSON, and Parquet (on AWS Open Data), with licensing per dataset (typically CC-BY 4.0/CC0).

name: OGC API - Features Demo Endpoints
theme_raw: WFS 后继：Features API 示例服务
notes: 包含可达的 demo features 服务列表，WFS 现代替代
verify_notes: Not WebFetched; GitHub repo assumed alive | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OGC 提供的 OGC API - Features 示例端点集合，包含可访问的 demo 要素服务列表。OGC API - Features 是基于 REST/JSON 的现代标准，被视为传统 WFS 的接替者，用于按要素粒度发布与查询矢量地理数据。这些全球示例端点适用于学习标准、客户端开发测试与互操作演示，以 GeoJSON/HTML 输出，采用 OGC 许可。
desc_en: A collection of OGC API - Features demo endpoints provided by OGC, including a list of reachable demo feature services. OGC API - Features is a modern REST/JSON standard regarded as the successor to traditional WFS for publishing and querying vector geospatial data at the feature level. These global example endpoints support learning the standard, client development and testing, and interoperability demonstrations, outputting GeoJSON/HTML under an OGC license.

name: OHM Nominatim
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden to WebFetch; likely UA blocked | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: OpenHistoricalMap（OHM）的 Nominatim 地理编码服务，覆盖全球。它在 OHM 历史地图数据之上提供地名搜索与地理编码/反向地理编码，可返回 JSON/GeoJSON 结果，适用于历史地名查询、历史地理研究与历史地图应用开发。数据采用 ODbL 许可，公开可用。
desc_en: A Nominatim geocoding service for OpenHistoricalMap (OHM), with global coverage. Built on OHM's historical map data, it provides place-name search and geocoding/reverse geocoding, returning JSON/GeoJSON results. It supports historical place-name lookup, historical-geography research, and historical-map application development. The data is licensed under ODbL and publicly available.

name: OHM QLever SPARQL Endpoint
theme_raw: SPARQL queries on OHM planet RDF
verify_notes: QLever SPARQL endpoint UI active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 基于 QLever 的 OpenHistoricalMap（OHM）SPARQL 查询端点，覆盖全球。它将 OHM 历史地图数据以知识图谱方式开放，支持通过 SPARQL 进行语义查询，并可借助 WKT 输出 GeoJSON 几何，适用于历史地理的复杂时空检索、关联分析与研究。数据采用 ODbL 许可，公开可用。
desc_en: A QLever-powered SPARQL query endpoint for OpenHistoricalMap (OHM), with global coverage. It exposes OHM's historical map data as a knowledge graph queryable via SPARQL, with GeoJSON geometry available through WKT. It supports complex spatiotemporal querying, linked analysis, and research in historical geography. The data is licensed under ODbL and publicly available.

name: OpenCage Planet OSM mirror
notes: OSM planet 镜像下载目录
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenCage 维护的 OpenStreetMap 全球数据（planet）镜像下载目录。它以 osm.pbf 格式提供 OSM 全球数据的镜像，便于本地导入、地理编码服务搭建与大规模矢量数据处理。数据继承 OSM 的 ODbL 许可，可直接下载，是获取 OSM 全量数据的备用镜像之一。
desc_en: A mirror download directory of the OpenStreetMap global (planet) data maintained by OpenCage. It provides the OSM planet data as osm.pbf files, facilitating local imports, geocoding-service deployment, and large-scale vector data processing. The data inherits OSM's ODbL license and is available for direct download, serving as an alternative mirror for obtaining the full OSM dataset.

name: OpenFlights GeoJSON
notes: Point + line vector data for aviation network
verify_notes: Dormant but accessible; JavaScript CLI | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Tom MacWright 整理的 OpenFlights 数据 GeoJSON 版本，覆盖全球航空网络。数据以点（机场）与线（航线）矢量描述全球民航网络，适用于航空网络可视化、航线分析与连通性研究。以 GeoJSON 格式托管于 GitHub，便于直接在 Web 地图与 GIS 中使用，底层 OpenFlights 数据采用 ODbL 许可。
desc_en: A GeoJSON version of the OpenFlights data compiled by Tom MacWright, covering the global aviation network. It describes the worldwide civil-aviation network as point (airports) and line (routes) vectors, supporting aviation-network visualization, route analysis, and connectivity research. Hosted on GitHub as GeoJSON for easy use in web maps and GIS, the underlying OpenFlights data is licensed under ODbL.

name: OpenGeoHub SoilSamples (GeoPackage compilation)
theme_raw: Compiled soil profile point datasets bound to single GPKG
verify_notes: Repo moved to openlandmap org | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenGeoHub 维护的 SoilSamples 土壤样点合集，以 GeoPackage 形式汇编全球土壤剖面/样点数据。它整合多来源的土壤观测点，适用于土壤制图、SoilGrids 等模型训练与验证及土壤属性分析。数据以矢量点形式提供，托管于 GitHub，开放使用（仓库附有许可文件），覆盖全球。
desc_en: A SoilSamples compilation maintained by OpenGeoHub, assembling global soil profile/sample point data as a GeoPackage. It integrates soil observation points from multiple sources, supporting soil mapping, training and validation of models such as SoilGrids, and soil-property analysis. The data is provided as vector points, hosted on GitHub and openly usable (with a license file in the repository), covering the globe.

name: OpenLandMap Compiled ESS - Zenodo release v0.1
theme_raw: Frozen DOI snapshot of compiled point datasets
notes: Citable mirror of the GitLab repo; use this for reproducible workflows.
verify_notes: v0.1 published 2024-01-17 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenGeoHub 在 Zenodo 发布的 OpenLandMap 编译型环境科学样点数据（Compiled ESS，v0.1 版本），覆盖全球。它是 GitLab 仓库的可引用镜像，以 GPKG + RDS 打包提供，便于可复现的工作流。适用于土壤与环境变量的样点建模、训练数据准备与全球制图，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，体积约 9.2MB。
desc_en: A citable Zenodo release (v0.1) of OpenLandMap's Compiled ESS (Earth System Science) point data published by OpenGeoHub, covering the globe. It is a citable mirror of the GitLab repository, distributed as GPKG + RDS bundles for reproducible workflows. It supports point-based modeling of soil and environmental variables, training-data preparation, and global mapping. It is licensed under CC-BY 4.0 and is about 9.2 MB.

name: OpenLandMap Compiled ESS Point Data Sets (GitLab)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Hydrography | Geology, soil & geomorphology
theme_raw: Compendium of harmonised soil + ecology point datasets (SoilChemDB, SoilHydroDB, WRB types, biomass etc.)
notes: Primary upstream source for SoilGrids and OpenLandMap vector point inputs; non-English source data harmonised inside (BR, RU, CN, AU national legacy soil archives).
verify_notes: License reported as GPLv3 by repo (known field said CDLA-Permissive) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenLandMap 在 GitLab 上的编译型环境科学（ESS）样点数据仓库，覆盖全球、整合多来源数据。它是 SoilGrids 与 OpenLandMap 矢量样点输入的主要上游来源，内部已对多国遗产土壤档案（如巴西、俄罗斯、中国、澳大利亚等非英语来源）进行了协调整合。数据按主题以 GeoPackage 与 RDS 提供，可 git clone 获取，采用 GPL v3.0 或更高版本许可。
desc_en: A GitLab repository of OpenLandMap's Compiled ESS (Earth System Science) point datasets, covering the globe and integrating multiple sources. It is the primary upstream source for SoilGrids and OpenLandMap vector point inputs, internally harmonizing national legacy soil archives (including non-English sources from Brazil, Russia, China, and Australia). The data is provided per theme as GeoPackage and RDS, obtainable via git clone, and licensed under GPL v3.0 or later.

name: OpenLandMap soildb portal
theme_raw: Web front-end for the compiled soil points compendium
formats: GPKG + RDS (links out to Zenodo / GitLab)
notes: Useful entry point - lists every theme's GPKG and its DOI.
verify_notes: Portal aggregates global soil samples; Zenodo downloads | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenLandMap 的 soildb 门户，是访问其全球土壤样点数据库的入口。该门户列出各主题的 GPKG 数据集及对应 DOI，并链接至 Zenodo/GitLab，配合 zendown R 包使用，便于检索与下载。适用于土壤建模训练数据获取、数据溯源与可复现研究，数据采用 CC-BY-4.0（或按来源）许可，覆盖全球。
desc_en: The soildb portal of OpenLandMap, an entry point for accessing its global soil sample database. The portal lists each theme's GPKG dataset with its corresponding DOI and links out to Zenodo/GitLab, designed to work with the zendown R package for easy discovery and download. It supports obtaining training data for soil modeling, data provenance, and reproducible research. The data is licensed under CC-BY-4.0 (or per source) and covers the globe.

name: OpenLandMap SoilSamples compendium (book + data)
theme_raw: Curated index + import scripts for ~150 soil point datasets, many national/non-English
formats: GPKG outputs via Quarto book recipes
notes: Includes recipes for hard-to-find national archives (e.g. Brazilian FEBR, Russian RSPD, African AfSIS-SSL); each chapter writes a .gpkg. Underrated discovery tool for cold/non-English vector point sources.
verify_notes: Page reachable; license not extracted in summary | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: OpenGeoHub 的 SoilSamples 数据合集（含 Quarto 在线书与配套数据），覆盖全球。该书以可复现的配方（recipe）生成各章对应的 GPKG 输出，并涵盖一些难以获取的国家级档案（如巴西 FEBR、俄罗斯 RSPD、非洲 AfSIS-SSL）。适用于土壤样点数据汇编、冷门/非英语矢量点源的发现与模型训练，采用 CC BY-SA 4.0 许可。
desc_en: The SoilSamples compendium from OpenGeoHub, comprising an online Quarto book and accompanying data, covering the globe. Each chapter uses reproducible recipes to produce a GPKG output and includes hard-to-find national archives such as Brazil's FEBR, Russia's RSPD, and Africa's AfSIS-SSL. It supports soil-sample data compilation, discovery of obscure or non-English vector point sources, and model training, under a CC BY-SA 4.0 license.

name: OpenLandMap STAC catalog (vector collections)
theme_raw: STAC index of OpenLandMap assets; a small number of collections expose vector items (point compendia, lithology source polygons)
notes: Most STAC items are COG rasters - filter on item assets with media-type application/geopackage to find the (still few) vector ones.
verify_notes: STAC Browser page reachable but content sparse in summary | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenLandMap 的 STAC 目录，提供其矢量数据集合的检索入口，覆盖全球。其中多数 STAC 条目为 COG 栅格，可通过筛选媒体类型为 application/geopackage 的资产来定位为数不多的矢量数据。STAC 条目指向 .gpkg/.geojson 资产，适用于数据编程化检索与工作流集成，经 STAC API 访问，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。
desc_en: The STAC catalog of OpenLandMap, providing a discovery entry point for its vector data collections, covering the globe. Most STAC items are COG rasters, so the relatively few vector assets can be located by filtering on assets with the media type application/geopackage. STAC items point to .gpkg/.geojson assets, supporting programmatic data discovery and workflow integration. Accessible via a STAC API and licensed under CC BY 4.0.

name: OpenLandMap WRB soil-type points (SoilSamples ch. 035)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Geology, soil & geomorphology | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: Geo-referenced WRB Reference Soil Group observations
feature_count: about 70,000 training points with WRB soil type
notes: Vectorised counterpart to SoilGrids' raster WRB class map; useful as validation points.
verify_notes: Public GitHub repo file; WRB soil import script | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenLandMap SoilSamples 第 035 章的 WRB 土壤类型样点配方，覆盖全球。它通过 Quarto 配方构建一个 GeoPackage，包含约 7 万个带 WRB 土壤类型标签的训练点（基于 2023 年 4 月 10 日下载的 WoSIS 快照），是 SoilGrids 栅格 WRB 类别图的矢量化对应物，适用于土壤分类制图的训练与验证。许可见仓库 LICENSE 文件。
desc_en: The WRB soil-type point recipe in chapter 035 of OpenLandMap SoilSamples, covering the globe. Run as a Quarto recipe, it builds a GeoPackage containing about 70,000 training points labeled with WRB soil type (based on a WoSIS snapshot downloaded 10 April 2023), serving as the vectorized counterpart to SoilGrids' raster WRB class map and useful for training and validating soil-classification mapping. Licensing is per the repository LICENSE file.

name: OpenRailwayMap Overpass API mirror
theme_raw: railway lines, stations, signals, electrification, gauge, maxspeed
formats: JSON / GeoJSON via Overpass; station/milestone REST endpoints
notes: REST endpoints only resolve stations + mileage; bulk vector requires Overpass or osm2pgsql
verify_notes: Page updated 2025-09-22; CC-BY-SA tiles + ODbL data confirmed | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: OpenRailwayMap 项目的 Overpass API 镜像，提供基于 OpenStreetMap 的全球铁路矢量数据。其 REST 端点仅解析车站与里程标信息，批量铁路矢量需经 Overpass 或 osm2pgsql 提取。数据以 JSON/GeoJSON 形式提供，适用于铁路网络制图、轨道交通分析与基础设施研究，免费公开；数据采用 ODbL（瓦片为 CC-BY-SA 2.0）许可。
desc_en: An Overpass API mirror for the OpenRailwayMap project, providing global railway vector data based on OpenStreetMap. Its REST endpoints resolve only stations and mileage markers, while bulk railway vectors require Overpass or osm2pgsql. The data is provided as JSON/GeoJSON, supporting railway-network mapping, rail-transit analysis, and infrastructure research, and is free and public. The data is licensed under ODbL (tiles CC-BY-SA 2.0).

name: OpenSeaMap Harbours database
formats: OSM XML / JSON via OpenSeaMap harbour API
notes: Separate from main seamark schema; documented community endpoint for marina/port attributes
verify_notes: Public wiki | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: OpenSeaMap 的港口（Harbours）数据库，提供全球码头/港口的属性信息。它独立于主航标（seamark）模式，是社区记录的港口/泊位接口，适用于海事导航、码头与停泊设施查询及航海应用开发。数据经 OpenSeaMap 港口 API 以 OSM XML/JSON 形式提供，免费公开，采用 CC BY-SA 2.0 许可。
desc_en: The Harbours database from OpenSeaMap, providing marina/port attribute information worldwide. Separate from the main seamark schema, it is a community-documented endpoint for harbour and berth attributes, supporting maritime navigation, marina and mooring lookup, and nautical application development. The data is served as OSM XML/JSON via the OpenSeaMap harbour API, free and public, under a CC BY-SA 2.0 license.

name: OpenSeaMap SourceForge release archive
theme_raw: chart data, harbour DB dumps, KAP/CM93 conversion helpers
formats: SQL dumps, .osm, KAP (raster excluded), some shapefile-adjacent harbour exports
notes: Older but still hosts harbour/POI dumps and tooling; vector content among mixed assets
verify_notes: Last update 2016-09-19, project largely dormant; license shown as GPLv3 not ODbL/CC-BY-SA | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenSeaMap 在 SourceForge 上的发布归档（最后更新于 2016-09-19），提供港口/POI 数据导出与相关工具。归档内容混杂，包含 SQL 转储、.osm、部分接近 Shapefile 的港口导出等矢量内容（KAP 栅格除外）。虽较陈旧，但仍可用于获取历史港口/POI 数据与工具，覆盖全球，采用 GPLv3 及其他许可。
desc_en: The SourceForge release archive of OpenSeaMap (last updated 2016-09-19), providing harbour/POI data exports and related tooling. The archive holds mixed assets including SQL dumps, .osm files, and some shapefile-adjacent harbour exports as vector content (excluding KAP raster). Although older, it still hosts historical harbour/POI dumps and tools, with global coverage, under GPLv3 and other licenses.

name: OpenStreetMap
notes: OSM 主门户,全球开放矢量数据
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenStreetMap（OSM）是全球最大的开放协作式地理数据库，由志愿者社区共同构建，由 OpenStreetMap 基金会维护。它涵盖道路、建筑、水系、POI、行政边界等海量矢量要素，覆盖全球，是地图制作、地理编码、路径规划与各类空间分析的基础数据源。数据以 osm/pbf 等多种格式开放下载，采用 ODbL 许可。
desc_en: OpenStreetMap (OSM) is the world's largest open, collaborative geographic database, built by a volunteer community and stewarded by the OpenStreetMap Foundation. It contains vast vector features including roads, buildings, waterways, POIs, and administrative boundaries with global coverage, serving as a foundational data source for cartography, geocoding, routing, and many spatial analyses. The data is openly downloadable in formats such as osm/pbf and is licensed under ODbL.

name: OpenStreetMap France extracts
notes: OSM区域提取下载,ODbL许可
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OSM France 提供的 OpenStreetMap 区域提取下载服务，按地区/国家分块提供 OSM 矢量数据。数据以 osm.pbf 格式提供，便于按需获取特定区域的道路、POI、边界等要素并导入本地数据库，适用于区域级制图、路径规划与空间分析。数据采用 ODbL 许可，可直接下载。
desc_en: An OpenStreetMap regional extract download service provided by OSM France, offering OSM vector data split by region/country. The data is provided in osm.pbf format, making it easy to obtain features such as roads, POIs, and boundaries for specific areas and import them into local databases, supporting regional mapping, routing, and spatial analysis. The data is licensed under ODbL and available for direct download.

name: OpenStreetMap France replication diffs
notes: OSM replication diff data download directory
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenStreetMap France 提供的复制差分（replication diff）下载目录，发布 OSM 数据的增量更新文件，用于让本地 OSM 数据库与上游保持同步。数据以 osm.pbf 和 osc.gz 等格式提供，按时间间隔滚动更新，覆盖 OSM 全球协作的矢量地理要素（道路、POI、边界等）。采用 ODbL 开放数据库许可，支持直接下载，适合搭建和维护自有 OSM 镜像或路由/地理编码服务。
desc_en: A replication-diff download directory maintained by OpenStreetMap France, publishing incremental OSM updates so a local database can be kept synchronized with upstream. Files are distributed in formats such as osm.pbf and osc.gz and refreshed on a rolling schedule, covering the collaboratively mapped OSM vector features (roads, POIs, boundaries, and more). Released under the ODbL open database licence and available by direct download, it is well suited to building and maintaining a self-hosted OSM mirror or downstream routing and geocoding services.

name: OS Code-Point with Polygons / Code-Point Open
license: OS OpenData / OGL v3 (sector-level open; unit-level only as derived open data)
formats_now: Shapefile, GeoPackage, MapInfo MID/MIF, MapInfo TAB, Vector Tiles
notes: Derived open polygon products exist; full Code-Point unit polygons need OS license, but sector-level open derivatives are available.
verify_notes: Updated quarterly; license not stated on this page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国国家测绘局（Ordnance Survey）的 Code-Point 系列产品，将邮政编码与点位/多边形几何关联，覆盖整个大不列颠。完整的单元级 Code-Point with Polygons 需 OS 商业许可，而扇区级（sector-level）开放衍生数据则在 OS OpenData / OGL v3 条款下免费提供。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoPackage 格式发布，约每三个月更新一次，常用于邮编定位、配送分区与社会经济空间分析。
desc_en: An Ordnance Survey product family linking postcodes to point and polygon geometries across Great Britain. The full unit-level Code-Point with Polygons requires an OS commercial licence, while sector-level open derivatives are freely available under OS OpenData / OGL v3 terms. Data are published as Shapefile and GeoPackage and refreshed roughly every three months. It is widely used for postcode geolocation, delivery and catchment zoning, and socioeconomic spatial analysis tied to the UK postcode hierarchy.

name: OS Features API (Highways)
license: OS OpenData / OGL v3.0 for open layers, paid premium tiers exist
notes: OGC WFS endpoint for OS Highways layer (Highways_RoadLink, Highways_FerryLink, Highways_Street, Highways_ConnectingLink, Highways_PathLink, road/ferry/path nodes). 100-feature page limit; requires API key but free tier.
verify_notes: OS Data Hub 文档已整合迁移至 docs.os.uk | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国国家测绘局通过 OS Data Hub 提供的 OGC WFS 要素服务，重点暴露 Highways（道路网）图层，包括 RoadLink、FerryLink、Street、ConnectingLink、PathLink 及相应节点。覆盖英国（大不列颠），开放图层遵循 OS OpenData / OGL v3，另有付费高级层级。服务支持 WFS 2.0，输出 GML、GeoJSON，每页限 100 个要素并需免费 API 密钥。适合在线按需查询道路、渡轮与步道几何，用于交通与路网分析。
desc_en: An OGC WFS feature service from Ordnance Survey's OS Data Hub, exposing the Highways layer including Highways_RoadLink, FerryLink, Street, ConnectingLink, PathLink and associated road, ferry and path nodes. It covers Great Britain, with open layers under OS OpenData / OGL v3 alongside paid premium tiers. The endpoint supports WFS 2.0 and serves GML and GeoJSON, paged at 100 features and requiring a free API key. It suits on-demand querying of road, ferry and path geometry for transport and network analysis.

name: OSM France Polygons extracts
notes: OSM法国行政边界多边形下载目录
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenStreetMap France 维护的多边形提取下载目录，提供从 OSM 衍生的行政边界等区域多边形，常以 .poly 和 GeoJSON 格式发布。.poly 文件可用于裁剪 OSM 数据到特定区域，GeoJSON 则便于直接在 GIS 中使用。数据采用 ODbL 许可，支持直接下载，适合按行政区裁剪 OSM 提取、定义处理范围或进行边界相关的空间分析。
desc_en: A polygon-extracts download directory maintained by OpenStreetMap France, offering OSM-derived area polygons such as administrative boundaries, typically published as .poly and GeoJSON files. The .poly files are useful for clipping OSM data to a specific region, while GeoJSON is convenient for direct GIS use. Distributed under the ODbL licence and available by direct download, it is well suited to cutting OSM extracts by administrative area, defining processing footprints, or boundary-based spatial analysis.

name: OSMnx
theme_raw: OSM 街道网/POI/建筑/区域 → NetworkX 图与 GeoDataFrame
coverage: 全球；用 Overpass API 实时取数
formats: GeoPackage, Shapefile, GraphML, GeoJSON (通过 GeoPandas)
doi_or_citation: Boeing, G. 2024. JOSS / 多篇方法学论文
notes: 学术界标准工具；适合可重复研究；不适合大区域批量
verify_notes: OSMnx 2.1.0 docs | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OSMnx 是 Geoff Boeing（南加州大学）开发的 Python 库，可从 OpenStreetMap 通过 Overpass API 实时下载、构建、分析和可视化街道网络与城市要素，覆盖全球。它能直接获取可路由的图（GraphML）、建筑、POI、行政边界，并导出为 GeoPackage、Shapefile、GeoJSON（经 GeoPandas）。代码采用 MIT 许可、数据为 ODbL。作为学术界研究城市形态与街网分析的标准工具，适合可重复研究，但不适合超大区域的批量提取。
desc_en: OSMnx is a Python library by Geoff Boeing (USC) for downloading, constructing, analysing and visualising street networks and urban features from OpenStreetMap via the Overpass API, with global coverage. It can retrieve routable graphs (GraphML), buildings, POIs and administrative boundaries, exporting to GeoPackage, Shapefile and GeoJSON through GeoPandas. The code is MIT-licensed while the data are ODbL. A de facto academic standard for urban-form and street-network analysis, it is ideal for reproducible research but less suited to bulk extraction over very large regions.

name: OurAirports - Airport Comments
coverage: Global user comments attached to airport points
notes: Useful for qualitative attribute enrichment of airport point layer.
verify_notes: Raw CSV with forum/comment data accessible. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OurAirports 项目的机场评论数据集，收录由社区用户为全球机场点位附加的文字评论。数据以 CSV 提供，可通过机场标识与 airports.csv 关联，从而为机场点矢量图层补充定性属性信息。采用公共领域（Unlicense）授权，每日开放更新。适合在机场点数据基础上做属性丰富、众包信息整合或质性分析，而非作为独立的几何图层使用。
desc_en: A dataset of community-contributed comments attached to airport points worldwide, from the OurAirports project. Provided as CSV, it can be joined via airport identifiers to airports.csv to enrich an airport point layer with qualitative attribute information. Released into the public domain (Unlicense) and updated daily, it is best used to add crowdsourced context to airport point data or for qualitative analysis, rather than as a standalone geometry layer.

name: Overseas Military Bases (8 great powers)
coverage: Global; CN, US, UK, RU, JP, IN, UAE, FR bases up to Nov 2020
notes: Companion vector dataset in same BRI collection.
verify_notes: HKU Datahub returns 403 to WebFetch; likely UA/bot block, page exists | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 由香港大学 DataHub / BRINFAITH 发布的海外军事基地数据集，记录截至 2020 年 11 月八个大国（中、美、英、俄、日、印、阿联酋、法）的海外基地点位。数据以 Shapefile 点图层加表格属性提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可开放下载。作为同一 BRI 研究合集中的配套矢量数据，适合地缘政治、军事地理与国际关系方面的空间研究。具体属性以原数据说明为准。
desc_en: A dataset published via HKU DataHub / BRINFAITH recording overseas military base locations of eight great powers (China, US, UK, Russia, Japan, India, UAE, France) up to November 2020. It is provided as a Shapefile point layer plus tabular attributes under a CC BY 4.0 licence and is openly downloadable. As a companion vector dataset within the same Belt-and-Road research collection, it suits spatial study in geopolitics, military geography and international relations; refer to the source documentation for attribute details.

name: Overture POI Data for the United Kingdom (queryable subset)
provider: Ballantyne & Berragan, Geographic Data Science Lab, Univ. Liverpool
notes: Provides fully-queryable open POI product for UK research; example workflow others can replicate per-country.
verify_notes: arXiv preprint accessible; Overture UK POI subset paper | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由利物浦大学地理数据科学实验室（Ballantyne & Berragan）整理的英国 Overture POI 数据可查询子集，将 Overture Maps 的兴趣点数据转化为面向研究的开放产品。数据以 DuckDB、Parquet 和 GeoJSON 格式提供，可直接下载并配有 GitHub 工作流，许可继承自 Overture 的 CDLA Permissive 2.0。覆盖英国，作为可按国别复现的示例工作流，适合 POI 分析、城市研究与开放 POI 基准构建。
desc_en: A queryable open subset of Overture POI data for the United Kingdom, prepared by Ballantyne & Berragan of the Geographic Data Science Lab at the University of Liverpool, turning Overture Maps point-of-interest data into a research-ready product. It is provided as DuckDB, Parquet and GeoJSON with a documented GitHub workflow, under the CDLA Permissive 2.0 licence inherited from Overture. Covering the UK and serving as a per-country reproducible example, it suits POI analysis, urban research and building open POI baselines.

name: PANGAEA
theme_raw: georeferenced datasets, cruises, sediment cores, ecology
formats: tab-delimited with lat/lon; downloadable as point vectors; OGC WMS for some collections
notes: Every dataset georeferenced; not pure GIS portal but de facto largest vector point archive in Earth sciences.
verify_notes: PANGAEA registry entry; 444k+ datasets as of 2026-04 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: PANGAEA 是由德国 AWI（不来梅港）与 MARUM（不来梅）共同运营的地球与环境科学开放数据档案库。其每个数据集都经过地理参考，多以带经纬度的制表符分隔表格发布，可下载为点矢量，部分合集还提供 OGC WMS。许可方式因数据集而异（多为 CC 系列）。虽非纯 GIS 门户，却是地球科学领域事实上最大的矢量点数据归档，适合海洋学、古气候与环境观测的数据检索与重用。
desc_en: PANGAEA is an open data archive for Earth and environmental sciences operated jointly by AWI Bremerhaven and MARUM Bremen, Germany. Every dataset is georeferenced and most are published as tab-delimited tables with latitude/longitude that can be downloaded as point vectors, with OGC WMS available for some collections. Licensing varies by dataset (largely Creative Commons). Though not a pure GIS portal, it is the de facto largest vector point archive in the Earth sciences, ideal for discovery and reuse of oceanographic, palaeoclimate and environmental observations.

name: Panoramax
theme_raw: geolocated street-level photo points (vector point features)
notes: Vector point catalog of street-level images
verify_notes: STAC 1.1.0 catalog operational | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Panoramax 是由 OSM-FR 与法国国家地理院（IGN）等推动的开放街景平台，提供社区贡献的全球街道级影像。其 API 以 GeoJSON 和 STAC items 形式暴露影像点位目录，数据采用 CC-BY-SA 等开放许可。作为 Mapillary/Google Street View 的开放替代，适合按位置检索街景照片、为道路与 POI 制图提供地面实况，以及构建基于影像的城市与交通分析。
desc_en: Panoramax is an open street-level imagery platform driven by OSM-FR and France's IGN, providing community-contributed street view imagery worldwide. Its API exposes a catalog of image points as GeoJSON and STAC items, with data under open licences such as CC-BY-SA. As an open alternative to proprietary street-view services, it suits retrieving street-level photos by location, providing ground truth for road and POI mapping, and building imagery-based urban and transport analysis.

name: PDOK BGT (Basisregistratie Grootschalige Topografie) — land use polygons
theme_canonical: POI / places | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: Detailed Dutch national LULC (forest, agriculture, urban)
license_now: CC0 / public domain (BGT 标配, 页面未直接显示)
formats_now: WMTS; OGC API Vector Tiles; OGC API Features; Download API; Viewer
notes: One of the world's most detailed national open LULC vectors; full WFS endpoints
verify_notes: 页面提供多种 OGC API/下载入口 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BGT（大比例尺地形基础登记）是荷兰 Kadaster 通过 PDOK 平台提供的国家级大比例尺地形数据，覆盖整个荷兰，包含土地利用、道路、水体、建筑等高精度矢量要素。数据通过 WFS / OGC API Features 服务，并提供 GeoPackage、CityGML 等格式，通常作为公共领域/CC0 开放数据使用。作为全球最详尽的国家级开放土地利用矢量之一，适合城市规划、资产管理与精细化空间分析。
desc_en: BGT (Basisregistratie Grootschalige Topografie) is the Netherlands' national large-scale topographic registration, delivered by Kadaster through the PDOK platform and covering the whole country with high-precision vector features for land use, roads, water and buildings. It is served via WFS / OGC API Features and offered in formats including GeoPackage and CityGML, generally available as public-domain / CC0 open data. As one of the world's most detailed national open land-use vector datasets, it suits urban planning, asset management and fine-grained spatial analysis.

name: Pelias Placeholder build (WOF coarse geocoder)
notes: Pre-built placeholder index with multilingual name translations across WOF hierarchy — useful for non-English name lookups.
verify_notes: HTTP 404 Not Found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: Pelias Placeholder 是基于 Who's On First（WOF）地名层级构建的粗粒度地理编码索引，由 Geocode Earth / Pelias 提供，覆盖全球。它预构建为约 1.9GB 的 SQLite 索引（store.sqlite3.gz）并附 GeoJSON 提取，包含跨 WOF 层级的多语言地名翻译。采用 WOF 许可，通过 HTTPS 下载。其多语言名称查询能力尤其适合非英语地名解析、行政区划地理编码与本地化地图服务。
desc_en: Pelias Placeholder is a coarse geocoding index built on the Who's On First (WOF) place hierarchy, provided by Geocode Earth / Pelias with global coverage. It ships as a pre-built SQLite index of about 1.9GB (store.sqlite3.gz) plus a GeoJSON extract, containing multilingual name translations across the WOF hierarchy. Distributed under the WOF licence via HTTPS, its multilingual lookups make it especially useful for non-English place-name resolution, administrative geocoding and localized mapping services.

name: Pleiades Gazetteer of Ancient Places
provider: Institute for the Study of the Ancient World (NYU) et al.
theme_raw: Ancient (Greek/Roman/Near Eastern) places gazetteer with geometries
notes: Niche but heavily cited in digital humanities & historical GIS.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Pleiades 是由纽约大学古代世界研究所等机构维护的古代地名地理信息库，聚焦地中海与古代世界，记录古代地点的名称、位置与历史关联。数据以 GeoJSON、KML、CSV、RDF 等格式提供，按季度发布数据转储并在 GitHub 上维护，采用 CC BY 3.0 许可。虽属小众，却在数字人文与历史 GIS 领域被广泛引用，适合古代史、考古与历史地理研究。
desc_en: Pleiades is a gazetteer of ancient places maintained by the Institute for the Study of the Ancient World (NYU) and partners, focusing on the Mediterranean and the ancient world and recording the names, locations and historical associations of ancient sites. Data are offered in GeoJSON, KML, CSV and RDF, released as quarterly dumps and maintained on GitHub under a CC BY 3.0 licence. Though niche, it is heavily cited in digital humanities and historical GIS, suiting research in ancient history, archaeology and historical geography.

name: Polling Places (TSE)
notes: Election voting locations
verify_notes: geobr 2.0.0 docs; supports DuckDB/Arrow output | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 巴西投票站（Polling Places）数据集源自巴西高等选举法院（TSE），通过 geobr R 包提供，覆盖巴西历届偶数年选举（2010–2024）的投票地点点位。数据以矢量点（sf 对象）形式开放使用，可直接在 R 中读取。适合选举地理、投票可达性与公共服务分布的空间研究，便于与人口及行政边界数据叠加分析。具体属性以 TSE 原始来源为准。
desc_en: A dataset of Brazilian polling places sourced from the Superior Electoral Court (TSE) and delivered through the geobr R package, covering voting locations for even-year elections from 2010 to 2024. The data are provided as vector points (sf objects) that can be read directly in R and are openly available. They suit spatial research on electoral geography, voting accessibility and public-service distribution, and overlay readily with population and administrative-boundary data; refer to the TSE source for attribute specifics.

name: Populated Places (10m)
verify_notes: Binary zip downloaded successfully | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Natural Earth 的居民点（Populated Places）数据集，提供 1:10m 比例尺的全球城市与聚居点点位图层。数据以 Shapefile 格式发布，约 2.7MB，通过 CDN 直接下载，属公共领域，可自由使用。作为 Natural Earth 制图旗舰产品之一，常用于小比例尺世界地图、城市标注、专题图底图与全球尺度可视化，附带城市名称、人口等级等通用制图属性。
desc_en: Natural Earth's Populated Places dataset provides a global point layer of cities and settlements at 1:10 million scale. It is published as a roughly 2.7MB Shapefile, available by direct CDN download, and is in the public domain for unrestricted use. As one of Natural Earth's flagship cartographic products, it is widely used for small-scale world maps, city labelling, thematic basemaps and global-scale visualization, carrying standard cartographic attributes such as place names and population tiers.

name: Population Exposure Estimates in Proximity to Nuclear Power Plants, Locations v1
theme_canonical: POI / places | Population & socioeconomic | Energy & infrastructure
notes: Global nuclear reactor point locations with specs/performance attributes (as of 2012). KML available via GeoServer.
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out; SEDAC migrated to NASA Earthdata, page likely moved | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NASA SEDAC / CIESIN 发布的核电站位置数据集（v1），提供全球核反应堆点位及其规格与运行性能属性（截至 2012 年）。数据以 Shapefile 点、CSV 和 KML 格式免费提供，KML 可经 GeoServer 获取，是同一系列「核电站邻近人口暴露估算」研究的位置基础。适合能源基础设施制图、核安全与人口暴露评估，以及全球尺度的风险与基础设施分析。
desc_en: A dataset from NASA SEDAC / CIESIN providing global nuclear power plant locations with reactor specifications and performance attributes as of 2012. It is offered free as point Shapefile, CSV and KML, with KML available via GeoServer, and forms the location basis for the companion population-exposure-near-nuclear-plants study. It suits energy-infrastructure mapping, nuclear safety and population-exposure assessment, and global-scale risk and infrastructure analysis.

name: pygeoapi master demo — public OGC API Features
notes: Useful as a stable test endpoint and as an example of pygeoapi-powered services worldwide.
verify_notes: pygeoapi 0.24.dev0; 15+ collections | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: pygeoapi 主分支演示服务，由 geopython / pygeoapi 项目维护，公开提供基于 OGC API - Features 的示例数据集合（如湖泊、葡萄牙 POI 等，多源自 Natural Earth）。数据以 GeoJSON 和 OGC API Features 形式开放，属公共领域。它既是稳定可用的测试端点，也展示了 pygeoapi 驱动的标准化地理空间 API 形态，适合开发调试、教学演示与 OGC API 客户端集成。
desc_en: A master-branch demo service maintained by the geopython / pygeoapi project, publicly exposing sample collections (lakes, Portuguese POIs and more, largely Natural-Earth-derived) via OGC API - Features. Data are served as GeoJSON and OGC API Features and are public-domain. It doubles as a stable test endpoint and as a reference for pygeoapi-powered standardized geospatial services worldwide, making it useful for development and debugging, teaching demos and OGC API client integration.

name: QLever OSM-Planet
notes: Returns OSM geometries as WKT/GeoJSON for semantic queries
verify_notes: SPARQL engine over OSM planet | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: QLever OSM-Planet 是弗莱堡大学 AD 研究组提供的免费公共 SPARQL 端点，将全球 OpenStreetMap 数据以语义图形式开放查询。通过 SPARQL CONSTRUCT 可将 OSM 几何以 WKT 或 GeoJSON 返回，覆盖全球，数据遵循 ODbL 1.0 许可。QLever 以高性能著称，适合对 OSM 进行语义化、空间联合查询，以及将地理要素与其他知识图谱数据整合分析。
desc_en: QLever OSM-Planet is a free public SPARQL endpoint from the University of Freiburg's Algorithms and Data Structures chair, opening global OpenStreetMap data for semantic querying. Via SPARQL CONSTRUCT it returns OSM geometries as WKT or GeoJSON, with global coverage under the ODbL 1.0 licence. Known for high performance, QLever suits semantic and spatial join queries over OSM and integrating geographic features with other knowledge-graph data.

name: Quality controlled groundwater level India dataset
formats_now: CSV (via Figshare DOI: 10.6084/m9.figshare.29293877.v3); Python 处理脚本
notes: 国家级地下水矢量点数据 — 罕见公开
verify_notes: 印度地下水水位 QC 数据集, 2759 站点, 2000-2022 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Asoka、Mishra 等人发布的印度质量受控地下水位数据集，作为 Scientific Data（2025）论文的补充材料公开。数据覆盖印度，时间跨度 2000–2022 年，按季度（1、5、8、11 月）记录，从 32,299 口井中筛选出 2,759 口可靠监测井。以 Shapefile 加 CSV 形式提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。作为罕见的国家级公开地下水矢量点数据，适合水文、地下水管理与气候水资源研究。
desc_en: A quality-controlled groundwater level dataset for India by Asoka, Mishra and colleagues, released as a supplement to a Scientific Data (2025) paper. Covering India over 2000–2022 with seasonal records (January, May, August, November), it retains 2,759 reliable wells filtered from 32,299. It is provided as Shapefile plus CSV under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. As a rare openly available national groundwater vector point dataset, it suits hydrology, groundwater management and climate-water research.

name: Resource Watch API (geostore + dataset endpoints)
theme_raw: API gateway for RW + GFW vector data
formats: GeoJSON in/out, SQL over CARTO-hosted vectors
access: Public REST, API key for write
notes: Geostore objects accept GeoJSON FeatureCollections; validates with ST_MakeValid. Useful for programmatic vector AOI workflows.
verify_notes: Resource Watch API reference fully accessible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Resource Watch API 由世界资源研究所（WRI）提供，包含 geostore 与 dataset 端点，支持对 CARTO 托管的矢量数据进行 SQL 查询和 GeoJSON 收发，覆盖全球环境与可持续发展主题数据。geostore 对象接受 GeoJSON FeatureCollection 并通过 ST_MakeValid 校验。读取公开、写入需 API 密钥，遵循 Resource Watch 服务条款与署名要求。适合程序化构建分析区域（AOI）与环境数据集成工作流。
desc_en: The Resource Watch API from the World Resources Institute (WRI) offers geostore and dataset endpoints supporting SQL queries over CARTO-hosted vectors and GeoJSON input/output, covering global environmental and sustainability datasets. Geostore objects accept GeoJSON FeatureCollections and validate with ST_MakeValid. Reads are public while writes need an API key, under Resource Watch terms of service and attribution requirements. It suits programmatic area-of-interest construction and environmental data integration workflows.

name: RSPO Palm Oil Mills
notes: Point dataset of certified palm oil mills
verify_notes: RSPO Palm Oil Mills page reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: RSPO 棕榈油加工厂数据集，由 WRI / Global Forest Watch 基于 RSPO（可持续棕榈油圆桌会议）发布，记录全球 RSPO 成员认证棕榈油厂的点位。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、CSV、KML 多种格式开放提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。适合供应链可追溯、毁林驱动分析、可持续采购与棕榈油产业的空间监测，可与森林覆盖与土地利用数据叠加使用。
desc_en: A point dataset of certified palm oil mills published by WRI / Global Forest Watch based on the RSPO (Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil), recording mills of RSPO members worldwide. It is openly available in Shapefile, GeoJSON, CSV and KML under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It suits supply-chain traceability, deforestation-driver analysis, sustainable sourcing and spatial monitoring of the palm oil industry, and overlays well with forest-cover and land-use data.

name: SAL - Suburbs and Localities (ABS)
notes: ABS Mesh Block approximation of gazetted localities; replaces former State Suburbs (SSC)
verify_notes: SAL (Statistical Area / Suburb-Locality) page reachable, content minimal in fetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SAL（郊区与地方，Suburbs and Localities）数据集由澳大利亚统计局（ABS）发布，覆盖全澳，是对法定地名（gazetted localities）的网格块（Mesh Block）近似边界，取代了原先的州郊区（SSC）分类。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 FeatureServer 形式开放提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。适合地址标准化、地名匹配、人口普查数据空间聚合与区域统计分析。
desc_en: The SAL (Suburbs and Localities) dataset published by the Australian Bureau of Statistics covers all of Australia as a Mesh Block approximation of gazetted localities, replacing the former State Suburbs (SSC) classification. It is openly provided as Shapefile, GeoJSON and FeatureServer under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It suits address standardization, place-name matching, spatial aggregation of census data and regional statistical analysis.

name: Satellite pixel-based classification maps for placer occurrence
notes: Vector targets derived from Sentinel-2/Landsat-9/EnMAP/WorldView-3
verify_notes: Satellite pixel-based classification maps for placer occurrence | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 发布于 Zenodo 的砂矿（placer）赋存基于卫星像素分类的成果数据集，覆盖海岸砂矿目标区，提供从遥感影像衍生的矢量目标与栅格分类图。矢量目标由 Sentinel-2、Landsat-9、EnMAP、WorldView-3 等多源影像分类得到，以 Shapefile 与 GeoTIFF 格式提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放下载。适合矿产勘查、海岸地质与多光谱遥感分类方法研究。
desc_en: A Zenodo-hosted dataset of satellite pixel-based classification maps for placer occurrence, covering coastal placer target sites and providing both remote-sensing-derived vector targets and raster classification maps. The vector targets are derived from multi-sensor imagery including Sentinel-2, Landsat-9, EnMAP and WorldView-3, supplied as Shapefile and GeoTIFF under a CC-BY-4.0 licence for open download. It suits mineral prospecting, coastal geology and multispectral remote-sensing classification research.

name: Schools (INEP)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Population & socioeconomic | Public services
notes: Geocoded school census
verify_notes: Source INEP | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 巴西学校（Schools）数据集源自巴西教育研究院 INEP 的学校普查，通过 geobr R 包提供地理编码的学校点位，覆盖巴西 2007–2025 年。数据以矢量点（sf 对象）形式开放，可直接在 R 中读取，仓库采用 MIT 许可。适合教育可达性、公共服务分布、人口与社会经济空间分析，便于与人口和行政边界数据叠加。具体属性以 INEP 原始来源为准。
desc_en: A dataset of Brazilian schools derived from the INEP school census, providing geocoded school points through the geobr R package and covering Brazil from 2007 to 2025. The data are openly available as vector points (sf objects) readable directly in R, with the repository under an MIT licence. It suits education accessibility, public-service distribution and population/socioeconomic spatial analysis, overlaying readily with demographic and administrative data; refer to INEP for attribute details.

name: Smithsonian / USGS Global Volcanism Program — Holocene volcanoes
notes: Volcano points + eruption polygons; weekly activity feed
verify_notes: WAF 403 to bot fetch; site otherwise live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 史密森尼学会全球火山计划（GVP）数据，与 USGS 合作维护，提供全球全新世（Holocene）火山点位及当前喷发信息。数据包含火山点、喷发多边形及每周活动动态，以 KML、Shapefile 和经 WFS 的 GeoJSON 等格式开放提供，采用 CC BY 许可。作为权威的全球火山参考数据，适合火山灾害评估、喷发监测、地质与灾害风险研究。
desc_en: Data from the Smithsonian Global Volcanism Program (GVP), maintained with the USGS, providing global Holocene volcano locations and current eruption information. It includes volcano points, eruption polygons and a weekly activity feed, openly available as KML, Shapefile and GeoJSON via WFS under a CC BY licence. As an authoritative global volcano reference, it suits volcanic hazard assessment, eruption monitoring, and geological and disaster-risk research.

name: SoilChemDB (theme of Compiled ESS)
theme_raw: Soil chemistry observations (pH, OC, CEC, nutrients) as points
notes: Direct vectorised training-point layer used by OpenLandMap SOC and pH models.
verify_notes: GitLab tree loaded; minimal content shown but page exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SoilChemDB 是 OpenLandMap「Compiled ESS 点数据集」中的土壤化学主题，汇编全球土壤化学训练点，直接用于 OpenLandMap 的土壤有机碳（SOC）与 pH 等模型。数据以 GeoPackage 格式输入/输出，通过 GitLab 原始文件或 git 获取，采用 CDLA-Permissive 许可。作为机器学习制图的矢量训练点图层，适合数字土壤制图、土壤属性建模与全球尺度环境分析。
desc_en: SoilChemDB is the soil-chemistry theme within OpenLandMap's Compiled ESS point datasets, assembling global soil chemistry training points used directly by OpenLandMap's soil organic carbon (SOC) and pH models. The data are handled as GeoPackage in and out, accessed via GitLab raw files or git under a CDLA-Permissive licence. As a vectorised training-point layer for machine-learning mapping, it suits digital soil mapping, soil-property modelling and global-scale environmental analysis.

name: SoilHydroDB (theme of Compiled ESS)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Hydrography | Geology, soil & geomorphology
theme_raw: Soil hydraulic properties (water retention, Ksat) points
notes: Aggregates UNSODA, HYBRAS (Brazil), EU-HYDI, SWIG into one .gpkg; rarely cited outside pedotransfer literature.
verify_notes: GitLab page loads, content JS-rendered (Loading state) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SoilHydroDB 是 OpenLandMap「Compiled ESS 点数据集」中的土壤水文主题，将 UNSODA、HYBRAS（巴西）、EU-HYDI、SWIG 等多个来源整合为统一的 GeoPackage，覆盖全球（以欧盟和美国遗留数据为主）。通过 GitLab 获取，采用 CDLA-Permissive 许可。适合土壤水力性质（持水、导水）建模与传递函数（pedotransfer）研究，是该领域较专门的训练数据汇编。
desc_en: SoilHydroDB is the soil-hydrology theme within OpenLandMap's Compiled ESS point datasets, aggregating sources such as UNSODA, HYBRAS (Brazil), EU-HYDI and SWIG into a single GeoPackage, with global coverage weighted toward EU and US legacy data. Accessed via GitLab under a CDLA-Permissive licence, it suits modelling of soil hydraulic properties (water retention and conductivity) and pedotransfer-function research, serving as a specialised training-data compilation rarely cited outside that literature.

name: STAC Index — global STAC catalog directory
formats: STAC catalogs/APIs (some with vector GeoParquet assets)
notes: Primary place to discover STAC catalogs; filter ecosystem for GeoParquet/vector tools. Includes Overture, Source Cooperative, fiboa references.
verify_notes: WebFetch returned minimal content but page is reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: STAC Index 是由 Radiant Earth 与社区维护的全球 STAC（时空资产目录）目录索引，是发现 STAC 目录与 API 的主要入口，覆盖全球。它列出大量公开 STAC 目录，可按生态系统筛选支持 GeoParquet 与矢量工具的条目，并收录 Overture、Source Cooperative、fiboa 等参考。各目录许可不一，开放访问。适合检索遥感与地理空间资产、构建 STAC 驱动的数据发现与处理流水线。
desc_en: STAC Index is a global directory of SpatioTemporal Asset Catalogs maintained by Radiant Earth and the community, serving as the primary place to discover STAC catalogs and APIs worldwide. It lists many public STAC catalogs, lets you filter the ecosystem for GeoParquet and vector tooling, and includes references such as Overture, Source Cooperative and fiboa. Licensing is per-catalog and access is open. It suits discovering remote-sensing and geospatial assets and building STAC-driven data discovery and processing pipelines.

name: Statistics Canada Dissemination Area / Block / CSD ArcGIS REST + WMS
theme_raw: Dissemination areas, blocks, census subdivisions, tracts, FSAs
formats: ArcGIS REST MapServer, WMS, GeoJSON, GML, File GDB
notes: REST endpoints often missed by users who download shapefiles only; supports server-side filtering.
verify_notes: Endpoint returns 404; service path likely moved within StatCan REST tree | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 加拿大统计局通过 NRCan 的 webservices.maps.canada.ca 提供的传播区（Dissemination Area）、区块及人口普查区划（CSD）ArcGIS REST 与 WMS 服务，覆盖加拿大。端点支持 ArcGIS REST MapServer、WMS、GeoJSON、GML 及 File GDB，并允许服务器端筛选，对应目录号 92-169-X，遵循加拿大开放政府许可（OGL）。这些 REST 端点常被只下载 Shapefile 的用户忽略，适合人口普查统计、社会经济与区域空间分析。
desc_en: Statistics Canada Dissemination Area, Block and Census Subdivision (CSD) services delivered as ArcGIS REST and WMS through NRCan's webservices.maps.canada.ca, covering Canada. The endpoints support ArcGIS REST MapServer, WMS, GeoJSON, GML and File GDB with server-side filtering, correspond to Catalogue 92-169-X, and are under the Open Government Licence – Canada. Often overlooked by users who only download shapefiles, they suit census statistics, socioeconomic and regional spatial analysis.

name: Stedsnavn (Place names)
verify_notes: Place names dataset | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: Stedsnavn（地名）数据集由挪威国家测绘局 Kartverket 发布，提供挪威官方地名点数据，覆盖全国。数据以 GML、SOSI 及 GeoJSON 格式提供，可下载或通过 WFS 获取，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。作为权威的国家地名库，适合地名匹配、地理编码、地图标注以及与行政与地形数据的空间整合。
desc_en: The Stedsnavn (place names) dataset published by Norway's national mapping authority Kartverket provides official Norwegian place-name points with nationwide coverage. It is offered in GML, SOSI and GeoJSON formats, available by download or via WFS under a CC BY 4.0 licence. As an authoritative national gazetteer, it suits place-name matching, geocoding, map labelling and spatial integration with administrative and topographic data.

name: SURE 2.0 - Worldwide Surface Rupture Database
notes: Line shapefiles of rupture traces for fault displacement hazard analysis
verify_notes: SURE 2.0 surface rupture DB, ~13.3MB total, 50 earthquakes | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SURE 2.0 是发布于 Zenodo 的全球地表破裂数据库，配套 Scientific Data 论文（Baize 等，2022），收录全球 50 次产生地表破裂的地震的破裂迹线。数据以线状 Shapefile 加表格属性提供，约 13.3MB，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可开放下载。专为断层位错灾害分析（FDHA）设计，适合地震地质、断层活动性与地表破裂灾害评估研究。
desc_en: SURE 2.0 is a worldwide surface rupture database hosted on Zenodo, accompanying a Scientific Data paper (Baize et al., 2022) and compiling rupture traces from 50 surface-rupturing earthquakes globally. It is provided as line Shapefiles plus tabular attributes at about 13.3MB under a CC BY 4.0 licence for open download. Built for fault displacement hazard analysis (FDHA), it suits earthquake geology, fault-activity and surface-rupture hazard assessment research.

name: Sustainability Consortium - Drivers of Global Deforestation repo (R model)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Hydrography | Land cover & land use
formats: CSV training points + GeoTIFF (vector training points only)
notes: Official code repo for aau3445; vector inputs are CSV point training samples
verify_notes: Repo exists; 2018 Curtis et al forest loss driver classification model; no license file visible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 The Sustainability Consortium 维护的「全球毁林驱动因素」代码仓库，是 Curtis 等（2018, aau3445）研究的官方 R 模型代码库，覆盖全球。其矢量输入为 CSV 格式的点训练样本，配合 GeoTIFF 栅格使用。仓库未附明确的 LICENSE 文件，通过 GitHub 获取。适合复现全球毁林驱动分类、土地利用变化建模与遥感训练数据方法研究。
desc_en: The 'Drivers of Global Deforestation' repository maintained by The Sustainability Consortium is the official R model codebase for the Curtis et al. (2018, aau3445) study, with global scope. Its vector inputs are CSV point training samples used alongside GeoTIFF rasters. The repository carries no explicit LICENSE file and is accessed via GitHub. It suits reproducing global deforestation-driver classification, land-use-change modelling and remote-sensing training-data methodology.

name: SVRGIS - Tornado/Hail/Wind Tracks (SPC)
theme_raw: Severe local storms - tracks & start points
notes: Six datasets: torn-aspath, torn-initpoint, hail-aspath, hail-initpoint, wind-aspath, wind-initpoint. Underlies Storm Events DB.
verify_notes: Tornado/hail/wind tracks 1950-2025; no explicit license string but US gov public domain. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SVRGIS 是 NOAA NWS 风暴预报中心（SPC）提供的龙卷风、冰雹与大风路径数据，覆盖美国本土（CONUS），龙卷风记录自 1950 年、冰雹与大风自 1955 年至 2025 年。包含六套数据：龙卷风/冰雹/大风的路径线（as-path）与起始点（init-point），以 Shapefile 提供，属公共领域，压缩包直接下载（最大约 55MB）。作为 Storm Events 数据库的底层数据，适合强对流天气灾害与气候趋势研究。
desc_en: SVRGIS provides tornado, hail and wind track data from NOAA NWS Storm Prediction Center (SPC), covering the contiguous US, with tornadoes from 1950 and hail and wind from 1955 through 2025. It comprises six datasets — as-path lines and initial points for tornadoes, hail and wind — supplied as Shapefiles in the public domain by zipped direct download (up to roughly 55MB). Underlying the Storm Events database, it suits severe-convective-weather hazard and climate-trend research.

name: Taiwan OSM Extracts
notes: OSM 台湾区域提取下载,矢量数据
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 台湾 OSM 提取数据，由 OSM 台湾社区成员 kcwu 维护的镜像提供，发布台湾区域的 OpenStreetMap 矢量数据。数据以 osm.pbf 与 osm.bz2 格式提供，支持直接下载，采用 ODbL 许可。包含道路、POI、建筑、边界等 OSM 协作要素，适合作为台湾区域路由、地理编码、制图与本地化 GIS 应用的数据源，避免下载整个 OSM 星球文件。
desc_en: Taiwan OSM extracts provided by a mirror maintained by kcwu of the OSM Taiwan community, publishing OpenStreetMap vector data for the Taiwan region. Data are offered in osm.pbf and osm.bz2 formats for direct download under the ODbL licence, covering collaboratively mapped OSM features such as roads, POIs, buildings and boundaries. It serves as a convenient regional data source for routing, geocoding, cartography and localized GIS applications without downloading the full OSM planet file.

name: TfL GIS Open Data Hub
theme_raw: public transit - tube/rail/bus stops, lines, cycle network
formats: ArcGIS FeatureServer, GeoJSON, Shapefile, WFS, KML
notes: Includes LU/Overground/DLR station points and line geometries; cycle hire docking stations, bus stop nodes.
verify_notes: TfL GIS Open Data Hub | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 伦敦交通局（TfL）GIS 开放数据中心，提供大伦敦地区的交通空间数据，包括地铁、地上铁、DLR 车站点位与线路几何，以及共享单车停靠站、公交站点节点等。数据通过 ArcGIS FeatureServer、GeoJSON、Shapefile、WFS、KML 等多种形式提供，遵循 TfL 开放数据条款（开放、需署名）。适合伦敦城市交通分析、可达性研究、出行规划与公共交通网络可视化。
desc_en: The Transport for London (TfL) GIS Open Data Hub provides transport spatial data for Greater London, including Underground, Overground and DLR station points and line geometries, plus cycle-hire docking stations and bus-stop nodes. Data are served via ArcGIS FeatureServer, GeoJSON, Shapefile, WFS and KML under TfL's open data terms (open, with attribution). It suits London urban-transport analysis, accessibility research, journey planning and public-transit network visualization.

name: TIGER/Line POI-adjacent point features (landmarks)
notes: Government open POI vector layer (schools, hospitals, cemeteries, etc.) — a canonical authoritative open POI source for the US referenced as baseline in POI conflation literature.
verify_notes: 2025 release Sep 23 2025 | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 美国人口普查局发布的 TIGER/Line 地标点要素图层，覆盖全美，包含学校、医院、墓地等公共与地标设施的矢量点数据。作为权威的政府开放 POI 数据源，常被 POI 配准与融合研究用作基线参照。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoPackage 格式提供，可直接下载，属美国政府公有领域，无使用限制，便于与其他地理数据集成。
desc_en: The U.S. Census Bureau's TIGER/Line landmark point features layer provides nationwide vector points for public and landmark facilities such as schools, hospitals, and cemeteries. As an authoritative government open POI source, it is frequently cited as a baseline reference in POI conflation and matching research. Distributed as Shapefile and GeoPackage via direct download, the data falls under U.S. Government public domain with no usage restrictions, making it easy to integrate with other geospatial datasets.

name: transport.data.gouv.fr (PAN - Point d'Acces National)
theme_raw: Public transit, bike-share, on-demand transport, parking, EV charging
feature_count: 475 public transit + 142 vehicle sharing + 38 road + 57 carpooling + 31 bike + others (387 offres)
notes: EU MMTIS-compliant National Access Point - many EU countries have analogous portals (DE: mobilithek.info, NL: nationaaltoegangspunt, IT: mobilita.gov.it).
verify_notes: 475 个公交数据集 + 142 个共享出行 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 法国生态转型部运营的国家交通数据接入点（PAN），汇集全国及各地区运营商的公共交通、共享出行、道路、拼车和共享单车等数据。平台符合欧盟 MMTIS 标准，提供 GTFS、NeTEx、GBFS、GeoJSON 等格式，支持 API 与直接下载，许可证经过协调统一（含开放许可证与 ODbL）。是多模式出行数据的权威入口，欧盟多国设有类似门户。
desc_en: Operated by France's Ministry for the Ecological Transition, this National Access Point (PAN) aggregates mobility data from national and regional operators, covering public transit, vehicle and bike sharing, roads, and carpooling. Compliant with the EU MMTIS regulation, it offers GTFS, NeTEx, GBFS, and GeoJSON formats through both API and direct download, under harmonized licences including Licence Ouverte and ODbL. It serves as France's authoritative multimodal mobility hub, with analogous portals in other EU member states.

name: Triton — Cenozoic Planktonic Foraminifera occurrence database (Figshare collection)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Marine & coastal | Hazards & disasters
coverage: Global oceans; Cenozoic (last ~66 Ma); >500,000 records from 174 expeditions / ~873 ODP/DSDP/IODP holes
formats: CSV, RData, XLSX (point occurrences with lat/lon — vector point data)
notes: Tabular point-occurrence data (lat/lon) — convertible to GeoJSON/Shapefile; primary deliverable of the Sci Data paper. NOTE: lead 'why' said 'hazard' but the paper is paleo-oceanography, not hazards.
verify_notes: Redirects to Springer Nature Figshare collection; landing returned 403 to WebFetch but collection exists | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: Triton 是覆盖整个新生代（约过去 6600 万年）全球海洋的浮游有孔虫产出记录数据库，整合了 174 次科考、约 873 个 ODP/DSDP/IODP 钻孔的逾 50 万条记录。数据以带经纬度的 CSV、RData、XLSX 表格点数据形式提供，可转换为 GeoJSON/Shapefile，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该库是 Fenton 等 2021 年 Scientific Data 论文的核心成果，主要服务古海洋学研究。
desc_en: Triton is a global ocean database of Cenozoic planktonic foraminifera occurrences spanning the last roughly 66 million years, compiling over 500,000 records from 174 expeditions and about 873 ODP/DSDP/IODP holes. Provided as georeferenced CSV, RData, and XLSX point tables convertible to GeoJSON or Shapefile, it is released under CC BY 4.0. As the primary deliverable of Fenton et al. (2021, Scientific Data), it chiefly supports paleo-oceanographic research rather than hazard analysis.

name: TUMI Mobility Data Hub - Public Transport Group (GTFS feeds catalog)
formats: GTFS (CSV + shapes.txt vector polylines, stops as point vectors)
notes: Aggregator entry-point for 200+ GTFS feeds focused on Global South cities; entries below are individual sub-datasets.
verify_notes: 203 datasets | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: TUMI 出行数据中心（由 GIZ 支持）的公共交通板块，汇集 200 多个城市的 GTFS 数据集，重点覆盖全球南方城市。GTFS 包含线路折线和站点点位等矢量信息，可经各数据集页面开放下载，许可证因数据集而异。它是面向发展中国家城市公共交通数据的聚合入口，各具体子数据集分列其下。
desc_en: The public transport group of the TUMI Mobility Data Hub, backed by GIZ, catalogs over 200 GTFS datasets with a focus on Global South cities. GTFS feeds include route polylines and stop points as vector data, openly downloadable through individual dataset pages under licenses that vary per dataset. The hub acts as an aggregator entry point to more than 200 transit feeds for developing-country cities, with each feed listed as a separate sub-dataset.

name: UKSCAPE-G2G ancillary catchment & gauging station spatial files (GB, observed)
formats: NetCDF gridded + ancillary catchment-area and gauging-station location files (1 km grid; vector-equivalent point/polygon information)
notes: Companion dataset to essd-15-2533-2023. Includes gauging station point file and catchment-area grids referenced in Table 1.4 of the paper.
verify_notes: DOI redirects to CEH catalogue | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UKSCAPE-G2G 模型的辅助空间数据，覆盖英国本岛（1980-2011 模型期），包含 1 km 网格的流域面积数据与测流站点位文件。数据由 UKCEH 通过环境信息数据中心（EIDC）以 NetCDF 网格及附属矢量等价信息发布，采用开放政府许可证（OGL），可开放下载。它是相关 ESSD 论文的配套数据集，含论文中引用的测流站点和流域网格。
desc_en: This UKSCAPE-G2G ancillary dataset covers Great Britain over the 1980-2011 model period, providing 1 km gridded catchment-area data alongside gauging-station location files. Published by UKCEH through the EIDC as NetCDF grids with vector-equivalent point and polygon information, it is openly downloadable under the Open Government Licence. It is the companion dataset to the associated ESSD paper, including the gauging-station points and catchment grids referenced in its tables.

name: UN-SPIDER Data Sources Portal
theme_raw: Disaster risk, hazard exposure (curated meta-catalog of vectors)
notes: Useful curated index pointing to vector hazard layers across UN system; meta-directory rather than primary host
verify_notes: UN-SPIDER Knowledge Portal data sources page; searchable database of providers | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UN-SPIDER（联合国外空司灾害管理与应急天基信息平台）的数据源门户，是一个全球性的精选元目录，指向联合国系统内各类灾害相关矢量图层（Shapefile/GeoJSON/WFS 等）。它本身不直接托管数据，而是作为查找灾害与应急地理数据的导航索引，所链接资源许可证各异（免费、受限或付费）。
desc_en: The UN-SPIDER Data Sources portal is a curated global meta-directory pointing to hazard-related vector layers across the UN system, linking to Shapefile, GeoJSON, and WFS sources. Rather than hosting data directly, it serves as a navigational index for locating disaster and emergency-response geospatial datasets. Linked resources carry mixed access terms ranging from free to restricted or paid, making it most useful as a discovery tool rather than a primary data host.

name: UNOSAT humanitarian rapid mapping datasets on HDX
theme_raw: Conflict damage assessment polygons/points (Gaza, Ukraine, Sudan, Syria, etc.); refugee/IDP camp mapping
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; HDX UNOSAT org page, likely bot block. | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: UNITAR/UNOSAT 在人道主义数据交换平台（HDX）上发布的快速制图数据集，主要覆盖活跃冲突地区，基于卫星影像分析生成。数据以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KMZ 等矢量格式开放提供，采用 CC BY-IGO 3.0 许可。这类数据广泛用于人道主义响应、损毁评估和冲突监测。
desc_en: UNOSAT (UNITAR) humanitarian rapid-mapping datasets on the HDX platform deliver satellite-derived geospatial analyses focused on active conflict zones. Provided openly as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and KMZ vector formats under CC BY-IGO 3.0, they are widely used for humanitarian response, damage assessment, and conflict monitoring. The collection offers timely, authoritative mapping products supporting UN and partner field operations.

name: Urbanity — Global Feature-Rich Urban Network Dataset
theme_canonical: POI / places | Transportation | Land cover & land use
theme_raw: 道路 - 多模态城市网络 + 步行/POI
feature_count: 50 major cities across 29 countries; ~4M street view images; 40+ indicators
notes: Scientific Data 论文 (Yap et al.); 与 OSMnx 不同, 富含上下文特征属性
verify_notes: Urbanity paper, Yap & Biljecki, Sci Data 2023; dataset on figshare CC-BY 4.0, code MIT | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Urbanity 是一个全球性的特征丰富城市网络数据集，覆盖 7 个区域 29 个国家的 50 座主要城市，包含街道网络的节点与边几何及大量上下文属性，并整合约 400 万张街景影像和 40 多项指标（以 2020 年人口为基准）。数据以 GeoJSON 和 CSV 提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可直接下载。与 OSMnx 不同，它额外携带丰富的城市语境特征属性，源自 Yap 等的 Scientific Data 论文。
desc_en: Urbanity is a global, feature-rich urban network dataset covering 50 major cities across 29 countries in seven world regions, providing street-network node and edge geometries enriched with extensive contextual attributes, around 4 million street-view images, and 40-plus indicators referenced to 2020 population. Delivered as GeoJSON and CSV under CC BY 4.0 via direct download, it differs from OSMnx by embedding rich urban-context features. It stems from Yap et al.'s Scientific Data publication.

name: US Census TIGERweb GeoServices (REST/WMS/WFS)
theme_raw: Census tracts, block groups, blocks, places, ZCTAs
formats: ArcGIS REST FeatureService, WMS, WFS, GeoJSON
formats_now: ArcGIS REST / WMS / WFS; folders: Census2020, Generalized_ACS(2012-2025), TIGERweb 等
feature_count: 16 folders incl. Census2020, Econ, ACS 2012-2025, TIGERweb
notes: TIGERweb exposes REST and OGC services; less famous than shapefile downloads but ideal as live endpoint.
verify_notes: ArcGIS Server 11.5; ACS数据已更新至2025 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 美国人口普查局的 TIGERweb GeoServices 提供 TIGER 地理数据的实时 Web 服务接口，覆盖全美，含 Census 2020、经济普查、2012-2025 年 ACS 等多个数据集。服务以 ArcGIS REST FeatureService、WMS、WFS 及 GeoJSON 形式开放，属美国政府公有领域。相比 Shapefile 下载，它更适合作为动态实时调用的端点。
desc_en: The U.S. Census Bureau's TIGERweb GeoServices expose TIGER geographic data as live web services covering the entire United States, including Census 2020, Economic Census, and ACS 2012-2025 datasets across sixteen service folders. Available as ArcGIS REST FeatureServices, WMS, WFS, and GeoJSON, the data is in the U.S. Government public domain. While less prominent than the bulk Shapefile downloads, these endpoints are ideal for live, programmatic access to authoritative U.S. boundary and demographic geometry.

name: USDA NRCS SSURGO Soils WFS (WGS84)
notes: 16+ feature types: mapunit polygon/line/point, survey areas, thematic interpretations.
verify_notes: 16 feature types including SSURGO map units | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国农业部自然资源保护局（NRCS）的 SSURGO 土壤空间数据 WFS 服务（WGS84），覆盖全美，提供详尽的土壤调查矢量数据。服务以 WFS 1.1.0 和 GML 开放，含 16 类以上要素类型，包括制图单元的面、线、点要素，调查区范围及各类专题解译。数据属美国公有领域，是美国权威的详细土壤数据来源。
desc_en: The USDA NRCS SSURGO Soils WFS (WGS84) delivers detailed U.S. soil survey vector data through an open OGC WFS 1.1.0 and GML interface covering the entire country. It exposes more than sixteen feature types, including map-unit polygon, line, and point features, survey-area extents, and a range of thematic interpretations. In the U.S. public domain, SSURGO is the authoritative source for high-resolution soil mapping across the United States.

name: USFWS National Wetlands Inventory (NWI)
theme_raw: wetland and deepwater habitat polygons (Cowardin classification)
formats: ArcGIS Hub FeatureServer, WMS, WFS, GeoServices, Shapefile, GeoPackage
notes: Largest wetlands vector dataset in the US. Hub portal exposes OGC services (WMS/WFS) plus ArcGIS REST endpoints.
verify_notes: Page reachable but content sparse; ArcGIS Hub explore page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国鱼类与野生动物管理局（USFWS）的国家湿地清查（NWI），覆盖美国本土及各属地，是美国最大的湿地矢量数据集。数据通过 ArcGIS Hub 门户以 FeatureServer、WMS、WFS、GeoServices 服务及 Shapefile、GeoPackage 下载等多种方式提供，属美国公有领域。广泛用于湿地保护、水文分析和环境管理。
desc_en: The USFWS National Wetlands Inventory (NWI) is the largest wetlands vector dataset in the United States, covering the country and its territories. Distributed through an ArcGIS Hub portal exposing FeatureServer, WMS, WFS, and GeoServices endpoints alongside Shapefile and GeoPackage downloads, the data is in the U.S. public domain. It is widely used for wetland conservation, hydrological analysis, and environmental management across federal, state, and research applications.

name: USGS Earthquake Catalog (FDSNWS)
access: REST FDSNWS Event API + real-time GeoJSON feeds
lychee_status: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://earthquake.usgs.gov/fdsnws/event/1))
lychee_text: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://earthquake.usgs.gov/fdsnws/event/1))
notes: Real-time point-vector earthquake feeds used widely.
verify_notes: Odd redirect to localhost via WebFetch; underlying USGS service known live | lychee:Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://earthquake.usgs.gov/fdsnws/event/1))
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局地震灾害项目提供的全球地震目录，通过 FDSNWS Event API 及实时 GeoJSON 推送服务发布。数据以 GeoJSON、KML、QuakeML 等矢量点格式提供，覆盖全球，属公有领域。作为权威的实时地震数据源，被全球研究、监测和应急系统广泛采用。
desc_en: The USGS Earthquake Catalog from the Earthquake Hazards Program provides a global record of seismic events through the standardized FDSNWS Event API and real-time GeoJSON feeds. Available as GeoJSON, KML, and QuakeML point vectors and covering the entire globe, the catalog is in the public domain. As an authoritative, continuously updated source of real-time earthquake data, it is widely used in research, monitoring, and emergency-response systems worldwide.

name: USGS Geochemical & Mineralogical Soils Data (ds801) WFS
license_now: US Public Domain (no fees, no access constraints)
notes: Point vector dataset of soil geochemistry sampling sites.
verify_notes: Feature type: ds801 soil geochemistry/mineralogy | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局的土壤地球化学与矿物学数据（ds801）WFS 服务，覆盖美国本土，为土壤地球化学采样点的矢量点数据集。服务以开放 WFS 和 GML 形式提供，属美国公有领域，无访问限制或费用。适用于地球化学背景值研究、环境与资源评价。
desc_en: The USGS Geochemical and Mineralogical Soils Data (ds801) WFS provides a point vector dataset of soil geochemistry sampling sites across the conterminous United States. Served through an open OGC WFS and GML interface, the data is in the U.S. public domain with no fees or access constraints. It supports geochemical baseline studies, environmental assessment, and resource-related analyses across the continental U.S.

name: USGS Geographic Names Information System (GNIS)
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
notes: Authoritative US gazetteer; vector point file.
verify_notes: Refresh every other month; UTF-8 | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局与地名委员会（BGN）维护的地理名称信息系统（GNIS），是美国及其属地的权威地名词典，以矢量点文件形式记录各类地理实体名称与位置。数据以 GeoPackage、File GDB 及管道分隔 TXT 格式提供，每两月更新一次，属 USGS 公有领域，可直接下载。
desc_en: The USGS Geographic Names Information System (GNIS), maintained with the U.S. Board on Geographic Names, is the authoritative gazetteer for the United States and its territories, recording the names and locations of geographic features as a vector point file. Distributed as GeoPackage, File GDB, and pipe-delimited TXT with bi-monthly refreshes, it is in the USGS public domain and freely downloadable, serving as the standard reference for official U.S. place names.

name: USGS Global Porphyry & Sediment-hosted Copper Assessment (SIR 2010-5090Z)
notes: Authoritative global Cu tract/deposit polygons + points; widely cited in resource modeling.
verify_notes: Global copper assessment data | lychee:Rejected status code: 502 Bad Gateway
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局的全球斑岩型与沉积岩型铜矿评价数据集（SIR 2010-5090Z），覆盖全球，提供权威的铜矿远景区/矿床面状与点状矢量数据。数据以 Shapefile、File GDB、KML 格式开放下载，属美国政府公有领域。该数据集在矿产资源建模与评价文献中被广泛引用。
desc_en: The USGS Global Porphyry and Sediment-hosted Copper Assessment (SIR 2010-5090Z) provides authoritative worldwide copper tract and deposit polygons and points. Available as Shapefile, File GDB, and KML for open download and in the U.S. Government public domain, it represents a comprehensive global mineral-resource assessment. The dataset is widely cited in resource modeling and mineral prospectivity studies.

name: USGS The National Map - Structures (Schools, Fire Stations, Hospitals, Law Enforcement)
formats: ArcGIS REST MapServer/FeatureServer (vector points); downloadable via TNM as Shapefile/GeoPackage
formats_now: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, Shapefile, File Geodatabase, WMS, WFS
notes: Authoritative federal replacement endpoint referenced in HIFLD crosswalk.
verify_notes: Data refreshed April 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局国家地图（The National Map）的建筑物结构图层，覆盖全美，包含学校、消防站、医院、执法机构等公共服务设施的矢量点数据。数据通过 ArcGIS REST MapServer/FeatureServer 服务开放，并可经 TNM 下载为 Shapefile 或 GeoPackage，属 USGS 公有领域。它是 HIFLD 数据对照中引用的权威联邦替代端点。
desc_en: The USGS The National Map Structures layer provides nationwide vector points for public-service facilities including schools, fire stations, hospitals, and law-enforcement sites. Served through ArcGIS REST MapServer and FeatureServer endpoints and downloadable via TNM as Shapefile or GeoPackage, the data is in the USGS public domain. It is cited as the authoritative federal replacement endpoint in HIFLD crosswalks for critical-infrastructure point data.

name: USGS U.S. Landslide Inventory (v3.0, 2025)
lychee_status: Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
time_span: historical to Feb 2025; uses Date_Min / Date_Max fields
notes: Integrated nationwide landslide inventory harmonising federal/state contributions.
verify_notes: USGS Landslide inventory v3.0, Feb 2025; DOI 10.5066/P14AJF8I | lychee:Rejected status code: 405 Method Not Allowed
desc_zh: 美国地质调查局的全美滑坡清查（v3.0，2025 年 2 月版），整合了联邦与各州贡献的滑坡记录，统一为一套全国性矢量数据集。数据覆盖美国，以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 和 CSV 提供，使用 Date_Min/Date_Max 字段标注时间，采用 CC0 1.0 协议，经 ScienceBase 发布。适用于滑坡灾害识别、风险评估与制图研究。
desc_en: The USGS U.S. Landslide Inventory (version 3.0, February 2025) harmonizes federal and state contributions into an integrated nationwide vector dataset of landslide occurrences. Covering the United States with records spanning historical to February 2025 (via Date_Min/Date_Max fields), it is provided as Shapefile, GeoPackage, and CSV under CC0 1.0 through ScienceBase. The inventory supports landslide hazard identification, susceptibility assessment, and mapping research.

name: WikiData geographic entities (P625 coordinate)
notes: Open structured POI/place repository commonly conflated with OSM/Wikimapia in the paper's open-source discussion.
verify_notes: Wikidata Query Service operational | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 维基数据（WikiData）中带坐标（P625 属性）的地理实体，是全球性的开放结构化地点/POI 知识库，由维基媒体基金会维护。数据可通过 SPARQL 公共端点和转储以 GeoJSON、KML 形式获取，采用 CC0 1.0 协议。在开源地理数据讨论中常与 OSM、Wikimapia 一同被用作可融合的开放 POI 来源。
desc_en: WikiData geographic entities carrying coordinate locations (property P625) form a global, open, structured repository of places and POIs maintained by the Wikimedia Foundation. Accessible via a public SPARQL endpoint and dumps, with results exportable as GeoJSON or KML, the data is released under CC0 1.0. It is commonly discussed alongside OpenStreetMap and Wikimapia as a conflatable open-source POI source in geospatial literature.

name: Wikimapia objects
