notes: Listed in the commentary as an open-source alternative to OSM; provides both point and polygon POI footprints.
verify_notes: Page loads but scrape returned little content | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: Wikimapia 是一个由志愿者社区维护的全球开放地理对象数据库，提供 POI 的点状和面状轮廓。数据可通过公开 API（需免费密钥）以 KML、GeoJSON 形式获取，采用 CC BY-SA 3.0 协议。在开源地理数据讨论中常被列为 OSM 的替代来源之一。
desc_en: Wikimapia is a volunteer-maintained global database of geographic objects providing both point and polygon POI footprints. Data is available through a public API (requiring a free key) as KML and GeoJSON under a CC BY-SA 3.0 license. It is frequently listed in geospatial commentary as an open-source alternative to OpenStreetMap, offering crowd-contributed place geometry and attributes worldwide.

name: WISE WFD River Basin Districts (RBD) and Water Bodies
theme_raw: river basin districts, surface water bodies, groundwater bodies, monitoring sites
formats: ESRI REST, WFS, WMS, GeoPackage, GDB
notes: Authoritative WFD spatial reporting. Use SDI EEA catalogue to find current ESRI REST + WFS endpoints; updated for 3rd RBMP.
verify_notes: Dataset marked as Obsolete; direct download requires Eionet auth | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 欧洲环境署（EEA）的 WISE 水框架指令（WFD）流域区（RBD）与水体空间数据，覆盖欧盟 27 国及欧洲环境署成员国，为 WFD 报送的权威空间数据集（比例尺约 1:100 万）。数据通过 ESRI REST、WFS、WMS 服务及 GeoPackage、GDB 提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 协议，并随第三轮流域管理计划（RBMP）更新。建议经 SDI EEA 目录查找最新端点。
desc_en: The EEA's WISE Water Framework Directive River Basin Districts (RBD) and Water Bodies dataset provides authoritative WFD reporting geometry covering the EU27 and EEA member states at roughly 1:1,000,000 scale. Delivered through ESRI REST, WFS, and WMS services plus GeoPackage and GDB under CC BY 4.0, it has been updated for the third River Basin Management Plan cycle. Current endpoints are best located via the SDI EEA catalogue.

name: WOF Postal codes — global parent + per-country
coverage: per-country (gb, us, ca, ch, de, fr, ...)
notes: Largely sourced from GeoNames; per-country repos like whosonfirst-data-postalcode-gb.
verify_notes: Hub repo only; actual data in per-country repos | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Who's On First（WOF）的邮政编码数据，按国家分库提供（如英国、美国、加拿大、瑞士、德国、法国等），数据多源自 GeoNames。以 GeoJSON 格式在 GitHub 各国仓库（如 whosonfirst-data-postalcode-gb）中分发，遵循 WOF 许可。适用于地理编码、地址解析与行政空间参照。
desc_en: Who's On First (WOF) postal code data is organized into per-country repositories (e.g., GB, US, CA, CH, DE, FR), largely sourced from GeoNames. Distributed as GeoJSON through GitHub repos such as whosonfirst-data-postalcode-gb under the WOF license, it supports geocoding, address parsing, and administrative spatial referencing. The per-country structure makes it straightforward to consume only the regions of interest.

name: WOF Venues (POI) per-country / per-US-state
notes: Legacy SimpleGeo POI corpus carried forward; quality varies by region.
verify_notes: Early stage; meta files incomplete | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Who's On First 的场所（POI）数据，按国家及美国各州分区，规模约 2000 万条记录，源自早期 SimpleGeo/Mapzen 的 POI 语料并延续维护。数据以 GeoJSON 格式分发在 GitHub 各分区仓库（如 whosonfirst-data-venue-us-ny），各区域数据质量参差不齐，许可见各仓库 LICENSE.md。
desc_en: Who's On First venue (POI) data, partitioned by country and U.S. state, comprises roughly 20 million records carried forward from the legacy SimpleGeo and Mapzen POI corpus. Distributed as GeoJSON across GitHub repositories such as whosonfirst-data-venue-us-ny, with licensing detailed per repo's LICENSE.md. Data quality varies considerably by region, reflecting its heterogeneous historical origins, but it remains a large open POI resource.

name: WoSIS 2023 Snapshot (GeoPackage)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Geology, soil & geomorphology | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: Soil profile points (chemical/physical properties, ~228k profiles, 174 countries)
notes: GPKG contains sites/profiles/layers/observations tables; the canonical vectorised export underlying SoilGrids training points.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WoSIS 2023 快照（GeoPackage 版）由 ISRIC 世界土壤信息中心发布，是全球土壤剖面数据库 2023 年 12 月的静态快照。数据以 GeoPackage（SQLite）加 TSV 提供，含 sites/profiles/layers/observations 等表，约 446 MB，可直接 HTTPS 下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 协议。它是 SoilGrids 训练点背后的规范化矢量导出，对应 Calisto 等 2024 年 ESSD 论文。
desc_en: The WoSIS 2023 Snapshot (GeoPackage) from ISRIC is a static December 2023 release of the global soil profile database. Provided as a roughly 446 MB GeoPackage (SQLite) plus TSV via direct HTTPS download under CC BY 4.0, it contains sites, profiles, layers, and observations tables. It is the canonical vectorized export underlying SoilGrids training points and corresponds to Calisto et al. (2024, ESSD), serving as a key reference for global soil modeling.

name: WoSIS Latest (dynamic) WFS
notes: Dynamic counterpart to the static GPKG snapshot; use for always-current point geometry.
verify_notes: MapServer service responding; WFS support not explicitly confirmed | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WoSIS Latest 是 ISRIC 提供的全球土壤剖面数据库动态 WFS 服务，作为静态 GeoPackage 快照的实时对应版本。服务通过 OGC WFS（GetFeature 支持 GML/GeoJSON 输出）提供始终最新的土壤点几何，采用 CC BY 4.0 协议。适用于需要获取最新土壤剖面采样点的全球性应用。
desc_en: WoSIS Latest is ISRIC's dynamic WFS service for the global soil profile database, serving as the always-current counterpart to the static GeoPackage snapshot. Exposed through an OGC WFS endpoint with GetFeature returning GML or GeoJSON, it provides up-to-date soil point geometry worldwide under CC BY 4.0. It is suited to applications requiring the most current soil-profile sampling points rather than a fixed snapshot.

name: WoSIS Soil Profile Database (points)
verify_notes: Dashboard at dashboards.isric.org; 230k+ profiles | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WoSIS 土壤剖面数据库（点数据）由 ISRIC 世界土壤信息中心维护，是全球范围的标准化土壤剖面观测数据集，以 GeoPackage 或 Shapefile 点要素形式开放提供。数据整合自众多来源并尊重各原始提供方许可。它是全球土壤制图与建模（如 SoilGrids）的重要基础观测数据。
desc_en: The WoSIS Soil Profile Database (points) maintained by ISRIC is a global, standardized collection of soil profile observations provided openly as GeoPackage or Shapefile point features. Compiled from numerous sources while respecting the licenses of original data providers, it underpins global soil mapping and modeling efforts such as SoilGrids. WoSIS is a foundational reference dataset for soil science and digital soil mapping worldwide.

name: Yelp Open Dataset
coverage: Selected metro areas (US, Canada, parts of Europe)
formats: JSON (points with lat/lon, convertible to GeoJSON)
notes: Explicitly cited; usable as vector POI under non-commercial terms — research-only.
verify_notes: Moved to business.yelp.com/data/resources/open-dataset/ | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Yelp 开放数据集，由 Yelp 公司发布，覆盖美国、加拿大及部分欧洲城市的选定都会区，包含带经纬度的商户点数据，可转换为 GeoJSON。数据以 JSON 格式在同意协议后免费下载，采用 Yelp 数据集许可（学术/非商业用途）。常被用作研究用的矢量 POI 数据源，仅限非商业研究使用。
desc_en: The Yelp Open Dataset, released by Yelp Inc., covers selected metropolitan areas in the U.S., Canada, and parts of Europe, providing business point data with latitude and longitude that can be converted to GeoJSON. Distributed as JSON via free download after agreement under the Yelp Dataset License for academic and non-commercial use, it is frequently cited as a research POI source. Its terms restrict use to non-commercial research only.

name: 资源环境科学数据注册与出版系统 (RESDC DOI 中公共服务相关数据集)
provider: 中科院地理科学与资源研究所 资源环境科学数据中心
license: DOI 引用; 用户协议
notes: 以DOI方式发布学校/医院/服务设施空间数据集合;按关键词检索
verify_notes: RESDC DOI portal reachable; raw text encoding issue | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国科学院地理科学与资源研究所资源环境科学数据中心（RESDC）的 DOI 注册与出版系统中与公共服务相关的数据集合，覆盖中国，多以 DOI 方式发布学校、医院、服务设施等空间数据，主要为 Shapefile 矢量格式。可按关键词检索，注册后下载，部分需付费，使用须遵循用户协议并以 DOI 方式引用。
desc_en: This collection within the RESDC DOI registration and publishing system from the Chinese Academy of Sciences' Institute of Geographic Sciences and Natural Resources Research gathers public-service-related spatial datasets for China. Schools, hospitals, and service facilities are published mainly as DOI-citable Shapefile vector data, searchable by keyword. Access requires registration and is partly paid, with use governed by a user agreement and DOI-based citation requirements.

name: 高德地图 POI 开放接口 (公交/地铁/机场/港口/加油站等)
theme_raw: 公共交通站点 + 交通基础设施 POI
license: 开发者协议 (有调用配额)
feature_count: Max 200 records per request; nearby radius up to 50,000 m
notes: CSDN/知乎/掘金最多教程贴的源；通过 liujiao111/poi、CUGbaoyi/Gaode_POI 等 GitHub 脚本批量抓取；需 GCJ02→WGS84 偏移转换
verify_notes: Documentation updated 2026-03-31 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 高德地图（Amap）的 POI 开放接口，覆盖中国，提供公交、地铁、机场、港口、加油站等兴趣点检索。接口以 JSON 返回经纬度（GCJ-02 坐标系，可矢量化），单次最多返回 200 条，周边搜索半径最大 50 公里，需申请密钥并遵循 Amap API 条款。是中文技术社区最常见的 POI 抓取教程来源，使用时需进行 GCJ-02 到 WGS84 的坐标纠偏。
desc_en: The Amap (Gaode) POI web service API covers China and supports searching points of interest such as bus and metro stations, airports, ports, and gas stations. It returns JSON with GCJ-02 coordinates (vectorizable), up to 200 records per request and nearby radius up to 50 km, requiring an API key under Amap's terms. Widely featured in Chinese developer tutorials and batch-scraping scripts, it requires a GCJ-02 to WGS84 datum-shift correction.

name: 黑土与湿地分中心数据集 (Black Soil and Wetland Sub-center)
theme_canonical: POI / places | Hydrography | Geology, soil & geomorphology
coverage: Northeast China (black soil belt + Sanjiang/Songnen wetlands)
access: Catalog with per-dataset download after login
notes: Region-specific vector entry point distinct from RESDC national soil layers.
verify_notes: Black Soil and Wetland Sub-Center; ~30.12 TB resources | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 黑土与湿地分中心数据集（NESSDC 东北分中心，中科院东北地理与农业生态研究所），覆盖中国东北黑土带及三江、松嫩湿地，提供土壤多边形、湿地多边形、流域等 Shapefile 矢量数据，总量约 30.12 TB。数据通过目录登录后按数据集下载，含多个 DOI/数据标识，版权为 geodata.cn 保留。它是区别于 RESDC 全国土壤图层的区域性矢量入口。
desc_en: The Black Soil and Wetland Sub-center dataset (NESSDC Northeast China Sub-center, IGA-CAS) covers Northeast China's black-soil belt and the Sanjiang and Songnen wetlands, offering soil polygons, wetland polygons, and watershed Shapefiles totaling around 30.12 TB. Available through a catalog with per-dataset download after login and carrying multiple DOIs, the data is rights-reserved under geodata.cn. It serves as a region-specific vector entry point distinct from RESDC's national soil layers.

name: The Second Glacier Inventory Dataset of the Altai Mountains (V1.0)
theme_raw: glacier extent (regional) | glacier extent (high-resolution) | glacier extent (basin)
notes: Sibling regional cut listed under SGI-2 family.
verify_notes: Search returns 242 pages of results; specific Altai dataset accessible via search | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 阿尔泰山第二次冰川编目数据集（V1.0），由中科院西北生态环境资源研究院通过国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心（NCDC）发布，覆盖中国境内阿尔泰山区，时相约为 2007-2010 年。数据以 Shapefile 提供，注册后免费下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 协议。它是中国第二次冰川编目（SGI-2）系列下的区域性子集。
desc_en: The Second Glacier Inventory Dataset of the Altai Mountains (V1.0), released by NIEER (CAS) through the National Cryosphere Desert Data Center (NCDC), covers the Chinese sector of the Altai Mountains around 2007-2010. Provided as Shapefile with free download after registration under CC BY 4.0, it is a regional cut within the Second Glacier Inventory of China (SGI-2) family, supporting cryosphere and glacier-change studies in the region.

name: Köppen-Geiger Climate Classification (Beck et al. GloH2O 1 km)
theme_raw: climate zones polygons / raster->vector | 气候带 / climate zones (30 KG classes) | climate zones
formats: netCDF; community vector conversions available (shapefile via World Bank Data Catalog)
doi_or_citation: Beck et al. 2023, Scientific Data, doi:10.1038/s41597-023-02549-6
notes: Native raster but routinely polygonized; World Bank Climate Change Knowledge Portal also publishes a Koppen-Geiger shapefile (1976-2000 and 2076-2100).
verify_notes: V3 maps including SSP scenarios available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Köppen-Geiger 气候分类数据集（Beck 等 / GloH2O，1 km 分辨率），覆盖全球，时间跨度 1901-2099 年。数据原生为 netCDF 栅格，但常被矢量化（世界银行气候变化知识门户提供 1976-2000 及 2076-2100 的 Shapefile）。采用 CC BY 4.0 协议，可直接下载，对应 Beck 等 2023 年 Scientific Data 论文。广泛用于气候带划分与生态、水文建模。
desc_en: The Köppen-Geiger Climate Classification (Beck et al., GloH2O) provides global 1 km climate-zone data spanning 1901-2099. Although natively a netCDF raster, it is routinely polygonized, with the World Bank Climate Change Knowledge Portal also publishing Köppen-Geiger shapefiles for 1976-2000 and 2076-2100. Released under CC BY 4.0 via direct download and tied to Beck et al. (2023, Scientific Data), it is widely used for climate zonation and ecological and hydrological modeling.

name: Randolph Glacier Inventory v7.0 (RGI 7.0)
theme_raw: 冰川轮廓 / glacier outlines | glaciers
formats: shapefile (per region), CSV hypsometry, JSON metadata
notes: Core anchor for cryosphere; cited in countless ESSD/Nature papers.
verify_notes: RGI 7.0 released 2023; data hosted at NSIDC (nsidc-0770); license/format details on NSIDC page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Randolph 冰川编目 v7.0（RGI 7.0）由 GLIMS/RGI 联盟与 NSIDC 发布，覆盖除冰盖外的全球冰川，目标时相约为 2000 年。数据按区域以 Shapefile 提供，附带 CSV 高程分带和 JSON 元数据，采用 CC BY 4.0 协议，可直接下载。它是冰冻圈研究的核心基准数据，被大量 ESSD 和 Nature 系列论文引用。
desc_en: The Randolph Glacier Inventory v7.0 (RGI 7.0), released by the GLIMS/RGI Consortium and NSIDC, maps the world's glaciers excluding the ice sheets, with a target date of approximately the year 2000. Provided per region as Shapefile with CSV hypsometry and JSON metadata under CC BY 4.0 via direct download, it is a core anchor dataset for cryosphere science, cited in countless ESSD and Nature-family publications on glacier extent and change.

name: RGI 青藏高原冰川矢量数据 (2015) / RGI v6 TP Glacier Outlines
provider: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 (TPDC)
notes: Convenient TP-cropped subset; access without GLIMS account.
verify_notes: TPDC 页面正常但 SPA 仅返回标题；详情需浏览器渲染 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 青藏高原冰川矢量数据（2015）由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，是 RGI v6 的青藏高原裁剪子集，覆盖青藏高原地区。数据以 Shapefile 提供，注册后可下载，遵循 TPDC 对 RGI 的开放镜像（CC BY）。它便于研究者无需 GLIMS 账户即可获取青藏高原冰川轮廓。
desc_en: This Tibetan Plateau glacier vector dataset (2015) from the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC) is a regional crop of RGI v6 covering the Tibetan Plateau. Provided as Shapefile with registration-required download under TPDC's open CC BY mirror of RGI, it offers a convenient Tibetan-Plateau subset of glacier outlines accessible without a GLIMS account, supporting regional cryosphere and glacier-change research.

name: The Second Glacier Inventory Dataset of China (V1.0)
provider: Northwest Institute of Eco-Environment and Resources, CAS / National Cryosphere Desert Data Center (NCDC, formerly Cold and Arid Regions Science Data Center, Lanzhou)
access: free, registration required (FTP/SFTP/web client at ncdc.ac.cn)
notes: Primary national SGI-2 polygon dataset; companion to Guo 2015 paper. ~48,571 glaciers, ~51,840 km^2.
splink_merged_from: The Second Glacier Inventory Dataset of the Kunlun Mountains in China (V1.0)
verify_notes: HTTP 404 Not Found - record may have moved on ncdc.ac.cn portal | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 中国第二次冰川编目数据集（V1.0）由中科院西北生态环境资源研究院通过国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心（NCDC）发布，覆盖中国大陆，时相约为 2007 年（基于 2006-2010 年 Landsat TM/ETM+ 影像）。数据以面状 Shapefile 提供，注册后免费下载，采用 CC BY 4.0 协议，约含 48571 条冰川、约 51840 平方公里。它是 Guo 等 2015 年论文的配套主数据集。
desc_en: The Second Glacier Inventory Dataset of China (V1.0), released by NIEER (CAS) through the National Cryosphere Desert Data Center (NCDC), covers mainland China at an epoch of around 2007, based on Landsat TM/ETM+ imagery from roughly 2006-2010. Provided as polygon Shapefile with free download after registration under CC BY 4.0, it contains about 48,571 glaciers totaling some 51,840 km². It is the primary national SGI-2 dataset companion to Guo et al. (2015).

name: Austrian Glacier Inventories GI 1–3 + GI LIA (Fischer et al.)
theme_raw: 冰川 / Austrian glacier outlines (multi-epoch incl. Little Ice Age)
notes: Rare LIA reconstruction polygons useful for change studies.
verify_notes: License is CC-BY-3.0 (not 4.0) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 奥地利冰川编目 GI 1-3 及小冰期（LIA）数据集（Fischer 等）发布于 PANGAEA，覆盖奥地利，包含小冰期、1969、1998 和 2006 年共四期约 140 年跨度的冰川轮廓。数据以 Shapefile 提供，可直接下载，采用 CC BY 3.0 协议。其中珍贵的小冰期重建多边形对长时段冰川变化研究尤为有用。
desc_en: The Austrian Glacier Inventories GI 1-3 plus GI LIA (Fischer et al.), published on PANGAEA, cover Austria with glacier outlines for the Little Ice Age, 1969, 1998, and 2006, spanning roughly 140 years. Provided as Shapefile via direct download under CC BY 3.0, the dataset is notable for its rare Little Ice Age reconstruction polygons, making it especially valuable for long-term glacier-change and climate-impact studies in the Alps.

name: Bathymetry (10m, all depths)
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Natural Earth 提供的全球海底地形（水深）矢量数据集，以 1:1000 万小比例尺制图，覆盖各深度等级的水深分层多边形。数据为 Shapefile 格式，属公共领域，可自由用于任何用途。它是制作世界地图、海洋背景底图与教学示意图的常用基础物理地理图层，强调制图美观与全球一致性而非测量精度。
desc_en: A global bathymetry (ocean depth) vector layer from Natural Earth, compiled at the 1:10 million small-scale level with depth-banded polygons covering all depth ranges. Distributed as Shapefiles in the public domain, it can be freely used for any purpose. It is a standard cartographic base layer for world maps, marine backdrops and teaching graphics, prioritizing visual consistency and global coverage over survey-grade precision.

name: Brazil Semi-arid Region
notes: Official semi-arid delimitation polygon.
verify_notes: Brazilian Semiarid municipalities | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 巴西半干旱区官方划界多边形数据，源自 IBGE/SUDENE，通过 R 语言 geobr 包提供。覆盖巴西东北部的半干旱区域，以 GeoPackage / sf 对象形式开放获取。该数据反映官方认定的半干旱行政边界，常用于干旱政策分析、区域规划与环境—社会经济研究，便于在 R 中直接加载与空间分析。
desc_en: The official delimitation polygon of Brazil's semi-arid region, sourced from IBGE/SUDENE and served through the geobr R package. It covers the semi-arid zone of northeastern Brazil and is provided openly as GeoPackage / sf objects. Representing the officially recognized semi-arid boundary, it is commonly used for drought-policy analysis, regional planning and environment-socioeconomic studies, and loads directly into R for spatial analysis.

name: Glacier inventory of the Alps from Sentinel-2 (Paul et al. 2019)
notes: Regional but high quality; uses Sentinel-2.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Paul 等人（2019）发布的欧洲阿尔卑斯山冰川编目，基于 Sentinel-2 影像绘制，托管于 PANGAEA。数据集包含约 4394 条面积大于 0.01 平方公里的冰川轮廓，参考时相约为 2015 年 8 月，分辨率约 10 米。以 Shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。该区域性高质量产品常用于阿尔卑斯冰川变化监测与对比研究。
desc_en: A glacier inventory of the European Alps by Paul et al. (2019), mapped from Sentinel-2 imagery and hosted on PANGAEA. It contains about 4,394 glacier outlines larger than 0.01 km², with a reference date around August 2015 and roughly 10 m resolution. Provided as Shapefiles under CC-BY-4.0, this high-quality regional product is widely used for monitoring and comparative studies of Alpine glacier change.

name: Global Mountain Glacier Centerlines and Lengths
access: Open download via paper DOI link
notes: Lines of maximum glacier length derived from global glacier inventory + DEM
verify_notes: Zhang et al. 2022, glacier centerlines | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Zhang 等人（ESSD, 2022）发布的全球山地冰川中心线与长度数据集，包含约 198,137 条冰川中心线。中心线基于全球冰川编目结合 DEM 提取，代表每条冰川的最大长度方向，以线状矢量 Shapefile 提供并按年更新。数据采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可经论文 DOI 开放下载，广泛用于冰川动力学、长度变化与冰川学建模研究。
desc_en: A global dataset of mountain glacier centerlines and lengths by Zhang et al. (ESSD, 2022), comprising about 198,137 glacier centerlines. Derived from a global glacier inventory combined with a DEM, the lines trace each glacier's direction of maximum length and are distributed as line-vector Shapefiles, updated annually. Released under CC-BY 4.0 and openly downloadable via the paper DOI, it supports glacier dynamics, length-change and glaciological modeling studies.

name: GMBA Mountain Inventory v1 (Karagulle/USGS-Esri rugged terrain)
notes: Predecessor of v2; still cited.
verify_notes: HTTP 404 — page moved/removed at Unibe; GMBA Mountain Inventory v1 likely relocated (try gmba.unibe.ch/research/data or new GMBA site) | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: GMBA 山地清单 v1，源自 Karagulle 等人（USGS-Esri 崎岖地形分析），是全球山地范围的矢量划定数据。以 Shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可直接下载。作为后续 v2 版本的前身，它至今仍被广泛引用，常用于山地生物多样性、生态与气候研究中界定山地区域与分析单元。
desc_en: GMBA Mountain Inventory v1, derived from Karagulle et al. (USGS-Esri rugged-terrain analysis), provides a global vector delineation of mountain areas. Distributed as Shapefiles under CC-BY-4.0 with direct download, it is the predecessor of the later v2 release but remains widely cited. It is commonly used to define mountain regions and analysis units in mountain biodiversity, ecology and climate research.

name: High-resolution glacier elevation-change dataset, Nyainqentanglha Mountains
lychee_status: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en/news/adefd05c-993d-44b7-a2d4-d12893d5fb4a))

verify_notes: lychee:Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://poles.tpdc.ac.cn/en/news/adefd05c-993d-44b7-a2d4-d12893d5fb4a))
desc_zh: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布的念青唐古拉山高分辨率冰川高程变化数据集，覆盖西藏念青唐古拉山脉。数据将冰川轮廓多边形与高程变化（dH）栅格配对提供，包含 Shapefile 与栅格两类文件，需注册后下载，遵循 TPDC 数据使用政策。适用于区域冰川物质平衡、冰量损失与气候响应研究。
desc_en: A high-resolution glacier elevation-change dataset for the Nyainqentanglha Mountains in Tibet, released by the Third Pole Environment Data Center (TPDC). It pairs glacier outline polygons (Shapefile) with elevation-change (dH) rasters, available via registered download under the TPDC data-use policy. The dataset supports regional studies of glacier mass balance, ice loss and climate response in this part of the Tibetan Plateau.

name: Hillslope Thermokarst Inventory - Qilian Mountains
notes: Manual visual interpretation + field validation
verify_notes: ESSD article live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 祁连山多年冻土区坡面热融（热喀斯特）灾害编目，发表于 ESSD（2024），共包含 1,064 个要素。数据通过人工目视解译并结合野外验证生成，以矢量多边形 Shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，可经论文 DOI 开放获取。适用于多年冻土退化、坡面稳定性与寒区地貌灾害研究。
desc_en: A hillslope thermokarst inventory for the permafrost region of the Qilian Mountains, published in ESSD (2024), containing 1,064 features. Produced through manual visual interpretation with field validation, it is provided as vector polygons (Shapefile) under CC-BY 4.0 and openly accessible via the paper DOI. The dataset is suited to studies of permafrost degradation, slope stability and cold-region geomorphological hazards.

name: ICGC Download Viewer
provider: Institut Cartogràfic i Geològic de Catalunya
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] Download viewer portal, may serve vector data
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 加泰罗尼亚制图与地质研究所（ICGC）的数据下载门户，提供该自治区的地理空间数据下载入口。可输出 Shapefile、GeoTIFF、DXF 等格式，通常采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该门户主要服务于加泰罗尼亚地形、地质与制图数据的检索与下载，是获取区域官方矢量与栅格数据的常用入口。
desc_en: A data download portal from the Cartographic and Geologic Institute of Catalonia (ICGC), serving geospatial data for the Catalonia region. It delivers formats such as Shapefile, GeoTIFF and DXF, typically under a CC BY 4.0 license. The viewer is a common access point for discovering and downloading the region's official topographic, geological and cartographic vector and raster datasets.

name: ICGC WMS Territorial Topographic
notes: 地形图 WMS 服务
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: ICGC 提供的territorial地形图 WMS 服务，以网络地图服务形式发布加泰罗尼亚的官方地形底图。该服务遵循 OGC WMS 标准，便于在 GIS 软件与 Web 地图中直接调用，许可通常为 CC BY 4.0。适用于将官方地形图作为底图叠加，用于规划、制图与空间分析等场景。
desc_en: An ICGC WMS service delivering Catalonia's official territorial topographic base map as a web map service. Built on the OGC WMS standard, it can be consumed directly in GIS software and web maps, typically under a CC BY 4.0 license. It is intended for overlaying the official topographic basemap in planning, cartography and spatial-analysis workflows across the region.

name: ICGC WMS/WCS Elevations
notes: OGC 高程数据服务页
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ICGC 的高程数据 WMS/WCS 服务页，通过 OGC 标准接口发布加泰罗尼亚的高程与地形数据。WMS 用于可视化展示，WCS 支持获取可分析的高程栅格覆盖。许可通常为 CC BY 4.0。该服务适用于地形分析、可视域计算与水文建模等需要数字高程模型的应用。
desc_en: ICGC's elevation WMS/WCS services page, publishing Catalonia's elevation and terrain data through OGC-standard interfaces. WMS supports visualization while WCS provides analysis-ready elevation coverages, typically under a CC BY 4.0 license. The services are suited to terrain analysis, viewshed computation and hydrological modeling, and to any workflow that needs an interoperable digital elevation model for the region.

name: IRIS / EarthScope GeoServer
lychee_status: Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://geoserver.iris.edu/))
notes: Vector layers for station inventories and geophysical observations.
verify_notes: WebFetch timeout 60s | lychee:Network error: Connection refused - server may be down or port blocked (error sending request for url (https://geoserver.iris.edu/))
desc_zh: EarthScope 联盟（前 IRIS）运营的 GeoServer 地理空间服务，面向全球提供地球物理观测相关的矢量图层，如台站清单与观测点位。通过 WMS、WFS、KML 等 OGC 服务发布，便于在 GIS 与 Web 地图中集成，数据通常开放/CC-BY。适用于地震学、地球物理研究中的台站定位、数据发现与可视化。
desc_en: A GeoServer geospatial service operated by the EarthScope Consortium (formerly IRIS), providing global vector layers related to geophysical observations such as station inventories and observation sites. Data are published via OGC services including WMS, WFS and KML for easy integration into GIS and web maps, generally under open/CC-BY terms. It supports station location, data discovery and visualization in seismology and geophysics research.

name: Köppen Climate Zones of North America (CEC vectorization of Beck 2018)
provider: Commission for Environmental Cooperation (CEC) — North American Environmental Atlas
access: direct shapefile zip download (~18 MB) via atlas layers page
notes: Vectorized representation of 29 of 30 global Köppen-Geiger climate zones present in North America, directly derived from Beck et al. 2018 1-km raster.
verify_notes: Active CEC page with downloads | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 北美环境合作委员会（CEC）发布的北美柯本气候分区矢量数据，是对 Beck 等人 2018 年 1 公里栅格的矢量化表达。覆盖加拿大、墨西哥与美国，包含北美出现的 30 个全球柯本-盖格气候带中的 29 个，以 Shapefile 提供，约 18 MB。适用于跨国气候带制图、生态区划与环境研究；具体许可需查阅元数据。
desc_en: A vector dataset of Köppen climate zones for North America from the Commission for Environmental Cooperation (CEC), vectorizing the 1-km raster of Beck et al. (2018). Covering Canada, Mexico and the USA, it represents 29 of the 30 global Köppen-Geiger zones present in North America, distributed as a Shapefile (~18 MB). It supports cross-border climate-zone mapping, ecological zoning and environmental research; check the metadata for exact license terms.

name: OpenTopography Datasets
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (http://opentopo.sdsc.edu/datasets))
