desc_zh: OpenTopography（由圣地亚哥超级计算中心 SDSC 运营）的数据集门户，主要提供高分辨率地形数据，包括 LiDAR 点云（LAS）与 DEM 栅格，并含少量矢量产品。数据以开放方式提供，可直接下载。该平台广泛用于地貌、地质、水文与灾害研究中获取高精度地形与三维点云数据。
desc_en: The dataset portal of OpenTopography, operated by the San Diego Supercomputer Center (SDSC), primarily offering high-resolution topographic data including LiDAR point clouds (LAS) and DEM rasters, with some vector products. Data are openly available for direct download. The platform is widely used to obtain high-precision terrain and 3D point-cloud data for geomorphology, geology, hydrology and hazard research.

name: Randolph Glacier Inventory v7 (RGI7) – global glacier outlines
provider: GLIMS / RGI Consortium, hosted by NSIDC
theme_raw: glacier outlines (excluding ice sheets), complex outlines, centerlines, intersects
coverage: global (all glaciated regions outside Greenland/Antarctic ice sheets)
license_now: NSIDC citation policy (no explicit CC license shown)
notes: Companion GLIMS database is the rolling living inventory; RGI is the snapshot used by IPCC and climate community.
verify_notes: Data download via HTTPS file system at daacdata.apps.nsidc.org | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Randolph 冰川编目第 7 版（RGI7），由 GLIMS / RGI 联盟编制、NSIDC 托管，是全球冰川轮廓的权威快照数据集，覆盖除格陵兰和南极冰盖外的所有冰川区域。每条冰川提供一个约 2000 年的单一轮廓，按一级分区以 Shapefile 提供。作为 IPCC 与气候学界广泛采用的标准编目，配套的 GLIMS 数据库则为持续更新的活体库。
desc_en: The Randolph Glacier Inventory version 7 (RGI7), compiled by the GLIMS/RGI Consortium and hosted by NSIDC, is the authoritative snapshot of global glacier outlines covering all glaciated regions outside the Greenland and Antarctic ice sheets. It provides a single outline (around year 2000) per glacier, distributed as Shapefiles by first-order region. Widely adopted by the IPCC and the climate community, it is the standard inventory, while the companion GLIMS database serves as the rolling living archive.

name: SHARE Geonetwork
theme_raw: cryosphere, glaciers, ecosystems, climate monitoring stations
coverage: high-altitude mountain stations worldwide (Himalaya, Karakorum, Alps, Andes)
notes: Repository flagged offline as of 2024 on re3data; historical mountain-research vector inventories. Portal: http://share.evk2cnr.org/
verify_notes: SHARE Geonetwork marked offline as of 2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SHARE Geonetwork 是意大利 CNR / EvK2CNR 维护的高山研究数据仓库，覆盖喜马拉雅、喀喇昆仑、阿尔卑斯与安第斯等地的全球高海拔观测台站。提供 ISO 19115 元数据及 GeoServer WMS/WFS 服务，开放获取但需注册，遵循 SHARE 数据共享政策。注意：re3data 标注该仓库在 2024 年已离线，主要为历史性的山地研究矢量清单。
desc_en: SHARE Geonetwork is a mountain-research data repository maintained by CNR / EvK2CNR in Italy, covering high-altitude monitoring stations worldwide across the Himalaya, Karakoram, Alps and Andes. It offers ISO 19115 metadata and GeoServer WMS/WFS services, openly accessible with registration under the SHARE Data Sharing Policy. Note that re3data flags the repository as offline as of 2024, so it now mainly holds historical mountain-research vector inventories.

name: Supraglacial Debris Cover (RGI v6.0 based)
formats_now: GIS raster/vector (debris cover, RGI v6.0 based)
feature_count: six zip-files, each containing 19 shapefiles (114 shapefile sets)
notes: Six zip files, 19 shapefiles each, RGI v6 structure plus debris-cover attributes.
verify_notes: DOI 重定向至 GFZ Potsdam 数据服务 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Scherler、Wulf 与 Gorelick（2018）发布的全球冰川表碛覆盖数据集，托管于 GFZ Data Services，基于 RGI v6.0 结构按 RGI 分区组织。数据约对应 2013–2017 年、30 米分辨率，包含表碛覆盖属性，以 Shapefile 提供（六个压缩包，每包 19 个 Shapefile），采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，开放获取。适用于冰川消融、表碛影响与冰川动力学研究。
desc_en: A global supraglacial debris-cover dataset by Scherler, Wulf and Gorelick (2018), hosted on GFZ Data Services and organized by RGI region following the RGI v6.0 structure. Spanning roughly 2013-2017 at 30 m resolution with debris-cover attributes, it is provided as Shapefiles (six zip files, 19 shapefiles each) under CC BY 4.0 and is openly accessible. It supports research on glacier melt, debris effects and glacier dynamics.

name: The Randolph Glacier Inventory (RGI) (2012-2017)
verify_notes: TPDC English landing reachable; details loaded via JS | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）镜像自 GLIMS 的 Randolph 冰川编目（RGI，2012–2017），提供全球冰川轮廓的 Shapefile。数据可免费获取，但需登录，遵循 TPDC 使用条款。RGI 是气候学界广泛采用的全球冰川轮廓标准，该镜像便于国内用户更便捷地访问与下载冰川矢量数据。
desc_en: A mirror of the Randolph Glacier Inventory (RGI, 2012-2017) from GLIMS, hosted by the Third Pole Environment Data Center (TPDC), providing global glacier outlines as Shapefiles. Access is free but requires login under TPDC terms. RGI is the widely adopted standard for global glacier outlines in the climate community, and this mirror offers users in the region more convenient access to and download of the glacier vector data.

name: World Bank Climate Change Knowledge Portal – Köppen-Geiger climate zones shapefile
notes: Official open vector form of K-G zones hosted on World Bank Data Catalog.
verify_notes: Koppen-Geiger Climate Classification 1976-2000 + 2076-2100 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界银行气候变化知识门户提供的柯本-盖格气候分区 Shapefile，是该分类的官方开放矢量形式，托管于世界银行数据目录。覆盖全球，包含历史时段（1976–2000）与预估时段（2076–2100）两套数据，文件体积很小。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可直接下载。适用于全球气候分区制图、气候变化情景对比与区域研究。
desc_en: A Köppen-Geiger climate-zone Shapefile from the World Bank Climate Change Knowledge Portal, the official open vector form of the classification hosted on the World Bank Data Catalog. It covers the globe with both historical (1976-2000) and projected (2076-2100) versions in compact files. Released under CC BY 4.0 with direct download, it supports global climate-zone mapping, climate-scenario comparison and regional studies.

name: World Map of the Köppen-Geiger Climate Classification (Vienna) — vector PDF/shp companion
provider: Institute for Veterinary Public Health, University of Veterinary Medicine Vienna (Rubel & Kottek)
license: Free for non-commercial / academic use (see site)
formats: PDF (vector), ASCII grid; widely re-released as shapefile
access: direct download (vector PDF + ASCII grids; community shapefile derivatives)
doi_or_citation: Kottek et al. 2006; Rubel & Kottek 2010 — predecessor/companion to Beck 2018
notes: Sibling reference dataset frequently cited alongside Beck 2018; high-resolution vector PDFs reusable for cartography.
verify_notes: Updated through 2023; v2023 in preparation | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 维也纳兽医大学（Rubel 与 Kottek）发布的世界柯本-盖格气候分类图，提供全球矢量 PDF、ASCII 栅格，社区也广泛再发布为 Shapefile。基于 Kottek 等 2006 与 Rubel & Kottek 2010，是常与 Beck 2018 并列引用的姊妹参考数据集。高分辨率矢量 PDF 适合制图复用。许可未明确，通常限非商业学术用途。
desc_en: The World Map of the Köppen-Geiger Climate Classification from the University of Veterinary Medicine Vienna (Rubel & Kottek), offering global vector PDFs and ASCII grids, with community-released Shapefile derivatives. Based on Kottek et al. (2006) and Rubel & Kottek (2010), it is a sibling reference dataset frequently cited alongside Beck (2018). Its high-resolution vector PDFs are reusable for cartography; licensing is unspecified and generally limited to non-commercial academic use.

name: 中国主要山脉及山峰分布数据 / Major Mountain Ranges & Peaks of China
provider: 数据禾 / 多家高校实验室 (originally digitized vs. ASTER GDEM 30m + 地质构造图)
license: unknown (commonly republished on CSDN/Sohu; original digitizers often academic)
notes: Mountain ranges in vector form are rare globally; this is one of the few Chinese authoritative shp products. Quality varies by mirror; preferred provenance via Science Data Bank or sciengine.com.
verify_notes: Connection refused; legacy ScienceDB URL pattern, see scidb.cn | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国主要山脉及山峰分布数据，原始基于 ASTER GDEM 30 米与地质构造图数字化而成，由多家高校实验室制作，常通过数据禾、科学数据银行等平台发布。覆盖中国全境，以 Shapefile（多边形 + 点）提供山脉范围与山峰位置。山脉矢量数据在全球较为稀缺，这是少有的中国权威产品之一，但不同镜像质量参差，建议优先选用科学数据银行等正规来源。许可情况不明。
desc_en: A dataset of China's major mountain ranges and peaks, originally digitized against ASTER GDEM (30 m) and geological structure maps by several university labs, often released through platforms such as Science Data Bank. Covering all of China, it provides mountain-range extents and peak locations as Shapefiles (polygons plus points). Vector mountain-range data are globally rare, making this one of the few authoritative Chinese products; mirror quality varies, so the Science Data Bank source is preferred. Licensing is unclear.

name: 中国第三次冰川编目 (2025 发布)
provider: 中科院 / 国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心 NCDC
license_now: 新闻稿未明确(数据由 NCDC/西北院发布)
notes: 最新冰川编目, 应通过 NCDC/TPDC 获取; 2026 年初仍在分发完善阶段
verify_notes: 中科院新闻稿 2025-03-24 发布: 第三次冰川编目, 当前约 46,000 km² / 69,000 条冰川, 较 1960s 减少 26% | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国第三次冰川编目（2025 年发布），由中科院西北院 / 国家冰川冻土沙漠科学数据中心（NCDC）发布，覆盖中国冰川，参考时段约为 2008–2020 年。预期以 Shapefile 提供，需注册获取。作为最新的全国性冰川编目，应通过 NCDC/TPDC 等正规渠道获取；据新闻稿信息，2026 年初仍处于分发完善阶段，许可条款尚未明确。
desc_en: China's Third Glacier Inventory (announced 2025), released by the Northwest Institute of CAS and the National Cryosphere Desert Data Center (NCDC), covering glaciers in China with a reference period of roughly 2008-2020. It is expected to be distributed as Shapefiles via registration. As the latest nationwide glacier inventory, it should be obtained through official channels such as NCDC/TPDC; per the press release it was still being finalized for distribution in early 2026, and license terms are not yet explicit.

name: Global Coastal Characteristics (GCC)
theme_canonical: Population & socioeconomic | Marine & coastal | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: Coastal infrastructure & socioeconomics | 海岸属性指标（80 项）
formats: Vector lines/points with attributes (roads, railways, ports, airports, population/GDP)
notes: Coastal segments with critical infrastructure attributes
verify_notes: Global Coastal Characteristics dataset (GCC) on Zenodo doi:10.5281/zenodo.8200199 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球海岸特征数据集（GCC），发表于 ESSD（2024），沿全球海岸线提供约 73 万个点位、涵盖 80 项指标。数据将海岸段与道路、铁路、港口、机场及人口/GDP 等关键基础设施和社会经济属性结合（基础数据涉及 ERA5，约 1979–2019）。以带属性的矢量线/点提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可经 DOI 开放获取。适用于海岸暴露度、灾害风险与沿海基础设施分析。
desc_en: The Global Coastal Characteristics (GCC) dataset, published in ESSD (2024), provides about 730,000 points with 80 indicators along the world's coastlines. It links coastal segments with critical infrastructure and socioeconomic attributes such as roads, railways, ports, airports and population/GDP, drawing on bases including ERA5 (roughly 1979-2019). Delivered as attributed vector lines and points under CC BY 4.0 and openly accessible via DOI, it supports coastal exposure, hazard-risk and infrastructure analysis.

name: GlobPOP: 33-year (1990-2022) global gridded population dataset
what_changes: Fuses WorldPop with GHS-POP, GPWv4, GRUMP and LandScan via cluster analysis + statistical learning to produce a temporally-consistent 30 arc-sec product 1990-2022
notes: Beijing Normal University; companion Nature Scientific Data paper s41597-024-02913-0
verify_notes: Heat exposure of older adults replication code/data | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GlobPOP 是覆盖 1990–2022 年的 33 年全球格网人口数据集，由北京师范大学团队制作，发表于 Nature 旗下 Scientific Data。数据以 GeoTIFF 提供，共 66 个文件（33 年 × 2 类），总量约 23.3 GB，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。它融合多套人口产品生成长时序一致的人口分布，适用于人口动态、暴露度评估与社会经济格网研究。
desc_en: GlobPOP is a 33-year (1990-2022) global gridded population dataset produced by a Beijing Normal University team and published in Nature's Scientific Data. It is distributed as GeoTIFFs comprising 66 files (33 years x 2 types), totaling about 23.3 GB, under a CC BY 4.0 license. By fusing several population products into a temporally consistent series, it supports research on population dynamics, exposure assessment and gridded socioeconomic analysis.

name: Alliance for Zero Extinction (AZE) sites
theme_raw: Sites holding last remaining populations of EN/CR species
formats: Shapefile via KBA / IBAT; KML on AZE site
access: Via WDKBA request or AZE portal
notes: Subset of KBAs under criterion E; frequently cited in IUCN gap analyses.
verify_notes: AZE 2018 map page no longer at this URL | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 零灭绝联盟（AZE）站点数据，由 BirdLife 协调的伙伴关系编制，全球范围约 853 个站点（2018 更新）。AZE 站点是依据标准 E 划定的关键生物多样性区域（KBA）子集，针对极度濒危且仅存于单一地点的物种。数据以 Shapefile（经 KBA/IBAT）和 KML 提供，需通过 WDKBA 申请或 AZE 门户获取，常见于 IUCN 保护空缺分析。
desc_en: Alliance for Zero Extinction (AZE) sites, compiled by a BirdLife-coordinated partnership, comprising about 853 sites globally (2018 update). AZE sites are a subset of Key Biodiversity Areas (KBAs) identified under criterion E, targeting highly threatened species confined to a single location. Data are available as Shapefiles via KBA/IBAT and as KML, accessed through a WDKBA request or the AZE portal, and are frequently cited in IUCN conservation gap analyses.

name: CDC/ATSDR Social Vulnerability Index (SVI) by Tract
coverage: USA census tracts; SVI themes incl. socioeconomic status
formats: GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, ArcGIS Feature Service (WFS-equivalent)
notes: Multiple vintages (2018/2020/2022/2024)
verify_notes: WebFetch 内容稀薄但页面标题正常返回；CDC SVI Tracts 仍在 ArcGIS Hub 提供。 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国疾控中心/毒物登记署（CDC/ATSDR）按人口普查区（tract）发布的社会脆弱性指数（SVI）数据。覆盖全美普查区，综合社会经济地位等多个主题衡量社区脆弱性，含多个年份版本（2018/2020/2022/2024）。提供 GeoJSON、Shapefile、KML 及 ArcGIS Feature Service，可经 ArcGIS Hub 下载或 REST 接口调用，属公共领域。适用于灾害准备、公共卫生与公平性分析。
desc_en: The CDC/ATSDR Social Vulnerability Index (SVI) by census tract, published via ArcGIS Hub. Covering U.S. census tracts, it measures community vulnerability across themes such as socioeconomic status, with multiple vintages (2018/2020/2022/2024). It is available as GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML and an ArcGIS Feature Service, downloadable from ArcGIS Hub or queryable via REST, and is in the public domain (CDC). It is widely used in disaster preparedness, public health and equity analysis.

name: compilerla Los Angeles Data Sources
theme_raw: Curated catalog of LA-area vector data portals
notes: Aggregates LA City/County, Caltrans, Metro GTFS, HIFLD, Census TIGER
verify_notes: Known catalog MIT but no visible LICENSE | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Compiler LA 维护的洛杉矶数据源汇总项目，通过 GitHub README 聚合大洛杉矶地区的多类地理空间数据来源，整合洛杉矶市/县、Caltrans、Metro GTFS、HIFLD 与 Census TIGER 等。提供指向 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 等格式的链接，便于查找区域数据。仓库未见明确许可证。它是定位与发现洛杉矶城市数据的便捷索引型资源。
desc_en: A Los Angeles data-sources catalog maintained by Compiler LA, aggregating geospatial data sources for Greater Los Angeles through a GitHub README and integrating Los Angeles City/County, Caltrans, Metro GTFS, HIFLD and Census TIGER. It provides links to Shapefile, GeoJSON and KML resources to ease data discovery. No explicit license is visible in the repository. It serves as a convenient index for locating and discovering Los Angeles urban data.

name: DOSE - Global Data set of reported Sub-national Economic output
formats: CSV joinable to GADM/geoBoundaries polygons; geometry shapefile released
verify_notes: Auth/cookie redirect; article exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: DOSE 是全球报告型次国家经济产出数据集，发表于 Scientific Data 并存于 Zenodo。覆盖全球 83 个国家、1,661 个次国家级地区，提供可与 GADM/geoBoundaries 多边形连接的 CSV 表格，并发布了几何 Shapefile。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，开放获取。适用于区域经济、不平等与气候—经济影响等次国家尺度研究。
desc_en: DOSE is a global dataset of reported sub-national economic output, published in Scientific Data and deposited on Zenodo. It covers 1,661 subnational regions across 83 countries, providing CSV tables joinable to GADM/geoBoundaries polygons along with a released geometry Shapefile. Distributed under CC BY 4.0 and openly accessible, it supports subnational research on regional economies, inequality and climate-economy impacts.

name: ForCenS — Forams Census global core-top compilation
doi_or_citation: Siccha & Kucera 2017, Sci Data; included in Triton
notes: Core-top dataset folded into Triton.
verify_notes: Planktonic foraminifera census counts dataset, published 2017 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ForCenS 是有孔虫表层沉积普查的全球汇编数据集（Siccha & Kucera 2017），托管于 PANGAEA，覆盖全球海洋、全新世。数据为含经纬度的表格 CSV（即矢量点位），记录有孔虫群落普查信息，采用 CC-BY-NC-SA-3.0 许可，开放获取。该核心顶部数据集已被纳入 Triton 数据集，适用于古海洋学、海洋生态与古气候重建研究。
desc_en: ForCenS is a global compilation of foraminiferal core-top census data (Siccha & Kucera 2017), hosted on PANGAEA and covering the global ocean during the Holocene. It is provided as tabular CSV with latitude/longitude (vector points) recording foram census information, under a CC-BY-NC-SA-3.0 license and openly accessible. This core-top dataset has been folded into the Triton compilation and supports paleoceanography, marine ecology and paleoclimate reconstruction.

name: GlobPOP: 31-year (1990-2020) global gridded population
what_changes: Data-fusion framework using cluster analysis and statistical learning to merge GHS-POP, GRUMP, GPWv4, LandScan and WorldPop into a unified continuous global population product.
notes: Published in Scientific Data (s41597-024-02913-0); GPWv4 is one of five fused inputs.
verify_notes: GlobPOP 33-year (1990-2022) global gridded population | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: GlobPOP 的 31 年版本，覆盖 1990–2020 年全球格网人口分布，发表于 Scientific Data。该产品融合包括 GPWv4 在内的五套人口数据生成长时序一致的人口格网。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，托管于 Zenodo 开放获取。适用于全球人口分布、城市化与暴露度等社会经济研究，是后续 1990–2022 版本的早期版本。
desc_en: The 31-year version of GlobPOP, covering global gridded population from 1990 to 2020 and published in Scientific Data. The product fuses five population datasets, including GPWv4, into a temporally consistent population grid. Released under CC BY 4.0 and hosted openly on Zenodo, it supports socioeconomic research on global population distribution, urbanization and exposure, and is an earlier edition of the later 1990-2022 release.

name: Gridded subnational population projections under SSPs 2020-2100 (1 km)
what_changes: Uses WorldPop 2020 baseline and projects to 2100 under SSP1-5 at 30 arc-sec via Random Forest; adds future time slices WorldPop does not provide
notes: Wang et al. 2022 Scientific Data; cold-niche SSP downscaling product
verify_notes: Downscaled GDP per capita 1990-2022; redirects to pmc subdomain | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 基于 SSP 情景的次国家级格网人口预估数据（Wang 等 2022，Scientific Data），时间跨度 2020–2100 年，空间分辨率 1 公里。该产品采用考虑寒冷生态位的 SSP 降尺度方法，生成多情景下的未来人口分布。采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，开放获取。适用于气候变化情景下的人口暴露、风险评估与长期社会经济规划研究。
desc_en: Gridded subnational population projections under the SSP scenarios (Wang et al. 2022, Scientific Data), spanning 2020-2100 at 1 km resolution. The product uses a cold-niche SSP downscaling approach to generate future population distributions across multiple scenarios. Released under CC BY 4.0 and openly accessible, it supports research on population exposure, risk assessment and long-term socioeconomic planning under climate-change scenarios.

name: IBGE Setores Censitários + Malhas Territoriais
theme_raw: Census enumeration sectors, municipios, weighting areas
formats: Shapefile, GeoPackage; OGC services via IBGE Mapas
formats_now: directory listing; format per folder (typically shapefile/GeoPackage)
notes: geobr R package wraps this; Geobases ES and other state IDEs republish as WMS/WFS.
verify_notes: FTP-style index page live; format info inside subfolders | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 巴西地理统计局（IBGE）的人口普查区（setores censitários）与行政区划网格（malhas territoriais）数据，覆盖巴西全境。提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage 及通过 IBGE Mapas 的 OGC 服务，数据公开（IBGE 声明所有文件均为公共数据）。R 语言 geobr 包封装了该数据源，部分州级 IDE 也以 WMS/WFS 再发布。适用于人口普查、行政区制图与社会经济空间分析。
desc_en: Census tracts (setores censitários) and administrative boundary meshes (malhas territoriais) from Brazil's IBGE, covering the entire country. They are provided as Shapefiles and GeoPackages plus OGC services via IBGE Mapas, and are public (IBGE states all files are public). The geobr R package wraps this source, and several state spatial-data infrastructures republish it as WMS/WFS. The data support census work, administrative mapping and socioeconomic spatial analysis.

name: India Geodata — village & census polygons (LGD, SoI, Bhuvan derivatives)
theme_raw: Indian census village polygons, district, sub-district
file_size: 160 GB+ across 60 datasets (LGD Villages 452.4 MB, Bhuvan Villages 754.9 MB, SOI Villages 574.0 MB parquet)
notes: Bhuvan itself requires registration; this repo packages clean derived layers.
verify_notes: page moved (extra 'e' in username); update URL | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: India Geodata 是一个开放社区项目，整理印度的村级与普查多边形数据，来源包括 LGD、印度测量局（SoI）与 Bhuvan 派生层。覆盖印度全境，跨 15 个类别提供约 60 套数据集，总量超过 160 GB，格式包括 Parquet、GeoJSON 与 Shapefile。Bhuvan 原始数据需注册，而该仓库将清洗后的派生层打包便于下载。许可遵循上游 Bhuvan/SoI 条款。适用于印度人口与行政区研究。
desc_en: India Geodata is an open community project curating India's village and census polygons from sources including LGD, the Survey of India (SoI) and Bhuvan derivatives. Covering all of India, it offers about 60 datasets across 15 categories totaling over 160 GB, in Parquet, GeoJSON and Shapefile formats. While Bhuvan itself requires registration, this repository packages clean derived layers for download, under upstream Bhuvan/SoI terms. It supports demographic and administrative research on India.

name: INE Spain Census Sections via INSPIRE
theme_raw: Secciones censales (~1500 inhabitants each) with population/income
notes: Pair with INE's Atlas de Distribución de Renta to map household income at finest unit publicly available.
verify_notes: Spain census sections, maintained annually by INE | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 西班牙国家统计局（INE）通过 INSPIRE 发布的人口普查小区（secciones censales）数据，覆盖西班牙全境，比例尺约 1:1000，自 2001 年起逐年更新。提供 WFS、GML、Atom 与 GeoJSON 等格式，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。该数据是西班牙公开可得的最细统计单元，结合 INE 收入分布图集可在最细粒度上绘制家庭收入分布。
desc_en: Census sections (secciones censales) of Spain published by the National Statistics Institute (INE) through INSPIRE, covering the whole country at about 1:1000 scale and updated annually from 2001 onward. They are available as WFS, GML, Atom and GeoJSON under a CC-BY 4.0 license. Representing the finest publicly available statistical unit in Spain, the data can be paired with INE's income distribution atlas to map household income at the finest granularity.

name: INSPIRE Statistical Units theme datasets (national geoportals)
coverage: EU-27 national statistical/administrative units, grids and reporting units
notes: Discovery layer over Member State statistical-units services (e.g. ES INE, IT ISTAT, DE Destatis) - useful when GISCO LAU is too generalised.
verify_notes: INSPIRE Geoportal search reachable; results loaded client-side | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: INSPIRE 统计单元（Statistical Units）主题数据集发现层，汇集欧盟成员国各国地理门户发布的统计/行政单元、格网与报告单元。覆盖 EU-27，提供 GML、Shapefile、GeoPackage 与 WFS 等格式，许可因记录而异。它作为发现入口，指向各成员国统计单元服务（如西班牙 INE、意大利 ISTAT、德国 Destatis），在 GISCO LAU 过于概化时尤为有用。
desc_en: A discovery layer for INSPIRE Statistical Units theme datasets, aggregating statistical/administrative units, grids and reporting units published by EU Member States' national geoportals. Covering the EU-27, it offers formats such as GML, Shapefile, GeoPackage and WFS, with licensing that varies by record. As a discovery entry point, it links to Member State statistical-units services (e.g. ES INE, IT ISTAT, DE Destatis) and is especially useful when GISCO LAU boundaries are too generalized.

name: Mapping Evolving Population Geography in China (county-level harmonised 1990-2020)
notes: Useful for cross-time Chinese demographic studies; verify final repo.
verify_notes: arXiv paper accessible; data not directly hosted here | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Yang 等人（arXiv 2203.02130）发布的中国县级协调人口地理数据，覆盖中国，提供跨时段一致的县级人口面板（题名涵盖 1990–2020，面板核心约 2010–2020）。数据以 Shapefile/GeoJSON 提供，可经 GitHub 或论文附录获取，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适用于跨时间的中国人口变迁与区域人口地理研究；建议使用前核实最终仓库地址。
desc_en: County-level harmonized population geography of China by Yang et al. (arXiv 2203.02130), covering China and providing a temporally consistent county-level population panel (the title spans 1990-2020, with the core panel around 2010-2020). Data are offered as Shapefile/GeoJSON via GitHub or the paper supplement under a CC-BY 4.0 license. It supports cross-time studies of Chinese demographic change and regional population geography; verifying the final repository location before use is advisable.

name: NOAA Billion-Dollar Disasters - Census-Tract GeoJSON
theme_canonical: Population & socioeconomic | Hazards & disasters | Physical geography (natural earth)
theme_raw: US billion-dollar weather/climate events with tract-level exposure
access: HTTP, also via Google Cloud Storage mirror
notes: Spatial files joined to >72,000 US census tracts; available as 'drought-billions' GeoJSON.
verify_notes: Redirects to /billions/ | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: NOAA NCEI 维护的“十亿美元灾害”数据集，记录美国自 1980 年以来造成至少十亿美元损失的气象与气候灾害事件。此版本将事件信息空间连接到逾 7.2 万个美国人口普查地块，提供 GeoJSON 与 CSV 格式，可下载或经 Google Cloud Storage 镜像获取。数据为公有领域，常用于灾害损失评估、气候风险制图及社会经济脆弱性分析，例如其中的“drought-billions”干旱专题图层。
desc_en: Maintained by NOAA NCEI, the Billion-Dollar Weather and Climate Disasters dataset catalogs U.S. events since 1980 that each caused at least one billion dollars in damage. This release spatially joins event information to more than 72,000 U.S. census tracts and is offered as GeoJSON and CSV, available over HTTP or through a Google Cloud Storage mirror. As a public-domain product it is widely used for disaster-loss accounting, climate-risk mapping, and socioeconomic vulnerability analysis, including the drought-focused 'drought-billions' layer.

name: Population spatialization & population clusters in absence of census - Mozambique etc.
notes: Methodology for vectorising population units where censuses lacking; underused for fragile states.
verify_notes: PMC domain migrated to pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Tatem 等人（WorldPop 团队）发表的方法学研究，针对缺乏完整人口普查的撒哈拉以南非洲国家（如莫桑比克），探讨如何对人口单元进行矢量化与人口聚类的空间化处理。提供约 90 米分辨率、可追溯至 1970 年代的 shapefile 矢量成果，以论文补充材料形式开放（CC-BY）。该方法对脆弱国家与数据匮乏地区的人口估算具有参考价值，但目前应用尚不充分。
desc_en: A WorldPop methodological study by Tatem and colleagues addressing how to spatialize population and delineate population clusters in sub-Saharan countries such as Mozambique where census coverage is sparse. It provides shapefile outputs at roughly 90 m resolution spanning from the 1970s onward, distributed as a paper supplement under CC-BY. The work is valuable for population estimation in fragile and data-poor states, though it remains comparatively underused outside specialist applications.

name: Pre-pandemic African protected area visitation dataset
what_changes: Joins WDPA polygons for African PAs with mobile-phone/visitation records and gate counts to produce a per-PA visitation table linked to WDPA IDs.
notes: Scientific Data paper; obscure niche socio-ecological derivative of WDPA.
verify_notes: Pre-pandemic African protected area visitation; Zenodo-hosted | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 发表于《Scientific Data》的一份非洲保护区访客（旅游访问）数据集，记录新冠疫情前非洲各保护区的游览情况，可视为世界保护区数据库（WDPA）的一个社会-生态衍生产品。以 CC BY 4.0 许可开放。该数据属于较为小众的专题资源，适用于保护区旅游、生态系统服务与人地关系研究；具体覆盖范围与要素细节请参考原文。
desc_en: A Scientific Data paper presenting a pre-pandemic dataset of visitation to African protected areas, serving as a socio-ecological derivative built upon the World Database on Protected Areas (WDPA). It is released under CC BY 4.0. This is a niche thematic resource suited to research on protected-area tourism, ecosystem services, and human-environment interactions; consult the original article for precise coverage and feature details.

name: Space2Stats (World Bank DECAT)
notes: Vector hex-grid statistics catalog referenced from stacindex.org
verify_notes: raw.githubusercontent returns 404; path may have moved within repo | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 世界银行 DECAT 团队开发的 Space2Stats 平台，将各类人口、社会经济与基础设施统计指标聚合到统一的 H3 六边形格网上，便于跨数据集对齐与空间分析。数据以 GeoParquet 矢量格式提供，并通过 STAC 目录（此处为 catalog.json 入口）编排，全球覆盖，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。适合需要标准化空间单元进行多源统计整合的研究与应用。
desc_en: Space2Stats, developed by the World Bank's DECAT team, aggregates population, socioeconomic, and infrastructure statistics onto a consistent H3 hexagonal grid to enable cross-dataset alignment and spatial analysis. Data are provided as GeoParquet vectors and organized through a STAC catalog (this catalog.json entry point), with global coverage under a CC-BY-4.0 license. It suits workflows that need standardized spatial units for integrating statistics from multiple sources.

name: SSP人口经济格点化数据集 (姜彤团队 v2)
provider: 南京信息工程大学 / 中国科学院 - 发布于ScienceDB
notes: 罕见中国学者主导的全球未来人口/GDP情景数据;气候变化耦合社会经济研究刚需;下载量已超16.7万次
verify_notes: ScienceDB platform; DOI/CSTR assignment | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由姜彤团队（南京信息工程大学/中国科学院）发布于 ScienceDB 的 SSP 人口与经济格点化数据集（v2），提供基于共享社会经济路径（SSP）情景的未来全球及中国人口与 GDP 空间分布预估，含 NetCDF 格网与分县矢量汇总。这是少有的由中国学者主导的全球未来情景数据，是气候变化与社会经济耦合研究的重要输入，下载量已超 16.7 万次，多数子集采用 CC-BY 许可。
desc_en: Published on ScienceDB by Jiang Tong's group (NUIST / Chinese Academy of Sciences), this SSP-based gridded population and economic dataset (v2) projects future global and Chinese population and GDP distributions under Shared Socioeconomic Pathway scenarios, supplied as NetCDF grids plus county-level vector summaries. As a rare Chinese-led global future-scenario product, it is heavily used in coupled climate-socioeconomic research, with downloads exceeding 167,000 and most components released under CC-BY licensing.

name: TIGER/Line Shapefile, 2020, Nation, U.S., Tribal Census Tracts
verify_notes: 2020 Tribal Census Tracts | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国人口普查局发布的 2020 年 TIGER/Line 部落人口普查地块（Tribal Census Tracts）全国级 shapefile，描绘美国境内联邦认可部落地区的统计制图边界。数据以 CC0 1.0 公有领域方式开放。作为权威官方地理底图，常用于将部落地区的人口与社会经济统计数据进行空间连接、制图及相关分析。
desc_en: Released by the U.S. Census Bureau, this 2020 TIGER/Line nation-level shapefile delineates Tribal Census Tracts, the statistical mapping boundaries for federally recognized tribal areas across the United States. It is distributed under CC0 1.0 as a public-domain product. As an authoritative official base geography, it is commonly used to spatially join, map, and analyze demographic and socioeconomic statistics for tribal areas.

name: UK Indices of Multiple Deprivation (IMD)
formats: CSV joinable to LSOA boundary (GeoJSON/WFS via ONS)
notes: Pair with LSOA polygons for choropleth/poverty mapping
verify_notes: IMD 2015 Barrow-in-Furness extract on CKAN | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英格兰多重剥夺指数（IMD），由住房、社区与地方政府部（MHCLG）经 data.gov.uk 发布，按下层超级输出区（LSOA）给出综合贫困/剥夺的评分与排名。此版本对应 2012/13 税务年度、于 2016-02-05 发布，覆盖 32,844 个 LSOA 小区域、326 个地方行政区。以 CSV 提供，可与 ONS 的 LSOA 边界（GeoJSON/WFS）连接绘制贫困分级地图，采用英国开放政府许可（OGL）。
desc_en: The English Indices of Multiple Deprivation (IMD), published by MHCLG via data.gov.uk, provide composite deprivation scores and ranks at Lower-layer Super Output Area (LSOA) level. This edition reflects the 2012/13 tax year, was published on 2016-02-05, and covers 32,844 LSOA small areas across 326 local authority districts. Supplied as CSV under the UK Open Government Licence, it is designed to be joined to ONS LSOA boundary polygons (GeoJSON/WFS) for choropleth poverty mapping.

name: US Atlas
notes: Derived from US Census TIGER via Natural Earth pipeline
verify_notes: latest release v3.0.1 (April 2023) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: US Atlas 是 topojson 项目提供的美国地理边界数据，包含州、县及全国轮廓等，以紧凑的 TopoJSON 及 GeoJSON 格式发布，便于在 D3.js 等网页可视化中直接使用。数据派生自美国人口普查局 TIGER（经 Natural Earth 处理流程），采用 ISC 许可，可通过 GitHub 与 jsDelivr CDN 获取，是网页地图与数据可视化的常用底图资源。
desc_en: US Atlas, from the topojson project, provides U.S. geographic boundaries (nation, states, counties) as compact TopoJSON and GeoJSON suitable for direct use in web visualizations such as D3.js. Derived from U.S. Census TIGER through a Natural Earth-style pipeline and released under the ISC license, it is distributed via GitHub and the jsDelivr CDN. It is a popular base layer for browser-based mapping and data visualization.

name: WORLD — External Geospatial Platforms: POPULATION
verify_notes: WB infra data page; entry is a catalog of external platforms | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界银行基础设施数据目录下的“外部地理空间平台：人口”条目，汇集并链接外部全球人口相关地理空间资源，便于用户检索与发现。数据为矢量形式（链接外部来源），全球覆盖，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可并公开提供。适合作为查找全球人口空间数据的索引入口，具体内容取决于所链接的外部数据集。
desc_en: An entry in the World Bank Infrastructure Data catalog titled 'External Geospatial Platforms: POPULATION,' compiling and linking external global population-related geospatial resources for discovery. It is delivered as vector data linked to external sources, with global coverage, public access, and a CC-BY-4.0 license. It serves mainly as an index to locate global population spatial data, with specifics depending on the external datasets referenced.

name: WorldPop Dataverse Repository
notes: Archive cited in Lloyd 2019 metadata record
verify_notes: Harvard Dataverse WorldPop collection page reachable | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: WorldPop 在 Harvard Dataverse 上的数据仓库，归档 WorldPop 项目的全球高分辨率人口分布及相关人口统计数据集，提供 GeoTIFF 栅格、CSV 以及部分 shapefile 矢量，可按 DOI 直接下载。数据以 CC BY 4.0 许可开放，被相关元数据记录（如 Lloyd 2019）引用，是全球人口建模、可达性分析与公共卫生研究广泛使用的权威数据来源。
desc_en: The WorldPop repository on Harvard Dataverse archives WorldPop's global high-resolution population distribution and related demographic datasets, offering GeoTIFF rasters, CSV, and some shapefiles with DOI-based direct download. Released under CC BY 4.0 and cited in metadata records such as Lloyd 2019, it is an authoritative source widely used for global population modeling, accessibility analysis, and public-health research.

name: 中国主要城市群基础地理数据 (1951-2023)
provider: 国家地球系统科学数据中心 (geodata.cn) - 人口主题专栏
theme_raw: 城市群/都市圈统计单元
notes: 人口主题分类下汇集多个矢量数据集
verify_notes: Publisher category index reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 国家地球系统科学数据中心（geodata.cn）人口主题专栏下的“中国主要城市群基础地理数据（1951-2023）”，汇集中国主要都市群在长时间序列上的基础地理矢量数据。以 shapefile/矢量形式提供，需注册下载，采用平台机构版权。适用于城市群演变、城镇化进程与区域人口空间格局研究，专栏下还汇集了多个相关矢量数据集。
desc_en: Hosted under the population theme of the National Earth System Science Data Center (geodata.cn), this 'Basic Geographic Data of Major Chinese Urban Agglomerations (1951-2023)' compiles long-time-series base vector data for China's principal metropolitan clusters. Provided as shapefiles/vectors under the platform's institutional copyright and requiring registration to download, it supports research on urban-agglomeration evolution, urbanization, and regional population patterns, alongside several related vector datasets in the same collection.

name: Wood Fiber Plantations / Concessions
theme_raw: Pulp & paper plantation polygons | Agricultural concessions | Species range and priority conservation polygons
coverage: Argentina, Brazil, Cambodia, China, India, Indonesia, Malaysia, Rwanda, South Africa, Vietnam
notes: Less commonly used than oil palm; valuable for pulp-and-paper supply-chain analysis. Compiled from disparate national grants.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由世界资源研究所（WRI）经 Global Forest Watch 发布的木纤维种植园/特许经营区数据，覆盖阿根廷、巴西、柬埔寨、中国、印度、印度尼西亚、马来西亚、卢旺达、南非和越南等国，描绘用于纸浆与造纸的木纤维林地边界。提供 shapefile 与 GeoJSON，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。相较油棕数据使用较少，但在纸浆造纸供应链与森林监测分析中价值显著；数据由多国零散授权资料汇编而成。
desc_en: Published by WRI through Global Forest Watch, this dataset maps wood-fiber plantations and concessions across Argentina, Brazil, Cambodia, China, India, Indonesia, Malaysia, Rwanda, South Africa, and Vietnam. Offered as shapefile and GeoJSON under CC BY 4.0, it is less commonly used than oil-palm layers but valuable for pulp-and-paper supply-chain and forest-monitoring analysis. It was compiled from disparate national grants and concession records.

name: RESOLVE Ecoregions 2017 (Dinerstein et al.)
theme_raw: 陆地生态分区 / terrestrial ecoregions (846 ecoregions, 14 biomes, 8 realms) | terrestrial ecoregions, biomes, realms (846/867 ecoregions, 14 biomes) | Ecoregions
notes: Widely cited; also served via UNEP-WCMC FeatureServer and Earth Engine RESOLVE/ECOREGIONS/2017.
verify_notes: Duplicate of item 0 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: RESOLVE Ecoregions 2017（Dinerstein 等，BioScience 2017）是全球陆地生态区划数据集，将全球陆地划分为数百个生态区，是生物多样性规划、保护优先级评估与生态系统制图的权威参考。以 shapefile 形式提供（约 150 MB），可直接下载，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，并同时通过 UNEP-WCMC FeatureServer 和 Google Earth Engine（RESOLVE/ECOREGIONS/2017）提供，被广泛引用。
desc_en: RESOLVE Ecoregions 2017 (Dinerstein et al., BioScience 2017) is a global terrestrial ecoregions dataset that partitions the world's land surface into several hundred ecoregions, serving as an authoritative reference for biodiversity planning, conservation prioritization, and ecosystem mapping. Available as a ~150 MB shapefile for direct download under CC-BY-4.0, it is also served via the UNEP-WCMC FeatureServer and Google Earth Engine (RESOLVE/ECOREGIONS/2017), and is very widely cited.

name: WCMC WDPA Current Polygons
theme_raw: World Database on Protected Areas | Vector FeatureCollections incl. TIGER, WDPA, FAO GAUL, USGS WBD | protected areas
license_now: No commercial use without permission; attribution required (UNEP-WCMC)
notes: Companion WDOECM (other effective conservation measures) collection also on GEE.
verify_notes: updated monthly | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界保护区数据库（WDPA）当前面状要素，由 UNEP-WCMC 与 IUCN 维护，是全球保护区的权威空间数据来源，收录超过 20 万个保护区，自 2017 年 7 月起按月更新。此版本以 Google Earth Engine FeatureCollection 形式提供，便于云端分析。使用需署名且未经许可不得用于商业用途；另有配套的 WDOECM（其他有效区域保护措施）数据集同样在 GEE 上提供。
desc_en: The WDPA current polygons, maintained by UNEP-WCMC and IUCN, are the authoritative global spatial source for protected areas, covering more than 200,000 sites and updated monthly since July 2017. This version is provided as a Google Earth Engine FeatureCollection for cloud-based analysis. Use requires attribution and prohibits commercial use without permission; a companion WDOECM (other effective area-based conservation measures) collection is also available on GEE.

name: EEA Biogeographical Regions of Europe (v3, 2016)
theme_raw: biogeographical regions (Habitats Directive, Emerald) | ecoregions / biogeographical | Biogeography
license: EEA standard reuse policy (effectively CC-BY-like; consult metadata)
license_now: EEA standard reuse policy (CC-BY-like), 详见 metadata
notes: EU regulatory dataset used for Natura 2000 / Habitats Directive reporting.
verify_notes: v3 (2016) 仍可达; 多种格式与服务 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 欧洲环境署（EEA）发布的欧洲生物地理区划（v3，2016 年），划分欧盟及邻近国家的生物地理区域，是 Natura 2000 网络与《栖息地指令》报告的官方监管数据集。提供 shapefile、SpatiaLite、ESRI REST 及 OGC WMS 等多种访问方式，可直接下载，于 2016-01-26 发布，采用类 CC-BY 的 EEA 标准再利用政策。常用于欧洲生物多样性评估与栖息地保护合规分析。
desc_en: The EEA Biogeographical Regions of Europe (v3, 2016) delineate the biogeographical zones of the EU and neighbouring countries and form an official regulatory dataset underpinning Natura 2000 and Habitats Directive reporting. Available as shapefile, SpatiaLite, ESRI REST, and OGC WMS for direct download, it was published on 2016-01-26 under the EEA's CC-BY-like standard reuse policy. It is widely used for European biodiversity assessment and habitat-protection compliance work.

name: GBIF Occurrence SQL Downloads (GBIF_Within / WKT)
theme_raw: Server-side SQL with WKT polygon predicates | protected_areas_biodiversity | species occurrences
formats: Input: WKT polygon. Output: CSV/Parquet (not vector itself, but vector-driven query)
notes: Vector geometries are inputs (WKT, anti-clockwise) via GBIF_Within; the only first-class spatial-query surface for advanced users.
verify_notes: Experimental feature, implementation may change in 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GBIF 提供的基于 SQL 的物种出现记录下载功能，支持以 WKT 多边形（GBIF_Within，要求逆时针顺序）作为空间查询输入，从全球生物多样性出现记录中筛选数据。输出为 CSV/Parquet（本身非矢量，但由矢量驱动查询），通过需认证的 API 访问并受配额限制，数据采用 CC BY 4.0。这是面向高级用户进行空间化生物多样性数据检索的核心一等接口。
desc_en: GBIF's SQL-based occurrence download capability lets users supply a WKT polygon (via GBIF_Within, requiring anti-clockwise ordering) as a spatial query input to filter the global biodiversity occurrence records. Outputs are CSV/Parquet (not vector themselves but vector-driven) delivered through an authenticated, quota-limited API, with data under CC BY 4.0. It is the first-class spatial-query surface for advanced biodiversity data extraction.

name: IUCN Red List Spatial Data Download (species range polygons)
theme_raw: Species ranges (global, multi-taxa) | species distribution / range | protected_areas_biodiversity
coverage: Global; mammals, amphibians, reptiles, freshwater groups, marine fish, sharks/rays, corals, conifers, seagrasses, mangroves, etc.
license: IUCN Red List Terms of Use (non-commercial; commercial via IBAT)
formats: Esri shapefile (polygons); points CSV; HydroBASIN join tables CSV
notes: Core canonical IUCN range-map archive; updated 2x/year with Red List releases. Excludes birds (use BirdLife).
verify_notes: WAF/Cloudflare 403; landing page is otherwise known to be active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: IUCN 红色名录空间数据下载提供全球物种分布范围多边形，覆盖哺乳类、两栖类、爬行类、淡水类群、海洋鱼类、鲨鳐、珊瑚、针叶树、海草、红树林等众多类群（鸟类除外，需用 BirdLife 数据）。提供 Esri shapefile 面要素、点位 CSV 及 HydroBASIN 连接表，免费但需注册并接受使用条款（商业使用经 IBAT）。随红色名录每年发布两次更新，是物种分布建模与保护评估的权威核心数据源。
desc_en: The IUCN Red List Spatial Data Download provides global species range polygons spanning mammals, amphibians, reptiles, freshwater groups, marine fish, sharks and rays, corals, conifers, seagrasses, mangroves, and more (excluding birds, for which BirdLife is used). It offers Esri shapefile polygons, point CSVs, and HydroBASIN join tables, free with registration and terms acceptance (commercial use via IBAT). Updated twice yearly with Red List releases, it is the canonical core archive for species-range modeling and conservation assessment.

name: World Database of Key Biodiversity Areas (WDKBA) - IBAT
access: registration / commercial tiers; free for research
notes: Authoritative KBA polygons; sample GIS downloads at /sample-downloads.
splink_merged_from: World Database of Key Biodiversity Areas (WDKBA)
verify_notes: Sensitive KBAs excluded; access via IBAT request | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界关键生物多样性区数据库（WDKBA），由 BirdLife International 与 KBA 伙伴关系维护，提供全球关键生物多样性区（KBA）的权威面状边界。经 IBAT 平台以 shapefile 形式分发，需注册，研究用途免费、商业使用按分级收费；另在 /sample-downloads 提供样例 GIS 数据。常用于保护优先级识别、企业生物多样性风险评估与栖息地保护规划。
desc_en: The World Database of Key Biodiversity Areas (WDKBA), maintained by BirdLife International and the KBA Partnership, provides authoritative polygon boundaries for Key Biodiversity Areas worldwide. Distributed as shapefiles through the IBAT platform, it requires registration, is free for research, and uses commercial tiers otherwise, with sample GIS downloads available at /sample-downloads. It is widely used for conservation prioritization, corporate biodiversity-risk screening, and habitat protection planning.

name: Brazil Conservation Units
notes: Federal, state and municipal conservation units polygons.
verify_notes: Source MMA dados.mma.gov.br | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 巴西保护单元（Conservation Units）数据，来源于巴西环境部（MMA），经 geobr R 包提供，涵盖联邦、州及市级各类保护单元的面状边界，含多个年份版本。以 GeoPackage / sf 格式通过 geobr 包获取，仓库采用 MIT 许可，数据源自 CNUC/MMA。适合巴西保护地分析、土地利用规划与生物多样性保护研究。
desc_en: Brazil Conservation Units, sourced from the Ministry of the Environment (MMA) and served via the geobr R package, cover federal, state, and municipal conservation-unit polygons across multiple years. Provided as GeoPackage / sf through geobr (repository under the MIT license, data from CNUC/MMA), they support Brazilian protected-area analysis, land-use planning, and biodiversity conservation research.

name: Quilombola Lands
notes: Officially recognized quilombola territories
verify_notes: Reference page not found; function may be renamed | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 巴西金邦拉（Quilombola）土地数据，由巴西国家殖民与土地改革研究所（INCRA）发布，经 geobr R 包提供，描绘官方认定的金邦拉（逃奴后裔社区）领地边界。以矢量（sf）格式开放获取，采用 INCRA 开放数据政策。适用于土地权属、社会公平与传统社区领地保护相关的空间分析。
desc_en: Brazil's Quilombola Lands, published by INCRA and served via the geobr R package, delineate officially recognized quilombola (descendants of escaped enslaved communities) territories. Provided as open vector (sf) data under INCRA's open-data policy, they support spatial analysis of land tenure, social equity, and traditional-community territorial protection.

name: Riparian Zones Change 2012-2018 (vector)
notes: Pre-built change polygons; rarely cited but valuable for WFD/biodiversity work
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 哥白尼陆地监测服务（CLMS/EEA）发布的河岸带土地覆盖/土地利用变化数据（2012-2018），针对欧洲河流流域缓冲区，提供预先计算好的变化多边形，分辨率约 5 米，按六年周期更新（元数据亦显示 2010-2014 时段）。提供 GPKG、SHP、GDB 格式，采用哥白尼数据政策。虽引用较少，但对《水框架指令》与生物多样性相关工作很有价值。
desc_en: Published by the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS/EEA), this Riparian Zones land cover/land use change product (2012-2018) covers European river-catchment buffer areas and provides pre-built change polygons at roughly 5 m resolution on a six-year cycle (metadata also notes a 2010-2014 period). Offered as GPKG, SHP, and GDB under the Copernicus data policy, it is seldom cited but valuable for Water Framework Directive and biodiversity work.

name: World Protected Areas 2019 (vector) - EEA SDI
formats_now: SHP, GDB, ASCII; WMTS/WMS; ESRI REST
notes: EEA's vectorized WDPA snapshot for analytical use.
verify_notes: Public access but non-commercial; must accept WDPA terms | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 欧洲环境署（EEA）空间数据基础设施（SDI）提供的“世界保护区 2019”矢量快照，是对 WDPA 的矢量化处理版本，供分析使用，全球覆盖，汇编自近 500 个来源、时间跨度自 1819 年至 2019 年。提供 SHP 与 GPKG 格式，开放获取，但遵循 WDPA 使用条款、禁止商业用途。适合保护区空间分析与制图，但需注意商业限制。
desc_en: The 'World Protected Areas 2019' vector snapshot from the EEA Spatial Data Infrastructure (SDI) is a vectorized version of the WDPA prepared for analytical use, with global coverage compiled from nearly 500 sources spanning 1819 to 2019. Provided as SHP and GPKG with open access, it follows the WDPA terms and conditions and prohibits commercial use. It suits protected-area spatial analysis and mapping, subject to those commercial restrictions.

name: A global database of butterfly species native distributions
coverage: Global; 10,372 butterfly species; ~10 km (5 arcmin); WGS84
notes: Companion raster GeoTIFFs also provided
verify_notes: Butterfly species, 7.85 GB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Daru（2024）发布于 Dryad 的全球蝴蝶物种原生分布数据库，涵盖 10,372 个蝴蝶物种，空间分辨率约 10 公里（5 弧分），采用 WGS84 坐标系。以 GeoPackage 形式提供逐物种分布多边形（总量约 7.85 GB），并附有配套的栅格 GeoTIFF；按 Dryad 条款（默认 CC0）开放下载。适合蝴蝶宏观生态、生物地理与物种分布建模研究。
desc_en: Published on Dryad by Daru (2024), this global database of butterfly native distributions covers 10,372 species at roughly 10 km (5 arc-minute) resolution in WGS84. It provides per-species range polygons as GeoPackage (about 7.85 GB total), with companion raster GeoTIFFs, openly downloadable under Dryad terms (CC0 by default). It supports butterfly macroecology, biogeography, and species-distribution modeling.

name: Article 17 Habitats Directive - spatial data (species & habitats distribution 10km)
formats_now: GDB, Geopackage, CSV, ESRI REST, WMS
notes: Distribution polygons per species/habitat code; joinable to conservation status tabular.
verify_notes: Article 17 spatial data three reporting periods | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 欧洲环境署/ETC 生物多样性发布的《栖息地指令》第 17 条空间数据，提供欧盟各物种与栖息地类型的分布多边形（10×10 公里格网），对应 2013-2018 报告周期（亦含 2007-2012）。以 shapefile 矢量形式开放下载，采用 EEA 再利用政策，可与保护状况表格数据按物种/栖息地编码连接。是欧盟生物多样性保护状况评估与履约报告的核心空间数据。
desc_en: Published by EEA / ETC Biodiversity, the Article 17 Habitats Directive spatial data provide species and habitat-type distribution polygons on a 10x10 km grid for the EU, covering the 2013-2018 reporting cycle (and the earlier 2007-2012 cycle). Released as shapefiles under EEA reuse terms, they join to tabular conservation-status data by species/habitat code. They are central to EU biodiversity conservation-status assessment and compliance reporting.

name: B-Cubed species occurrence cubes (vector grid cubes from GBIF)
license_now: EU Horizon Europe; open collaboration (GitHub edit), no explicit license stated
formats_now: JSON query files, DOI-linked occurrence cubes
notes: Builds vector grid-cell biodiversity cubes from GBIF + checklists
verify_notes: Tutorial page; not a dataset host | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: B-Cubed（与 GBIF 合作）提供的物种出现数据立方体方法与教程，将 GBIF 出现记录与物种名录整合为基于 EEA 格网的矢量格网生物多样性立方体，覆盖欧洲及全球。成果以 GeoPackage / sf 面要素形式提供，配套开放教程与 R 包，属欧盟 Horizon Europe 开放协作项目（未明确声明许可）。适合标准化、可复现的生物多样性指标计算与空间分析。
desc_en: B-Cubed, in collaboration with GBIF, provides methods and tutorials for building species occurrence cubes that combine GBIF records with checklists into EEA-grid vector biodiversity cubes covering Europe and globally. Outputs are GeoPackage / sf polygons accompanied by an open tutorial and R package, developed under the EU Horizon Europe program as an open collaboration (no explicit license stated). It suits standardized, reproducible biodiversity-indicator computation and spatial analysis.

name: BC Parks, Ecological Reserves, and Protected Areas
verify_notes: BC Parks dataset | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省（BC）公园、生态保护区及保护区数据，由 BC 省经 open.canada.ca 发布，描绘该省各类受保护与受管控自然区域的边界。提供 shapefile 与 KML 格式，采用不列颠哥伦比亚省开放政府许可。适用于该省保护地管理、土地利用规划与生态保护相关的空间分析与制图。
desc_en: The BC Parks, Ecological Reserves, and Protected Areas dataset, published by the Province of British Columbia via open.canada.ca, delineates the boundaries of the province's protected and managed natural areas. Provided as shapefile and KML under the Open Government Licence - British Columbia, it supports protected-area management, land-use planning, and conservation analysis and mapping within the province.

name: Biodiversity Hotspots Map (English labels) — Zenodo
what_changes: Combines CI biodiversity-hotspot polygons with Natural Earth country/coast base layers to produce a publication-ready cartographic vector dataset.
notes: Low-citation derivative cartographic product reusing Natural Earth basemap.
verify_notes: Biodiversity Hotspots Map (English), 36 hotspots, 2016.1; raster/image only, not vector | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 发布于 Zenodo 的“生物多样性热点地图（英文标注）”，是一份基于 Natural Earth 底图制作的制图衍生产品，展示全球生物多样性热点的概略分布，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该产品引用较少，更偏向于可视化/制图用途，适合作展示与教学参考，而非高精度分析底图；具体覆盖与要素细节请参考 Zenodo 记录。
desc_en: Hosted on Zenodo, the 'Biodiversity Hotspots Map (English labels)' is a cartographic derivative built on a Natural Earth basemap that depicts the broad distribution of global biodiversity hotspots, released under CC BY 4.0. It is a low-citation product oriented toward visualization and presentation rather than high-precision analysis; consult the Zenodo record for exact coverage and feature details.

name: Biodiversity Intactness (io-biodiversity)
notes: Vector index via geoparquet-items collection asset.
verify_notes: JS-rendered page; reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Impact Observatory 与 Vizzuality 制作的全球生物多样性完整度（Biodiversity Intactness）数据集，反映各地生物多样性相对于未受人类干扰基线的保留程度。主体为云优化 GeoTIFF（COG）栅格，并提供 geoparquet-items 矢量索引便于检索，经 Microsoft Planetary Computer 的 STAC 与 Azure 访问，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。适合全球生物多样性现状评估与保护规划。
desc_en: The Biodiversity Intactness (io-biodiversity) dataset, produced by Impact Observatory and Vizzuality, indicates how much of an area's biodiversity remains relative to an undisturbed baseline. Delivered primarily as Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF rasters with a geoparquet-items vector index for discovery, it is accessed through Microsoft Planetary Computer's STAC and Azure under CC BY 4.0. It supports global biodiversity-condition assessment and conservation planning.

name: BioONE 生物多样性与生态安全大数据平台
provider: 中科院战略性先导专项 (A 类)
coverage: 全国 173 个数据集，含物种分布
verify_notes: unable to verify first certificate | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BioONE 生物多样性与生态安全大数据平台，依托中国科学院战略性先导科技专项（A 类）建设，汇集全国 173 个数据集，涵盖物种分布等生物多样性主题，含矢量点/面等多种数据格式，需注册访问。可作为中国生物多样性与生态安全研究的综合性数据门户，支撑物种分布、保护规划与生态评估等应用。
desc_en: The BioONE Big Data Platform for Biodiversity and Ecological Security, developed under a Chinese Academy of Sciences Strategic Priority Research Program (Category A), aggregates 173 nationwide datasets covering biodiversity themes including species distributions, in multiple formats such as vector points and polygons, with registration-based access. It serves as a comprehensive data portal for China's biodiversity and ecological-security research, supporting species-distribution, conservation-planning, and ecological-assessment applications.

name: BirdLife / HBW Species Distribution Maps of the Birds of the World
notes: The bird-half of IUCN spatial data; jointly used with IUCN Red List polygons for global SDM/range work.
verify_notes: Active; copyright 2024-2026; non-commercial via form, commercial via IBAT | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BirdLife International 与 HBW（Lynx）联合发布的全球鸟类物种分布图，覆盖逾 11,000 种鸟类，是全球鸟类分布范围的权威数据，常与 IUCN 红色名录多边形配合使用，构成全球物种分布建模与范围分析的“鸟类部分”。以文件地理数据库（.gdb）提供（可按需提供 shapefile），通过经审核的申请表获取，非商业用途免费、商业使用经 IBAT。
desc_en: Jointly produced by BirdLife International and HBW (Lynx), the Species Distribution Maps of the Birds of the World cover more than 11,000 species and are the authoritative source for global bird ranges. They complement IUCN Red List polygons, forming the 'bird half' of global spatial data for species-distribution modeling and range analysis. Provided as a File Geodatabase (.gdb), with shapefile on request, they are obtained through a vetted request form, free for non-commercial use and licensed commercially via IBAT.

name: BON in a Box STAC (GeoBON)
theme_raw: biodiversity essential variables (includes vector species range, protected areas)
notes: Mixed catalog; numerous vector biodiversity layers
verify_notes: STAC v1.0.0; per-collection licensing | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GEO BON 的“BON in a Box”STAC 目录，汇集全球范围内多样的生物多样性观测与衍生数据图层，包含 GeoJSON/矢量与栅格等多种格式，许可方式各异（多为开放）。通过开放的 STAC API 访问，便于编程化检索与集成。适合需要整合多源生物多样性指标与监测数据的研究与应用。
desc_en: The 'BON in a Box' STAC catalog from GEO BON aggregates a diverse set of global biodiversity observation and derived data layers, including GeoJSON/vector and raster formats under varying (mostly open) licenses. Accessible through an open STAC API for programmatic discovery and integration, it suits research and applications that need to combine multi-source biodiversity indicators and monitoring data.

name: CAFF Circumpolar Biodiversity Monitoring (CBMP) vector layers
notes: Biodiversity thematic feed surfaced through Arctic SDI.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CAFF 环北极生物多样性监测计划（CBMP）矢量图层，由北极动植物保护工作组（CAFF）经北极生物多样性数据服务（ABDS）发布，覆盖环北极北极地区。提供 SHP、GeoPackage 与 WFS 等格式，经 GeoNetwork 目录及 WFS/WMS 访问，采用开放（CC BY）许可，并通过北极 SDI 进行专题汇聚。适合北极生物多样性监测、变化评估与区域保护研究。
desc_en: The CAFF Circumpolar Biodiversity Monitoring Program (CBMP) vector layers, published by CAFF through the Arctic Biodiversity Data Service (ABDS), cover the circumpolar Arctic. Available as SHP, GeoPackage, and WFS via a GeoNetwork catalog and WFS/WMS services under an open (CC BY) license and surfaced through the Arctic SDI, they suit Arctic biodiversity monitoring, change assessment, and regional conservation research.

name: Canadian Protected and Conserved Areas Database (CPCAD)
verify_notes: CPCAD freely available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 加拿大保护与保育地数据库（CPCAD），由加拿大环境与气候变化部维护，是加拿大陆地与海洋受保护及保育地的权威空间数据集，用于追踪国家保护地覆盖与履约进展。提供文件地理数据库（FGDB）矢量、WMS 及 ESRI REST 服务，采用加拿大开放政府许可。常用于国家保护目标评估、海洋与陆地保护规划及空间分析。
desc_en: The Canadian Protected and Conserved Areas Database (CPCAD), maintained by Environment and Climate Change Canada, is the authoritative spatial dataset of Canada's terrestrial and marine protected and conserved areas, used to track national protected-area coverage and commitments. Provided as File Geodatabase (FGDB) vectors plus WMS and ESRI REST services under the Open Government Licence - Canada, it is widely used for national conservation-target assessment and marine and terrestrial protection planning.

name: Code & supplementary spatial data – OECM contribution to global biodiversity
notes: Companion to Nature Communications 2025 OECM paper
verify_notes: OECMs code for Nature Communications 2025 paper | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 发布于 Zenodo 的代码与补充空间数据，配套 2025 年《Nature Communications》关于 OECM（其他有效区域保护措施）对全球生物多样性贡献的论文。内容包括 R 脚本及由 WDPA/WD-OECM 衍生的矢量输入，体量约 20.3 kB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，全球覆盖。适合复现该研究的分析流程及开展 OECM 相关的保护成效评估。
desc_en: Hosted on Zenodo, this code and supplementary spatial data accompany a 2025 Nature Communications paper on the contribution of OECMs (other effective area-based conservation measures) to global biodiversity. It comprises R scripts and vector inputs derived from WDPA/WD-OECM (about 20.3 kB) under a CC-BY-4.0 license with global coverage. It supports reproducing the study's analytical workflow and OECM-related conservation-effectiveness assessment.

name: Ecoregions species lists with Red List status
what_changes: Intersects IUCN Red List range polygons with Dinerstein (2017) terrestrial ecoregions to produce per-ecoregion species inventories (mammals, birds, amphibians) tagged with Red List category.
notes: Assembled 2020; cold-tail derivative providing ecoregion-level rollups rather than raw species ranges.
verify_notes: Figshare returned 403 to WebFetch; likely alive via browser | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 发布于 figshare 的“生态区物种名录及红色名录状况”数据集，将物种及其 IUCN 红色名录受威胁状况按生态区进行汇总，提供生态区层面的物种统计，而非原始物种分布范围。约 2020 年汇编，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。属较小众的衍生产品，适合生态区尺度的生物多样性与保护优先级分析；具体格式与覆盖请参考记录页。
desc_en: Published on figshare, the 'Ecoregions species lists with Red List status' dataset rolls up species and their IUCN Red List threat status to the ecoregion level, providing ecoregion-scale species summaries rather than raw species ranges. Assembled around 2020 under a CC-BY 4.0 license, it is a niche derivative suited to ecoregion-level biodiversity and conservation-prioritization analysis; consult the record page for exact formats and coverage.

name: EPA Omernik Ecoregions of the Continental United States (Levels I–IV)
coverage: CONUS (parallel Level I/II datasets for North America)
file_size: Level III 35 mb (with states) / 28 mb; Level IV 69 mb / 65 mb
notes: Different schema from WWF TEOW; widely used in US conservation planning. Also hosts CEC Level I/II North America ecoregions (US+CA+MX).
verify_notes: Last updated 2025-11-24; Level III/IV downloads available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国环保署（EPA）与 Omernik 共同维护的美国本土生态区划数据，提供从 I 级到 IV 级的多尺度生态区边界，IV 级最为精细。该体系基于地形、地质、土壤、植被和气候等多要素综合划分，广泛应用于美国的保护规划、水质评估与生态系统管理，其分区逻辑不同于 WWF TEOW 体系。数据以 shapefile 和文件地理数据库形式直接下载，属于美国政府公有领域，并附带覆盖美国、加拿大、墨西哥的 CEC 北美 I/II 级生态区。
desc_en: Maintained by the US EPA and Omernik, this dataset delineates the ecoregions of the conterminous United States across a nested hierarchy from coarse Level I to highly detailed Level IV. Boundaries integrate terrain, geology, soils, vegetation and climate, and follow a different conceptual scheme than the WWF terrestrial ecoregions. It is heavily used in US conservation planning, water-quality assessment and ecosystem management. Data are distributed as shapefiles and file geodatabases for direct download as US public-domain material, and the site also hosts the CEC Level I/II North American ecoregions covering the US, Canada and Mexico.

name: Expert range maps of global mammal distributions harmonised to three taxonomic authorities (MDD v1.2)
notes: Marsh et al., published in Journal of Biogeography; widely reused for biodiversity assessments
verify_notes: 哺乳动物范围地图；27 个分类目级 zip + Mammalia 综合包，约 20.5GB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Marsh 等人编制、发表于《Journal of Biogeography》的全球哺乳动物专家分布范围图，覆盖 6,362 种现存哺乳动物，并将分类协调至三套主流分类权威（含 MDD v1.2）。数据以 GeoPackage 和按目分包的 shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，总量约 20.5GB。作为权威的物种分布多边形数据集，常用于生物多样性评估、保护空缺分析与物种分布建模等研究。
desc_en: Compiled by Marsh et al. and published in the Journal of Biogeography, this dataset provides expert range maps for 6,362 extant mammal species, harmonised across three taxonomic authorities including Mammal Diversity Database v1.2. It is delivered as GeoPackage and per-order shapefile archives totalling about 20.5 GB under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. The harmonised polygons are widely reused for biodiversity assessments, protected-area gap analyses and species distribution modelling that require consistent global mammal ranges.

name: Functional connectivity of the world's protected areas (Brennan et al.)
what_changes: Uses WDPA polygons (April 2018 / May 2020 versions) to compute and publish global functional connectivity metrics and connectivity-derived spatial layers between protected areas.
notes: Niche research-grade derivative published alongside Science paper on global PA connectivity.
verify_notes: Functional connectivity of protected areas (Brennan et al. 2022) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 随 Brennan 等人发表于《Science》的全球保护区功能连通性研究配套数据集，以矢量形式刻画世界各地保护区之间的连通状况。数据采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可托管于 Zenodo，属研究级衍生成果，适用于景观连通性、保护网络规划与栖息地破碎化等分析。具体格式与覆盖范围以仓库说明为准。
desc_en: This is the research-grade companion dataset to Brennan et al.'s Science paper on the functional connectivity of the world's protected areas. Distributed via Zenodo under a CC-BY-4.0 licence, it provides vector layers characterising how protected areas connect across the globe. It is intended for studies of landscape connectivity, protected-area network design and habitat fragmentation rather than as a general-purpose reference layer; consult the repository record for exact formats and coverage.

name: GARD 1.7 - global distributions for all terrestrial reptiles
license_now: Dryad terms (CC0 implied; site states 'Content licensed for reuse')
notes: Expert-validated global reptile range polygons
verify_notes: GARD 1.7 reptile distributions; 854MB shapefile available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GARD（Global Assessment of Reptile Distributions）1.7 版，提供全球 10,914 种陆生爬行动物的专家校验分布范围多边形，由 Roll、Meiri 等人发布。数据为 shapefile 多边形格式，约 854MB，托管于 Dryad 并允许重用（CC0 含义）。作为目前最完整的全球爬行动物分布数据之一，常用于生物多样性热点识别、保护空缺分析及宏观生态研究。
desc_en: GARD (Global Assessment of Reptile Distributions) version 1.7 provides expert-validated range polygons for 10,914 terrestrial reptile species worldwide, released by Roll, Meiri and colleagues. The data are supplied as polygon shapefiles of roughly 854 MB through Dryad under open reuse terms. As one of the most complete global reptile distribution datasets available, it underpins biodiversity hotspot mapping, conservation gap analyses and macroecological research on a clade historically under-represented in spatial datasets.

name: GBIF Backbone Taxonomy + Checklist Datasets (no geometry, but used to build vector cubes)
notes: Combined with GADM polygons via B-Cubed to produce vector species cubes
verify_notes: GBIF dataset pages normally CC0/CC-BY; WebFetch blocked but resource likely exists | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: GBIF 主干分类法及配套名录数据集，是全球生物多样性信息网络的核心分类参考骨架。数据本身不含几何信息，以 Darwin Core Archive（DwC-A）格式、CC0 许可开放下载。它常与 GADM 行政边界多边形结合，通过 B-Cubed 工作流生成矢量物种立方体，为占有率统计、保护区覆盖分析等提供分类一致性基础。
desc_en: The GBIF Backbone Taxonomy and associated checklist datasets form the core taxonomic reference skeleton of the Global Biodiversity Information Facility. The data carry no geometry and are published as Darwin Core Archive (DwC-A) files under a CC0 licence. In a geospatial context they are combined with GADM administrative polygons through the B-Cubed workflow to build vector species cubes, providing the taxonomic backbone needed for occupancy summaries, protected-area coverage and biodiversity indicator analyses.

name: gbif.range R package derived ecoregion-based range maps
what_changes: R package + accompanying EnviDat dataset producing ecologically-informed species range polygons by intersecting GBIF occurrences with in-house ecoregion shapefiles.
notes: Software + reference shapefiles; downstream vector range maps generated per-species on demand.
verify_notes: gbif.range R package v1.1 current | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EnviDat 上托管的 gbif.range R 包及其参考资源，包含用于生成基于生态区的物种分布范围图的软件与参考 shapefile。下游的逐物种矢量范围图按需生成。数据采用 CC-BY-SA 4.0 许可，适用于由 GBIF 出现记录推导物种分布的生态与保护研究。
desc_en: Hosted on EnviDat, this record provides the gbif.range R package together with its reference resources, including the software and bundled reference shapefiles used to derive ecoregion-based species range maps. Downstream per-species vector ranges are generated on demand rather than distributed as a fixed product. Released under a CC-BY-SA 4.0 licence, it supports ecological and conservation work that derives species distributions from GBIF occurrence records using an ecoregion framework.

name: gbif.range — ecoregion-based species range polygons
access: open-source R package + bundled ecoregion shapefiles
notes: Generates vector range polygons from GBIF occurrences using ecoregion shapefiles
verify_notes: Active; 1121 commits | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Chauvier 等人（ETH/WSL）开发的 gbif.range 开源 R 包，可基于 GBIF 出现记录与生态区 shapefile 生成物种分布范围多边形。包采用 MIT 与 GPL-3.0 双许可，附带生态区参考 shapefile，输出 sf 多边形/shapefile。适合需要从点位出现数据快速构建保守物种范围图的生态与保护研究。
desc_en: Developed by Chauvier et al. (ETH/WSL), gbif.range is an open-source R package that generates species range polygons from GBIF occurrence records using bundled ecoregion shapefiles. It is dual-licensed under MIT and GPL-3.0 and outputs ranges as sf polygons or shapefiles. The tool is well suited to ecological and conservation studies that need to construct conservative species range estimates directly from point occurrence data using an ecoregion-based delimitation approach.

name: Global 1-km habitat distribution for endangered species (2020-2100)
theme_canonical: Protected areas & biodiversity | Physical geography (natural earth)
what_changes: Crosses IUCN expert range maps + habitat/elevation preferences with global LULC projections under SSP/RCP scenarios to produce future AOH rasters for 2,571 amphibians, 617 birds, 1,280 mammals, 1,456 reptiles at 1 km.
notes: Sci Data 2025; niche climate-projected AOH extension of IUCN spatial data.
verify_notes: Nature IDP cookie redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 发表于《Scientific Data》（2025）的全球 1 公里濒危物种栖息地分布数据集，提供 2020 至 2100 年的气候情景投影，是 IUCN 空间数据在适宜栖息地（AOH）方向的延伸成果。数据采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。该数据属较为专门的研究产品，适用于气候变化下的栖息地变化预测、保护优先区识别及物种脆弱性评估。
desc_en: Published in Scientific Data (2025), this dataset provides global habitat distributions for endangered species at 1 km resolution with climate-projected layers spanning 2020 to 2100. It is a niche, area-of-habitat extension built on IUCN spatial data and is released under a CC-BY 4.0 licence. The product supports forward-looking analyses of habitat change under climate scenarios, identification of conservation priorities and assessments of species vulnerability across the rest of the century.

name: Global Critical Habitat Screening Layer

desc_zh: UNEP-WCMC 发布的全球关键栖息地筛查图层（Global Critical Habitat Screening Layer），用于初步识别可能触发 IFC 关键栖息地标准的区域。数据包含矢量（shapefile）与栅格（GeoTIFF）形式，全球覆盖，按 UNEP-WCMC 使用条款提供。常用于环境与社会影响评估、企业生物多样性风险筛查及金融机构尽职调查。
desc_en: Produced by UNEP-WCMC, the Global Critical Habitat Screening Layer offers a worldwide first-pass indication of areas likely to trigger critical-habitat criteria such as those of the IFC Performance Standards. It is provided in both vector (shapefile) and raster (GeoTIFF) form under UNEP-WCMC terms. The layer is commonly applied in environmental and social impact assessments, corporate biodiversity-risk screening and due-diligence workflows for financial institutions evaluating sensitive sites.

name: Global Saltmarshes (McOwen et al.)

desc_zh: 由 McOwen 等人于 2017 年发表的全球盐沼数据集，托管于 UNEP-WCMC，是全球首个综合性盐沼分布数据集，覆盖 99 个国家。数据以多边形与点要素 shapefile 加 Access 数据库形式提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，并发表于《Biodiversity Data Journal》数据论文。广泛用于蓝碳核算、海岸湿地保护与生态系统服务评估。
desc_en: Compiled by McOwen et al. (2017) and hosted by UNEP-WCMC, this is the first comprehensive global saltmarsh dataset, drawing together records from 99 countries. It is distributed as polygon and point shapefiles plus an accompanying Access database under a CC-BY 4.0 licence, and is documented in a Biodiversity Data Journal data paper. The dataset is widely used for blue-carbon accounting, coastal wetland conservation and ecosystem-service assessment of these valuable but under-mapped habitats.

name: Global taxonomic occurrence grids using GBIF data for species distribution models
notes: Useful for protected-area coverage and KBA gap analyses
verify_notes: Global taxonomic occurrence grids from GBIF (1deg) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 基于 GBIF 数据构建的全球分类群出现栅格/网格数据集，用于物种分布建模，以按类群划分的 GeoPackage 矢量网格形式提供。压缩包约 182.7 MB（解压约 8.6GB），采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放获取。该数据可支持保护区覆盖评估与关键生物多样性区（KBA）空缺分析等应用。
desc_en: Derived from GBIF data, this dataset provides global taxonomic occurrence grids intended for species distribution modelling, delivered as per-taxon GeoPackage vector grids. The download is about 182.7 MB and expands to roughly 8.6 GB, openly available under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. By summarising occurrences onto consistent grids, it supports protected-area coverage assessments, Key Biodiversity Area gap analyses and other applications that need aggregated, model-ready biodiversity layers.

name: Global tree species range maps via alpha-hulls (GBIF-derived)
what_changes: Converts GBIF point occurrences for global tree species (2,070 contributing datasets) into alpha-hull polygons representing extent of occurrence (EOO); produces vector range polygons rather than points.
notes: Registered as a GBIF derived dataset DOI; methodology follows alpha-hull EOO workflows used in IUCN-style assessments.
verify_notes: Resolves to GBIF derivedDataset; GBIF returned 403 to WebFetch but URL is valid | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 基于 GBIF 出现记录、采用 alpha-hull 方法生成的全球树种分布范围图，登记为 GBIF 衍生数据集 DOI。其方法遵循 IUCN 评估中常用的 alpha-hull 占有范围（EOO）工作流。数据采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可（遵循 GBIF 衍生数据集引用政策）。适用于树种分布制图、保护评估与生物多样性研究。
desc_en: This GBIF-derived dataset provides global tree species range maps constructed with alpha-hull methods and is registered under a GBIF derived-dataset DOI. The approach follows the alpha-hull extent-of-occurrence workflows commonly used in IUCN-style assessments to delimit ranges from occurrence points. It is released under a CC-BY 4.0 licence in line with GBIF's derived-dataset citation policy, and is suitable for tree distribution mapping, conservation assessment and broader biodiversity research.

name: GMS Protected Areas
notes: Polygon alignments of designated protected areas.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 亚洲开发银行大湄公河次区域（GMS）项目提供的保护区数据，刻画次区域内已划定保护区的多边形边界。数据以 shapefile（多边形）和 KMZ 格式开放下载，按 ADB GMS 开放使用条款提供。适用于大湄公河流域的跨境保护规划、土地利用与生态廊道分析。
desc_en: Provided through the Asian Development Bank's Greater Mekong Subregion (GMS) programme, this dataset delineates the polygon boundaries of designated protected areas across the subregion. It is available for open download as polygon shapefiles and KMZ files under the ADB GMS open-use terms. The layer supports transboundary conservation planning, land-use analysis and ecological-corridor studies across the Mekong basin countries.

name: High Biodiversity Wilderness Areas (2004)
notes: Classic HBWA polygons from Conservation International.
verify_notes: zenodo.figshare blocks WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 高生物多样性荒野区（High Biodiversity Wilderness Areas, HBWA）多边形数据，源自 Mittermeier 等人与保护国际（Conservation International）提出的经典框架，识别既保有大面积原始荒野又具高物种丰富度的全球区域。数据为 shapefile 多边形，全球覆盖，采用 CC BY 许可开放获取。常用于全球保护优先区划定与对比分析。
desc_en: This dataset provides the High Biodiversity Wilderness Areas (HBWA) polygons, derived from the classic framework of Mittermeier et al. and Conservation International that identifies regions retaining extensive intact wilderness alongside exceptional species richness. It is supplied as global polygon shapefiles under a CC BY licence. The layer is widely used in global conservation prioritisation and as a complement or contrast to biodiversity-hotspot delineations in comparative analyses.

name: IBAMA SISCOM - Embargos, Autuações, Unidades de Conservação Federais
theme_raw: Environmental enforcement, protected areas, fire scars
notes: Áreas embargadas, UCs federais, focos de calor históricos
verify_notes: GeoServer reachable; OWS ExceptionReport without params is expected | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 巴西环境与可再生自然资源研究所（IBAMA）SISCOM 系统的 GeoServer 服务，提供环境查封区（embargos）、行政处罚（autuações）、联邦保护区（UCs federais）及历史火点等矢量图层。数据通过 WFS 和 shapefile 开放访问（依信息公开法 LAI）。适用于巴西环境执法监测、保护区管理与森林退化分析。
desc_en: This is the GeoServer endpoint of IBAMA's SISCOM system, exposing vector layers for environmental embargoes, enforcement actions, federal protected areas (UCs) and historical fire hotspots across Brazil. The data are openly accessible via WFS and shapefile under Brazil's access-to-information law (LAI). The service supports monitoring of environmental enforcement, protected-area management and analyses of deforestation and land-use violations within the Brazilian territory.

name: IBAT GIS downloads (IUCN species + WDPA + KBA bundled extracts)
theme_raw: Combined biodiversity layers for site assessment
access: Paid subscription / free for NGOs/academics with limits
feature_count: up to 1,000,000 km² per GIS Download
notes: The standard commercial/ESG channel for IUCN range, KBA and WDPA polygons in one bundle.
verify_notes: Sample GIS downloads; full data behind subscription | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: IBAT（综合生物多样性评估工具）由 BirdLife、保护国际、IUCN 与 UNEP-WCMC 联盟运营，将 IUCN 物种分布、关键生物多样性区（KBA）与世界保护区数据库（WDPA）打包成统一的 GIS 提取包。数据以 shapefile 提供，可按研究区裁剪或全球获取，采用 IBAT 数据许可（按量付费/订阅，NGO 与学术机构有免费额度）。是企业 ESG 与生物多样性风险评估的标准商业数据渠道。
desc_en: Operated by the IBAT Alliance (BirdLife, Conservation International, IUCN and UNEP-WCMC), IBAT bundles IUCN species ranges, Key Biodiversity Areas and the World Database on Protected Areas (WDPA) into unified GIS extracts. Data are delivered as zipped shapefiles, clipped to an area of interest or downloaded globally, under the IBAT Data Licence (pay-as-you-go or subscription, with limited free access for NGOs and academics). It is the standard commercial channel for sourcing these flagship biodiversity layers together for ESG and risk screening.

name: ICMBio - Unidades de Conservação Federais (Parques, Reservas)
notes: Limites oficiais das UCs federais
verify_notes: Endpoint live; returns OGC exception when params missing - normal GeoServer behavior. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 巴西生物多样性保护研究所（ICMBio）通过国家空间数据基础设施（INDE）联邦发布的联邦保护区数据，提供国家公园、保护区等联邦保护单元（UCs federais）的官方边界。数据以 WFS 和 shapefile 开放访问。适用于巴西保护区管理、土地规划与生态研究。
desc_en: Published by ICMBio and federated through Brazil's national spatial data infrastructure (INDE), this dataset provides the official boundaries of federal protected areas (UCs federais), including national parks and reserves. The data are openly accessible via a WFS endpoint and as shapefiles. The layer serves as the authoritative reference for Brazilian federal conservation-unit limits in protected-area management, land planning and ecological research.

name: INSPIRE WFS - Protected Sites (Cultural Heritage), Czech Republic
notes: Niche use of Protected Sites theme for cultural heritage rather than Natura 2000 - useful contrast.

desc_zh: 捷克国家遗产研究所（Národní památkový ústav）依据 INSPIRE 指令发布的受保护场地（文化遗产）WFS 服务，覆盖捷克全境。该数据将 INSPIRE 的 Protected Sites 主题用于文化遗产而非 Natura 2000 自然保护，提供了有价值的对比视角。服务以 WFS 2.0.0 开放访问，采用 CC BY-SA 4.0 许可。
desc_en: Published by the Czech National Heritage Institute (Národní památkový ústav) under the INSPIRE directive, this WFS service delivers Protected Sites data for cultural heritage across the Czech Republic. It is a notable case of the INSPIRE Protected Sites theme being used for cultural-heritage designation rather than Natura 2000 nature protection, offering a useful contrast. The service is openly accessible via WFS 2.0.0 under a CC BY-SA 4.0 licence with no stated limitations.

name: IUCN Red List of Ecosystems (RLE) global assessments spatial layers
coverage: Growing; regional + emerging global ecosystem typology layers
formats: Shapefile / GeoPackage (per assessment, attached to each published assessment)
lychee_text: Network error: SSL certificate not trusted. Use --insecure if site is trusted (error sending request for url (https://assessments.iucnrle.org/))
notes: Vector polygons attached to individual RLE assessments; less centralized than species Red List but increasingly cited.
