desc_zh: IUCN 生态系统红色名录（Red List of Ecosystems, RLE）的空间图层，由 IUCN 生态系统管理委员会维护。每项已发布的 RLE 评估附带对应的矢量多边形（shapefile/GeoPackage），覆盖范围随评估增加而不断扩展，并逐步对接全球生态系统类型学。数据许可因评估而异，多为 CC-BY，按评估单独下载。适用于生态系统受威胁状况评估与保护规划。
desc_en: Maintained by the IUCN Commission on Ecosystem Management, the Red List of Ecosystems (RLE) provides spatial layers attached to individual published ecosystem assessments. Each assessment carries its own vector polygons in shapefile or GeoPackage form, with coverage growing as new regional and emerging global ecosystem-typology assessments are added. Licensing varies by assessment but is mostly CC-BY, and data are downloaded per assessment. The layers support evaluation of ecosystem threat status and conservation planning.

name: LIFE Programme Projects Linked to Natura 2000 Sites
formats: Vector (linked to EEA 1 km grid / Natura 2000 polygons)
notes: Companion to Natura2000 grid dataset
verify_notes: LIFE Programme Projects linked to Natura 2000 Sites | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 托管于 Zenodo 的数据集，将欧盟 LIFE 计划项目与 Natura 2000 保护区点关联，是 Natura 2000 网格数据集的配套产品。数据为矢量形式，链接至 EEA 1 公里网格与 Natura 2000 多边形，覆盖欧盟，约 9.3 MB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放获取。适用于分析 LIFE 资助与保护区网络的空间关系及保护投入评估。
desc_en: Hosted on Zenodo, this dataset links EU LIFE Programme projects to Natura 2000 sites and serves as a companion to the Natura 2000 reference-grid dataset. It is provided as vector data tied to the EEA 1 km grid and Natura 2000 polygon codes, covering the EU at about 9.3 MB under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. The layer is useful for analysing the spatial relationship between LIFE funding and the protected-area network and for assessing conservation investment across sites.

name: Living Atlases / ALA spatial portal (GBIF-aligned)
theme_raw: National biodiversity portals exposing WMS/WFS over GBIF-shared data
coverage: Australia, Spain, France, Portugal, Sweden, Argentina, Brazil, Costa Rica, Andorra, Scotland, etc.
notes: Non-English/cold path: many ALA-clone nodes expose real OGC WFS over occurrence data that upstream GBIF.org does not - e.g. spatial.ala.org.au, gbif.es.
verify_notes: Active community site | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Living Atlases / ALA 空间门户是基于澳大利亚生物地图集（ALA）平台、与 GBIF 对接的节点网络，覆盖澳大利亚、西班牙、法国、葡萄牙、瑞典、阿根廷、巴西、哥斯达黎加等多国。各节点以 WMS、WFS、GeoJSON 等 OGC 服务开放出现数据，采用 CC BY-SA 4.0 许可。许多 ALA 克隆节点提供了 GBIF.org 上游所没有的真正 OGC WFS 接口（如 spatial.ala.org.au、gbif.es）。
desc_en: The Living Atlases / ALA spatial portal is a GBIF-aligned network of nodes built on the Atlas of Living Australia platform, spanning Australia, Spain, France, Portugal, Sweden, Argentina, Brazil, Costa Rica and others. Each node exposes occurrence data through OGC services such as WMS, WFS and GeoJSON under a CC BY-SA 4.0 licence. Notably, many ALA-clone nodes (e.g. spatial.ala.org.au, gbif.es) offer genuine OGC WFS access over occurrence data that the upstream GBIF.org portal does not provide.

name: Mesopelagic Ecoregions (Sutton et al. 2017)
provider: Sutton et al., Deep-Sea Research I
doi_or_citation: Sutton et al. 2017, Deep-Sea Res I 126:85-102
feature_count: 33 global mesopelagic ecoregions (20 oceanic, 13 distant neritic)
notes: 冷门但权威；GOODS 系列衍生。下载需联系作者或在 dryad/supplement 找补充资料。
verify_notes: Sutton et al. 2017 mesopelagic biogeographic classification (33 ecoregions) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由 Sutton 等人于 2017 年发表于《Deep-Sea Research I》的中层带（mesopelagic）生态区划数据，将全球海洋中层水域划分为 33 个生态区（20 个大洋型、13 个远岸近海型）。数据为 shapefile 形式，作为论文补充材料提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，源自 GOODS 系列。冷门但权威，适用于深海保护规划与海洋生态研究；下载或需查阅补充资料或联系作者。
desc_en: Published by Sutton et al. (2017) in Deep-Sea Research I, this dataset divides the global ocean's mesopelagic zone into 33 ecoregions (20 oceanic and 13 distant-neritic). It is supplied as a shapefile within the paper's supplementary material under a CC-BY 4.0 licence and derives from the GOODS biogeographic series. Though obscure, it is an authoritative reference for the twilight zone, supporting deep-sea conservation planning and marine ecology; access may require the supplement or contacting the authors.

name: MMA - Áreas Prioritárias para Conservação, Cadastro Nacional UCs
notes: Inclui Cadastro Nacional de Unidades de Conservação
verify_notes: Reachable; OGC exception report indicates server up. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 巴西环境部（MMA）通过国家空间数据基础设施（INDE）发布的图层，包含保护优先区（Áreas Prioritárias para Conservação）和国家保护区登记册（Cadastro Nacional de Unidades de Conservação）。数据以 WFS 和 shapefile 开放访问。适用于巴西全国尺度的生物多样性保护规划、保护优先级评估与保护区管理。
desc_en: Published by Brazil's Ministry of the Environment (MMA) through the INDE infrastructure, this service provides Priority Areas for Conservation (Áreas Prioritárias para Conservação) along with the National Registry of Conservation Units (Cadastro Nacional de Unidades de Conservação). The data are openly accessible via WFS and shapefile. The layers support national-scale biodiversity conservation planning, prioritisation and protected-area management across Brazil.

name: Multi-resolution sampling-effort data for global biodiversity modelling
what_changes: Reprocesses GBIF occurrence records into global raster + vector sampling-effort layers (observation counts, species richness) stratified across nine taxonomic groups at multiple spatial resolutions and annual/cumulative temporal windows; used for bias-aware ecological modelling.
notes: Bias-correction layer rather than a species map; explicit downstream of GBIF snapshots.
verify_notes: Multi-resolution sampling-effort data for global biodiversity modelling; 8.3GB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 托管于 Zenodo 的多分辨率采样努力数据集，用于全球生物多样性建模。它并非物种分布图，而是基于 GBIF 快照衍生的采样偏差校正图层，用于修正出现记录的空间不均衡。数据约 8.3GB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放获取。适用于物种分布建模中的偏差校正与生物多样性指标计算。
desc_en: Hosted on Zenodo, this dataset provides multi-resolution sampling-effort layers for global biodiversity modelling. Rather than a species map, it is a bias-correction product derived explicitly from GBIF snapshots, designed to account for spatial unevenness in occurrence records. It is about 8.3 GB and openly available under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. The data are intended for sampling-bias correction in species distribution modelling and for more robust computation of biodiversity indicators.

name: N2K Change 2012-2018 (vector)
notes: Pairs with EU Grassland Watch (cop4n2k.eu) - habitat loss indicator
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 哥白尼陆地监测服务（CLMS/EEA）发布的 N2K 变化（2012–2018）矢量数据，刻画 Natura 2000 站点内土地覆盖/利用在该时段的变化，与 N2K 2018 现状产品配套，覆盖相同的约 4,790 个站点。数据以 ESRI GDB 和 GPKG 格式提供，遵循哥白尼数据政策。常与欧盟草地观测（EU Grassland Watch）结合作为栖息地退化指标。
desc_en: Produced by the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS/EEA), the N2K Change 2012-2018 vector product captures land-cover and land-use change over that period within Natura 2000 sites, pairing with the N2K 2018 status layer across the same roughly 4,790 sites. It is delivered in ESRI GDB and GPKG formats under the Copernicus data policy. The dataset is often combined with EU Grassland Watch as a habitat-loss indicator for assessing change in Europe's protected sites.

name: National Parks (GeoJSON resource)
verify_notes: 404 Not Found - dataset removed/relocated | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 美国国家公园管理局（NPS）发布的国家公园边界 GeoJSON 资源，覆盖美国全境的国家公园单元。数据以 GeoJSON 格式开放获取，属美国公有领域。适用于制图、公众信息服务、保护区可视化与一般地理分析。
desc_en: Published by the U.S. National Park Service, this resource provides national park boundaries for the United States as a GeoJSON layer. The data are openly available in the US public domain and are easy to integrate into web maps and analyses. The layer is suitable for cartography, public-information services, protected-area visualisation and general geographic analysis involving the US national park system.

name: Natura 2000 (N2K) LCLU 2018 (vector)
coverage: ~4,790 grassland-rich Natura 2000 sites + 2 km buffer, EEA39
notes: 55 thematic classes; MMU 0.5 ha; high thematic detail beyond CLC
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 哥白尼陆地监测服务（CLMS/EEA）发布的 Natura 2000（N2K）土地覆盖/土地利用 2018 矢量产品，覆盖约 4,790 个富含草地的 Natura 2000 站点及 2 公里缓冲区（EEA39 范围）。数据包含 55 个专题类别，最小制图单元 0.5 公顷，专题精度高于 CORINE 土地覆盖（CLC）。以 ESRI GDB 和 GPKG 提供，遵循哥白尼数据政策，并附 DOI。适用于栖息地制图与保护区监测。
desc_en: Produced by the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS/EEA), the Natura 2000 LCLU 2018 vector product maps land cover and land use across about 4,790 grassland-rich Natura 2000 sites plus a 2 km buffer over the EEA39 area. It offers 55 thematic classes at a 0.5 ha minimum mapping unit, providing far greater thematic detail than CORINE Land Cover. The data are supplied in ESRI GDB and GPKG formats with a registered DOI under the Copernicus data policy, supporting detailed habitat mapping and protected-area monitoring.

name: Natura 2000 sites on the EEA reference grid (1 km)
formats: Vector grid (linked to Natura 2000 polygon codes)
notes: Spatial join layer for Natura 2000 site-area coverage analyses
verify_notes: Open record | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 托管于 Zenodo 的数据集，将 Natura 2000 站点映射到欧洲环境署（EEA）1 公里参考网格上，作为空间连接图层，链接至 Natura 2000 多边形编码。覆盖欧盟成员国，约 61.0 MB，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放获取。适用于 Natura 2000 站点面积覆盖统计与基于网格的空间叠加分析。
desc_en: Hosted on Zenodo, this dataset maps Natura 2000 sites onto the European Environment Agency's 1 km reference grid as a spatial-join layer linked to Natura 2000 polygon codes. It covers the EU member states, is about 61.0 MB, and is openly available under a CC-BY-4.0 licence. The grid representation is designed for Natura 2000 site-area coverage analyses and for grid-based overlay and aggregation workflows across other gridded European datasets.

name: Natural England - Ramsar, SSSI, SAC, SPA (England)
notes: Multiple designated site layers; also via data.gov.uk
verify_notes: Page reachable; details sparse in summary | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国自然署（Natural England / DEFRA）发布的英格兰指定保护场地数据，包括拉姆萨尔湿地（Ramsar）、特别科学价值地（SSSI）、特别保护区（SAC）和特别保护鸟类区（SPA）等多个图层。数据以 shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、WFS、CSV 等多种格式免费提供，并支持 ArcGIS REST/WFS 服务，通常采用开放政府许可（OGL）。适用于英格兰自然保护规划、土地利用与环境评估。
desc_en: Published by Natural England (DEFRA), this portal provides England's designated conservation sites, including Ramsar wetlands, Sites of Special Scientific Interest (SSSI), Special Areas of Conservation (SAC) and Special Protection Areas (SPA), across multiple layers. Data are offered free in shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, WFS and CSV formats with ArcGIS REST/WFS services, typically under the Open Government Licence. The layers support nature-conservation planning, land-use decisions and environmental assessment in England, and are also mirrored via data.gov.uk.

name: Natural Resource Protection and Child Health Indicators (NRMI) 2013
notes: Country-polygon NRMI score; relatively obscure successor to EPI-family indicators hosted at SEDAC.
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 由 NASA SEDAC / CIESIN 与耶鲁大学制作的自然资源保护与儿童健康指标（NRMI）2013 数据集，以国家级多边形呈现各国 NRMI 评分，是环境绩效指数（EPI）家族的衍生产品。数据为国家级 shapefile 加 CSV，全球覆盖，采用 CC BY 许可，通过 HTTPS 并需 Earthdata 登录获取。适用于环境治理、公共卫生与可持续发展的跨国对比研究。
desc_en: Produced by NASA SEDAC / CIESIN and Yale, the Natural Resource Protection and Child Health Indicators (NRMI) 2013 dataset presents country-level NRMI scores as national polygons and is a relatively obscure successor within the Environmental Performance Index family. It is provided as country shapefiles plus CSV with global coverage under a CC BY licence, accessed over HTTPS with Earthdata Login. The data support cross-national comparison in environmental governance, public health and sustainable-development research.

name: OOPT.info - Russian Federal Protected Areas GIS database
theme_raw: Russian federal zapovedniks, national parks, zakazniks
notes: Russian-language; more detailed than WDPA Russia slice; non-English, rarely cited outside RU
verify_notes: No formal open license; contact maintainer Maxim Dubinin | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OOPT.info 是由透明世界（Transparent World）与 WWF 俄罗斯等社区机构维护的俄罗斯联邦级保护区 GIS 数据库，覆盖俄罗斯全境的联邦级保护区，精度约 1:200,000（数据年份约 1999–2003）。数据为 shapefile，需按请求获取，采用需署名的专有版权（WRI/ISEU/BCC）。该俄语数据集比 WDPA 的俄罗斯部分更详细，但在俄语圈外较少被引用。
desc_en: OOPT.info is a community-maintained GIS database of Russia's federal-level protected areas, curated by Transparent World and WWF Russia among others, covering the Russian Federation at roughly 1:200,000 scale with data dating to around 1999-2003. It is supplied as request-based shapefiles under a proprietary copyright requiring attribution (WRI/ISEU/BCC). This Russian-language dataset is more detailed than the Russian slice of the WDPA but is rarely cited outside Russian-speaking circles.

name: Possible Special Areas of Conservation (England) - data.gov.uk CKAN
notes: UK CKAN catalogue entry exposing OGC services.
verify_notes: Geometry currently unshared from AGOL; WFS/WMS non-functional | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国 data.gov.uk CKAN 目录中的条目，由自然署（Natural England）发布英格兰可能的特别保护区（possible Special Areas of Conservation, pSAC）数据。该条目暴露 OGC 服务，数据以 WFS、WMS、shapefile 和 GeoJSON 形式开放获取，引用开放政府许可（OGL）。适用于英格兰候选保护区的规划评估与生境保护研究。
desc_en: This data.gov.uk CKAN catalogue entry, published by Natural England, exposes the possible Special Areas of Conservation (pSAC) in England. It surfaces OGC services with the data available as WFS, WMS, shapefile and GeoJSON under the referenced Open Government Licence. The record supports planning assessment and habitat-conservation research concerning candidate protected sites within the English part of the Natura 2000 designation process.

name: ProtConn global Protected Connected indicator layers (Saura et al.)
what_changes: Computes ProtConn percentage and intermediate fraction layers from WDPA polygons (and buffered points) ≥1 km² across multiple dispersal distances; published as country-level tabular and spatial outputs.
notes: Used by BIP/CBD reporting; obscure standalone spatial layers rather than mainstream WDPA mirror.
verify_notes: ProtConn CPAG tool | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ProtConn（Protected Connected）全球保护区连通性指标图层，由 Saura 等人方法发展而来，数据源自 JRC DOPA。该指标衡量保护区网络中相互连通的部分，被生物多样性指标合作组织（BIP）与 CBD 报告所采用。它属较为专门的独立空间图层，而非主流 WDPA 镜像，许可状态未明确说明。适用于保护区连通性评估与全球保护进展报告。
desc_en: ProtConn (Protected Connected) provides global protected-area connectivity indicator layers developed from the methods of Saura et al., with the underlying data originating from the JRC's Digital Observatory for Protected Areas (DOPA). The indicator measures the connected fraction of protected-area networks and feeds into Biodiversity Indicators Partnership and CBD reporting. It is a specialised standalone spatial layer rather than a mainstream WDPA mirror, with licensing not explicitly stated, and is used for connectivity assessment and global conservation progress reporting.

name: pygbif — Python client
notes: Python bindings for occurrence + maps API
verify_notes: v0.6.6 released 2025-11-14 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: pygbif 是 GBIF 官方的 Python 客户端库，封装了出现记录（occurrence）与地图（maps）等 API，接受 GeoJSON/WKT 作为空间输入并返回点位输出。该库采用 MIT 开源许可。它是以编程方式访问 GBIF 全球物种出现数据的常用工具，适用于数据获取、清洗与下游的物种分布建模工作流。
desc_en: pygbif is the official GBIF Python client, wrapping the occurrence and maps APIs and accepting GeoJSON/WKT as spatial inputs while returning point outputs. It is released under the permissive MIT licence. The library is a common tool for programmatic access to GBIF's global species occurrence data, fitting naturally into data-retrieval, cleaning and downstream species-distribution-modelling workflows that need scripted, reproducible queries against GBIF.

name: Shapefile of the terrestrial protected areas of the UAE
notes: Terrestrial PA polygons for UAE.
verify_notes: plos.figshare blocks WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 发表于《PLOS ONE》（2021）补充材料、托管于 PLOS Figshare 的阿联酋陆地保护区 shapefile，提供阿拉伯联合酋长国陆地保护区的多边形边界。数据为 shapefile 多边形，采用 CC BY 许可开放获取。适用于阿联酋的保护区管理、土地利用规划与区域生物多样性研究。
desc_en: Hosted on PLOS Figshare as supplementary material to a 2021 PLOS ONE article, this dataset provides a shapefile of the terrestrial protected areas of the United Arab Emirates, giving polygon boundaries for the country's land-based reserves. It is supplied as polygon shapefiles under a CC BY licence and is openly available. The data support protected-area management, land-use planning and regional biodiversity research within the UAE.

name: South Africa PACA - Protected and Conservation Areas Database
lychee_status: Network error: TLS handshake failed. Check SSL/TLS configuration (error sending request for url (https://egis.environment.gov.za/protected_and_conservation_areas_database))
lychee_text: Network error: TLS handshake failed. Check SSL/TLS configuration (error sending request for url (https://egis.environment.gov.za/protected_and_conservation_areas_database))
notes: Authoritative SA feeder, fuller attributes than WDPA SA slice
verify_notes: Fetch timed out after 60s | lychee:Network error: TLS handshake failed. Check SSL/TLS configuration (error sending request for url (https://egis.environment.gov.za/protected_and_conservation_areas_database))
desc_zh: 南非保护区与保育区数据库（PACA）由南非林业、渔业与环境部（DFFE）的 E-GIS 平台发布，是该国权威的保护区矢量边界数据来源，按季度更新。它覆盖南非全境的各类法定保护区与保育区，相比 WDPA 中的南非切片，属性信息更为完整。数据以 Shapefile 格式通过 E-GIS 门户开放下载，采用南非开放使用授权，适用于保护规划、土地利用评估与环境影响分析。
desc_en: South Africa's Protected and Conservation Areas Database (PACA) is published by the Department of Forestry, Fisheries and the Environment (DFFE) through its E-GIS portal. It is the authoritative national source of protected and conservation area boundaries, updated quarterly and offering fuller attributes than the South African slice of the WDPA. Data are distributed as Shapefiles via open download under a South African open-use licence. The dataset supports conservation planning, land-use assessment, and environmental impact studies across the country.

name: Species occurrence and occupancy in protected areas of the Natura2000 network in Belgium
what_changes: Subsets GBIF occurrences to the Natura2000 protected-area polygon network in Belgium, computing per-PA species lists and occupancy statistics; spatial join between GBIF points and WDPA/Natura2000 polygons.
notes: Niche derivative useful as a worked example of GBIF x protected-area intersections.
verify_notes: Natura2000 Belgium species occurrence; 3 CSVs | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一个发布于 Zenodo 的小型衍生数据集，记录了比利时 Natura2000 网络保护区内的物种出现与占有情况，约含 2000 个多边形。数据以 CC0 1.0 公共领域方式开放，是展示如何将 GBIF 物种出现数据与保护区边界做空间相交分析的典型范例。它适合作为教学或方法演示用途，而非大尺度生物多样性评估。
desc_en: Hosted on Zenodo, this small derivative dataset documents species occurrence and occupancy within protected areas of Belgium's Natura2000 network, comprising roughly 2,000 polygons. Released under CC0 1.0 into the public domain, it serves as a worked example of intersecting GBIF species-occurrence records with protected-area boundaries. It is best suited as a teaching or methodological demonstration resource rather than a large-scale biodiversity assessment, illustrating a reproducible GBIF-by-protected-area workflow.

name: Supplementary spatial dataset – Area-based conservation in the twenty-first century
notes: Companion to Maxwell et al. 2020 Nature paper on area-based conservation
verify_notes: Extended data for Area-based conservation paper (tabular, not spatial) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Maxwell 等人 2020 年发表于《Nature》的区域性保护研究的配套空间数据集，托管于 Zenodo，覆盖全球范围。数据包含矢量表格与多边形补充文件，体量约 289.5 kB（3 个文件），采用 CC-BY-4.0 授权开放获取。它用于支撑论文中关于二十一世纪基于区域的保护成效分析，适合复现该研究或开展相关的全球保护格局探讨。
desc_en: This is the supplementary spatial dataset accompanying Maxwell et al. (2020) in Nature on area-based conservation in the twenty-first century, hosted on Zenodo with global coverage. It bundles vector tables and polygon supplements totalling about 289.5 kB across three files, released openly under CC-BY-4.0. The data underpin the paper's analysis of area-based conservation outcomes and are well suited to reproducing that study or exploring global conservation patterns.

name: Terrestrial Ecoregions of the World (TNC)
license: Public / TNC terms (free use with attribution)
access: Direct shapefile / GeoJSON download via ArcGIS Hub; legacy mirror http://maps.tnc.org/files/shp/terr-ecoregions-TNC.zip
notes: Includes Major Habitat Types, Biogeographical Realms, TNC Terrestrial Assessment Units (Dec 2009)
verify_notes: Terrestrial Ecoregions (TNC); page exists | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由大自然保护协会（TNC）发布的全球陆地生态区数据集，划分了 825 个陆地生态区，是生态分区与生物地理研究的基础参考。数据基于 Olson 等人 2001 年发表于《BioScience》的经典框架，并整合了主要栖息地类型、生物地理域以及 TNC 陆地评估单元。提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML 与 FeatureServer 等多种格式，通过 ArcGIS Hub 开放下载，遵守 TNC 条款（免费但须署名）。
desc_en: Published by The Nature Conservancy, this dataset delineates 825 global terrestrial ecoregions and is a foundational reference for ecological stratification and biogeographic analysis. It builds on the classic Olson et al. (2001) framework in BioScience and incorporates Major Habitat Types, Biogeographical Realms, and TNC Terrestrial Assessment Units. Available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, and a FeatureServer via ArcGIS Hub, it is free to use with attribution under TNC's terms.

name: The Tropical Andes Biodiversity Hotspot: Mira-Mataje Binational Basins dataset
notes: Includes ecosystem polygons with endemic/threatened species attributes
verify_notes: Nature auth gate via WebFetch; article live | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一篇发表于《Scientific Data》（Nature）的数据论文，提供热带安第斯生物多样性热点区 Mira-Mataje 跨国流域（哥伦比亚/厄瓜多尔）的数据集。内容包括生态系统划分的 Shapefile 以及 Darwin Core 归档，多边形带有特有种与受威胁物种属性。数据采用 CC-BY 授权开放获取，适用于跨境流域的生态系统制图、生物多样性评估与保护优先级研究。
desc_en: Published in Scientific Data (Nature), this dataset covers the Mira-Mataje binational basins (Colombia/Ecuador) within the Tropical Andes biodiversity hotspot. It includes a Shapefile of ecosystem delineations together with a Darwin Core Archive, with polygons carrying attributes on endemic and threatened species. Released openly under CC-BY, it supports transboundary ecosystem mapping, biodiversity assessment, and conservation-priority analysis in one of the world's most biodiverse regions.

name: Threatened Species No-Go Mapping Tool
notes: Attributes: theme, scientific name, IUCN status, area km2
verify_notes: Companion tool at nogo.ewt.org.za; supplementary GitHub repo | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 受威胁物种禁区制图工具（Threatened Species No-Go Mapping Tool）由 Cowan、Henry 与 Little（2025）发布于 Dryad，覆盖南非。数据为多边形 Shapefile（约 18.73 MB，2025 年 4 月发布），属性涵盖主题、物种学名、IUCN 受威胁状态与面积（平方公里）。它可用于识别对受威胁物种敏感、应避免开发的区域，支持环境影响评估与土地利用决策。
desc_en: The Threatened Species No-Go Mapping Tool, by Cowan, Henry and Little (2025) on Dryad, covers South Africa. It is provided as a multipolygon Shapefile (about 18.73 MB, released April 2025) with attributes including theme, scientific name, IUCN threat status, and area in square kilometres. The dataset helps identify zones sensitive to threatened species that should be avoided in development, supporting environmental impact assessment and land-use decision-making.

name: TNC Atlas of Global Conservation - companion vector layers
access: Per-layer shapefile downloads listed in metadata index
doi_or_citation: Hoekstra et al. 2010, Univ. California Press
notes: Includes habitat extent, threats, biodiversity surrogate layers
verify_notes: TNC Atlas metadata page returns 404; consider replacing with geospatial.tnc.org datasets | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是大自然保护协会（TNC）《全球保护图集》（Atlas of Global Conservation, Hoekstra 等 2010）的配套矢量图层集合，覆盖全球。图层包括栖息地范围、威胁因子与生物多样性替代指标等，以 Shapefile 形式提供，各图层在元数据索引中分别列出供下载。数据免费使用但须署名，适用于全球尺度的栖息地与威胁分析、保护科普及制图。
desc_en: These are the companion vector layers to The Nature Conservancy's Atlas of Global Conservation (Hoekstra et al. 2010), with global coverage. The collection includes habitat extent, threats, and biodiversity surrogate layers, provided as per-layer Shapefile downloads listed in a metadata index. Free to use with attribution, the data support global-scale habitat and threat analysis, conservation communication, and mapping.

name: Toward better conservation: spatial analysis of GBIF species occurrence (ESSD 2026)
what_changes: Algorithmically generates occurrence-based realized distribution maps for >600,000 species (vertebrates, arthropods, mollusks, vascular plants, fungi) from GBIF; validated against expert maps for mammals, ants, plants.
notes: Large but recent (2026) downstream vector product; near-real-time biodiversity mapping pipeline atop GBIF.
verify_notes: GBIF spatial analysis article; data on World Bank DDH | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一篇 2026 年发表于《Earth System Science Data》（ESSD）的数据论文，基于 GBIF 物种出现记录开展空间分析，面向保护应用，涉及约 60 万个物种。它是一个体量大且较新的下游矢量产品，搭建在 GBIF 之上的近实时生物多样性制图流程。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 授权，适用于大尺度生物多样性格局分析与保护规划研究。
desc_en: Published in Earth System Science Data (ESSD) in 2026, this dataset presents a spatial analysis of GBIF species-occurrence records aimed at conservation, spanning roughly 600,000 species. It is a large and recent downstream vector product built atop GBIF as a near-real-time biodiversity mapping pipeline. Released under CC BY 4.0, it supports large-scale biodiversity pattern analysis and conservation planning.

name: WDPA - World Database on Protected Areas (UNEP-WCMC ArcGIS Hub)
formats: Shapefile, GDB, Feature Service (ESRI REST), WMS
notes: Official global protected areas dataset, monthly updates; ArcGIS Hub item with REST feature service.
verify_notes: UNEP-WCMC ArcGIS portal item page | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 世界保护区数据库（WDPA）是由 UNEP-WCMC 维护的官方全球保护区数据集，此条目托管于其 ArcGIS Hub，提供 REST 要素服务。WDPA 汇集全球各国及国际的陆地与海洋保护区边界与属性，按月更新，是保护区研究与报告的国际权威标准。数据提供 Shapefile、GDB、ESRI REST 要素服务与 WMS，开放获取但须署名，并受 WDPA 使用条款（非商业）约束。
desc_en: The World Database on Protected Areas (WDPA) is the official global protected-areas dataset maintained by UNEP-WCMC; this item is hosted on its ArcGIS Hub with a REST feature service. WDPA compiles terrestrial and marine protected-area boundaries and attributes worldwide, updated monthly, and is the international standard for protected-area research and reporting. Offered as Shapefile, GDB, ESRI REST, and WMS, it is open with attribution under the non-commercial WDPA Terms of Use.

name: WDPA monthly archive (S3 bucket)
notes: Hosts monthly snapshots and the WDPA manual
verify_notes: Public S3 ListBucket; chronological archives 2009-2016; IsTruncated=true | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是世界保护区数据库（WDPA）的月度归档 AWS S3 存储桶，由 UNEP-WCMC 托管。它通过 HTTPS 直接提供 WDPA 的月度快照（Shapefile 与 FileGDB 压缩包）以及 WDPA 操作手册，覆盖全球。该入口适合需要批量获取或追溯历史月度版本的用户，使用须遵守 WDPA 条款。
desc_en: This AWS S3 bucket, hosted by UNEP-WCMC, serves the monthly archive of the World Database on Protected Areas (WDPA). It provides monthly snapshots as Shapefile and FileGDB ZIPs, along with the WDPA manual, via direct HTTPS access with global coverage. The endpoint suits users needing bulk downloads or historical monthly versions, subject to the WDPA Terms of Use.

name: WISE WFD Protected Areas (incl. bathing waters, nitrates zones)
verify_notes: v2025.11 published Feb 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WISE 水框架指令（WFD）保护区数据集由欧洲环境署（EEA）通过 WISE 平台发布，覆盖欧盟。它汇集了与水相关的法定保护区，包括娱乐用水（浴场水）区域与硝酸盐脆弱带等。数据以 GeoPackage 与 Shapefile 提供，可直接下载，遵循 EEA 开放授权，适用于水资源管理、合规报告与环境监测。
desc_en: The WISE WFD Protected Areas dataset is published by the European Environment Agency (EEA) through the WISE platform, covering the EU. It compiles water-related designated protected areas, including bathing waters and nitrates-vulnerable zones. Provided as GeoPackage and Shapefile with direct download under an EEA open licence, it supports water resource management, regulatory compliance reporting, and environmental monitoring.

name: WWF Ecoregions on ScienceBase (TEOW v2.0)
formats_now: Shapefile, XML, JSON, FGDC, MODS XML, ISO XML
notes: Alternative authoritative mirror
verify_notes: USGS ScienceBase WWF TEOW v2.0 item; full metadata available | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是托管于 USGS ScienceBase 的世界陆地生态区数据集（TEOW v2.0）镜像，基于 Olson 等人 2001 年的经典工作，覆盖全球。作为另一个权威镜像，它以 Shapefile 提供，处于公共领域（USGS 镜像），便于在美国政府平台上稳定获取。适用于全球生态分区、生物地理研究与栖息地分析。
desc_en: This is a mirror of the World Terrestrial Ecoregions dataset (TEOW v2.0) hosted on USGS ScienceBase, based on the classic Olson et al. (2001) work with global coverage. As an alternative authoritative mirror, it is provided as a Shapefile in the public domain via USGS, offering stable access through a US government platform. It supports global ecological stratification, biogeographic research, and habitat analysis.

name: WWF Terrestrial Ecoregions of the World (Olson et al. 2001)
notes: Standard biome stratification used by Curtis 2018 to define tropical/temperate/boreal domains
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; WWF often blocks bots but page exists in browsers | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 世界陆地生态区数据集（Olson 等 2001）由 WWF-US 发布，将全球陆地划分为 825 个生态区，是生物群区分层的标准参考，并被 Curtis 等 2018 年研究用于界定热带、温带与北方域。数据以 Shapefile 形式直接下载，免费用于科研、保护与教育用途。它广泛应用于生态分区、生物多样性评估与全球环境分析。
desc_en: The Terrestrial Ecoregions of the World dataset (Olson et al. 2001), published by WWF-US, partitions the global land surface into 825 ecoregions and is the standard reference for biome stratification, used by Curtis et al. (2018) to define tropical, temperate, and boreal domains. Provided as a directly downloadable Shapefile, it is free for scientific, conservation, and educational use, and is widely applied in ecological stratification and global environmental analysis.

name: 中国数字植物标本馆 (CVH) - 物种分布点
provider: 国家植物标本资源库 (16 家标本馆联合)
formats: 点位 CSV (含经纬度，可矢量化)
notes: 中国植物标本数字化共享平台
verify_notes: unable to verify first certificate | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国数字植物标本馆（CVH）由国家植物标本资源库（16 家标本馆联合）建设，是中国植物标本数字化共享的核心平台。它汇集全国范围的植物标本记录，提供带经纬度的点位数据（可导出 CSV 并矢量化），支持开放检索。该平台适用于物种分布制图、植物多样性研究与标本数据复用。
desc_en: The Chinese Virtual Herbarium (CVH) is built by China's National Herbarium resource bank, a consortium of 16 herbaria, as a core platform for digitized plant specimen sharing. It aggregates plant specimen records from across China and offers georeferenced point data (exportable as CSV and vectorizable) with open search. The platform supports species distribution mapping, plant biodiversity research, and reuse of specimen data.

name: 中国生态系统评估与生态安全格局数据库 (CNNR)
provider: 中国科学院生态环境研究中心 / 国家科技基础条件平台

desc_zh: 中国生态系统评估与生态安全格局数据库（CNNR）由中国科学院生态环境研究中心依托国家科技基础条件平台建设，覆盖全国自然保护区。数据库提供保护区的矢量边界及属性信息，采用注册访问方式。它适用于自然保护区分析、生态系统评估与生态安全格局研究。
desc_en: The China Ecosystem Assessment and Ecological Security Pattern Database (CNNR) is developed by the Research Center for Eco-Environmental Sciences, Chinese Academy of Sciences, under a national science infrastructure platform, covering nature reserves nationwide. It provides reserve vector boundaries together with attributes via registered access. The database supports nature-reserve analysis, ecosystem assessment, and ecological security pattern research.

name: 中国自然保护区标本资源共享平台地理信息库
provider: 中国自然保护区标本资源共享平台
notes: 原始来源平台；含保护级别、类型、面积、所属部门、保护对象等
verify_notes: connection timeout >60s | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 中国自然保护区标本资源共享平台地理信息库覆盖全国 3000 多个自然保护区，是相关保护区边界数据的原始来源平台。数据以 KMZ 格式提供（可转换为 Shapefile），属性包含保护级别、类型、面积、所属部门与保护对象等。面向科研使用开放，适用于保护区空间分析与生物多样性保护研究。
desc_en: The geographic information database of China's Nature Reserve Specimen Resource Sharing Platform covers more than 3,000 nature reserves nationwide and serves as the primary source for these reserve boundaries. Data are provided as KMZ (convertible to Shapefile) with attributes including protection level, type, area, administering authority, and conservation targets. Open for research use, it supports protected-area spatial analysis and biodiversity conservation studies.

name: 中国观鸟记录中心 (Birdreport)
provider: 中国观鸟记录中心 (公民科学平台)
formats: 点位数据 (可导出 CSV / 矢量化)
notes: 2014 年起的鸟类公民科学记录，可生成物种分布点矢量
verify_notes: Homepage public; some features need login | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国观鸟记录中心（Birdreport）是一个公民科学平台，自 2014 年起积累全国范围的鸟类观测记录。数据为点位形式（可导出 CSV 并矢量化），可生成物种分布点矢量，使用需提出申请。它是研究中国鸟类分布、物候与生物多样性监测的重要公民科学数据源。
desc_en: Birdreport (China Bird Report Center) is a citizen-science platform that has accumulated nationwide bird-observation records since 2014. The data are point records (exportable as CSV and vectorizable) that can yield species-occurrence point layers, with use subject to application. It is an important citizen-science source for studying bird distribution, phenology, and biodiversity monitoring across China.

name: Global Healthsites Mapping Project data exports (companion to Springer chapter, Saameli et al. 2018)
theme_raw: healthcare | Health facilities globally | Open health facilities (clinics, hospitals, pharmacies)
formats: GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, CSV via API and HDX
notes: Academic publication: Springer chapter doi:10.1007/978-3-319-91068-0_5; ongoing crowd-sourced dataset.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch（疑似反爬/CDN 拦截），浏览器一般可达；许可证仍记录为 ODbL | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 全球医疗设施制图项目（Global Healthsites Mapping Project）提供全球超过 120 万个医疗设施的开放数据，是 Saameli 等 2018 年 Springer 章节的配套数据集。数据通过 API 与 HDX 以 GeoJSON、Shapefile、KML 和 CSV 等格式开放，采用 ODbL 授权，并持续众包更新。它适用于医疗可及性分析、公共卫生规划与人道主义响应。
desc_en: The Global Healthsites Mapping Project provides open data on over 1.2 million health facilities worldwide and is the companion dataset to the Springer chapter by Saameli et al. (2018). Data are available via API and HDX as GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, and CSV under the ODbL licence, with ongoing crowd-sourced updates. The dataset supports healthcare-access analysis, public-health planning, and humanitarian response.

name: CDC Environmental Justice Index (EJI) FeatureService
theme_raw: Cumulative environmental + social + health burden index | environmental justice / cumulative impact
notes: Newer than SVI, 36 indicators across 10 domains. EJI 2024 layers on ArcGIS Online services6.
verify_notes: Active; EJI 2024 plus climate-integrated EJI available | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 环境正义指数（EJI）由美国 CDC/ATSDR 与 EPA 联合编制，覆盖美国本土，通过 ArcGIS REST 要素/地图服务提供。相比社会脆弱性指数（SVI），EJI 更新更晚，整合了跨 10 个领域的 36 项指标，用于刻画环境、社会与健康脆弱性的叠加。数据属美国政府公共领域，2024 年图层可在 ArcGIS Online 上访问，适用于环境正义分析与公共卫生决策。
desc_en: The Environmental Justice Index (EJI), jointly developed by the US CDC/ATSDR and EPA, covers the continental United States and is served via ArcGIS REST feature and map services. Newer than the Social Vulnerability Index, EJI integrates 36 indicators across 10 domains to characterize cumulative environmental, social, and health vulnerability. In the US-government public domain, its 2024 layers are accessible on ArcGIS Online, supporting environmental-justice analysis and public-health decision-making.

name: Global Subnational Prevalence of Child Malnutrition, v1
notes: Stunting/underweight rates at subnational polygons; underused complement to IMR layer.
verify_notes: WebFetch timed out | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 全球次国家级儿童营养不良流行率数据集（v1）由 NASA SEDAC / CIESIN 发布，覆盖全球次国家级行政单元。数据以次国家级多边形给出生长迟缓、低体重等指标，提供 Esri Shapefile 与栅格格式，采用 CC BY 授权，通过 HTTPS（需 Earthdata 登录）获取。它是婴儿死亡率等图层的有益补充，适用于贫困、健康与可持续发展研究。
desc_en: The Global Subnational Prevalence of Child Malnutrition (v1) dataset is published by NASA SEDAC / CIESIN with global subnational coverage. It reports stunting and underweight rates at subnational polygons, provided as Esri Shapefile plus grid under a CC BY licence, accessed via HTTPS with Earthdata Login. An underused complement to infant-mortality layers, it supports poverty, health, and sustainable-development research.

name: CDC OMH_SVI Service Folder (full OMH-SVI series)
notes: Aggregated layers for OMH-SVI dashboards.
verify_notes: OMH_SVI folder active, version 10.91 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是 CDC 少数族裔健康办公室（OMH）社会脆弱性指数（OMH-SVI）系列的完整服务目录，覆盖美国县级。它通过 ArcGIS REST 服务目录提供 GeoJSON 与 Shapefile 等格式的聚合图层，用于支撑 OMH-SVI 仪表盘。数据属公共领域，适用于健康公平、社会脆弱性分析与公共卫生规划。
desc_en: This is the full service folder for the CDC Office of Minority Health (OMH) Social Vulnerability Index series, covering US counties. It exposes aggregated layers in GeoJSON and Shapefile via an ArcGIS REST services folder, supporting OMH-SVI dashboards. In the public domain, the data support health-equity, social-vulnerability analysis, and public-health planning.

name: data.europa.eu - High-Value Datasets (geospatial public services)
provider: European Commission / EU Open Data Portal
theme_raw: Schools, hospitals, emergency services across EU
access: Catalog harvest + redirect to source portal
notes: INSPIRE-aligned 'Utility and governmental services' theme; quality varies by Member State.
verify_notes: data.europa.eu search page reachable; JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: data.europa.eu 高价值数据集（地理空间公共服务）由欧盟委员会的欧盟开放数据门户提供，覆盖欧盟 27 国，内容从各国门户联合汇聚而来。它对应 INSPIRE 的“公用事业与政府服务”主题，可用于检索学校等公共服务设施。数据格式包括 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GML 与 WFS 等（因来源而异），多采用 CC BY 4.0 或各国等价授权，门户提供目录汇聚并重定向至源门户。各成员国数据质量参差，适用于跨欧盟公共服务空间分析。
desc_en: The data.europa.eu High-Value Datasets (geospatial public services) are provided by the European Commission's EU Open Data Portal, covering the EU-27 and federated from national portals. Aligned with the INSPIRE 'Utility and governmental services' theme, the catalogue enables discovery of public-service facilities such as schools. Formats include Shapefile, GeoJSON, GML, and WFS (varying by source), mostly under CC BY 4.0 or national equivalents, with the portal harvesting and redirecting to source portals. Data quality varies by Member State; it supports EU-wide public-service spatial analysis.

name: Giga - Global School Connectivity Mapping (UNICEF-ITU; underlying data referenced in Scientific Data / arXiv 2024)
formats: GeoJSON, CSV via API; downloadable per country
notes: Methodology paper: Large-scale School Mapping (arXiv:2412.14870).
verify_notes: GigaMaps 是 SPA 页面；抓取内容稀薄；URL 存活 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Giga 全球学校联通制图项目由 UNICEF 与 ITU 合作开展，覆盖全球 140 多个国家约 210 万所学校。它绘制学校位置及其互联网连通情况，提供 GeoJSON 与 CSV（通过 API），可按国家下载，方法学见 arXiv:2412.14870。数据开放获取（具体授权页面为 JS 渲染未明确），适用于教育可及性、数字鸿沟与基础设施规划研究。
desc_en: Giga's Global School Connectivity Mapping project, run by UNICEF and the ITU, covers about 2.1 million schools across more than 140 countries. It maps school locations and their internet connectivity, offering GeoJSON and CSV via API with per-country downloads; the methodology appears in arXiv:2412.14870. The data are openly accessible (licence not stated on the JS-rendered page) and support education-access, digital-divide, and infrastructure-planning research.

name: HIFLD Private Schools
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub page JS-rendered; not extractable by WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HIFLD 私立学校数据集由美国国土安全部（DHS）通过 HIFLD 平台发布，覆盖美国，提供私立学校的点位位置。数据以 GeoJSON、Shapefile、KML 与 WFS 等格式开放获取，属公共领域。它适用于教育设施分析、应急规划与基础设施研究。
desc_en: The HIFLD Private Schools dataset is published by the US Department of Homeland Security through the HIFLD platform, covering the United States and providing point locations of private schools. Available openly as GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, and WFS in the public domain, it supports education-facility analysis, emergency planning, and infrastructure research.

name: HIFLD Public Schools
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub page JS-rendered; not extractable by WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HIFLD 公立学校数据集由美国国土安全部（DHS）通过 HIFLD 平台、源自 NCES 数据发布，覆盖美国，提供公立学校的点位位置。数据以 GeoJSON、Shapefile、KML、CSV 与 WFS 等格式开放获取，属公共领域。它适用于教育设施分析、学区规划与应急基础设施研究。
desc_en: The HIFLD Public Schools dataset is published by the US Department of Homeland Security through the HIFLD platform, sourced from NCES, covering the United States and providing point locations of public schools. Available openly as GeoJSON, Shapefile, KML, CSV, and WFS in the public domain, it supports education-facility analysis, school-district planning, and emergency infrastructure research.

name: Hong Kong GeoData Store (CSDI alpha portal)
theme_raw: 公共設施 79 類 (schools, hospitals, govt premises, leisure...)
license: Hong Kong Government Open Data Licence

notes: 地理參考公共設施資料的主入口；CSDI 的前身/alpha

desc_zh: 香港地理数据站（GeoData Store，CSDI alpha 门户）由香港特区政府发展局与地政总署运营，是地理参考公共设施资料的主入口，也是空间数据共享平台（CSDI）的前身。数据覆盖香港，提供 GeoJSON、KML、GML、Shapefile、CSV、Excel 与 MDB 等多种格式，免登录免费下载，遵循香港政府开放数据授权，适用于城市规划与公共服务分析。
desc_en: The Hong Kong GeoData Store (the CSDI alpha portal) is operated by the HKSAR Development Bureau and Lands Department as the main entry point for georeferenced public-facility data and a precursor to the Common Spatial Data Infrastructure. Covering Hong Kong, it offers GeoJSON, KML, GML, Shapefile, CSV, Excel, and MDB formats with free, login-free download under the Hong Kong Government open-data licence, supporting urban planning and public-service analysis.

name: Minority Health Social Vulnerability Index (OMH SVI)
provider: CDC Office of Minority Health & ATSDR
notes: Extends SVI with healthcare access & medical vulnerability themes.
verify_notes: MapServer subpath 404; OMH_SVI folder confirmed present | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 少数族裔健康社会脆弱性指数（OMH-SVI）由 CDC 少数族裔健康办公室与 ATSDR 编制，覆盖美国（县/普查区级）。它在传统 SVI 基础上扩展了医疗可及性与医疗脆弱性主题，通过 ArcGIS REST 地图服务提供 FeatureServer 与 GeoJSON。数据属公共领域，适用于健康公平分析、医疗资源规划与公共卫生应急。
desc_en: The Minority Health Social Vulnerability Index (OMH-SVI), produced by the CDC Office of Minority Health and ATSDR, covers the United States at county and tract level. It extends the standard SVI with healthcare-access and medical-vulnerability themes, served via an ArcGIS REST MapServer as FeatureServer and GeoJSON. In the public domain, it supports health-equity analysis, healthcare-resource planning, and public-health emergency response.

name: National atlas of tsetse flies in Kenya
notes: Niche national-scale vector dataset; example of country-level non-English-world content hosted in FAO GeoNetwork.
verify_notes: FAO Kenya tsetse atlas — license is NC-SA, not pure CC-BY | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 肯尼亚采采蝇国家图集由 FAO 与肯尼亚 KENTTEC 合作编制，覆盖肯尼亚，基于 2006–2019 年间约 5000 个诱捕点采集的约 71000 只采采蝇记录。数据以 Shapefile 提供，采用 CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO 授权开放获取，托管于 FAO GeoNetwork。它是国家尺度的专题媒介昆虫数据集，适用于昆虫媒介病害（如锥虫病）防控与兽医公共卫生研究。
desc_en: The National Atlas of Tsetse Flies in Kenya, produced by FAO and Kenya's KENTTEC, covers Kenya and is based on about 71,000 flies recorded at roughly 5,000 trapping locations between 2006 and 2019. Provided as Shapefile under a CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO licence and hosted in FAO GeoNetwork, it is a national-scale thematic vector dataset supporting control of insect-vector diseases such as trypanosomiasis and veterinary public-health research.

name: NCES K12 School Locations FeatureServer
formats_now: JSON, geoJSON, PBF, PNG, PDF, SVG
verify_notes: ArcGIS REST MapServer active | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: NCES K12 学校位置要素服务由美国国家教育统计中心（NCES）发布，覆盖美国，提供 K-12 学校的矢量点位。数据通过 ArcGIS REST 要素/地图服务获取，开放访问（NCES 公共，无明确许可声明）。它适用于教育设施分析、学区规划与教育公平研究。
desc_en: The NCES K12 School Locations feature service, published by the US National Center for Education Statistics, covers the United States and provides vector point locations of K-12 schools. Accessible as an ArcGIS REST FeatureServer/MapServer with open access (NCES public, no explicit licence stated), it supports education-facility analysis, school-district planning, and education-equity research.

name: Noise contours reported under Environmental Noise Directive (END)
formats: GeoPackage, ESRI FGDB, WMS, ESRI REST
verify_notes: Last modified Mar 2026 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 根据《环境噪声指令》（END）报告的噪声等值线数据集由欧洲环境署（EEA）发布，覆盖 EEA38 国家。它包含各成员国上报的噪声等值线，反映道路、铁路、机场等噪声源的环境噪声分布。数据提供 GeoPackage、ESRI FGDB、WMS 与 ESRI REST 等格式，可直接下载，遵循 EEA 开放授权，适用于噪声污染评估与环境健康研究。
desc_en: The Noise Contours reported under the Environmental Noise Directive (END) dataset is published by the European Environment Agency, covering the EEA38 countries. It contains noise contours reported by member states, reflecting environmental noise from roads, railways, airports, and other sources. Provided as GeoPackage, ESRI FGDB, WMS, and ESRI REST with direct download under an EEA open licence, it supports noise-pollution assessment and environmental-health research.

name: Putting health facilities on the map: open dataset of sub-Saharan African health facilities (BMC Medicine 2025 collection)
notes: Updated comprehensive open dataset referencing Maina et al.
verify_notes: Springer auth redirect; article likely still accessible in browser | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是发表于《BMC Medicine》2025 年专辑的撒哈拉以南非洲医疗设施开放数据集，由 BMC Medicine 与 Figshare/HDX 托管，覆盖撒哈拉以南非洲，是对 Maina 等人工作的更新与扩充。数据以带经纬度的 CSV 及其 Shapefile 衍生品提供，采用 CC-BY 授权开放获取。它适用于医疗可及性分析、公共卫生规划与卫生系统研究。
desc_en: Published in a BMC Medicine 2025 collection, this open dataset of sub-Saharan African health facilities is hosted via Figshare/HDX, covering sub-Saharan Africa and updating and expanding on the work of Maina et al. Data are provided as CSV with latitude/longitude plus Shapefile derivatives under a CC-BY licence with open access. It supports healthcare-access analysis, public-health planning, and health-systems research.

name: Spatial database of public health facilities in sub-Saharan Africa (Maina et al., Scientific Data 2019)
coverage: 50 sub-Saharan African countries; 98,745 public health facilities
formats: CSV with lat/lon (point vector, geocodable); Excel

desc_zh: 撒哈拉以南非洲公共卫生设施空间数据库（Maina 等，《Scientific Data》2019）覆盖 50 个撒哈拉以南非洲国家，包含 98745 个公共卫生设施。数据以带经纬度的 CSV（可地理编码的点矢量）及 Excel 提供，托管于 Springer Nature 的 Figshare 集合，采用 CC-BY 授权开放获取。它是医疗可及性、卫生系统规划与公共卫生研究的权威参考数据集。
desc_en: The spatial database of public health facilities in sub-Saharan Africa (Maina et al., Scientific Data 2019) covers 50 sub-Saharan African countries and includes 98,745 public health facilities. Data are provided as CSV with latitude/longitude (a geocodable point vector) and Excel, hosted as a Figshare collection by Springer Nature under a CC-BY licence with open access. It is an authoritative reference for healthcare-access, health-system planning, and public-health research.

name: 长三角分中心数据资源 (含医疗/教育空间点)
provider: 国家地球系统科学数据中心 长三角分中心 (南京师范大学)

desc_zh: 长三角分中心数据资源由国家地球系统科学数据中心长三角分中心（南京师范大学）建设，覆盖长三角地区及全国部分区域，含医疗、教育等公共服务空间点要素。数据以矢量（Shapefile/点要素）形式提供，面向科研用途，需注册下载。它适用于区域公共服务分析、城市与区域规划研究。
desc_en: The Yangtze River Delta sub-center data resources, developed by the National Earth System Science Data Center's Yangtze River Delta sub-center at Nanjing Normal University, cover the Yangtze River Delta and parts of China, including health and education public-service point features. Data are provided as vector (Shapefile/point features) for research use with registered download, supporting regional public-service analysis and urban and regional planning research.

verify_notes: DOI redirects to Harvard Dataverse citation page | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 全球城市街道网络 GeoPackage（v2）由南加州大学 Geoff Boeing 发布于 Harvard Dataverse，覆盖全球每一个城市区域（8914 个以上城市，按国家打包为压缩 GeoPackage）。数据基于 OpenStreetMap 经 OSMnx 提取，城市边界依据 GHS 城市中心数据库定义，总量约 80 GB，采用 CC0 1.0 公共领域授权。它是 Boeing 全球街道网络项目的主要矢量成果，适用于城市形态、交通网络与可达性研究。
desc_en: The Global Urban Street Networks GeoPackages (v2), released by Geoff Boeing (USC) on Harvard Dataverse, cover every urban area in the world (8,914+ cities, packaged as country-level zipped GeoPackages). Derived from OpenStreetMap via OSMnx with cities defined from the GHS Urban Centre Database, the dataset totals about 80 GB under a CC0 1.0 public-domain dedication. It is the primary vector deliverable of Boeing's global street-network project, supporting urban-morphology, transport-network, and accessibility research.

formats: Shapefile, GeoPackage, GDB, ESRI REST, WMS
formats_now: SHP, GeoPackage, MDB, ASCII; WMS; ESRI REST
notes: Authoritative European feeder to WDPA; more detail than WDPA extracts for EU
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: CDDA 国家指定保护区数据集（欧洲共同保护区数据库）由欧洲环境署（EEA）联合 UNEP-WCMC 与欧洲委员会维护，覆盖 EEA 成员及合作国家，按年更新。作为汇入 WDPA 的权威欧洲数据源，它对欧盟保护区的描述比 WDPA 提取版更为详细。数据提供 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GDB、ESRI REST 与 WMS 等格式，通过 EEA SDI 直接下载，采用 CC-BY 4.0 授权，适用于欧洲保护区分析与政策报告。
desc_en: The CDDA Nationally Designated Areas dataset (Common Database on Designated Areas for Europe) is maintained by the EEA together with UNEP-WCMC and the Council of Europe, covering EEA member and collaborating countries and updated annually. As the authoritative European feeder to the WDPA, it offers more detail on EU protected areas than WDPA extracts. Available as Shapefile, GeoPackage, GDB, ESRI REST, and WMS via direct EEA SDI download under CC-BY 4.0, it supports European protected-area analysis and policy reporting.

name: GRIP Global Roads Inventory Project (v4)
provider: PBL Netherlands Environmental Assessment Agency / GLOBIO
theme_raw: global road network harmonized | 道路 - 全球道路网 | transportation / roads
formats: ESRI File Geodatabase, Shapefile, raster density
formats_now: ESRI FGDB, Shapefile, ASCII grid raster
notes: Harmonized using UNSDI-Transportation datamodel from ~60 source datasets. Mirrored on UNDP GeoHub, FAO catalog, World Bank, EU data portal.
verify_notes: GLOBIO states CC0; Zenodo copy uses CC-BY 4.0 - dual | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GRIP（全球道路清查项目）由荷兰环境评估署 PBL/GLOBIO 制作，是覆盖全球 222 个国家的开放道路矢量数据集。它采用 UNSDI 交通数据模型，对约 60 个来源数据进行了统一协调与整合，以 CC0 公共领域许可发布，提供 ESRI 文件地理数据库、Shapefile 及栅格密度格式。该数据被广泛镜像于 UNDP GeoHub、FAO、世界银行与欧盟数据门户，常用于交通可达性、生态影响评估和全球基础设施分析。
desc_en: GRIP (Global Roads Inventory Project, v4) from PBL Netherlands/GLOBIO is an open global road vector dataset spanning 222 countries. It harmonizes roughly 60 source datasets under the UNSDI-Transportation data model and is released under a permissive CC0 public-domain license, with ESRI File Geodatabase, Shapefile, and raster density formats available. Widely mirrored on UNDP GeoHub, the FAO catalog, World Bank, and EU data portals, GRIP is a standard reference for transport accessibility studies, ecological-impact assessment, and global infrastructure analysis (Meijer et al. 2018).

name: OpenStreetMap Coastlines (osmdata.openstreetmap.de)
theme_raw: Coastline | Coastline / land & water polygons | Global coastline lines and land/water polygons
notes: Defacto high-detail open coastline; OSMCoastline tool on GitHub osmcode/osmcoastline.
verify_notes: Active; notes that OSM coastline can be broken pending automatic repair | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是基于 OpenStreetMap 数据生成的全球高精度海岸线数据集，由 Jochen Topf 用 OSMCoastline 工具从 OSM 海岸线标签自动提取并定期更新。它提供拆分/合并的海岸线以及配套的陆地与水体多边形 Shapefile，采用 ODbL 许可。作为事实上的开放高分辨率海岸线标准，常用于地图底图制作、海岸带分析和水陆掩膜处理。
desc_en: This is a global high-detail coastline dataset derived from OpenStreetMap, generated and regularly refreshed by Jochen Topf using the OSMCoastline tool from OSM coastline tags. It ships split and merged coastlines plus companion land_polygons and water_polygons shapefiles, all under the ODbL license. The de-facto open high-resolution coastline reference, it is commonly used for basemap production, coastal-zone analysis, and land/water masking. The OSMCoastline tool is available on GitHub (osmcode/osmcoastline).

name: FAO GeoNetwork - AQUASTAT hydrography layers
provider: Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO) Land & Water
theme_raw: African major rivers, basins, hydrography, irrigated areas | Rivers, basins, irrigation, water bodies | FAO statistical fishing areas, EEZs (republished), maritime zones
notes: Includes Major African Hydrology layers, basin shapes (Nile, Niger, Senegal, Lake Chad, Okavango). GeoNetwork exposes OGC services for many records.
verify_notes: 502 error; FAO catalog temporarily unavailable | lychee:Rejected status code: 502 Bad Gateway
desc_zh: 这是联合国粮农组织（FAO）土地与水资源部通过其 GeoNetwork 目录发布的 AQUASTAT 水文图层集合，覆盖全球并尤其侧重非洲。内容包括主要非洲水文要素、尼罗河、尼日尔河、塞内加尔河、乍得湖、奥卡万戈等流域边界。数据通过 WMS/WFS 等 OGC 服务及 Shapefile 提供，许可多为 CC-BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO，常用于水资源管理、流域分析与湿地研究。
desc_en: This is a collection of AQUASTAT hydrography layers published by FAO's Land & Water division through its GeoNetwork catalog, with global coverage and especially strong representation of Africa. It includes major African hydrology layers and river-basin shapes such as the Nile, Niger, Senegal, Lake Chad, and Okavango. Data are served via OGC WMS/WFS services and Shapefile, mostly under CC-BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO (license varies by record). It is typically used for water-resource management, basin analysis, and wetland studies.

name: Global Roads Open Access Data Set (gROADSv1)
formats: Esri Geodatabase (.gdb) global; Esri Shapefile (.shp) regional
notes: One of the few openly-licensed global road vector layers; merges national best-available sources under UNSDI-T model. Regional shapefiles are the practical vector deliverable.
verify_notes: SEDAC 迁移至 NASA EarthData;原 URL 常超时,可能需要 Earthdata 登录 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: gROADSv1（全球道路开放访问数据集）由 NASA SEDAC/CIESIN 与 CODATA 制作，是少数开放许可（CC BY）的全球道路矢量图层之一。它在 UNSDI-T 模型下整合了各国最佳可用道路数据，全球版以 Esri 地理数据库提供，分区域则以 Shapefile 形式交付，后者通常是实际可用的矢量产品。下载需 Earthdata 登录，常用于全球可达性、人口与基础设施关联分析。
desc_en: gROADSv1 (Global Roads Open Access Data Set) from NASA SEDAC/CIESIN and CODATA is one of the few openly licensed (CC BY) global road vector layers. It merges national best-available road sources under the UNSDI-T data model, delivered as a global Esri Geodatabase and as regional Esri shapefiles, the latter being the practical vector product for most users. Access is via HTTPS with Earthdata Login. It is commonly used for global accessibility modeling and population/infrastructure analyses (doi:10.7927/H4VD6WCT).

name: OurAirports (upstream source)
theme_raw: transport/aviation | Airports, runways, navaids, frequencies, countries, regions | 机场 + 跑道
notes: Upstream of DataHub airport-codes; richer companion tables (runways, navaids, countries, regions). | Merged duplicate OurAirports Data (https://ourairports.com/data/)
verify_notes: 截至 2026-06-01 仍每日更新，托管于 GitHub davidmegginson/ourairports-data | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OurAirports Data 由 OurAirports 社区维护，提供全球机场点数据，涵盖机场位置及相关属性信息。数据属公共领域，以 CSV 格式直接下载，覆盖全球范围。它是社区众包、持续更新的开放航空数据，适用于航空网络分析、机场定位、地图制作与交通研究。
desc_en: OurAirports Data, maintained by the OurAirports community, provides global airport point data covering airport locations and associated attributes. Released into the public domain, it is available as CSV for direct download with worldwide coverage. As a crowdsourced, continually updated open aviation resource, it supports air-network analysis, airport geolocation, cartography and transport research.

name: PEDNAV — Pedestrian street network for Boston (graph_clusters_30m_bos.pk)
provider: Zenodo / Bongiorno et al. (MIT Senseable City Lab)
theme_raw: Transport / Pedestrian street network (vector graph with lat/lon vertices) | Pedestrian street networks (urban transport vector graphs) | Transportation / Pedestrian street network (vector graph: nodes=intersections lat/lon, edges=streets with length in meters)
formats: Python pickle of igraph object (vertex 'pos' = lat/lon, 'ppos' = projected coords, edges weighted by street length in meters) — vector graph data, not native shapefile/GeoJSON but reconstructable as LineString vector layer
notes: Companion data for 'Vector-based pedestrian navigation in cities' (Nat. Comput. Sci. 2021). Underlying source is OpenStreetMap pedestrian network clustered at 30 m. Not strictly shapefile/geojson — but a vector network with explicit coordinates.
verify_notes: PEDNAV v1.1, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.5187718 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是论文《城市中基于矢量的行人导航》（Nature Computational Science 2021）的配套数据，由 MIT Senseable City Lab 的 Bongiorno 等人发布于 Zenodo。它以 Python pickle 格式保存波士顿行人街道网络的 igraph 图对象，顶点带有经纬度和投影坐标，边按街道长度（米）加权，底层来源是按 30 米聚类的 OSM 行人网络。虽非原生 Shapefile/GeoJSON，但可重建为带显式坐标的线状矢量层，适合行人导航与城市步行可达性研究。
desc_en: This is the companion data for 'Vector-based pedestrian navigation in cities' (Nature Computational Science 2021) by Bongiorno et al. of MIT Senseable City Lab, hosted on Zenodo. It stores Boston's pedestrian street network as a Python-pickled igraph object, with vertices carrying lat/lon and projected coordinates and edges weighted by street length in meters; the underlying source is the OSM pedestrian network clustered at 30 m. Though not native Shapefile/GeoJSON, it is a vector network with explicit coordinates, reconstructable as a LineString layer for pedestrian navigation and walkability research (doi:10.5281/zenodo.5187718).

name: CPTOND-2025 metro routes layer
theme_raw: transportation / rail transit | transportation / public transit | transportation / network topology
coverage: 46 metro systems including Mainland China, HK, Macao, Taiwan; 992 lines; ~33,000 km
notes: metro_routes.shp 992 records; Taiwan metro included
verify_notes: Same DOI as parent dataset | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 这是 CPTOND-2025 数据集中的地铁线路图层，发布于 Figshare（Jiang 等）。它覆盖包括中国大陆、香港、澳门和台湾在内的 46 个地铁系统，包含 992 条线路、总长约 33,000 公里。数据以 WGS-84 坐标的 LineString Shapefile 提供（metro_routes.shp 共 992 条记录），采用 CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 许可，适合城市轨道交通网络与公共交通研究。
desc_en: This is the metro routes layer of the CPTOND-2025 dataset, published on Figshare (Jiang et al.). It covers 46 metro systems including Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan, comprising 992 lines totaling roughly 33,000 km. Data are provided as a LineString Shapefile in WGS-84 (metro_routes.shp with 992 records) under a CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 license, suitable for urban rail transit network and public-transport research (doi:10.1038/s41597-025-06505-4).

name: NGA World Port Index (WPI)
theme_raw: global ports | World ports, harbors with depths, facilities, services | Maritime / Ports
formats: Shapefile, MS Access, PDF; also as ArcGIS FeatureLayer item
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://msi.nga.mil/Publications/WPI))
notes: Also republished on ArcGIS Online (item id 976ae810a25245228747b80191f625d0) and on HDX/Hub Ocean as queryable service.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden,疑似反爬;直访浏览器可正常访问 | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://msi.nga.mil/Publications/WPI))
desc_zh: NGA 世界港口索引（WPI）由美国国家地理空间情报局发布，是覆盖全球的港口属性矢量数据集。它记录世界各地港口的位置及众多港务特征，以 Shapefile、MS Access 和 PDF 形式提供，并有 ArcGIS FeatureLayer 版本，属美国政府公共领域作品。该数据还在 ArcGIS Online、HDX 与 Hub Ocean 上以可查询服务形式重新发布，常用于海运、港口物流与海事分析。
desc_en: The NGA World Port Index (WPI), published by the US National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency, is a global vector dataset of ports and their attributes. It records the locations and numerous port characteristics of ports worldwide, offered as Shapefile, MS Access, and PDF, plus an ArcGIS FeatureLayer item, as a US Government public-domain work. It is also republished on ArcGIS Online, HDX, and Hub Ocean as queryable services, and is commonly used for maritime shipping, port logistics, and marine analysis.

name: USGS National Map Transportation MapServer
theme_raw: TIGER-based roads, railroads, trails, airports | Roads, railroads, airports, trails | Transportation (roads, trails, rail, airports)
formats: ArcGIS REST/FeatureServer, WMS, WFS, Shapefile via TNM Download
formats_now: REST/SOAP/WMS; JSON, geoJSON, PBF; downloads as File GDB or Shapefile
notes: TIGER/Line + USGS edits. Strong WFS coverage at carto.nationalmap.gov.
verify_notes: active | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是美国地质调查局（USGS）国家地图的交通 MapServer 服务，覆盖全美。它基于 TIGER/Line 加 USGS 编辑，共含 39 个图层（12 个小比例尺 + 27 个大/中比例尺），通过 ArcGIS REST/FeatureServer、WMS、WFS 及 TNM Download 的 Shapefile 提供，属美国公共领域。数据于 2026 年 4 月刷新，WFS 覆盖完善，常用于美国全国交通制图与网络分析。
desc_en: This is the USGS National Map Transportation MapServer service covering the United States. Built from TIGER/Line plus USGS edits, it comprises 39 layers (12 small-scale and 27 large/medium-scale) and is exposed via ArcGIS REST/FeatureServer, WMS, WFS, and Shapefile through TNM Download, all in the US public domain. Refreshed in April 2026 with strong WFS coverage, it is commonly used for nationwide transportation mapping and network analysis in the US.

name: GRIP via World Bank Data Catalog (Feature & Vector Tile services)
formats: Shapefile + ArcGIS Feature Service + Vector Tiles
formats_now: ZIP regional, ArcGIS Vector Tile / Feature Services
file_size: Europe 0.8 GB; North America 501.1 MB; SE Asia 429.6 MB; Africa 119.5 MB
feature_count: over 21 million km of roads across 222 countries
verify_notes: GRIP 2018 on World Bank Data Catalog | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是世界银行数据目录中重新发布的 GRIP 全球道路数据，提供要素服务与矢量瓦片。它覆盖全球并按区域划分，含 222 个国家、超过 2100 万公里道路（2018 年参考），以 Shapefile、ArcGIS Feature Service 及矢量瓦片形式提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可。各区域数据量不一（欧洲约 0.8 GB、北美约 501 MB、东南亚约 430 MB、非洲约 120 MB），适合区域交通与基础设施分析。
desc_en: This is GRIP global roads data republished in the World Bank Data Catalog with Feature and Vector Tile services. It covers the globe by region, with over 21 million km of roads across 222 countries (2018 reference), available as Shapefile, ArcGIS Feature Service, and vector tiles under a CC-BY-4.0 license. Regional volumes vary (Europe about 0.8 GB, North America about 501 MB, SE Asia about 430 MB, Africa about 120 MB), making it convenient for regional transport and infrastructure analysis.

name: transportation_networks_of_china — Road segment network (1994–2024)
theme_raw: Transportation — road network (segment-level, China) | Transportation — freight railway network (segment-level, China) | Transportation — passenger railway network (segment-level, China, incl. HSR)
formats: CSV (segment + segment-pixel mapping, reconstructible to line vector / shapefile via pixel chains)
notes: seg_info_road.csv + seg_pixel_road.csv + seg_year_road.csv encode a segment-level national road network; designed to be reconstructed into vector line geometries from the 12669x8829 pixel grid. Not native shapefile but a vector-network representation.
verify_notes: 同上 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Ma Lin 等人发布于 GitHub 的中国交通网络数据集中的道路分段网络部分，覆盖中国大陆约 279 个地级市、时间跨度 1994–2024 年。它以 CSV 形式（分段、分段-像元映射、分段-年份）编码全国道路网络，设计为可从 12669×8829 的像元网格重建为矢量线几何（如 Shapefile）。虽非原生 Shapefile，但属矢量网络表达，适合中国道路网络演化与时空分析。
desc_en: This is the road segment network component of Ma Lin et al.'s transportation_networks_of_china dataset on GitHub, covering Mainland China across roughly 279 prefectures over 1994-2024. It encodes a segment-level national road network as CSV files (segment info, segment-pixel mapping, and segment-year tables) designed to be reconstructed into vector line geometries (e.g., shapefiles) from a 12669x8829 pixel grid. Though not native Shapefile, it is a vector-network representation suited to studying the evolution and spatiotemporal dynamics of China's road network.

name: CPTOND-2025 — China Public Transport Operation Network Dataset (full bundle: 350-city bus + 46-city metro)
theme_raw: Transport — urban public transit networks (bus + metro) | Transport — city bus networks | Transport — urban rail / metro
coverage: Mainland China + HK/Macao/Taiwan; 350 cities (bus), 46 cities (metro); collected June 2025; ~3.4M km routes, 140,371 bus routes, 992 metro lines
license: Open access (Scientific Data data descriptor; specific CC license not explicitly stated on portal)
formats: Shapefile (.shp) — routes + stops; WGS-84 EPSG:4326; UTF-8 bilingual attributes
notes: Per-city files named {city_en}_bus_routes.shp / _bus_stops.shp / _metro_routes.shp / _metro_stops.shp. Sourced via 8684 platform + Amap API. Mean spatial accuracy 5.08 m.
verify_notes: figshare returns 403 to WebFetch (anti-bot); record likely exists | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: CPTOND-2025（中国公共交通运营网络数据集）是完整的公交与地铁矢量数据包，覆盖中国大陆及港澳台，含 350 个城市的公交（140,371 条线路）和 46 个城市的地铁（992 条线路），路线总长约 340 万公里，数据采集于 2025 年 6 月。数据以 WGS-84（EPSG:4326）Shapefile 提供路线与站点，含 UTF-8 双语属性，按城市命名分文件。来源为 8684 平台与高德 API，平均空间精度约 5.08 米，适合公共交通可达性与城市研究。
desc_en: CPTOND-2025 (China Public Transport Operation Network Dataset) is the full bundle of bus and metro vector data covering Mainland China plus Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan, with 350 cities for bus (140,371 routes) and 46 cities for metro (992 lines), totaling about 3.4 million km of routes, collected in June 2025. Routes and stops are provided as WGS-84 (EPSG:4326) Shapefiles with UTF-8 bilingual attributes in per-city files. Sourced via the 8684 platform and Amap API with mean spatial accuracy around 5.08 m, it suits public-transport accessibility and urban research (doi:10.1038/s41597-025-06505-4).

name: GRIP global roads on UNDP GeoHub
notes: Republished GRIP4 as vector tile service
verify_notes: UNDP GeoHub mirror, cloud-optimized formats | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 UNDP GeoHub 上重新发布的 GRIP4 全球道路数据，以矢量瓦片服务形式提供，并附 Shapefile 镜像。它覆盖全球（2018 年参考），采用 CC0 1.0 公共领域许可，可通过开放网络服务直接调用。作为 GRIP4 的便捷在线版本，适合在 Web GIS 与可视化环境中快速使用全球道路网络。
desc_en: This is GRIP4 global roads data republished on UNDP GeoHub as a vector tile service with a Shapefile mirror. It covers the globe (2018 reference) under a CC0 1.0 public-domain license and can be consumed directly via open web services. As a convenient online version of GRIP4, it is well suited for quickly using the global road network in web GIS and visualization environments.

name: HIFLD Open Data (Homeland Infrastructure Foundation-Level Data)
theme_raw: critical infrastructure | Critical infrastructure vectors: power, pipelines, hospitals, schools, EMS, broadband | Critical infrastructure: power, transport, comms, emergency services
notes: 500+ datasets: power, hospitals, schools, transportation
verify_notes: ArcGIS Hub page loads; JS-rendered, minimal text | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: HIFLD（国土基础设施基础级数据）是美国国土安全部 GeoPlatform 维护的开放数据门户，覆盖全美。它汇集 500 余个数据集，涵盖电力、医院、学校、交通等关键基础设施，以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV 及 WFS 形式提供，属美国政府公共领域。该平台是研究美国基础设施、应急管理和公共服务布局的重要矢量数据来源。
desc_en: HIFLD (Homeland Infrastructure Foundation-Level Data) is an open data portal maintained by the US DHS GeoPlatform, covering the United States. It aggregates over 500 datasets spanning power, hospitals, schools, transportation, and other critical infrastructure, offered as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, CSV, and WFS in the US-government public domain. The platform is a key vector data source for studying US infrastructure, emergency management, and the distribution of public services.

name: OpenStreetMap Generalized Coastlines (zoom 8)
theme_raw: coastline polygons/polylines | coastline polyline | global coastline polylines (generalized)
notes: Used by GCC as base for 1 km transect generation.
verify_notes: HTTP 404 Not Found - page no longer exists | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 这是基于 OpenStreetMap 数据生成的全球泛化（zoom 8）海岸线 Shapefile，由 osmdata.openstreetmap.de 发布，采用 ODbL 许可。它是完整 OSM 海岸线的简化版本，适合小比例尺制图和概览级展示，并曾被用作 GCC 生成 1 公里海岸线断面的底图。常用于全球或区域尺度的海岸线可视化与轻量分析。
desc_en: This is a global generalized (zoom 8) coastline Shapefile derived from OpenStreetMap, published by osmdata.openstreetmap.de under the ODbL license. As a simplified version of the full OSM coastline, it suits small-scale cartography and overview-level display, and has been used as a base for generating 1 km coastal transects (e.g., by GCC). It is commonly applied to global or regional coastline visualization and lightweight analysis.

name: OpenStreetMap waterways/water polygons (Geofabrik + osmdata)
theme_raw: Rivers, streams, canals, lakes, coastlines | coastline / ocean mask | ocean / water polygons
notes: Geofabrik shapefiles include 'waterways' layer per region; FOSSGIS water-polygons split by coastline.
verify_notes: Theme mislabel: 'Transportation' should be Hydrography | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是基于 OpenStreetMap 的全球水体多边形数据集，由 OSM 社区通过 Geofabrik/FOSSGIS 制作，采用 ODbL 许可。它提供按海岸线拆分的水体多边形，以及（在 Geofabrik 区域提取中）含 waterways 图层的 Shapefile、GeoPackage 与 PBF 格式，支持全球及国家/区域级范围。常用于水陆掩膜、水文制图和地图底图渲染。
desc_en: This is a global water polygons dataset based on OpenStreetMap, produced by the OSM community via Geofabrik/FOSSGIS under the ODbL license. It provides coastline-split water polygons and, in Geofabrik regional extracts, a 'waterways' layer, available as Shapefile, GeoPackage, and PBF for global and country/region extents. It is commonly used for land/water masking, hydrographic mapping, and basemap rendering.

name: OpenStreetMapData Land Polygons (osmdata.openstreetmap.de)
theme_raw: coastline / land polygons | coastline / land mask | coastline (anchor reference)
notes: Cited in the retrospective as the de-facto OSM-based successor for high-resolution coastlines; regenerated weekly from osmcoastline.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是基于 OpenStreetMap 的全球陆地多边形数据集，由 Jochen Topf 与 OpenStreetMap 基金会发布，采用 ODbL 许可。它以 WGS84 和 Web Mercator 两种投影提供 Shapefile，由 osmcoastline 每周从 OSM 海岸线重新生成。作为基于 OSM 的事实上的高分辨率海岸线后继产品，常用于地图底图的陆地填充、水陆掩膜和海岸带制图。
desc_en: This is a global land polygons dataset based on OpenStreetMap, published by Jochen Topf and the OpenStreetMap Foundation under the ODbL license. It is provided as Shapefiles in both WGS84 and Web Mercator projections, regenerated weekly from osmcoastline. Cited as the de-facto OSM-based successor for high-resolution coastlines, it is commonly used for land fill in basemaps, land/water masking, and coastal-zone cartography.

name: Urban Science Beyond Samples — Up-to-Date Street Network Models (2026 successor release)
theme_raw: Updated global urban street networks | Reproducible workflow producing the 5 Dataverse datasets above | Reproduction scripts; lists per-country file index
coverage: Every urban area in the world, refreshed
formats: GeoPackage (vector), plus GraphML and node/edge lists
access: Open; scripts on GitHub, vector data on Harvard Dataverse
doi_or_citation: Boeing, G. 2026. Environment and Planning B. doi:10.1177/23998083261446991; arXiv:2605.00108
feature_count: every urban area in the world (GHS Urban Centre Database 2025)
notes: Refresh of the 2021 release; same dataverse structure; GeoPackages remain the vector deliverable.
verify_notes: Street network models for every urban area in the world; data on Harvard Dataverse | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Geoff Boeing 发布的全球城市街道网络模型的 2026 更新版（《Urban Science Beyond Samples》），覆盖全球每个城市地区（基于 GHS 城市中心数据库 2025）。它以 GeoPackage 矢量为主要交付格式，并附 GraphML 和节点/边列表，脚本托管于 GitHub、矢量数据托管于 Harvard Dataverse，采用 MIT 许可。作为 2021 版的刷新，全量数据约需 2 TB 磁盘空间，广泛用于城市形态、可步行性与交通网络研究。
desc_en: This is Geoff Boeing's 2026 update of global urban street network models ('Urban Science Beyond Samples'), covering every urban area in the world (based on the GHS Urban Centre Database 2025). GeoPackage vector files are the primary deliverable, accompanied by GraphML and node/edge lists, with scripts on GitHub and vector data on Harvard Dataverse under an MIT license. A refresh of the 2021 release requiring about 2 TB of disk space at full scale, it is widely used for urban morphology, walkability, and transport network research (doi:10.1177/23998083261446991).

name: Africa's Infrastructure: Railways (AICD)
theme_raw: African railway network | Sub-Saharan Africa railways, roads, ports, airports network
notes: Catalog entry combines tabular databank indicators with vector railway shapefiles from the AICD legacy archive.
verify_notes: Africa Infrastructure - Railways; metadata updated 2023-01 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是世界银行非洲基础设施诊断（AICD）项目下的铁路数据，覆盖撒哈拉以南非洲。该目录条目将 AICD 遗留档案中的矢量铁路 Shapefile 与表格化指标相结合，时间约为 1990–2009 年，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可。适合研究非洲铁路网络、交通基础设施现状与区域发展分析。
desc_en: This is railway data from the World Bank's Africa Infrastructure Country Diagnostic (AICD), covering Sub-Saharan Africa. The catalog entry combines vector railway shapefiles from the AICD legacy archive with tabular databank indicators, spanning roughly 1990-2009 under a CC-BY 4.0 license. It is suited to studying Africa's railway networks, transport infrastructure status, and regional development analysis.

name: CPTOND-2025 deduplicated stops by city
theme_raw: transportation / public transit | 公共交通 - 公交/地铁线路+站点
license_now: 未指定正式许可（声称开放科学原则）
access: open download (project page lists Figshare + raw GeoJSON server)
feature_count: 350个城市的公交网络和46个城市的地铁系统; 公交约337.5万公里, 地铁约3.3万公里
notes: Per-city files: {city_en}_bus_routes.shp / _bus_stops.shp / _metro_routes.shp / _metro_stops.shp
verify_notes: CPTOND-2025 站点活跃，DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.29377427；P4 写 CC-BY-4.0 但页面未明示具体许可 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 CPTOND-2025 项目按城市去重后的站点图层，由项目站点与 Figshare 提供，覆盖 350 个城市的公交网络（约 337.5 万公里）和 46 个城市的地铁系统（约 3.3 万公里），基于 2025 年 6 月数据采集。数据以 Shapefile 和 GeoJSON 提供（含原始 GeoJSON 服务器），按城市分文件命名。适合公共交通站点分析与城市轨道/公交可达性研究。
desc_en: This is the CPTOND-2025 project's per-city deduplicated stops layer, provided via the project site and Figshare, covering bus networks in 350 cities (about 3.375 million km) and metro systems in 46 cities (about 33,000 km), based on June 2025 data collection. Data are offered as Shapefile and GeoJSON (including a raw GeoJSON server) in per-city files named by city. It suits public-transport stop analysis and urban rail/bus accessibility research (doi:10.6084/m9.figshare.29377427).

name: data.gov.sg geospatial catalogue (URA / SLA)
theme_raw: Master Plan, planning, transport, environment | Public housing stock
notes: Filter-by-format search returns all vector layers. URA Master Plan 2019 subzone/planning area/region are the headline layers.
verify_notes: data.gov.sg datasets filtered by geo formats accessible. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是新加坡政府开放数据门户 data.gov.sg 的地理空间目录，由 GovTech（URA、SLA、LTA、NParks 等机构）维护，覆盖新加坡全境。它提供 GeoJSON、KML、KMZ 和 Shapefile 等矢量格式，可免费访问并支持 API，采用新加坡开放数据许可。其中 URA 2019 总体规划的分区、规划区与区域图层是核心数据，常用于城市规划与土地利用研究。
desc_en: This is Singapore's open data geospatial catalogue on data.gov.sg, maintained by GovTech (URA, SLA, LTA, NParks), covering Singapore. It provides vector formats including GeoJSON, KML, KMZ, and Shapefile, freely accessible with API support under the Singapore Open Data Licence. The URA Master Plan 2019 subzone, planning area, and region layers are headline datasets, commonly used for urban planning and land-use research.

name: EMODnet Seabed Habitats WFS (EUSeaMap)
theme_raw: Seabed habitats / Annex I habitats | EUNIS / MSFD broad-scale habitat polygons
notes: EUSeaMap 2023, Annex I habitats (Sandbanks 1110, Reefs 1170, Posidonia 1120, etc.), OSPAR T&D habitats.
verify_notes: EMODnet Seabed Habitats WFS GetCapabilities returns valid XML | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 EMODnet 海床栖息地（EUSeaMap）的 WFS 服务，由 EMODnet Seabed Habitats 联盟提供，覆盖欧洲各海域。它发布 EUSeaMap 2023 成果，包含欧盟生境指令附件 I 栖息地（如沙洲 1110、礁石 1170、海神草床 1120 等）及 OSPAR 受威胁与衰退栖息地，分辨率约 100 米。数据通过开放 OGC WFS 以 GeoJSON、Shapefile、GML 形式提供，采用 CC-BY 4.0 许可，适合海洋空间规划与海床生境制图。
desc_en: This is the EMODnet Seabed Habitats (EUSeaMap) WFS service from the EMODnet Seabed Habitats consortium, covering European seas. It serves the EUSeaMap 2023 product, including EU Habitats Directive Annex I habitats (e.g., Sandbanks 1110, Reefs 1170, Posidonia beds 1120) and OSPAR threatened-and-declining habitats, at roughly 100 m resolution. Data are delivered via open OGC WFS as GeoJSON, Shapefile, and GML under a CC-BY 4.0 license, suited to marine spatial planning and seabed-habitat mapping.

name: First Road Surface Type Dataset for 50 African Countries (ESSD 2026)
provider: Copernicus / Earth System Science Data, Figshare
theme_raw: 道路 - 路面材质分类矢量
formats: ESRI Shapefile (按国家分片), WGS 1984 Web Mercator
lychee_status: Network error: Network error: Connection reset by peer (os error 54) (error sending request for url (https://essd.copernicus.org/articles/18/267/2026))
feature_count: approximately 13,309,000 road segments; total length about 6,822,516 km; 50 African countries
notes: 首个非洲全境路面铺装属性 (paved/unpaved) 矢量数据, ESSD 2026 数据论文; 精度 86.8%
verify_notes: Road surface type dataset for 50 African countries; Figshare DOI 10.6084/m9.figshare.29424107 | lychee:Network error: Network error: Connection reset by peer (os error 54) (error sending request for url (https://essd.copernicus.org/articles/18/267/2026))
desc_zh: 这是首个覆盖非洲 50 国全境的路面铺装类型（铺装/未铺装）矢量数据集，作为 Earth System Science Data（ESSD 2026）数据论文发布。它约含 1331 万条道路分段、总长约 682 万公里，参考年份约 2020（源数据 2018–2020），整体精度约 86.8%。数据以按国家分片的 ESRI Shapefile（WGS 1984 Web Mercator）提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，适合非洲道路质量、可达性与发展研究。
desc_en: This is the first road surface type (paved/unpaved) vector dataset covering all 50 African countries, published as an Earth System Science Data (ESSD 2026) data paper. It contains roughly 13.3 million road segments totaling about 6.82 million km, with a reference year around 2020 (source data 2018-2020) and overall accuracy near 86.8%. Data are provided as per-country ESRI Shapefiles (WGS 1984 Web Mercator) under a CC BY 4.0 license, suited to studying road quality, accessibility, and development across Africa (doi:10.6084/m9.figshare.29424107).

name: generate-china-subways-geojson (China subway stations & lines GeoJSON, Amap-derived)
theme_raw: Transport / Urban rail transit (subway/metro stations and lines) | 城市轨道交通 - 地铁线路+站点
coverage: Approximately 41 Chinese cities with metro systems (e.g. Beijing 1100, Shanghai 3100, Guangzhou 4401, Shenzhen 4403, Wuhan 4201, plus Xuzhou, Changzhou, Hohhot, etc.); nationwide combined files
license: No license declared in repository (code MIT-likely by convention but unspecified); upstream Amap data subject to Amap ToS — redistribution restricted
license_now: 无 LICENSE 文件（未声明）
formats: GeoJSON (china-station.json point features; china-line.json line features; per-city station/line JSON)
formats_now: JSON (china-station.json / china-line.json，可用 QGIS 打开)
access: Open-source script on GitHub; user runs `npm run gen` to scrape Amap and emit GeoJSON files (with GCJ-02 → WGS-84 correction)
notes: Repo is a generator tool rather than a hosted dataset; outputs (china-station.json, china-line.json) are produced locally after running the script. Coordinate de-shift (GCJ-02 纠偏) applied. Editable in QGIS. Useful for Chinese urban rail transit network research; relate to peer-reviewed equivalents such as CPTOND-2025 (46-city subway vector, doi 10.1038/s41597-025-06505-4) for cross-validation.
verify_notes: 仓库存在但仅 3 次提交，无 releases/issues，维护活跃度低；P4 描述称"源码 MIT 风格"但实际无许可声明 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是一个由社区作者 luxueyan 维护的开源工具，用于从高德地图抓取并生成中国地铁站点与线路的 GeoJSON。它覆盖约 41 个有地铁的中国城市（如北京、上海、广州、深圳、武汉等），输出站点点要素与线路线要素，并做了 GCJ-02 到 WGS-84 的坐标纠偏。该仓库是生成器而非托管数据集，运行脚本后在本地产出文件，可在 QGIS 中编辑，适合中国城市轨道交通网络研究。
desc_en: This is an open-source tool by community author luxueyan that scrapes Amap (Gaode Maps) to generate GeoJSON of China's subway stations and lines. It covers roughly 41 Chinese cities with metro systems (e.g., Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Wuhan), outputting station point features and line features, with GCJ-02 to WGS-84 coordinate correction applied. The repository is a generator rather than a hosted dataset, producing files locally after running the script; outputs are editable in QGIS and useful for Chinese urban rail transit network research. No LICENSE file is declared.

name: GEODATA TOPO 250K Series 3
theme_raw: Topographic vector | Topographic vectors (10 themes: hydro, transport, infra, vegetation, etc.)
notes: 10 themes: cartography, elevation, hydrography, transport, etc.
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden to WebFetch (likely bot block) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GEODATA TOPO 250K Series 3 由澳大利亚地球科学局（Geoscience Australia）发布，是 1:250,000 比例尺的全国地形矢量数据集。它包含制图、高程、水文、交通等 10 个主题图层，以 Shapefile、MapInfo TAB 和个人地理数据库格式提供，采用 CC-BY 许可。作为澳大利亚权威的中比例尺地形基础数据，常用于全国制图、交通与水文分析。
desc_en: GEODATA TOPO 250K Series 3 from Geoscience Australia is a national topographic vector dataset at 1:250,000 scale. It contains 10 themes including cartography, elevation, hydrography, and transport, offered as Shapefile, MapInfo TAB, and Personal Geodatabase under a CC-BY license. As Australia's authoritative medium-scale topographic foundation data, it is commonly used for national mapping and transport and hydrographic analysis.

name: GRIP FeatureCollection on GEE community catalog
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是在 Google Earth Engine 社区目录中以 FeatureCollection 形式提供的 GRIP 全球道路数据。它基于 GRIP4（2018 参考，2021-04-03 更新），跨 7 个区域共含约 2576 万条矢量要素，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可通过 Earth Engine 直接开放调用。适合在 GEE 云平台上进行大规模全球道路网络分析与遥感叠加。
desc_en: This is GRIP global roads data provided as a FeatureCollection in the Google Earth Engine community catalog. Based on GRIP4 (2018 reference, updated 2021-04-03), it contains about 25.76 million vector features across 7 regions under a CC-BY-4.0 license, openly accessible directly through Earth Engine. It is well suited for large-scale global road network analysis and remote-sensing overlays on the GEE cloud platform.

name: GTFS Guadalajara Metropolitan Area - MiMacro, MiTren & SiTren
provider: SITEUR / Government of Jalisco (via TUMI hub)
theme_raw: BRT, light rail, and trunk bus routes & stops | BRT + light rail public transit routes
