formats: GTFS (shapes.txt LineString vectors, stops.txt point vectors)
notes: Combines MiMacro BRT, MiTren and SiTren feeders.
verify_notes: TUMI hub notes license info may be outdated; check original source | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是墨西哥瓜达拉哈拉都市区的公共交通 GTFS 数据，由哈利斯科州政府/SITEUR 经 TUMI 数据中心发布，覆盖 MiMacro 快速公交、MiTren 及 SiTren 接驳系统，数据截至 2022 年 1 月 31 日。GTFS 中的 shapes.txt 提供线路 LineString 矢量、stops.txt 提供站点点矢量，以 ZIP 直接下载，许可未在门户中明确。适合公共交通规划、出行可达性与时刻表分析。
desc_en: This is public-transport GTFS data for the Guadalajara metropolitan area in Mexico, published by Jalisco's government/SITEUR via the TUMI data hub, covering the MiMacro BRT, MiTren, and SiTren feeder systems, current as of January 31, 2022. Within the GTFS, shapes.txt provides route LineString vectors and stops.txt provides stop point vectors, available as a direct ZIP download; the license is not specified on the portal. It suits transit planning, accessibility, and schedule analysis.

name: Maryland iMap / state DOT FeatureServices
theme_raw: roads, AADT, transit, bike | Statewide authoritative GIS layers
notes: Example of well-organized state-level ArcGIS Hub with WFS for every transport layer; nearly every US state DOT has equivalent (e.g., NCDOT, WSDOT, Caltrans GIS).
verify_notes: Maryland GIS Data Catalog 仍在线，但抓取内容稀少（JS 渲染）；License/格式需进入具体数据集页 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是美国马里兰州 iMap 平台及州交通部的 FeatureServices，覆盖马里兰州区域。它通过 FeatureServer 和 WFS 提供交通等矢量图层 API 访问，属开放数据，是组织良好的州级 ArcGIS Hub 范例。几乎每个美国州交通部门都有类似服务（如 NCDOT、WSDOT、Caltrans GIS），适合州级交通规划与地理空间应用。
desc_en: This is Maryland's iMap platform and state DOT FeatureServices, covering the Maryland region in the US. It provides API access to transportation and other vector layers via FeatureServer and WFS as open data, and is an example of a well-organized state-level ArcGIS Hub. Nearly every US state DOT has an equivalent (e.g., NCDOT, WSDOT, Caltrans GIS), making it suitable for state-level transport planning and geospatial applications.

name: NM Transport Infrastructure (composite MapServer: roads, rail, aviation, physiography)
notes: Composite Dynamic National Map service: aviation, road transport, rail transport, physiography themes from GA 250K Topo.
verify_notes: service possibly renamed/removed | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 这是澳大利亚地球科学局（Geoscience Australia）的国家地图交通基础设施复合 MapServer 服务，覆盖澳大利亚全境。它整合来自 GA 250K 地形数据的航空、公路交通、铁路交通和地貌等主题，以 WMS、WFS 和 MapServer REST（GeoJSON）形式公开提供，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。适合澳大利亚全国交通基础设施制图与综合分析。
desc_en: This is Geoscience Australia's National Map Transport Infrastructure composite MapServer service, covering all of Australia. It integrates aviation, road transport, rail transport, and physiography themes from GA's 250K Topo data, openly served via WMS, WFS, and MapServer REST (GeoJSON) under a CC BY 4.0 license. It is well suited to nationwide transport infrastructure mapping and integrated analysis in Australia.

name: OpenFreeMap tiles (OSM vector)
theme_raw: OpenStreetMap-based vector basemap tiles | Free hosted OSM vector tiles
notes: Drop-in MVT tile service derived from full-planet OSM
verify_notes: Active; v0.9 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenFreeMap 由 Zsolt Ero 开发，是基于全球 OpenStreetMap 数据的免费矢量瓦片服务。它以 Mapbox Vector Tiles（MVT，planetiler 模式）格式提供全球覆盖，既有免费公共瓦片端点，也支持自托管，代码采用 MIT 许可、数据采用 ODbL 许可。作为可直接替换的 MVT 瓦片服务，适合 Web 地图、底图渲染与自定义地图应用。
desc_en: OpenFreeMap, developed by Zsolt Ero, is a free vector tile service derived from full-planet OpenStreetMap data. It provides global coverage as Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT, planetiler schema), with free public tile endpoints as well as self-hosting, under an MIT license for the code and ODbL for the data. As a drop-in MVT tile service, it suits web maps, basemap rendering, and custom mapping applications.

name: Ordnance Survey - OS Open Roads
notes: Routable network with road classification & node-edge topology.
verify_notes: Page reachable but content JS-rendered; landing snippet has no license/format detail | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OS Open Roads 由英国测绘局（Ordnance Survey）发布，是覆盖英国大不列颠岛的开放道路网络矢量数据集。它提供带道路分类和节点-边拓扑的可路由网络，以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、GML 及矢量瓦片形式直接下载，采用开放政府许可 v3.0（OGL）。作为权威的英国道路基础数据，常用于路径规划、交通分析与制图。
desc_en: OS Open Roads, published by the UK's Ordnance Survey, is an open road network vector dataset covering Great Britain. It provides a routable network with road classification and node-edge topology, available for direct download as Shapefile, GeoPackage, GML, and vector tiles under the Open Government Licence v3.0. As authoritative British road foundation data, it is commonly used for route planning, transport analysis, and cartography.

name: OurAirports - Airports
formats: CSV with lat/lon (point vector, convertible to GeoJSON/Shapefile)
notes: Fields include ident, type, name, lat/lon, elevation, continent, ISO country, ISO region, municipality, IATA/ICAO codes.
verify_notes: content too large to summarize but file served | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 OurAirports 的机场数据表，由 David Megginson 维护，覆盖全球约 8 万个机场、直升机场和水上机场基地。它以含经纬度的 CSV 提供点矢量（可转换为 GeoJSON/Shapefile），属公共领域（Unlicense/CC0），每日重新生成。字段包括标识码、类型、名称、经纬度、海拔、大洲、ISO 国家与地区、城市、IATA/ICAO 代码，广泛用于航空数据分析与机场定位。
desc_en: This is the OurAirports airports table maintained by David Megginson, covering roughly 80,000 airports, heliports, and seaplane bases worldwide. It is provided as CSV with lat/lon (point vector, convertible to GeoJSON/Shapefile) in the public domain (Unlicense/CC0), regenerated daily. Fields include ident, type, name, lat/lon, elevation, continent, ISO country, ISO region, municipality, and IATA/ICAO codes, making it widely used for aviation data analysis and airport geolocation.

name: OurAirports - Navaids
theme_raw: aviation navigation aids | aviation navigation aids (VOR/NDB/DME/TACAN)
notes: Includes ident, type, frequency, magnetic variation, slaved variation.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 OurAirports 的导航台数据表，覆盖全球 VOR/DME/NDB/TACAN 等无线电导航设施（估计上万条记录）。它以含经纬度的 CSV 提供点矢量，属公共领域，每日更新。字段包括标识码、类型、频率、磁差和从动磁差，适合航空导航分析、空域研究与航路相关应用。
desc_en: This is the OurAirports navaids table, covering global VOR/DME/NDB/TACAN radio navigation aids (an estimated 10,000+ records). It is provided as CSV with lat/lon (point vector) in the public domain and updated daily. Fields include ident, type, frequency, magnetic variation, and slaved variation, making it suitable for aviation navigation analysis, airspace studies, and airway-related applications.

name: PEDNAV source code repository (cbongiorno/pednav)
theme_raw: Code + small bundled vector network data for stochastic vector-based pedestrian navigation | Code + bundled vector network data for pedestrian navigation
coverage: Boston and San Francisco pedestrian networks (same as Zenodo snapshot)
formats: Python package; bundled igraph pickles of pedestrian street networks
doi_or_citation: Mirrored to Zenodo as 10.5281/zenodo.5187718; paper DOI 10.1038/s43588-021-00130-y
notes: Same underlying pedestrian street network vector graphs as the Zenodo archive; useful for reproducing/exporting to GeoJSON. No additional cities beyond Boston/SF released.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 PEDNAV 的源代码仓库（cbongiorno/pednav），由 Christian Bongiorno 维护，配套论文《城市中基于矢量的行人导航》。它包含波士顿和旧金山行人街道网络的 igraph pickle 数据（与 Zenodo 快照相同），采用 GPL-3.0 许可，可公开克隆。其底层为 30 米尺度的行人街道网络矢量图，可用于复现实验或导出为 GeoJSON，未发布波士顿/旧金山以外的城市。
desc_en: This is the PEDNAV source code repository (cbongiorno/pednav) by Christian Bongiorno, the companion to 'Vector-based pedestrian navigation in cities.' It bundles igraph pickles of the Boston and San Francisco pedestrian street networks (the same as the Zenodo snapshot) under a GPL-3.0 license, publicly cloneable. The underlying data are 30 m-scale pedestrian street network vector graphs, useful for reproducing experiments or exporting to GeoJSON; no cities beyond Boston and San Francisco are released (mirrored to Zenodo as doi:10.5281/zenodo.5187718).

name: South Africa Roads (AICD)
theme_raw: Road network with class, width, lanes, surface, condition | South Africa road network (alternate/curated record)
notes: Last updated 2017; part of Africa Infrastructure Country Diagnostic series. Companion country shapefiles exist (Ghana, Nigeria, etc.).
verify_notes: South Africa Roads AICD | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 南非道路矢量数据集，来自世界银行非洲基础设施国别诊断（AICD，由 Africon 编制）系列。数据覆盖南非全境的道路网络，以压缩 Shapefile 形式提供（约 22.9 MB），采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。该系列还包含加纳、尼日利亚等多个非洲国家的同类数据，常用于交通可达性、基础设施投资与区域发展研究。最新更新于 2017 年。
desc_en: A vector road dataset for South Africa, part of the World Bank's Africa Infrastructure Country Diagnostic (AICD) series compiled by Africon. It covers the national road network and is distributed as a zipped Shapefile (about 22.9 MB) under a CC BY 4.0 licence, last updated in 2017. Companion country files exist for Ghana, Nigeria and others. The data is well suited to transport accessibility, infrastructure investment and regional development analysis across sub-Saharan Africa.

name: Statistics Canada / NRCan National Road Network (NRN)
theme_raw: Roads, ferry connections, traffic direction, hierarchy | transportation
feature_count: two linear entities (Road Segment and Ferry Connection Segment) and three punctual entities (Junction, Blocked Passage, Toll Point); 13 provincial/territorial datasets
notes: Plus parallel National Railway Network (NRWN) at open.canada.ca.
verify_notes: NRN GeoBase; updated 2024-12-18, annual | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 加拿大国家道路网（NRN）数据集，由加拿大自然资源部 / GeoBase 维护，按省和地区组织，共 13 个省/地区数据集。数据包含道路段、渡轮连接段两类线要素，以及交叉口、阻断点、收费点三类点要素，提供 Shapefile、GML、KML 与 File GDB 等格式，采用加拿大开放政府许可，可直接下载。同一门户还提供配套的国家铁路网（NRWN）数据。适用于交通建模、路网分析与制图。
desc_en: The National Road Network (NRN) for Canada, maintained by Natural Resources Canada / GeoBase and organised province by province across 13 provincial and territorial datasets. It models two linear entities (Road Segment and Ferry Connection Segment) and three point entities (Junction, Blocked Passage, Toll Point), available as Shapefile, GML, KML and File GDB under the Open Government Licence – Canada. A parallel National Railway Network (NRWN) is published on the same portal. It supports routing, network analysis and authoritative national mapping.

name: TENtec / GISCO TEN-T Trans-European Transport Network
provider: European Commission DG MOVE / Eurostat GISCO
theme_raw: transportation - core/comprehensive road, rail, IWW, ports, airports, RRT
notes: Combines TENtec interactive map data with Eurostat GISCO downloads. ERA also publishes RINF rail infrastructure as Linked Data on TriplyDB.
verify_notes: Airports & Ports datasets, ETRS89 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 泛欧交通网络（TEN-T）矢量数据，由欧盟委员会运输总司（DG MOVE）的 TENtec 系统与 Eurostat GISCO 共同提供，覆盖整个欧洲大陆。数据比例尺约 1:1,000,000（2006–2013），通过 GISCO 以 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 WFS/WMS 服务发布，遵循 Eurostat 版权与许可条款。常用于跨境交通走廊、基础设施规划与欧盟政策分析。欧洲铁路局还以关联数据形式发布 RINF 铁路基础设施。
desc_en: Vector data for the Trans-European Transport Network (TEN-T), provided jointly by the European Commission's DG MOVE (TENtec) and Eurostat GISCO, covering the European continent. Published at roughly 1:1,000,000 scale (2006–2013) as Shapefile, GeoJSON and WFS/WMS services through GISCO under Eurostat copyright provisions. It is widely used for cross-border corridor studies, infrastructure planning and EU policy analysis. The European Union Agency for Railways additionally publishes RINF rail infrastructure as Linked Data.

name: The BRI's economic corridors
theme_raw: transport corridors / geopolitics | 道路+铁路 - 一带一路经济走廊
coverage: 8 BRI economic corridors, global (up to Aug 2021)
notes: Companion vector dataset in the same BRI geo-mapping collection - corridor polylines/polygons with status attributes.
verify_notes: HKU DataHub 返回 403，可能反爬；未确认许可证状态 | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: “一带一路经济走廊”矢量数据集，由香港大学 DataHub 与 BRINFAITH 项目发布（Man & Palmer, 2022），描绘八条主要 BRI 经济走廊，覆盖范围为全球（数据截至 2021 年 8 月）。数据以走廊线/面几何加属性表的形式提供，附带状态等属性，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可开放下载。适用于“一带一路”地理制图、跨国基础设施与地缘经济研究。
desc_en: A vector dataset of the Belt and Road Initiative's economic corridors, released through HKU DataHub by the BRINFAITH project (Man & Palmer, 2022). It maps eight major BRI economic corridors with global reach (current to August 2021), provided as corridor polylines/polygons with status attributes under a CC BY 4.0 licence and openly downloadable. It belongs to a wider BRI geo-mapping collection and supports research on BRI corridors, transnational infrastructure and geoeconomics.

name: Transport for NSW Open Data Hub
theme_raw: Roads, public transit GTFS+RT, ferry wharves, bike network, traffic counts | public transport stops, routes, cycling, rail
license_now: Data Licence (站点专属) + Acceptable Use Policy
feature_count: 64,720 registered users, 15,762 applications, 35.78B API hits (hub metrics)
notes: Sister portals: opendata.transport.vic.gov.au, Queensland data.qld.gov.au transport group, data.wa.gov.au.
verify_notes: GTFS Studio 实时提取目前因技术问题暂停 | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 澳大利亚新南威尔士州交通厅（Transport for NSW）开放数据中心，发布覆盖新南威尔士州的交通相关数据集，包括 Shapefile、GeoJSON、GTFS 公交时刻表以及 REST/实时 API。门户活跃度高（注册用户逾 6 万、应用近 1.6 万），采用站点专属数据许可及可接受使用政策。维州、昆士兰、西澳等地设有姊妹门户。适用于公交规划、出行分析与交通应用开发。
desc_en: The Transport for NSW Open Data Hub publishes transport datasets covering New South Wales, Australia, including Shapefile and GeoJSON geospatial layers, GTFS public-transport feeds and REST/real-time APIs. The hub is heavily used, with tens of thousands of registered users and thousands of applications, and is governed by a site-specific Data Licence and Acceptable Use Policy. Sister portals exist for Victoria, Queensland and Western Australia. It supports transit planning, mobility analysis and app development.

name: 一带一路及其毗邻区域1km道路网密度数据集 (含路网矢量)
provider: 全球变化科学研究数据出版系统 / 中科院地理资源所
theme_raw: 可达性 (援助投送可达性代理) | Ramsar wetlands
formats: Raster 1km + 源 OSM 路网矢量参考
notes: 主产品为格网密度, 元数据指明源为路网矢量; 用于援助物资陆路可达性建模。
verify_notes: Global Change Sci Data Publishing System (GeoDOI) item page accessible | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: “一带一路及其毗邻区域 1km 道路网密度数据集”，由全球变化科学研究数据出版系统 / 中科院地理资源所发布，覆盖“一带一路”沿线及毗邻区。主产品为 1 公里格网道路网密度栅格，元数据指明其源数据为 OSM 路网矢量，可作参考。数据通过 GeoDOI 开放获取，需按要求引用。常用于援助物资陆路可达性、交通基础设施分布与区域连通性建模。
desc_en: A 1 km road-network density dataset for the Belt and Road region and its adjacent areas, published through China's Global Change Science Research Data Publishing System (IGSNRR, CAS). The main product is a 1 km gridded road-density raster, with metadata indicating that the source is an OpenStreetMap-derived road vector network. It is openly available via GeoDOI with a citation requirement and is used for modelling overland accessibility of aid, transport infrastructure distribution and regional connectivity.

name: 第三极1:100万道路数据集（2014）
provider: 国家青藏高原科学数据中心 (TPDC)
theme_raw: 交通-道路/铁路 | 交通 - 公路/铁路 (高原区域)
license: TPDC 数据使用协议 (需注册申请)
notes: 基于 1:100万 ADC_WorldMap; WGS84; 含主要公路、道路、铁路三层及名称/类型属性
verify_notes: TPDC SPA - content mostly client-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 第三极 1:100 万道路数据集（2014），由国家青藏高原科学数据中心（TPDC）发布，覆盖青藏高原（第三极）。数据基于 1:100 万 ADC WorldMap，采用 WGS84 坐标，以 Shapefile 形式提供主要公路、道路和铁路三个图层，并含名称、类型等属性。需注册下载，遵循 TPDC 用户协议。适用于高原交通分析、可达性评估与区域地理研究。
desc_en: A 1:1,000,000 road dataset for the Third Pole (Tibetan Plateau) for 2014, distributed by the National Tibetan Plateau Data Center (TPDC). Based on the 1:1,000,000 ADC WorldMap and projected in WGS84, it provides three Shapefile layers — main highways, roads and railways — with name and type attributes. Registration is required and use follows the TPDC user agreement. It is suited to plateau transport analysis, accessibility assessment and regional geographic study.

name: A historical geospatial database of the island of Cyprus in the 1960s
provider: Harokopio University of Athens (Papadias & Chalkias) / Mendeley Data
theme_canonical: Transportation | Land cover & land use | Marine & coastal
notes: Sibling Cyprus HGIS dataset cited inside Sci Data paper; enables 1880s vs 1960s temporal comparison.
verify_notes: DOI redirects to Elsevier linkinghub; intermediate redirect page, content not retrieved | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 塞浦路斯 1960 年代历史地理空间数据库，由雅典哈罗科皮奥大学（Papadias & Chalkias）发布于 Mendeley Data，源自美国陆军制图局 K715 1:50,000 系列地图。数据以 ESRI Shapefile（面/线）形式提供，涵盖交通、土地利用、海岸等要素，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。配套的塞浦路斯历史 GIS 数据集可支持 1880 年代与 1960 年代的时空对比研究。适用于历史地理与景观变化分析。
desc_en: A historical geospatial database of Cyprus in the 1960s, produced by Harokopio University of Athens (Papadias & Chalkias) and distributed via Mendeley Data, digitised from the US AMS K715 1:50,000 map series. Provided as ESRI Shapefiles (polygon/polyline) covering transport, land use and coastal features under a CC BY 4.0 licence. A sibling Cyprus HGIS dataset enables temporal comparison between the 1880s and 1960s. It supports historical geography and landscape-change research.

name: ACM SIGSPATIAL GIS Cup 2017 SF Shortest Path
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] 学术比赛数据集页,可能含矢量路网
verify_notes: lychee:Rejected status code: 302 Found
desc_zh: ACM SIGSPATIAL GIS Cup 2017 旧金山最短路径数据集，由慕尼黑工业大学 Martin Werner 提供的学术比赛数据页面。该数据集与旧金山道路网及最短路径计算相关，可直接下载，许可未明确说明（学术用途）。具体格式与要素细节尚待核实。适用于路径规划算法、空间索引与图查询的基准测试与教学。
desc_en: The ACM SIGSPATIAL GIS Cup 2017 San Francisco shortest-path dataset, hosted by Martin Werner (TUM) on an academic competition page. It relates to the San Francisco road network and shortest-path computation and is available for direct download under an unspecified academic licence; exact formats and feature details remain to be verified. It is intended for benchmarking and teaching of routing algorithms, spatial indexing and graph queries.

name: African Road Surface Type Dataset (50 countries)
formats: ESRI Shapefile (per country), WGS 1984 Web Mercator
notes: Derived from OSM with paved/unpaved classification
verify_notes: DOI redirects to Figshare FRST_dataset | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 非洲道路路面类型数据集（覆盖 50 个非洲国家），由 Liu & Zhou 发布于 Figshare。数据基于 OpenStreetMap 派生，对约 1330 万条路段、约 680 万公里道路进行铺装/未铺装分类，按国家以 ESRI Shapefile 提供（WGS 1984 Web 墨卡托投影），采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可开放下载，并有配套 ESSD 论文。适用于交通可达性、路况评估与基础设施规划研究。
desc_en: An African road surface type dataset covering 50 countries, released on Figshare by Liu & Zhou. Derived from OpenStreetMap, it classifies roughly 13.3 million segments and about 6.8 million km of roads as paved or unpaved, provided per country as ESRI Shapefiles in WGS 1984 Web Mercator under a CC BY 4.0 licence, with an accompanying ESSD paper. It is openly downloadable and supports accessibility analysis, road-condition assessment and infrastructure planning across Africa.

name: African Transport Systems Database (AfTS-Db)
what_changes: Builds topologically clean continental road/rail/port/airport network vectors for Africa from raw OSM PBF via Open-Gira; adds node/edge IDs, mode classification, and connectivity attributes.
notes: Pant et al. 2025; cold-niche Africa transport derivative.
verify_notes: v1.0.0 Nov 2025, data DOI 10.5281/zenodo.17861120 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 非洲交通系统数据库（AfTS-Db），托管于 GitHub（NISMod 项目，Pant 等，2025），是一个面向非洲的交通基础设施衍生数据库，采用 MIT 许可并附 Zenodo DOI。数据具体覆盖范围与格式细节有限，整体面向多模式交通网络的整合与建模。适用于非洲基础设施风险、网络分析与气候适应性研究。
desc_en: The African Transport Systems Database (AfTS-Db), hosted on GitHub by the NISMod team (Pant et al., 2025), is a transport-infrastructure derivative database for Africa released under an MIT licence with a Zenodo DOI. Detailed coverage and format information are limited, but it is oriented toward integrating and modelling multimodal transport networks. It is intended for African infrastructure risk, network analysis and climate-resilience research.

name: Airport Codes (Datahub.io core)
provider: Datahub.io / Open Knowledge Foundation (mirror of OurAirports)
coverage: Global — ~78k airports/heliports/seaplane bases with lat/lon, IATA/ICAO, ISO country/region
formats: CSV with coordinates (point-vector convertible to GeoJSON/Shapefile)
notes: Main file: airport-codes.csv (~8.8 MB). Includes columns ident, type, name, elevation_ft, continent, iso_country, iso_region, municipality, icao_code, iata_code, gps_code, local_code, coordinates.
verify_notes: 约每6小时更新; 源 OurAirports | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 机场代码数据集（Datahub.io 核心数据集），由开放知识基金会维护，镜像自 OurAirports，覆盖全球约 7.8 万个机场、直升机场和水上机场。数据以 CSV 提供（约 8.8 MB），含经纬度、IATA/ICAO 代码、ISO 国家/地区、海拔、城市等字段，点位可直接转为 GeoJSON/Shapefile，采用 ODC-PDDL（公共领域）许可，每日镜像更新。适用于航空网络分析、地理编码与可视化。
desc_en: The Airport Codes core dataset on Datahub.io, maintained by the Open Knowledge Foundation as a daily mirror of OurAirports, covering roughly 78,000 airports, heliports and seaplane bases worldwide. Provided as an 8.8 MB CSV with latitude/longitude, IATA/ICAO codes, ISO country and region, elevation and municipality, the points convert readily to GeoJSON or Shapefile. It is released under the public-domain ODC-PDDL licence and suits aviation network analysis, geocoding and visualisation.

name: Airport Runway Centrelines and Landing Grounds (Line Features)
notes: Runway centreline line features classified per Enroute Supplement Australia.
verify_notes: hub page not found | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 机场跑道中心线与着陆场（线要素）数据集，由澳大利亚地球科学局（AMSIS Hub）发布，覆盖澳大利亚。数据为跑道中心线线要素，依据《澳大利亚航路补充资料》分类，通过 ArcGIS Hub 的 FeatureServer 提供 GeoJSON、Shapefile、KML 下载及 WFS 服务，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可。适用于航空制图、机场基础设施分析与空域规划。
desc_en: An Australian dataset of airport runway centrelines and landing grounds as line features, published by Geoscience Australia on the AMSIS ArcGIS Hub. The runway centreline features are classified per the Enroute Supplement Australia and are served through a public FeatureServer offering GeoJSON, Shapefile and KML downloads plus WFS access under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It supports aeronautical mapping, airport infrastructure analysis and airspace planning.

name: AMSIS – Australian Marine Spatial Information System
theme_raw: Australian maritime jurisdictions, petroleum titles, marine parks
notes: Authoritative Australian baselines, EEZ, ECS, internal waters; Esri Hub open layers.
verify_notes: Page loads but minimal text scraped; hub appears operational | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: AMSIS——澳大利亚海洋空间信息系统，由澳大利亚地球科学局运营，覆盖澳大利亚专属经济区及外大陆架。门户发布权威的海洋基线、领海基线、EEZ、外大陆架及内水等矢量图层，以 Shapefile、Esri 图层及 WMS/WFS 服务提供。许可条款未明确。适用于海洋管辖边界、海事规划与海洋空间分析。
desc_en: AMSIS – the Australian Marine Spatial Information System, operated by Geoscience Australia, covers Australia's Exclusive Economic Zone and extended continental shelf. The portal publishes authoritative maritime baselines, internal waters, EEZ and ECS boundaries as Esri Hub vector layers in Shapefile and Esri formats with WMS/WFS services, though licensing terms are not clearly stated. It is used for marine jurisdictional boundaries, maritime planning and ocean spatial analysis.

name: Apache Baremaps OpenStreetMap vector tiles
theme_raw: Custom vector tiles from OSM + PostGIS
formats_now: Vector Tiles, OSM, Shapefile, FlatGeobuf, GeoParquet, PMTiles
notes: Pipeline that produces vector datasets directly in PostGIS
verify_notes: latest release 0.8.2 (Feb 2025) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Apache Baremaps 是由 Apache 软件基金会维护的开源工具链，可直接从 OpenStreetMap 数据生成矢量瓦片并入库 PostGIS，覆盖范围可全球或按需配置。它输出 Mapbox 矢量瓦片（MVT）及 PostGIS 表，采用 Apache-2.0 许可，托管于 GitHub。本质是地图数据生产管线而非静态数据集，适用于自建底图、矢量瓦片服务与地理数据处理流程。
desc_en: Apache Baremaps is an open-source toolkit from the Apache Software Foundation that builds vector tiles and PostGIS datasets directly from OpenStreetMap data, with global or configurable coverage. It produces Mapbox Vector Tiles (MVT) and PostGIS tables, is licensed under Apache-2.0 and hosted on GitHub. Rather than a static dataset, it is a data-production pipeline suited to self-hosted basemaps, vector-tile serving and geospatial data processing.

name: BC Open Maps (DataBC)
theme_canonical: Transportation | Hydrography | Land cover & land use
formats: shp, GeoPackage, KML; WFS via openmaps.gov.bc.ca
notes: Sub-national portal frequently cited in kartoza list
verify_notes: BC Data Catalogue landing reachable; details not extracted by WebFetch | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: BC Open Maps（DataBC）是加拿大不列颠哥伦比亚省的官方开放数据目录，覆盖全省，提供交通、水文、土地利用等多主题矢量数据。数据以 Shapefile、GeoPackage、KML 形式提供，并通过 openmaps.gov.bc.ca 提供 WFS 服务，采用 BC 省开放政府许可（OGL-BC）。该省级门户在地理数据社区中被广泛引用，适用于区域规划、自然资源管理与制图。
desc_en: BC Open Maps (DataBC) is the official open-data catalogue of British Columbia, Canada, covering the whole province with multi-theme vector data spanning transportation, hydrography and land use. Data is offered as Shapefile, GeoPackage and KML, with WFS services via openmaps.gov.bc.ca, under the OGL-BC open government licence. This widely cited sub-national portal supports regional planning, natural-resource management and mapping.

name: Boston University China's Global Energy Finance (CGEF) Database
provider: Boston University Global Development Policy Center
formats: Excel/CSV with country & lat/lon for many projects (vector point convertible)
formats_now: web report, PDF policy brief, database
notes: Primary source #2 for the BRI Energy Investments dataset; some records contain coordinates supporting vectorization.
verify_notes: CGEF database referenced | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 波士顿大学全球发展政策中心“中国全球能源金融”（CGEF）数据库（Gallagher & Ray），追踪 2000 年至今中国在全球范围内的海外能源金融与投资项目。数据以 Excel/CSV 提供，含国别及部分项目的经纬度，可矢量化为点数据，遵循 BU GDP 使用条款，公开下载。常作为“一带一路”能源投资研究的核心来源，适用于能源金融、地缘经济与基础设施投资分析。
desc_en: The China's Global Energy Finance (CGEF) Database from Boston University's Global Development Policy Center (Gallagher & Ray) tracks Chinese overseas energy finance and investment projects worldwide from 2000 to the present. Provided as Excel/CSV with country information and latitude/longitude for many projects (allowing point vectorisation), it is publicly downloadable under BU GDP terms. A key source for BRI energy-investment studies, it supports energy-finance, geoeconomic and infrastructure-investment analysis.

name: Canada Railway Network (Open Government CKAN)
formats_now: CSV, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, Shapefile, WFS, WMS, HTML
notes: Native CKAN dataset providing WFS-accessible railway lines + transport_line dataset (roads) on the same portal.
verify_notes: Quebec Railway Network; last modified 2026-05-27, annual updates | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 加拿大铁路网数据集，由加拿大统计局 / 自然资源部通过开放政府 CKAN 门户发布，覆盖加拿大全境。这是原生 CKAN 数据集，提供 WFS 可访问的铁路线，并配有 GeoJSON、CSV、GeoPackage 等格式，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，按年更新（最近修改于 2026 年）。同一门户还提供配套的道路（transport_line）数据集。适用于铁路网络分析、交通规划与制图。
desc_en: The Canada Railway Network dataset, published by Statistics Canada / NRCan through the Open Government CKAN portal and covering all of Canada. As a native CKAN dataset it provides WFS-accessible railway lines alongside GeoJSON, CSV and GeoPackage formats under a CC BY 4.0 licence, updated annually (last modified in 2026). A companion road (transport_line) dataset is available on the same portal. It supports rail-network analysis, transport planning and mapping.

name: Canadian roadless areas comparison dataset (Cordeiro et al. 2022, Cons Sci & Practice)
what_changes: Subsets and clips GRIP4 over Canada and benchmarks it against national (NRN) and regional road datasets to derive country-level roadless-area polygons; quantifies GRIP omission/commission bias.
notes: Cold national-scale derivative rather than a mainstream re-release.
verify_notes: Wiley returned 402 Payment Required (likely bot/paywall); article presumed live. | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 加拿大无路区比较数据集（Cordeiro 等，2022，发表于 Conservation Science and Practice），是一个国家尺度的无路荒野区分析衍生数据集，采用 CC-BY 许可。数据围绕加拿大道路网络与无路区域的比较，具体格式与覆盖细节有限。属较冷门的科研派生数据，适用于景观连通性、生态保护与人类足迹研究。
desc_en: A Canadian roadless-areas comparison dataset accompanying Cordeiro et al. (2022) in Conservation Science and Practice, a national-scale derivative analysing roadless wilderness. Released under a CC-BY licence, it focuses on comparing Canada's road network and roadless areas, though detailed format and coverage information is limited. As a niche research derivative, it suits landscape-connectivity, conservation and human-footprint studies.

name: CartoCiudad
notes: [MAYBE - needs verification] CartoCiudad是西班牙官方街道地址矢量数据, 但此为门户首页
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CartoCiudad 是西班牙国家地理研究院（IGN España / CNIG）维护的官方街道与地址矢量数据，覆盖西班牙，提供 shp、gml 及 WMS/WFS 服务，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可直接下载。此链接为门户首页，具体数据集需进一步核实。适用于地址地理编码、路径规划与城市级制图。
desc_en: CartoCiudad is Spain's official street and address vector data, maintained by IGN España / CNIG and covering Spain, offered as shp and gml downloads plus WMS/WFS services under a CC BY 4.0 licence. This particular link is the portal homepage, so specific datasets need verification. It supports address geocoding, routing and city-scale mapping.

name: China Bus Networks 2024 (sibling dataset, 299-city vector bus network)
notes: Cited by CPTOND-2025 as the prior-year bus vector dataset; reduced city count and more restrictive licence than CPTOND-2025.
verify_notes: figshare returns 403 to WebFetch; record likely exists | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 中国公交网络 2024（姊妹数据集），发布于 Figshare（Springer Nature），覆盖中国 299 座城市 2024 年的公交线路与站点。数据以矢量（Shapefile/GeoJSON）形式提供线路与站点，采用 CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 许可，可直接下载。该数据集被 CPTOND-2025 引用为上一年度的公交矢量数据，城市数量较少且许可更严格。适用于公共交通网络分析与城市可达性研究。
desc_en: China Bus Networks 2024, a sibling dataset on Figshare (Springer Nature) covering bus routes and stops in 299 Chinese cities for 2024. It provides routes and stops as vector data (Shapefile/GeoJSON) under a CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 licence and is directly downloadable. Cited by CPTOND-2025 as the prior-year bus vector dataset, it has fewer cities and a more restrictive licence. It supports public-transit network analysis and urban accessibility research.

name: China Bus Networks 2024 (Wang et al.)
notes: Cited as comparable predecessor dataset
verify_notes: DOI redirects to Nature Scientific Data article | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国公交网络 2024（Wang 等，发表于 Scientific Data），覆盖中国 299 座城市 2024 年的公交网络，数据存放于 Figshare。以矢量（Shapefile/GeoJSON）形式提供，采用 CC BY-NC-ND 许可，可开放下载。该数据集常被引为同类公交数据集的可比前作。适用于公共交通网络结构、城市出行与可达性研究。
desc_en: China Bus Networks 2024 (Wang et al., published in Scientific Data), covering bus networks across 299 Chinese cities for 2024, with data hosted on Figshare. It is provided as vector data (Shapefile/GeoJSON) under a CC BY-NC-ND licence and is openly downloadable. The dataset is frequently cited as a comparable predecessor among Chinese transit datasets. It supports research on public-transport network structure, urban mobility and accessibility.

name: China Public Transport Operation Network Dataset (CPTOND-2025)
theme_raw: 公共交通 - 公交+地铁矢量网络
coverage: 中国大陆 350 城市公交 + 46 城市地铁 + 港澳台
formats: Shapefile (中英双语属性), 兼容 GTFS
notes: Scientific Data 2025 发表, 国家级公交-地铁矢量数据集, 含线路+站点+运营属性, 比 OSM 全得多
verify_notes: Auth redirect (IDP); article exists behind login flow | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 中国公共交通运营网络数据集（CPTOND-2025），发表于 Nature 旗下 Scientific Data，覆盖中国大陆 350 城公交、46 城地铁，并含港澳台。数据以 Shapefile 提供（中英双语属性），兼容 GTFS，包含线路、站点及运营属性，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，可直接下载。相较 OSM 覆盖更全面，是国家级公交-地铁矢量数据集。适用于公共交通网络分析、可达性评估与出行建模。
desc_en: The China Public Transport Operation Network Dataset (CPTOND-2025), published in Nature's Scientific Data, covers bus systems in 350 mainland cities and metro systems in 46 cities, plus Hong Kong, Macau and Taiwan. It is provided as Shapefiles with bilingual (Chinese/English) attributes, is GTFS-compatible and includes routes, stops and operational attributes under a CC-BY-4.0 licence, with direct download. More comprehensive than OSM, this national-scale bus–metro vector dataset supports transit network analysis, accessibility assessment and mobility modelling.

name: CnOpenData 全国机场 / 港口 / 铁路点位数据
provider: CnOpenData 上海财经大学开放数据中心
theme_raw: 机场 + 港口 + 铁路 (点要素)
formats: CSV (经纬度可直接矢量化) - 部分含 shp
notes: 国内财经类研究常用引用源；含中英文名、IATA/ICAO 代码、所属省份
verify_notes: Annual updates | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: CnOpenData 全国机场/港口/铁路点位数据，由上海财经大学开放数据中心发布，覆盖中国及全球。数据以 CSV 提供（含经纬度，可直接矢量化，部分含 shp），包含中英文名称、IATA/ICAO 代码、所属省份等字段，中国部分数据更新至 2020 年初并按年更新。需注册，作为商业平台许可未明确说明。常被国内财经类研究引用，适用于交通节点定位与区域分析。
desc_en: CnOpenData's airport, port and railway point datasets, published by Shanghai University of Finance and Economics' open-data center, covering China and the world. Provided as CSV with latitude/longitude (directly vectorisable, some with shapefiles), the records include Chinese and English names, IATA/ICAO codes and province. Chinese data extends through early 2020 with annual updates. Registration is required and, as a commercial platform, licensing is not explicit. It is commonly cited in Chinese economics research and suits transport-node location and regional analysis.

name: Creating a dataset of historic roads in Sydney from scanned maps
verify_notes: Nature Sci Data; idp redirect for cookie auth | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 悉尼历史道路数据集，发表于 Nature 旗下 Scientific Data，从扫描旧地图中提取了悉尼约 5.2 万条道路链接。数据以矢量线图层提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，开放获取。适用于城市历史地理、道路网络演变与历史 GIS 研究。
desc_en: A dataset of historic roads in Sydney, Australia, published in Nature's Scientific Data, created by extracting around 52,000 road links from scanned maps. It is provided as a vector line layer under a CC-BY-4.0 licence and is openly available. It supports urban historical geography, road-network evolution and historical GIS research.

name: CSIS Reconnecting Asia Project Database (archived)
provider: Center for Strategic and International Studies (CSIS)
theme_raw: Eurasian infrastructure projects across BRI: power plants, roads, rails, ports, intermodal, transmission, pipelines
coverage: Eurasia, 14,000+ projects since 2006 (frozen Dec 2020; project ended 2022)
license: CSIS terms (free for research with attribution)
formats: Web map / point-based geocoded records; CSV/GeoJSON export via database UI (no shapefile bulk publicly documented)
access: Open web database; no longer updated
notes: Frequently cross-referenced by BRI tracker datasets including the Yin et al. BRI energy paper; provides cross-border transport vector data complementary to the energy focus.
verify_notes: Domain renamed reconnectingasia->reconasia; database still public, 14000+ projects, snapshot Dec 2020 | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: CSIS“重新连接亚洲”项目数据库（已归档），由美国战略与国际研究中心（CSIS）建立，覆盖欧亚地区，自 2006 年起收录 1.4 万余个项目（2020 年 12 月冻结，项目 2022 年结束）。数据以基于点的地理编码记录形式提供，可通过数据库界面导出 CSV/GeoJSON，遵循 CSIS 条款（科研用途免费、需署名）。常被“一带一路”追踪类数据集交叉引用，适用于跨境交通与基础设施研究。
desc_en: The CSIS Reconnecting Asia Project Database (now archived), built by the Center for Strategic and International Studies, covers Eurasia with more than 14,000 projects logged since 2006 (frozen December 2020; project ended 2022). It offers point-based geocoded records with CSV/GeoJSON export through the database interface under CSIS terms (free for research with attribution). Frequently cross-referenced by BRI tracker datasets, it provides cross-border transport and infrastructure data for geoeconomic research.

name: DATA.GOV.HK - 開發 (Development) category 矢量資料集
theme_raw: Development, planning, terrain landslide inventory, transport routes
notes: 含 Enhanced Natural Terrain Landslide Inventory (SHP) 與 Routes & Fares (GeoJSON) 等冷門資料
verify_notes: Category page accessible; license/format on individual dataset pages | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: DATA.GOV.HK“开发（Development）”类别矢量资料集，由香港特区多个政府部门提供，覆盖香港。该类别包含交通、灾害等多种数据，以 Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML、CSV 形式开放下载，采用香港开放数据许可（OGDL），其中包括增强型自然山坡山泥倾泻清单（SHP）、路线及收费（GeoJSON）等较冷门资料。适用于城市规划、交通与地质灾害研究。
desc_en: The Development category vector datasets on DATA.GOV.HK, provided by multiple HKSAR government departments and covering Hong Kong. The category spans transport and hazard-related data offered as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML and CSV under the Hong Kong Open Government Data Licence, and includes niche layers such as the Enhanced Natural Terrain Landslide Inventory (SHP) and Routes & Fares (GeoJSON). It supports urban planning, transport and geohazard research.

name: Data.Transportation.gov (BTS open portal)
provider: US DOT / Bureau of Transportation Statistics
theme_raw: Rail crossings, airports, ports, bike network, NTAD layers
notes: Hosts National Transportation Atlas Database (NTAD) layers individually.
verify_notes: US DOT portal active | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Data.Transportation.gov 是美国交通部 / 交通统计局（BTS）的开放数据门户，覆盖美国全境，逐层托管国家交通图集数据库（NTAD）图层。数据以 GeoJSON、Shapefile、CSV 及 Socrata API 形式提供，遵循 Socrata 服务条款及 DOT 政策，可通过 API 或直接下载获取。适用于全国交通基础设施分析、运输统计与制图。
desc_en: Data.Transportation.gov is the open-data portal of the US Department of Transportation / Bureau of Transportation Statistics, covering the United States and hosting the National Transportation Atlas Database (NTAD) layers individually. Data is available as GeoJSON, Shapefile, CSV and via the Socrata API under Socrata terms and DOT policy, through API access or direct download. It supports national transport-infrastructure analysis, transportation statistics and mapping.

name: Daylight Landcover (Meta / OSM US)
license: Open (Daylight; project sunsetted 2024 but files still hosted)
notes: 8 classes (Snow, Forest, Urban, Grass, Crop, Barren, Water, Shrub) remapped from ESA WorldCover 11-class raster, denoised and smoothed. Direct: https://daylight-openstreetmap.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/landcover/low.shp (.dbf/.prj/.shx)
verify_notes: S3 bucket s3://daylight-openstreetmap/landcover/ | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Daylight Landcover（Meta / OSM US）是基于 ESA WorldCover 2020 派生的全球土地覆盖矢量数据，由 Meta 的 Daylight Map Distribution（OSM US）发布。数据将 ESA WorldCover 的 11 类栅格重映射、去噪并平滑为 8 类（雪、林地、城市、草地、农田、裸地、水体、灌丛）的 Shapefile，开放许可，托管于 AWS S3 公共桶（项目 2024 年停更但文件仍可下载）。适用于全球底图制图与土地覆盖分析。
desc_en: Daylight Landcover (Meta / OSM US) is a global land-cover vector dataset derived from ESA WorldCover 2020, published by Meta's Daylight Map Distribution. It remaps ESA WorldCover's 11 raster classes into 8 vector classes (Snow, Forest, Urban, Grass, Crop, Barren, Water, Shrub), denoised and smoothed, distributed as Shapefiles under an open licence from a public AWS S3 bucket. The project was sunset in 2024 but files remain hosted. It suits global basemap cartography and land-cover analysis.

name: Deep learning-based extraction of Kenya's historical road network
notes: 3 road classes from topographic maps
verify_notes: Nature Sci Data; idp redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 基于深度学习提取的肯尼亚历史道路网络数据集，发表于 Nature 旗下 Scientific Data，覆盖肯尼亚。研究利用深度学习从历史地形图中提取道路，按 3 个道路等级以线 Shapefile 提供，采用 CC-BY-4.0 许可，开放获取。适用于历史交通地理、道路网络演变与历史 GIS 研究。
desc_en: A deep-learning-based extraction of Kenya's historical road network, published in Nature's Scientific Data and covering Kenya. Roads were extracted from historical topographic maps using deep learning and provided as a line Shapefile across three road classes under a CC-BY-4.0 licence, openly available. It supports historical transport geography, road-network evolution and historical GIS research.

name: Deutsche Bahn Open Data (CKAN)
formats: CKAN API, GeoJSON, Shapefile, WFS via DB-OpenData
notes: CKAN portal with full DB rail network as vector. Companion BKG WFS Streckennetz uses the same source data.
verify_notes: Portal relocating since 2024-03-10 to Mobilithek, GovData, Opendata-OEPNV; APIs (Timetables, StaDa, FaSta) via DB API Marketplace | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 德国铁路（Deutsche Bahn）开放数据门户，基于 CKAN，由德国铁路股份公司发布，覆盖德国全境，提供完整的 DB 铁路网络矢量数据。数据通过 CKAN API 及 GeoJSON、Shapefile、WFS 等形式获取，采用 CC BY 4.0 / 开放许可。配套的 BKG WFS 路网（Streckennetz）使用同源数据。适用于铁路网络分析、交通规划与制图。
desc_en: The Deutsche Bahn Open Data portal, a CKAN-based platform published by Deutsche Bahn AG covering all of Germany and providing the full DB rail network as vector data. Data is accessible through the CKAN API and as GeoJSON, Shapefile and WFS under a CC BY 4.0 / open licence. A companion BKG WFS Streckennetz service draws on the same source data. It supports rail-network analysis, transport planning and mapping.

name: devdatalab/paper-agn-forests-roads replication polygons
theme_canonical: Transportation | Land cover & land use | Energy & infrastructure
doi_or_citation: Asher, Garg, Novosad 'The Ecological Impact of Transportation Infrastructure', Economic Journal
notes: Sibling SHRUG paper repo cited alongside lhab003 - contains rural road and forest polygon ancillaries.
verify_notes: Replication repo; authors recommend SHRUG dataset instead | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: devdatalab/paper-agn-forests-roads 复现数据（Asher, Garg, Novosad，发表于 Economic Journal），覆盖印度，提供论文《交通基础设施的生态影响》的配套农村道路与森林面要素数据。数据以 Shapefile 和 CSV 形式发布于 GitHub 与 Dataverse，许可未在仓库中明确说明。该数据为 SHRUG 项目相关的派生数据，适用于交通与森林、生态影响及发展经济学研究。
desc_en: The devdatalab/paper-agn-forests-roads replication data (Asher, Garg, Novosad, Economic Journal) covers India, providing the rural-road and forest polygon ancillaries for the paper 'The Ecological Impact of Transportation Infrastructure'. Distributed as Shapefile and CSV via GitHub and Dataverse, the licence is unspecified in the repository. Tied to the broader SHRUG project, it supports research on transport and forests, ecological impact and development economics.

name: EMODnet Digital Bathymetry DTM (with coastline/baseline vectors)
notes: Vector coastline and maritime baselines distributed alongside the DTM.
verify_notes: European Data Portal page reachable; details JS-rendered | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EMODnet 数字水深 DTM（含海岸线/基线矢量），由 EMODnet Bathymetry 提供，覆盖欧洲各海域。除水深数字地形模型外，还配套发布海岸线与海事基线矢量，以 Shapefile（海岸线/基线）、ESRI ASCII、NetCDF 及 WMS/WCS 服务提供，采用 EMODnet 开放数据许可，开放下载并支持 OGC 服务。适用于海洋测深、海岸制图与海事边界分析。
desc_en: The EMODnet Digital Bathymetry DTM (with coastline/baseline vectors), provided by EMODnet Bathymetry and covering European seas. Alongside the bathymetric digital terrain model, it distributes vector coastlines and maritime baselines as Shapefile, plus ESRI ASCII and NetCDF, with WMS/WCS services, under the EMODnet open-data licence and openly downloadable. It supports marine bathymetry, coastal mapping and maritime-boundary analysis.

name: EMODnet Seabed Habitats (EUSeaMap and member maps)
license_now: freely available (per EMODnet Terms of Use); some layers view-only
notes: Vector habitat polygons (EUNIS / MSFD broad habitat types). Other EMODnet themes (Human Activities, Geology, Bathymetry contours) likewise served via WFS.
verify_notes: Operational; product catalogue + map viewer | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EMODnet 海床栖息地数据（EUSeaMap 及成员国地图），由 EMODnet / 欧盟委员会海事与渔业总司（DG MARE）提供，覆盖欧洲各海域。数据为海床栖息地矢量面（EUNIS / MSFD 大类栖息地类型，100m 分辨率，2010–2023 共 6 个版本，当前为 EUSeaMap 2023），以 Shapefile、GeoPackage 及 WFS/WMS 服务提供，依 EMODnet 使用条款免费获取（部分图层仅供查看）。适用于海洋生境制图、海洋空间规划与生态评估。
desc_en: EMODnet Seabed Habitats (EUSeaMap and member maps), provided by EMODnet / the European Commission's DG MARE and covering European seas. It delivers seabed-habitat vector polygons (EUNIS / MSFD broad habitat types) at 100 m resolution across six iterations from 2010 to 2023 (current EUSeaMap 2023), as Shapefile, GeoPackage and WFS/WMS services, freely available under EMODnet Terms of Use (some layers view-only). It supports marine-habitat mapping, maritime spatial planning and ecological assessment.

name: EuroGeographics EuroRegionalMap (ERM)
theme_raw: harmonised pan-European topographic incl. transport networks
license: Open Data for non-commercial use (recent change)
license_now: © EuroGeographics, 按用户/覆盖范围定价（非完全开放）
formats: Shapefile/GDB; some WFS via member states
formats_now: ESRI File Geodatabase (ArcGIS 10.1), ESRI Shapefile (on demand)
feature_count: 51 European countries and territories; 36 NMCAs; 7 themes
notes: Pan-European harmonised road/rail/water/air feature classes; basis for BKG's INSPIRE TN service.
verify_notes: P4 标注'Open Data for non-commercial use'，但页面显示仍为收费授权，license_p4 可能不准确 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: EuroGeographics EuroRegionalMap（ERM），由各国国家测绘与地籍机构（NMCAs）通过 EuroGeographics 提供，覆盖 51 个欧洲国家和地区（来自 36 家 NMCA），含 7 个主题，比例尺 1:250,000（当前版本于 2021 年 4 月发布）。数据提供泛欧协调一致的公路、铁路、水路、航空等要素类，以 Shapefile/GDB 及部分 WFS 形式提供，按用户和覆盖范围定价（需注册，非完全开放）。是 BKG 的 INSPIRE 交通网络服务基础。适用于泛欧交通分析与跨境制图。
desc_en: EuroGeographics EuroRegionalMap (ERM), supplied by national mapping and cadastral agencies (NMCAs) through EuroGeographics, covers 51 European countries and territories from 36 NMCAs across seven themes at 1:250,000 scale (current version released April 2021). It offers pan-European harmonised road, rail, water and air feature classes as Shapefile/GDB and some WFS, priced by user and coverage (registration required; not fully open). It underpins BKG's INSPIRE Transport Networks service and supports pan-European transport analysis and cross-border mapping.

name: FCC Antenna Structure Registration (ASR)
formats: DB dumps -> point vector (CSV/SHP via state portals)
lychee_text: Network error: HTTP/2 protocol error. Server may not support HTTP/2 properly (error sending request for url (https://www.fcc.gov/uls/transactions/daily-weekly))
notes: All registered antenna structures >200 ft; lat/long coordinates
verify_notes: 60s timeout - FCC ULS page slow | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 美国联邦通信委员会（FCC）天线结构注册（ASR）数据，记录全美范围内所有需登记的天线塔与支撑结构（通常为高于约200英尺或位于机场附近者）。数据以经纬度坐标的点要素形式提供，来源于FCC通用许可系统（ULS）的每日/每周事务数据库转储，可经由各州门户转换为CSV或Shapefile矢量。数据属公共领域，可自由下载，常用于通信基础设施分析、航空障碍物评估与覆盖建模。
desc_en: The FCC Antenna Structure Registration (ASR) dataset records registered antenna towers and supporting structures across the United States, typically those exceeding about 200 feet or sited near airports. Released as point vector features with latitude/longitude coordinates, it originates from daily and weekly transaction dumps of the FCC's Universal Licensing System and can be converted to CSV or Shapefile via state portals. As public-domain data with open download, it is widely used for telecom infrastructure analysis, aviation obstruction assessment, and coverage modeling.

name: FHWA HPMS Public Geospatial Release
theme_raw: Highway Performance Monitoring - federal-aid highways with attributes (AADT, IRI, lanes)
notes: Rare combination of geometry + performance metrics; widely cited in transport econ papers.
verify_notes: Last modified 2022-09-13; access via FeatureServer endpoints rather than direct shp | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国联邦公路管理局（FHWA）公路绩效监测系统（HPMS）公开地理空间发布，按州提供Shapefile格式的公路网矢量。其特色在于将道路几何与绩效指标（如交通量、路况等属性）结合，这一组合在公开数据中较为少见，因此在交通经济学研究中被广泛引用。数据属美国公共领域，可直接下载，适用于全国及州级交通分析与建模。
desc_en: The FHWA Highway Performance Monitoring System (HPMS) public geospatial release provides per-state Shapefiles of the U.S. highway network. Its distinguishing feature is the combination of road geometry with performance metrics such as traffic volumes and condition attributes, a pairing rarely available openly and consequently widely cited in transport economics research. The data is in the U.S. public domain and offered as direct download, supporting national and state-level transportation analysis and modeling.

name: FreeGeoDB
notes: Free vector geo dataset with CC-BY license
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: FreeGeoDB是由delight.im维护的免费矢量地理数据集，以CSV、JSON及含WKT几何的MySQL格式提供。该数据集采用CC-BY-4.0许可，可直接下载，适合需要轻量、开放地理基础数据的应用与开发场景。由于元数据有限，具体覆盖范围与要素细节以仓库说明为准。
desc_en: FreeGeoDB is a free vector geographic dataset maintained by delight.im, distributed in CSV, JSON, and MySQL formats with WKT geometry. Released under the CC-BY-4.0 license and available as a direct download, it suits applications and development work needing lightweight, openly licensed geographic reference data. Given the limited metadata, exact coverage and feature details should be confirmed from the repository documentation.

name: Fundamental GIS: Digital Chart of China, 1:1M, v1
notes: DCW-derived vector layers: rivers, roads, hydrography
verify_notes: SEDAC server timeout | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 由CIESIN/SEDAC（中国维度数据集）发布的基础GIS：中国数字海图（1:100万，v1），是源自Digital Chart of World（DCW）的中国矢量图层，包含河流、道路与水文等要素。数据以Shapefile提供，采用CC BY 4.0许可，需通过Earthdata账号免费获取。适用于中国全国尺度的交通、水系与基础底图制图与分析。
desc_en: Published by CIESIN/SEDAC under its China Dimensions program, this Fundamental GIS: Digital Chart of China (1:1M, v1) provides DCW-derived vector layers for China, including rivers, roads, and hydrography. Delivered as Shapefiles under a CC BY 4.0 license and accessible free with an Earthdata login, it serves national-scale mapping and analysis of transportation, drainage networks, and base reference layers across China.

name: GA All Roads (Australia)
access: public download (mirrored on Open Net Zero, also via GA portal)
notes: National all-roads vector dataset derived from GA topographic and jurisdictional sources.
verify_notes: license explicitly unknown | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 由澳大利亚地球科学局（Geoscience Australia）发布的全国道路矢量数据集，源自GA的地形与各州/领地管辖数据，覆盖澳大利亚全境道路网络。数据以Shapefile、GeoJSON及FeatureServer形式提供，可通过Open Net Zero镜像或GA门户公开下载。适用于全国交通网络分析、可达性与基础设施研究；具体许可条款以发布页面说明为准。
desc_en: Published by Geoscience Australia, this national all-roads vector dataset is derived from GA topographic and jurisdictional sources and covers the road network across Australia. It is available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, and FeatureServer, downloadable openly via the Open Net Zero mirror or the GA portal. The data supports national transport network analysis, accessibility studies, and infrastructure research; specific licensing should be confirmed on the source page.

name: Geo-mapping databases of the Belt and Road Initiative (parent collection)
provider: HKU DataHub / BRINFAITH, University of Hong Kong
theme_raw: BRI macro geospatial collection (transport, geopolitics, infrastructure)
coverage: China + BRI partner countries (Eurasia, Africa, LatAm)
doi_or_citation: Man, C.Y. & Palmer, D.A. (2022), HKU DataHub collection 142874
notes: Parent collection page enumerating all sibling BRI vector datasets; useful seed for further phase-2 expansion.
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; bot protection. | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 香港大学DataHub（BRINFAITH项目）发布的“一带一路倡议地理制图数据库”母集合页面，汇集了一系列围绕中国及一带一路伙伴国家（涵盖欧亚、非洲、拉美）的矢量数据集。集合整体以Shapefile提供，采用CC BY 4.0许可，开放下载。该页面枚举所有同系列子数据集，是检索与进一步扩展相关地理资源的入口。
desc_en: This is the parent collection page of the Geo-mapping Databases of the Belt and Road Initiative, hosted on HKU DataHub by the BRINFAITH project at the University of Hong Kong. It aggregates a series of vector datasets covering China and BRI partner countries across Eurasia, Africa, and Latin America. Provided collection-wide as Shapefiles under a CC BY 4.0 license and openly downloadable, the page enumerates all sibling datasets and serves as an entry point for discovering and expanding related geographic resources.

name: GeoJSON files for MCSC Trucking Industry Decarbonization Explorer (Geo-TIDE)
notes: Vector layers for trucking decarbonization mapping
verify_notes: Geo-TIDE GeoJSON files | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MCSC货运行业脱碳探索工具（Geo-TIDE）的GeoJSON图层，托管于Zenodo，覆盖美国（2024年），约150 MB。这些矢量图层用于支持货运卡车脱碳的地理可视化与分析。数据采用CC-BY-4.0许可，开放获取，附带DOI便于引用，适合能源转型与交通基础设施相关研究。
desc_en: Hosted on Zenodo, these GeoJSON files support the MCSC Trucking Industry Decarbonization Explorer (Geo-TIDE), covering the USA for 2024 at roughly 150 MB. The vector layers underpin geographic visualization and analysis of trucking decarbonization. Released under CC-BY-4.0 with open access and a citable DOI, the dataset suits research on energy transition and transport infrastructure.

name: Geoscience Australia Foundation Rail / Transport Infrastructure MapServer
theme_raw: rail lines, sidings, tramways, stations, roads, airfields
formats: ArcGIS REST MapServer, WMS, WFS via GA portal
notes: Sister service NM_Transport_Infrastructure provides roads/airfields. Available also via Digital Atlas of Australia.
verify_notes: 2 layers: Railway_Stations, Railway_Lines | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 澳大利亚地球科学局提供的基础铁路/交通基础设施ArcGIS REST MapServer服务，覆盖澳大利亚全境，包含铁路线与车站等图层（单次请求上限2000条记录）。服务可通过ArcGIS REST、WMS、WFS访问，采用CC BY 4.0许可，亦可在澳大利亚数字地图集中获取。配套的NM_Transport_Infrastructure服务还提供道路与机场数据，适合交通网络与基础设施分析。
desc_en: This Geoscience Australia ArcGIS REST MapServer delivers foundation rail and transport infrastructure layers for Australia, including railway lines and stations (with a 2000-record limit per request). Accessible via ArcGIS REST, WMS, and WFS under a CC BY 4.0 license, it is also available through the Digital Atlas of Australia. A companion NM_Transport_Infrastructure service adds roads and airfields, supporting transport network and infrastructure analysis.

name: GeoServer Project Demo / Sample Data
theme_raw: 演示矢量层（topp:states, sf:roads 等）
license: GPL（软件）/ 数据多为公共领域
notes: WFS 学习参考端点的源仓库
verify_notes: Not WebFetched; GitHub repo assumed alive | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GeoServer是OSGeo旗下的开源地理服务器项目，其代码仓库附带演示用样本数据（如美国州界、塔斯马尼亚等示例图层），可通过WFS以Shapefile、GeoPackage形式访问。软件采用GPL许可，演示数据多为公共领域。该仓库常作为学习WFS等OGC服务的参考端点来源，适合开发测试与教学。
desc_en: GeoServer is the OSGeo open-source geospatial server project, whose repository ships with demo sample data such as U.S. state boundaries and Tasmania layers, served via WFS as Shapefile and GeoPackage. The software is GPL-licensed while the demo data is largely public domain. The repository is commonly used as a reference source of WFS and other OGC service endpoints for development, testing, and teaching.

name: Geospatial dataset from Kitchener's Map of Cyprus (1878-1883) - Road network
provider: Harokopio University of Athens / Mendeley Data
notes: 19,695 polyline features (~15,256 km) digitized from Kitchener's 1885 1:63,360 map.
verify_notes: Kitchener's Map of Cyprus geospatial dataset, 6 layers, June 2024 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 源自Kitchener 1878-1883年塞浦路斯地图的道路网络地理空间数据集，由雅典哈罗科皮奥大学制作，发布于Mendeley Data。数据覆盖塞浦路斯全岛（约9,247平方公里），从1:63,360历史地图数字化而来，含19,695条折线要素（约15,256公里）。以ESRI Shapefile（折线，EPSG:32636）提供，采用CC BY 4.0许可，可直接下载，适合历史交通网络与景观变迁研究。
desc_en: This geospatial dataset reconstructs the road network from Kitchener's Map of Cyprus (1878-1883), produced by Harokopio University of Athens and published on Mendeley Data. Covering the entire island of about 9,247 km², it was digitized from the 1:63,360 historical map and comprises 19,695 polyline features totaling roughly 15,256 km. Provided as an ESRI Shapefile (polyline, EPSG:32636) under CC BY 4.0 with direct download, it supports research on historical transport networks and landscape change.

name: Ghana Roads (AICD)
theme_raw: Road network, surface type and condition
notes: Cold-but-cited country road shapefile from AICD program; useful for SSA transport modeling.
verify_notes: Ghana Roads AICD | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由世界银行与Africon在非洲基础设施国别诊断（AICD）项目下制作的加纳道路Shapefile，覆盖加纳全国。数据采用CC BY 4.0许可，公开获取。虽属较旧但被广泛引用的国别道路数据，常用于撒哈拉以南非洲的交通建模与可达性分析。
desc_en: Produced by the World Bank and Africon under the Africa Infrastructure Country Diagnostic (AICD) program, this Ghana Roads Shapefile covers the country's road network. Released under CC BY 4.0 with public access, it is an older but well-cited country road dataset frequently used for Sub-Saharan Africa transport modeling and accessibility analysis.

name: Ghost Roads Asia-Pacific tropical roads dataset (Engert et al. 2024, Nature)
what_changes: Hand-digitised >1.37 million km of unmapped 'ghost' roads in tropical Asia-Pacific that are absent from GRIP and OSM; uses GRIP+OSM as the baseline to identify missing roads (3.0-6.6x more roads than GRIP).
notes: Cold derivative; operationally defines its target relative to GRIP.
verify_notes: Nature article requires auth/login redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Engert等（2024，Nature）发布的亚太热带地区“幽灵道路”（未被官方记录的非正式道路）数据集，作为论文的补充材料提供，采用CC-BY 4.0许可。该数据集相对GRIP等既有道路数据界定其制图目标，揭示了热带森林区大量未登记道路。具体格式、覆盖范围与获取方式以论文及其补充材料为准，适合森林砍伐与生态影响研究。
desc_en: Published as supplementary material to Engert et al. (2024, Nature), this Ghost Roads dataset maps informal, undocumented roads across the Asia-Pacific tropics under a CC-BY 4.0 license. It operationally defines its target relative to existing road data such as GRIP, revealing extensive unrecorded roads in tropical forest regions. Exact formats, coverage, and access should be drawn from the paper and its supplement; it is well suited to deforestation and ecological-impact research.

name: Global Intra-city Commuting OD Flow Dataset
notes: 全球城内通勤OD流矢量化数据集
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 发表于Nature Scientific Data的全球城内通勤OD流矢量化数据集，描述城市内部的出行起讫（origin-destination）流量。数据以CSV/GeoJSON提供，采用CC BY许可，可直接下载，适用于城市交通、通勤模式与可达性分析。具体覆盖城市与时间范围以原文为准。
desc_en: Published in Nature Scientific Data, this Global Intra-city Commuting OD Flow Dataset captures origin-destination travel flows within cities. Provided as CSV/GeoJSON under a CC BY license with direct download, it supports analysis of urban mobility, commuting patterns, and accessibility. The specific cities and time range covered should be confirmed from the original article.

name: Global Roadless Areas map (Ibisch et al. 2016, Science)
what_changes: Applies a 1-km buffer to roads to derive global roadless patches (~600,000 polygons); originally OSM-based but later harmonized analyses substitute/compare with GRIP roads.
notes: Companion 'Mapping roadless areas in regions with contrasting human footprint' (Sci Rep 2024, 10.1038/s41598-024-55283-3) explicitly compares OSM- and GRIP-derived roadless layers.
verify_notes: Science.org 403 Forbidden; publisher paywall/anti-bot. Supp data CC-BY likely intact. | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Ibisch等（2016，Science）发布的全球无路区（roadless areas）地图，作为论文补充数据提供，包含约600,000个多边形，采用CC-BY许可。该数据通过缓冲全球道路网络识别相对完整、未被道路切割的区域，是生态连通性与保护规划的重要参考。配套的Sci Rep 2024研究进一步比较了基于OSM与GRIP的无路区图层。
desc_en: Published as supplementary data to Ibisch et al. (2016, Science) under a CC-BY license, this Global Roadless Areas map contains about 600,000 polygons. It identifies relatively intact areas not fragmented by roads, derived by buffering the global road network, and serves as a key reference for ecological connectivity and conservation planning. A companion 2024 Scientific Reports study further compares OSM- and GRIP-derived roadless layers.

name: Global UNHAS Routes
notes: Status='Open' UNHAS passenger/cargo flight routes.
verify_notes: WFP GeoNode timed out (60s) | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 由世界粮食计划署人道空运服务（WFP UNHAS）发布的全球UNHAS航线数据集，覆盖当前活跃运营的客运与货运飞行航线（状态为“开放”）。数据以Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML及WFS提供，采用WFP开放条款，可下载或经WFS访问。适用于人道援助物流、应急响应与航空连通性分析。
desc_en: Published by the WFP United Nations Humanitarian Air Service (UNHAS), this Global UNHAS Routes dataset covers active passenger and cargo flight routes flagged as 'Open'. Available as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, and WFS under WFP open terms, it can be downloaded or accessed via WFS. The data supports humanitarian logistics, emergency response, and analysis of aviation connectivity in operational areas.

name: Global urban road network self-adaptive simplification
verify_notes: Nature Sci Data; idp redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 发表于Nature Scientific Data的全球城市道路网络自适应简化数据集，提供经简化处理的城市道路图（vector road graph），覆盖全球城市。数据采用CC-BY-4.0许可，开放获取。自适应简化在保留网络拓扑特征的同时降低复杂度，适合大尺度城市形态、可达性与网络分析。
desc_en: Published in Nature Scientific Data, this Global Urban Road Network Self-Adaptive Simplification dataset provides simplified road graphs for cities worldwide. Released as vector data under a CC-BY-4.0 license with open access, the adaptive simplification reduces network complexity while preserving key topological characteristics. It is well suited to large-scale urban morphology, accessibility, and network analysis.

name: Global Urban Street Networks Metadata
theme_raw: Per-UA metadata for the network corpus
notes: Fifth sibling DOI completing the corpus; not vector itself.
verify_notes: Harvard Dataverse landing page | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 由Geoff Boeing在Harvard Dataverse发布的全球城市街道网络元数据，覆盖8,914个城区。该数据为街道网络语料库的元数据配套（CSV/JSON，本身非矢量），记录各城市网络的统计与描述信息。采用CC0 1.0公共领域奉献，开放获取，是该街道网络系列的第五个DOI，用于补充与索引整个语料库。
desc_en: Published by Geoff Boeing on Harvard Dataverse, this Global Urban Street Networks Metadata covers 8,914 urban areas. As the metadata companion (CSV/JSON, not vector itself) to the street network corpus, it records statistical and descriptive information for each city's network. Released under CC0 1.0 with open access, it is the fifth sibling DOI completing the corpus and supports indexing and reference across the collection.

name: GlobalUrbanNet — 8,914 Cities Street Network Models
theme_raw: 道路 - 全球城市可驾驶街道网
notes: Boeing (2020) 论文的衍生; 注意 OSM 衍生数据须保留 ODbL share-alike
verify_notes: Boeing 2020/2021 street network paper; published in Geographical Analysis | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GlobalUrbanNet是覆盖178个国家、8,914座城市的街道网络模型数据集，源自Boeing（2020）的研究，基于OSMnx从OpenStreetMap构建，含超过1.6亿节点与3.2亿条边。数据以GraphML/GeoPackage格式提供，可直接下载。因衍生自OSM，使用须遵守ODbL的署名与相同方式共享条款，适合城市形态与网络科学研究。
desc_en: GlobalUrbanNet provides street network models for 8,914 cities across 178 countries, derived from Boeing (2020) and built from OpenStreetMap via OSMnx, comprising over 160 million nodes and 320 million edges. Distributed as GraphML/GeoPackage with direct download, it is OSM-derived and therefore subject to ODbL attribution and share-alike requirements. The dataset is well suited to urban morphology and network science research.

name: GMS Economic Corridors - Roads with Attributes
notes: Road alignments along GMS Economic Corridors with attributes: road class, number of lanes, condition, surface.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: 由亚洲开发银行大湄公河次区域（ADB GMS）项目发布的经济走廊道路数据集，覆盖GMS经济走廊沿线道路。数据以Shapefile（折线）与KMZ提供，含道路等级、车道数、路况、路面类型等属性，采用ADB GMS开放使用条款，开放下载。适用于次区域交通规划、走廊连通性与基础设施分析。
desc_en: Published under the Asian Development Bank's Greater Mekong Subregion (GMS) program, this dataset maps road alignments along the GMS Economic Corridors with attributes including road class, number of lanes, condition, and surface type. Provided as Shapefile (polyline) and KMZ under ADB GMS open-use terms with open download, it supports subregional transport planning, corridor connectivity, and infrastructure analysis.

name: GRIP4 on Zenodo (versioned archive)
verify_notes: DOI redirects to Zenodo record | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GRIP4（Global Roads Inventory Project v4）在Zenodo上的版本化存档，由荷兰环境评估署（PBL）制作，提供全球及7个区域的道路网络数据。GRIP4整合多源数据，是被广泛使用的全球道路矢量底图。数据以Shapefile与File Geodatabase提供，采用ODbL许可，开放下载并带版本化DOI，适用于全球及区域交通、可达性与环境影响研究。
desc_en: This is the versioned Zenodo archive of GRIP4 (Global Roads Inventory Project v4), produced by the Netherlands Environmental Assessment Agency (PBL), covering global and seven regional road networks. GRIP4 integrates multiple sources into a widely used global road vector baseline. Provided as Shapefile and File Geodatabase under an ODbL license with open download and a versioned DOI, it serves global and regional transport, accessibility, and environmental-impact research.

desc_en: This is the GRIP4 (Global Roads Inventory Project v4) Region 1 — North America road network vector data, produced by the Netherlands Environmental Assessment Agency (PBL). As a regional tile of the global GRIP4 baseline, it is provided as a Shapefile under an ODbL license with direct download, supporting transport, accessibility, and environmental-impact analysis across North America.

desc_en: This is the GRIP4 Region 2 — Central & South America road network vector data, produced by the Netherlands Environmental Assessment Agency (PBL). name: GRIP4 Global Roads Inventory Project supplementary spatial data
provider: PBL Netherlands Environmental Assessment Agency / GLOBIO
notes: Official Zenodo record for the global GRIP4 roads release, including global and seven regional vector packages plus 5-arcminute road-density rasters. Zenodo API metadata checked 2026-07-10.
splink_merged_from: GRIP4 Region 6 - South & East Asia (vector) @ https://zenodo.org/record/6420961
verify_notes: GRIP4 Global Roads Inventory, ~10.1 TB | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GRIP4补充空间数据的Zenodo镜像，由荷兰环境评估署（PBL）制作，是全球道路清查项目（GRIP4）矢量发布的版本化存档。数据以Shapefile与File Geodatabase提供，开放获取并带版本化DOI。元数据中标注的体量条目应以官方发布为准。适用于全球道路网络、交通与环境影响研究。
desc_en: This Zenodo mirror provides the GRIP4 supplementary spatial data, produced by the Netherlands Environmental Assessment Agency (PBL), as a versioned archive of the Global Roads Inventory Project (GRIP4) vector release. Available as Shapefile and File Geodatabase with open access and a versioned DOI, it supports global road network, transport, and environmental-impact research. Any size figure in the metadata should be confirmed against the official release.

name: GTFS Guadalajara Light Train (Tren Ligero / SITEUR)
verify_notes: lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 墨西哥瓜达拉哈拉轻轨（Tren Ligero / SITEUR）的GTFS数据，覆盖瓜达拉哈拉都会区，由SITEUR提供。数据以GTFS标准发布（含线路与站点矢量），可直接下载，适用于公共交通分析、行程规划与可达性研究。许可条款未明确说明。
desc_en: This dataset provides GTFS data for the Guadalajara Light Train (Tren Ligero / SITEUR), covering the metropolitan area of Guadalajara, Mexico, supplied by SITEUR. Published in the GTFS standard with route lines and stop vectors and available as direct download, it supports public-transit analysis, trip planning, and accessibility research. The license is not specified.

name: GTFS.de feeds (Germany public transit)
license_now: Free baseline + premium tiers (not explicitly stated)
notes: Referenced by ORS docs as GTFS source for public-transport profile
verify_notes: Converted daily from NeTEx | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: GTFS.de提供德国公共交通的GTFS数据源，覆盖德国全境，由gtfs.de运营。数据以GTFS（含站点与shapes矢量的压缩CSV）格式发布，提供免费基础层与付费高级层。该数据源被OpenRouteService文档引用为公共交通出行配置的GTFS来源，适用于公交路线规划与可达性分析。
desc_en: GTFS.de provides GTFS feeds for German public transit covering all of Germany, operated by gtfs.de. The data follows the GTFS standard (zipped CSV with stops and shapes vectors) and is offered as a free baseline tier alongside premium tiers. Referenced in the OpenRouteService documentation as a GTFS source for its public-transport profile, it supports transit routing and accessibility analysis.

name: HOTOSM China Roads (OpenStreetMap Export)
notes: ~800 MB GeoJSON

desc_en: Published by the Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team (HOT), this China Roads dataset is an OpenStreetMap export of the country's road network. Provided as Shapefile and GeoJSON (about 800 MB) under an ODbL license with direct download, it is sourced from crowdsourced OSM data and regularly refreshed. It supports humanitarian response, accessibility, and transport network analysis, subject to ODbL attribution and share-alike terms.

name: HOTOSM Philippines Roads (OpenStreetMap Export)
verify_notes: HDX 403 to WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 由人道OpenStreetMap团队（HOT）发布的菲律宾道路数据集，是OpenStreetMap的菲律宾道路导出。数据以Shapefile与GeoJSON提供，采用ODbL许可，可直接下载。源自OSM众包数据，定期更新，适用于人道响应、灾害管理与交通网络分析；使用须遵守ODbL署名与相同方式共享条款。
desc_en: Published by the Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team (HOT), this Philippines Roads dataset is an OpenStreetMap export of the country's road network. Provided as Shapefile and GeoJSON under an ODbL license with direct download, it is sourced from crowdsourced OSM data and regularly refreshed. It supports humanitarian response, disaster management, and transport network analysis, subject to ODbL attribution and share-alike terms.

name: HOTOSM Ukraine Roads (OpenStreetMap Export)
notes: 218 MB GeoJSON; regularly refreshed OSM export
