desc_zh: 由人道OpenStreetMap团队（HOT）发布的乌克兰道路数据集，是OpenStreetMap的乌克兰道路导出（约218 MB）。数据以Shapefile、GeoJSON、KML与GeoPackage提供，采用ODbL许可，可直接下载并定期刷新。适用于人道响应、冲突与灾害背景下的可达性及交通网络分析；使用须遵守ODbL署名与相同方式共享条款。
desc_en: Published by the Humanitarian OpenStreetMap Team (HOT), this Ukraine Roads dataset is an OpenStreetMap export of the country's road network at about 218 MB. Provided as Shapefile, GeoJSON, KML, and GeoPackage under an ODbL license with direct download and regular refreshes, it supports humanitarian response and accessibility and transport analysis in conflict and disaster contexts, subject to ODbL attribution and share-alike terms.

name: INSPIRE Download Service (WFS) for Transport Networks - Germany (BKG)
theme_raw: transportation - road, rail, water, air, cable
notes: INSPIRE-conformant TN theme. Sister WFS 'WFS Streckennetz Deutsche Bahn' (wfs_bahn) for detailed DB rail network.
verify_notes: DLM 1:250,000 | lychee:Rejected status code: 400 Bad Request
desc_zh: 由德国联邦测绘与大地测量局（BKG）提供的INSPIRE交通网络（TN）下载服务（WFS），覆盖德国全境，约1:25万尺度。服务以WFS 2.0（GML 3.2.1 INSPIRE模式）形式发布，符合INSPIRE交通网络主题规范，免费提供。配套的“WFS Streckennetz Deutsche Bahn”服务提供更详细的德铁铁路网络，适合跨境互操作的交通网络分析。
desc_en: Provided by Germany's Federal Agency for Cartography and Geodesy (BKG), this INSPIRE Download Service (WFS) delivers Transport Networks for Germany at roughly 1:250,000 scale. Offered free as WFS 2.0 (GML 3.2.1 INSPIRE schema) and conformant to the INSPIRE Transport Networks theme, it is complemented by a sister service for the detailed Deutsche Bahn rail network. It supports interoperable, INSPIRE-compliant transport network analysis.

name: INSPIRE Transport Networks WFS - Finland (FTIA)
notes: Full INSPIRE TN application schema covering all 4 modes. Service includes companion WMS view service.
verify_notes: INSPIRE Download Service for Road Transport Networks - Väylävirasto | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 由芬兰交通基础设施局（Väylävirasto / FTIA）提供的INSPIRE交通网络WFS服务，覆盖芬兰全境，遵循完整的INSPIRE交通网络应用模式，涵盖四种交通方式（道路、铁路、水路、航空）。服务以WFS 2.0与GML形式发布，采用CC BY 4.0许可，并附带配套的WMS视图服务，适合跨境互操作的交通网络制图与分析。
desc_en: Provided by the Finnish Transport Infrastructure Agency (Väylävirasto / FTIA), this INSPIRE Transport Networks WFS service covers all of Finland and implements the full INSPIRE Transport Networks application schema across all four transport modes (road, rail, water, air). Delivered as WFS 2.0 and GML under a CC BY 4.0 license with a companion WMS view service, it supports interoperable, INSPIRE-compliant transport network mapping and analysis.

name: Living England Habitat Map (Phase 4)
formats_now: GDB, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, LYR, WMS, WFS, OGC API Features
notes: Random-forest classified habitat segments; native vector via ArcGIS Hub
verify_notes: Update frequency: notPlanned | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Living England 栖息地图（第四阶段）由英格兰自然署（Natural England）发布，覆盖整个英格兰，是一套基于随机森林分类生成的栖息地分割矢量数据。数据以约 10 米分辨率、面向 2021 年的影像分类得出，划分出各类陆地覆盖与栖息地类型。数据以 OGL v3.0 开放政府许可发布，提供 SHP、GeoJSON 及 WFS 等格式，可通过 ArcGIS Hub 的 FeatureServer 与 WFS 直接访问，适用于生态评估、土地覆盖分析与自然资源管理。
desc_en: The Living England Habitat Map (Phase 4), published by Natural England, provides a wall-to-wall vector habitat classification for England. The dataset is produced through random-forest classification of satellite imagery at roughly 10 m resolution for the 2021 reference period, segmenting the landscape into habitat and land-cover classes. Released under the Open Government Licence v3.0, it is available as Shapefile, GeoJSON and WFS through an ArcGIS Hub FeatureServer. It supports ecological assessment, land-cover analysis and natural-resource management across England.

name: London Datastore
notes: Note: many spatial datasets are SHP/TAB only — fewer native GeoJSON downloads than US peers.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; likely bot block but site is normally public. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: London Datastore 是大伦敦政府（GLA）运营的开放数据门户，覆盖伦敦市区 33 个自治市，汇集了交通、人口、规划、环境等多领域数据集。平台免费开放、无需认证，采用英国开放政府许可（v2/v3）发布。空间数据多以 Shapefile、MapInfo TAB 格式提供，部分含 GeoJSON 与 CSV；相较美国同类门户，原生 GeoJSON 下载较少。适用于城市研究、政策分析与地图制作。
desc_en: The London Datastore is the open-data portal of the Greater London Authority, covering the 33 boroughs of Greater London with datasets spanning transport, population, planning and environment. It is free to use with no authentication and is published under the UK Open Government Licence (v2/v3). Spatial layers are mostly delivered as Shapefile and MapInfo TAB, with some GeoJSON and CSV subsets, and offer fewer native GeoJSON downloads than comparable US portals. It is well suited to urban research, policy analysis and cartography.

name: Major Roads
notes: Major roads subset of national roads
verify_notes: Major Roads dataset page reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Major Roads 是 Geoscape Australia 通过 Digital Atlas of Australia 发布的全国主要道路矢量数据集，是国家道路网络中主干道路的子集。数据覆盖整个澳大利亚，以 CC BY 4.0 许可开放，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 FeatureServer 等格式，便于直接下载或在线调用。适用于交通规划、区域可达性分析、地图底图制作及与其他基础设施数据的叠加。
desc_en: Major Roads, published by Geoscape Australia via the Digital Atlas of Australia, is a national vector layer representing the major-road subset of Australia's road network. It covers the whole of Australia and is openly licensed under CC BY 4.0, distributed as Shapefile, GeoJSON and a FeatureServer for direct download or live API access. The dataset suits transport planning, regional accessibility analysis, basemap production and overlay with other infrastructure data.

name: Malawi Road Network
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Malawi Road Network 是世界银行发布的马拉维道路网络矢量数据集，覆盖马拉维全境的道路线要素。数据以 CC BY 4.0 许可公开提供，格式为 Shapefile，可公开下载。该数据可用于交通可达性研究、基础设施规划、灾害响应与发展项目评估，是低收入国家道路网络分析的基础参考数据之一。
desc_en: The Malawi Road Network is a World Bank vector dataset of road line features covering Malawi. It is openly available under a CC BY 4.0 licence in Shapefile format for public download. The data supports transport-accessibility studies, infrastructure planning, disaster response and development-project assessment, and serves as a baseline reference for road-network analysis in a low-income country setting.

name: MapBiomas Infraestrutura - Brazil transport infrastructure compilation
theme_canonical: Transportation | Land cover & land use | Energy & infrastructure
theme_raw: Roads, railways, ports, airports, energy & mining infrastructure
license_now: All rights reserved (see Terms of use)
notes: Stitches together IBGE, ANTT, EPE, ONS, MME, ANAC primary sources into one open vector bundle - cited in deforestation/transport studies.
verify_notes: Updated through Aug 2025 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: MapBiomas Infraestrutura 是巴西 MapBiomas 学术联盟整理的全国交通与基础设施矢量数据汇编，覆盖巴西全境。它将 IBGE、ANTT、EPE、ONS、MME、ANAC 等多个官方来源拼接为统一的开放矢量数据集，更新至 2025 年 8 月，提供 Shapefile 与 GeoTIFF 格式，可直接下载。该数据常被引用于巴西的毁林与交通研究。使用前需查阅其使用条款，许可声明为保留权利。
desc_en: MapBiomas Infraestrutura is a national compilation of transport and infrastructure vector data assembled by the Brazilian MapBiomas academic consortium, covering all of Brazil. It stitches together primary sources from IBGE, ANTT, EPE, ONS, MME and ANAC into a single bundle, updated through August 2025 and distributed as Shapefile and GeoTIFF for direct download. Widely cited in Brazilian deforestation and transport studies, it is released under stated terms of use that reserve rights, so users should review its conditions.

name: MarineCadastre MarineTransportation FeatureServer
theme_raw: shipping lanes, traffic separation, ports, navigable waterways
formats: ArcGIS FeatureServer, GeoJSON, Shapefile via Hub
notes: Direct REST FeatureServer with Shipping Lanes and Regulations (ID 0) extracted from NOAA ENC. Companion Hub hub.marinecadastre.gov also exposes AIS-derived vessel traffic density layers.
verify_notes: 2 layers; weekly updates | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: MarineCadastre MarineTransportation FeatureServer 由 NOAA、BOEM 与美国海岸警卫队联合提供，覆盖美国专属经济区（EEZ）。该服务直接以 ArcGIS REST FeatureServer 形式发布航运航道与相关管制要素，数据提取自 NOAA 电子海图（ENC），每周更新。数据属美国公共领域，可经 GeoJSON、Shapefile 等格式获取。配套的 MarineCadastre Hub 还提供 AIS 衍生的船舶交通密度图层，适用于海洋空间规划与航运分析。
desc_en: The MarineCadastre MarineTransportation FeatureServer, provided jointly by NOAA, BOEM and the US Coast Guard, covers the US Exclusive Economic Zone. It exposes shipping lanes and regulatory features directly as an ArcGIS REST FeatureServer, extracted from NOAA electronic navigational charts (ENC) and updated weekly. As US public-domain data it is accessible via GeoJSON and Shapefile, and a companion MarineCadastre Hub adds AIS-derived vessel-traffic-density layers. It supports marine spatial planning and maritime-traffic analysis.

name: Maritime Route & Vessel Tracklet Dataset (Brest)
theme_raw: 航运 - 航路矢量原型
coverage: 法国布雷斯特海域 (17 条航线)
formats_now: ZIP (含 AIS clusters + route prototypes + labeled tracklets)
file_size: 366.9 kB main file; 182.7 MB total across versions
feature_count: 17 maritime routes; tracklets of 5 consecutive AIS contacts
notes: 稀有的 vessel-to-route association 标注数据, 用于轨迹与既有航线匹配
verify_notes: 原 p4 标 CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0,Zenodo 实际页显示 CC-BY-4.0;末次修订 2023-01-10 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Maritime Route & Vessel Tracklet Dataset（Brest）是一套面向法国布雷斯特海域的矢量数据集，包含 17 条航线原型及由 5 个连续 AIS 触点构成的轨迹片段（tracklet）聚类。数据以 CC-BY-4.0 许可在 Zenodo 发布，主文件约 366.9 kB，各版本总量约 182.7 MB，可直接下载。它是较为稀有的船舶轨迹与既有航线关联标注数据，适用于轨迹挖掘、航线匹配与海事行为分析研究。
desc_en: The Maritime Route & Vessel Tracklet Dataset (Brest) is a vector dataset for the waters around Brest, France, containing 17 maritime route prototypes and clusters of tracklets built from five consecutive AIS contacts. Released on Zenodo under CC-BY-4.0, the main file is about 366.9 kB with roughly 182.7 MB across all versions, available for direct download. It is a rare resource providing vessel-to-route association annotations, useful for trajectory mining, route matching and maritime-behaviour analysis.

name: Mekong Infrastructure Tracker
provider: Stimson Center / Blue Raster (USAID Mekong Safeguards)
theme_raw: 公路+铁路+航道 - 跨境基础设施
license: 未明 (公开 Hub, 推断 CC-BY)
formats: ArcGIS Hub 矢量图层 (项目点/线)
notes: 冷门跨境组织数据, 含运输+能源项目; 可经 ArcGIS Hub 下载
verify_notes: Esri blocks bot fetch; URL otherwise reachable in browser | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: Mekong Infrastructure Tracker 由史汀生中心与 Blue Raster 在 USAID Mekong Safeguards 项目下开发，覆盖湄公河流域 6 国，记录该区域的交通与能源基础设施项目，以点和线矢量要素表示。数据通过 ArcGIS Hub 发布并可下载，是较冷门的跨境区域数据，适用于区域可持续性、基础设施投资与跨境治理研究。具体许可未明确，公开 Hub 推断为 CC-BY 类。
desc_en: The Mekong Infrastructure Tracker, developed by the Stimson Center and Blue Raster under USAID Mekong Safeguards, covers the six countries of the Mekong region and catalogues transport and energy infrastructure projects as point and line vector features. Distributed and downloadable through ArcGIS Hub, it is a relatively obscure cross-border regional dataset useful for studies of regional sustainability, infrastructure investment and transboundary governance. The licence is not explicitly stated but is inferred to be CC-BY-style given the open Hub.

name: Motor Vehicle Collisions - Crashes
notes: 含经纬度的NYC交通事故点数据,可作矢量点集
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Motor Vehicle Collisions - Crashes 来自 NYC Open Data（经 data.gov 汇编），记录纽约市的机动车交通事故，每条记录含经纬度坐标，可作为矢量点集使用。数据以美国公共领域发布，提供 CSV/GeoJSON 格式直接下载。适用于交通安全分析、事故热点识别、城市规划与公共健康研究。
desc_en: Motor Vehicle Collisions - Crashes, from NYC Open Data via data.gov, records motor-vehicle crashes across New York City, with each record carrying latitude/longitude coordinates that can be used as a vector point set. Released in the US public domain, it is available as CSV/GeoJSON for direct download. The dataset supports traffic-safety analysis, crash-hotspot identification, urban planning and public-health research.

name: MSDCW - Multi-level Street-block Divisions of 985 Cities Worldwide
provider: Authors of Sci Data 2025 paper (figshare deposit)
coverage: 985 cities with population > 500k across 142 countries/regions, global
notes: Primary dataset of the lead paper; 5-level hierarchical street-blocks derived from OSM road network.
verify_notes: Figshare blocks WebFetch (403), but URL pattern is standard live figshare dataset | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: MSDCW（全球 985 城市多层级街区划分）是一篇 2025 年《Scientific Data》论文的主数据集，覆盖 142 个国家/地区中人口超过 50 万的 985 座城市。数据基于 OpenStreetMap 道路网络衍生，划分出 5 个空间层级的街区单元，以 Shapefile（按国家分包 ZIP）提供，CC-BY 4.0 许可，可在 figshare 公开下载。适用于城市形态分析，并可作为低收入国家缺乏人口普查单元时的统计分析单元。
desc_en: MSDCW (Multi-level Street-block Divisions of 985 Cities Worldwide) is the primary dataset of a 2025 Scientific Data paper, covering 985 cities with populations over 500,000 across 142 countries and regions. Derived from the OpenStreetMap road network, it provides hierarchical street-block units at five spatial levels, distributed as per-country Shapefile ZIPs under CC-BY 4.0 and openly downloadable from figshare. It supports urban-morphology analysis and can serve as a statistical unit where census tracts are unavailable, especially in lower-income countries.

name: Multi-level Street-block Divisions of 985 Cities Worldwide (MSDCW)
theme_canonical: Transportation | Land cover & land use | Population & socioeconomic
notes: Useful as statistical analysis unit when census tracts unavailable in LMICs.
verify_notes: Nature SSO redirect | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 MSDCW（全球 985 城市多层级街区划分）数据集的《Scientific Data》论文页，由清华大学 Liu、Long 等人发表。论文描述了覆盖 142 个国家、985 座人口超 50 万城市的 5 级街区划分方法与数据，基于 OSM 道路网络生成，以 CC-BY 4.0 许可发布，配套数据托管于 Zenodo/Figshare，提供 Shapefile/GeoJSON。适用于城市形态、交通与社会经济分析，尤其可作为缺乏普查单元地区的统计单元。
desc_en: This is the Scientific Data paper for the MSDCW dataset (Multi-level Street-block Divisions of 985 Cities Worldwide), authored by Liu, Long and colleagues at Tsinghua University. The paper documents a five-level street-block partition derived from the OSM road network across 985 cities with populations over 500,000 in 142 countries. Released under CC-BY 4.0 with supplementary data on Zenodo/Figshare in Shapefile/GeoJSON, it supports urban-morphology, transport and socioeconomic analysis, and provides useful statistical units where census tracts are unavailable.

name: National Electricity Infrastructure - Transmission Lines
notes: Adjacent Foundation infrastructure layer hosted at same services.ga.gov.au root; relevant when treating linear infrastructure broadly.
verify_notes: Electricity Transmission Lines layer | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: National Electricity Infrastructure - Transmission Lines 由澳大利亚地球科学局（Geoscience Australia）发布，覆盖澳大利亚全境的输电线路要素。数据以 MapServer REST 服务提供，支持 GeoJSON、JSON、WMS 与 WFS 访问，采用 CC BY 4.0 许可公开。它属于基础地理信息中的能源基础设施图层，可与同一服务根下的其他基础设施数据协同使用，适用于电网规划、能源研究与线性基础设施分析。
desc_en: National Electricity Infrastructure - Transmission Lines, published by Geoscience Australia, covers transmission-line features across Australia. The data is served via a MapServer REST endpoint supporting GeoJSON, JSON, WMS and WFS access, openly licensed under CC BY 4.0. As an energy-infrastructure layer within Australia's foundation spatial data, it can be combined with other infrastructure layers hosted under the same services.ga.gov.au root, supporting grid planning, energy research and linear-infrastructure analysis.

name: National Roads
notes: National road network line features
verify_notes: National Roads dataset page reachable | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: National Roads 由 Geoscape Australia 通过 Digital Atlas of Australia 发布，是覆盖澳大利亚全境的国家道路网络线要素数据集。数据以 CC BY 4.0 许可开放，提供 Shapefile、GeoJSON 及 FeatureServer 等格式，便于直接下载或在线调用。相比 Major Roads，本数据集为更完整的全国路网，适用于交通规划、路网分析、可达性研究及地图底图制作。
desc_en: National Roads, published by Geoscape Australia via the Digital Atlas of Australia, is a vector dataset of road-network line features covering all of Australia. It is openly licensed under CC BY 4.0 and available as Shapefile, GeoJSON and a FeatureServer for direct download or live API use. As a fuller national network than the Major Roads subset, it supports transport planning, network analysis, accessibility studies and basemap production.

name: Natural England — Priority Habitats Inventory & Living England Habitat Map
license_now: Open Government Licence v3.0 (assumed, Defra Hub default)
formats: SHP, GeoJSON, WFS, WMS, OGC API

desc_zh: 该数据集来自 Defra/自然英格兰署的开放数据门户，汇集了英格兰优先栖息地清单（Priority Habitats Inventory）与 Living England 栖息地图（第四阶段）。数据覆盖英格兰全境，提供 SHP、GeoJSON、WFS、WMS 及 OGC API Features 等多种访问方式，二者均以 ArcGIS Hub FeatureServer 形式发布。许可推断为开放政府许可 v3.0。适用于生态保护、栖息地制图与土地管理研究。
desc_en: This dataset from the Defra / Natural England open-data hub brings together the Priority Habitats Inventory and the Living England Habitat Map (Phase 4) for England. Covering the whole of England, it is delivered through ArcGIS Hub FeatureServers offering SHP, GeoJSON, WFS, WMS and OGC API Features access. The licence is assumed to be the Open Government Licence v3.0, the Defra Hub default. The data supports nature conservation, habitat mapping and land-management research.

notes: Vector-based digital nautical chart database - companion to MSI products though not directly under /Publications.
verify_notes: WAF 拦截；DNC 已于 FY25 退役，逐步被 S-57 ENC 取代，需要确认归档位置 | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://dnc.nga.mil/dncp/DNCdb.php))
desc_zh: NGA Digital Nautical Chart（DNC，数字航海图）由美国国家地理空间情报局（NGA）发布，是一套全球范围的矢量航海图数据库，采用矢量产品格式（VPF），亦有 Shapefile 衍生形式。数据属美国公共领域，需开放注册后获取。它是 NGA 海事安全信息产品的配套数据，目前正逐步向 ENC 电子海图过渡（已标注 FY25 退役）。适用于海事导航、海洋制图与航运研究。
desc_en: The NGA Digital Nautical Chart (DNC), published by the US National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency, is a global vector nautical-chart database in Vector Product Format (VPF), with Shapefile derivatives also available. As US public-domain data it is obtained via open registration. A companion to NGA's Maritime Safety Information products, it is being phased out in favour of ENC electronic charts (FY25 retirement noted). It supports maritime navigation, nautical cartography and shipping research.

name: NGA Maritime Safety Information Publications Index
formats: Mixed (PDF, shapefile, CSV, GeoJSON, KML for specific products)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://msi.nga.mil/Publications))
notes: Root catalog page (the lead itself) listing WPI, RNA, NTM, Sailing Directions etc. - traverse to each product for vector downloads.
verify_notes: WebFetch 返回 403 Forbidden；站点对自动化抓取有 WAF 拦截，但 NGA MSI 域名仍在运行 | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://msi.nga.mil/Publications))
desc_zh: NGA Maritime Safety Information Publications Index 是美国 NGA 海事安全信息（MSI）的根目录页，列出 WPI（世界港口索引）、RNA（无线电助航）、NTM（航海通告）、Sailing Directions（航路指南）等全球海事出版物。数据属美国公共领域，按产品提供 PDF、Shapefile、CSV、GeoJSON、KML 等混合格式，需进入各具体产品页获取矢量下载。适用于海事导航、港口与航运信息检索。
desc_en: The NGA Maritime Safety Information Publications Index is the root catalogue page for the US NGA's MSI products, listing global publications such as the World Port Index (WPI), Radio Navigational Aids (RNA), Notice to Mariners (NTM) and Sailing Directions. As US public-domain material it offers a mix of PDF, Shapefile, CSV, GeoJSON and KML by product, with vector downloads reached by navigating into each individual product. It supports maritime navigation and port and shipping information retrieval.

name: Nigeria Roads (AICD)
notes: Part of AICD country-by-country road vector series.
verify_notes: 404 Not Found; URL pattern obsolete - try search/dataset path | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: Nigeria Roads (AICD) 是世界银行非洲基础设施国别诊断（AICD）项目下的尼日利亚道路矢量数据集，由 Africon 于 2009 年编制，覆盖尼日利亚全境。数据以 CC BY 4.0 许可公开提供，格式为 Shapefile。它属于 AICD 逐国道路矢量系列之一，适用于交通可达性、基础设施规划与发展研究，是非洲路网分析的参考数据。
desc_en: Nigeria Roads (AICD) is a World Bank road vector dataset for Nigeria, compiled by Africon in 2009 under the Africa Infrastructure Country Diagnostic, covering the whole of Nigeria. It is openly available under CC BY 4.0 in Shapefile format. As one of the AICD country-by-country road vector series, it supports transport-accessibility, infrastructure-planning and development research, serving as a reference for African road-network analysis.

name: OGD India - Transport GIS Dataset & NATMO National Highways
theme_raw: National highways, state highways, railway lines, airports
notes: NATMO geoportal at geoportal.natmo.gov.in/dataset/national-highways. BISAG-N processes the official NHAI ~130,000 km line file - not all of it is fully public yet.
verify_notes: 403 Forbidden to bot | lychee:Rejected status code: 403 Forbidden
desc_zh: OGD India 交通 GIS 数据集（含 NATMO 国道）由印度政府（NIC、公路运输与高速公路部 MoRTH、NATMO）发布，覆盖印度全境，提供国道等交通线要素。数据以印度政府开放数据许可（GODL）发布，格式为 Shapefile、KML，部分需注册下载。NATMO 地理门户（geoportal.natmo.gov.in）提供相关数据，由 BISAG-N 处理官方 NHAI 约 13 万公里路网线文件，但并非全部完全公开。适用于交通规划与全国路网研究。
desc_en: The OGD India Transport GIS Dataset (with NATMO National Highways), published by the Government of India (NIC, MoRTH, NATMO), covers all of India and provides transport line features such as national highways. Released under the Government Open Data License – India (GODL) in Shapefile and KML, parts require registration to download. Related data is hosted on the NATMO geoportal, where BISAG-N processes the official NHAI network of roughly 130,000 km, though not all of it is yet fully public. It supports transport planning and national road-network research.

name: OHM Map Styles (MapLibre styles for vector tiles)
theme_raw: Styles for OHM vector tiles (Historic, Railway, Woodblock, Japanese Scroll)
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OHM Map Styles 是 OpenHistoricalMap 项目的地图样式仓库，提供面向矢量瓦片（MVT）的 Mapbox/MapLibre 样式 JSON。它本身不是地理要素数据，而是用于渲染 OHM 历史地图矢量瓦片的样式定义，覆盖全球。代码以 CC0-1.0 公共领域许可发布，可在 GitHub 公开获取。适用于历史地图可视化、Web 地图开发与时间维度地理制图。
desc_en: OHM Map Styles is the OpenHistoricalMap project's repository of map styles, providing Mapbox/MapLibre style JSON for rendering vector tiles (MVT). Rather than geographic feature data itself, it is the styling definition used to render OHM's global historical-map vector tiles. The code is released under the CC0-1.0 public-domain dedication and is openly available on GitHub. It supports historical-map visualisation, web-map development and time-aware cartography.

name: ONTL / Infra S.A. Shapefiles (Plano Nacional de Logistica 2035)
theme_raw: Federal & state highways, railways, ports, waterways, intermodal terminals
license_now: 无特殊使用限制 (页面声明)
notes: Backed by IBGE 'Logistica dos Transportes' product; ANTT publishes ferrovias group at dados.antt.gov.br/group/ferrovias.
verify_notes: 12 个 PNL 2035 情景包;文件更新至 2024-05 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: ONTL / Infra S.A. Shapefiles 是巴西联邦政府（EPL / Infra S.A.）在《国家物流规划 2035》（PNL 2035）框架下发布的交通规划矢量数据，覆盖巴西全境，基准年为 2017 年、规划展望至 2035 年。数据以 Shapefile 提供，可直接下载，页面声明无特殊使用限制。其底层依托 IBGE「交通物流」产品，铁路相关数据由 ANTT 在 dados.antt.gov.br 发布。适用于交通规划、物流网络与基础设施投资研究。
desc_en: ONTL / Infra S.A. Shapefiles are transport-planning vector data published by the Brazilian federal government (EPL / Infra S.A.) under the National Logistics Plan 2035 (PNL 2035), covering all of Brazil with a 2017 base year and a 2035 planning horizon. Provided as Shapefile for direct download, the page states no special usage restrictions. The data builds on IBGE's transport-logistics product, with railway groups published by ANTT. It supports transport planning, logistics-network and infrastructure-investment research.

name: OpenRailwayMap tile-export (MBTiles generator)
notes: No prebuilt download URL; generates tiles from local osm2pgsql DB
verify_notes: Minimally maintained (last release v0.1.0 2019) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenRailwayMap tile-export 是 OpenRailwayMap 项目的 MBTiles 生成工具，从本地 osm2pgsql 数据库构建矢量瓦片（MVT），输出为 MBTiles。它没有预制下载链接，需用户自行搭建数据库并生成瓦片，覆盖范围由用户自定义、可达全球。代码以 MIT 许可在 GitHub 开源。适用于自托管铁路地图、铁路网络可视化与基于 OSM 的轨道交通数据处理。
desc_en: OpenRailwayMap tile-export is the OpenRailwayMap project's MBTiles generator, building vector tiles (MVT) from a local osm2pgsql database and outputting MBTiles. There is no prebuilt download URL; users build tiles themselves over a user-defined, potentially global extent. The code is open-source under the MIT licence on GitHub. It suits self-hosted railway maps, rail-network visualisation and processing of OSM-based rail data.

name: OpenRailwayMap vector tiles (hiddewie build)
notes: De-facto modern vector backend for openrailwaymap.app
verify_notes: License is GPL-3.0 not MIT as recorded in p4 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OpenRailwayMap-vector（hiddewie 构建版）是社区开发者 Hidde Wieringa 维护的 OpenRailwayMap 矢量瓦片方案，输出 MVT 矢量瓦片与 PMTiles，覆盖全球，可自托管或使用演示站。它已成为 openrailwaymap.app 实际采用的现代矢量后端。代码以 GPL-3.0 许可发布，底层数据遵循 ODbL（源自 OSM）。适用于铁路网络可视化、Web 地图开发与轨道交通数据应用。
desc_en: OpenRailwayMap-vector (the hiddewie build) is a community vector-tile solution for OpenRailwayMap, maintained by developer Hidde Wieringa, producing MVT vector tiles and PMTiles with global coverage that can be self-hosted or accessed via a demo. It has become the de-facto modern vector backend for openrailwaymap.app. The code is released under GPL-3.0, while the underlying OSM-derived data follows the ODbL. It supports rail-network visualisation, web-map development and rail data applications.

name: openrailwaymap-exporter (Rust CLI)
formats_now: JSON, DOT/GraphViz, SVG, WASM, Python bindings
notes: Lesser-known third-party fetcher targeting OpenRailwayMap/Overpass
verify_notes: Actively developed (156 commits) | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: openrailwaymap-exporter 是社区开发者 chriamue 编写的 Rust 命令行工具，针对 OpenRailwayMap/Overpass 抓取任意 bbox 范围内的铁路数据，输出自定义 JSON，可转换为 GeoJSON。它是较冷门的第三方铁路数据抓取器，代码以 MIT 许可开源。适用于按需提取局部铁路网络、自动化数据采集与轨道交通分析。
desc_en: openrailwaymap-exporter is a Rust command-line tool by community developer chriamue that fetches railway data for any Overpass bounding box from OpenRailwayMap/Overpass, outputting custom JSON that is convertible to GeoJSON. It is a lesser-known third-party fetcher, open-sourced under the MIT licence. The tool suits on-demand extraction of local rail networks, automated data collection and rail-network analysis.

name: OpenStreetMap-derived European power grid (Medjroubi et al. SciGRID)
notes: PyPSA-Eur prebundled dataset; includes geojson layers for buses, lines, regions
verify_notes: PyPSA-Eur dataset; newer version available | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 这是基于 OpenStreetMap 衍生的欧洲电网数据集（SciGRID/PyPSA-Eur 系列，Medjroubi、Hörsch 等人），覆盖欧洲 ENTSO-E 区域。数据为 PyPSA-Eur 预打包产品，包含母线、线路、区域等带几何信息的网络拓扑，提供 GeoJSON 与 CSV 格式，在 Zenodo 以 CC-BY-4.0 许可开放。适用于电力系统建模、能源系统优化与欧洲电网分析研究。
desc_en: This is an OpenStreetMap-derived European power-grid dataset (the SciGRID/PyPSA-Eur lineage, Medjroubi, Hörsch and colleagues), covering the European ENTSO-E area. Prebundled for PyPSA-Eur, it includes network topology with geometries for buses, lines and regions, supplied as GeoJSON and CSV and released openly on Zenodo under CC-BY-4.0. It supports power-system modelling, energy-system optimisation and European grid analysis.

name: opentransportdata.swiss
theme_raw: GTFS, NeTEx, station coords, real-time SIRI
formats_now: 未在首页列出;详见 data.opentransportdata.swiss
notes: One of the cleanest multi-modal national datasets in Europe.
verify_notes: 2026-06 仍有更新 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: opentransportdata.swiss 由瑞士联邦运输办公室（BAV）运营，覆盖瑞士全国，是欧洲质量最高、最整洁的多模式公共交通开放数据平台之一。它提供 GTFS、NeTEx、SIRI XML 及 GeoJSON 等格式，支持 API、直接下载与注册访问。数据涵盖铁路、公交等多种交通方式的时刻表与实时信息。许可参照 ASTRA 使用条款（页面未完全明示）。适用于交通研究、行程规划应用与出行分析。
desc_en: opentransportdata.swiss, operated by the Swiss Federal Office of Transport (BAV), covers all of Switzerland and is one of Europe's cleanest multimodal public-transport open-data platforms. It provides GTFS, NeTEx, SIRI XML and GeoJSON via API, direct download and registered access, spanning timetables and real-time information across rail, bus and other modes. Usage follows ASTRA terms that the page does not fully specify. It supports transport research, journey-planning applications and mobility analysis.

name: OSM-Wikidata railway-station integration corpus
what_changes: Subsets OSM to railway-station nodes globally and links them to Wikidata entities for integration-potential analysis; outputs aligned point dataset with provenance attributes.
notes: Very niche OSM x Wikidata railway-station alignment.
verify_notes: OSM-Wikidata railway stations integration paper, SOTM 2022 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: OSM-Wikidata 铁路车站整合语料库是一套发布于 Zenodo 的小众数据集，用于将 OpenStreetMap 与 Wikidata 中的铁路车站实体进行对齐匹配。数据以 CC BY 4.0 许可开放。该数据适用于实体对齐、知识图谱构建与铁路车站数据集成研究，是 OSM 与 Wikidata 链接领域较为专门的资源。
desc_en: The OSM-Wikidata railway-station integration corpus is a niche dataset on Zenodo for aligning and matching railway-station entities between OpenStreetMap and Wikidata. It is released under a CC BY 4.0 licence. The data supports entity alignment, knowledge-graph construction and railway-station data integration, serving as a specialised resource for linking OSM and Wikidata.

name: Overture Maps Open Data
notes: Open global vector data download landing
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Overture Maps Open Data 由 Overture Maps Foundation（亚马逊、微软、Meta、TomTom 等共同发起）提供，是面向全球的开放矢量地图数据下载入口，涵盖交通、建筑、地点等多个主题。数据以 GeoParquet 格式发布，采用 CDLA-Permissive 2.0 与 ODbL 双许可。其规模庞大、结构标准化，适用于地图制图、地理分析、导航与大规模空间数据处理。
desc_en: Overture Maps Open Data, provided by the Overture Maps Foundation (backed by Amazon, Microsoft, Meta, TomTom and others), is the download landing page for open global vector map data spanning themes such as transportation, buildings and places. The data is distributed as GeoParquet under dual CDLA-Permissive 2.0 and ODbL licensing. Large-scale and standardised, it supports cartography, geospatial analysis, navigation and large-scale spatial data processing.

name: Planetary Computer STAC GeoParquet Snapshots
formats: GeoParquet (one row per STAC item, geometry = footprint polygon)
notes: Bulk vector index of every STAC item — broadest open vector layer hosted.
verify_notes: lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Planetary Computer STAC GeoParquet Snapshots 由微软提供，是其行星计算平台（Planetary Computer）所有 STAC 数据集合的批量矢量索引。每行对应一个 STAC item，几何为其覆盖范围（footprint）多边形，以 GeoParquet 格式通过 Azure Blob 的 geoparquet-items 集合资产提供。代码以 MIT 许可发布，数据许可按各集合而定。它是该平台托管的最广泛开放矢量层，适用于影像检索、数据编目与大规模地理数据发现。
desc_en: Planetary Computer STAC GeoParquet Snapshots, provided by Microsoft, is a bulk vector index of every STAC collection on the Planetary Computer. Each row represents one STAC item with its footprint polygon as geometry, delivered as GeoParquet via the 'geoparquet-items' collection asset on Azure Blob. The code is MIT-licensed while data licensing is per collection. As the broadest open vector layer hosted on the platform, it supports imagery search, data cataloguing and large-scale geospatial discovery.

name: Public Transport Network Data for 25 Cities (Kujala et al. 2018)
theme_raw: 公共交通 - 多模式 GTFS 衍生网络
coverage: 25 个全球城市 (柏林、伦敦、悉尼、东京等)
notes: 公共交通图论研究经典基准数据; Zenodo 镜像也可下载
verify_notes: 303 to Nature IDP auth flow; article still accessible to browsers | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Public Transport Network Data for 25 Cities（Kujala 等，2018）发表于《Scientific Data》，由阿尔托大学/赫尔辛基团队制作，覆盖柏林、伦敦、悉尼、东京等全球 25 座城市的公共交通网络。数据以节点/边的 CSV 及 GeoJSON 子集提供，CC-BY-4.0 许可，可直接下载（Zenodo 亦有镜像）。它是公共交通图论研究的经典基准数据，适用于网络科学、可达性分析与城市交通研究。
desc_en: Public Transport Network Data for 25 Cities (Kujala et al. 2018), published in Scientific Data by an Aalto/Helsinki team, covers the public-transport networks of 25 global cities including Berlin, London, Sydney and Tokyo. The data is provided as node/edge CSV plus GeoJSON subsets under CC-BY-4.0 for direct download, with a Zenodo mirror also available. A classic benchmark for graph-theoretic public-transport research, it supports network science, accessibility analysis and urban-transport studies.

name: Radio Navigational Aids (Pub 117) - landing page
formats: PDF + structured data (XML/CSV); positions geocodable to vector points
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://msi.nga.mil/Publications/RNA))
notes: Companion publication on the MSI Publications page; positions of radio aids worldwide.
verify_notes: NGA MSI site returns 403 to WebFetch; likely live for browsers | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://msi.nga.mil/Publications/RNA))
desc_zh: Radio Navigational Aids（Pub 117，无线电助航）是 NGA 海事安全信息（MSI）出版物之一的着陆页，列出全球无线电助航设施的位置信息。数据属美国公共领域，以 PDF 及结构化数据（XML/CSV）提供，其中位置可地理编码为矢量点。它是 MSI 出版物页的配套出版物，适用于海事导航、无线电助航设施定位与航运信息研究。
desc_en: Radio Navigational Aids (Pub 117) is the landing page for one of NGA's Maritime Safety Information (MSI) publications, listing the positions of radio navigational aids worldwide. As US public-domain data it is provided as PDF plus structured data (XML/CSV), where positions can be geocoded into vector points. A companion to the MSI Publications page, it supports maritime navigation, radio-aid geolocation and shipping-information research.

name: Railroads (10m)
verify_notes: File exists, exceeds 10MB fetch cap | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Railroads (10m) 是 Natural Earth 提供的全球铁路矢量数据集，比例尺为 1:1000 万（最精细的 10m 等级），覆盖全球。数据以 Shapefile 格式通过 CDN 直接下载，约 10MB，属公共领域。Natural Earth 是制图领域广泛使用的免费小比例尺底图数据来源，本图层适用于全球及区域铁路网络制图、概览地图与背景图层。
desc_en: Railroads (10m) is Natural Earth's global railway vector dataset at the 1:10 million (most detailed '10m') scale, with worldwide coverage. Distributed as a roughly 10 MB Shapefile via CDN and in the public domain, it comes from Natural Earth, a widely used free source of small-scale basemap data. The layer suits global and regional railway-network mapping, overview maps and background layers.

name: Railway networks connecting China with South(east) Asia (跨境铁路, HKU DataHub)
provider: 香港大学 DataHub (作者发表数据集)
theme_raw: 跨境铁路 - 已建/在建/规划
coverage: 中国 + 东南亚/南亚 (一带一路相关)
notes: 少见的跨境铁路含规划线路矢量；一带一路研究高价值数据
verify_notes: HKU DataHub 返回 403 Forbidden（可能反爬/区域限制），无法核实最新元数据 | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: Railway networks connecting China with South(east) Asia 是香港大学 DataHub 收录的作者发表数据集，覆盖中国与东南亚/南亚之间的跨境铁路网络，含规划线路，矢量格式为 Shapefile。数据以 CC-BY 4.0（HKU DataHub 默认）许可开放下载。这是较少见的跨境铁路含规划线路矢量数据，对一带一路相关研究具有较高价值，适用于跨境交通、区域互联互通与地缘经济分析。
desc_en: Railway networks connecting China with South(east) Asia is an author-deposited dataset on the University of Hong Kong DataHub, covering cross-border railway networks between China and Southeast/South Asia, including planned lines, in Shapefile vector format. It is openly downloadable under CC-BY 4.0 (the HKU DataHub default). A rare cross-border railway dataset that includes proposed routes, it is high-value for Belt and Road research and supports cross-border transport, regional connectivity and geo-economic analysis.

name: Reseau ferre national (SNCF Reseau lines)
theme_raw: French national rail lines, stations, tracks
notes: Useful alongside transport.data.gouv.fr GTFS feeds for full multimodal France stack.
verify_notes: Dataset updated 2024-03-28 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Reseau ferre national 是法国国家铁路网（SNCF Reseau 线路）的形状文件，通过 data.gouv.fr 发布，覆盖法国全境。数据以 Shapefile 格式直接下载，约 13.2 MB、比例尺约 1:1000、更新至 2024-03-28，采用 ODbL 许可。它可与 transport.data.gouv.fr 的 GTFS 数据配合，构成法国完整的多模式交通数据栈，适用于铁路网络分析、交通规划与多模式出行研究。
desc_en: Reseau ferre national is the shapefile of France's national railway network (SNCF Reseau lines), published via data.gouv.fr and covering all of France. Distributed as a roughly 13.2 MB Shapefile at about 1:1,000 scale and updated 2024-03-28, it is licensed under ODbL. Used alongside the GTFS feeds on transport.data.gouv.fr, it completes a full multimodal France stack and supports rail-network analysis, transport planning and multimodal mobility research.

name: Roads (10m)
verify_notes: Direct ZIP download confirmed | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Roads (10m) 是 Natural Earth 提供的全球道路矢量数据集，比例尺为 1:1000 万（最精细的 10m 等级），覆盖全球。数据以 Shapefile 格式通过 CDN 直接下载，约 8.7MB，属公共领域。作为广受欢迎的免费小比例尺底图来源，本图层适用于全球及区域道路网络制图、概览地图与背景图层，常用于宏观尺度可视化。
desc_en: Roads (10m) is Natural Earth's global road vector dataset at the 1:10 million (most detailed '10m') scale, with worldwide coverage. Distributed as a roughly 8.7 MB Shapefile via CDN and in the public domain, it comes from the widely used Natural Earth basemap collection. The layer suits global and regional road-network mapping, overview maps and background layers, and is commonly used for small-scale visualisation.

name: SwissRailNet — Four Representations of Swiss Railway
provider: Sterchi et al. — Data in Brief 2025
theme_raw: 铁路 - 国家级铁路矢量+时间网
formats: 节点/边几何 (CSV+几何), 含时间网
notes: Data in Brief 数据论文; 含拓扑+时空两种表示, 适合网络科学
verify_notes: SwissRailNet paper - PMC moved to pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov; data on figshare | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: SwissRailNet 是一个覆盖瑞士全境的铁路网络矢量数据集，作为 Data in Brief 数据论文（Sterchi 等，2025）发布。它以节点/边几何（CSV 加几何）的形式给出四种不同的网络表示，既包含拓扑结构，也包含时空（含时间网）表示，涉及 1626 个车站及数万至上百万条边。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，可直接下载，约 26 MB，特别适合网络科学、交通可达性与时空可达性建模研究。
desc_en: SwissRailNet is a vector dataset of the Swiss railway network released as a Data in Brief data paper (Sterchi et al., 2025). It provides four complementary network representations as nodes and edges (CSV plus geometry), spanning both topological and spatio-temporal (time-expanded) forms, covering 1,626 stations and from a few thousand up to over a million edges. Distributed under CC BY 4.0 and directly downloadable at roughly 26 MB, it is well suited to network science, accessibility analysis and temporal reachability modelling.

name: The Lancang-Mekong Cooperation (LMC)
coverage: 6 LMC member states (China + Mekong basin countries) up to Aug 2022
notes: Companion vector dataset in same BRI collection; relevant to cross-border railway context.
verify_notes: HTTP 403 Forbidden via WebFetch; likely Cloudflare/bot protection on datahub.hku.hk. Resource may still be reachable in browser. | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 该数据集来自香港大学 DataHub（BRINFAITH 项目），以 Shapefile 多边形形式描绘澜沧江-湄公河合作（LMC）框架下的六个成员国（中国及湄公河流域国家），数据截至 2022 年 8 月。它是同一个“一带一路”矢量合集中的配套数据，可用于跨境区域合作、铁路与基础设施联通的空间背景分析。数据采用 CC BY 4.0 许可，公开可下载。
desc_en: Published on the University of Hong Kong DataHub as part of the BRINFAITH project, this dataset uses Shapefile polygons to delineate the six member states of the Lancang-Mekong Cooperation (China and the Mekong basin countries), current to August 2022. It is a companion vector layer within a broader Belt and Road collection and provides spatial context for cross-border cooperation and railway connectivity. It is openly downloadable under a CC BY 4.0 licence.

name: Transitland feed registry
notes: Alternative GTFS source for ORS public-transport profile
verify_notes: REST API + map UI | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Transitland 是由 Interline Technologies 维护的全球公共交通数据源注册与聚合平台。它汇集来自各地交通运营商的 GTFS 与 GTFS-RT 班次数据，并通过 API 提供 GeoJSON 等地理格式，覆盖范围为全球。许可证因各数据源而异。它支持免费 API 与批量下载，常被用作路径规划（如 ORS 公共交通模式）的替代 GTFS 数据来源，适合公交可达性与多模式出行分析。
desc_en: Transitland is a global registry and aggregator of public-transit data feeds maintained by Interline Technologies. It consolidates GTFS and GTFS-RT schedule feeds from transit agencies worldwide and exposes them through an API, including GeoJSON output. Licensing varies per individual feed. With both a free API and bulk download, it is widely used as an alternative GTFS source for routing engines (for example an OpenRouteService public-transport profile) and for transit accessibility and multimodal travel analysis.

name: Transport Data Commons Portal
theme_raw: transport demand, modal share, vehicle stocks, networks
formats: CKAN API; mix of CSV + vector
notes: Newer (2024+) CKAN aggregator for sustainable-transport datasets; includes spatial layers from IEA, ITDP, GIZ.
verify_notes: CKAN portal landing page; specific licensing per-dataset | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: 交通数据共享平台（Transport Data Commons Portal）是由 TDC 倡议（Datopian、GIZ、WRI 及 ITF/OECD 等合作）建设的较新（2024 年起）CKAN 数据聚合门户，聚焦全球可持续交通主题。它通过 CKAN API 提供数据，内容混合 CSV 与矢量空间图层，来源包括 IEA、ITDP、GIZ 等机构。数据遵循开放定义下的开放数据许可，适合交通脱碳、政策与可持续出行研究。
desc_en: The Transport Data Commons Portal is a newer (2024+) CKAN-based aggregator built by the TDC Initiative (Datopian, GIZ, WRI and ITF/OECD) focused on sustainable-transport data worldwide. It is accessed via a CKAN API and combines CSV tables with vector spatial layers, drawing on sources such as the IEA, ITDP and GIZ. Released under Open Definition-compliant open-data terms, it supports research on transport decarbonisation, policy and sustainable mobility.

name: Transport Networks in Canada - CanVec Series - Transport Features
notes: Roads, rail, ferries, trails; derived from NRN and NRWN
verify_notes: Last modified 2025-12-22 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集是加拿大自然资源部（NRCan）CanVec 系列中的交通要素矢量层，覆盖加拿大全境，包含道路、铁路、渡轮和步道等交通要素，派生自国家道路网（NRN）与国家铁路网（NRWN）。数据以 Shapefile 和文件地理数据库（FGDB）格式提供，遵循加拿大开放政府许可，适合全国尺度的交通基础设施制图与网络分析。
desc_en: This dataset is the transport-features vector layer of Natural Resources Canada's CanVec series, covering all of Canada. It includes roads, railways, ferries and trails, derived from the National Road Network (NRN) and National Railway Network (NRWN). Provided as Shapefile and File Geodatabase (FGDB), it is released under the Open Government Licence - Canada and suits national-scale transport infrastructure mapping and network analysis.

name: Turrutebasen (national hiking/ski trail vector)
verify_notes: National hiking/ski trail vectors | lychee:timeout
desc_zh: Turrutebasen 是挪威全国徒步与滑雪路径矢量数据库，由挪威地图局（Kartverket）与挪威徒步协会（DNT）共同维护，覆盖挪威全境。数据提供 GML、SOSI 和 GeoJSON 等格式，支持直接下载与 WFS 服务，遵循 CC BY 4.0 许可。它是户外休闲路径规划、旅游与可达性分析的权威官方数据源。
desc_en: Turrutebasen is Norway's national database of hiking and ski trails, maintained jointly by the Norwegian Mapping Authority (Kartverket) and the Norwegian Trekking Association (DNT), covering all of Norway. It is available in GML, SOSI and GeoJSON formats with both direct download and a WFS service, under a CC BY 4.0 licence. It serves as the authoritative source for outdoor recreation route planning, tourism and accessibility analysis.

name: UK Office for National Statistics - Output Areas (OA / LSOA / MSOA)
formats_now: Shapefile, GeoJSON, CSV via ArcGIS Hub
notes: Smallest UK census geography, comparable to street-blocks.
verify_notes: Open Geography Portal landing renders via JS; search works | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 英国国家统计局（ONS）开放地理门户提供的输出区（OA / LSOA / MSOA）是英国普查统计的最小级地理单元，覆盖英格兰、威尔士并有北爱尔兰与苏格兰的对应单元。这些边界以 Shapefile 和 GeoJSON 形式公开下载，遵循 OGL v3.0 许可。其精细程度可与街区相比，是人口、社会经济与可达性空间分析的标准统计基础。
desc_en: Output Areas (OA / LSOA / MSOA) from the UK Office for National Statistics Open Geography Portal are the smallest UK census geographies, covering England and Wales with equivalents for Northern Ireland and Scotland. The boundaries are openly downloadable as Shapefile and GeoJSON under the OGL v3.0 licence. Comparable in granularity to street blocks, they form a standard statistical base for population, socioeconomic and accessibility analysis.

name: UN/LOCODE (DataHub core)
notes: Cross-walk for ports/intermodal nodes.
verify_notes: Multiple CSV files; stable r-link URLs | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: UN/LOCODE（DataHub core 版）是联合国欧洲经济委员会（UNECE）维护的全球贸易与运输地点代码体系，约含 11 万个地点，覆盖全球。数据以带坐标（DDMM 格式）的 CSV 提供，可矢量化为点要素，遵循 ODC-PDDL-1.0 公共领域许可。它是港口、机场、铁路与多式联运节点的标准识别与交叉对照参考，广泛用于物流与贸易数据整合。
desc_en: UN/LOCODE (DataHub core edition) is the United Nations Code for Trade and Transport Locations maintained by UNECE, comprising around 110,000 locations worldwide. It is provided as CSV with coordinates (DDMM format) that can be vectorised into points, under the ODC-PDDL-1.0 public-domain dedication. It serves as a standard identifier and cross-walk for ports, airports, rail and intermodal nodes, widely used in logistics and trade data integration.

name: UNECE E-roads (AGR) and E-waterways (AGN) shapefiles
provider: UN Economic Commission for Europe - Sustainable Transport Division
theme_raw: E-road network (international road agreement), E-waterway network
notes: AGR/AGN SHPs published; AGC railway SHP not yet released - TEN-T core is the closest proxy. Blue Book DB for AGN at apps.unece.org/AGN/.
verify_notes: Last updated 2022-11-17; uses R, QGIS | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 该数据集由联合国欧洲经济委员会（UNECE）可持续交通司发布，提供 E 级公路（AGR）和 E 级内河水道（AGN）的 Shapefile 矢量，覆盖泛欧、高加索及中亚地区，数据约每五年更新一次（2005、2010、2015、2020）。许可证未明确声明。AGC 铁路 Shapefile 尚未发布，TEN-T 核心网可作最接近的替代；AGN 另有 Blue Book 数据库。适合国际交通走廊与运量可视化分析。
desc_en: Published by the UNECE Sustainable Transport Division, this dataset provides Shapefiles of the E-road network (AGR) and E-waterway network (AGN), covering pan-Europe plus the Caucasus and Central Asia, updated roughly every five years (2005, 2010, 2015, 2020). The licence is not explicitly declared. The AGC railway Shapefile is not yet released, with the TEN-T core network the closest proxy, while AGN is also backed by the Blue Book database. It suits analysis of international transport corridors and traffic volumes.

name: UNHCR data portal transport layers
notes: Listed by GRIP paper among UN road vector contributors
verify_notes: Operational Data Portal confirms CC BY 4.0 for datasets. | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 联合国难民署（UNHCR）数据门户提供的交通图层覆盖难民接收国，包含道路等交通要素矢量，以 Shapefile 或 GeoJSON 形式提供，部分图层公开、部分受限。数据通常遵循 CC BY 4.0 许可，并被 GRIP 等全球道路数据研究列为联合国道路矢量贡献来源之一。适合人道主义、难民安置与冲突地区的可达性与后勤分析。
desc_en: The UNHCR data portal provides transport layers for refugee-hosting countries, including road and related transport features as vector data in Shapefile or GeoJSON, with some layers open and others access-restricted. The data is generally offered under a CC BY 4.0 licence and is cited among the UN road-vector contributors in the GRIP global roads study. It supports humanitarian, refugee-settlement and conflict-zone accessibility and logistics analysis.

name: Urban Road Network Data (80 world cities)
notes: Companion dataset to Karduni et al. urban road network protocol.
verify_notes: figshare blocks WebFetch; record presumed live | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 该数据集（发表于 Scientific Data, 2016）提供全球 80 个人口最多城市区域的城市道路网络矢量数据，作为 Karduni 等城市道路网络提取协议的配套数据。数据以 Shapefile（连线与节点）及边列表形式提供，托管于 Figshare，遵循 CC BY 许可。它适合跨城市的街道网络结构、拓扑与城市形态比较研究。
desc_en: Published in Scientific Data (2016), this dataset provides urban road network vector data for the 80 most populous urban areas worldwide, as a companion to Karduni et al.'s urban road network extraction protocol. It is supplied as Shapefiles (links and nodes) and edge lists, hosted on Figshare under a CC BY licence. It is well suited to cross-city comparison of street network structure, topology and urban form.

name: Urbanity: A Global Feature-Rich Network Dataset of Cities
notes: Enhances OSM with 40+ indicators
verify_notes: Urbanity Scientific Data paper; live in browser | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: Urbanity 是发表于 Scientific Data（Nature）的全球城市网络数据集，覆盖 29 个国家的 50 个城市。它在 OpenStreetMap 街道网络基础上叠加 40 多项要素指标，以矢量网络（节点/边）形式提供，遵循 CC BY 许可，开放获取。该数据集为城市街道网络的特征丰富表示，适合城市形态、可达性与跨国城市比较的网络科学研究。
desc_en: Urbanity is a global urban network dataset published in Scientific Data (Nature), covering 50 cities across 29 countries. It enriches OpenStreetMap street networks with more than 40 feature indicators and is provided as a vector network of nodes and edges under a CC BY licence, openly accessible. As a feature-rich representation of urban street networks, it suits network-science research on urban form, accessibility and cross-national city comparison.

name: Urbanity: Global Urban Network Dataset
notes: Feature-rich urban street network dataset with dashboard.
verify_notes: figshare blocks WebFetch | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 这是 Urbanity 全球城市网络数据集在 Figshare 上的发布版本（Yap 等，Scientific Data），覆盖全球多座城市。它以矢量网络（GeoJSON/Shapefile）形式提供要素丰富的城市街道网络，并配有可视化仪表盘，遵循 CC BY 许可，开放获取。适合城市网络分析、城市形态比较与可达性研究。
desc_en: This is the Figshare release of the Urbanity Global Urban Network Dataset (Yap et al., Scientific Data), covering multiple cities worldwide. It provides feature-rich urban street networks as vector data (GeoJSON/Shapefile) accompanied by a visualisation dashboard, under a CC BY licence and openly accessible. It supports urban network analysis, urban-form comparison and accessibility research.

name: US NGDA Transportation (FGDC/GeoPlatform)
theme_raw: national transportation theme (roads, rail, air, transit, waterways)
notes: Pure vector NGDA collection listed via STAC Index
verify_notes: OGC-compliant collection endpoint | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 美国国家地理空间数据资产（NGDA）交通主题集由美国联邦地理数据委员会（FGDC）/ GeoPlatform 通过 ArcGIS Hub 发布，覆盖全美。它是一个纯矢量的交通要素集合，以 Esri 要素服务、GeoJSON 和 Shapefile 形式提供，属于美国公有领域。该数据集是权威的国家级交通基础设施数据源，适合全国尺度交通制图与空间分析。
desc_en: The US NGDA Transportation theme is published by the US FGDC / GeoPlatform through ArcGIS Hub and covers the entire United States. It is a pure vector collection of transportation features delivered as Esri Feature Services, GeoJSON and Shapefile, in the US public domain. As an authoritative national-scale transport infrastructure source, it suits country-wide transport mapping and spatial analysis.

name: VMAP0 (Vector Map Level 0)
lychee_status: Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://earth-info.nga.mil/))
notes: Foundational legacy road source merged in GRIP
verify_notes: NGA portal live; page does not directly mention VMAP0 anymore - VMAP0 deprecated/legacy. | lychee:Network error: Connection failed. Check network connectivity and firewall settings (error sending request for url (https://earth-info.nga.mil/))
desc_zh: VMAP0（Vector Map Level 0）是美国国家地理空间情报局（NGA，原 NIMA）发布的全球矢量地图，比例尺为 1:1,000,000，属于美国政府公有领域。它以 VPF 格式及衍生的 Shapefile 提供，是一套基础性的全球底图数据，其道路图层曾被并入 GRIP 全球道路数据集，是经典的全球交通与地理底图遗产数据源。
desc_en: VMAP0 (Vector Map Level 0) is a global vector map released by the US National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency (NGA, formerly NIMA) at 1:1,000,000 scale, in the US-government public domain. It is provided in VPF format and Shapefile derivatives as a foundational global base-map dataset, and its road layer was merged into the GRIP global roads dataset. It remains a classic legacy source for global transport and base mapping.

name: WOF Intersections (Manhattan, experimental)
notes: Experimental; small but cited as the WOF intersections prototype.
verify_notes: Experimental; 15 commits; minimal activity | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: 这是 Who's On First（WOF）发布的曼哈顿道路交叉口实验性数据集，覆盖纽约曼哈顿地区，以 GeoJSON 形式托管于 GitHub。它规模较小且属实验性质，是 WOF 交叉口数据建模的原型范例。许可证以仓库内 LICENSE.md 为准。适合街道交叉口建模、地名地理实体（gazetteer）实验与相关方法研究。
desc_en: This is an experimental Who's On First (WOF) dataset of road intersections in Manhattan, covering the borough of Manhattan, New York, hosted as GeoJSON on GitHub. It is small and experimental, serving as the prototype for WOF's intersections modelling, with licensing governed by the repository's LICENSE.md. It suits street-intersection modelling, gazetteer experimentation and related methods research.

name: WUSU - Wuhan Urban Semantic Understanding Dataset
theme_raw: 城市语义 / 建筑 / 道路矢量标签
notes: 聚焦武汉，包含建筑、不透水面变化矢量标注
verify_notes: Data hosted at rsidea.whu.edu.cn/resource_wusu_sharing.htm | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: WUSU（武汉城市语义理解数据集）由武汉大学 LIESMARS 的 RSIDEA 团队发布，聚焦武汉地区，提供 2015-2018 年多时相的 GeoTIFF 影像与配套 Shapefile（由分割掩膜转矢量），包含建筑、不透水面变化等语义标注。数据遵循 ODbL + DbCL 许可，仅限学术、不可商用。适合遥感语义分割、城市变化检测与城市土地利用研究。
desc_en: WUSU (Wuhan Urban Semantic Understanding dataset) is released by the RSIDEA group at LIESMARS, Wuhan University, focusing on Wuhan. It provides multi-temporal GeoTIFF imagery (2015-2018) with accompanying Shapefiles vectorised from segmentation masks, including semantic labels for buildings and impervious-surface change. Distributed under ODbL + DbCL for academic, non-commercial use, it suits remote-sensing semantic segmentation, urban change detection and land-use research.

name: 中国 2024 公交网络综合矢量数据集 (299城公交线路+站点)
notes: 基于高德+百度API交叉校验；含L-Space 拓扑；上海站点 16313 远超 OSM 的 10312
verify_notes: figshare 返回 403（反爬/CDN）；条目本身大概率仍存在 | lychee:202 Accepted
desc_zh: 这是 Wang 等（Scientific Data, 2025）发布的中国 2024 公交网络综合矢量数据集，覆盖中国 299 个城市（除台湾）的公交线路与站点。数据以 Shapefile 提供，基于高德与百度 API 交叉校验，并含 L-Space 拓扑表示；其覆盖度优于 OSM（如上海站点 16313 个，远超 OSM 的 10312 个）。遵循 CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 许可，可直接下载，适合全国公交可达性与网络分析。
desc_en: This is a comprehensive vector dataset of China's 2024 bus networks by Wang et al. (Scientific Data, 2025), covering bus routes and stops across 299 Chinese cities (excluding Taiwan). Provided as Shapefiles, it is built from cross-validated Amap and Baidu API data and includes an L-Space topological representation, with coverage exceeding OSM (for example 16,313 stops in Shanghai versus OSM's 10,312). Released under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 and directly downloadable, it suits nationwide transit accessibility and network analysis.

name: 中国铁路地图 cnrail.geogv.org (线路 + 车站轨迹库)
provider: 个人维护 (微软工程师) / GeoGV
formats: 在线 webGIS；线路 ID JSON (可抓取)
notes: 被多篇中文综述/博客作为铁路网最完整在线源；非官方下载但常用作矢量整理参考；需要爬虫
verify_notes: WebFetch 60 秒超时；站点可能慢或暂不可达 | lychee:200 OK
desc_zh: cnrail.geogv.org（中国铁路地图）是一个由个人（微软工程师）维护的在线 WebGIS 平台，基于 GeoGV，覆盖中国大陆铁路网，包含线路与车站轨迹库。它被多篇中文综述与博客视为最完整的在线铁路网来源，常作为矢量整理的参考，但许可证未明确，无官方下载，线路 ID JSON 需通过爬虫抓取。适合铁路网研究的参考与数据采集。
desc_en: cnrail.geogv.org (China Railway Map) is an online WebGIS platform maintained by an individual (a Microsoft engineer) and built on GeoGV, covering the railway network of mainland China with route and station track data. It is regarded in many Chinese reviews and blogs as the most complete online source for the railway network and is often used as a reference for vector compilation, but its licence is unspecified, there is no official download, and route-ID JSON must be scraped. It suits reference and data collection for railway network research.

name: 国家综合交通运输信息平台 (交通运输部数据开放)
provider: 中华人民共和国交通运输部
theme_raw: 综合交通 - 统计+部分空间
formats: 主为统计 (CSV) ；部分专题含矢量
notes: 虽然主要是统计，但是为权威源；少量专题 (如重点公路、港口位置) 含矢量；适合作为引用锚点
verify_notes: 返回 404，原 '数据开放' 子站点疑似下线/改版；建议改用 mot.gov.cn 新栏目 | lychee:Rejected status code: 404 Not Found
desc_zh: 国家综合交通运输信息平台是中华人民共和国交通运输部的数据开放入口，覆盖全国，属政府公开数据。其内容以统计数据（CSV）为主，并通过 API 提供，部分专题（如重点公路、港口位置）包含矢量数据。虽以统计为主，但作为权威官方源，非常适合作为全国交通数据的引用锚点与专题矢量参考。
desc_en: The National Comprehensive Transport Information Platform is the open-data portal of the Ministry of Transport of the People's Republic of China, with national coverage as official government data. Its content is mainly statistical (CSV), served via an API, with a few thematic layers (such as key highways and port locations) including vector data. Although predominantly statistical, as an authoritative official source it is well suited as a citation anchor for national transport data and for thematic vector reference.

name: 道路 — 时空三极环境大数据平台 (Poles) 数据标签集
provider: 时空三极环境大数据平台 (Poles TPDC)
coverage: 三极区域 (青藏/北极/南极及相邻)

desc_zh: 这是时空三极环境大数据平台（Poles TPDC）的“道路”主题标签聚合页，覆盖三极区域（青藏高原、北极、南极及相邻地区），汇集多套区域道路矢量子数据集，以 Shapefile 形式提供。数据遵循 TPDC 数据使用协议，需注册下载。适合极地与高寒区域的交通基础设施、可达性与环境研究。
desc_en: This is the road-themed tag aggregation page of the Poles spatiotemporal three-poles environmental big-data platform (Poles TPDC), covering the three-pole regions (the Tibetan Plateau, Arctic, Antarctic and adjacent areas). It assembles multiple regional road vector sub-datasets provided as Shapefiles. The data follows the TPDC data-use agreement and requires registration to download. It suits transport infrastructure, accessibility and environmental research in polar and alpine regions.
